papers.abstract: This paper analyzes difference-in-differences designs with a continuous treatment. We show that treatment effect on the treated-type parameters can be identified under a generalized parallel trends assumption that is similar to the binary treatment setup. However, interpreting differences in these parameters across different values of the treatment can be particularly challenging due to selection bias that is not ruled out by the parallel trends assumption. We discuss alternative, typically stronger, assumptions that alleviate these challenges. We also provide a variety of treatment effect decomposition results, highlighting that parameters associated with popular linear two-way fixed-effect (TWFE) specifications can be hard to interpret, even when there are only two time periods. We introduce alternative estimation procedures that do not suffer from these TWFE drawbacks, and show in an application that they can lead to different conclusions.
papers.zh_title: 连续处理变量的双重差分法
papers.zh_abstract: 本文分析了具有连续处理变量的双重差分设计。我们表明，在类似于二元处理设置的一般化平行趋势假设下，可以识别处理组处理效应类型的参数。然而，由于平行趋势假设并未排除的选择性偏差，解释这些参数在不同处理值之间的差异可能特别具有挑战性。我们讨论了通常更强的替代假设，以缓解这些挑战。我们还提供了各种处理效应分解结果，强调即使只有两个时期，与流行的线性双向固定效应规范相关的参数也可能难以解释。我们介绍了不受这些双向固定效应缺陷影响的替代估计程序，并在一个应用中表明它们可能导致不同的结论。

papers.title: How Do Surrogates Make Treatment Decisions for Patients with Dementia? An Experimental Survey Study
papers.authors: Lauren Hersch Nicholas, Kenneth M. Langa, Scott D. Halpern, Mario Macis
papers.abstract: Despite the growing need for surrogate decision-making for older adults, little is known about how surrogates make decisions and whether advance directives would change decision-making. We conducted a nationally representative experimental survey that cross-randomized cognitive impairment, gender, and characteristics of advance care planning among hospitalized older adults through a series of vignettes. Our study yielded three main findings: first, respondents were much less likely to recommend life-sustaining treatments for patients with dementia, especially after personal exposure. Second, respondents were more likely to ignore patient preferences for life-extending treatment when the patient had dementia, and choose unwanted life-extending treatments for patients without dementia. Third, in scenarios where the patient's wishes were unclear, respondents were more likely to choose treatments that matched their own preferences. These findings underscore the need for improved communication and decision-making processes for patients with cognitive impairment and highlight the importance of choosing a surrogate decision-maker with similar treatment preferences.
papers.zh_title: 代理人为痴呆症患者做出治疗决策的方式：一项实验性调查研究
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管老年人对代理决策的需求日益增长，但关于代理人如何做出决策以及预先指示是否会改变决策过程，我们知之甚少。我们进行了一项具有全国代表性的实验性调查，通过一系列情景案例，交叉随机化了认知障碍、性别以及预先护理计划特征，对象是住院老年人。我们的研究得出三个主要发现：首先，受访者向痴呆症患者推荐维持生命治疗的可能性要低得多，尤其是在个人接触后。其次，当患者患有痴呆症时，受访者更有可能忽略患者对延长生命治疗的偏好，并为没有痴呆症的患者选择不想要的延长生命治疗。第三，在患者意愿不明确的情景中，受访者更有可能选择符合自身偏好的治疗。这些发现强调了改善认知障碍患者沟通和决策过程的必要性，并突出了选择具有相似治疗偏好的代理决策者的重要性。

papers.title: Whatever-It-Takes Policymaking during the Pandemic
papers.authors: Kathryn M.E. Dominguez, Andrea Foschi
papers.abstract: Central banks across the globe introduced large-scale asset purchase programs to address the unprecedented circumstances experienced during the pandemic. Many of these programs were announced as open-ended to shock-and-awe market participants and restore confidence in financial markets. This paper examines whether these whatever-it-takes announcements had larger effects than announcements with explicit limits on scale. We use a narrative approach to categorize announcements made by twenty-two central banks, and event study, propensity-score-matching, and local projection methods to measure the short-term effects of policy announcements on exchange rates and sovereign bond yields. We find that on average a central bank's first whatever-it-takes announcement lowers 10-year bond yields by an additional 47 basis points relative to size-limited announcements, suggesting that communication of potential policy scale matters. Our results for yields hold for both advanced and emerging economies, while exchange rates go in opposing directions, muting their response when we group all countries together.
papers.zh_title: 疫情期间的“不惜一切代价”政策制定
papers.zh_abstract: 全球各国央行推出了大规模资产购买计划，以应对疫情期间前所未有的情况。其中许多计划被宣布为开放式，以震慑市场参与者并恢复金融市场的信心。本文考察了这些“不惜一切代价”的声明是否比明确限制规模的声明产生了更大的影响。我们采用叙事方法对22家央行的声明进行分类，并使用事件研究、倾向得分匹配和局部投影方法来衡量政策声明对汇率和主权债券收益率的短期影响。我们发现，平均而言，央行首次“不惜一切代价”的声明相对于有限规模的声明，使10年期债券收益率额外降低了47个基点，这表明潜在政策规模的沟通很重要。我们对收益率的结果在发达经济体和新兴经济体中均成立，而汇率则走向相反方向，当我们将所有国家分组在一起时，其反应被削弱。

papers.title: Evolution of Debt Financing toward Less-Regulated Financial Intermediaries in the United States
papers.authors: Isil Erel, Eduard Inozemtsev
papers.abstract: Nonbank lenders have been playing an increasing role in supplying debt, especially after the Great Recession. How important are the distortions in the greater regulation of banks that differentially limit risk-taking across alternative providers of credit? How might the growing role of nonbanks in credit markets affect financial stability? This selective review addresses these questions and discusses how banks and nonbanks helped provide liquidity to the nonfinancial sector during the COVID-19 pandemic shock. We argue that tighter bank regulation has created incentives for nonbanks to increase their participation in credit markets, a trend that creates concerns about financial stability.
papers.zh_title: 美国债务融资向监管较少的金融中介机构的演变
papers.zh_abstract: 非银行放贷机构在提供债务方面发挥着越来越大的作用，尤其是在大衰退之后。对银行更严格的监管在不同信贷提供者之间差异性地限制风险承担，这种扭曲有多重要？非银行机构在信贷市场中日益增长的角色可能如何影响金融稳定？这篇选择性综述探讨了这些问题，并讨论了在COVID-19疫情冲击期间，银行和非银行机构如何帮助为非金融部门提供流动性。我们认为，更严格的银行监管激励了非银行机构增加其在信贷市场的参与，这一趋势引发了对金融稳定的担忧。

papers.title: Information-Constrained Coordination of Economic Behavior
papers.authors: Guy Aridor, Rava Azeredo da Silveira, Michael Woodford
papers.abstract: We analyze a coordination game with information-constrained players. The players' actions are based on a noisy compressed representation of the game's payoffs in a particular case, where the compressed representation is a latent state learned by a variational autoencoder (VAE). Our generalized VAE is optimized to trade off the average payoff obtained over a distribution of possible games against a measure of the congruence between the agent's internal model and the statistics of its environment. We apply our model to the coordination game in the experiment of Frydman and Nunnari (2023), and show that it offers an explanation for two salient features of the experimental evidence: both the relatively continuous variation in the players' action probabilities with changes in the game payoffs, and the dependence of the degree of stochasticity of players' choices on the range of game payoffs encountered on different trials. Our approach also provides an account of the way in which play should gradually adjust to a change in the distribution of game payoffs that are encountered, offering an explanation for the history-dependent play documented by Arifovic et al. (2013).
papers.zh_title: 信息约束下的经济行为协调
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了一个具有信息约束参与者的协调博弈。参与者的行动基于博弈收益的噪声压缩表示，在特定情况下，该压缩表示是由变分自编码器学习到的潜在状态。我们的广义变分自编码器经过优化，以在可能博弈分布上获得的平均收益与代理人内部模型与其环境统计量之间的一致性度量之间进行权衡。我们将模型应用于Frydman和Nunnari（2023）实验中的协调博弈，并表明它为实验证据的两个显著特征提供了解释：参与者行动概率随博弈收益变化而相对连续的变化，以及参与者选择随机性程度对在不同试验中遇到的博弈收益范围的依赖性。我们的方法还解释了游戏方式应如何逐渐适应所遇到的博弈收益分布的变化，从而为Arifovic等人（2013）记录的历史依赖游戏提供了解释。

papers.title: Campaigning Against Populism Emotions and Information in Real Election Campaigns
papers.authors: Cesi Cruz, Julien Labonne, Francesco Trebbi
papers.abstract: Populist politicians have leveraged direct connections with voters to win elections worldwide, often using emotional rather than policy appeals. Do these forms of campaigning work for programmatic politicians as well? We partner with a mainstream opposition political party to implement a field experiment during the 2019 Philippine Senatorial election to test the effectiveness of: (i) direct in-person appeals providing policy information; (ii) the addition of an activity designed to engender positive emotion. We show that direct engagement providing policy information increases vote share for the party, even in a clientelistic context. Additionally, while the emotional activity increases engagement with the campaign in the short term, the information-only treatment was more effective. Last, we present evidence that the treatments operated through learning and persuasion channels: treated voters were more likely to know the party, more certain about their knowledge, and gave higher ratings to the party’s quality and proposed policies.
papers.zh_title: 对抗民粹主义的竞选：真实选举活动中的情感与信息
papers.zh_abstract: 民粹主义政客利用与选民的直接联系在全球赢得选举，通常诉诸情感而非政策诉求。这种竞选方式对纲领性政客是否同样有效？我们与一个主流反对党合作，在2019年菲律宾参议院选举期间实施了一项实地实验，以测试以下两种方式的有效性：(i) 提供政策信息的直接面对面呼吁；(ii) 增加一项旨在激发积极情感的活动。我们表明，即使在庇护主义背景下，提供政策信息的直接接触也能增加该政党的得票率。此外，虽然情感活动在短期内增加了对竞选的参与度，但仅提供信息的处理方式更为有效。最后，我们提供的证据表明，这些处理方式通过学习和说服渠道发挥作用：受处理的选民更有可能了解该政党，对其知识更加确定，并对该政党的质量和提出的政策给予更高评价。

papers.title: Difference-in-Differences in the Marketplace
papers.authors: Robert Minton, Casey B. Mulligan
papers.abstract: Price theory says that the most important effects of policy and technological change are often found beyond their first point of contact. This appears opposed to econometric methods that rule out spillovers of one person’s treatment on another’s outcomes. This paper uses the industry model from price theory to represent the statistical concepts of treatments and controls. When treated and control observations are in the same market, the controls are indirectly affected by the treatment. Moreover, even the effect of the treatment on the treated reveals only part of the consequence for the treated of treating the entire market, which is often the parameter of interest. Marshall’s Laws of Derived Demand provide a guide for empirical work: precise price-theoretic interpretations of the direct and spillover effects of a treatment, the quantitative relationships between them, and how they correspond to the scale and substitution effects emphasized in price theory.
papers.zh_title: 市场中的双重差分法
papers.zh_abstract: 价格理论指出，政策和科技变革最重要的影响往往超出其最初的接触点。这似乎与排除一个人受处理对另一个人结果产生溢出效应的计量经济学方法相悖。本文利用价格理论中的行业模型来表述处理组和对照组的统计概念。当处理组和对照组观测值处于同一市场时，对照组会间接受到处理的影响。此外，即使处理对受处理者的影响也只揭示了处理整个市场对受处理者后果的一部分，而这通常是人们感兴趣的参数。马歇尔的派生需求定律为实证工作提供了指导：对处理的直接效应和溢出效应、它们之间的数量关系，以及它们如何对应价格理论中强调的规模效应和替代效应，给出了精确的价格理论解释。

papers.title: Lives vs. Livelihoods: The Impact of the Great Recession on Mortality and Welfare
papers.authors: Amy Finkelstein, Matthew J. Notowidigdo, Frank Schilbach, Jonathan Zhang
papers.abstract: We leverage spatial variation in the severity of the Great Recession across the United States to examine its impact on mortality and to explore implications for the welfare consequences of recessions. We estimate that an increase in the unemployment rate of the magnitude of the Great Recession reduces the average, annual age-adjusted mortality rate by 2.3 percent, with effects persisting for at least 10 years. Mortality reductions appear across causes of death and are concentrated in the half of the population with a high school degree or less. We estimate similar percentage reductions in mortality at all ages, with declines in elderly mortality thus responsible for about three-quarters of the total mortality reduction. Recession-induced mortality declines are driven primarily by external effects of reduced aggregate economic activity on mortality, and recession-induced reductions in air pollution appear to be a quantitatively important mechanism. Incorporating our estimates of pro-cyclical mortality into a standard macroeconomics framework substantially reduces the welfare costs of recessions, particularly for people with less education, and at older ages where they may even be welfare-improving.
papers.zh_title: 生命与生计：大衰退对死亡率与福利的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用美国各地大衰退严重程度的空间差异，来考察其对死亡率的影响，并探讨其对衰退福利后果的启示。我们估计，失业率上升幅度与大衰退相当，会使平均年度年龄调整死亡率降低2.3%，且这种影响至少持续10年。死亡率的降低出现在各种死因中，并集中在拥有高中或以下学历的一半人口中。我们估计所有年龄段的死亡率降低百分比相似，因此老年死亡率的下降约占总体死亡率降低的四分之三。衰退导致的死亡率下降主要源于总体经济活动减少对死亡率的外部效应，而衰退导致的空气污染减少似乎是一个数量上重要的机制。将我们估计的顺周期死亡率纳入标准宏观经济学框架，会大幅降低衰退的福利成本，尤其是对受教育程度较低的人群和老年人而言，对后者来说甚至可能改善福利。

papers.title: Immigration Enforcement and Public Safety
papers.authors: Felipe M. Gonçalves, Elisa Jácome, Emily K. Weisburst
papers.abstract: How does immigration enforcement affect public safety? Heightened enforcement could reduce crime by deterring and incapacitating immigrant offenders or, alternatively, increase crime by discouraging victims from reporting offenses. We study the U.S. Secure Communities program, which expanded interior enforcement against unauthorized immigrants. Using national survey data, we find that the program reduced the likelihood that Hispanic victims reported crimes to police and increased the victimization of Hispanics. Total reported crimes are unchanged, masking these opposing effects. We provide evidence that reduced Hispanic reporting is the key driver of increased victimization. Our findings underscore the importance of trust in institutions as a central determinant of public safety.
papers.meta: Programs：LE, LS, PE, POL；JEL：J15, K37, K42

papers.title: Does Defensive Gun Use Deter Crime?
papers.authors: John J. Donohue, Alex Oktay, Amy L. Zhang, Matthew Benavides
papers.abstract: We study the opposing deterrent and enabling effects of guns carried by law-abiding citizens on violent crime, using the location of shooting ranges as an instrument. Our incident-level data based on admittedly imperfect data from the Gun Violence Archive suggests that defensive gun use (DGU) by crime victims may decrease the probability of their injury or death, while increasing the risk of death or injury by the criminal suspects. However, in the aggregate, higher numbers of defensive gun uses—which proxies for more gun carrying and use—are associated with higher numbers of violent crimes, injuries, and fatalities among victims and suspects alike. We hypothesize that this equilibrium effect arises because more guns being carried and used by citizens produce more incentive and opportunities for criminals to acquire guns, leading to a commensurate increase in the incidence and lethality of crime. In summary, our analysis supports the conclusion that the widespread carrying and use of guns is overall more likely to enable violent crimes than to deter them.

papers.title: Keeping Up with the Jansens: Causal Peer Effects on Household Spending, Beliefs and Happiness
papers.authors: Maarten van Rooij, Olivier Coibion, Dimitris Georgarakos, Bernardo Candia, Yuriy Gorodnichenko
papers.abstract: How strong are peer effects on the beliefs and spending decisions of individuals? We use a randomized control study in which treated households are told about either average income or debt of individuals like them to assess how peer effects influence their beliefs and spending. The information treatments are successful at moving respondents’ beliefs about peers’ incomes and debt levels. We find that individuals with exogenously higher perceived relative income become more opposed to redistribution and increase the amount of time they spend socializing with peers. In addition, we find some evidence of reallocative “keeping up with the Joneses” on spending, as those who learn their peers earn more than they thought tend to reallocate their spending toward durable goods and away from non-durables. However, the quantitative magnitude of peer effects on spending is small in the months following the information experiment. Peer effects also matter for labor supply decisions and ex-post employment outcomes. Finally, believing that one earns more than peers causally leads to large positive effects on happiness, above and beyond effects coming from spending more time with peers, changing beliefs about redistribution, or changes in spending patterns.
papers.zh_title: 与詹森一家看齐：同伴效应对家庭支出、信念与幸福感的因果影响
papers.zh_abstract: 同伴效应对个人信念和支出决策的影响有多强？我们采用一项随机对照研究，告知受处理家庭与他们类似人群的平均收入或债务，以评估同伴效应如何影响他们的信念和支出。信息处理成功地改变了受访者对同伴收入和债务水平的信念。我们发现，那些外生感知相对收入较高的个人更反对再分配，并增加了与同伴社交的时间。此外，我们找到一些证据表明支出存在重新分配的“攀比效应”，即那些得知同伴收入高于自己预期的人倾向于将支出从非耐用品重新分配到耐用品。然而，在信息实验后的几个月里，同伴效应对支出的数量级很小。同伴效应也对劳动力供给决策和事后就业结果产生影响。最后，相信自己的收入高于同伴会因果性地对幸福感产生巨大的积极影响，这种影响超出了花更多时间与同伴相处、改变对再分配的信念或改变支出模式所带来的效应。

papers.title: Copyright Policy Options for Generative Artificial Intelligence
papers.authors: Joshua S. Gans
papers.abstract: New generative artificial intelligence (AI) models, including large language models and image generators, have created new challenges for copyright policy as such models may be trained on data that includes copy-protected content. This paper examines this issue from an economics perspective and analyses how different copyright regimes for generative AI will impact the quality of content generated as well as the quality of AI training. A key factor is whether generative AI models are small (with content providers capable of negotiations with AI providers) or large (where negotiations are prohibitive). For small AI models, it is found that giving original content providers copyright protection leads to superior social welfare outcomes compared to having no copyright protection. For large AI models, this comparison is ambiguous and depends on the level of potential harm to original content providers and the importance of content for AI training quality. However, it is demonstrated that an ex-post `fair use' type mechanism can lead to higher expected social welfare than traditional copyright regimes.
papers.zh_title: 生成式人工智能的版权政策选择
papers.zh_abstract: 新的生成式人工智能模型，包括大型语言模型和图像生成器，给版权政策带来了新的挑战，因为这些模型可能基于包含受版权保护内容的数据进行训练。本文从经济学角度审视这一问题，并分析针对生成式人工智能的不同版权制度将如何影响生成内容的质量以及人工智能训练的质量。一个关键因素是生成式人工智能模型是小型（内容提供者能够与人工智能提供者进行谈判）还是大型（谈判成本过高）。对于小型人工智能模型，研究发现，与没有版权保护相比，给予原始内容提供者版权保护会带来更高的社会福利结果。对于大型人工智能模型，这种比较是模糊的，取决于对原始内容提供者的潜在损害程度以及内容对人工智能训练质量的重要性。然而，研究表明，事后“合理使用”类型的机制可以比传统版权制度带来更高的预期社会福利。

papers.title: How Learning About Harms Impacts the Optimal Rate of Artificial Intelligence Adoption
papers.authors: Joshua S. Gans
papers.abstract: This paper examines recent proposals and research suggesting that AI adoption should be delayed until its potential harms are properly understood. It is shown that conclusions regarding the social optimality of delayed AI adoption are sensitive to assumptions regarding the process by which regulators learn about the salience of particular harms. When such learning is by doing -- based on the real-world adoption of AI -- this generally favours acceleration of AI adoption to surface and react to potential harms more quickly. This case is strengthened when AI adoption is potentially reversible. The paper examines how different conclusions regarding the optimality of accelerated or delayed AI adoption influence and are influenced by other policies that may moderate AI harm.
papers.zh_title: 了解危害如何影响人工智能采用的最优速度
papers.zh_abstract: 本文审视了近期关于人工智能采用应被推迟直至其潜在危害被充分理解的提议和研究。研究表明，关于延迟采用人工智能的社会最优性的结论，对监管者了解特定危害显著性的过程的假设很敏感。当这种学习是通过实践——基于人工智能在现实世界中的采用——进行时，这通常有利于加速人工智能的采用，以便更快地发现潜在危害并做出反应。当人工智能的采用可能具有可逆性时，这种情况会得到加强。本文考察了关于加速或延迟采用人工智能的最优性的不同结论如何影响并受其他可能减轻人工智能危害的政策的影响。

papers.title: Gender Inequality in Latin America and the Caribbean
papers.authors: Inés Berniell, Raquel Fernández, Sonya Krutikova
papers.abstract: This paper examines gender inequality focusing on two critical spheres in which gender inequality is generated: education and work. Our objective is to provide a current snapshot of gender inequality across key indicators as well as a dynamic perspective that highlights successes and failures. We facilitate a cross-country comparison as well by grouping countries within Latin America by their level of economics development and drawing comparisons with countries outside the region. Finally, we reflect on differences in the ways that gender inequalities play out across different socio-economic groups, particularly those that highlight other sources of inequality.
papers.zh_title: 拉丁美洲和加勒比地区的性别不平等
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了性别不平等，重点关注性别不平等产生的两个关键领域：教育和工作。我们的目标是提供当前性别不平等在关键指标上的快照，以及一个突出成功与失败的动态视角。我们还通过将拉丁美洲国家按经济发展水平分组，并与区域外国家进行比较，促进了跨国比较。最后，我们反思了性别不平等在不同社会经济群体中表现方式的差异，特别是那些凸显其他不平等来源的差异。

papers.title: Effects of Childhood Cognitive and Behavioral Disabilities on Adult Economic Outcomes
papers.authors: Hope Corman, Kelly Noonan, Nancy Reichman
papers.abstract: Developmental disabilities are not rare among U.S. children and rates have been increasing in recent decades. The increases have been driven by cognitive and behavioral disorders. While some studies have investigated the effects of specific childhood conditions, particularly ADHD, on adult economic outcomes, none has considered the overall effects of cognitive and behavioral disabilities. We address this key gap by rigorously estimating effects of cognitive and behavioral impairments in childhood, which account for the bulk and increasing share of child disability cases in the U.S., on a set of salient adult economic outcomes. Using the National Longitudinal Survey of Youth 79 Child Supplement, we estimate the effects of low cognitive test scores and high behavior problem scores in childhood on receipt of disability benefits, educational attainment, employment, wages, and access to transportation and credit in adulthood, using household fixed effects models to control for potentially confounding factors that are unobserved. We find significant effects in the expected direction for both cognitive and behavioral childhood disabilities on all outcomes. The findings have important implications for well-being over the life course for a non-trivial share of the U.S. population and their families, government expenditures, and public policy.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, EH, LS；JEL：I10, I14, I24, I30, J14, J20, J24
papers.zh_title: 儿童认知和行为障碍对成年经济结果的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 发育障碍在美国儿童中并不罕见，且其发生率近几十年来一直在上升。这种增长主要由认知和行为障碍驱动。虽然一些研究调查了特定儿童期状况（尤其是多动症）对成年经济结果的影响，但尚无研究考虑认知和行为障碍的总体影响。我们通过严格估计儿童期认知和行为损伤（这在美国儿童残疾案例中占主导且比例不断增加）对一系列显著的成年经济结果的影响，来填补这一关键空白。利用全国青年纵向调查79儿童补充数据，我们采用家庭固定效应模型来控制未观测到的潜在混杂因素，估计了儿童期低认知测试分数和高行为问题分数对成年期领取残疾福利、教育程度、就业、工资以及获得交通和信贷机会的影响。我们发现，儿童期认知和行为残疾对所有结果都产生了预期方向的显著影响。这些发现对于美国相当一部分人口及其家庭的生命历程福祉、政府支出和公共政策具有重要意义。

papers.title: Protective Behavior and Life Insurance
papers.authors: Abigail Hurwitz, Olivia S. Mitchell, Orly Sade
papers.abstract: We study life insurance market responses to Covid-19 using unique national administrative data from Israel on purchases and cancellations of life insurance policies, and an internet survey of Americans’ life insurance choices, risk attitudes, Covid-19 perceptions, and vaccination behavior. We see no evidence that life insurance purchases or cancellations were consistent with adverse selection during the pandemic, while we do find advantageous selection. Moreover, life insurance policyholders were more likely to get vaccinated, thus taking ex-post preventive action reducing their pandemic risk. Such positive reactive behavior has not been previously reported in the life insurance setting.
papers.zh_title: 防护行为与人寿保险
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用以色列全国行政数据（涵盖人寿保险保单的购买与取消）以及一项针对美国人寿保险选择、风险态度、新冠疫情认知及疫苗接种行为的互联网调查，研究了人寿保险市场对新冠疫情的响应。我们没有发现任何证据表明疫情期间人寿保险的购买或取消与逆向选择一致，反而发现了有利选择。此外，人寿保险保单持有人更有可能接种疫苗，从而采取事后预防措施降低其疫情风险。这种积极的反应性行为此前在人寿保险领域尚未被报道。

papers.title: CEO Compensation and Cash-Flow Shocks: Evidence from Changes in Environmental Regulations
papers.authors: Seungho Choi, Ross Levine, Raphael Jonghyeon Park, Simon Xu
papers.abstract: This paper investigates how shocks to expected cash flows influence CEO incentive compensation. Exploiting changes in compliance with environmental regulations as shocks to expected future cash flows, we find that adverse shocks typically prompt corporate boards to recalibrate CEO compensation to reduce risk-taking incentives. However, this pattern is not uniform. Financially distressed firms exhibit milder reductions in compensation convexity, with some even increasing it, suggesting a “gambling for resurrection” strategy. Moreover, the strength of corporate governance influences shareholders’ capacity to align executive incentives with shareholder risk preferences following unanticipated changes in the stringency of environmental regulations.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EEE；JEL：G34, G38, M52, Q53, Q58
papers.zh_title: CEO薪酬与现金流冲击：来自环境监管变化的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了预期现金流冲击如何影响CEO激励性薪酬。利用环境合规性变化作为预期未来现金流的冲击，我们发现不利冲击通常会促使公司董事会重新调整CEO薪酬，以减少风险承担激励。然而，这种模式并非统一。财务困境公司表现出较弱的薪酬凸性降低，有些甚至增加了凸性，这表明存在“赌一把以求翻身”的策略。此外，公司治理的强度会影响股东在环境监管严格程度发生意外变化后，将高管激励与股东风险偏好对齐的能力。

papers.title: Does Pension Automatic Enrollment Increase Debt? Evidence from a Large-Scale Natural Experiment
papers.authors: John Beshears, Matthew Blakstad, James J. Choi, Christopher Firth, John Gathergood, David Laibson, Richard Notley, Jesal D. Sheth, Will Sandbrook, Neil Stewart
papers.abstract: Does automatic enrollment into retirement saving increase household debt? We study the randomized roll-out of automatic enrollment pensions to ~160,000 employers in the United Kingdom with 2-29 employees. We find that the additional savings generated through automatic enrollment are partially offset by increases in unsecured debt. Over the first 41 months after enrollment, each additional month increases the average automatically enrolled employee’s pension savings by £33-£39, unsecured debt (such as personal loans and bank overdrafts) by £7, the likelihood of having a mortgage by 0.05 percentage points, and mortgage balances by £120. Automatic enrollment causes loan defaults to fall and credit scores to rise modestly.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, PE；JEL：D14, D15, D90, G51, J32
papers.zh_title: 养老金自动加入会增加债务吗？来自大规模自然实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 退休储蓄的自动加入是否会增加家庭债务？我们研究了英国约16万家拥有2至29名员工的雇主随机推广的自动加入养老金计划。我们发现，通过自动加入产生的额外储蓄部分被无担保债务的增加所抵消。在加入后的前41个月里，每增加一个月，自动加入员工的平均养老金储蓄增加33至39英镑，无担保债务（如个人贷款和银行透支）增加7英镑，拥有抵押贷款的可能性增加0.05个百分点，抵押贷款余额增加120英镑。自动加入导致贷款违约率下降，信用评分适度上升。

papers.title: Platform Information Provision and Consumer Search: A Field Experiment
papers.authors: Lu Fang, Yanyou Chen, Chiara Farronato, Zhe Yuan, Yitong Wang
papers.abstract: Despite substantial efforts to help consumers search in more intuitive ways, text search remains the predominant tool for product discovery online. In this paper, we explore the effects of visual and textual cues for search refinement on consumer search and purchasing behavior. We collaborate with one of the largest e-commerce platforms in China and study its roll out of a new search tool. When a customer searches for a general term (e.g., “headphones”), the tool suggests refined queries (e.g., “bluetooth headphones” or “noise-canceling headphones”) with the help of images and texts. The search tool was rolled out with a long-run experiment, which allows us to measure its short-run and long-run effects. We find that, although there was no immediate effect on orders or total expenditures, the search tool changed customers’ search and purchasing behavior in the long-run. Customers with access to the new tool eventually increased orders and expenditures compared to those in the control group, especially for non top-selling products. The purchase increase comes from more effective searches,
papers.meta: Programs：IO, PR；JEL：D81, D83, L2, L81, L86
papers.zh_title: 平台信息提供与消费者搜索：一项实地实验
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管在帮助消费者以更直观的方式搜索方面做出了巨大努力，文本搜索仍然是线上产品发现的主要工具。在本文中，我们探讨了用于搜索细化的视觉和文本线索对消费者搜索和购买行为的影响。我们与中国最大的电子商务平台之一合作，研究了其新搜索工具的推出。当客户搜索一个通用术语（例如“耳机”）时，该工具借助图片和文本建议细化的查询（例如“蓝牙耳机”或“降噪耳机”）。该搜索工具通过一项长期实验推出，这使我们能够衡量其短期和长期影响。我们发现，尽管对订单或总支出没有立即影响，但该搜索工具在长期内改变了客户的搜索和购买行为。与对照组相比，使用新工具的客户最终增加了订单和支出，尤其是对于非畅销产品。购买量的增加源于更有效的搜索。

papers.title: The Causal Effects of Global Supply Chain Disruptions on Macroeconomic Outcomes: Evidence and Theory
papers.authors: Xiwen Bai, Jesús Fernández-Villaverde, Yiliang Li, Francesco Zanetti
papers.abstract: We study the causal effects and policy implications of global supply chain disruptions. We construct a new index of supply chain disruptions from the mandatory automatic identification system data of container ships, developing a novel spatial clustering algorithm that determines real-time congestion from the position, speed, and heading of container ships in major ports around the globe. We develop a model with search frictions between producers and retailers that links spare productive capacity with congestion in the goods market and the responses of output and prices to supply chain shocks. The co-movements of output, prices, and spare capacity yield unique identifying restrictions for supply chain disturbances that allow us to study the causal effects of such disruptions. We document how supply chain shocks drove inflation during 2021 but that, in 2022, traditional demand and supply shocks also played an important role in explaining inflation. Finally, we show how monetary policy is more effective in taming inflation after a global supply chain shock than in regular circumstances.
papers.zh_title: 全球供应链中断对宏观经济结果的因果影响：证据与理论
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了全球供应链中断的因果影响和政策含义。我们利用集装箱船的强制性自动识别系统数据构建了一个新的供应链中断指数，开发了一种新颖的空间聚类算法，该算法根据全球主要港口集装箱船的位置、速度和航向确定实时拥堵情况。我们建立了一个包含生产者和零售商之间搜索摩擦的模型，将闲置生产能力与商品市场拥堵以及产出和价格对供应链冲击的反应联系起来。产出、价格和闲置产能的共同变动为供应链扰动提供了独特的识别限制，使我们能够研究此类中断的因果影响。我们记录了供应链冲击如何在2021年推动通胀，但在2022年，传统的需求和供给冲击在解释通胀方面也发挥了重要作用。最后，我们展示了在全球供应链冲击后，货币政策在抑制通胀方面比正常情况下更有效。

papers.title: Optimal Trade Policy with International Technology Diffusion
papers.authors: Yan Bai, Keyu Jin, Dan Lu, Hanxi Wang
papers.abstract: We study optimal dynamic trade policies in an Eaton-Kortum model with technology diffusion through trade. The process of innovation and diffusion is one in which new ideas are combined with insights from others. Trade thus affects technology by determining the distribution from which producers draw their insights. Our theory shows that optimal policies capture a dynamic motive for a country to alter global technology. These policies take into account selection effects, country endowments, and other alterations to trade patterns that affect the degree and quality of diffusion. We provide explicit formulas showing that a Home country would like to subsidize imports from places that improve the quality of learning at Home; or lower its export tax to another country if a) higher productivity in that country is good for the Home, and b) more exports to that country improve the quality of learning and, in turn, the country’s technology. We also calibrate the model using cross-country data and quantify dynamic trade policies and their attendant welfare implications.
papers.zh_title: 国际技术扩散下的最优贸易政策
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在一个包含通过贸易进行技术扩散的Eaton-Kortum模型中研究最优动态贸易政策。创新与扩散的过程是一个新思想与他人见解相结合的过程。因此，贸易通过决定生产者获取见解的分布来影响技术。我们的理论表明，最优政策捕捉了一个国家改变全球技术的动态动机。这些政策考虑了选择效应、国家禀赋以及对影响扩散程度和质量的贸易模式的其他改变。我们提供了明确的公式，表明本国希望补贴从那些能提高本国学习质量的地方的进口；或者降低对另一个国家的出口税，如果a) 该国的更高生产率对本国有利，并且b) 对该国的更多出口能提高学习质量，进而改善该国的技术。我们还利用跨国数据校准了模型，并量化了动态贸易政策及其相关的福利影响。

papers.title: Applying AI to Rebuild Middle Class Jobs
papers.authors: David Autor
papers.abstract: While the utopian vision of the current Information Age was that computerization would flatten economic hierarchies by democratizing information, the opposite has occurred. Information, it turns out, is merely an input into a more consequential economic function, decision-making, which is the province of elite experts. The unique opportunity that AI offers to the labor market is to extend the relevance, reach, and value of human expertise. Because of AI’s capacity to weave information and rules with acquired experience to support decision-making, it can be applied to enable a larger set of workers possessing complementary knowledge to perform some of the higher-stakes decision-making tasks that are currently arrogated to elite experts, e.g., medical care to doctors, document production to lawyers, software coding to computer engineers, and undergraduate education to professors. My thesis is not a forecast but an argument about what is possible: AI, if used well, can assist with restoring the middle-skill, middle-class heart of the US labor market that has been hollowed out by automation and globalization.
papers.zh_title: 应用人工智能重建中产阶级就业岗位
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管当前信息时代的乌托邦愿景是计算机化将通过信息民主化来扁平化经济层级，但实际情况恰恰相反。事实证明，信息仅仅是更重要的经济功能——决策——的输入，而决策是精英专家的领域。人工智能为劳动力市场提供的独特机会是扩展人类专业知识的关联性、覆盖范围和价值。由于人工智能能够将信息和规则与获得的经验相结合以支持决策，它可以被用来使更多拥有互补知识的工人能够执行一些目前由精英专家垄断的高风险决策任务，例如医疗保健（医生）、文件制作（律师）、软件编码（计算机工程师）和本科教育（教授）。我的论点不是预测，而是关于可能性的论证：如果运用得当，人工智能可以帮助恢复美国劳动力市场中被自动化和全球化掏空的中等技能、中产阶级核心。

papers.title: Out-group Penalties in Refugee Assistance: A Survey Experiment
papers.authors: Cristina Cattaneo, Daniela Grieco, Nicola Lacetera, Mario Macis
papers.abstract: We study out-group biases in attitudes toward refugees, and the effect of European Union (EU) immigration policies on these views, using an online survey experiment including 4,087 Italian participants. We assess attitudes using donations to a randomly assigned group: Italian victims of violence or refugees fleeing wars in Ukraine or African countries. We also employ a novel measure, the share donated in cash. While donations indicated less support for African and Ukrainian refugees compared to Italian victims, the cash measure revealed a stronger prejudice against distant out-groups, with participants giving African refugees a smaller proportion of cash donations. This result was mainly driven by individuals with right-leaning political views. Providing information about immigration policy reforms that give the EU a more substantial role in receiving and allocating refugees had no impact. Textual analysis supports these findings.
papers.meta: Programs：LS, PE, POL；JEL：C99, D02, D64, J15
papers.zh_title: 难民援助中的外群体惩罚：一项调查实验
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过一项包含4087名意大利参与者的在线调查实验，研究了对难民态度的外群体偏见，以及欧盟移民政策对这些观点的影响。我们通过向随机分配的群体（意大利暴力受害者、逃离乌克兰战争的难民或逃离非洲国家的难民）进行捐赠来评估态度。我们还采用了一种新颖的衡量标准：现金捐赠的比例。虽然捐赠显示对非洲和乌克兰难民的支持少于对意大利受害者的支持，但现金衡量标准揭示了对更遥远外群体的更强偏见，参与者给予非洲难民的现金捐赠比例较小。这一结果主要由持右翼政治观点的个体驱动。提供关于赋予欧盟在接收和分配难民方面更实质性作用的移民政策改革信息没有产生影响。文本分析支持了这些发现。

papers.title: Tariff Rate Uncertainty and the Structure of Supply Chains
papers.authors: Sebastian Heise, Justin R. Pierce, Georg Schaur, Peter K. Schott
papers.abstract: We show that reducing the probability of a trade war promotes long-term importer-exporter relationships that ensure provision of high-quality inputs via incentive premia. Empirically, we introduce a method for distinguishing between these Japanese versus spot-market (i.e., American) relationships in customs data, show that their use varies intuitively across trading partners and products, and find that Japanese importing from China increases after a reduction in the possibility of a trade war. Extending the standard general equilibrium trade model to encompass potential trade wars and relational contracts, we estimate that eliminating Japanese procurement reduces welfare about a third as much as moving to autarky.
papers.zh_title: 关税税率不确定性与供应链结构
papers.zh_abstract: 我们表明，降低贸易战的可能性会促进长期的进口商-出口商关系，这种关系通过激励溢价确保高质量投入品的供应。实证上，我们引入了一种方法，用于在海关数据中区分这些日本式关系与现货市场（即美国式）关系，展示了它们在不同贸易伙伴和产品间的使用符合直觉，并发现日本从中国的进口在贸易战可能性降低后增加。将标准的一般均衡贸易模型扩展到涵盖潜在贸易战和关系合同，我们估计，消除日本式采购会使福利减少约三分之一，其程度相当于走向自给自足。

papers.title: Monetary Policy Wedges and the Long-term Liabilities of Households and Firms
papers.authors: Jules H. van Binsbergen, Marco Grotteria
papers.abstract: We examine the transmission of monetary policy shocks to the long-duration liabilities of households and firms using high-frequency variation in 10-year swap rates around FOMC announcements. We find that four weeks after the announcement mortgage rates move one-for-one with 10-year swap rates, leaving little explanatory power for mortgage concentration, bank market power, or credit risk. Variation in credit risk does materially affect monetary policy transmission to corporate bonds. Expected future short rates and term premia play a significant role in driving both mortgage rates and corporate bond yields, which explains the Federal Reserve’s increased focus on these quantities.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IFM, ME；JEL：E40, E43, E44, E5, E50, E52, E58, G21, G51
papers.zh_title: 货币政策楔子与家庭和企业的长期负债
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用联邦公开市场委员会公告前后10年期互换利率的高频变动，考察了货币政策冲击向家庭和企业长期负债的传导。我们发现，公告四周后，抵押贷款利率与10年期互换利率一对一变动，抵押贷款集中度、银行市场势力或信用风险几乎没有解释力。信用风险的变化确实对货币政策向公司债券的传导产生实质性影响。预期的未来短期利率和期限溢价在推动抵押贷款利率和公司债券收益率方面都起着重要作用，这解释了美联储对这些变量日益增加的关注。

papers.title: The Government Patent Register: A New Resource for Measuring U.S. Government-Funded Patenting
papers.authors: Daniel P. Gross, Bhaven N. Sampat
papers.abstract: We introduce new historical administrative data identifying U.S. government-funded patents since the early twentieth century. In addition to the funding agency, the data report whether the government has title to the patent (“title” patents) or funded a patent assigned to a private organization (“license” patents). The data include a large number of “license” patents that cannot be linked to government funding from patent text or other sources. Combining the historical data with modern administrative sources, we present a public, consolidated data series measuring U.S. government-funded patents—including funding agencies—through 2020, and we provide code to extend this series in the future. We use the data to document long-run patterns in U.S. government-funded patents and federal patent policy, propose ways in which these data can be used in future research, and discuss limitations of the data.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, PR；JEL：N42, N72, O31, O34, O38
papers.zh_title: 政府专利登记簿：衡量美国政府资助专利的新资源
papers.zh_abstract: 我们引入了新的历史行政数据，用于识别自20世纪初以来美国政府资助的专利。除了资助机构外，这些数据还报告了政府是否拥有专利所有权（“所有权”专利），或者是否资助了分配给私人组织的专利（“许可”专利）。这些数据包含大量无法通过专利文本或其他来源与政府资助关联的“许可”专利。通过将历史数据与现代行政来源相结合，我们提供了一个公开的、整合的数据序列，用于衡量截至2020年的美国政府资助专利（包括资助机构），并提供了未来扩展该序列的代码。我们利用这些数据记录了美国政府资助专利和联邦专利政策的长期模式，提出了这些数据在未来研究中可能的使用方式，并讨论了数据的局限性。

papers.title: Discrete Choice, Complete Markets, and Equilibrium
papers.authors: Simon Mongey, Michael E. Waugh
papers.abstract: This paper characterizes the allocations that emerge in general equilibrium economies populated by households with preferences of the additive random utility type that make discrete consumption, employment or spatial decisions. We start with a complete markets economy where households can trade claims contingent upon the realizations of their preference shocks. We (i) establish a first and second welfare theorem, (ii) illustrate that in the absence of ex-ante trade, discrete choice economies are generically inefficient, (iii) show that complete markets are not necessary and a much smaller set of securities decentralizes the efficient allocation. We illustrate the relevance of these results in several canonical settings and for measuring how welfare changes in response to changes in prices.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IO, ITI, LS；JEL：D5, D52, E2, F1, R13
papers.zh_title: 离散选择、完全市场与均衡
papers.zh_abstract: 本文刻画了由具有加性随机效用类型偏好的家庭组成的一般均衡经济中出现的配置，这些家庭做出离散的消费、就业或空间决策。我们从家庭可以交易依赖于其偏好冲击实现状态的或有债权的完全市场经济开始。我们（i）建立了第一和第二福利定理，（ii）说明了在缺乏事前交易的情况下，离散选择经济通常是低效的，（iii）表明完全市场并非必要，而一个更小的证券集合就能分散化实现有效配置。我们在几个经典设定中以及衡量福利如何随价格变化而变化时，说明了这些结果的相关性。

papers.title: Behavioral Responses to Wealth Taxation: Evidence from Colombia
papers.authors: Juliana Londoño-Vélez, Javier Avila-Mahecha
papers.abstract: We study behavioral responses to personal wealth taxes in Colombia. We utilize tax microdata from 1993 to 2016 linked with the leaked Panama Papers to investigate offshoring to the country’s key tax havens. We leverage variation from discrete jumps in tax liability and four major reforms to the wealth tax system, including changes in tax rates and duration, using bunching and difference-in-difference techniques. We find compelling evidence that taxpayers instantly reduce the wealth they declare in response to a wealth tax. Moreover, these effects can persist for years even after the wealth tax is no longer in place, providing the first evidence of a hysteresis effect for a temporary tax policy. The response is driven by misreporting items that authorities cannot cross-verify, such as overstating debt and understating non-third-party-reported business assets. Additionally, the wealthiest taxpayers respond to wealth tax increases by hiding assets in hard-to-track entities in tax havens.
papers.zh_title: 对财富税的行为反应：来自哥伦比亚的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了哥伦比亚个人财富税的行为反应。我们利用1993年至2016年的税收微观数据，并与泄露的巴拿马文件相关联，以调查向该国主要避税天堂的离岸转移。我们利用税收负债的离散跳跃以及财富税体系的四次重大改革（包括税率和持续时间的变化）带来的变化，采用聚束和双重差分技术。我们发现了令人信服的证据，表明纳税人会立即减少因财富税而申报的财富。此外，这些效应即使在财富税不再实施后也可能持续多年，这首次为临时税收政策提供了滞后效应的证据。这种反应是由虚报当局无法交叉验证的项目驱动的，例如夸大债务和低估非第三方报告的企业资产。此外，最富有的纳税人通过将资产隐藏在避税天堂难以追踪的实体中，来应对财富税的增加。

papers.title: What Drives U.S. Import Price Inflation?
papers.authors: Mary Amiti, Oleg Itskhoki, David Weinstein
papers.abstract: Inflation has risen sharply in many countries since the COVID-19 outbreak. Economists have debated the underlying causes. In this paper, we examine the drivers of the global import price inflation, which peaked at approximately 11 percent a year. We find that a common global component closely tracks movements in aggregate U.S. import prices until late 2022. Afterward, idiosyncratic U.S. demand shocks started to dominate.
papers.zh_title: 是什么推动了美国进口价格通胀？
papers.zh_abstract: 自新冠疫情爆发以来，许多国家的通胀率急剧上升。经济学家们一直在争论其根本原因。在本文中，我们研究了全球进口价格通胀的驱动因素，该通胀率峰值约为每年11%。我们发现，直到2022年底，一个共同的全球成分紧密追踪美国进口价格总量的变动。此后，美国特有的需求冲击开始占据主导地位。

papers.title: Making a Song and Dance About It: The Effectiveness of Teaching Children Vocabulary with Animated Music Videos
papers.authors: Ariel Kalil, Susan Mayer, Philip Oreopoulos, Rohen Shah
papers.abstract: Programs that engage young children in movement and song to help them learn are popular but experimental evidence on their impact is sparse. We use an RCT to evaluate the effectiveness of Big Word Club (BWC), a classroom program that uses music and dance videos for 3-5 minutes per day to increase vocabulary. We conducted a field experiment with 818 preschool and kindergarten students in 47 schools in three U.S. states. We find that treated students scored higher on a test of words targeted by the program (0.30 SD) after four months of use and this effect persisted for two months.
papers.zh_title: 载歌载舞：用动画音乐视频教儿童词汇的有效性
papers.zh_abstract: 让幼儿通过运动和唱歌来学习的项目很受欢迎，但关于其影响的实验证据却很少。我们使用随机对照试验来评估Big Word Club（BWC）的有效性，这是一个课堂项目，每天使用音乐和舞蹈视频3-5分钟来增加词汇量。我们在美国三个州的47所学校对818名学前班和幼儿园学生进行了现场实验。我们发现，经过四个月的使用，接受干预的学生在项目目标词汇测试中得分更高（0.30个标准差），并且这种效果持续了两个月。

papers.title: Populism, Polarization and Green Investment
papers.authors: Anders Anderson, David T. Robinson
papers.abstract: We use detailed, individual-level, panel data to relate growing political polarization to (i) changing beliefs about the pace of global warming and (ii) the propensity to make climate-friendly investment decisions. Individuals in our study were exogenously exposed to forest fires to varying degrees in the summer of 2018. While exposure increased the perceived pace of climate change on average, the response is attenuated in areas experiencing increases in right-wing populism, especially when local environmental media coverage was stronger. Changing beliefs also predict climate-friendly investment, but this is heavily mediated by the same political dynamics.
papers.zh_title: 民粹主义、两极分化与绿色投资
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用详细的个体层面面板数据，将日益加剧的政治两极分化与（i）关于全球变暖速度的信念变化以及（ii）做出气候友好型投资决策的倾向联系起来。我们研究中的个体在2018年夏季不同程度地外生地暴露于森林火灾。虽然平均而言，暴露增加了对气候变化感知速度，但在右翼民粹主义上升的地区，这种反应被削弱，尤其是在当地环境媒体报道较强时。变化的信念也预测了气候友好型投资，但这在很大程度上受到相同政治动态的中介作用。

papers.title: Declining Responsiveness at the Establishment Level: Sources and Productivity Implications
papers.authors: Russell Cooper, John C. Haltiwanger, Jonathan Willis
papers.abstract: This paper studies competing sources of declining dynamism. Evidence shows that an important component of this decline is accounted for by the reduction in the response of employment to shocks in US establishments. Using a plant level dynamic optimization problem as a framework for analysis, four potential reasons for this decline are studied: (i) a change in exogenous processes for profits, (ii) an increase in impatience, (iii) increased market power and (iv) increasing adjustment costs. We identify and quantity the contribution of each of these factors building on a simulated method of moments estimation of our structural model. Our results indicate that the reduction in responsiveness largely reflects increased costs of employment adjustment. Changes in market power, as captured by changes in the curvature of the revenue, function play a minimal role. But, in the presence of rising adjustment costs, measured sales-weighted markups using the recently popular indirect production approach rise substantially, along with rising dispersion and skewness of such measured markups.
papers.zh_title: 企业层面响应性的下降：来源与生产率影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了经济活力下降的竞争性来源。证据表明，这种下降的一个重要组成部分是美国企业对冲击的就业响应减少。使用工厂层面的动态优化问题作为分析框架，研究了这种下降的四个潜在原因：（i）利润外生过程的变化，（ii）不耐烦程度的增加，（iii）市场力量的增强，以及（iv）调整成本的增加。我们基于结构模型的模拟矩估计方法，识别并量化了每个因素的贡献。我们的结果表明，响应性的降低在很大程度上反映了就业调整成本的增加。市场力量的变化（通过收入函数曲率的变化来捕捉）只发挥了微小作用。但是，在调整成本上升的情况下，使用最近流行的间接生产方法衡量的销售加权加成率大幅上升，同时这些衡量指标的离散度和偏度也在增加。

papers.title: Exorbitant Privilege and the Sustainability of US Public Debt
papers.authors: Jason Choi, Duong Q. Dang, Rishabh Kirpalani, Diego J. Perez
papers.abstract: We study the extent to which the perceived cost of losing the exorbitant privilege the US holds in global safe asset markets sustains the safety of its public debt. Our findings indicate that the loss of this special status in the event of a default significantly augments the debt capacity for the US. Debt levels would be up to 30% lower if the US did not have this special status. Most of this extra debt capacity arises from the loss of the convenience yield on US Treasuries, which makes debt more expensive following its loss and provides strong incentives to repay debt.
papers.zh_title: 过高特权与美国公共债务的可持续性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了美国在全球安全资产市场所拥有的过高特权在违约情况下丧失的感知成本，在多大程度上维持了其公共债务的安全性。我们的研究结果表明，在违约事件中失去这种特殊地位显著增加了美国的债务能力。如果美国没有这种特殊地位，债务水平将降低高达30%。这种额外的债务能力大部分源于美国国债便利收益的丧失，这使得债务在丧失后变得更加昂贵，并为偿还债务提供了强有力的激励。

papers.title: The Role of International Financial Integration in Monetary Policy Transmission
papers.authors: Jing Cynthia Wu, Yinxi Xie, Ji Zhang
papers.abstract: Motivated by empirical evidence, we propose an open-economy New Keynesian model with financial integration that allows financial intermediaries to hold foreign long-term bonds. We find financial integration features an amplification for a domestic monetary policy shock and a negative spillover for a foreign shock. These results hold for conventional and unconventional monetary policies. Among various aspects of financial integration, the bond duration plays a major role, and our results cannot be replicated by a standard model of perfect risk sharing between households. Finally, we observe an important interaction between financial integration and trade openness, and demonstrate trade alone does not have an economically meaningful impact on monetary policy transmission.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E40, E5, F30
papers.zh_title: 国际金融一体化在货币政策传导中的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 受实证证据的启发，我们提出了一个包含金融一体化的开放经济新凯恩斯模型，该模型允许金融中介持有外国长期债券。我们发现，金融一体化会放大国内货币政策冲击，并对国外冲击产生负向溢出效应。这些结果对常规和非常规货币政策均成立。在金融一体化的各个方面中，债券期限起着主要作用，而我们的结果无法通过家庭间完美风险分担的标准模型复制。最后，我们观察到金融一体化与贸易开放度之间存在重要的相互作用，并证明仅靠贸易本身对货币政策传导没有经济意义上的显著影响。

papers.title: The Role of Non-Pecuniary Considerations: Location Decisions of College Graduates from Low Income Backgrounds
papers.authors: Yifan Gong, Todd R. Stinebrickner, Ralph Stinebrickner, Yuxi Yao
papers.abstract: We examine the initial post-college geographic location decisions of students from hometowns in the Appalachian region that often lack substantial high-skilled job opportunities, focusing on the role of non-pecuniary considerations. Novel survey questions in the spirit of the contingent valuation approach allow us to measure the full non-pecuniary benefits of each relevant geographic location, in dollar equivalents. A new specification test is designed and implemented to provide evidence about the quality of these non-pecuniary measures. Supplementing perceived location choice probabilities and expectations about pecuniary factors with our new non-pecuniary measures allows us to estimate a stylized model of location choice and obtain a comprehensive understanding of the importance of pecuniary and non-pecuniary factors. We also combine the non-pecuniary measures with realized location and earnings outcomes to characterize inequality in overall welfare.
papers.zh_title: 非金钱因素的作用：来自低收入背景大学毕业生的区位决策
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了来自阿巴拉契亚地区家乡（这些地区通常缺乏大量高技能就业机会）的学生在大学毕业后的初始地理区位决策，重点关注非金钱因素的作用。基于条件估值法精神的新型调查问题使我们能够以美元等价物衡量每个相关地理区位的全部非金钱收益。我们设计并实施了一项新的规范检验，以提供关于这些非金钱度量质量的证据。将感知的区位选择概率和对金钱因素的预期与我们新的非金钱度量相结合，使我们能够估计一个简约的区位选择模型，并全面理解金钱和非金钱因素的重要性。我们还结合非金钱度量与实际的区位和收入结果，来刻画总体福利中的不平等。

papers.title: English Language Requirement and Educational Inequality: Evidence from 16 Million College Applicants in China
papers.authors: Hongbin Li, Lingsheng Meng, Kai Mu, Shaoda Wang
papers.abstract: This paper studies the unintended effect of English language requirement on educational inequality by investigating how the staggered rollout of English listening tests in China’s high-stakes National College Entrance Exam (NCEE) affected the rural-urban gap in college access. Leveraging administrative data covering the universe of NCEE participants between 1999 and 2003, we find that the introduction of English listening tests significantly lowered rural students’ exam score percentile ranks relative to their urban counterparts, resulting in a 30% increase in the rural-urban gap in college access. Our back-of-the-envelope calculations suggest that, as a result of this policy change, more than 54,000 rural students lost college seats to their urban peers between 1999 and 2003, and another 11,000 rural students who elite colleges could have admitted ended up in non-elite colleges, causing them significant future income losses.
papers.zh_title: 英语要求与教育不平等：来自中国1600万高考考生的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文通过研究中国高利害性高考中英语听力测试的分阶段引入如何影响大学入学的城乡差距，探讨了英语语言要求的意外效应。利用覆盖1999年至2003年间所有高考考生的行政数据，我们发现，英语听力测试的引入显著降低了农村学生相对于城市学生的考试成绩百分位排名，导致大学入学的城乡差距增加了30%。我们的粗略计算表明，由于这一政策变化，在1999年至2003年间，超过54,000名农村学生将大学名额让给了城市同龄人，另有11,000名本可被精英大学录取的农村学生最终进入了非精英大学，这给他们造成了显著的未来收入损失。

papers.title: ChatGPT and Corporate Policies
papers.authors: Manish Jha, Jialin Qian, Michael Weber, Baozhong Yang
papers.abstract: We create a firm-level ChatGPT investment score, based on conference calls, that measures managers' anticipated changes in capital expenditures. We validate the score with interpretable textual content and its strong correlation with CFO survey responses. The investment score predicts future capital expenditure for up to nine quarters, controlling for Tobin's q and other determinants, implying the investment score provides incremental information about firms' future investment opportunities. The investment score also separately forecasts future total, intangible, and R&D investments. High-investment-score firms experience significant negative future abnormal returns. We demonstrate ChatGPT's applicability to measure other policies, such as dividends and employment.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：C81, E22, G14, G31, G32, O33
papers.zh_title: ChatGPT与企业政策
papers.zh_abstract: 我们基于电话会议构建了一个企业层面的ChatGPT投资得分，用以衡量管理者预期的资本支出变化。我们通过可解释的文本内容以及该得分与首席财务官调查回应的强相关性来验证该得分。在控制了托宾q和其他决定因素后，该投资得分能预测未来长达九个季度的资本支出，这意味着该得分提供了关于企业未来投资机会的增量信息。该投资得分还能分别预测未来的总投资、无形资产投资和研发投资。高投资得分的企业经历了显著的未来负异常回报。我们展示了ChatGPT在衡量其他政策（如股息和就业）方面的适用性。

papers.title: The Long-term Effects of Inflation on Inflation Expectations
papers.authors: Fabio Braggion, Felix von Meyerinck, Nic Schaub, Michael Weber
papers.abstract: We study the long-term effects of inflation surges on inflation expectations. German households living in areas with higher local inflation during the hyperinflation of the 1920s expect higher inflation today, after partialling out determinants of historical inflation and current inflation expectations . Our evidence points towards transmission of inflation experiences from parents to children and through collective memory. Differential historical inflation also modulates the updating of expectations to current inflation, the response to economic policies affecting inflation, and financial decisions. We obtain similar results for Polish households residing in formerly German areas. Overall, our findings are consistent with inflationary shocks having a long-lasting impact on attitudes towards inflation.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, AP, CF, ME；JEL：D14, E31, E71, G41, N14
papers.zh_title: 通货膨胀对通胀预期的长期影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了通胀飙升对通胀预期的长期影响。在控制了历史通胀和当前通胀预期的决定因素后，居住在20世纪20年代恶性通胀期间当地通胀率较高地区的德国家庭，如今预期通胀率更高。我们的证据指向通胀经历从父母向子女的传递，以及通过集体记忆的传递。历史通胀差异还会调节预期对当前通胀的更新、对影响通胀的经济政策的反应以及金融决策。我们对居住在原德国地区的波兰家庭也得到了类似的结果。总体而言，我们的发现与通胀冲击对通胀态度产生持久影响的结论一致。

papers.title: On Digital Currencies
papers.authors: Harald Uhlig
papers.abstract: I discuss private and central-bank-issued digital currencies, summarizing my prior research. I argue that prices of private digital currencies such as bitcoin follow random walks or, more generally, risk-adjusted martingales. For central bank digital currencies, I argue that they enhance the “CBDC trilemma” facing a central bank: out of the three objectives, price stability, efficiency, and monetary trust, it can achieve at most two.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, IFM, ME；JEL：E31, E42, E44, E52, G12, G21
papers.zh_title: 论数字货币
papers.zh_abstract: 我讨论了私人和央行发行的数字货币，并总结了我之前的研究。我认为，像比特币这样的私人数字货币的价格遵循随机游走，或者更一般地说，遵循风险调整后的鞅。对于央行数字货币，我认为它们加剧了央行面临的“CBDC三难困境”：在价格稳定、效率和货币信任这三个目标中，最多只能实现两个。

papers.title: How Do Voters Respond to Welfare Vis-a-Vis Public Good Programs? Theory and Evidence of Political Clientelism
papers.authors: Pranab Bardhan, Sandip Mitra, Dilip Mookherjee, Anusha Nath
papers.abstract: Using rural household survey data from West Bengal, we find that voters respond positively to excludable government welfare benefits but not to local public good programs, while reporting having benefited from both. Consistent with these voting patterns, shocks to electoral competition induced by exogenous redistricting of villages resulted in upper-tier governments manipulating allocations across local governments only for excludable benefit programs. Using a hierarchical budgeting model, we argue these results provide credible evidence of the presence of clientelism rather than programmatic politics.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, POL；JEL：H40, H75, H76, O10, P48
papers.zh_title: 选民如何回应福利项目与公共品项目？政治庇护主义的理论与证据
papers.zh_abstract: 利用西孟加拉邦的农村家庭调查数据，我们发现选民对排他性的政府福利项目有积极回应，但对地方公共品项目则不然，尽管他们报告从两者中都受益。与这些投票模式一致，由外生村庄重新划分引起的选举竞争冲击，导致上级政府仅在排他性福利项目上操纵对地方政府的拨款。利用一个层级预算模型，我们认为这些结果为存在庇护主义而非纲领性政治提供了可信的证据。

papers.title: Declining Clientelism of Welfare Benefits? Targeting and Political Competition based Evidence from an Indian state
papers.authors: Pushkar Maitra, Sandip Mitra, Dilip Mookherjee, Sujata Visaria
papers.abstract: It has been argued that since 2014, under the BJP-led central government, welfare benefits in India have become better targeted and less prone to clientelistic control by state and local governments. Arguably this has helped to increase the vote share of the BJP vis-a-vis regional parties. We test these hypotheses using longitudinal data from 3500 rural households in the state of West Bengal. We fail to find evidence that the new “central” programs introduced after 2014 were better targeted than traditional “state” programs, or that the targeting of state programs improved after 2014. Households receiving the new “central” benefits introduced since 2014 were more likely to switch their political support to the BJP. However, changes in the scale, composition or targeting of these programs, in clientelistic effectiveness of traditional state programs or in household incomes, fail to account for the large observed increase in the voters' support for the BJP. Non-Hindus, especially recent immigrant non-Hindus, were much less likely to switch support to the BJP, even after controlling for benefits received and changes in household incomes. Our results suggest that ideology and identity politics were more important factors explaining the rising popularity of the BJP.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, POL；JEL：H53, H75, O17, O23, P43
papers.zh_title: 福利项目庇护主义的衰落？基于印度一个邦的瞄准与政治竞争证据
papers.zh_abstract: 有人认为，自2014年以来，在印度人民党领导的中央政府下，印度的福利项目瞄准性更好，且不易受邦和地方政府庇护主义控制。这据称有助于提高印度人民党相对于地区政党的得票率。我们利用西孟加拉邦3500个农村家庭的纵向数据检验这些假设。我们没有发现证据表明2014年后引入的新“中央”项目比传统的“邦”项目瞄准性更好，或者邦项目的瞄准性在2014年后有所改善。获得2014年以来新“中央”福利的家庭更有可能将政治支持转向印度人民党。然而，这些项目规模、构成或瞄准性的变化、传统邦项目庇护主义有效性的变化或家庭收入的变化，都无法解释观察到的选民对印度人民党支持的大幅增加。非印度教徒，尤其是近期移民的非印度教徒，转向支持印度人民党的可能性要小得多，即使在控制了获得的福利和家庭收入变化之后也是如此。我们的结果表明，意识形态和身份政治是解释印度人民党日益受欢迎的更重要的因素。

papers.title: Robust Content Moderation: Theory and Applications
papers.authors: Scott Duke Kominers, Jesse M. Shapiro
papers.abstract: A sender sends a signal about a state to a receiver who takes an action that determines a payoff. A moderator can block, flag, or even modify the sender’s signal before it reaches the receiver—but the moderator cannot control how the receiver will act on what they see. Classic results imply that the only way that the moderator can robustly change the outcome is by removing information. We show why robustness is a sensible criterion, when a moderator would want to remove information, and how the problem changes when the sender’s signal can depend on the moderator’s policy. We develop applications to social media content moderation, state censorship, “flooding the zone,” and AI filtering.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, POL, PR；JEL：D47, D82, D83, L82, L86

papers.title: Information-Based Pricing in Specialized Lending
papers.authors: Kristian Blickle, Zhiguo He, Jing Huang, Cecilia Parlatore
papers.abstract: We study specialized lending in a credit market competition model with private information. Two banks, equipped with similar data processing systems, possess general signals regarding the borrowers quality; the specialized bank, has access to an additional specialized signal. We study equilibria in which both lenders use general signals to screen loan applications. Conditional on making an offer, the specialized lender prices loans based on its specialized signal. This private-information-based pricing helps explain why loans made by specialized lenders have lower interest rates (lower winning bids) and better ex-post performance (fewer non-performing loans), which we support with robust empirical evidence.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, IO, PR；JEL：D43, D44, D82, G21, G23, L10
papers.zh_title: 专业化贷款中的信息定价
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在一个具有私人信息的信贷市场竞争模型中研究专业化贷款。两家银行配备相似的数据处理系统，拥有关于借款人质量的一般信号；专业化银行还能获得额外的专业化信号。我们研究了两种贷款人都使用一般信号筛选贷款申请的均衡。在提供报价的条件下，专业化贷款人根据其专业化信号对贷款进行定价。这种基于私人信息的定价有助于解释为什么专业化贷款人发放的贷款利率更低（中标价更低）且事后表现更好（不良贷款更少），我们通过稳健的实证证据支持了这一点。

papers.title: Gender Differences in Negotiations and Labor Market Outcomes: Evidence from an Information Intervention with College Students
papers.authors: Patricia Cortés, Jacob French, Jessica Pan, Basit Zafar
papers.abstract: We assess the role of information gaps in understanding gender differences in negotiation behavior by conducting a randomized information experiment on the 2018 to 2020 graduating cohorts of undergraduate business majors from Boston University. Prior to starting their job search, treated students were provided with objective information about the gender gap in negotiation among their peers along with the earnings changes conditional on negotiating. We find sizable immediate effects on negotiation intentions that persist to actual negotiation behavior, particularly for men. While the treatment affects women's negotiation behavior through belief-updating, the effects on men's behavior are primarily through increased salience of the information. Further, we find some evidence that gender-specific treatment spillovers likely contribute to the smaller average treatment effects on behavior for women. Overall, our findings suggest that such information interventions can help to nudge women who have potentially large financial returns to negotiation to realize these gains.
papers.zh_title: 谈判中的性别差异与劳动力市场结果：来自大学生信息干预的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过对波士顿大学2018至2020届本科商科毕业生进行随机信息实验，评估信息差距在理解谈判行为性别差异中的作用。在开始求职前，受处理的学生获得了关于同龄人中谈判性别差距以及谈判后收入变化的客观信息。我们发现这对谈判意图产生了显著的即时影响，并持续到实际谈判行为，尤其是对男性而言。虽然处理通过信念更新影响了女性的谈判行为，但对男性行为的影响主要是通过提高信息的显著性。此外，我们发现一些证据表明，特定性别的处理溢出效应可能导致了女性行为平均处理效应的减小。总体而言，我们的发现表明，此类信息干预有助于推动那些可能从谈判中获得巨大财务回报的女性实现这些收益。

papers.title: Taxing Top Wealth: Migration Responses and their Aggregate Economic Implications
papers.authors: Katrine Jakobsen, Henrik Kleven, Jonas Kolsrud, Camille Landais, Mathilde Muñoz
papers.abstract: Using administrative data from Scandinavian countries, we provide evidence on international migration responses to wealth taxes and evaluate their aggregate economic implications. We find significant migration responses among the wealthy: a 1pp increase in the top wealth tax rate decreases the stock of wealthy taxpayers by about 2%. A large fraction of the wealthy are business owners, and their businesses are negatively affected by owner out-migration. The aggregate effects are nevertheless modest: the migration responses to a 1pp increase in the top wealth tax rate reduce employment by 0.02%, investments by 0.07%, and value-added by 0.10%.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, LS, PE, PR；JEL：D31, E21, H20, H31, L26
papers.zh_title: 对顶层财富征税：移民反应及其总体经济影响
papers.zh_abstract: 利用斯堪的纳维亚国家的行政数据，我们提供了关于国际移民对财富税反应的证据，并评估了其总体经济影响。我们发现富人有显著的移民反应：最高财富税率提高1个百分点会使富裕纳税人的存量减少约2%。很大一部分富人是企业主，他们的企业受到所有者外迁的负面影响。然而，总体影响是适度的：最高财富税率提高1个百分点所引发的移民反应使就业减少0.02%，投资减少0.07%，增加值减少0.10%。

papers.title: Smooth Diagnostic Expectations
papers.authors: Francesco Bianchi, Cosmin L. Ilut, Hikaru Saijo
papers.abstract: We introduce “smooth diagnosticity.” Under smooth diagnosticity, agents over-react to new information defined as the difference between the current information set and a previous information set. Since new information typically changes not just the conditional mean, but also the conditional uncertainty, changes in uncertainty surrounding current and past beliefs affect the severity of the Diagnostic Expectations (DE) distortion. Smooth DE nests the baseline DE of Bordalo et al. (2018) and implies a joint and parsimonious micro-foundation for various properties of survey data: (1) over-reaction of conditional mean to news, (2) stronger over-reaction for weaker signals and longer forecast horizons, and (3) over-confidence in subjective uncertainty. We embed Smooth DE in an analytical RBC model. The model accounts for over-reaction and over-confidence in surveys, as well as three salient properties of the business cycle: (1) asymmetry, (2) countercyclical micro volatility, and (3) countercyclical macro volatility.
papers.zh_title: 平滑诊断性预期
papers.zh_abstract: 我们引入了“平滑诊断性”概念。在平滑诊断性下，经济主体对定义为当前信息集与先前信息集之差的新信息反应过度。由于新信息通常不仅改变条件均值，还改变条件不确定性，围绕当前和过去信念的不确定性变化会影响诊断性预期（DE）扭曲的严重程度。平滑DE嵌套了Bordalo等人（2018）的基准DE，并为调查数据的各种特性提供了一个联合且简约的微观基础：（1）条件均值对新闻的反应过度；（2）对于较弱的信号和较长的预测期限，反应过度更强；（3）主观不确定性中的过度自信。我们将平滑DE嵌入一个分析性的真实商业周期（RBC）模型中。该模型解释了调查中的反应过度和过度自信，以及商业周期的三个显著特性：（1）非对称性；（2）逆周期的微观波动性；（3）逆周期的宏观波动性。

papers.title: The Essential Role of Altruism in Medical Decision Making
papers.authors: Paul Gertler, Ada Kwan
papers.abstract: Patients rely on medical care providers to act in their best interests because providers understand disease pathology and appropriate treatment much better than patients. Providers, however, not only give advice (diagnose) but also deliver (sell) treatments based on that advice. This creates a moral hazard dilemma where provider financial interests can diverge from patient interests, especially when providers are motivated more by profits than by altruism. We investigate how profit motivated versus altruistic preferences influence medical care decision making in the context of malaria in Kenya. We measured the appropriateness of care using data from an audit study that employed standardized patients (SP) who were trained to present as real patients the identical clinical case scenario to providers. The SPs were confirmed to be malaria negative before and after field work with a very reliable and sensitive blood test at a high-quality laboratory. We measured provider preferences using a lab in the field, real stakes, modified version of the dictator game. We find that more profit-motivated providers report higher rates of false-positive malaria test results than do more altruistic providers. Specifically, purely profit motivated providers report 30 percentage points more positives than providers who are altruistically motivated, and providers likely knew that the positive results that they reported to their patients were false. We also find that more profit motivated providers sold more unnecessary antimalarial drugs than did more altruistic providers. Based on mediation analysis, more profit-oriented providers sold more drugs not only because they knowingly reported more false positives, but also because they promoted drugs sales more conditional on a positive test result. Thus, profit motivated providers seem to have misrepresented test results to sell more unnecessary malaria-related drugs.
papers.zh_title: 利他主义在医疗决策中的关键作用
papers.zh_abstract: 患者依赖医疗服务提供者为其最佳利益行事，因为提供者比患者更了解疾病病理和适当治疗。然而，提供者不仅提供建议（诊断），还基于该建议提供（销售）治疗。这造成了一个道德风险困境，即提供者的财务利益可能与患者利益相背离，尤其是当提供者更多地受利润而非利他主义驱动时。我们以肯尼亚的疟疾为背景，研究了利润驱动与利他主义偏好如何影响医疗决策。我们使用来自审计研究的数据衡量了护理的适当性，该研究采用了标准化病人（SP），他们经过培训，以真实患者身份向提供者呈现相同的临床病例场景。SP在实地工作前后均通过高质量实验室中非常可靠且灵敏的血液检测确认为疟疾阴性。我们使用实验室实地实验、真实赌注、修改版的独裁者游戏来衡量提供者偏好。我们发现，与更利他的提供者相比，更受利润驱动的提供者报告的假阳性疟疾检测结果率更高。具体而言，纯粹利润驱动的提供者报告的阳性结果比利他驱动的提供者高出30个百分点，并且提供者可能知道他们向患者报告的阳性结果是假的。我们还发现，更受利润驱动的提供者比更利他的提供者销售了更多不必要的抗疟药物。基于中介分析，更以利润为导向的提供者销售更多药物，不仅因为他们故意报告更多假阳性结果，还因为他们在检测结果阳性后更积极地促进药物销售。因此，利润驱动的提供者似乎歪曲了检测结果，以销售更多不必要的疟疾相关药物。

papers.title: Trade War and Peace: U.S.-China Trade and Tariff Risk from 2015–2050
papers.authors: George A. Alessandria, Shafaat Y. Khan, Armen Khederlarian, Kim J. Ruhl, Joseph B. Steinberg
papers.abstract: We model trade policy as a Markov process. Using a dynamic exporting model, we estimate how expectations about U.S. tariffs on China have changed around the U.S.-China trade war. We find (i) no increase in the likelihood of a trade war before 2018; (ii) the trade war was initially expected to end quickly but its expected duration grew substantially after 2020; and (iii) the trade war reduced the likelihood that China would face Non-Normal Trade Relations tariffs in the future. Our findings imply the expected mean future U.S. tariff on China rose more under President Biden than under President Trump.
papers.zh_title: 贸易战与和平：2015–2050年的美中贸易与关税风险
papers.zh_abstract: 我们将贸易政策建模为一个马尔可夫过程。使用一个动态出口模型，我们估计了围绕美中贸易战，美国对中国关税的预期如何变化。我们发现：（i）2018年之前贸易战的可能性没有增加；（ii）贸易战最初预计会很快结束，但其预期持续时间在2020年后大幅增长；（iii）贸易战降低了中国未来面临非正常贸易关系关税的可能性。我们的发现意味着，在拜登总统任期内，美国对中国未来平均关税的预期上升幅度超过了特朗普总统任期。

papers.title: A Cognitive Foundation for Perceiving Uncertainty
papers.authors: J. Aislinn Bohren, Josh Hascher, Alex Imas, Michael Ungeheuer, Martin Weber
papers.abstract: We propose a framework where perceptions of uncertainty are driven by the interaction between cognitive constraints and the way that people learn about it—whether information is presented sequentially or simultaneously. People can learn about uncertainty by observing the distribution of outcomes all at once (e.g., seeing a stock return distribution) or sampling outcomes from the relevant distribution sequentially (e.g., experiencing a series of stock returns). Limited attention leads to the overweighting of unlikely but salient events—the dominant force when learning from simultaneous information—whereas imperfect recall leads to the underweighting of such events—the dominant force when learning sequentially. A series of studies show that, when learning from simultaneous information, people are overoptimistic about and are attracted to assets that mostly underperform, but sporadically exhibit large outperformance. However, they overwhelmingly select more consistently outperforming assets when learning the same information sequentially, and this is reflected in beliefs. The entire 40-percentage point preference reversal appears to be driven by limited attention and memory; manipulating these factors completely eliminates the effect of the learning environment on choices and beliefs, and can even reverse it.
papers.zh_title: 感知不确定性的认知基础
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个框架，其中不确定性感知由认知约束与人们学习方式（信息是顺序呈现还是同时呈现）之间的相互作用驱动。人们可以通过同时观察结果分布（例如，看到股票收益分布）或从相关分布中顺序抽样结果（例如，经历一系列股票收益）来了解不确定性。有限注意力导致对不太可能但显著事件的过度加权——这是从同时信息中学习时的主导力量；而不完美记忆导致对此类事件的低加权——这是顺序学习时的主导力量。一系列研究表明，当从同时信息中学习时，人们对那些大多表现不佳但偶尔表现出巨大超额收益的资产过度乐观并被其吸引。然而，当以相同信息顺序学习时，他们压倒性地选择表现更一致的资产，这反映在信念中。整个40个百分点的偏好逆转似乎是由有限注意力和记忆驱动的；操纵这些因素完全消除了学习环境对选择和信念的影响，甚至可能逆转它。

papers.title: Understanding the Demand-Side of an Illegal Market: Prohibition of Menthol Cigarettes
papers.authors: Donald S. Kenkel, Alan D. Mathios, Grace N. Phillips, Revathy Suryanarayana, Hua Wang, Sen Zeng
papers.abstract: The Food and Drug Administration has proposed to prohibit menthol cigarettes, which are smoked by almost 19 million people in the U.S. Illegal markets for menthol cigarettes could not only blunt the prohibition’s intended consequence to reduce smoking but could also lead to unintended consequences. We use data from a discrete choice experiment to estimate a mixed logit model which predicts that the prohibition of menthol cigarettes would substantially increase the fraction of menthol smokers who attempt to quit. However, our model also predicts a substantial potential consumer demand for illegal menthol cigarettes. Depending on the impact of illegality on product prices, our model predicts the potential demand-side of an illegal market for menthol cigarettes could be 59-92 percent the size of the status quo market if menthol e-cigarettes are legal, and 69-100 percent the size of the status quo market if menthol e-cigarettes are also illegal. Our mixed logit model estimated in willingness to pay space implies that the mean WTP to avoid an illegal retail market is equivalent to a tax of $8.44 per pack. In our partial cost-benefit analysis, the opportunity costs of prohibition exceed the value of the reduction in mortality risks from secondhand smoke by $15.4 billion annually.
papers.zh_title: 理解非法市场的需求侧：薄荷醇香烟禁令
papers.zh_abstract: 美国食品药品监督管理局已提议禁止薄荷醇香烟，美国近1900万人吸食这种香烟。薄荷醇香烟的非法市场不仅可能削弱禁令减少吸烟的预期效果，还可能导致意外后果。我们使用来自离散选择实验的数据估计了一个混合logit模型，该模型预测，禁止薄荷醇香烟将大幅增加尝试戒烟的薄荷醇吸烟者比例。然而，我们的模型也预测了对非法薄荷醇香烟的潜在消费者需求巨大。根据非法性对产品价格的影响，我们的模型预测，如果薄荷醇电子烟合法，非法薄荷醇香烟市场的潜在需求侧规模可能是现状市场的59-92%；如果薄荷醇电子烟也非法，则可能是现状市场的69-100%。我们在支付意愿空间中估计的混合logit模型意味着，避免非法零售市场的平均支付意愿相当于每包8.44美元的税收。在我们的部分成本效益分析中，禁令的机会成本每年超过二手烟死亡风险降低价值的154亿美元。

papers.title: Misallocation and Asset Prices
papers.authors: Winston Wei Dou, Yan Ji, Di Tian, Pengfei Wang
papers.abstract: We develop an endogenous growth model with heterogeneous firms facing financial frictions, where capital misallocation emerges as a key endogenous state variable. Misallocation is endogenously driven by transitory aggregate liquidity shocks, as firms with different productivity levels respond differently to the same shock by optimally adjusting capacity utilization. Financial frictions and persistent idiosyncratic productivity make capital reallocation gradual, leading to slow-moving misallocation that drives time-series variation in low-frequency economic growth and serves as a source of systematic risk in asset markets. This mechanism operates through a feedback loop induced by the valuation channel: persistent misallocation elevates risk premia, which depresses the marginal q of intangible capital and reduces R&D incentives. The resulting decline in expected long-run growth and rise in macroeconomic volatility further amplifies risk premia under recursive preferences. We provide empirical evidence that capital misallocation captures low-frequency growth fluctuations and present supporting tests that confirm the model’s key predictions.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IO, PR；JEL：L11, O30, O40
papers.zh_title: 资源错配与资产价格
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个内生增长模型，其中包含面临金融摩擦的异质性企业，资本错配作为一个关键的内生状态变量出现。错配由暂时的总体流动性冲击内生驱动，因为不同生产率水平的企业通过最优调整产能利用率对相同冲击做出不同反应。金融摩擦和持久的异质性生产率使资本重新配置缓慢，导致缓慢移动的错配，驱动低频经济增长的时间序列变化，并成为资产市场中系统性风险的来源。这一机制通过估值渠道引发的反馈循环运作：持续的错配提升风险溢价，从而抑制无形资本的边际q值并降低研发激励。由此导致的预期长期增长下降和宏观经济波动上升，在递归偏好下进一步放大了风险溢价。我们提供了经验证据，表明资本错配捕捉了低频增长波动，并提供了支持性检验，证实了模型的关键预测。

papers.title: Data, Privacy Laws and Firm Production: Evidence from the GDPR
papers.authors: Mert Demirer, Diego J. Jiménez Hernández, Dean Li, Sida Peng
papers.abstract: By regulating how firms collect and use data, privacy laws may alter firm demand for information technology inputs. We study how firms respond to privacy laws in the context of the EU’s General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) by using seven years of data from a global cloud-computing provider. Our difference-in-difference estimates indicate that, in response to the GDPR, EU firms decreased data storage by 26% and data processing by 15% relative to comparable US firms, becoming less "data-intensive." To estimate the costs of the GDPR for firms, we propose and estimate a production function where firms combine data and computation in firm production. We find that data and computation are strong complements and that firm responses are consistent with the GDPR, representing a 22% increase in the cost of data. This increase translates into only a 0.1–0.6% rise in overall production costs because data plays a relatively small role in firm production compared to computation.
papers.zh_title: 数据、隐私法与厂商生产：来自GDPR的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 通过规范企业收集和使用数据的方式，隐私法可能改变企业对信息技术投入的需求。我们以欧盟《通用数据保护条例》（GDPR）为背景，利用来自一家全球云计算提供商七年的数据，研究企业如何应对隐私法。我们的双重差分估计表明，相对于可比的美国企业，欧盟企业在应对GDPR时，数据存储减少了26%，数据处理减少了15%，变得不那么“数据密集型”。为了估计GDPR对企业的成本，我们提出并估计了一个生产函数，其中企业在生产中结合数据和计算。我们发现数据和计算是强互补品，并且企业的反应与GDPR一致，代表着数据成本增加了22%。由于数据在企业生产中的作用相对于计算较小，这一增加仅导致总生产成本上升0.1-0.6%。

papers.title: Climate Change, Population Growth, and Population Pressure
papers.authors: J. Vernon Henderson, Bo Yeon Jang, Adam Storeygard, David N. Weil
papers.abstract: We develop a novel method for assessing the effect of constraints imposed by spatially-fixed natural resources on aggregate economic output. We apply it to estimate and compare the projected effects of climate change and population growth over the course of the 21st century, by country and globally. We find that standard population growth projections imply larger reductions in income than even the most extreme widely-adopted climate change scenario (RCP8.5). Further, climate change and population growth will have their most damaging effects in similar places. Relative to previous work on macro climate impacts, our approach has the advantages of being disciplined by a simple macro growth model that allows for adaptation and of assessing impacts via a large set of climate moments, not just annual average temperature and precipitation. Our estimated effects of climate are by construction independent of country-level factors such as institutions.
papers.zh_title: 气候变化、人口增长与人口压力
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一种新方法，用于评估空间固定的自然资源约束对总体经济产出的影响。我们应用该方法，按国家和全球层面，估计并比较了21世纪气候变化和人口增长的预期影响。我们发现，标准的人口增长预测意味着收入减少幅度甚至超过最极端且被广泛采用的气候变化情景（RCP8.5）。此外，气候变化和人口增长将在相似的地方产生最具破坏性的影响。与以往关于宏观气候影响的研究相比，我们的方法具有以下优势：受一个允许适应的简单宏观增长模型的约束，并通过大量气候矩（而不仅仅是年平均温度和降水）来评估影响。我们估计的气候效应，按构建方式，独立于制度等国家层面因素。

papers.title: Labor Migration, Capital Accumulation, and the Structure of Rural Labor Markets
papers.authors: Taryn Dinkelman, Grace Kumchulesi, Martine Mariotti
papers.abstract: Between 1967 and 1974, a bilateral treaty increased circular labor migration from Malawi to South Africa by 200%, bringing over 53 million USD in earnings into origin communities. A deadly migrant worker plane crash in 1974 ended these flows and led to migrant repatriation. We study how this shock affected local labor markets. In regions receiving more migrant capital after the crash, workers, particularly women, shifted from farming into non-farm work over thirty years. Investments in non-farm physical and human capital contribute to these sectoral changes. This natural experiment shows that temporary capital inflows can permanently reshape rural labor markets.
papers.zh_title: 劳动力迁移、资本积累与农村劳动力市场结构
papers.zh_abstract: 1967年至1974年间，一项双边条约使从马拉维到南非的循环劳动力迁移增加了200%，为原籍社区带来了超过5300万美元的收入。1974年一场致命的 migrant 工人飞机失事终止了这些流动并导致 migrant 遣返。我们研究了这一冲击如何影响当地劳动力市场。在空难后接收更多 migrant 资本的地区，工人（尤其是女性）在三十多年间从农业转向非农工作。对非农物质资本和人力资本的投资促进了这些部门变化。这一自然实验表明，临时性资本流入可以永久性地重塑农村劳动力市场。

papers.title: Technology Regulation Reconsidered: The Effects of Certificate of Need Policies on the Quantity and Quality of Diagnostic Imaging
papers.authors: Jill Horwitz, Austin Nichols, Carrie H. Colla, David M. Cutler
papers.abstract: Estimates of the impact of Certificate of Need laws on medical care have been inconsistent, possibly because not all CON laws apply to all services. Using an original dataset identifying imaging-related CON laws, we estimate the effects of CON on CT and MRI, using regression discontinuities at state borders. Medicare beneficiaries in regulated states are slightly less likely to receive any image and considerably less likely to receive low-value imaging than beneficiaries in non-regulated states. High-value imaging is either unaffected or declines much less. Overall, CON reduces low value care and largely leaves high value care unaffected.
papers.zh_title: 技术监管再思考：需求证明政策对诊断影像数量和质量的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 关于需求证明法律对医疗保健影响的估计结果一直不一致，可能因为并非所有CON法律都适用于所有服务。利用一个识别影像相关CON法律的原始数据集，我们使用州界上的断点回归估计了CON对CT和MRI的影响。受监管州的医疗保险受益人与非监管州的受益人相比，接受任何影像检查的可能性略低，而接受低价值影像检查的可能性则低得多。高价值影像要么不受影响，要么下降幅度小得多。总体而言，CON减少了低价值医疗服务，并在很大程度上使高价值医疗服务不受影响。

papers.title: Invoice Currency Choice in Intra-Firm Trade: A Transaction-Level Analysis of Japanese Automobile Exports
papers.authors: Taiyo Yoshimi, Uraku Yoshimoto, Kiyotaka Sato, Takatoshi Ito, Junko Shimizu, Yushi Yoshida
papers.abstract: This study empirically investigates how the invoice currency choice differs between intra-firm and arm’s-length exports. We also examine whether other firm- and product-level characteristics affect the choice of invoice currency. This study is the first to be granted access to highly disaggregated transaction-level trade data for Japan. Focusing on Japanese automobile exports to France, we demonstrate that the importer’s currency tends to be chosen in intra-firm export invoicing based on a panel logit estimation. Our empirical findings remain robust when different types of intra-firm export variables and other conventional explanatory variables are introduced, such as firm and product market share, exchange rate volatility, euro-invoiced imports, labor productivity, and research and development intensity. Given growing intra-firm trade and expanding global value chains, Japanese parent firms tend to invoice in the importers’ currency, assuming the foreign exchange risk that arises from intra-firm trade. Thus, exchange rate risk management is a significant consideration for Japanese parent firms.
papers.zh_title: 公司内部贸易中的发票货币选择：基于日本汽车出口交易层面的分析
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究实证调查了公司内部出口与公平交易出口之间发票货币选择的差异。我们还考察了其他企业和产品层面的特征是否影响发票货币的选择。本研究是首个获准访问日本高度细化的交易层面贸易数据的研究。聚焦于日本对法国的汽车出口，我们基于面板logit估计证明，在公司内部出口发票中倾向于选择进口商货币。当引入不同类型的公司内部出口变量和其他传统解释变量（如企业和产品市场份额、汇率波动性、欧元计价进口、劳动生产率和研发强度）时，我们的实证结果依然稳健。鉴于公司内部贸易的增长和全球价值链的扩展，日本母公司倾向于以进口商货币开具发票，承担公司内部贸易产生的外汇风险。因此，汇率风险管理是日本母公司的一个重要考量。

papers.title: How Managers Can Use Purchaser Performance Information to Improve Procurement Efficiency
papers.authors: Pablo A. Celhay, Paul Gertler, Marcelo Olivares, Raimundo Undurraga
