papers.zh_abstract: 产业政策应如何引导以减少扭曲并促进经济发展？我们在一个包含技术采用的多部门模型中研究这一问题，其中商品和现代技术的生产具有丰富的网络结构。我们提供了部门政策乘数的简单公式，并深入分析了不同政策工具的有效性。我们设计了一个简单的程序来估计模型参数以及技术在各部门的分布，并将其应用于印度数据。我们发现，技术采用极大地放大了乘数的规模，并改变了产业政策优先部门的排序。此外，我们发现采用补贴是促进经济发展最具成本效益的工具。

papers.title: Toward an Understanding of the Returns to Cognitive Skill Across Cohorts
papers.authors: Judith K. Hellerstein, Sai Luo, Sergio S. Urzúa
papers.abstract: Recent research concludes that wage returns to cognitive skill have declined in the U.S. We reassess this finding. Using decomposition methods, we document the pivotal role played by dynamic shifts in the distributions of pre-labor market cognitive skill. These shifts explain the declining estimated returns, especially for white men. We discard measurement error as an explanation. Although often overlooked, grappling with changing pre-labor market skill distributions is necessary for capturing the evolution of their labor market returns. This may prove especially important in the future, given continuing changes in skill development in recent youth cohorts.

papers.title: The Market and Climate Implications of U.S. LNG Exports
papers.authors: James H. Stock, Matthew Zaragoza-Watkins
papers.abstract: From 2015 to 2023, the United States transformed from a net importer of natural gas to the world's largest liquified natural gas (LNG) exporter. We find that this surge in LNG exports has reconnected U.S. gas prices to world market prices, after a hiatus of “shut-in” fracked gas. We estimate that the domestic gas price effect of this recoupling is comparable to a $30/ton carbon tax. For coal prices, which are coupled to gas through competition in the power sector, this effect is comparable to a $20/ton carbon tax. Using the NREL ReEDS model, we estimate that this recoupling reduces U.S. 2030 power sector CO2 emissions by roughly 145 million metric tons. These domestic estimates contribute to estimating the overall climate impact of LNG exports.
papers.zh_title: 美国液化天然气出口的市场与气候影响
papers.zh_abstract: 从2015年到2023年，美国从天然气净进口国转变为全球最大的液化天然气出口国。我们发现，液化天然气出口的激增重新将美国天然气价格与世界市场价格联系起来，此前经历了“封存”压裂天然气的间歇期。我们估计，这种重新耦合对国内天然气价格的影响相当于每吨30美元的碳税。对于煤炭价格而言，由于电力部门中煤炭与天然气通过竞争相互关联，这种影响相当于每吨20美元的碳税。利用NREL ReEDS模型，我们估计这种重新耦合将使美国2030年电力部门的二氧化碳排放量减少约1.45亿公吨。这些国内估算有助于评估液化天然气出口的整体气候影响。

papers.title: Losing Medicaid and Crime
papers.authors: Monica Deza, Thanh Lu, Johanna Catherine Maclean, Alberto Ortega
papers.abstract: We study the impact of losing health insurance on crime by leveraging one of the most substantial Medicaid disenrollments in U.S. history, which occurred in Tennessee in 2005 and led to 170,000 adults unexpectedly losing coverage. Using police agency-level data and a difference-in-differences approach, we find that this mass insurance loss reduced Medicaid enrollment and increased total crime rates with particularly strong effects for non-violent crime. An analysis of mechanisms suggests that the disenrollment had aggregate effects that extended beyond insurance losses. In particular, we show that the policy shock lead to changes in economic stability, healthcare access and health outcomes, and government spending, all of which could have contributed to the increase in crime we document.
papers.zh_title: 失去医疗补助与犯罪
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用美国历史上最大规模的医疗补助取消事件之一来研究失去健康保险对犯罪的影响，该事件于2005年在田纳西州发生，导致17万成年人意外失去保险。通过使用警察机构层面的数据和双重差分方法，我们发现，这种大规模的保险损失减少了医疗补助的参保率，并提高了总体犯罪率，对非暴力犯罪的影响尤为显著。对机制的分析表明，取消保险产生了超出保险损失本身的总体效应。具体而言，我们显示，这一政策冲击导致了经济稳定性、医疗保健可及性、健康结果以及政府支出的变化，所有这些都可能促成了我们所记录的犯罪增加。

papers.title: Fallow Lengths and the Structure of Property Rights
papers.authors: Etienne Le Rossignol, Sara Lowes, Eduardo Montero
papers.abstract: We study a fundamental institution in many societies: the structure of property rights over land. Across societies, communal land rights have been more common than private land rights. We test the hypothesis that longer fallow requirements – the time needed to leave land uncultivated to restore fertility based on ecological features of the soil and climate – led to a higher prevalence of communal property rights. Longer fallow requirements generate higher protection costs and therefore make communal rights more beneficial. We construct an ecological measure of the optimal fallow length for the most suitable staple crop across grid cells globally based on soil type, temperature, and climate. We find that places where land needs to be fallowed for longer periods are more likely to have communal property rights both historically and presently. We then examine the implications for efforts to title land. Using World Bank project ratings and academic impact evaluations, we find that land interventions are less effective and positive estimated impacts are systematically less common in settings with longer fallow requirements, suggesting a mismatch between development policy and the underlying context. Our results provide insights into the origins of property rights structures and the importance of aligning development policies with the cultural and institutional setting.
papers.zh_title: 休耕期与产权结构
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了许多社会中的一项基本制度：土地产权结构。在不同社会中，共有土地权利比私有土地权利更为普遍。我们检验了以下假设：更长的休耕要求——即根据土壤和气候的生态特征，土地需要闲置以恢复肥力的时间——导致了共有产权制度的更高普及率。更长的休耕要求会产生更高的保护成本，从而使共有权利更加有利。我们基于土壤类型、温度和气候，构建了一个全球网格单元上最适合主粮作物的最优休耕长度的生态指标。我们发现，历史上和当前，土地需要休耕更长时间的地区更可能拥有共有产权制度。然后，我们考察了这对土地确权努力的影响。利用世界银行项目评级和学术影响评估，我们发现，在休耕要求更长的环境中，土地干预措施效果较差，且正面估计影响系统性较少，这表明发展政策与基本背景之间存在错配。我们的结果为产权制度的起源以及使发展政策与文化制度环境保持一致的重要性提供了见解。

papers.title: Corporate Debt, Boom-Bust Cycles, and Financial Crises
papers.authors: Victoria Ivashina, Ṣebnem Kalemli-Özcan, Luc Laeven, Karsten Müller
papers.abstract: Using a new dataset on sectoral credit exposures in 114 economies from 1940 to 2014, we provide evidence that corporate debt plays a key role in explaining macroeconomic boom-bust cycles, financial crises, and sluggish recoveries. We find that: (i) corporate debt accounts for two-thirds of aggregate credit expansion and three-quarters of nonperforming loans during downturns; (ii) firm credit growth is linked to future crises more so when it is backed by pro-cyclical collateral; (iii) expansions in corporate debt predict crises, conditional on expansions in household credit; (iv) increasing dispersion in corporate credit also predicts financial crises, consistent with heterogeneous firm financial frictions; (v) financial crises following booms in corporate debt are associated with slower macro recoveries.
papers.zh_title: 企业债务、繁荣-萧条周期与金融危机
papers.zh_abstract: 利用1940年至2014年114个经济体部门信贷敞口的新数据集，我们提供了证据表明企业债务在解释宏观经济繁荣-萧条周期、金融危机和缓慢复苏中起着关键作用。我们发现：（i）企业债务占总体信贷扩张的三分之二，占经济下行期间不良贷款的四分之三；（ii）企业信贷增长与未来危机的关联更强，尤其是当它以顺周期抵押品为支撑时；（iii）企业债务的扩张在家庭信贷扩张的条件下能预测危机；（iv）企业信贷分散度的增加也能预测金融危机，这与异质性企业的金融摩擦一致；（v）企业债务繁荣之后的金融危机与更缓慢的宏观复苏相关。

papers.title: Health Shocks under Hospital Capacity Constraint: Evidence from Air Pollution in Sao Paulo, Brazil
papers.authors: Bruna Guidetti, Paula Pereda, Edson R. Severnini
papers.abstract: How responsive to health shocks are healthcare systems in the developing world? Developing countries are known to have both lower levels of hospital infrastructure and serious health shocks driven by air pollution. These shocks are transitory and may be marginal relative to other health demands, so healthcare systems might be able to manage them. On the other hand, with limited capacity hospitals may not be able to respond rapidly, possibly exacerbating health damages from pollution. In this study, we examine the consequences of health shocks induced by air pollution in a megacity in the developing world: Sao Paulo, Brazil. Using daily data on pediatric hospitalizations from 2015-2017, an instrumental variable approach based on wind speed, and a plausibly exogenous measure of hospital capacity constraints, we show that such transitory health shocks can disrupt healthcare services due to limited capacity, including for conditions seemingly unrelated to air pollution. Also, we cannot rule out severe deterioration of health outcomes.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, EEE, EH；JEL：I15, O13, Q53, Q56
papers.zh_title: 医院容量约束下的健康冲击：来自巴西圣保罗空气污染的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 发展中国家的医疗系统对健康冲击的反应程度如何？众所周知，发展中国家既面临较低的医院基础设施水平，又面临由空气污染引发的严重健康冲击。这些冲击是暂时的，且相对于其他健康需求可能微不足道，因此医疗系统或许能够应对。另一方面，由于容量有限，医院可能无法迅速响应，这可能会加剧污染对健康的损害。在本研究中，我们考察了发展中国家特大城市——巴西圣保罗——由空气污染引发的健康冲击的后果。利用2015-2017年儿科住院的每日数据、基于风速的工具变量方法以及一个看似外生的医院容量约束指标，我们表明，这种暂时性的健康冲击会因容量有限而扰乱医疗服务，包括那些看似与空气污染无关的疾病。此外，我们不能排除健康状况严重恶化的可能性。

papers.title: The Causal Effect of Parents’ Education on Children’s Earnings
papers.authors: Sang Yoon (Tim) Lee, Nicolas A. Roys, Ananth Seshadri
papers.abstract: We present a model of endogenous schooling and earnings to isolate the causal effect of parents’ education on children’s education and earnings outcomes. The model suggests that parents’ education is positively related to children’s earnings, but its relationship with children’s education is ambiguous. Identification is achieved by comparing the earnings of children with the same length of schooling, whose parents have different lengths of schooling. The model also features heterogeneous preferences for schooling, and is estimated using HRS data. The empirically observed positive OLS coefficient obtained by regressing children’s schooling on parents’ schooling is mainly accounted for by the correlation between parents’ schooling and children’s unobserved preferences for schooling. This is countered by a negative, structural relationship between parents’ and children’s schooling choices, resulting in an IV coefficient close to zero when exogenously increasing parents’ schooling. Nonetheless, an exogenous one-year increase in parents’ schooling increases children’s lifetime earnings by 1.2 percent on average.
papers.zh_title: 父母教育对子女收入的因果效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个内生性教育与收入模型，以分离父母教育对子女教育和收入结果的因果效应。该模型表明，父母教育与子女收入正相关，但其与子女教育的关系则不确定。识别是通过比较受教育年限相同但父母受教育年限不同的子女的收入来实现的。该模型还包含对教育的异质性偏好，并使用HRS数据进行估计。通过将子女受教育年限对父母受教育年限进行回归得到的经验上正的OLS系数，主要归因于父母受教育年限与子女未观测到的教育偏好之间的相关性。这被父母与子女教育选择之间的负向结构性关系所抵消，导致当外生增加父母受教育年限时，IV系数接近于零。尽管如此，父母受教育年限外生增加一年，会使子女的终生收入平均增加1.2%。

papers.title: Non-Binary Gender Economics
papers.authors: Katherine B. Coffman, Lucas C. Coffman, Keith Marzilli Ericson
papers.abstract: Economics research has largely overlooked non-binary individuals. We aim to jump-start the literature by providing data on several economically-important beliefs and preferences. Among many results, non-binary individuals report more gender-based discrimination and express different career and life aspirations, including less desire for children. Anti-non-binary sentiment is stronger than anti-LGBT sentiment, and strongest among men. Non-binary respondents report lower assertiveness than men and women, and their social preferences are similar to men’s and less prosocial than women’s, with age an important moderator. Elicited beliefs reveal inaccurate stereotypes as people often mistake the direction of group differences or exaggerate their size.
papers.zh_title: 非二元性别经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 经济学研究在很大程度上忽视了非二元性别个体。我们旨在通过提供若干经济上重要的信念和偏好数据来启动这一领域的研究。在众多结果中，非二元性别个体报告了更多的基于性别的歧视，并表达了不同的职业和生活抱负，包括较少的生育意愿。反非二元性别情绪强于反LGBT情绪，且在男性中最为强烈。非二元性别受访者报告的自信程度低于男性和女性，其社会偏好与男性相似，但比女性更少亲社会性，其中年龄是一个重要的调节因素。通过诱导出的信念揭示了不准确的刻板印象，因为人们常常误解群体差异的方向或夸大其规模。

papers.title: Are Supply Networks Efficiently Resilient?
papers.authors: Agostino Capponi, Chuan Du, Joseph E. Stiglitz
papers.abstract: We show that supply networks are inefficiently, and insufficiently, resilient. Upstream firms can adjust capacity investments to hedge against supply and demand shocks. However, the social benefits of such investments are not internalized, because of market incompleteness and market power. Upstream firms underinvest in resilience, passing on the costs to downstream firms, and drive trade excessively toward the spot markets. Policies designed to incentivize capacity investment, reduce reliance on spot markets, and enhance competition ameliorate the externality.
papers.meta: Programs：IO；JEL：D21, D24, D25, D43, D85, E23, L13
papers.zh_title: 供应链是否具有高效韧性？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们表明供应链的韧性既低效又不足。上游企业可以调整产能投资以对冲供给和需求冲击。然而，由于市场不完全性和市场势力，这类投资的社会效益并未被内部化。上游企业对韧性投资不足，将成本转嫁给下游企业，并过度推动贸易转向现货市场。旨在激励产能投资、减少对现货市场依赖以及增强竞争的政策可以改善这种外部性。

papers.title: Movies
papers.authors: Stelios Michalopoulos, Christopher Rauh
papers.abstract: Why are certain movies more successful in some markets than others? Are the entertainment products we consume reflective of our core values and beliefs? These questions drive our investigation into the relationship between a society’s oral tradition and the financial success of films. We combine a unique catalog of local tales, myths, and legends around the world with data on international movie screenings and revenues. First, we quantify the similarity between movies’ plots and traditional motifs employing machine learning techniques. Comparing the same movie across different markets, we establish that films that resonate more with local folklore systematically accrue higher revenue and are more likely to be screened. Second, we document analogous patterns within the US. Google Trends data reveal a pronounced interest in markets where ancestral narratives align more closely with a movie’s theme. Third, we delve into the explicit values transmitted by films, concentrating on the depiction of risk and gender roles. Films that promote risk-taking sell more in entrepreneurial societies today, rooted in traditions where characters pursue dangerous tasks successfully. Films portraying women in stereotypical roles continue to find a robust audience in societies with similar gender stereotypes in their folklore and where women today continue being relegated to subordinate positions. These findings underscore the enduring influence of traditional storytelling on entertainment patterns in the 21st century, highlighting a profound connection between movie consumption and deeply ingrained cultural narratives and values.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, POL；JEL：N0, O10, P0, Z00, Z1, Z10, Z11, Z13
papers.zh_title: 电影
papers.zh_abstract: 为什么某些电影在某些市场比其他市场更成功？我们消费的娱乐产品是否反映了我们的核心价值观和信仰？这些问题驱动我们研究社会口头传统与电影财务成功之间的关系。我们结合了全球各地地方故事、神话和传说的独特目录，以及国际电影放映和收入数据。首先，我们利用机器学习技术量化电影情节与传统主题之间的相似性。通过比较同一部电影在不同市场的表现，我们确定与当地民间传说更契合的电影系统性地获得更高收入，并且更有可能被放映。其次，我们在美国内部记录了类似的模式。谷歌趋势数据显示，在祖先叙事与电影主题更一致的市场中，兴趣显著更高。第三，我们深入探讨电影传递的明确价值观，重点关注风险描绘和性别角色。在当今创业型社会中，宣扬冒险的电影销量更高，这些社会根植于角色成功追求危险任务的传统。在民间传说中存在类似性别刻板印象、且女性至今仍被置于从属地位的社会中，描绘女性刻板角色的电影继续拥有强大的观众群。这些发现强调了传统叙事对21世纪娱乐模式的持久影响，突显了电影消费与根深蒂固的文化叙事和价值观之间的深刻联系。

papers.title: Navigating by Falling Stars: Monetary Policy with Fiscally Driven Natural Rates
papers.authors: Rodolfo G. Campos, Jesús Fernández-Villaverde, Galo Nuño, Peter Paz
papers.abstract: We study a new type of monetary-fiscal interaction in a heterogeneous-agent New Keynesian model with a fiscal block. Due to household heterogeneity, the stock of public debt affects the natural interest rate, forcing the central bank to adapt its monetary policy rule to the fiscal stance to guarantee that inflation remains at its target. There is, however, a minimum level of debt below which the steady-state inflation deviates from its target due to the zero lower bound on nominal rates. We analyze the response to a debt-financed fiscal expansion and quantify the impact of different timings in the adaptation of the monetary policy rule, as well as the performance of alternative monetary policy rules that do not require an assessment of the natural rates. We validate our findings with a series of empirical estimates.
papers.zh_title: 借流星导航：财政驱动自然利率下的货币政策
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在一个包含财政模块的异质性主体新凯恩斯模型中研究了一种新型货币-财政互动。由于家庭异质性，公共债务存量会影响自然利率，迫使中央银行调整其货币政策规则以适应财政立场，以确保通胀保持在目标水平。然而，存在一个最低债务水平，低于该水平时，由于名义利率的零下限，稳态通胀会偏离目标。我们分析了债务融资财政扩张的响应，量化了货币政策规则调整不同时机的影响，以及不需要评估自然利率的替代货币政策规则的表现。我们通过一系列实证估计验证了我们的发现。

papers.title: Weathering the Storm: Supply Chains and Climate Risk
papers.authors: Juanma Castro-Vincenzi, Gaurav Khanna, Nicolas Morales, Nitya Pandalai-Nayar
papers.abstract: We characterize how firms structure supply chains under climate risk. Using new data on the universe of firm-to-firm transactions from an Indian state, we show that firms diversify sourcing locations, and that suppliers exposed to climate risk charge lower prices. We develop a general equilibrium spatial model of firm input sourcing under climate risk. Firms diversify identical inputs from suppliers across space, trading off the probability of climate disruptions against higher input costs. We quantify the model using data on 271 Indian regions. Wages are inversely correlated with sourcing risk, giving rise to a cost minimization-resilience tradeoff. Supply chain diversification unambiguously reduces real wage volatility, but ambiguously affects their levels, as diversification may come with high input costs. While diversification mitigates climate risk, it exacerbates the distributional consequences of climate change by reducing wages in regions prone to frequent shocks.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, IFM, ITI；JEL：E0, F0, F10, F18, F40, F62
papers.zh_title: 抵御风暴：供应链与气候风险
papers.zh_abstract: 我们描述了企业在气候风险下如何构建供应链。利用来自印度一个邦的企业间交易全量新数据，我们表明企业会多样化采购地点，且面临气候风险的供应商会收取更低的价格。我们构建了一个气候风险下企业投入品采购的一般均衡空间模型。企业从不同空间的供应商处多样化采购相同投入品，在气候中断概率与更高投入成本之间进行权衡。我们利用271个印度地区的数据量化了该模型。工资与采购风险呈负相关，这产生了成本最小化与韧性之间的权衡。供应链多样化明确降低了实际工资波动性，但对其水平的影响不明确，因为多样化可能伴随高投入成本。虽然多样化减轻了气候风险，但它通过降低频繁遭受冲击地区居民的工资，加剧了气候变化带来的分配后果。

papers.title: The Feasibility of Using Bayh-Dole March-In Rights to Lower Drug Prices: An Update
papers.authors: Lisa Larrimore Ouellette, Bhaven N. Sampat
papers.abstract: In December 2023, the Biden-Harris Administration released a proposed framework for exercising government “march-in” rights on high-priced taxpayer-funded drugs. While both proponents and critics of the new rules view them as having broad scope, march-in rights can be exercised only on patents that result from federally funded research, and they can enable generic entry only if all patents on a drug were public-sector patents. In this paper, we examine the feasibility of using march-in rights to lower pharmaceutical prices by examining patents on drugs approved by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) from 1985 to 2022. Our primary analyses focus on the 883 new molecular entities with at least one patent listed in the FDA’s Orange Book since 1985. While 9 percent of these drugs have a public-sector patent, only 2.5 percent have only public-sector patents. While the new march-in rules could be a tool to lower prices for a few drugs, their overall impact on prices or expenditures will likely be limited. In addition to the updated analyses, we provide links to the data used in the analyses.
papers.zh_title: 利用Bayh-Dole法案介入权降低药品价格的可行性：最新更新
papers.zh_abstract: 2023年12月，拜登-哈里斯政府发布了一项拟议框架，旨在对高价纳税人资助的药品行使政府“介入”权。尽管新规则的支持者和批评者都认为其适用范围广泛，但介入权仅能针对由联邦资助研究产生的专利行使，并且只有当药品的所有专利都是公共部门专利时，才能实现仿制药进入。在本文中，我们通过检查1985年至2022年美国食品药品监督管理局批准的药品专利，考察了利用介入权降低药品价格的可行性。我们的主要分析聚焦于自1985年以来在FDA橙皮书中列有至少一项专利的883种新分子实体。虽然这些药品中有9%拥有一项公共部门专利，但仅有2.5%的药品专利全部来自公共部门。尽管新的介入规则可能成为降低少数药品价格的工具，但其对整体价格或支出的影响可能有限。除了更新分析外，我们还提供了分析所用数据的链接。

papers.title: Equilibrium Responses to Price Controls: A Supply-Chain Approach
papers.authors: Casey B. Mulligan
papers.abstract: Prices are regulated in many markets, ranging from healthcare to labor to telecommunications. This paper reinterprets the variables in the basic supply-demand model so that both product-definition and quantity are equilibrium outcomes. Specifically, compliance with price controls is achieved by altering the production-factor mix along the supply chain. This approach yields surprising insights into the incidence of price regulations and their effects on the amount of trade. Furthermore, it reveals how many of the short-run effects of price controls can be opposite of what they are in the long run. The supply-chain framework also easily represents business-to-business price controls, which have been more prevalent in policy practice than price-theoretic analysis.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, LE, LS, PE；JEL：D41, D57, K2, L51
papers.zh_title: 价格管制的均衡响应：一种供应链方法
papers.zh_abstract: 价格在许多市场中受到管制，范围从医疗保健到劳动力再到电信。本文重新解释了基本供需模型中的变量，使得产品定义和数量都是均衡结果。具体而言，通过沿供应链改变生产要素组合来实现对价格管制的合规。这种方法为价格管制的影响及其对贸易量的影响提供了令人惊讶的见解。此外，它揭示了价格管制的许多短期效应如何可能与其长期效应相反。供应链框架也易于表示企业间价格管制，这在政策实践中比价格理论分析更为普遍。

papers.title: Product Liability Litigation and Innovation: Evidence from Medical Devices
papers.authors: Alberto Galasso, Hong Luo
papers.abstract: We examine the relationship between product liability litigation and innovation by systematically combining data on product liability lawsuits with data on new product introductions in a panel dataset of leading medical device firms. We first document a decline in the propensity to introduce new products for both defendant firms and other firms operating in litigated device categories. This decline, however, does not spill over to other device categories, and we also do not find any slowing down in firms' patenting activities. We then show that changes in two features of the regulatory environment---(1) the availability of public information regarding adverse events and (2) federal law taking precedence over state law---substantially affect the likelihood of litigation. These changes also provide quasi-exogenous variations in litigation that confirm our baseline findings. Finally, we show that litigation appears to induce firms to develop safer devices. Overall, our findings suggest that product liability litigation affects the rate and direction of technological progress, and that safety regulation and liability regimes interact with one another in significant ways.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, LE, PR；JEL：K13, K41, L51, O32
papers.zh_title: 产品责任诉讼与创新：来自医疗器械的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过系统地将产品责任诉讼数据与领先医疗器械公司面板数据集中的新产品引入数据相结合，考察了产品责任诉讼与创新之间的关系。我们首先发现，对于被告公司以及在被诉讼的器械类别中运营的其他公司，引入新产品的倾向有所下降。然而，这种下降并未溢出到其他器械类别，我们也没有发现公司专利活动有任何放缓。然后，我们表明监管环境两个特征的变化——(1) 关于不良事件的公共信息的可用性，以及 (2) 联邦法律优先于州法律——显著影响诉讼的可能性。这些变化还提供了准外生的诉讼变化，证实了我们的基线发现。最后，我们表明诉讼似乎促使公司开发更安全的器械。总体而言，我们的发现表明产品责任诉讼影响技术进步的速率和方向，并且安全监管与责任制度之间存在显著的相互作用。

papers.title: Behavioral Sticky Prices
papers.authors: Sergio Rebelo, Miguel Santana, Pedro Teles
papers.abstract: We develop a model in which households make decisions using a dual-process framework. System 1 relies on fast, intuitive heuristics but is prone to error, while System 2 demands cognitive effort but yields more accurate decisions. Monopolistic firms can influence which system households engage through pricing. This strategic influence creates a novel source of price inertia. The model accounts for the ”rockets and feathers” phenomenon (prices rise quickly but fall slowly), explains why firms with unexpectedly high demand often avoid price changes, and why hazard functions are downward sloping. Our model implies that price stability is not optimal.
papers.zh_title: 行为性价格粘性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个家庭使用双过程框架进行决策的模型。系统1依赖快速、直观的启发式方法，但容易出错；而系统2需要认知努力，但能产生更准确的决策。垄断企业可以通过定价来影响家庭使用哪个系统。这种策略性影响创造了一种新的价格惯性来源。该模型解释了“火箭与羽毛”现象（价格上涨快但下跌慢），说明了为何意外高需求的企业往往避免改变价格，以及为何风险函数呈向下倾斜。我们的模型表明，价格稳定并非最优选择。

papers.title: The Puzzling Persistence of Financial Crises
papers.authors: Charles W. Calomiris, Matthew S. Jaremski
papers.abstract: The high social costs of financial crises imply that economists, policymakers, businesses, and households have a tremendous incentive to understand, and try to prevent them. And yet, so far we have failed to learn how to avoid them. In this article, we take a novel approach to studying financial crises. We first build ten case studies of financial crises that stretch over two millennia, and then consider their salient points of differences and commonalities. We see this as the beginning of developing a useful taxonomy of crises – an understanding of the most important factors that reappear across the many examples, which also allows (as in any taxonomy) some examples to be more similar to each other than others. From the perspective of our review of the ten crises, we consider the question of why it has proven so difficult to learn from past crises to avoid future ones.
papers.zh_title: 金融危机令人费解的持续性
papers.zh_abstract: 金融危机的巨大社会成本意味着经济学家、政策制定者、企业和家庭有极大的动力去理解并试图预防它们。然而，迄今为止，我们仍未学会如何避免危机。在本文中，我们采用一种新颖的方法来研究金融危机。我们首先构建了跨越两千年的十个金融危机案例研究，然后考察它们之间的显著差异点和共同点。我们将此视为发展一个有用的危机分类法的开端——理解在许多案例中反复出现的最重要因素，这也允许（如同任何分类法一样）某些案例之间比其他案例更为相似。基于我们对这十次危机的回顾，我们探讨了为何从过去的危机中吸取教训以避免未来危机如此困难的问题。

papers.title: Persistent Effects of Social Program Participation on the Third Generation
papers.authors: Gordon B. Dahl, Anne Gielen
papers.abstract: Can participation in safety net programs have long-lasting negative effects across multiple generations? Prior work shows a 1993 Dutch disability insurance reform which tightened requirements and lowered benefits for participants resulted in better outcomes for their children. We study the third generation, finding that grandchildren of individuals whose DI eligibility and benefits were reduced are less likely to be born premature, have low birthweight, or experience complicated deliveries. They also have better health and schooling outcomes during early childhood. These early-life improvements are consequential, as they have been linked to better health, education, and labor market outcomes in adulthood.
papers.zh_title: 社会项目参与对第三代的持久影响
papers.zh_abstract: 安全网项目的参与是否会对多代人产生长期的负面影响？先前的研究表明，1993年荷兰的一项残疾保险改革（收紧了参与条件并降低了福利）使参与者的子女获得了更好的结果。我们研究了第三代，发现那些其残疾保险资格和福利被削减的个人的孙辈，出生时早产、低出生体重或经历复杂分娩的可能性更低。他们在幼儿期的健康和学业成果也更好。这些早期生活的改善意义重大，因为它们与成年后更好的健康、教育和劳动力市场结果相关联。

papers.title: A Housing Portfolio Channel of QE Transmission
papers.authors: Dominik Boddin, Daniel Marcel te Kaat, Chang Ma, Alessandro Rebucci
papers.abstract: We document a housing portfolio channel of quantitative easing (QE) transmission exploiting variation in German household data in a difference-in-differences setting around QE adoption in 2015. We find that QE encourages households with larger initial bond positions to rebalance more toward second homes. Rebalancing is especially pronounced among higher-income and church-affiliated households with stronger tax incentives to purchase and rent out properties. We also show that, in regions more exposed to this channel, house prices increase more than rents, and sale listings decrease more than rental ones, suggesting that the rental supply may increase in response to QE.
papers.zh_title: 量化宽松传导的住房投资组合渠道
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用德国住户数据的差异，在2015年量化宽松政策实施前后的双重差分设定中，记录了量化宽松传导的一个住房投资组合渠道。我们发现，量化宽松鼓励初始债券头寸较大的家庭更多地重新平衡其资产，转向第二套住房。这种重新平衡在收入较高和有教会背景的家庭中尤为明显，这些家庭有更强的税收激励去购买和出租房产。我们还表明，在受此渠道影响更大的地区，房价相对于租金上涨更多，而待售房源相对于待租房源减少更多，这表明租赁供应可能因量化宽松而增加。

papers.title: Portfolio Flows and Household Portfolios
papers.authors: Daniel Marcel te Kaat, Chang Ma, Alessandro Rebucci
papers.abstract: In this paper, we show that cross-border portfolio flows around the peak of the European Crisis induced households to rebalance their portfolios toward housing. Estimating difference-in-differences regressions around Draghi's “Whatever It Take” speech in July 2012 with household data from the ECB's Household Finance and Consumption Survey, we find that portfolio inflows induce households with larger ex-ante bond and equity shares to rebalance more strongly toward housing. The effect is not driven by higher pre-treatment access to credit or higher credit growth during the treatment period and is stronger for wealthier and less risk-averse households.
papers.zh_title: 跨境投资组合流动与家庭资产组合
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们表明，在欧洲危机高峰时期，跨境投资组合流动促使家庭将其资产组合重新平衡至住房。我们利用欧洲央行家庭金融与消费调查中的家庭数据，围绕德拉吉2012年7月“不惜一切代价”演讲进行双重差分回归估计，发现投资组合流入促使事前债券和股票份额较大的家庭更强烈地向住房重新平衡。这种效应并非由处理前更高的信贷可得性或处理期间更高的信贷增长所驱动，并且对于更富有和风险厌恶程度较低的家庭更为显著。

papers.title: Housing Speculation, GSEs, and Credit Market Spillovers
papers.authors: Natee Amornsiripanitch, Philip E. Strahan, Song Zhang, Xiang Zheng
papers.abstract: In 2021, the U.S. Treasury reduced Government Sponsored Enterprises (GSEs) exposure to speculative mortgages. As a result, GSE purchases fell by about 20 percentage points. The policy reduced credit to speculative investors in housing, but increased credit to unaffected parts of the conforming-mortgage market. Banks responded by reallocating provision of speculative mortgage credit across their local markets, which in turn affected their provision of small business credit. These adjustments are most pronounced where banks do not own branches. The results suggest that banks manage credit provision not only in a macro sense – the focus of most research – but also market-by-market.
papers.zh_title: 住房投机、政府赞助企业与信贷市场溢出效应
papers.zh_abstract: 2021年，美国财政部减少了政府赞助企业对投机性抵押贷款的敞口。结果，政府赞助企业的购买量下降了约20个百分点。该政策减少了向住房投机性投资者的信贷，但增加了向合规抵押贷款市场未受影响部分的信贷。银行通过在其本地市场之间重新分配投机性抵押贷款信贷的供给来应对，这进而影响了它们对小企业信贷的供给。这些调整在银行没有分支机构的地区最为明显。结果表明，银行不仅在宏观意义上管理信贷供给（这是大多数研究的焦点），而且还在逐个市场的基础上进行管理。

papers.title: Do People Report Happiness Accurately?
papers.authors: James Andreoni, B. Douglas Bernheim, Tingyan Jia
papers.abstract: Validation of happiness measures is inherently challenging because subjective sensations are unobserved. We introduce a novel validation method: subjects report how happy they would feel (or did feel) after some specified event, as well as how they would respond (or would have responded) to a survey question about their happiness after the same event. The difference between these two responses measures “self-reported misreporting.” We demonstrate that self-reported misreporting varies across events and is substantial for certain types of events. These findings imply that caution is warranted when interpreting differences in self-reported well-being across contexts.
papers.zh_title: 人们准确报告幸福感吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 幸福感测量的验证本质上具有挑战性，因为主观感受是无法观测的。我们引入了一种新颖的验证方法：受试者报告他们在某个特定事件后（或将会）感到多幸福，以及他们在同一事件后（或将会）如何回答一个关于其幸福感的调查问题。这两个回答之间的差异衡量了“自我报告的误报”。我们证明，自我报告的误报因事件而异，并且对于某些类型的事件而言是显著的。这些发现意味着，在解释不同情境下自我报告幸福感的差异时应保持谨慎。

papers.title: Tunneling and Hidden Profits in Health Care
papers.authors: Ashvin Gandhi, Andrew Olenski
papers.abstract: This study examines whether healthcare providers tunnel profits and assets to commonly-owned related parties by making inflated payments for their goods and services. Such practices allow providers to understate their profitability—which may encourage regulators to increase reimbursements and relax quality standards—and shield assets from malpractice liability. Using uniquely detailed nursing home financial data, we find evidence of widespread tunneling to related-party real estate and management companies. Our estimates suggest that 68% of nursing home profits are tunneled to related parties and that accounting for tunneled profits and assets raises the implied typical investment IRR from 4.83% to 13.11%.
papers.zh_title: 医疗保健中的利益输送与隐藏利润
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究考察了医疗保健提供者是否通过向共同拥有的关联方支付虚高的商品和服务费用，从而向其输送利润和资产。这种做法使提供者能够低估其盈利能力——这可能会鼓励监管机构提高报销标准和放宽质量标准——并将资产从医疗事故责任中隔离出来。利用极其详细的养老院财务数据，我们发现了向关联方房地产和管理公司进行广泛利益输送的证据。我们的估计表明，68%的养老院利润被输送给关联方，而将输送的利润和资产考虑在内后，隐含的典型投资内部收益率从4.83%提高到13.11%。

papers.title: Restrictions on Municipal Broadband Provision and Mothers’ Labor Market Outcomes: Evidence from the COVID-19 Pandemic
papers.authors: Saket S. Hegde, Jessica Van Parys
papers.abstract: Prior to the COVID–19 pandemic, 17 states had legally restricted local governments from building their own broadband infrastructure and/or providing broadband internet to their communities. We use Federal Communications Commission (FCC) data to show that broadband subscribership grew slower in states with these restrictions compared to states without restrictions post-2020, particularly in counties with less affordable plans and fewer broadband providers. Then we examine how municipal restrictions affected the labor supply of married women with children following the sharp increase in telework after the pandemic. We employ the Current Population Survey (CPS) from 2018–2022 to estimate event studies and difference–in–differences models. Results show that mothers’ post-pandemic employment decreased by 4.7% in restriction states relative to non-restriction states; additionally, mothers in restriction states left the labor force and shifted to caregiving. Among mothers continuing to work, the share of time spent working from home decreased by 49%, while commute time increased 27%, in states with broadband restrictions versus states without. The results suggest that mothers were less likely to enter the workforce in states where remote work opportunities were limited by restrictions on broadband provision.
papers.zh_title: 市政宽带限制对新冠疫情劳动力市场结果的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 新冠疫情开启了一种“居家办公”的趋势，但工人需要可靠且快速的互联网连接（例如宽带）才能在家工作。然而，截至2020年1月，有18个州在法律上限制了地方政府和合作社自行建设宽带基础设施和/或向其社区提供宽带互联网。与没有限制的州相比，此类政策在疫情前减少了有限制州的宽带接入和竞争（Whitacre and Gallardo 2020）。我们使用2018-2023年的当前人口调查数据来估计一个动态双重差分模型，该模型展示了在新冠疫情前后，有和没有宽带限制的州的劳动力参与率如何变化。我们重点关注有孩子的已婚女性，这是一个劳动力供给弹性更大、可能特别看重居家办公所提供的灵活性的群体（Dettling 2017）。我们发现，与没有限制的州相比，在疫情后有限制州的州，已婚母亲的劳动力参与率和就业率分别下降了1.7%和2.2%。没有孩子的女性和有孩子的已婚男性的劳动力市场结果未受宽带限制的影响。结果表明，在宽带限制限制了她们居家办公能力的州，有孩子的已婚女性更难以留在劳动力队伍中。

papers.title: Banks in Space
papers.authors: Ezra Oberfield, Esteban Rossi-Hansberg, Nicholas Trachter, Derek T. Wenning
papers.abstract: We study the spatial expansion of banks in response to banking deregulation in the 1980s and 90s. During this period, large banks expanded rapidly, mostly by adding new branches in new locations, while many small banks exited. We document that large banks sorted into the densest markets, but that sorting weakened over time as large banks expanded to more marginal markets in search of locations with a relative abundance of retail deposits. This allowed large banks to reduce their dependence on expensive wholesale funding and grow further. To rationalize these patterns we propose a theory of multi-branch banks that sort into heterogeneous locations. Our theory yields two forms of sorting. First, span-of-control sorting incentivizes top firms to select the largest markets and smaller banks the more marginal ones. Second, mismatch sorting incentivizes banks to locate in more marginal locations, where deposits are abundant relative to loan demand, to better align their deposits and loans and minimize wholesale funding. Together, these two forms of sorting account well for the sorting patterns we document in the data.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, IO, ITI；JEL：D20, G21, G24, L23, L25, R12, R19
papers.zh_title: 空间中的银行
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了20世纪80年代和90年代银行业放松管制后银行的空间扩张。在此期间，大型银行迅速扩张，主要通过在新地点增设新分行，而许多小银行则退出了市场。我们记录了大型银行向最密集市场聚集的现象，但这种聚集随时间推移而减弱，因为大型银行扩张到更边缘的市场，寻找零售存款相对充裕的地点。这使得大型银行能够减少对昂贵批发融资的依赖并进一步增长。为了合理化这些模式，我们提出了一个多分行银行理论，这些银行会聚集到异质性地点。我们的理论产生了两种聚集形式。首先，控制跨度聚集激励顶级公司选择最大的市场，而较小的银行则选择更边缘的市场。其次，错配聚集激励银行定位于更边缘的地点，即存款相对于贷款需求充裕的地方，以更好地匹配其存款和贷款并最小化批发融资。这两种聚集形式共同很好地解释了我们在数据中记录的聚集模式。

papers.title: Scenarios for the Transition to AGI
papers.authors: Anton Korinek, Donghyun Suh
papers.abstract: We analyze how output and wages behave under different scenarios for technological progress that may culminate in Artificial General Intelligence (AGI), defined as the ability of AI systems to perform all tasks that humans can perform. We assume that human work can be decomposed into atomistic tasks that differ in their complexity. Advances in technology make ever more complex tasks amenable to automation. The effects on wages depend on a race between automation and capital accumulation. If automation proceeds sufficiently slowly, then there is always enough work for humans, and wages may rise forever. By contrast, if the complexity of tasks that humans can perform is bounded and full automation is reached, then wages collapse. But declines may occur even before if large-scale automation outpaces capital accumulation and makes labor too abundant. Automating productivity growth may lead to broad-based gains in the returns to all factors. By contrast, bottlenecks to growth from irreproducible scarce factors may exacerbate the decline in wages.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, LS, PR；JEL：E24, J23, J24, O33, O41
papers.zh_title: 向通用人工智能过渡的情景
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了在可能最终实现通用人工智能的技术进步的不同情景下，产出和工资如何变化。通用人工智能被定义为人工智能系统能够执行人类所能执行的所有任务的能力。我们假设人类工作可以分解为原子化任务，这些任务在复杂性上有所不同。技术进步使得越来越复杂的任务变得适合自动化。对工资的影响取决于自动化与资本积累之间的竞赛。如果自动化进展足够缓慢，那么人类总有足够的工作可做，工资可能会永远上涨。相反，如果人类能执行的任务的复杂性存在上限，并且实现了完全自动化，那么工资就会崩溃。但即使在完全自动化之前，如果大规模自动化超过资本积累并使劳动力过于充裕，工资也可能下降。自动化带来的生产率增长可能导致所有要素回报的广泛增长。相反，来自不可复制的稀缺要素的增长瓶颈可能会加剧工资的下降。

papers.title: Regulation of Access, Pricing, and Planning of High Voltage Transmission in the U.S.
papers.authors: Joe DeLosa III, Johannes P. Pfeifenberger, Paul Joskow
papers.abstract: The U.S. regulation of high-voltage transmission is highly complex and, as a result, generally poorly understood. The complexity is created by separate, but overlapping, jurisdictional authorities of the U.S. federal regulators and those of individual states, districts, and territories. While U.S. federal regulators have authority over stand-alone transmission service and the regional wholesale power markets that use the transmission grid, state regulators have jurisdiction over both (1) retail electricity services that include the distribution network, the retail cost of transmission service, and often generation service; and (2) the permitting of most new transmission facilities within their states’ boundaries. Some of these federal and state regulatory authorities overlap and some of them do not apply to non-jurisdictional transmission providers (such as certain municipal utilities, cooperatives, and federal power marketing agencies) and states (such as Texas) that are not synchronized with the larger regional grid. We summarize this complex structure of transmission regulation in the U.S. and the history of regulations that have created the industry structure and regulatory frameworks that exist today. We provide an overview of how transmission investments are priced and recovered and the planning processes that individual transmission owners and regional grid operators use to plan the necessary expansion of the high-voltage transmission grid. We also point out some of the economic inefficiencies that are created by a combination of balkanized regulatory structures and outdated industry planning practices.
papers.zh_title: 美国高压输电的准入、定价与规划监管
papers.zh_abstract: 美国对高压输电的监管极为复杂，因此通常难以被充分理解。这种复杂性源于美国联邦监管机构与各州、地区和领地监管机构之间相互独立但又存在重叠的管辖权。联邦监管机构对独立输电服务以及使用输电网络的区域批发电力市场拥有管辖权，而州监管机构则对以下两方面拥有管辖权：（1）包含配电网络、输电服务零售成本以及通常还包括发电服务的零售电力服务；（2）其州界内大多数新建输电设施的许可审批。这些联邦和州监管权力有些相互重叠，有些则不适用于非管辖范围内的输电供应商（例如某些市政公用事业、合作社和联邦电力营销机构）以及不与更大区域电网同步的州（例如得克萨斯州）。我们总结了美国这种复杂的输电监管结构，以及造就了当今行业结构和监管框架的监管历史。我们概述了输电投资如何定价和回收，以及各个输电业主和区域电网运营商用于规划高压输电网络必要扩建的规划流程。我们还指出了碎片化的监管结构与过时的行业规划实践相结合所造成的一些经济低效问题。

papers.title: The Household Equipment Revolution
papers.authors: Effrosyni Adamopoulou, Jeremy Greenwood, Nezih Guner
papers.abstract: A brief historical overview of the household equipment revolution and the women who transformed the home in Germany and the United States.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PR；JEL：B31, D13, J22, N32, N34
papers.zh_title: 家用设备革命
papers.zh_abstract: 本文简要概述了家用设备革命以及那些在德国和美国改变了家庭面貌的女性。

papers.title: Re-assessing the Spatial Mismatch Hypothesis
papers.authors: David Card, Jesse Rothstein, Moises Yi
papers.abstract: We use detailed location information from the Longitudinal Employer-Household Dynamics (LEHD) database to develop new evidence on the effects of spatial mismatch on the relative earnings of Black workers in large US cities. We classify workplaces by the size of the pay premiums they offer in a two-way fixed effects model, providing a simple metric for defining “good” jobs. We show that: (a) Black workers earn nearly the same average wage premiums as whites; (b) in most cities Black workers live closer to jobs, and closer to good jobs, than do whites; (c) Black workers typically commute shorter distances than whites; and (d) people who commute further earn higher average pay premiums, but the elasticity with respect to distance traveled is slightly lower for Black workers. We conclude that geographic proximity to good jobs is unlikely to be a major source of the racial earnings gaps in major U.S. cities today.
papers.zh_title: 重新评估空间错配假说
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用纵向雇主-家庭动态数据库（LEHD）中的详细位置信息，就空间错配对美国大城市黑人劳动者相对收入的影响提供了新的证据。我们在一个双向固定效应模型中，根据工作场所提供的薪酬溢价大小对其进行分类，从而为定义“好”工作提供了一个简单的衡量标准。我们表明：（a）黑人劳动者的平均工资溢价几乎与白人相同；（b）在大多数城市，黑人劳动者比白人居住地更靠近工作地点，也更靠近好工作；（c）黑人劳动者的通勤距离通常比白人短；（d）通勤距离更远的人获得的平均薪酬溢价更高，但黑人劳动者相对于通勤距离的弹性略低。我们得出结论，地理上靠近好工作不太可能是当今美国主要城市种族收入差距的主要来源。

papers.title: Non-robustness of Diffusion Estimates on Networks with Measurement Error
papers.authors: Arun G. Chandrasekhar, Paul Goldsmith-Pinkham, Tyler McCormick, Samuel A. Thau, Jerry Wei
papers.abstract: Network diffusion models are used to study things like disease transmission, information spread, and technology adoption. However, small amounts of mismeasurement are extremely likely in the networks constructed to operationalize these models. We show that estimates of diffusions are highly non-robust to this measurement error. First, we show that even when measurement error is vanishingly small, such that the share of missed links is close to zero, forecasts about the extent of diffusion will greatly underestimate the truth. Second, a small mismeasurement in the identity of the initial seed generates a large shift in the locations of expected diffusion path. We show that both of these results still hold when the vanishing measurement error is only local in nature. Such non-robustness in forecasting exists even under conditions where the basic reproductive number is consistently estimable. Possible solutions, such as estimating the measurement error or implementing widespread detection efforts, still face difficulties because the number of missed links are so small. Finally, we conduct Monte Carlo simulations on simulated networks, and real networks from three settings: travel data from the COVID-19 pandemic in the western US, a mobile phone marketing campaign in rural India, and in an insurance experiment in China.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, ME, PR；JEL：C01, D85, E0
papers.zh_title: 存在测量误差的网络扩散估计的非稳健性
papers.zh_abstract: 网络扩散模型被用于研究疾病传播、信息扩散和技术采用等现象。然而，在为实现这些模型而构建的网络中，出现少量测量误差的可能性极高。我们表明，扩散估计对这些测量误差高度不稳健。首先，我们证明，即使测量误差小到可以忽略不计，以至于遗漏链接的比例接近于零，关于扩散程度的预测也会严重低估真实情况。其次，初始种子节点身份的一个微小测量误差会导致预期扩散路径位置发生巨大偏移。我们表明，即使这种可忽略的测量误差仅具有局部性质，这两个结果仍然成立。即使在基本再生数可以被一致估计的条件下，这种预测的非稳健性依然存在。可能的解决方案，例如估计测量误差或实施广泛的检测工作，仍然面临困难，因为遗漏的链接数量非常少。最后，我们在模拟网络以及来自三个真实场景的网络（美国西部COVID-19大流行期间的旅行数据、印度农村的一次手机营销活动以及中国的一个保险实验）上进行了蒙特卡洛模拟。

papers.title: Size Matters: Matching Externalities and the Advantages of Large Labor Markets
papers.authors: Enrico Moretti, Moises Yi
papers.abstract: Economists have long hypothesized that large and thick labor markets facilitate the matching between workers and firms. We use administrative data from the LEHD to compare the job search outcomes of workers originally in large and small markets who lost their jobs due to a firm closure. We define a labor market as the Commuting Zone×industry pair in the quarter before the closure. To account for the possible sorting of high-quality workers into larger markets, the effect of market size is identified by comparing workers in large and small markets within the same CZ, conditional on workers fixed effects. In the six quarters before their firm’s closure, workers in small and large markets have a similar probability of employment and quarterly earnings. Following the closure, workers in larger markets experience significantly shorter non-employment spells and smaller earning losses than workers in smaller markets, indicating that larger markets partially insure workers against idiosyncratic employment shocks. A 1 percent increase in market size results in a 0.015 and 0.023 percentage points increase in the 1-year re-employment probability of high school and college graduates, respectively. Displaced workers in larger markets also experience a significantly lower need for relocation to a different CZ. Conditional on finding a new job, the quality of the new worker-firm match is higher in larger markets, as proxied by a higher probability that the new match lasts more than one year; the new industry is the same as the old one; and the new industry is a “good fit” for the worker’s college major. Consistent with the notion that market size should be particularly consequential for more specialized workers, we find that the effects are larger in industries where human capital is more specialized and less portable. Our findings may help explain the geographical agglomeration of industries--especially those that make intensive use of highly specialized workers--and validate one of the mechanisms that urban economists have proposed for the existence of agglomeration economies.
papers.zh_title: 规模重要：匹配外部性与大型劳动力市场的优势
papers.zh_abstract: 经济学家长期以来假设，大型且厚实的劳动力市场有助于促进工人与企业之间的匹配。我们使用LEHD的行政数据，比较了原本处于大型和小型市场中因企业倒闭而失业的工人的求职结果。我们将劳动力市场定义为倒闭前一个季度的通勤区×行业配对。为了考虑高质量工人可能向大型市场自选择的问题，我们通过比较同一通勤区内大型和小型市场的工人，并控制工人固定效应，来识别市场规模效应。在企业倒闭前的六个季度，小型和大型市场的工人具有相似的就业概率和季度收入。在企业倒闭后，大型市场的工人经历的非就业期显著更短，收入损失也小于小型市场的工人，这表明大型市场为工人提供了部分抵御特殊就业冲击的保障。市场规模每增加1%，高中和大学毕业生的一年内再就业概率分别提高0.015和0.023个百分点。大型市场中的失业工人搬迁到不同通勤区的需求也显著更低。在找到新工作的条件下，大型市场中新的工人-企业匹配质量更高，其代理指标包括新匹配持续超过一年的概率更高、新行业与旧行业相同、以及新行业与工人的大学专业“匹配良好”。与市场规模对更专业化工人影响尤为显著的观念一致，我们发现，在人力资本更专业化且可移植性更低的行业中，这种效应更大。我们的发现可能有助于解释产业的地理集聚现象——尤其是那些密集使用高度专业化工人的产业——并验证了城市经济学家提出的关于集聚经济存在的一种机制。

papers.title: The Effect of Price Caps on Advertising to Physicians: Evidence from the 340b Drug Pricing Program
papers.authors: Sylvia Hristakeva, Julie Holland Mortimer, Eric Yde
papers.abstract: We study the effect of price caps on the provision of costly effort by pharmaceutical firms using variation in drug discounts generated by a price regulation program that allows eligible hospitals to purchase outpatient drugs at steep discounts. These discounts directly affect drug manufacturers’ markups, and may change firms’ incentives to exert promotional effort targeted towards physicians at these hospitals. We find that the effects of price regulation on pharmaceutical firm effort depend crucially on the design of the regulations. Using detailed data on marketing payments from pharmaceutical firms to physicians, we observe that physicians receive 13% fewer promotional payments after their hospitals take up the program. The design of the price caps imply that discounts tend to increase with a drug’s age. Consistent with theoretical predictions, we find that pharmaceutical firms shift promotional payments away from older drugs and towards newer drugs, which are less affected by the price caps. Understanding these strategic, non-price adjustments is important for policymakers seeking to design effective regulations targeting specific products.
papers.meta: Programs：IO；JEL：I1, I11, L0, L2, M30, M37, M39
papers.zh_title: 价格上限对医生广告的影响：来自340b药品定价计划的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用一项价格监管计划产生的药品折扣变化，研究了价格上限对制药公司提供昂贵努力的影响。该计划允许符合条件的医院以大幅折扣购买门诊药品。这些折扣直接影响药品制造商的加价，并可能改变公司向这些医院医生进行促销努力的激励。我们发现，价格监管对制药公司努力的影响关键取决于监管的设计。利用制药公司向医生支付营销费用的详细数据，我们观察到，在医生所在的医院加入该计划后，他们收到的促销付款减少了13%。价格上限的设计意味着折扣通常随着药品上市时间的增长而增加。与理论预测一致，我们发现制药公司将促销付款从老药转向受价格上限影响较小的新药。理解这些战略性的非价格调整，对于旨在设计针对特定产品的有效监管政策的决策者来说至关重要。

papers.title: Asset Demand and Real Interest Rates
papers.authors: Paul Beaudry, Katya Kartashova, Césaire Meh
papers.abstract: Understanding factors that drive asset demand is central to explaining movements in long-term real interest rates. In this paper, we begin by documenting that much of the increase in the demand for assets in the US in the 30 years prior to Covid represented greater desire to hold assets by households of given age and income levels. For example, if we focus on the 55-64 age group, its wealth-to-income ratio increased by 45-55%, depending on whether housing is included or not. We then develop a model of asset demands which combines retirement motives and inter-temporal substitution motives to quantitatively explore different factors that may have contributed to such an increase. Our findings suggest that decreasing interest rates likely led to a substantial increase in demand for retirement wealth. We also explore some of the across group heterogeneity and show how social security may explain why the lowest income groups did not follow the general trend. Finally, we discuss macroeconomic implications of long-run asset demands that are a decreasing function of interest rates.
papers.zh_title: 资产需求与实际利率
papers.zh_abstract: 理解驱动资产需求的因素对于解释长期实际利率的变动至关重要。在本文中，我们首先记录到，在新冠疫情之前的30年里，美国资产需求的增长很大程度上反映了特定年龄和收入水平的家庭持有资产的意愿增强。例如，如果我们关注55-64岁年龄组，其财富收入比增加了45-55%，具体取决于是否包含住房。然后，我们开发了一个结合退休动机和跨期替代动机的资产需求模型，以定量探索可能导致这种增长的不同因素。我们的研究结果表明，利率下降很可能导致了对退休财富需求的显著增加。我们还探讨了部分群体间的异质性，并展示了社会保障如何可能解释为什么最低收入群体没有遵循总体趋势。最后，我们讨论了长期资产需求（作为利率的递减函数）的宏观经济含义。

papers.title: Technological Synergies, Heterogeneous Firms, and Uncertainty Shocks
papers.authors: Jesús Fernández-Villaverde, Yang Yu, Francesco Zanetti
papers.abstract: This paper examines the role of technological synergies among heterogeneous firms in business cycle fluctuations. We first document six empirical facts using microdata, revealing strong synergies, positive assortative matching, and their cyclical variations. Next, we embed these synergies into a quantitative business cycle model calibrated to firm-level data, showing that frictions in forming and dissolving trading relationships lead to imperfect sorting with significant macro effects. Specifically, we demonstrate that, in the presence of technological synergies, uncertainty shocks reduce aggregate output even without nonconvex adjustment costs, nominal rigidities, or financial frictions.
papers.zh_title: 技术协同效应、异质性企业与不确定性冲击
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了异质性企业间的技术协同效应在商业周期波动中的作用。我们首先利用微观数据记录了六个经验事实，揭示了强大的协同效应、正向分类匹配及其周期性变化。接着，我们将这些协同效应嵌入到一个根据企业层面数据校准的定量商业周期模型中，表明在形成和解除交易关系中的摩擦会导致不完美的分类匹配，并产生显著的宏观效应。具体而言，我们证明，在存在技术协同效应的情况下，即使没有非凸调整成本、名义刚性或金融摩擦，不确定性冲击也会降低总产出。

papers.title: On the Spatial Determinants of Educational Access
papers.authors: Francesco Agostinelli, Margaux Luflade, Paolo Martellini
papers.abstract: We define educational access as the component of a neighborhood's value that is determined by the set of schools available to its residents. This paper studies the extent to which educational access is determined by sorting based on heterogeneous preferences over school attributes, or local institutions that constrain residential location and school choice---such as school catchment areas and housing regulation. We develop a spatial equilibrium model of residential sorting and school choice, estimated using data from a large school district in the United States. The model replicates the responses of house prices and school enrollment to quasi-experimental variation in school peer composition and school transportation provision. We find that low-income families prioritize proximity to schools while high-income families and families with high-skilled children place more value on school peer composition. We use the model to evaluate how the geography of neighborhood sorting influences the aggregate and distributional outcomes of a school-choice expansion (place-based) and a housing voucher (people-based) policy. We find that both policies result in net welfare losses, with only marginal improvements in school peer composition for the average low-income family. Although eligible families benefit from these policies, the negative impact falls on families who currently invest in their children's education by residing in expensive neighborhoods. Under both policies, higher-income families are less exposed to the inflow of low-income children into their schools, either because of their longer distance from target neighborhoods or because of the cost imposed by residential zoning regulation on voucher recipients.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, EFG, LS, PE；JEL：I24, J13, R23, R31
papers.zh_title: 教育可及性的空间决定因素研究
papers.zh_abstract: 我们将教育可及性定义为社区价值中由居民可获得的学校集合所决定的部分。本文研究教育可及性在多大程度上取决于对学校属性的异质性偏好所导致的居住分选，或取决于限制居住地点和学校选择的本地制度——例如学区划分和住房监管。我们构建了一个居住分选与学校选择的空间均衡模型，并使用美国某大学区的数据进行估计。该模型能够复现房价和学校入学率对学校同伴构成和学校交通供给的准实验性变化的反应。我们发现，低收入家庭优先考虑学校邻近性，而高收入家庭和高技能子女家庭则更看重学校同伴构成。我们利用该模型评估了邻里分选的地理格局如何影响一项学校选择扩展政策（基于地点）和一项住房券政策（基于人群）的总体和分配结果。我们发现，这两项政策均导致净福利损失，且对普通低收入家庭而言，学校同伴构成的改善微乎其微。尽管符合条件的家庭从这些政策中受益，但负面影响落在了那些目前通过居住在昂贵社区来投资子女教育的家庭身上。在这两项政策下，高收入家庭较少受到低收入儿童涌入其学校的影响，这要么是因为他们距离目标社区较远，要么是因为居住分区监管对住房券领取者施加了成本。

papers.title: Spillovers and Spillbacks
papers.authors: Sushant Acharya, Paolo A. Pesenti
papers.abstract: We study international monetary policy spillovers and spillbacks in a tractable two-country Heterogeneous Agent New Keynesian model. Relative to Representative Agent (RANK) models, our framework introduces a precautionary-savings channel, as households in both countries face uninsurable income risk, and a real-income channel, as households have heterogeneous marginal propensities to consume (MPC). While both channels amplify the size of spillovers/spillbacks, only precautionary savings can change their sign relative to RANK. Spillovers are likely to be larger in economies with higher fractions of high MPC households and more countercyclical income risk. Quantitatively, both channels amplify spillovers by 30-60% relative to RANK.
papers.zh_title: 溢出效应与回溢效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在一个易于处理的两国异质性主体新凯恩斯模型中研究国际货币政策溢出效应与回溢效应。相对于代表性主体模型，我们的框架引入了预防性储蓄渠道（因为两国居民都面临不可保险的收入风险）和实际收入渠道（因为居民具有异质性的边际消费倾向）。虽然这两个渠道都放大了溢出/回溢效应的规模，但只有预防性储蓄才能改变其相对于代表性主体模型的符号。在高边际消费倾向家庭比例更高、收入风险更反周期的经济体中，溢出效应可能更大。定量分析表明，相对于代表性主体模型，这两个渠道将溢出效应放大了30-60%。

papers.title: Adaptation Using Financial Markets: Climate Risk Diversification through Securitization
papers.authors: Matthew E. Kahn, Amine Ouazad, Erkan Yönder
papers.abstract: In the face of rising climate risk, financial institutions may adapt by transferring such risk to securitizers that have the skill and expertise to build diversified pools, such as Mortgage-Backed Securities. In diversified pools, exposure to climate risk may have a small impact on performance metrics such as deal losses, yield-to-maturity, and total returns, depending on the degree of spatial correlation and concentration. This paper builds a data set of the securitization chain from mortgage-level to MBS deal-level cash flows. Wildfires lead to higher rates of prepayment and foreclosure at the mortgage level, and larger losses during foreclosure sales. At the MBS deal level, a lower spatial concentration of dollar balances (lower spatial dollar Herfindahl), a lower spatial correlation in wildfire events (within-deal correlation), leads to a lower exposure to wildfire events. These quantifiable metrics of diversification identify those existing deals whose design makes them resilient to climate change. This paper builds optimal deals by finding the portfolio weights in a mean-variance framework that trades off return and risk. Extrapolating wildfire risk using a wildfire probability model and temperature projections in 2050, the paper provides and implements a portfolio diversification algorithm that builds climate-resilient MBSs whose returns are minimally impacted by wildfire risk even as they supply mortgage credit to wildfire prone areas.
papers.zh_title: 利用金融市场进行适应：通过证券化实现气候风险分散化
papers.zh_abstract: 面对日益加剧的气候风险，金融机构可能通过将此类风险转移给具备技能和专业知识来构建多元化资产池的证券化机构（例如住房抵押贷款支持证券）来进行适应。在多元化的资产池中，气候风险暴露对交易损失、到期收益率和总回报等绩效指标的影响可能较小，具体取决于空间相关性和集中度。本文构建了一个从抵押贷款层面到住房抵押贷款支持证券交易层面现金流的数据集。野火导致抵押贷款层面的提前还款和止赎率上升，并在止赎销售中造成更大损失。在住房抵押贷款支持证券交易层面，美元余额的空间集中度较低（较低的空间美元赫芬达尔指数）、野火事件的空间相关性较低（交易内相关性），导致对野火事件的暴露程度较低。这些可量化的分散化指标识别出了那些设计上对气候变化具有韧性的现有交易。本文通过均值-方差框架中权衡回报与风险的组合权重来构建最优交易。利用野火概率模型和2050年温度预测来外推野火风险，本文提出并实施了一种组合分散化算法，以构建具有气候韧性的住房抵押贷款支持证券，即使它们为野火易发地区提供抵押贷款信贷，其回报也受野火风险影响最小。

papers.title: Community Engagement with Law Enforcement after High-profile Acts of Police Violence
papers.authors: Desmond Ang, Panka Bencsik, Jesse M. Bruhn, Ellora Derenoncourt
papers.abstract: We document a sharp rise in gunshots coupled with declining 911 call volume across thirteen major US cities in the aftermath of the murder of George Floyd. National survey data also indicate that victims of crime became less likely to report their victimization to law enforcement due to mistrust of police. Our results suggest that high-profile acts of police violence may erode community engagement with law enforcement and highlight the call-to-shot ratio as a natural measure of attitudes towards the police.
papers.zh_title: 高调警察暴力事件后社区与执法部门的互动
papers.zh_abstract: 我们记录了乔治·弗洛伊德谋杀案发生后，美国十三个主要城市的枪击事件急剧增加，同时911报警电话数量下降。全国调查数据还表明，犯罪受害者因不信任警察而向执法部门报告受害情况的意愿降低。我们的结果表明，高调的警察暴力事件可能会削弱社区与执法部门的互动，并突显了报警与枪击比率作为衡量对警察态度的一个自然指标。

papers.title: Competing Narratives in Action: An Empirical Analysis of Model Adoption Dynamics
papers.authors: Marco Angrisani, Anya Samek, Ricardo Serrano-Padial
papers.abstract: We use a longitudinal dataset measuring beliefs and behaviors to study the dynamics of model – or narrative – adoption during the Covid-19 pandemic. We show that individuals switch beliefs about the effectiveness of preventive behaviors following changes in perceived risk. The adoption of narratives promoting preventive behaviors is procyclical and narrative switching is influenced by exposure to conflicting information. We explain the data using a heterogeneous-agent model of competing narratives in which agents exhibit motivated beliefs. Adopting misspecified narratives increases infection rates, highlighting the importance of promoting accurate beliefs to guide behavior in the presence of novel risks.
papers.zh_title: 行动中的竞争性叙事：模型采纳动态的实证分析
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用一个测量信念和行为的纵向数据集，研究新冠疫情期间模型（或叙事）采纳的动态过程。我们表明，个体在感知风险发生变化后会改变关于预防行为有效性的信念。推广预防行为的叙事采纳是顺周期的，叙事转换受到接触冲突信息的影响。我们使用一个包含动机信念的异质性主体竞争性叙事模型来解释这些数据。采纳错误设定的叙事会增加感染率，这凸显了在面对新型风险时，推广准确信念以指导行为的重要性。

papers.title: Can VAT Cuts and Anti-Profiteering Measures Dampen the Effects of Food Price Inflation?
papers.authors: Youssef Benzarti, Santiago Garriga, Darío Tortarolo
papers.abstract: We study a temporary VAT cut on food, its re-introduction, and anti-profiteering price caps during high inflation in Argentina. Using barcode-level data from over 3,000 supermarkets, we find: (1) in monitored chains, VAT-cut pass-through is near-complete, unlike the incomplete pass-through in less-monitored settings; (2) in unmonitored independents, pass-through is asymmetric—prices rise more after reinstatement than after the cut and stay above pre-cut levels; and (3) caps compress price increases in chains but leave capped prices persistently below pre-cut levels. A consumer surplus model shows the VAT cut was progressive, with caps reducing the asymmetry’s regressive impact.

papers.title: Within-Firm Pay Inequality and Productivity
papers.authors: Melanie Wallskog, Nicholas Bloom, Scott W. Ohlmacher, Cristina Tello-Trillo
papers.abstract: Combining confidential Census worker and firm data, we find three key results. First, employees at more productive firms earn higher pay at all earnings levels. Second, this pay-productivity relationship strengthens with seniority, doubling from an elasticity of 0.07 for pay on productivity for the median-paid employee to 0.15 for the top-paid employee. Consequently, more productive firms have higher within-firm inequality. Our data suggests this is driven by their greater adoption of aggressive performance-pay bonus and management schemes. Finally, the magnitude of this pay-performance slope suggests rising productivity can explain 40% of the rise in within-firm inequality since 1980.
papers.zh_title: 企业内部薪酬不平等与生产率
papers.zh_abstract: 结合保密的普查工人和企业数据，我们发现了三个关键结果。首先，生产率更高的企业为所有收入水平的员工支付更高的薪酬。其次，这种薪酬-生产率关系随着资历加深而增强，从中位数薪酬员工薪酬对生产率的弹性0.07翻倍至最高薪酬员工的0.15。因此，生产率更高的企业具有更高的内部不平等。我们的数据表明，这是由于它们更积极地采用激进的绩效薪酬奖金和管理方案。最后，这种薪酬-绩效斜率的大小表明，自1980年以来，生产率的提高可以解释企业内部不平等上升的40%。

papers.title: Evaluating and Pricing Health Insurance in Lower-income Countries: A Field Experiment in India
papers.authors: Anup Malani, Cynthia Kinnan, Gabriella Conti, Kosuke Imai, Morgen Miller, Shailender Swaminathan, Alessandra Voena, Bartosz Woda
papers.abstract: Universal health coverage is a widely shared goal across lower-income countries. We conducted a large-scale, 4-year trial that randomized premiums and subsidies for India’s first national, public hospital insurance program, called RSBY. We find substantial demand (∼ 60% uptake) even when consumers were charged a price equal to the premium the government paid for insurance. We also find substantial adverse selection into insurance at positive prices. Insurance enrollment increases insurance utilization, partly due to spillovers from use of insurance by neighbors. However, healthcare utilization does not rise substantially, suggesting the primary benefit of insurance is financial. Many enrollees attempted to use insurance but failed, suggesting that learning is critical to the success of public insurance. We find very few statistically significant impacts of insurance access or enrollment on health. Because there is substantial willingness-to- pay for insurance, and given how distortionary it is to raise revenue in the Indian context, we calculate that our sample population should be charged a premium for RSBY between 67-95% of average costs (INR 528-1052, $30-60) rather than a zero premium to maximize the marginal value of public funds.
papers.zh_title: 评估低收入国家健康保险并为其定价：印度的一项实地实验
papers.zh_abstract: 全民健康覆盖是低收入国家广泛认同的目标。我们进行了一项大规模、为期四年的试验，对印度首个全国性公立医院保险计划RSBY的保费和补贴进行了随机化。我们发现，即使消费者被收取与政府为保险支付的保费相等的价格，需求也相当可观（约60%的参保率）。我们还发现，在正价格下存在显著的逆向选择进入保险。保险参保增加了保险使用，部分原因是邻居使用保险的溢出效应。然而，医疗保健使用并未大幅增加，这表明保险的主要好处是财务上的。许多参保者尝试使用保险但失败了，这表明学习对于公共保险的成功至关重要。我们发现保险可及性或参保对健康的影响在统计上显著的结果很少。由于存在显著的保险支付意愿，并且考虑到在印度背景下筹集收入的扭曲性，我们计算出，为了最大化公共资金的边际价值，应向我们的样本人口收取RSBY保费，其金额为平均成本的67-95%（印度卢比528-1052，约30-60美元），而不是零保费。

papers.title: Sticky Discount Rates
papers.authors: Masao Fukui, Niels Joachim Gormsen, Kilian Huber
papers.abstract: We show that firms’ nominal required returns (i.e., discount rates) are sticky with respect to expected inflation. Sticky discount rates generate distinct theoretical predictions that are broadly consistent with stylized empirical patterns: increases in expected inflation directly raise real investment; demand shocks generate investment-consumption comovement; and the sensitivity of investment to interest rates is low. Sticky discount rates imply monetary non-neutrality, even when all other prices are flexible, because of a direct link from expected inflation to investment. In the New Keynesian optimal monetary policy problem, the central bank steers long-run inflation expectations, even in response to temporary shocks.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, IO, ME, PR；JEL：D22, E22, E23, E31, E32, E43, E44, E52, E58, G12, G31
papers.zh_title: 粘性贴现率
papers.zh_abstract: 我们证明，企业的名义必要回报率（即贴现率）相对于预期通胀具有粘性。粘性贴现率产生了独特的理论预测，这些预测与典型的经验模式大体一致：预期通胀上升直接提高了实际投资；需求冲击引发了投资与消费的联动；投资对利率的敏感度较低。即使所有其他价格都是灵活的，粘性贴现率也意味着货币非中性，这是因为预期通胀与投资之间存在直接联系。在新凯恩斯最优货币政策问题中，央行会引导长期通胀预期，即使是在应对暂时性冲击时也是如此。

papers.title: Central Banking Post Crises
papers.authors: Michael Kiley, Frederic S. Mishkin
papers.abstract: The world economy has experienced the largest financial crisis in generations, a global pandemic, and a resurgence in inflation during the first quarter of the 21st century, yielding important insights for central banking. Price stability has important benefits and is the responsibility of a central bank. Achieving price stability in a complex and uncertain environment involves a credible commitment to a nominal anchor with a strong response to inflation and pre-emptive leaning against an overheating economy. Associated challenges imply that central bank communication and transparency are key elements of monetary policy strategies and tactics. Crises have emphasized the role of central banks in promoting financial stability, as financial stability is key to achieving price and economic stability, but this role increases risks to independence. Goals for central banks other than price and economic stability, complemented by financial stability, can make it more difficult for them to stabilize both inflation and economic activity.
papers.zh_title: 危机后的中央银行
papers.zh_abstract: 在21世纪的前二十五年里，世界经济经历了数代人以来最严重的金融危机、一场全球大流行病以及通胀的再度抬头，这为中央银行提供了重要启示。价格稳定具有重大益处，并且是央行的职责所在。在复杂且不确定的环境中实现价格稳定，需要可信地承诺一个名义锚，对通胀做出强有力的反应，并预防性地抑制经济过热。相关的挑战意味着，央行沟通和透明度是货币政策策略和战术的关键要素。危机凸显了央行在促进金融稳定方面的作用，因为金融稳定是实现价格和经济稳定的关键，但这一角色增加了独立性面临的风险。除了价格和经济稳定（辅以金融稳定）之外，为央行设定的其他目标，可能会使它们更难同时稳定通胀和经济活动。

papers.title: The Effect of Early Childhood Programs on Third-Grade Test Scores: Evidence from Transitional Kindergarten in Michigan
papers.authors: Jordan S. Berne, Brian A. Jacob, Tareena Musaddiq, Anna Shapiro, Christina Weiland
papers.abstract: Transitional Kindergarten (TK) is a relatively recent entrant into the U.S. early education landscape, combining features of public pre-K and regular kindergarten. We provide the first estimates of the impact of Michigan’s TK program on 3rd grade test scores. Using an augmented regression discontinuity design, we find that TK improves 3rd grade math scores by 0.29 standard deviations relative to a counterfactual that includes other formal and informal learning options. This impact is notably large relative to the prior pre-K literature. Estimates for English Language Arts (ELA) are imprecise but suggestive of a positive effect as well.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：I20, I21, I24, I28, J01
papers.zh_title: 早期儿童项目对三年级考试成绩的影响：来自密歇根州过渡性幼儿园的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 过渡性幼儿园（TK）是美国早期教育领域相对较新的参与者，它结合了公立学前班和常规幼儿园的特点。我们首次估算了密歇根州TK项目对三年级考试成绩的影响。使用增强的断点回归设计，我们发现，相对于包含其他正式和非正式学习选项的反事实情况，TK使三年级数学成绩提高了0.29个标准差。与之前的学前班文献相比，这一影响显著较大。对英语语言艺术（ELA）的估计不精确，但也暗示了正向效应。

papers.title: Ban-the-Box Laws: Fair and Effective?
papers.authors: Robert Kaestner, Xufei Wang
papers.abstract: Ban-the-box (BTB) laws are a widely used public policy rooted in employment law related to unnecessarily exclusionary hiring practices. BTB laws are intended to improve the employment opportunities of those with criminal backgrounds by giving them a fair chance during the hiring process. Prior research on the effectiveness of these laws in meeting their objective is limited and inconclusive. In this article, we extend the prior literature in two ways: we expand the years of analysis to a period of rapid expansion of BTB laws and we examine different types of BTB laws depending on the employers affected (e.g., public sector). Results indicate that BTB laws, any type of BTB law or BTB laws covering different types of employers, have no systematic or statistically significant association with employment of low-educated men, both young and old and across racial and ethnic groups. We speculate that the lack of effectiveness of BTB laws stems from the difficulty in enforcing such laws and already high rates of employer willingness to hire those with criminal histories.
papers.zh_title: “禁问犯罪记录”法律：公平且有效？
papers.zh_abstract: “禁问犯罪记录”（BTB）法律是一项广泛使用的公共政策，源于与不必要排斥性招聘实践相关的就业法。BTB法律旨在通过给予有犯罪背景的人在招聘过程中公平的机会，来改善他们的就业机会。先前关于这些法律在实现其目标方面有效性的研究有限且尚无定论。在本文中，我们以两种方式扩展了先前文献：我们将分析年份扩展到BTB法律快速扩张的时期，并根据受影响的雇主类型（例如，公共部门）考察不同类型的BTB法律。结果表明，BTB法律（任何类型的BTB法律或覆盖不同类型雇主的BTB法律）与低教育水平男性（无论年轻还是年长，以及跨种族和族裔群体）的就业之间没有系统性或统计上显著的关联。我们推测，BTB法律缺乏有效性源于执行此类法律的困难以及雇主已经很高的愿意雇佣有犯罪历史者的比例。

papers.title: Apart but Connected: Online Tutoring, Cognitive Outcomes, and Soft Skills
papers.authors: Michela Carlana, Eliana La Ferrara
papers.abstract: We study the Tutoring Online Program (TOP), where: (i) tutoring is entirely online; (ii) tutors are volunteer university students, matched with underprivileged middle school students. We leverage random assignment to estimate effects during and after the pandemic (2020 and 2022), investigating channels of impact. Three hours of individual tutoring per week increased math performance by 0.23 SD in 2020 and 0.20 SD in 2022. Higher-dosage yielded stronger effects, while group tutoring smaller effects. TOP enhanced students’ aspirations, socio-emotional skills and psychological well-being, but only during school closures. We also estimate the impact of TOP on tutors, finding increases in empathy.
papers.zh_title: 分离但相连：在线辅导、认知结果和软技能
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在线辅导项目（TOP），其特点是：（i）辅导完全在线进行；（ii）辅导员是志愿的大学生，与弱势的初中生配对。我们利用随机分配来估计疫情期间及之后（2020年和2022年）的影响，并调查影响渠道。每周三小时的个别辅导使2020年数学成绩提高0.23个标准差，2022年提高0.20个标准差。更高剂量产生更强效果，而小组辅导效果较小。TOP增强了学生的抱负、社会情感技能和心理健康，但仅在学校关闭期间。我们还估计了TOP对辅导员的影响，发现共情能力有所提高。

papers.title: The Distributional Impact of Sectoral Supply and Demand Shifts: A Unified Framework
papers.authors: Nittai K. Bergman, Nir Jaimovich, Itay Saporta-Eksten
papers.abstract: Economies routinely experience a variety of sector-specific supply and demand shifts. Yet, the distributional welfare consequences of these shifts are not well understood. We address this gap by developing an analytical framework that jointly integrates supply-side and demand-side heterogeneity without imposing specific functional forms on consumption and production. This enables us to identify the key forces that shape the distributional welfare impact of sector-specific supply and demand shifts—in terms of consumer preferences and sectoral production functions. We estimate key parameters and quantify the heterogeneous welfare effects of sectoral shifts, revealing significant variation in their impact.
papers.zh_title: 部门供需变动的分配效应：一个统一框架
papers.zh_abstract: 经济体经常经历各种特定部门的供需变动。然而，这些变动的分配性福利后果尚不明确。我们通过开发一个分析框架来填补这一空白，该框架在不施加特定消费和生产函数形式的情况下，联合整合了供给侧和需求侧的异质性。这使我们能够识别出塑造特定部门供需变动分配性福利影响的关键力量——涉及消费者偏好和部门生产函数。我们估计了关键参数，并量化了部门变动的异质性福利效应，揭示了其影响的显著差异。

papers.title: Market Power in Artificial Intelligence
papers.authors: Joshua S. Gans
papers.abstract: This paper surveys the relevant existing literature that can help researchers and policy makers understand the drivers of competition in markets that constitute the provision of artificial intelligence products. The focus is on three broad markets: training data, input data, and AI predictions. It is shown that a key factor in determining the emergence and persistence of market power will be the operation of markets for data that would allow for trading data across firm boundaries.
papers.zh_title: 人工智能中的市场势力
papers.zh_abstract: 本文梳理了相关现有文献，旨在帮助研究人员和政策制定者理解构成人工智能产品供给的各个市场中竞争驱动因素。重点聚焦于三个广泛的市场：训练数据、输入数据和人工智能预测。研究表明，决定市场势力出现与持续的关键因素将是数据市场的运作方式，该市场允许数据在企业边界之外进行交易。

papers.title: Comprehensive OOS Evaluation of Predictive Algorithms with Statistical Decision Theory
papers.authors: Jeff Dominitz, Charles F. Manski
papers.abstract: We argue that comprehensive out-of-sample (OOS) evaluation using statistical decision theory (SDT) should replace the current practice of K-fold and Common Task Framework validation in machine learning (ML) research. SDT provides a formal framework for performing comprehensive OOS evaluation across all possible (1) training samples, (2) populations that may generate training data, and (3) populations of prediction interest. Regarding feature (3), we emphasize that SDT requires the practitioner to directly confront the possibility that the future may not look like the past and to account for a possible need to extrapolate from one population to another when building a predictive algorithm. SDT is simple in abstraction, but it is often computationally demanding to implement. We discuss progress in tractable implementation of SDT when prediction accuracy is measured by mean square error or by misclassification rate. We summarize research studying settings in which the training data will be generated from a subpopulation of the population of prediction interest. We consider conditional prediction with alternative restrictions on the state space of possible populations that may generate training data. We present an illustrative application of the methodology to the problem of predicting patient illness to inform clinical decision making. We conclude by calling on ML researchers to join with econometricians and statisticians in expanding the domain within which implementation of SDT is tractable.
papers.zh_title: 基于统计决策理论的预测算法全面样本外评估
papers.zh_abstract: 我们认为，在机器学习研究中，应使用基于统计决策理论的全面样本外评估来取代当前流行的K折交叉验证和通用任务框架验证方法。统计决策理论提供了一个正式框架，能够对所有可能的（1）训练样本、（2）可能生成训练数据的总体以及（3）预测感兴趣的总体进行全面的样本外评估。关于特征（3），我们强调统计决策理论要求实践者直接面对未来可能与过去不同的可能性，并在构建预测算法时考虑从一个总体外推到另一个总体的潜在需求。统计决策理论在抽象层面很简单，但在实施时通常计算量很大。我们讨论了当预测精度通过均方误差或误分类率衡量时，在统计决策理论的可处理实施方面取得的进展。我们总结了针对训练数据将来自预测感兴趣总体的子总体这一情景的研究。我们考虑了在可能生成训练数据的总体状态空间上施加不同限制的条件预测。我们通过一个将方法应用于预测患者病情以辅助临床决策的示例来说明该方法。最后，我们呼吁机器学习研究人员与计量经济学家和统计学家合作，共同扩展统计决策理论可处理实施的领域。

papers.title: Aggregation, Liquidity, and Asset Prices with Incomplete Markets
papers.authors: Sebastian Di Tella, Benjamin M. Hébert, Pablo Kurlat
papers.abstract: We analytically characterize asset-pricing and consumption behavior in two-account heterogeneous-agent models with aggregate risk. We show that trading frictions can simultaneously explain (1) household-level consumption behavior such as high marginal propensities to consume, (2) a zero-beta rate on equities that satisfies an aggregate consumption Euler equation, (3) a return on safe assets that does not, and (4) a flat securities market line. The return of equities is well explained by aggregate consumption, while the return of safe assets reflects a large and volatile liquidity premium.
papers.zh_title: 不完全市场下的加总、流动性与资产价格
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在具有总体风险的双账户异质性代理人模型中，对资产定价和消费行为进行了分析性刻画。我们证明，交易摩擦可以同时解释：（1）家庭层面的消费行为，如高边际消费倾向；（2）满足总体消费欧拉方程的股票零贝塔收益率；（3）不满足该方程的安全资产收益率；以及（4）平坦的证券市场线。股票的收益率可以由总体消费很好地解释，而安全资产的收益率则反映了一个巨大且波动的流动性溢价。

papers.title: Does Consolidation in Medicare Part D affect Enrollment and Drug Expenditures?
papers.authors: Pinka Chatterji, Chun-Yu Ho, Tao Jin, Yichuan Wang
papers.abstract: This paper exploits the nationwide merger of CVS and Universal American to examine how industry consolidation in Medicare Part D affects beneficiaries’ enrollment in stand-alone prescription drug plans (PDPs) and out-of-pocket (OOP) drug spending. Data come from the 2010-2016 waves of the Health and Retirement Study (HRS). We find that overall, the merger decreases enrollment in stand-alone PDPs and increases OOP drug spending among enrollees who remain in PDPs. The merger’s negative effects on PDP enrollment are driven by healthier beneficiaries, while the increases in OOP drug spending are stronger for lower-income individuals and for individuals in worse health. The merger also leads to effects beyond drug usage and the PDP market; in particular, PDP enrollees use fewer outpatient visits and, overall, Medicare beneficiaries are less likely to enroll in Medicare Advantage prescription drug (MAPD) plans after the merger. Finally, we find some evidence that higher plan premiums and changes in plans’ quality and drug access after the merger are potential mechanisms leading to our main results.
papers.zh_title: Medicare D部分合并是否影响参保和药品支出？
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用CVS与Universal American的全国性合并，考察了Medicare D部分行业整合如何影响受益人对独立处方药计划的参保以及自付药品支出。数据来自2010-2016年健康与退休研究。我们发现，总体而言，该合并降低了独立处方药计划的参保率，并增加了仍留在处方药计划中的参保人的自付药品支出。合并对处方药计划参保的负面影响主要由健康状况较好的受益人驱动，而自付药品支出的增加在低收入人群和健康状况较差的人群中更为显著。该合并还产生了超出药品使用和处方药计划市场的影响；特别是，处方药计划参保人在合并后减少了门诊就诊次数，并且总体而言，Medicare受益人在合并后加入Medicare Advantage处方药计划的可能性降低。最后，我们发现有证据表明，合并后更高的计划保费以及计划质量和药品获取渠道的变化是导致我们主要结果的潜在机制。

papers.title: Forced Migration and Refugees: Policies for Successful Economic and Social Integration
papers.authors: Dany Bahar, Rebecca J. Brough, Giovanni Peri
papers.abstract: The inflow of refugees and their subsequent integration can be an important challenge for both the refugees themselves and the host society. Policy interventions can improve the lives and economic success of refugees and of their communities. In this paper, we review the socioeconomic integration policy interventions focused on refugees and the evidence surrounding them. We also highlight some interesting topics for future research and stress the need to rigorously evaluate their effectiveness and implications for the successful integration of refugees.
papers.zh_title: 被迫移民与难民：实现成功经济与社会融合的政策
papers.zh_abstract: 难民的流入及其随后的融合对难民本身和接收社会都可能构成重大挑战。政策干预可以改善难民及其社区的生活和经济成就。在本文中，我们回顾了针对难民的社会经济融合政策干预及其相关证据。我们还强调了未来研究的一些有趣主题，并强调需要严格评估这些干预措施的有效性及其对难民成功融合的影响。

papers.title: The Long-Run Impacts of Public Industrial Investment on Local Development and Economic Mobility: Evidence from World War II
papers.authors: Andrew Garin, Jonathan L. Rothbaum
papers.abstract: This paper studies the long-run effects of government-led construction of manufacturing plants on the regions where they were built and on individuals from those regions. Specifically, we examine publicly financed plants built in dispersed locations outside of major urban centers for security reasons during the United States' industrial mobilization for World War II. Wartime plant construction had large and persistent impacts on local development, characterized by an expansion of relatively high-wage manufacturing employment throughout the postwar era. These benefits were shared by incumbent residents; we find men born before WWII in counties where plants were built earned $1,200 (in 2020 dollars) or 2.5 percent more per year in adulthood relative to those born in counterfactual comparison regions, with larger benefits accruing to children of lower-income parents. The balance of evidence suggests that these individuals benefited primarily from the local expansion of higher-wage jobs to which they had access as adults, rather than because of developmental effects from exposure to better environments during childhood.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, LS, PE；JEL：H56, J31, J62, N42, R11, R53
papers.zh_title: 公共工业投资对地方发展与经济流动性的长期影响：来自第二次世界大战的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了政府主导的制造工厂建设对其所在地区以及来自这些地区的个人的长期影响。具体而言，我们考察了美国为第二次世界大战进行工业动员期间，出于安全原因在主要城市中心以外的分散地点建设的公共资助工厂。战时工厂建设对地方发展产生了巨大且持续的影响，其特点是战后时期相对高工资的制造业就业岗位扩张。这些好处惠及了现有居民；我们发现，二战前出生在建有工厂的县的男性，成年后每年比出生在反事实对照地区的男性多赚1200美元（按2020年美元计算）或2.5%，且低收入父母的孩子获得了更大的收益。证据总体表明，这些个人主要受益于他们成年后能够获得的本地高工资工作岗位的扩张，而非由于童年时期接触更好环境所带来的发展效应。

papers.title: Attribute-based Subsidies and Market Power: an Application to Electric Vehicles
papers.authors: Panle Jia Barwick, Hyuk-Soo Kwon, Shanjun Li
papers.abstract: Attribute-based subsidies (ABS) are commonly used to promote the diffusion of energy-efficient products, whose manufacturers often wield significant market power. We develop a theoretical framework for the optimal design of ABS to account for endogenous product attributes, environmental externalities, and market power. We then estimate an equilibrium model of China's vehicle market under ABS and conduct counterfactual simulations to evaluate the welfare impacts of various subsidy designs. Compared to the uniform subsidies, ABS lead to higher product quality and are more effective in mitigating quantity distortions, albeit with a modest environmental cost. Between 42% to 62% of welfare gains under ABS relative to uniform subsidies are attributed to more desirable product attributes, with the remainder explained by reductions in market power distortions. Allowing subsidy redistribution through product-level subsidies, as suggested by our theoretical model, further enhances welfare gains by an additional 34% to 62%. Among the ABS designs, China's notched subsidy design based on driving range leads to vehicle downsizing that undermines welfare benefits. Subsidies based on battery capacity, as implemented in the U.S., achieve the highest welfare gains by effectively balancing market power and environmental impacts.
papers.zh_title: 基于属性的补贴与市场势力：以电动汽车为例
papers.zh_abstract: 基于属性的补贴常用于推广能效产品，而这些产品的制造商通常拥有显著的市场势力。我们构建了一个理论框架，用于在考虑内生产品属性、环境外部性和市场势力的情况下，优化设计基于属性的补贴。然后，我们估计了一个基于属性补贴下中国汽车市场的均衡模型，并进行反事实模拟，以评估各种补贴设计的福利影响。与统一补贴相比，基于属性的补贴带来了更高的产品质量，并且在缓解数量扭曲方面更有效，尽管伴随着适度的环境成本。在基于属性补贴相对于统一补贴的福利收益中，42%至62%归因于更理想的产品属性，其余部分则归因于市场势力扭曲的减少。如我们的理论模型所示，允许通过产品级补贴进行补贴再分配，可进一步将福利收益提高34%至62%。在基于属性的补贴设计中，中国基于续航里程的分级补贴设计导致了车辆小型化，从而削弱了福利收益。而美国实施的基于电池容量的补贴，通过有效平衡市场势力与环境影响，实现了最高的福利收益。

papers.title: Shortening the Path to Productive Investment: Evidence from Input Fairs and Cash Transfers in Malawi
