papers.authors: Shilpa Aggarwal, Dahyeon Jeong, Naresh Kumar, David Sungho Park, Jonathan Robinson, Alan Spearot
papers.abstract: While cash transfers consistently show large effects on immediate outcomes like consumption, limited access to markets may mute their impact on productive investment. In an experiment in Malawi, we cross-cut cash transfers with an "input fair," designed to reduce transport costs to access agricultural inputs. Cash alone increases investment by 27%, while the joint provision of cash and the input fair increases investment by about 40%; thus, the incremental effect of the input fair is equivalent to about a 50% increase compared to the effect of cash alone. Input fairs alone were ineffective.
papers.zh_title: 缩短生产性投资之路：来自马拉维投入品集市和现金转移的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管现金转移在消费等即时结果上持续显示出巨大效果，但有限的市场准入可能会削弱其对生产性投资的影响。在马拉维的一项实验中，我们将现金转移与旨在降低获取农业投入品运输成本的“投入品集市”进行交叉设计。仅现金转移使投资增加了27%，而同时提供现金和投入品集市则使投资增加了约40%；因此，投入品集市的增量效应相当于仅现金转移效应的约50%。仅提供投入品集市则无效。

papers.title: Measuring the Commercial Potential of Science
papers.authors: Roger Masclans, Sharique Hasan, Wesley M. Cohen
papers.abstract: We develop an ex-ante measure of commercial potential of science, an otherwise unobservable variable driving the performance of innovation-intensive firms. To do so, we rely on LLMs and neural networks to predict whether scientific articles will influence firms’ use of science. Incorporating time-varying models and the quantification of uncertainty, the measure is validated through both traditional methods and out-of-sample exercises, leveraging a major university’s technology transfer data. To illustrate the methodological contributions of our measure, we apply it to examining the impacts of university reputation and university privatization of science, finding that firms’ reliance on reputation may lead to foregone opportunities, and privatization (i.e., patenting) appears to increase firms’ use of the science of one university. We make our measure and method available to researchers.
papers.meta: Programs：PR；JEL：O3, O30, O31, O32, O33, O34, O35, O36, O38, O39
papers.zh_title: 衡量科学的商业潜力
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一种事前衡量科学商业潜力的方法，这是一个驱动创新密集型公司绩效但原本不可观测的变量。为此，我们依赖大语言模型和神经网络来预测科学文章是否会影响企业对科学的使用。该衡量方法结合了时变模型和不确定性量化，并通过传统方法和样本外练习进行了验证，利用了某所主要大学的技术转移数据。为了说明我们衡量方法的方法论贡献，我们将其应用于考察大学声誉和大学科学私有化的影响，发现企业对声誉的依赖可能导致错失机会，而私有化（即专利化）似乎增加了企业对某所大学科学的使用。我们向研究人员提供我们的衡量方法和工具。

papers.title: 3D-PCA: Factor Models with Restrictions
papers.authors: Martin Lettau
papers.abstract: This paper proposes latent factor models for multidimensional panels called 3D-PCA. Factor weights are constructed from a small set of dimension-specific building blocks, which give rise to proportionality restrictions of factor weights. While the set of feasible factors is restricted, factors with long/short structures often found in pricing factors are admissible. I estimate the model using a 3-dimensional data set of double-sorted portfolios of 11 characteristics. Factors estimated by 3D-PCA have higher Sharpe ratios and smaller cross-sectional pricing errors than models with PCA or Fama-French factors. Since factor weights are subject to restrictions, the number of free parameters is small. Consequently, the model produces robust results in short time series and performs well in recursive out-of-sample estimations.
papers.zh_title: 3D-PCA：具有约束的因子模型
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提出了针对多维面板数据的潜在因子模型，称为3D-PCA。因子权重由一小组特定维度的构建块构成，这导致了因子权重的比例约束。虽然可行因子的集合受到限制，但定价因子中常见的多空结构因子是可接受的。我使用一个包含11个特征的双重排序投资组合的三维数据集来估计模型。与使用PCA或Fama-French因子的模型相比，通过3D-PCA估计的因子具有更高的夏普比率和更小的横截面定价误差。由于因子权重受到约束，自由参数的数量很少。因此，该模型在短时间序列中产生稳健的结果，并在递归样本外估计中表现良好。

papers.title: Navigating Higher Education Insurance: An Experimental Study on Demand and Adverse Selection
papers.authors: Sidhya Balakrishnan, Eric Bettinger, Michael S. Kofoed, Dubravka Ritter, Douglas A. Webber, Ege Aksu, Jonathan S. Hartley
papers.abstract: We conduct a survey-based experiment with 2,776 students at a non-profit university to analyze income insurance demand in education financing. We offered students a hypothetical choice: either a federal loan with income-driven repayment or an income-share agreement (ISA), with randomized framing of downside protections. Emphasizing income insurance increased ISA uptake by 43%. We observe that students are responsive to changes in contract terms and possible student loan cancellation, which is evidence of preference adjustment or adverse selection. Our results indicate that framing specific terms can increase demand for higher education insurance to potentially address risk for students with varying outcomes.
papers.zh_title: 导航高等教育保险：关于需求与逆向选择的实验研究
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在一所非营利大学对2776名学生进行了一项基于调查的实验，以分析教育融资中的收入保险需求。我们向学生提供了一种假设选择：要么是带有收入驱动还款的联邦贷款，要么是收入分享协议，并对下行保护进行了随机框架设计。强调收入保险使收入分享协议的采纳率提高了43%。我们观察到学生对合同条款的变化以及可能的学生贷款取消有反应，这是偏好调整或逆向选择的证据。我们的结果表明，对特定条款进行框架设计可以增加对高等教育保险的需求，从而可能应对结果各异的学生所面临的风险。

papers.title: Effects of COVID-19 Shutdowns on Domestic Violence in the U.S.
papers.authors: Yutong Chen, Amalia R. Miller, Carmit Segal, Melissa K. Spencer
papers.abstract: This chapter examines the impact of COVID-19 shutdowns on domestic violence (DV) in the United States. Despite widespread concerns that pandemic shutdowns could increase DV, initial studies found mixed evidence that varied across data sources and locations. We review the evolving literature on the effects of the pandemic and highlight results from studies that examine multiple measures of DV across a common set of large cities. These studies show that the conflicting early results are due to opposite effects of pandemic shutdowns on two measures of DV in police data: an increase in domestic violence 911 calls and a decrease in DV crime reports. In theory, this divergence can come from either higher DV reporting rates, possibly because of additional media attention to DV and greater third-party calling, or from lower policing intensity for DV crimes. Prior evidence from police data and other sources supports the conclusion that the increase in calls came from greater reporting, while the incidence of criminal DV decreased. Finally, we present new evidence drawing on police and hospitals records from across the state of California to show that DV crimes and hospital emergency department (ED) visits were both lower during pandemic shutdowns.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, LE, LS, PE；JEL：I18, J12, J16, K42
papers.zh_title: 新冠疫情封锁对美国家庭暴力的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本章考察了新冠疫情封锁对美国家庭暴力的影响。尽管普遍担心疫情封锁可能增加家庭暴力，但初步研究发现证据不一，且因数据来源和地点而异。我们回顾了关于疫情影响的不断发展的文献，并重点介绍了在一组共同的大城市中考察多种家庭暴力衡量指标的研究结果。这些研究表明，早期相互矛盾的结果源于疫情封锁对警方数据中两种家庭暴力衡量指标产生了相反的影响：家庭暴力911报警电话增加，而家庭暴力犯罪报告减少。理论上，这种分歧可能源于更高的家庭暴力报告率（可能是因为媒体对家庭暴力的额外关注和更多的第三方报警），或者源于警方对家庭暴力犯罪的执法力度降低。先前来自警方数据和其他来源的证据支持了这样的结论：报警电话的增加源于更高的报告率，而犯罪性家庭暴力的发生率则下降了。最后，我们利用加州全州的警方和医院记录提供了新证据，表明在疫情封锁期间，家庭暴力犯罪和医院急诊科就诊量均有所下降。

papers.title: The Missing Link? Using LinkedIn Data to Measure Race, Ethnic, and Gender Differences in Employment Outcomes at Individual Companies
papers.authors: Alexander Berry, Elizabeth M. Maloney, David Neumark
papers.abstract: Stronger enforcement of discrimination laws can help to reduce disparities in economic outcomes with respect to race, ethnicity, and gender in the United States. However, the data necessary to detect possible discrimination and to act to counter it is not publicly available – in particular, data on racial, ethnic, and gender disparities within specific companies. In this paper, we explore and develop methods to use information extracted from publicly available LinkedIn data to measure the racial, ethnic, and gender composition of company workforces. We use predictive tools based on both names and pictures to identify race, ethnicity, and gender. We show that one can use LinkedIn data to obtain reasonably reliable measures of workforce demographic composition by race, ethnicity, and gender, based on validation exercises comparing estimates from scraped LinkedIn data to two sources: ACS data, and company diversity or EEO-1 reports. We apply our methods to study the race, ethnic, and gender composition of workers who were hired and those who experienced mass layoffs at two large companies. Finally, we explore using LinkedIn data to measure race, ethnic, and gender differences in promotion. In our analyses of layoffs and promotions, we find suggestive evidence of discrimination at some of the companies we study, including evidence of “intersectional” discrimination against black and Hispanic women.
papers.zh_title: 缺失的环节？利用领英数据衡量个别公司在种族、民族和性别方面的就业结果差异
papers.zh_abstract: 加强反歧视法律的执行有助于减少美国在种族、民族和性别方面经济结果的差异。然而，检测可能存在的歧视并采取行动所需的数据——特别是特定公司内部种族、民族和性别差异的数据——并未公开。在本文中，我们探索并开发了利用从公开可用的领英数据中提取信息来衡量公司劳动力种族、民族和性别构成的方法。我们使用基于姓名和照片的预测工具来识别种族、民族和性别。我们通过验证练习，将抓取的领英数据估算结果与两个来源（美国社区调查数据和公司多样性或EEO-1报告）进行比较，表明可以利用领英数据获得关于劳动力人口统计构成（按种族、民族和性别划分）的相当可靠的衡量指标。我们应用这些方法研究了两家大型公司中被雇佣员工以及经历大规模裁员员工的种族、民族和性别构成。最后，我们探索了利用领英数据衡量晋升中的种族、民族和性别差异。在对裁员和晋升的分析中，我们发现了所研究的一些公司存在歧视的暗示性证据，包括针对黑人和西班牙裔女性的“交叉性”歧视证据。

papers.title: Book Value Risk Management of Banks: Limited Hedging, HTM Accounting, and Rising Interest Rates
papers.authors: João Granja, Erica Xuewei Jiang, Gregor Matvos, Tomasz Piskorski, Amit Seru
papers.abstract: We document that as interest rates rose in 2022, banks limited the impact on the accounting value of their assets but left most long-duration assets exposed to interest rate risk. Call report and SEC data show that only about 6% of U.S. banking assets were hedged with derivatives, and even the heaviest users hedged only a small share of their portfolios. Rather than hedge market-value risk, banks relied on held-to-maturity (HTM) accounting to shield book capital, reclassifying roughly $1 trillion of securities as HTM once rates began to rise. More vulnerable banks, especially those overseen by less stringent state regulators, were more likely to shift into HTM. We develop a simple model of how capital regulation, accounting rules, and bank incentives interact in determining whether banks hedge interest rate risk or recapitalize. Capital regulation can reduce run risk, particularly when equity holders are unwilling to hedge or raise new capital. HTM accounting can help well-capitalized banks avoid the costs of excessively tight capital requirements, but it can also enable weaker, moderately-capitalized, banks to window-dress capital ratios, leaving them susceptible to runs. Incorporating deposit franchise value into regulatory capital without considering run risk may further weaken the effectiveness of capital regulation. These findings carry important implications for regulatory capital accounting and risk-management practices across the banking sector.
papers.zh_title: 银行账面价值风险管理：有限对冲、持有至到期会计与利率上升
papers.zh_abstract: 我们记录了在2022年利率上升时，银行限制了对其资产会计价值的影响，但使大多数长期资产暴露于利率风险之下。呼叫报告和证券交易委员会数据显示，只有约6%的美国银行资产通过衍生品进行了对冲，即使是最重度使用者也只对冲了其投资组合的一小部分。银行没有对冲市场价值风险，而是依赖持有至到期会计来保护账面资本，在利率开始上升后将大约1万亿美元的证券重新分类为持有至到期。更脆弱的银行，尤其是那些由监管较宽松的州级机构监管的银行，更有可能转向持有至到期。我们建立了一个简单模型，说明资本监管、会计规则和银行激励如何相互作用，决定银行是对冲利率风险还是进行资本重组。资本监管可以降低挤兑风险，尤其是在股东不愿对冲或筹集新资本时。持有至到期会计可以帮助资本充足的银行避免过于严格的资本要求带来的成本，但它也可能使较弱、资本适中的银行粉饰资本比率，使其容易遭受挤兑。在不考虑挤兑风险的情况下将存款特许经营权价值纳入监管资本，可能进一步削弱资本监管的有效性。这些发现对银行业监管资本会计和风险管理实践具有重要启示。

papers.title: The Influence of Occupational Licensing on Workforce Transitions to Retirement
papers.authors: Yun taek Oh, Morris M. Kleiner
papers.abstract: Ways of leaving the labor force has been an understudied aspect of labor market outcomes. Labor market institutions such as occupational licensing may influence how individuals transition to retirement. When and how workers transition from career jobs to full retirement may contribute to pre- and post-retirement well-being. Previous investigations of retirement pathways focused on the patterns and outcomes of retirement transitions, yet the influence of occupational licensing on retirement transition has not been analyzed. In this study, we use the Current Population Survey and Survey of Income and Program Participation to investigate how occupational licensing influences American later-career workers’ choice of retirement pathways. Our results show that licensed workers are less likely to choose to change careers but more likely to reduce work hours in transitioning out of the workforce. These results are consistent with the findings that licensed workers receive more benefits in the form of preferable retirement options, suggesting that these workers tend to have higher wages, benefits, and flexibility even toward the end of their careers.
papers.meta: Programs：LS；JEL：J0, J26, J3, J30, J32, J33, J40, J44
papers.zh_title: 职业许可对劳动力向退休过渡的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 离开劳动力市场的方式一直是劳动力市场结果中研究不足的一个方面。职业许可等劳动力市场制度可能影响个人向退休过渡的方式。工人从职业生涯工作过渡到完全退休的时间和方式可能影响退休前后的福祉。以往对退休路径的研究侧重于退休过渡的模式和结果，但尚未分析职业许可对退休过渡的影响。在本研究中，我们使用当前人口调查和收入与项目参与调查来调查职业许可如何影响美国晚期职业工人对退休路径的选择。我们的结果表明，持有执照的工人在退出劳动力市场时，不太可能选择转行，但更可能减少工作时间。这些结果与持有执照的工人以更优退休选择形式获得更多福利的发现一致，表明这些工人即使在职业生涯末期也倾向于拥有更高的工资、福利和灵活性。

papers.title: Aggregate Demand Externality and Self-Fulfilling Default Cycles
papers.authors: Jess Benhabib, Feng Dong, Pengfei Wang, Zhenyang Xu
papers.abstract: We develop a model of self-fulfilling default cycles with demand externality a la Dixit- Stiglitz to explain the recurrent clustered defaults observed in the data. The literature reports that observable fundamental factors alone are insufficient to explain the cluster. A decline in aggregate output reduces the value of firms and increases their probability of default. As defaults take more firms out of production, aggregate output declines further, creating a positive feedback loop that generates multiple equilibria and self-fulfilling default cycles. Our global analysis using Bogdanov-Takens bifurcation reveals the existence of multiple or even infinite paths that satisfy all equilibrium conditions. Moreover, a family of periodic orbits can emerge in the perfect foresight equilibrium. Our model is consistent with the view that business cycles arise largely because the economy’s internal forces tend to endogenously generate cyclical mechanisms (Beaudry et al., 2020).
papers.zh_title: 总需求外部性与自我实现的违约周期
papers.zh_abstract: 我们建立了一个具有迪克西特-斯蒂格利茨式需求外部性的自我实现违约周期模型，以解释数据中观察到的反复出现的集群违约现象。文献报告称，仅凭可观测的基本面因素不足以解释这种集群现象。总产出的下降会降低企业价值并增加其违约概率。随着违约使更多企业退出生产，总产出进一步下降，形成正反馈循环，产生多重均衡和自我实现的违约周期。我们使用博格丹诺夫-塔肯斯分岔进行的全局分析揭示了存在多条甚至无限条满足所有均衡条件的路径。此外，在完美预见均衡中可能出现一族周期轨道。我们的模型与以下观点一致：经济周期很大程度上源于经济内部力量倾向于内生地产生周期性机制。

papers.title: Contracts with Interdependent Preferences
papers.authors: Debraj Ray, Marek Weretka
papers.abstract: A principal contracts with multiple agents, as in Lazear and Rosen (1981) and Green and Stokey (1983). The setup is classical except for the assumption that agents have interdependent preferences. We characterize cost effective contracts, and relate the direction of co-movement in rewards — “joint liability” (positive) or “tournaments” (negative) — to the assumed structure of preference interdependence. We also study the implications of preference interdependence for the principal’s payoffs. We identify two asymmetries. First, the optimal contract leans towards joint liability rather than tournaments, especially in larger teams, in a sense made precise in the paper. Second, when the mechanism-design problem is augmented by robustness constraints designed to eliminate multiple equilibria, the principal may prefer teams linked via adversarial rather than altruistic preferences.
papers.zh_title: 具有相互依赖偏好的契约
papers.zh_abstract: 一个委托人与多个代理人签订契约，如拉齐尔和罗森（1981）以及格林和斯托基（1983）所述。除了假设代理人具有相互依赖的偏好外，该设定是经典的。我们刻画了成本有效的契约，并将报酬共同变动方向——“连带责任”（正向）或“锦标赛”（负向）——与假定的偏好相互依赖结构联系起来。我们还研究了偏好相互依赖对委托人收益的影响。我们识别出两种不对称性。首先，最优契约倾向于连带责任而非锦标赛，尤其是在较大的团队中，其含义在文中精确阐述。其次，当机制设计问题通过旨在消除多重均衡的稳健性约束得到增强时，委托人可能偏好通过对抗性而非利他性偏好联系起来的团队。

papers.title: Enforcement Risk and Screening in Rental Markets: Evidence from Eviction Moratoria
papers.authors: Alina Arefeva, Kay Jowers, Qihui Hu, Christopher Timmins
papers.abstract: We combine a hand-collected dataset on state eviction moratoria with a nationwide field experiment of more than 25,000 rental inquiries to study how contract enforcement affects screening in rental housing markets. Using staggered moratorium expirations, we show that property managers discriminated more against minority renters when eviction enforcement was suspended. Linking inquiries to tenant address histories, we find that non-responses translated into different move-in patterns and reduced property owners’ returns through foregone leasing opportunities. A simple search model rationalizes these responses as property managers re-optimize when enforcement is suspended.
papers.meta: Programs：PE；JEL：D83, G18, G21, G32, J15, R31
papers.zh_title: 租赁市场中的执行风险与筛选：来自驱逐暂停令的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们将手工收集的州级驱逐暂停令数据与一项涵盖超过25,000次租赁咨询的全国性实地实验相结合，研究合同执行如何影响租赁住房市场中的筛选。利用暂停令到期的时间差异，我们表明当驱逐执行暂停时，物业经理对少数族裔租户的歧视加剧。通过将咨询与租户地址历史记录关联，我们发现未回复转化为不同的迁入模式，并通过放弃的租赁机会降低了业主的回报。一个简单的搜索模型将这些反应合理化，即物业经理在执行暂停时重新优化其行为。

papers.title: How Does Expropriation Risk Affect Innovation?
papers.authors: Jose-Miguel Benavente, Claudio Bravo-Ortega, Pablo Egaña-delSol, Bronwyn H. Hall
papers.abstract: We analyze how expropriation risk reduces incentives for innovation and reallocates resources from the innovative sector, building on Romer’s(1990) model. Our framework predicts the R&D expenditure, the share of human capital in R&D, the number of patents, technical progress, and economic growth are all lower due to lower expected profits and patent devaluation in the presence of expropriation risks. Empirical analyses, based on a LASSO Instrumental Variable approach and a novel comprehensive dataset spanning nearly two decades, confirm our theoretical predictions. We find robust evidence that expropriation risk, such as corruption, negatively impacts innovation by reducing R&D expenditure, human capital in R&D, number of patents, scientific publications, and the Economic Complexity Index, which is our proxy for technical progress. These findings highlight the detrimental effects of expropriation risk on innovation and economic development at the country level.
papers.zh_title: 征收风险如何影响创新？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们基于罗默（1990）的模型，分析了征收风险如何降低创新激励并将资源从创新部门重新配置。我们的框架预测，由于存在征收风险，预期利润降低和专利贬值，导致研发支出、研发中的人力资本份额、专利数量、技术进步和经济增长均较低。基于LASSO工具变量方法和一个涵盖近二十年的新颖综合数据集的实证分析，证实了我们的理论预测。我们发现了稳健的证据，表明征收风险（如腐败）通过减少研发支出、研发中的人力资本、专利数量、科学出版物以及作为技术进步代理变量的经济复杂性指数，对创新产生负面影响。这些发现突显了征收风险在国家层面对创新和经济发展的不利影响。

papers.title: Blended Finance
papers.authors: Caroline Flammer, Thomas Giroux, Geoffrey Heal
papers.abstract: Blended finance—the use of public and philanthropic funding to crowd in private capital—has emerged as a potential tool for financing sustainable development. Yet little is known about the design of blended finance contracts. We develop a conceptual framework in which development finance institutions (DFIs) allocate concessional capital across projects to maximize societal impact while crowding in private investors. Our framework highlights a trade-off between sustainability impact and the amount of concessionality required to make projects commercially viable and characterizes how DFIs optimally combine different instruments, including concessional debt, junior equity tranches, and risk management facilities. We then provide empirical evidence on blended finance using deal-level data from a major DFI. Consistent with our conceptual framework, projects with higher anticipated sustainability impact receive greater concessionality. Moreover, concessionality is higher in countries with greater political risk and information asymmetries, and these projects are more likely to include risk management provisions. Our findings provide new evidence on how DFIs deploy catalytic capital to mobilize private investment in sustainable development.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, DEV, EEE, PE；JEL：G23, H41, O1, Q01, Q14
papers.zh_title: 混合融资
papers.zh_abstract: 混合融资——利用公共和慈善资金撬动私人资本——已成为为可持续发展融资的潜在工具。然而，人们对混合融资契约的设计知之甚少。我们开发了一个概念框架，其中开发金融机构在项目间分配优惠资本，以最大化社会影响，同时撬动私人投资者。我们的框架强调了可持续性影响与使项目具有商业可行性所需的优惠程度之间的权衡，并刻画了开发金融机构如何最优地组合不同工具，包括优惠债务、次级股权层级和风险管理设施。然后，我们利用一家主要开发金融机构的交易层面数据，提供了关于混合融资的实证证据。与我们的概念框架一致，预期可持续性影响更高的项目获得了更大的优惠性。此外，在政治风险和不对称信息较高的国家，优惠性更高，并且这些项目更可能包含风险管理条款。我们的发现为开发金融机构如何部署催化资本以动员私人投资于可持续发展提供了新证据。

papers.title: Promoting Public Health with Blunt Instruments: Evidence from Vaccine Mandates
papers.authors: Rahi Abouk, John S. Earle, Johanna Catherine Maclean, Sungbin Park
papers.abstract: We study the effect of mandates requiring COVID-19 vaccination among healthcare industry workers adopted in 2021 in the United States. There are long-standing worker shortages in the U.S. healthcare industry, pre-dating the COVID-19 pandemic. The impact of COVID-19 vaccine mandates on shortages is ex ante ambiguous. If mandates increase perceived safety of the healthcare industry, marginal workers may be drawn to healthcare, relaxing shortages. On the other hand, if marginal workers are vaccine hesitant or averse, then mandates may push workers away from the industry and exacerbate shortages. We combine monthly data from the Current Population Survey 2021 to 2022 with difference-in-differences methods to study the effects of state vaccine mandates on the probability of working in healthcare, and of employment transitions into and out of the industry. Our findings suggest that vaccine mandates may have worsened healthcare workforce shortages: following adoption of a state-level mandate, the probability of working in the healthcare industry declines by 6%. Effects are larger among workers in healthcare-specific occupations, who leave the industry at higher rates in response to mandates and are slower to be replaced than workers in non-healthcare occupations. Findings suggest trade-offs faced by health policymakers seeking to achieve multiple health objectives.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, LS, PE；JEL：H70, I1, I11, J20
papers.zh_title: 用钝器促进公共卫生：来自疫苗强制令的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了2021年美国通过的针对医疗行业从业者的新冠疫苗强制令的效果。美国医疗行业长期存在劳动力短缺问题，这早在新冠疫情之前就已存在。新冠疫苗强制令对劳动力短缺的影响在事前是不确定的。如果强制令提高了医疗行业的感知安全性，边际劳动者可能会被吸引到医疗行业，从而缓解短缺。另一方面，如果边际劳动者对疫苗犹豫或反感，那么强制令可能会将劳动者推离该行业，加剧短缺。我们将2021年至2022年当前人口调查的月度数据与双重差分方法相结合，研究州级疫苗强制令对在医疗行业工作概率以及进入和离开该行业的就业转换的影响。我们的研究结果表明，疫苗强制令可能加剧了医疗劳动力短缺：在州级强制令实施后，在医疗行业工作的概率下降了6%。这种效应在医疗特定职业的工人中更大，他们因强制令而离开该行业的比率更高，并且比非医疗职业的工人更慢被替代。研究结果揭示了寻求实现多重健康目标的卫生政策制定者所面临的权衡取舍。

papers.title: Explorations of Cumulative Advantage Using Data on French Physicists
papers.authors: Bronwyn H. Hall, Jacques Mairesse
papers.abstract: We use a large dataset of approximately 1500 physicists employed by the Centre National de la Recherche Scientifique (CNRS) in France to investigate the role of cumulative advantage in their publication career. Measuring output by time series of the number of publications and the number of cite-weighted publications for each physicist, we find that the simple stylized facts predicted by cumulative advantage hold only weakly for these physicists. However, regressions with fixed effects, life cycle effects, and past productivity provide strong evidence that cumulative advantage matters for future productivity. In future work, we plan to compare this sample with those from other countries that have different systems for the conduct of scientific research.
papers.zh_title: 利用法国物理学家数据探索累积优势
papers.zh_abstract: 我们使用一个包含法国国家科学研究中心（CNRS）约1500名物理学家的庞大数据集，研究累积优势在其发表生涯中的作用。通过以每位物理学家发表论文数量和引用加权论文数量的时间序列来衡量产出，我们发现累积优势预测的简单典型事实对这些物理学家仅微弱成立。然而，包含固定效应、生命周期效应和过去生产力的回归分析提供了强有力的证据，表明累积优势对未来生产力至关重要。在未来的工作中，我们计划将此样本与其他具有不同科学研究体系国家的样本进行比较。

papers.title: Deposit Insurance, Deposit Competition, and Bank Instability
papers.authors: Matthew S. Jaremski, Steven Sprick Schuster
papers.abstract: The lack of full deposit insurance coverage might lead to additional financial instability during crises if uninsured depositors move funds to more secure institutions. Because the broad coverage of modern systems makes this dynamic hard to test, we study the role that the U.S. Postal Savings System, which provided insured accounts at some post offices, played in the Great Depression. Postal savings was associated with increased depositor withdrawals at banks in the same town. Using an IV that identifies exogenous variation in postal saving, we find that banks were more likely to close when a nearby post office accepted deposits.
papers.zh_title: 存款保险、存款竞争与银行不稳定性
papers.zh_abstract: 在危机期间，如果未投保的储户将资金转移到更安全的机构，缺乏完全的存款保险覆盖可能导致额外的金融不稳定。由于现代系统的广泛覆盖使得这种动态难以检验，我们研究了美国邮政储蓄系统（该系统在某些邮局提供保险账户）在大萧条时期所扮演的角色。邮政储蓄与同一城镇银行储户提款的增加有关。使用识别邮政储蓄外生变化的工具变量，我们发现当附近邮局接受存款时，银行更有可能倒闭。

papers.title: Project Development with Delegated Bargaining: The Role of Elevated Hurdle Rates
papers.authors: John W. Barry, Bruce I. Carlin, Alan D. Crane, John Graham
papers.abstract: During project development, costs are endogenously determined through delegated bargaining with counterparties. In surveys, nearly 80% of CFOs report using an elevated hurdle rate, the implications of which we explore in a delegated bargaining model. We show that elevated hurdle rates can convey a bargaining advantage that exceeds the opportunity cost of forgone projects, whether hurdle rate buffers arise for strategic or non-strategic reasons. Using CFO survey data, we find buffer use is negatively related to the cost of capital and ex ante bargaining power, consistent with the model, and that realized returns exhibit “beat the hurdle rate benchmark” behavior.
papers.zh_title: 委托谈判下的项目开发：高门槛利率的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 在项目开发过程中，成本是通过与交易对手的委托谈判内生决定的。在调查中，近80%的首席财务官报告使用高门槛利率，我们在一个委托谈判模型中探讨了其含义。我们表明，无论门槛利率缓冲是出于战略原因还是非战略原因，高门槛利率都可以传递一种谈判优势，这种优势超过了放弃项目的机会成本。使用首席财务官调查数据，我们发现缓冲的使用与资本成本和事前谈判能力负相关，这与模型一致，并且实现的回报表现出“超越门槛利率基准”的行为。

papers.title: “Something Works” in U.S. Jails: Misconduct and Recidivism Effects of the IGNITE Program
papers.authors: Marcella Alsan, Arkey M. Barnett, Peter Hull, Crystal Yang
papers.abstract: A longstanding and influential view in U.S. correctional policy is that “nothing works” when it comes to rehabilitating incarcerated individuals. We revisit this hypothesis by studying an innovative law-enforcement-led program launched in the county jail of Flint, Michigan: Inmate Growth Naturally and Intentionally Through Education (IGNITE). We develop an instrumental variable approach to estimate the effects of IGNITE exposure, which leverages quasi-random court delays that cause individuals to spend more time in jail both before and after the program’s launch. Holding time in jail fixed, we find that one additional month of IGNITE exposure reduces weekly misconduct within jail and three-month recidivism by 25% and 24%, respectively, with the recidivism effects growing over time. Surveys of staff and community members, along with administrative test score records and within-jail text messages, suggest that cultural change and improved literacy and numeracy scores as contributing mechanisms.
papers.zh_title: 美国监狱中“有些方法有效”：IGNITE项目对不当行为和累犯的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 美国矫正政策中一个长期且具有影响力的观点是，在改造被监禁者方面“没有方法有效”。我们通过研究密歇根州弗林特县监狱启动的一项创新的执法主导项目——通过教育自然且有意识地促进囚犯成长（IGNITE）——来重新审视这一假设。我们开发了一种工具变量方法来估计IGNITE暴露的影响，该方法利用了准随机的法庭延迟，导致个人在项目启动前后在监狱中度过更长时间。在控制监狱时间不变的情况下，我们发现额外一个月的IGNITE暴露分别将监狱内的每周不当行为和三个月累犯率降低了25%和24%，并且累犯效应随时间增长。对工作人员和社区成员的调查，以及行政考试成绩记录和监狱内短信，表明文化变革以及读写和计算能力的提高是促成机制。

papers.title: Anatomy of Technology and Tasks in the Establishment
papers.authors: Xavier Cirera, Diego A. Comin, Marcio Cruz
papers.abstract: We construct a grid that covers the key business functions of an establishment and the main technologies used in each of them. We populate this grid with data from over 20,000 establishments in 15 countries. We use this dataset to document novel “facts” about how establishments use technology, the sourcing of business functions, the specialization of establishments from a task perspective, the measurement of technology, and the relationship between technology sophistication and productivity across establishments. We find that differences in technology sophistication account for 31% of cross-establishment dispersion in productivity and for more than half of the agricultural productivity gap.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, EFG, ITI, LS, PR；JEL：O33
papers.zh_title: 企业内部技术与任务的剖析
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个网格，覆盖了企业的主要业务功能以及每个功能中使用的主要技术。我们用来自15个国家超过20,000家企业的数据填充了这个网格。我们利用这个数据集记录了关于企业如何使用技术、业务功能的来源、从任务角度看的专业化、技术衡量以及跨企业技术复杂性与生产力之间关系的新“事实”。我们发现，技术复杂性的差异解释了跨企业生产力差异的31%，以及农业生产力差距的一半以上。

papers.title: When to Appease and When to Punish: Hitler, Putin, and Hamas
papers.authors: Lee E. Ohanian, David K. Levine
papers.abstract: Much has been written about deterrence, the process of committing to punish an adversary to prevent an attack. But in sufficiently rich environments where attacks evolve over time, formulating a strategy involves not only deterrence but also appeasement, the less costly process of not responding to an attack. This paper develops a model that integrates these two processes to analyze the equilibrium time paths of attacks, punishment, and appeasement. We study an environment in which a small attack is launched and can be followed by a larger attack. There are pooling and separating equilibria. The pooling equilibrium turns the common intuition that appeasement is a sign of weakness, inviting subsequent attacks, on its head, because appeasement is a sign of strength in the pooling case. In contrast, the separating equilibrium captures the common intuition that appeasement is a sign of weakness, but only because deterrence in this equilibrium fails. We interpret several episodes of aggression, appeasement, and deterrence: Neville Chamberlain's responses to Hitler, Putin's invasion of Ukraine, Israel's response to Hamas, Turkey's invasion of Cyprus, and Serbia's attacks in Kosovo.
papers.zh_title: 何时安抚，何时惩罚：希特勒、普京与哈马斯
papers.zh_abstract: 关于威慑——即承诺惩罚对手以防止攻击的过程——已有大量论述。但在攻击随时间演变的足够丰富的环境中，制定策略不仅涉及威慑，还涉及安抚——即不对攻击做出反应的代价较低的过程。本文开发了一个整合这两个过程的模型，以分析攻击、惩罚和安抚的均衡时间路径。我们研究了一个环境，其中小规模攻击发起后可能随之发生更大规模的攻击。存在混同均衡和分离均衡。混同均衡颠覆了安抚是软弱表现、会招致后续攻击的常见直觉，因为在混同情况下，安抚是力量的象征。相反，分离均衡捕捉了安抚是软弱表现的常见直觉，但这仅仅是因为该均衡中的威慑失效了。我们解读了几个涉及侵略、安抚和威慑的事件：内维尔·张伯伦对希特勒的反应、普京入侵乌克兰、以色列对哈马斯的反应、土耳其入侵塞浦路斯以及塞尔维亚在科索沃的攻击。

papers.title: 'Morality and Political Economy' from the Vantage Point of Economics
papers.authors: Benjamin Enke
papers.abstract: This article calls for a greater integration of moral psychology and political economy. While these disciplines were initially deeply intertwined, cross-disciplinary exchange became rare throughout the 20th century. More recently, the tide has shifted again – social scientists of different backgrounds recognized that morality and politico-economic outcomes influence each other in rich bi-directional ways. Because psychologists and economists possess distinct and complementary skill sets, part of this movement consists of productive ‘economic imperialism’ – economists leveraging their empirical toolkit to test and substantiate theories from moral psychology at scale or in the wild. To illustrate this, I present two case studies of recent economics research on prominent ideas in moral psychology. First, the theory that morality is ultimately economically functional – that it evolved as a form of ‘psychological and biological police’ to enforce cooperation in economic production and exchange. Second, that the structure of morality shapes political views and polarization, including on economic issues such as taxation and redistribution. I conclude from these case studies that economists have much to gain from integrating more ideas from moral psychology, and that moral psychologists will be able to make an even more compelling case that morality and politico-economic outcomes influence each other if they engage with research in economics.
papers.zh_title: 从经济学视角看“道德与政治经济学”
papers.zh_abstract: 本文呼吁加强道德心理学与政治经济学的整合。尽管这些学科最初紧密交织，但跨学科交流在整个20世纪变得罕见。最近，潮流再次转变——不同背景的社会科学家认识到道德与政治经济结果以丰富的双向方式相互影响。由于心理学家和经济学家拥有独特且互补的技能，这一运动的一部分包括富有成效的“经济帝国主义”——经济学家利用其实证工具包大规模或在现实环境中检验和证实道德心理学的理论。为了说明这一点，我展示了两个关于道德心理学中著名思想的近期经济学研究案例。首先，道德最终具有经济功能的理论——即道德演变为一种“心理和生物警察”，以强制执行经济生产和交换中的合作。其次，道德结构塑造政治观点和两极分化，包括在税收和再分配等经济问题上。我从这些案例研究中得出结论，经济学家可以从整合更多道德心理学思想中获益良多，而道德心理学家如果与经济学研究互动，将能够更有力地论证道德与政治经济结果相互影响。

papers.title: Risk-Adjusting the Returns to Private Debt Funds
papers.authors: Isil Erel, Thomas Flanagan, Michael S. Weisbach
papers.abstract: Private debt funds are the fastest growing segment of the private capital market. We evaluate their risk-adjusted returns, applying a cash-flow based method to form a replicating portfolio that mimics their risk profiles. Using both equity and debt benchmarks to measure risk, a typical private debt fund produces an insignificant abnormal return to its investors. However, gross-of-fee abnormal returns are positive, and using only debt benchmarks also leads to positive abnormal returns as funds contain equity risks. The rates at which private debt funds lend appear to be high enough to offset the funds’ fees and risks, but not high enough to exceed both their fees and investors' risk-adjusted rates of return.
papers.zh_title: 私人债务基金回报的风险调整
papers.zh_abstract: 私人债务基金是私人资本市场中增长最快的部分。我们评估其风险调整后的回报，采用基于现金流的方法构建一个复制其风险特征的复制组合。通过同时使用股权和债务基准来衡量风险，一个典型的私人债务基金为其投资者产生的异常回报并不显著。然而，扣除费用前的异常回报为正，且仅使用债务基准也会得出正的异常回报，因为基金包含股权风险。私人债务基金的贷款利率似乎足以抵消基金的费用和风险，但不足以同时超过其费用和投资者的风险调整后回报率。

papers.title: The Impact of Unions on Wages in the Public Sector: Evidence from Higher Education
papers.authors: Michael Baker, Yosh Halberstam, Kory Kroft, Alexandre Mas, Derek Messacar
papers.abstract: This paper studies the effects of unionization on the salaries of Canadian university faculty between 1970-2022. The evidence indicates that unionization increases salaries on average by 2 percent in the first year post-unionization and by 6 percent after 6 years. These gains are driven largely by wage increases in the bottom half of the salary distribution, and stem from the introduction of salary floors. The results further reveal that these effects are primarily concentrated between 1970 and 1995 and they are financed by an increase in student enrollment. We do not find any impacts on employment, tuition or government transfers.
papers.zh_title: 工会对公共部门工资的影响：来自高等教育的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了1970年至2022年间工会化对加拿大大学教师工资的影响。证据表明，工会化在工会化后第一年平均使工资增加2%，六年后增加6%。这些收益主要由工资分布下半部分的工资增长驱动，并源于引入工资下限。结果进一步揭示，这些影响主要集中在1970年至1995年间，并且通过增加学生入学率来融资。我们没有发现对就业、学费或政府转移支付有任何影响。

papers.title: Invoicing Currency Choice: Strategic Complementarities and Currency Matching
papers.authors: Yushi Yoshida, Junko Shimizu, Takatoshi Ito, Kiyotaka Sato, Taiyo Yoshimi, Uraku Yoshimoto
papers.abstract: Japanese exporters’ choice of invoice currencies is investigated using newly available official Customs declaration data, which records detailed information, including the trading partners’ names, invoicing currency, and product descriptions. The strategic complementarity mechanism, that is, choosing the same invoice currency as others in the same industry or the same destination market, is found among Japanese exporters. We propose the “broad two-way exporters” whose export destinations and import origins do not necessarily match and the “narrow two-way exporters” whose export destination and import origins match in the same year. It is found that currency matching for exports and imports is as essential as strategic complementarity for two-way exporters, regardless of dominant currency, producer currency, or local currency invoicing. However, as one of this paper’s novelty, we found evidence that newly entering two-way exporters are less concerned about currency matching. Therefore, the currency matching mechanism for two-way exporters is gradually formed as they continue to survive in international markets.
papers.zh_title: 发票货币选择：战略互补性与货币匹配
papers.zh_abstract: 利用新获得的官方海关申报数据（该数据记录了包括贸易伙伴名称、发票货币和产品描述在内的详细信息），研究了日本出口商的发票货币选择。在日本出口商中发现了战略互补性机制，即选择与同行业或同一目的地市场其他出口商相同的发票货币。我们提出了“广义双向出口商”（其出口目的地和进口来源不一定匹配）和“狭义双向出口商”（其出口目的地和进口来源在同一年匹配）。研究发现，对于双向出口商而言，无论采用主导货币、生产者货币还是当地货币计价，进出口的货币匹配与战略互补性同样重要。然而，作为本文的新颖之处之一，我们发现新进入的双向出口商对货币匹配的关切较少。因此，双向出口商的货币匹配机制是在它们持续在国际市场中生存的过程中逐渐形成的。

papers.title: The Geography of Capital Allocation in the Euro Area
papers.authors: Roland Beck, Antonio Coppola, Angus J. Lewis, Matteo Maggiori, Martin Schmitz, Jesse Schreger
papers.abstract: We assess Euro Area financial integration correcting for the role of “onshore offshore financial centers” (OOFCs) within the Euro Area. The OOFCs of Luxembourg, Ireland, and the Netherlands serve dual roles as both hubs of investment fund intermediation and centers of securities issuance by foreign firms. We provide new estimates of Euro Area countries’ bilateral portfolio investments which look through both roles, attributing the wealth held via investment funds to the underlying holders and linking securities issuance to the ultimate parent firms. Our new estimates show that the Euro Area is less financially integrated than it appears, both within the currency union and vis-à-vis the rest of the world. While official data suggests a sharp decline in portfolio home bias for Euro Area countries relative to other developed economies following the introduction of the euro, we demonstrate that this pattern only remains true for bond portfolios, while it is artificially generated by OOFC activities for equity portfolios. Further, using new administrative evidence on the identity of non-Euro Area investors in OOFC funds, we document that the bulk of the positions constituting missing wealth in international financial accounts are now accounted for by United Kingdom counterparts.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, ME, PE；JEL：E0, F0, G0
papers.zh_title: 欧元区资本配置的地理分布
papers.zh_abstract: 我们评估了欧元区的金融一体化，并修正了欧元区内“在岸离岸金融中心”（OOFCs）的作用。卢森堡、爱尔兰和荷兰的OOFCs既充当投资基金中介的枢纽，又充当外国公司证券发行的中心。我们提供了欧元区国家双边组合投资的新估计，这些估计透视了这两种角色，将通过投资基金持有的财富归因于最终持有人，并将证券发行与最终母公司联系起来。我们的新估计表明，无论是在货币联盟内部还是与世界其他地区相比，欧元区的金融一体化程度都比表面上看起来要低。虽然官方数据显示，在引入欧元后，欧元区国家的投资组合本土偏好相对于其他发达经济体急剧下降，但我们证明，这种模式仅对债券组合成立，而对于股票组合，它是由OOFC活动人为产生的。此外，利用关于OOFC基金中非欧元区投资者身份的新行政证据，我们记录了国际金融账户中构成缺失财富的头寸大部分现在由英国交易对手方解释。

papers.title: Not in My Backyard? The Local Impact of Wind and Solar Parks in Brazil
papers.authors: Fabian Scheifele, David Popp
papers.abstract: Support from local citizens is important for the scale-up of renewable energy. We investigate the impact of utility-scale wind and solar parks on employment, GDP and public finances in Brazilian municipalities using a difference-in-differences design with matching. We find a positive employment impact of 1-1.5 jobs/MW in the 15 months preceding the commissioning of a solar park, when the park is under construction, but no impacts thereafter. For wind, we find no employment impacts during the construction phase and potentially a small impact of 0.2-0.25 jobs/MW in the 12 months following commissioning. In the year after commissioning, GDP increases 23% for an average sized solar park and 12% for an average sized wind project. The impacts only decrease slightly in the following years. We also find significant persistent fiscal revenue impacts in wind compared to only a one-time tax revenue increase in solar at the time of construction. Our results provide different implications for policymakers that want to advocate for renewable energy in their towns. While for solar, the main benefit constitutes a short-term increase in low-skilled employment and public revenues, wind energy provides more long-term financial benefits but less local employment opportunities.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE；JEL：E24, H71, J21, O13, O14, Q52
papers.zh_title: 不要在我家后院？巴西风能和太阳能园区的地方影响
papers.zh_abstract: 当地居民的支持对于可再生能源的推广至关重要。我们采用匹配的双重差分设计，研究了公用事业规模的风能和太阳能园区对巴西市政当局就业、GDP和公共财政的影响。我们发现，在太阳能园区投产前的15个月（即建设期间），就业产生1-1.5个工作岗位/兆瓦的正面影响，但此后没有影响。对于风能，我们在建设阶段没有发现就业影响，在投产后的12个月内可能产生0.2-0.25个工作岗位/兆瓦的小幅影响。在投产后的第一年，对于平均规模的太阳能园区，GDP增长23%；对于平均规模的风能项目，GDP增长12%。这些影响在随后几年仅略有下降。我们还发现，与太阳能仅在建设期间一次性税收收入增加相比，风能产生了显著且持续的财政收入影响。我们的结果为希望在其城镇倡导可再生能源的政策制定者提供了不同的启示。对于太阳能而言，主要好处是低技能就业和公共收入的短期增加，而风能则提供更长期的财政收益，但当地就业机会较少。

papers.title: The Effects of Medical Debt Relief: Evidence from Two Randomized Experiments
papers.authors: Raymond Kluender, Neale Mahoney, Francis Wong, Wesley Yin
papers.abstract: Two in five Americans have medical debt, nearly half of whom owe at least $2,500. Concerned by this burden, governments and private donors have undertaken large, high-profile efforts to relieve medical debt. We partnered with RIP Medical Debt (now Undue Medical Debt) to conduct two randomized experiments that relieved medical debt with a face value of $169 million for 83,401 people between 2018 and 2020. Our experiments focused on downstream medical debt that had been sold to debt collectors, and one of our experiments straddled an industry-wide pullback in the reporting of medical debt to the credit bureaus, allowing us to estimate the effects of debt relief with and without counterfactual reporting. We track outcomes using credit reports, collections account data, and a multimodal survey. There are three sets of results. First, we find a modest improvement in credit access when there is counterfactual credit reporting, but no impact on credit report outcomes when there is not. Second, we estimate that debt relief causes a moderate but statistically significant reduction in payments of existing medical bills. Third, we find no effects on survey measures of mental and physical health, healthcare utilization, and financial wellness. Taken together, our results indicate that the strong correlations documented in prior research do not translate into causal effects for downstream medical debt relief.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, CF, EH, IO, LS, PE；JEL：G51, I1, I18
papers.zh_title: 医疗债务减免的影响：来自两项随机实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 五分之二的美国人负有医疗债务，其中近一半人至少欠款2500美元。出于对这种负担的担忧，政府和私人捐助者已采取大规模、高知名度的努力来减免医疗债务。我们与RIP医疗债务（现为Undue医疗债务）合作，在2018年至2020年间进行了两项随机实验，为83,401人减免了面值1.69亿美元的医疗债务。我们的实验聚焦于已出售给收债机构的下游医疗债务，其中一项实验恰逢行业范围内向征信机构报告医疗债务的普遍撤回，这使我们能够估计在有和没有反事实报告情况下的债务减免效应。我们使用信用报告、催收账户数据和多模式调查来追踪结果。有三组结果。首先，当存在反事实信用报告时，我们发现信用获取略有改善，但在没有反事实信用报告时，对信用报告结果没有影响。其次，我们估计债务减免导致现有医疗账单支付适度但统计上显著的减少。第三，我们发现对心理健康和身体健康、医疗保健利用以及财务健康的调查指标没有影响。综合来看，我们的结果表明，先前研究中记录的高度相关性并未转化为下游医疗债务减免的因果效应。

papers.title: Inequality and Racial Backlash: Evidence from the Reconstruction Era and the Freedmen’s Bureau
papers.authors: Eric Chyn, Kareem Haggag, Bryan A. Stuart
papers.abstract: How do majority groups respond to a narrowing of inequality in racially polarized environments? We study this question by examining the effects of the Freedmen’s Bureau, an agency created after the U.S. Civil War to provide aid to former slaves and launch institutional reform in the South. We use new historical records and an event study approach to estimate impacts of the Bureau on political economy in the South. In the decade immediately after the war, counties with Bureau field offices had reduced vote shares for Democrats, the major political party that previously championed slavery and opposed Black civil rights during Reconstruction. In the longer-run, we find evidence of backlash in the form of higher Democratic vote shares and increases in several forms of racial violence, including lynchings and attacks against Black schools. This backlash extends through the twentieth century, when we find that counties that once had a Bureau field office have higher rates of second-wave and third-wave Ku Klux Klan activity and lower rates of intergenerational economic mobility. Overall, our results suggest that the initial impacts of the Freedmen’s Bureau stimulated countervailing responses by White majorities who sought to offset social progress of Black Americans.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, LS, PE, POL；JEL：D72, D74, I31, J15, N31
papers.zh_title: 不平等与种族反弹：来自重建时期和自由民局的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 在种族极化环境中，多数群体如何应对不平等的缩小？我们通过研究自由民局（美国内战后创建的一个机构，旨在为前奴隶提供援助并在南方启动制度改革）的影响来探讨这个问题。我们使用新的历史记录和事件研究方法，估计该局对南方政治经济的影响。在战后十年内，设有自由民局外地办事处的县，民主党（在内战期间曾倡导奴隶制并在重建时期反对黑人公民权利的主要政党）的得票率下降。从长期来看，我们发现了反弹的证据，表现为民主党得票率上升以及多种形式的种族暴力（包括私刑和对黑人学校的袭击）增加。这种反弹持续到二十世纪，我们发现曾经设有自由民局外地办事处的县，第二波和第三波三K党活动率更高，代际经济流动性更低。总体而言，我们的结果表明，自由民局的初始影响刺激了白人多数群体的对抗性反应，他们试图抵消美国黑人的社会进步。

papers.title: A Discrimination Report Card
papers.authors: Patrick M. Kline, Evan K. Rose, Christopher R. Walters
papers.abstract: We develop an empirical Bayes ranking procedure that assigns ordinal grades to noisy measurements, balancing the information content of the assigned grades against the expected frequency of ranking errors. Applying the method to a massive correspondence experiment, we grade the race and gender contact gaps of 97 U.S. employers, the identities of which we disclose for the first time. The grades are presented alongside measures of uncertainty about each firm’s contact gap in an accessible report card that is easily adaptable to other settings where ranks and levels are of simultaneous interest.
papers.meta: Programs：LE, LS, PE, TWP；JEL：C11, C13, J71
papers.zh_title: 歧视报告卡
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一种经验贝叶斯排序程序，为有噪声的测量值分配顺序等级，在分配等级的信息内容与预期排序错误频率之间取得平衡。将该方法应用于一项大规模通信实验，我们对97家美国雇主的种族和性别联系差距进行评级，并首次披露这些雇主的身份。这些等级与每个公司联系差距的不确定性度量一起，呈现在一份易于理解的报告卡中，该报告卡可轻松适用于其他对等级和水平同时感兴趣的场合。

papers.title: Quantifying the Uncertainty of Imputed Demographic Disparity Estimates: The Dual-Bootstrap
papers.authors: Benjamin Lu, Jia Wan, Derek Ouyang, Jacob Goldin, Daniel E. Ho
papers.abstract: Measuring average differences in an outcome across racial or ethnic groups is a crucial first step for equity assessments, but researchers often lack access to data on individuals’ races and ethnicities to calculate them. A common solution is to impute the missing race or ethnicity labels using proxies, then use those imputations to estimate the disparity. Conventional standard errors mischaracterize the resulting estimate’s uncertainty because they treat the imputation model as given and fixed, instead of as an unknown object that must be estimated with uncertainty. We propose a dual-bootstrap approach that explicitly accounts for measurement uncertainty and thus enables more accurate statistical inference, which we demonstrate via simulation. In addition, we adapt our approach to the commonly used Bayesian Improved Surname Geocoding (BISG) imputation algorithm, where direct bootstrapping is infeasible because the underlying Census Bureau data are unavailable. In simulations, we find that measurement uncertainty is generally insignificant for BISG except in particular circumstances; bias, not variance, is likely the predominant source of error. We apply our method to quantify the uncertainty of prevalence estimates of common health conditions by race using data from the American Family Cohort.
papers.zh_title: 量化估算的人口统计差异估计的不确定性：双重自助法
papers.zh_abstract: 衡量结果在种族或民族群体间的平均差异是公平评估的关键第一步，但研究人员通常缺乏获取个人种族和民族数据来计算这些差异的途径。一个常见的解决方案是使用代理变量来估算缺失的种族或民族标签，然后使用这些估算值来估计差异。传统的标准误错误地描述了由此产生的估计值的不确定性，因为它们将估算模型视为已知和固定的，而不是一个必须带有不确定性进行估计的未知对象。我们提出了一种双重自助法，明确考虑了测量不确定性，从而能够进行更准确的统计推断，我们通过模拟证明了这一点。此外，我们将我们的方法应用于常用的贝叶斯改进姓氏地理编码（BISG）估算算法，在该算法中，由于底层人口普查局数据不可用，直接自助法不可行。在模拟中，我们发现除了特定情况外，测量不确定性对BISG通常不显著；偏差（而非方差）很可能是误差的主要来源。我们将我们的方法应用于使用美国家庭队列数据，按种族量化常见健康状况患病率估计的不确定性。

papers.title: Ideology, Incidence and the Political Economy of Fuel Taxes: Evidence from the California 2018 Proposition 6
papers.authors: Lucas Epstein, Erich Muehlegger
papers.abstract: In 2018, California voters rejected Proposition 6, a ballot initiative that sought to repeal state gasoline taxes and vehicle fees enacted as part of the 2017 Road Repair and Accountability Act. We study the relationship between support for the proposition, political ideology and the economic burdens imposed by the Act. For every hundred dollars of annual per-household imposed costs, we estimate that support for the proposition rose by 3 - 9 percentage points. Notably, we find that the relationship between voting and the economic burden of the policy is seven times stronger in the most conservative tracts relative to the most liberal tracts. Since conservative areas in California and elsewhere tend to bear a higher burden from transportation and energy taxes than liberal areas, heterogeneity in the response to economic burdens has important implications for the popular support for environmental taxes and the ongoing policy debate about how to finance future road infrastructure.
papers.zh_title: 意识形态、负担与燃油税的政治经济学：来自2018年加州第6号提案的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 2018年，加州选民否决了第6号提案，该投票倡议旨在废除作为2017年《道路修复与责任法案》一部分而颁布的州汽油税和车辆费。我们研究了对该提案的支持、政治意识形态以及该法案所施加的经济负担之间的关系。对于每户每年一百美元的强加成本，我们估计对该提案的支持率上升了3到9个百分点。值得注意的是，我们发现，在最保守的地区，投票与政策经济负担之间的关系比在最自由的地区要强七倍。由于加州及其他地区的保守地区往往比自由地区承受更高的交通和能源税负担，对经济负担反应的异质性对环保税的民众支持度以及关于如何为未来道路基础设施融资的持续政策辩论具有重要意义。

papers.title: Effects of Income on Infant Health: Evidence from the Expanded Child Tax Credit and Pandemic Stimulus Checks
papers.authors: Wei Lyu, George Wehby, Robert Kaestner
papers.abstract: During the COVID-19 pandemic, the federal government issued stimulus checks and expanded the child tax credit. These pandemic payments varied by marital status and the number of children in the household and were substantial with some families receiving several thousand dollars. We exploit this plausibly exogenous variation in income to obtain estimates of the effect income on infant health. We measure the total amount of pandemic payments received during pregnancy, or the year before birth, and examine how this additional income affects birthweight, the incidence of low birth weight, gestational age and fetal growth. Data are from birth certificates and analyses are conducted separately by maternal marital status and education (less than high school or high school) to isolate only the variation in pandemic payments due to differences in the number of children (parity). Estimates indicate that these pandemic cash payments had no statistically significant, or clinically or economically meaningful effects on infant health. Overall, the findings suggest that income transfers during pregnancy will have little effect on socioeconomic disparities in infant health.
papers.zh_title: 收入对婴儿健康的影响：来自扩大的儿童税收抵免和疫情刺激支票的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 在COVID-19疫情期间，联邦政府发放了刺激支票并扩大了儿童税收抵免。这些疫情支付因婚姻状况和家庭中儿童数量而异，且数额可观，一些家庭收到了数千美元。我们利用这种看似外生的收入变化来估计收入对婴儿健康的影响。我们衡量了怀孕期间或出生前一年收到的疫情支付总额，并检验了这笔额外收入如何影响出生体重、低出生体重发生率、孕周和胎儿生长。数据来自出生证明，分析按母亲婚姻状况和教育程度（高中以下或高中）分别进行，以仅隔离因子女数量（胎次）差异导致的疫情支付变化。估计结果表明，这些疫情现金支付对婴儿健康没有统计学上显著、或临床或经济上有意义的影响。总体而言，研究结果表明，怀孕期间的收入转移对婴儿健康的社会经济差异影响甚微。

papers.title: Identification of Marginal Treatment Effects using Subjective Expectations
papers.authors: Joseph S. Briggs, Andrew Caplin, Søren Leth-Petersen, Christopher Tonetti
papers.abstract: We develop a method to identify the individual latent propensity to select into treatment and marginal treatment effects. Identification is achieved with survey data on individuals' subjective expectations of their treatment propensity and of their treatment-contingent outcomes. We use the method to study how child birth affects female labor supply in Denmark. We find limited latent heterogeneity and large short-term effects that vanish by 18 months after birth. We support the validity of the identifying assumptions in this context by using administrative data to show that the average treatment effect on the treated computed using our method and traditional event-study methods are nearly equal. Finally, we study the effects of counterfactual changes to child care cost and quality on female labor supply.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EFG, LS, PE；JEL：C32, C52, C83, J13, J22
papers.zh_title: 利用主观预期识别边际处理效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一种方法来识别个体进入处理的潜在倾向以及边际处理效应。该识别通过关于个体对其处理倾向和处理条件结果的预期的主观预期调查数据实现。我们使用该方法研究生育如何影响丹麦的女性劳动力供给。我们发现有限的潜在异质性以及巨大的短期效应，这些效应在产后18个月消失。我们通过使用行政数据表明，使用我们的方法计算的处理组的平均处理效应与传统事件研究方法的计算结果几乎相等，从而支持了该背景下识别假设的有效性。最后，我们研究了儿童保育成本和质量的假设性变化对女性劳动力供给的影响。

papers.title: Changing Central Bank Pressures and Inflation
papers.authors: Hassan Afrouzi, Marina Halac, Kenneth S. Rogoff, Pierre Yared
papers.abstract: We present a simple long-run aggregate demand and supply framework for evaluating long-run inflation. The framework illustrates how exogenous economic and political economy factors generate central bank pressures that can impact long-run inflation as well as transitions between steady states. We use the analysis to provide a fresh perspective on the forces that drove global inflation downward over the past four decades. We argue that for inflation to remain low and stable in the future, political economy factors, such as strengthened central bank independence or more credible public debt policy, would need to offset the global economic pressures now pushing average long-run inflation upwards.
papers.zh_title: 变化的央行压力与通货膨胀
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个简单的长期总需求和总供给框架来评估长期通胀。该框架说明了外生的经济和政经因素如何产生央行压力，这些压力可以影响长期通胀以及稳态之间的转换。我们利用这一分析为过去四十年推动全球通胀下行的力量提供了一个新的视角。我们认为，为了使通胀在未来保持低位和稳定，政经因素，例如加强央行独立性或更可信的公共债务政策，将需要抵消目前推动平均长期通胀上行的全球经济压力。

papers.title: Mortality Burden From Wildfire Smoke Under Climate Change
papers.authors: Minghao Qiu, Jessica Li, Carlos F. Gould, Renzhi Jing, Makoto Kelp, Marissa Childs, Mathew Kiang, Sam Heft-Neal, Noah Diffenbaugh, Marshall Burke
papers.abstract: Wildfire activity has increased in the US and is projected to accelerate under future climate change. However, our understanding of the impacts of climate change on wildfire smoke and health remains highly uncertain. We quantify the past and future mortality burden in the US due to wildfire smoke fine particulate matter (PM2.5). We construct an ensemble of statistical and machine learning models that link variation in climate to wildfire smoke PM2.5, and empirically estimate smoke PM2.5-mortality relationships using georeferenced data on all recorded deaths in the US from 2006 to 2019. We project that climate-driven increases in future smoke PM2.5 could result in 27,800 excess deaths per year by 2050 under a high warming scenario, a 76% increase relative to estimated 2011-2020 averages. Cumulative excess deaths from wildfire smoke PM2.5 could exceed 700,000 between 2025-2055. When monetized, climate-induced smoke deaths result in annual damages of $244 billion by mid-century, comparable to the estimated sum of all other damages in the US in prior analyses. Our research suggests that the health cost of climate-driven wildfire smoke could be among the most important and costly consequences of a warming climate in the US.
papers.zh_title: 气候变化下野火烟雾的死亡率负担
papers.zh_abstract: 美国的野火活动有所增加，并预计在未来气候变化下会加速。然而，我们对气候变化对野火烟雾和健康影响的理解仍然高度不确定。我们量化了美国过去和未来因野火烟雾细颗粒物（PM2.5）导致的死亡率负担。我们构建了一个统计和机器学习模型的集成，将气候变异与野火烟雾PM2.5联系起来，并使用2006年至2019年美国所有记录死亡的地理参考数据，实证估计了烟雾PM2.5与死亡率之间的关系。我们预测，在高变暖情景下，到2050年，气候驱动的未来烟雾PM2.5增加可能导致每年27,800例超额死亡，比2011-2020年的估计平均值增加76%。2025年至2055年间，野火烟雾PM2.5导致的累计超额死亡可能超过700,000例。当货币化时，到本世纪中叶，气候导致的烟雾死亡每年造成2440亿美元的损失，与先前分析中美国所有其他损失的总和估计值相当。我们的研究表明，气候驱动的野火烟雾的健康成本可能是美国气候变暖最重要且代价最高的后果之一。

papers.title: Taxation of Capital: Capital Levies and Commitment
papers.authors: Robert J. Barro, Varadarajan V. Chari
papers.abstract: Chamley and Judd argued that optimal taxation dictates zero long-run tax rates on capital income, but Straub and Werning found that tax rates may be positive even in the steady state. These models feature a “period-zero problem” in the underlying Ramsey formulation, which omits past commitments but includes future ones. The period-zero policymaker then imposes capital levies on initial assets—directly or indirectly through positive tax rates on future asset income and non-constant tax rates on consumption. Chari, Nicolini, and Teles add commitment by the period-zero policymaker to households’ initial wealth in utility units. In this case, a nonzero capital levy may apply in period zero, future tax rates on asset income equal zero, and tax rates on consumption are constant. Time-consistency fails if future policymakers are unconstrained but holds if commitments to initial wealth in utility units are strict enough each period to motivate each policymaker to choose zero direct capital levies. In that case, a timeless perspective applies where period zero is not special, tax rates on asset income are always zero, and tax rates on consumption are constant. Introduction of uncertainty generates state-contingent levies on assets and random-walk-like variations in consumption tax rates.
papers.zh_title: 资本课税：资本税与承诺
papers.zh_abstract: Chamley和Judd认为最优税收规定资本收入的长期税率应为零，但Straub和Werning发现即使在稳态下税率也可能为正。这些模型在基础的拉姆齐公式中存在一个“第零期问题”，该公式忽略了过去的承诺但包含了未来的承诺。然后，第零期的政策制定者对初始资产征收资本税——直接地或间接地通过对未来资产收入征收正税率和对消费征收非常数税率。Chari、Nicolini和Teles通过第零期政策制定者对以效用单位计量的家庭初始财富的承诺来增加承诺。在这种情况下，第零期可能适用非零的资本税，未来资产收入的税率为零，且消费税率是常数。如果未来的政策制定者不受约束，则时间一致性失败；但如果每个时期对以效用单位计量的初始财富的承诺足够严格，以激励每个政策制定者选择零直接资本税，则时间一致性成立。在这种情况下，适用一种永恒视角，其中第零期并不特殊，资产收入的税率始终为零，且消费税率是常数。引入不确定性会产生状态依存的资产税和类似随机游走的消费税率变化。

papers.title: Beyond Bad Luck: Macroeconomic Implications of Persistent Heterogeneity In Optimism
papers.authors: Oliver Pfäuti, Fabian Seyrich, Jonathan Zinman
papers.abstract: Household savings behavior and financial situations have important implications for macroeconomic fluctuations and policy. They are empirically persistent within households and heterogeneous across them. Yet standard modeling practice assumes ex-ante identical households and accounts for heterogeneity only in shock realizations. We consider persistent heterogeneity in a key aspect of consumer decision making—(biased) beliefs about one’s own future financial situation—and show that it strongly conditionally correlates with actual financial decisions and conditions. We use novel microdata to quantitatively discipline ex-ante optimism heterogeneity in an otherwise standard HANK model. Optimistic bias drives households to spend instead of accumulating buffer stock saving and thereby produces more empirically realistic HtM, wealth, and MPC distributions, with optimistic households exhibiting higher MPCs than their rational counterparts even away from the borrowing constraint. Accounting for optimism makes targeted transfers less stimulative and incentivizing self-insurance less effective, but also implies that public insurance is less distortionary.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PE；JEL：D01, D91, E03, E2, E21, E22, E32, E62, G51, H31, H6
papers.zh_title: 超越坏运气：乐观主义中持久异质性的宏观经济含义
papers.zh_abstract: 家庭储蓄行为和财务状况对宏观经济波动和政策具有重要影响。它们在经验上在家庭内部具有持久性，并在家庭之间具有异质性。然而，标准建模实践假设事前相同的家庭，并且仅通过冲击实现来解释异质性。我们考虑了消费者决策的一个关键方面——关于自身未来财务状况的（有偏）信念——中的持久异质性，并表明它与实际的财务决策和状况具有很强的条件相关性。我们使用新颖的微观数据，在标准的HANK模型中定量地约束了事前乐观主义异质性。乐观偏差驱使家庭消费而不是积累缓冲库存储蓄，从而产生了更符合经验的HtM、财富和MPC分布，其中乐观家庭即使在远离借贷约束的情况下也表现出比理性家庭更高的MPC。考虑乐观主义使得定向转移支付的刺激效果减弱，并使激励自我保险的效果降低，但也意味着公共保险的扭曲性更小。

papers.title: Location Sorting and Endogenous Amenities: Evidence from Amsterdam
papers.authors: Milena Almagro, Tomás Domínguez-Iino
papers.abstract: This paper shows the endogeneity of amenities plays a crucial role in determining the welfare distribution of a city’s residents. We quantify this mechanism by building a dynamic model of residential choice with heterogeneous households, where consumption amenities are the equilibrium outcome of a market for non-tradables. We estimate our model using Dutch microdata and leveraging variation in Amsterdam’s spatial distribution of tourists as a demand shifter, finding significant heterogeneity in residents’ preferences over amenities and in the supply responses of amenities to changes in demand composition. This two-way heterogeneity dictates the degree of horizontal differentiation across neighborhoods, residential sorting, and inequality. Finally, we show the distributional effects of mass tourism depend on this heterogeneity: following rent increases due to growing tourist demand for housing, younger residents—whose amenity preferences are closest to tourists—are compensated by amenities tilting in their favor, while the losses of older residents are amplified.
papers.meta: Programs：IO；JEL：L0, L83, R0, R13, R20, R21
papers.zh_title: 区位选择与内生便利设施：来自阿姆斯特丹的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文表明，便利设施的内生性在决定城市居民福利分布方面起着关键作用。我们通过构建一个包含异质性家庭的动态居住选择模型来量化这一机制，其中消费便利设施是非贸易品市场的均衡结果。我们利用荷兰微观数据，并利用阿姆斯特丹游客空间分布的变化作为需求转移因子来估计我们的模型，发现居民对便利设施的偏好以及便利设施供给对需求构成变化的反应存在显著的异质性。这种双向异质性决定了社区间的水平差异化程度、居住分选和不平等。最后，我们表明大众旅游的分配效应取决于这种异质性：由于游客对住房的需求增长导致租金上涨，年轻居民——其便利设施偏好与游客最接近——因便利设施向有利于他们的方向倾斜而得到补偿，而老年居民的损失则被放大。

papers.title: The Performance of Emerging Markets During the Fed’s Easing and Tightening Cycles: A Cross-Country Resilience Analysis
papers.authors: Joshua Aizenman, Donghyun Park, Irfan A. Qureshi, Gazi Salah Uddin, Jamel Saadaoui
papers.abstract: We investigate the determinants of emerging markets performance during five U.S. Federal Reserve monetary tightening and easing cycles during 2004 - 2023. We study how macroeconomic and institutional conditions of an Emerging Market (EM) at the beginning of a cycle explain EM resilience during each cycle. More specifically, our baseline cross-sectional regressions examine how those conditions affect three measures of resilience, namely bilateral exchange rate against the USD, exchange rate market pressure, and country-specific Morgan Stanley Capital International index (MSCI). We then stack the five cross-sections to build a panel database to investigate potential asymmetry between tightening versus easing cycles. Our evidence indicates that macroeconomic and institutional variables are associated with EM performance, determinants of resilience differ during tightening versus easing cycles, and institutions matter more during difficult times. Our specific findings are largely consistent with economic intuition. For instance, we find that current account balance, international reserves, and inflation are all important determinants of EM resilience.
papers.zh_title: 美联储宽松与紧缩周期中新兴市场的表现：跨国韧性分析
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了2004年至2023年期间，在美国联邦储备系统五次货币紧缩与宽松周期中，新兴市场表现的决定因素。我们探讨了周期开始时新兴市场的宏观经济和制度条件如何解释其在该周期中的韧性。具体而言，我们的基准横截面回归分析了这些条件如何影响三种韧性指标：对美元的双边汇率、汇率市场压力以及特定国家的摩根士丹利资本国际指数。随后，我们将五个横截面数据堆叠构建面板数据库，以研究紧缩周期与宽松周期之间可能存在的非对称性。我们的证据表明，宏观经济和制度变量与新兴市场表现相关，韧性决定因素在紧缩与宽松周期中存在差异，且制度在困难时期更为重要。我们的具体发现与经济直觉基本一致。例如，我们发现经常账户余额、国际储备和通货膨胀都是新兴市场韧性的重要决定因素。

papers.title: The Effect of E-cigarette Taxes on Substance Use
papers.authors: Dhaval M. Dave, Yang Liang, Johanna Catherine Maclean, Caterina Muratori, Joseph J. Sabia
papers.abstract: Public health advocates warn that the rapid growth of legal markets for electronic nicotine delivery systems (ENDS) may generate a “gateway” to marijuana and harder drug consumption, particularly among teenagers. This study explores the effects of ENDS taxes on substance use. We find that a one-dollar increase in ENDS taxes (2023$) is associated with a 1.0 to 1.5 percentage point decline in teen marijuana use and in co-use of ENDS and marijuana. This result is consistent with e-cigarettes and marijuana being economic complements. We also find that youth responses to ENDS taxes, in terms of their ENDS use and spillovers into marijuana use, appear to moderate over the longer term. We find no evidence that ENDS taxes affect drug treatment admissions or consumption of illicit drugs other than marijuana such as cocaine, methamphetamine, or opioids.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LE, PE；JEL：H2, I12, I18, J13
papers.zh_title: 电子烟税对物质使用的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 公共卫生倡导者警告称，电子尼古丁输送系统合法市场的快速增长可能为青少年吸食大麻和更烈性毒品创造“门户”。本研究探讨了电子烟税对物质使用的影响。我们发现，电子烟税每增加1美元（按2023年美元计算），青少年大麻使用以及电子烟与大麻共同使用的比例下降1.0至1.5个百分点。这一结果与电子烟和大麻是经济互补品的结论一致。我们还发现，青少年对电子烟税的反应，即其电子烟使用及向大麻使用的溢出效应，似乎在长期内趋于缓和。我们没有发现证据表明电子烟税会影响药物滥用治疗入院率或除大麻以外的非法药物（如可卡因、甲基苯丙胺或阿片类药物）的消费。

papers.title: What Hundreds of Economic News Events Say About Belief Overreaction in the Stock Market
papers.authors: Francesco Bianchi, Sydney C. Ludvigson, Sai Ma
papers.abstract: We measure the nature and severity of a variety of belief distortions in market reactions to hundreds of economic news events by synthesizing structural estimation with algorithmic machine learning to quantify bias. We find that investors systematically overreact to perceptions about multiple fundamental shocks, a phenomenon we show often dampens rather than amplifies market volatility via a shock composition effect. Such effects imply that the stock market can underreact to news, even when investors overreact to all shocks.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：G1, G12, G4, G41
papers.zh_title: 数百条经济新闻事件揭示的股市信念过度反应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过估计一个结合算法机器学习来量化偏差的结构性资产定价模型，衡量了市场对数百条经济新闻事件反应中各种信念扭曲的性质和严重程度。我们发现，投资者系统性地对多种基本面冲击的感知做出过度反应，我们表明这种现象可以通过冲击构成效应抑制而非放大市场波动。这种冲击构成效应可能导致市场对新闻反应不足，即使投资者对所有冲击都过度反应。

papers.title: Why Do We Dislike Inflation?
papers.authors: Stefanie Stantcheva
papers.abstract: This paper provides new evidence on a long-standing question asked by Shiller (1997): Why do we dislike inflation? I conducted two surveys on representative samples of the US population to elicit people’s perceptions about the impacts of inflation and their reactions to it. The predominant reason for people’s aversion to inflation is the widespread belief that it diminishes their buying power, as neither personal nor general wage increases seem to match the pace of rising prices. As a result, respondents report having to make costly adjustments in their budgets and behaviors, especially among lower-income groups. Inflation also provokes stress, emotional responses, and a sense of inequity, as the wages of high-income individuals are perceived to grow more rapidly amidst inflation. Many respondents believe that firms have considerable discretion in setting wages, opting not to raise them in order to boost profits, rather than being compelled by market dynamics. The potential positive associations of inflation, such as with reduced unemployment or enhanced economic activity, are typically not recognized by respondents. Inflation ranks high in priority among various economic and social issues, with respondents blaming the government and businesses for it. I also highlight a substantial polarization in attitudes towards inflation along partisan lines, as well as across income groups.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, ME, PE, POL；JEL：E12, E40, E50, E70, G5, P43
papers.zh_title: 我们为何厌恶通货膨胀？
papers.zh_abstract: 本文为Shiller（1997）提出的一个长期问题提供了新证据：我们为何厌恶通货膨胀？我对美国人口的代表性样本进行了两项调查，以了解人们对通货膨胀影响的看法及其反应。人们厌恶通货膨胀的主要原因在于普遍认为通胀削弱了购买力，因为个人工资和整体工资的增长似乎都跟不上物价上涨的步伐。因此，受访者表示不得不在预算和行为上做出代价高昂的调整，尤其是在低收入群体中。通货膨胀还会引发压力、情绪反应和不公平感，因为高收入者的工资被认为在通胀期间增长更快。许多受访者认为，企业在设定工资方面拥有相当大的自由裁量权，它们选择不提高工资以增加利润，而非受市场动态所迫。通货膨胀的潜在积极关联，例如与失业率下降或经济活动增强的关系，通常未被受访者认识到。在各种经济和社会问题中，通货膨胀的优先级很高，受访者将其归咎于政府和企业。我还强调了在通货膨胀态度上存在显著的党派分歧以及收入群体间的两极分化。

papers.title: Amazon Self-preferencing in the Shadow of the Digital Markets Act
papers.authors: Joel Waldfogel
papers.abstract: Regulators around the world are discussing, or taking action to limit, self-preferencing by large platforms. This paper explores Amazon's search rankings of its own products as the European Union's Digital Markets Act (DMA) was coming into effect. Using data on over 8 million Amazon search results at 22 Amazon domains in the US, Europe, and elsewhere, I document three things. First, conditional on rudimentary product characteristics, Amazon's own products receive search ranks that are 24 positions better on average throughout the sample period. Second, the Amazon rank differential is large in comparison with the differential for 142 other popular brands. Third, shortly after the EU designated Amazon a “gatekeeper” platform in September 2023, the Amazon rank differential fell from a 30 position advantage to a 20 position advantage, while other major brands' rank positions were unaffected. The changed Amazon search rankings appear in both Europe and other jurisdictions.
papers.zh_title: 《数字市场法案》阴影下的亚马逊自我优待
papers.zh_abstract: 全球监管机构正在讨论或采取行动限制大型平台的自我优待行为。本文探讨了在欧盟《数字市场法案》即将生效之际，亚马逊对其自有产品的搜索排名情况。利用来自美国、欧洲及其他地区22个亚马逊域名的超过800万条亚马逊搜索结果数据，我记录了三点发现。首先，在控制基本产品特征后，在整个样本期内，亚马逊自有产品的搜索排名平均高出24个位次。其次，与其他142个流行品牌相比，亚马逊的排名差异较大。第三，在2023年9月欧盟将亚马逊指定为“守门人”平台后不久，亚马逊的排名优势从30个位次降至20个位次，而其他主要品牌的排名位置未受影响。亚马逊搜索排名的变化在欧洲和其他司法管辖区均有出现。

papers.title: Consumption Dynamics and Welfare Under Non-Gaussian Earnings Risk
papers.authors: Fatih Guvenen, Serdar Ozkan, Rocio Madera
papers.abstract: Recent empirical studies document that the distribution of earnings changes displays substantial deviations from lognormality: in particular, earnings changes are negatively skewed with extremely high kurtosis (long and thick tails), and these non-Gaussian features vary substantially both over the life cycle and with the earnings level of individuals. Furthermore, earnings changes display nonlinear (asymmetric) mean reversion. In this paper, we embed a very rich “benchmark earnings process” that captures these non-Gaussian and nonlinear features into a lifecycle consumption-saving model and study its implications for consumption dynamics, consumption insurance, and welfare. We show four main results. First, the benchmark process essentially matches the empirical lifetime earnings inequality—a first-order proxy for consumption inequality—whereas the canonical Gaussian (persistent-plus-transitory) process understates it by a factor of five to ten. Second, the welfare cost of idiosyncratic risk implied by the benchmark process is between two-to-four times higher than the canonical Gaussian one. Third, the standard method in the literature for measuring the pass-through of income shocks to consumption—can significantly overstate the degree of consumption smoothing possible under non-Gaussian shocks. Fourth, the marginal propensity to consume out of transitory income (e.g., from a stimulus check) is higher under non-Gaussian earnings risk.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EFG, LS, ME, PE；JEL：E24, E60, J31
papers.zh_title: 非高斯收入风险下的消费动态与福利
papers.zh_abstract: 近期的实证研究记录显示，收入变化的分布显著偏离对数正态分布：具体而言，收入变化呈负偏态且具有极高的峰度（长尾和厚尾），这些非高斯特征在生命周期内以及随个人收入水平的不同而显著变化。此外，收入变化表现出非线性（非对称）均值回归。在本文中，我们将一个捕捉了这些非高斯和非线性特征的非常丰富的“基准收入过程”嵌入到生命周期消费-储蓄模型中，并研究其对消费动态、消费保险和福利的影响。我们展示了四个主要结果。首先，基准过程基本匹配了经验性的终生收入不平等——这是消费不平等的一阶代理变量——而典型的高斯（持久加暂时）过程将其低估了五到十倍。其次，基准过程隐含的异质性风险福利成本是典型高斯过程的两到四倍。第三，文献中用于衡量收入冲击向消费传导的标准方法，可能显著高估了在非高斯冲击下可能实现的消费平滑程度。第四，在非高斯收入风险下，来自暂时性收入（例如刺激支票）的边际消费倾向更高。

papers.title: Does nothing stop a bullet like a job? The effects of income on crime
papers.authors: Jens Ludwig, Kevin Schnepel
papers.abstract: Do jobs and income-transfer programs affect crime? The answer depends on why one is asking the question, which shapes what one means by “crime.” Many studies focus on understanding why overall crime rates vary across people, places, and time; since 80% of all crimes are property offenses, that’s what this type of research typically explains. But if the goal is to understand what to do about the crime problem, the focus will instead be on serious violent crimes, which account for the majority of the social costs of crime. The best available evidence suggests that policies that reduce economic desperation reduce property crime (and hence overall crime rates) but have little systematic relationship to violent crime. The difference in impacts surely stems in large part from the fact that most violent crimes, including murder, are not crimes of profit but rather crimes of passion – including rage. Policies to alleviate material hardship, as important and useful as those are for improving people’s lives and well-being, are not by themselves sufficient to also substantially alleviate the burden of crime on society.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, EH, LE, LS, PE；JEL：H0, I39, K40
papers.zh_title: 工作能否阻挡子弹？收入对犯罪的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 工作和收入转移项目会影响犯罪吗？答案取决于提问的目的，这决定了“犯罪”的含义。许多研究侧重于理解为什么总体犯罪率在不同人群、地点和时间之间存在差异；由于80%的犯罪是财产犯罪，这类研究通常解释的就是这一点。但如果目标是理解如何解决犯罪问题，那么重点将转向严重暴力犯罪，这些犯罪占犯罪社会成本的大部分。现有最佳证据表明，减少经济绝望的政策会减少财产犯罪（从而降低总体犯罪率），但与暴力犯罪几乎没有系统性关联。这种影响差异很大程度上源于大多数暴力犯罪（包括谋杀）并非牟利犯罪，而是激情犯罪——包括愤怒。缓解物质匮乏的政策，尽管对改善人们的生活和福祉重要且有用，但本身并不足以大幅减轻犯罪对社会的负担。

papers.title: Marginal Returns to Public Universities
papers.authors: Jack Mountjoy
papers.abstract: This paper studies the returns to enrolling in American public universities by comparing the long-term outcomes of barely admitted versus barely rejected applicants. I use administrative admission records spanning all 35 public universities in Texas, which collectively enroll 10 percent of all American public university students, to systematically identify and employ decentralized cutoffs in SAT/ACT scores that generate discontinuities in admission and enrollment. The typical marginally admitted student gains an additional year of education in the four-year sector, becomes 12 percentage points more likely to ever earn a bachelor’s degree, and eventually earns 8 percent more than their marginally rejected but otherwise identical counterpart. Marginally admitted students pay no additional tuition costs thanks to offsetting grant aid; cost-benefit calculations show internal rates of return of 26 percent for the marginal students themselves, 16 percent for society (which must pay for the additional education), and 7 percent for the government budget. Earnings gains are similar across admitting institutions of varying selectivity, but smaller for students from low-income families, who spend more time enrolled but complete fewer degrees and major in less lucrative fields. Finally, I develop a method to separately identify effects for students on the extensive margin of attending any university versus those on the margin of attending a more selective one, revealing larger effects on the extensive margin.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：H43, H75, I2, I20, I22, I23, I24, I26, I28, J24, J31
papers.zh_title: 公立大学的边际回报
papers.zh_abstract: 本文通过比较勉强被录取与勉强被拒绝的申请者的长期结果，研究了就读美国公立大学的回报。我使用了涵盖德克萨斯州所有35所公立大学的行政录取记录（这些大学共招收美国所有公立大学学生的10%），系统地识别并利用了SAT/ACT分数中的分散截止点，这些截止点在录取和入学中产生了不连续性。典型的边际录取学生多获得一年的四年制大学教育，获得学士学位的可能性提高12个百分点，最终收入比勉强被拒绝但其他方面相同的对应者高出8%。得益于抵消性的助学金，边际录取学生无需支付额外的学费；成本效益计算显示，边际学生自身的内部收益率为26%，社会（必须为额外教育付费）为16%，政府预算为7%。不同选择性的录取院校的收入增长相似，但来自低收入家庭的学生收入增长较小，他们入学时间更长但完成学位更少，且主修收入较低的领域。最后，我开发了一种方法，分别识别对是否上大学的广延边际学生与对选择更具选择性大学的质量边际学生的影响，揭示了广延边际上的效应更大。

papers.title: Beliefs that Entertain
papers.authors: Ashvin Gandhi, Paola Giuliano, Eric Guan, Quinn Keefer, Chase McDonald, Michaela Pagel, Joshua Tasoff
papers.abstract: Economic research on entertainment is scant despite its large share of time use. We apply insights from behavioral economic theory to analyze the role of beliefs on players’ engagement with video games. Using detailed minute-by-minute data on 2.8 million matches from the popular video game League of Legends, we estimate a model of player engagement as a function of the path of their beliefs during the match. Consistent with reference-dependence and loss aversion but contrary to some models of anticipatory utility, lagging behind the opponent throughout the match increases engagement. This is true whether the player wins or loses, but the effect is substantially larger for losers. Players are more engaged when held in suspense throughout the match and dislike when surprises are actually realized. Winners prefer surprises to be smoothed out throughout the match, whereas losers prefer surprises clumped. We also find evidence in favor of flow theory: players engage more when they face a challenge but not when the match is too hard or too easy. We then leverage our estimated model to inform game design. We find that optimizing the information revelation process could substantially increase player engagement: the average effect is 43% as large as the effect of making a losing player feel like a winner.
papers.zh_title: 令人愉悦的信念
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管娱乐活动在时间使用中占据很大份额，但关于娱乐的经济学研究却很少。我们运用行为经济理论的见解，分析信念在玩家参与电子游戏中的作用。利用热门电子游戏《英雄联盟》中280万场比赛的详细逐分钟数据，我们估计了一个玩家参与度模型，该模型以玩家在比赛过程中信念路径的函数形式呈现。与参照依赖和损失厌恶一致，但与某些预期效用模型相反，在整场比赛中落后于对手会增加参与度。无论玩家是赢是输，这一结论都成立，但对输家的影响要大得多。当玩家在整场比赛中处于悬念状态时，他们参与度更高，并且不喜欢意外实际发生。赢家偏好意外在整场比赛中平滑分布，而输家则偏好意外集中出现。我们还发现了支持心流理论的证据：当玩家面临挑战时参与度更高，但比赛太难或太容易时则不然。随后，我们利用估计出的模型为游戏设计提供信息。我们发现，优化信息揭示过程可以显著提高玩家参与度：平均效果相当于让输家感觉像赢家这一效果的43%。

papers.title: Bank Failures and Economic Activity: Evidence from the Progressive Era
papers.authors: Gary Richardson, Marco Del Angel, Michael Gou
papers.abstract: During the Progressive Era (1900-29), economic growth was rapid but volatile. Boom and busts witnessed the formation and failure of tens of thousands of firms and thousands of banks. This essay uses new data and methods to identify causal links between failures of banks and bankruptcies of firms. Our analysis indicates that bank failures triggered bankruptcies of firms that depended upon banks for ongoing access to commercial credit. Firms that did not depend upon banks for credit did not fail in appreciably larger numbers after banks failed or during financial panics.
papers.zh_title: 银行倒闭与经济活动：来自进步时代的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 在进步时代（1900-1929年），经济增长迅速但不稳定。繁荣与萧条见证了数万家企业倒闭和数千家银行倒闭。本文使用新的数据和方法来识别银行倒闭与企业破产之间的因果联系。我们的分析表明，银行倒闭引发了那些依赖银行持续获得商业信贷的企业的破产。不依赖银行信贷的企业在银行倒闭或金融危机期间并未出现明显更多的倒闭。

papers.title: Weighted Noise: Discretion in Regulation
papers.authors: Sumit Agarwal, Bernardo C. Morais, Amit Seru, Kelly Shue
papers.abstract: Human discretion is a defining feature of legal and regulatory decision-making. While discretion lets professionals incorporate subtle soft information that rules or algorithms may miss, it also introduces noise— disagreement among decision-makers, such that the same case could yield different outcomes depending on who handles it. We study this trade-off in U.S. bank supervision, where examiners issue CAMELS ratings that shape bank capitalization and lending. Using confidential supervisory data, we model final ratings as weighted sums of component issues. We find that disagreement arises through three channels: (1) examiners treat all issues, even relatively objective ones, as subjective; (2) they disproportionately weight more subjective issues, with management quality alone accounting for nearly 50% of the total weight; and (3) they disagree on the weights applied to each issue, even when agreeing on the issues themselves. We measure discretion as the residual in ratings unexplained by bank fundamentals—this residual captures both soft information and examiner-specific judgment. Because examiner assignment is quasi-random, systematic variation in this residual isolates noise rather than signal. This noise has real consequences: tougher examiners cause banks to raise capital and cut lending for years, and the expectation of unpredictable supervision can prompt banks to preemptively reduce lending. Yet discretion is not purely negative; the discretionary rating predicts future bank deterioration more accurately than a simple model based solely on hard data. Using machine-learning models as a high-dimensional benchmark, we further show that algorithms outperform supervisory ratings in narrowly targeted forecasting tasks but do not replicate supervisory assessments themselves. Nonetheless, excessive discretion adds noise without extra signal. Moderately constraining how subjective components are weighted improves predictive accuracy and reduces costly disagreement.
papers.zh_title: 加权噪声：监管中的自由裁量权
papers.zh_abstract: 人类自由裁量权是法律和监管决策的一个决定性特征。虽然自由裁量权让专业人士能够融入规则或算法可能遗漏的微妙软信息，但它也引入了噪声——决策者之间的分歧，使得同一案件可能因处理者不同而产生不同结果。我们研究了美国银行监管中的这种权衡，其中检查员发布CAMELS评级，这些评级影响银行的资本化和贷款。使用机密监管数据，我们将最终评级建模为各组成部分问题的加权和。我们发现分歧通过三个渠道产生：（1）检查员将所有问题，即使是相对客观的问题，都视为主观的；（2）他们不成比例地加权更主观的问题，仅管理质量一项就占总权重的近50%；（3）即使对问题本身达成一致，他们对应用于每个问题的权重也存在分歧。我们将自由裁量权衡量为评级中无法被银行基本面解释的残差——该残差同时捕捉了软信息和检查员特定的判断。由于检查员分配是准随机的，该残差的系统性变化隔离了噪声而非信号。这种噪声具有实际后果：更严格的检查员会导致银行在数年内提高资本并削减贷款，而对不可预测监管的预期可能促使银行先发制人地减少贷款。然而，自由裁量权并非纯粹负面；自由裁量评级预测银行未来恶化的准确性高于仅基于硬数据的简单模型。使用机器学习模型作为高维基准，我们进一步表明，算法在狭义的目标预测任务中优于监管评级，但并不能复制监管评估本身。尽管如此，过度的自由裁量权增加了噪声而没有增加额外信号。适度约束主观组成部分的加权方式可以提高预测准确性并减少代价高昂的分歧。

papers.title: The Limited Effects of U.S. Protests
papers.authors: Amory Gethin, Vincent Pons
papers.abstract: We provide systematic evidence on the effects of protests on public opinion, political behavior, and legislative policymaking. Drawing on a database covering the quasi-universe of protests held in the United States from 2017 to 2022, we identify 14 protest waves that covered topics related to environmental protection, gender equality, racial issues, gun control, immigration, and national and international politics.
