We use Twitter data, Google search volumes, high-frequency surveys, official election results, and data on politician behavior to track the evolution of online interest, policy views, vote intentions, and policies proposed and adopted before and after the onset of each protest wave. Combining national-level event studies with difference-in-differences designs that exploit variation in local protest intensity, we find that protests generate substantial internet activity but have minimal effects on other outcomes. The Black Lives Matter protests following George Floyd’s death are a notable exception. They increased both support for the Democratic Party and legislative activity on racial issues, suggesting that transgressive contention is more impactful than contained demonstrations. Finally, protests generally do not generate political backlash unless they become violent.
papers.zh_title: 美国抗议活动的有限影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提供了关于抗议活动对公众舆论、政治行为和立法政策制定影响的系统性证据。基于一个涵盖2017年至2022年美国近乎所有抗议活动的数据库，我们识别出14次涉及环境保护、性别平等、种族问题、枪支管制、移民以及国内和国际政治议题的抗议浪潮。我们利用推特数据、谷歌搜索量、高频调查、官方选举结果以及政治家行为数据，追踪每次抗议浪潮爆发前后网络关注度、政策观点、投票意向以及提议和通过政策的演变。结合国家级事件研究与利用地方抗议强度差异的双重差分设计，我们发现抗议活动能产生大量互联网活动，但对其他结果的影响微乎其微。乔治·弗洛伊德去世后的“黑人的命也是命”抗议活动是一个显著的例外。它们增加了对民主党的支持以及种族问题上的立法活动，这表明越轨性抗争比受控示威更具影响力。最后，除非抗议活动演变为暴力，否则通常不会引发政治反弹。

papers.title: Bank Runs, Fragility, and Regulation
papers.authors: Manuel Amador, Javier Bianchi
papers.abstract: We examine banking regulation in a macroeconomic model of bank runs. We construct a general equilibrium model where banks may default because of fundamental or self-fulfilling runs. With only fundamental defaults, we show that the competitive equilibrium is constrained efficient. However, when banks are vulnerable to runs, banks’ leverage decisions are not ex-ante optimal: individual banks do not internalize that higher leverage makes other banks more vulnerable. The theory calls for introducing minimum capital requirements, even in the absence of bailouts.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E32, E44, E58, G01, G21, G33
papers.zh_title: 银行挤兑、脆弱性与监管
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在一个包含银行挤兑的宏观经济模型中考察银行监管。我们构建了一个一般均衡模型，其中银行可能因基本面原因或自我实现的挤兑而违约。当仅存在基本面违约时，我们证明竞争性均衡是约束有效的。然而，当银行容易受到挤兑时，银行的杠杆决策并非事前最优：单个银行没有内化更高的杠杆会使其他银行更加脆弱这一事实。该理论要求引入最低资本要求，即使在没有救助的情况下也是如此。

papers.title: Countries for Old Men: An Analysis of the Age Pay Gap
papers.authors: Nicola Bianchi, Matteo Paradisi
papers.abstract: This study investigates the growing wage disparity between older and younger workers in high-income countries. We propose a conceptual framework of the labor market in which firms cannot change the contracts of older employees and cannot freely add higher-ranked positions to their organizations. In this model, a larger supply of older workers and declining economic growth restrict younger workers’ access to higher-paying roles and widen the age pay gap in favor of older workers. Drawing on extensive administrative and survey data, we document that the characteristics of these negative spillovers on younger workers’ careers align with the model’s predictions. As older workers enjoy more successful careers, younger workers become less likely to hold higher-ranked jobs and fall toward the bottom of the wage distribution. The pay gap between younger and older workers increases more in slower-growing, older, and larger firms and in firms with higher mean wages, where these negative spillovers on younger workers are larger in magnitude. Moreover, younger employees become less likely to work for higher-paying firms, whose share of older workers disproportionately increases over time. Finally, we show that alternative explanations for these findings receive little empirical support.
papers.zh_title: 老男人的国度：年龄收入差距分析
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究探讨了高收入国家中老年工人与年轻工人之间日益扩大的工资差距。我们提出了一个劳动力市场的概念框架，其中企业无法改变老年员工的合同，也不能随意在其组织中增加更高层级的职位。在这个模型中，老年工人供给的增加以及经济增长的放缓限制了年轻工人获得高薪职位的机会，并扩大了有利于老年工人的年龄收入差距。利用广泛的行政和调查数据，我们记录了这些对年轻工人职业生涯的负面溢出效应的特征与模型的预测一致。随着老年工人职业生涯更加成功，年轻工人担任更高层级职位的可能性降低，并滑向工资分布的底部。在增长较慢、规模较大、历史较久以及平均工资较高的企业中，年轻工人与老年工人之间的收入差距增加更大，因为这些企业对年轻工人的负面溢出效应幅度更大。此外，年轻员工为高薪企业工作的可能性降低，而这些企业中老年工人的比例随着时间的推移不成比例地增加。最后，我们表明这些发现的其他替代解释几乎得不到实证支持。

papers.title: Three Things about Mobile App Commissions
papers.authors: Joshua S. Gans
papers.abstract: Mobile app commissions paid by app developers to a monopolist device maker/app store operator are examined. Three results are demonstrated. First, unregulated app commissions are set at a level that maximises consumer surplus. Second, eliminating app commissions will lead to higher device prices. Third, requiring a menu of options for consumers as to how device makers receive subsidies from app developers constrains app commissions in a way that provides a more equal balance between consumer versus app developer interests.
papers.zh_title: 关于移动应用佣金的三个要点
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了应用开发者向垄断设备制造商/应用商店运营商支付的移动应用佣金。我们证明了三个结果。第一，未受监管的应用佣金设定在最大化消费者剩余的水平。第二，取消应用佣金将导致设备价格上涨。第三，要求为消费者提供关于设备制造商如何从应用开发者处获得补贴的选项菜单，会以一种在消费者与应用开发者利益之间提供更均衡平衡的方式约束应用佣金。

papers.title: Heterogeneity and Endogenous Compliance: Implications for Scaling Class Size Interventions
papers.authors: Karun Adusumilli, Francesco Agostinelli, Emilio Borghesan
papers.abstract: This paper examines the scalability of the results from the Tennessee Student-Teacher Achievement Ratio (STAR) Project, a prominent educational experiment. We explore how the misalignment between the experimental design and the econometric model affects researchers' ability to learn about the intervention's scalability. We document heterogeneity in compliance with class-size reduction that is more extensive than previously acknowledged and discuss its consequences for the evaluation of the experiment. Guided by this finding, we implement a new econometric framework incorporating heterogeneous treatment effects and endogenous class size determination. We find that the effect of class size on test scores differs considerably across schools, with only a small fraction of schools having significant benefits from reduced class sizes. We discuss the challenges this poses for the intervention's scalability and conclude by analyzing targeted class-size interventions.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：C51, H52, I2, J13
papers.zh_title: 异质性与内生合规性：对扩大班级规模干预措施的启示
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了田纳西州学生/教师成就比率（STAR）项目这一著名教育实验结果的可扩展性。我们探讨了实验设计与计量模型之间的错位如何影响研究者了解干预措施可扩展性的能力。我们记录了在缩减班级规模方面的合规性异质性，其程度比先前认识到的更为广泛，并讨论了这对实验评估的后果。在此发现的指导下，我们实施了一个新的计量经济学框架，该框架纳入了异质性处理效应和内生的班级规模决定。我们发现，班级规模对考试成绩的影响在不同学校之间存在显著差异，只有一小部分学校从缩减班级规模中获得了显著益处。我们讨论了这对干预措施可扩展性带来的挑战，并最后分析了有针对性的班级规模干预措施。

papers.title: The Declining Mental Health Of The Young And The Global Disappearance Of The Hump Shape In Age In Unhappiness
papers.authors: David G. Blanchflower, Alex Bryson, Xiaowei Xu
papers.abstract: Across many studies subjective well-being follows a U-shape in age, declining until people reach middle-age, only to rebound subsequently. Ill-being follows a mirror-imaged hump-shape. But this empirical regularity has been replaced by a monotonic decrease in illbeing by age. The reason for the change is the deterioration in young people’s mental health both absolutely and relative to older people. We reconsider evidence for this fundamental change in the link between illbeing and age with micro data for the United States and the United Kingdom. Beginning around 2011 there is a monotonic and declining cross-sectional association between well-being and age. In the UK the recent COVID pandemic exacerbated the trends by impacting most heavily on the wellbeing of the young, but this was not the case in the United States. We replicate the decrease in illbeing by age across 34 countries, including the United States and the United Kingdom, using five ill-being metrics for the period 2020-2024 and confirm the findings.
papers.zh_title: 年轻人心理健康的下降与全球年龄-不幸福驼峰形状的消失
papers.zh_abstract: 在众多研究中，主观幸福感随年龄呈U形分布，在人们步入中年之前下降，随后反弹。不幸福感则呈现镜像的驼峰形状。但这一经验规律已被不幸福感随年龄单调递减所取代。变化的原因是年轻人心理健康的恶化，无论是绝对水平还是相对于老年人而言。我们利用美国和英国的微观数据重新审视了不幸福感与年龄之间这种根本性变化的证据。大约从2011年开始，幸福感与年龄之间出现了单调递减的横截面关联。在英国，最近的COVID-19大流行加剧了这一趋势，对年轻人的幸福感影响最为严重，但在美国情况并非如此。我们使用2020-2024年期间的五个不幸福感指标，在包括美国和英国在内的34个国家中复制了不幸福感随年龄递减的现象，并确认了这些发现。

papers.title: Nothing for Something: Marketing Cancer Drugs to Physicians Increases Prescribing Without Improving Mortality
papers.authors: Colleen Carey, Michael Daly, Jing Li
papers.abstract: Physicians commonly receive marketing-related transfers from drug firms. We examine the impact of these relationships on the prescribing of physician-administered cancer drugs in Medicare. We find that prescribing of the associated drug increases 4\\% in the twelve months after a payment is received, with the increase beginning sharply in the month of payment and fading out within a year. A marketing payment also leads physicians to begin treating cancer patients with lower expected mortality. While payments result in greater expenditure on cancer drugs, there are no associated improvements in patient mortality.
papers.zh_title: 无谓的付出：向医生营销抗癌药物增加处方量但未改善死亡率
papers.zh_abstract: 医生通常从制药公司获得与营销相关的转移支付。我们研究了这些关系对医疗保险中医生处方抗癌药物行为的影响。我们发现，在收到付款后的十二个月内，相关药物的处方量增加了4%，这种增加在付款当月急剧开始，并在一年内逐渐消退。营销付款还导致医生开始治疗预期死亡率较低的癌症患者。虽然付款导致抗癌药物支出增加，但患者死亡率并未得到相应改善。

papers.title: The Global Life-Cycle Optimizer – Analyzing Fiscal Policy's Potential to Dramatically Distort Labor Supply and Saving
papers.authors: Johannes Brumm, Laurence J. Kotlikoff, Christopher Krause, Joshua Zanger
papers.abstract: Fiscal policy in the U.S. and other countries renders intertemporal budgets nondifferentiable, non-convex, and discontinuous. Consequently, assessing work and saving responses to policy requires global optimization. This paper develops the Global Life-Cycle Optimizer (GLO), which robustly and precisely locates global optima in highly complex fiscal settings. We use the GLO to study how a stylized U.S. fiscal system distorts workers’ labor supply and saving over the life-cycle. The system incorporates kinks from federal income tax brackets, Social Security’s FICA tax, and a notch from the provision of basic income below a threshold. The GLO reproduces theoretically predicted earnings bunching and flipping over a remarkably wide range of wage rates. Saving distortions and associated excess burdens are substantial. Extensions with discrete labor supply, joint taxation of couples, social security, and wage shocks demonstrate the GLO’s versatility.
papers.meta: Programs：LS；JEL：H2, H3, H30, H31, I38, J22

papers.title: Religious Worship Attendance in America: Evidence from Cellphone Data
papers.authors: Devin G. Pope
papers.abstract: WP 32334 is currently unavailable; please check back at a later date.
papers.zh_title: 美国的宗教礼拜出席率：来自手机数据的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 工作论文32334目前不可用；请稍后再查看。

papers.title: Neighborhood Effects: Evidence from Wartime Destruction in London
papers.authors: Stephen J. Redding, Daniel M. Sturm
papers.abstract: We use the German bombing of London during the Second World War as an exogenous source of variation to provide evidence on neighborhood effects. We construct a newly-digitized dataset at the level of individual buildings on wartime destruction, property values, and socioeconomic composition in London before and after the Second World War. We develop a quantitative urban model, in which heterogeneous groups of individuals endogenously sort across locations in response to differences in natural advantages, wartime destruction and neighborhood effects. We find strong and localized neighborhood effects, which magnify the direct impact of wartime destruction, and make a substantial contribution to observed differences in socioeconomic outcomes across locations.
papers.zh_title: 邻里效应：来自伦敦战时破坏的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用二战期间德国对伦敦的轰炸作为外生变异来源，为邻里效应提供证据。我们构建了一个新数字化的数据集，涵盖二战前后伦敦单个建筑层面的战时破坏、房产价值和社会经济构成。我们开发了一个定量城市模型，在该模型中，异质性群体根据自然优势、战时破坏和邻里效应的差异，内生地在不同地点进行分类。我们发现存在强烈且局部的邻里效应，这些效应放大了战时破坏的直接影响，并对观察到的不同地点社会经济结果的差异做出了实质性贡献。

papers.title: To Pay or Autopay? Fintech Innovation and Credit Card Payments
papers.authors: Jialan Wang
papers.abstract: Digital technologies and fintech firms have rapidly reshaped the consumer financial landscape in recent years, and have the potential to help consumers make better decisions and improve their financial health. Existing technologies such as autopay are also experiencing increased takeup, a trend that could be accelerated by innovations such as open banking. I examine the extent to which autopay affects payment behavior for customers of a credit card serviced by a fintech company. Using sharp changes in the company's practices in a regression discontinuity design, I find that a small nudge accounts for half of all autopay enrollment during the sample period, and that enrollment at account opening is persistent. Autopay increases the likelihood of making the minimum payment by 20 to 29pp, more than doubling the baseline rate. The results show that seemingly minor technological defaults can have economically large effects on consumer credit outcomes.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, LE, PR；JEL：D12, D14, G21, G41, G51
papers.zh_title: 支付还是自动支付？金融科技创新与信用卡支付
papers.zh_abstract: 近年来，数字技术和金融科技公司迅速重塑了消费者金融格局，并有可能帮助消费者做出更好的决策并改善其财务健康状况。现有的技术如自动支付，其采用率也在增加，这一趋势可能因开放银行等创新而加速。我研究了自动支付如何影响一家金融科技公司服务的信用卡客户的支付行为。利用公司实践中的急剧变化，采用断点回归设计，我发现一个小小的推动就解释了样本期间一半的自动支付注册，并且在开户时的注册具有持续性。自动支付将进行最低还款的可能性提高了20到29个百分点，使基准率翻了一倍以上。结果表明，看似微不足道的技术默认设置可能对消费者信贷结果产生经济上显著的影响。

papers.title: How You Pay Drives What You Choose: Health Savings Accounts versus Cash in Health Insurance Plan Choice
papers.authors: Jonathan Gruber, Mengyun M. Lin, Haoming Liu, Junjian Yi
papers.abstract: A marked feature of health insurance plan choice is inconsistent choices through the overweighting of premiums relative to out-of-pocket spending. We show that this source of inconsistency disappears when both types of spending come from the same source of designated funds. We focus on the MediSave program in Singapore, whereby residents can pay their health insurance premiums with cash or MediSave funds, but are subject to limits that vary by age and over time. By exploiting variations in those limits, we consistently find that when individuals are able to pay their health insurance premiums with MediSave funds, they are less price sensitive and more willing to enroll in more generous plans—which results in lower spending levels and variance, and lower adverse selection in the market. The results suggest a strong role for mental accounting in insurance decisions.
papers.zh_title: 支付方式决定选择：健康储蓄账户与现金在健康保险计划选择中的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 健康保险计划选择的一个显著特征是通过过度重视保费相对于自付支出来做出不一致的选择。我们表明，当两种类型的支出来自同一指定资金来源时，这种不一致的来源就会消失。我们专注于新加坡的保健储蓄计划，居民可以用现金或保健储蓄基金支付健康保险保费，但受到因年龄和时间而变化的限额约束。通过利用这些限额的变化，我们一致地发现，当个人能够用保健储蓄基金支付健康保险保费时，他们对价格不那么敏感，更愿意加入更慷慨的计划——这导致了更低的支出水平和方差，以及市场中更低程度的逆向选择。结果表明，心理账户在保险决策中扮演着重要角色。

papers.title: Global Spillovers from FED Hikes and a Strong Dollar: The Risk Channel
papers.authors: José Cristi, Ṣebnem Kalemli-Özcan, Mariana Sans, Filiz D. Unsal
papers.abstract: We study the international transmission of U.S. monetary policy (FED hikes) and a strong U.S. dollar. Both of these variables are endogenous and thus we follow the recent developments in the literature to measure the exogenous components of each from the perspective of the rest of the world (ROW). We show that while U.S. monetary policy shocks act as financial shocks increasing risk premia in emerging markets, a shock to U.S. dollar does not generate the same effect.
papers.zh_title: 美联储加息与强势美元的全球溢出效应：风险渠道
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了美国货币政策（美联储加息）和强势美元的国际传导。这两个变量都是内生的，因此我们遵循文献的最新发展，从世界其他国家的角度衡量各自的 exogenous 成分。我们表明，虽然美国货币政策冲击作为金融冲击，增加了新兴市场的风险溢价，但美元冲击并不会产生同样的效果。

papers.title: Global Transmission of FED Hikes: The Role of Policy Credibility and Balance Sheets
papers.authors: Ṣebnem Kalemli-Özcan, Filiz D. Unsal
papers.abstract: Contrary to historical episodes, the 2022–2023 tightening of US monetary policy has not yet triggered financial crisis in emerging markets. Why is this time different? To answer this question, we analyze the current situation through the lens of historical evidence. In emerging markets, the financial channel–based transmission of US policy historically led to more adverse outcomes compared to advanced economies, where the trade channel fails to smooth out these negative effects. When the Federal Reserve increases interest rates, global investors tend to shed risky assets in response to the tightening global financial conditions, affecting emerging markets more severely due to their lower credit ratings and higher risk profiles. This time around, the escape from emerging market assets and the increase in risk spreads have been limited. We document that the historical experience of higher risk spreads and capital outflows can be largely explained by the lack of credible monetary policies and dollar-denominated debt. The improvement in monetary policy frameworks combined with reduced levels of dollar-denominated debt have helped emerging markets weather the recent Federal Reserve hikes.
papers.zh_title: 美联储加息的全球传导：政策可信度与资产负债表的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 与历史事件相反，2022-2023年美国货币政策的紧缩尚未在新兴市场引发金融危机。为什么这次不同？为了回答这个问题，我们通过历史证据的视角来分析当前形势。在新兴市场，基于金融渠道的美国政策传导历史上导致了比发达经济体更不利的结果，而在发达经济体中，贸易渠道无法平滑这些负面影响。当美联储加息时，全球投资者倾向于因全球金融状况收紧而抛售风险资产，由于新兴市场信用评级较低且风险状况较高，其受到的影响更为严重。这一次，逃离新兴市场资产和风险利差上升的情况有限。我们记录到，历史上较高的风险利差和资本外流在很大程度上可以解释为缺乏可信的货币政策和美元计价债务。货币政策框架的改善，加上美元计价债务水平的降低，帮助新兴市场抵御了最近的美联储加息。

papers.title: Smoke from Factory Chimneys: The Applied Economics of Air Pollution in the Progressive Era
papers.authors: H. Spencer Banzhaf, Randall Walsh
papers.abstract: Like today, one hundred years ago air pollution was a matter of grave concern in the world's most polluted cities. In the wake of its famous 1908-9 social survey, the City of Pittsburgh commissioned an "Economic Survey of Pittsburgh" from John T. Holdsworth, a prominent institutional economist at the University of Pittsburgh. Although wide ranging, the report opened by stating that "The first fundamental need in Pittsburgh is the eradication of smoke." This report was followed by a series of Smoke Investigations, in which, astonishingly, jars were placed around the city and the ash weighed monthly. In one application, Holdsworth's assistant, John J. O'Connor, estimated the economic costs from smoke. Arguably the first damage-cost study, O'Connor's work challenges our understanding of what counts as "economic" in the progressive era.
papers.zh_title: 工厂烟囱的烟雾：进步时代空气污染的应用经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 与今天一样，一百年前，空气污染是世界上污染最严重的城市中一个严重关切的问题。在其著名的1908-9年社会调查之后，匹兹堡市委托匹兹堡大学著名制度经济学家约翰·T·霍尔兹沃思进行了一项“匹兹堡经济调查”。尽管范围广泛，但该报告开篇即指出：“匹兹堡的首要基本需求是消除烟雾。”这份报告之后进行了一系列烟雾调查，令人惊讶的是，调查中将罐子放置在城市的各个地方，并每月称量其中的灰烬。在一项应用中，霍尔兹沃思的助手约翰·J·奥康纳估计了烟雾的经济成本。奥康纳的工作可以说是第一项损害成本研究，它挑战了我们对进步时代什么是“经济”的理解。

papers.title: Recovering Overlooked Information in Categorical Variables with LLMs: An Application to Labor Market Mismatch
papers.authors: Yi Chen, Hanming Fang, Yi Zhao, Zibo Zhao
papers.abstract: Categorical variables have no intrinsic ordering, and researchers often adopt a fixed-effect (FE) approach in empirical analysis. However, this approach has two significant limitations: it overlooks textual labels associated with the categorical variables; and it produces unstable results when there are only limited observations in a category. In this paper, we propose a novel method that utilizes recent advances in large language models (LLMs) to recover overlooked information in categorical variables. We apply this method to investigate labor market mismatch. Specifically, we task LLMs with simulating the role of a human resources specialist to assess the suitability of an applicant with specific characteristics for a given job. Our main findings can be summarized in three parts. First, using comprehensive administrative data from an online job posting platform, we show that our new match quality measure is positively correlated with several traditional measures in the literature, and at the same time, we highlight the LLM's capability to provide additional information conditional on the traditional measures. Second, we demonstrate the broad applicability of the new method with a survey data containing significantly less information than the administrative data, which makes it impossible to compute most of the traditional match quality measures. Our LLM measure successfully replicates most of the salient patterns observed in a hard-to-access administrative dataset using easily accessible survey data. Third, we investigate the gender gap in match quality and explore whether there exists gender stereotypes in the hiring process. We simulate an audit study, examining whether revealing gender information to LLMs influences their assessment. We show that when gender information is disclosed to the GPT, the model deems females better suited for traditionally female-dominated roles.
papers.zh_title: 利用大语言模型恢复分类变量中被忽视的信息：劳动力市场错配的应用
papers.zh_abstract: 分类变量没有内在排序，研究者通常在实证分析中采用固定效应方法。然而，这种方法有两个显著局限：它忽略了与分类变量相关的文本标签；并且当某个类别中观测值有限时，会产生不稳定的结果。本文提出一种新方法，利用大语言模型的最新进展来恢复分类变量中被忽视的信息。我们将该方法应用于研究劳动力市场错配。具体而言，我们让大语言模型模拟人力资源专家的角色，评估具有特定特征的求职者是否适合某个给定职位。主要发现可概括为三部分。第一，利用来自在线职位发布平台的综合行政数据，我们表明新的匹配质量度量与文献中若干传统度量正相关，同时，我们强调大语言模型在传统度量条件下提供额外信息的能力。第二，我们通过一项包含信息远少于行政数据的调查数据，展示了新方法的广泛适用性，而传统匹配质量度量大多无法基于该调查数据计算。利用易于获取的调查数据，我们的大语言模型度量成功复制了在难以获取的行政数据集中观察到的大部分显著模式。第三，我们研究了匹配质量中的性别差距，并探讨招聘过程中是否存在性别刻板印象。我们模拟了一项审计研究，考察向大语言模型透露性别信息是否会影响其评估。我们发现，当性别信息被披露给GPT时，该模型认为女性更适合传统上由女性主导的职位。

papers.title: After the Storm: How Emergency Liquidity Helps Small Businesses Following Natural Disasters
papers.authors: Benjamin L. Collier, Sabrina T. Howell, Lea Rendell
papers.abstract: Does emergency credit prevent long-term financial distress? We study the causal effects of government-provided recovery loans to small businesses following natural disasters. The rapid financial injection might enable viable firms to survive and grow or might hobble precarious firms with more risk and interest obligations. We show that the loans reduce exit and bankruptcy, increase employment and revenue, unlock private credit, and reduce delinquency. These effects, especially the crowding-in of private credit, appear to reflect resolving uncertainty about repair. We do not find capital reallocation away from neighboring firms and see some evidence of positive spillovers on local entry.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EEE, PE, PR；JEL：G21, G32, H81, Q54, R33
papers.zh_title: 风暴过后：紧急流动性如何帮助小企业应对自然灾害
papers.zh_abstract: 紧急信贷能否防止长期财务困境？我们研究了自然灾害后政府向小企业提供的复苏贷款的因果效应。快速的资金注入可能使有生存能力的企业得以存活并增长，也可能使脆弱的企业背负更多风险和利息负担而陷入困境。我们发现，这些贷款降低了企业退出和破产率，增加了就业和收入，释放了私人信贷，并减少了拖欠。这些效应，尤其是对私人信贷的挤入效应，似乎反映了对修复不确定性的消除。我们没有发现资本从邻近企业重新配置的证据，并且看到了一些对本地新进入企业的正向溢出效应。

papers.title: Interdependent Values in Matching Markets: Evidence from Medical School Programs in Denmark
papers.authors: Benjamin Friedrich, Martin B. Hackmann, Adam Kapor, Sofia J. Moroni, Anne Brink Nandrup
papers.abstract: This paper presents the first empirical evidence of interdependent values and strategic responses by market participants in a two-sided matching market. We consider the market for medical school programs in Denmark, which uses a centralized assignment mechanism. Leveraging unique administrative data and an information experiment, we show that students and rival programs hold payoff-relevant information that each program could use to admit students with higher persistence rates. Programs respond to these two sources of interdependent values, student self-selection and interdependent program values, by exhibiting ”home bias” towards local applicants. We construct and estimate a novel equilibrium model reflecting this evidence, and find that fully sharing information could significantly increase student persistence and program payoffs, but enabling students to communicate first preferences would leave outcomes unchanged. An alternative model assuming independent private values contradicts the empirical evidence, highlighting the importance of accounting for interdependent values in understanding and designing matching markets.
papers.zh_title: 匹配市场中的相互依赖价值：来自丹麦医学院项目的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提供了双边匹配市场中相互依赖价值和市场参与者战略反应的首次实证证据。我们考虑丹麦医学院项目的市场，该市场使用集中分配机制。利用独特的行政数据和一项信息实验，我们表明学生和竞争项目持有与收益相关的信息，每个项目可利用这些信息录取具有更高坚持率的学生。项目通过表现出对本地申请者的“本地偏好”，来应对这两种相互依赖价值的来源——学生自我选择和相互依赖的项目价值。我们构建并估计了一个反映这一证据的新颖均衡模型，发现完全共享信息可以显著提高学生坚持率和项目收益，但允许学生沟通第一志愿则不会改变结果。一个假设独立私人价值的替代模型与实证证据相矛盾，突显了在理解和设计匹配市场时考虑相互依赖价值的重要性。

papers.title: Monetary Policy, Segmentation, and the Term Structure
papers.authors: Rohan Kekre, Moritz Lenel, Federico Mainardi
papers.abstract: We develop a segmented markets model which rationalizes the effects of monetary policy on the term structure of interest rates. When arbitrageurs’ portfolio features positive duration, an unexpected rise in the short rate lowers their wealth and raises term premia. A calibration to the U.S. economy accounts for much of the transmission of monetary shocks to long rates. We discuss the additional implications of our framework for state-dependence in policy transmission, the volatility and slope of the yield curve, and trends in term premia accompanying trends in the natural rate.
papers.zh_title: 货币政策、分割与期限结构
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个分割市场模型，该模型解释了货币政策对利率期限结构的影响。当套利者的投资组合具有正久期时，短期利率的意外上升会降低其财富并提高期限溢价。对美国经济的校准解释了货币政策冲击向长期利率传导的很大一部分。我们讨论了我们的框架对政策传导的状态依赖性、收益率曲线的波动性和斜率，以及伴随自然利率趋势的期限溢价趋势的额外含义。

papers.title: Homelessness and the Persistence of Deprivation: Income, Employment, and Safety Net Participation
papers.authors: Bruce D. Meyer, Angela Wyse, Gillian Meyer, Alexa Grunwaldt, Derek Wu
papers.abstract: Homelessness is arguably the most extreme hardship associated with poverty in the United States, yet people experiencing homelessness are excluded from official poverty statistics and much of the extreme poverty literature. This paper provides the most detailed and accurate portrait to date of the level and persistence of material disadvantage faced by this population, including the first national estimates of income, employment, and safety net participation based on administrative data. Starting from the first large and nationally representative sample of adults recorded as sheltered and unsheltered homeless taken from the 2010 Census, we link restricted-use longitudinal tax records and administrative data on the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP), Medicare, Medicaid, Disability Insurance (DI), Supplemental Security Income (SSI), veterans’ benefits, housing assistance, and mortality. Nearly half of these adults had formal employment in the year they were observed as homeless, and nearly all either worked or were reached by at least one safety net program. Nevertheless, their incomes remained low for the decade surrounding an observed period of homelessness, suggesting that homelessness tends to arise in the context of long-term, severe deprivation rather than large and sudden losses of income. People appear to experience homelessness because they are very poor despite being connected to the labor market and safety net, with low permanent incomes leaving them vulnerable to the loss of housing when met with even modest disruptions to life circumstances.
papers.zh_title: 无家可归与贫困的持续性：收入、就业与安全网参与
papers.zh_abstract: 无家可归可以说是美国与贫困相关的最极端困难，然而经历无家可归的人群被排除在官方贫困统计和大部分极端贫困文献之外。本文提供了迄今为止关于该人群所面临物质劣势水平和持续性的最详细、最准确的描述，包括基于行政数据的首个全国性收入、就业和安全网参与估计。从2010年人口普查中首次获取的、具有全国代表性的、记录为收容所和无家可归的成年人大型样本出发，我们链接了受限使用的纵向税务记录以及关于补充营养援助计划、医疗保险、医疗补助、残疾保险、补充保障收入、退伍军人福利、住房援助和死亡率的行政数据。这些成年人中近一半在被观察到无家可归的年份有正式工作，几乎所有人在至少一个安全网项目中工作或得到覆盖。尽管如此，在观察到无家可归时期前后的十年间，他们的收入仍然很低，这表明无家可归往往发生在长期严重贫困的背景下，而非收入大幅突然损失。人们之所以经历无家可归，是因为尽管与劳动力市场和安全网有联系，但他们仍然非常贫困，低持久性收入使他们即使在生活状况发生微小干扰时也容易失去住房。

papers.title: The Dominant Role of Expectations and Broad-Based Supply Shocks in Driving Inflation
papers.authors: Paul Beaudry, Chenyu Hou, Franck Portier
papers.abstract: The object of this paper is to assess the role of supply shocks, labour market tightness and expectation formation in explaining bouts of inflation. We begin by showing that a quasi-flat Phillips curve, which was popular prior to the pandemic, still fits the post-2020 US data well and that changes in short term inflation expectations induced by supply shocks likely played a major role in the recent inflation episode. We then document features of the joint dynamics of inflation and inflation expectations. Given the difficulty of reproducing these dynamics under rational expectations, we propose and evaluate a model with imperfect information and bounded rationality. In our model, agents see sectoral inflations as being driven by a component common to all the sectors of the economy and by sector-specific shocks. When supply shocks affect many sectors (what we refer to as a broad-based supply shock), agents infer that the common component of inflation has increased, which drive persistent inflation dynamics through their effect of expectations. We show that departure from full rationality is minor, but that it is enough for broad-based supply shocks to be amplified and propagated over time in a manner needed to explain the data.
papers.zh_title: 预期和广泛供给冲击在推动通胀中的主导作用
papers.zh_abstract: 本文旨在评估供给冲击、劳动力市场紧张程度和预期形成在解释通胀爆发中的作用。我们首先表明，在疫情前流行的准平坦菲利普斯曲线仍然很好地拟合了2020年后的美国数据，并且由供给冲击引起的短期通胀预期变化可能在近期通胀事件中发挥了主要作用。然后，我们记录了通胀和通胀预期联合动态的特征。鉴于在理性预期下难以重现这些动态，我们提出并评估了一个具有不完全信息和有限理性的模型。在我们的模型中，主体认为部门通胀是由经济所有部门共有的一个组成部分和部门特定冲击驱动的。当供给冲击影响许多部门（我们称之为广泛供给冲击）时，主体推断通胀的共同组成部分已经上升，这通过其对预期的影响驱动了持续的通胀动态。我们表明，与完全理性的偏离是微小的，但这足以使广泛供给冲击以解释数据所需的方式随时间被放大和传播。

papers.title: Quantitative Tightening Around the Globe: What Have We Learned?
papers.authors: Wenxin Du, Kristin Forbes, Matthew N. Luzzetti
papers.abstract: This paper uses the recent cross-country experience with quantitative tightening (QT) to assess the impact of shrinking central bank balance sheets. We analyze the experience in seven advanced economies (Australia, Canada, Euro area, New Zealand, Sweden, UK and US)—documenting different strategies and the substantive reduction in central bank balance sheets that has already occurred. Then we assess the macroeconomic and financial impact of QT announcements on yields and a range of other market prices. QT announcements increase government bond yields, steepening the yield curve and potentially signaling a greater commitment to raising policy interest rates, but have more limited effects on most other financial market indicators. Active QT has a larger impact than passive QT, particularly on longer maturities. The implementation of QT has been associated with a modest rise in overnight funding spreads and a decline in the “convenience yield” of government bonds, but QT transactions did not significantly affect the pricing and market liquidity of government debt securities. Finally, we evaluate who buys assets when central banks unwind balance sheets, an issue which will become increasingly important if central banks continue to reduce their security holdings while government debt issuance remains elevated. We find that increased demand by domestic nonbanks has largely compensated for reduced bond holdings by central banks. This series of cross-country results suggests that QT has had more of an impact than “paint drying”, but far less than simply reversing the effects of the quantitative easing programs launched during periods of market stress. Looking ahead, although QT has been smooth to date, frictions could increase in the future so that QT quickly evolves into more like watching “water boil”.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, IFM, ME；JEL：E4, E5, F30, G10
papers.zh_title: 全球量化紧缩：我们学到了什么？
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用近期各国量化紧缩的经验来评估央行缩表的影响。我们分析了七个发达经济体（澳大利亚、加拿大、欧元区、新西兰、瑞典、英国和美国）的经验——记录了不同的策略以及已经发生的央行资产负债表实质性缩减。然后，我们评估了量化紧缩公告对收益率和一系列其他市场价格产生的宏观经济和金融影响。量化紧缩公告提高了政府债券收益率，使收益率曲线陡峭化，并可能预示着提高政策利率的更大承诺，但对大多数其他金融市场指标的影响较为有限。主动量化紧缩比被动量化紧缩影响更大，尤其是在较长期限上。量化紧缩的实施与隔夜融资利差的温和上升和政府债券“便利收益率”的下降有关，但量化紧缩交易并未显著影响政府债务证券的定价和市场流动性。最后，我们评估了央行缩表时谁在购买资产，如果央行继续减少其证券持有量而政府债务发行仍处于高位，这一问题将变得越来越重要。我们发现，国内非银行机构需求的增加在很大程度上弥补了央行债券持有量的减少。这一系列跨国结果表明，量化紧缩的影响比“看油漆干”更大，但远非简单地逆转在市场压力时期启动的量化宽松计划的效果。展望未来，尽管迄今为止量化紧缩进展顺利，但摩擦可能会在未来增加，从而使量化紧缩迅速演变为更像“看水烧开”。

papers.title: Application Flows
papers.authors: Steven J. Davis, Brenda Samaniego de la Parra
papers.abstract: We build and analyze a new U.S. database that links 125 million applications to job vacancies and employer-side clients on Dice.com, an online platform for jobs and workers in software design, computer systems, engineering, financial analysis, management consulting, and other occupations that require technical skills. We find, first, that posting durations are quite short, often only two or three days, with a median of seven days. Second, unlike vacancy durations, posting durations do not lengthen with market tightness. Third, job seekers display a striking propensity to target new postings, with almost half of applications flowing to openings posted in the past 48 hours. Fourth, applications per posting are much too uneven to reflect random search, even within narrow market segments and job categories. Moreover, posted offer wages play no role in explaining the deviations from a random-search benchmark. Fifth, intermediaries play a huge role on both sides of the platform: Recruitment and staffing firms account for two-thirds of all postings and attract most of the applications. We relate these and other findings to theories of labor market search.
papers.zh_title: 申请流
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建并分析了一个新的美国数据库，该数据库将1.25亿份求职申请与Dice.com上的职位空缺和雇主端客户联系起来。Dice.com是一个面向软件设计、计算机系统、工程、财务分析、管理咨询以及其他需要技术技能的职业的求职者和雇主的在线平台。我们首先发现，职位发布持续时间相当短，通常只有两三天，中位数为七天。其次，与职位空缺持续时间不同，发布持续时间不会随市场紧张程度而延长。第三，求职者表现出惊人的倾向，即瞄准新发布的职位，近一半的申请流向过去48小时内发布的空缺。第四，每个职位的申请数量极不均匀，无法反映随机搜索，即使在狭窄的市场细分和职位类别内也是如此。此外，公布的报价工资在解释与随机搜索基准的偏离方面不起任何作用。第五，中介在平台双方都发挥着巨大作用：招聘和人员配置公司占所有职位发布的三分之二，并吸引了大部分申请。我们将这些发现及其他发现与劳动力市场搜索理论联系起来。

papers.title: Tracking Firm Use of AI in Real Time: A Snapshot from the Business Trends and Outlook Survey
papers.authors: Kathryn Bonney, Cory Breaux, Cathy Buffington, Emin Dinlersoz, Lucia S. Foster, Nathan Goldschlag, John C. Haltiwanger, Zachary Kroff, Keith Savage
papers.abstract: Timely and accurate measurement of AI use by firms is both challenging and crucial for understanding the impacts of AI on the U.S. economy. We provide new, real-time estimates of current and expected future use of AI for business purposes based on the Business Trends and Outlook Survey for September 2023 to February 2024. During this period, bi-weekly estimates of AI use rate rose from 3.7% to 5.4%, with an expected rate of about 6.6% by early Fall 2024. The fraction of workers at businesses that use AI is higher, especially for large businesses and in the Information sector. AI use is higher in large firms but the relationship between AI use and firm size is non-monotonic. In contrast, AI use is higher in young firms although, on an employment-weighted basis, is U-shaped in firm age. Common uses of AI include marketing automation, virtual agents, and data/text analytics. AI users often utilize AI to substitute for worker tasks and equipment/software, but few report reductions in employment due to AI use. Many firms undergo organizational changes to accommodate AI, particularly by training staff, developing new workflows, and purchasing cloud services/storage. AI users also exhibit better overall performance and higher incidence of employment expansion compared to other businesses. The most common reason for non-adoption is the inapplicability of AI to the business.
papers.zh_title: 实时追踪企业人工智能使用情况：来自商业趋势与展望调查的快照
papers.zh_abstract: 及时且准确地衡量企业对人工智能的使用，对于理解人工智能对美国经济的影响既充满挑战又至关重要。我们基于2023年9月至2024年2月的商业趋势与展望调查，提供了当前及预期未来企业将人工智能用于商业目的的新实时估计。在此期间，人工智能使用率的双周估计值从3.7%上升至5.4%，预计到2024年初秋将达到约6.6%。在使用人工智能的企业中，员工占比更高，尤其是在大型企业和信息行业。人工智能在大型企业中使用率更高，但人工智能使用率与企业规模之间的关系是非单调的。相比之下，人工智能在年轻企业中使用率更高，尽管按就业加权计算，其与企业年龄呈U型关系。人工智能的常见用途包括营销自动化、虚拟代理以及数据/文本分析。人工智能用户通常利用人工智能来替代工人任务和设备/软件，但很少有人报告因使用人工智能而导致就业减少。许多企业为了适应人工智能而进行组织变革，特别是通过培训员工、开发新工作流程以及购买云服务/存储。与其他企业相比，人工智能用户还表现出更好的整体绩效和更高的就业扩张发生率。不采用人工智能的最常见原因是人工智能不适用于该业务。

papers.title: Theory-Driven Entrepreneurial Search
papers.authors: Ankur Chavda, Joshua S. Gans, Scott Stern
papers.abstract: How should theory-based entrepreneurs search for strategies to implement their ideas? The theory-based view of strategy posits that decision-makers hold theories about their environment premised on beliefs that should be actively tested. This causal framework, which underlies the theory-based view, also has implications for entrepreneurial search: the process by which entrepreneurs uncover strategies to implement their ideas. In this paper, we develop a Bayesian model where entrepreneurs update their beliefs as they conduct entrepreneurial search. We find several optimal behaviors for theory-based entrepreneurs such as reverting to a previous strategy after finding a relatively poor strategy and continuing to search after finding a relatively good strategy, which are missing when entrepreneurs lack such a theory-based approach. As these predictions align with examples of successful entrepreneurs, our findings both provide a method to empirically identify skilled entrepreneurs and demonstrate the usefulness of applying the theory-based view to entrepreneurial behavior more generally.
papers.zh_title: 理论驱动的创业搜索
papers.zh_abstract: 基于理论的创业者应如何搜索策略来实施他们的想法？基于理论的战略观认为，决策者持有关于其环境的理论，这些理论基于应被积极检验的信念。这种构成基于理论观基础的因果框架，对创业搜索（即创业者发现实施其想法策略的过程）也具有启示意义。在本文中，我们开发了一个贝叶斯模型，其中创业者在进行创业搜索时会更新他们的信念。我们为基于理论的创业者找到了几种最优行为，例如在发现相对较差的策略后恢复到先前的策略，以及在发现相对较好的策略后继续搜索，而当创业者缺乏这种基于理论的方法时，这些行为是缺失的。由于这些预测与成功创业者的案例相符，我们的发现既提供了一种实证识别熟练创业者的方法，也展示了将基于理论的观点更普遍地应用于创业行为的有用性。

papers.title: The Impact of Green Investors on Stock Prices
papers.authors: Gong Cheng, Eric Jondeau, Benoit Mojon, Dimitri Vayanos
papers.abstract: We study the impact of green investors on stock prices in a dynamic equilibrium model where investors are green, passive or active. Green investors track an index that progressively excludes the stocks of the brownest firms; passive investors hold a value-weighted index of all stocks; and active investors hold a mean-variance efficient portfolio of all stocks. Contrary to the literature, we find large drops in the stock prices of the brownest firms and moderate increases for greener firms. These effects occur primarily upon the announcement of the green index's formation and continue during the exclusion phase. The announcement effects imply a first-mover advantage to early adopters of decarbonisation strategies.
papers.zh_title: 绿色投资者对股票价格的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在一个动态均衡模型中研究绿色投资者对股票价格的影响，其中投资者分为绿色投资者、被动投资者和主动投资者。绿色投资者追踪一个逐步排除最棕色公司股票的指数；被动投资者持有所有股票的价值加权指数；主动投资者持有所有股票的均值-方差有效投资组合。与文献相反，我们发现最棕色公司的股票价格大幅下跌，而绿色公司的股票价格温和上涨。这些效应主要发生在绿色指数形成的公告期间，并在排除阶段持续存在。公告效应意味着早期采用脱碳战略者具有先发优势。

papers.title: Where Do Banks End and NBFIs Begin?
papers.authors: Viral V. Acharya, Nicola Cetorelli, Bruce Tuckman
papers.abstract: In recent years, assets of non-bank financial intermediaries (NBFIs) have grown significantly relative to those of banks. These two sectors are commonly viewed either as operating in parallel, performing different activities, or as substitutes, performing substantially similar activities, with banks inside and NBFIs outside the perimeter of banking regulation. We argue instead that NBFI and bank businesses and risks are so interwoven that they are better described as having transformed over time rather than as having migrated from banks to NBFIs. These transformations are at least in part a response to regulation and are such that banks remain special as both routine and emergency liquidity providers to NBFIs. We support this perspective as follows: (i) The new and enhanced financial accounts data for the United States (“From Whom to Whom”) show that banks and NBFIs finance each other, with NBFIs especially dependent on banks; (ii) Case studies and regulatory data show that banks remain exposed to credit and funding risks, which at first glance seem to have moved to NBFIs, and also to contingent liquidity risk from the provision of credit lines to NBFIs; and (iii) Empirical work confirms bank-NBFI linkages through the correlation of their abnormal equity returns and market-based measures of systemic risk. We discuss some potential regulatory responses, including treating the two sectors holistically; recognizing the implications for risk propagation and amplification; and exploring new ways to internalize the costs of systemic risk.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF；JEL：G01, G20, G21, G22, G23, G24, G28, G29
papers.zh_title: 银行与非银行金融中介的界限在哪里？
papers.zh_abstract: 近年来，非银行金融中介的资产相对于银行显著增长。这两个部门通常被视为要么并行运作、从事不同活动，要么作为替代品、从事实质上相似的活动，其中银行处于银行监管范围内，而非银行金融中介则处于监管范围之外。相反，我们认为非银行金融中介与银行的业务和风险如此交织，以至于它们最好被描述为随时间发生了转变，而非从银行迁移到了非银行金融中介。这些转变至少部分是对监管的回应，并且使得银行作为非银行金融中介的常规和紧急流动性提供者仍然具有特殊性。我们通过以下方式支持这一观点：（i）美国新的和增强的金融账户数据（“从谁到谁”）显示，银行和非银行金融中介相互融资，非银行金融中介尤其依赖银行；（ii）案例研究和监管数据显示，银行仍然面临信用和融资风险（这些风险乍看之下似乎已转移至非银行金融中介），以及因向非银行金融中介提供信贷额度而产生的或有流动性风险；（iii）实证工作通过其异常股票收益与基于市场的系统性风险度量的相关性，确认了银行与非银行金融中介之间的关联。我们讨论了一些潜在的监管应对措施，包括整体对待这两个部门；认识到对风险传播和放大的影响；以及探索将系统性风险成本内部化的新方法。

papers.title: Toward an Understanding of the Economics of Misinformation: Evidence from a Demand Side Field Experiment on Critical Thinking
papers.authors: John A. List, Lina M. Ramírez, Julia Seither, Jaime Unda, Beatriz Vallejo
papers.abstract: Misinformation represents a vital threat to the societal fabric of modern economies. While the supply side of the misinformation market has begun to receive increased scrutiny, the demand side has received scant attention. We explore the demand for misinformation through the lens of augmenting critical thinking skills in a field experiment during the 2022 Presidential election in Colombia. Data from roughly 2.000 individuals suggest that our treatments enhance critical thinking, causing subjects to more carefully consider the truthfulness of potential misinformation. We furthermore provide evidence that reducing the demand of fake news can deliver on the dual goal of reducing the spread of fake news by encouraging reporting of misinformation.
papers.zh_title: 迈向对错误信息经济学的理解：来自批判性思维需求方田野实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 错误信息对现代经济的社会结构构成了重大威胁。尽管错误信息市场的供给方已开始受到更多关注，但需求方却鲜有研究。我们通过2022年哥伦比亚总统选举期间的一项田野实验，从增强批判性思维技能的角度探讨了对错误信息的需求。来自约2000名个体的数据表明，我们的干预措施增强了批判性思维，使受试者更仔细地考虑潜在错误信息的真实性。此外，我们提供了证据表明，减少假新闻需求可以通过鼓励举报错误信息来实现减少假新闻传播的双重目标。

papers.title: Shocking Offers: Gender, Wage Inequality, and Recessions in Online Labor Markets
papers.authors: Belinda Archibong, Peter Blair Henry
papers.abstract: Using data from the largest online job portal in Nigeria, we document: (a) gender differences in salary offers for jobs, and (b) the response of (a) to recessions. Jobs in industries where the number of job applicants skews female, offer lower starting salaries than jobs in industries where applicants skew male. During Nigeria’s 2016 recession, overall job applications rose, but applications to jobs in industries that skew male increased more than applications to jobs in industries that skew female. Salary offers fell sharply for jobs in male-skewed industries compared to female-skewed industries. In accordance with this relative shift in applications, in 2016, the salary-offer gender gap almost disappeared.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, LS；JEL：J16, J64, J71, J78, L86, O12
papers.zh_title: 令人震惊的报价：在线劳动力市场中的性别、工资不平等与经济衰退
papers.zh_abstract: 利用尼日利亚最大在线求职门户网站的数据，我们记录了：(a) 工作薪资报价中的性别差异，以及 (b) (a) 对经济衰退的反应。在求职者性别比例偏向女性的行业中，工作起薪低于求职者性别比例偏向男性的行业。在尼日利亚2016年经济衰退期间，总体求职申请数量上升，但偏向男性行业的求职申请增长幅度大于偏向女性行业的求职申请。与偏向女性行业相比，偏向男性行业的薪资报价大幅下降。根据这种求职申请的相对变化，2016年薪资报价的性别差距几乎消失。

papers.title: One Factor to Bind the Cross-Section of Returns
papers.authors: Nicola Borri, Denis Chetverikov, Yukun Liu, Aleh Tsyvinski
papers.abstract: We propose a new non-linear single-factor asset pricing model. Despite its parsimony, this model represents exactly any non-linear model with an arbitrary number of factors and loadings – a consequence of the Kolmogorov-Arnold representation theorem. It features only one pricing component comprising a nonparametric link function of the time-dependent factor and factor loading that we jointly estimate with sieve-based estimators. Using 171 assets across major classes, our model delivers superior cross-sectional performance with a low-dimensional approximation of the link function. Most known finance and macro factors become insignificant controlling for our single-factor.
papers.zh_title: 一个因子绑定横截面收益
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种新的非线性单因子资产定价模型。尽管模型简洁，但它能精确表示任意具有任意数量因子和载荷的非线性模型——这是科尔莫戈罗夫-阿诺德表示定理的结果。该模型仅包含一个定价成分，由一个依赖于时变因子和因子载荷的非参数连接函数组成，我们使用基于筛子的估计器联合估计该函数。利用主要资产类别中的171种资产，我们的模型通过连接函数的低维近似实现了优越的横截面表现。在控制我们的单因子后，大多数已知的金融和宏观因子变得不显著。

papers.title: Does Inflation Affect Earnings Relevance? A Century-Long Analysis
papers.authors: Oliver Binz, John Graham, Matthew Kubic
papers.abstract: Financial reports present assets, liabilities, and earnings on a nominal basis (unadjusted for inflation). Using a novel dataset of nearly a century of financial reports, this paper examines whether and how inflation affects the relation between accounting earnings and stock market value, i.e., earnings relevance. On the one hand, inflation may decrease earnings relevance as historical cost accounting relies on historical transaction prices that become less relevant when inflation changes the price level. On the other hand, inflation may increase earnings relevance by increasing firms’ discount rates and thereby shifting agents’ focus towards nearer-term payoffs. Consistent with the latter hypothesis, we document a strong positive relation between earnings relevance and inflation. Cross-sectional tests indicate that this relation is stronger for firms that are more sensitive to discount rate changes. We find that inflation is of first-order importance relative to determinants of earnings relevance explored in prior literature.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, ME；JEL：E31, G10, M40, M41
papers.zh_title: 通货膨胀会影响盈余相关性吗？一个长达一个世纪的分析
papers.zh_abstract: 财务报告以名义基础（未根据通货膨胀调整）列报资产、负债和盈余。利用近一个世纪财务报告的新数据集，本文考察了通货膨胀是否以及如何影响会计盈余与股票市场价值之间的关系，即盈余相关性。一方面，通货膨胀可能降低盈余相关性，因为历史成本会计依赖于历史交易价格，当通货膨胀改变价格水平时，这些价格的相关性降低。另一方面，通货膨胀可能通过提高企业的贴现率，从而将代理人的关注点转向更短期的收益，来增加盈余相关性。与后一种假设一致，我们记录了盈余相关性与通货膨胀之间的强正相关关系。横截面检验表明，这种关系对于对贴现率变化更敏感的企业更为强烈。我们发现，相对于先前文献中探讨的盈余相关性决定因素，通货膨胀具有一阶重要性。

papers.title: The Big Shift in Working Arrangements: Eight Ways Unusual
papers.authors: Steven J. Davis
papers.abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic instigated a big shift in working arrangements. I first describe the scale of this shift in the United States, drawing on the Survey of Working Arrangements and Attitudes and other sources. I then review differences, circa 2023, in work-from-home rates across industries, demographic groups, and countries. The big shift had surprisingly benign (or even positive) effects on productivity, which is one reason it has endured. Compared to other shocks that strike modern economies, the big shift is also unusual in other respects: It relaxes time budget constraints, improves flexibility in time use, enhances individual autonomy, relaxes locational constraints, drives a major re-sorting of workers to jobs and employers, and alters the structure of wages. The big shift also reduces wage-growth pressures during the transition to new working arrangements and life styles. The shift benefits workers, on average, even as it lowers non-labor costs and real product wages for firms.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PR；JEL：D20, D83, E24, J22, J31
papers.zh_title: 工作安排的重大转变：八个方面的不同寻常之处
papers.zh_abstract: COVID-19大流行引发了工作安排的重大转变。我首先根据工作安排与态度调查及其他来源，描述了美国这一转变的规模。然后，我回顾了大约2023年不同行业、人口群体和国家之间居家办公率的差异。这一重大转变对生产率产生了出人意料的良性（甚至积极）影响，这也是其得以持续的原因之一。与冲击现代经济的其他冲击相比，这一重大转变在其他方面也不同寻常：它放松了时间预算约束，改善了时间使用的灵活性，增强了个体自主性，放松了地点约束，推动了工人与工作和雇主之间的重大重新匹配，并改变了工资结构。这一重大转变还在向新工作安排和生活方式过渡期间降低了工资增长压力。平均而言，这一转变使工人受益，即使它降低了企业的非劳动成本和实际产品工资。

papers.title: Education and Adult Cognition in a Low-income Setting: Differences among Adult Siblings
papers.authors: Yuan S. Zhang, Elizabeth Frankenberg, Duncan Thomas
papers.abstract: The relationship between completed education and adult cognition is investigated using data from the Indonesia Family Life Survey. We compare adult siblings to account for shared, difficult-to-measure characteristics that likely affect this relationship, including genetics and parental preferences and investments. After establishing the importance of shared family background factors, we document substantively large, significant impacts of education on cognition in models with sibling fixed effects. In contrast, the strong positive correlation between education and adult height is reduced to zero in models with sibling fixed effects, suggesting little contamination in the education-height association beyond factors common to siblings.
papers.zh_title: 低收入环境中的教育与成人认知：成年兄弟姐妹之间的差异
papers.zh_abstract: 利用印度尼西亚家庭生活调查的数据，研究了完成的教育与成人认知之间的关系。我们比较了成年兄弟姐妹，以考虑可能影响这种关系的共同且难以衡量的特征，包括遗传因素以及父母的偏好和投资。在确定了共同家庭背景因素的重要性后，我们在包含兄弟姐妹固定效应的模型中记录了教育对认知的实质性且显著的影响。相比之下，教育与成人身高之间的强正相关在包含兄弟姐妹固定效应的模型中降至零，这表明除了兄弟姐妹共同的因素外，教育-身高关联中几乎没有污染。

papers.title: After 40 Years, How Representative Are Labor Market Outcomes in the NLSY79?
papers.authors: Alexander Bick, Adam Blandin, Richard Rogerson
papers.abstract: In 1979, the National Longitudinal Study of Youth 1979 (NLSY79) began following a group of US residents born between 1957 and 1964. It has continued to re-interview these same individuals for more than four decades. Despite this long sampling period, attrition remains modest. This paper shows that after 40 years of data collection, the remaining NLYS79 sample continues to be broadly representative of their national cohorts with regard to key labor market outcomes. For NLSY79 age cohorts, life-cycle profiles of employment, hours worked, and earnings are comparable to those in the Current Population Survey. Moreover, average lifetime earnings over the age range 25 to 55 closely align with the same measure in Social Security Administration data. Our results suggest that the NLSY79 can continue to provide useful data for economists and other social scientists studying life-cycle and lifetime labor market outcomes, including earnings inequality.
papers.zh_title: 40年后，NLSY79中的劳动力市场结果代表性如何？
papers.zh_abstract: 1979年，全国青年纵向调查1979（NLSY79）开始追踪一组出生于1957年至1964年间的美国居民。四十多年来，它持续对这些相同个体进行重新访谈。尽管抽样期很长，但样本流失仍然较小。本文表明，经过40年的数据收集，剩余的NLSY79样本在关键劳动力市场结果方面仍然广泛代表其全国同龄群体。对于NLSY79的年龄队列，就业、工作小时数和收入的生命周期曲线与当前人口调查中的曲线相当。此外，25至55岁年龄段的平均终身收入与社会保障管理局数据中的相同指标高度一致。我们的结果表明，NLSY79可以继续为经济学家和其他社会科学家研究生命周期和终身劳动力市场结果（包括收入不平等）提供有用的数据。

papers.title: Bargaining and Dynamic Competition
papers.authors: Shanglyu Deng, Dun Jia, Mario Leccese, Andrew Sweeting
papers.abstract: Industries with significant scale economies or learning-by-doing may come to be dominated by a single firm. Economists have studied how likely this is to happen, and whether it is efficient, using models where buyers are price or quantity takers, even though these industries are often also characterized by buyer-seller negotiations. We extend the dynamic “learning-by-doing and forgetting” model of Besanko, Doraszelski, Kryukov, and Satterthwaite (2010) to allow for Nash-in-Nash bargaining over prices. Price-taking and the social planner solution are captured as special cases. We show that sellers’ dynamic incentives, market concentration and welfare can change sharply, and non-monotonically, as one moves away from the price-taking assumption. We study the implications of buyer bargaining power for the existence of multiple equilibria, the design of subsidy policies and the welfare effects of policies designed to increase competition.
papers.zh_title: 讨价还价与动态竞争
papers.zh_abstract: 具有显著规模经济或干中学效应的行业可能最终由单一企业主导。经济学家使用买方是价格接受者或数量接受者的模型研究了这种情况发生的可能性及其效率，尽管这些行业通常也以买卖双方谈判为特征。我们扩展了Besanko、Doraszelski、Kryukov和Satterthwaite（2010）的动态“干中学与遗忘”模型，以允许纳什-纳什讨价还价定价。价格接受和社会计划者解决方案作为特例被纳入。我们表明，随着偏离价格接受假设，卖方的动态激励、市场集中度和福利可能发生剧烈且非单调的变化。我们研究了买方议价能力对多重均衡存在性、补贴政策设计以及旨在增加竞争的政策的福利效应的影响。

papers.title: Technological Progress and Rent Seeking
papers.authors: Vincent Glode, Guillermo Ordoñez
papers.abstract: We model firms’ allocation of resources across surplus-creating (i.e., productive) and surplus-appropriating (i.e., rent-seeking) activities. Our model predicts that industry-wide technological advancements, such as recent progress in data collection and processing, induce a disproportionate and socially inefficient reallocation of resources toward surplus-appropriating activities. As technology improves, firms rely more on appropriation to obtain their profits, endogenously reducing the impact of technological progress on economic progress and inflating the price of the resources used for both types of activities. We apply our theoretical insights to shed light on the rise of high-frequency trading
papers.zh_title: 技术进步与寻租行为
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个模型，分析企业在创造剩余（即生产性）活动与获取剩余（即寻租性）活动之间的资源配置。模型预测，行业层面的技术进步——例如近期在数据收集与处理方面的进展——会促使资源不成比例地、且在社会效率低下的情况下向获取剩余的活动重新配置。随着技术改进，企业更加依赖寻租行为来获取利润，这内生地削弱了技术进步对经济进步的影响，并抬高了用于两类活动的资源价格。我们运用理论洞见来阐释高频交易的兴起。

papers.title: Assessing the Costs of Balancing College and Work Activities: The Gig Economy Meets Online Education
papers.authors: Esteban M. Aucejo, A. Spencer Perry, Basit Zafar
papers.abstract: Balancing the demands of work and schooling is a challenging task for an increasing number of students who have to pay their way through college and for workers who intend to upgrade their skills. However, flexible learning and working environments could play an important role in easing many frictions associated with performing both activities simultaneously. Using detailed (work and study effort) data -- from a partnership between Arizona State University and Uber that allows eligible drivers to enroll in online college courses for free -- we analyze how labor supply and study efforts respond to changes in labor market conditions and college activities/tasks. Our findings indicate that a 10% increase in average weekly online college activities reduces weekly time spent on the Uber platform by about 1%, indicating a low “short run” opportunity cost of studying when working. We also show that study time is not particularly sensitive to changes in labor market conditions, where a 10% increase in average weekly pay reduces study hours by only 2%. Consistent with these results, we find that workers take advantage of their flexible schedules by changing their usual working hours when their college courses are more demanding. We do not find adverse effects of work hours on academic performance in this context, or of study hours on workplace performance (as measured by driver ratings or tips). Finally, the (elicited) value assigned to flexible working and educational formats is high among the students in our sample, who view online education as an important vehicle for increasing expected future income. Overall, this study underscores that combining flexible working and learning formats could constitute a suitable path for many (lowSES) students who work to afford an increasingly expensive college education and for workers aiming to improve their skill set.
papers.zh_title: 评估平衡大学学习与工作活动的成本：零工经济遇上在线教育
papers.zh_abstract: 对于越来越多需要自费上大学的学生以及希望提升技能的劳动者而言，平衡工作与学业需求是一项艰巨的任务。然而，灵活的学习和工作环境可能在缓解同时进行这两项活动所带来的诸多摩擦方面发挥重要作用。利用亚利桑那州立大学与优步合作（允许符合条件的司机免费注册在线大学课程）提供的详细（工作和学习努力）数据，我们分析了劳动力供给和学习努力如何响应劳动力市场状况及大学活动/任务的变化。我们的研究结果表明，平均每周在线大学活动增加10%，会导致每周在优步平台上花费的时间减少约1%，这表明工作时学习的“短期”机会成本较低。我们还发现，学习时间对劳动力市场状况的变化并不特别敏感，平均每周薪酬增加10%仅使学习时间减少2%。与这些结果一致，我们发现劳动者会利用其灵活的工作安排，在大学课程要求更高时改变通常的工作时间。在此背景下，我们未发现工作时间对学业成绩有不利影响，也未发现学习时间对工作表现（以司机评分或小费衡量）有不利影响。最后，在我们的样本学生中，他们对灵活工作和教育模式所赋予的（经诱导得出的）价值很高，他们将在线教育视为增加预期未来收入的重要途径。总体而言，这项研究强调，结合灵活的工作和学习模式，可能为许多通过工作来支付日益昂贵的大学费用的（低社会经济地位）学生以及旨在提升技能的劳动者提供一条合适的路径。

papers.title: Private Adoption of Public Good Technologies: The Case of PurpleAir
papers.authors: Joshua S. Graff Zivin, Benjamin Krebs, Matthew J. Neidell
papers.abstract: We study the private adoption and diffusion of a technology that provides a local public good – PurpleAir (PA) pollution monitors. From a purely informational perspective, the ideal spacing of these monitors should reflect the degree of spatial correlation in pollution. In stark contrast, we find that monitor adoption is spatially highly clustered in less polluted areas, suggesting the marginal monitor adopted provides minimal additional public information. Moreover, monitor adoption mainly occurs in affluent, predominantly white neighborhoods, underscoring the potential environmental justice concerns associated with the private provision of this public good.
papers.zh_title: 公共物品技术的私人采用：以PurpleAir为例
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一种提供地方公共物品的技术——PurpleAir污染监测仪——的私人采用与扩散。从纯粹的信息角度来看，这些监测仪的理想间距应反映污染的空间相关程度。然而，与此形成鲜明对比的是，我们发现监测仪的采用在空间上高度集中于污染较轻的地区，这表明边际上被采用的监测仪所提供的额外公共信息微乎其微。此外，监测仪的采用主要发生在富裕且以白人为主的社区，这凸显了私人提供这种公共物品可能引发的环境正义问题。

papers.title: Financial Literacy and Financial Education: An Overview
papers.authors: Tim Kaiser, Annamaria Lusardi
papers.abstract: This article provides a concise narrative overview of the rapidly growing empirical literature on financial literacy and financial education. We first discuss stylized facts on the demographic correlates of financial literacy. We next cover the evidence on the effects of financial literacy on financial behaviors and outcomes. Finally, we review the evidence on the causal effects of financial education programs focusing on randomized controlled trial evaluations. The article concludes with perspectives on future research priorities for both financial literacy and financial education.
papers.zh_title: 金融素养与金融教育：概述
papers.zh_abstract: 本文对快速增长的关于金融素养与金融教育的实证文献进行了简洁的叙述性概述。我们首先讨论了关于金融素养人口统计学相关性的典型事实。接着，我们涵盖了关于金融素养对金融行为和结果影响的证据。最后，我们回顾了关于金融教育项目因果效应的证据，重点关注随机对照试验评估。文章最后对金融素养和金融教育未来的研究重点提出了展望。

papers.title: Macroeconomics of Mental Health
papers.authors: Boaz Abramson, Job Boerma, Aleh Tsyvinski
papers.abstract: We develop an economic theory of mental health. The theory is grounded in classic and modern psychiatric literature, is disciplined with micro data, and is formalized in a life-cycle heterogeneous agent framework. In our model, individuals experiencing mental illness have pessimistic expectations and lose time due to rumination. As a result, they work less, consume less, invest less in risky assets, and forego treatment which in turn reinforces mental illness. We quantify the societal burden of mental illness and evaluate the efficacy of prominent policy proposals. We show that expanding the availability of treatment services and improving treatment of mental illness in late adolescence substantially improve mental health and welfare.
papers.zh_title: 心理健康宏观经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个关于心理健康的经济学理论。该理论植根于经典和现代精神病学文献，通过微观数据进行校准，并在生命周期异质性主体框架中形式化。在我们的模型中，经历精神疾病的个体持有悲观预期，并因反刍思维而损失时间。因此，他们工作更少、消费更少、对风险资产的投资更少，并且放弃治疗，这反过来又加剧了精神疾病。我们量化了精神疾病的社会负担，并评估了主要政策提案的有效性。我们表明，扩大治疗服务的可及性以及改善青少年晚期精神疾病的治疗，能够显著改善心理健康和福利。

papers.title: The Benefits and Costs of Secured Debt
papers.authors: Efraim Benmelech
papers.abstract: Secured debt—a debt contract that offers security to creditors in the form of collateralized assets—has been a cornerstone of credit markets in most societies since antiquity. The ability to seize and sell collateral reduces the creditor’s expected losses when the debtor defaults on a promised payment. Moreover, when a firm borrows from multiple creditors with different seniorities, debt secured by assets has higher priority relative to other creditors and is first in line for payment if the firm is bankrupt. While the benefits of secured debt have been shown in both the theoretical and empirical literature, less is known about the costs associated with secured borrowing. This paper surveys the burgeoning empirical literature on secured debt and provides an assessment of the costs and benefits of secured debt.
papers.zh_title: 担保债务的收益与成本
papers.zh_abstract: 担保债务——一种以抵押资产形式向债权人提供担保的债务合约——自古以来就是大多数社会信贷市场的基石。扣押和出售抵押品的能力减少了债务人违约未支付款项时债权人的预期损失。此外，当一家公司向具有不同优先级的多个债权人借款时，以资产担保的债务相对于其他债权人具有更高的优先级，并在公司破产时优先获得偿付。尽管理论和实证文献都已证明了担保债务的收益，但关于担保借款相关成本的认识仍然不足。本文调查了关于担保债务的新兴实证文献，并对担保债务的成本与收益进行了评估。

papers.title: Return Migration and Human Capital Flows
papers.authors: Naser Amanzadeh, Amir Kermani, Timothy McQuade
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, ITI, LS；JEL：F22, J61, O15

papers.title: Balancing Federalism: The Impact of Decentralizing School Accountability
papers.authors: Eric A. Hanushek, Patricia Saenz-Armstrong, Alejandra Salazar
papers.abstract: Education policy, while primarily the responsibility of the state governments, involves complicated decision making at the local, state, and federal levels. The federal involvement dramatically increased with the introduction of test-based accountability under the No Child Left Behind Act of 2001. But, reflecting resistance to various parts of this law, the involvement of federal policy making was substantially reduced when Congress passed the Every Student Succeeds Act in 2015. This change in policy allows estimation of the impact of altered federalism. By looking at how states reacted to their enhanced decision-making role, we see a retreat from the use of output-based policy toward teachers, and this retreat was associated with significantly lower student achievement growth. As a result, this readjustment of federalism to decision making by lower levels appeared to lower national achievement. The snapshot of federalism impacts here is a lower bound on the effects as more states will very likely react to the flexibility of ESSA and as more school districts change their teacher force.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：H1, H7, I20
papers.zh_title: 平衡联邦制：分散学校问责制的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 教育政策虽然主要由州政府负责，但涉及地方、州和联邦层面的复杂决策。随着2001年《不让一个孩子掉队法案》引入基于考试的问责制，联邦政府的参与度大幅增加。然而，由于对该法案各部分的抵制，当国会于2015年通过《每个学生成功法案》时，联邦政策制定的参与度显著降低。这一政策变化使得我们能够评估联邦制调整的影响。通过观察各州如何应对其增强的决策角色，我们发现各州在针对教师的政策上从基于产出的方式后退，而这种后退与显著较低的学生成绩增长相关。因此，这种将联邦制调整为更低层级决策的做法似乎降低了全国范围内的学业成就。这里呈现的联邦制影响快照是影响的下限，因为更多州很可能会对ESSA的灵活性做出反应，并且更多学区会改变其教师队伍。

papers.title: The Gender Concealment Gap
papers.authors: Christine L. Exley, Raymond Fisman, Judd B. Kessler, Louis-Pierre Lepage, Xiaomeng Li, Corinne Low, Xiaoyue Shan, Mattie Toma, Basit Zafar
papers.abstract: We identify and explore a gender concealment gap when individuals have the opportunity to hide information about their performance from others. In data from two universities that allowed students to replace letter grades with “credit” on their transcripts, we find that men are substantially more likely than women to conceal grades that will harm their GPAs. The gender concealment gap persists across student traits and course features and generates inequity: the option to conceal leads to GPA gains that are 50% larger for men than for women. University data and complementary experimental evidence suggests that women may conceal less because they expect others will make worse inferences about their concealed grades.
papers.zh_title: 性别隐藏差距
papers.zh_abstract: 我们识别并探讨了当个体有机会向他人隐藏其表现信息时存在的性别隐藏差距。来自两所大学的数据显示，学生可以用“学分”替代成绩单上的字母等级，我们发现男性比女性更倾向于隐藏会损害其GPA的成绩。这种性别隐藏差距在不同学生特征和课程特征中持续存在，并导致了不平等：隐藏选项带来的GPA提升，男性比女性高出50%。大学数据和补充实验证据表明，女性隐藏较少可能是因为她们预期他人会对其隐藏的成绩做出更差的推断。

papers.title: Mask Mandate Costs
papers.authors: Patrick Carlin, Shyam Raman, Kosali I. Simon, Ryan Sullivan, Coady Wing
papers.abstract: This paper presents the results from a hypothetical set of questions related to mask-wearing behavior and opinions that were asked of a nationally representative sample of over 4,000 participants in early 2022. Mask mandates were hotly debated in public discourse, and though much research exists on benefits of masks, there has been no research thus far on the distribution of perceived costs of compliance. As is common in economic research that aims to assess the value to society of non-market activities, we use survey valuation methods and ask how much participants would be willing to pay to be exempted from rules of mandatory community masking. The survey asks specifically about a 3 month exemption. We find that the majority of respondents (56%) are not willing to pay to be exempted from mandatory masking. However, the average person was willing to pay $525, and a small segment of the population (0.9%) stated they were willing to pay over $5,000 to be exempted from the mandate. Younger respondents stated higher willingness to pay to avoid the mandate than older respondents. Combining our results with standard measures of the value of a statistical life, we estimate that a 3 month masking order was perceived as cost effective through willingness-to-pay questions only if at least 13,333 lives were saved by the policy.
papers.zh_title: 口罩强制令的成本
papers.zh_abstract: 本文展示了2022年初对超过4000名全国代表性样本参与者进行的一组关于口罩佩戴行为和意见的假设性问题的调查结果。口罩强制令在公共讨论中备受争议，尽管关于口罩益处的研究很多，但迄今为止尚无关于合规感知成本分布的研究。与旨在评估非市场活动社会价值的经济学研究常见做法一样，我们使用调查估值方法，询问参与者愿意支付多少费用以豁免于社区强制口罩规定。调查特别询问了三个月的豁免期。我们发现，大多数受访者（56%）不愿意为豁免强制口罩而付费。然而，平均每人愿意支付525美元，一小部分人群（0.9%）表示愿意支付超过5000美元以豁免于该强制令。年轻受访者比年长受访者表示愿意支付更高的金额以避免强制令。结合我们的结果与统计生命价值的标准衡量标准，我们估计，只有当该政策至少挽救13,333条生命时，三个月的口罩强制令才通过意愿支付问题被视为具有成本效益。

papers.title: Examiner and Judge Designs in Economics: A Practitioner's Guide
papers.authors: Eric Chyn, Brigham Frandsen, Emily C. Leslie
papers.abstract: This article provides empirical researchers with an introduction and guide to research designs based on variation in judge and examiner tendencies to administer treatments or other interventions. We review the basic theory behind the research design, outline the assumptions under which the design identifies causal effects, describe empirical tests of those assumptions, and discuss tradeoffs associated with choices researchers must make for estimation. We demonstrate concepts and best practices concretely in an empirical case study that uses an examiner tendency research design to study the effects of pre-trial detention.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：C21, C26, C31, C54, K14
papers.zh_title: 经济学中的审查员与法官设计：实践者指南
papers.zh_abstract: 本文为实证研究人员提供了基于法官和审查员在实施处理或其他干预措施方面倾向性差异的研究设计的介绍和指南。我们回顾了该研究设计背后的基本理论，概述了该设计识别因果效应的假设条件，描述了这些假设的实证检验方法，并讨论了研究人员在估计过程中必须做出的选择所涉及的权衡。我们通过一个实证案例研究具体展示了概念和最佳实践，该案例使用审查员倾向性研究设计来研究审前拘留的影响。

papers.title: A Field Experiment on Antitrust Compliance
papers.authors: Kei Kawai, Jun Nakabayashi
papers.abstract: We study the effectiveness of firms' compliance programs by conducting a field experiment in which we disclose to a subset of Japanese firms that the firm is potentially engaging in illegal bid-rigging. We find that the information that we disclose affects the bidding behavior of the treated firms: our test of bid-rigging is less able to reject the null of competition when applied to the bidding data of the treated firms after the intervention. We find evidence that this change is not the result of firms ceasing to collude, however. We find evidence suggesting that firms continue to collude even after our intervention and that the change in the bidding behavior we document is the result of active concealment of evidence by cartelizing firms.
papers.zh_title: 反垄断合规的实地实验
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过进行一项实地实验来研究企业合规计划的有效性，在该实验中，我们向一部分日本企业披露，该企业可能正在从事非法的串通投标行为。我们发现，我们披露的信息影响了受处理企业的投标行为：在干预后，当应用于受处理企业的投标数据时，我们的串通投标检验更难以拒绝竞争的零假设。然而，我们发现有证据表明，这种变化并非企业停止合谋的结果。证据表明，即使在我们干预之后，企业仍在继续合谋，并且我们所记录的投标行为变化是合谋企业积极隐藏证据的结果。

papers.title: Human Capital Spillovers and Health: Does Living Around College Graduates Lengthen Life?
papers.authors: Jacob H. Bor, David M. Cutler, Edward L. Glaeser, Ljubica Ristovska
papers.abstract: Equally educated people are healthier if they live in more educated places. Every 10 percent point increase in an area’s share of adults with a college degree is associated with a decline in all-cause mortality by 7%, controlling for individual education, demographics, and area characteristics. Area human capital is also associated with lower disease prevalence and improvements in self-reported health. The association between area education and health increased greatly between 1990 and 2010. Spatial sorting does not drive these externalities; there is little evidence that sicker people move disproportionately into less educated areas. Differences in health-related amenities, ranging from hospital quality to pollution, explain no more than 17% of the area human capital spillovers on health. Over half of the correlation between area human capital and health is a result of the correlation between area human capital and smoking and obesity. More educated areas have stricter regulations regarding smoking and more negative beliefs about smoking. These have translated over time into a population that smokes noticeably less and that is less obese, leading to increasing divergence in health outcomes by area education.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, ED, EH；JEL：I12, I18, I24, I26, R10
papers.zh_title: 人力资本溢出与健康：生活在大学毕业生周围能延长寿命吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 同等教育水平的人如果生活在受教育程度更高的地方，会更健康。在控制个人教育水平、人口统计特征和地区特征后，一个地区拥有大学学位的成年人比例每提高10个百分点，全因死亡率就会下降7%。地区人力资本也与较低的疾病患病率和自评健康状况的改善相关。地区教育与健康之间的关联在1990年至2010年间大幅增加。空间分类并不能驱动这些外部性；几乎没有证据表明病人会不成比例地迁移到受教育程度较低的地区。从医院质量到污染等健康相关便利设施的差异，最多只能解释地区人力资本对健康溢出效应的17%。地区人力资本与健康之间超过一半的相关性是由地区人力资本与吸烟和肥胖之间的相关性造成的。受教育程度更高的地区对吸烟有更严格的规定，并且对吸烟有更负面的看法。随着时间的推移，这些因素导致这些地区的人口吸烟率显著降低，肥胖率也较低，从而导致按地区教育程度划分的健康结果差异不断扩大。

papers.title: Work Requirements and Child Tax Benefits
papers.authors: Jacob Goldin, Tatiana Homonoff, Neel A. Lal, Ithai Lurie, Katherine Michelmore, Matthew Unrath
papers.abstract: Many U.S. safety-net programs condition benefit eligibility on work. Eliminating work requirements would better target benefits to the neediest families but attenuates pro-work incentives. Using administrative records, we study how expanding a California child tax credit to non-workers affected maternal labor supply. We rely on quasi-random birth-timing and a novel method for using placebo analyses to maximize estimator precision. Eliminating the work requirement caused very few mothers to exit the labor force; our 95% confidence interval excludes reductions over one-third of one percent. Our results suggest expanding tax benefits to the lowest-income families need not meaningfully reduce workforce participation.
papers.zh_title: 工作要求与儿童税收优惠
papers.zh_abstract: 美国许多安全网项目将福利资格与工作挂钩。取消工作要求可以更好地将福利瞄准最需要帮助的家庭，但会削弱促进工作的激励。利用行政记录，我们研究了将加州儿童税收抵免扩大到非工作者对母亲劳动供给的影响。我们依赖于准随机的生育时机以及一种使用安慰剂分析来最大化估计精度的新方法。取消工作要求导致极少数母亲退出劳动力市场；我们的95%置信区间排除了超过三分之一百分点的减少。我们的结果表明，将税收优惠扩大到最低收入家庭未必会显著降低劳动力参与率。

papers.title: Upward Mobility in Developing Countries
papers.authors: Garance Genicot, Debraj Ray, Carolina Concha-Arriagada
papers.abstract: This article provides an overview of the literature on mobility in developing countries. Explicit distinctions are drawn between directional and non-directional measures, absolute and relative measures, and combinations thereof. We note that the scarcity of panel data has hindered the measurement of mobility for many countries. We pay particular attention to the recent development of panel-free mobility measures, which allows us to measure upward mobility in 122 countries. Throughout this review, we discuss some central themes in the literature.
papers.zh_title: 发展中国家的向上流动性
papers.zh_abstract: 本文综述了关于发展中国家流动性的文献。我们明确区分了方向性与非方向性指标、绝对与相对指标及其组合。我们注意到，面板数据的匮乏阻碍了许多国家流动性的测量。我们特别关注近期发展的无面板流动性指标，这使得我们能够衡量122个国家的向上流动性。在整个综述中，我们讨论了文献中的一些核心主题。

papers.title: Loopholes and the Incidence of Public Services: Evidence from Funding Career & Technical Education
papers.authors: Thomas Goldring, Brian Jacob, Daniel Kreisman, Michael Ricks
papers.abstract: In 2015, Michigan increased its Career and Technical Education (CTE) funding and changed its funding formula to reimburse programs-based student progression through program curricula. Although this change nearly doubled program completion rates, student enrollment and persistence were unaffected; instead, administrators accelerated student progress by reorganizing course curricula around notches in the new funding formula. As a result of response heterogeneity, 30% of the funding increase is transferred away from high-poverty districts to more affluent ones, underscoring how supply-side responses to loopholes shape the incidence of public services.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：I20, I21, I22
papers.zh_title: 漏洞与公共服务的归宿：来自职业与技术教育资助的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 2015年，密歇根州增加了职业与技术教育（CTE）资助，并改变了资助公式，根据学生完成课程大纲的进度来报销项目。尽管这一变化使项目完成率几乎翻倍，但学生入学率和持续学习率并未受到影响；相反，管理人员通过围绕新资助公式中的节点重组课程大纲，加速了学生进度。由于反应的异质性，30%的资助增加额从高贫困学区转移到了更富裕的学区，这突显了供给侧对漏洞的反应如何塑造公共服务的归宿。

papers.title: Immigration's Effect on US Wages and Employment Redux
papers.authors: Alessandro Caiumi, Giovanni Peri
papers.abstract: In this article we revive, extend and improve the approach used in a series of influential papers written in the 2000s to estimate how changes in the supply of immigrant workers affected natives' wages in the US. We begin by extending the analysis to include the more recent years 2000-2022. Additionally, we introduce three important improvements. First, we introduce an IV that uses a new skill-based shift-share for immigrants and the demographic evolution for natives, which we show passes validity tests and has reasonably strong power. Second, we provide estimates of the impact of immigration on the employment-population ratio of natives to test for crowding out at the national level. Third, we analyze occupational upgrading of natives in response to immigrants. Using these estimates, we calculate that immigration, thanks to native-immigrant complementarity and college skill content of immigrants, had a positive and significant effect between +1.7 to +2.6\\% on wages of less educated native workers, over the period 2000-2019 and no significant wage effect on college educated natives. We also calculate a positive employment rate effect for most native workers. Even simulations for the most recent 2019-2022 period suggest small positive effects on wages of non-college natives and no significant crowding out effects on employment.
papers.zh_title: 移民对美国工资和就业影响的再探讨
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们复兴、扩展并改进了2000年代一系列有影响力的论文中使用的方法，以估计移民工人供给变化如何影响美国本土工人的工资。我们首先将分析扩展到包括最近的2000-2022年。此外，我们引入了三项重要改进。第一，我们引入了一个工具变量，该变量使用基于移民的新技能份额转移和本土人口演变，我们证明其通过了有效性检验并具有相当强的解释力。第二，我们提供了移民对本土工人就业人口比影响的估计，以检验国家层面的挤出效应。第三，我们分析了本土工人为应对移民而进行的职业升级。利用这些估计，我们计算出，由于本土与移民的互补性以及移民的大学技能含量，在2000-2019年期间，移民对受教育程度较低的本土工人工资产生了显著的正向影响，幅度在+1.7%至+2.6%之间，而对受过大学教育的本土工人没有显著的工资影响。我们还计算出对大多数本土工人有正的就业率效应。即使对最近的2019-2022年期间的模拟也表明，移民对非大学学历本土工人的工资有小的正向影响，且没有显著的就业挤出效应。

papers.title: Teaching Teachers To Use Computer Assisted Learning Effectively: Experimental and Quasi-Experimental Evidence
papers.authors: Philip Oreopoulos, Chloe Gibbs, Michael Jensen, Joseph Price
papers.abstract: Mastery learning - the process by which students must demonstrate proficiency with a single topic before moving on - is well recognized as one of the most effective ways to learn, yet many teachers struggle or remain unsure about how to implement it into a classroom setting. This study evaluates a program to encourage greater mastery learning through technology and proactive continuous teacher support. Focusing on elementary and middle school mathematics, teachers receive weekly coaching in how to use Computer Assisted Learning (CAL) for helping students follow a customized roadmap of incremental progress. Results from two field experiments indicate significant Intent To Treat effects on math performance of 0.12 - 0.22 standard deviations. Further analysis indicates that these gains are from students in classrooms with at least an average of 35 minutes of practice per week. Teachers able to achieve high-dosage practice have a high degree of initial buy-in, a clear implementation strategy for when practice occurs, and a willingness to closely monitor progress and follow-up with struggling students.
papers.zh_title: 有效教授教师使用计算机辅助学习：实验与准实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 掌握学习——即学生必须在进入下一个主题之前证明对单个主题的熟练程度——被公认为最有效的学习方式之一，然而许多教师仍难以或不确定如何在课堂环境中实施它。本研究评估了一个通过技术和主动持续教师支持来鼓励更多掌握学习的项目。聚焦于中小学数学，教师每周接受辅导，学习如何使用计算机辅助学习（CAL）帮助学生遵循定制的渐进进步路线图。来自两个现场实验的结果表明，对数学成绩的意向治疗效应显著，为0.12至0.22个标准差。进一步分析表明，这些收益来自每周平均至少进行35分钟练习的课堂中的学生。能够实现高剂量练习的教师具有高度的初始认同感、明确的练习实施策略，以及密切监控进度并跟进困难学生的意愿。

papers.title: The Dollar versus the Euro as International Reserve Currencies
papers.authors: Menzie D. Chinn, Jeffrey A. Frankel, Hiro Ito
papers.abstract: We begin by examining determinants of aggregate foreign exchange reserve holdings by central banks (size of issuing country’s economy and financial markets, ability of the currency to hold value, and inertia). But understanding the determination of reserve holdings probably requires going beyond the aggregate numbers, instead observing individual central bank behavior, including characteristics of the holding country (bilateral trade with the issuing country, bilateral currency peg, and proxies for bilateral exposure to sanctions), in addition to the characteristics of the reserve currency issuer. On a currency-by-currency basis, US dollar holdings are somewhat well explained by several issuer characteristics; but the other currencies are less successfully explained. It may be that the results from currency-by-currency estimation are impaired by insufficient sample size. This consideration offers a motivation for pooling the data across the major currencies and imposing the constraints that reserve holdings are determined in the same way for each currency. In this setting, most economic determinants enter with significance: economic size as measured by GDP, size of financial markets as measured by foreign exchange turnover, bilateral currency peg, and bilateral trade share. However, geopolitical variables (bilateral alliance, bilateral sanctions) usually do not enter with significance.
papers.zh_title: 美元与欧元作为国际储备货币的比较
papers.zh_abstract: 我们首先考察中央银行外汇储备总量的决定因素（发行国经济和金融市场的规模、货币保值能力以及惯性）。但理解储备持有的决定可能还需要超越总量数字，转而观察单个中央银行的行为，包括持有国的特征（与发行国的双边贸易、双边货币挂钩以及双边制裁暴露的代理变量），以及储备货币发行国的特征。在逐个货币的基础上，美元持有量在一定程度上可以由几个发行国特征较好地解释；但其他货币的解释效果较差。这可能是因为逐个货币估计的结果因样本量不足而受损。这一考虑为将主要货币的数据合并并施加约束（即每种货币的储备持有以相同方式决定）提供了动机。在这种设定下，大多数经济决定因素具有显著性：以GDP衡量的经济规模、以外汇交易量衡量的金融市场规模、双边货币挂钩以及双边贸易份额。然而，地缘政治变量（双边联盟、双边制裁）通常不显著。

papers.title: The Rise and Fall of the Teaching Profession: Prestige, Interest, Preparation, and Satisfaction over the Last Half Century
papers.authors: Matthew A. Kraft, Melissa Arnold Lyon
papers.abstract: We examine the state of the U.S. K-12 teaching profession over the last half century by compiling nationally representative time-series data on four interrelated constructs: occupational prestige, interest among students, the number of individuals preparing for entry, and on-the-job satisfaction. We find a consistent and dynamic pattern across every measure: a rapid decline in the 1970s, a swift rise in the 1980s extending into the mid 1990s, relative stability, and then a sustained decline beginning around 2010. The current state of the teaching profession is at or near its lowest levels in 50 years. We identify and explore a range of hypotheses that might explain these historical patterns including economic and sociopolitical factors, education policies, and school environments.
papers.zh_title: 教师职业的兴衰：过去半个世纪的声望、兴趣、准备与满意度
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过汇编具有全国代表性的时间序列数据，考察了过去半个世纪美国K-12教师职业的状况，这些数据涉及四个相互关联的构念：职业声望、学生兴趣、准备入职的人数以及在职满意度。我们发现每个指标都呈现出一致且动态的模式：1970年代迅速下降，1980年代迅速上升并持续到1990年代中期，随后相对稳定，然后从2010年左右开始持续下降。教师职业的当前状态处于或接近50年来的最低水平。我们识别并探讨了一系列可能解释这些历史模式的假设，包括经济和社会政治因素、教育政策以及学校环境。

papers.title: Ethics and Illusions: How Ethical Declarations Shape Market Behavior
papers.authors: John M. Barrios, Jeremy Bertomeu, Radhika Lunawat, Ibrahima Sall
papers.abstract: We examine the impacts of ethical declarations on market transactions through a controlled laboratory experiment, where privately-informed sellers issue a public report prior to a first-price auction. We find that while signing an ethical statement does not reduce misreporting by sellers, it significantly increases buyer trust, often skewing the terms of the trade in favor of sellers.
