Contrary to rational expectations, buyers consistently struggle to undo the bias. In counterfactual scenarios, from our structural analysis, we find that price efficiency improves when buyers rationally process uncertainty about sellers' ethical preferences, yet bias persists even when buyers have more accurate perceptions of sellers'’ ethical standards. Overall, our results suggests that disclosure interventions aimed at enhancing ethical conduct in market settings may not necessarily lead to more efficient pricing or reduced bias, and in some instances, may even disadvantage certain market participants.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, LE；JEL：D53, G10, G14, G4, G41
papers.zh_title: 伦理与幻觉：伦理声明如何塑造市场行为
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过一个受控的实验室实验，考察伦理声明对市场交易的影响，其中拥有私人信息的卖方在首价拍卖前发布公开报告。我们发现，虽然签署伦理声明并未减少卖方的虚假报告，但它显著增加了买方的信任，往往使交易条件向卖方倾斜。与理性预期相反，买方始终难以纠正这种偏差。在我们的结构分析的反事实情景中，我们发现当买方理性处理关于卖方伦理偏好的不确定性时，价格效率会提高，但即使买方对卖方的伦理标准有更准确的认知，偏差仍然存在。总体而言，我们的结果表明，旨在增强市场环境中伦理行为的披露干预措施，不一定能带来更有效的定价或减少偏差，在某些情况下，甚至可能使某些市场参与者处于不利地位。

papers.title: Gaining Steam: Incumbent Lock-in and Entrant Leapfrogging
papers.authors: Richard Hornbeck, Shanon Hsuan-Ming Hsu, Anders Humlum, Martin Rotemberg
papers.abstract: We examine the long transition from water to steam power in US manufacturing, focusing on early users of mechanical power: lumber and flour mills. Digitizing Census of Manufactures manuscripts for 1850 to 1880, we show that as steam costs declined, manufacturing activity grew faster in counties with less waterpower potential. This growth was driven by steam powered entrants and agglomeration, as water powered incumbents faced switching barriers primarily from sunk costs. Estimating a dynamic model of firm entry and steam adoption, we find that the interaction of switching barriers and high fixed costs creates a quantitatively important and socially inefficient drag on technology adoption. Despite substantial entry and exit, switching barriers remained influential for aggregate steam adoption throughout the 19th century, as water power required lower fixed costs and therefore was attractive to relatively low productivity entrants. These entrants then became incumbents, locked into water power even if their productivity grew.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, EEE, EFG, IO, PR；JEL：D25, N61, O14
papers.zh_title: 获得蒸汽动力：在位者锁定与进入者跨越
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了美国制造业从水动力到蒸汽动力的长期转型，重点关注机械动力的早期使用者：木材厂和面粉厂。通过数字化1850年至1880年制造业普查手稿，我们表明，随着蒸汽成本下降，制造业活动在水力潜力较低的县增长更快。这种增长是由蒸汽动力进入者和集聚效应驱动的，而水动力在位者面临主要来自沉没成本的转换障碍。通过估计企业进入和蒸汽采用的动态模型，我们发现转换障碍与高固定成本的相互作用，对技术采用产生了数量上重要且社会效率低下的拖累。尽管存在大量的进入和退出，转换障碍在整个19世纪对总体蒸汽采用仍然具有影响力，因为水动力需要较低的固定成本，因此对生产率相对较低的进入者具有吸引力。这些进入者随后成为在位者，即使其生产率增长，也被锁定在水动力中。

papers.title: Do Female–Owned Employment Agencies Mitigate Discrimination and Expand Opportunity for Women?
papers.authors: Jennifer Hunt, Carolyn Moehling
papers.abstract: We create a dataset of 14,000 help–wanted advertisements placed by U.S. employment agencies in 1950 and 1960, when help–wanted advertisements specified gender, and collect information on agency ownership. Female–owned agencies specialized in vacancies for women, expanding access of female job–seekers to agency services. They also advertised more skilled occupations to women than did male–owned agencies, leading to 5% higher wages for women. But they advertised more clerical jobs to men, contributing to 17% lower male wages. However, the gender wage gap within agency was the same for female-and male–owned agencies, suggesting no mitigation of discrimination.
papers.zh_title: 女性拥有的就业中介能否减少歧视并为女性扩大机会？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们创建了一个数据集，包含1950年和1960年美国就业中介发布的14000条招聘广告（当时招聘广告会注明性别），并收集了中介所有权的信息。女性拥有的中介专注于为女性提供职位空缺，扩大了女性求职者获得中介服务的机会。与男性拥有的中介相比，它们还向女性宣传更多技能型职业，导致女性工资高出5%。但它们向男性宣传更多文职工作，导致男性工资降低17%。然而，在中介内部，女性和男性拥有的中介的性别工资差距相同，这表明歧视并未得到缓解。

papers.title: Social Protection in the Developing World
papers.authors: Abhijit Banerjee, Rema Hanna, Benjamin A. Olken, Diana Sverdlin Lisker
papers.abstract: Social protection programs have become increasingly widespread in low- and middle-income countries, with their own distinct characteristics to match the environments in which they are operating. This paper reviews the growing literature on the design and impact of these programs. We review how to identify potential beneficiaries given the large informal sector, the design and implementation of redistribution and income support programs, and the challenges and potential of social insurance. We use our frameworks as a guide for consolidating and organizing the existing literature, and also to highlight areas and questions for future research.
papers.zh_title: 发展中国家的社会保护
papers.zh_abstract: 社会保护项目在低收入和中等收入国家变得越来越普遍，并具有与其运行环境相匹配的独特特征。本文回顾了关于这些项目设计和影响的日益增长的文献。我们探讨了在存在大量非正规部门的情况下如何识别潜在受益者、再分配和收入支持项目的设计与实施，以及社会保险面临的挑战和潜力。我们利用我们的框架作为指南来整合和组织现有文献，同时也强调未来研究的领域和问题。

papers.title: Automated Social Science: Language Models as Scientist and Subjects
papers.authors: Benjamin S. Manning, Kehang Zhu, John J. Horton
papers.abstract: We present an approach for automatically generating and testing, in silico, social scientific hypotheses. This automation is made possible by recent advances in large language models (LLM), but the key feature of the approach is the use of structural causal models. Structural causal models provide a language to state hypotheses, a blueprint for constructing LLM-based agents, an experimental design, and a plan for data analysis. The fitted structural causal model becomes an object available for prediction or the planning of follow-on experiments. We demonstrate the approach with several scenarios: a negotiation, a bail hearing, a job interview, and an auction. In each case, causal relationships are both proposed and tested by the system, finding evidence for some and not others. We provide evidence that the insights from these simulations of social interactions are not available to the LLM purely through direct elicitation. When given its proposed structural causal model for each scenario, the LLM is good at predicting the signs of estimated effects, but it cannot reliably predict the magnitudes of those estimates. In the auction experiment, the in silico simulation results closely match the predictions of auction theory, but elicited predictions of the clearing prices from the LLM are inaccurate. However, the LLM's predictions are dramatically improved if the model can condition on the fitted structural causal model. In short, the LLM knows more than it can (immediately) tell.
papers.zh_title: 自动化社会科学：作为科学家和主体的大语言模型
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种在计算机中自动生成和检验社会科学假设的方法。这种自动化得益于大语言模型的最新进展，但该方法的关键特征是使用结构因果模型。结构因果模型提供了一种陈述假设的语言、构建基于大语言模型主体的蓝图、实验设计以及数据分析计划。拟合后的结构因果模型成为一个可用于预测或规划后续实验的对象。我们通过几个场景演示了该方法：谈判、保释听证会、求职面试和拍卖。在每种情况下，因果关系都由系统提出并检验，发现了一些证据，而另一些则没有。我们提供的证据表明，这些社会互动模拟的见解无法通过直接引出纯粹从大语言模型中获得。当给定其为每个场景提出的结构因果模型时，大语言模型善于预测估计效应的符号，但无法可靠地预测这些估计值的大小。在拍卖实验中，计算机模拟结果与拍卖理论的预测非常吻合，但从大语言模型中引出的清算价格预测却不准确。然而，如果模型能够以拟合的结构因果模型为条件，那么大语言模型的预测会得到显著改善。简而言之，大语言模型知道的比它（立即）能说出来的要多。

papers.title: The Impact of Lump-Sum Retirement Withdrawals on Labor Supply: Evidence from Peru
papers.authors: Carla Moreno, Sita Slavov
papers.abstract: We examine the labor supply impact of a 2016 policy that allows retirement-eligible individuals covered by Peru’s private pension system to receive retirement benefits as a lump sum rather than as an annuity. We present a theoretical model predicting that, for liquidity constrained workers, the lump sum option makes formal employment (requiring pension participation) more attractive relative to informal employment (not requiring pension participation); it also encourages early retirement. Using household panel data, we estimate the impact of the 2016 policy on the labor supply of workers covered by the private pension system compared to workers covered by the alternative pay-as-you-go defined benefit pension (which was unaffected by the policy). The policy is associated with an increase in the probability of being retired at ages 50 (early retirement age for women), 55 (early retirement age for men), and 65 (full retirement age for all workers). We also find increases in formal sector employment among women in their late 40s and men in their early 50s, consistent with increased efforts to qualify for early retirement (which requires recent pension contributions). The policy’s effects are concentrated among workers with less education, who are more likely to be liquidity constrained.
papers.zh_title: 一次性退休取款对劳动供给的影响：来自秘鲁的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了2016年一项政策对劳动供给的影响，该政策允许秘鲁私人养老金体系覆盖的符合退休条件的个人以一次性付款而非年金的形式领取退休福利。我们提出了一个理论模型，预测对于面临流动性约束的工人来说，一次性付款选项使正规就业（需要参与养老金）相对于非正规就业（不需要参与养老金）更具吸引力；同时它也鼓励提前退休。利用家庭面板数据，我们估计了2016年政策对私人养老金体系覆盖工人劳动供给的影响，并与受替代的现收现付制固定收益养老金（不受该政策影响）覆盖的工人进行比较。该政策与50岁（女性提前退休年龄）、55岁（男性提前退休年龄）和65岁（所有工人正常退休年龄）退休概率的增加相关。我们还发现，在40多岁女性和50岁出头男性中，正规部门就业有所增加，这与为获得提前退休资格（需要近期缴纳养老金）而增加的努力相一致。该政策的影响集中在受教育程度较低的工人中，他们更可能面临流动性约束。

papers.title: Inflation Preferences
papers.authors: Hassan Afrouzi, Alexander Dietrich, Kristian Myrseth, Romanos Priftis, Raphael Schoenle
papers.abstract: We document novel survey-based facts on preferred long-run inflation rates among U.S. consumers. Consumers on average prefer a 0.20% annual inflation rate, considerably below the Federal Reserve’s 2% target. Inflation preferences not only correlate with demographic and socioeconomic characteristics, but also with economic reasoning. A randomized control trial reveals that two narratives based on economic models—describing how inflation lowers the real value of wages as well as money holdings—affect inflation preferences. While our results can inform the design of central bank communication on inflation targets, they also raise questions about the alignment between such targets and consumer preferences.
papers.zh_title: 通胀偏好
papers.zh_abstract: 我们记录了基于调查的美国消费者对长期通胀率偏好的新颖事实。消费者平均偏好0.20%的年通胀率，远低于美联储2%的目标。通胀偏好不仅与人口和社会经济特征相关，还与经济推理相关。一项随机对照试验表明，两种基于经济模型的叙述——描述通胀如何降低工资和货币持有的实际价值——会影响通胀偏好。虽然我们的结果可以为央行关于通胀目标的沟通设计提供信息，但它们也引发了关于此类目标与消费者偏好之间一致性的问题。

papers.title: The Provision of Information and Incentives in School Assignment Mechanisms
papers.authors: Derek Neal, Joseph Root
papers.abstract: Research on centralized school assignment mechanisms often focuses on whether parents who participate in specific mechanisms are likely to truthfully report their preferences or engage in various costly strategic behaviors. However, a growing literature suggests that parents may not know enough about the school options available to them to form complete preference rankings. We develop a simple model that explains why it is not surprising that many participants in school assignment mechanisms possess limited information about the schools available to them. We then discuss policies that could improve both the information that participants bring to school assignment mechanisms and the quality of the schools in their choice sets.
papers.zh_title: 学校分配机制中的信息与激励提供
papers.zh_abstract: 关于集中式学校分配机制的研究通常关注参与特定机制的家长是否可能真实报告其偏好，或从事各种代价高昂的策略行为。然而，越来越多的文献表明，家长可能对其可选择的学校了解不足，无法形成完整的偏好排序。我们开发了一个简单模型，解释了为什么许多学校分配机制的参与者对所提供学校的信息有限并不令人惊讶。然后，我们讨论了可以改善参与者带入学校分配机制的信息以及其选择集中学校质量的政策。

papers.title: Cities, Heterogeneous Firms, and Trade
papers.authors: Jan David Bakker, Alvaro Garcia Marin, Andrei V. Potlogea, Nico Voigtländer, Yang Yang
papers.abstract: Does international trade affect the growth of cities, and vice versa? Assembling disaggregate data for four countries, we document a novel stylized fact: Export activity is disproportionately concentrated in larger cities – even more so than overall economic activity. We rationalize this fact by marrying a standard quantitative spatial economics model with a heterogeneous firm model that features selection into the domestic and the export market. Our model delivers novel predictions for the bi-directional interactions between trade and urban dynamics: On the one hand, trade liberalization shifts employment towards larger cities, and on the other hand, liberalizing land use raises exports. We structurally estimate the model using Chinese and French firm-level data. We find that trade policies have quantitatively meaningful impacts on urban outcomes and vice versa, and that the aggregate effects of trade and urban policies differ from standard models that do not account for the interaction between trade and cities. In addition, a distinguishing prediction of our model – which we confirm in the data – is that local trade elasticities vary systematically with city size, so that a country’s aggregate trade elasticity depends on the spatial distribution of production within its borders.
papers.zh_title: 城市、异质性企业与贸易
papers.zh_abstract: 国际贸易是否影响城市增长，反之亦然？通过汇总四个国家的微观数据，我们记录了一个新颖的典型事实：出口活动不成比例地集中在较大的城市——甚至比整体经济活动更为集中。我们通过将一个标准的定量空间经济学模型与一个具有进入国内和出口市场选择特征的异质性企业模型相结合，来解释这一事实。我们的模型为贸易与城市动态之间的双向互动提供了新颖的预测：一方面，贸易自由化将就业转向更大的城市；另一方面，放松土地管制会提高出口。我们利用中国和法国的企业层面数据对模型进行了结构估计。我们发现，贸易政策对城市结果具有数量上显著的影响，反之亦然，并且贸易和城市政策的总体效应与不考虑贸易与城市之间相互作用的标准模型不同。此外，我们模型的一个显著预测——我们在数据中证实了这一点——是地方贸易弹性随城市规模系统性地变化，因此一个国家的总体贸易弹性取决于其境内生产的空间分布。

papers.title: Consumer-Financed Fiscal Stimulus: Evidence from Digital Coupons in China
papers.authors: Jing Ding, Lei Jiang, Lucy Msall, Matthew J. Notowidigdo
papers.abstract: In 2020, local governments in China began issuing digital coupons to stimulate spending in targeted categories such as restaurants and supermarkets. Using data from a large e-commerce platform and a bunching estimation approach, we find that the coupons caused large increases in spending of 3.1–3.3 yuan per yuan spent by the government. The large spending responses do not come from substitution away from non-targeted spending categories or from short-run intertemporal substitution. To rationalize these results, we develop a dynamic consumption model showing how coupons’ minimum spending thresholds create temporary notches that lead to large spending responses.
papers.zh_title: 消费者融资的财政刺激：来自中国数字消费券的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 2020年，中国地方政府开始发放数字消费券，以刺激餐饮和超市等目标类别的支出。利用来自大型电子商务平台的数据和聚束估计方法，我们发现消费券导致支出大幅增加，每花费政府1元人民币，支出增加3.1-3.3元人民币。巨大的支出反应并非来自非目标支出类别的替代，也非来自短期的跨期替代。为了合理化这些结果，我们开发了一个动态消费模型，展示了消费券的最低消费门槛如何创造临时的缺口，从而导致巨大的支出反应。

papers.title: Meritocracy across Countries
papers.authors: Oriana Bandiera, Ananya Kotia, Ilse Lindenlaub, Christian Moser, Andrea Prat
papers.abstract: Are labor markets in higher-income countries more meritocratic, in the sense that worker-job matching is based on skills rather than idiosyncratic attributes unrelated to productivity? If so, why? And what are the aggregate consequences? Using internationally comparable data on worker skills and job skill requirements of over 120,000 individuals across 28 countries, we document that workers' skills better match their jobs' skill requirements in higher-income countries. To quantify the role of worker-job matching in development accounting, we build an equilibrium matching model that allows for cross-country differences in three fundamentals: (i) the endowments of multidimensional worker skills and job skill requirements, which determine match feasibility; (ii) technology, which determines the returns to matching; and (iii) idiosyncratic matching frictions, which capture the role of nonproductive worker and job traits in the matching process. The estimated model delivers two key insights. First, improvements in worker-job matching due to reduced matching frictions account for only a small share of cross-country income differences. Second, however, improved worker-job matching is crucial for unlocking the gains from economic development generated by adopting frontier endowments and technology.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, LS, PR；JEL：C78, E24, J24, J31, O11, O12
papers.zh_title: 各国精英体制的比较研究
papers.zh_abstract: 高收入国家的劳动力市场是否更具精英体制特征，即工人与工作的匹配基于技能而非与生产力无关的特殊属性？如果是，原因何在？其总体经济后果又是什么？利用涵盖28个国家超过12万人的国际可比工人技能与工作技能要求数据，我们记录到：在高收入国家，工人的技能与其工作的技能要求匹配度更高。为量化工人-工作匹配在发展核算中的作用，我们构建了一个均衡匹配模型，该模型允许各国在三个基本要素上存在差异：（i）多维工人技能与工作技能要求的禀赋，这决定了匹配的可行性；（ii）技术，它决定了匹配的回报；（iii）特殊匹配摩擦，它捕捉了非生产性工人与工作特征在匹配过程中的作用。估计模型得出了两个关键见解。首先，因匹配摩擦减少而带来的工人-工作匹配改善，仅能解释跨国收入差异的一小部分。其次，然而，改善工人-工作匹配对于释放由采用前沿禀赋和技术所带来的经济发展收益至关重要。

papers.title: Why Does Working from Home Vary Across Countries and People?
papers.authors: Pablo Zarate, Mathias Dolls, Steven J. Davis, Nicholas Bloom, Jose Maria Barrero, Cevat Giray Aksoy
papers.abstract: We use two surveys to assess why work from home (WFH) varies so much across countries and people. A measure of cultural individualism accounts for about one-third of the cross-country variation in WFH rates. Australia, Canada, the UK, and the US score highly on individualism and WFH rates, whereas Asian countries score low on both. Other factors such as cumulative lockdown stringency, population density, industry mix, and GDP per capita also matter, but they account for less of the variation. When looking across individual workers in the United States, we find that industry mix, population density and lockdown severity help account for current WFH rates, as does the partisan leaning of the county in which the worker resides. We conclude that multiple factors influence WFH rates, and technological feasibility is only one of them.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, DEV, ITI, LS, PR；JEL：E0, G0, L0
papers.zh_title: 为何居家办公在不同国家和人群间存在差异？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用两项调查来评估为何居家办公（WFH）在不同国家和人群间差异如此之大。一项衡量文化个人主义的指标解释了约三分之一的跨国WFH率差异。澳大利亚、加拿大、英国和美国在个人主义和WFH率上得分较高，而亚洲国家在这两方面得分均较低。其他因素，如累计封锁严格程度、人口密度、行业结构和人均GDP，也很重要，但它们解释的差异较少。在考察美国个体工人时，我们发现行业结构、人口密度和封锁严重程度有助于解释当前的WFH率，工人所在县的党派倾向也是如此。我们得出结论：多种因素影响WFH率，技术可行性只是其中之一。

papers.title: Estimating Racial Disparities When Race is Not Observed
papers.authors: Cory McCartan, Robin Fisher, Jacob Goldin, Daniel E. Ho, Kosuke Imai
papers.abstract: The estimation of racial disparities in various fields is often hampered by the lack of individual-level racial information. In many cases, the law prohibits the collection of such information to prevent direct racial discrimination. As a result, analysts have frequently adopted Bayesian Improved Surname Geocoding (BISG) and its variants, which combine individual names and addresses with Census data to predict race. Unfortunately, the residuals of BISG are often correlated with the outcomes of interest, generally attenuating estimates of racial disparities. To correct this bias, we propose an alternative identification strategy under the assumption that surname is conditionally independent of the outcome given (unobserved) race, residence location, and other observed characteristics. We introduce a new class of models, Bayesian Instrumental Regression for Disparity Estimation (BIRDiE), that take BISG probabilities as inputs and produce racial disparity estimates by using surnames as an instrumental variable for race. Our estimation method is scalable, making it possible to analyze large-scale administrative data. We also show how to address potential violations of the key identification assumptions. A validation study based on the North Carolina voter file shows that BISG+BIRDiE reduces error by up to 84% when estimating racial differences in party registration. Finally, we apply the proposed methodology to estimate racial differences in who benefits from the home mortgage interest deduction using individual-level tax data from the U.S. Internal Revenue Service. Open-source software is available which implements the proposed methodology.
papers.zh_title: 当种族信息未被观测时如何估计种族差异
papers.zh_abstract: 在各个领域中，种族差异的估计常常因缺乏个体层面的种族信息而受阻。在许多情况下，法律禁止收集此类信息以防止直接的种族歧视。因此，分析人员经常采用贝叶斯改进姓氏地理编码（BISG）及其变体，该方法将个人姓名和地址与人口普查数据相结合来预测种族。不幸的是，BISG的残差通常与感兴趣的结果相关，这通常会减弱种族差异的估计值。为纠正此偏差，我们提出了一种替代识别策略，其假设是：在给定（未观测的）种族、居住地点和其他观测特征的情况下，姓氏与结果条件独立。我们引入了一类新模型，即用于差异估计的贝叶斯工具回归（BIRDiE），该模型以BISG概率为输入，通过使用姓氏作为种族的工具变量来产生种族差异估计。我们的估计方法具有可扩展性，使得分析大规模行政数据成为可能。我们还展示了如何处理关键识别假设的潜在违反。基于北卡罗来纳州选民档案的验证研究表明，在估计政党登记的种族差异时，BISG+BIRDiE将误差减少了高达84%。最后，我们应用所提出的方法，利用美国国税局的个体层面税收数据，估计了谁从住房抵押贷款利息扣除中受益的种族差异。提供开源软件以实现所提出的方法。

papers.title: Transparency and Percent Plans
papers.authors: Adam Kapor
papers.abstract: Transparency vs. opacity is an important dimension of college admission policy. Colleges may gain useful information from a holistic review of applicants’ materials, but in doing so may contribute to uncertainty that discourages potential applicants with poor information. This paper investigates the impacts of admissions transparency in the context of Texas’ Top Ten Percent Plan, using survey and administrative data from Texas and a model of college applications, admissions, enrollment, grades, and persistence. I estimate that two thirds of the plan’s 9.1 point impact on top-decile students’ probability of attending a flagship university was due to information rather than mechanical effects. Students induced to enroll are more likely to come from low- income high schools, and academically outperform the students that they displace. These effects would be larger if complemented by financial-aid information, and are driven by transparency, not misalignment between the rules used for automatic and discretionary admissions.
papers.zh_title: 透明度与百分比计划
papers.zh_abstract: 透明度与不透明性是大学录取政策的一个重要维度。大学可能通过对申请者材料进行全面审查来获取有用信息，但这样做可能会增加不确定性，从而阻碍信息匮乏的潜在申请者。本文利用德克萨斯州的调查和行政数据，以及一个涵盖大学申请、录取、入学、成绩和持续就读的模型，研究了在德克萨斯州前百分之十计划的背景下，录取透明度的影响。我估计，该计划对前十分之一学生进入旗舰大学概率产生的9.1个百分点影响中，有三分之二是由信息效应而非机械效应造成的。被诱导入学的学生更有可能来自低收入高中，并且他们在学业上优于被他们取代的学生。如果辅以经济援助信息，这些效应会更大，并且这些效应是由透明度驱动的，而非自动录取与酌情录取规则之间的错位。

papers.title: Labor Market Externalities of Pre-retirement Employment Protection
papers.authors: Paweł Chrostek, Krzysztof Karbownik, Michał Myck
papers.abstract: Using population-level administrative data, we study labor market externalities stemming from age-specific employment protection legislation (EPL) targeted towards older workers. Our results show no economically meaningful overall effects of the EPL on employment or earnings of either men or women approaching eligibility. Considering separately incumbent workers and non-employees we find small positive and small negative employment effects for the former and the latter groups, respectively.
papers.zh_title: 退休前就业保护对劳动力市场的外部性
papers.zh_abstract: 利用人口层面的行政数据，我们研究了针对老年工人的特定年龄就业保护立法（EPL）所产生的劳动力市场外部性。我们的结果显示，该就业保护立法对即将符合资格条件的男性和女性的就业或收入均未产生具有经济意义的总体影响。分别考虑在职员工和非雇员时，我们发现前者有微小的正向就业效应，后者则有微小的负向就业效应。

papers.title: The Evolution of Black-White Differences in Occupational Mobility Across Post-Civil War America
papers.authors: Steven N. Durlauf, Gueyon Kim, Dohyeon Lee, Xi Song
papers.abstract: This paper studies long-run differences in intergenerational occupational mobility between Black and White Americans. Combining data from linked historical censuses and contemporary large-scale surveys, we provide a comprehensive set of mobility measures based on Markov chains that trace the short- and long-run dynamics of occupational differences. Our findings highlight the unique importance of changes in mobility experienced by the 1940–1950 birth cohort in shaping the current occupational distribution and reducing the racial occupational gap. We further explore the properties of continuing occupational inequalities and argue that these disparities are better understood by a lack of exchange mobility rather than structural mobility. Thus, contemporary occupational disparities cannot be expected to disappear based on the occupational dynamics seen historically.
papers.zh_title: 内战后美国黑人与白人职业流动性差异的演变
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了美国黑人与白人之间代际职业流动性的长期差异。通过结合关联的历史人口普查数据和当代大规模调查数据，我们基于马尔可夫链提供了一套全面的流动性衡量指标，用以追溯职业差异的短期和长期动态。我们的发现强调了1940-1950年出生队列所经历的流动性变化在塑造当前职业分布和缩小种族职业差距方面的独特重要性。我们进一步探讨了持续存在的职业不平等的特性，并认为这些差异最好被理解为缺乏交换流动性，而非结构性流动性。因此，根据历史上看到的职业动态，不能期望当代的职业差异会消失。

papers.title: Reforming Rotations
papers.authors: E. Jason Baron, Richard Lombardo, Joseph P. Ryan, Jeongsoo Suh, Quitze Valenzuela-Stookey
papers.abstract: In many settings, tasks are assigned to agents via a rotation. Such quasi-random allocation ignores heterogeneity in agents’ performance and preferences. We study how a designer can exploit such heterogeneity to improve aggregate performance while simultaneously ensuring that no agent is worse off relative to the status-quo system. The key challenge is that, while the designer may be able to estimate agents’ performance, their preferences are inherently unobservable. We develop a mechanism-design framework to study this problem and characterize optimal mechanisms in both static and dynamic settings. Optimal mechanisms can be interpreted as competitive equilibria in which agents trade tasks facing personalized, kinked budget sets. As an illustration, we apply our results to the assignment of Child Protective Services investigators to maltreatment cases. Simulations show that the mechanism reduces false positives (unnecessary foster care placements) by up to 14% while also lowering false negatives (missed maltreatment cases) and overall placements.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, LS, PE；JEL：D82, H75, J13, J45
papers.zh_title: 改革轮岗制度
papers.zh_abstract: 在许多情境中，任务通过轮岗分配给代理人。这种准随机分配忽略了代理人在绩效和偏好上的异质性。我们研究设计者如何利用这种异质性来改善总体绩效，同时确保没有代理人的境况相对于现状系统变得更差。关键挑战在于，虽然设计者可能能够估计代理人的绩效，但他们的偏好本质上是不可观测的。我们开发了一个机制设计框架来研究这个问题，并在静态和动态环境中刻画了最优机制。最优机制可以解释为竞争均衡，其中代理人面对个性化的、有拐点的预算集来交易任务。作为示例，我们将我们的结果应用于儿童保护服务调查员对虐待案件的分配。模拟显示，该机制将误报（不必要的寄养安置）减少了高达14%，同时降低了漏报（遗漏的虐待案件）和总体安置数量。

papers.title: New Gig Work or Changes in Reporting? Understanding Self-Employment Trends in Tax Data
papers.authors: Andrew Garin, Emilie Jackson, Dmitri K. Koustas
papers.abstract: Rising self-employment rates in U.S. tax data that are absent in survey data have led to speculation that tax records capture a rise in new “gig” work that surveys miss. Drawing on the universe of IRS tax returns, we show that trends in firm-reported payments to “gig” and other contract workers do not explain the rise in self-employment reported to the IRS; rather, that increase is driven by self-reported earnings of individuals in the EITC phase-in range. We isolate pure reporting responses from real labor supply responses by examining births of workers’ first children around an end-of-year cutoff for credit eligibility that creates exogenous variation in tax rates at the end of the tax year after labor supply decisions are already sunk. We ﬁnd that ex-posing workers with sunk labor supply to negative marginal tax rates results in large increases in their propensity to self-report self-employment—only a small minority of which leads to bunching at kink-points. Consistent with pure strategic reporting behavior, we find no impact on reporting among taxpayers with no incentive to report additional income and no eﬀects on firm-reported payments of any kind. Moreover, we find these reporting responses have grown over time as knowledge of tax incentives has become widespread. Quantification exercises suggest that changes in taxpayer reporting behavior are a major driver of discrepancies between self-employment trends in self-reported and third-party reported data. Our findings suggest caution is warranted before deferring to self-reported tax data over other data sources when measuring labor market trends.
papers.meta: Programs：LS, PE, PR；JEL：H26, J21, J41, J46, J82
papers.zh_title: 新零工经济还是报告方式的变化？理解税收数据中的自雇趋势
papers.zh_abstract: 美国税收数据中自雇率的上升（而调查数据中并未出现）引发了猜测，即税务记录捕捉到了调查所遗漏的新型“零工”工作的增长。利用美国国税局（IRS）的全部纳税申报表数据，我们表明，企业向“零工”及其他合同工报告的付款趋势并不能解释向IRS报告的自雇收入增长；相反，这一增长是由处于劳动所得税抵免（EITC）收入递增区间内的个人的自报收入所驱动的。我们通过考察工人第一个孩子出生时间（围绕一个年末截止日期，该截止日期用于确定信贷资格，从而在劳动供给决策已成定局后，在纳税年度末产生外生的税率变化）来分离纯粹的报告反应与真实的劳动供给反应。我们发现，让劳动供给已成定局的工人面临负的边际税率，会大幅增加他们自报自雇收入的倾向——其中只有极小部分导致了在拐点处的聚集。与纯粹的策略性报告行为一致，我们发现，对于没有动机报告额外收入的纳税人，报告行为没有影响，并且对企业报告的任何类型的付款也没有影响。此外，我们发现这些报告反应随着时间的推移而增长，因为对税收激励的了解已变得普遍。量化分析表明，纳税人报告行为的变化是自报数据与第三方报告数据中自雇趋势差异的主要驱动因素。我们的发现表明，在衡量劳动力市场趋势时，在依赖自报税收数据而非其他数据来源之前应保持谨慎。

papers.title: Slow Learning
papers.authors: Lawrence Christiano, Martin S. Eichenbaum, Benjamin K. Johannsen
papers.abstract: This paper provides an analytic characterization of the speed of convergence under learning to a rational expectations equilibrium (REE) for a large class of multivariate models. We show that learning is slower when people’s beliefs about model outcomes are more self-fulfilling. The paper also investigates which features of a model economy make beliefs more self-fulfilling, using variants of the simple new-Keynesian model and a medium-scale DSGE model. For empirically plausible specifications of these models, convergence of a learning equilibrium to the REE is so slow that analysis based on rational expectations can be misleading.
papers.zh_title: 缓慢学习
papers.zh_abstract: 本文对一大类多元模型在学习过程中向理性预期均衡收敛的速度进行了分析性刻画。在这类模型中，人们对模型结果的信念是这些结果的核心决定因素。随后，本文探究了经济体的哪些特征决定了学习收敛是快速还是缓慢。我们通过将分析结果应用于新凯恩斯模型，并研究零下限对收敛至理性预期均衡速度的影响来展开分析。在某些情况下，学习均衡向理性预期均衡的收敛可能极其缓慢，以至于基于理性预期的政策分析会产生严重误导。

papers.title: From Predictive Algorithms to Automatic Generation of Anomalies
papers.authors: Sendhil Mullainathan, Ashesh Rambachan
papers.abstract: Machine learning algorithms can find predictive signals that researchers fail to notice; yet they are notoriously hard-to-interpret. How can we extract theoretical insights from these black boxes? History provides a clue. Facing a similar problem – how to extract theoretical insights from their intuitions – researchers often turned to “anomalies:” constructed examples that highlight flaws in an existing theory and spur the development of new ones. Canonical examples include the Allais paradox and the Kahneman-Tversky choice experiments for expected utility theory. We suggest anomalies can extract theoretical insights from black box predictive algorithms. We develop procedures to automatically generate anomalies for an existing theory when given a predictive algorithm. We cast anomaly generation as an adversarial game between a theory and a falsifier, the solutions to which are anomalies: instances where the black box algorithm predicts - were we to collect data - we would likely observe violations of the theory. As an illustration, we generate anomalies for expected utility theory using a large, publicly available dataset on real lottery choices. Based on an estimated neural network that predicts lottery choices, our procedures recover known anomalies and discover new ones for expected utility theory. In incentivized experiments, subjects violate expected utility theory on these algorithmically generated anomalies; moreover, the violation rates are similar to observed rates for the Allais paradox and Common ratio effect.
papers.zh_title: 从预测算法到异常现象的自动生成
papers.zh_abstract: 机器学习算法能够发现研究人员未能注意到的预测信号，然而它们却以难以解释而著称。我们如何从这些黑箱中提取理论洞见？历史提供了线索。面对类似的问题——如何从直觉中提取理论洞见——研究人员常常转向“异常现象”：构建的例子，用以突出现有理论的缺陷并激发新理论的发展。典型的例子包括阿莱悖论和卡尼曼-特沃斯基关于期望效用理论的选择实验。我们建议，异常现象可以从黑箱预测算法中提取理论洞见。我们开发了在给定预测算法的情况下，为现有理论自动生成异常现象的程序。我们将异常生成视为一个理论与证伪者之间的对抗博弈，其解就是异常现象：在这些实例中，黑箱算法预测——如果我们收集数据——我们很可能会观察到违反理论的情况。作为说明，我们使用一个关于真实彩票选择的大型公开数据集，为期望效用理论生成异常现象。基于一个预测彩票选择的估计神经网络，我们的程序恢复了已知的异常现象，并为期望效用理论发现了新的异常现象。在激励实验中，受试者在这些算法生成的异常现象上违反了期望效用理论；此外，违反率与观察到的阿莱悖论和共同比率效应的比率相似。

papers.title: Understanding Economic Behavior Using Open-ended Survey Data
papers.authors: Ingar K. Haaland, Christopher Roth, Stefanie Stantcheva, Johannes Wohlfart
papers.abstract: We survey the recent literature in economics using open-ended survey data to uncover mechanisms behind economic beliefs and behaviors. We first provide an overview of different applications, including the measurement of motives, mental models, narratives, attention, information transmission, and recall. We next describe different ways of eliciting open-ended responses, including single-item open-ended questions, speech recordings, and AI-powered qualitative interviews. Subsequently, we discuss methods to annotate and analyze such data with a focus on recent advances in large language models. Our review concludes with a discussion of promising avenues for future research.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, LS, ME, PE, POL；JEL：C90, D83, D91
papers.zh_title: 利用开放式调查数据理解经济行为
papers.zh_abstract: 我们调查了近期经济学中利用开放式调查数据揭示经济信念和行为背后机制的文献。我们首先概述了不同的应用，包括动机、心智模型、叙事、注意力、信息传递和回忆的测量。接下来，我们描述了引出开放式回答的不同方式，包括单项开放式问题、语音记录和人工智能驱动的定性访谈。随后，我们讨论了注释和分析此类数据的方法，重点关注大型语言模型的最新进展。我们的综述最后讨论了未来研究的有前景的方向。

papers.title: U.S. Worker Mobility Across Establishments within Firms: Scope, Prevalence, and Effects on Worker Earnings
papers.authors: Jeronimo Carballo, Richard K. Mansfield, Charles Adam Pfander
papers.abstract: Multi-establishment firms account for around 60% of U.S. workers' primary employers, providing ample opportunity for workers to change their work location without changing their employer. Using U.S. matched employer-employee data, this paper analyzes workers' access to and use of such between-establishment job transitions, and estimates the effect on workers' earnings growth of greater access, as measured by proximity of employment at other within-firm establishments. While establishment transitions are not perfectly observed, we estimate that within-firm establishment transitions account for 7.8% percent of all job transitions and 18.2% of transitions originating from the largest firms. Using variation in worker's establishment locations within their firms' establishment network, we show that having a greater share of the firm's jobs in nearby establishments generates meaningful increases in workers' earnings: a worker at the 90th percentile of earnings gains from more proximate within-firm job opportunities can expect to enjoy 2% higher average earnings over the following five years than a worker at the 10th percentile with the same baseline earnings.
papers.zh_title: 美国工人在企业内部跨机构流动：范围、普遍性及其对工人收入的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 多机构企业约占美国工人主要雇主的60%，这为工人提供了在不更换雇主的情况下改变工作地点的充足机会。利用美国匹配的雇主-雇员数据，本文分析了工人获得和使用此类跨机构工作转换的情况，并估计了更大的可及性（以企业内部其他就近机构的就业机会衡量）对工人收入增长的影响。虽然机构转换并非完全可观测，但我们估计，企业内部机构转换占所有工作转换的7.8%，占来自最大企业的工作转换的18.2%。利用工人所在机构在其企业机构网络中的位置差异，我们表明，在企业附近机构中拥有更大份额的工作岗位会带来工人收入的显著增长：与基线收入相同但处于第10百分位的工人相比，处于因更近的企业内部工作机会而获得收入增长的第90百分位的工人，在未来五年内的平均收入预计会高出2%。

papers.title: The Circular Economy
papers.authors: Don Fullerton
papers.abstract: Research about the circular economy is dominated by engineers, architects, and social scientists in fields other than economics. The concepts they study can be useful in economic models of policies – to reduce virgin materials extraction, to encourage green design, and to make better use of products in ways that reduce waste. This essay attempts to discuss circular economy in economists’ language about market failures, distributional equity, and policies that can raise economic welfare by making the appropriate tradeoffs between fixing those market failures and achieving other social goals.
papers.zh_title: 循环经济
papers.zh_abstract: 关于循环经济的研究主要由工程师、建筑师以及经济学以外的社会科学家主导。他们研究的概念可以用于经济政策模型——以减少原生材料开采、鼓励绿色设计、以及以减废方式更好地利用产品。本文试图用经济学家关于市场失灵、分配公平以及通过权衡修复市场失灵与实现其他社会目标来提高经济福利的政策语言来讨论循环经济。

papers.title: Understanding Demand for Police Alternatives
papers.authors: Bocar A. Ba, Meghna Baskar, Tony Cheng, Rei Mariman
papers.abstract: In a series of experiments, we present evidence of bipartisan public demand for police alternatives, contrasted with persistent policy resistance from key stakeholders. First, our survey experiment demonstrates that introducing U.S. respondents to dontcallthepolice.com (DCTP), a database of non-governmental emergency response options, significantly reduces reliance on police for nonviolent situations. However, this effect does not extend to violent scenarios where no police substitutes exist. Second, our follow-up survey reveals enduring impacts, including heightened recall of the 988 hotline as an alternative during suicidal crises. Third, our field experiment and qualitative interviews find police resistance to embracing DCTP, despite widespread public support for nonviolent police substitutes.
papers.zh_title: 理解对警察替代方案的需求
papers.zh_abstract: 在一系列实验中，我们展示了公众对警察替代方案的两党需求，与关键利益相关者持续的政策抵制形成对比。首先，我们的调查实验表明，向美国受访者介绍dontcallthepolice.com（一个非政府应急响应选项数据库）显著减少了他们在非暴力情况下对警察的依赖。然而，这种效应并未扩展到不存在警察替代方案的暴力场景。其次，我们的后续调查揭示了持久的影响，包括在自杀危机期间对988热线作为替代方案的记忆增强。第三，我们的现场实验和定性访谈发现，尽管公众广泛支持非暴力警察替代方案，但警察对接受DCTP存在抵制。

papers.title: Identifying Monetary Policy Shocks: A Natural Language Approach
papers.authors: S. Borağan Aruoba, Thomas Drechsel
papers.abstract: We develop a novel method for the identification of monetary policy shocks. By applying natural language processing techniques to documents that Federal Reserve staff prepare in advance of policy decisions, we capture the Fed's information set. Using machine learning techniques, we then predict changes in the target interest rate conditional on this information set and obtain a measure of monetary policy shocks as the residual. We show that the documents' text contains essential information about the economy which is not captured by numerical forecasts that the staff include in the same documents. The dynamic responses of macro variables to our monetary policy shocks are consistent with the theoretical consensus. Shocks constructed by only controlling for the staff forecasts imply responses of macro variables at odds with theory. We directly link these differences to the information that our procedure extracts from the text over and above information captured by the forecasts.
papers.zh_title: 识别货币政策冲击：一种自然语言方法
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一种识别货币政策冲击的新方法。通过将自然语言处理技术应用于美联储工作人员在政策决策前准备的文件，我们捕捉了美联储的信息集。利用机器学习技术，我们随后基于该信息集预测目标利率的变化，并将残差作为货币政策冲击的度量。我们表明，文件文本包含关于经济的重要信息，而这些信息并未被工作人员在同一文件中包含的数值预测所捕捉。宏观变量对我们货币政策冲击的动态响应与理论共识一致。仅通过控制工作人员预测构建的冲击所隐含的宏观变量响应与理论相悖。我们将这些差异直接归因于我们的程序从文本中提取的信息，这些信息超出了预测所捕捉的信息。

papers.title: Learning from Ricardo and Thompson: Machinery and Labor in the Early Industrial Revolution, and in the Age of AI
papers.authors: Daron Acemoglu, Simon Johnson
papers.abstract: David Ricardo initially believed machinery would help workers but revised his opinion, likely based on the impact of automation in the textile industry. Despite cotton textiles becoming one of the largest sectors in the British economy, real wages for cotton weavers did not rise for decades. As E.P. Thompson emphasized, automation forced workers into unhealthy factories with close surveillance and little autonomy. Automation can increase wages, but only when accompanied by new tasks that raise the marginal productivity of labor and/or when there is sufficient additional hiring in complementary sectors. Wages are unlikely to rise when workers cannot push for their share of productivity growth. Today, artificial intelligence may boost average productivity, but it also may replace many workers while degrading job quality for those who remain employed. As in Ricardo’s time, the impact of automation on workers today is more complex than an automatic linkage from higher productivity to better wages.
papers.zh_title: 从李嘉图和汤普森学习：早期工业革命与人工智能时代的机器与劳动
papers.zh_abstract: 大卫·李嘉图最初认为机器会帮助工人，但后来修正了他的观点，这很可能基于纺织业自动化的影响。尽管棉纺织品成为英国经济中最大的部门之一，棉织工的实际工资数十年未涨。正如E.P.汤普森所强调的，自动化迫使工人进入不健康的工厂，受到严密监视且几乎没有自主权。自动化可以提高工资，但前提是伴随新任务提升劳动的边际生产率，和/或互补部门有足够的额外雇佣。当工人无法争取其生产率增长份额时，工资不太可能上升。如今，人工智能可能提升平均生产率，但也可能取代许多工人，同时降低仍在就业者的工作质量。正如李嘉图时代，自动化对当今工人的影响比从更高生产率到更好工资的自动关联更为复杂。

papers.title: Accounting for the Evolution of China’s Production and Trade Patterns
papers.authors: Hanwei Huang, Jiandong Ju, Vivian Yue
papers.abstract: This paper studies the evolution of China's production and trade patterns during its integration into the global economy. We document and explain new facts concerning changes in production and exports at the industry and firm levels using microdata and a quantitative Ricardian and Heckscher–Ohlin model with heterogeneous firms. Counterfactual simulations reveal that capital deepening made China's production and exports more capital-intensive, although labor-biased productivity growth acted as a counterforce. Consistent with the data, our model demonstrates that China's trade openness peaked around the mid-2000s and fell until the 2020s, while the world's exposure to Chinese exports rose continuously.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, IFM, ITI；JEL：D24, E23, E25, F12, F14, F16
papers.zh_title: 解释中国生产与贸易模式的演变
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了中国融入全球经济过程中其生产与贸易模式的演变。我们利用微观数据以及一个包含异质性企业的定量李嘉图和赫克歇尔-俄林模型，记录并解释了行业和企业层面生产与出口变化的新事实。反事实模拟显示，资本深化使中国的生产和出口更加资本密集型，尽管偏向劳动的生产率增长起到了抵消作用。与数据一致，我们的模型表明，中国的贸易开放度在2000年代中期左右达到峰值，随后下降直至2020年代，而世界对中国出口的暴露程度则持续上升。

papers.title: The Costs and Benefits of Clan Culture: Elite Control versus Cooperation in China
papers.authors: Shuo Chen, Raymond Fisman, Xiaohuan Lan, Yongxiang Wang, Qing Ye
papers.abstract: Kinship ties are a common institution that may facilitate in-group coordination and cooperation. Yet their benefits – or lack thereof – depend crucially on the broader institutional environment. We study how the prevalence of clan ties affect how communities confronted two well-studied historical episodes from the early years of the People's Republic of China, utilizing four distinct proxies for county clan strength: the presence of recognized ancestral halls; genealogical records; rice suitability; and geographic latitude. We show that the loss of livestock associated with 1955-56 collectivization (which mandated that farmers surrender livestock for little compensation) documented by Chen and Lan (2017) was much less pronounced in strong-clan areas. By contrast, we show that the 1959-61 Great Famine was associated with higher mortality in areas with stronger clan ties. We argue that reconciling these two conflicting patterns requires that we take a broader view of how kinship groups interact with other governance institutions, in particular the role of kinship as a means of elite control.
papers.zh_title: 宗族文化的成本与收益：中国的精英控制与合作
papers.zh_abstract: 亲属关系是一种常见的制度，可能促进群体内部的协调与合作。然而，其收益（或缺乏收益）关键取决于更广泛的制度环境。我们研究宗族关系的普遍性如何影响社区应对中华人民共和国早期两个研究充分的历史事件，利用四个不同的县级宗族强度代理变量：公认的祠堂存在、族谱记录、水稻适宜性和地理纬度。我们表明，陈和兰（2017）记录的1955-56年集体化（强制农民以极低补偿交出牲畜）导致的牲畜损失，在宗族强大的地区要小得多。相比之下，我们表明，1959-61年大饥荒在宗族关系更强的地区与更高的死亡率相关。我们认为，调和这两种矛盾的模式需要我们对亲属群体如何与其他治理机构互动采取更广泛的视角，特别是宗族作为精英控制手段的作用。

papers.title: Measuring Information Frictions in Migration Decisions: A Revealed-Preference Approach
papers.authors: Charly Porcher, Eduardo Morales, Thomas Fujiwara
papers.abstract: We investigate the role of information frictions in migration. Using novel moment inequalities and data on internal migration in Brazil, we estimate worker preferences and migration costs while allowing for unobserved worker-specific information sets. We find that common estimation procedures overestimate migration costs and underestimate the importance of expected wages in migration decisions. Model specification tests indicate that workers often have limited information on location-specific wages. However, those living in regions with better internet access and larger populations have more precise wage information, and information precision decreases with distance. According to our estimated model, workers’ limited wage information plays a quantitatively important role in reducing migration flows and worker welfare, and limits the effect of policies that reduce migration costs.
papers.zh_title: 衡量迁移决策中的信息摩擦：一种显示偏好方法
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了信息摩擦在迁移中的作用。利用新颖的矩不等式和巴西国内迁移数据，我们在允许存在未观测到的工人特定信息集的情况下，估计了工人偏好和迁移成本。我们发现，常见的估计程序高估了迁移成本，并低估了预期工资在迁移决策中的重要性。模型设定检验表明，工人通常对特定地点的工资信息有限。然而，那些生活在互联网接入更好和人口更多地区的人拥有更精确的工资信息，且信息精确度随距离增加而降低。根据我们估计的模型，工人有限的工资信息在减少迁移流量和工人福利方面起着数量上重要的作用，并限制了降低迁移成本政策的效果。

papers.title: Alleviating Worker Shortages Through Targeted Subsidies: Evidence from Incentive Payments in Healthcare
papers.authors: Ashvin Gandhi, Andrew Olenski, Krista J. Ruffini, Karen Shen
papers.abstract: Worker shortages are common in many industries. This paper examines the effect of government subsidies to address these shortages in the context of a reform that tied Medicaid payments to nursing home staffing levels. We find that the reform substantially increased staffing, especially for facilities serving many Medicaid patients. Facilities responded primarily by hiring workers in lower-wage roles rather than increasing hours of incumbent or high-wage staff. This contrasts with null effects we estimate for a non-incentivized rate increase, suggesting that the incentive structure of government payments—rather than just the level—is key to boosting employment in sectors facing worker shortages.
papers.zh_title: 通过定向补贴缓解工人短缺：来自医疗保健激励支付的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 工人短缺在许多行业都很常见。本文以一项将医疗补助支付与养老院人员配备水平挂钩的改革为背景，考察了政府补贴解决这些短缺的效果。我们发现，该改革显著增加了人员配备，尤其是对于服务大量医疗补助患者的机构。机构主要通过雇佣较低工资岗位的工人来应对，而不是增加在职或高工资员工的工作时间。这与我们对非激励性费率增长估计的零效应形成对比，表明政府支付的激励结构——而不仅仅是水平——对于促进面临工人短缺行业的就业至关重要。

papers.title: How Do U.S. Firms Withstand Foreign Industrial Policies?
papers.authors: Xiao Cen, Vyacheslav Fos, Wei Jiang
papers.abstract: China’s industrial policies (“Five-Year Plans”) displace U.S. production/employment and heighten plant closures in the same industries as those targeted by the policies in China. The impact was not anticipated by the stock market, but U.S. companies in the "treated industries" suffer a valuation loss afterwards. Firms shift production to upstream or downstream industries benefiting from the boost, or offshore to government-endorsed industries in China. Such within-firm adjustments offset the direct impact. U.S. firms are better able to withstand foreign government interventions provided that they enjoy flexibility, including preexisting business toeholds in the "beneficiary" industries, financial access, and labor fluidity.
papers.zh_title: 美国企业如何抵御外国产业政策？
papers.zh_abstract: 中国的产业政策（“五年规划”）导致美国在与中国政策目标相同行业的生产和就业减少，并加剧了工厂关闭。股市并未预料到这一影响，但“受处理行业”的美国公司随后遭受估值损失。企业将生产转移到受益于政策提振的上游或下游行业，或离岸至中国政府认可的行业。这种企业内部调整抵消了直接影响。只要美国企业享有灵活性，包括在“受益”行业已有的业务立足点、融资渠道和劳动力流动性，它们就能更好地抵御外国政府干预。

papers.title: Gender and Electoral Incentives: Evidence from COVID-19 Response
papers.authors: Juan Pablo Chauvin, Clemence Tricaud
papers.abstract: This paper provides new evidence on why men and women leaders make different choices. Exploiting Brazilian close elections, we show that female mayors responded differently to the COVID-19 crisis over the year 2020. Female mayors were less likely to close non-essential businesses early in the pandemic and female-led municipalities experienced higher mortality, while the reverse was true later on. We show that these findings can be rationalized by a simple political agency model in which politicians seek re-election and voters are gender biased. Consistent with this interpretation, the gender differences we find are driven exclusively by mayors facing re-election.
papers.zh_title: 性别与选举激励：来自COVID-19应对的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提供了关于男女领导人为何做出不同选择的新证据。利用巴西的激烈选举，我们表明女性市长在2020年全年对COVID-19危机的应对方式不同。女性市长在大流行早期不太可能关闭非必要企业，女性领导的市镇死亡率更高，而后期情况则相反。我们表明，这些发现可以通过一个简单的政治代理模型合理化，其中政治家寻求连任，而选民存在性别偏见。与这一解释一致，我们发现的性别差异完全由面临连任的市长驱动。

papers.title: A Theory of Labor Markets with Inefficient Turnover
papers.authors: Andrés Blanco, Andres Drenik, Christian Moser, Emilio Zaratiegui
papers.abstract: We develop a theory of labor markets with four features: search frictions, worker productivity shocks, wage rigidity, and two-sided lack of commitment. Inefficient job separations occur in the form of endogenous quits and layoffs that are unilaterally initiated whenever a worker's wage-to-productivity ratio moves outside an inaction region. We derive sufficient statistics for the labor market response to aggregate shocks based on the distribution of workers' wage-to-productivity ratios. These statistics depend on the incidence of inefficient job separations and are linked to readily available microdata on wage changes and worker flows between jobs.
papers.zh_title: 低效流动的劳动力市场理论
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个包含四个特征的劳动力市场理论：搜索摩擦、工人生产率冲击、工资刚性以及双方缺乏承诺。低效的工作分离表现为内生性辞职和裁员，当工人的工资-生产率比率偏离无行动区间时，任何一方均可单方面发起。我们基于工人工资-生产率比率的分布，推导出劳动力市场对总体冲击响应的充分统计量。这些统计量取决于低效工作分离的发生率，并与工资变化和工人跨工作流动的现成微观数据相关联。

papers.title: The Gender Pay Gap: Micro Sources and Macro Consequences
papers.authors: Iacopo Morchio, Christian Moser
papers.abstract: Using linked employer-employee data from Brazil, we document a large gender pay gap due to women working at lower-paying employers with better nonpay attributes. To interpret these facts, we develop an equilibrium search model with endogenous firm pay, amenities, and hiring. We provide a constructive proof of identification of all model parameters. The estimated model suggests that amenities are important for both men and women, that compensating differentials explain half of the gender pay gap, and that there are significant output and welfare gains from eliminating gender differences. However, equal-treatment policies fail to achieve those gains.
papers.zh_title: 性别薪酬差距：微观来源与宏观后果
papers.zh_abstract: 利用巴西的关联雇主-雇员数据，我们记录了因女性在薪酬较低但非薪酬属性更优的雇主处工作而导致的巨大性别薪酬差距。为解释这些事实，我们开发了一个包含内生企业薪酬、便利设施和招聘的均衡搜索模型。我们提供了所有模型参数识别的建设性证明。估计模型表明，便利设施对男性和女性都很重要，补偿性差异解释了性别薪酬差距的一半，消除性别差异可带来显著的产出和福利收益。然而，平等待遇政策未能实现这些收益。

papers.title: Birth Order in the Very Long-Run: Estimating Firstborn Premiums between 1850 and 1940
papers.authors: Angela Cools, Jared Grooms, Krzysztof Karbownik, Siobhan M. O'Keefe, Joseph Price, Anthony Wray
papers.abstract: The nineteenth-century American family experienced tremendous demographic, economic, and institutional changes. By using birth order effects as a proxy for family environment, and linked census data on men born between 1835 and 1910, we study how the family's role in human capital production evolved over this period. We find firstborn premiums for occupational outcomes, marriage, and fertility that are similar across census waves. Our results indicate that the returns to investments in the family environment were stable over a long period.
papers.zh_title: 极长时期内的出生顺序：估计1850年至1940年间的头胎优势
papers.zh_abstract: 19世纪的美国家庭经历了巨大的人口、经济和制度变迁。通过使用出生顺序效应作为家庭环境的代理变量，并利用1835年至1910年间出生男性的关联人口普查数据，我们研究了家庭在人力资本生产中的作用在这一时期的演变。我们发现，在职业结果、婚姻和生育方面存在头胎优势，且这些优势在不同普查波次中相似。我们的结果表明，家庭环境投资的回报在长期内保持稳定。

papers.title: On Eliciting Subjective Probability Distributions of Expectations
papers.authors: Valerie R. Boctor, Olivier Coibion, Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Michael Weber
papers.abstract: Using data from a large survey of American households, we compare density forecasts elicited with bins- and scenarios-based questions. We show that inflation density forecasts are sensitive to the survey question designs used to elicit them. The within-person discrepancy is smaller, but still discernible, for unemployment expectations. The discrepancy in responses is systematically related to sociodemographic characteristics of respondents. The differences shed light on the significance of priming in bins-based inflation density forecasts.
papers.zh_title: 关于引出主观概率分布预期的方法
papers.zh_abstract: 利用一项针对美国家庭的大规模调查数据，我们比较了基于分箱法和基于情景法的问题所引出的密度预测。我们表明，通胀密度预测对用于引出它们的调查问题设计很敏感。对于失业预期，个体内的差异较小但仍可察觉。回答中的差异与受访者的社会人口特征系统相关。这些差异揭示了分箱法通胀密度预测中启动效应的重要性。

papers.title: Empirical Tests of the Green Paradox for Climate Legislation
papers.authors: Maya A. Norman, Wolfram Schlenker
papers.abstract: The Green Paradox posits that fossil fuel markets respond to changing expectations about climate legislation, which limits future consumption, by shifting consumption to the present through lower present-day prices. We demonstrate that oil futures responded negatively to daily changes in the prediction market's expectations that the Waxman-Markey bill — the US climate bill discussed in 2009-2010 — would pass. This effect is consistent across various maturities as the proposed legislation would reset the entire price and consumption path, unlike temporary supply or demand shocks that phase out over time. The bill’s passage would have increased current global oil consumption by 2-4%. Furthermore, a strengthening of climate policy, as measured by monthly variations in media salience regarding climate policy over the last four decades, and two court rulings signaling limited future fossil fuel use, were associated with negative abnormal oil future returns. Taken together, our findings confirm that restricting future fossil fuel use will accelerate current-day consumption.
papers.zh_title: 气候立法绿色悖论的实证检验
papers.zh_abstract: 绿色悖论认为，化石燃料市场通过降低当前价格将消费转移到当前，以应对限制未来消费的气候立法预期的变化。我们证明，石油期货对预测市场中关于瓦克斯曼-马基法案（2009-2010年讨论的美国气候法案）通过可能性的每日变化做出了负面反应。这一效应在不同期限上一致，因为拟议的立法将重置整个价格和消费路径，这与随时间消退的暂时性供给或需求冲击不同。该法案的通过将使当前全球石油消费增加2-4%。此外，气候政策的加强——以过去四十年间媒体对气候政策关注度的月度变化以及两项限制未来化石燃料使用的法院裁决来衡量——与负面的异常石油期货收益相关。综合来看，我们的发现证实了限制未来化石燃料使用将加速当前消费。

papers.title: Social-Science Genomics: Progress, Challenges, and Future Directions
papers.authors: Daniel J. Benjamin, David Cesarini, Patrick Turley, Alexander Strudwick Young
papers.abstract: Rapid progress has been made in identifying links between human genetic variation and social and behavioral phenotypes. Applications in mainstream economics are beginning to emerge. This review aims to provide the background needed to bring the interested economist to the frontier of social-science genomics. Our review is structured around a theoretical framework that nests many of the key methods, concepts and tools found in the literature. We clarify key assumptions and appropriate interpretations. After reviewing several significant applications, we conclude by outlining future advances in genetics that will expand the scope of potential applications, and we discuss the ethical and communication challenges that arise in this area of research.
papers.zh_title: 社会科学基因组学：进展、挑战与未来方向
papers.zh_abstract: 在识别人类遗传变异与社会和行为表型之间的联系方面取得了快速进展。主流经济学的应用开始出现。本综述旨在提供必要的背景知识，使感兴趣的经济学家能够了解社会科学基因组学的前沿。我们的综述围绕一个理论框架展开，该框架涵盖了文献中的许多关键方法、概念和工具。我们阐明了关键假设和适当的解释。在回顾了几个重要应用之后，我们最后概述了遗传学的未来进展，这些进展将扩大潜在应用的范围，并讨论了该研究领域出现的伦理和沟通挑战。

papers.title: Building Non-Discriminatory Algorithms in Selected Data
papers.authors: David Arnold, Will S. Dobbie, Peter Hull
papers.abstract: We develop new quasi-experimental tools to understand algorithmic discrimination and build non-discriminatory algorithms when the outcome of interest is only selectively observed. These tools are applied in the context of pretrial bail decisions, where conventional algorithmic predictions are generated using only the misconduct outcomes of released defendants. We first show that algorithmic discrimination arises in such settings when the available algorithmic inputs are systematically different for white and Black defendants with the same objective misconduct potential. We then show how algorithmic discrimination can be eliminated by measuring and purging these conditional input disparities. Leveraging the quasi-random assignment of bail judges in New York City, we find that our new algorithms not only eliminate algorithmic discrimination but also generate more accurate predictions by correcting for the selective observability of misconduct outcomes.
papers.zh_title: 在选择性数据中构建非歧视性算法
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了新的准实验工具，以理解算法歧视，并在感兴趣的结果仅被选择性观测时构建非歧视性算法。这些工具应用于审前保释决策的背景，其中传统的算法预测仅使用被释放被告的不当行为结果生成。我们首先表明，当可用的算法输入对于具有相同客观不当行为潜力的白人和黑人被告系统性地不同时，算法歧视就会出现。然后，我们展示了如何通过测量和消除这些条件输入差异来消除算法歧视。利用纽约市保释法官的准随机分配，我们发现我们的新算法不仅消除了算法歧视，而且通过纠正不当行为结果的可选择性观测性，生成了更准确的预测。

papers.title: Business as Usual: Bank Net Zero Commitments, Lending, and Engagement
papers.authors: Parinitha R. Sastry, Emil Verner, David Marques Ibanez
papers.abstract: We use administrative credit registry data from Europe to study the impact of voluntary lender net zero commitments. We have two sets of findings. First, we find no evidence of lender divestment. Net zero banks neither reduce credit supply to the sectors they target for decarbonization nor do they increase financing for renewables projects. Second, we find no evidence of reduced financed emissions through engagement. Borrowers of net zero banks are not more likely to set decarbonization targets or reduce their verified emissions. Our estimates rule out even moderate-sized effects. These results highlight the limits of voluntary commitments for decarbonization.
papers.zh_title: 一切照旧：银行净零承诺、贷款与参与
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用欧洲的行政信贷登记数据来研究自愿性贷款机构净零承诺的影响。我们有两组发现。首先，我们没有发现贷款机构撤资的证据。净零银行既没有减少对其脱碳目标行业的信贷供给，也没有增加对可再生能源项目的融资。其次，我们没有发现通过参与减少融资排放的证据。净零银行的借款人并不更有可能设定脱碳目标或减少其经核实的排放。我们的估计排除了即使是中等规模的影响。这些结果凸显了自愿性脱碳承诺的局限性。

papers.title: The Streetlight Effect in Data-Driven Exploration
papers.authors: Johannes Hoelzemann, Gustavo Manso, Abhishek Nagaraj, Matteo Tranchero
papers.abstract: We study exploration under uncertainty and show how access to data on past attempts can paradoxically hinder breakthrough discovery. We develop a model of the “streetlight effect” demonstrating that when data highlights attractive but ultimately suboptimal projects, it can narrow exploration and suppress innovation. In a laboratory experiment, we find that revealing the value of an enticing project lowers payoffs and reduces breakthrough discoveries. This drop stems from increased free-riding behavior, which crowds out the generation of new data. We validate our theory in the context of scientific research into the genetic origins of human diseases. To identify the causal impact of past data, we use an instrumental variable that leverages exogenous genetic overlaps between humans and laboratory mice, which reduces research costs for specific genes and leads to prioritized data collection about them. We find that diseases with early evidence of promising genetic targets are 16 percentage points less likely to yield breakthroughs than those where early efforts failed. While competition attenuates the streetlight effect, it does not eliminate it. Our paper provides the first systematic analysis of this phenomenon, outlining the conditions under which data leads agents to look under the lamppost rather than engage in socially beneficial exploration.
papers.zh_title: 数据驱动探索中的路灯效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了不确定性下的探索行为，并展示了获取过去尝试的数据如何可能矛盾地阻碍突破性发现。我们构建了一个“路灯效应”模型，证明当数据突出显示有吸引力但最终并非最优的项目时，它会缩小探索范围并抑制创新。在一项实验室实验中，我们发现揭示一个诱人项目的价值会降低收益并减少突破性发现。这种下降源于搭便车行为的增加，从而挤出了新数据的生成。我们在人类疾病遗传起源的科学研究背景下验证了我们的理论。为了识别过去数据的因果影响，我们使用了一个工具变量，该变量利用了人类与实验室小鼠之间的外生遗传重叠，这降低了特定基因的研究成本，并导致对这些基因的数据收集优先化。我们发现，与早期努力失败的疾病相比，早期有希望遗传靶点证据的疾病取得突破的可能性低16个百分点。虽然竞争减弱了路灯效应，但并未消除它。我们的论文首次对这一现象进行了系统分析，概述了数据导致主体在路灯下寻找而非进行对社会有益的探索的条件。

papers.title: Immigrant Entrepreneurship: New Estimates and a Research Agenda
papers.authors: Saheel A. Chodavadia, Sari Pekkala Kerr, William R. Kerr, Louis J. Maiden
papers.abstract: Immigrants contribute disproportionately to entrepreneurship in many countries, accounting for a quarter of new employer businesses in the US. We review recent research on the measurement of immigrant entrepreneurship, the traits of immigrant founders, their economic impact, and policy levers. We provide updated statistics on the share of US entrepreneurs who are immigrants. We utilize the Annual Business Survey to quantify the greater rates of patenting and innovation in immigrant-founded firms. This higher propensity towards innovation is only partly explained by differences in education levels and fields of study. We conclude with avenues for future research.
papers.meta: Programs：LS, PR；JEL：F22, F6, J15, J61, L26, M13, O15, O3, R23
papers.zh_title: 移民创业：新估计与研究议程
papers.zh_abstract: 移民在许多国家对创业的贡献不成比例，在美国占新雇主企业的四分之一。我们回顾了近期关于移民创业衡量、移民创始人特征、其经济影响以及政策杠杆的研究。我们提供了美国创业者中移民比例的最新统计数据。我们利用年度商业调查来量化移民创办企业中更高的专利和创新能力。这种更高的创新倾向仅部分由教育水平和研究领域的差异解释。最后，我们提出了未来研究的途径。

papers.title: A Computable Dynamic Oligopoly Model of Capacity Investment
papers.authors: Gautam Gowrisankaran, Philipp Schmidt-Dengler
papers.abstract: We analyze a class of dynamic models that has several recent applications, where each period, each firm receives a private shock to the marginal cost of investment and chooses among many ordered capacity levels. Simulation methods to compute these models can result in non-existence of pure strategy equilibrium, while including multinomial shocks leads to counterintuitive predictions. We provide a computationally fast method to calculate optimal investment probabilities given value functions that iteratively finds investment levels chosen with positive probability and cutoffs of private information shocks across choices. Our method is useful to practitioners seeking to estimate models with continuous firm choices.
papers.zh_title: 一个可计算的产能投资动态寡头模型
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了一类在近期多个应用中出现的动态模型，其中每个时期，每家企业都会收到一个关于投资边际成本的私人冲击，并在多个有序的产能水平中进行选择。模拟这些模型的计算方法可能导致纯策略均衡不存在，而包含多项冲击则会导致反直觉的预测。我们提供了一种计算快速的方法，在给定价值函数的情况下计算最优投资概率，该方法迭代地找出以正概率选择的投资水平以及跨选择的私人信息冲击临界值。我们的方法对于寻求估计具有连续企业选择的模型的实践者很有用。

papers.title: Taxes Depress Corporate Borrowing: Evidence from Private Firms
papers.authors: Ivan T. Ivanov, Luke Pettit, Toni Whited
papers.abstract: We use variation in state corporate income tax rates to re-examine the relation between taxes and corporate leverage. Contrary to prior research, we find that corporate leverage rises after tax cuts for small private firms. An estimated dynamic equilibrium model shows that tax cuts make capital more productive and spur borrowing. Tax cuts also produce more distant default thresholds and lower credit spreads. These effects outweigh the lower interest tax deduction and lead to higher optimal leverage choices, especially for firms with flexible investment policies. The presence of the interest tax deduction raises consumer welfare in equilibrium.
papers.zh_title: 税收抑制企业借贷：来自私营企业的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用州企业所得税税率的变化来重新审视税收与企业杠杆之间的关系。与先前研究相反，我们发现对于小型私营企业，减税后企业杠杆率上升。一个估计的动态均衡模型表明，减税使资本更具生产力并刺激借贷。减税还导致更远的违约阈值和更低的信用利差。这些效应超过了较低的利息税抵扣，并导致更高的最优杠杆选择，尤其是对于投资政策灵活的企业。利息税抵扣的存在在均衡中提高了消费者福利。

papers.title: Quality Signaling and Demand for Renewable Energy Technology: Evidence from a Randomized Field Experiment
papers.authors: Aidan Coville, Joshua S. Graff Zivin, Arndt Reichert, Ann-Kristin Reitmann
papers.abstract: Solar technologies have been associated with private and social returns, but their technological potential often remains unachieved because of persistently low demand for high-quality products. In a randomized field experiment in Senegal, we assess the potential of three types of quality signaling to increase demand for high-quality solar lamps. We find no effect on demand when consumers are offered a money-back guarantee but increased demand with a third-party certification or warranty, consistent with the notion that consumers are uncertain about product durability rather than their utility. However, despite the higher willingness to pay, the prices they would pay are still well below market prices for the average household, suggesting that reducing information asymmetries alone is insufficient to encourage wider adoption. Surprisingly, we also find that the effective quality signals in our setting stimulate demand for low-quality products by creating product-class effects among those least familiar with the product.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE；JEL：D12, D83, L15, O13, Q41
papers.zh_title: 质量信号与可再生能源技术需求：来自随机田野实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 太阳能技术一直与私人和社会回报相关联，但由于对高质量产品的需求持续低迷，其技术潜力往往未能实现。在塞内加尔的一项随机田野实验中，我们评估了三种质量信号类型在增加对高质量太阳能灯需求方面的潜力。我们发现，当消费者获得退款保证时，对需求没有影响，但第三方认证或保修增加了需求，这与消费者对产品耐用性而非效用存在不确定性的观点一致。然而，尽管支付意愿更高，他们愿意支付的价格仍远低于普通家庭的市场价格，这表明仅减少信息不对称不足以鼓励更广泛的采用。令人惊讶的是，我们还发现，在我们的环境中有效的质量信号通过在最不熟悉该产品的人群中创造产品类别效应，刺激了对低质量产品的需求。

papers.title: Incentive-Compatible Unemployment Reinsurance for the Euro Area
papers.authors: Alexander Karaivanov, Benoit Mojon, Luiz Pereira da Silva, Albert Pierres Tejada, Robert Townsend
papers.abstract: We model a reinsurance mechanism for the national unemployment insurance programs of euro area member states. The risk-sharing scheme we analyze is designed to smooth country-level unemployment risk and expenditures around each country’s median level, so that participation and contributions remain incentive-compatible at all times and there are no redistributionary transfers across countries. We show that, relative to the status quo, such scheme would have provided nearly perfect insurance of the euro area member states’ unemployment expenditures risk in the aftermath of the 2009 sovereign debt crisis if allowed to borrow up to 2 percent of the euro area GDP. Limiting, or not allowing borrowing by the scheme would have still provided significant smoothing of surpluses and deficits in the national unemployment insurance programs over the period 2000–2019.
papers.zh_title: 欧元区激励相容的失业保险再保险机制
papers.zh_abstract: 我们为欧元区成员国的国家失业保险计划建模了一个再保险机制。我们分析的风险分担方案旨在平滑各国围绕其中位数水平的国家层面失业风险和支出，使得参与和贡献在任何时候都保持激励相容，并且各国之间不存在再分配性转移。我们表明，相对于现状，如果该方案被允许借款高达欧元区GDP的2%，那么在2009年主权债务危机之后，它将为欧元区成员国的失业支出风险提供近乎完美的保险。限制或不允许该方案借款，仍将在2000-2019年期间为国家失业保险计划中的盈余和赤字提供显著的平滑作用。

papers.title: Access to Credit Reduces the Value of Insurance
papers.authors: Sonia Jaffe, Anup Malani, Julian Reif
papers.abstract: We analyze the value of insurance when individuals have access to credit markets. Loans allow consumers to smooth financial shocks over time, decreasing the value of consumption smoothing from insurance. We derive formulas for the value of insurance that can be taken to data, and show how that value depends on individual characteristics and features of loans. We estimate that access to a five-year loan decreases the values of community- and experience-rated insurance for the average beneficiary by $232-$366 (58--61%). Even for the sickest decile, this loan access reduces the value of community-rated insurance by $1,099 (17%).
papers.zh_title: 信贷获取降低了保险的价值
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了当个人能够进入信贷市场时保险的价值。贷款允许消费者随时间平滑财务冲击，从而降低了保险带来的消费平滑价值。我们推导了可用于数据的保险价值公式，并展示了该价值如何取决于个人特征和贷款特性。我们估计，获得五年期贷款会使社区评级和经验评级保险对平均受益人的价值降低232-366美元（58-61%）。即使对于最病重的十分位人群，这种贷款获取也会使社区评级保险的价值降低1,099美元（17%）。

papers.title: Can you Erase the Mark of a Criminal Record? Labor Market Impacts of Criminal Record Remediation
papers.authors: Amanda Y. Agan, Andrew Garin, Dmitri K. Koustas, Alexandre Mas, Crystal Yang
papers.abstract: We investigate whether removing a previously-obtained criminal record improves employment outcomes. We estimate the causal impact of criminal record remediation laws that have been widely enacted with the goal of improving employment opportunities for millions of individuals with records. We find consistent evidence that removing an existing record does not improve labor market outcomes, on average. A notable exception is participation in gig work through online platforms, which often screen workers based on their records but not their employment histories. The evidence is consistent with records initially scarring labor market trajectories in a way that is difficult to undo later.
papers.zh_title: 你能抹去犯罪记录的印记吗？犯罪记录修复的劳动力市场影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们调查了移除先前获得的犯罪记录是否能改善就业结果。我们估计了犯罪记录修复法律的因果影响，这些法律已被广泛颁布，旨在改善数百万有记录个人的就业机会。我们发现一致的证据表明，平均而言，移除现有记录并不能改善劳动力市场结果。一个显著的例外是通过在线平台参与零工工作，这些平台通常根据记录而非就业历史筛选工人。证据与记录最初以难以日后逆转的方式损害劳动力市场轨迹的观点一致。

papers.title: International Reserve Management under Rollover Crises
papers.authors: Mauricio Barbosa-Alves, Javier Bianchi, César Sosa-Padilla
papers.abstract: This paper investigates how a government should manage international reserves when it faces the risk of a rollover crisis. We ask, should the government accumulate reserves or reduce debt to make itself less vulnerable? We show that the optimal policy entails initially reducing debt, followed by a subsequent increase in both debt and reserves as the government approaches a safe zone. Furthermore, we find that issuing additional debt to accumulate reserves can lead to a reduction in sovereign spreads. Evidence from a panel of emerging economies is consistent with these predictions: increases in reserves financed by public external borrowing are associated with lower spreads, and reserve holdings are not systematically drawn down during crisis episodes.
papers.zh_title: 展期危机下的国际储备管理
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了当政府面临展期危机风险时，应如何管理国际储备。我们提出疑问：政府应积累储备还是减少债务以降低自身脆弱性？研究表明，最优政策是先减少债务，随后在政府接近安全区域时同时增加债务和储备。此外，我们发现发行额外债务以积累储备可导致主权利差下降。来自新兴经济体的面板数据与这些预测一致：通过公共外部借款融资的储备增加与较低的利差相关，且在危机期间储备持有量并未系统性减少。

papers.title: Contingent Trade Agreements
papers.authors: Bård Harstad
papers.abstract: There are often conflicts between proponents of trade and environmental activists. This paper shows, however, how trade agreements can be designed so as to motivate environmental conservation. I first analyze a standard trade model, where resource exploitation (e.g., deforestation) is a trade-specific investment that causes environmental damage. In this model, traditional trade agreements will cause more exploitation. Next, I investigate the extent to which conservation can be motivated by a contingent trade agreement (CTA), where default tariffs can vary with changes in the resource stock (e.g., the forest cover). The model permits many products, countries, and collaborators. A numerical example suggests that growth and liberalization can cause Brazil's agricultural area to expand by 27%, but this expansion can be avoided if the EU and the US offer a CTA.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, ITI, POL；JEL：F13, F18, F55, Q37, Q56
papers.zh_title: 或有贸易协定
papers.zh_abstract: 贸易支持者与环保活动家之间常存在冲突。然而，本文展示了如何设计贸易协定以激励环境保护。我首先分析了一个标准贸易模型，其中资源开采（如森林砍伐）是一种造成环境损害的贸易特定投资。在该模型中，传统贸易协定会导致更多开采。接着，我研究了通过或有贸易协定（CTA）能在多大程度上激励保护行为，在该协定中，默认关税可随资源存量（如森林覆盖率）的变化而调整。该模型允许多种产品、国家和合作方。一个数值示例表明，增长与自由化可能导致巴西农业面积扩大27%，但如果欧盟和美国提供CTA，这种扩张可以避免。

papers.title: Exorbitant Privilege: A Safe-Asset View
papers.authors: Zhengyang Jiang
papers.abstract: I propose a model of the reserve currency paradigm that centers on liquidity demand for safe assets. In global recessions, the demand for U.S. safe assets increases and raises their convenience yields, giving rise to stronger dollar and countercyclical seigniorage revenues. The seigniorage revenues raise the U.S. wealth and consumption shares in recessions, despite the U.S. suffering portfolio losses from external positions. This asset demand channel also connects exchange rates to bond holdings, which provides new perspectives on exchange rate disconnect and the exchange rate-capital flow relationship. Under this safe-asset view, exorbitant privilege does not require exorbitant duty.
papers.zh_title: 过高特权：安全资产视角
papers.zh_abstract: 我提出了一个以安全资产流动性需求为核心的储备货币范式模型。在全球衰退期间，对美国安全资产的需求增加，提高了其便利收益率，导致美元走强和反周期的铸币税收入。尽管美国因外部头寸遭受投资组合损失，但铸币税收入提高了美国在衰退期间的财富和消费份额。这种资产需求渠道还将汇率与债券持有量联系起来，为汇率脱节和汇率-资本流动关系提供了新视角。在这种安全资产视角下，过高特权并不要求过高义务。

papers.title: Dollar Asset Holdings and Hedging Around the Globe
papers.authors: Wenxin Du, Amy W. Huber
papers.abstract: We collect and analyze a large set of industry- and company-level filings from global institutional investors to provide the first comprehensive estimates of foreign investors’ U.S. dollar (USD) security holdings and currency hedging practices. We document that foreign investors’ USD holdings expanded six-fold over two decades, driven in large part by increased portfolio allocations. Following the 2007-09 financial crisis, mutual funds, insurance companies, and pension funds raised their USD hedge ratios by 15 percentage points, with total FX hedging demand reaching $2 trillion by 2019. USD hedging demand varies significantly across currency areas and banking systems. Using a mean-variance framework, we benchmark investors’ currency hedging practices and identify expected FX returns as a key driver of hedging decisions, beyond considerations of variance minimization. Finally, we show a strong correlation between hedging activity and the cross-section of CIP deviations, underscoring the role of constrained financial intermediaries in currency hedging markets.
papers.zh_title: 全球范围内的美元资产持有与对冲
papers.zh_abstract: 我们收集并分析了来自全球机构投资者的大量行业和公司层面文件，首次提供了外国投资者美元证券持有和货币对冲实践的全面估计。我们记录到，外国投资者的美元持有量在二十年间增长了六倍，这在很大程度上是由投资组合配置增加驱动的。在2007-09年金融危机之后，共同基金、保险公司和养老基金将其美元对冲比率提高了15个百分点，到2019年，外汇对冲总需求达到2万亿美元。美元对冲需求在不同货币区和银行体系之间存在显著差异。使用均值-方差框架，我们以投资者的货币对冲实践为基准，并确定预期外汇回报是对冲决策的关键驱动因素，而不仅仅是方差最小化的考虑。最后，我们展示了对冲活动与货币基差交易偏差横截面之间的强相关性，强调了受约束的金融中介在货币对冲市场中的作用。

papers.title: Demand-side and Supply-side Constraints in the Market for Financial Advice
papers.authors: Jonathan Reuter, Antoinette Schoar
papers.abstract: In this review, we argue that access to financial advice and the quality of this advice is shaped by a broad array of demand-side and supply-side constraints. While the literature has predominantly focused on conflicts of interest between advisors and clients, we highlight that the transaction costs of providing advice, mistaken beliefs on the demand side or supply side, and other factors can have equally detrimental effects on the quality and access to advice. Moreover, these factors affect how researchers should assess the impact of financial advice across heterogeneous groups of households. While households with low levels of financial literacy are more likely to benefit from advice—potentially including conflicted advice—they are also the least likely to detect misconduct, and perhaps the least likely to understand the value of paying for advice. Regulators should consider not only how regulation changes the quality of advice, but also the fraction of households who are able to receive it and how different groups would have invested without any advice. Financial innovation has the potential to provide customized advice at low cost, but also to embed conflicts of interest in algorithms that are opaque to households and regulators.
papers.zh_title: 金融咨询市场中的需求侧和供给侧约束
papers.zh_abstract: 在这篇综述中，我们认为，获得金融咨询的机会以及咨询的质量受到一系列需求侧和供给侧约束的影响。虽然文献主要关注顾问与客户之间的利益冲突，但我们强调，提供咨询的交易成本、需求侧或供给侧的误解以及其他因素，可能对咨询质量和获取机会产生同样有害的影响。此外，这些因素影响了研究人员应如何评估金融咨询对不同异质性家庭群体的影响。虽然金融素养水平低的家庭更有可能从咨询中受益——可能包括存在利益冲突的咨询——但他们也是最不可能发现不当行为的群体，或许也是最不了解付费咨询价值的群体。监管机构不仅应考虑监管如何改变咨询质量，还应考虑能够获得咨询的家庭比例，以及不同群体在没有咨询的情况下会如何投资。金融创新有可能以低成本提供定制化咨询，但也可能将利益冲突嵌入对家庭和监管机构不透明的算法中。

papers.title: Trade Wars and the Optimal Design of Monetary Rules
papers.authors: Stéphane Auray, Michael B. Devereux, Aurélien Eyquem
papers.abstract: Monetary rules may have a large effect on the outcome of trade wars if central banks target the CPI inflation rate or more generally changes in the relative price of traded goods. We lay out a two-country open-economy model with sticky prices where countries engage in trade wars. In the presence of monopoly pricing markups, we show that the final level of tariffs and welfare losses from trade wars critically depend on the design of monetary policy. If central banks adopt a fixed nominal exchange rate or even better target the CPI inflation rate, trade wars are much less intense than those under PPI inflation targeting. We further show that an optimally delegated monetary rule that internalizes the formation of non-cooperative trade policy can actually completely eliminate a trade war, and even act to partly offset the welfare cost of monopoly markups.
papers.zh_title: 贸易战与货币政策规则的最优设计
papers.zh_abstract: 如果中央银行以消费者价格指数通胀率或更一般地以贸易品相对价格的变化为目标，货币政策规则可能对贸易战的结果产生重大影响。我们构建了一个具有粘性价格的两国开放经济模型，其中各国参与贸易战。在存在垄断定价加成的情况下，我们表明，关税的最终水平和贸易战造成的福利损失关键取决于货币政策的设计。如果中央银行采用固定名义汇率，或者更好的是以消费者价格指数通胀率为目标，那么贸易战的激烈程度远低于以生产者价格指数通胀为目标的情况。我们进一步表明，一个内化了非合作贸易政策形成的最优委托货币政策规则，实际上可以完全消除贸易战，甚至部分抵消垄断加成的福利成本。

papers.title: The Macroeconomic Impact of Climate Change: Global vs. Local Temperature
papers.authors: Adrien Bilal, Diego R. Känzig
papers.abstract: This paper estimates that the macroeconomic damages from climate change are an order of magnitude larger than previously thought. Exploiting natural global temperature variability, we find that 1°C warming reduces world GDP by over 20% in the long run. Global temperature correlates strongly with extreme climatic events, unlike country-level temperature used in previous work, explaining our larger estimate. We use this evidence to estimate damage functions in a neoclassical growth model. Business-as-usual warming implies a present welfare loss of more than 30%, and a Social Cost of Carbon in excess of $1,200 per ton. These impacts suggest that unilateral decarbonization policy is cost-effective for large countries such as the United States.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, EFG, ITI；JEL：E01, E23, F18, O44, Q54, Q56
papers.zh_title: 气候变化的宏观经济影响：全球温度与局部温度
papers.zh_abstract: 本文估计气候变化造成的宏观经济损害比先前认为的大一个数量级。利用全球自然温度变异性，我们发现长期内升温1°C会使世界GDP减少超过20%。全球温度与极端气候事件高度相关，这与先前研究中使用的国家层面温度不同，从而解释了我们的更大估计值。我们利用这一证据在新古典增长模型中估计损害函数。照常升温情景意味着当前福利损失超过30%，且碳的社会成本超过每吨1200美元。这些影响表明，对于美国等大国而言，单边脱碳政策具有成本效益。

papers.title: Monetary Transmission Through Bank Securities Portfolios
papers.authors: Daniel Greenwald, John Krainer, Pascal Paul
papers.abstract: We study the transmission of monetary policy through bank securities portfolios using granular supervisory data on U.S. bank securities, hedging positions, and corporate credit. Banks that experienced larger losses on their securities during the 2022-2023 monetary tightening cycle extended less credit to firms. This spillover effect was stronger for available-for-sale securities, unhedged securities, and banks that must include unrealized gains and losses in their regulatory capital. A structural model, disciplined by our cross-sectional regression estimates, shows that interest rate transmission is stronger the more banks are required to adjust their regulatory capital for unrealized value changes of securities.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, ME；JEL：E32, E43, E44, E51, E52, E60, G21, G32
papers.zh_title: 通过银行证券组合的货币政策传导
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用美国银行证券、对冲头寸和企业信贷的精细监管数据，研究货币政策通过银行证券组合的传导。在2022-2023年货币紧缩周期中，证券损失较大的银行向企业提供的信贷较少。这种溢出效应对于可供出售证券、未对冲证券以及必须将未实现损益纳入监管资本的银行更为强烈。一个由我们的横截面回归估计约束的结构模型表明，银行越需要根据证券未实现价值变动调整监管资本，利率传导就越强。

papers.title: Melitz Meets Lewis: The Impacts of Roads on Structural Transformation and Businesses
papers.authors: Joseph P. Kaboski, Jianyu Lu, Wei Qian, Lixia Ren
papers.abstract: This paper examines the impact of roads on structural transformation and business composition theoretically and empirically. We develop a two-sector model of regional trade with endogenous firm entry that highlights two opposing forces. \\textit{Ceteris paribus} lower trade costs in non-agriculture lead to fewer firms, but cheaper agricultural imports releases labor from local agricultural production leading to more firms. Using major highway programs in India and China, we find results broadly consistent with the theory, with declines in the number of businesses where structural transformation is weak, and increases where it is strong.
papers.zh_title: Melitz遇见Lewis：道路对结构转型和企业的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本文从理论和实证上考察道路对结构转型和企业构成的影响。我们构建了一个包含内生企业进入的两部门区域贸易模型，强调两种相反的力量。在其他条件相同的情况下，非农业部门较低的贸易成本导致企业数量减少，但更便宜的农产品进口释放了当地农业生产的劳动力，从而带来更多企业。利用印度和中国的主要高速公路项目，我们发现结果与理论基本一致：在结构转型较弱的地区企业数量下降，而在结构转型较强的地区企业数量增加。

papers.title: Optimal Mortgage Refinancing with Inattention
papers.authors: David W. Berger, Konstantin Milbradt, Fabrice Tourre, Joseph S. Vavra
papers.abstract: We build a model of optimal fixed-rate mortgage refinancing with fixed costs and inattention and derive a new sufficient statistic that can be used to measure inattention frictions from simple moments of the rate gap distribution. In the model, borrowers pay attention to rates sporadically so they often fail to refinance even when it is profitable. When paying attention, borrowers optimally choose to refinance earlier than under a perfect attention benchmark. Our model can rationalize almost all errors of “omission” (refinancing too slowly) and a large fraction of the errors of “commission” (refinancing too quickly) previously documented in the data.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, ME；JEL：E4, G21, G4, G5, R2
papers.zh_title: 存在注意力不足时的最优抵押贷款再融资
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个存在固定成本和注意力不足的最优固定利率抵押贷款再融资模型，并推导出一个新的充分统计量，可用于从利率缺口分布的简单矩中衡量注意力不足摩擦。在该模型中，借款人偶尔关注利率，因此即使再融资有利可图，他们也常常未能进行再融资。当关注利率时，借款人最优选择比完全注意力基准下更早进行再融资。我们的模型可以解释数据中先前记录的大部分“不作为”错误（再融资过慢）和很大一部分“作为”错误（再融资过快）。

papers.title: The Economics of Infertility: Evidence from Reproductive Medicine
papers.authors: Sarah Bögl, Jasmin Moshfegh, Petra Persson, Maria Polyakova
papers.abstract: As the share of births that rely on assisted reproductive technologies (ART) keeps growing, policies around infertility treatments remain ridden with controversy. We use population-wide Swedish administrative data with uniquely detailed information on individual-level use of ARTs, combined with quasi-experimental empirical methods, to characterize the rate of infertility burden, its private and public costs, and the role of insurance coverage in alleviating infertility.
