We estimate that one in eight women will experience primary infertility – the inability to have any child at all – over her fertile years. Our analysis reveals that persistent infertility causes a long-run deterioration of mental health and couple stability, with no long-run “protective” effects (of having no child) on earnings. Insurance coverage plays a central role in driving the demand for expensive infertility treatments (IVF). The rate of IVF initiations drops by half when treatment is not covered by health insurance. Our estimates imply that couples are willing to pay at most 33% of their annual disposable income for a course of IVF treatment that gives an about 40% chance of having a child. The response to insurance coverage is more pronounced at the lower end of the income distribution. We show that, as a result, coverage of infertility treatments determines both the total number of additional children as well as their allocation across the socio-economic spectrum.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LS, PE；JEL：H0, I0, J0
papers.zh_title: 不孕不育经济学：来自生殖医学的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 随着依赖辅助生殖技术（ART）出生的婴儿比例持续增长，围绕不孕不育治疗的政策仍充满争议。我们利用瑞典全人口行政数据，其中包含个人层面ART使用的独特详细信息，结合准实验实证方法，来刻画不孕不育负担率、其私人和公共成本，以及保险覆盖在缓解不孕不育中的作用。我们估计，每八名女性中就有一人在育龄期内经历原发性不孕不育——即完全无法生育孩子。我们的分析显示，持续性不孕不育会导致心理健康和伴侣关系的长期恶化，而在收入方面没有（因无子女而产生的）长期“保护”效应。保险覆盖在推动昂贵的不孕不育治疗（IVF）需求中起着核心作用。当治疗不被健康保险覆盖时，IVF启动率下降一半。我们的估计表明，夫妇愿意为一个约40%概率生育孩子的IVF疗程支付最多其年可支配收入的33%。对保险覆盖的反应在收入分布的低端更为明显。我们表明，因此，不孕不育治疗的覆盖既决定了额外子女的总数，也决定了他们在社会经济谱系中的分配。

papers.title: Do E-Cigarette Retail Licensure Laws Reduce Tobacco Use?
papers.authors: Charles J. Courtemanche, Yang Liang, Johanna Catherine Maclean, Caterina Muratori, Joseph J. Sabia
papers.abstract: E-cigarette licensure laws (ELLs) require retailers to obtain a state license to sell e-cigarettes over the counter. This study is the first to comprehensively explore the effect of ELL adoption on youth and adult tobacco product use. Using data from the State Youth Risk Behavior Survey (YRBS) and a difference-in-differences approach, we find no evidence that ELL adoption reduces overall youth ENDS use. The precision of our estimates allows us to rule out, with 95 percent confidence, ELL-induced prior-month youth ENDS use declines of more than 3.4 percent. The pattern of null findings persists when we examine ELLs that impose (1) higher penalties for retailer non-compliance, (2) higher renewable licensure fees, and (3) criminal as compared to civil penalties. However, we do uncover evidence that adoption of ELLs with higher penalties associated with a modest reduction in ENDS use among Black teens. We conclude that ELLs have only limited success in curbing access to ENDS.
papers.zh_title: 电子烟零售许可法能否减少烟草使用？
papers.zh_abstract: 电子烟许可法（ELLs）要求零售商获得州许可证才能非处方销售电子烟。本研究首次全面探讨ELL采纳对青少年和成人烟草产品使用的影响。利用州青少年风险行为调查（YRBS）数据和双重差分方法，我们没有发现ELL采纳能减少青少年整体ENDS使用的证据。我们估计的精度允许我们在95%置信水平上排除ELL导致青少年过去一个月ENDS使用下降超过3.4%的可能性。当我们考察（1）对零售商违规施加更高处罚、（2）更高续期许可费以及（3）刑事处罚而非民事处罚的ELL时，零结果模式依然存在。然而，我们确实发现证据表明，采纳具有更高处罚的ELL与黑人青少年ENDS使用的适度减少相关。我们得出结论，ELL在遏制ENDS获取方面仅取得有限成功。

papers.title: Employer 401(k) Matches for Student Debt Repayment: Killing Two Birds with One Stone?
papers.authors: Vanya Horneff, Raimond Maurer, Olivia S. Mitchell
papers.abstract: Almost 50 million Americans are burdened by the need to repay almost $2 trillion in student loan debt, while at the same time having to save for retirement. This article analyzes the potential impact of the 2022 SECURE 2.0 Act reform which permits employers to match contributions for student loan repayments, in 401(k) plans. Our calibrated lifecycle model measures the impact of this reform on heterogeneous households’ financial behavior and welfare. We show that, post-reform, employees will repay more loan debt but reduce own retirement plan contributions, offset by higher employer-matching contributions that take loan repayments into account.
papers.zh_title: 雇主对学生贷款还款的401(k)匹配：一石二鸟？
papers.zh_abstract: 近5000万美国人背负着近2万亿美元的学生贷款债务需要偿还，同时还要为退休储蓄。本文分析了2022年《SECURE 2.0法案》改革的潜在影响，该改革允许雇主在401(k)计划中为学生贷款还款提供匹配缴款。我们校准的生命周期模型衡量了这项改革对异质性家庭财务行为和福利的影响。我们表明，改革后，员工将偿还更多贷款债务，但会减少自己的退休计划缴款，而这部分被考虑贷款还款的更高雇主匹配缴款所抵消。

papers.title: Half Empty and Half Full? Women in Economics and the Rise in Gender-Related Research
papers.authors: Francisca M. Antman, Kirk B. Doran, Xuechao Qian, Bruce A. Weinberg
papers.abstract: Using the EconLit dissertation database and large-scale algorithmic methods that identify author demographics from names, we investigate the connection between the gender of economics dissertators and dissertation topics. Despite stagnation in the share of women among economics Ph.D.s in recent years, there has been a remarkable rise in gender-related dissertations in economics over time and in many sub-fields. Women economists are significantly more likely to write gender-related dissertations and bring gender-related topics into a wide range of fields within economics. Men in economics have also substantially increased their interest in gender-related topics.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PR；JEL：A23, I23, J16, O30
papers.zh_title: 半空半满？经济学中的女性与性别相关研究的兴起
papers.zh_abstract: 利用EconLit论文数据库和通过姓名识别作者人口统计特征的大规模算法方法，我们调查了经济学博士论文作者的性别与论文主题之间的联系。尽管近年来经济学博士中女性比例停滞不前，但经济学中性别相关论文的数量随时间推移以及在许多子领域中显著增加。女性经济学家更有可能撰写性别相关论文，并将性别相关主题引入经济学内的广泛领域。经济学中的男性对性别相关主题的兴趣也大幅增加。

papers.title: The Disenrollment and Labor Supply Effects of SNAP Work Requirements
papers.authors: Jason B. Cook, Chloe N. East
papers.abstract: Amid growing efforts to expand work requirements in U.S. transfer programs, new proposals target parents of young children, despite limited evidence of efficacy for this population. We provide the first modern causal estimates of the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program’s (SNAP) work requirements on parents using linked administrative data. Parents do not increase their work, but are much less likely to receive SNAP, undermining SNAP’s ability to reach the neediest households. The structure of these policies enables us to tease apart mechanisms and we conclude that administrative burdens imposed by work requirements are the key driver of this disenrollment effect.
papers.zh_title: SNAP工作要求对退出参保和劳动供给的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 在美国转移支付项目中扩大工作要求的努力日益增加，新的提案针对年幼子女的父母，尽管针对这一人群的有效性证据有限。我们利用关联行政数据，首次提供了补充营养援助计划（SNAP）工作要求对父母影响的现代因果估计。父母并未增加工作，但获得SNAP的可能性大幅降低，这削弱了SNAP覆盖最贫困家庭的能力。这些政策的结构使我们能够梳理出机制，我们得出结论：工作要求带来的行政负担是这种退出参保效应的关键驱动因素。

papers.title: Losing to Gain: Revenue Shortfalls and Fiscal Capacity in Brazil
papers.authors: Claudio Ferraz, Dirk Foremny, Juan Francisco Santini
papers.abstract: This paper investigates how shocks to non-tax revenues impact tax collection in Brazilian municipalities, exploiting an exogenous shift in intergovernmental transfers driven by population updates. Our analysis reveals asymmetric effects of shocks: revenue gains lead to increased spending without tax reductions, while losses in transfers prompt investments in fiscal capacity and boost tax revenues. Enhancing fiscal capacity entails adjusting tax bureaucrat payments, improving property registries, and cracking down on delinquency, with heterogeneous responses based on political competition and the educational levels of local leaders and the bureaucracy. These findings emphasize the importance of rules that reduce the reliance on non-tax revenues and promote effective tax collection.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, PE, POL；JEL：H71, H72, H83, P11
papers.zh_title: 失之东隅，收之桑榆：巴西的收入短缺与财政能力
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了非税收收入冲击如何影响巴西市镇的税收征收，利用人口更新驱动的政府间转移支付外生变化。我们的分析揭示了冲击的非对称效应：收入增加导致支出上升，但税收并未减少；而转移支付损失则促使财政能力投资，并提高税收收入。增强财政能力包括调整税务官僚薪酬、改善财产登记以及打击拖欠行为，其反应因政治竞争以及地方领导人和官僚的教育水平而异。这些发现强调了减少对非税收收入依赖并促进有效税收征收的规则的重要性。

papers.title: Pricing Innovation in Surgical Care Markets
papers.authors: Alice Chen, Seth M. Freedman, Elizabeth L. Munnich, Michael R. Richards
papers.abstract: Technological innovation in medical services can improve health, but its ability to reach patients often depends on price signals for downstream providers, which can also be discordant across production inputs. We examine such a context when Medicare sharply revises facility fees—while holding physician fees constant—for advanced surgical care performed within certain outpatient settings. Industry-wide output for impacted cases increases via market expansion, and indirectly affected physicians devote more labor supply to these cases by sacrificing other outpatient and inpatient surgical volumes. Government price setting for healthcare facilities spills over onto physicians––impacting their technology utilization and time allocations.
papers.meta: Programs：EH；JEL：I11, I13, I18, L25, L84, L88
papers.zh_title: 外科护理市场中的创新定价
papers.zh_abstract: 医疗服务的技术创新可以改善健康，但其惠及患者的能力往往取决于下游提供者的价格信号，而这些信号在生产投入之间也可能不一致。我们研究了当Medicare大幅修订某些门诊环境下高级外科护理的设施费用（同时保持医生费用不变）时的此类情境。受影响病例的行业产出通过市场扩张而增加，而间接受影响的医生通过牺牲其他门诊和住院手术量，将更多劳动供给投入这些病例。政府对医疗设施的价格设定会溢出到医生身上，影响他们的技术利用和时间分配。

papers.title: To Find Relative Earnings Gains After the China Shock, Look Outside Manufacturing and Upstream
papers.authors: Justin R. Pierce, Peter K. Schott, Cristina Tello-Trillo
papers.abstract: We examine US workers' employment and earnings before and after trade liberalization with China. Among workers initially employed in manufacturing, we find substantial and persistent declines in both outcomes, with indirect exposure via input-output linkages exacerbating the negative effects of direct exposure. For workers initially employed outside manufacturing, however, we find that the positive impact of greater upstream exposure via inputs more than offsets the adverse impacts of own- and downstream exposure, inducing relative earnings gains. We also find that spatial exposure is more influential than industry exposure.
papers.zh_title: 寻找中国冲击后的相对收入增长：关注制造业之外和上游领域
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了中美贸易自由化前后美国工人的就业和收入。在最初受雇于制造业的工人中，我们发现这两个结果都出现了显著且持续的下降，通过投入产出关联的间接暴露加剧了直接暴露的负面影响。然而，对于最初受雇于制造业以外的工人，我们发现更大的上游投入暴露的正面影响足以抵消自身和下游暴露的不利影响，从而带来相对收入增长。我们还发现，空间暴露比行业暴露更具影响力。

papers.title: Demographic Diversity and Economic Research: Fields of Specialization and Research on Race, Ethnicity, and Inequality
papers.authors: Francisca M. Antman, Kirk B. Doran, Xuechao Qian, Bruce A. Weinberg
papers.abstract: Using dissertation research topics found in the EconLit database and large-scale algorithmic methods that identify author demographics based on names, we explore the link between race and ethnicity and fields of economic research. We find that underrepresented racial and ethnic minority (URM) researchers are more likely to write dissertations in some unexpected sub-fields of economics, but limited evidence that they are more likely to write dissertations on racial topics once we include basic controls. These descriptive results may be due to limitations in the data, intrinsic motivations, or external constraints.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PR；JEL：A13, A23, I23, J15, O30
papers.zh_title: 人口多样性与经济研究：专业领域及关于种族、民族与不平等的研究
papers.zh_abstract: 利用EconLit数据库中的博士论文研究主题，以及基于姓名识别作者人口特征的大规模算法方法，我们探讨了种族和民族与经济研究领域之间的联系。我们发现，代表性不足的种族和民族少数群体（URM）研究人员更有可能在一些意想不到的经济学子领域撰写博士论文，但一旦加入基本控制变量，他们更有可能撰写关于种族主题论文的证据有限。这些描述性结果可能源于数据限制、内在动机或外部约束。

papers.title: What do Financial Markets say about the Exchange Rate?
papers.authors: Mikhail Chernov, Valentin Haddad, Oleg Itskhoki
papers.abstract: We develop a general framework characterizing when exchange rates connect or disconnect from fundamentals across different financial market structures. International portfolio risk sharing governs how tightly exchange rates track households’ stochastic discount factors. We introduce a tractable sufficient statistic for connect: the prevalence of globally-traded risks, the component of asset risks that households in both countries can trade through available financial instruments. When globally-traded risks dominate, exchange rate puzzles persist regardless of market structure. In turn, disconnect requires neither extreme segmentation nor thin financial markets; it emerges whenever globally-traded risks are limited. Empirically, cross-country asset return correlations are weak, implying modest amount of globally-traded risks and pervasive disconnect in intermediated market structures. When correlations increase, as observed post-2008 or during high-risk episodes, exchange rates track fundamentals more closely.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E44, F31, G15
papers.zh_title: 金融市场对汇率有何看法？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们建立了一个通用框架，描述在不同金融市场结构下，汇率何时与基本面连接或脱钩。国际投资组合风险分担决定了汇率追踪家庭随机贴现因子的紧密程度。我们引入了一个易于处理的连接充分统计量：全球交易风险的存在程度，即两国家庭通过可用金融工具可以交易的资产风险组成部分。当全球交易风险占主导时，无论市场结构如何，汇率谜题都会持续存在。反过来，脱钩既不需要极端分割，也不需要薄弱的金融市场；只要全球交易风险有限，脱钩就会出现。实证上，跨国资产回报相关性较弱，意味着全球交易风险程度适中，且在中间市场结构中普遍存在脱钩。当相关性增加时（如2008年后或高风险时期所见），汇率更紧密地追踪基本面。

papers.title: Demand For E-Cigarettes Based On Nicotine Strength: Evidence From Retail Sales
papers.authors: Megan C. Diaz, Adrian Bertrand, Tatum McKay, Barbara A. Schillo, Bushraa S. Khatib, John A. Tauras
papers.abstract: Using NielsenIQ Retail Scanner data, we estimate demand equations for e-cigarettes by nicotine concentration. Overall, the models show that the price elasticities of demand range from -2.117 to -1.494. In a rapidly evolving e-cigarette market, demand for e-cigarettes varies considerably by nicotine strength. High-nicotine products, which have many close substitutes, are found to be more responsive to changes in price. Demand for low-nicotine products, with few close substitutes, are found to be less responsive to changes in price. Our findings also suggest that e-cigarettes with the lowest and highest nicotine concentrations may be economic complements, suggesting concurrent use. Unlike available evidence on cross-tax elasticities of demand, we find no evidence of an economic relationship between traditional cigarettes and e-cigarettes when broken down by nicotine strength concentration.
papers.zh_title: 基于尼古丁浓度的电子烟需求：来自零售销售的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 利用NielsenIQ零售扫描数据，我们按尼古丁浓度估算了电子烟的需求方程。总体而言，模型显示需求价格弹性范围在-2.117至-1.494之间。在快速演变的电子烟市场中，电子烟的需求因尼古丁强度而有显著差异。我们发现，具有许多近似替代品的高尼古丁产品对价格变化更为敏感。而具有较少近似替代品的低尼古丁产品对价格变化的敏感度较低。我们的发现还表明，最低和最高尼古丁浓度的电子烟可能是经济互补品，暗示同时使用。与现有关于需求交叉税收弹性的证据不同，我们发现按尼古丁强度浓度细分时，传统卷烟与电子烟之间不存在经济关系的证据。

papers.title: Causal Effects in Matching Mechanisms with Strategically Reported Preferences
papers.authors: Marinho Bertanha, Margaux Luflade, Ismael Mourifié
papers.abstract: A growing number of central authorities use assignment mechanisms to allocate students to schools in a way that reflects student preferences and school priorities. However, most real-world mechanisms incentivize students to strategically misreport their preferences. In this paper, we provide an approach for identifying the causal effects of school assignment on future outcomes that accounts for strategic misreporting. Misreporting may invalidate existing point-identification approaches, and we derive sharp bounds for causal effects that are robust to strategic behavior. Our approach applies to any mechanism as long as there exist placement scores and cutoffs that characterize that mechanism’s allocation rule. We use data from a deferred acceptance mechanism that assigns students to more than 1,000 university–major combinations in Chile. Matching theory predicts that students’ behavior in Chile should be strategic because they can list only up to eight options, and we find empirical evidence consistent with such behavior. Our bounds are informative enough to reveal significant heterogeneity in graduation success with respect to preferences and school assignment.
papers.zh_title: 具有策略性报告偏好的匹配机制中的因果效应
papers.zh_abstract: 越来越多的中央机构使用分配机制，以反映学生偏好和学校优先级的方式将学生分配到学校。然而，大多数现实世界的机制激励学生策略性地虚报其偏好。在本文中，我们提供了一种方法，用于识别学校分配对未来结果的因果效应，该方法考虑了策略性虚报。虚报可能使现有的点识别方法失效，我们推导出对策略行为稳健的因果效应的尖锐边界。我们的方法适用于任何机制，只要存在描述该机制分配规则的安置分数和截止点。我们使用智利将学生分配到超过1000个大学-专业组合的延迟接受机制的数据。匹配理论预测，智利学生的行为应该是策略性的，因为他们只能列出最多八个选项，并且我们发现了与这种行为一致的实证证据。我们的边界信息量足够大，能够揭示在偏好和学校分配方面毕业成功的显著异质性。

papers.title: The Moral Values of "Rugged Individualism"
papers.authors: Samuel Bazzi, Martin Fiszbein, Maximiliano Garcia
papers.abstract: The United States is among the most individualistic societies in the world. However, unlike Western European individualism, which is imbued with moral universalism, America’s “rugged individualism” is instead particularistic. We link this distinctive cultural configuration to the country’s frontier history. The frontier favored self-reliance, but also rewarded cooperation, which could only be sustained through strong, local group identities. We show that counties with longer frontier history are more particularistic, displaying stronger opposition to federal taxes relative to state taxes, stronger communal values, less charitable giving to distant counties, and fewer online friendships with people in distant counties. At the same time, connections across counties display assortative matching on frontier history, highlighting the important role of culture in bridging disparate areas of the country. Overall, our results shed new light on moral values and the divergence of American and European individualism.
papers.zh_title: “粗犷个人主义”的道德价值观
papers.zh_abstract: 美国是世界上最个人主义的社会之一。然而，与充满道德普遍主义的西欧个人主义不同，美国的“粗犷个人主义”反而是特殊主义的。我们将这种独特的文化形态与该国的边疆历史联系起来。边疆地区崇尚自力更生，但也奖励合作，而合作只能通过强大的本地群体认同来维持。我们表明，边疆历史更长的县更倾向于特殊主义：它们表现出对联邦税收相对于州税收更强烈的反对、更强的社群价值观、对遥远县的慈善捐赠更少，以及与遥远县居民的在线友谊更少。同时，各县之间的关联在边疆历史上表现出分类匹配，这凸显了文化在连接国家不同地区方面的重要作用。总体而言，我们的研究结果为道德价值观以及美国和欧洲个人主义的分歧提供了新的见解。

papers.title: Predicting Police Misconduct
papers.authors: Greg Stoddard, Dylan J. Fitzpatrick, Jens Ludwig
papers.abstract: Whether police misconduct can be prevented depends partly on whether it can be predicted. We show police misconduct is partially predictable and that estimated misconduct risk is not simply an artifact of measurement error or a proxy for officer activity. We also show many officers at risk of on-duty misconduct have elevated off-duty risk too, suggesting a potential link between accountability and officer wellness. We show that targeting preventive interventions even with a simple prediction model – number of past complaints, which is not as predictive as machine learning but lower-cost to deploy – has marginal value of public funds of infinity.
papers.zh_title: 预测警察不当行为
papers.zh_abstract: 警察不当行为能否被预防，部分取决于它能否被预测。我们表明警察不当行为是部分可预测的，并且估计的不当行为风险并非仅仅是测量误差的产物或警官活动的代理变量。我们还表明，许多有执勤不当行为风险的警官，其非执勤期间的风险也更高，这暗示了问责制与警官福祉之间可能存在联系。我们表明，即使使用简单的预测模型——即过去投诉的数量，其预测能力不如机器学习但部署成本更低——来针对性地实施预防性干预，其公共资金的边际价值也是无穷大的。

papers.title: The Dynamic Effects of Cash Transfers to Agricultural Households
papers.authors: Shilpa Aggarwal, Jenny C. Aker, Dahyeon Jeong, Naresh Kumar, David Sungho Park, Jonathan Robinson, Alan Spearot
papers.abstract: While cash transfers will tautologically increase contemporaneous consumption, it is unclear whether these gains will persist, especially in rural agricultural settings with limited productive investment opportunities. Using bi-monthly survey data from recipients of a large, unconditional cash transfer in Liberia and Malawi, we document sustained food security improvements until 1.5-2 years after disbursement, driven by increased farm investments and production. We additionally document reductions in casual off-farm labor, increases in psychological well-being and, in Liberia, a decline in IPV. We find similar increases in harvest output across different transfer sizes. Those receiving larger transfers spend more on housing and durables.
papers.zh_title: 现金转移对农业家庭的动态效应
papers.zh_abstract: 虽然现金转移在逻辑上会增加当期消费，但这些收益能否持续尚不清楚，尤其是在生产性投资机会有限的农村农业环境中。利用来自利比里亚和马拉维大规模无条件现金转移接受者的双月调查数据，我们记录了在发放后1.5至2年内持续的粮食安全改善，这由农业投资和产量的增加所驱动。我们还记录了非农临时劳动的减少、心理福祉的提升，以及在利比里亚，亲密伴侣暴力的下降。我们发现不同转移规模下的收获产量增长相似。接受较大转移的家庭在住房和耐用品上支出更多。

papers.title: Artificial Intelligence and the Skill Premium
papers.authors: David E. Bloom, Klaus Prettner, Jamel Saadaoui, Mario Veruete
papers.abstract: How will the emergence of ChatGPT and other forms of artificial intelligence (AI) affect the skill premium? To address this question, we propose a nested constant elasticity of substitution production function that distinguishes among three types of capital: traditional physical capital (machines, assembly lines), industrial robots, and AI. Following the literature, we assume that industrial robots predominantly substitute for low-skill workers, whereas AI mainly helps to perform the tasks of high-skill workers. We show that AI reduces the skill premium as long as it is more substitutable for high-skill workers than low-skill workers are for high-skill workers.
papers.zh_title: 人工智能与技能溢价
papers.zh_abstract: ChatGPT及其他形式人工智能的出现将如何影响技能溢价？为回答这个问题，我们提出一个嵌套的恒定替代弹性生产函数，该函数区分了三种资本类型：传统实物资本（机器、装配线）、工业机器人和人工智能。遵循文献，我们假设工业机器人主要替代低技能工人，而人工智能主要帮助执行高技能工人的任务。我们表明，只要人工智能对高技能工人的可替代性高于低技能工人对高技能工人的可替代性，人工智能就会降低技能溢价。

papers.title: Integrating Minorities in the Classroom: The Role of Students, Parents, and Teachers
papers.authors: Alexandra de Gendre, Krzysztof Karbownik, Nicolás Salamanca, Yves Zenou
papers.abstract: We develop a multi-agent model of the education production function where investments of students, parents, and teachers are linked to the presence of minorities in the classroom. We then test the key implications of this model using rich survey data and a mandate to randomly assign students to classrooms. Consistent with our model, we show that exposure to minority peers decreases student effort, parental investments, and teacher engagement and it results in lower student test scores. Observables correlated with minority status explain less than a third of the reduced-form test score effect while over a third can be descriptively attributed to endogenous responses of the agents.
papers.zh_title: 在课堂中融合少数群体：学生、家长和教师的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个教育生产函数的多主体模型，其中学生、家长和教师的投资与课堂中少数群体的存在相关联。然后，我们利用丰富的调查数据和一项强制将学生随机分配到班级的规定，检验了该模型的关键含义。与我们的模型一致，我们表明接触少数群体同辈会降低学生的努力程度、家长的投资和教师的参与度，并导致学生考试成绩下降。与少数群体地位相关的可观测变量解释了简化形式考试成绩效应的不到三分之一，而超过三分之一可以描述性地归因于各主体的内生反应。

papers.title: Early Predictors of Racial Disparities in Criminal Justice Involvement
papers.authors: Andrew Jordan, Ezra Karger, Derek Neal
papers.abstract: We examine ten cohorts of male eighth graders in public schools in Chicago, IL: 1995-2004. We find large racial disparities in academic achievement, socioeconomic status (SES), and adult criminal justice involvement. Our measures of SES and academic achievement are strong predictors of future felony arraignment and incarceration, even among students of the same race who attend the same school, but mappings between student characteristics and adult criminal justice outcomes vary greatly by race. Our measures of early achievement, SES, and early environment predict only small portions of the overall Black-Hispanic disparities in adult criminal justice involvement but typically predict at least half of Black-White criminal justice disparities and over eighty percent of Hispanic-White disparities. The relationships between various value-added measures of eighth-grade school quality and future criminal justice outcomes also vary by race. Schools that excel at promoting on-time matriculation from eighth grade to high school significantly reduce rates of criminal justice involvement among Black males.
papers.zh_title: 刑事司法参与中种族差异的早期预测因素
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了伊利诺伊州芝加哥市公立学校1995年至2004年十届八年级男生群体。我们发现学业成绩、社会经济地位和成年后刑事司法参与方面存在巨大的种族差异。我们的社会经济地位和学业成绩指标是未来重罪传讯和监禁的有力预测因素，即使在就读同一所学校的同种族学生中也是如此，但学生特征与成年刑事司法结果之间的映射关系因种族而异。我们的早期成绩、社会经济地位和早期环境指标仅能预测整体黑人与西班牙裔成年刑事司法参与差异的一小部分，但通常能预测至少一半的黑人与白人刑事司法差异，以及超过百分之八十的西班牙裔与白人差异。八年级学校质量的各种增值指标与未来刑事司法结果之间的关系也因种族而异。在促进八年级学生按时升入高中方面表现出色的学校，显著降低了黑人男性的刑事司法参与率。

papers.title: The Negligible Effect of Free Contraception on Fertility: Experimental Evidence from Burkina Faso
papers.authors: Pascaline Dupas, Seema Jayachandran, Adriana Lleras-Muney, Pauline Rossi
papers.abstract: We conducted a randomized trial among 14,545 households in rural Burkina Faso to test the oft-cited hypothesis that limited access to contraception is an important driver of high fertility rates in West Africa. We do not find support for this hypothesis. Women who were given free access to medical contraception for three years did not have lower birth rates; we can reject even modest effects. We cross-randomized additional interventions to address possible inefficiencies leading to low demand for free contraception, specifically misperceptions about the child mortality rate, limited exposure to opposing views about family size and contraception, and social pressure. Free contraception did not influence fertility even in combination with these other interventions.
papers.zh_title: 免费避孕对生育率的可忽略影响：来自布基纳法索的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在布基纳法索农村地区对14,545户家庭进行了一项随机试验，以检验一个常被引用的假设：避孕药具获取受限是西非高生育率的重要驱动因素。我们没有找到支持这一假设的证据。获得免费医疗避孕药具三年的女性并未降低生育率；我们甚至可以排除适度的效应。我们交叉随机化了额外的干预措施，以解决可能导致对免费避孕需求低下的潜在低效率问题，具体包括对儿童死亡率的误解、接触关于家庭规模和避孕的反对意见有限，以及社会压力。即使与这些其他干预措施相结合，免费避孕也未影响生育率。

papers.title: Cities as Engines of Opportunities: Evidence from Brazil
papers.authors: Radu Barza, Edward L. Glaeser, César A. Hidalgo, Martina Viarengo
papers.abstract: Are developing-world cities engines of opportunities for low-wage earners? In this study, we track a cohort of young low-income workers in Brazil for thirteen years to explore the contribution of factors such as industrial structure and skill segregation on upward income mobility. We find that cities in the south of Brazil are more effective engines of upward mobility than cities in the north and that these differences appear to be primarily related to the exposure of unskilled workers to skilled co-workers, which in turn reflects industry composition and complexity. Our results suggest that the positive effects of urbanization depend on the skilled and unskilled working together, a form of integration that is more prevalent in the cities of southern Brazil than in northern cities. This segregation, which can decline with specialization and the division of labor, may hinder the ability of Brazil's northern cities to offer more opportunities for escaping poverty.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, LS；JEL：D63, I24, N90, N96, O10, O11, O18, O43, R10, R23
papers.zh_title: 城市作为机遇引擎：来自巴西的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 发展中国家的城市是低收入者向上流动的引擎吗？在本研究中，我们追踪了巴西一批年轻低收入工作者长达十三年，以探索产业结构、技能隔离等因素对向上收入流动性的贡献。我们发现，巴西南部城市比北部城市更有效地充当了向上流动的引擎，这些差异似乎主要与非熟练工人接触熟练同事有关，而这又反映了产业构成和复杂性。我们的结果表明，城市化的积极效应取决于熟练工人和非熟练工人共同工作，这种融合形式在巴西南部城市比北部城市更为普遍。这种隔离可能随着专业化和劳动分工而减弱，但也可能阻碍巴西北部城市提供更多摆脱贫困机会的能力。

papers.title: Identifying the Cumulative Causal Effect of a Non-Binary Treatment from a Binary Instrument
papers.authors: Vedant Vohra, Jacob Goldin
papers.abstract: The effect of a treatment may depend on the intensity with which it is administered. We study identification of ordered treatment effects with a binary instrument, focusing on the effect of moving from the treatment’s minimum to maximum intensity. With arbitrary heterogeneity across units, standard IV assumptions (Angrist and Imbens, 1995) do not constrain this parameter, even among compliers. We consider a range of additional assumptions and show how they can deliver sharp, informative bounds. We illustrate our approach with two applications, involving the effect of (1) health insurance on emergency department usage, and (2) attendance in an after-school program on student learning.
papers.zh_title: 从二元工具变量识别非二元处理的累积因果效应
papers.zh_abstract: 处理效应可能取决于其施加强度。我们研究使用二元工具变量识别有序处理效应，重点关注从处理的最小强度移动到最大强度的效应。在存在任意单位异质性的情况下，即使是在依从者中，标准工具变量假设（Angrist and Imbens, 1995）也无法约束该参数。我们考虑一系列额外假设，并展示它们如何能够提供尖锐且信息丰富的边界。我们通过两个应用来说明我们的方法，涉及（1）医疗保险对急诊科使用的影响，以及（2）参加课后项目对学生学习的影响。

papers.title: Disentangling Exploration from Exploitation
papers.authors: Alessandro Lizzeri, Eran Shmaya, Leeat Yariv
papers.abstract: Starting from Robbins (1952), the literature on experimentation via multi-armed bandits has wed exploration and exploitation. Nonetheless, in many applications, agents' exploration and exploitation need not be intertwined: a policymaker may assess new policies different than the status quo; an investor may evaluate projects outside her portfolio. We characterize the optimal experimentation policy when exploration and exploitation are disentangled in the case of Poisson bandits, allowing for general news structures. The optimal policy features complete learning asymptotically, exhibits lots of persistence, but cannot be identified by an index à la Gittins. Disentanglement is particularly valuable for intermediate parameter values.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, IO, LE, LS, ME, POL；JEL：C73, D81, D83, O35
papers.zh_title: 将探索与利用分离开来
papers.zh_abstract: 从Robbins（1952）开始，关于通过多臂老虎机进行实验的文献将探索与利用结合在一起。然而，在许多应用中，主体的探索和利用不必交织在一起：政策制定者可以评估不同于现状的新政策；投资者可以评估其投资组合之外的项目。我们刻画了在探索与利用分离的情况下，针对泊松老虎机并允许一般新闻结构的最优实验政策。最优政策在渐近意义上具有完全学习的特征，表现出很强的持续性，但无法通过Gittins指数来识别。分离对于中间参数值尤其有价值。

papers.title: The Effects of Mental Health Interventions on Labor Market Outcomes in Low- and Middle-Income Countries
papers.authors: Crick Lund, Kate Orkin, Marc Witte, John H. Walker, Thandi Davies, Johannes Haushofer, Sarah Murray, Judy Bass, Laura Murray, Wietse Tol, Vikram H. Patel
papers.abstract: Mental health conditions are prevalent but rarely treated in low- and middle-income countries (LMICs). Little is known about how these conditions affect economic participation. This paper shows that treating mental health conditions substantially improves recipients’ capacity to work in these contexts. First, we perform a systematic review and meta-analysis of all randomized controlled trials (RCTs) ever conducted that evaluate treatments for mental ill-health and measure economic outcomes in LMICs. On average, treating common mental disorders like depression with psychotherapy improves an aggregate of labor market outcomes made up of employment, time spent working, capacity to work and job search by 0.16 standard deviations. Treating severe mental disorders, like schizophrenia, improves the aggregate by 0.30 standard deviations, but effects are noisily estimated. Second, we build a new dataset, pooling all available microdata from RCTs using the most common trial design: studies of psychotherapy in LMICs that treated depression and measured days participants were unable to work in the past month. We observe comparable treatment effects on mental health and work outcomes in this sub-sample of highly similar studies. We also show evidence consistent with mental health being the mechanism through which psychotherapy improves work outcomes.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EH, LS；JEL：D9, I14, J24, O1
papers.zh_title: 中低收入国家心理健康干预对劳动力市场结果的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 心理健康问题在中低收入国家普遍存在，但很少得到治疗。关于这些问题如何影响经济参与，我们知之甚少。本文表明，在这些背景下，治疗心理健康问题能显著改善受益者的工作能力。首先，我们对所有在中低收入国家评估心理健康问题治疗并衡量经济结果的随机对照试验进行了系统回顾和荟萃分析。平均而言，用心理疗法治疗抑郁症等常见精神障碍，能使由就业、工作时间、工作能力和求职构成的劳动力市场综合指标提高0.16个标准差。治疗精神分裂症等严重精神障碍，能使该综合指标提高0.30个标准差，但效应估计的噪声较大。其次，我们构建了一个新数据集，汇集了来自使用最常见试验设计（即在中低收入国家进行的、治疗抑郁症并衡量参与者过去一个月无法工作天数的心理疗法研究）的随机对照试验的所有可用微观数据。在这个高度相似的研究子样本中，我们观察到心理健康和工作结果的治疗效果具有可比性。我们还展示了与心理健康是心理疗法改善工作结果的机制相一致的证据。

papers.title: Why Doesn’t the United States Have National Health Insurance? The Political Role of the American Medical Association
papers.authors: Marcella Alsan, Yousra Neberai
papers.abstract: This study examines a critical juncture in the development of health insurance in the United States. We examine how the American Medical Association (AMA) reduced support for National Health Insurance (NHI) in the immediate post-World War II period and contributed to the entrenchment of private insurance coverage. The AMA’s national campaign against NHI - directed by the country’s first political public relations firm, Whitaker & Baxter’s Campaigns, Inc. - implemented a two-pronged strategy: (1) persuade the American voter that supporting NHI was equivalent to supporting socialism; and, (2) enroll working-age adults (and eventually their dependents) in private health insurance plans to reduce demand for a public scheme. We bring together archival data from several novel sources documenting Campaign operations, which involved leveraging mass communications, the professional network, and the social standing of physicians. We find a one standard deviation increase in Campaign exposure explains approximately 20% of the increase in private health insurance enrollment and a similar decline in public opinion support for legislation enacting NHI. We present several findings that suggest the Campaign influenced policymaking directly: via passage of Campaign-drafted resolutions by civic organizations, adoption of Campaign language in Congress, and donations to the 1952 Republican presidential candidate through an AMA-WB political action committee. These findings suggest that the rise of private health insurance in the U.S. was not solely due to wartime wage freezes, collective bargaining, or favorable tax treatment. Rather, it was also enabled by an interest group-financed Campaign.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, POL；JEL：D72, I14, I18, N34, N42
papers.zh_title: 为什么美国没有全民健康保险？美国医学会的政治角色
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究考察了美国健康保险发展中的一个关键节点。我们研究了美国医学会（AMA）如何在二战刚结束后的时期减少了对全民健康保险（NHI）的支持，并促成了私人保险覆盖的巩固。AMA反对NHI的全国性运动——由该国第一家政治公关公司Whitaker & Baxter's Campaigns, Inc.指导——实施了一项双管齐下的策略：（1）说服美国选民，支持NHI等同于支持社会主义；（2）让工作年龄成年人（以及最终他们的家属）加入私人健康保险计划，以减少对公共计划的需求。我们汇集了来自多个新来源的档案数据，记录了Campaign的运作，该运作利用了大众传播、专业网络和医生的社会地位。我们发现，Campaign暴露度每增加一个标准差，可以解释私人健康保险参保率约20%的增长，以及公众对实施NHI立法的支持率类似的下降。我们提出了几项发现，表明Campaign直接影响了政策制定：通过民间组织通过Campaign起草的决议、国会采纳Campaign的语言、以及通过一个AMA-WB政治行动委员会向1952年共和党总统候选人捐款。这些发现表明，美国私人健康保险的兴起并非仅仅由于战时工资冻结、集体谈判或优惠税收待遇。相反，它也是由一个利益集团资助的Campaign促成的。

papers.title: (Pro-) Social Learning and Strategic Disclosure
papers.authors: Roland Bénabou, Nikhil Vellodi
papers.abstract: We study a sequential experimentation model with endogenous feedback. Agents choose between a safe and risky action, the latter generating stochastic rewards. When making this choice, each agent is selfishly motivated (myopic). However, agents can disclose their experiences to a public record, and when doing so are pro-socially motivated (forward-looking). When prior uncertainty is large, disclosure is both polarized (only extreme signals are disclosed) and positively biased (no feedback is bad news). When prior uncertainty is small, a novel form of unraveling occurs and disclosure is complete. Subsidizing disclosure costs can perversely lead to less disclosure but more experimentation.
papers.zh_title: （亲）社会学习与策略性披露
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个具有内生反馈的序贯实验模型。代理人需要在安全行动和风险行动之间做出选择，后者会产生随机回报。在做出这一选择时，每个代理人都受自私动机驱动（短视）。然而，代理人可以将他们的经历披露到公共记录中，并且在这样做时受亲社会动机驱动（前瞻性）。当先验不确定性很大时，披露既是两极化的（只有极端信号被披露）也是正向偏倚的（没有反馈是坏消息）。当先验不确定性很小时，会出现一种新颖形式的“拆解”现象，披露是完全的。补贴披露成本可能会反常地导致更少的披露但更多的实验。

papers.title: Inflation's Impact on American Households
papers.authors: David Altig, Alan J. Auerbach, Erin F. Eidschun, Laurence J. Kotlikoff, Victor Yifan Ye
papers.abstract: The post-COVID price surge has reignited interest in inflation’s impact on American households. Even if anticipated and with full market adjustments, inflation affects households through its interaction with the fiscal system, which is the focus of this paper. Inflation affects households through its interaction with the fiscal. We run the 2019 Survey of Consumer Finances (SCF), assuming different inflation rates, through the Fiscal Analyzer (TFA) – a life cycle, consumption-smoothing tool incorporating all major federal and state fiscal programs. Before doing so, we adjust the SCF data to neutralize inflation’s non-fiscal effects. A permanent increase in the inflation rate from zero to 10 percent reduces median lifetime spending by 6.82 percent. This impact is smaller – 4.74 percent – when fiscal COLAs aren’t lagged. But the big stories are the progressivity of inflation’s increase in net taxation, its age pattern, and its heterogeneity. The 15.9 percent median lifetime spending loss of the top 1 percent from 10 percent inflation is roughly 2.5 times that of the bottom quintile. Middle aged households are hit far harder because they have more asset income, which, with inflation, is taxed at a higher effective rate. The 25th percentile of spending changes is a reduction of 9.84 percent. The 75th percentile change is still a reduction of 4.83 percent. The maximum spending decline (increase) across all households is 64.9 (46.7) percent. Thus, the distribution of welfare is highly sensitive to significant, ongoing inflation.
papers.zh_title: 通胀对美国居民家庭的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 新冠疫情后的价格飙升重新激发了人们对通胀影响美国居民家庭的兴趣。即使通胀被预期到且市场进行了充分调整，它仍会通过与财政体系的相互作用来影响家庭，这正是本文的焦点。我们利用2019年消费者金融调查（SCF）数据，假设不同的通胀率，通过财政分析器（TFA）——一个包含所有主要联邦和州财政项目的生命周期消费平滑工具——进行分析。在此之前，我们对SCF数据进行了调整，以消除通胀的非财政效应。通胀率从零永久性上升至10%，会使终身中位支出下降6.82%。当财政生活成本调整（COLA）不存在滞后时，这一影响较小，为4.74%。但关键问题在于通胀导致净税收增加的累进性、其年龄模式及其异质性。对于收入最高的1%人群，10%的通胀导致终身中位支出损失15.9%，大约是收入最低五分之一人群的2.5倍。中年家庭受到的冲击要大得多，因为他们拥有更多的资产收入，而在通胀下，这些收入面临更高的有效税率。支出变化的第25百分位是下降9.84%，第75百分位仍然是下降4.83%。所有家庭中，最大支出下降（上升）幅度为64.9%（46.7%）。因此，福利分配对持续的高通胀高度敏感。

papers.title: There is No Excess Volatility Puzzle
papers.authors: Andrew Atkeson, Jonathan Heathcote, Fabrizio Perri
papers.abstract: We present two valuation models that we use to account for the annual data on price per share and dividends per share for the CRSP Value-Weighted Index from 1929-2023. We show that it is a simple matter to account for these data based purely on a model of variation over time in the expected ratio of dividends per share to aggregate consumption under two conditions. First, investors must receive news shocks regarding the expected ratio of dividends per share to aggregate consumption in the long run. Second, the discount rate used to evaluate the impact of this news on the current price per share must be low. We use the approach of Campbell and Shiller (1987) and Campbell and Shiller (1988) to argue that the cash flow news in our model is not a stand-in for changes in expected returns: with our model parameters, returns are not predictable and price dividend spreads and ratios predict dividend growth at model-implied magnitudes. We illustrate which parameter choices account for differences between our results and prior findings in the literature. We conclude that the answer to Shiller (1981)’s question “Do stock prices move too much to be justified by subsequent movements in dividends?” is “not necessarily”.
papers.zh_title: 不存在过度波动之谜
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了两个估值模型，用于解释1929年至2023年CRSP市值加权指数的每股价格和每股股息的年度数据。我们证明，仅基于每股股息与总消费之比的预期随时间变化的模型，在满足两个条件时，就能轻易解释这些数据。首先，投资者必须接收到关于长期内每股股息与总消费之比的预期的新息冲击。其次，用于评估该新息对当前每股价格影响的贴现率必须较低。我们采用Campbell和Shiller（1987）以及Campbell和Shiller（1988）的方法，论证我们模型中的现金流新息并非预期收益变化的替代品：在我们的模型参数下，收益不可预测，而价格股息差和比率以模型隐含的幅度预测股息增长。我们说明了哪些参数选择可以解释我们的结果与文献中先前发现之间的差异。我们得出结论，对于Shiller（1981）的问题“股票价格是否波动过大，以至于无法用随后的股息变动来证明？”，答案是“未必”。

papers.title: Dynamic Efficiency and Pricing of Innovations with Insurance: The Case for Gene Therapies
papers.authors: Anirban Basu
papers.abstract: I demonstrate that to achieve dynamic efficiency, the optimal share of total surplus that a social payer should transfer to an innovating industry for a current asset depends on the marginal product of investment and the share of profits invested by the industry on the current asset and not on returns from future innovations. This insight arises from using a dynamic multi-period model of optimal transfers rather than a static two-period model with one optimal transfer, as used in the literature. I delve into the implications for alternative pricing of healthcare innovations - value-based prices using cost-effectiveness analysis, monopoly prices under the social demand curve, and monopoly profit preserving prices under insurance – for surplus appropriation by the innovating industry. I also explore how alternative financing mechanisms used by social payers and the demand uncertainty that innovators face impact this appropriation share. I illustrate these concepts with a substantive example of pricing gene therapy for sickle cell disease in the United States
papers.zh_title: 动态效率与创新定价（含保险）：以基因疗法为例
papers.zh_abstract: 我证明，为了实现动态效率，社会支付方应将当前资产总剩余的最优份额转移给创新行业，该份额取决于投资的边际产品以及该行业将利润投资于当前资产的比例，而非未来创新的回报。这一见解源于使用动态多期最优转移模型，而非文献中使用的静态两期单次最优转移模型。我深入探讨了替代性医疗创新定价方式——基于成本效益分析的价值定价、社会需求曲线下的垄断定价以及保险下的垄断利润维持定价——对创新行业剩余获取的影响。我还探讨了社会支付方使用的替代性融资机制以及创新者面临的需求不确定性如何影响这一获取份额。我以美国镰状细胞病基因疗法定价的具体实例来说明这些概念。

papers.title: Credit, Land Speculation, and Long-Run Economic Growth
papers.authors: Tomohiro Hirano, Joseph E. Stiglitz
papers.abstract: This paper analyses the impact of credit expansions arising from increases in collateral values or lower interest rate policies on long-run productivity and economic growth in a two-sector endogenous growth economy with credit frictions, with the driver of growth lying in one sector (manufacturing) but not in the other (real estate). We show that it is not so much aggregate credit expansion that matters for long-run productivity and economic growth but sectoral credit expansions. Credit expansions associated mainly with relaxation of real estate financing (capital investment financing) will be productivity-and growth-retarding (enhancing). Without financial regulations, low interest rates and more expansionary monetary policy may so encourage land speculation using leverage that productive capital investment and economic growth are decreased. Unlike in standard macroeconomic models, in ours, the equilibrium price of land will be finite even if the safe rate of interest is less than the rate of output growth.
papers.zh_title: 信贷、土地投机与长期经济增长
papers.zh_abstract: 本文在一个存在信贷摩擦的两部门内生增长经济体中，分析了由抵押品价值上升或低利率政策引发的信贷扩张对长期生产率和经济增长的影响，其中增长动力来自一个部门（制造业）而非另一个部门（房地产）。我们表明，对长期生产率和经济增长起关键作用的并非总体信贷扩张，而是部门信贷扩张。主要与房地产融资放松（资本投资融资放松）相关的信贷扩张将抑制（促进）生产率和增长。在没有金融监管的情况下，低利率和更扩张性的货币政策可能如此鼓励利用杠杆进行土地投机，以至于减少了生产性资本投资和经济增长。与标准宏观经济模型不同，在我们的模型中，即使安全利率低于产出增长率，土地的均衡价格也是有限的。

papers.title: Fiscal Consequences of Central Bank Losses
papers.authors: Stephen G. Cecchetti, Jens Hilscher
papers.abstract: In response to the Global Financial Crisis, central banks engaged in large-scale asset purchases funded by the issuance of reserves. These “unconventional” policies continued during the pandemic, so that by 2022 central banks’ balance sheets had grown up to ten-fold. As a result of rapidly increasing interest rates, these massive portfolios began producing substantial losses. We interpret these losses as fiscal policy consequences of quantitative easing and stress that they must be balanced against the prior benefits of implementing purchase policies. Importantly, losses differ qualitatively depending on whether the central bank chooses to buy domestic or foreign assets, thus resulting in transfers either within or between countries. Effects of losses may differ due to accounting rules (when losses are realized) and when the fiscal authority compensates for losses (the structure of indemnification agreements). Data from the Federal Reserve, the Eurosystem, and the Bank of England show that maximum annual losses are between 0.3 and 1.5 percent of GDP. By contrast, the Swiss National Bank is sustaining losses up to 17 percent of GDP.
papers.zh_title: 中央银行损失的财政后果
papers.zh_abstract: 为应对全球金融危机，中央银行通过发行准备金进行大规模资产购买。这些“非常规”政策在疫情期间得以延续，到2022年，中央银行的资产负债表规模已增长至原来的十倍。由于利率迅速上升，这些庞大的投资组合开始产生巨额亏损。我们将这些损失解释为量化宽松政策的财政后果，并强调必须将其与实施购买政策的事先收益相权衡。重要的是，损失的性质因中央银行选择购买国内资产还是国外资产而有所不同，从而导致国家内部或国家之间的转移。损失的影响可能因会计规则（损失何时实现）以及财政当局何时补偿损失（赔偿协议的结构）而不同。来自美联储、欧元体系和英格兰银行的数据显示，最大年度损失在GDP的0.3%至1.5%之间。相比之下，瑞士国家银行承受的损失高达GDP的17%。

papers.title: Racial Protests and Credit Access
papers.authors: Raffi E. Garcia, Alberto Ortega
papers.abstract: Recent local racial protests and the subsequent national racial justice movement following George Floyd’s death heightened awareness of racial disparities in the US. Analyzing Paycheck Protection Program loans using difference-in-differences and event-study methodologies, we find that local racial protests improve credit access for Black business owners. The increased social media and public attention following George Floyd’s death also positively influenced public perceptions of racial equity, leading to relatively larger loan amounts for Black business owners compared to other racial-ethnic groups. We find implicit and explicit racial biases, including within the finance sector, decreased after Floyd’s death, driving these effects.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EH, PR；JEL：G20, G28, G40, J15, J7, L26
papers.zh_title: 种族抗议与信贷获取
papers.zh_abstract: 乔治·弗洛伊德去世后，近期的地方种族抗议以及随后的全国性种族正义运动提高了人们对美国种族差异的认识。通过使用双重差分法和事件研究法分析薪资保护计划（PPP）贷款，我们发现地方种族抗议改善了黑人企业主的信贷获取。乔治·弗洛伊德去世后社交媒体和公众关注度的增加也积极影响了公众对种族公平的看法，导致黑人企业主获得的贷款金额相对于其他种族-族裔群体更大。我们发现，在弗洛伊德去世后，包括金融部门在内的内隐和外显种族偏见有所减少，从而推动了这些效应。

papers.title: What Drives Investors' Portfolio Choices? Separating Risk Preferences from Frictions
papers.authors: Taha Choukhmane, Tim de Silva
papers.abstract: We study the role of risk preferences and frictions in portfolio choice using variation in 401(k) default options. Patterns of active choice in response to different default funds imply that, absent participation frictions, 94% of investors prefer holding stocks, with an equity share of retirement wealth declining with age—patterns markedly different from observed allocations. We use this quasi-experiment to estimate a life cycle model and find a relative risk aversion of 2.5, EIS of 0.25, and $160 portfolio adjustment cost. Our results suggest that low levels of stock market participation in retirement accounts are due to participation frictions rather than non-standard preferences such as loss-aversion.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, AP, CF；JEL：D14, D15, G0, G11, G40, G5, G51, J32
papers.zh_title: 是什么驱动了投资者的投资组合选择？分离风险偏好与摩擦
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用401(k)默认选项的变化来研究风险偏好和摩擦在投资组合选择中的作用。针对不同默认基金做出的主动选择模式表明，在没有参与摩擦的情况下，94%的投资者偏好持有股票，且退休财富中的股票份额随年龄增长而下降——这些模式与观察到的资产配置截然不同。我们利用这一准实验来估计生命周期模型，发现相对风险厌恶系数为2.5，跨期替代弹性（EIS）为0.25，投资组合调整成本为160美元。我们的结果表明，退休账户中股票市场参与率低是由于参与摩擦，而非损失厌恶等非标准偏好。

papers.title: Gendered Change: 150 Years of Transformation in US Hours
papers.authors: L. Rachel Ngai, Claudia Olivetti, Barbara Petrongolo
papers.abstract: Women's contribution to the economy has been markedly underestimated in predominantly agricultural societies, due to their widespread involvement in unpaid agricultural work. Combining data from the US Census and several early sources, we create a consistent measure of male and female employment and hours for the US for 1870-2019, including paid work and unpaid work in family farms and non-farm businesses. The resulting measure of hours traces a U-shape for women, with a modest decline up to mid-20th century followed by a sustained increase, and a monotonic decline for men. We propose a multisector economy with uneven productivity growth, income effects, and consumption complementarity across sectoral outputs. During early development stages, declining agriculture leads to rising services -- both in the market and the home -- and leisure, reducing market work for both genders. In later stages, structural transformation reallocates labor from manufacturing into services, while marketization reallocates labor from home to market services. Given gender comparative advantages, the first channel is more relevant for men, reducing male hours, while the second channel is more relevant for women, increasing female hours. Our quantitative illustration suggests that structural transformation and marketization can account for the overall decline in market hours from 1880-1950, and one quarter of the rise and decline, respectively, in female and male market hours from 1950-2019.
papers.zh_title: 性别变迁：美国工作时长的150年转型
papers.zh_abstract: 在主要农业社会中，由于女性广泛参与无酬农业劳动，她们对经济的贡献被显著低估。结合美国人口普查数据和多个早期来源，我们为1870-2019年的美国创建了一致的男性和女性就业及工作时长衡量指标，包括有酬工作以及家庭农场和非农企业中的无酬工作。由此得出的女性工作时长呈U形，在20世纪中期之前略有下降，随后持续上升；男性工作时长则呈单调下降。我们提出了一个包含不均匀生产率增长、收入效应以及部门产出间消费互补性的多部门经济体。在早期发展阶段，农业的衰退导致市场服务和家庭服务以及休闲的增加，从而减少了男女双方的市场工作。在后期阶段，结构转型将劳动力从制造业重新配置到服务业，而市场化则将劳动力从家庭服务重新配置到市场服务。鉴于性别比较优势，第一个渠道对男性更为相关，减少了男性工作时长；第二个渠道对女性更为相关，增加了女性工作时长。我们的定量说明表明，结构转型和市场化可以解释1880-1950年市场工作时长的总体下降，以及1950-2019年女性和男性市场工作时长分别上升和下降的四分之一。

papers.title: Old Moats for New Models: Openness, Control, and Competition in Generative AI
papers.authors: Pierre Azoulay, Joshua L. Krieger, Abhishek Nagaraj
papers.abstract: Drawing insights from the field of innovation economics, we discuss the likely competitive environment shaping generative AI advances. Central to our analysis are the concepts of appropriability—whether firms in the industry are able to control the knowledge generated by their innovations—and complementary assets—whether effective entry requires access to specialized infrastructure and capabilities to which incumbent firms can ration access. While the rapid improvements in AI foundation models promise transformative impacts across broad sectors of the economy, we argue that tight control over complementary assets will likely result in a concentrated market structure, as in past episodes of technological upheaval. We suggest the likely paths through which incumbent firms may restrict entry, confining newcomers to subordinate roles and stifling broad sectoral innovation. We conclude with speculations regarding how this oligopolistic future might be averted. Policy interventions aimed at fractionalizing or facilitating shared access to complementary assets might help preserve competition and incentives for extending the generative AI frontier. Ironically, the best hopes for a vibrant open source AI ecosystem might rest on the presence of a “rogue” technology giant, who might choose openness and engagement with smaller firms as a strategic weapon wielded against other incumbents.
papers.zh_title: 新模型的旧护城河：生成式人工智能中的开放性、控制与竞争
papers.zh_abstract: 借鉴创新经济学的见解，我们讨论了可能塑造生成式人工智能进步的竞争环境。我们分析的核心概念是“可占有性”——即行业内的企业能否控制其创新所产生的知识——以及“互补性资产”——即有效进入是否需要获取在位企业可以限制使用的专业基础设施和能力。尽管人工智能基础模型的快速改进有望对经济的广泛领域产生变革性影响，但我们认为，对互补性资产的严格控制可能会导致市场结构集中，正如过去技术剧变时期所发生的那样。我们指出了在位企业可能限制进入、将新来者限制在从属角色并扼杀广泛部门创新的可能路径。最后，我们推测了如何避免这种寡头垄断的未来。旨在分割或促进互补性资产共享获取的政策干预，可能有助于维护竞争和扩展生成式人工智能前沿的激励。具有讽刺意味的是，一个充满活力的开源人工智能生态系统的最佳希望可能在于存在一个“叛逆”的技术巨头，它可能选择开放并与小公司合作，作为对抗其他在位企业的战略武器。

papers.title: Dynamic Collective Action and the Power of Large Numbers
papers.authors: Marco Battaglini, Thomas R. Palfrey
papers.abstract: Collective action problems arise when a group’s common goal can only be achieved if enough members engage in a costly action. We study the equilibrium properties of such problems when decisions are made dynamically over time, delay is costly, and members have heterogeneous and privately known preferences. In these environments, time acts as both a curse and a blessing: individuals have incentives to delay their actions to observe the commitments of others, yet time can also serve as a coordination device. This tension generates an equilibrium dynamic that combines learning about the eventual probability of success with free-riding incentives and coordination challenges. For finite n, dynamic collective decisions are inherently probabilistic: the probability of success is always positive, but there remains a strictly positive probability that the process halts inefficiently—stopping “cold turkey” before success is achieved. As n becomes large, however, the outcome becomes essentially deterministic: success is achieved either almost instantly at minimum cost or not at all, depending on how quickly the threshold number of participants grows with n. We establish this result by uncovering a novel connection between the equilibria of dynamic Bayesian games and the class of optimal static direct mechanisms requiring Honest and Obedient behavior—an insight that may have broader applicability to mechanism design, beyond collective action environments.
papers.zh_title: 动态集体行动与大数力量
papers.zh_abstract: 一个群体中的个体随时间推移决定是否参与集体行动。参与成本是私人信息，并且需要最低数量的参与者才能成功。个体有动机延迟决策以观察他人的承诺，从而导致复杂的均衡动态。虽然成功的概率始终为正，但过程在成功实现之前停止的概率也为正。对于大型群体，成功要么立即实现，要么永远不会实现，这取决于所需参与者数量趋于无穷大的速率。

papers.title: Shrinking the Term Structure
papers.authors: Damir Filipović, Markus Pelger, Ye Ye
papers.abstract: We propose a new framework to explain the factor structure in the full cross section of Treasury bond returns. Our method unifies non-parametric curve estimation with cross-sectional factor modeling. We identify smoothness as a fundamental principle of the term structure of returns. Our approach implies investable factors, which correspond to the optimal spanning basis functions in decreasing order of smoothness. Our factors explain the slope and curvature shapes frequently encountered in PCA. In a comprehensive empirical study, we show that the first four factors explain the time-series variation and risk premia of the term structure of excess returns. Cash flows are covariances as the exposure of bonds to factors is fully explained by cash flow information. We identify a state-dependent complexity premium. The fourth factor, which captures complex shapes of the term structure premium, substantially reduces pricing errors and pays off during recessions.
papers.zh_title: 缩减期限结构
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个新框架来解释国债收益率完整截面中的因子结构。我们的方法将非参数曲线估计与截面因子建模统一起来。我们将平滑性识别为收益率期限结构的一个基本原则。我们的方法隐含了可投资的因子，这些因子对应于按平滑性递减顺序排列的最优跨期基函数。我们的因子解释了主成分分析中经常遇到的斜率和曲率形状。在一项全面的实证研究中，我们表明前四个因子解释了超额收益率期限结构的时间序列变化和风险溢价。现金流是协方差，因为债券对因子的暴露完全由现金流信息解释。我们识别出一个状态依赖的复杂性溢价。第四个因子捕捉了期限结构溢价的复杂形状，显著减少了定价误差，并在经济衰退期间获得回报。

papers.title: Unions, wages and hours
papers.authors: David G. Blanchflower, Alex Bryson
papers.abstract: We examine union-non-union differentials in wages and hours in the United States over the last 50 years using data from the Current Population Survey (CPS). The regression-adjusted difference between union members’ and non-members’ hourly earnings has been falling since the Great Recession. The union differential in weekly wages has been more stable. Although it fell by around 5 log points during COVID it remains 15 log points. This weekly earnings differential arises from both a higher hourly wage of around 10 log points and longer working hours (5 log points). The working hours differential partly reflects unions’ ability to tackle under-employment, such that union workers work closer to the hours they desire than their non-union counterparts. The traditional focus on hourly wage differentials underplays the important role trade unions play in maintaining members’ weekly earnings by ensuring workers receive the paid hours they desire.
papers.zh_title: 工会、工资与工时
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用当前人口调查数据，研究了美国过去50年中工会与非工会成员在工资和工时上的差异。自大衰退以来，工会成员与非成员小时工资的回归调整差异一直在下降。工会成员在周工资上的差异更为稳定。尽管在新冠疫情期间下降了约5个对数点，但仍保持在15个对数点。这种周收入差异源于约10个对数点的小时工资差异和更长的工时（5个对数点）。工时差异部分反映了工会解决就业不足的能力，使得工会工人的工作时间更接近其期望工时，而非工会工人则不然。传统上对小时工资差异的关注低估了工会在确保工人获得期望的带薪工时、从而维持其周收入方面所发挥的重要作用。

papers.title: Inflation and Trading
papers.authors: Philip Schnorpfeil, Michael Weber, Andreas Hackethal
papers.abstract: We study how investors respond to inflation combining a customized survey experiment with trading data at a time of historically high inflation. Investors' beliefs about the stock return-inflation relation are very heterogeneous in the cross section and on average too optimistic. Moreover, many investors appear unaware of inflation-hedging strategies despite being otherwise well-informed about inflation and asset returns. Consequently, whereas exogenous shifts in inflation expectations do not impact return expectations, information on past returns during periods of high inflation leads to negative updating about the perceived stock-return impact of inflation, which feeds into return expectations and subsequent actual trading behavior.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：C93, D14, D83, D84, E22, E31, E44, G11, G51
papers.zh_title: 通胀与交易
papers.zh_abstract: 我们结合定制的调查实验与历史高通胀时期的交易数据，研究投资者如何应对通胀。投资者关于股票收益-通胀关系的信念在横截面上非常异质，且平均而言过于乐观。此外，许多投资者似乎对通胀对冲策略缺乏了解，尽管他们对通胀和资产回报的其他方面信息掌握良好。因此，虽然通胀预期的外生变化不会影响收益预期，但关于高通胀时期历史回报的信息会导致投资者对通胀感知的股票收益影响进行负面更新，这进而影响收益预期和随后的实际交易行为。

papers.title: What Went Wrong with Federal Student Loans?
papers.authors: Adam Looney, Constantine Yannelis
papers.abstract: At a time when the returns to college and graduate school are at historic highs, why do so many students struggle with their student loans? The increase in aggregate student debt and the struggles of today’s student loan borrowers can be traced to changes in federal policies intended to broaden access to federal aid and educational opportunities, and which increased enrollment and borrowing in higher-risk circumstances. Starting in the late 1990s, policymakers weakened regulations that had constrained institutions from enrolling aid-dependent students. This led to rising enrollment of relatively disadvantaged students, but primarily at poor-performing, low-value institutions whose students systematically failed to complete a degree, struggled to repay their loans, defaulted at high rates, and foundered in the job market. As these new borrowers experienced similarly poor outcomes, their loans piled up, loan performance deteriorated, and with it the finances of the federal program. The crisis illustrates the important role that educational institutions play in access to postsecondary education and student outcomes, and difficulty of using broadly-available loans to subsidize investments in education when there is so much heterogeneity in outcomes across institutions and programs and in the ability to repay of students.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, ED, LS, PE；JEL：G0, G5, G50, G59, H81, I20, I22
papers.zh_title: 联邦学生贷款出了什么问题？
papers.zh_abstract: 在大学和研究生教育的回报率处于历史高位之际，为何如此多的学生在偿还学生贷款方面遇到困难？学生债务总额的增加以及当今学生贷款借款人的困境，可以追溯到旨在扩大联邦援助和教育机会获取的联邦政策变化，这些变化增加了高风险情况下的入学率和借贷。从20世纪90年代末开始，政策制定者削弱了此前限制机构招收依赖援助学生的法规。这导致相对弱势学生的入学率上升，但主要是在表现不佳、价值低的院校，这些院校的学生系统性地未能完成学位、难以偿还贷款、违约率高，并且在就业市场上举步维艰。随着这些新借款人经历同样糟糕的结果，他们的贷款堆积起来，贷款表现恶化，联邦项目的财务状况也随之恶化。这场危机说明了教育机构在高等教育入学和学生成果方面的重要作用，以及在院校和项目之间结果以及学生偿还能力存在巨大异质性的情况下，利用广泛可得的贷款来补贴教育投资的困难。

papers.title: Paper Tiger? Chinese Science and Home Bias in Citations
papers.authors: Shumin Qiu, Claudia Steinwender, Pierre Azoulay
papers.abstract: We investigate the phenomenon of home bias in scientific citations, where researchers disproportionately cite work from their own country. We develop a benchmark for expected citations based on the relative size of countries, defining home bias as deviations from this norm. Our findings reveal that China exhibits the largest home bias across all major countries and in nearly all scientific fields studied. This stands in contrast to the pattern of home bias for China’s trade in goods and services, where China does not stand out from most industrialized countries. After adjusting citation counts for home bias, we demonstrate that China’s apparent rise in citation rankings is overstated. Our adjusted ranking places China fourth globally, behind the US, the UK, and Germany, tempering the perception of China’s scientific dominance.
papers.zh_title: 纸老虎？中国科学与引用中的本土偏好
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了科学引用中的本土偏好现象，即研究人员不成比例地引用本国的工作。我们基于国家的相对规模建立了一个预期引用的基准，将偏离这一基准定义为本土偏好。我们的研究结果显示，在所有主要国家和几乎所有研究的科学领域中，中国表现出最大的本土偏好。这与中国商品和服务贸易中的本土偏好模式形成对比，在贸易方面中国并不比大多数工业化国家突出。在根据本土偏好调整引用计数后，我们证明中国在引用排名中的明显上升被夸大了。调整后的排名将中国置于全球第四位，落后于美国、英国和德国，从而缓和了对中国科学主导地位的看法。

papers.title: Shaping Inequality and Intergenerational Persistence of Poverty: Free College or Better Schools
papers.authors: Dirk Krueger, Alexander Ludwig, Irina Popova
papers.abstract: We evaluate the aggregate, distributional and welfare consequences of alternative government education policies to encourage college completion, such as making college free and improving funding for public schooling. To do so, we construct a general equilibrium overlapping generations model with intergenerational linkages, a higher education choice as well as a multi-stage human capital production process during childhood and adolescence with parental and government schooling investments. The model features rich cross-sectional heterogeneity, distinguishes between single and married parents, and is disciplined by US household survey data on income, wealth, education and time use. Studying the transitions induced by unexpected policy reforms we show that the “free college” and the “better schools” reform generate significant welfare gains, which take time to materialize and are lower in general than in partial equilibrium. It is optimal to combine both reforms: tuition subsidies make college affordable even for children from poorer parental backgrounds and better schools increase human capital thereby reducing dropout risk.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EFG, PE；JEL：D15, D31, E24, I24
papers.zh_title: 塑造不平等与贫困的代际持续性：免费大学还是更好的学校
papers.zh_abstract: 我们评估了替代性政府教育政策（如免费大学和改善公立学校资助）在鼓励大学完成方面的总体、分配和福利后果。为此，我们构建了一个具有代际联系、高等教育选择以及儿童和青少年时期多阶段人力资本生产过程的世代交叠一般均衡模型，其中包含父母和政府的学校教育投资。该模型具有丰富的横截面异质性，区分了单亲父母和已婚父母，并受到美国关于收入、财富、教育和时间使用的家庭调查数据的约束。通过研究意外政策改革引发的转型，我们表明“免费大学”和“更好的学校”改革产生了显著的福利收益，这些收益需要时间才能实现，并且通常低于局部均衡中的收益。将两种改革结合起来是最优的：学费补贴使来自贫困家庭背景的儿童也能负担得起大学，而更好的学校则提高了人力资本，从而降低了辍学风险。

papers.title: When Protectionism Kills Talent
papers.authors: Mehmet I. Canayaz, Isil Erel, Umit G. Gurun, Yufeng Wu
papers.abstract: Protectionist policies intended to revitalize US chip manufacturing backfired, ultimately weakening the domestic workforce they aimed to rebuild. Instead of fostering talent growth, these measures resulted in a significant decline in hiring for critical science and engineering roles, particularly in entry-level positions and at firms heavily impacted by tariffs. Companies heavily reliant on foreign talent cut back on domestic recruitment and instead shifted to hiring in countries with more favorable immigration policies. US protectionism also discouraged students from pursuing chip-related degrees, leading to a contraction in the domestic talent pipeline. Our conceptual model, which demonstrates how labor supply constraints and rising costs undermine the effectiveness of protectionism, provides a theoretical foundation for these findings.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, LS, POL；JEL：F16, G15, J21, J23, L1, O3
papers.zh_title: 当保护主义扼杀人才
papers.zh_abstract: 旨在振兴美国芯片制造业的保护主义政策产生了反效果，最终削弱了它们本欲重建的国内劳动力队伍。这些措施非但没有促进人才增长，反而导致关键科学与工程岗位的招聘显著下降，尤其是在初级职位以及受关税影响严重的公司。严重依赖外国人才的企业削减了国内招聘，转而将招聘活动转移到移民政策更友好的国家。美国的保护主义也阻碍了学生攻读芯片相关学位，导致国内人才储备萎缩。我们的概念模型展示了劳动力供给约束和成本上升如何削弱保护主义的有效性，为这些发现提供了理论基础。

papers.title: Sustained Debt Reduction: The Jamaica Exception
papers.authors: Serkan Arslanalp, Barry Eichengreen, Peter Blair Henry
papers.abstract: Reducing high public debts is key for countries seeking to restore fiscal capacity and resilience in the wake of recent crises. But large debt reductions are rare. Jamaica stands out for reducing its debt from 144 percent of GDP to 72 percent over the last decade, a record achieved by running large, persistent primary budget surpluses. Well-designed fiscal rules combined with social partnership agreements making for fiscal ownership are at the root of its achievement.
papers.zh_title: 持续的债务削减：牙买加的特例
papers.zh_abstract: 降低高额公共债务对于各国在近期危机后恢复财政能力和韧性至关重要。但大规模的债务削减十分罕见。牙买加在过去十年中脱颖而出，将其债务从GDP的144%降至72%，这一成就通过持续维持大规模的基本预算盈余实现。精心设计的财政规则与促进财政自主权的社会伙伴关系协议是其成功的根本原因。

papers.title: Wage Insurance for Displaced Workers
papers.authors: Benjamin G. Hyman, Brian K. Kovak, Adam Leive
papers.abstract: Wage insurance provides income support to displaced workers who find reemployment at a lower wage. We analyze wage insurance in the context of the U.S. Trade Adjustment Assistance (TAA) program by merging linked employer-employee Census data to TAA petitions and leveraging a discontinuity in eligibility based on worker age. Wage insurance eligibility increases short-run employment probabilities and leads to higher long-run cumulative earnings. We find shorter non-employment durations largely drive increased long-term earnings among workers eligible for wage insurance. Our results are quantitatively consistent with a standard non-stationary partial equilibrium search model. The program is self-financing even under conservative assumptions.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, ITI, LS, PE；JEL：H50, J64, J65
papers.zh_title: 针对失业工人的工资保险
papers.zh_abstract: 工资保险为那些以较低工资重新就业的失业工人提供收入支持。我们通过将关联的雇主-雇员人口普查数据与贸易调整援助（TAA）申请数据合并，并利用基于工人年龄的资格认定中的不连续性，分析了美国贸易调整援助（TAA）项目背景下的工资保险。工资保险资格提高了短期就业概率，并带来了更高的长期累积收入。我们发现，更短的非就业持续时间在很大程度上推动了有资格获得工资保险的工人长期收入的增加。我们的结果在数量上与标准的非平稳局部均衡搜索模型一致。即使在保守假设下，该项目也能实现自筹资金。

papers.title: The Effects of Emergency Rental Assistance During the Pandemic: Evidence from Four Cities
papers.authors: Robert Collinson, Anthony A. DeFusco, John Eric Humphries, Benjamin J. Keys, David C. Phillips, Vincent Reina, Patrick S. Turner, Winnie van Dijk
papers.abstract: Short-term rental assistance expanded to unprecedented scale during the COVID-19 pandemic. We evaluate five programs distributing over $200 million through lottery, using administrative and survey data to assess effects on rent payment, housing stability, financial distress, and health. Assistance led to increases in rent payment and reduced concerns about eviction, with suggestive improvements in self-reported mental and physical health. In contrast with pre-pandemic emergency rental assistance, we find little effect on housing stability or financial distress. Explanations for these muted effects include: eviction moratoria weakening the link between rent and displacement, expanded safety net programs, and market softening favoring tenants.
papers.zh_title: 疫情期间紧急租金援助的效果：来自四个城市的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 在COVID-19大流行期间，短期租金援助的规模扩大到了前所未有的程度。我们评估了五个通过抽签方式分配超过2亿美元的项目，利用行政和调查数据来评估其对租金支付、住房稳定性、财务困境和健康的影响。援助导致租金支付增加，并减少了对被驱逐的担忧，同时有迹象表明自我报告的心理和身体健康状况有所改善。与大流行前的紧急租金援助相比，我们发现其对住房稳定性或财务困境的影响甚微。对这些微弱效果的解释包括：驱逐禁令削弱了租金与流离失所之间的联系、安全网项目的扩大以及市场疲软有利于租户。

papers.title: Self-fulfilling fluctuations in HANK economies
papers.authors: Sushant Acharya, Jess Benhabib
papers.abstract: We show that in Heterogeneous-Agent New-Keynesian (HANK) economies with countercyclical risk the natural interest rate is endogenous and co-moves with output, leaving the economy sus-ceptible to self-fulfilling fluctuations. Unlike in Representative-Agent New-Keynesian models, the Taylor principle is not sufficient to guarantee uniqueness of equilibrium in HANK if risk is even mildly countercyclical: multiple bounded-equilibria exist, no matter how strongly monetary policy responds to changes in inflation. For an active-monetary policy to eliminate self-fulfilling fluctua-tions, it must stabilize the endogenous natural rate fluctuations. Alternatively, a passive-monetary and active-fiscal regime can also eliminate equilibrium multiplicity.
papers.zh_title: HANK经济体中的自我实现波动
papers.zh_abstract: 我们表明，在具有逆周期风险的异质性代理人新凯恩斯（HANK）经济体中，自然利率是内生的，并与产出共同变动，使经济容易受到自我实现波动的影响。与代表性代理人新凯恩斯模型不同，如果风险即使是温和的逆周期，泰勒原理不足以保证HANK中均衡的唯一性：无论货币政策对通胀变化的反应有多强烈，都存在多个有界均衡。要消除自我实现波动，积极的货币政策必须稳定内生的自然利率波动。或者，消极货币与积极财政的政策组合也能消除均衡的多重性。

papers.title: Estimating the Effects of Political Pressure on the Fed: A Narrative Approach with New Data
papers.authors: Thomas Drechsel
papers.abstract: This paper combines new data and a narrative approach to identify shocks to political pressure on the Federal Reserve. From archival records, I build a data set of personal interactions between U.S. Presidents and Fed officials between 1933 and 2016. Since personal interactions do not necessarily reflect political pressure, I develop a narrative identification strategy based on President Nixon's pressure on Fed Chair Burns. I exploit this narrative through restrictions on a structural vector autoregression that includes the personal interaction data. I find that political pressure shocks (i) increase inflation strongly and persistently, (ii) lead to statistically weak negative effects on activity, (iii) contributed to inflationary episodes outside of the Nixon era, and (iv) transmit differently from standard expansionary monetary policy shocks, by having a stronger effect on inflation expectations. Quantitatively, increasing political pressure by half as much as Nixon, for six months, raises the price level more than 8%.
papers.zh_title: 估算政治压力对美联储的影响：基于新数据的叙事方法
papers.zh_abstract: 本文结合新数据和叙事方法来识别对美联储的政治压力冲击。根据档案记录，我构建了一个1933年至2016年间美国总统与美联储官员之间个人互动的数据集。由于个人互动并不一定反映政治压力，我基于尼克松总统对美联储主席伯恩斯施加压力的叙事，发展了一种叙事识别策略。我通过一个包含个人互动数据的结构向量自回归模型中的约束来利用这一叙事。我发现，政治压力冲击会（i）强烈且持续地推高通胀，（ii）对经济活动产生统计上微弱的负面影响，（iii）在尼克松时代之外的通胀事件中也有所贡献，并且（iv）其传导方式与标准的扩张性货币政策冲击不同，对通胀预期有更强的影响。从数量上看，将政治压力提高到尼克松时期的一半水平，并持续六个月，会使价格水平上升超过8%。

papers.title: A Flexible Model of Food Security: Estimation and Implications for Prediction
papers.authors: Will Davis, Jose O. Xilau, Rusty Tchernis, Christian A. Gregory
papers.abstract: We propose a novel Bayesian Graded Response Model (BGRM) for food security measurement. Our BGRM has several attractive features. It produces continuous food security estimates and measures of estimation uncertainty at the household level. Unlike the USDA’s official measurement model, the BGRM can be used with binary and polytomous items. We further modify our BGRM to include any combination of binary, ordered polytomous, and continuous variables. With data from the 2017-18 National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey (NHANES), we estimate our BGRM for responses to the 10 adult core Food Security Module (FSM) questions. We find substantial uncertainty in household-level estimates, emphasizing the inherent uncertainty of latent trait estimation. We observe overlap in BGRM estimates across USDA-defined food security categories and significant variation within categories. We estimate our model using Current Population Survey (CPS) data as a robustness check. CPS results are qualitatively similar to those from the NHANES, highlighting possible implications for national USDA food security estimates. We explore the BGRM’s ability to explain variations in health outcomes associated with food security and compare results to those produced using standard USDA category definitions. Finally, we demonstrate the BGRM’s flexibility by incorporating an additional continuous variable, the Healthy Eating Index (HEI), into the model, capturing nutrition quality and food security information in a novel latent construct. The adaptability of our BGRM positions it as a versatile tool for measuring food security and other latent traits requiring a diverse range of variable types like nutrition security.
papers.zh_title: 一个灵活的粮食安全模型：估计及其对预测的启示
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种新颖的贝叶斯分级响应模型（BGRM）用于粮食安全测量。我们的BGRM具有几个吸引人的特点。它能在家庭层面产生连续的粮食安全估计值和估计不确定性度量。与美国农业部的官方测量模型不同，BGRM可用于二元和多项项目。我们进一步修改了BGRM，使其能够包含二元、有序多项和连续变量的任意组合。利用2017-18年全国健康与营养检查调查（NHANES）的数据，我们针对10个成人核心粮食安全模块（FSM）问题的回答估计了BGRM。我们发现家庭层面估计存在相当大的不确定性，这突显了潜在特质估计固有的不确定性。我们观察到，在美国农业部定义的粮食安全类别之间，BGRM估计值存在重叠，且类别内部存在显著变异。我们使用当前人口调查（CPS）数据作为稳健性检验来估计模型。CPS的结果在性质上与NHANES的结果相似，凸显了对美国农业部全国粮食安全估计可能产生的影响。我们探讨了BGRM解释与粮食安全相关的健康结果变异的能力，并将结果与使用标准美国农业部类别定义产生的结果进行比较。最后，我们通过将一个额外的连续变量——健康饮食指数（HEI）纳入模型，展示BGRM的灵活性，在一个新颖的潜在构念中捕捉营养质量和粮食安全信息。我们BGRM的适应性使其成为测量粮食安全以及其他需要多种变量类型（如营养安全）的潜在特质的通用工具。

papers.title: Voluntary Emission Restraints in Developing Economies: The Role of Trade Policy
papers.authors: Lorenzo Caliendo, Marcelo Dolabella, Mauricio Moreira, Matthew Murillo, Fernando Parro
papers.abstract: We study the role of trade policy in one of the most pressing climate policy challenges that developing countries face: meeting voluntary emission restraints (VERs). To do so, we develop a general equilibrium trade model that extends Caliendo and Parro (2015) in three dimensions. First, we model extractive sectors that feature a continuum of producers with heterogeneous productivity, demanding labor, dirty natural resources, and intermediate goods from all industries. Second, we consider that production generates different amounts of emissions across sectors and countries, and households experience disutility from carbon emissions, modeled as a pure externality as in Shapiro (2021). Third, we model a general set of taxes along the value chain—on production, intermediate and final consumption, and on labor—which allows for different options of carbon taxes and tariffs that impact emissions and other outcomes in general equilibrium. In our quantitative analysis, we focus on two groups of policies: those that are in the traditional realm of trade policy, related to tariff reform and potential emission biases; and those that combine a Pigouvian carbon tax with border adjustments. Our main findings point to a nuanced role of trade policy as a climate policy in developing economies. Although it is effective in mitigating emission leakages, such leakages are small in magnitude, and border adjustment tariffs have collateral effects in terms of trade declines, and in many countries, welfare losses. These findings contrast with the implications of climate policy in large economies, where emission leakages are much more significant and the impact on trade less costly. Our main results also indicate that carbon taxes and tariffs will not be enough for most developing countries to meet their net-zero emission targets dictated by the VERs.
papers.meta: Programs：ITI；JEL：A10, F13, F18, F6, H23, Q5, Q56
papers.zh_title: 发展中经济体的自愿减排：贸易政策的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了贸易政策在发展中国家面临的最紧迫的气候政策挑战之一——实现自愿减排（VERs）中的作用。为此，我们开发了一个一般均衡贸易模型，该模型在三个维度上扩展了Caliendo和Parro（2015）的研究。首先，我们对采掘部门进行建模，该部门具有一系列生产率异质的生产者，需要劳动力、污染性自然资源以及来自所有行业的中间产品。其次，我们考虑生产在不同部门和不同国家产生不同数量的排放，并且家庭因碳排放而遭受效用损失，这被建模为一种纯粹的外部性，如Shapiro（2021）所述。第三，我们沿价值链对一系列税收进行建模——包括生产税、中间和最终消费税以及劳动税——这允许不同的碳税和关税选项，这些选项在一般均衡中影响排放和其他结果。在我们的定量分析中，我们关注两类政策：一类属于传统贸易政策领域，涉及关税改革和潜在的排放偏差；另一类则将庇古税式的碳税与边境调整相结合。我们的主要发现指出了贸易政策作为发展中国家气候政策的一个微妙作用。尽管它在减轻排放泄漏方面是有效的，但这种泄漏的规模很小，而且边境调整关税在贸易下降以及许多国家的福利损失方面具有附带效应。这些发现与大型经济体中气候政策的含义形成对比，在大型经济体中，排放泄漏更为显著，对贸易的影响成本也更低。我们的主要结果还表明，对于大多数发展中国家而言，碳税和关税不足以使其达到自愿减排所规定的净零排放目标。

papers.title: Designing Dynamic Reassignment Mechanisms: Evidence from GP Allocation
papers.authors: Ingrid Huitfeldt, Victoria Marone, Daniel C. Waldinger
papers.abstract: Many centralized assignment systems seek to not only provide good matches for participants’ current needs, but also to accommodate changes in preferences and circumstances. We study the problem of designing a dynamic reassignment mechanism in the context of Norway’s system for allocating patients to general practitioners (GPs). We provide direct evidence of misallocation under the current system––patients sitting on waitlists for each others’ GPs, but who cannot trade––and analyze an alternative mechanism that adapts the Top-Trading Cycles (TTC) algorithm to a dynamic environment. In contrast to the static case, dynamic TTC may leave some agents worse off relative to a status quo where trades are not permitted, introducing novel concerns about fairness. We empirically evaluate how this mechanism would perform by estimating a structural model of switching behavior and GP choice. While introducing TTC would on average reduce waiting times and increase patient welfare––with especially large benefits for female patients and recent movers––patients endowed with undesirable GPs would be harmed. Adjustments to the priority system can avoid harming this group while preserving most of the gains from TTC.
papers.zh_title: 设计动态重新分配机制：来自全科医生分配的实证证据
papers.zh_abstract: 许多集中分配系统不仅旨在为参与者的当前需求提供良好匹配，还需适应偏好和情况的变化。我们以挪威将患者分配给全科医生的系统为背景，研究动态重新分配机制的设计问题。我们提供了当前系统下分配不当的直接证据——患者彼此在对方的全科医生候补名单上，却无法进行交换——并分析了一种将顶级交易循环算法应用于动态环境的替代机制。与静态情况相比，动态顶级交易循环可能使某些参与者的境况比不允许交易的状态更差，从而引发关于公平性的新担忧。我们通过估计一个关于转换行为和全科医生选择的结构模型，实证评估了该机制的表现。虽然引入顶级交易循环平均而言会减少等待时间并提高患者福利——对女性患者和新搬来者尤其有利——但被分配到不理想全科医生的患者将受到损害。对优先级系统的调整可以避免损害这一群体，同时保留顶级交易循环的大部分收益。

papers.title: Impact of Retail CBDC on Digital Payments, and Bank Deposits: Evidence from India
papers.authors: Marco Di Maggio, Pulak Ghosh, Soumya Kanti Ghosh, Andrew Wu
papers.abstract: Interest in central bank digital currencies (CBDCs) has been burgeoning with 134 countries now exploring its implementation. In December 2022, India started its CBDC pilot program to continue its transition towards a digitized payments economy. This paper presents the first empirical analysis utilizing detailed transaction data to explore the dynamics between CBDCs and existing digital payment methods, as well as the implications of increased CBDC usage on traditional bank deposits. Our findings reveal that policies which increase transaction costs for current digital payment methods catalyze a substitution effect, bolstering CBDC adoption. Furthermore, an uptick in CBDC usage is associated with a notable decline in bank, cash, and savings deposits, suggesting potential paths to bank disintermediation. This study contributes critical insights into the evolving competition between digital currencies and established financial infrastructures, highlighting the transformative potential of CBDCs on the broader economy.
papers.zh_title: 零售央行数字货币对数字支付和银行存款的影响：来自印度的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 随着134个国家现在正在探索央行数字货币的实施，对其的兴趣正在迅速增长。2022年12月，印度启动了央行数字货币试点项目，以继续其向数字化支付经济的转型。本文首次利用详细的交易数据进行实证分析，探讨央行数字货币与现有数字支付方式之间的动态关系，以及央行数字货币使用增加对传统银行存款的影响。我们的研究结果表明，提高现有数字支付方式交易成本的政策会催化替代效应，促进央行数字货币的采用。此外，央行数字货币使用量的增加与银行、现金和储蓄存款的显著下降相关，这表明了银行去中介化的潜在路径。本研究为数字货币与既定金融基础设施之间不断演变的竞争提供了关键见解，突显了央行数字货币对更广泛经济的变革潜力。

papers.title: A Sharp Test for the Judge Leniency Design
papers.authors: Mohamed Coulibaly, Yu-Chin Hsu, Ismael Mourifié, Yuanyuan Wan
papers.abstract: We propose a new specification test to assess the validity of the judge leniency design. We characterize a set of sharp testable implications, which exploit all the relevant information in the observed data distribution to detect violations of the judge leniency design assumptions. The proposed sharp test is asymptotically valid and consistent and will not make discordant recommendations. When the judge’s leniency design assumptions are rejected, we propose a way to salvage the model using partial monotonicity and exclusion assumptions, under which a variant of the Local Instrumental Variable (LIV) estimand can recover the Marginal Treatment Effect. Simulation studies show our test outperforms existing non-sharp tests by significant margins. We apply our test to assess the validity of the judge leniency design using data from Stevenson (2018), and it rejects the validity for three crime categories: robbery, drug selling, and drug possession.
papers.zh_title: 法官宽大处理设计的严格检验
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种新的设定检验，以评估法官宽大处理设计的有效性。我们刻画了一组严格的检验含义，这些含义利用观测数据分布中的所有相关信息来检测对法官宽大处理设计假设的违反。所提出的严格检验是渐近有效且一致的，并且不会给出不一致的建议。当法官宽大处理设计假设被拒绝时，我们提出了一种利用部分单调性和排除性假设来挽救模型的方法，在此假设下，局部工具变量估计量的一个变体可以恢复边际处理效应。模拟研究表明，我们的检验在显著程度上优于现有的非严格检验。我们使用Stevenson（2018）的数据应用我们的检验来评估法官宽大处理设计的有效性，结果拒绝了抢劫、毒品销售和毒品持有这三个犯罪类别的有效性。

papers.title: Can Gun Violence be Deterred at Low Cost? Evidence from a Randomized Experiment in New York City
papers.authors: Oludamilare Aboaba, Aaron Chalfin, Michael LaForest Tucker, Lucie Parker, Patrick Sharkey
papers.abstract: Can gun violence be deterred at low cost? We report the results of a randomized experiment of a messaging intervention which was designed to reduce gun violence among individuals under parole supervision with a prior violent felony conviction or firearm arrest. The intervention consisted of a group meeting in which high-risk paroled individuals were notified of the sanction they would face upon reoffending while being offered community resources to support re- integration into the community. The program did not lead to a reduction in gun violence or create community spillover effects but did reduce parole violations by 15%. Potential mechanisms and implications for similar programs are discussed.
papers.zh_title: 枪支暴力能否以低成本被威慑？来自纽约市随机实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 枪支暴力能否以低成本被威慑？我们报告了一项信息干预随机实验的结果，该实验旨在减少处于假释监督下且有先前暴力重罪定罪或枪支逮捕记录的个人的枪支暴力。干预措施包括一次小组会议，会上高风险假释人员被告知再次犯罪将面临的制裁，同时提供社区资源以支持其重新融入社区。该计划并未导致枪支暴力减少或产生社区溢出效应，但确实将假释违规行为减少了15%。本文讨论了潜在机制及对类似项目的启示。

papers.title: The Political Economy of Industrial Policy
papers.authors: Réka Juhász, Nathan J. Lane
papers.abstract: We examine the ways in which political realities shape industrial policy through the lens of modern political economy. We consider two broad “governance constraints”: i) the political forces that shape how industrial policy is chosen and ii) the ways in which state capacity affects implementation.
