The framework of modern political economy suggests that government failure is not a necessary feature of industrial policy; rather, it is more likely to emerge when countries pursue industrial policies beyond their governance capacity constraints. As such, our political economy of industrial policy is not fatalist. Instead, it enables policymakers to constructively confront challenges.
papers.zh_title: 产业政策的政治经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过现代政治经济学的视角，审视政治现实塑造产业政策的方式。我们考虑两类广泛的“治理约束”：一是塑造产业政策选择方式的政治力量，二是国家能力影响实施的方式。现代政治经济学的框架表明，政府失灵并非产业政策的必然特征；相反，当国家追求超出其治理能力约束的产业政策时，政府失灵更有可能出现。因此，我们对产业政策的政治经济学分析并非宿命论。相反，它使政策制定者能够建设性地应对挑战。

papers.title: Economic Budgeting for Endowment-Dependent Universities
papers.authors: John Y. Campbell, Jeremy C. Stein, Alex A. Wu
papers.abstract: To understand their financial position, universities need to understand the long-term implications of their operating revenues and costs in relation to the financial assets they have available. Standard budgeting procedures that focus on one or two years at a time and use generally accepted accounting principles (GAAP) do not do this. We present an alternative framework that discounts cash flow forecasts over the infinite future and compares the present value of operating obligations to the value of the university’s endowment net of any debt it has issued. We illustrate the potential of this framework using recent data from Harvard’s Faculty of Arts and Sciences (FAS).
papers.zh_title: 捐赠依赖型大学的经济预算
papers.zh_abstract: 为了理解自身的财务状况，大学需要了解其运营收入和成本相对于可用金融资产的长期影响。标准预算程序通常一次只关注一两年，并采用公认会计原则（GAAP），但这并不能实现上述目标。我们提出了一个替代框架，该框架对无限未来的现金流预测进行贴现，并将运营义务的现值与大学捐赠基金的价值（扣除其已发行的任何债务）进行比较。我们利用哈佛大学文理学院（FAS）的最新数据，展示了这一框架的潜力。

papers.title: How Successful Public Health Interventions Fail: Regulating Prostitution in Nineteenth-Century Britain
papers.authors: Grant Goehring, W. Walker Hanlon
papers.abstract: Public health interventions often involve a trade-off between improving health and protecting individual rights. We study this trade-off in a high-stakes setting: prostitution regulations aimed at reducing the spread of sexually transmitted infections (STIs) in Victorian Britain. These regulations, known as the Contagious Disease Acts (CDAs), introduced a system of registration of sex workers, compulsory medical inspections, and the involuntary confinement of infected workers, in a legal market for sex. The first part of our analysis shows that the CDAs led to substantial public health improvements. However, despite their effectiveness, the CDAs were ultimately repealed. The second part of our study examines the causes of this repeal. We show that repeal was driven by concerns about the violation of the basic rights of sex workers and unequal treatment relative to men who purchased sex. These findings emphasize that the success of a public health intervention depends not only on its effectiveness as a sanitary measure but also on how the costs of the regulation are distributed.
papers.zh_title: 成功的公共卫生干预如何失败：19世纪英国的卖淫监管
papers.zh_abstract: 公共卫生干预通常涉及改善健康与保护个人权利之间的权衡。我们在一个高风险背景下研究这种权衡：旨在减少维多利亚时代英国性传播感染（STI）传播的卖淫法规。这些法规被称为《传染病法案》（CDAs），在合法的性市场中引入了一套性工作者登记制度、强制性医疗检查以及对感染者的强制隔离。我们分析的第一部分表明，CDAs带来了显著的公共卫生改善。然而，尽管有效，CDAs最终被废除。我们研究的第二部分考察了废除的原因。我们表明，废除是由对性工作者基本权利受到侵犯以及相对于购买性服务的男性受到不平等待遇的担忧所驱动的。这些发现强调，公共卫生干预的成功不仅取决于其作为卫生措施的有效性，还取决于监管成本如何分配。

papers.title: SAFE to Update Inflation Expectations? New Survey Evidence on Euro Area Firms
papers.authors: Ursel Baumann, Annalisa Ferrando, Dimitris Georgarakos, Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Timo Reinelt
papers.abstract: This paper provides new survey evidence on firms’ inflation expectations in the euro area. Building on the ECB’s Survey on the Access to Finance of Enterprises (SAFE), we introduce consistent measurement of inflation expectations across countries and shed new light on the properties and causal effects of these expectations. We find considerable heterogeneity in firms’ inflation expectations and show that firms disagree about future inflation more than professional forecasters but less than households. We document that differences in firms’ demographics, firms’ choices and constraints, and cross-country macroeconomic environments account for most of the variation in inflation expectations by roughly equal shares. Using an RCT approach, we show that firms update their inflation expectations in a Bayesian manner. Moreover, they revise their plans regarding prices, wages, costs and employment in response to information treatments about current or future inflation.
papers.zh_title: 安全更新通胀预期？关于欧元区企业的新调查证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提供了关于欧元区企业通胀预期的新调查证据。基于欧洲央行的企业融资渠道调查（SAFE），我们引入了跨国家一致的通胀预期衡量方法，并揭示了这些预期的性质及其因果效应的新见解。我们发现企业的通胀预期存在相当大的异质性，并表明企业对未来通胀的分歧大于专业预测者，但小于家庭。我们记录了企业人口统计特征、企业选择和约束以及跨国宏观经济环境的差异，各自以大致相等的份额解释了通胀预期的大部分变化。通过使用随机对照试验（RCT）方法，我们表明企业以贝叶斯方式更新其通胀预期。此外，它们会根据关于当前或未来通胀的信息处理，修订其关于价格、工资、成本和就业的计划。

papers.title: Investment in Infrastructure and Trade: The Case of Ports
papers.authors: Giulia Brancaccio, Myrto Kalouptsidi, Theodore Papageorgiou
papers.abstract: Transportation infrastructure is vital for the smooth functioning of international trade. Ports are a crucial gateway to this system: with more than 80% of trade carried by ships, they shape trade costs, and it is critical that they operate efficiently. Yet ports are susceptible to disruptions, causing costly delays. With enormous budgets spent on infrastructure to alleviate these costs, a key policy question emerges: in a world with high volatility, what are the returns to investing in infrastructure? To address this question, we introduce an empirical framework that combines insights from queueing theory to capture port technology, with tools from demand estimation. We use our framework, together with a collection of novel datasets, to quantify the costs of disruptions and evaluate transportation infrastructure investment. Our analysis unveils three policy-relevant messages: (i) investing in port infrastructure can lead to substantial trade and welfare gains, but only if targeted properly– in fact, net of costs, investment has positive returns at a minority of US ports; (ii) there are sizable spillovers across ports, as investing in one port can decongest a wider set of ports, suggesting that coordinated decision-making may result in more efficient investment decisions; (iii) macroeconomic volatility can drastically change returns to investment and their geography.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IO, ITI；JEL：E39, F1, F14, L0, L90, L91, R4, R41, R42
papers.zh_title: 基础设施投资与贸易：以港口为例
papers.zh_abstract: 交通基础设施对于国际贸易的顺畅运行至关重要。港口是这个系统的关键门户：由于超过80%的贸易通过船舶运输，港口决定了贸易成本，其高效运营至关重要。然而，港口容易受到干扰，导致代价高昂的延误。由于巨额预算用于基础设施以减轻这些成本，一个关键的政策问题出现了：在一个高度波动的世界中，基础设施投资的回报是什么？为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一个实证框架，该框架结合了排队论（用于捕捉港口技术）和需求估计工具。我们利用我们的框架以及一系列新颖的数据集，量化了干扰的成本并评估了交通基础设施投资。我们的分析揭示了三个与政策相关的信息：（i）投资港口基础设施可以带来显著的贸易和福利收益，但前提是投资要有针对性——事实上，在扣除成本后，投资仅在美国少数港口产生正回报；（ii）港口之间存在显著的溢出效应，因为投资一个港口可以缓解更广泛港口的拥堵，这表明协调决策可能带来更有效的投资决策；（iii）宏观经济波动可能极大地改变投资回报及其地理分布。

papers.title: The Impact of Affirmative Action Litigation on Police Killings of Civilians
papers.authors: Robynn J.A. Cox, Jamein P. Cunningham, Alberto Ortega
papers.abstract: Although research has shown that court-ordered hiring quotas increase the number of minority police officers in litigated cities, there has been little insight into how workforce diversity, or lack thereof, may impact police violence against civilians. Using an event study framework, we find that the threat of affirmative action litigation reduces police killings of non-White civilians in the long-run. In addition, we find evidence of lower arrest rates for non-White civilians and more diverse police departments 25 years after litigation. Our results highlight the vital role that federal interventions have in addressing police behavior and the use of lethal force.
papers.zh_title: 平权行动诉讼对警察杀害平民事件的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管研究表明，法院命令的招聘配额增加了被诉讼城市中少数族裔警察的数量，但关于劳动力多样性（或缺乏多样性）如何影响警察对平民的暴力行为，目前几乎没有深入了解。使用事件研究框架，我们发现平权行动诉讼的威胁在长期内减少了警察对非白人平民的杀害。此外，我们发现有证据表明，在诉讼25年后，非白人平民的逮捕率降低，警察部门的多样性增加。我们的结果凸显了联邦干预在解决警察行为和使用致命武力方面的重要作用。

papers.title: Business, Liquidity, and Information Cycles
papers.authors: Gorkem Bostanci, Guillermo Ordoñez
papers.abstract: Stock markets play a dual role: help allocate capital by conveying information about firms’ fundamentals and provide liquidity by quickly turning stocks into cash. We propose a trading model in which these two roles are endogenously related: more intensive use of stocks for liquidity affects both the information and the noise about fundamentals contained in prices. We structurally estimate stock price informativeness for several countries and show that it sharply declines when the banking system has trouble providing liquidity. We incorporate this module into a dynamic general equilibrium model to study the real effects of this mechanism through capital misallocation across heterogeneous firms. Calibrating the model for the US, we show that, due to less informative stock markets, the output loss is 43% larger if recessions are accompanied by liquidity distress.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME, PR；JEL：D53, D82, E32, G11, G12
papers.zh_title: 商业、流动性与信息周期
papers.zh_abstract: 股票市场扮演着双重角色：通过传递关于公司基本面的信息来帮助配置资本，以及通过快速将股票转换为现金来提供流动性。我们提出了一个交易模型，其中这两个角色是内生相关的：更密集地使用股票进行流动性会影响价格中包含的关于基本面的信息和噪声。我们结构性估计了几个国家的股票价格信息含量，并表明当银行系统在提供流动性方面遇到困难时，信息含量会急剧下降。我们将这个模块纳入一个动态一般均衡模型中，通过异质性企业间的资本错配来研究这一机制的实际影响。通过校准美国模型，我们表明，由于股票市场信息含量降低，如果经济衰退伴随着流动性困境，产出损失会额外增加43%。

papers.title: Further Evidence on the Global Decline in the Mental Health of the Young
papers.authors: David G. Blanchflower, Alex Bryson, Anthony Lepinteur, Alan Piper
papers.abstract: Prior to around 2011, there was a pronounced curvilinear relationship between age and wellbeing: poor mental health was hump-shaped with respect to age, whilst subjective well-being was U-shaped. We examine data from a European panel for France, Germany, Italy, Spain and Sweden called, Come-Here, for 2020-2023, plus data from International Social Survey Program (ISSP) surveys for 2011 and 2021 and some country-specific data. Mental ill-health now declines in a roughly monotonic fashion with age, whilst subjective well-being rises with age. We also show that young people with poorer mental health spend more time daily in front of a screen on the internet or their smartphone, and that within-person increases in poor mental health are correlated with spending more time in front of a screen. This evidence appears important because it is among the first pieces of research to use panel data on individuals to track the relationship between screen time and changes in mental health, and because the results caution against simply using the presence of the internet in the household, or low usage indicators (such as having used the internet in the last week) to capture the role played by screen time in the growth of mental ill-health.
papers.zh_title: 全球年轻人心理健康下降的进一步证据
papers.zh_abstract: 大约在2011年之前，年龄与幸福感之间存在明显的曲线关系：心理健康状况不佳随年龄呈驼峰形分布，而主观幸福感则呈U形分布。我们考察了来自欧洲面板数据（Come-Here，涵盖2020-2023年法国、德国、意大利、西班牙和瑞典）以及2011年和2021年国际社会调查项目（ISSP）调查数据和一些特定国家数据。心理健康不佳现在大致随年龄单调下降，而主观幸福感随年龄上升。我们还表明，心理健康较差的年轻人每天花更多时间在屏幕前（互联网或智能手机上），并且个体内心理健康状况恶化的增加与花更多时间在屏幕前相关。这一证据似乎很重要，因为它是首批使用个体面板数据追踪屏幕时间与心理健康变化关系的研究之一，并且结果警示我们，不能简单地使用家庭互联网接入或低使用率指标（例如上周使用过互联网）来捕捉屏幕时间在心理健康问题增长中所起的作用。

papers.title: Discount Factors and Monetary Policy: Evidence from Dual-Listed Stocks
papers.authors: Quentin Vandeweyer, Minghao Yang, Constantine Yannelis
papers.abstract: This paper studies the transmission of monetary policy to the stock market through investors’ discount factors. To isolate this channel, we investigate the effect of US monetary policy surprises on the ratio of prices of the same stock listed simultaneously in Hong Kong and Mainland China, and thereby control for revisions in cash-flow expectations. We find this channel to be strong and asymmetric, with the effect driven by surprise monetary policy interest rate cuts. A 100 basis point surprise cut results in a 30 basis point increase in the ratio of stock prices over 5 days. These results suggest significant slow-moving reductions in stock market risk premia following accommodating monetary policy surprises.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, ME, PE；JEL：E5, E51, E58, G12, G14
papers.zh_title: 贴现因子与货币政策：来自双重上市股票的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究货币政策通过投资者贴现因子向股票市场的传导。为了隔离这一渠道，我们考察了美国货币政策意外对同时在香港和中国内地上市的同一股票价格比率的影响，从而控制了现金流预期的修正。我们发现这一渠道强劲且不对称，其效应由意外的货币政策降息所驱动。100个基点的意外降息导致5天内股票价格比率上升30个基点。这些结果表明，在宽松的货币政策意外之后，股票市场风险溢价存在显著的缓慢下降。

papers.title: A Quantile Model of Firm Investment
papers.authors: Heitor Almeida, Murillo Campello, Luciano I. de Castro, Antonio F. Galvao Jr
papers.abstract: We develop a dynamic model of firm investment under uncertainty that captures firms’ risk attitude using quantile preferences. The firm maximizes its present value, defined as current profits and investment plus the discounted value of the τ-quantile of its value next period. In our framework, τ ∈ (0, 1) parametrizes the firm’s attitude toward downside risk. The model implies that the firm’s investment policy equates the marginal cost of capital with the τ-quantile of the discounted present value of future marginal profits — investment depends directly on the firm’s risk attitude. We further integrate our model into a “q-theory” of investment. Numerical solutions show how heterogeneity across τ-quantiles impacts the value of the firm and investment decisions. Empirical estimations of the quantile investment model show that the strength of the relation between investment and Tobin’s q increases as downside risk aversion decreases. Estimates of firms’ risk attitude reveal evidence of high levels of downside risk aversion.
papers.zh_title: 企业投资的分位数模型
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个不确定性下企业投资的动态模型，该模型利用分位数偏好来刻画企业的风险态度。企业最大化其现值，该现值定义为当前利润和投资加上下一期企业价值τ分位数的折现值。在我们的框架中，τ ∈ (0, 1) 参数化了企业对下行风险的态度。该模型意味着，企业的投资政策使得资本的边际成本等于未来边际利润折现现值的τ分位数——投资直接取决于企业的风险态度。我们进一步将我们的模型整合到投资的“q理论”中。数值解展示了τ分位数之间的异质性如何影响企业价值和投资决策。对分位数投资模型的实证估计表明，投资与托宾q之间关系的强度随着下行风险厌恶程度的降低而增加。对企业风险态度的估计揭示了高水平下行风险厌恶的证据。

papers.title: People's Understanding of Inflation
papers.authors: Alberto Binetti, Francesco Nuzzi, Stefanie Stantcheva
papers.abstract: This paper studies people’s understanding of inflation–their perceived causes, consequences, trade-offs–and the policies supported to mitigate its effects. We design a new, detailed online survey based on the rich existing literature in economics with two experimental components— a conjoint experiment and an information experiment—to examine how well public views align with established economic theories. Our key findings show that the major perceived causes of inflation include government actions, such as increased foreign aid and war-related expenditures, alongside rises in production costs attributed to recent events like the COVID-19 pandemic, oil price fluctuations, and supply chain disruptions. Respondents anticipate many negative consequences of inflation but the most noted one is the increased complexity and difficulty in household decision-making. Partisan differences emerge distinctly, with Republicans more likely to attribute inflation to government policies and foresee broader negative outcomes, whereas Democrats anticipate greater inequality effects. Inflation is perceived as an unambiguously negative phenomenon without any potential positive economic correlates. Notably, there is a widespread belief that managing inflation can be achieved without significant trade-offs, such as reducing economic activity or increasing unemployment. These perceptions are hard to move experimentally. In terms of policy responses, there is resistance to monetary tightening, consistent with the perceived absence of trade-offs and the belief that it is unnecessary to reduce economic activity to fight inflation. The widespread misconception that inflation rises following increases in interest rates even leads to support for rate cuts to reduce inflation. There is a clear preference for policies that are perceived to have other benefits, such as reducing government debt in progressive ways or increasing corporate taxes, and for support for vulnerable households, despite potential inflationary effects.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ME, POL；JEL：E03, E24, E31, E58, E71
papers.zh_title: 人们对通货膨胀的理解
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究人们对通货膨胀的理解——他们感知到的原因、后果、权衡——以及为减轻其影响而支持的政策。我们基于经济学中丰富的现有文献设计了一项新的、详细的在线调查，包含两个实验组成部分——一个联合实验和一个信息实验——以检验公众观点与既定经济理论的一致程度。我们的主要发现表明，通货膨胀的主要感知原因包括政府行动，例如增加对外援助和与战争相关的支出，以及归因于近期事件（如COVID-19大流行、油价波动和供应链中断）的生产成本上升。受访者预期通货膨胀会带来许多负面后果，但最值得注意的是家庭决策的复杂性和难度增加。党派差异明显出现，共和党人更可能将通货膨胀归因于政府政策并预见更广泛的负面结果，而民主党人则预期更大的不平等效应。通货膨胀被视为一种明确的负面现象，没有任何潜在的正向经济关联。值得注意的是，人们普遍认为可以在不付出重大权衡（如减少经济活动或增加失业）的情况下实现管理通货膨胀。这些认知在实验上难以改变。在政策应对方面，存在对货币紧缩的抵制，这与感知到的权衡缺失以及认为没有必要为了对抗通货膨胀而减少经济活动的信念一致。通货膨胀在利率上升后也会上升的普遍误解甚至导致人们支持降息以降低通货膨胀。人们明显偏好那些被认为具有其他好处的政策，例如以渐进方式减少政府债务或增加企业税，以及支持弱势家庭，尽管这些政策可能具有通胀效应。

papers.title: School Equalization in the Shadow of Jim Crow: Causes and Consequences of Resource Disparity in Mississippi circa 1940
papers.authors: David Card, Leah Clark, Ciprian Domnisoru, Lowell Taylor
papers.abstract: A school finance equalization program established in Mississippi in 1920 failed to help many of the state's Black students – an outcome that was typical in the segregated U.S. South (Horace Mann Bond, 1934). In majority-Black school districts, local decision-makers overwhelmingly favored white schools when allotting funds from the state's preexisting per capita fund, and the resulting high expenditures on white students rendered these districts ineligible for the equalization program. Thus, while Black students residing in majority-white districts benefited from increased spending and standards for Black schools, those in majority-Black districts continued to experience extremely low – and even worsening – school funding. We model the processes that led the so-called equalization policy to create disparities in schooling resources for Black students, and estimate effects on Black children using both a neighboring-counties design and an IV strategy. We find that local educational spending had large impacts on Black enrollment rates, as reported in the 1940 census, with Black educational attainment increasing in marginal spending. Finally, we link the 1940 and 2000 censuses to show that Black children exposed to higher levels of school expenditures had significantly more completed schooling and higher income late in life.
papers.zh_title: 吉姆·克劳阴影下的学校均等化：1940年左右密西西比州资源差距的原因与后果
papers.zh_abstract: 密西西比州于1920年建立的一项学校财政均等化计划未能帮助该州的许多黑人学生——这是美国南部种族隔离地区的典型结果（Horace Mann Bond, 1934）。在黑人占多数的学区，地方决策者在分配该州先前存在的人均基金时压倒性地偏袒白人学校，由此导致的白人学生高支出使得这些学区没有资格参加均等化计划。因此，虽然居住在白人占多数学区的黑人学生受益于黑人学校支出的增加和标准的提高，但那些居住在黑人占多数学区的黑人学生继续经历极低甚至恶化的学校经费。我们模拟了导致所谓均等化政策为黑人学生创造教育资源差距的过程，并使用邻近县设计和工具变量策略估计了对黑人儿童的影响。我们发现，根据1940年人口普查报告，地方教育支出对黑人入学率产生了巨大影响，黑人教育程度随边际支出增加而提高。最后，我们将1940年和2000年的人口普查数据联系起来，表明接触更高水平学校支出的黑人儿童在晚年拥有显著更高的完成学业年限和收入。

papers.title: Double Robustness of Local Projections and Some Unpleasant VARithmetic
papers.authors: José Luis Montiel Olea, Mikkel Plagborg-Møller, Eric Qian, Christian K. Wolf
papers.abstract: We consider impulse response inference in a locally misspecified vector autoregression (VAR) model. The conventional local projection (LP) confidence interval has correct coverage even when the misspecification is so large that it can be detected with probability approaching 1. This result follows from a “double robustness” property analogous to that of popular partially linear regression estimators. In contrast, the conventional VAR confidence interval with short-to-moderate lag length can severely undercover, even for misspecification that is small, economically plausible, and difficult to detect statistically. There is no free lunch: the VAR confidence interval has robust coverage only if the lag length is so large that the interval is as wide as the LP interval.
papers.zh_title: 局部投影的双重稳健性与一些不愉快的VAR计量问题
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考虑在局部误设的向量自回归（VAR）模型中的脉冲响应推断。即使误设大到可以以趋近于1的概率被检测到，传统的局部投影（LP）置信区间仍具有正确的覆盖概率。这一结果源于一种类似于流行的部分线性回归估计量的“双重稳健性”性质。相比之下，具有短到中等滞后长度的传统VAR置信区间可能会严重覆盖不足，即使对于很小、经济上合理且难以统计检测的误设也是如此。没有免费的午餐：只有当滞后长度大到使得区间与LP区间一样宽时，VAR置信区间才具有稳健的覆盖概率。

papers.title: Nominal Devaluations, Inflation and Inequality
papers.authors: Andrés Blanco, Andrés Drenik, Emilio Zaratiegui
papers.abstract: We study the distribution of labor income during large devaluations. Across countries, inequality falls after large devaluations within the context of a surge in inflation and a fall and subsequent recovery of real labor income. To better understand inequality dynamics, we use a novel administrative dataset covering the 2002 Argentinean devaluation. We show that following a homogeneous fall in real labor income across workers, the bottom of the income distribution recovers faster than the top. Low labor mobility and lack of union coverage among high-income workers explain their slow recovery.
papers.zh_title: 名义贬值、通货膨胀与不平等
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究大规模贬值期间劳动收入的分配。跨国来看，在大幅贬值之后，伴随着通货膨胀飙升以及实际劳动收入下降随后恢复，不平等程度下降。为了更好地理解不平等动态，我们使用了一个涵盖2002年阿根廷贬值的新型行政数据集。我们表明，在全体工人实际劳动收入同质下降之后，收入分配底部的恢复速度快于顶部。低收入工人中低劳动流动性和缺乏工会覆盖解释了其缓慢的恢复。

papers.title: An Empirical Framework For Matching With Imperfect Competition
papers.authors: Mons Chan, Kory Kroft, Elena Mattana, Ismael Mourifié
papers.abstract: This paper builds, identifies and estimates a model of the labor market that features strategic interactions in wage setting and two-sided heterogeneity in order to shed light on the sources of wage inequality. We provide a tractable characterization of the model equilibrium and demonstrate its existence and uniqueness. This characterization of the equilibrium allows us to derive a rich set of comparative statics and to gauge the relative contributions of worker skill, preference for amenities and strategic interactions to equilibrium wage inequality. Using instrumental variables, we establish identification of labor demand and supply parameters and estimate them using matched employer-employee data from Denmark. Using our estimated structural model, we perform a series of counterfactual analyses in order to provide a quantitative evaluation of the main sources of wage inequality in Denmark.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, LS；JEL：J0, J20, J3, J31, J42
papers.zh_title: 不完全竞争匹配的实证框架
papers.zh_abstract: 本文构建、识别并估计了一个劳动力市场模型，该模型具有工资设定中的战略互动和双边异质性，以揭示工资不平等的来源。我们提供了模型均衡的可处理特征描述，并证明了其存在性和唯一性。这种均衡特征描述使我们能够推导出丰富的比较静态分析，并衡量工人技能、对便利品的偏好以及战略互动对均衡工资不平等的相对贡献。使用工具变量，我们建立了劳动力需求和供给参数的识别，并使用来自丹麦的匹配雇主-雇员数据对其进行估计。利用我们估计的结构模型，我们进行了一系列反事实分析，以对丹麦工资不平等的主要来源进行定量评估。

papers.title: The Effect of Inequality on Redistribution: An Econometric Analysis
papers.authors: Michael J. Boskin, Kareem Elnahal, Adam Zhang
papers.abstract: Using data on U.S. state and federal taxes and transfers over a quarter century, we estimate a regression model that yields the marginal effect of any shift of market income share from one quintile to another on the entire post tax, post-transfer income distribution. We identify exogenous income distribution changes and account for reverse causality using instruments based on exposure to international trade shocks, international commodity price shocks and national industry demand shocks, as well as lagged endogenous variables, with controls for the level of income, the business cycle and demographics. We find the degree of attenuation of market income shifts initially increases in quintile rank, peaks at the middle quintile and then falls for higher income quintiles, consistent with median voter political economy theory and what Stigler called Director’s Law. We also provide evidence of considerable and systematic spillover effects on quintiles neither gaining nor losing in the “experiments,” also favoring the middle quintile, what we label the greedy median voter. “Voting” and “income insurance” coalition analyses are presented. We find a strong negative relationship between average real income and redistribution and a modest effect of two year led inequality.
papers.zh_title: 不平等对再分配的影响：一项计量经济学分析
papers.zh_abstract: 利用美国州和联邦税收与转移支付四分之一个世纪的数据，我们估计了一个回归模型，该模型得出市场收入份额从一个五分位组转移到另一个五分位组的任何变化对整个税后、转移后收入分布的边际效应。我们识别出外生的收入分配变化，并使用基于国际贸易冲击暴露、国际大宗商品价格冲击和国内行业需求冲击的工具变量以及滞后的内生变量，同时控制收入水平、商业周期和人口统计变量，来处理反向因果关系。我们发现，市场收入变化的衰减程度最初随五分位组排名增加而增加，在中位五分位组达到峰值，然后对较高收入五分位组下降，这与中位选民政治经济学理论以及斯蒂格勒所称的“迪雷克托定律”一致。我们还提供了证据，表明在“实验”中既未获得也未失去的五分位组存在显著且系统的溢出效应，同样有利于中位五分位组，我们称之为贪婪的中位选民。本文还呈现了“投票”和“收入保险”联盟分析。我们发现平均实际收入与再分配之间存在强烈的负相关关系，而领先两年的不平等对再分配的影响较小。

papers.title: Keeping Up Appearances: An Experimental Investigation of Socioeconomic Status Signaling to Avoid Discrimination
papers.authors: Pascaline Dupas, Marcel Fafchamps, Laura Hernandez-Nunez
papers.abstract: We investigate the welfare cost of relative rank considerations, using a series of vignettes and lab-in-the-field experiments with over 2,000 individuals in Abidjan, Côte d’Ivoire. We show that: (1) people perceived to be of very low rank are considered more likely to be sidelined from beneficial opportunities in many aspects of life; and (2) in response, people invest in their appearance and distort consumption choices in order to appear of higher rank. These effects are economically significant. As predicted by a simple signaling model, the distortion concerns people with low (but not too low) socio-economic status and the SES range concerned varies across types of beneficial opportunities.
papers.zh_title: 维持体面：一项关于为避免歧视而进行社会经济地位信号传递的实验研究
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用在科特迪瓦阿比让对超过2000名个体进行的一系列情景实验和实验室实地实验，研究了相对排名考虑的福利成本。我们表明：（1）被认为排名极低的人更可能被认为在生活的许多方面被排除在有益机会之外；（2）作为回应，人们投资于自己的外表并扭曲消费选择，以显得排名更高。这些影响在经济上是显著的。正如一个简单的信号模型所预测的那样，这种扭曲涉及社会经济地位低（但并非极低）的人群，并且所涉及的社会经济地位范围因有益机会的类型而异。

papers.title: Returns Heterogeneity and Consumption Inequality Over the Life Cycle
papers.authors: Claudio Daminato, Luigi Pistaferri
papers.abstract: A recent literature argues that persistent heterogeneity in wealth returns ("type dependence") as well as a positive association with wealth levels ("scale dependence") play an important role for explaining features of the wealth distribution, especially its extreme concentration at the top. In contrast, traditional models of wealth accumulation emphasize the role of persistent differences in labor earnings. Using panel data from the PSID, we first document that a common unobserved component (which we interpret as the endowment of cognitive and non-cognitive skills of an individual) drives persistent heterogeneity in both wealth returns and labor earnings. We embed these features of the joint wealth return-earnings process in a life-cycle model of consumer behavior and show that ignoring them would dramatically understate average returns for people at the top of the wealth distribution as well as the level and rise of consumption inequality over the life cycle.
papers.zh_title: 生命周期中的回报异质性与消费不平等
papers.zh_abstract: 近期的文献认为，财富回报的持续性异质性（“类型依赖性”）以及其与财富水平的正相关关系（“规模依赖性”）在解释财富分布特征，尤其是顶部的极端集中现象中扮演着重要角色。相比之下，传统的财富积累模型则强调劳动收入的持续性差异。利用PSID的面板数据，我们首先发现一个共同不可观测的成分（我们将其解释为个人认知和非认知技能的禀赋）驱动了财富回报和劳动收入两方面的持续性异质性。我们将这些联合财富回报-收入过程的特征嵌入到消费者行为的生命周期模型中，并表明，忽略这些特征将严重低估财富分布顶端人群的平均回报，以及消费不平等在整个生命周期中的水平和上升幅度。

papers.title: Explaining Adverse Cholesterol Levels and Distinct Gender Patterns in an Indonesian Population Compared with the U.S.
papers.authors: Ralph I. Lawton, Elizabeth Frankenberg, Teresa Seeman, Arun S. Karlamangla, Cecep Sumantri, Duncan Thomas
papers.abstract: With the expiration of many tax cuts and unmet climate targets, 2025 could be a crucial year for climate policy in the United States. Using an integrated model of energy supply and demand, this paper aims to assess climate policies that the U.S. federal government may consider in 2025 and to evaluate emissions reductions, abatement costs, fiscal impacts, and household energy expenditures across a range of policy scenarios. The model results show several key findings. First, the emissions reductions of the Inflation Reduction Act are significantly augmented under scenarios that add a modest carbon fee or, to a lesser extent, that implement a clean electricity standard in the power sector. Second, net fiscal costs can be substantially reduced in scenarios that include a carbon fee, especially if fossil fuel exports are taxed. Third, expanding the IRA tax credits yields modest additional emissions reductions with higher fiscal costs. Finally, although none of the policy combinations across these scenarios achieve the U.S. target of a 50-52% economy-wide emissions reduction by 2030 from 2005 levels, the carbon fee and clean electricity standard scenarios achieve these levels between 2030 and 2035.
papers.zh_title: 解释印度尼西亚人群与美国相比的不良胆固醇水平及独特的性别模式
papers.zh_abstract: 随着许多减税政策的到期和气候目标未能实现，2025年可能成为美国气候政策的关键一年。本文利用一个能源供需综合模型，旨在评估美国联邦政府可能在2025年考虑的气候政策，并在一系列政策情景下评估减排量、减排成本、财政影响以及家庭能源支出。模型结果显示了几个关键发现。首先，在增加适度碳费或（在较小程度上）在电力部门实施清洁电力标准的情景下，《通胀削减法案》的减排效果显著增强。其次，在包含碳费的情景下，净财政成本可以大幅降低，特别是如果对化石燃料出口征税。第三，扩大IRA税收抵免会带来适度的额外减排，但财政成本更高。最后，尽管这些情景中的任何政策组合都未能实现美国到2030年将全经济范围排放量从2005年水平减少50-52%的目标，但碳费和清洁电力标准情景在2030年至2035年间达到了这些水平。

papers.title: Household Inflation Expectations: An Overview of Recent Insights for Monetary Policy
papers.authors: Francesco D’Acunto, Evangelos Charalambakis, Dimitris Georgarakos, Geoff Kenny, Justus Meyer, Michael Weber
papers.abstract: This paper discusses the recent wave of research that has emphasized the importance of measures of consumers’ inflation expectations. In contrast to other measures of expected inflation, such as for experts or financial market participants, consumers’ inflation expectations capture the broader distribution of societal beliefs about inflation. This research has revealed very significant deviations from traditional assumptions about rationality in consumers’ expectations formation. However, households do act on their beliefs about inflation, though in heterogeneous ways that can depart from the predictions of conventional economic models. Recent euro area experiences highlight the importance of tracking the degree of anchoring in consumers’ inflation expectations in a way that considers their inherent complexity, heterogeneity, and subjectivity. On average, consumers’ medium and longer-term expectations deviate noticeably in levels from central bank targets and, in contrast with expert expectations, often co-move more closely with shorter-term inflation news. By stepping up their engagement with the wider public, central banks may be able to influence expectations by building up greater knowledge and trust and thereby support more effective monetary transmission. Communication efforts need to be persistent because central banks must compete with many other demands on consumers’ attention.
papers.zh_title: 家庭通胀预期：近期对货币政策启示的概述
papers.zh_abstract: 本文讨论了近期强调消费者通胀预期重要性的研究浪潮。与专家或金融市场参与者的其他预期通胀指标相比，消费者的通胀预期捕捉了社会对通胀信念的更广泛分布。这项研究揭示了消费者预期形成过程中与传统理性假设的显著偏离。然而，家庭确实会根据其对通胀的信念采取行动，尽管方式各异，可能偏离传统经济模型的预测。近期欧元区的经验凸显了追踪消费者通胀预期锚定程度的重要性，且需考虑其固有的复杂性、异质性和主观性。平均而言，消费者的中期和长期预期水平明显偏离央行目标，并且与专家预期相反，它们通常与短期通胀消息的联动更为紧密。通过加强与公众的互动，央行或许能够通过建立更多的知识和信任来影响预期，从而支持更有效的货币政策传导。沟通努力需要持之以恒，因为央行必须与众多争夺消费者注意力的其他需求竞争。

papers.title: The Simple Macroeconomics of AI
papers.authors: Daron Acemoglu
papers.abstract: This paper evaluates claims about large macroeconomic implications of new advances in AI. It starts from a task-based model of AI’s effects, working through automation and task complementarities. So long as AI’s microeconomic effects are driven by cost savings/productivity improvements at the task level, its macroeconomic consequences will be given by a version of Hulten’s theorem: GDP and aggregate productivity gains can be estimated by what fraction of tasks are impacted and average task-level cost savings. Using existing estimates on exposure to AI and productivity improvements at the task level, these macroeconomic effects appear nontrivial but modest—no more than a 0.66% increase in total factor productivity (TFP) over 10 years. The paper then argues that even these estimates could be exaggerated, because early evidence is from easy-to-learn tasks, whereas some of the future effects will come from hard-to-learn tasks, where there are many context-dependent factors affecting decision-making and no objective outcome measures from which to learn successful performance. Consequently, predicted TFP gains over the next 10 years are even more modest and are predicted to be less than 0.53%. I also explore AI’s wage and inequality effects. I show theoretically that even when AI improves the productivity of low-skill workers in certain tasks (without creating new tasks for them), this may increase rather than reduce inequality. Empirically, I find that AI advances are unlikely to increase inequality as much as previous automation technologies because their impact is more equally distributed across demographic groups, but there is also no evidence that AI will reduce labor income inequality. Instead, AI is predicted to widen the gap between capital and labor income. Finally, some of the new tasks created by AI may have negative social value (such as design of algorithms for online manipulation), and I discuss how to incorporate the macroeconomic effects of new tasks that may have negative social value.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PR；JEL：E24, J24, O30, O33
papers.zh_title: 人工智能的简单宏观经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 本文评估了关于人工智能新进展可能带来巨大宏观经济影响的论断。文章从一个基于任务的AI影响模型出发，该模型通过自动化和任务互补性发挥作用。只要AI的微观经济效应是由任务层面的成本节约/生产率提升驱动的，其宏观经济后果将由Hulten定理的一个版本给出：GDP和总体生产率增长可以通过受影响的任份额和平均任务层面成本节约来估算。利用现有关于AI暴露度和任务层面生产率提升的估计，这些宏观经济效应看似不容忽视但较为温和——在10年内，全要素生产率（TFP）增长不超过0.66%。文章随后论证，即使是这些估计也可能被夸大，因为早期证据来自易于学习的任务，而未来部分效应将来自难以学习的任务，在这些任务中存在许多影响决策的上下文相关因素，并且没有客观的结果衡量标准来学习成功表现。因此，预测未来10年的TFP增长更为温和，预计低于0.53%。我还探讨了AI对工资和不平等的影响。我从理论上证明，即使AI在某些任务中提高了低技能工人的生产率（而没有为他们创造新任务），这也可能增加而非减少不平等。实证上，我发现AI进步不太可能像以往的自动化技术那样加剧不平等，因为其影响在不同人口群体间分布更均匀，但也没有证据表明AI会减少劳动收入不平等。相反，AI预计将扩大资本与劳动收入之间的差距。最后，AI创造的一些新任务可能具有负社会价值（例如设计用于在线操纵的算法），我讨论了如何纳入可能具有负社会价值的新任务的宏观经济效应。

papers.title: Licensure as a Credential: Evidence on Unemployment Protection and Inequality from the Great Recession and COVID-19
papers.authors: Peter Q. Blair, Bobby W. Chung
papers.abstract: Recent research shows that education shields workers from job loss in recessions. We test whether occupational licensing, another widespread credential, provides similar unemployment protection during recessions. Using individual-level licensing data and supplemental state-occupation measures, we study both the Great Recession and the COVID-19 recession. Licensed workers experienced a 0.8-1 percentage point (27%) smaller increase in unemployment than comparable unlicensed workers in both downturns. Ignoring these unemployment effects understates inequality between licensed and unlicensed workers by 3–7%. Our findings suggest that, like education, licensing not only raises wages but also protects jobs, thereby amplifying inequality during economic downturns.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, ED, IFM, LE, LS；JEL：E02, E24, J08, J23, J24, J44, J64, K31, L31, M51
papers.zh_title: 作为凭证的职业许可：来自大衰退和COVID-19关于失业保护和不平等的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 近期研究表明，教育能在经济衰退中保护工人免受失业。我们检验了另一种普遍存在的凭证——职业许可——是否能在衰退期间提供类似的失业保护。利用个人层面的许可数据以及补充性的州-职业层面度量，我们研究了大衰退和COVID-19衰退。在这两次衰退中，持证工人的失业率增幅比类似的无证工人小0.8-1个百分点（27%）。忽略这些失业效应会使持证与无证工人之间的不平等被低估3-7%。我们的发现表明，与教育类似，职业许可不仅提高了工资，还保护了就业，从而在经济衰退期间加剧了不平等。

papers.title: Algorithmic Bias and Historical Injustice: Race and Digital Profiling
papers.authors: Abigail Matthew, Amalia R. Miller, Catherine Tucker
papers.abstract: This paper studies the implications of attempts at "ethnic-affinity" profiling on Facebook that reflects users' engagement with content on Facebook. Profiling by ethnic-affinity is highly correlated with Census estimates of population race by geography. However, more users were profiled as African-American in former slave states relative to the baseline population. This occurs because the targeting algorithm was better at identifying Black users through differentiated engagement with cultural content in these states. This implies that policies restricting the collection of racial identity data will be unsuccessful due to the existence of proxies, and that relying on proxies may introduce troubling biases.
papers.meta: Programs：LE, LS, PR；JEL：J15, J78, K24, M37
papers.zh_title: 算法偏见与历史不公：种族与数字画像
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了Facebook上反映用户与内容互动的“族裔亲和”画像尝试的含义。基于族裔亲和的画像与人口普查按地理区域估计的种族人口高度相关。然而，相对于基线人口，更多用户在前奴隶州被画像为非裔美国人。这是因为在这些州，目标算法通过差异化的文化内容互动更善于识别黑人用户。这意味着限制种族身份数据收集的政策将因代理变量的存在而失败，并且依赖代理变量可能会引入令人不安的偏见。

papers.title: An Analysis of Pandemic-Era Inflation in 11 Economies
papers.authors: Olivier J. Blanchard, Ben S. Bernanke
papers.abstract: In a collaborative project with ten central banks, we have investigated the causes of the post-pandemic global inflation, building on our earlier work for the United States. Globally, as in the United States, pandemic-era inflation was due primarily to supply disruptions and sharp increases in the prices of food and energy; however, and in sharp contrast to the 1970s, the inflationary effects of these supply shocks have not been persistent, in part due to the credibility of central bank inflation targets. As the effects of supply shocks have subsided, tight labor markets, and the rises in nominal wages, have become relatively more important sources of inflation in many countries. In several countries, including the United States, curbing wage inflation and returning price inflation to target may require a period of modestly higher unemployment.
papers.zh_title: 11个经济体疫情时期通胀分析
papers.zh_abstract: 在与十家中央银行合作的项目中，我们在先前对美国研究的基础上，调查了疫情后全球通胀的原因。全球范围内，如同美国一样，疫情时期的通胀主要是由供应中断以及食品和能源价格急剧上涨所致；然而，与1970年代形成鲜明对比的是，这些供应冲击的通胀效应并未持续，部分原因在于央行通胀目标的可信度。随着供应冲击的影响消退，在许多国家，劳动力市场紧张和名义工资上涨已成为相对更重要的通胀来源。在包括美国在内的几个国家，要抑制工资通胀并使价格通胀回归目标水平，可能需要一段失业率适度上升的时期。

papers.title: The Inflation Accelerator
papers.authors: Andrés Blanco, Corina Boar, Callum J. Jones, Virgiliu Midrigan
papers.abstract: We develop a tractable sticky price model in which the fraction of price changes evolves endogenously over time and, consistent with the evidence, increases with inflation. Because we assume that firms sell multiple products and choose how many, but not which, prices to adjust in every period, our model admits exact aggregation and reduces to a one-equation extension of the Calvo model. The model features a powerful inflation accelerator–a feedback loop between inflation and the fraction of price changes – which significantly increases the slope of the Phillips curve during periods of high inflation.
papers.zh_title: 通胀加速器
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个易于处理的价格粘性模型，其中价格调整的比例随时间内生演变，并且与证据一致，该比例随通胀上升而增加。由于我们假设企业销售多种产品，并在每个时期选择调整多少种价格（而非哪些价格），我们的模型允许精确加总，并简化为卡尔沃模型的一个单方程扩展。该模型具有强大的通胀加速器——即通胀与价格调整比例之间的反馈循环——这在高通胀时期显著增加了菲利普斯曲线的斜率。

papers.title: A Shared Interest: Do Bonds Strengthen Equity Monitoring?
papers.authors: Todd A. Gormley, Manish Jha
papers.abstract: Institutional investors conduct more governance research and are less likely to follow proxy advisor vote recommendations when a company’s bonds comprise a larger share of their assets. These findings are driven by bond holdings, shareholder proposals, and companies where fixed-income managers are more likely to be attentive and share an interest with equity investors in improving governance. The findings do not concentrate on companies or shareholder proposals where creditor-shareholder conflicts are likely. Overall, the findings suggest that corporate bond holdings influence how actively institutions monitor their equity positions and contribute to institutions’ overall incentive to be engaged stewards.
papers.zh_title: 共同利益：债券会加强股权监督吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 当一家公司的债券在其资产中占较大份额时，机构投资者会进行更多的治理研究，并且不太可能遵循代理顾问的投票建议。这些发现是由债券持有量、股东提案以及固定收益管理者更可能关注并与股权投资者在改善治理方面有共同利益的公司所驱动的。这些发现并不集中在可能存在债权人-股东冲突的公司或股东提案上。总体而言，这些发现表明，公司债券持有量会影响机构投资者积极监督其股权头寸的方式，并有助于增强机构投资者成为积极参与管理者的整体激励。

papers.title: Her Property Transactions: White Women and the Frequency of Female Ownership in the Antebellum Era
papers.authors: Benton Wishart, Trevon D. Logan
papers.abstract: The traditional historical narrative claims that White women were rarely involved in market transactions for enslaved people in the antebellum United States. Using transaction records, notary statements, and runaway advertisements, we provide the first quantitative estimates of the extent of White women’s involvement in antebellum slave transactions as owners of record. Contrary to the narrative, we find that White women were quite frequently noted as owners of record in transactions as both buyers and sellers. White women participated in more than 30% of the transactions in the largest market for enslaved people in the antebellum era. We also find that White women were especially likely to be owners involved in transactions with enslaved women, where they were listed as owners in nearly 40% of transactions. Linking transaction participants to the census, we find that White women owners were not more likely to be widows nor were they older than women in the general population. Overall, our results are consistent with the new historical narrative that White women were ubiquitous in enslavement transactions and this was a critical part of White women’s economic activity in the antebellum era.
papers.zh_title: 她的财产交易：内战前白人女性与女性所有权的频率
papers.zh_abstract: 传统历史叙述声称，在内战前的美国，白人女性很少参与被奴役者的市场交易。利用交易记录、公证人声明和逃亡广告，我们首次提供了白人女性在内战前奴隶交易中作为登记所有者参与程度的定量估计。与这种叙述相反，我们发现白人女性作为登记所有者，在交易中作为买方和卖方都相当频繁地出现。在内战前最大的被奴役者市场中，白人女性参与了超过30%的交易。我们还发现，白人女性尤其可能成为涉及被奴役女性的交易中的所有者，在近40%的交易中被列为所有者。将交易参与者与人口普查数据关联后，我们发现白人女性所有者并非更可能是寡妇，也不比一般女性人口年龄更大。总体而言，我们的结果与新的历史叙述一致，即白人女性在奴隶交易中无处不在，这是内战前白人女性经济活动的一个关键部分。

papers.title: The Concave Phillips Curve
papers.authors: Narayana R. Kocherlakota
papers.abstract: This paper derives the curvature properties of the short-run Phillips curve for a wide class of models with time-dependent pricing frictions. Contrary to conventional thinking, the Phillips curve is asymptotically horizontal for high levels of economic activity and asymptotically vertical for low levels of economic activity. Moreover, it is globally concave under relatively weak conditions that allow real marginal cost to be an unbounded convex function of economic activity. Intuitively, when economic activity is very high (low), substitution effects within the price index imply that inflation behaves as if prices are nearly fully sticky (flexible). Using (conventional) measures of inflation that understate the relevant substitution effects may lead to misleading conclusions about the curvature of the Phillips curve, and to corresponding errors in the formulation of monetary policy.
papers.zh_title: 凹形菲利普斯曲线
papers.zh_abstract: 本文推导了在广泛的一类具有时间依赖定价摩擦的模型中短期菲利普斯曲线的曲率性质。与传统观点相反，菲利普斯曲线在高经济活动水平下渐近水平，在低经济活动水平下渐近垂直。此外，在相对宽松的条件下（允许实际边际成本成为经济活动的无界凸函数），该曲线全局呈凹形。直观上，当经济活动非常高（低）时，价格指数内的替代效应意味着通胀的表现仿佛价格几乎完全粘性（灵活）。使用低估相关替代效应的（传统）通胀衡量指标，可能会导致关于菲利普斯曲线曲率的误导性结论，以及货币政策制定中的相应错误。

papers.title: Unemployment Insurance Fraud in the Debit Card Market
papers.authors: Umang Khetan, Jetson Leder-Luis, Jialan Wang, Yunrong Zhou
papers.abstract: We study fraud in the unemployment insurance (UI) system using a dataset of 35 million debit card transactions. We apply machine learning techniques to cluster cards corresponding to varying levels of suspicious or potentially fraudulent activity. We then conduct a difference-in-differences analysis based on the staggered adoption of state-level identity verification systems between 2020 and 2021 to assess the effectiveness of screening for reducing fraud. Our findings suggest that identity verification reduced payouts to suspicious cards by 27%, while non-suspicious cards were largely unaffected by these technologies. Our results indicate that identity screening may be an effective mechanism for mitigating fraud in the UI system and for benefits programs more broadly.
papers.zh_title: 借记卡市场中的失业保险欺诈
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用一个包含3500万笔借记卡交易的数据集研究失业保险系统中的欺诈行为。我们应用机器学习技术对卡片进行聚类，以对应不同程度的可疑或潜在欺诈活动。然后，我们基于2020年至2021年间各州分阶段采用身份验证系统的情况，进行双重差分分析，以评估筛查在减少欺诈方面的有效性。我们的研究结果表明，身份验证使向可疑卡片的支付减少了27%，而无可疑卡片在很大程度上未受这些技术的影响。我们的结果表明，身份筛查可能是减轻失业保险系统以及更广泛福利项目中欺诈行为的有效机制。

papers.title: Measuring and Predicting “New Work” in the United States: The Role of Local Factors and Global Shocks
papers.authors: Gueyon Kim, Cassandra Merritt, Giovanni Peri
papers.abstract: The evolution of work is of emerging importance to advanced economies' growth. In this study, we develop a new semantic-distance-based algorithm to identify “new work,” namely the new types of jobs introduced in the US. We characterize how “new work” relates to task content of jobs and skill characteristics of workers and document its geographic distribution and association with employment growth. Then, we analyze whether local factors associated in the previous literature with agglomeration economies and productivity growth as well as local exposures to global shocks—technology, trade, immigration, and population aging—predict the creation of “new work.” We find local supply of college educated in 1980 as the strongest predictor of “new work.” Using the historical location of 4-year colleges, a strong instrument for local college share, we find a positive and significant causal effect of local supply of human capital on “new work.”
papers.meta: Programs：ITI, LS, PR；JEL：F1, J11, J14, J23, J24, J61, O33
papers.zh_title: 衡量和预测美国的“新工作”：地方因素与全球冲击的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 工作的演变对发达经济体的增长日益重要。在本研究中，我们开发了一种新的基于语义距离的算法来识别“新工作”，即美国引入的新类型工作岗位。我们描述了“新工作”如何与工作的任务内容和工人的技能特征相关联，并记录了其地理分布以及与就业增长的关系。然后，我们分析了先前文献中与集聚经济和生产率增长相关的地方因素，以及地方对全球冲击（技术、贸易、移民和人口老龄化）的暴露程度，是否能够预测“新工作”的创造。我们发现，1980年地方大学毕业生供给是“新工作”最强的预测因子。利用四年制大学的历史位置作为地方大学份额的强工具变量，我们发现地方人力资本供给对“新工作”具有正向且显著的因果效应。

papers.title: Risky Oil: It's All in the Tails
papers.authors: Christiane Baumeister, Florian Huber, Massimiliano Marcellino
papers.abstract: The substantial fluctuations in oil prices in the wake of the COVID-19 pandemic and the Russian invasion of Ukraine have highlighted the importance of tail events in the global market for crude oil which call for careful risk assessment. In this paper we focus on forecasting tail risks in the oil market by setting up a general empirical framework that allows for flexible predictive distributions of oil prices that can depart from normality. This model, based on Bayesian additive regression trees, remains agnostic on the functional form of the conditional mean relations and assumes that the shocks are driven by a stochastic volatility model. We show that our nonparametric approach improves in terms of tail forecasts upon three competing models: quantile regressions commonly used for studying tail events, the Bayesian VAR with stochastic volatility, and the simple random walk. We illustrate the practical relevance of our new approach by tracking the evolution of predictive densities during three recent economic and geopolitical crisis episodes, by developing consumer and producer distress indices that signal the build-up of upside and downside price risk, and by conducting a risk scenario analysis for 2024.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, IFM, ME；JEL：C11, C32, C53, Q41, Q47
papers.zh_title: 风险石油：一切都在尾部
papers.zh_abstract: 新冠疫情和俄罗斯入侵乌克兰之后石油价格的大幅波动，凸显了全球原油市场中尾部事件的重要性，这要求进行仔细的风险评估。在本文中，我们通过建立一个通用的实证框架来关注石油市场尾部风险的预测，该框架允许石油价格具有灵活且可能偏离正态分布的预测分布。该模型基于贝叶斯加性回归树，对条件均值关系的函数形式保持不可知，并假设冲击由随机波动率模型驱动。我们表明，我们的非参数方法在尾部预测方面优于三个竞争模型：常用于研究尾部事件的分位数回归、具有随机波动率的贝叶斯VAR以及简单的随机游走。我们通过追踪最近三次经济和地缘政治危机事件期间预测密度的演变、开发指示上行和下行价格风险积累的生产者和消费者困境指数，以及进行2024年风险情景分析，来说明我们新方法的实际相关性。

papers.title: Latent Heterogeneity in the Marginal Propensity to Consume
papers.authors: Daniel Lewis, Davide Melcangi, Laura Pilossoph
papers.abstract: We estimate the unconditional distribution of the marginal propensity to consume (MPC) using clustering regression applied to the 2008 economic stimulus payments. By deviating from the standard approach of estimating MPC heterogeneity using interactions with observables, we can recover the full distribution of MPCs. We find households spent between 4 and 133% of the rebate within a quarter, and individual households used rebates for different goods. While many observable characteristics correlate individually with our estimated MPCs, these relationships disappear when tested jointly, except for income and the average propensity to consume. Household observable characteristics explain only 8% of MPC variation, highlighting the role of latent heterogeneity.
papers.zh_title: 边际消费倾向中的潜在异质性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用聚类回归方法，基于2008年经济刺激支付数据，估计了边际消费倾向的无条件分布。通过偏离使用可观测变量交互项来估计MPC异质性的标准方法，我们能够恢复MPC的完整分布。我们发现，家庭在一个季度内花费了退税的4%至133%，并且不同家庭将退税用于不同的商品。虽然许多可观测特征与我们的估计MPC单独相关，但当联合检验时，这些关系消失，除了收入和平均消费倾向。家庭可观测特征仅解释了MPC变异的8%，凸显了潜在异质性的作用。

papers.title: The Exchange Rate as an Industrial Policy
papers.authors: Pablo Ottonello, Diego J. Perez, William Witheridge
papers.abstract: We study the role of exchange rates in industrial policy. We construct an open-economy macroeconomic framework with production externalities and show that the desirability of these policies critically depends on the dynamic patterns of externalities. When they are stronger in earlier stages of development, economies that are converging to the technological frontier can improve welfare by intervening in foreign exchange markets, keeping the exchange rate undervalued, and speeding the transition; economies that are not converging to the technological frontier are better off not using the exchange rate as an industrial policy tool. Capital-flow mobility and labor market dynamism play a central role in the effectiveness of these policies. We also discuss the role of capital controls as an industrial policy tool and use our framework to interpret historical experiences.
papers.zh_title: 作为产业政策的汇率
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了汇率在产业政策中的作用。我们构建了一个包含生产外部性的开放经济宏观框架，并表明这些政策的可取性关键取决于外部性的动态模式。当外部性在发展的早期阶段更强时，正在向技术前沿收敛的经济体可以通过干预外汇市场、保持汇率低估并加速转型来改善福利；而未向技术前沿收敛的经济体则最好不使用汇率作为产业政策工具。资本流动性和劳动力市场活力在这些政策的有效性中起着核心作用。我们还讨论了资本管制作为产业政策工具的作用，并利用我们的框架来解释历史经验。

papers.title: Is the Decline in the Number of Community Banks Detrimental to Community Economic Development?
papers.authors: Bernadette Minton, Alvaro G. Taboada, Rohan Williamson
papers.abstract: Our research examines the impact of dwindling community bank numbers on community investment and economic development. Initially, we confirm the vital role of community banks’ small business lending in local development. Contrary to popular belief, we find that a decrease in community banks positively affects community investment, through small business loan (SBL) originations. Key factors include the local presence of other community banks and the continuity of the consolidating bank's presence. Interestingly, the effect remains neutral in underserved or distressed counties and diminishes when a large bank acquires a community bank without maintaining a local presence. Post-consolidation, community banks emerge larger and more robust, capable of issuing larger SBLs, while larger banks and Fintech firms contribute by providing smaller SBLs. Overall, our findings reinforce the critical contribution of community banks to local development, suggesting that a reduction in their numbers leads to a stronger, more stable banking infrastructure in the small business lending landscape.
papers.zh_title: 社区银行数量下降是否不利于社区经济发展？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们的研究考察了社区银行数量减少对社区投资和经济发展的影响。首先，我们确认了社区银行的小企业贷款在地方发展中的关键作用。与普遍看法相反，我们发现社区银行数量的减少通过小企业贷款发放对社区投资产生积极影响。关键因素包括其他社区银行的本地存在以及合并银行持续存在的连续性。有趣的是，在服务不足或陷入困境的县，这种影响保持中性，并且当大型银行收购社区银行而未保持本地存在时，这种影响减弱。合并后，社区银行变得更大、更稳健，能够发放更大的小企业贷款，而大型银行和金融科技公司通过提供较小的小企业贷款做出贡献。总体而言，我们的发现强化了社区银行对地方发展的关键贡献，表明其数量减少导致小企业贷款领域出现更强大、更稳定的银行基础设施。

papers.title: The Effects of Tobacco 21 Laws on Smoking and Vaping: Evidence from Panel Data and Biomarkers
papers.authors: Chad D. Cotti, Philip DeCicca, Erik T. Nesson
papers.abstract: We use data from the Population Assessment of Tobacco Use and Health (PATH), a longitudinal data set including self-reported and biomarker measures of tobacco use, to examine the effects of state-level tobacco 21 (T21) laws on smoking and vaping. T21 laws reduce self-reported cigarette smoking among 18-to-20 year olds, concentrated in males. Initial non-users who “age-out” of treatment are less likely to subsequently initiate self-reported smoking or vaping. Treated smokers are less likely to buy their own cigarettes and more likely to buy cigarettes in a different state. Biomarker results are mixed, and we find some evidence of a reduction in nicotine exposure but less evidence for a reduction in exposure to tobacco. Finally, we test for non-classical measurement error. T21 laws reduce the probability that clinically identified likely cigarette smokers self-report as smokers, which may increase the apparent effect of T21 laws on cigarette smoking as measured by self-reports.
papers.zh_title: 烟草21岁法案对吸烟和电子烟的影响：来自面板数据和生物标志物的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们使用烟草使用与健康人口评估数据，这是一个包含自我报告和生物标志物测量的纵向数据集，来考察州级烟草21岁法案对吸烟和电子烟的影响。T21法案减少了18至20岁人群的自我报告吸烟，主要集中在男性。初始非使用者中“超龄”脱离治疗的人随后开始自我报告吸烟或电子烟的可能性较低。受治疗的吸烟者更少购买自己的香烟，更可能在不同州购买香烟。生物标志物结果不一，我们发现一些证据表明尼古丁暴露减少，但烟草暴露减少的证据较少。最后，我们检验了非经典测量误差。T21法案降低了临床认定的可能吸烟者自我报告为吸烟者的概率，这可能会增加T21法案对自我报告吸烟的明显效果。

papers.title: The Law of Small Numbers in Financial Markets: Theory and Evidence
papers.authors: Lawrence J. Jin, Cameron Peng
papers.abstract: We build a model of the law of small numbers (LSN)—the incorrect belief that even small samples represent the properties of the underlying population—to study its implications for trading behavior and asset prices. In our model, a belief in the LSN induces investors to expect short-term price trends to revert and long-term price trends to persist. As a result, asset prices exhibit short-term momentum and long-term reversals. The model can reconcile the coexistence of the disposition effect and return extrapolation. In addition, it makes new predictions about investor behavior, including return patterns before purchases and sales, a weakened disposition effect for long-term holdings, doubling down in buying, a positive correlation between doubling down and the disposition effect, and heterogeneous selling propensities to past returns. By testing these predictions using account-level transaction data, we show that the LSN provides a parsimonious way of understanding a variety of puzzles about investor behavior.
papers.zh_title: 金融市场中的小数定律：理论与证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个小数定律模型——即错误地认为即使小样本也代表总体属性的信念——以研究其对交易行为和资产价格的影响。在我们的模型中，对LSN的信念导致投资者预期短期价格趋势会逆转，而长期价格趋势会持续。因此，资产价格表现出短期动量与长期反转。该模型可以调和处置效应与回报外推的共存。此外，它还对投资者行为做出了新的预测，包括购买和出售前的回报模式、长期持有的处置效应减弱、买入中的加倍下注、加倍下注与处置效应之间的正相关，以及对过去回报的异质性出售倾向。通过使用账户级交易数据检验这些预测，我们表明LSN提供了一种简洁的方式来理解关于投资者行为的各种谜题。

papers.title: Reviving Micro Real Rigidities: The Importance of Demand Shocks
papers.authors: S. Borağan Aruoba, Eugene Oue, Felipe Saffie, Jonathan Willis
papers.abstract: We revisit micro real rigidities as a source of monetary non-neutrality in a menu-cost model with variable markups, using firm-level evidence to pin down key primitives. We embed a non-CES demand system in a quantitative monetary model and use firm-dynamics evidence to identify demand curvature and firm-level productivity and demand processes. The calibrated model matches untargeted micro pricing moments, the markup distribution, and cost pass-through, while generating comparable non-neutrality. The key innovation is an empirically supported placement of idiosyncratic demand shocks that shifts residual demand, thereby moving desired markups and prices under non-CES demand. The broader implication is that this calibrated model provides a portable framework linking monetary economics with trade and IO evidence.
papers.zh_title: 复兴微观实际刚性：需求冲击的重要性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们重新审视了微观实际刚性作为菜单成本模型中货币非中性的来源，该模型具有可变加成率，并使用企业层面证据来确定关键原始参数。我们将非CES需求系统嵌入一个定量货币模型，并利用企业动态证据来识别需求曲率以及企业层面的生产率和需求过程。校准后的模型匹配了未目标化的微观定价矩、加成率分布和成本传导，同时产生了可比的非中性。关键的创新在于，经验支持的特质性需求冲击的定位会移动剩余需求，从而在非CES需求下移动期望加成率和价格。更广泛的含义是，这个校准后的模型提供了一个可移植的框架，将货币经济学与贸易和产业组织证据联系起来。

papers.title: Broadband Internet Access, Economic Growth, and Wellbeing
papers.authors: Kathryn R. Johnson, Claudia Persico
papers.abstract: Between 2000 and 2008, access to high-speed, broadband internet grew significantly in the United States, but there is debate on whether access to high-speed internet improves or harms wellbeing. We find that a ten percent increase in the proportion of county residents with access to broadband internet leads to a 1.01 percent reduction in the number of suicides in a county, as well as improvements in self-reported mental and physical health. We further find that this reduction in suicide deaths is likely due to economic improvements in counties that have access to broadband internet. Counties with increased access to broadband internet see reductions in poverty rate and unemployment rate. In addition, zip codes that gain access to broadband internet see increases in the numbers of employees and establishments. In addition, heterogeneity analysis indicates that the positive effects are concentrated in the working age population, those between 25 and 64 years old. This pattern is precisely what is predicted by the literature linking economic conditions to suicide risk.
papers.zh_title: 宽带互联网接入、经济增长与福祉
papers.zh_abstract: 在2000年至2008年间，美国高速宽带互联网的接入显著增长，但关于高速互联网接入是否改善或损害福祉存在争议。我们发现，一个县中拥有宽带互联网接入的居民比例每增加10%，会导致该县自杀人数减少1.01%，同时自我报告的心理和身体健康状况也有所改善。我们进一步发现，自杀死亡的减少很可能归因于接入宽带互联网的县的经济改善。宽带互联网接入增加的县，贫困率和失业率下降。此外，获得宽带互联网接入的邮政编码区域，员工数量和机构数量增加。异质性分析表明，积极影响集中在25至64岁的劳动年龄人口中。这一模式正是文献中关于经济状况与自杀风险关联的预测。

papers.title: Understanding Expert Choices Using Decision Time
papers.authors: David Card, Stefano DellaVigna, Chenxi Jiang, Dmitry Taubinsky
papers.abstract: Laboratory experiments find a robust relationship between decision times and perceived values of alternatives. This paper investigates how these findings translate to experts' decision making and information acquisition in the field. In a stylized model of expert choice between two alternatives, we show that (i) less-commonly chosen alternatives are more likely to be chosen later than earlier; (ii) decision time is higher when the likelihood of choosing each alternative is closer to fifty percent; and (iii) the ultimate quality of the chosen alternative may increase or decrease with decision time, depending on whether earlier or later signals are more informative. We test these predictions in the editorial setting, where we observe proxies for paper quality and signals available to editors. We document that (i) the probability of a positive decision rises with decision time; (ii) average decision time is higher when our estimated probability of a positive decision is closer to fifty percent; and (iii) paper quality is positively (negatively) related to decision time for papers with Reject (R&R) decisions. Structural estimates show that the additional information acquired in editorial delays is modest, and has little impact on the quality of decisions.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PE, POL, PR；JEL：D03, O30
papers.zh_title: 利用决策时间理解专家选择
papers.zh_abstract: 实验室实验发现决策时间与备选方案的感知价值之间存在稳健关系。本文研究了这些发现如何转化为专家在现实中的决策和信息获取。在一个关于专家在两个备选方案之间选择的简化模型中，我们表明：(i) 较少被选择的备选方案更可能在后期而非早期被选择；(ii) 当选择每个备选方案的可能性接近50%时，决策时间更长；(iii) 所选备选方案的最终质量可能随决策时间增加或减少，取决于早期还是后期信号更具信息量。我们在编辑环境中检验这些预测，其中我们观察到论文质量的代理变量以及编辑可获得的信号。我们记录到：(i) 积极决策的概率随决策时间上升；(ii) 当我们估计的积极决策概率接近50%时，平均决策时间更高；(iii) 对于被拒稿的论文，论文质量与决策时间正相关；对于被要求修改的论文，则负相关。结构估计表明，编辑延迟中获取的额外信息是适度的，对决策质量影响不大。

papers.title: Medical Cannabis Availability and Mental Health: Evidence From New York’s Medical Cannabis Program
papers.authors: Coleman Drake, Dylan Nagy, Matthew D. Eisenberg, David Slusky
papers.abstract: Evidence on cannabis legalization’s effects on mental health remains scarce, despite both rapid increases in cannabis use and an ongoing mental health crisis in the United States. We use granular geographic data to estimate medical cannabis dispensary availability’s effects on self-reported mental health in New York state from 2011 through 2021 using a two-stage difference-in-differences approach to minimize bias introduced from the staggered opening of dispensaries. Our findings rule out that medical cannabis availability had negative effects on mental health for the adult population overall. We also find that medical cannabis availability reduced past-month self-reported poor mental health days by nearly 10%—3.37 percentage points—among adults 65 and above. These results suggest medical cannabis access has positive health impacts for older populations, likely through pain relief.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LE, PE；JEL：H75, I12, I18, I31, K32, K42
papers.zh_title: 医用大麻的可及性与心理健康：来自纽约州医用大麻项目的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管美国大麻使用量迅速增加且心理健康危机持续存在，但关于大麻合法化对心理健康影响的证据仍然稀缺。我们利用细粒度地理数据，采用两阶段双重差分法来估计医用大麻药房的可及性对2011年至2021年纽约州自我报告心理健康的影响，以尽量减少因药房交错开业而引入的偏差。我们的研究结果排除了医用大麻可及性对整体成年人口心理健康产生负面影响的可能。我们还发现，医用大麻的可及性使65岁及以上成年人过去一个月自我报告的心理健康状况不佳天数减少了近10%（即3.37个百分点）。这些结果表明，医用大麻的可及性对老年人群具有积极的健康影响，很可能是通过缓解疼痛实现的。

papers.title: Trust, Intangible Assets, and Productivity
papers.authors: Gilbert Cette, Jimmy Lopez, Jacques Mairesse, Giuseppe Nicoletti
papers.abstract: Business environments dominated by information flows and autonomous tasks, typical of knowledge-intensive industries, are likely to require enough social capital to be viable and productive. In this paper, we use new EUKLEMS-INTANProd industry-level data (Bontadini et al., 2023a) covering a panel of 19 countries and 20 industries over the 1995-2018 period to investigate the influence of a key element of social capital – trust – on labour productivity in intangible-intensive industries, controlling for hiring and firing regulations that can constrain the ability of managers to implement best practices productively. We find that in such industries, productivity gains from high levels of trust are stronger than elsewhere, while too strict hiring and firing regulations are more damaging for productivity. Using a more limited sample for which data on management quality are available, we show that the positive impact of high trust on productivity in intangible-intensive industries is channeled by the ability to benefit from good management, a key element of organizational capital. Productivity gains from relatively high levels of trust in knowledge-rich environments are estimated to be sizeable and our estimates survive a number of robustness checks.
papers.zh_title: 信任、无形资产与生产率
papers.zh_abstract: 以信息流和自主任务为主导的商业环境（典型于知识密集型行业）可能需要足够的社会资本才能维持其可行性和生产率。在本文中，我们利用覆盖1995-2018年期间19个国家和20个行业面板数据的新版EUKLEMS-INTANProd行业层面数据（Bontadini等人，2023a），研究了社会资本的一个关键要素——信任——对无形资产密集型行业劳动生产率的影响，同时控制了可能限制管理者有效实施最佳实践的雇佣和解雇法规。我们发现，在此类行业中，高信任水平带来的生产率提升比其他行业更为显著，而过于严格的雇佣和解雇法规对生产率的损害则更大。通过使用一个可获得管理质量数据的有限样本，我们表明，在无形资产密集型行业中，高信任对生产率的积极影响是通过受益于良好管理（组织资本的关键要素）的能力来传导的。据估计，在知识密集型环境中，相对较高的信任水平所带来的生产率提升是相当可观的，并且我们的估计结果通过了多项稳健性检验。

papers.title: What is Newsworthy? Theory and Evidence
papers.authors: Luis Armona, Matthew Gentzkow, Emir Kamenica, Jesse M. Shapiro
papers.abstract: We introduce a model in which a benevolent news outlet decides whether to report the realization of a state to a consumer, who pays a cost to receive it. A simple statistical rule, called a proper scoring rule, describes when the outlet should be more likely to report the realization. Using data from the US television news, we show that a particular scoring rule successfully predicts many salient features of news reporting. We show how to use this rule as a control variable to discipline tests of reporting bias, and we show that controlling for it matters in our applications.
papers.zh_title: 什么具有新闻价值？理论与证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们引入了一个模型，其中一家善意的新闻机构决定是否向消费者报告某个状态的实现情况，而消费者需要为此支付成本。一个简单的统计规则，称为适当评分规则，描述了该机构何时更有可能报告该实现情况。利用美国电视新闻的数据，我们表明一个特定的评分规则成功预测了新闻报道的许多显著特征。我们展示了如何将该规则用作控制变量来规范对报道偏见的检验，并且我们表明在我们的应用中控制该规则是重要的。

papers.title: Monetary Policy Along the Yield Curve: Why Can Central Banks Affect Long-Term Real Rates?
papers.authors: Paul Beaudry, Paolo Cavallino, Tim Willems
papers.abstract: Evidence suggests that monetary policy can affect long-term real interest rates, but it is not clear what drives this outcome. We argue this occurs because very persistent policy-induced interest rate changes may have only weak effects on activity. This can arise when consumption-savings decisions are not primarily driven by intertemporal substitution, but also by life-cycle forces associated with retirement. Within such an environment, we show that the impact of highly persistent monetary policy shocks on activity is determined by two forces: an asset valuation effect, and the response of the average marginal propensity to consume out of financial wealth. Our quantitative analysis indicates that these forces likely cancel each other out, allowing monetary policy to (unconsciously) drive trends in long-run real rates. Our findings also imply that very precise knowledge of r* might not be essential to the successful conduct of monetary policy.
papers.zh_title: 沿收益率曲线的货币政策：为什么中央银行能够影响长期实际利率？
papers.zh_abstract: 证据表明货币政策能够影响长期实际利率，但尚不清楚是什么驱动了这一结果。我们认为，这是因为政策引发的非常持久的利率变化可能对经济活动只有微弱的影响。当消费-储蓄决策并非主要由跨期替代驱动，而是也受到与退休相关的生命周期力量影响时，这种情况就可能发生。在这样的环境中，我们表明，高度持久的货币政策冲击对经济活动的影响由两种力量决定：资产估值效应，以及金融财富的平均边际消费倾向的响应。我们的定量分析表明，这些力量很可能相互抵消，从而使货币政策能够（无意识地）驱动长期实际利率的趋势。我们的研究结果还意味着，对r*的非常精确的了解可能并非成功实施货币政策所必需的。

papers.title: Can Technology Facilitate Scale? Evidence from a Randomized Evaluation of High Dosage Tutoring
papers.authors: Monica P. Bhatt, Jonathan Guryan, Salman A. Khan, Michael LaForest-Tucker, Bhavya Mishra
papers.abstract: High-dosage tutoring is an effective way to improve student learning (Nickow et al., 2024; Guryan et al., 2023). Finding ways to deliver high-dosage tutoring at large scale remains a challenge. Two primary challenges to scaling are cost and staffing. One possible solution is to reduce costs by substituting some tutor time with computer-assisted learning (CAL) technology. The question is: Does doing so compromise effectiveness? This paper provides evidence from a randomized controlled trial (RCT) of approximately 4,000 students in two large school districts in 2018- 19 and 2019-20. The RCT tested the effectiveness of an in-school math tutoring program where students worked in groups of four, with two students working with an in-person tutor while the other two worked on CAL, alternating every other day. The tutoring model had per-pupil costs approximately 30 percent lower than the 2- to-1 tutoring model studied in Guryan et al. (2023). We find gains in students’ math standardized test scores of 0.23 standard deviations for participating students, which are almost as large as the effect sizes of the 2-to-1 tutoring model reported in Guryan et al. (2023). These findings suggest strategic use of technology may be a way to increase the scalability of HDT.
papers.zh_title: 技术能否促进规模化？来自高剂量辅导随机评估的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 高剂量辅导是改善学生学习的有效方法（Nickow等人，2024；Guryan等人，2023）。寻找大规模提供高剂量辅导的方法仍然是一个挑战。规模化的两个主要挑战是成本和人员配备。一种可能的解决方案是通过用计算机辅助学习技术替代部分辅导时间来降低成本。问题是：这样做是否会损害有效性？本文提供了来自2018-19和2019-20学年两个大学区约4000名学生的随机对照试验的证据。该随机对照试验测试了一个校内数学辅导项目的有效性，该项目中，学生以四人一组的形式学习，其中两名学生与面对面辅导员一起学习，而另外两名学生则使用计算机辅助学习，每隔一天交替进行。该辅导模式的人均成本比Guryan等人（2023）研究的2对1辅导模式低约30%。我们发现，参与学生的数学标准化考试成绩提高了0.23个标准差，这几乎与Guryan等人（2023）报告的2对1辅导模式的效果大小相当。这些发现表明，战略性地使用技术可能是提高高剂量辅导可扩展性的一种方式。

papers.title: Procyclical Stocks Earn Higher Returns
papers.authors: William N. Goetzmann, Akiko Watanabe, Masahiro Watanabe
papers.abstract: We find that procyclical stocks, whose returns comove with business cycles, earn higher average returns than countercyclical stocks. We use almost a three-quarter century of real GDP growth expectations from economists’ surveys to determine forecasted economic states. This approach largely avoids the confounding effects of econometric forecasting model error. The loading on the expected real GDP growth rate is a priced risk measure. A fully tradable, ex-ante portfolio formed on this loading generates a procyclicality premium that is statistically significant, economically large, long-lasting over a few years, and independent of the size, book-to-market, and momentum effects.
papers.zh_title: 顺周期股票获得更高回报
papers.zh_abstract: 我们发现，顺周期股票（其回报率与经济周期同步变动）的平均回报率高于逆周期股票。我们利用经济学家调查中近四分之三个世纪的实际GDP增长预期来确定预测的经济状态。这种方法在很大程度上避免了计量经济预测模型误差的混淆效应。预期实际GDP增长率的载荷是一个定价风险度量。基于该载荷构建的完全可交易、事前投资组合产生了一个顺周期溢价，该溢价在统计上显著、经济上可观、持续数年，并且独立于规模、账面市值比和动量效应。

papers.title: Gender-Specific Transportation Costs and Female Time Use: Evidence from India’s Pink Slip Program
papers.authors: Yutong Chen, Kerem Coşar, Devaki Ghose, Shirish Mahendru, Sheetal Sekhri
papers.abstract: Reducing gender-specific commuting barriers in developing countries can have heterogeneous effects on women’s labor outcomes. We study a program that offers free bus rides for women in several Indian states (the Pink Slip program) using a synthetic difference-in-differences approach to examine impacts on transportation expenditures, time use, and labor supply. We find that the program substantially reduces bus-related expenditures. However, when considering all women together, we find no significant changes in travel time, household production, or labor supply. Beneath these aggregate effects, responses vary sharply by employment, marital status, and education. Unmarried women employed prior to the policy increase labor supply, while married women with low and medium levels of education reallocate time away from paid work toward household chores. Overall employment rates remain unchanged in the short run, highlighting that reducing commuting costs does not uniformly improve women’s labor market outcomes.
papers.zh_title: 性别特定的通勤成本与女性时间利用：来自印度“粉色车票”项目的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 在发展中国家，减少性别特定的通勤障碍可能对女性的劳动成果产生异质性影响。我们研究了一个在印度多个邦为女性提供免费公交乘车服务的项目（“粉色车票”项目），采用合成双重差分法来考察其对交通支出、时间利用和劳动供给的影响。我们发现，该项目大幅减少了与公交相关的支出。然而，当将所有女性作为一个整体考虑时，我们发现出行时间、家庭生产或劳动供给没有显著变化。在这些总体效应之下，不同群体的反应因就业状况、婚姻状况和教育程度而存在显著差异。在政策实施前已有工作的未婚女性增加了劳动供给，而受教育程度为低和中等水平的已婚女性则将时间从有偿工作重新分配到家务劳动中。总体就业率在短期内保持不变，这凸显出降低通勤成本并不能一致地改善女性的劳动力市场结果。

papers.title: Bankruptcy Resolution and Credit Cycles
papers.authors: Martin Kornejew, Chen Lian, Yueran Ma, Pablo Ottonello, Diego J. Perez
papers.abstract: We study how the macroeconomic dynamics following credit cycles vary with business bankruptcy institutions. Using data on bankruptcy efficiency and business credit around the world, we document that business credit booms are followed by severe declines in output, investment, and consumption in environments with poorly functioning business bankruptcy. On the contrary, in settings with well functioning business bankruptcy, the aftermath of credit booms is characterized by moderate changes in economic activities. We use a simple model to lay out how and when efficient bankruptcy systems can mitigate the negative consequences of credit booms.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E60, G01, G3
papers.zh_title: 破产清算与信贷周期
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了信贷周期之后的宏观经济动态如何随企业破产制度而变化。利用全球范围内的破产效率和企业信贷数据，我们记录到，在破产功能不佳的环境中，企业信贷繁荣之后会出现产出、投资和消费的严重下降。相反，在破产功能良好的环境中，信贷繁荣之后的经济活动变化较为温和。我们使用一个简单模型阐述了高效破产制度如何以及何时能够减轻信贷繁荣的负面后果。

papers.title: Place-Based Economic Development and Long-Run Firm Employment and Sales: Evidence from American Indian Reservations
papers.authors: Joseph A. Aguilar, Randall Akee, Elton Mykerezi
papers.abstract: We examine how one of the largest U.S. place-based economic development programs, the Indian Gaming Regulatory Act (IGRA) of 1988, with annual revenues in excess of \\$40 billion, affects local firm total employment and sales through direct channels and through IGRA's effects on adjacent non-gaming industry firms. Our analysis focuses on the effect of this national (across 29 U.S. states) place-based economic development program over several decades. We create a novel data set linking a firm-level panel dataset of business outcomes and tribal casino operations by geographic location over several decades. We find that after the start of tribal casino operations, there is a substantial average increase in employment and sales for local firms. We also show that casino operations drive initial increases in employment and sales; however, pre-existing firms also realize gains in employment and sales in the subsequent 2-5 years after the start of casino operations. These effects also spill over to firms in non-related industries; in our analysis, we exclude the Arts, Entertainment, Recreation, Accommodation and Food Services industries and we continue to observe higher employment for firms located on tribal reservations with casino operations. We provide the first evidence on the impact of place-based economic development on long-run business outcomes in some of the most underdeveloped regions in the U.S.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, LS, PE, PR；JEL：H55, O12, O18, R11
papers.zh_title: 基于地点的经济发展与长期企业就业和销售额：来自美洲原住民保留地的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了美国最大的基于地点的经济发展项目之一——1988年《印第安博彩管理法》（IGRA），其年收入超过400亿美元——如何通过直接渠道以及通过IGRA对邻近非博彩行业企业的影响，影响当地企业的总就业和销售额。我们的分析聚焦于这项全国性（涵盖美国29个州）基于地点的经济发展项目在数十年间的效应。我们创建了一个新颖的数据集，将数十年间按地理位置划分的企业层面商业结果面板数据与部落赌场运营数据联系起来。我们发现，在部落赌场开始运营后，当地企业的就业和销售额平均大幅增加。我们还表明，赌场运营推动了就业和销售额的初始增长；然而，在赌场运营开始后的2-5年内，原有企业也实现了就业和销售额的增长。这些效应还溢出到非相关行业的企业；在我们的分析中，我们排除了艺术、娱乐、休闲、住宿和餐饮服务行业，并继续观察到位于有赌场运营的部落保留地上的企业就业水平更高。我们首次提供了关于基于地点的经济发展对美国一些最不发达地区长期商业结果影响的证据。

papers.title: On Robust Inference in Time Series Regression
papers.authors: Richard T. Baillie, Francis X. Diebold, George Kapetanios, Kun Ho Kim, Aaron Mora
papers.abstract: Least squares regression with heteroskedasticity consistent standard errors (“OLS-HC regression”) has proved very useful in cross section environments. However, several major difficulties, which are generally overlooked, must be confronted when transferring the HC technology to time series environments via heteroskedasticity and autocorrelation consistent standard errors (“OLS-HAC regression”). First, in plausible time-series environments, OLS parameter estimates can be inconsistent, so that OLS-HAC inference fails even asymptotically. Second, most economic time series have autocorrelation, which renders OLS parameter estimates inefficient. Third, autocorrelation similarly renders conditional predictions based on OLS parameter estimates inefficient. Finally, the structure of popular HAC covariance matrix estimators is ill-suited for capturing the autoregressive autocorrelation typically present in economic time series, which produces large size distortions and reduced power in HAC-based hypothesis testing, in all but the largest samples. We show that all four problems are largely avoided by the use of a simple and easily-implemented dynamic regression procedure, which we call DURBIN. We demonstrate the advantages of DURBIN with detailed simulations covering a range of practical issues.
papers.zh_title: 时间序列回归中的稳健推断
papers.zh_abstract: 使用异方差一致性标准误的最小二乘回归（“OLS-HC回归”）在横截面环境中已被证明非常有用。然而，当通过异方差和自相关一致性标准误（“OLS-HAC回归”）将HC技术应用于时间序列环境时，必须面对几个通常被忽视的主要困难。首先，在合理的时间序列环境中，OLS参数估计可能不一致，因此OLS-HAC推断即使在渐近意义上也会失败。其次，大多数经济时间序列存在自相关，这使得OLS参数估计效率低下。第三，自相关同样使得基于OLS参数估计的条件预测效率低下。最后，流行的HAC协方差矩阵估计量的结构不适合捕捉经济时间序列中通常存在的自回归自相关，这导致在除最大样本外的所有样本中，基于HAC的假设检验产生较大的规模扭曲和降低的检验功效。我们表明，通过使用一个简单且易于实施的动态回归程序（我们称之为DURBIN），这四个问题在很大程度上得以避免。我们通过涵盖一系列实际问题的详细模拟证明了DURBIN的优势。

papers.title: Attention Cycles
papers.authors: Joel P. Flynn, Karthik Sastry
papers.abstract: We study how bounded rationality coevolves with the business cycle. We introduce a business-cycle model in which firms face a cognitive cost of making precise decisions. Theoretically, we characterize equilibrium with non-parametric, state-dependent stochastic choice. Firms have greater incentives to pay attention in downturns because they are owned by risk-averse households. Correspondingly, the model generates counter-cyclical attention, pro-cyclical mistakes, and an endogenous attention wedge that depresses aggregate productivity when attention is low. Empirically, we test the model's predictions using novel measures of firms' mistakes and attention. Quantitatively, attention cycles generate significant stochastic volatility of output growth and shock propagation asymmetries.
papers.zh_title: 注意力周期
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究有限理性如何与经济周期共同演化。我们引入了一个经济周期模型，其中企业在做出精确决策时面临认知成本。从理论上讲，我们刻画了具有非参数、状态依赖随机选择的均衡。企业有更大的激励在经济衰退期集中注意力，因为它们由风险厌恶的家庭所有。相应地，该模型产生了逆周期的注意力、顺周期的错误，以及一个内生的注意力楔子，当注意力较低时会抑制总体生产率。在实证上，我们利用企业错误和注意力的新度量来检验模型的预测。在数量上，注意力周期产生了显著的产出增长随机波动性和冲击传播不对称性。

papers.title: Sleep: Educational Impact and Habit Formation
papers.authors: Osea Giuntella, Silvia Saccardo, Sally Sadoff
papers.abstract: There is growing evidence on the importance of sleep for productivity, but little is known about the impact of interventions targeting sleep. In a field experiment among U.S. university students, we show that incentives for sleep increase both sleep and academic performance. Motivated by theories of cue-based habit formation, our primary intervention couples personalized bedtime reminders with morning feedback and immediate rewards for sleeping at least seven hours on weeknights. The intervention increases the share of nights with at least seven hours of sleep by 26 percent and average weeknight sleep by an estimated 19 minutes during a four-week treatment period, with persistent effects of about eight minutes per night during a one to five-week post-treatment period. Comparisons to secondary treatments show that immediate incentives have larger impacts on sleep than delayed incentives or reminders and feedback alone during the treatment period, but do not have statistically distinguishable impacts on longer-term sleep habits in the post-treatment period. We estimate that immediate incentives im- prove average semester course performance by 0.075 - 0.089 grade points, a 0.10 - 0.11 standard deviation increase. Our results demonstrate that incentives to sleep can be a cost-effective tool for improving educational outcomes.
papers.zh_title: 睡眠：教育影响与习惯养成
papers.zh_abstract: 越来越多的证据表明睡眠对生产力至关重要，但针对睡眠的干预措施的影响却鲜为人知。在一项针对美国大学生的实地实验中，我们表明，为睡眠提供激励既能增加睡眠时间，也能提高学业成绩。受基于线索的习惯养成理论的启发，我们的主要干预措施将个性化的就寝提醒与早晨反馈以及在工作日夜晚至少睡七小时的即时奖励相结合。在为期四周的干预期内，该干预措施使至少睡七小时的夜晚比例提高了26%，并将平均工作日夜晚睡眠时间估计增加了19分钟；在干预期结束后的一至五周内，每晚仍有约八分钟的持续效应。与次要干预措施的比较表明，在干预期内，即时激励对睡眠的影响大于延迟激励或仅提供提醒和反馈，但在干预期后的长期睡眠习惯方面，这些干预措施没有统计学上可区分的差异。我们估计，即时激励能使学期平均课程成绩提高0.075至0.089个绩点，即增加0.10至0.11个标准差。我们的结果表明，睡眠激励可以成为改善教育成果的一种具有成本效益的工具。

papers.title: Spatial Competition, Strategic Entry Responses, and the North Dakota Railroad War of 1905
papers.authors: Chad Syverson
papers.abstract: The North Dakota Railroad War of 1905, which pitted a potential entrant (the Soo Line) against an established monopolist incumbent (the Great Northern Railway), offers a lucid empirical example of strategic behavior, and in particular the potential for entry deterrence through product proliferation. I use detailed geographic data and historical records to examine the profitability of both the incumbent’s and entrant’s potential and chosen strategies. I find that the incumbent could have likely profitably deterred entry. It did not, however, waiting instead to respond only once the entrant began building. This simultaneous entry arguably led to over expansion in the market. I investigate whether the chosen strategies may have ultimately ended up being both unprofitable for the firms involved as well as, potentially, socially wasteful.
papers.zh_title: 空间竞争、战略进入回应与1905年北达科他铁路战争
papers.zh_abstract: 1905年的北达科他铁路战争，一方是潜在进入者（苏线铁路），另一方是既有的垄断在位者（大北方铁路），为战略行为，特别是通过产品扩散来阻止进入的可能性，提供了一个清晰的实证案例。我利用详细的地理数据和历史记录，考察了在位者和进入者潜在及已选策略的盈利能力。我发现，在位者本有可能通过盈利的方式阻止进入。然而，它并没有这样做，而是等到进入者开始建设后才做出回应。这种同时进入的局面，可以说导致了市场的过度扩张。我研究了这些已选策略是否最终可能对相关企业无利可图，并且可能造成社会浪费。

papers.title: The Social Value of Hurricane Forecasts
papers.authors: Renato Molina, Ivan Rudik
papers.abstract: What is the impact and value of hurricane forecasts? We study this question using the universe of landfalling US hurricanes between 2005–2022.
