We find that forecasts drive adaptive protective expenditures, and that erroneous underforecasts result in a significant increase in total hurricane damage. Using a theoretically-grounded approach for estimating the marginal value of forecast improvements, we find that improvements since 2007, after the implementation of a national policy to improve hurricane forecasts, have reduced total costs by 23%, averaging $2 billion per hurricane. These benefits far exceed the annual budget of the policy and of all federal weather forecasting.
papers.zh_title: 飓风预报的社会价值
papers.zh_abstract: 飓风预报的影响和价值是什么？我们利用2005年至2022年间登陆美国的所有飓风数据来研究这个问题。我们发现，预报会驱动适应性保护支出，而错误的低估预报会导致飓风总损失显著增加。使用一种基于理论的方法来估计预报改进的边际价值，我们发现，自2007年实施旨在改进飓风预报的国家政策以来，预报的改进已使总成本降低了23%，平均每次飓风减少20亿美元。这些收益远远超过了该政策以及所有联邦天气预报的年度预算。

papers.title: Stronger IPR, Better Inclusion? Impact Of WTO Accession On Female AI Inventors in China
papers.authors: Shubhangi Agrawal, Sawan Rathi, Chirantan Chatterjee, Matthew J. Higgins
papers.abstract: Do stronger intellectual property rights (IPR) incentivize women’s participation in innovation? We provide new causal evidence on this question using the USPTO’s Artificial Intelligence Patent Dataset. Our identification strategy exploits China’s WTO TRIPS accession, which led to a substantial strengthening of IPR in 2002. Our results show that post-WTO accession, the number of patents with at least one female inventor in China rose by 95%, and the number of individual female inventors increased by 111%, relative to other countries. We also find significant improvement in patent quality measured by forward citations, strategic importance, and patent impact scores. Heterogeneity analysis shows that gains were concentrated in less complex AI technologies such as computer vision and knowledge processing, with smaller increases in frontier areas like machine learning and evolutionary computation. Our results are robust to alternative control groups, synthetic controls, coarsened exact matching, and randomized inference tests. We identify three mechanisms underlying this surge in female innovation. First, the share of domestic female inventors on patenting teams rose sharply. Second, patents with female inventors increasingly originated from private firms rather than state-owned enterprises, reflecting market liberalization effects. Third, systematic investment in women’s higher education expanded the pool of qualified female researchers. Together, these findings suggest that while China’s WTO accession provided an exogenous policy shock, complementary institutional reforms were essential in enabling women’s participation in the innovation economy. Overall, the results highlight that stronger intellectual property rights when embedded in supportive institutional contexts can foster both technological progress and gender inclusion.
papers.zh_title: 更强的知识产权，更好的包容性？加入WTO对中国女性人工智能发明家的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 更强的知识产权（IPR）是否会激励女性参与创新？我们利用美国专利商标局的人工智能专利数据集，为这个问题提供了新的因果证据。我们的识别策略利用了2002年中国加入WTO的《与贸易有关的知识产权协定》（TRIPS），这导致了知识产权的实质性加强。我们的结果表明，加入WTO后，与其他国家相比，中国至少包含一位女性发明人的专利数量增加了95%，女性发明人个体数量增加了111%。我们还发现，以前向引用、战略重要性和专利影响得分衡量的专利质量显著提高。异质性分析显示，收益集中在计算机视觉和知识处理等复杂性较低的人工智能技术领域，而在机器学习和进化计算等前沿领域的增长较小。我们的结果对于替代对照组、合成控制法、粗化精确匹配和随机推断检验都是稳健的。我们确定了推动女性创新激增的三种机制。首先，专利团队中本土女性发明人的比例急剧上升。其次，包含女性发明人的专利越来越多地来自私营企业而非国有企业，反映了市场自由化的效应。第三，对女性高等教育的系统性投资扩大了合格女性研究人员的储备。这些发现共同表明，虽然中国加入WTO提供了一个外生的政策冲击，但互补性的制度改革对于促进女性参与创新经济至关重要。总体而言，结果强调，当嵌入支持性的制度环境时，更强的知识产权可以同时促进技术进步和性别包容。

papers.title: Voluntary Minimum Wages
papers.authors: Ellora Derenoncourt, David Weil
papers.abstract: Recent wage growth at the bottom of the earnings distribution in the U.S. has reversed a decades-long trend of widening wage inequality. Numerous state and local minimum wage increases have overtaken an effectively non-binding federal minimum, and robust labor demand in the post-pandemic recovery drove wage growth in the low-wage sector. An increasingly pervasive phenomenon over this same period (2014-2023) is the use of company-wide, voluntary minimum wages (VMWs) by private employers, including some of the largest U.S. retailers. We use anonymized payroll data for thousands of firms collected by a major credit bureau to study the effects of these policies on large retailers’ own wages and employment, as well as spillover effects onto other employers in shared labor markets, variously defined. Using stacked event studies centered around multiple VMW events and a continuous treatment variable defined as the gap between local area wages and the company minimum, we find that VMWs result in sizable wage increases and reductions in turnover at the companies that implemented them. Turning to wages at other companies, including those connected to the large retailer by worker flows, we estimate precise, economically negligible spillover effects. Despite the decline in separations from companies with voluntary minimums, overall hiring rates at connected employers do not decline, consistent with substitutability across new hires. Although voluntary minimum wage policies have affected over 3 million jobs among the largest retailers, their impact on the broader labor market is limited.
papers.zh_title: 自愿性最低工资
papers.zh_abstract: 近期美国收入分配底端的工资增长，逆转了数十年来工资不平等扩大的趋势。众多州和地方最低工资的提高，已经超越了实际上已无约束力的联邦最低工资，而疫情后复苏期间强劲的劳动力需求也推动了低工资部门的工资增长。在同一时期（2014-2023年），一个日益普遍的现象是私营雇主，包括一些美国最大的零售商，采用全公司范围的自愿性最低工资（VMW）。我们使用一家主要信用机构收集的数千家企业的匿名薪资数据，来研究这些政策对大型零售商自身工资和就业的影响，以及对共享劳动力市场中其他雇主的溢出效应（以不同方式定义）。通过围绕多个VMW事件构建的堆叠事件研究，以及一个定义为当地工资与公司最低工资之间差距的连续处理变量，我们发现，VMW导致了实施这些政策的公司工资大幅上涨和人员流动率下降。转向其他公司的工资，包括那些通过工人流动与大型零售商相关联的公司，我们估计出精确且经济上可忽略的溢出效应。尽管自愿性最低工资公司的离职率下降，但关联雇主的整体招聘率并未下降，这与新员工之间的可替代性一致。尽管自愿性最低工资政策已影响到大型零售商中超过300万个工作岗位，但它们对更广泛劳动力市场的影响是有限的。

papers.title: Tasks and Black-white Inequality over the Long Twentieth Century
papers.authors: Rowena Gray, Siobhan M. O'Keefe, Sarah Quincy, Zachary Ward
papers.abstract: We present new evidence on the long-run trend of occupational task content by race in the United States, 1900-2021. Black workers began the transition to better paid, cognitive-intensive modern jobs at least a generation after white workers; substantial convergence only occurred from 1960 onwards. Longitudinal data suggests that transitions to new task content were racially biased: Black men moved to jobs with lower rewarded task content than white men, conditional on initial task content, though gaps decreased after World War II. Routine-intensive Black workers were less likely to move up into non-routine analytic work compared to white workers in both historical and modern periods. The results suggest that task-displacement shocks, such as automating routine-manual work, widen Black-white inequality
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, LS；JEL：J24, J62, N31, N32
papers.zh_title: 长期二十世纪的任务内容与黑白不平等
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提供了1900年至2021年间美国按种族划分的职业任务内容长期趋势的新证据。黑人工人向报酬更高、认知密集型现代工作的转型，比白人工人晚了至少一代人；实质性的趋同仅从1960年开始。纵向数据表明，向新任务内容的转型存在种族偏见：在控制了初始任务内容后，黑人男性转向了比白人男性报酬更低的任务内容的工作，尽管这一差距在二战后有所缩小。无论是在历史时期还是现代时期，与白人工人相比，从事常规密集型工作的黑人工人晋升到非常规分析性工作的可能性更低。结果表明，任务替代冲击，例如常规体力工作的自动化，会扩大黑白不平等。

papers.title: Synthesis of Evidence Yields High Social Cost of Carbon Due to Structural Model Variation and Uncertainties
papers.authors: Frances C. Moore, Moritz A. Drupp, James Rising, Simon Dietz, Ivan Rudik, Gernot Wagner
papers.abstract: Estimating the cost to society from a ton of carbon dioxide (CO2) released into the atmosphere requires connecting a model of the climate system with a representation of the economic and social effects of changes in climate, as well as the valuation and aggregation of diverse, uncertain impacts across both time and space. The literature on this cost, termed the social cost of carbon (SCC), is large and growing. Prior work has largely focused on better constraining the values of parameters such as climate sensitivity, the discount rate, and the damage function. A growing literature has also examined the effect of varying more fundamental structural elements of the models supporting SCC calculations. These structural model choices—including the introduction of climate or economic tipping points, changing the structure of economic preferences, and accounting for the persistence of climate damages—have been analyzed in piecemeal, uncoordinated fashion, leaving their relative importance unclear. Here we perform a comprehensive synthesis of the evidence on the SCC, combining 1823 estimates of the SCC from 147 studies published between 2000 and 2020 with a survey of the authors of these studies. The distribution of published SCC values for a 2020 pulse year is wide and substantially right-skewed, showing evidence of a heavy right tail (truncated mean of $132, median $39). Analysis of variance reveals important roles for structural elements in driving SCC estimates, particularly the inclusion of persistent damages via effects on economic growth, representation of the Earth system, and distributional weighting. However, our survey reveals that experts believe the literature is biased downwards due to an under-sampling of structural model variations, as well as biases in damage-function and discount-rate parameters. To address this imbalance, we train a random forest model on variation in the literature and use it to generate a synthetic SCC distribution that more closely matches expert assessments of appropriate model structure and discounting. This synthetic distribution has a median and mean of $185 and $284 per ton CO2, respectively, for a 2020 pulse year (5%–95% range: $32–$874), higher than all official government estimates, including a 2023 update from the U.S. Environmental Protection Agency.
papers.zh_title: 证据综合显示，由于结构模型变化和不确定性，碳的社会成本很高
papers.zh_abstract: 估算向大气中释放一吨二氧化碳（CO2）给社会带来的成本，需要将气候系统模型与气候变化的经济和社会影响表征，以及跨时间和空间对多样化、不确定影响的估值和加总联系起来。关于这种成本（称为碳的社会成本，SCC）的文献数量庞大且不断增长。先前的工作主要集中在更好地约束气候敏感性、贴现率和损害函数等参数的值。越来越多的文献也考察了改变支持SCC计算模型更基本结构要素的影响。这些结构模型选择——包括引入气候或经济临界点、改变经济偏好结构以及考虑气候损害的持续性——是以零散、不协调的方式进行分析的，使得它们的相对重要性尚不明确。在此，我们对SCC的证据进行了全面综合，将2000年至2020年间发表的147项研究中的1823个SCC估计值与对这些研究作者的调查相结合。针对2020年脉冲年份的已发表SCC值的分布范围很广且明显右偏，显示出存在厚右尾的证据（截断均值为132美元，中位数为39美元）。方差分析揭示了结构要素在驱动SCC估计值方面的重要作用，特别是通过经济增长效应纳入持续性损害、地球系统的表征以及分配权重。然而，我们的调查显示，专家认为由于对结构模型变化的抽样不足，以及对损害函数和贴现率参数的偏差，现有文献存在向下偏倚。为了解决这种不平衡，我们根据文献中的变化训练了一个随机森林模型，并用它来生成一个合成SCC分布，该分布更接近专家对适当模型结构和贴现的评估。对于2020年脉冲年份，该合成分布的中位数和均值分别为每吨CO2 185美元和284美元（5%-95%范围：32-874美元），高于所有官方政府估计值，包括美国环境保护署2023年的更新值。

papers.title: Commercial Rivalry as Seller Incidence Shifting: Non-parametric Accounting of the China Shock
papers.authors: James E. Anderson
papers.abstract: Intense US-China commercial rivalry is quantified in this paper with novel non-parametric relative resistance sufficient statistics. The accounting method minimizes the demand specification error variance in revealed resistances. China's manufacturing seller incidence falls (seller price rises) 7.6% yearly as China's sales share quadruples over 2000-14. US seller incidence rises 4.1% yearly as US sales share halves. Domestic trade shares closely fit revealed relative resistances with trade elasticity equal to one. Industrial policy pays for itself in suggestive projections. A 10% rise in US 2014 sales share reduces seller incidence 6.0%, exports rise and net benefit is positive.
papers.zh_title: 作为卖方归宿转移的商业竞争：中国冲击的非参数核算
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用新颖的非参数相对阻力充分统计量，对激烈的美中商业竞争进行了量化。这种核算方法最大限度地减少了揭示阻力中需求规格误差的方差。在2000年至2014年间，随着中国销售份额翻了两番，中国制造业的卖方归宿下降（卖方价格上涨）了7.6%。随着美国销售份额减半，美国卖方归宿上升了4.1%。国内贸易份额与揭示的相对阻力高度吻合，贸易弹性等于1。在推测性预测中，产业政策能够收回成本。美国2014年销售份额提高10%，会使卖方归宿降低6.0%，出口增加，净收益为正。

papers.title: Organizing a Kingdom
papers.authors: Charles Angelucci, Simone Meraglia, Nico Voigtländer
papers.abstract: We develop a framework to examine the organizational challenges faced by central rulers whose large territories require delegating administrative power to distant rural or urban elites. These elites have distinct policy preferences and vary in their economic importance. The ruler’s organizational choices balance a trade-off: allowing elites to adapt to local and common shocks while maintaining coordination across the realm. We show that as urban economic potential grows, the ruler transfers administrative control over towns from landed to urban elites, particularly when all players’ preferences are aligned. When towns are administratively autonomous, the ruler summons them to central assemblies to ensure effective communication and coordination. This mechanism can explain how, during the Commercial Revolution, European merchant elites gained nationwide political clout in parliament by first obtaining control over urban administrations. We provide empirical evidence for our core mechanisms and discuss how the model applies to other historical dynamics (ancient Rome and Spanish America), as well as to contemporary organizational problems.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, POL；JEL：D02, D72, D73, N43, N93, O43
papers.zh_title: 组织一个王国
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个分析框架，研究中央统治者面临的组织挑战：其广袤领土需要将行政权力委托给偏远的乡村或城市精英。这些精英拥有不同的政策偏好，且经济重要性各异。统治者的组织选择需要权衡：允许精英适应地方和共同冲击，同时维持整个王国的协调。我们证明，随着城市经济潜力的增长，统治者会将城镇的行政控制权从土地精英转移给城市精英，尤其是在所有参与者的偏好一致时。当城镇实现行政自治时，统治者会召集它们参加中央议会，以确保有效的沟通与协调。这一机制可以解释，在商业革命期间，欧洲商人精英如何通过首先获得城市行政控制权，从而在议会中获得全国性的政治影响力。我们为核心机制提供了实证证据，并讨论了该模型如何适用于其他历史动态（古罗马和西属美洲）以及当代组织问题。

papers.title: What Can Measured Beliefs Tell Us About Monetary Non-Neutrality?
papers.authors: Hassan Afrouzi, Joel P. Flynn, Choongryul Yang
papers.abstract: This paper studies how to use microeconomic data on beliefs and prices to identify the relative contributions of pricing and information frictions to monetary non-neutrality. In a canonical general equilibrium model with both pricing frictions and information acquisition, we analytically characterize how these frictions contribute to non-neutrality. Exploiting this characterization, we show that data on the cross-sectional distributions of uncertainty and pricing durations are necessary and sufficient to identify non-neutrality. Implementing our approach in survey data, we find that: (i) information and pricing frictions are approximately equally important, and (ii) assuming exogenous information would overstate non-neutrality by 60%.
papers.zh_title: 可测信念能告诉我们关于货币非中性的什么信息？
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究如何利用关于信念和价格的微观经济数据，来识别定价摩擦和信息摩擦对货币非中性的相对贡献。在一个同时包含定价摩擦和信息获取的经典一般均衡模型中，我们分析性地刻画了这些摩擦如何导致非中性。利用这一刻画，我们证明，关于不确定性和定价持续时间的横截面分布数据，是识别非中性的必要且充分条件。将我们的方法应用于调查数据，我们发现：（i）信息摩擦和定价摩擦的重要性大致相当；（ii）假设信息外生会高估非中性程度60%。

papers.title: Algorithmic Pricing: Implications for Marketing Strategy and Regulation
papers.authors: Martin Spann, Marco Bertini, Oded Koenigsberg, Robert Zeithammer, Diego Aparicio, Yuxin Chen, Fabrizio Fantini, Ginger Zhe Jin, Vicki Morwitz, Peter Popkowski Leszczyc, Maria Ana Vitorino, Gizem Yalcin Williams, Hyesung Yoo
papers.abstract: Over the past decade, a growing number of firms have delegated pricing decisions to algorithms in consumer and business markets such as travel, entertainment, and retail, as well as in platform markets such as ride-sharing. We define algorithmic pricing as “the use of programs to automate the setting of prices.” Firms adopt algorithmic pricing to optimize their prices in response to changing market conditions and to leverage the efficiency gains from automation. Advances in information technology and the increased availability of digital data have further facilitated the use of algorithm-driven pricing strategies. Yet adopting algorithmic pricing is not merely a technical upgrade—it is a strategic decision that must align with a company's existing and future marketing strategies. Moreover, algorithmic pricing can raise various regulatory concerns regarding potential threats to competition and the legality of price discrimination. This paper discusses the implementation of algorithmic pricing in the context of firms' marketing strategies and regulatory frameworks, while outlining an agenda for future research in this increasingly important area.
papers.zh_title: 算法定价：对营销策略与监管的启示
papers.zh_abstract: 过去十年中，越来越多的企业在消费市场和企业市场（如旅游、娱乐和零售）以及平台市场（如网约车）中将定价决策委托给算法。我们将算法定价定义为“使用程序自动化设定价格的过程”。企业采用算法定价是为了优化价格以应对不断变化的市场条件，并利用自动化带来的效率提升。信息技术的进步和数字数据可用性的增加，进一步促进了算法驱动定价策略的使用。然而，采用算法定价不仅仅是技术升级——它是一项战略决策，必须与公司现有和未来的营销策略保持一致。此外，算法定价可能引发各种监管问题，涉及对竞争的潜在威胁以及价格歧视的合法性。本文讨论了在企业营销策略和监管框架背景下算法定价的实施，同时为这一日益重要领域的未来研究勾勒了议程。

papers.title: Food Policy in a Warming World
papers.authors: Allan Hsiao, Jacob Moscona, Karthik Sastry
papers.abstract: This paper studies how governments intervene in agricultural markets to reshape the economic consequences of climate extremes. We construct a global dataset of agricultural policies and extreme heat exposure by country and crop since 1980. Extreme heat shocks to domestic production lead to policies that assist consumers by lowering domestic food prices. This effect is persistent, primarily implemented via border policies, and stronger during election years. Shocks to foreign production induce the opposite response: policies that assist producers by raising prices. These findings can be rationalized by a model in which governments use agricultural policy to redistribute among domestic interest groups. Our estimates imply that policy responses shield domestic consumers, while exacerbating losses for domestic producers and foreign consumers. Policy responses have regressive consequences globally, disproportionately harming poor and heat-exposed countries.
papers.zh_title: 变暖世界中的粮食政策
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究政府如何干预农产品市场以重塑气候极端事件的经济后果。我们构建了一个自1980年以来按国家和作物划分的全球农业政策与极端高温暴露数据集。国内生产遭受极端高温冲击会导致政府采取政策，通过降低国内粮食价格来帮助消费者。这种效应是持久的，主要通过边境政策实施，并且在选举年份更为强烈。外国生产遭受冲击则引发相反的反应：政府采取政策，通过提高价格来帮助生产者。这些发现可以通过一个模型得到合理解释，在该模型中，政府利用农业政策在国内利益集团之间进行再分配。我们的估计表明，政策反应保护了国内消费者，同时加剧了国内生产者和外国消费者的损失。政策反应在全球范围内具有累退性，对贫困和高温暴露国家的伤害尤为严重。

papers.title: Pricing Under Distress
papers.authors: S. Borağan Aruoba, Andrés Fernández, Daniel Guzmán, Ernesto Pastén, Felipe Saffie
papers.abstract: We study price adjustment during Chile’s October 2019 Social Uprising using VAT invoice data linking supermarket and supplier prices. Price-change frequency fell, adjustment size increased, and markups rose conditional on adjustment. Supplier pricing was unchanged, and supermarket responses did not vary with local riot intensity, weighing against upstream cost shocks and localized disruptions. We show that frequency and size alone cannot distinguish anticipated demand dispersion from higher menu costs. Combining the micro data with a calibrated Kimball menu-cost model, we find that both channels are needed to match the data and that both amplify monetary non-neutrality.
papers.zh_title: 困境中的定价
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用一个准自然实验——2019年智利社会骚乱——来隔离不确定性对企业定价行为的前瞻性预期效应。在全国性抗议和骚乱爆发后的31天期间，超市价格变动的频率下降了约一半，而调整的平均规模上升了约一半。供应商价格保持稳定，且骚乱的地方强度无法解释这种变化，这表明存在一种前瞻性机制。一个包含关于未来异质性需求波动新闻的菜单成本模型，能够复制这些动态。预期的不确定性放大了货币政策的短期实际效应，凸显了时机的重要性。

papers.title: The Effects of Short-Term Rental Regulation: Insights from Chicago
papers.authors: Ginger Zhe Jin, Liad Wagman, Mengyi Zhong
papers.abstract: We provide an in-depth study of short-term rental (STR) regulation in Chicago. While many municipalities choose between outright bans or laissez-faire strategies concerning STR activities, Chicago pioneered a middle-ground ordinance, enabling the market to exist with limitations and registrations, and imposing a new tax. We show that compared to three control cities, the number of active Airbnb listings in Chicago declined 16.4% in the two years after the ordinance, but this effect is only significant after the city began receiving detailed data feeds from STR platforms. We further demonstrate (i) localized reductions in burglaries near buildings that prohibit STR listings as part of a new capability of the ordinance, (ii) Airbnb revenues declined more in zip codes with above-median hotel revenues, and (iii) Chicago’s middle ground approach generated different and nuanced effects on different STR stakeholders, including the city itself in terms of its STR tax revenues.
papers.zh_title: 短租监管的影响：来自芝加哥的洞察
papers.zh_abstract: 我们对芝加哥的短租监管进行了深入研究。虽然许多城市对短租活动选择全面禁止或自由放任策略，但芝加哥开创了一种中间路线法令，允许市场在限制和注册条件下存在，并征收新税。我们表明，与三个对照城市相比，芝加哥在法令实施两年后活跃的Airbnb房源数量下降了16.4%，但这种效应仅在城市开始从短租平台接收详细数据馈送后才显著。我们进一步证明：（i）作为法令新功能的一部分，在禁止短租列表的建筑附近，入室盗窃案出现局部减少；（ii）在酒店收入高于中位数的邮政编码区，Airbnb收入下降更多；（iii）芝加哥的中间路线方法对不同短租利益相关者（包括城市自身，就其短租税收收入而言）产生了不同且微妙的效应。

papers.title: Automation and Rent Dissipation: Implications for Wages, Inequality, and Productivity
papers.authors: Daron Acemoglu, Pascual Restrepo
papers.abstract: This paper studies the effects of automation in economies with labor market distortions that generate worker rents—wages above opportunity cost—in some jobs. We show that automation targets high-rent tasks, dissipating rents and amplifying wage losses from automation. It also reduces within-group wage dispersion for exposed groups. Automation-driven rent dissipation is inefficient and reduces (and could even negate) the productivity gains from automation. Using data for the US from 1980 to 2016, we find evidence of sizable rent dissipation and reduced within-group wage dispersion due to automation. Using these estimates and accounting for equilibrium effects, we estimate that automation accounts for 52% of the increase in between-group inequality in the US since 1980, with rent dissipation being responsible for a fifth of this contribution. We also estimate that inefficient rent dissipation offset 60–90% of the productivity gains from automation since 1980.
papers.zh_title: 自动化与租金消散：对工资、不平等和生产率的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了在存在劳动力市场扭曲（导致某些工作中工人获得高于机会成本的工资，即租金）的经济体中自动化的影响。我们证明，自动化瞄准高租金任务，消散租金并放大自动化带来的工资损失。它还会减少受影响群体的组内工资离散度。自动化驱动的租金消散是低效的，会降低（甚至可能抵消）自动化的生产率收益。利用1980年至2016年的美国数据，我们发现了自动化导致大量租金消散和组内工资离散度降低的证据。利用这些估计并考虑均衡效应，我们估算出自1980年以来，自动化解释了美国组间不平等增加的52%，其中租金消散贡献了其中的五分之一。我们还估算，低效的租金消散抵消了自1980年以来自动化生产率收益的60%至90%。

papers.title: The Effect of E-Cigarette Flavor Bans on Tobacco Use
papers.authors: Chad D. Cotti, Charles J. Courtemanche, Yang Liang, Johanna Catherine Maclean, Erik T. Nesson, Joseph J. Sabia
papers.abstract: Advocates for sales restrictions on flavored e-cigarettes argue that flavors appeal to young people and lead them down a path to nicotine addiction. This study is among the first to examine the effect of state and local restrictions on the sale of flavored electronic nicotine delivery system (ENDS) products on youth and young adult tobacco use. Using data from the State and National Youth Risk Behavior Surveys, we find that the adoption of an ENDS flavor restriction reduces frequent and everyday youth ENDS use by 1.2 to 2.5 percentage points. Auxiliary analyses of the Behavioral Risk Factor Surveillance System show similar effects on ENDS use for young adults ages 18-20. However, we also detect evidence of an unintended effect of ENDS flavor restrictions that is especially clear among 18-20-year-olds: inducing substitution to combustible cigarette smoking. Finally, there is no evidence that ENDS flavor restrictions affect ENDS use among adults aged 21 and older or non-tobacco-related health behaviors such as binge drinking and illicit drug use.
papers.zh_title: 电子烟口味禁令对烟草使用的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 支持限制调味电子烟销售的人士认为，口味对年轻人有吸引力，并引导他们走上尼古丁成瘾的道路。本研究是首批考察州和地方对调味电子尼古丁传送系统产品销售的限制，对青少年和青年烟草使用影响的研究之一。利用州和全国青少年风险行为调查的数据，我们发现，实施电子尼古丁传送系统口味限制，会使青少年频繁和日常使用电子尼古丁传送系统的比例降低1.2至2.5个百分点。对行为风险因素监测系统的辅助分析显示，对18至20岁年轻人的电子尼古丁传送系统使用有类似影响。然而，我们也检测到电子尼古丁传送系统口味限制存在意外效应的证据，这在18至20岁人群中尤为明显：诱导他们转向可燃香烟。最后，没有证据表明电子尼古丁传送系统口味限制会影响21岁及以上成年人的电子尼古丁传送系统使用，或影响与烟草无关的健康行为，如酗酒和非法药物使用。

papers.title: Comprehensive E-cigarette Flavor Bans and Tobacco Use among Youth, Young Adults, and Adults
papers.authors: Henry Saffer, Selen Ozdogan, Michael Grossman, Daniel L. Dench, Dhaval M. Dave
papers.abstract: The vast majority of youth e-cigarette users consume flavored e-cigarettes, raising concerns from public health advocates that flavors may drive youth initiation and continued use of e-cigarettes. Flavors drew further notice from the public health community following the sudden outbreak of lung injury among vapers in 2019, prompting several states to enact sweeping bans on flavored e-cigarettes. In this study, we examine the effects of these comprehensive bans on e-cigarette use and potential spillovers into other tobacco use by youth, young adults, and adults. We utilize both standard difference-in-differences (DID) and synthetic DID methods, in conjunction with four national data sets. We find evidence that young adults decrease their use of the banned flavored e-cigarettes as well as their overall e-cigarette use, by about two percentage points, while increasing cigarette use. For youth, there is some suggestive evidence of increasing cigarette use, though these results are contaminated by pre-trend differences between treatment and control units. The bans have no effect on e-cigarette and smoking participation among older adults (ages 25+). Our findings suggest that statewide comprehensive flavor bans may have generated an unintended consequence by encouraging substitution towards traditional smoking in some populations.
papers.zh_title: 全面电子烟口味禁令与青少年、年轻成人及成人的烟草使用
papers.zh_abstract: 绝大多数青少年电子烟使用者消费的是调味电子烟，这引发了公共卫生倡导者的担忧，即口味可能推动青少年开始并持续使用电子烟。在2019年电子烟使用者中突然爆发肺损伤事件后，口味问题进一步引起了公共卫生界的关注，促使多个州颁布了全面禁止调味电子烟的法令。在本研究中，我们考察了这些全面禁令对电子烟使用的影响，以及对青少年、年轻成人和成人其他烟草使用的潜在溢出效应。我们同时使用了标准的双重差分法和合成双重差分法，并结合了四个全国性数据集。我们发现证据表明，年轻成人减少了被禁调味电子烟的使用以及整体电子烟使用，降幅约为两个百分点，同时增加了卷烟使用。对于青少年，有一些提示性证据表明卷烟使用增加，但这些结果受到处理组和对照组之间事前趋势差异的干扰。这些禁令对25岁及以上老年人的电子烟使用和吸烟参与没有影响。我们的研究结果表明，全州范围的全面口味禁令可能产生了意想不到的后果，即鼓励某些人群转向传统吸烟。

papers.title: Post-Neoliberal Globalization: International Trade Rules for Global Prosperity
papers.authors: Martin M. Guzman, Joseph E. Stiglitz
papers.abstract: This paper analyzes frameworks for the design of the rules for international trading, assuming that it is possible to have some rule of law. In the Arrow-Debreu benchmark, where there is no economic power and political power is seemingly irrelevant, there is no need for trade agreements – free trade is the optimal policy for each country. But under even minimal deviations from that benchmark, trade agreements matter. We focus on environments in which there are market failures, technology is endogenous, and there is political power. Power dynamics play, for instance, a critical role in the design, implementation, and enforcement of agreements, with the latter being a critical difference between international agreements and domestic contracts and a key determinant of the feasibility and consequences of agreements. With endogenous technology, trade rules proscribing industrial policies may lead to lower growth and greater cross-country inequalities. Finally, we develop a framework which may be useful in the design and implementation of trade rules.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, ITI, POL；JEL：B17, F13, F15, F50, O24, Q56
papers.zh_title: 后新自由主义全球化：促进全球繁荣的国际贸易规则
papers.zh_abstract: 本文分析了国际贸易规则设计的框架，假设存在某种法治是可能的。在阿罗-德布鲁基准模型中，不存在经济权力，政治权力似乎无关紧要，因此不需要贸易协定——自由贸易对每个国家都是最优政策。但即使在该基准模型的最小偏离下，贸易协定也变得重要。我们聚焦于存在市场失灵、技术内生化以及存在政治权力的环境。例如，权力动态在协定的设计、实施和执行中起着关键作用，后者是国际协定与国内合同之间的关键区别，也是协定可行性和后果的关键决定因素。在技术内生化的情况下，禁止产业政策的贸易规则可能导致增长放缓和国家间不平等加剧。最后，我们开发了一个可能有助于设计和实施贸易规则的框架。

papers.title: Judging the Judges: Indexing of Complex Information Reduces Injustice
papers.authors: Andrew Caplin, Andrei Gomberg, Joyce Sadka
papers.abstract: We demonstrate that cognitive constraints produce injustice in its most paradigmatic form: incorrect verdicts in judicial trials. Responding to a request for help, we conducted a field study in Mexican labor courts in which time pressure on the judges leads to their making mistakes, many of which are appealed. All we did was to index pages to random case files to help judges quickly find relevant information. We made no other changes whatsoever. Our treatment greatly reduced successful appeals, fully 50% in complex cases, and resulted in judicial opinions that were shorter and more on point. These findings have already informed recent reforms in Mexico's labor court procedures and have broader applicability.
papers.zh_title: 评判法官：复杂信息的索引化减少不公正
papers.zh_abstract: 我们证明认知约束会导致其最典型形式的不公正：司法审判中的错误判决。应请求提供帮助，我们在墨西哥劳动法院进行了一项实地研究，其中法官面临的时间压力导致他们犯错，其中许多错误被上诉。我们所做的只是将随机案卷的页面编入索引，以帮助法官快速找到相关信息。我们没有进行任何其他更改。我们的处理大大减少了成功上诉，在复杂案件中减少了整整50%，并使得司法意见更简短、更切题。这些发现已为墨西哥劳动法院程序近期的改革提供了信息，并具有更广泛的适用性。

papers.title: Market Design in Regulated Health Insurance Markets: Risk Adjustment vs. Subsidies
papers.authors: Liran Einav, Amy Finkelstein, Pietro Tebaldi
papers.abstract: Health insurance is increasingly provided through managed competition, in which subsidies for consumers and risk adjustment for insurers are key market design instruments. We illustrate theoretically that, in markets with adverse selection, subsidies provide greater flexibility in tailoring premiums to heterogeneous buyers, and produce equilibria with lower markups and greater enrollment. We assess these effects quantitatively using estimates from the California ACA marketplace.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, IO, PE；JEL：G22, G28, H51, I13
papers.zh_title: 监管健康保险市场中的市场设计：风险调整与补贴
papers.zh_abstract: 健康保险越来越多地通过管理竞争来提供，其中对消费者的补贴和对保险公司的风险调整是关键的市场设计工具。我们从理论上说明，在存在逆向选择的市场中，补贴在针对异质性买家定制保费方面提供了更大的灵活性，并产生具有更低加成率和更高参保率的均衡。我们利用加州ACA市场的估计来定量评估这些效应。

papers.title: Book-Value Wealth Taxation, Capital Income Taxation, and Innovation
papers.authors: Fatih Guvenen, Gueorgui Kambourov, Burhan Kuruscu, Sergio Ocampo-Diaz
papers.abstract: When is a wealth tax preferable to a capital income tax? When is the opposite true? More generally, can capital taxation be structured to improve productivity, incentivize innovation, and ultimately increase welfare? We study these questions theoretically in an infinite-horizon model with entrepreneurs and workers, in which entrepreneurial firms differ in their productivity and are subject to collateral constraints. The stationary equilibrium features heterogeneous returns and misallocation of capital. We show that increasing the wealth tax increases aggregate productivity. The gains result from the “use-it-or-lose-it” effect of wealth taxes when returns are heterogeneous, which causes a reallocation of capital from entrepreneurs with low productivity to those with high productivity. Furthermore, if the capital income tax is adjusted to balance the government's budget, aggregate capital, output, and wages also increase. We then study the welfare maximizing combination of wealth and capital income taxes and show that the optimal mix shifts towards a higher wealth tax and a lower capital income tax as the capital intensity of production increases. For a range of plausible parameter values, the optimal wealth tax is positive, whereas the capital income tax can be positive or negative (a subsidy). We then endogenize the entrepreneurial productivity distribution by introducing either ex ante innovation or entrepreneurial effort in production and show that this strengthens our results: by allowing entrepreneurs to keep more of the upside relative to a capital income tax, a wealth tax incentivizes more innovation and entrepreneurial effort, leading to larger increases in productivity, output, and welfare.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, LS, ME, PE, PR；JEL：E21, E25, E60, H21, H24, J31
papers.zh_title: 账面财富税、资本所得税与创新
papers.zh_abstract: 何时财富税优于资本所得税？何时相反？更一般地说，资本税能否被设计成提高生产率、激励创新并最终增加福利？我们在一个包含企业家和工人的无限期界模型中从理论上研究这些问题，其中企业家企业具有不同的生产率并面临抵押约束。稳态均衡具有异质性回报和资本错配的特征。我们表明，提高财富税会提高总体生产率。收益源于当回报异质时财富税的“要么使用，要么失去”效应，这导致资本从低生产率企业家重新配置到高生产率企业家。此外，如果调整资本所得税以平衡政府预算，总资本、产出和工资也会增加。然后，我们研究财富税和资本所得税的福利最大化组合，并表明随着生产资本密集度的提高，最优组合会转向更高的财富税和更低的资本所得税。在一系列合理的参数值下，最优财富税为正，而资本所得税可以为正或负（补贴）。然后，我们通过引入事前创新或生产中的企业家努力来内生化企业家生产率分布，并表明这强化了我们的结果：通过允许企业家相对于资本所得税保留更多上行收益，财富税激励了更多创新和企业家努力，导致生产率、产出和福利的更大增长。

papers.title: Extraordinary Labor Market Developments and the 2022-23 Disinflation
papers.authors: Steven J. Davis
papers.abstract: Two extraordinary U.S. labor market developments facilitated the sharp disinflation in 2022-23 without raising the unemployment rate. First, pandemic-driven infection worries and social distancing intentions caused a sizable drag on labor force participation that began to reverse in the first quarter of 2022, and perhaps earlier. As the reversal unfolded, it raised labor supply and reduced wage growth. Second, the pandemic-instigated shift to work from home (WFH) raised the amenity value of employment in many jobs and for many workers. This development lowered wage-growth pressures along the transition path to a new equilibrium with pay packages that recognized higher remote work levels and their benefits to workers. Surveys of business executives imply that the shift to WFH lowered average wage growth by two percentage points from spring 2021 to spring 2023. A direct inspection finds that average real wage growth from 2021 Q1 to 2024 Q1 in the U.S. economy was at least 3.5 to 4.4 ppts below the path suggested by pre-pandemic experience. This large shortfall in real wage growth aligns well with the interpretation of the 2022-23 disinflation offered here.
papers.zh_title: 非凡的劳动力市场发展与2022-23年的去通胀
papers.zh_abstract: 美国劳动力市场的两项非凡发展促进了2022-23年期间在不提高失业率的情况下实现急剧去通胀。首先，疫情引发的感染担忧和社交距离意愿对劳动力参与率造成了显著拖累，这种拖累从2022年第一季度（或许更早）开始逆转。随着逆转的展开，劳动力供给增加，工资增长放缓。其次，疫情引发的居家办公转变提高了许多工作岗位和许多工人的就业舒适度价值。这一发展在向新均衡的过渡路径上降低了工资增长压力，新均衡的薪酬方案承认了更高的远程工作水平及其对工人的益处。对商业高管的调查表明，从2021年春季到2023年春季，向居家办公的转变使平均工资增长率降低了两个百分点。直接检查发现，从2021年第一季度到2024年第一季度，美国经济中的平均实际工资增长至少比疫情前经验所暗示的路径低3.5至4.4个百分点。实际工资增长的这一巨大缺口与本文对2022-23年去通胀的解释高度吻合。

papers.title: Does the EITC Reduce Caregiving for Parents?
papers.authors: Katherine Michelmore, Anna Wiersma Strauss, Emily E. Wiemers
papers.abstract: Families provide substantial care to older adults with functional limitations. Policies that incentivize work have the potential to reduce this valuable care. This study uses the Health and Retirement Study (HRS) and a simulated benefit approach to examine the consequences of increases in the generosity of the Earned Income Tax Credit (EITC), a work-contingent cash benefit, for the care that parents receive from their EITC-eligible daughters. We find that a $500 increase in EITC generosity reduces the care that parents age 65+ with functional limitations receive by 13-24 hours per month, and that this is due to a reduction in the likelihood of receiving intensive care (40+ hours per month). We assess the full effect of this reduction in caregiving by examining whether financial transfers increase as a substitute for care, whether other children or spouses fill the care gap, and whether paid caregiving increases in response to declines in family care. We find no evidence of increased financial transfers and that care gaps remain for older parents that are not filled by other children, spouses, or paid care providers. We conclude that an unintended consequence of the EITC is that the older parents of EITC recipients receive less care overall in response to increased EITC benefit generosity.
papers.zh_title: 劳动所得税抵免是否会减少对父母的照料？
papers.zh_abstract: 家庭为有功能限制的老年人提供了大量照料。激励工作的政策有可能减少这种宝贵的照料。本研究使用健康与退休研究数据和模拟工具方法，考察劳动所得税抵免（一种与工作挂钩的现金福利）慷慨程度的提高，对符合EITC条件的女儿所获得的父母照料的影响。我们发现，EITC慷慨程度的提高减少了父母从符合EITC条件的女儿那里获得的照料，尤其是对年长父母和有功能限制的父母而言。为了评估这种照料减少的全面影响，我们考察了财务转移是否作为减少照料的替代而增加，其他成年子女是否填补了符合EITC条件的女儿留下的照料缺口，以及付费照料是否因家庭照料的减少而增加。我们没有发现财务转移增加的证据，并且年长父母的照料缺口仍然存在，未被其他子女或付费照料提供者填补。我们得出结论，EITC的一个意外后果是，随着EITC福利慷慨程度的提高，EITC领取者的年长父母总体上从子女那里获得的照料减少了。

papers.title: Rent Guarantee Insurance
papers.authors: Boaz Abramson, Stijn Van Nieuwerburgh
papers.abstract: A rent guarantee insurance (RGI) policy makes a limited number of rent payments to the landlord on behalf of an insured tenant unable to pay rent due to a negative income or health expenditure shock. We introduce RGI in a rich quantitative equilibrium model of housing insecurity and show it increases welfare by improving risk sharing across idiosyncratic and aggregate states of the world, reducing the need for a large security deposits, and reducing homelessness which imposes large costs on society. While unrestricted access is not financially viable with either private or public insurance providers due to moral hazard and adverse selection, restricting access can restore viability. Private insurers must target better off renters to break even, while public insurers focus on households most at-risk of homelessness.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, PE；JEL：E20, E62, G11, G18, G22, G5, R21, R38
papers.zh_title: 租金担保保险
papers.zh_abstract: 租金担保保险单代表无法支付租金的受保租户（因负面收入或健康支出冲击）向房东支付有限次数的租金。我们在一个丰富的住房不安全定量均衡模型中引入RGI，并表明它通过改善跨特定和总体状态的世界的风险分担、减少对大量保证金的需求以及减少给社会带来巨大成本的无家可归现象，从而提高了福利。虽然由于道德风险和逆向选择，无论是私人还是公共保险提供者，无限制的准入在财务上均不可行，但限制准入可以恢复可行性。私人保险公司必须瞄准较富裕的租户才能实现盈亏平衡，而公共保险公司则专注于最有可能无家可归的家庭。

papers.title: Automating Short-Term Payroll Savings: Evidence from Four Large U.K. Experiments
papers.authors: Sarah Holmes Berk, James J. Choi, Jay Garg, John Beshears, David Laibson
papers.abstract: Automatic enrollment is often used to increase retirement savings. What are the effects of using it (or, alternatively, requiring an active enrollment choice) to increase short-term savings? We evaluate two experiments in the U.K. at employers that enable workers to set up payroll contributions to fund short-term savings accounts. In the first experiment (N = 7,404), employees at two firms were randomly assigned opt-in, opt-out, or active choice enrollment into the short-term savings program. Nine months later, participation was 48 percentage points higher under automatic enrollment than opt-in enrollment, and average balances were £114 higher. In the second experiment (N = 3,605), after years of offering opt-in payroll contributions to fund a short-term savings account, the employer changed to opt-out enrollment for new hires only. In tenure month 18, participation in the short-term savings program was 48 percentage points higher under automatic enrollment, and average balances were £193 higher.
papers.zh_title: 自动化短期工资储蓄：来自英国四项大型实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 自动注册常被用于增加退休储蓄。使用它（或者，替代地，要求主动注册选择）来增加短期储蓄的效果如何？我们评估了英国雇主的两项实验，这些实验使工人能够设立工资缴款来资助短期储蓄账户。在第一项实验（N = 7,404）中，两家公司的员工被随机分配到短期储蓄计划的默认加入、默认退出或主动选择注册。九个月后，自动注册下的参与率比默认加入注册高出48个百分点，平均余额高出114英镑。在第二项实验（N = 3,605）中，在提供多年默认加入工资缴款以资助短期储蓄账户后，雇主改为仅对新员工实行默认退出注册。在任职第18个月时，自动注册下短期储蓄计划的参与率高出48个百分点，平均余额高出193英镑。

papers.title: The Impact of Price Transparency in Outpatient Provider Markets
papers.authors: Kayleigh Barnes, Sherry A. Glied, Benjamin R. Handel, Grace Kim
papers.abstract: Medical provider price transparency is often touted as a way to lower health care spending. But the impact of price transparency is theoretically ambiguous: it could lower health care spending via increased consumer price shopping or improved insurer bargaining but could also raise health care prices via improved provider bargaining or provider collusion. We conduct a randomized-controlled trial to examine the impact of a state-wide medical charge transparency tool in outpatient provider markets in New York State. In the experiment, individual providers’ billed charges (list prices) were released randomly at the level of the procedure and three-digit zipcode. We use a comprehensive commercial claims database to assess the impact of this intervention and find that it leads to a small increase in overall billed charges (+0.75%). This effect is concentrated among low-priced providers in markets with low out-of-network spending, suggesting that the transparency tool improves provider pricing information. We find no evidence of quantity effects. Results do not vary consistently across specialty groups, market concentration, frequency of service use, or frequency of website use. These results are consistent with price transparency having a minimal effect on consumer shopping while slightly improving provider information about competitors’ charges.
papers.zh_title: 门诊服务市场价格透明化的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 医疗服务价格透明化常被宣传为降低医疗保健支出的方式。但价格透明化的影响在理论上是不确定的：它可能通过增加消费者价格比较或改善保险公司议价来降低医疗保健支出，但也可能通过改善医疗服务提供者议价或提供者合谋来提高医疗价格。我们进行了一项随机对照试验，以考察纽约州门诊服务市场中全州医疗收费透明工具的影响。在实验中，个体提供者的收费价格（标价）在程序和三位邮政编码层面被随机公布。我们使用一个全面的商业索赔数据库来评估这一干预的影响，发现它导致总体收费价格小幅上涨（+0.75%）。这一效应集中在低价格提供者和网络外支出较低的市场，表明透明工具改善了提供者的定价信息。我们没有发现数量效应的证据。结果在不同专业组、市场集中度、服务使用频率或网站使用频率之间并不一致。这些结果与价格透明化对消费者购物影响极小，同时略微改善提供者关于竞争对手收费价格信息的观点一致。

papers.title: Property Insurance and Disaster Risk: New Evidence from Mortgage Escrow Data
papers.authors: Benjamin J. Keys, Philip Mulder
papers.abstract: We develop a new dataset to study homeowners insurance using over 74 million premiums from 2014–2024 inferred from mortgage escrow payments. We document rapidly rising premiums and a doubling of the pass-through from disaster risk into premiums. Using variation in correlated wildfire and hurricane exposure, we show that the increase in the risk-to-premium gradient was accelerated by a repricing of catastrophic risk in global capital markets. Premium increases are capitalized into home values, reducing home price growth by over $40,000 in the most exposed zipcodes. The premium and home price effects are larger in areas facing rising climate risk.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, PE；JEL：G21, G22, G52, Q54, R31
papers.zh_title: 财产保险与灾害风险：来自抵押贷款托管账户数据的新证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用从2014年至2024年从抵押贷款托管账户支付中推断出的超过7400万笔保费，开发了一个新的数据集来研究房主保险。我们记录了保费的快速上涨以及灾害风险向保费传导率的翻倍。利用相关野火和飓风暴露的差异，我们表明风险-保费梯度的增加因全球资本市场对巨灾风险的重新定价而加速。保费上涨被资本化到房屋价值中，使风险最高的邮政编码区的房价增长减少了超过40,000美元。保费和房价效应在面临日益增长的气候风险的地区更大。

papers.title: Fertility Beliefs and Outcomes: The Role of Relationship Status and Attractiveness
papers.authors: Yifan Gong, Tyler Skura, Ralph Stinebrickner, Todd R. Stinebrickner
papers.abstract: Unique data from the Berea Panel Study provides new evidence about fertility outcomes before age 30 and beliefs about these outcomes elicited soon after college graduation. Comparing outcomes and beliefs yields a measure of belief accuracy. Individuals who are unmarried and not in relationships at age 24 are extremely optimistic about the probability of having children, while married individuals have very accurate beliefs. Novel attractiveness measures are central for understanding fertility beliefs and outcomes for females but not for males. Marriage is a mechanism that is relevant for understanding differences in beliefs, outcomes, and misperceptions across relationship and attractiveness groups.
papers.zh_title: 生育信念与结果：关系状态和吸引力的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 来自伯里亚小组研究的独特数据提供了关于30岁前生育结果以及大学毕业后不久对这些结果的信念的新证据。比较结果和信念得出了信念准确性的衡量标准。24岁时未婚且未处于恋爱关系中的个体对生育子女的概率极为乐观，而已婚个体的信念非常准确。新颖的吸引力衡量标准对于理解女性的生育信念和结果至关重要，但对男性则不然。婚姻是一个机制，对于理解不同关系和吸引力群体在信念、结果和误解方面的差异具有相关性。

papers.title: The Chronic Disease Index: Analyzing Health Inequalities Over the Lifecycle
papers.authors: Kaveh Danesh, Jonathan T. Kolstad, William D. Parker, Johannes Spinnewijn
papers.abstract: The rich live longer than the poor, but relatively little is known about the evolution of health inequality across the lifecycle. Using rich administrative data from the Netherlands, we develop an index of chronic disease burden based on the projected contribution to old-age mortality. Chronic conditions account for one-third of the mortality gap in old age. Using our index we demonstrate that health inequality arises much earlier in life; by age 35, the bottom half of the income distribution has the same disease burden as those age 50 in the top half. Approximately 60% of the divergence across income groups is due to low-income individuals developing chronic illness at a faster rate, rather than chronically ill individuals sorting into lower-income groups. Using linked health survey data, we then examine the contributions of various mediators to the incidence of chronic diseases over the life cycle. Socioeconomic and geographic factors explain most of the variation, while individual health behaviors play a moderate role. Our findings align with calls to target health policies toward early-life social determinants of health.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, CH, EH, PE；JEL：I1, I12, I14
papers.zh_title: 慢性病指数：分析生命周期中的健康不平等
papers.zh_abstract: 富人比穷人活得更长，但关于健康不平等在整个生命周期中的演变知之甚少。利用来自荷兰的丰富行政数据，我们基于对老年死亡率的预测贡献，开发了一个慢性病负担指数。慢性病解释了老年死亡率差距的三分之一。利用我们的指数，我们证明健康不平等在生命早期就已出现；到35岁时，收入分布下半部分人群的疾病负担与收入上半部分50岁人群相同。大约60%的收入群体间差异是由于低收入个体以更快的速度患上慢性病，而不是慢性病患者流入低收入群体。利用关联的健康调查数据，我们随后考察了各种中介因素对生命周期中慢性病发病率的贡献。社会经济和地理因素解释了大部分变异，而个人健康行为则起到中等作用。我们的发现与将健康政策瞄准生命早期健康社会决定因素的呼吁相一致。

papers.title: Traumatic Financial Experiences and Persistent Changes in Financial Behavior: Evidence from the Freedman's Savings Bank
papers.authors: Vellore Arthi, Gary Richardson, Mark Van Orden
papers.abstract: The failure of the Freedman's Savings Bank (FSB), one of the only Black-serving banks in the early post-bellum South, was an economic catastrophe and one of the great episodes of racial exploitation in post-Emancipation history. It was also most Black Americans' first experience of banking. Can events like these permanently alter financial preferences and behavior? To test this, we examine the impact of FSB collapse on life insurance-holding, an accessible alternative savings vehicle over the late 19th and early 20th centuries. We document a sharp and persistent increase in insurance demand in affected counties following the shock, driven disproportionately by Black customers. We also use FSB migrant flows to disentangle place-based and cohort-based effects, thus identifying psychological and cultural scarring as a distinct mechanism underlying the shift in financial behavior induced by the bank's collapse. Horizontal and intergenerational transmission of preferences help explain the shock’s persistent effects on financial behavior.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, DAE, IFM；JEL：D63, G21, G22, G51, G52, I30, N21, N22, N31, N32
papers.zh_title: 创伤性金融经历与金融行为的持久变化：来自自由民储蓄银行的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 自由民储蓄银行（FSB）是战后初期南部少数几家服务于黑人的银行之一，其倒闭是一场经济灾难，也是解放后历史上种族剥削的重大事件之一。对大多数美国黑人而言，这也是他们首次接触银行业。此类事件是否会永久性地改变金融偏好和行为？为检验这一假设，我们考察了FSB倒闭对19世纪末20世纪初一种可获得的替代储蓄工具——人寿保险持有——的影响。我们记录了受冲击县保险需求的急剧且持久的增长，这种增长主要由黑人客户驱动。我们还利用FSB移民流来分离基于地点和基于队列的影响，从而将心理和文化创伤识别为银行倒闭所引发的金融行为转变背后的独特机制。偏好的横向和代际传递有助于解释该冲击对金融行为的持久影响。

papers.title: Historical Differences in Female-Owned Manufacturing Establishments: The United States, 1850-1880
papers.authors: Ruveyda Gozen, Richard Hornbeck, Anders Humlum, Martin Rotemberg
papers.abstract: We characterize female-owned manufacturing establishments using newly digitized manuscripts from the US Census of Manufactures (1850, 1860, 1870, 1880). Female-owned establishments were smaller than male-owned establishments and had lower capital-to-output ratios, which could reflect more-constrained financial access and other distortions. Female-owned establishments employed more women and paid women higher wages, creating a potential cycle between increased female business ownership and increased female labor market participation. Female-owned establishments concentrated in sub-industries like women's clothing and millinery, which is associated with some but not all of these differences. We also show how female owners differed from other women in the Population Census.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, DAE, DEV, EFG, IO, LS, PR；JEL：M1
papers.zh_title: 女性所有制制造业企业的历史差异：美国，1850-1880年
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用新数字化的美国制造业普查手稿（1850年、1860年、1870年、1880年）来刻画女性所有制制造业企业的特征。女性所有制企业规模小于男性所有制企业，且资本产出比更低，这可能反映了更受限制的融资渠道和其他扭曲因素。女性所有制企业雇佣更多女性，并向女性支付更高工资，从而在女性企业所有权增加与女性劳动力市场参与增加之间形成了一个潜在循环。女性所有制企业集中于女装和女帽等子行业，这与部分（但非全部）上述差异相关。我们还展示了女性所有者与人口普查中其他女性之间的差异。

papers.title: Political Connections, Allocation of Stimulus Spending, and the Jobs Multiplier
papers.authors: Joonkyu Choi, Veronika Penciakova, Felipe Saffie
papers.abstract: We study the role of firms’ political influence on the effectiveness of government spending using ARRA as a laboratory. Through an IV approach, we show that a 10 percentage points increase in the share of politically connected spending lowers the job creation effect of stimulus by 33 percent at the state level. We exploit ex-post close state-level elections to establish that firms that contributed to winning candidates create fewer jobs after winning grants. Using a quantitative general equilibrium model, we show that politically connected spending also lowers the aggregate jobs multiplier, and that the dampening effect is rationalized by connected firms charging higher markups.
papers.zh_title: 政治关联、刺激支出分配与就业乘数
papers.zh_abstract: 我们以《美国复苏与再投资法案》（ARRA）为实验室，研究企业政治影响力对政府支出有效性的作用。通过工具变量方法，我们表明，在州层面，政治关联支出份额每增加10个百分点，刺激计划的就业创造效应就会降低33%。我们利用事后激烈的州级选举来证明，向获胜候选人捐款的企业在获得拨款后创造的就业岗位更少。通过一个定量一般均衡模型，我们表明政治关联支出也会降低总体就业乘数，并且这种抑制效应可以通过关联企业收取更高的加成率来合理化。

papers.title: Printing Away the Mortgages: Fiscal Inflation and the Post-Covid Boom
papers.authors: William F. Diamond, Tim Landvoigt, Germán Sánchez Sánchez
papers.abstract: We analyze the impact of fiscal and monetary stimulus in an economy with mortgage debt, where inflation redistributes from savers to borrowers. We show theoretically that fiscal transfers without future tax increases cause a surge in inflation, increasing consumption demand and house prices. The power of fiscal stimulus grows when borrowers are more indebted. We then show quantitatively that transfers followed by easy monetary policy cause a surge in inflation which helps explain features of the post-Covid boom, including a boom in output and house prices. This boom comes with a longer-term contraction, since redistribution reduces borrower labor supply.
papers.zh_title: 印钞还贷：财政通胀与后疫情繁荣
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了在存在抵押贷款债务的经济体中，财政和货币刺激的影响，其中通胀将财富从储蓄者重新分配给借款人。我们从理论上证明，没有未来增税的财政转移会导致通胀飙升，增加消费需求和房价。当借款人负债更高时，财政刺激的效力会增强。然后，我们定量表明，转移支付之后伴随宽松货币政策会导致通胀飙升，这有助于解释后疫情繁荣的特征，包括产出和房价的繁荣。这种繁荣伴随着长期收缩，因为再分配减少了借款人的劳动力供给。

papers.title: U.S. Liquid Government Liabilities and Emerging Market Capital Flows
papers.authors: Annie Soyean Lee, Charles Engel
papers.abstract: Empirical work finds that flows of investments from the U.S. and other high income countries to emerging markets increase during times of quantitative easing (QE) by the U.S. Federal Reserve, and the reverse movement occurs under quantitative tightening. We offer new evidence to confirm these findings, and then propose a theory based on the liquidity of U.S. government liabilities held by the public. We hypothesize that QE, by increasing liquidity, offers greater flexibility for investors that might be concerned their funds will be tied up when shocks to income or investment opportunities arise. With the assurance that some of their portfolio can be readily sold in liquid markets, rich country investors are more willing to increase investments in illiquid loans to emerging markets. The effect of increasing the liquidity of U.S. government liabilities on investments in EMs may even be stronger during times of greater uncertainty. We find evidence to support our interpretation: QE lowers covered interest parity deviations for the dollar, as our model predicts.
papers.zh_title: 美国流动性政府负债与新兴市场资本流动
papers.zh_abstract: 实证研究发现，在美国联邦储备系统实施量化宽松（QE）期间，从美国和其他高收入国家流向新兴市场的投资增加，而在量化紧缩期间则出现反向流动。我们提供了新的证据来证实这些发现，然后基于公众持有的美国政府负债的流动性提出一个理论。我们假设，量化宽松通过增加流动性，为那些担心在收入或投资机会受到冲击时资金被套牢的投资者提供了更大的灵活性。由于确信其部分投资组合可以在流动性市场上随时出售，富裕国家的投资者更愿意增加对新兴市场非流动性贷款的投资。在不确定性更高的时期，增加美国政府负债流动性对新兴市场投资的影响甚至可能更强。我们发现了支持我们解释的证据：正如我们的模型所预测的，量化宽松降低了美元的抛补利率平价偏差。

papers.title: Effects of the Expansion of the Earned Income Tax Credit for Childless Young Adults on Material Wellbeing
papers.authors: Jiwan Lee, Katherine Michelmore, Natasha Pilkauskas, Christopher Wimer
papers.abstract: In 2021, the U.S. Congress temporarily expanded the Earned Income Tax Credit for workers without a qualifying child (childless EITC), to help counteract the impact of the COVID-19 pandemic on lower-wage working adults. This expansion roughly tripled the maximum benefits for qualifying filers and lowered the minimum age to claim the credit from 25 to 19, providing new benefits to low-income young adults. Using data from the Census Bureau’s Household Pulse Survey and a difference-in-differences design, this study is among the first to examine the impact of the expanded childless EITC on young adults’ material hardship (food, housing, and expenses). We find that the temporary expansion led to a significant decrease in housing hardship among low-income, childless, young adults, and suggestive evidence that it also reduced food insufficiency and difficulty with expenses. Overall our findings show that the temporary expansion of the childless EITC helped reduce material hardship among young adults.
papers.zh_title: 针对无子女年轻劳动者的劳动所得税抵免扩大对物质福祉的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 2021年，美国国会暂时扩大了针对无合格子女劳动者（无子女EITC）的劳动所得税抵免，以帮助抵消COVID-19大流行对低工资成年劳动者的影响。此次扩大使合格申报者的最高福利大约增加了两倍，并将申领该抵免的最低年龄从25岁降至19岁，为低收入年轻人提供了新的福利。利用人口普查局家庭脉搏调查的数据和双重差分设计，本研究率先考察了扩大后的无子女EITC对年轻人物质困难（食物、住房和开支）的影响。我们发现，这一临时扩大显著降低了低收入、无子女年轻人的住房困难，并有提示性证据表明它也减少了食物不足和开支困难。总体而言，我们的研究结果表明，无子女EITC的临时扩大有助于减少年轻人的物质困难。

papers.title: Preschool Lottery Admissions and Its Effects on Long-Run Earnings and Outcomes
papers.authors: Randall Akee, Leah R. Clark
papers.abstract: We use an admissions lottery to estimate the effect of a non-means tested preschool program on students’ long-run earnings, employment, family income, household formation, and geographic mobility. We observe long-run outcomes by linking both admitted and non-admitted individuals to confidential administrative data including tax records. Funding for this preschool program comes from an Indigenous organization, which grants Indigenous students admissions preference and free tuition. We find treated children have between 5 to 6 percent higher earnings as young adults. The results are quite large for young women, especially those from the lower half of the initial parental household income distribution. There is also some evidence that children, regardless of gender, from households with below median parental incomes realize the largest average increases in earnings in adulthood. Finally, we find that increased earnings start at ages 21 and older for the treated students. Likely mechanisms include high-quality teachers and curriculum.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS；JEL：I20, I21, I24, I26, J31
papers.zh_title: 学前教育抽签录取及其对长期收入和结果的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用入学抽签来估计一个非经济状况调查型学前教育项目对学生长期收入、就业、家庭收入、家庭组建和地理流动性的影响。我们通过将被录取和未被录取的个人与包括税务记录在内的机密行政数据相链接，来观察长期结果。该学前教育项目的资金来自一个原住民组织，该组织给予原住民学生录取优先权和免费学费。我们发现，接受过该项目的儿童在成年后的收入高出5%至6%。对于年轻女性，尤其是那些来自初始父母家庭收入分布下半部分的女性，结果相当显著。还有一些证据表明，无论性别如何，来自父母收入低于中位数家庭的儿童在成年后收入的平均增幅最大。最后，我们发现，被录取学生的收入增长始于21岁及以后。可能的机制包括高质量的教师和课程。

papers.title: In their Shoes: Empathy through Information
papers.authors: Marianne Andries, Leonardo Bursztyn, Thomas Chaney, Milena Djourelova, Alex Imas
papers.abstract: We explore the mechanics of empathy. We show that information about an outgroup can potentially activate and magnify empathy when presented in conjunction with an experience simulating their struggles. This response increases the willingness to help the struggling group, but it is only activated when the information comes before the experience and not after. We provide evidence for this effect in an immersive virtual reality experiment where participants (“witnesses”) simulate the struggle of unauthorized migrants (“protagonists”). These results are then replicated in a series of controlled lab experiments. We show that this effect operates through an increase in interpersonal similarity, or relatability. If information shifts perceptions of relatability, which changes people’s experience when witnessing the protagonist’s struggles, then it magnifies their empathetic response and drives them to engage in more prosocial behavior. Together, our evidence suggests that the ability to put oneself in the shoes of another person or group can be enhanced by activating empathy through simple information provision.
papers.zh_title: 设身处地：信息引发的共情
papers.zh_abstract: 我们探索共情的机制。我们表明，关于外群体的信息，当与模拟其困境的经历相结合呈现时，有可能激活并放大共情。这种反应会增加帮助困境群体的意愿，但只有当信息出现在经历之前而非之后时才会被激活。我们在一个沉浸式虚拟现实实验中为这种效应提供了证据，参与者（“见证者”）模拟了未经授权的移民（“主角”）的困境。这些结果随后在一系列受控的实验室实验中得到了复制。我们表明，这种效应是通过增加人际相似性或可关联性来发挥作用的。如果信息改变了对可关联性的感知，从而改变了人们在目睹主角困境时的体验，那么它就会放大他们的共情反应，并驱使他们从事更多的亲社会行为。总之，我们的证据表明，通过简单的信息提供来激活共情，可以增强设身处地为他人或群体着想的能力。

papers.title: Creative Destruction, Stock Return Volatility, and the Number of Listed Firms
papers.authors: Söhnke M. Bartram, Gregory W. Brown, René M. Stulz
papers.abstract: Average idiosyncratic volatility and firm idiosyncratic volatility increase with the number of listed firms. Average industry idiosyncratic volatility increases with the number of listed firms in the industry. We ex-plain the relation between idiosyncratic volatility and the number of listed firms through Schumpeterian creative destruction. We show that Schumpeterian creative destruction increases as the number of listed firms increases. However, there is no consistent evidence of an incremental effect of the number of non-listed firms on idiosyncratic volatility either in the aggregate or at the industry level, suggesting that listed firms play a unique role in the dynamism of the economy.
papers.zh_title: 创造性破坏、股票收益波动率与上市公司数量
papers.zh_abstract: 平均特质波动率和公司特质波动率随上市公司数量的增加而上升。行业平均特质波动率随该行业上市公司数量的增加而上升。我们通过熊彼特式创造性破坏来解释特质波动率与上市公司数量之间的关系。我们表明，随着上市公司数量的增加，熊彼特式创造性破坏也会加剧。然而，无论是在总体层面还是在行业层面，都没有一致的证据表明非上市公司数量对特质波动率存在增量效应，这表明上市公司在经济活力中扮演着独特角色。

papers.title: Sufficient Statistics for Measuring Forward-Looking Welfare
papers.authors: Lautaro Adamovsky, David Baqaee, Ariel Burstein, Yasutaka Koike-Mori
papers.abstract: We provide a sufficient-statistic method for measuring forward-looking welfare in money-metric terms. The method adapts the money metric to dynamic environments with uncertainty, incomplete markets, and borrowing constraints. Under time separability and using households with negligible idiosyncratic income risk as a reference group, we infer the welfare-relevant value of future consumption from consumptionsaving behavior, given an estimate of the intertemporal elasticity of substitution (EIS). In simulations disciplined by PSID income dynamics, the method tracks true welfare more accurately than net-present-value calculations. Applying the method to PSID households from 2005 to 2019, we estimate dynamic cost-of-living indices below the static CPI benchmark. This is because, controlling for age and real wealth, unconstrained households in 2019 spend a greater share of wealth on consumption than comparable households in 2005. With an EIS below one, this implies a lower perceived cost of future consumption relative to present consumption. We also illustrate how the resulting welfare measure can be used as an outcome in reduced-form work by estimating welfare losses associated with job loss.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, ITI；JEL：C14, D0, D10, D11, E0, E01, E20, I3, J6
papers.zh_title: 衡量前瞻性福利的充分统计量
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种充分统计量方法，用于衡量动态福利的货币化指数。该方法依赖于两个假设：（i）个体的偏好可在当前消费与未来消费之间分离；（ii）一部分家庭不承担不可分散的特质性风险。对于这一群体，我们通过消费-储蓄行为推断未来相对于当前的价值。然后，通过匹配其他所有家庭的预算份额来确定其福利水平。我们的方法能够适应不完全市场、生命周期动机、非理性预期以及非指数贴现，而无需指定函数形式。实施该方法仅需要时间序列价格数据、重复截面收入-资产负债表-支出数据，以及跨期替代弹性的估计值。在模拟中，我们的方法比净现值计算更能准确追踪真实福利，尤其是在存在信贷约束的情况下。应用于PSID数据时，我们的衡量指标与静态指数存在显著差异。我们的估计可用于研究冲击的福利效应，而无需逐一列举这些冲击所影响的每个边际和预测每个时间跨度。

papers.title: International Policy Coordination in a Multisectoral Model of Trade and Health Policy
papers.authors: Viral V. Acharya, Zhengyang Jiang, Robert J. Richmond, Ernst-Ludwig Von Thadden
papers.abstract: We analyze international trade and health policy coordination during a pandemic by developing a two-economy, two-sector trade model integrated into a micro-founded SIR model of infection dynamics. Disease transmission intensity can differ by goods (manufactured versus services and domestic versus foreign). Governments can adopt containment policies to suppress infection spread domestically, and levy import tariffs to prevent infection from abroad. The globally coordinated policy dynamically adjusts both policy instruments heterogeneously across sectors. The more-infected country aggressively contains the pandemic, raising tariffs and tilting the terms of trade in its favor, while the less-infected country lowers tariffs to share its economic pain. In contrast, in the Nash equilibrium of uncoordinated policies the more infected country does not internalize the global spread of the pandemic, lowering tariffs and its terms of trade, especially in the contact-intensive services sector, while the less infected country counters the spread by raising tariffs. Coordination therefore matters: the health-cum-trade war leads to less consumption and production, as well as smaller health gains due to inadequate global diversification of infection curves.
papers.zh_title: 多部门贸易与健康政策模型中的国际政策协调
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过构建一个融入微观基础SIR感染动态模型的两经济体、两部门贸易模型，分析了疫情期间国际贸易与健康政策的协调问题。疾病传播强度可能因商品类型（制造业与服务品、国内与国外）而异。政府可以采取遏制政策以抑制国内感染传播，并征收进口关税以防止境外感染。全球协调政策会动态地、跨部门异质地调整这两种政策工具。感染更严重的国家会积极遏制疫情，提高关税并改善其贸易条件，而感染较轻的国家则会降低关税以分担经济痛苦。相比之下，在非协调政策的纳什均衡中，感染更严重的国家不会将疫情的全球传播内部化，从而降低关税及其贸易条件，尤其是在接触密集型服务部门，而感染较轻的国家则通过提高关税来应对传播。因此，协调至关重要：健康与贸易战会导致消费和生产减少，并且由于感染曲线缺乏全球多样化，健康收益也较小。

papers.title: Dynamic Models, New Gains from Trade?
papers.authors: Christoph Boehm, Andrei A. Levchenko, Nitya Pandalai-Nayar, Hiroshi Toma
papers.abstract: Yes. We state closed-form expressions for steady state gains from trade that apply in a class of dynamic trade models that includes dynamic versions of the Krugman (1980), Melitz (2003), and customer capital (e.g., Arkolakis, 2010) models. As in Arkolakis, Costinot, and Rodríguez-Clare (2012), the gains are a function of the domestic trade share and the long-run elasticity of trade with respect to iceberg trade costs. This elasticity, however, cannot be recovered from the long-run tariff elasticity alone, because the dynamic trade adjustment mechanism present in this class of models increases the difference between the iceberg and the tariff elasticity in the long run. Our main substantive finding is that the dynamic gains from trade are unambiguously greater than those implied by static models, conditional on the same long-run tariff elasticity. We propose an approach to implement the formula by combining tariff elasticity estimates at multiple horizons and demonstrate that the difference in gains relative to static models can be substantial. Finally, accounting for the transition path has a modest impact on the magnitude of the gains from trade, relative to simply comparing steady states using the formula.

papers.title: Turbocharging Profits? Contract Gaming and Revenue Allocation in Healthcare
papers.authors: Atul Gupta, Ambar La Forgia, Adam Sacarny
papers.abstract: Firms often exploit loopholes in government contracts to boost revenues. The welfare consequences of this behavior depend on how firms use the marginal windfall dollar, yet little evidence exists to guide policymakers. This paper studies how hospitals allocated over $3 billion obtained from gaming a Medicare payment loophole. The average gaming hospital increased both Medicare and total revenue by around 10%, implying large spillovers on other payers. Consistent with theories of organizational behavior, nonprofit hospitals deployed most of the windfall toward operating costs, while for-profits deducted the entire amount off their balance sheet, distributing a substantial portion to executives and shareholders. Accordingly, we detect modest reductions in mortality rates at nonprofits but no changes at for-profits. Our results imply that the consequences of such engineered windfalls vary substantially by hospital ownership.
papers.zh_title: 利润增压？医疗保健中的合同漏洞利用与收入分配
papers.zh_abstract: 企业经常利用政府合同中的漏洞来增加收入。这种行为对福利的影响取决于企业如何使用边际意外收入，但指导政策制定者的证据却很少。本文研究了医院如何分配通过利用Medicare支付漏洞获得的超过30亿美元。平均而言，利用漏洞的医院将其Medicare收入和总收入均提高了约10%，这意味着对其他支付方产生了巨大的溢出效应。与组织行为理论一致，非营利医院将大部分意外收入用于运营成本，而营利性医院则将全部金额从其资产负债表中扣除，并将相当一部分分配给高管和股东。相应地，我们检测到非营利医院的死亡率略有下降，但营利医院没有变化。我们的结果表明，这种人为设计的意外收入的后果因医院所有权而异。

papers.title: Fighting Abuse with Prescription Tracking: Mandatory Drug Monitoring and Intimate Partner Violence
papers.authors: Dhaval M. Dave, Bilge Erten, David W. Hummel, Pinar Keskin, Shuo Zhang
papers.abstract: The opioid crisis generates broader societal harms beyond direct health and economic effects, impacting non-users through adverse spillovers on children, families, and communities. We study the spillover effects of a supply-side policy aimed at reducing the over-prescribing of opioids on women’s wellbeing by examining its effects on intimate partner violence (IPV). Using administrative data on incidents reported to law enforcement, in conjunction with quasi-experimental variation in the adoption of stringent mandatory access prescription drug monitoring programs, we find that these policies have generated a downstream benefit for women by significantly reducing their overall exposure to IPV and IPV-involved injuries by 9 to 10 percent. Strongest effects are experienced by groups with higher rates of opioid consumption at baseline, including non-Hispanic Whites. However, we also find a significant uptick in heroin-involved IPV incidents, suggesting substitution into illicit drug consumption. Our results highlight the need to identify high-risk groups prone to switching to illicit opioids and to address this risk through evidence-based policies. Accounting for effects on IPV adds to the estimated societal burden of the opioid epidemic.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LE, PE；JEL：H0, I12, I18, J12, J16, K0
papers.zh_title: 通过处方追踪打击滥用：强制性药物监测与亲密伴侣暴力
papers.zh_abstract: 阿片类药物危机除了直接的健康和经济影响外，还通过不利的溢出效应对儿童、家庭和社区产生更广泛的社会危害。我们通过研究旨在减少阿片类药物过度处方的供给侧政策对亲密伴侣暴力的影响，来考察其对女性福祉的溢出效应。利用向执法部门报告的事件行政数据，并结合各州采用严格的强制性访问处方药监测计划的准实验性变化，我们发现这些政策为女性带来了下游收益，显著降低了她们遭受亲密伴侣暴力的总体风险以及涉及伤害的亲密伴侣暴力事件，降幅为9%至10%。在基线阿片类药物消费率较高的群体中，包括非西班牙裔白人，效果最为显著。然而，我们也发现涉及海洛因的亲密伴侣暴力事件显著增加，这表明存在向非法药物消费的替代。我们的结果强调了识别倾向于转向非法阿片类药物的高风险群体，并通过循证政策应对这一风险的必要性。将亲密伴侣暴力的影响纳入考量，增加了对阿片类药物流行社会负担的估计。

papers.title: Statistical Discrimination and the Distribution of Wages
papers.authors: Prashant Bharadwaj, Rahul Deb, Ludovic Renou
papers.abstract: We characterize the conditions under which the wage distributions for two groups are consistent with a general model of statistical discrimination. We adapt this theoretical characterization to develop a novel empirical test, the rejection of which we interpret as evidence of taste-based discrimination. In doing so, we provide a theoretical foundation via which the wage structure effect in the decomposition of wage distributions can be interpreted as evidence of taste-based discrimination. We provide a proof of concept application using Census and NLSY-79 data, which suggests taste-based discrimination at work against Black male workers in several broad occupation categories.
papers.zh_title: 统计歧视与工资分布
papers.zh_abstract: 我们刻画了两个群体的工资分布与一个一般统计歧视模型相一致的条件。我们调整这一理论刻画，开发了一种新颖的实证检验，我们将对该检验的拒绝解释为基于偏好的歧视的证据。在此过程中，我们提供了一个理论基础，通过该基础，工资分布分解中的工资结构效应可以被解释为基于偏好的歧视的证据。我们利用人口普查和NLSY-79数据提供了一个概念验证应用，该应用表明在几个广泛的职业类别中，针对黑人男性工人的基于偏好的歧视在起作用。

papers.title: Dynamic Targeting: Experimental Evidence from Energy Rebate Programs
papers.authors: Takanori Ida, Takunori Ishihara, Koichiro Ito, Daido Kido, Toru Kitagawa, Shosei Sakaguchi, Shusaku Sasaki
papers.abstract: Economic policies often involve dynamic interventions, in which individuals receive repeated treatments over multiple periods. However, existing economic studies typically focus on static targeting, potentially overlooking valuable information generated by dynamic interventions. We develop a framework for designing optimal dynamic targeting policies that maximize social welfare. We show that dynamic targeting can outperform static targeting through several key mechanisms—learning, habit formation, and adaptive targeting effects—and develop a method to empirically identify these effects. Using a sequential randomized controlled trial (RCT) of a residential energy rebate program, we find that dynamic targeting nearly doubles the social welfare gains relative to static targeting and produces more than five times larger welfare gains than non-targeting policies. We also investigate how households’ anticipatory responses to adaptive assignment rules affect the welfare gains from dynamic targeting.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, IO, LS, PE；JEL：C1, C50, C9, C93, Q4, Q40, Q41, Q48, Q50, Q58
papers.zh_title: 动态定向：来自能源回扣项目的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 经济政策通常涉及动态干预，即个体在多个时期内接受重复处理。然而，现有的经济研究通常侧重于静态定向，可能忽视了动态干预产生的有价值信息。我们开发了一个设计最优动态定向政策的框架，以最大化社会福利。我们表明，动态定向可以通过几个关键机制——学习效应、习惯形成效应和适应性定向效应——优于静态定向，并开发了一种实证识别这些效应的方法。利用一个住宅能源回扣项目的序贯随机对照试验，我们发现动态定向产生的社会福利收益几乎是静态定向的两倍，并且比非定向政策产生的福利收益高出五倍以上。我们还研究了家庭对适应性分配规则的预期反应如何影响动态定向的福利收益。

papers.title: Financial Incentives for Adoption and Kin Guardianship Improve Achievement for Foster Children
papers.authors: David Simon, Aaron Sojourner, Jon Pedersen, Heidi Ombisa Skallet
papers.abstract: This paper reports new evidence that giving financial rewards for adopting a child from foster care or becoming a kin guardian improves the later school performance of these children. It uses linked administrative data to examine a policy change in Minnesota. This change increased the payments to adoptive parents and kin guardians for children ages 6 and older, making them equal to what foster care payments were, but didn't raise payments as much for younger children. Difference-in-differences analysis shows that this policy of equalizing payments increased the average academic achievement of foster children by 31 percent of a standard deviation three years after their cases began. Additionally, the policy raised the total value of payments to these children by about $2,000 during this period. It also led to a 29 percent increase in the monthly chance of moving from foster care to adoption or kin guardianship, improved school stability, and reduced school suspensions. This research contributes to the limited evidence on how financial incentives can encourage adoptions and is one of the first to provide evidence of its positive effects on outcomes beyond the child welfare system.
papers.zh_title: 收养和亲属监护的经济激励改善寄养儿童学业成就
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提供了新证据，表明对从寄养机构收养儿童或成为亲属监护人给予经济奖励，能够改善这些儿童日后的学业表现。研究利用关联行政数据，考察了明尼苏达州的一项政策变化。该政策提高了对6岁及以上儿童收养父母和亲属监护人的支付金额，使其与寄养支付水平持平，但对更年幼儿童的支付提高幅度较小。双重差分分析显示，这项支付均等化政策在案件启动三年后，使寄养儿童的平均学业成就提高了31%的标准差。此外，该政策在此期间使这些儿童获得的支付总额增加了约2000美元。它还导致每月从寄养转向收养或亲属监护的概率提高了29%，改善了学校稳定性，并减少了停学处分。本研究为经济激励如何促进收养的有限证据做出了贡献，并且是首批提供证据表明其对儿童福利系统以外结果具有积极影响的研究之一。

papers.title: Custom Proxy Voting Advice
papers.authors: Edwin Hu, Nadya Malenko, Jonathon Zytnick
papers.abstract: This paper studies institutional investors’ decision-making using novel data from a major proxy advisor. We highlight the significant role of customized proxy advice in shaping shareholders’ voting decisions. About 80% of funds receive customized advice, and custom recommendations differ substantially from benchmark recommendations. We show that customization plays two key roles. First, it helps shareholders express their ideologies through the vote. Second, it facilitates shareholders’ decision-making process by reducing the need to pay attention to every proposal individually and enabling focus on the more important proposals. Customization thus influences both the aggregation of preferences and the aggregation of information in voting outcomes. Our findings offer a new perspective on the role of proxy advisors and suggest a shift away from solely focusing on benchmark recommendations.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, LE；JEL：D72, G23, G34, G38, K22
papers.zh_title: 定制代理投票建议
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用一家主要代理顾问机构的新数据，研究机构投资者的决策过程。我们强调了定制化代理建议在塑造股东投票决策中的重要作用。约80%的基金接受定制化建议，且定制建议与基准建议存在显著差异。我们表明，定制化发挥两个关键作用。首先，它帮助股东通过投票表达其意识形态。其次，它通过减少对每项提案逐一关注的需求，并使股东能够聚焦于更重要的提案，从而便利了股东的决策过程。因此，定制化既影响了投票结果中偏好的聚合，也影响了信息的聚合。我们的发现为代理顾问的角色提供了新视角，并建议将关注点从仅聚焦于基准建议上转移开。

papers.title: Optimal Age-based Policies for Pandemics: An Economic Analysis of Covid-19 and Beyond
papers.authors: Luiz Brotherhood, Philipp Kircher, Cezar Santos, Michèle Tertilt
papers.abstract: This paper investigates the importance of the age composition for pandemic policy design. To do so, it introduces an economic framework with age heterogeneity, individual choice, and incomplete information, emphasizing the value of testing. Calibrating the model to the US Covid-19 pandemic reveals an 80% reduction in death toll due to voluntary actions and the lockdown implemented in the US. The optimal lockdown, however, is more stringent than what was implemented in the US. Moreover, the social planner follows an asymmetric approach by locking down the young relatively more than the old. We underscore the importance of testing, showing its impact on reduced deaths, lower economic costs and laxer lockdown. We use the framework to provide systematic insights into pandemics caused by different viruses (among others the Spanish flu), and underline the influence of economic conditions on optimal policies.
papers.zh_title: 大流行病的基于年龄的最优政策：对新冠及其他疫情的的经济分析
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了年龄构成对流行病政策设计的重要性。为此，我们引入了一个包含年龄异质性、个体选择和不完全信息的经济框架，强调了检测的价值。将模型校准至美国新冠疫情，结果显示，由于自愿行动和美国实施的封锁，死亡人数减少了80%。然而，最优封锁比美国实际实施的封锁更为严格。此外，社会规划者采取了一种不对称的方法，对年轻人的封锁相对多于老年人。我们强调了检测的重要性，展示了其对减少死亡、降低经济成本和放宽封锁的影响。我们利用该框架为不同病毒（包括西班牙流感）引起的流行病提供了系统性见解，并强调了经济条件对最优政策的影响。

papers.title: Heterogeneity and Aggregate Fluctuations: Insights from TANK Models
papers.authors: Davide Debortoli, Jordi Galí
papers.abstract: We analyze the merits and limitations of simple tractable New Keynesian models (RANK and TANK) in accounting for the aggregate predictions of Heterogenous Agent New Keynesian models (HANK). By means of comparison of a number of nested HANK models, we investigate the role played by (i) idiosyncratic income risk, (ii) a binding borrowing constraint, and (iii) a portfolio choice between liquid and illiquid assets. We argue that the effects of household heterogeneity can be largely understood looking at the differential behavior of two types of households: hand-to-mouth and unconstrained. We find that a suitably specified and calibrated TANK model (which abstracts from idiosyncratic income risk) can capture reasonably well the aggregate implications of household heterogeneity and the main channels through which it operates. That ability increases in the presence of a policy rule that emphasizes inflation stability. In the limiting case of a strict inflation targeting policy, heterogeneity becomes irrelevant for the determination of aggregate output.
papers.zh_title: 异质性与总体波动：来自TANK模型的洞见
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了简单易处理的新凯恩斯模型（RANK和TANK）在解释异质性代理人新凯恩斯模型（HANK）的总体预测方面的优点和局限性。通过比较一系列嵌套的HANK模型，我们研究了（i）异质性收入风险、（ii）具有约束力的借贷约束，以及（iii）流动性与非流动性资产之间的投资组合选择所起的作用。我们认为，家庭异质性的影响在很大程度上可以通过观察两类家庭（手到口型家庭和无约束家庭）的差异化行为来理解。我们发现，一个适当设定和校准的TANK模型（它抽象掉了异质性收入风险）能够相当好地捕捉家庭异质性的总体含义及其运作的主要渠道。这种能力在存在强调通胀稳定的政策规则时会增强。在严格通胀目标政策的极限情况下，异质性对于总体产出的决定变得无关紧要。

papers.title: Career Expectations and Outcomes: Evidence (on Gender Gaps) from the Economics Job Market
papers.authors: Brooke Helppie McFall, Eric D. Parolin, Basit Zafar
papers.abstract: This paper investigates gender gaps in long-term career expectations and outcomes of PhD candidates in economics. For this purpose, we match rich survey data on PhD candidates (from the 2008-2010 job market cohorts) to public data on job histories and publication records through 2022. We document four novel empirical facts: (1) there is a robust gender gap in career expectations, with females about 10 percentage points less likely to ex-ante expect to get tenure or publish regularly; (2) the gender gap in expectations is remarkably similar to the gap observed for academic outcomes; (3) expectations are similarly predictive of outcomes for males and females. In addition, the predictive power of expectations does not differ by the relationship status of the individual; and (4) gender gaps in expectations can explain about 19% and 13% of the ex-post gaps in tenure and publications, respectively.
papers.zh_title: 职业期望与结果：来自经济学就业市场的证据（关于性别差距）
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了经济学博士候选人在长期职业期望和结果方面的性别差距。为此，我们将关于博士候选人（来自2008-2010年就业市场队列）的丰富调查数据与截至2022年的工作经历和发表记录的公开数据进行了匹配。我们记录了四个新颖的实证事实：（1）职业期望存在稳健的性别差距，女性事先预期获得终身教职或定期发表论文的可能性约低10个百分点；（2）期望中的性别差距与学术结果中观察到的差距非常相似；（3）期望对男性和女性结果的预测能力相似。此外，期望的预测能力不因个人的关系状况而异；（4）期望中的性别差距可以分别解释事后终身教职差距和发表差距的约19%和13%。

papers.title: Who Pays for Rising Health Care Prices? Evidence from Hospital Mergers
papers.authors: Zarek Brot-Goldberg, Zack Cooper, Stuart V. Craig, Lev R. Klarnet, Ithai Lurie, Corbin L. Miller
papers.abstract: We analyze the economic consequences of rising US health care prices. By increasing the cost of employer-sponsored health insurance, rising prices serve as a de facto payroll tax on labor. Using exposure to hospital mergers as an instrument, we estimate that a 1% increase in health care prices lowers payroll and employment at non-health-care employers by 0.4%. At the county level, a 1% increase in health care prices reduces labor income by 0.27%, increases flows into unemployment by 1%, and lowers federal income tax receipts by 0.4%. The disemployment effects of rising prices are concentrated among lower- and middle-income workers.
papers.zh_title: 谁为不断上涨的医疗价格买单？来自医院并购的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了美国医疗价格不断上涨的经济后果。通过增加雇主提供的健康保险成本，价格上涨实际上充当了对劳动力征收的工资税。利用医院并购的暴露度作为工具变量，我们估计医疗价格每上涨1%，非医疗保健雇主的工资总额和就业人数就会下降0.4%。在县级层面，医疗价格每上涨1%，劳动收入减少0.27%，流入失业的人数增加1%，联邦所得税收入减少0.4%。价格上涨导致的就业减少效应集中在低收入和中等收入工人群体中。

papers.title: One Cohort at a Time: A New Perspective on the Declining Gender Pay Gap
papers.authors: Jaime Arellano-Bover, Nicola Bianchi, Salvatore Lattanzio, Matteo Paradisi
papers.abstract: This paper studies the interaction between the decrease in the gender pay gap and the stagnation in the careers of younger workers, analyzing data from the United States, Italy, Canada, and the United Kingdom. We propose a model of the labor market in which a larger supply of older workers can crowd out younger workers from top-paying positions. These negative career spillovers disproportionately affect the career trajectories of younger men because they are more likely than younger women to hold higher-paying jobs at baseline. The data strongly support this cohort-driven interpretation of the shrinking gender pay gap. The whole decline in the gap originates from (i) newer worker cohorts who enter the labor market with smaller-than-average gender pay gaps and (ii) older worker cohorts who exit with higher-than-average gender pay gaps. As predicted by the model, the gender pay convergence at labor-market entry stems from younger men's larger positional losses in the wage distribution. Younger men experience the largest positional losses within higher-paying firms, in which they become less represented over time at a faster rate than younger women. Finally, we document that labor-market exit is the sole contributor to the decline in the gender pay gap after the mid-1990s, which implies no full gender pay convergence for the foreseeable future. Consistent with our framework, we find evidence that most of the remaining gender pay gap at entry depends on predetermined educational choices.
papers.zh_title: 逐代推进：性别收入差距缩小的新视角
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了性别收入差距缩小与年轻工人职业发展停滞之间的相互作用，分析了来自美国、意大利、加拿大和英国的数据。我们提出了一个劳动力市场模型，在该模型中，年长工人供应量的增加可能会将年轻工人挤出高薪职位。这些负面的职业溢出效应对年轻男性的职业轨迹影响尤为严重，因为他们在基准情况下比年轻女性更有可能从事高薪工作。数据有力地支持了这种基于队列的性别收入差距缩小的解释。差距的全部缩小源于：(i) 新进入劳动力市场的工人队列，其性别收入差距低于平均水平，以及 (ii) 退出劳动力市场的年长工人队列，其性别收入差距高于平均水平。正如模型所预测的，劳动力市场进入时的性别收入趋同源于年轻男性在工资分布中更大的职位损失。年轻男性在薪酬更高的公司中遭受的职位损失最大，在这些公司中，他们随着时间的推移，其代表性下降的速度比年轻女性更快。最后，我们记录了劳动力市场退出是20世纪90年代中期以后性别收入差距下降的唯一贡献因素，这意味着在可预见的未来，性别收入不会完全趋同。与我们的框架一致，我们发现证据表明，进入时剩余的大部分性别收入差距取决于预先确定的教育选择。

papers.title: Firms' Perceived Cost of Capital
papers.authors: Niels Joachim Gormsen, Kilian Huber
papers.abstract: We analyze firms’ perceptions of their cost of capital using hand-collected data. We show that firms with a higher perceived cost of capital invest less and earn higher returns on invested capital, suggesting that the perceived cost of capital determines the long-run allocation of capital. In inefficient markets, firms aiming to maximize their current market value should set their perceived cost of capital equal to the expected returns on their debt and equity.
