We strongly reject this market-value maximization benchmark, as little variation in firms’ perceived cost of capital can be explained by variation in market-based expected returns. Alternatively, firms may aim to maximize their fair value, which is the value corrected for financial market inefficiencies. We find evidence in favor of this approach, as a fundamental risk benchmark explains half the variation in the perceived cost of capital. Most variation in the perceived cost of capital can be explained by firms incorporating investors’ biased return expectations, which is inconsistent with firms maximizing their current market value. Using a quantitative model, we find that distortions in the perceived cost of capital can generate substantial capital misallocation and thereby reduce aggregate productivity.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, IO, ME, PR；JEL：E44, G1, G3, G4, O47
papers.zh_title: 企业感知的资本成本
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用手工收集的数据分析了企业对其资本成本的感知。我们表明，感知资本成本较高的企业投资较少，但获得的投资资本回报率较高，这表明感知的资本成本决定了资本的长期配置。在无效市场中，旨在最大化其当前市场价值的企业应将其感知的资本成本设定为等于其债务和股权的预期回报。我们强烈否定了这一市场价值最大化基准，因为企业感知资本成本的变化几乎无法用基于市场的预期回报变化来解释。或者，企业可能旨在最大化其公允价值，即针对金融市场无效性进行修正后的价值。我们找到了支持这种方法的证据，因为一个基本风险基准可以解释感知资本成本一半的变化。感知资本成本的大部分变化可以通过企业纳入投资者有偏的回报预期来解释，这与企业最大化其当前市场价值的目标不一致。通过使用定量模型，我们发现感知资本成本的扭曲可能导致严重的资本错配，从而降低总体生产率。

papers.title: How Substitutable Are the Classical and Radical Right?
papers.authors: Jesús Fernández-Villaverde, Carlos Sanz
papers.abstract: Over the last two decades, a new generation of right-wing parties and leaders has emerged worldwide. A central question is how substitutable voters perceive these parties to be relative to the classical right. We address this question using a quasi-natural experiment from Spain’s 2023 general election. Due to a last-minute candidate withdrawal, the radical right (Vox) could not run in one constituency. This unexpected event, unrelated to economic or ideological fundamentals, allows us to estimate the effects of radical right parties on electoral outcomes. Using a synthetic difference-in-differences design, we find that the classical right captured 82.9% of the radical right vote. The radical right’s absence also slightly increased the vote share for left-wing parties and nearly doubled protest voting. These effects are stronger in high-unemployment areas, suggesting that the classical and radical right are less likely to be viewed as substitutes there. Additional analyses using survey data corroborate our findings.
papers.zh_title: 古典右翼与激进右翼的可替代性有多强？
papers.zh_abstract: 在过去二十年中，新一代右翼政党和领导人在全球范围内兴起。一个核心问题是，选民认为这些政党相对于古典右翼的可替代性有多强。我们利用西班牙2023年大选的一个准自然实验来探讨这个问题。由于一名候选人在最后一刻退出，激进右翼政党（呼声党）无法在一个选区参选。这一与经济和意识形态基本面无关的意外事件，使我们能够估计激进右翼政党对选举结果的影响。使用合成双重差分设计，我们发现古典右翼政党获得了激进右翼政党82.9%的选票。激进右翼的缺席也略微增加了左翼政党的得票率，并使抗议投票几乎翻了一番。这些效应在高失业率地区更为显著，表明在这些地区，古典右翼和激进右翼被视为替代品的可能性较低。使用调查数据进行的额外分析证实了我们的发现。

papers.title: The Effects of the 2021 Child Tax Credit on Child Developmental Outcomes
papers.authors: Anna Aizer, Adriana Lleras-Muney, Katherine Michelmore
papers.abstract: Child poverty fell to historic lows in 2021, in large part due to the temporary expansion of the Child Tax Credit (CTC). We consider the possible implications of this expansion on children’s short- and long-term development. To do so, we review the available short-run evidence from the 2021 expansion and the existing research evidence on the longer run effects of similar income transfers in childhood on child health and human capital. We conclude that the CTC likely improved child health and well-being in the short and long run, with greater impacts for poor children and modest or nonexistent effects for non-poor children. Moreover, the effects might be more substantial for younger children and for those in places with weaker safety nets.
papers.zh_title: 2021年儿童税收抵免对儿童发展结果的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 2021年儿童贫困率降至历史低点，这在很大程度上归功于儿童税收抵免的临时扩大。我们考虑了这次扩大对儿童短期和长期发展的可能影响。为此，我们回顾了2021年扩大政策可获得的短期证据，以及关于童年时期类似收入转移对儿童健康和人力资本长期影响的现有研究证据。我们得出结论，儿童税收抵免可能在短期和长期内改善了儿童的健康和福祉，对贫困儿童的影响更大，对非贫困儿童的影响则较小或不存在。此外，对于年龄较小的儿童以及那些安全网较薄弱地区的儿童，其影响可能更为显著。

papers.title: Stakes and Signals: An Empirical Investigation of Muddled Information in Standardized Testing
papers.authors: Germán J. Reyes, Evan Riehl, Ruqing Xu
papers.abstract: We examine a natural experiment in Brazil in which similar students took the same standardized test as either a low-stakes school accountability exam or a high-stakes admission exam for the country's top universities. Using administrative data and a difference-in-differences design, we find that test score gaps between high- and low-income students expanded on the high-stakes exam, consistent with wealthy students engaging in test prep. Yet the increase in stakes made scores more informative for students' college outcomes. Thus the "muddling" of information on natural ability and test prep improved the quality of the score signal, although it also exacerbated inequality.
papers.zh_title: 激励与信号：标准化考试中信息混淆的实证研究
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了巴西的一项自然实验，在该实验中，相似的学生参加了相同的标准化考试，但该考试要么是低风险的学校问责考试，要么是面向该国顶尖大学的高风险入学考试。利用行政数据和双重差分设计，我们发现高收入与低收入学生之间的考试成绩差距在高风险考试中扩大了，这与富裕学生参加备考辅导的现象一致。然而，考试风险的提高使得分数对于学生的大学录取结果更具信息含量。因此，关于天赋和备考辅导信息的“混淆”提高了分数信号的质量，尽管它也加剧了不平等。

papers.title: The Value of De Minimis Imports
papers.authors: Pablo D. Fajgelbaum, Amit Khandelwal
papers.abstract: A U.S. consumer can import $800 worth of goods per day free of tariffs and administrative fees. Fueled by rising direct-to-consumer trade, these “de minimis” shipments have exploded in recent years, yet are not recorded in Census trade data. Who benefits from this type of trade, and what are the policy implications? We analyze international shipment data, including de minimis shipments, from three global carriers and U.S. Customs and Border Protection. Lower-income zip codes are more likely to import de minimis shipments, particularly from China, which suggests that the tariff and administrative fee incidence in direct-to-consumer trade disproportionately benefits the poor. Theoretically, imposing tariffs above a threshold leads to terms-of-trade gains through bunching, even in a setting with complete pass-through of linear tariffs. Empirically, bunching pins down the demand elasticity for direct shipments. Eliminating §321 would reduce aggregate welfare by $10.9-$13.0 billion and disproportionately hurt lower-income and minority consumers.
papers.zh_title: 小额免税进口的价值
papers.zh_abstract: 美国消费者每天可以免税进口价值800美元的商品，且无需缴纳行政费用。在直接面向消费者贸易增长的推动下，这些“小额免税”货物近年来激增，但并未被记录在人口普查贸易数据中。谁从这类贸易中受益，其政策含义是什么？我们分析了来自三家全球承运商和美国海关与边境保护局的国际货运数据，包括小额免税货物。低收入邮政编码区域更有可能进口小额免税货物，尤其是来自中国的货物，这表明直接面向消费者贸易中的关税和行政费用负担不成比例地惠及了穷人。理论上，征收高于某一阈值的关税会导致通过聚集效应产生的贸易条件改善，即使在线性关税完全转嫁的情况下也是如此。实证上，聚集效应确定了直接运输货物的需求弹性。取消第321条款将使总福利减少109亿至130亿美元，并对低收入和少数族裔消费者造成不成比例的伤害。

papers.title: Policy Options for the Drug Pricing Conundrum
papers.authors: Kate Ho, Ariel Pakes
papers.abstract: Current proposals aimed at reducing U.S. pharmaceutical prices would have immediate benefits (particularly for low-income and elderly populations), but are likely to dramatically reduce firms’ investment in highly welfare-improving R&D. The U.S. subsidizes the worldwide pharmaceutical market: U.S. drug prices are more than 250% of those in other OECD countries. If each drug had a single international price across the highest-income OECD countries and total pharmaceutical firm profits were held fixed: U.S. prices would fall by half; every other country’s prices would increase (by 28 to over 300%); and R&D incentives would be maintained. We propose a potential lever for the U.S. government to influence worldwide drug pricing: access to the Medicare market.
papers.zh_title: 药品定价难题的政策选择
papers.zh_abstract: 当前旨在降低美国药品价格的提案将带来即时收益（尤其对低收入和老年人群），但很可能大幅减少企业在高度改善福利的研发上的投资。美国补贴着全球药品市场：美国药品价格是其他OECD国家的250%以上。如果每种药品在最高收入OECD国家之间设定单一国际价格，并且制药公司总利润保持不变：美国价格将下降一半；其他每个国家的价格都将上涨（涨幅从28%到超过300%）；而研发激励将得以维持。我们提出了一个美国政府可能影响全球药品定价的杠杆：进入Medicare市场的准入权。

papers.title: Voting on Public Goods: Citizens vs Shareholders
papers.authors: Robin J. Döttling, Doron Y. Levit, Nadya Malenko, Magdalena A. Rola-Janicka
papers.abstract: We study the interplay between a “one person-one vote” political system and a “one share-one vote” corporate governance regime. If shareholders push firms for more pro-social policies, political backlash may arise, undoing ESG initiatives. In a frictionless economy, shareholder democracy becomes irrelevant: the political system fully offsets shareholder influence. With public policy frictions, pro-social corporations can mitigate regulatory shortcomings and enhance corporate public goods provision. Nevertheless, shareholder democracy can hurt citizens due to the representation problem: it favors the preferences of the wealthy. Investor diversification, pass-through voting, and lobbying have important implications for these trade-offs of shareholder democracy.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EEE, PE, POL；JEL：D62, D72, G28, G34, H23
papers.zh_title: 公共产品投票：公民与股东
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了“一人一票”政治体制与“一股一票”公司治理制度之间的相互作用。如果股东推动企业采取更多亲社会政策，可能会引发政治反弹，从而抵消ESG倡议。在一个无摩擦的经济中，股东民主变得无关紧要：政治体制完全抵消了股东的影响。在存在公共政策摩擦的情况下，亲社会企业可以缓解监管缺陷，并增加企业公共产品供给。然而，由于代表性问题，股东民主可能损害公民利益：它偏向于富人的偏好。投资者多元化、传递投票和游说对股东民主的这些权衡具有重要影响。

papers.title: Third Places and Neighborhood Entrepreneurship: Evidence from Starbucks Cafés
papers.authors: Jinkyong Choi, Jorge Guzman, Mario L. Small
papers.abstract: Sociologists have shown that “third places” such as neighborhood cafés help people maintain and use their network ties. Do they help local entrepreneurs, for whom networks are important? We examine whether the introduction of Starbucks cafés into U.S. neighborhoods with no coffee shops increased entrepreneurship. When compared to census tracts that were scheduled to receive a Starbucks but did not get one, tracts that received a Starbucks saw an increase in the number of startups of 9.1% to 22.5% (or 2.9 to 6.4 firms) per year, over the subsequent 7 years. A partnership between Starbucks and Magic Johnson focused on underprivileged neighborhoods produced larger effects. Analyses suggest a networks mechanism is at play.
papers.zh_title: 第三场所与邻里创业：来自星巴克咖啡馆的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 社会学家已经表明，邻里咖啡馆等“第三场所”有助于人们维持和利用其社交网络。它们是否有助于当地创业者（对其而言网络很重要）？我们考察了星巴克咖啡馆进入美国没有咖啡店的社区是否增加了创业活动。与计划开设星巴克但最终未开设的人口普查区相比，在随后7年中，开设星巴克的人口普查区每年新创企业数量增加了9.1%至22.5%（即2.9至6.4家企业）。星巴克与魔术师约翰逊合作、专注于弱势社区的项目产生了更大的效果。分析表明，网络机制在发挥作用。

papers.title: Williamson and Coase: Transaction Costs or Rent-Seeking in the Formation of Institutions
papers.authors: Gary D. Libecap
papers.abstract: In 1960, Ronald Coase offered a decentralized bargaining framework for reducing transaction costs in externality mitigation. Subsequent US environmental policies have not made it primary. Policies are centralized and prescriptive. To explore why, I examine the Clean Air Act Amendments of 1970, 1977, 1990, the most wide-ranging US environmental law; the Magnuson-Stevens Fishery Act of 1976, the primary US fishing regulation; and the Endangered Species Act of 1973, suggested to be the most powerful conservation law in the world. It is commonly asserted that the transaction costs of Coase are high relative to command and control. I find no empirical support for this claim; it is not tested; nor does it appear in legislative histories as justification for observed regulation. Prescriptive controls may involve higher transaction costs than Coase. Relevant externalities often are local where information about abatement costs and benefits would be available and costs of defining and trading decentralized property rights potentially lower than in the political arena with larger numbers of heterogeneous parties and objectives. Rent-seeking by political agents rather than transaction cost reduction dominates policy selection. Coase’s efficient collaborative problem solving has not been realized. Although the three laws provide public goods, they appear costly on the margin, inequitable, and mired in political controversy. High costs in all three laws is a key empirical finding. Predictions for policy formation motivated by transaction cost reduction or rent-seeking guide the analysis.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, EEE, LE；JEL：K11, K32, N42, N5, N52, N92, Q52, Q53, Q57, Q58
papers.zh_title: 威廉姆森与科斯：制度形成中的交易成本还是寻租
papers.zh_abstract: 1960年，罗纳德·科斯提出了一个用于减少外部性缓解中交易成本的分散化谈判框架。随后的美国环境政策并未将其作为主要手段。政策是集中化和指令性的。为了探究原因，我考察了1970年、1977年、1990年的《清洁空气法修正案》（美国最广泛的环境法律）、1976年的《马格努森-史蒂文斯渔业保护与管理法》（美国主要的渔业法规）以及1973年的《濒危物种法》（被认为是世界上最强大的保护法）。人们普遍断言，科斯的交易成本相对于命令与控制而言较高。我发现这一主张没有实证支持；它未经检验；在立法历史中也没有作为所观察到的监管的理由出现。指令性控制可能涉及比科斯更高的交易成本。相关外部性通常是地方性的，在那里减排成本和收益的信息可得，且分散化产权界定和交易的成本可能低于政治舞台（涉及更多异质性主体和目标）。政治代理人的寻租而非交易成本减少主导了政策选择。科斯的高效协作问题解决方式未能实现。尽管这三部法律提供了公共产品，但它们似乎在边际上成本高昂、不公平且深陷政治争议。所有三部法律的高成本是一个关键的实证发现。由交易成本减少或寻租驱动的政策形成预测指导了分析。

papers.title: The Macroeconomics of Narratives
papers.authors: Joel P. Flynn, Karthik Sastry
papers.abstract: We study the macroeconomic implications of narratives, defined as beliefs about the economy that spread contagiously. In an otherwise standard business-cycle model, narratives generate persistent and belief-driven fluctuations. Sufficiently contagious narratives can "go viral," generating hysteresis in the model's unique equilibrium. Empirically, we use natural-language-processing methods to measure firms' narratives. Consistent with the theory, narratives spread contagiously and firms expand after adopting optimistic narratives, even though these narratives have no predictive power for future firm fundamentals. Quantitatively, narratives explain 32% and 18% of the output reductions over the early 2000s recession and Great Recession, respectively, and 19% of output variance.
papers.zh_title: 叙事的宏观经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了叙事的宏观经济含义，叙事被定义为关于经济的信念，这些信念具有传染性传播的特点。在一个其他方面标准的商业周期模型中，叙事会产生持续且由信念驱动的波动。具有足够传染性的叙事可以“病毒式传播”，在模型的唯一均衡中产生滞后效应。实证上，我们使用自然语言处理方法衡量企业的叙事。与理论一致，叙事具有传染性传播的特点，并且企业在采纳乐观叙事后会扩张，尽管这些叙事对未来企业基本面没有预测能力。定量上，叙事分别解释了21世纪初衰退和大衰退期间产出下降的32%和18%，以及产出方差的19%。

papers.title: Destabilizing Digital "Bank Walks"
papers.authors: Naz Koont, Tano Santos, Luigi Zingales
papers.abstract: We develop a model of “stickiness” of bank deposits to study the effect of digitalization on the size and duration of the value of the deposit franchise and, ultimately, on banks’ stability. The model predicts that digitalization increases the sensitivity of deposit levels and rates to changes in the Fed funds rate. We test these predictions using data on the U.S. banking sector, and find that, when interest rates rise, deposit outflows, or “walks”, and deposit rate pass-through are significantly larger at banks with mobile apps and brokerage services. We use these estimates to predict the effects of digitalization on bank stability. Digitalization has ambiguous effects on the value of the deposit franchise, depending on the magnitude of the reduction in the marginal cost of servicing deposits. Still, it unambiguously increases the deposit franchise duration, undermining bank stability.
papers.zh_title: 破坏稳定的数字“银行挤兑”
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个银行存款“粘性”模型，以研究数字化对存款特许经营权价值的大小和持续时间的影响，并最终影响银行的稳定性。该模型预测，数字化增加了存款水平和利率对联邦基金利率变化的敏感性。我们利用美国银行业的数据检验了这些预测，发现当利率上升时，拥有移动应用程序和经纪服务的银行的存款外流（即“挤兑”）和存款利率传导显著更大。我们利用这些估计来预测数字化对银行稳定性的影响。数字化对存款特许经营权价值的影响是模糊的，取决于存款服务边际成本降低的幅度。尽管如此，它明确增加了存款特许经营权的持续时间，从而削弱了银行稳定性。

papers.title: The Social Costs of Sovereign Default
papers.authors: Juan P. Farah-Yacoub, Clemens M. Graf von Luckner, Carmen M. Reinhart
papers.abstract: This paper investigates the economic and social consequences of sovereign default on external debt. We focus on the crises’ impact on real per capita GDP, infant mortality, life expectancy, poverty headcounts, and calorie supply per capita. After methodological exclusions, the sample covers 221 default episodes over 1815-2020. The analysis adopts an eclectic empirical strategy that relies on an augmented synthetic control method and local projections. Our findings suggest that sovereign defaults lead to significant adverse economic outcomes, with defaulting economies falling behind their counterparts by a cumulative 8.5 percent of GDP per capita within three years of default. Moreover, output per capita remains nearly 20 percent below that of non-defaulting peers after a decade. Based on the trajectory of the health, nutrition, and poverty indicators we study, we assess that the social costs of sovereign default are significant, broad-based, and long-lived.
papers.zh_title: 主权违约的社会成本
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了主权外部债务违约的经济和社会后果。我们重点关注危机对实际人均GDP、婴儿死亡率、预期寿命、贫困人口比例和人均卡路里供应量的影响。经过方法论排除后，样本涵盖了1815年至2020年间的221次违约事件。分析采用了一种折衷的实证策略，依赖于增强型合成控制方法和局部投影法。我们的研究结果表明，主权违约会导致显著的不利经济后果，违约经济体在违约后三年内的人均GDP累计落后于其对照经济体8.5%。此外，十年后，其人均产出仍比未违约的同类经济体低近20%。根据我们研究的健康、营养和贫困指标的轨迹，我们评估认为，主权违约的社会成本是显著的、广泛的且持久的。

papers.title: Sovereign Haircuts: 200 Years of Creditor Losses
papers.authors: Clemens M. Graf von Luckner, Josefin Meyer, Carmen M. Reinhart, Christoph Trebesch
papers.abstract: We study sovereign external debt crises over the past 200 years, with a focus on creditor losses, or “haircuts”. Our sample covers 327 sovereign debt restructurings with external private creditors over 205 default spells since 1815. Creditor losses vary widely (from none to 100%), but the statistical distribution has remained remarkably stable over two centuries, with an average haircut of around 45 percent. The data also reveal that “serial restructurings”, meaning two or more debt exchanges in the same default spell, are on the rise. To account for this trend toward serial renegotiation, we introduce the “Bulow-Rogoff haircut” - a cumulative measure that captures the combined creditor loss across all restructurings during a single debt crisis. Using this measure, we show that longer debt crises deliver larger haircuts and that interim restructurings provide limited debt relief. We further examine past predictors of the size of haircuts and identify “rules of thumb” applicable to future defaults. Poorer countries, first-time debt issuers, and those that borrowed heavily from external creditors all record significantly higher haircuts in case of a default. Geopolitical shocks - such as wars, revolutions, or the break-up of empires – deliver the deepest haircuts. Sovereign debt investment disasters are often linked to (geo-)political disasters.
papers.zh_title: 主权债务减记：200年的债权人损失
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了过去200年的主权外部债务危机，重点关注债权人损失，即“减记”。我们的样本涵盖了自1815年以来205次违约事件中与外部私人债权人进行的327次主权债务重组。债权人损失差异很大（从0%到100%），但统计分布在过去两个世纪中保持显著稳定，平均减记幅度约为45%。数据还显示，“连续重组”，即在同一次违约事件中进行两次或更多次债务交换，正在增加。为了解释这种连续重新谈判的趋势，我们引入了“Bulow-Rogoff减记”——一个累积指标，用于衡量单次债务危机中所有重组造成的债权人总损失。使用这一指标，我们表明，更长的债务危机会带来更大的减记，而临时重组提供的债务减免有限。我们进一步考察了减记规模的历史预测因素，并确定了适用于未来违约的“经验法则”。较贫穷的国家、首次发行债务的国家以及大量从外部债权人借款的国家，在发生违约时记录的减记幅度显著更高。地缘政治冲击——如战争、革命或帝国解体——带来了最深的减记。主权债务投资灾难通常与（地缘）政治灾难相关。

papers.title: Dynamic Identification in VARs
papers.authors: Paul Beaudry, Fabrice Collard, Patrick Fève, Alain Guay, Franck Portier
papers.abstract: Most macroeconomic models view economic outcomes as being generated by a combination of endogenous and exogenous dynamic forces. In particular, the exogenous forces are generally modelled as a set of independent dynamics processes. In this paper we begin by showing that this dual dynamic structure is sufficient to identify the entire set of structural impulse responses inherent to any such model. No extra restrictions are needed. We then use this result to suggest how it can be used to evaluate common SVAR restrictions (impact restrictions, long run restrictions and proxy-VAR).
papers.zh_title: VAR中的动态识别
papers.zh_abstract: 大多数宏观经济模型将经济结果视为由内生和外生动态力量共同作用产生。特别是，外生力量通常被建模为一组独立的动态过程。在本文中，我们首先证明，这种双重动态结构足以识别任何此类模型所固有的整套结构性脉冲响应。不需要额外的限制。然后，我们利用这一结果，提出如何将其用于评估常见的SVAR限制（冲击限制、长期限制和代理变量VAR）。

papers.title: Diffuse Bunching with Frictions: Theory and Estimation
papers.authors: Santosh Anagol, Allan Davids, Benjamin B. Lockwood, Tarun Ramadorai
papers.abstract: We incorporate a general model of frictions into the bunching-based elasticity estimator. The new estimator replaces bunching-window bounds with a “lumpiness parameter” and uses fewer parameters than the conventional approach while delivering additional economically-interpretable quantities such as the size of frictions and unobserved adjustment costs. The model matches rich observed bunching patterns such as sharp-peaked diffuse bunching around tax kinks and depressed density in notch-adjacent dominated regions. We apply the estimator to canonical settings including the U.S. EITC kink, and to administrative tax data from South Africa, where we uncover novel insights on unobserved VAT compliance costs and kink misperceptions.
papers.zh_title: 存在摩擦的扩散性聚集：理论与估计
papers.zh_abstract: 我们将一个一般的摩擦模型纳入基于聚集的弹性估计量中。新的估计量用一个“聚集参数”取代了聚集窗口边界，使用的参数比传统方法更少，同时提供了额外的具有经济解释意义的量，例如摩擦的大小和未观测到的调整成本。该模型匹配了丰富的观测到的聚集模式，例如税收拐点附近尖锐峰值的扩散性聚集，以及断点附近被主导区域中密度下降的模式。我们将该估计量应用于典型场景，包括美国EITC拐点，以及来自南非的行政税收数据，在那里我们发现了关于未观测到的增值税合规成本和拐点误解的新见解。

papers.title: Exchange Rate Disconnect Revisited
papers.authors: Ryan Chahrour, Vito Cormun, Pierre De Leo, Pablo A. Guerrón-Quintana, Rosen Valchev
papers.abstract: We find that variation in expected U.S. productivity explains over half of U.S. dollar/G7 exchange rate fluctuations. Both correctly-anticipated changes in productivity and expectational noise, which influences the expectation of productivity but not its eventual realization, have large effects. This “noisy news” is primarily related to medium-to-long-run TFP growth, and transmits to the exchange rate by causing significant deviations from uncovered interest parity. Together, these disturbances generate many well-known exchange puzzles, including predictable excess returns, low Backus-Smith correlations, and excess volatility. Our findings suggest these puzzles have a common origin, linked to productivity expectations.
papers.zh_title: 汇率脱节再探
papers.zh_abstract: 我们发现，预期美国生产率的变化解释了美元/七国集团汇率波动的一半以上。正确预期的生产率变化以及影响生产率预期但不影响其最终实现的预期噪声，都具有显著影响。这种“噪声新闻”主要与中长期全要素生产率增长相关，并通过导致显著偏离无抛补利率平价来传导至汇率。这些扰动共同产生了许多众所周知的汇率谜题，包括可预测的超额回报、低Backus-Smith相关性以及过度波动。我们的研究结果表明，这些谜题有一个共同的起源，与生产率预期相关。

papers.title: Disaster Management
papers.authors: Agnes Norris Keiller, John Van Reenen
papers.abstract: Climate change is making natural disasters more frequent, yet little is known about the capacity of firms to withstand such disasters and adapt to their increased frequency. We examine this issue using a the latest wave of the World Management Survey (WMS) that includes new questions on firms’ climate change perceptions and adaptation behavior. Combining this with geocoded data on natural disasters and previous WMS waves, we create a panel spanning 8,000 firms across 33 countries and three decades that shows exposure to disasters decreases growth inputs, outputs and firm survival. More importantly, firms with structured management practices are more resilient, suffering much smaller drops in jobs and capital. To understand the mechanisms behind this resilience, we use the new WMS climate questions to show better managed firms have more accurate perceptions of climate-related risks to their businesses. Such firms are also more likely to have implemented measures to adapt to climate change both overall and in response to their perceived climate risk. Other aspects of firm organisation, such as decentralisation, also help protect against disasters, but their adaptation behaviour is not well-targeted. These results show that improving management is one way to help protect economies from climate change shocks.
papers.zh_title: 灾害管理
papers.zh_abstract: 气候变化使自然灾害更加频繁，但关于企业抵御此类灾害并适应其频率增加的能力，我们知之甚少。我们利用最新一轮的世界管理调查（WMS）来研究这个问题，该调查包含了关于企业气候变化认知和适应行为的新问题。结合自然灾害的地理编码数据和之前的WMS轮次，我们构建了一个涵盖33个国家、8000家企业、跨越三十年的面板数据，表明灾害暴露会减少增长投入、产出和企业生存。更重要的是，具有结构化管理实践的企业更具韧性，其就业和资本下降幅度要小得多。为了理解这种韧性背后的机制，我们利用新的WMS气候问题表明，管理更好的企业对其业务面临的气候相关风险有更准确的认知。这些企业也更有可能已经实施了适应气候变化的措施，无论是总体上的还是针对其感知到的气候风险的。企业组织的其他方面，如分权化，也有助于抵御灾害，但其适应行为针对性不强。这些结果表明，改善管理是帮助保护经济体免受气候变化冲击的一种方式。

papers.title: Inflation Targets: Practice Ahead of Theory
papers.authors: Mervyn A. King
papers.abstract: Inflation targets were introduced well ahead of the development of the theory of inflation targeting. The practice was successful because it comprised a new set of procedures and institutions for setting monetary policy in a transparent and accountable fashion – “constrained discretion”; the later theory was less useful because it purported to be a theory of the determination of the price level. But inflation targeting does not constitute a new theory of the monetary transmission mechanism. The belief that it does led to the replacement of Milton Friedman’s dictum that “inflation is always and everywhere a monetary phenomenon” by the new dictum that “inflation is always and everywhere a transitory phenomenon”. This had unfortunate consequences during the recent inflation. The paper concludes with a discussion of the challenges facing inflation targets in the future.
papers.zh_title: 通胀目标：实践先于理论
papers.zh_abstract: 通胀目标的引入远早于通胀目标理论的发展。这一实践之所以成功，是因为它包含了一套以透明和负责任的方式制定货币政策的新程序和制度——“受约束的裁量权”；后来的理论用处较小，因为它声称是价格水平决定的理论。但通胀目标并不构成货币传导机制的新理论。认为它构成新理论的信念，导致米尔顿·弗里德曼的格言“通货膨胀无论何时何地都是一种货币现象”被新的格言“通货膨胀无论何时何地都是一种暂时现象”所取代。这在最近的通货膨胀期间产生了不幸的后果。本文最后讨论了通胀目标在未来面临的挑战。

papers.title: The Price of Housing in the United States, 1890-2006
papers.authors: Ronan C. Lyons, Allison Shertzer, Rowena Gray, David N. Agorastos
papers.abstract: We construct the first consistent market rent and home sales price series for American cities across the 20th century using millions of newspaper real estate listings. Our findings revise several stylized facts about U.S. housing markets. Real market rents did not fall during the 20th century for most cities. Instead, real rental price levels increased by about 20% from 1890 to 2006. There was also greater growth in real housing sales prices from 1965 to 1995 than is commonly understood. Using these series we document several new facts about housing markets. The return to homeownership has varied considerably across cities and over time, but rental returns were historically much more important than capital gains in every city. We discuss the implications of our indices for the business cycle and the consumer price index. Finally, we provide evidence that housing prices increased unevenly across cities over time in response to natural building and regulatory constraints.
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用数百万条报纸房地产列表，构建了20世纪美国城市首个一致的市场租金和房屋销售价格序列。我们的研究结果修正了关于美国住房市场的几个典型事实。对于大多数城市而言，实际市场租金在20世纪并未下降。相反，从1890年到2006年，实际租金价格水平上涨了约20%。1965年至1995年间，实际住房销售价格的增长也比通常理解的要大。利用这些序列，我们记录了关于住房市场的几个新事实。房屋所有权的回报在不同城市和不同时期差异很大，但在每个城市，历史上租金回报比资本收益重要得多。我们讨论了我们的指数对商业周期和消费者价格指数的影响。最后，我们提供的证据表明，随着时间的推移，由于自然建筑和监管限制，各城市的住房价格以不均衡的方式上涨。

papers.title: Charity: Have the Rates of US Households Contributing Money or Time Declined?
papers.authors: V. Kerry Smith
papers.abstract: This paper uses the responses to questions about charitable contributions from the Survey of Consumer Finances (SCF) between 1992 and 2022 to consider the rates of US households contributing money or time to charitable organizations. The fraction donating $500 or more remained relatively constant over this period, with about 47% answering they had donated in both 1991 and 2021. The fraction of households volunteering time declined consistently after 2005 from 34% to 26%. When the samples are restricted to those giving financially or those volunteering, the results confirm the relationship between giving time or money depends on people’s other charitable behaviors.
papers.zh_title: 慈善：美国家庭捐款或捐时间的比例下降了吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用1992年至2022年间消费者金融调查（SCF）中关于慈善捐赠问题的回答，考察了美国家庭向慈善组织捐款或捐时间的比例。在此期间，捐赠500美元或以上的家庭比例保持相对稳定，约47%的家庭在1991年和2021年都表示曾进行过捐赠。志愿捐时间的家庭比例在2005年后持续下降，从34%降至26%。当样本限制在仅捐款或仅捐时间的家庭时，结果证实，捐时间或捐钱的关系取决于人们其他的慈善行为。

papers.title: Is Software Eating the World?
papers.authors: Sangmin Aum, Yongseok Shin
papers.abstract: When explaining the declining labor income share in advanced economies, the macro literature finds that the elasticity of substitution between capital and labor is greater than one. However, the vast majority of micro-level estimates shows that capital and labor are complements (elasticity less than one). Using firm- and establishment-level data from Korea, we divide capital into equipment and software, as they may interact with labor in different ways. Our estimation shows that equipment and labor are complements (elasticity 0.6), consistent with other micro-level estimates, but software and labor are substitutes (1.6), a novel finding that helps reconcile the macro vs. micro-literature elasticity discord. As the quality of software improves, labor shares fall within firms because of factor substitution and endogenously rising markups. In addition, production reallocates toward firms that use software more intensively, as they become effectively more productive. Because in the data these firms have higher markups and lower labor shares, the reallocation further raises the aggregate markup and reduces the aggregate labor share. The rise of software accounts for two-thirds of the labor share decline in Korea between 1990 and 2018. The factor substitution and the markup channels are equally important. On the other hand, the falling equipment price plays a minor role, because the factor substitution and the markup channels offset each other.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG；JEL：D22, D24, D33, E22, E25, L11
papers.zh_title: 软件正在吞噬世界吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 在解释发达经济体劳动收入份额下降时，宏观文献发现资本与劳动之间的替代弹性大于1。然而，绝大多数微观层面的估计显示资本与劳动是互补的（弹性小于1）。利用韩国企业和机构层面的数据，我们将资本分为设备资本和软件资本，因为它们可能与劳动以不同方式相互作用。我们的估计显示，设备资本与劳动是互补的（弹性为0.6），与其他微观估计一致，但软件资本与劳动是替代的（弹性为1.6），这一新发现有助于调和宏观与微观文献在弹性上的分歧。随着软件质量的提高，由于要素替代和内生的加成率上升，企业内部的劳动份额下降。此外，生产会重新配置到更密集使用软件的企业，因为这些企业实际上变得更具生产力。由于在数据中这些企业具有更高的加成率和更低的劳动份额，这种重新配置进一步提高了总体加成率并降低了总体劳动份额。软件的兴起解释了韩国1990年至2018年间劳动份额下降的三分之二。要素替代和加成率渠道同等重要。另一方面，设备价格下降的作用较小，因为要素替代和加成率渠道相互抵消。

papers.title: The Power of Inclusive Labor Force Participation for Mitigating Population Aging: Closing Gaps at the Intersection Between Race/Ethnicity and Gender in the United States
papers.authors: René Böheim, Thomas Horvath, Thomas Leoni, Martin Spielauer
papers.abstract: We develop a dynamic microsimulation model to project the labor force and economic dependency ratios in the United States from 2022 to 2060, taking population projections and the large inequalities between population groups of different race/ethnicity and gender into account. We contrast policy scenarios and show the potential impact that closing the gaps in education, health, and participation rates between population subgroups can have on increasing the U.S. labor force. Our baseline projections indicate an increase of the labor force of about 27 million people by 2060, which is mainly caused by population growth. The downstream effects of removing disparities in population health and educational attainment on labor force participation can add about 10% (+2.6 million people) to our baseline projections. The potential effects of closing gaps between genders and between minority groups and the non-Hispanic White population, however, are much larger if we assume the equalization of participation rates for individuals with similar characteristics. Closing gender gaps within ethno-racial groups, for instance, can add 9.9 to 14.3 million people to the labor force. Overall, reducing disparities in labor force participation rates has the potential to more than compensate the effects of demographic aging on the economic dependency ratio.
papers.zh_title: 包容性劳动力参与对缓解人口老龄化的力量：缩小美国种族/民族与性别交叉领域的差距
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个动态微观模拟模型，用于预测2022年至2060年间美国的劳动力与经济抚养比，同时考虑了人口预测以及不同种族/民族和性别群体之间的巨大不平等。我们对比了政策情景，并展示了缩小人口亚群体在教育、健康和参与率方面的差距对增加美国劳动力的潜在影响。我们的基线预测显示，到2060年劳动力将增加约2700万人，这主要是由人口增长驱动的。消除人口健康和教育程度差异对劳动力参与的间接影响，可在基线预测基础上增加约10%（+260万人）。然而，如果我们假设具有相似特征的个体的参与率均等化，那么缩小性别之间以及少数群体与非西班牙裔白人群体之间差距的潜在影响要大得多。例如，缩小种族/民族群体内部的性别差距，可使劳动力增加990万至1430万人。总体而言，缩小劳动力参与率差距的潜力足以抵消人口老龄化对经济抚养比的影响。

papers.title: Emotions and Subjective Crash Beliefs
papers.authors: William N. Goetzmann, Dasol Kim, Robert J. Shiller
papers.abstract: Over the past two decades, respondents to the Shiller Investor Confidence Surveys have assessed the probability of a catastrophic stock market crash to be much higher than the historical frequency of such events. We decompose these crash probabilities into fundamental and subjective components and use a large language model to estimate the emotional content of respondent narratives. The subjective crash component is strongly associated with high negative affect. We use respondent location to test how news of unusual exogenous shocks affects crash belief formation. The results are consistent the risk-as-feelings hypothesis and suggest a path by which emotional response to news about salient events may play a role in the scale and variation in investor beliefs about rare disasters.
papers.zh_title: 情绪与主观崩盘信念
papers.zh_abstract: 在过去二十年中，希勒投资者信心调查的受访者对灾难性股市崩盘概率的评估远高于此类事件的历史发生频率。我们将这些崩盘概率分解为基本成分和主观成分，并使用大语言模型来估计受访者叙述中的情感内容。主观崩盘成分与高负面情绪密切相关。我们利用受访者所在地来检验异常外生冲击的消息如何影响崩盘信念的形成。结果与“风险即感觉”假说一致，并表明对显著事件消息的情绪反应可能在投资者关于罕见灾难信念的规模和变化中发挥作用。

papers.title: Paying Your Fair Share: Perceived Fairness and Tax Compliance
papers.authors: Brad C. Nathan, Ricardo Perez-Truglia, Alejandro Zentner
papers.abstract: We provide evidence on the role of perceived fairness in tax compliance. Are households more willing to pay taxes when they believe others are contributing their fair share? We investigate this question through a natural field experiment in the context of U.S. property taxes. Using an information-disclosure experiment, we exogenously shifted households’ perceptions of the average tax rate paid by others. We find that higher perceived average tax rates increase perceptions of fairness and reduce the likelihood of filing a tax appeal. We quantify the effect of fairness in monetary terms: for every additional $1 paid by the average household, an individual taxpayer is willing to contribute an additional $0.43. In the field experiment, subjects were informed about the average tax rate but not why it might differ from their own. In a complementary survey, we show that this context matters: when households learn that others pay lower rates due to exemptions, such as for disability or advanced age, they are more willing to tolerate unequal tax rates.
papers.zh_title: 支付你应得的份额：感知公平与税收遵从
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提供了关于感知公平在税收遵从中的作用的证据。当家庭认为其他人正在贡献其应得份额时，他们是否更愿意纳税？我们通过一项在美国房产税背景下进行的自然实地实验来研究这个问题。利用一项信息披露实验，我们外生地改变了家庭对他人支付的平均税率的感知。我们发现，更高的感知平均税率会增加公平感，并降低提出税收申诉的可能性。我们以货币形式量化了公平的影响：对于普通家庭每多支付1美元，单个纳税人愿意额外贡献0.43美元。在实地实验中，受试者被告知平均税率，但未被告知其为何可能与自身税率不同。在一项补充调查中，我们表明这一背景很重要：当家庭了解到他人因残疾或高龄等豁免而支付较低税率时，他们更愿意容忍不平等的税率。

papers.title: The Economic Effects of American Slavery: Tests at the Border
papers.authors: Hoyt Bleakley, Paul Rhode
papers.abstract: To engage with the large literature on the economic effects of slavery, we use antebellum census data to test for statistical differences at the 1860 free-slave border. We find evidence of lower population density, less intensive land use, and lower farm values on the slave side. Half of the border region was half underutilized. This does not support the view that abolition was a costly constraint for landowners. Indeed, the lower demand for similar, yet cheaper, land presents a different puzzle: why wouldn't the yeomen farmers cross the border to fill up empty land in slave states, as was happening in the free states of the Old Northwest? On this point, we find evidence of higher wages on the slave side, indicating an aversion of free labor to working in a slave society. This evidence of systemically lower economic performance in slavery-legal areas suggests that the earlier literature on the profitability of plantations was misplaced, or at least incomplete.
papers.zh_title: 美国奴隶制的经济效应：边界检验
papers.zh_abstract: 为了与关于奴隶制经济效应的大量文献进行对话，我们使用内战前的普查数据，检验1860年自由州与蓄奴州边界两侧是否存在统计上的差异。我们发现，在蓄奴州一侧，人口密度更低、土地利用强度更小、农场价值也更低。边界地区有一半的土地未得到充分利用。这一发现并不支持“废奴对土地所有者而言是一项代价高昂的约束”这一观点。事实上，对相似但更便宜土地的需求更低，这提出了一个不同的谜题：为什么自耕农不像在旧西北部的自由州那样，跨越边界去填充蓄奴州的空旷土地？关于这一点，我们发现有证据表明蓄奴州一侧的工资更高，这表明自由劳动力对在奴隶制社会中工作存在厌恶情绪。这些证据表明，在法律允许奴隶制的地区，经济表现系统性更低，这暗示早期关于种植园盈利能力的文献可能定位有误，或至少是不完整的。

papers.title: Beyond the War: Public Service and the Transmission of Gender Norms
papers.authors: Abhay Aneja, Silvia Farina, Guo Xu
papers.abstract: This paper combines personnel records of the U.S. federal government with census data to study how shocks to the gender composition of a large organization can persistently shift gender norms. Exploiting city-by-department variation in the sudden expansion of female clerical employment driven by World War I, we find that daughters of civil servants exposed to female co-workers are more likely to work later in life, command higher income, and have fewer children. These intergenerational effects increase with the size of the city-level exposure to female government workers and are driven by daughters in their teenage years at the time of exposure. We also show that cities exposed to a larger increase in female federal workers saw persistently higher female labor force participation in the public sector, as well as modest contemporaneous increases in private sector labor force participation suggestive of spill-overs. Collectively, the results are consistent with both the vertical and horizontal transmission of gender norms and highlight how increasing gender representation within the public sector can have broader labor market implications.
papers.zh_title: 超越战争：公共服务与性别规范的传递
papers.zh_abstract: 本文将美国联邦政府的人事记录与人口普查数据相结合，研究大型组织性别构成的冲击如何能够持久地改变性别规范。利用第一次世界大战推动的女性文职就业突然扩张所带来的城市-部门层面的差异，我们发现，接触到女性同事的公务员的女儿，在日后更有可能参加工作、获得更高收入，并且生育更少的孩子。这些代际效应随着城市层面接触女性政府雇员的规模增大而增强，并且主要由在接触时处于青少年时期的女儿所驱动。我们还发现，那些女性联邦雇员增长幅度更大的城市，其公共部门的女性劳动力参与率持续更高，同时私营部门的劳动力参与率也出现了适度的同期增长，这暗示了溢出效应的存在。总体而言，这些结果与性别规范的垂直和水平传递均一致，并突显了提高公共部门内女性代表性如何能够产生更广泛的劳动力市场影响。

papers.title: Are We Fragmented Yet? Measuring Geopolitical Fragmentation and Its Causal Effect
papers.authors: Jesús Fernández-Villaverde, Tomohide Mineyama, Dongho Song
papers.abstract: After decades of rising global economic integration, the world economy is fragmenting. To measure this, we introduce a geopolitical fragmentation index based on a dynamic hierarchical factor model with time-varying parameters and stochastic volatility. We then use structural vector autoregressions and local projections to assess the causal effects of fragmentation. Increased fragmentation negatively impacts the global economy, with emerging economies suffering more than advanced ones. Notably, fragmentation has an immediate negative effect, while the benefits of reduced fragmentation unfold gradually. A sectoral analysis shows that industries closely tied to global markets are more adversely affected. Finally, we highlight significant differences in the effects of fragmentation across geopolitical blocs.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG；JEL：C11, C31, E00, F01, F2, F4, F6
papers.zh_title: 我们是否已经碎片化？衡量地缘政治碎片化及其因果效应
papers.zh_abstract: 在经历了数十年的全球经济一体化上升之后，世界经济正在碎片化。为了衡量这一现象，我们引入了一个基于具有时变参数和随机波动的动态分层因子模型的地缘政治碎片化指数。然后，我们使用结构向量自回归和局部投影法来评估碎片化的因果效应。碎片化加剧对全球经济产生负面影响，其中新兴经济体比发达经济体遭受的损失更大。值得注意的是，碎片化具有即时的负面效应，而减少碎片化的好处则是逐步显现的。一项行业分析表明，与全球市场联系紧密的行业受到的不利影响更大。最后，我们强调了碎片化对不同地缘政治集团的影响存在显著差异。

papers.title: On the Ubiquity of Declining Business Dynamism
papers.authors: David Hummels, Kan Yue
papers.abstract: Recent work documents declining business dynamism in establishment data, and points to difficulty in reallocating resources across firms as an important cause. Using import data, we document declining market dynamism that bears a striking resemblance to establishment-level findings and holds for the vast majority of countries and products. Entry rates and the reallocation of market shares fall over time. Young exporters experience rising prices, falling market shares, and reduced skewness in growth rates relative to older exporters. A heterogeneous firm model with additive productivity shocks and growing expenditures, but no reallocation of resources across exporters, can generate all these facts.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IO, ITI；JEL：D22, F14, L23, O40
papers.zh_title: 论商业活力下降的普遍性
papers.zh_abstract: 近期研究利用机构层面数据记录了商业活力的下降，并将资源在企业间重新配置的困难视为一个重要原因。利用进口数据，我们记录了市场活力的下降，这与机构层面的发现惊人地相似，并且适用于绝大多数国家和产品。进入率和市场份额的重新配置随时间推移而下降。与老牌出口商相比，年轻出口商面临价格上涨、市场份额下降以及增长率偏度降低的情况。一个包含加性生产率冲击和不断增长的支出、但不存在出口商间资源重新配置的异质性企业模型，可以生成所有这些事实。

papers.title: Monetary Policy without Moving Interest Rates: The Fed Non-Yield Shock
papers.authors: Christoph Boehm, T. Niklas Kroner
papers.abstract: Existing high-frequency monetary policy shocks explain surprisingly little variation in stock prices and exchange rates around FOMC announcements. Further, both of these asset classes display heightened volatility relative to non-announcement times. We use a heteroskedasticity-based procedure to estimate a “Fed non-yield shock”, which is orthogonal to yield changes and is identified from excess volatility in the S&P 500 and various dollar exchange rates. The non-yield shock has large effects on global markets, with a positive non-yield shock raising U.S. and foreign stock prices, depreciating the dollar, and increasing commodity prices. At the same time, the shock leaves global yields unaffected. Further results indicate that the non-yield shock transmits mostly through risk premia. The existence of the non-yield shock generally has implications for how monetary policy shocks can be identified, raising concerns about the validity of many common approaches.
papers.meta: Programs：IFM, ME；JEL：E43, E44, E52, E58, F31, G10
papers.zh_title: 不改变利率的货币政策：美联储非收益率冲击
papers.zh_abstract: 现有的高频货币政策冲击在解释联邦公开市场委员会公告前后股票价格和汇率的变化方面，解释力出奇地小。此外，这两类资产类别在公告日期间的波动性均高于非公告日。我们使用一种基于异方差性的程序来估计“美联储非收益率冲击”，该冲击与收益率变化正交，并通过标普500指数和各种美元汇率的超额波动来识别。非收益率冲击对全球市场有巨大影响：正向的非收益率冲击会推高美国和外国股票价格，使美元贬值，并推高大宗商品价格。同时，该冲击对全球收益率没有影响。进一步的结果表明，非收益率冲击主要通过风险溢价进行传导。非收益率冲击的存在通常对如何识别货币政策冲击具有启示意义，引发了对许多常见方法有效性的担忧。

papers.title: The Intergenerational Effects of Permanent Legal Status
papers.authors: Elizabeth U. Cascio, Paul Cornell, Ethan G. Lewis
papers.abstract: We estimate the effects of permanent legal status on the health of children born to immigrants in the United States using variation from the Immigration Reform and Control Act of 1986 (IRCA). Our empirical approach compares trends in birth outcomes for foreign-born Mexican mothers across counties with different application rates under IRCA’s large-scale legalization programs. Maternal legalization raised birthweight. Effects arose immediately after the application process began – five years before affected women became Medicaid-eligible – suggesting causal mechanisms besides improved access to early prenatal care. Changes in the composition of births, stemming from changes in fertility and family reunification, contribute to but far from fully explain the birthweight impacts. The more likely mechanisms were instead the increases in family income and reductions in stress that came from gaining legal status.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LS, PE；JEL：I13, I14, I18, J15, J61, K37
papers.zh_title: 永久合法身份的代际效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用1986年《移民改革与控制法》带来的变化，估计了永久合法身份对美国移民所生子女健康的影响。我们的实证方法比较了，在IRCA大规模合法化计划下，不同申请率的县中，墨西哥裔外国出生母亲的生育结果趋势。母亲获得合法身份提高了婴儿出生体重。这种效应在申请程序开始后立即出现——比受影响女性有资格获得医疗补助早了五年——这表明除了改善早期产前保健的可及性之外，还存在其他因果机制。由生育率和家庭团聚变化导致的出生人口构成变化，对出生体重影响有贡献，但远不能完全解释。更可能的机制反而是，获得合法身份所带来的家庭收入增加和压力减少。

papers.title: Identifying Agglomeration Shadows: Long-run Evidence from Ancient Ports
papers.authors: Richard Hornbeck, Guy Michaels, Ferdinand Rauch
papers.abstract: We examine “agglomeration shadows” that emerge around large cities, which discourage some economic activities in nearby areas. Identifying agglomeration shadows is complicated, however, by endogenous city formation and “wave interference” that we show in simulations. We use the locations of ancient ports near the Mediterranean, which seeded modern cities, to estimate agglomeration shadows cast on nearby areas. We find that empirically, as in the simulations, detectable agglomeration shadows emerge for large cities around ancient ports. These patterns extend to modern city locations more generally, and illustrate how encouraging growth in particular places can discourage growth of nearby areas.
papers.zh_title: 识别集聚阴影：来自古代港口的长期证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了围绕大城市出现的“集聚阴影”，这些阴影抑制了邻近地区的某些经济活动。然而，识别集聚阴影是复杂的，原因在于内生的城市形成以及我们在模拟中展示的“波干涉”。我们利用地中海附近古代港口的位置（这些港口催生了现代城市）来估计其对邻近地区投射的集聚阴影。我们发现，在实证中，如同在模拟中一样，对于围绕古代港口的大城市，可以检测到集聚阴影的出现。这些模式更普遍地延伸到现代城市的位置，并说明了促进特定地方的增长如何可能抑制邻近地区的增长。

papers.title: How Inflation Expectations De-Anchor: The Role of Selective Memory Cues
papers.authors: Nicola Gennaioli, Marta Leva, Raphael Schoenle, Andrei Shleifer
papers.abstract: In a model of memory and selective recall, household inflation expectations remain rigid when inflation is anchored but exhibit sharp instability during inflation surges, as similarity prompts retrieval of forgotten high-inflation experiences. Using data from the New York Fed’s Survey of Consumer Expectations and the University of Michigan’s Consumer Survey, we show that similarity can quantitatively account for the sharp post-pandemic rise in inflation expectations, particularly among the elderly. The memory-based model also accounts for how people estimate future inflation ranges and why they neglect infrequent experiences when forming point expectations. These predictions are likewise supported by the data.
papers.zh_title: 通胀预期如何脱锚：选择性记忆线索的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 在一个包含记忆和选择性回忆的模型中，当通胀被锚定时，家庭通胀预期保持刚性，但在通胀飙升期间表现出急剧的不稳定性，因为相似性会触发对已被遗忘的高通胀经历的回忆。利用纽约联储消费者预期调查和密歇根大学消费者调查的数据，我们表明，相似性可以定量解释疫情后通胀预期的急剧上升，尤其是在老年人中。基于记忆的模型还解释了人们如何估计未来通胀范围，以及为什么在形成点预期时会忽略不频繁的经历。这些预测同样得到了数据的支持。

papers.title: How Good are Proxies for Legal Status? Evidence from the Legalization of Two Million Mexicans
papers.authors: Elizabeth U. Cascio, Ethan G. Lewis, Chengguo Zhang
papers.abstract: Two million Mexicans were granted lawful permanent residency in the U.S. under the Immigration Reform and Control Act of 1986 (IRCA). We find that a prominent proxy for legal status poorly detects this event. A decade after legalization, the share of Mexicans who are likely legal according to this proxy shows little change in survey data. Estimates rule out increases of three and eight percentage points relative to comparison groups of Mexican Americans and non-Hispanic Blacks, respectively – figures well below expectations based on administrative data. In contrast, an actual measure of status, citizenship, does rise in line with administrative facts.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LS, PE；JEL：H53, J15, J21, J61, J62
papers.zh_title: 法律身份代理指标的准确性如何？来自两百万墨西哥人合法化的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 根据1986年《移民改革与控制法案》（IRCA），两百万墨西哥人获得了美国合法永久居留权。我们发现，一个常用的法律身份代理指标未能有效检测到这一事件。在合法化十年后，根据该代理指标推断为“可能合法”的墨西哥人比例在调查数据中几乎没有变化。与墨西哥裔美国人和非西班牙裔黑人对照组相比，估计结果排除了分别增加3个和8个百分点的可能性——这一数字远低于基于行政数据的预期。相比之下，实际的身份衡量指标（公民身份）确实按照行政事实上升了。

papers.title: Retirement Benefit Distributions for California Educators
papers.authors: Robert L. Clark, Denis Pelletier, Beth Ritter
papers.abstract: Distribution choices by individuals retiring from CalSTRS are examined for participants that retired between 2016 and 2023. Women are much more likely to select a member-only annuity while a larger proportion of men select a J&S annuity that provide survivor benefits. Being married is a dominant factor in the selection of J&S annuities. Greater final annual salary, older ages at retirement, and more years of service are associated with a greater probability of choosing a J&S annuity. We also find that benefit choices from the primary benefit plan are jointly determined with distributions chosen from the supplemental pension plan. Interestingly, about half of retirees select a lump sum distribution from the supplemental plan while receiving an annuity from their primary plan.
papers.zh_title: 加州教育工作者的退休福利分配
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究考察了2016年至2023年间从加州教师退休系统（CalSTRS）退休的参与者的分配选择。女性更倾向于选择仅限成员的年金，而更大比例的男性选择提供遗属福利的联合与遗属（J&S）年金。婚姻状况是选择J&S年金的主导因素。更高的最终年薪、更晚的退休年龄以及更长的服务年限与选择J&S年金的概率增加相关。我们还发现，主要福利计划的福利选择与补充养老金计划的分配选择是共同决定的。有趣的是，大约一半的退休人员从补充计划中选择一次性领取，同时从主要计划中领取年金。

papers.title: How Merger Synergies Can Harm Consumers: A Defense of the Efficiencies Offense
papers.authors: Paulo Ramos, Thomas G. Wollmann
papers.abstract: This paper uses an aggregative games framework to predict consumer welfare when market structure is endogenously determined. Specifically, we characterize mergers whose synergies reduce consumer welfare by inducing rivals to exit. Our results apply to quantity competition among homogeneous products as well as price competition among multiproduct firms facing multinomial logit demand. Based on models calibrated to commonly used parameter values, we find that the synergies required to maintain consumer surplus can be much higher than those implied by traditional merger analysis. We also find that neither follow-on mergers nor subsequent entry necessarily eliminate the problem.
papers.zh_title: 合并协同效应如何损害消费者：为效率抗辩的辩护
papers.zh_abstract: 本文使用一个聚合博弈框架来预测当市场结构内生决定时的消费者福利。具体而言，我们刻画了那些通过诱导竞争对手退出而降低消费者福利的合并协同效应。我们的结果适用于同质产品间的数量竞争以及面临多项Logit需求的多产品企业间的价格竞争。基于校准到常用参数值的模型，我们发现维持消费者剩余所需的协同效应可能远高于传统合并分析所隐含的水平。我们还发现，后续合并或后续进入并不一定能消除这一问题。

papers.title: Social Comparisons and Adolescent Body Misperception: Evidence from School Entry Cutoffs
papers.authors: Christopher S. Carpenter, Brandyn F. Churchill
papers.abstract: We provide novel evidence on the role of social comparisons in shaping adolescent body misperception. Using an instrumental variables approach leveraging variation in relative age generated by school entry cutoff months and data from the Health Behaviour in School-Aged Children study, we show that relatively older students are more likely to misperceive their weight harshly relative to their BMIs compared to their same-age counterparts who are relatively younger within their classrooms. Meanwhile, relatively younger students are more likely to misperceive their weight leniently relative to their BMIs. We then show that relatively older students are less likely to be overweight or obese, consume more low-calorie foods, and report higher levels of physical activity. Overall, our results suggest that relatively older students base their weight-related expectations and behaviors on their younger peers, while relatively younger students compare themselves to their older peers.
papers.zh_title: 社会比较与青少年身体认知偏差：来自入学截止日期的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提供了关于社会比较在塑造青少年身体认知偏差中作用的新证据。利用基于入学截止月份产生的相对年龄差异作为工具变量，并结合“学龄儿童健康行为”研究的数据，我们表明，与同班级中相对较年轻的同龄人相比，相对年长的学生更可能相对于其身体质量指数（BMI）严厉地误判自己的体重。与此同时，相对年轻的学生更可能相对于其BMI宽松地误判自己的体重。我们还发现，相对年长的学生超重或肥胖的可能性更低，摄入更多低热量食物，并报告更高水平的身体活动。总体而言，我们的结果表明，相对年长的学生基于其较年轻的同龄人来设定与体重相关的期望和行为，而相对年轻的学生则与较年长的同龄人进行比较。

papers.title: Wealth at Birth and its Effect on Child Academic Achievement and Behavioral Problems
papers.authors: Luis F. Faundez, Robert Kaestner
papers.abstract: In this article, we examine the association between family wealth and academic achievement and socioemotional behaviors of children ages 5 to 12. We examine whether wealth prior to birth and at ages 4 or 5 affects academic test scores and behavioral problems during two periods of childhood, ages 5 to 8 and ages 9 to 12, for a large and relatively recent cohort of children. We also examine associations between different forms of wealth (e.g., home equity) and child achievement and behaviors. Finally, we assess whether wealth prior to birth mediates racial/ethnic disparities in child achievement and disparities in achievement by maternal education/ability (AFQT). Results of our analysis indicate that wealth, particularly financial wealth that is the most liquid, has a modest positive association with achievement test scores. We also find that wealth is associated with fewer behavioral problems, but these results are less robust.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：H40, I24, I30
papers.zh_title: 出生时的财富及其对儿童学业成就和行为问题的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们考察了家庭财富与5至12岁儿童学业成就及社会情感行为之间的关联。我们针对一个较大且相对较新的儿童队列，检验了出生前及4或5岁时的财富是否会影响儿童在童年两个时期（5至8岁和9至12岁）的学业测试分数和行为问题。我们还考察了不同形式的财富（例如房屋净值）与儿童成就和行为之间的关联。最后，我们评估了出生前的财富是否中介了儿童成就中的种族/民族差异以及按母亲教育程度/能力（AFQT）划分的成就差异。我们的分析结果表明，财富，尤其是流动性最强的金融财富，与学业测试分数存在适度的正向关联。我们还发现财富与较少的行为问题相关，但这些结果不太稳健。

papers.title: Industrial Organization and The Rise of Market Power
papers.authors: Nathan H. Miller
papers.abstract: This article addresses developments in the literature on The Rise of Market Power. First, it summarizes research about the result of De Loecker 2020 that the sales-weighted average markup has increased in the United States. Second, it summarizes and evaluates a set of industry studies that examine market power over long time horizons in specific settings. A theme that emerges from these industry studies is that technological advancements matter a great deal for the evolution of economic outcomes. By contrast, the studies do not point to weak antitrust enforcement as contributing to greater market power. The article concludes by outlining directions for future research.
papers.zh_title: 产业组织与市场势力的崛起
papers.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了关于“市场势力崛起”的文献发展。首先，它总结了De Loecker（2020）的研究结果，即美国销售额加权的平均加成率有所上升。其次，它总结并评估了一组在特定环境下考察长期市场势力的行业研究。这些行业研究浮现的一个主题是，技术进步对经济结果的演变至关重要。相比之下，这些研究并未指出反垄断执法不力是导致市场势力增强的因素。文章最后概述了未来研究的方向。

papers.title: Price Discounts and Cheapflation During the Post-Pandemic Inflation Surge
papers.authors: Alberto Cavallo, Oleksiy Kryvtsov
papers.abstract: We study how within-store price variation changes with inflation, and whether households exploit it to attenuate the inflation burden. We use micro price data for food products sold by 91 large multi-channel retailers in ten countries between 2018 and 2024. Measuring unit prices within narrowly defined product categories, we analyze two key sources of variation in prices within a store: temporary price discounts and differences across similar products. Price changes associated with discounts grew at a much lower average rate than regular prices, helping to mitigate the inflation burden. By contrast, cheapflation—a faster rise in prices of cheaper goods relative to prices of more expensive varieties of the same good—exacerbated it. Using Canadian Homescan Panel Data, we estimate that spending on discounts reduced the change in the average unit price by 4.1 percentage points, but expenditure switching to cheaper brands raised it by 2.8 percentage points.
papers.zh_title: 后疫情通胀飙升期间的折扣与廉价通胀
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了店内价格变动如何随通胀变化，以及家庭是否利用这种变动来减轻通胀负担。我们使用了2018年至2024年间十个国家91家大型多渠道零售商销售的食品的微观价格数据。通过衡量狭义定义产品类别内的单位价格，我们分析了店内价格变动的两个关键来源：临时性价格折扣和相似产品之间的差异。与折扣相关的价格变动平均增长率远低于常规价格，这有助于减轻通胀负担。相比之下，“廉价通胀”——即较便宜商品的价格相对于同种商品较昂贵品种的价格上涨更快——则加剧了通胀负担。利用加拿大家庭扫描面板数据，我们估计，在折扣上的支出使平均单位价格的变化降低了4.1个百分点，但转向更便宜品牌的支出则使其提高了2.8个百分点。

papers.title: How Are Insurance Markets Adapting to Climate Change? Risk Classification and Pricing in the Market for Homeowners Insurance
papers.authors: Judson Boomhower, Meredith Fowlie, Jacob Gellman, Andrew Plantinga
papers.abstract: Property insurance is critical for reducing household exposure to severe weather risks and aiding in recovery when disaster strikes. As climate risks escalate, insurers are investing in more sophisticated methods to classify and price complex disaster risks. We use proprietary data on parcel-level wildfire risk, together with insurers’ regulatory filings, to investigate how wildfire risk insurance is being priced and provided in a large market for homeowners insurance. We document striking variation in insurers’ risk classification and pricing strategies. Firms that rely on coarser measures of wildfire risk are exposed to potentially severe adverse selection as a result of their information disadvantage relative to insurers with richer models. Consistent with this fact, firms relying on simpler pricing methods charge relatively high prices in high-risk market segments – or choose not to serve these areas at all. A theoretical model of a market for natural hazard insurance that incorporates both asymmetric risk classification and market regulation helps rationalize the empirical patterns we document. Our results highlight how the winner’s curse can increase prices and limit participation in insurance markets for large, hard-to-model risks.
papers.zh_title: 保险市场如何适应气候变化？房屋保险市场中的风险分类与定价
papers.zh_abstract: 财产保险对于减少家庭面临恶劣天气风险以及灾难发生后的恢复至关重要。随着气候风险升级，保险公司正在投资更复杂的方法来分类和定价复杂的灾害风险。我们利用地块层面的野火风险专有数据以及保险公司的监管申报文件，调查了在一个大型房屋保险市场中，野火风险保险是如何定价和提供的。我们记录了保险公司在风险分类和定价策略上的显著差异。依赖较粗略野火风险衡量指标的公司，由于相对于拥有更丰富模型的保险公司存在信息劣势，可能面临严重的逆向选择。与这一事实一致，依赖更简单定价方法的公司在高风险市场细分领域收取相对较高的价格——或者选择完全不服务于这些地区。一个结合了非对称风险分类和市场监管的自然灾害保险市场理论模型有助于解释我们记录的经验模式。我们的结果强调了“赢家诅咒”如何能够提高价格并限制保险公司参与那些风险大且难以建模的市场。

papers.title: Closing the Gates: Assessing Impacts of the Immigration Act of 1917
papers.authors: Ina Ganguli, Jennifer R. Withrow
papers.abstract: On February 5, 1917, the United States passed the Immigration Act of 1917, which included a test for all migrants arriving to the U.S. to prove they were literate. The Literacy Test was one of the first and few times the U.S. used a broad ‘skill-based’ immigration policy in an attempt to limit migration. We assess whether the Immigration Act had any measurable impacts on immigration to the U.S. Using a differences-in-differences approach and digitized data from Ellis Island ship manifests from directly before and after the Act’s passage and enactment, we show that the Act significantly altered selection into migration to the U.S. from Europe through Ellis Island, reducing migration from low literacy countries by 70 percent compared to arrivals from high-literacy countries. We also discuss other provisions of the Act that had the potential to influence the gender composition of arrivals. We show that women – and in particular single women – were less likely to arrive after its passage. Our analysis suggests that even during this period of lower immigration due to WWI and rising literacy levels, the 1917 Act was a consequential moment in immigration history in the United States.
papers.zh_title: 关闭大门：评估1917年移民法的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 1917年2月5日，美国通过了《1917年移民法》，其中包含一项对所有抵达美国的移民进行识字测试的要求。识字测试是美国最早且为数不多的、试图通过广泛的“技能型”移民政策来限制移民的措施之一。我们评估了该移民法是否对移民美国产生了可衡量的影响。利用双重差分方法以及该法案通过和生效前后埃利斯岛船舶舱单的数字化数据，我们表明，该法案显著改变了通过埃利斯岛从欧洲移民到美国的选择，使来自低识字率国家的移民人数比来自高识字率国家的移民人数减少了70%。我们还讨论了该法案中可能影响抵达者性别构成的其他条款。我们表明，在该法案通过后，女性——尤其是单身女性——抵达的可能性更低。我们的分析表明，即使是在第一次世界大战导致移民减少且识字率上升的时期，1917年法案也是美国移民史上一个具有重大影响的时刻。

papers.title: The Long and Variable Lags of Monetary Policy: Evidence from Disaggregated Price Indices
papers.authors: S. Borağan Aruoba, Thomas Drechsel
papers.abstract: We study how monetary policy affects subcomponents of the Personal Consumption Expenditures Price Index (PCEPI) using local projections. Following a monetary policy contraction, the response of aggregate PCEPI turns significantly negative after over three years. There are stark differences in the timing and magnitude of the responses across price categories, including some prices that show an initially positive response. We discuss theoretical interpretations of our findings and point to useful directions for future theoretical research. We also show how to re-aggregate our cross-sectional estimates and their standard errors, taking into account dependence between different prices using a Seemingly Unrelated Regression approach. Re-aggregation exercises show that changes in expenditure behavior have not accelerated the long-lagged response of inflation to monetary policy.
papers.zh_title: 货币政策的长期且多变的滞后效应：来自细分价格指数的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用局部投影法研究了货币政策如何影响个人消费支出价格指数（PCEPI）的子成分。在货币政策紧缩之后，总体PCEPI的响应在三年多后显著转为负值。不同价格类别在响应的时机和幅度上存在显著差异，包括一些价格最初呈现正向响应。我们讨论了研究结果的理论解释，并为未来理论研究指出了有益的方向。我们还展示了如何重新加总我们的横截面估计值及其标准误，并利用似不相关回归方法考虑了不同价格之间的依赖性。重新加总练习表明，支出行为的变化并未加速通货膨胀对货币政策的长期滞后响应。

papers.title: Building a Wall Around Science: The Effect of U.S.-China Tensions on International Scientific Research
papers.authors: Robert Flynn, Britta Glennon, Raviv Murciano-Goroff, Jiusi Xiao
papers.abstract: This paper quantifies how rising U.S.–China geopolitical tensions reshaped international science along three dimensions: trainee mobility, cross-border knowledge flows, and researcher productivity. Using a difference-in-differences design alongside detailed CV and publications data, we find ethnically Chinese students became 15% less likely to enter U.S. doctoral programs and 4% less likely to remain in the U.S. after graduation. China-based scientists cite U.S. research less frequently, while U.S. citations of China-produced work remain unchanged on average. Productivity among U.S.-based ethnically Chinese researchers declined by 8–11%, with a 10% higher rate of exit, but we do not see the same declines in China-based researcher productivity. These patterns cannot be explained by formal policy changes alone and instead point to a chilling effect driven by perceived hostility. Our results highlight how geopolitical tensions, independent of war or policy, can reshape the global geography of scientific talent and knowledge.
papers.zh_title: 围绕科学筑墙：中美紧张局势对国际科学研究的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本文量化了日益加剧的中美地缘政治紧张局势如何从三个维度重塑国际科学：受训者流动性、跨境知识流动和研究人员生产力。利用双重差分设计以及详细的简历和出版物数据，我们发现，华裔学生进入美国博士项目的可能性降低了15%，毕业后留在美国的可能性降低了4%。位于中国的科学家引用美国研究的频率降低，而美国对来自中国研究的引用平均而言保持不变。位于美国的华裔研究人员的生产力下降了8-11%，退出率高出10%，但我们并未观察到位于中国的研究人员生产力出现同样的下降。这些模式不能仅由正式政策变化来解释，反而指向一种由感知到的敌意所驱动的寒蝉效应。我们的结果凸显了地缘政治紧张局势，独立于战争或政策，如何能够重塑全球科学人才和知识的版图。

papers.title: Who Benefits from Trade Wars?
papers.authors: Ling Cen, Lauren Cohen, Jing Wu, Fan Zhang
papers.abstract: Using both the onset of the US-China trade war in 2018 and the most recent Russia-Ukraine War and associated trade tensions, we show a counterintuitive pattern in global international trade. Namely, while the average firm trading with these nations significantly decreases their trade with these jurisdictions following sanctions, government-linked firms show a marked contrast. In particular, government-linked firms actually significantly increase their importing activity following the onset of formal sanctions. The increase is large - roughly 30% (t=4.23), following the shock. We find no increase broadly for government-supplying firms to other countries (even countries in the same regions) at the same time, nor of these same firms in these same regions at other times. In terms of mechanism, government-linked supplier firms are nearly twice as likely to receive tariff exemptions as equivalent firms doing trade in the region who are not government suppliers. More broadly, these effects are increasing in the level of government connection. Using micro-level data, we find that government-supplying firms that recruit more employees with past government work experience also increase their importing activity more – particularly when the past employee worked in a government-contracting role. Lastly, we find evidence that this results in sizable accrued benefits in terms of firm-level profitability, market share gains, and outsized stock returns.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IFM, ITI；JEL：F42, F51, G15, G38
papers.zh_title: 谁从贸易战中受益？
papers.zh_abstract: 利用2018年中美贸易战的爆发以及最近的俄乌战争及相关贸易紧张局势，我们展示了全球国际贸易中一种反直觉的模式。即，尽管与这些国家进行贸易的平均企业在制裁后显著减少了与这些司法管辖区的贸易，但与政府有关联的企业却表现出显著对比。具体而言，与政府有关联的企业在正式制裁开始后实际上显著增加了其进口活动。这种增长幅度很大——在冲击后约为30%（t=4.23）。我们未发现同时期向其他国家（甚至同一地区的国家）供货的政府关联企业有广泛增长，也未发现这些企业在其他时间于同一地区有类似增长。在机制方面，与政府有关联的供应商企业获得关税豁免的可能性几乎是该地区从事贸易但非政府供应商的同等企业的两倍。更广泛地说，这些效应随着政府关联程度的提高而增强。利用微观数据，我们发现，招聘更多具有政府工作经历员工的政府供应商企业，其进口活动也增加得更多——尤其是当这些前雇员曾在政府合同岗位工作时。最后，我们发现有证据表明，这导致了在企业层面盈利能力、市场份额增长以及超额股票回报方面的可观累积收益。

papers.title: Bond Market Views of the Fed
papers.authors: Luigi Bocola, Alessandro Dovis, Kasper Jørgensen, Rishabh Kirpalani
papers.abstract: This paper uses high frequency data to detect shifts in financial markets' perception of the Federal Reserve stance on inflation. We construct daily revisions to expectations of future nominal interest rates and inflation that are priced into nominal and inflation-protected bonds, and find that the relation between these two variables-positive and stable for over twenty years-has weakened substantially over the 2020-2022 period. In the context of canonical monetary reaction functions considered in the literature, these results are indicative of a monetary authority that places less weight on inflation stabilization. We augment a standard New Keynesian model with regime shifts in the monetary policy rule, calibrate it to match our findings, and use it as a laboratory to understand the drivers of U.S. inflation post 2020. We find that the shift in the monetary policy stance accounts for half of the observed increase in inflation.
papers.zh_title: 债券市场对美联储的看法
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用高频数据来检测金融市场对美联储通胀立场认知的变化。我们构建了名义债券和通胀保值债券所定价的未来名义利率和通胀预期的每日修正值，并发现这两个变量之间的关系——在二十多年里一直为正且稳定——在2020-2022年期间已大幅减弱。在文献中考虑的标准货币政策反应函数背景下，这些结果表明货币当局对通胀稳定的重视程度降低。我们在一个标准的新凯恩斯主义模型中加入了货币政策规则中的制度转换，对其进行校准以匹配我们的发现，并将其作为一个实验室来理解2020年后美国通胀的驱动因素。我们发现，货币政策立场的转变解释了观察到的通胀增长的一半。

papers.title: Leaders in Social Movements: Evidence From Unions in Myanmar
papers.authors: Laura E. Boudreau, Rocco Macchiavello, Virginia Minni, Mari Tanaka
papers.abstract: Social movements are catalysts for crucial institutional changes. To succeed, they must coordinate members’ views (consensus building) and actions (mobilization). We study union leaders within Myanmar’s burgeoning labor movement. Union leaders are positively selected on both personality traits that enable them to influence others and ability but earn lower wages. In group discussions about workers’ views on an upcoming national minimum wage negotiation, randomly embedded leaders build consensus around the union’s preferred policy. In an experiment that mimics individual decision-making in a collective action set-up, leaders increase mobilization through coordination. Leaders empower social movements by building consensus that encourages mobilization.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, LS, POL；JEL：C93, D23, D70, J51, J52
papers.zh_title: 社会运动中的领导者：来自缅甸工会的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 社会运动是推动关键制度变革的催化剂。为了成功，它们必须协调成员的观点（建立共识）和行动（动员）。我们研究了缅甸蓬勃发展的劳工运动中的工会领导者。工会领导者在能够影响他人的个性特征和能力方面均被正向选择，但工资较低。在关于工人对即将到来的全国最低工资谈判看法的分组讨论中，随机嵌入的领导者围绕工会偏好的政策建立了共识。在一个模拟集体行动情境中个人决策的实验中，领导者通过协调增加了动员。领导者通过建立鼓励动员的共识来赋能社会运动。

papers.title: Breaking Boundaries: Lower Tail Dependence Can Triple the Economic Value of Index Insurance for Rural Households
papers.authors: Enrique Estefania-Salazar, Michael Carter, Eva Iglesias, Álvaro Escribano
papers.abstract: Despite its promise to help low-wealth households manage climate risk, index insurance remains hampered by downside basis risk, meaning that an insured party suffers a loss, but receives no payment because the insurance index fails to register a loss. While efforts to reduce basis risk focus on the creation of indices that better predict losses, this paper focuses on the creation of statistically rigorous insurance zones that minimize downside basis risk. In contrast to our approach, most existing index insurance contracts use statistically ad hoc administrative boundaries to demarcate insurance zones. To improve on this practice, we develop a machine learning algorithm that forms zones to maximizes lower tail dependence within the zone. After exploring the logic for using lower tail dependence, we apply our algorithm to the long-running index-based livestock insurance contract in Northern Kenya. We show that compared to the currently employed administrative insurance areas, our algorithm creates an insurance contract that increases the expected utility value of the insurance by 60-200% even when keeping the number of zones the same. Optimizing the number of zones using our method can further increase the economic value of index insurance to its beneficiaries.
papers.zh_title: 打破界限：下尾相依性可使指数保险对农村家庭的经济价值增加两倍
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管指数保险有望帮助低收入家庭管理气候风险，但它仍然受到下行基差风险的困扰，这意味着投保方遭受损失，但由于保险指数未能记录到损失而未获得赔付。虽然减少基差风险的努力侧重于创建能更好预测损失的指数，但本文侧重于创建在统计上严谨的保险区域，以最小化下行基差风险。与我们的方法相比，大多数现有的指数保险合同使用统计上随意的行政边界来划分保险区域。为了改进这种做法，我们开发了一种机器学习算法，通过形成区域来最大化区域内的下尾相依性。在探讨了使用下尾相依性的逻辑之后，我们将我们的算法应用于肯尼亚北部长期运行的基于指数的牲畜保险合同。我们表明，与目前使用的行政保险区域相比，即使保持区域数量相同，我们的算法创建的保险合同也能将保险的预期效用价值提高60-200%。使用我们的方法优化区域数量可以进一步提高指数保险对其受益者的经济价值。

papers.title: Intergenerational Human Capital Impacts and Complementarities in Kenya
papers.authors: Madeline Duhon, Lia Fernald, Joan Hamory, Edward Miguel, Eric Ochieng, Michael W. Walker
papers.abstract: This study exploits experimental variation in parent human capital (early-life school-based deworming) and a shock to schooling (extended Covid closures) to estimate how these factors interact in the production of child human capital within a sample of 3,500 Kenyan 3-8 year olds. Parents with additional exposure to childhood deworming have children with improved human capital, including in health, non-cognitive development, and cognition; cognitive scores are +0.26 standard deviation units higher among treated parents' school-age children, only prior to school closures. Findings are interpreted through a model where home-based and school inputs are complements in the production of child cognition.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, EH, LS；JEL：I00, J24, O15
papers.zh_title: 肯尼亚代际人力资本影响与互补性
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究利用父母人力资本（童年早期基于学校的驱虫干预）和一次对学校教育的冲击（新冠疫情导致的长期停课）的实验性变异，来估计这些因素如何在3500名3-8岁肯尼亚儿童样本中相互作用，影响儿童人力资本的产出。童年时期额外接触驱虫干预的父母，其子女在健康、非认知发展和认知方面的人力资本有所改善；在停课前，受干预父母的学龄儿童的认知得分高出0.26个标准差。研究结果通过一个模型进行解释，该模型认为家庭投入和学校投入在儿童认知生产中具有互补性。

papers.title: Reliability Options in Renewables-Dominated Electricity Markets
papers.authors: Shaun D. McRae, Frank A. Wolak
papers.abstract: Recent energy shortfalls in renewables-dominated electricity markets call for a mechanism to ensure demand is met under all system conditions. We demonstrate severe shortcomings of an increasingly popular mechanism—reliability options—caused by its interaction with fixed-price forward contracts for energy. Large generators can trigger the option exercise, weakening the short-term incentive to sell output provided by forward contracts alone. In the longer term, hydro generators sell more forward contracts and store less water, reducing system reliability. We empirically show that Colombian generators respond to these incentives. We analyze a standardized energy contracting approach to long-term resource adequacy that does not create these economic incentives.
papers.zh_title: 可再生能源主导电力市场中的可靠性期权
papers.zh_abstract: 近期可再生能源主导电力市场出现的能源短缺问题，凸显了建立一种能在所有系统条件下确保需求得到满足的机制的必要性。我们揭示了日益流行的机制——可靠性期权——因其与固定价格能源远期合约的相互作用而产生的严重缺陷。大型发电商可以触发期权行权，从而削弱仅由远期合约提供的短期售电激励。从长期来看，水电发电商会出售更多远期合约并减少储水量，从而降低系统可靠性。我们通过实证表明，哥伦比亚的发电商对这些激励措施做出了反应。我们分析了一种标准化的能源合同方法，用于确保长期资源充足性，而该方法不会产生这些经济激励。

papers.title: Household Climate Finance: Theory and Survey Data on Safe and Risky Green Assets
papers.authors: Shifrah Aron-Dine, Johannes Beutel, Monika Piazzesi, Martin Schneider
papers.abstract: This paper studies green investing using data from a representative survey of German households that inform a quantitative asset pricing model. We document substantial heterogeneity in nonpecuniary benefits and hedging across the wealth distribution, as well as sizeable unmet demand for green deposit accounts. Model counterfactuals show that optimism about green equity returns, rather than tastes, is currently responsible for the greenium. Introducing green deposits at a spread would not crowd out green equity but increase overall green investment. Feeding results from an RCT into the model, we show green equity could increase with better information about green finance.
papers.zh_title: 家庭气候金融：关于安全与风险绿色资产的理论与调查数据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用一项具有代表性的德国家庭调查数据研究绿色投资，该数据为定量资产定价模型提供了信息。我们记录了非金钱收益和风险对冲在财富分布中的显著异质性，以及对绿色存款账户的大量未满足需求。模型反事实分析表明，目前对绿色权益回报的乐观情绪（而非偏好）是绿色溢价的原因。以利差引入绿色存款不会挤出绿色权益，反而会增加整体绿色投资。将随机对照试验的结果输入模型，我们表明，通过提供更好的绿色金融信息，绿色权益投资可能会增加。

papers.title: Regime Changes and FDI: A Tale of Two Countries – Poland and Israel
papers.authors: Assaf Razin, Andrzej Cieslik
papers.abstract: This essay examines the effects of radical transformations in the liberal characteristics of regimes on foreign direct investors. It focuses on the differing and common patterns in foreign direct investment (FDI) in response to the rise and decline of liberal economic regimes, using the cases of Poland and Israel as examples. The liberalization of Poland's economy and market reforms in the late 1980s and early 1990s significantly boosted the country's attractiveness to international companies. However, a decade of illiberal policies under the PiS regime has diminished Poland's appeal to foreign investors. Similarly, Israel experienced substantial growth in its GNP and particularly in the high-tech sector from the 1990s to the 2010s. This growth was driven by capital liberalization and finance surges, leading to a marked increase in FDI, particularly in technology. Key factors such as a more skilled workforce and advances in education and research were crucial to this surge. However, recent shifts have resulted in a sharp decline in foreign direct investment.
papers.zh_title: 政权更迭与外国直接投资：以波兰和以色列为例
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了政权自由主义特征的剧烈变革对外国直接投资的影响。它以波兰和以色列为例，聚焦于外国直接投资在自由主义经济体制兴起和衰落过程中表现出的不同与共同模式。20世纪80年代末和90年代初波兰经济的自由化和市场改革显著提升了该国对国际公司的吸引力。然而，法律与公正党执政十年间的非自由主义政策削弱了波兰对外国投资者的吸引力。同样，以色列从20世纪90年代到21世纪头十年，其国民生产总值，特别是高科技部门经历了显著增长。这一增长由资本自由化和金融激增驱动，导致外国直接投资（尤其是在科技领域）显著增加。更熟练的劳动力以及教育和研究的进步等关键因素对这一激增至关重要。然而，近期的转变导致外国直接投资急剧下降。

papers.title: How Do Physicians Respond to New Medical Research?
papers.authors: Philip DeCicca, Maripier Isabelle, Natalie Malak
papers.abstract: What happens when the findings of a prominent medical study are overturned? Using a medical trial on breech births, we estimate the effect of the reversal of such a medical study on physician choices and infant health outcomes. Using the United States Birth Certificate Records from 1995-2010, we employ a difference-in-differences estimator for C-sections, low Apgar, and low birth weight measures. We find that the reversal of a multi-site, high profile, randomized control trial on the appropriate delivery of term breech births, the Term Breech Trial (TBT), led to a 15-23 percent decline in C-sections for such births at a time when the overall trend in C-sections was rising. We find our largest estimated effects amongst traditionally disadvantaged groups. However, we do not find that such a change in practice had significant impacts on infant health. Contrary to prior studies, we find that physicians updated their beliefs quickly, and do indeed adjust to new medical research, particularly young physicians, prior to mandatory policy or professional guidelines.
papers.zh_title: 医生如何应对新的医学研究？
papers.zh_abstract: 当一项著名医学研究的发现被推翻时会发生什么？利用一项关于臀位分娩的医学试验，我们估计了此类医学研究结论逆转对医生选择及婴儿健康结果的影响。使用1995-2010年美国出生证明记录，我们对剖腹产、低阿普加评分和低出生体重指标采用了双重差分估计。我们发现，一项关于足月臀位分娩适当方式的多中心、高知名度随机对照试验——足月臀位试验（TBT）的逆转，导致此类分娩的剖腹产率下降了15-23%，而当时剖腹产的整体趋势正在上升。我们发现在传统弱势群体中估计效应最大。然而，我们并未发现这种实践变化对婴儿健康产生显著影响。与先前研究相反，我们发现医生迅速更新了他们的信念，并且确实会根据新的医学研究进行调整，尤其是年轻医生，这发生在强制性政策或专业指南出台之前。

papers.title: Career Values for Labor Markets: Evidence from Robot Adoption
papers.authors: Maria Petrova, Gregor Schubert, Bledi Taska, Pinar Yildirim
papers.abstract: Career progression is important for people’s lives and economic decisions. We develop an empirical measure of an occupation’s local “career value”—the long-run value of the earnings that will result from working in that job and following the career ladder associated with it. We then document that career values have been stagnating over the 2000-2016 period, in spite of growing wages, due to a deterioration in career mobility. We estimate the effect of robot automation on career values over the same time period and find that one additional industrial robot per 1,000 workers lowered local career values by about 1.5 percent. The reason is that robotization reduces transitions into better-paid occupations and redirects workers toward similar- or lower-paid jobs. The impact is largest in high-manufacturing areas, for mid-experience workers, and for males. Demotions from management jobs that result from robotization are more likely for less-educated workers and for women, who are more likely to respond by upskilling. Declines in career values led to a reduction in housing construction and college enrollment, and an increase in Republican vote shares in 2016, which highlights how the career effects of automation shape forward-looking household decisions.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, POL, PR；JEL：J01, L6, M0, M20, M29, M55, O14, O3, P0
papers.zh_title: 劳动力市场的职业价值：来自机器人采用的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 职业发展对人们的生活和经济决策至关重要。我们开发了一个衡量职业本地“职业价值”的实证指标——即从事该工作并遵循其相关职业阶梯所带来收入的长期价值。然后我们记录到，尽管工资在增长，但在2000-2016年期间，由于职业流动性的恶化，职业价值一直停滞不前。我们估计了同期机器人自动化对职业价值的影响，发现每1000名工人增加一台工业机器人，会使本地职业价值降低约1.5%。原因是机器人化减少了向收入更高职业的转换，并将工人引导至收入相似或更低的工作。这种影响在制造业密集地区、中等经验工人和男性中最大。机器人化导致的管理岗位降级更可能发生在受教育程度较低的工人和女性身上，她们更可能通过提升技能来应对。职业价值的下降导致了住房建设和大学入学率的减少，以及2016年共和党得票率的上升，这突显了自动化的职业效应如何塑造前瞻性的家庭决策。

papers.title: Just What the Doctor Ordered? The Benefits and Costs of E-Cigarette Regulation in Australia
papers.authors: Donald S. Kenkel, Alan D. Mathios, Grace N. Phillips, Revathy Suryanarayana, Hua Wang, Sen Zeng
papers.abstract: Australia had adopted a novel approach to e-cigarette policy by requiring a physician’s prescription to lawfully obtain nicotine e-cigarettes. We conducted an online discrete choice experiment to gauge how adult Australian smokers made hypothetical choices between cigarettes, prescription e-cigarettes, non-prescription e-cigarettes, and quitting. We estimate a mixed logit model, which allows us to predict the market shares under different policy scenarios. The mixed logit model also provides estimates of consumer willingness to pay for the benefits from the prescription status of e-cigarettes and the costs of illegal e-cigarette markets. We estimate that the average utility loss from an illegal retail market is worth AU$7.90 per pack-equivalent. We use the corresponding estimates of the compensating variations in income to conduct cost-benefit analyses of possible reforms to Australian e-cigarette regulation. In aggregate, we estimate that the benefits of allowing but not requiring prescriptions of e-cigarettes are AU$1.8 billion per year. Our paper provides a novel contribution to research on e-cigarette regulation and provides a case-study for the policy implementation in Australia. Our paper is also part of our research agenda to explore and develop methods to conduct policy analysis and cost-benefit analysis of regulatory policies that might create illegal markets.
papers.zh_title: 恰如医嘱？澳大利亚电子烟监管的收益与成本
papers.zh_abstract: 澳大利亚采取了一种新颖的电子烟政策方法，要求获得医生处方才能合法获取尼古丁电子烟。我们进行了一项在线离散选择实验，以衡量澳大利亚成年吸烟者在香烟、处方电子烟、非处方电子烟和戒烟之间如何做出假设性选择。我们估计了一个混合logit模型，该模型使我们能够预测不同政策情景下的市场份额。混合logit模型还提供了消费者对电子烟处方状态收益以及非法电子烟市场成本的支付意愿估计。我们估计，非法零售市场的平均效用损失相当于每包当量7.90澳元。我们利用相应的收入补偿变差估计，对澳大利亚电子烟监管的可能改革进行了成本效益分析。总体而言，我们估计允许但不要求电子烟处方的收益为每年18亿澳元。我们的论文为电子烟监管研究提供了新颖的贡献，并为澳大利亚的政策实施提供了一个案例研究。我们的论文也是我们探索和开发对可能产生非法市场的监管政策进行政策分析和成本效益分析方法的研究议程的一部分。

papers.title: Plan Design and Participant Behavior in Defined Contribution Retirement Plans: Past, Present, and Future
papers.authors: Jonathan Reuter
papers.abstract: I review the academic literature on defined contribution retirement plan design and participant behavior. While adoption of automatic enrollment has significantly increased participation rates, recent studies find the long-run effects on savings are smaller than the short-run effects, with some savings financed via debt. I also review efforts to expand access to employer-based retirement savings and liquid savings, the pros and cons of target date funds as default investment options, potential conflicts of interest in plan design, and potential benefits of customized defaults. I conclude by discussing how SECURE 2.0 may impact US workers and highlighting topics for future research.
papers.zh_title: 固定缴款退休金计划的设计与参与者行为：过去、现在与未来
