papers.zh_abstract: 我回顾了关于固定缴款退休金计划设计和参与者行为的学术文献。虽然自动加入的采用显著提高了参与率，但最近的研究发现，对储蓄的长期影响小于短期影响，部分储蓄是通过债务融资的。我还回顾了扩大雇主支持退休储蓄和流动性储蓄可及性的努力、作为默认投资选项的目标日期基金的利弊、计划设计中潜在的利益冲突，以及定制化默认选项的潜在好处。最后，我讨论了SECURE 2.0法案可能如何影响美国工人，并强调了未来研究的主题。

papers.title: Partisan Politics and Annual Shareholder Meeting Formats
papers.authors: Yuanzhi Li, David Yermack
papers.abstract: We study companies’ decisions about holding annual shareholder meetings on-line during the Covid pandemic, and returning to classical in-person meetings post-pandemic. Among S&P 1500 companies, the frequency of virtual meetings shot up from less than 10 percent to more than 80 percent in the first year of the pandemic, with only gradual reversion to in-person meetings since then. Partisan politics has significant associations with these decisions. In-person meetings are more likely for companies that have Republican CEOs, and for companies with headquarters located in jurisdictions that vote Republican. Corporate democracy therefore seems to have been swept up by the tides of contemporary political feuds.
papers.zh_title: 党派政治与年度股东大会形式
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了公司在新冠疫情期间举行在线年度股东大会，以及疫情后回归传统线下会议的决定。在标普1500指数公司中，虚拟会议的频率在疫情第一年从不到10%飙升至超过80%，此后仅逐步回归线下会议。党派政治与这些决定存在显著关联。拥有共和党CEO的公司，以及总部位于投票支持共和党辖区的公司，更可能举行线下会议。因此，公司民主似乎已被当代政治纷争的浪潮所席卷。

papers.title: Industrial Policy in the Global Semiconductor Sector
papers.authors: Pinelopi K. Goldberg, Réka Juhász, Nathan J. Lane, Giulia Lo Forte, Jeff Thurk
papers.abstract: The resurgence of subsidies and industrial policies has raised concerns about their potential inefficiency and alignment with multilateral principles. Critics warn that such policies may divert resources to less efficient firms and provoke retaliatory measures from other countries, leading to a wasteful “subsidy race.” However, subsidies for sectors with inherent cross-border externalities can have positive global effects. This paper examines these issues within the semiconductor industry: a key driver of economic growth and innovation with potentially significant learning-by-doing and strategic importance due to its dual-use applications.\nOur study aims to: (1) document and quantify recent industrial policies in the global semiconductor sector, (2) explore the rationale behind these policies, and (3) evaluate their economic impacts, particularly their cross-border effects, and compatibility with multilateral principles. We employ historical analysis, natural language processing, and a model-based approach to measure government support and its impacts. Our findings indicate that government support has been vital for the industry’s growth, with subsidies being the primary form of support. They also highlight the importance of cross-border technology transfers through FDI, business and research collaborations, and technology licensing. China, despite significant subsidies, does not stand out as an outlier compared to other countries, given its market size.\nModel estimates suggest the presence of learning-by-doing at the firm-product level as well as economies of scope within a firm and substantial cross-border learning spillovers. These spillovers likely reflect cross-country technology transfers and the role of fabless clients and input suppliers in disseminating knowledge globally through their interactions with foundries. Such cross-border spillovers are not merely accidental but result from deliberate actions by market participants that cannot be taken for granted. Firms may choose to share knowledge across borders or restrict access to frontier technology, thereby excluding certain countries. Future research will use model estimates to simulate the quantitative implications of subsidies and to explore the dynamics of a “subsidy race” in the semiconductor industry.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, IO, ITI, PR；JEL：F13, F61, L63, N60, O38
papers.zh_title: 全球半导体产业的产业政策
papers.zh_abstract: 补贴和产业政策的复兴引发了对其潜在效率低下以及是否符合多边原则的担忧。批评者警告称，此类政策可能将资源转移到效率较低的企业，并引发其他国家的报复性措施，导致浪费性的“补贴竞赛”。然而，对具有内在跨境外部性的行业进行补贴可能产生积极的全球效应。本文在半导体行业内审视这些问题：半导体是经济增长和创新的关键驱动力，具有显著的学习效应，并因其军民两用应用而具有战略重要性。 我们的研究旨在：(1) 记录并量化全球半导体行业近期的产业政策，(2) 探索这些政策背后的理由，以及 (3) 评估其经济影响，特别是其跨境效应，以及与多边原则的兼容性。我们采用历史分析、自然语言处理和基于模型的方法来衡量政府支持及其影响。我们的研究结果表明，政府支持对该行业的增长至关重要，其中补贴是主要支持形式。它们还强调了通过外商直接投资、商业和研究合作以及技术许可进行的跨境技术转让的重要性。中国尽管补贴规模巨大，但考虑到其市场规模，与其他国家相比并不显得异常。 模型估计表明，在企业-产品层面存在学习效应，企业内部存在范围经济，并且存在显著的跨境学习溢出效应。这些溢出效应可能反映了跨国技术转让，以及无晶圆厂客户和投入品供应商通过与代工厂的互动在全球传播知识的作用。这种跨境溢出效应并非偶然，而是市场参与者有意为之的结果，不能视为理所当然。企业可能选择跨境共享知识，或限制对前沿技术的访问，从而将某些国家排除在外。未来的研究将利用模型估计来模拟补贴的量化影响，并探索半导体行业“补贴竞赛”的动态。

papers.title: Partisan Expectations and COVID-Era Inflation
papers.authors: Carola Binder, Rupal Kamdar, Jane M. Ryngaert
papers.abstract: We document that, during the COVID-19 era, the inflation expectations of Democrats remained strongly anchored, while those of Republicans did not. Republicans' expectations not only rose well above the inflation target, but also became more sensitive to a variety of shocks, including CPI releases and energy prices. We then exploit geographic variation in political affiliation at the MSA level to show that the partial de-anchoring of expectations had implications for realized inflation. Counterfactual exercises imply that, had all expectations become as unanchored as those of Republicans, average inflation would have been two to three percentage points higher for much of the pandemic period, ceteris paribus.
papers.zh_title: 党派预期与新冠时期的通胀
papers.zh_abstract: 我们记录到，在新冠疫情期间，民主党人的通胀预期仍然保持强劲锚定，而共和党人则不然。共和党人的预期不仅远高于通胀目标，而且对各种冲击（包括CPI发布和能源价格）变得更加敏感。然后，我们利用大都市统计区层面政治归属的地理差异来表明，预期的部分脱锚对实际通胀产生了影响。反事实模拟表明，如果所有预期都变得像共和党人那样脱锚，在其他条件不变的情况下，疫情大部分时期的平均通胀率将高出两到三个百分点。

papers.title: Unobserved Contributions and Political Influence: Evidence from the Death of Top Donors
papers.authors: Marco Battaglini, Valerio Leone Sciabolazza, Mengwei Lin, Eleonora Patacchini
papers.abstract: It has long been noted that there is little money in U.S. politics relative to the stakes. But what if political contributions are not fully observable or are non-monetary and thus difficult to quantify? We study this question using new data on top donors in U.S. congressional races. To identify their influence, we exploit exogenous shocks to candidate–donor relationships generated by donor deaths. We show that the death of a top donor reduces a candidate’s probability of election in subsequent elections. The loss of a donor also affects legislative behavior: elected candidates become more aligned with their party and concentrate their legislative activity in fewer policy areas. These effects are not explained by the size of donors’ direct contributions. Instead, they are stronger for prominent donors and appear to operate through their impact on broader fundraising and social networks. Our findings suggest that observable campaign donations capture only a small share of the political influence exercised by major donors.
papers.zh_title: 未观测到的捐款与政治影响力：来自顶级捐赠者去世的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 长期以来，人们注意到美国政治中的金钱相对于利害关系而言很少。但如果政治捐款并非完全可观测，或者是非货币形式因而难以量化呢？我们利用美国国会竞选中顶级捐赠者的新数据来研究这个问题。为了识别他们的影响力，我们利用了捐赠者去世所产生的候选人与捐赠者关系的外生冲击。我们表明，顶级捐赠者的去世会降低候选人在后续选举中当选的概率。捐赠者的流失也会影响立法行为：当选的候选人变得更加与党派保持一致，并将其立法活动集中在更少的政策领域。这些效应并不能由捐赠者直接捐款的规模来解释。相反，它们对于知名捐赠者更为强烈，并且似乎是通过其对更广泛的筹款和社交网络的影响而起作用。我们的研究结果表明，可观测的竞选捐款仅捕捉了主要捐赠者所行使政治影响力的一小部分。

papers.title: Superstars or Supervillains? Large Firms in the South Korean Growth Miracle
papers.authors: Jaedo Choi, Andrei A. Levchenko, Dimitrije Ruzic, Younghun Shim
papers.abstract: We quantify the contribution of the largest firms to South Korea’s economic performance over the period 1972-2011. Using firm-level historical data, we document a novel fact: firm concentration rose substantially during the growth miracle period. To understand whether rising concentration contributed positively or negatively to South Korean real income, we build a quantitative dynamic heterogeneous firm small open economy model. Our framework accommodates a variety of potential causes and consequences of changing firm concentration: productivity, distortions, selection into exporting, scale economies, and oligopolistic and oligopsonistic market power in domestic goods and labor markets. The model is implemented directly on the firm-level data and inverted to recover the drivers of concentration. We find that most of the differential performance of the top firms is attributable to higher productivity growth rather than increasingly favorable distortions. Exceptional performance of the top 3 firms within each sector relative to the average firms contributed 20.8% to the 2011 real GDP and 6.6% to the net present value of welfare over the period 1972-2011. Thus, the largest Korean firms were superstars rather than supervillains.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ITI；JEL：F12, F16, L11, N15, O40
papers.zh_title: 超级明星还是超级恶棍？韩国增长奇迹中的大型企业
papers.zh_abstract: 我们量化了1972-2011年期间韩国最大企业对经济表现的贡献。利用企业层面的历史数据，我们记录了一个新事实：在增长奇迹期间，企业集中度大幅上升。为了理解集中度上升对韩国实际收入是产生了积极还是消极影响，我们构建了一个定量动态异质性企业小型开放经济模型。我们的框架涵盖了企业集中度变化的各种潜在原因和后果：生产率、扭曲、出口选择、规模经济，以及国内商品和劳动力市场中的寡头和寡买方市场势力。该模型直接在企业层面数据上实施，并通过反推来恢复集中度的驱动因素。我们发现，顶级企业的差异化表现大多归因于更高的生产率增长，而非日益有利的扭曲。每个行业内前3大企业相对于平均企业的卓越表现，对2011年实际GDP的贡献为20.8%，对1972-2011年期间福利净现值的贡献为6.6%。因此，韩国最大的企业是超级明星而非超级恶棍。

papers.title: Banks and Tax-Exempt Debt Arbitrage
papers.authors: James R. Hines Jr., Emily Horton
papers.abstract: Interest paid by U.S. state and local bonds is tax-exempt, making these bonds attractive to investors – though a tax rule limits arbitrage opportunities by restricting associated interest expense deductions. Prior to 1986, U.S. banks were not subject to the interest deduction limitation, making banks preferred holders of tax-exempt debt. U.S. banks used tax-exempt debt to reduce their tax liabilities by roughly 20% in the 1950s and 45% in the 1960s, rising to as much as 80% by the early 1980s. Despite their special exemption, and in part because of their widespread holdings, banks did not benefit from investing in tax-exempt bonds, as competition between banks reduced bond yields to the point of investor indifference. The absence of a tax benefit from arbitrage appears not only in observed bond yields, but also in banks’ considerable unused potential for further tax reductions. After the Tax Reform Act of 1986 removed their special tax exemption, banks significantly reduced their holdings of tax-exempt debt, particularly among banks most severely impacted by the rule change.
papers.zh_title: 银行与免税债务套利
papers.zh_abstract: 美国州和地方债券支付的利息是免税的，这使得这些债券对投资者具有吸引力——尽管一项税收规则通过限制相关的利息费用扣除来限制套利机会。在1986年之前，美国银行不受利息扣除限制的约束，这使得银行成为免税债务的优先持有者。美国银行利用免税债务在1950年代减少了约20%的税负，在1960年代减少了45%，到1980年代初期这一比例上升至高达80%。尽管享有特殊豁免，并且部分由于其广泛的持有量，银行并未从投资免税债券中受益，因为银行之间的竞争将债券收益率压低至投资者无差异的水平。套利缺乏税收优惠不仅体现在观察到的债券收益率上，还体现在银行在进一步减税方面存在大量未利用的潜力。1986年《税收改革法案》取消了它们的特殊税收豁免后，银行大幅减少了免税债务的持有量，尤其是在受规则变化影响最严重的银行中。

papers.title: Timing Sustainable Engagement in Real Asset Investments
papers.authors: Bram van der Kroft, Juan Palacios, Roberto Rigobon, Siqi Zheng
papers.abstract: This paper estimates the effect of sustainable shareholder engagement on firm's investments. We study the real estate industry where investments are sporadic and occur following depreciation cycles. SEC restrictions (rule 240.14a-8) on shareholder proposals, in combination with the asset depreciation cycles, create random variation enabling us to identify firms' sustainable investment decisions. Using unique micro-data tracking investments in all public US commercial real estate properties over the past two decades, we find that sustainable engagement effectively steers firms to initiate tangible and long-lasting sustainable retrofits. However, engagement is ineffective or impairs such investments when it does not coincide with reinvestment periods, or investors vote down the proposal.
papers.zh_title: 实物资产投资中可持续参与的时机
papers.zh_abstract: 本文估计了可持续股东参与对企业投资的影响。我们研究房地产行业，该行业的投资是零星的，并且发生在折旧周期之后。美国证券交易委员会关于股东提案的限制（规则240.14a-8），结合资产折旧周期，产生了随机变异，使我们能够识别企业的可持续投资决策。利用过去二十年追踪所有美国上市商业房地产物业投资的独特微观数据，我们发现可持续参与有效地引导企业启动有形且持久的可持续改造。然而，当参与不与再投资周期重合，或者投资者投票否决提案时，参与是无效的，甚至会损害此类投资。

papers.title: Intra-Household Welfare Inequality and Household Public Goods
papers.authors: Pierre-André Chiappori, Costas Meghir, Yoko Okuyama
papers.abstract: We develop a money metric welfare index for individuals within households, allowing for public goods, work, and heterogeneous preferences for men and women. Using Japanese data, we estimate a collective model of labor supply, private consumption, and expenditures on children and other public goods. We find that women have stronger preference for spending on children and other public goods than men. Within-household inequality is larger than between-household inequality, but has been declining across cohorts, reflecting improvements in women’s position. This is driven by the increase in women’ college graduation, improvement in their relative wages, and the increase in childcare availability.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, LS, PE；JEL：H31, H41, J12, J13, J16, J22
papers.zh_title: 家庭内部福利不平等与家庭公共品
papers.zh_abstract: 我们为家庭内部的个人开发了一个货币度量福利指数，该指数考虑了公共品、工作以及男性和女性的异质性偏好。利用日本数据，我们估计了一个关于劳动供给、私人消费以及儿童和其他公共品支出的集体模型。我们发现，女性比男性更偏好于在儿童和其他公共品上支出。家庭内部不平等大于家庭之间不平等，但跨队列呈下降趋势，这反映了女性地位的改善。这一趋势是由女性大学毕业率的提高、相对工资的改善以及儿童保育可用性的增加所驱动的。

papers.title: Estimation of Nonlinear Exchange Rate Dynamics in Evolving Regimes
papers.authors: Jeffrey A. Frankel, Yao Hou, Danxia Xie
papers.abstract: This paper develops a new econometric framework to estimate and classify exchange rate regimes. They are classified into four distinct categories: fixed exchange rates, BBC (band, basket and crawl), managed floating, and freely floating. The procedure captures the patterns of exchange rate dynamics and the interventions by authorities under each of the regimes. We pay particular attention to the BBC and offer a new approach to parameter estimation by utilizing a three-regime Threshold Auto Regressive (TAR) model to reveal the nonlinear nature of exchange rate dynamics. We further extend our benchmark framework to allow the evolution of exchange rate regimes over time by adopting the minimum description length (MDL) principle, to overcome the challenge of simultaneous two-dimensional inference of nonlinearity in the state dimension and structural breaks in the time dimension. We apply our framework to 26 countries. The results suggest that exchange rate dynamics under different regimes are well captured by our new framework.
papers.zh_title: 演变体制中非线性汇率动态的估计
papers.zh_abstract: 本文开发了一个新的计量经济学框架来估计和分类汇率制度。它们被分为四个不同的类别：固定汇率、BBC（区间、篮子与爬行）、管理浮动和自由浮动。该程序捕捉了每种制度下汇率动态和当局干预的模式。我们特别关注BBC，并提出了一种新的参数估计方法，利用三区制阈值自回归模型来揭示汇率动态的非线性特征。我们进一步扩展了基准框架，采用最小描述长度原则允许汇率制度随时间演变，以克服在状态维度上非线性和时间维度上结构突变的同时二维推断挑战。我们将该框架应用于26个国家。结果表明，不同制度下的汇率动态被我们的新框架很好地捕捉到了。

papers.title: Stock Market Wealth and Entrepreneurship
papers.authors: Gabriel Chodorow-Reich, Plamen T. Nenov, Vitor Santos, Alp Simsek
papers.abstract: We use data on stock portfolios of Norwegian households to show that stock market wealth increases entrepreneurship by relaxing financial constraints. Our research design isolates idiosyncratic variation in household-level stock market returns. An increase in stock market wealth increases the propensity to start a firm, with the response concentrated in households with moderate levels of financial wealth, for whom a 20 percent increase in wealth due to a positive stock return increases the likelihood to start a firm by about 20%, and in years when the aggregate stock market return in Norway is high. We develop a method to study the effect of wealth on firm outcomes that corrects for the bias introduced by selection into entrepreneurship. Higher wealth causally increases firm profitability, an indication that it relaxes would-be entrepreneurs’ financial constraints. Consistent with this interpretation, the pass-through from stock wealth into equity in the new firm is one-for-one.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, PR；JEL：E22, E44, G50, L26
papers.zh_title: 股票市场财富与创业
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用挪威家庭股票投资组合的数据表明，股票市场财富通过放松金融约束来促进创业。我们的研究设计隔离了家庭层面股票市场回报的异质性变动。股票市场财富的增加提高了创办企业的倾向，这种反应集中在金融财富水平适中的家庭中，对于这些家庭，因正股票回报导致的财富增加20%，会使创办企业的可能性提高约20%；并且这种反应集中在挪威整体股票市场回报较高的年份。我们开发了一种方法来研究财富对企业结果的影响，该方法纠正了由创业选择引入的偏差。更高的财富因果性地提高了企业盈利能力，这表明它放松了潜在创业者的金融约束。与这一解释一致，从股票财富到新企业股权的传导是一对一的。

papers.title: The Lasting Impacts of Middle School Principals
papers.authors: Eric A. Hanushek, Andrew J. Morgan, Steven G. Rivkin, Jeffrey C. Schiman, Ayman Shakeel, Lauren Sartain
papers.abstract: Using rich Texas administrative data, we estimate the impact of middle school principals on post-secondary schooling, employment, and criminal justice outcomes. The results highlight the importance of school leadership, though striking differences emerge in the relative importance of different skill dimensions to different outcomes. The estimates reveal large and highly significant effects of principal value-added to cognitive skills on the productive activities of schooling and work but much weaker effects of value-added to noncognitive skills on these outcomes. In contrast, there is little or no evidence that middle school principals affect the probability a male is arrested and has a guilty disposition by raising cognitive skills but strong evidence that they affect these outcomes through their impacts on noncognitive skills, especially those related to the probability of an out-of-school suspension. In addition, the principal effects on the probability of engagement in the criminal justice system are much larger for Black than for nonBlack males, corresponding to race differences in engagement with the criminal justice system.
papers.zh_title: 中学校长的持久影响
papers.zh_abstract: 利用丰富的德克萨斯州行政数据，我们估计了中学校长对高等教育、就业和刑事司法结果的影响。结果凸显了学校领导力的重要性，尽管在不同技能维度对不同结果的相对重要性上出现了显著差异。估计显示，校长在认知技能上的增值对学校教育和工作的生产性活动具有巨大且高度显著的影响，而在非认知技能上的增值对这些结果的影响则弱得多。相比之下，几乎没有证据表明中学校长通过提高认知技能来影响男性被逮捕并被判有罪的概率，但有强有力的证据表明他们通过影响非认知技能（尤其是与校外停学概率相关的技能）来影响这些结果。此外，校长对参与刑事司法系统概率的影响，黑人男性远大于非黑人男性，这与参与刑事司法系统的种族差异相对应。

papers.title: College Students and Career Aspirations: Nudging Student Interest in Teaching
papers.authors: Alvin Christian, Matthew Ronfeldt, Basit Zafar
papers.abstract: We survey undergraduate students at a large public university to understand the pecuniary and non-pecuniary factors driving their college major and career decisions with a focus on K-12 teaching. While the average student reports there is a 6% chance they will pursue teaching, almost 27% report a nonzero chance of working as a teacher in the future. Students, relative to existing statistics, generally believe they would earn substantially more in a non-teaching job (relative to a teaching job). We run a randomized information experiment where we provide students with information on the pecuniary and non-pecuniary job characteristics of teachers and non-teachers. This low-cost informational intervention impacts students' beliefs about their job characteristics if they were to work as a teacher or non-teacher, and increases the reported likelihood they will major or minor in education by 35% and pursue a job as a teacher or in education by 14%. Linking the survey data with administrative transcript records, we find that the intervention had small (and weak) impacts on the decision to minor in education in the subsequent year. Overall, our results indicate that students hold biased beliefs about their career prospects, they update these beliefs when provided with information, and that this information has limited impacts on their choices regarding studying and having a career in teaching.
papers.zh_title: 大学生与职业抱负：助推学生对教学的兴趣
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在一所大型公立大学对本科生进行调查，以了解影响他们大学专业和职业决策的金钱和非金钱因素，重点关注K-12教学。虽然平均学生报告从事教学的可能性为6%，但近27%的学生报告未来有非零概率成为教师。与现有统计数据相比，学生普遍认为他们在非教学工作（相对于教学工作）中的收入会高得多。我们进行了一项随机信息实验，向学生提供关于教师和非教师工作特征的金钱和非金钱信息。这种低成本的信息干预影响了学生对自己如果成为教师或非教师时工作特征的信念，并将他们报告的可能主修或辅修教育的可能性提高了35%，从事教师或教育领域工作的可能性提高了14%。将调查数据与行政成绩记录相关联，我们发现该干预对随后一年决定辅修教育产生了微小（且微弱）的影响。总体而言，我们的结果表明，学生对其职业前景持有有偏见的信念，他们在获得信息后会更新这些信念，并且这些信息对他们关于学习和从事教学职业的选择影响有限。

papers.title: Webmunk: A New Tool for Studying Online Behavior and Digital Platforms
papers.authors: Chiara Farronato, Andrey Fradkin, Chris Karr
papers.abstract: Understanding the behavior of users online is important for researchers, policymakers, and private companies alike. But observing online behavior and conducting experiments is difficult without direct access to the user base and software of technology companies. We introduce Webmunk, an open-source tool designed to make conducting online studies much easier. The user-facing side of Webmunk is a browser extension that can track consumer browsing behavior and experimentally modify consumers experiences as they browse the Internet. It can be installed just like any other browser extension, such as ad blockers. Through this extension, researchers can collect a host of consumer data, from URLs to web page HTML elements, clicks, and scroll positions. The extension can also modify information and change the look of a web page, allowing for researchers to implement interventions that vary across study participants. A key advantage of this approach is that interventions occur while participants are engaging in real world activities such as shopping, browsing the news, using social media, or searching for information. We demonstrate the power of Webmunk by discussing two studies in progress.
papers.zh_title: Webmunk：研究在线行为与数字平台的新工具
papers.zh_abstract: 理解用户的在线行为对于研究人员、政策制定者和私营公司都至关重要。但是，如果没有直接访问科技公司的用户群和软件的权限，观察在线行为和进行实验就很困难。我们介绍Webmunk，一个旨在使进行在线研究变得更加容易的开源工具。Webmunk面向用户的一端是一个浏览器扩展，它可以跟踪消费者的浏览行为，并在消费者浏览互联网时实验性地修改消费者的体验。它可以像任何其他浏览器扩展（例如广告拦截器）一样安装。通过这个扩展，研究人员可以收集大量消费者数据，从URL到网页HTML元素、点击和滚动位置。该扩展还可以修改信息并改变网页的外观，允许研究人员实施在研究参与者之间有所不同的干预措施。这种方法的一个关键优势是，干预发生在参与者从事现实世界活动（如购物、浏览新闻、使用社交媒体或搜索信息）时。我们通过讨论两项正在进行的研究来展示Webmunk的强大功能。

papers.title: Identifying Shocks to Systematic Risk in Times of Crisis
papers.authors: Jacob Boudoukh, Yukun Liu, Tobias J. Moskowitz, Matthew P. Richardson
papers.abstract: We characterize how risk evolves during a crisis. Using high-frequency data, we find that the first two principal components (PCs) of the covariance matrix of global asset returns experience large, sudden, and temporary spikes coinciding with well-known crises – Covid-19 pandemic, Global Financial Crisis, and Brexit. Despite the origin of these crises being very different, the risk dynamics share remarkably common features: PC1 shocks come solely from asset volatility, while PC2 shocks come from changing loadings/composition, effectively making it a “crisis” factor. Using the exogenous nature of Covid-19, we provide novel identification of risk dynamics by linking these changes to news about the virus and epidemiological model forecast errors over time and across countries. We conclude with investment implications, where shocks to systematic risk sharply reduce diversification benefits and ex ante attempts to hedge it are futile, which may be a defining characteristic of a crisis – that it is unavoidable.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, IFM；JEL：F3, F30, G01, G1, G10, G11, G12
papers.zh_title: 危机时期系统性风险冲击的识别
papers.zh_abstract: 我们描述了危机期间风险如何演变。利用高频数据，我们发现全球资产收益协方差矩阵的前两个主成分（PC）经历了与众所周知的危机（新冠疫情、全球金融危机和英国脱欧）同时发生的大幅、突然和暂时的飙升。尽管这些危机的起源非常不同，但风险动态呈现出显著共同的特征：PC1冲击完全来自资产波动率，而PC2冲击则来自载荷/构成的变化，这实际上使其成为一个“危机”因子。利用新冠疫情的外生性质，我们通过将这些变化与关于病毒的新闻以及跨时间和跨国家的流行病学模型预测误差联系起来，提供了对风险动态的新颖识别。最后，我们讨论了投资含义，其中系统性风险的冲击急剧降低了分散化收益，而事前的对冲尝试是徒劳的，这可能是危机的一个定义性特征——即它是不可避免的。

papers.title: Driving Change: Evaluating Connecticut's Collaborative Approach to Reducing Racial Disparities in Policing
papers.authors: Susan T. Parker, Matthew B. Ross, Stephen Ross
papers.abstract: We examine a statewide program that identifies police departments with large racial disparities in traffic stops and works with identified departments to reduce disparities. The intervention caused large (23.56%) and persistent (at least 12 months) reductions in the number of minorities involved in traffic stops, with no impact on stops of white drivers. Reductions in traffic stops involving minority drivers primarily result from fewer pretextual stops (85%) for lighting violations and non-moving violations. We find relative declines of approximately 30% for stops resulting in a warning or an arrest. Using data on crime and vehicle crashes, we find no evidence that crashes increase after traffic stops fall, but we do find moderate declines in the clearance rates for property crime.
papers.meta: Programs：LE, LS, PE；JEL：H7, I3, J7, K4
papers.zh_title: 推动变革：评估康涅狄格州减少警务中种族差异的协作方法
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了一个全州范围内的项目，该项目识别出在交通拦截中存在较大种族差异的警察部门，并与被识别出的部门合作以减少差异。该干预措施导致涉及少数族裔的交通拦截数量大幅（23.56%）且持续（至少12个月）减少，而对白人驾驶员的拦截没有影响。涉及少数族裔驾驶员的交通拦截减少主要源于因照明违规和非行驶违规而进行的借口性拦截（占85%）的减少。我们发现导致警告或逮捕的拦截相对下降了约30%。利用犯罪和车辆碰撞数据，我们没有发现交通拦截减少后碰撞增加的证据，但我们确实发现财产犯罪的破案率出现了适度下降。

papers.title: Transgender Earnings Gaps in the United States: Evidence from Administrative Data
papers.authors: Christopher S. Carpenter, Lucas Goodman, Maxine J. Lee
papers.abstract: We provide the first evidence on transgender earnings in the US using administrative data on over 55,000 individuals who changed their gender marker with the Social Security Administration and had gender-congruent first name changes on tax records. We validate and describe this sample which exhibits positive selection likely associated with the ability to legally affirm gender. To address selection we estimate transgender earnings gaps using timing variation within-person and variation across siblings and coworkers. All three approaches return evidence of robust transgender earnings penalties of 6-13 log points driven by extensive and intensive margin differences.
papers.zh_title: 美国跨性别者收入差距：来自行政数据的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用超过55,000名向社会保障局更改其性别标记并在税务记录中进行了与性别一致的姓名变更的个体的行政数据，提供了关于美国跨性别者收入的首次证据。我们验证并描述了该样本，该样本表现出正向选择，这可能与合法确认性别的能力有关。为了解决选择性问题，我们利用个体内的时间变化以及兄弟姐妹和同事之间的差异来估计跨性别者收入差距。所有三种方法都返回了稳健的跨性别者收入惩罚的证据，约为6-13个对数点，这由广延边际和集约边际的差异所驱动。

papers.title: How will Generative AI impact Communication?
papers.authors: Joshua S. Gans
papers.abstract: This paper examines the impact of Generative AI (GAI) on communication through the lens of salience and signalling models. It explores how GAI affects both senders' ability to create salient messages and receivers' costs of absorbing them. The analysis reveals that while GAI can increase communication by reducing costs, it may also disrupt traditional signalling mechanisms. In a salience model, GAI generally improves outcomes but can potentially reduce receiver welfare. In a pure signalling model, GAI may hinder effective communication by making it harder to distinguish high-quality messages. This suggests that GAI's introduction necessitates new instruments and mechanisms to facilitate effective communication and quality assessment in this evolving landscape.
papers.zh_title: 生成式人工智能将如何影响沟通？
papers.zh_abstract: 本文通过显著性和信号传递模型的视角，考察了生成式人工智能（GAI）对沟通的影响。它探讨了GAI如何影响发送者创造显著信息的能力以及接收者吸收这些信息的成本。分析表明，虽然GAI可以通过降低成本来增加沟通，但它也可能破坏传统的信号传递机制。在显著性模型中，GAI通常会改善结果，但可能潜在地降低接收者的福利。在纯信号传递模型中，GAI可能通过使区分高质量信息变得更加困难，从而阻碍有效沟通。这表明，GAI的引入需要新的工具和机制，以便在这一不断演变的格局中促进有效的沟通和质量评估。

papers.title: Redesigning Payments for Ecosystem Services to Increase Cost-Effectiveness
papers.authors: Santiago Izquierdo-Tort, Seema Jayachandran, Santiago Saavedra
papers.abstract: Payments for Ecosystem Services (PES) are a widely used approach for forest conservation through which people are paid to avoid deforesting land they enroll in the program. We present findings from a randomized trial in Mexico that tested whether a PES contract that requires enrollees to enroll all of their forest is more effective than the traditional PES contract that allows them to exercise choice. The modification's aim is to prevent landowners from enrolling only parcels they planned to conserve anyway while leaving aside other parcels to deforest. We find that the full-enrollment treatment reduces deforestation by 41% compared to the traditional contract. This extra conservation occurs despite the full-enrollment provision reducing the compliance rate due to its more stringent requirements. The full-enrollment treatment more than quadrupled cost-effectiveness, highlighting the potential to substantially improve the efficacy of conservation payments through simple contract modifications.
papers.zh_title: 重新设计生态系统服务付费以提高成本效益
papers.zh_abstract: 生态系统服务付费（PES）是一种广泛使用的森林保护方法，通过向参与者支付费用，使其避免砍伐其纳入项目的土地。我们展示了墨西哥一项随机试验的结果，该试验测试了要求参与者将所有森林都纳入项目的PES合同，是否比允许参与者自行选择的传统PES合同更有效。这一修改的目的是防止土地所有者只将他们原本就计划保护的林地纳入项目，而将其他林地留作砍伐之用。我们发现，与传统合同相比，全纳入处理使森林砍伐减少了41%。尽管全纳入条款因其更严格的要求而降低了合规率，但额外的保护效果仍然实现了。全纳入处理的成本效益提高了四倍以上，凸显了通过简单的合同修改来大幅提高保护付费效能的潜力。

papers.title: The Distributional Effects of U.S. Tax Credits for Heat Pumps, Solar Panels, and Electric Vehicles
papers.authors: Severin Borenstein, Lucas W. Davis
papers.abstract: Over the last two decades, U.S. households have received $47 billion in tax credits for buying heat pumps, solar panels, electric vehicles, and other “clean energy” technologies. Using information from tax returns, we show that these tax credits have gone predominantly to higher-income households. The bottom three income quintiles have received about 10% of all credits, while the top quintile has received about 60%. The most extreme is the tax credit for electric vehicles, for which the top quintile has received more than 80% of all credits. The concentration of tax credits among high-income filers is relatively constant over time, though we do find a slight broadening for the electric vehicle credit since 2018. The paper then turns to the related question of cost effectiveness, examining how clean energy technology adoption has changed over time and discussing some of the broader economic considerations for this type of tax credit.
papers.zh_title: 美国热泵、太阳能电池板和电动汽车税收抵免的分配效应
papers.zh_abstract: 在过去二十年里，美国家庭因购买热泵、太阳能电池板、电动汽车及其他“清洁能源”技术而获得了470亿美元的税收抵免。利用纳税申报表的信息，我们表明这些税收抵免主要流向了高收入家庭。收入最低的三个五等分组获得了约10%的抵免额，而最高五等分组获得了约60%。最极端的是电动汽车税收抵免，最高五等分组获得了超过80%的抵免额。税收抵免集中在高收入申报者中的现象随时间推移相对稳定，尽管我们发现自2018年以来电动汽车税收抵免的分布略有扩大。本文随后转向成本效益这一相关问题，考察清洁能源技术采纳率随时间的变化，并讨论此类税收抵免所涉及的一些更广泛的经济考量。

papers.title: Labor Market Matching, Wages, and Amenities
papers.authors: Thibaut Lamadon, Jeremy Lise, Costas Meghir, Jean-Marc Robin
papers.abstract: This paper develops an equilibrium labor market model that jointly incorporates worker heterogeneity, firm heterogeneity, compensating differentials, search frictions, and Becker–type complementarities. We show that the primitives of the model are nonparametrically identified using matched employer–employee data. Unobserved heterogeneity can be recovered in the first stage in a fully model consistent way, making estimation very tractable. We apply the framework to Swedish administrative data and find substantial heterogeneity in worker preferences over firms, large non-pecuniary contributions to wage dispersion, and meaningful but imperfect sorting. Our estimates provide a structural interpretation of observed wage premia, mobility patterns, and sorting patterns in the data.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, TWP；JEL：J0, J01, J20, J31, J41
papers.zh_title: 劳动力市场匹配、工资与舒适度
papers.zh_abstract: 本文构建了一个均衡劳动力市场模型，该模型共同纳入了工人异质性、企业异质性、补偿性差异、搜索摩擦以及贝克尔型互补性。我们证明，利用匹配的雇主-雇员数据，模型的基本要素可以非参数地识别。未观测到的异质性可以在第一阶段以完全符合模型的方式恢复，使得估计非常易于处理。我们将该框架应用于瑞典行政数据，发现工人对企业偏好的巨大异质性、非货币因素对工资离散度的重要贡献，以及有意义但不完美的分类。我们的估计为数据中观察到的工资溢价、流动模式和分类模式提供了结构性解释。

papers.title: Will User-Contributed AI Training Data Eat Its Own Tail?
papers.authors: Joshua S. Gans
papers.abstract: This paper examines and finds that the answer is likely to be no. The environment examined starts with users who contribute based on their motives to create a public good. Their own actions determine the quality of that public good but also embed a free-rider problem. When AI is trained on that data, it can generate similar contributions to the public good. It is shown that this increases the incentive of human users to provide contributions that are more costly to supply. Thus, the overall quality of contributions from both AI and humans rises compared to human-only contributions. In situations where platform providers want to generate more contributions using explicit incentives, the rate of return on such incentives is shown to be lower in this environment.
papers.zh_title: 用户贡献的AI训练数据会自食其果吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察并发现答案很可能是否定的。所考察的环境始于用户基于自身动机为创造公共品做出贡献。他们自身的行为决定了该公共品的质量，但也内嵌了一个搭便车问题。当AI基于这些数据进行训练时，它能够生成类似的公共品贡献。研究表明，这增加了人类用户提供成本更高贡献的激励。因此，与仅有人类贡献的情况相比，AI和人类贡献的整体质量都会提高。在平台提供商希望利用显性激励来产生更多贡献的情况下，本文表明此类激励的回报率在这种环境中较低。

papers.title: Demand for Artificial Intelligence in Settlement Negotiations
papers.authors: Joshua S. Gans
papers.abstract: When AI prediction substantially resolves trial uncertainty, a party purchasing AI prediction will disclose it if it is in their favour and not otherwise, signalling the outcome to the other party. Thus, the trial outcome becomes common knowledge. However, this implies that the parties will settle rather than purchase the AI prediction. When parties have differing prior beliefs regarding trial outcomes, these differences are only resolved if the AI prediction is purchased and utilised. In this case, AI will be purchased in equilibrium. Different trial cost allocation rules awarding all costs to the losing party (the English Rule) or having each party bear their own costs (the American Rule) can impact the demand for AI for settlement negotiations, but how this occurs interacts with the expectations regarding whether a settlement will occur or not in AI's absence.
papers.zh_title: 和解谈判中对人工智能的需求
papers.zh_abstract: 当AI预测能大幅解决审判不确定性时，购买AI预测的一方如果预测结果对其有利就会披露，否则就不披露，从而向另一方发出结果信号。因此，审判结果成为共同知识。然而，这意味着双方将达成和解，而不是购买AI预测。当双方对审判结果持有不同的先验信念时，这些差异只有在AI预测被购买并使用时才能得到解决。在这种情况下，AI将在均衡中被购买。不同的诉讼费用分配规则——如败诉方承担所有费用（英国规则）或各方自行承担费用（美国规则）——会影响和解谈判中对AI的需求，但这种影响方式与在没有AI的情况下是否会发生和解的预期相互作用。

papers.title: Learning, Catastrophic Risk and Ambiguity in the Climate Change Era
papers.authors: Frances C. Moore
papers.abstract: Key methodologies used for managing weather risks have relied on the assumption that climate is not changing and that the historic weather record is therefore representative of current risks. Anthropogenic climate change upends this assumption, effectively reducing the information available to actors and increasing ambiguity in the estimated climate distribution, with associated costs for weather risk management and risk-averse decision-makers. These costs result purely from the knowledge that the climate could be changing, may arise abruptly, are additional to any direct costs or benefits from actual climate change, and are, to date, entirely unquantified. Using a case study of extreme rainfall-related flood damages in New York City, this paper illustrates how these ambiguity-related costs arise. Greater uncertainty over the current climate distribution interacts with a steeply non-linear damage function to greatly increase the mean and variance of the posterior loss distribution. This is a systemic information shock that cannot be diversified within the insurance sector, producing higher and more volatile premiums and higher reinsurance costs. These effects are consistent with recent developments in US property insurance markets, where premium increases, bankruptcies, and insurer withdrawals have been linked to the growing costs of natural disasters.
papers.zh_title: 气候变化时代的学习、灾难性风险与模糊性
papers.zh_abstract: 用于管理天气风险的关键方法论一直依赖于气候不变的假设，即历史天气记录能够代表当前风险。人为气候变化颠覆了这一假设，实际上减少了行为者可获得的信息，增加了估计气候分布中的模糊性，并给天气风险管理和风险厌恶型决策者带来了相关成本。这些成本纯粹源于气候可能正在变化这一认知，可能突然出现，是实际气候变化带来的任何直接成本或收益之外的额外成本，并且迄今为止完全未被量化。本文以纽约市极端降雨相关洪水损失为案例，说明了这些模糊性相关成本是如何产生的。当前气候分布的更大不确定性，与高度非线性的损失函数相互作用，极大地增加了后验损失分布的均值和方差。这是一种系统性的信息冲击，无法在保险部门内部实现分散化，从而导致更高且更不稳定的保费以及更高的再保险成本。这些效应与美国财产保险市场近期的动态一致，在该市场中，保费上涨、破产和保险公司退出与自然灾害成本不断上升有关。

papers.title: Intertemporal Choice Bracketing and the Measurement of Time Preferences
papers.authors: Yonas Alem, John Loeser, Aprajit Mahajan
papers.abstract: Economists routinely rationalize financial behaviors and prominent empirical anomalies using time preferences inferred from money earlier or later (MEL) responses; yet theory suggests such choices could instead reflect investment returns. We conduct a lab-in-the-field experiment in Kenya combining repeated MEL, randomized large cash transfers, and an illiquid savings product. Neither time preferences nor marginal investment returns exclusively rationalize choices: randomized cash transfers significantly affect MEL responses, yet subjects also fail to arbitrage across economically equivalent MEL and savings opportunities. However, we provide evidence that heterogeneity in time preferences drives the predictive power of MEL for savings decisions, rationalizing routine practice.
papers.zh_title: 跨期选择框定与时间偏好的测量
papers.zh_abstract: 经济学家通常利用从“现在或以后获得金钱”（MEL）反应中推断出的时间偏好来解释金融行为和显著的经验异常；然而理论表明，此类选择可能反映的是投资回报。我们在肯尼亚进行了一项实地实验，结合了重复的MEL、随机的大额现金转移以及一种非流动性储蓄产品。时间偏好和边际投资回报都无法单独解释这些选择：随机现金转移显著影响了MEL反应，但受试者也未能利用MEL和储蓄机会在经济上等价这一点进行套利。然而，我们提供的证据表明，时间偏好的异质性驱动了MEL对储蓄决策的预测能力，从而为常规实践提供了合理性解释。

papers.title: McCarthyism, Media, and Political Repression: Evidence from Hollywood
papers.authors: Hui Ren Tan, Tianyi Wang

papers.title: Local Administration and Racial Inequality in Federal Program Access: Insights from New Deal Work Relief
papers.authors: Price V. Fishback, Jessamyn Schaller, Evan J. Taylor
papers.abstract: New Deal programs provided relief jobs for millions of unemployed Americans. Although the federal government sought to prohibit racial discrimination, eligibility was determined by local administrators. Using the 1940 Census, we estimate county-level Black–White gaps in WPA employment. The estimates show that about 40% of Black male workers lived in counties where their rate of work relief employment was the same or higher than similar White male workers, including 24% in the South. Black workers’ relative access to work relief was higher where the White unemployment rate was lower and where local governments had more resources.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, LS, PE, POL；JEL：J08, J45, J78, N32, N42
papers.zh_title: 地方行政与联邦项目获取中的种族不平等：来自新政工作救济的启示
papers.zh_abstract: 新政项目为数百万失业美国人提供了救济性工作。尽管联邦政府试图禁止种族歧视，但资格认定由地方行政官员决定。利用1940年人口普查数据，我们估算了县级层面黑人与白人在公共事业振兴署（WPA）就业中的差距。估算结果显示，约40%的黑人男性工人居住在其工作救济就业率与类似白人男性工人相同或更高的县，其中24%位于南方。在白人失业率较低且地方政府资源更充裕的地区，黑人工人获得工作救济的相对机会更高。

papers.title: Higher-Order Beliefs and Risky Asset Holdings
papers.authors: Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Xiao Yin
papers.abstract: We combine a customized survey and randomized controlled trial (RCT) to study the effect of higher-order beliefs on U.S. retail investors’ portfolio allocations. We find that investors’ higher-order beliefs about stock market returns are correlated with but distinct from their first-order beliefs. Furthermore, the differences between the two vary systematically according to investor characteristics. We use information treatments in the RCT to create exogenous differential variations in first- and higher-order beliefs. We find that an exogenous increase in first-order beliefs increases the portfolio share allocated to the stock market (risky assets), while an exogenous increase in higher-order beliefs reduces it.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：C83, D84, G11, G12, G51
papers.zh_title: 高阶信念与风险资产持有
papers.zh_abstract: 我们结合定制化调查与随机对照试验（RCT），研究高阶信念对美国散户投资者投资组合配置的影响。我们发现，投资者关于股市回报的高阶信念与其一阶信念相关但有所区别。此外，两者之间的差异根据投资者特征呈现系统性变化。我们在RCT中使用信息处理来创造一阶信念和高阶信念的外生差异变化。我们发现，一阶信念的外生增加会提高投资组合中配置于股市（风险资产）的份额，而高阶信念的外生增加则会降低这一份额。

papers.title: The Effect of Postsecondary Educational Institutions on Local Economies: A Bird’s-Eye View
papers.authors: Patrick Lehnert, Madison Dell, Uschi Backes-Gellner, Eric Bettinger
papers.abstract: Despite worldwide expansion of higher education, the impact of higher education institutions on local economic activity is still poorly understood. We analyze the local economic effects of branch campus openings in Tennessee and Texas, two states representative of the underlying U.S. enrollment patterns. To overcome the lack of adequate data, we use a novel proxy for regional economic activity based on daytime satellite imagery. Applying different panel methods—traditional difference-in-differences (DD), heterogeneity-robust DD, and instrumental variables—we find positive effects. Independent data show an increase in college graduates and employment in the sectors aligned with programs offered at branch campuses.
papers.zh_title: 高等教育机构对地方经济的影响：鸟瞰视角
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管高等教育在全球范围内扩张，但高等教育机构对地方经济活动的影响仍知之甚少。我们分析了田纳西州和得克萨斯州分校校区开设对地方经济的影响，这两个州代表了美国潜在的就学模式。为克服数据不足，我们基于白天卫星图像使用了一种新颖的区域经济活动代理变量。应用不同的面板方法——传统双重差分法（DD）、异质性稳健DD以及工具变量法——我们发现了积极效应。独立数据显示，分校校区所设项目相关领域的大学毕业生数量和就业均有所增加。

papers.title: The Economics of Biodiversity Loss
papers.authors: Stefano Giglio, Theresa Kuchler, Johannes Stroebel, Olivier Wang
papers.abstract: We explore the economic effects of biodiversity loss by developing an ecologically-founded model that captures how different species interact to deliver the ecosystem services that complement other factors of economic production. Aggregate ecosystem services are produced by combining several non-substitutable ecosystem functions such as pollination and water filtration, which are each provided by many substitutable species playing similar roles. As a result, economic output is an increasing but highly concave function of species richness. The marginal economic value of a species depends on three factors: (i) the number of similar species within its ecosystem function, (ii) the marginal importance of the affected function for overall ecosystem productivity, and (iii) the extent to which ecosystem services constrain economic output in each country. Using our framework, we derive expressions for the fragility of ecosystem service provision and its evolution over time, which depends, among other things, on the distribution of biodiversity losses across ecosystem functions. We discuss how these fragility measures can help policymakers assess the risks induced by biodiversity loss and prioritize conservation efforts. We also embed our model of ecosystem service production in a standard economic model to study optimal land use when land use raises output at the cost of reducing biodiversity. We find that even in settings where species loss does not reduce output substantially today, it lowers growth opportunities and reduces resilience to future species loss, especially when past species loss has been asymmetric across functions. Consistent with these predictions of our model, we show empirically that news about biodiversity loss increases spreads on credit default swaps (CDS) more for countries with more depleted ecosystems.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EEE, EFG, IFM, ME, PE；JEL：E0, E30, E60, Q0, Q01, Q30, Q32, Q38, Q51, Q54, Q56, Q57
papers.zh_title: 生物多样性损失的经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过构建一个基于生态学的模型来探索生物多样性损失的经济效应，该模型捕捉了不同物种如何相互作用以提供补充其他经济生产要素的生态系统服务。总生态系统服务由若干不可替代的生态系统功能（如授粉和水过滤）组合产生，而每项功能由许多扮演相似角色的可替代物种提供。因此，经济产出是物种丰富度的递增但高度凹函数。一个物种的边际经济价值取决于三个因素：（i）其所在生态系统功能中相似物种的数量，（ii）受影响功能对整体生态系统生产力的边际重要性，以及（iii）生态系统服务在每个国家对经济产出的约束程度。利用我们的框架，我们推导出生态系统服务供给脆弱性及其随时间演变的表达式，这取决于生物多样性损失在生态系统功能间的分布等因素。我们讨论了这些脆弱性度量如何帮助政策制定者评估生物多样性损失引发的风险并优先安排保护工作。我们还将生态系统服务生产模型嵌入标准经济模型中，以研究当土地使用以提高产出为代价减少生物多样性时的最优土地利用。我们发现，即使在物种损失今天并未大幅减少产出的情况下，它也会降低增长机会并削弱对未来物种损失的韧性，尤其是当过去的物种损失在功能间不对称时。与模型预测一致，我们实证表明，对于生态系统更枯竭的国家，关于生物多样性损失的新闻会更大程度地增加信用违约互换（CDS）利差。

papers.title: Innovation Spillovers across U.S. Tech Clusters
papers.authors: Xavier Giroud, Ernest Liu, Holger Mueller
papers.abstract: The vast majority of U.S. inventors work for firms that also have inventors and plants in other tech clusters. Using merged USPTO–U.S. Census Bureau plant-level data, we show that larger tech clusters not only make local inventors more productive but also raise the productivity of inventors and plants in other clusters, which are connected to the focal cluster through their parent firms’ networks of innovating plants. Cross-cluster innovation spillovers do not depend on the physical distance between clusters, and plants cite disproportionately more patents from other firms in connected clusters, across large physical distances. To rationalize these findings, and to inform policy, we develop a tractable model of spatial innovation that features both within- and cross-cluster innovation spillovers. Based on our model, we derive a sufficient statistic for the wedge between the social and private returns to innovation in a given location. Taking the model to the data, we rank all U.S. tech clusters according to this wedge. While larger tech clusters exhibit a greater social-private innovation wedge, this is not because of local knowledge spillovers, but because they are well-connected to other clusters through fims’ networks of innovating plants. In counterfactual exercises, we show that an increase in the interconnectedness of U.S. tech clusters raises the social-private innovation wedge in (almost) all locations, but especially in tech clusters that are large and well-connected to other clusters.
papers.zh_title: 美国科技集群间的创新溢出
papers.zh_abstract: 绝大多数美国发明家受雇于那些在其他科技集群也拥有发明家和工厂的企业。利用合并的美国专利商标局（USPTO）与美国人口普查局工厂级数据，我们表明，较大的科技集群不仅提高了本地发明家的生产率，还提高了其他集群中发明家和工厂的生产率，这些其他集群通过其母公司的创新工厂网络与焦点集群相连。跨集群创新溢出不依赖于集群间的物理距离，并且工厂引用来自相连集群中其他企业的专利比例更高，即使物理距离遥远。为合理化这些发现并为政策提供信息，我们构建了一个可处理的空间创新模型，该模型兼具集群内和跨集群创新溢出特征。基于我们的模型，我们推导出一个充分统计量，用于衡量给定地点创新的社会回报与私人回报之间的楔子。将模型应用于数据，我们根据这一楔子对所有美国科技集群进行排序。虽然较大的科技集群表现出更大的社会-私人创新楔子，但这并非由于本地知识溢出，而是因为它们通过企业的创新工厂网络与其他集群紧密相连。在反事实模拟中，我们表明，美国科技集群互联性的提高会提升（几乎所有）地点的社会-私人创新楔子，尤其是在那些规模大且与其他集群联系紧密的科技集群中。

papers.title: Investment in Preventive Care for Children of Middle Eastern Ancestry During the Trump Administration
papers.authors: Shooshan Danagoulian, Owen Fleming, Daniel S. Grossman, David Slusky
papers.abstract: Individuals of Middle Eastern and North African (MENA) ancestry in the US have been targeted by anti-immigrant and counterterrorism policies and have been the focus of vitriolic political rhetoric. Despite this, lack of data identifying MENA individuals has prevented systematic evaluation of the impact of these policies and rhetoric on MENA communities’ wellbeing, including investment in health capital. This paper begins to address this gap in knowledge using a large, longitudinal medical records database with expanded race and ethnicity measures to describe disparities and evaluate the impact of immigration policies and anti-MENA rhetoric on preventive care use among MENA children in the US. Specifically, we evaluate the election of Donald Trump, and find that the election decreased MENA children’s utilization of vaccinations and well visits. Documenting MENA health and outcomes following official US policy and rhetoric is paramount for understanding the full consequences of policies that target underrepresented groups.
papers.zh_title: 特朗普政府期间中东裔儿童预防性护理投资
papers.zh_abstract: 美国的中东和北非（MENA）血统个体一直是反移民和反恐政策的目标，并成为尖刻政治言论的焦点。尽管如此，由于缺乏识别MENA个体的数据，这些政策和言论对MENA社区福祉（包括健康资本投资）的影响一直未能得到系统评估。本文利用一个包含扩展种族和民族指标的大型纵向医疗记录数据库，开始填补这一知识空白，描述差异并评估移民政策和反MENA言论对美国MENA儿童预防性护理使用的影响。具体而言，我们评估了唐纳德·特朗普的当选，发现此次当选减少了MENA儿童的疫苗接种和健康检查使用。记录官方美国政策和言论后MENA的健康状况和结果是理解针对代表性不足群体政策全部后果的关键。

papers.title: Spillovers in Public Benefit Enrollment: How does Expanding Public Health Insurance for Working-Age Adults affect Future Health Insurance Choices?
papers.authors: M. Kate Bundorf, Melissa McInerney, Kosali I. Simon, Ruth Winecoff
papers.abstract: Enrollment in one public benefit program often affects enrollment in others. We study life-course spillovers by examining how access to publicly subsidized health insurance prior to age 65 affects public benefit choices at the age of Medicare eligibility. We use administrative data to examine several Medicare enrollment choices: the heavily under-subscribed Medicaid “dual” coverage as a supplement to Medicare; Medicare Part D; the Part D Low Income Subsidy (LIS); and Medicare Advantage. Focusing on people living in low-income zip codes, we find a large increase in dual Medicaid among new Medicare beneficiaries in Medicaid expansion states relative to non- expansion states, as well as corresponding increases in healthcare use and reductions in out-of-pocket spending. The dual Medicaid increase exerts a bonus effect: greater take-up of LIS and Part D programs, which we attribute to the accompanying automatic enrollment in these programs. Our results on Medicare Advantage enrollment are inconclusive. Overall, our results suggest that experience with Medicaid before age 65 causes meaningful behavioral responses among the lowest-income beneficiaries when they age into Medicare; this emphasizes the importance of longitudinal spillovers also present in other public programs with eligibility criteria that differ by applicant age (e.g., Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) and Supplemental Security Income (SSI)).
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, PE；JEL：H0, H51, H75, I0, I13
papers.zh_title: 公共福利注册中的溢出效应：扩大工作年龄成年人公共医疗保险如何影响未来的医疗保险选择？
papers.zh_abstract: 一个公共福利项目的注册常常影响其他项目的注册。我们通过研究65岁前获得公共补贴医疗保险的机会如何影响达到医疗保险资格年龄时的公共福利选择，来考察生命历程中的溢出效应。我们使用行政数据考察了几项医疗保险注册选择：作为医疗保险补充的严重注册不足的医疗补助“双重”覆盖；医疗保险D部分；D部分低收入补贴（LIS）；以及医疗保险优势计划。聚焦于生活在低收入邮政编码区的人群，我们发现，相对于非扩张州，医疗补助扩张州的新医疗保险受益人中双重医疗补助大幅增加，同时医疗保健使用增加且自付费用减少。双重医疗补助的增加产生了红利效应：LIS和D部分项目的注册率提高，我们将其归因于随之而来的这些项目的自动注册。我们关于医疗保险优势计划注册的结果尚无定论。总体而言，我们的结果表明，65岁前拥有医疗补助经历会在最低收入受益人进入医疗保险时引起有意义的行为反应；这强调了纵向溢出效应的重要性，这种效应也存在于其他根据申请人年龄设定不同资格标准的公共项目中（例如，补充营养援助计划（SNAP）和补充保障收入（SSI））。

papers.title: On the Determinants of Young Adult Outcomes: Impacts of Randomly Assigned Neighborhoods For Children in Military Families
papers.authors: Laura Kawano, Bruce Sacerdote, William L. Skimmyhorn, Michael Stevens
papers.abstract: Using the quasi-random assignment of 760,000 children in U.S. military families, we show that neighborhood attributes experienced during childhood have powerful impacts on SAT scores, college-going and earnings. For earnings and college going outcomes, location during high school is twice as important as location during elementary school, and for SAT scores, location during middle school has the strongest impact. There is little evidence of positive interactions in neighborhood quality across ages groups. Importantly, the same locations benefi t children with equal potency across race or sex. Twenty years of exposure in a 1 standard deviation "better" county raises SAT composite scores by 10 points (1.8 percentiles), raises college attendance by 1.7 percentage points, earnings by 2.2 percentile points, and lowers EITC receipt by 10%. Impacts are three times more potent when we measure neighborhood quality at the zip code level: twenty years of exposure to a one (county level) standard deviation better zip code raises college going by 6.7 percentage points, SAT composite by 38 points and income percentile at age 25 by 6.1 points. By equalizing average neighborhood quality for Black and White families, we estimate that the Army's quasi-random assignment reduces Black-white earnings gaps among the children of Army personnel by 23%.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS；JEL：I0, I24, J0, J01
papers.zh_title: 论年轻人结果的决定因素：军人家庭儿童随机分配社区的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 利用美国军人家庭中76万名儿童的准随机分配，我们表明童年时期经历的社区属性对SAT分数、大学入学率和收入有强大影响。对于收入和大学入学结果，高中时期的所在地点的重要性是小学时期的两倍；而对于SAT分数，初中时期的所在地点影响最强。几乎没有证据表明不同年龄段的社区质量存在正向交互作用。重要的是，相同地点对不同种族或性别的儿童具有同等效力。在标准差为1的“更好”县中暴露20年，可使SAT综合分数提高10分（1.8个百分点），大学入学率提高1.7个百分点，收入提高2.2个百分点，并降低EITC领取率10%。当我们以邮政编码层面衡量社区质量时，影响效果是三倍：在（县级）标准差为1的更好邮政编码中暴露20年，可使大学入学率提高6.7个百分点，SAT综合分数提高38分，25岁时的收入百分位数提高6.1个百分点。通过平衡黑人和白人家庭的平均社区质量，我们估计陆军的准随机分配将陆军人员子女中的黑人与白人收入差距缩小了23%。

papers.title: Dynamic Price Competition with Capacity Constraints
papers.authors: Jose M. Betancourt, Ali Hortaçsu, Aniko Öry, Kevin R. Williams
papers.abstract: We study dynamic price competition between sellers offering differentiated products with limited capacity and a common sales deadline. In every period, firms simultaneously set prices, and a randomly arriving buyer decides whether to purchase a product or leave the market. Given remaining capacities, firms trade off selling today against shifting demand to competitors to obtain future market power. We provide conditions for the existence and uniqueness of pure-strategy Markov perfect equilibria. In the continuous-time limit, prices solve a system of ordinary differential equations. We derive properties of equilibrium dynamics and show that prices increase the most when the product with the lowest remaining capacity sells. Because firms do not fully internalize the social option value of future sales, equilibrium prices can be inefficiently low such that both firms and consumers would benefit if firms could commit to higher prices. We term this new welfare effect the Bertrand scarcity trap.
papers.zh_title: 产能约束下的动态价格竞争
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了销售差异化产品且面临有限产能与共同销售截止日期的卖家之间的动态价格竞争。在每个时期，企业同时设定价格，随机到达的买家决定是否购买产品或离开市场。给定剩余产能，企业需要在今日销售与将需求转移给竞争对手以获取未来市场势力之间进行权衡。我们为纯策略马尔可夫完美均衡的存在性和唯一性提供了条件。在连续时间极限下，价格满足一个常微分方程组。我们推导了均衡动态的性质，并表明当剩余产能最低的产品售出时，价格涨幅最大。由于企业未能完全内化未来销售的社会期权价值，均衡价格可能低至无效率水平，以至于如果企业能够承诺更高的价格，企业和消费者都将受益。我们将这种新的福利效应称为“伯特兰稀缺陷阱”。

papers.title: Lessons from the Biggest Business Tax Cut in US History
papers.authors: Gabriel Chodorow-Reich, Owen M. Zidar, Eric Zwick
papers.abstract: We assess the business provisions of the 2017 Tax Cuts and Jobs Act, the biggest corporate tax cut in US history. We draw five lessons. First, corporate tax revenue fell by 40 percent due to the lower rate and more generous expensing. Second, firms with larger declines in their effective tax wedge increased investment relatively more. In aggregate, we suggest a loose consensus from the literature that total tangible corporate investment increased by 11 percent. Third, the business tax provisions increased economic growth and wages by less than advertised by the Act’s proponents, with long-run GDP higher by less than 1% and labor income by less than $1,000 per employee. Fourth, provisions that increase foreign investment by US-based multinationals also boost their domestic operations. Fifth, some of the expired and expiring provisions, such as accelerated depreciation, generate more investment per dollar of tax revenue than others.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, ITI, LE, LS, ME, PE, PR；JEL：H25, H32, K34
papers.zh_title: 美国历史上最大企业减税政策的教训
papers.zh_abstract: 我们评估了2017年《减税与就业法案》中的企业条款，这是美国历史上最大的企业减税。我们得出五点教训。第一，由于税率降低和更慷慨的费用化处理，企业所得税收入下降了40%。第二，有效税收楔子下降幅度更大的企业，其投资增长相对更多。总体而言，我们建议文献中形成的一个松散共识是，有形企业总投资增长了11%。第三，企业税收条款对经济增长和工资的提升作用小于该法案支持者所宣称的程度，长期GDP增长低于1%，每位员工的劳动收入增长低于1000美元。第四，促进美国跨国公司在海外投资的条款也提振了其国内业务。第五，一些已到期和即将到期的条款，例如加速折旧，每单位税收收入产生的投资比其他条款更多。

papers.title: Alternative Measures of Teachers’ Value Added and Impact on Short and Long-Term Outcomes: Evidence From Random Assignment
papers.authors: Victor Lavy, Rigissa Megalokonomou
papers.abstract: A recent critique of using teachers’ test score value-added (TVA) is that teacher quality is multifaceted; some teachers are effective in raising test scores, others are effective in improving long-term outcomes. This paper exploits an institutional setting where high school teachers are randomly assigned to classes to compute multiple long-run TVA measures based on university schooling outcomes and high school behavior. We find substantial correlations between test scores and long-run TVA but zero correlations between these two TVA measures and behavior TVA. We find that short-term test-score TVA and long-run TVA are highly correlated and equally good predictors of long-term outcomes.
papers.zh_title: 教师增值的替代衡量指标及其对短期与长期结果的影响：来自随机分配的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 最近对使用教师考试成绩增值（TVA）的批评指出，教师质量是多方面的；一些教师擅长提高考试成绩，另一些教师则擅长改善长期结果。本文利用高中教师被随机分配至班级的制度环境，基于大学教育成果和高中行为计算了多种长期TVA衡量指标。我们发现考试成绩TVA与长期TVA之间存在显著相关性，但这两类TVA衡量指标与行为TVA之间的相关性为零。我们发现短期考试成绩TVA与长期TVA高度相关，并且两者都是长期结果的同等良好的预测指标。

papers.title: Aggregate Shocks and the Formation of Preferences and Beliefs
papers.authors: Paola Giuliano, Antonio Spilimbergo
papers.abstract: A growing body of work has shown that aggregate shocks affect the formation of preferences and beliefs. This article reviews evidence from sociology, social psychology, and economics to assess the relevance of aggregate shocks, whether the period in which they are experienced matters, and whether they alter preferences and beliefs permanently. We review the literature on recessions, inflation experiences, trade shocks, and aggregate non-economic shocks including migrations, wars, terrorist attacks, pandemics, and natural disasters. For each aggregate shock, we discuss the main empirical methodologies, their limitations, and their comparability across studies, outlining possible mechanisms whenever available. A few conclusions emerge consistently across the reviewed papers. First, aggregate shocks impact many preferences and beliefs, including political preferences, risk attitudes, and trust in institutions. Second, the effect of shocks experienced during young adulthood is stronger and longer lasting. Third, negative aggregate economic shocks generally move preferences and beliefs to the right of the political spectrum, while the effects of non-economic adverse shocks are more heterogeneous and depend on the context.
papers.zh_title: 总体冲击与偏好及信念的形成
papers.zh_abstract: 越来越多的研究表明，总体冲击会影响偏好和信念的形成。本文回顾了来自社会学、社会心理学和经济学的证据，以评估总体冲击的相关性、冲击经历的时间段是否重要，以及冲击是否会永久改变偏好和信念。我们综述了关于经济衰退、通胀经历、贸易冲击以及非经济总体冲击（包括移民、战争、恐怖袭击、流行病和自然灾害）的文献。对于每种总体冲击，我们讨论了主要的实证方法、其局限性以及不同研究之间的可比性，并在可能的情况下概述了潜在机制。在综述的论文中，一些结论一致出现。首先，总体冲击影响许多偏好和信念，包括政治偏好、风险态度和对机构的信任。其次，青年时期经历的冲击影响更强且更持久。第三，负面的总体经济冲击通常使偏好和信念向政治光谱的右翼移动，而非经济不利冲击的影响则更具异质性，并取决于具体情境。

papers.title: Designing Scientific Grants
papers.authors: Christoph Carnehl, Marco Ottaviani, Justus Preusser
papers.abstract: This paper overviews the economics of scientific grants, focusing on the interplay between the inherent uncertainty in research, researchers' incentives, and grant design. Grants differ from traditional market systems and other science and innovation policy tools, such as prizes and patents. We outline the main economic forces specific to science, noting the limited attention given to grant funding in the economics literature. Using tools from information economics, we identify key incentive problems at various stages of the grant funding process and offer guidance for effective grant design.\nIn the allocation stage, funders aim to select the highest-merit applications while minimizing evaluation costs. The selection rule, in turn, impacts researchers' incentives to apply and invest in their proposals. In the grant management stage, funders monitor researchers to ensure efficient use of funds. We discuss the advantages and potential pitfalls of (partial) lotteries and emphasize the effectiveness of staged grant design in promoting a productive use of grants.\nBeyond these broadly applicable insights, our overview highlights the need for further research on grantmaking. Understudied areas include, at the micro level, the interplay of different grant funding stages, and at the macro level, the interaction of grants with other instruments in the market for science.
papers.zh_title: 科学资助的设计
papers.zh_abstract: 本文概述了科学资助的经济学，重点关注研究固有的不确定性、研究人员的激励以及资助设计之间的相互作用。资助不同于传统的市场体系以及其他科学与创新政策工具，如奖项和专利。我们概述了科学领域特有的主要经济力量，并指出经济学文献中对资助资金的关注有限。利用信息经济学的工具，我们识别了资助过程中不同阶段的关键激励问题，并为有效的资助设计提供了指导。在分配阶段，资助方旨在选择最具价值的申请，同时最小化评估成本。而选择规则反过来会影响研究人员申请和投入提案的激励。在资助管理阶段，资助方监督研究人员以确保资金的有效使用。我们讨论了（部分）抽签的优势和潜在陷阱，并强调了分阶段资助设计在促进资助有效利用方面的有效性。除了这些广泛适用的见解，我们的概述还强调了对资助行为进行进一步研究的必要性。在微观层面，研究不足的领域包括资助不同阶段之间的相互作用；在宏观层面，则包括资助与科学市场中其他工具的互动。

papers.title: Codification, Technology Absorption, and the Globalization of the Industrial Revolution
papers.authors: Réka Juhász, Shogo Sakabe, David Weinstein
papers.abstract: This paper examines the global adoption of technology in the late nineteenth century. We construct several novel datasets to test the idea that the codification of technical knowledge in the vernacular was necessary for countries to absorb the technologies of the First Industrial Revolution. We find that comparative advantage shifted to industries that could benefit from these technologies in countries and colonies with access to codified technical knowledge, but not in other regions. Using the rapid and unprecedented codification of technical knowledge in Meiji Japan as a natural experiment, we show that this pattern emerged only after the Japanese government codified vast amounts of technical knowledge. Our findings shed new light on the frictions associated with technological diffusion and offer a novel explanation for why Meiji Japan was unique among non-Western countries in successfully industrializing during the first wave of globalization.
papers.zh_title: 编码化、技术吸收与工业革命的全球化
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了19世纪末期技术的全球采用情况。我们构建了几个新颖的数据集，以检验这样一个观点：技术知识以本地语言进行编码化是各国吸收第一次工业革命技术的必要条件。我们发现，在能够获取编码化技术知识的国家和殖民地，比较优势转向了能够从这些技术中受益的行业，但在其他地区则不然。利用明治日本技术知识快速且前所未有的编码化作为自然实验，我们表明这种模式仅在日本政府将大量技术知识编码化之后才出现。我们的发现为技术扩散相关的摩擦提供了新的视角，并为明治日本为何在第一次全球化浪潮中成为唯一成功实现工业化的非西方国家提供了新颖的解释。

papers.title: Lessons from History for Successful Disinflation
papers.authors: Christina D. Romer, David H. Romer
papers.abstract: Why do some attempts at disinflation lead to substantial reductions in inflation while others do not? We investigate this question in the context of the Federal Reserve’s attempts at disinflation since World War II. Our central finding is that a fundamental determinant of success in reducing inflation was the strength of the Federal Reserve’s commitment to disinflation at the start of its attempts. In episodes where its commitment was high, there were significant declines in inflation that were often long-lasting, while in ones where its commitment was low, falls in inflation were at most small and short-lived. We find that although the extent of the Federal Reserve’s commitment was often clear to the public, there is no evidence that stronger commitment to disinflation directly affected expected inflation. Rather, the main channel through which weak commitment led to unsuccessful disinflation was premature abandonment of the disinflationary policy. We conclude by discussing the implications for the Federal Reserve’s current effort at disinflation.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, ME；JEL：E31, E52, E58, E65, N12
papers.zh_title: 成功去通胀的历史教训
papers.zh_abstract: 为什么一些去通胀尝试能导致通胀大幅下降，而另一些却不能？我们在二战后美联储去通胀尝试的背景下研究这个问题。我们的核心发现是，成功降低通胀的一个根本决定因素是美联储在尝试开始时对去通胀承诺的强度。在承诺度高的时期，通胀出现显著且往往持久的下降；而在承诺度低的时期，通胀下降最多是微小且短暂的。我们发现，尽管美联储的承诺程度通常对公众是清晰的，但没有证据表明更强的去通胀承诺直接影响预期通胀。相反，弱承诺导致去通胀失败的主要渠道是过早放弃去通胀政策。最后，我们讨论了这对美联储当前去通胀努力的启示。

papers.title: Donald Trump's words
papers.authors: Nikita Savin, Daniel Treisman
papers.abstract: Donald Trump’s campaign speeches have impressed some and outraged others. Yet relatively little is known about how his rhetoric has changed over time and how it compares to that of other politicians, both in the US and abroad. We analyze a monthly series of Trump’s addresses in 2015-24, comparing them to speeches by other U.S. presidential candidates and various world leaders, past and present. We document that Trump’s use of violent vocabulary has intensified over time—reflecting increasing attention to wars but even more to crime—and is now among the most extreme of any democratic politicians studied. Simultaneously, Trump’s use of words related to economic performance has declined, matching a general trend among candidates of both parties. Although containing populist elements, Trump’s rhetoric diverges from the populist stereotype, particularly in his relatively infrequent references to “the people.” He increasingly embraces an exclusionary populism focused on vilifying out-groups.
papers.zh_title: 唐纳德·特朗普的言辞
papers.zh_abstract: 唐纳德·特朗普的竞选演讲给一些人留下了深刻印象，也激怒了另一些人。然而，关于他的言辞如何随时间变化，以及与美国国内外其他政治人物相比如何，人们所知相对较少。我们分析了特朗普在2015-24年间每月系列演讲，并将其与其他美国总统候选人以及过去和现在的多位世界领导人的演讲进行了比较。我们记录到，特朗普使用暴力词汇的频率随时间推移而加剧——这反映了他对战争，尤其是对犯罪的日益关注——并且目前在所有被研究的民主政客中属于最极端的之一。与此同时，特朗普使用与经济表现相关词汇的频率有所下降，这与两党候选人的普遍趋势一致。尽管包含民粹主义元素，特朗普的言辞与民粹主义刻板印象有所不同，尤其体现在他相对较少提及“人民”。他越来越倾向于一种排他性的民粹主义，专注于诋毁外部群体。

papers.title: Beliefs About the Economy are Excessively Sensitive to Household-Level Shocks: Evidence from Linked Survey and Administrative Data
papers.authors: Dmitry Taubinsky, Luigi Butera, Matteo Saccarola, Chen Lian
papers.abstract: We study how people’s beliefs about the economy covary with household-level events, utilizing a unique link between Danish administrative data and a large-scale survey of consumer expectations. We find that compared to actual inflation, people’s inflation forecasts covary much more strongly (and negatively) with both recently realized household income changes and measures of expected future household income changes. We formally establish that these findings are stark deviations from the Bayesian rational expectations benchmark. Similar results hold for perceptions of past inflation (“backcasts”), suggesting that imperfect recall is a key mechanism for biased forecasts. Building on this, a series of additional tests, some of which utilize data on adverse health events, suggests that the forecast biases are at least partly due to affect-cued recall. That is, negative (positive) household-level events cue negative (positive) recollections, which lead to pessimistic (optimistic) forecasts.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, ME, PE；JEL：D90, E0, E7, G0, G5, H31
papers.zh_title: 关于经济的信念对家庭层面冲击过度敏感：来自关联调查与行政数据的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用丹麦行政数据与大规模消费者预期调查之间的独特关联，研究人们对经济的信念如何随家庭层面事件而变化。我们发现，与实际通胀相比，人们的通胀预测与近期实现的家庭收入变化以及预期的未来家庭收入变化之间的协动性更强（且为负向）。我们正式证明，这些发现与贝叶斯理性预期基准存在显著偏离。类似的结果也适用于对过去通胀的感知（“回溯预测”），表明不完美回忆是导致预测偏差的关键机制。在此基础上，一系列额外测试（其中一些利用了不良健康事件的数据）表明，预测偏差至少部分源于情绪线索驱动的回忆。也就是说，负面（正面）的家庭层面事件会引发负面（正面）的回忆，从而导致悲观（乐观）的预测。

papers.title: CEO Compensation and Adverse Shocks: Evidence from Changes in Environmental Regulations
papers.authors: Seungho Choi, Ross Levine, Raphael Park, Simon Xu
papers.abstract: Although corporate finance theory suggests how adverse shocks influence shareholder preferences toward corporate risk-taking and executive compensation, few researchers explore this relationship empirically. We construct a firm-year measure of unexpected shocks to environmental regulatory stringency. We find that adverse environmental regulatory shocks typically prompt corporate boards to reduce the risk-taking incentives of CEO compensation. However, this pattern is not uniform. Financially distressed firms exhibit milder reductions in compensation convexity, with some even increasing it, suggesting a “gambling for resurrection” strategy. Moreover, the strength of corporate governance influences shareholders’ capacity to align executive incentives with changing shareholder risk preferences.
papers.zh_title: CEO薪酬与不利冲击：来自环境监管变化的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管公司金融理论提出了不利冲击如何影响股东对企业风险承担和高管薪酬的偏好，但很少有研究者实证探索这一关系。我们构建了一个衡量环境监管严格程度意外冲击的企业-年度指标。我们发现，不利的环境监管冲击通常会促使公司董事会降低CEO薪酬中的风险承担激励。然而，这种模式并非统一。财务困境企业表现出更温和的薪酬凸性降低，有些甚至增加凸性，暗示了一种“为复活而赌博”的策略。此外，公司治理的强度会影响股东将高管激励与变化的股东风险偏好对齐的能力。

papers.title: The Effects of the 2021 Child Tax Credit on Parents’ Psychological Well-Being
papers.authors: Lisa A. Gennetian, Anna Gassman-Pines
papers.abstract: Although improving psychological well-being was not the explicit focus of the 2021 expanded Child Tax Credit (CTC), psychological health outcomes may have been affected by the positive income shocks generated by the credit. In this chapter we ask: How did the 2021 expanded CTC affect parents’ psychological well-being? Some studies have found that the CTC led to reductions in parental reports of clinical levels of depression and anxiety and in subclinical depressive and anxiety symptoms. Using similar methods, other studies have found no effect on these same outcomes. Importantly, however, the evidence does not point to the CTC worsening psychological well-being. We conclude that the evidence so far is thin, narrow, and mixed, even when our review is expanded to comparable studies on the impact of income support. Alignment of policy objectives with a broader range of measurement approaches will be important in building a more conclusive evidence base.
papers.zh_title: 2021年儿童税收抵免对父母心理健康的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管改善心理健康并非2021年扩大的儿童税收抵免（CTC）的明确目标，但该抵免产生的正向收入冲击可能影响了心理健康结果。在本章中，我们探讨：2021年扩大的CTC如何影响父母的心理健康？一些研究发现，CTC导致父母报告临床水平的抑郁和焦虑以及亚临床抑郁和焦虑症状减少。使用类似方法，其他研究发现对这些相同结果没有影响。然而，重要的是，证据并未表明CTC恶化了心理健康。我们得出结论，即使将我们的综述扩展到关于收入支持的可比研究，目前的证据仍然薄弱、狭窄且混杂。将政策目标与更广泛的测量方法对齐，对于建立更具结论性的证据基础至关重要。

papers.title: How Do Strategic Complementarity and Substitutability Shape Equilibrium Dynamics?
papers.authors: Paul Beaudry, Dana S. Galizia, Franck Portier
papers.abstract: Macroeconomic dynamics are shaped by how individual incentives to spend and accumulate interact with the decisions of others. The goal of this paper is to identify—within a simple large-game-theoretic structure—which types of agent interactions favor which types of dynamic equilibrium outcomes. In particular, we extend the static analysis of Cooper and John 1988 to a dynamic setting to clarify the role of strategic complementarity and substitutability in delivering dynamics such as monotonic convergence to a unique steady state, hysteresis, endogenous cycles, and indeterminacy.
papers.zh_title: 战略互补性与替代性如何塑造均衡动态？
papers.zh_abstract: 宏观经济动态由个体支出和积累的激励如何与他人决策相互作用所塑造。本文的目标是在一个简单的大博弈理论结构中，识别哪种类型的代理人互动有利于哪种类型的动态均衡结果。特别是，我们将Cooper和John（1988）的静态分析扩展到动态设定，以阐明战略互补性和替代性在产生诸如单调收敛到唯一稳态、滞后效应、内生周期和不确定性等动态中的作用。

papers.title: Markups and Entry in a Circular Hotelling Model
papers.authors: Robert J. Barro
papers.abstract: The circular version of Hotelling’s locational model is extended by incorporating a continuum of consumers with constant-elasticity demand functions along with stores that have constant marginal costs of production. The stores are evenly spaced in equilibrium. The model implies that the markup of price over marginal cost depends on the spacing between stores and a transportation-cost parameter but is, as an approximation, independent of the elasticity of demand. This result reflects pricing decisions by stores that factor in the threat of losing business entirely at the borders with neighboring stores. This model provides a theory of price markups that substitutes for, or at least supplements, the familiar Lerner approach, which puts all the weight on the elasticity of demand. Moreover, the pricing results apply even when the magnitude of the elasticity of demand is less than one. The price markups determine the extent of entry into the market and, thereby, the efficiency of market outcomes. Entry is excessive when the approximate markup formula is accurate.
papers.zh_title: 圆形霍特林模型中的加成与进入
papers.zh_abstract: 通过纳入具有不变弹性需求函数的连续消费者以及具有不变边际生产成本的商店，扩展了霍特林区位模型的圆形版本。商店在均衡中均匀分布。该模型意味着价格对边际成本的加成取决于商店间距和运输成本参数，但近似独立于需求弹性。这一结果反映了商店的定价决策，这些决策考虑了在与相邻商店边界处完全失去业务的威胁。该模型提供了一种价格加成理论，替代或至少补充了将所有权重放在需求弹性上的常见勒纳方法。此外，即使需求弹性的大小小于1，定价结果也适用。价格加成决定了市场进入的程度，从而决定了市场结果的效率。当近似加成公式准确时，进入是过度的。

papers.title: Do Reforms Aimed at Reducing Time to Graduation Work? Evidence from the Italian Higher Education System
papers.authors: Davide Malacrino, Samuel Nocito, Raffaele Saggio
papers.abstract: This paper examines the impact of a reform aimed at expediting graduation times in Italian universities by reducing the number of exams students must pass to obtain the fixed number of credits required to graduate. Using event-study estimates that leverage the reform’s staggered implementation, we find that this policy change led to an increase in on-time graduation rates but also resulted in a decreased probability of employment one-year post-graduation. However, this negative effect reverses into a positive one in the medium run. We show that these patterns are explained by students using the time gained from earlier graduation to pursue additional educational qualifications in the year following graduation, an investment that ultimately leads to higher earnings in the medium run.
papers.zh_title: 旨在缩短毕业时间的改革有效吗？来自意大利高等教育体系的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了一项旨在加快意大利大学毕业时间的改革的影响，该改革通过减少学生为获得毕业所需固定学分而必须通过的考试数量来实现。利用利用改革分阶段实施的事件研究估计，我们发现这一政策变化导致按时毕业率上升，但也导致毕业后一年就业概率下降。然而，这一负面效应在中期转为正面。我们表明，这些模式可以通过学生利用提前毕业获得的时间在毕业后一年内追求额外教育资格来解释，这一投资最终在中期带来更高的收入。

papers.title: Implementing a Ramsey Plan
papers.authors: Wei Jiang, Thomas J. Sargent, Neng Wang
papers.abstract: Lucas and Stokey (1983) motivated future governments to confirm an optimal tax plan by rescheduling government debt appropriately. Debortoli et al. (2021) showed that sometimes that does not work. We show how a Ramsey plan can always be implemented by adding instantaneous debt to Lucas and Stokey’s contractible subspace and requiring that each continuation government preserve that debt’s purchasing power instantaneously. We formulate the Ramsey problem with a Bellman equation and use it to study settings with various initial term debt structures and government spending processes. We extract implications about tax smoothing and effects of fiscal policies on bond markets.
papers.zh_title: 实施拉姆齐计划
papers.zh_abstract: Lucas和Stokey（1983）通过适当调整政府债务结构，激励未来政府确认最优税收计划。Debortoli等人（2021）表明，有时这并不奏效。我们展示了如何通过向Lucas和Stokey的可契约子空间添加瞬时债务，并要求每个后续政府瞬时维持该债务的购买力，从而始终可以实施拉姆齐计划。我们使用贝尔曼方程表述拉姆齐问题，并利用它研究具有各种初始期限债务结构和政府支出过程的设定。我们提取了关于税收平滑以及财政政策对债券市场影响的含义。

papers.title: Race and Ethnicity (Mis)measurement in the U.S. Criminal Justice System
papers.authors: Keith Finlay, Elizabeth Luh, Michael G. Mueller-Smith
papers.abstract: The United States criminal justice system is characterized by substantial disparities in outcomes across racial and ethnic groups. Understanding these disparities requires accurate measures of race and ethnicity of people involved in the justice system. We document how race and ethnicity are recorded by administrative agents and how operational concerns limit corrections to misreported race and ethnicity. To understand the impacts of these administrative processes, this paper uses novel linkages between person-level microdata from the Criminal Justice Administrative Records System (CJARS) and race and ethnicity composites from U.S. Census Bureau census and administrative records, mostly composed of self-reported or family-reported race/ethnicity, to quantify mismeasurement of race and ethnicity in the justice system. We find that 17 percent of misdemeanor and felony defendants and 10 percent of prison inmates have an agency-recorded label that does not concord with the composite measure, largely driven by justice agencies poorly measuring people identified in Census Bureau data as Hispanic, Asian, Pacific Islander, or American Indian and Alaska Native (AIAN). Using estimated correspondences between agency-recorded and the composite race and ethnicity, we reweight federal series on imprisonment rates and show that those series, which currently rely on small survey samples to impute racial and ethnic population shares, have substantially underestimated the incarceration rates of Whites, Blacks, and AIANs.
papers.zh_title: 美国刑事司法系统中的种族与族裔（误）测量
papers.zh_abstract: 美国刑事司法系统在不同种族和族裔群体之间存在显著的结果差异。理解这些差异需要准确测量司法系统中涉及人员的种族和族裔。我们记录了行政代理人如何记录种族和族裔，以及操作层面的关切如何限制对误报种族和族裔的纠正。为了理解这些行政过程的影响，本文利用刑事司法行政记录系统（CJARS）的个人层面微观数据与美国人口普查局普查和行政记录（主要由自我报告或家庭报告的种族/族裔组成）的种族和族裔综合指标之间的新颖关联，量化司法系统中种族和族裔的测量误差。我们发现，17%的轻罪和重罪被告以及10%的监狱囚犯拥有与综合指标不一致的机构记录标签，这主要是由于司法机构对人口普查局数据中识别为西班牙裔、亚裔、太平洋岛民或美洲印第安人和阿拉斯加原住民（AIAN）的人群测量不佳。利用机构记录种族和族裔与综合指标之间的估计对应关系，我们重新加权了联邦监禁率序列，并表明这些目前依赖小型调查样本来推算种族和族裔人口份额的序列，显著低估了白人、黑人和AIAN的监禁率。

papers.title: The Social Value of Temporary Carbon Removals and Delayed Emissions
papers.authors: Ben Groom, Frank Venmans
papers.abstract: An economic approach to calculating the Social Value of Temporary Reductions (SVTR) in atmospheric carbon is discussed. The SVTR allows different carbon removals projects to be prioritised in a way that maximises welfare and establishes equivalence between temporary, risky removals with permanent ones in terms of avoided welfare losses from climate damages. The approach is compared to previous attempts in the physical and natural sciences and economics to price temporary emissions reductions, none of which successfully integrate economics and climate science. Applications of the SVTR exist in public project appraisal, Life Cycle Analysis, pricing carbon debts and determining short term carbon credit and offset contracts. Potential criticisms of equivalence measures and tonne-year accounting stemming from concerns that temporary removals do not impact long-term temperatures are shown to be special cases of our integrated economic approach. Temporary removals provide transitory cooling benefits and if repeated are equivalent to permanent solutions. They also can have permanent effects via learning by doing or reducing the likelihood of tipping points. The SVTR helps determine how temporary removals can fit into an efficient response to climate. Ruling out temporary removals and equivalence, and the intertemporal transfers that they imply, could unnecessarily tie the hands of policy makers.
papers.zh_title: 临时碳移除与延迟排放的社会价值
papers.zh_abstract: 本文讨论了一种计算大气碳临时减排社会价值的经济学方法。临时减排社会价值允许以最大化福利的方式对不同碳移除项目进行优先排序，并在避免气候损害造成的福利损失方面，建立临时性、有风险的移除与永久性移除之间的等价关系。该方法与以往物理学、自然科学和经济学中为临时减排定价的尝试进行了比较，这些尝试均未能成功整合经济学与气候科学。临时减排社会价值的应用存在于公共项目评估、生命周期分析、碳债务定价以及确定短期碳信用和碳抵消合同之中。对等价措施和吨年核算的潜在批评——源于担忧临时移除不会影响长期温度——被证明是我们综合经济方法的特例。临时移除提供暂时的降温效益，如果重复进行，则等同于永久性解决方案。它们还可以通过干中学或降低临界点可能性来产生永久性影响。临时减排社会价值有助于确定临时移除如何融入对气候的有效应对。排除临时移除和等价性及其所隐含的跨期转移，可能会不必要地束缚政策制定者的手脚。

papers.title: The Shifting Finance of Electricity Generation
papers.authors: Aleksandar Andonov, Joshua Rauh
papers.abstract: Private equity (PE), institutional investors, and foreign corporations own 58% of wind, 47% of solar, and 34% of natural gas electricity generation. These new entrants are twice as likely to create new power plants as incumbent domestic listed utilities, highlighting a new role for PE in large-scale asset creation. They also acquire existing plants. While fossil-fuel plant sales to foreign corporations extend operations, PE has similar decommissioning rates to incumbents. The new owners create more efficient plants and improve acquired ones. Market deregulation drives the results, highlighting the dual importance of competition and new financing for both creation and acquisitions.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EEE；JEL：G23, G24, G32, H54, L51, L71, L94, O13, Q41, Q48
papers.zh_title: 发电领域的金融格局变迁
papers.zh_abstract: 私募股权、机构投资者和外国公司拥有58%的风力发电、47%的太阳能发电和34%的天然气发电。这些新进入者创建新发电厂的可能性是现有国内上市公用事业公司的两倍，突显了私募股权在大规模资产创建中的新角色。它们也收购现有电厂。虽然化石燃料电厂出售给外国公司会延长运营，但私募股权的退役率与现有企业相似。新所有者创建了更高效的工厂，并改进了收购的工厂。市场放松管制推动了这些结果，凸显了竞争和新融资对于创建和收购的双重重要性。

papers.title: Different Paths to College Success: The Impact of Massachusetts’ Charter Schools on College Trajectories
papers.authors: Sarah Cohodes, Astrid Pineda
papers.abstract: The charter school movement encompasses many school models. In Massachusetts in the 2010’s, the site of our study, urban charter schools primarily used “No Excuses” practices, whereas nonurban charters had greater model variety. Using randomized admissions lotteries, we estimate the impact of charter schools by locality on college preparation, enrollment, and graduation. Urban charter schools boost all of these outcomes. Nonurban charter schools raise college enrollment and graduation despite reducing state test scores and AP enrollment. Our results suggest that there is more than one path to a college degree and that test score impacts may not predict college outcomes.
papers.zh_title: 通往大学成功的不同路径：马萨诸塞州特许学校对大学轨迹的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 特许学校运动包含多种学校模式。在我们研究的所在地马萨诸塞州，2010年代的城市特许学校主要采用“不找借口”实践，而非城市特许学校则有更大的模式多样性。利用随机入学抽签，我们估算了按地区划分的特许学校对大学准备、入学和毕业的影响。城市特许学校提升了所有这些结果。非城市特许学校提高了大学入学率和毕业率，尽管降低了州考试成绩和大学先修课程注册率。我们的结果表明，通往大学学位的路径不止一条，考试成绩的影响可能无法预测大学结果。

papers.title: The Speed of Firm Response to Inflation
papers.authors: Ivan Yotzov, Nicholas Bloom, Philip Bunn, Paul Mizen, Gregory Thwaites
papers.abstract: This paper analyses the response of UK firms to monthly CPI inflation releases using high-frequency data from a large business survey.
