Firms’ inflation perceptions and expectations respond within hours of new inflation data releases. Firm expectations are most responsive when inflation coverage in the media is elevated, suggesting a key role for the media in focusing attention on data releases. Furthermore, firms respond to changes in inflation data, but not to surprises relative to professional forecasts. This highlights a distinction between “Wall Street”, where financial markets respond to inflation surprises, and “Main Street”, where firms respond to media inflation headlines.
papers.zh_title: 企业对通胀的反应速度
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用一项大型商业调查的高频数据，分析了英国企业对月度消费者价格指数通胀发布的反应。企业的通胀感知和预期会在新的通胀数据发布后数小时内做出反应。当媒体对通胀的报道增多时，企业预期的反应最为强烈，这表明媒体在引导关注数据发布方面发挥着关键作用。此外，企业对通胀数据的变化做出反应，但对相对于专业预测的意外情况没有反应。这凸显了“华尔街”（金融市场对通胀意外做出反应）与“主街”（企业对媒体通胀头条做出反应）之间的区别。

papers.title: Mispricing Narratives after Social Unrest
papers.authors: Bocar A. Ba, Abdoulaye Ndiaye, Roman Rivera, Alexander Whitefield
papers.abstract: We study how negative sentiment around an industry impacts beliefs and behaviors, focusing on demands for racial justice after the murder of George Floyd and the salience of the “defund the police” movement. We assess stakeholder beliefs on the impact of protests on the stock prices of police-affiliated firms. In our survey experiment, laypeople and finance professionals predicted more negative stock price outcomes when they lacked details on the products supplied by such firms. Exposure to narratives about the context of the protests further reduced the prediction accuracy of these groups. In contrast, product information improved the prediction accuracy of respondents. Turning to real-life behavior, we find that mutual funds exposed to protests were 20% less likely to hold police stocks, after the protests, than funds in areas without protests. Political support for maintaining police funding, though in the majority, declined by 4.3 percentage points in protest areas. The salience of the “defund the police” narrative led to significant overreactions in both financial predictions and real-life behavior.
papers.zh_title: 社会动荡后的错误定价叙事
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了围绕某个行业的负面情绪如何影响信念和行为，重点关注乔治·弗洛伊德被谋杀后对种族正义的诉求以及“撤资警察”运动的凸显性。我们评估了利益相关者对抗议活动对警察关联公司股价影响的信念。在我们的调查实验中，当缺乏这些公司所供应产品的详细信息时，普通人和金融专业人士预测了更负面的股价结果。接触关于抗议背景的叙事进一步降低了这些群体的预测准确性。相比之下，产品信息提高了受访者的预测准确性。转向现实行为，我们发现，与没有抗议地区的基金相比，暴露于抗议活动的共同基金在抗议后持有警察股票的可能性降低了20%。尽管维持警察经费的政治支持仍占多数，但在抗议地区下降了4.3个百分点。“撤资警察”叙事的凸显性导致了金融预测和现实行为中的显著过度反应。

papers.title: The Effects of Wealth on Health Care Spending: Evidence from the Housing Market
papers.authors: Michael F. Lovenheim, Jun Hyun Yun
papers.abstract: The U.S. healthcare system requires substantial out-of-pocket payments by most consumers, which can prevent some from receiving needed medical services. Recent policy proposals seek to address this problem by increasing government health care spending in order to reduce out-of-pocket costs. The social value of these policies rests in part on the extent to which consumers face credit constraints in financing medical spending. We present a novel analysis of whether elderly households face such credit constraints by estimating the effects of wealth variation from home price changes on out-of-pocket medical expenditures. Using data from the Health and Retirement Study and various measures of home price changes, we find no evidence that housing wealth impacts out-of-pocket medical spending. The estimates are universally small and precise, allowing us to rule out even modest-sized effects. Effects are zero across the expenditure distribution, for specific categories of expenditure, and for different types of consumers split by health insurance status and SES. Our results suggest that further subsidizing health care for elderly homeowners, the majority of older Americans, would increase moral hazard costs without increasing access to needed care.
papers.zh_title: 财富对医疗支出的影响：来自房地产市场的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 美国医疗体系要求大多数消费者承担大量自付费用，这可能阻碍部分人获得必要的医疗服务。近期政策提案试图通过增加政府医疗支出来降低自付成本，从而解决这一问题。这些政策的社会价值部分取决于消费者在融资医疗支出时面临信贷约束的程度。我们通过估计房价变动带来的财富变化对自付医疗支出的影响，对老年家庭是否面临此类信贷约束进行了新颖的分析。利用健康与退休研究的数据以及多种房价变动指标，我们没有发现住房财富影响自付医疗支出的证据。估计结果普遍较小且精确，使我们能够排除即使是中等程度的影响。在支出分布的各分位点、特定支出类别以及按医疗保险状况和社会经济地位划分的不同类型消费者中，影响均为零。我们的结果表明，进一步补贴老年房主（占美国老年人多数）的医疗保健，将增加道德风险成本，而不会增加对必要医疗服务的获取。

papers.title: A Welfare Analysis of Policies Impacting Climate Change
papers.authors: Robert W. Hahn, Nathaniel Hendren, Robert D. Metcalfe, Ben Sprung-Keyser
papers.abstract: We study the welfare impacts of 96 climate-related tax and spending policies. We extend and apply the marginal value of public funds (MVPF) framework, most notably providing a new method for incorporating learning-by-doing spillovers. We find subsidies for the production of clean energy (such as wind production tax credits) have higher MVPFs than all other subsidies in our sample, including EV subsidies. Conservation nudges have large MVPFs when targeting regions with dirty grids. Fuel taxes and cap-and-trade policies are highly efficient means of raising revenue. We also construct traditional cost-per-ton estimates and compare and contrast the lessons they provide.
papers.zh_title: 影响气候变化的政策福利分析
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了96项与气候相关的税收和支出政策的福利影响。我们扩展并应用了公共资金边际价值框架，最显著的是提供了一种纳入干中学溢出效应的新方法。我们发现，清洁能源生产补贴（如风电生产税收抵免）的公共资金边际价值高于我们样本中的所有其他补贴，包括电动汽车补贴。当针对电网污染严重的地区时，节能助推措施具有较高的公共资金边际价值。燃油税和限额交易政策是高效的财政收入筹集手段。我们还构建了传统的每吨成本估算，并比较和对比了它们提供的经验教训。

papers.title: Do Mergers and Acquisitions Improve Efficiency? Evidence from Power Plants
papers.authors: Mert Demirer, Ömer Karaduman
papers.abstract: Using rich data on hourly physical productivity and thousands of ownership changes from US power plants, we study the effects of acquisitions on efficiency and underlying mechanisms. We find a 2% average increase in efficiency for acquired plants, beginning five months after acquisitions. Efficiency gains rise to 5% under direct ownership changes, with no significant change when only parent ownership changes. Investigating the mechanisms, three-quarters of the efficiency gain is attributed to increased productive efficiency, while the rest comes from dynamic efficiency through changes in production allocation. Our evidence suggests that high-productivity firms buy underperforming assets from low-productivity firms and make them as productive as their existing assets through operational improvements. Finally, acquired plants improve their performance beyond efficiency by increasing output and reducing outages.
papers.zh_title: 并购能提高效率吗？来自发电厂的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 利用美国发电厂每小时实物生产率的丰富数据以及数千次所有权变更，我们研究了收购对效率的影响及其潜在机制。我们发现，被收购工厂的效率平均提高2%，这一效应在收购后五个月开始显现。在直接所有权变更的情况下，效率提升达到5%，而当仅母公司所有权变更时，没有显著变化。通过探究机制，四分之三的效率提升归因于生产效率的提高，其余部分则来自通过生产分配变化实现的动态效率。我们的证据表明，高生产率企业从低生产率企业购买表现不佳的资产，并通过运营改进使其达到与现有资产相同的生产率水平。最后，被收购工厂通过增加产出和减少停机时间，在效率之外还改善了整体绩效。

papers.title: Digital Advertising and Market Structure: Implications for Privacy Regulation
papers.authors: Daniel Deisenroth, Utsav Manjeer, Zarak Sohail, Steven Tadelis, Nils Wernerfelt
papers.abstract: We study how changes in the effectiveness of targeted digital advertising shape firm behavior and product-market outcomes. We leverage the introduction of Apple's App Tracking Transparency (ATT) framework, which limited online advertisers' access to user data and thus substantially reduced their advertising effectiveness. Using proprietary advertiser-level data from Meta and industry-level outcomes from the Bureau of Labor Statistics, we show that greater exposure to the ATT shock led to lower ad spend, fewer establishments, and higher product prices. The findings suggest that digital advertising primarily expands markets and that privacy policies can have unintended consequences on product market competition.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, PR；JEL：D22, D40, L10, L59, M38
papers.zh_title: 数字广告与市场结构：对隐私监管的启示
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了定向数字广告有效性的变化如何塑造企业行为和产品市场结果。我们利用了苹果应用追踪透明度框架的引入，该框架限制了在线广告商对用户数据的访问，从而大幅降低了其广告效果。利用来自Meta的专有广告商层面数据以及劳工统计局的行业层面结果，我们发现，对应用追踪透明度冲击暴露程度越高，导致广告支出越低、企业数量越少、产品价格越高。这些发现表明，数字广告主要起到扩大市场的作用，而隐私政策可能对产品市场竞争产生意想不到的后果。

papers.title: Production Function Estimation Using Subjective Expectations Data
papers.authors: Agnes Norris Keiller, Áureo de Paula, John Van Reenen
papers.abstract: Standard methods for estimating production functions in the Olley and Pakes (1996) tradition require assumptions on input choices. We introduce a new method that exploits (increasingly available) data on a firm’s expectations of its future output and inputs that allows us to obtain consistent production function parameter estimates while relaxing these input demand assumptions. In contrast to dynamic panel methods, our proposed estimator can be implemented on very short panels (including a single cross-section), and Monte Carlo simulations show it outperforms alternative estimators when firms’ material input choices are subject to optimization error. Implementing a range of production function estimators on UK data, we find our proposed estimator yields results that are either similar to or more credible than commonly-used alternatives. These differences are larger in industries where material inputs appear harder to optimize. We show that TFP implied by our proposed estimator is more strongly associated with future jobs growth than existing methods, suggesting that failing to adequately account for input endogeneity may underestimate the degree of dynamic reallocation in the economy.
papers.zh_title: 利用主观预期数据估计生产函数
papers.zh_abstract: 在Olley和Pakes（1996）传统中估计生产函数的标准方法需要对投入选择做出假设。我们引入了一种新方法，该方法利用（日益可得的）企业对其未来产出和投入的预期数据，使我们能够在放宽这些投入需求假设的情况下获得一致的生产函数参数估计。与动态面板方法相比，我们提出的估计量可以在非常短的面板数据（包括单个横截面）上实施，并且蒙特卡洛模拟表明，当企业的材料投入选择存在优化误差时，该估计量优于其他替代估计量。在英国数据上实施一系列生产函数估计量，我们发现，我们提出的估计量得出的结果与常用的替代方法要么相似，要么更可信。在材料投入似乎更难优化的行业中，这些差异更大。我们表明，与现有方法相比，我们提出的估计量所隐含的全要素生产率与未来就业增长的相关性更强，这表明未能充分解释投入内生性可能会低估经济中的动态再配置程度。

papers.title: Is Maturity-Transformation Risk Priced into Bank Deposit Rates?
papers.authors: Matthias Fleckenstein, Francis A. Longstaff
papers.abstract: We use the term structure of bank CD rates to examine whether maturity-transformation risk is priced into the rates banks offer customers. We find that depositors pay a significant cost for the liquidity provided by bank deposits. This cost is strongly related to the amount of maturity-transformation risk that these deposit accounts create. The cost is also negatively correlated with the convenience premia in Treasury markets, which suggests that households do not view deposit liquidity and Treasury liquidity as perfect substitutes. The results have important implications about the role of deposit franchises and market power in banking markets.
papers.zh_title: 期限转换风险是否被定价在银行存款利率中？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用银行存单利率的期限结构来检验期限转换风险是否被定价在银行向客户提供的利率中。我们发现，存款人为银行存款提供的流动性支付了显著的成本。这一成本与这些存款账户所产生的期限转换风险量密切相关。该成本也与国债市场中的便利收益负相关，这表明家庭并不将存款流动性和国债流动性视为完全替代品。这些结果对于存款特许经营权的作用以及银行市场中的市场势力具有重要启示。

papers.title: Intergenerational Spillovers of Driving Privileges for Undocumented Immigrants: Evidence from Early Childhood Education
papers.authors: Catalina Amuedo-Dorantes, Monica Deza, Genti Kostandini, Tianyuan Luo
papers.abstract: We study the intergenerational impact of granting driver’s licenses to undocumented immigrants on early childhood education (ECE) participation among their U.S.-born children. Using a difference-in-differences framework applied to American Community Survey data from 2005– 2019, we find that these policies increase preschool enrollment by 6% among Hispanic children with likely undocumented parents. Effects are larger when mothers are the likely license recipients. We find no effects among children of documented Hispanic parents or in placebo samples. Mechanism analyses show increased vehicle ownership, solo commuting, maternal labor earnings, and English proficiency, suggesting reduced logistical and economic barriers. These findings underscore how inclusive mobility policies can improve educational equity and long-run integration outcomes.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS；JEL：I24, J15, J6, J68, K37
papers.zh_title: 无证移民驾驶特权代际溢出效应：来自学前教育的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了向无证移民发放驾驶执照对其在美国出生的子女的学前教育参与率的代际影响。利用2005年至2019年美国社区调查数据，采用双重差分框架，我们发现这些政策使父母可能为无证移民的西班牙裔儿童的学前入学率提高了6%。当母亲可能是驾照获得者时，影响更大。我们在有证西班牙裔父母的子女或安慰剂样本中未发现影响。机制分析显示，车辆拥有率、单独通勤、母亲劳动收入以及英语熟练程度均有所提高，这表明物流和经济障碍有所减少。这些发现强调了包容性出行政策如何能够改善教育公平和长期融合结果。

papers.title: On the Origins of Direct Rule: Armed Groups and Customary Chiefs in Eastern Congo
papers.authors: Soeren J. Henn, Gauthier Marchais, Christian Mastaki Mugaruka, Raúl Sánchez de la Sierra
papers.abstract: Armed groups routinely delegate domains of rule to village customary chiefs—indirect rule. The larger a chief’s power over the villagers relative to the group’s, the more there is indirect rule. Over time, enabled by the chief’s efforts to legitimize the group, the group expands the taxes they collect themselves in addition to those collected by the chief for them and substitutes the chief for justice administration—converging to direct rule. This suggests indirect rule is a temporary arrangement by uninformed or illegitimate rulers with an inherent agency problem, overcome when rulers acquire enough skill to replace pre-existing political authorities.
papers.zh_title: 直接统治的起源：刚果东部的武装团体与世袭酋长
papers.zh_abstract: 武装团体通常将统治领域委托给村庄世袭酋长——即间接统治。酋长相对于武装团体对村民的权力越大，间接统治的程度就越高。随着时间的推移，在酋长努力使武装团体合法化的推动下，武装团体扩大了其自行征收的税收（除了酋长为其代征的税收之外），并取代酋长进行司法管理——从而趋向直接统治。这表明，间接统治是信息不足或缺乏合法性的统治者的一种临时安排，其存在固有的代理问题，当统治者获得足够技能以取代既有的政治权威时，这一问题便得以克服。

papers.title: Exploiting Complementarity in Applied General-Equilibrium Models: Heterogeneous Firms, Multinationals, Capacity Constraints, Endogenous Zeros
papers.authors: James R. Markusenhttps://admin.nber.org/admin/tools/wp_catalog/reorder_authors?paper=w32721
papers.abstract: Applied general-equilibrium (AGE) models have often made compromises to circumvent difficult modeling problems. One of these is avoiding endogenous zeros, ruling out important questions. Traditional perfect competition models: when do technologies or trade links switch from active to inactive or vice versa? Heterogeneous firms: what types of firms are active in equilibrium? Multinationals: when do firms switch from exporting to foreign production? Capacity constraints: could trade links or production sectors hit capacity limits? Here I exploit the complementarity approach to general equilibrium, focusing on modeling heterogeneous firms and endogenous multinational production. Instead of the traditional continuum formulation, there is a discrete and finite set of firm types, differing in marginal costs across but not within types. There is an upper bound on the number of firms that can enter in each firm type. Formulated as a non-linear complementarity problem, we can solve for the set of active firm types in relation to characteristics of the economy such as size or trade costs and their modes of operation: no entry, domestic, exporting, multinational. The analysis easily incorporates endogenous markups and positive aggregate profits. Productivities can be calculated directly from data and no integrals/integration/parametric distributions are required.
papers.zh_title: 在应用一般均衡模型中利用互补性：异质性企业、跨国公司、产能约束与内生零点
papers.zh_abstract: 应用一般均衡（AGE）模型常常为了规避棘手的建模问题而做出妥协。其中之一是避免内生零点，从而排除了重要问题的研究。传统的完全竞争模型：技术或贸易联系何时从活跃转为不活跃，反之亦然？异质性企业：何种类型的企业在均衡中活跃？跨国公司：企业何时从出口转向国外生产？产能约束：贸易联系或生产部门是否会触及产能上限？本文利用一般均衡的互补性方法，重点关注异质性企业和内生跨国生产的建模。与传统的连续统设定不同，这里采用离散且有限的企业类型集合，不同类型间的边际成本存在差异，但类型内部相同。每种企业类型可进入的企业数量存在上限。通过将其表述为一个非线性互补问题，我们可以根据经济特征（如规模或贸易成本）及其运营模式（不进入、国内生产、出口、跨国生产）来求解活跃的企业类型集合。该分析能轻松纳入内生加成定价和正的总利润。生产率可直接从数据中计算得出，无需积分、积分运算或参数分布假设。

papers.title: Job Search, Unemployment Insurance, and Active Labor Market Policies
papers.authors: Thomas Le Barbanchon, Johannes F. Schmieder, Andrea Weber
papers.abstract: This chapter, prepared for the Handbook of Labor Economics, presents a comprehensive overview of how labor economists understand job search among the unemployed and how job search is shaped by unemployment insurance (UI) and active labor market policies (ALMP). It focuses on synthesizing key lessons from the empirical research of the last decade and presents recent novel theoretical developments.
papers.zh_title: 求职、失业保险与积极劳动力市场政策
papers.zh_abstract: 本章为《劳动经济学手册》而撰写，全面概述了劳动经济学家如何理解失业者的求职行为，以及求职如何受到失业保险（UI）和积极劳动力市场政策（ALMP）的影响。本章重点综合了过去十年实证研究的关键教训，并介绍了近期新颖的理论发展。

papers.title: The Employment Effects of a Guaranteed Income: Experimental Evidence from Two U.S. States
papers.authors: Eva Vivalt, Elizabeth Rhodes, Alexander W. Bartik, David E. Broockman, Patrick Krause, Sarah Miller
papers.abstract: We study the causal impacts of income on a rich array of employment outcomes, leveraging an experiment in which 1,000 low-income individuals were randomized into receiving $1,000 per month unconditionally for three years, with a control group of 2,000 participants receiving $50/month. We gather detailed survey data, administrative records, and data from a mobile phone app. The transfer caused total individual income excluding the transfers to fall by about $1,800/year relative to the control group and a 4.1 percentage point decrease in labor market participation. Participants reduced their work hours as a result of the transfers by 1-2 hours/week and participants’ partners reduced their work hours by a comparable amount. Among other categories of time use, the greatest increase generated by the transfer was in time spent on leisure. Despite asking detailed questions about amenities, we find no impact on quality of employment, and our confidence intervals can rule out even small improvements. Treated participants broadly increase expenditures, led by spending on non-durable goods and services, with smaller increases in spending on durable goods and human capital. We observe no significant effects on degree attainment, though the magnitudes of the estimated effects generally appear larger among younger participants. Measures of subjective well-being are higher among treated participants in the first year of the transfers but then revert to control group levels. Overall, our results suggest a moderate labor supply effect that does not appear offset by other productive activities.
papers.zh_title: 保障性收入的就业效应：来自美国两个州的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用一项实验研究了收入对一系列丰富就业结果的因果影响。在该实验中，1000名低收入个体被随机分配，在三年内每月无条件获得1000美元，而由2000名参与者组成的对照组每月获得50美元。我们收集了详细的调查数据、行政记录以及来自手机应用程序的数据。与对照组相比，这笔转移支付导致个体总收入（不包括转移支付）每年减少约1800美元，劳动力市场参与率下降4.1个百分点。参与者因转移支付而减少了每周1-2小时的工作时间，参与者的伴侣也减少了相当数量的工作时间。在其他时间使用类别中，转移支付带来的最大增长是休闲时间的增加。尽管我们详细询问了工作条件，但未发现对就业质量有任何影响，并且我们的置信区间可以排除即使是微小的改善。受助参与者的支出普遍增加，主要由非耐用品和服务支出带动，耐用品和人力资本支出增长较小。我们未观察到对学位获得有显著影响，尽管估计效应的大小在年轻参与者中通常更大。在转移支付的第一年，受助参与者的主观幸福感指标较高，但随后恢复到对照组水平。总体而言，我们的结果表明存在适度的劳动力供给效应，且该效应似乎未被其他生产性活动所抵消。

papers.title: The Gas Trap: Outcompeting Coal vs. Renewables
papers.authors: Bård Harstad, Katinka Holtsmark
papers.abstract: We analyze a fundamental dilemma and time-inconsistency problem facing a climate coalition producing natural gas. In the short term, it is tempting to export more to outcompete coal. When this policy is anticipated, however, investments in renewables fall and emissions ultimately increase. When the coalition cannot pre-commit, its policies will be counterproductive. We discuss the robustness of this result and possible solutions. If the coalition can invest directly in renewables, for instance, the incentive to maintain a high price on exports can mitigate the temptation to reduce the price to outcompete coal. Under certain conditions, the commitment outcome can be implemented.
papers.zh_title: 天然气陷阱：与煤炭竞争 vs. 与可再生能源竞争
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了生产天然气的气候联盟面临的一个根本性困境和时间不一致性问题。短期内，通过增加出口来击败煤炭具有诱惑力。然而，当这一政策被预期到时，可再生能源投资将下降，最终导致排放增加。当联盟无法做出事前承诺时，其政策将适得其反。我们讨论了这一结果的稳健性以及可能的解决方案。例如，如果联盟能够直接投资于可再生能源，那么维持高出口价格的激励可以缓解为击败煤炭而降低价格的诱惑。在某些条件下，可以实现承诺情形下的结果。

papers.title: Anti-social norms
papers.authors: Leopoldo Fergusson, José-Alberto Guerra, James A. Robinson
papers.abstract: Since formal rules can only partially reduce opportunistic behavior, third-party sanctioning to promote fairness is critical to achieving desirable social outcomes. Social norms may underpin such behavior, but they can also undermine it. We study one such norm the "don’t be a toad" norm, as it is referred to in Colombia that tells people to mind their own business and not snitch on others. In a set of fairness games where a third party can punish unfair behavior, but players can invoke the "don’t be a toad" norm, we find that the mere possibility of invoking this norm completely reverses the benefits of third-party sanctioning to achieve fair social outcomes. We establish this is an anti-social norm in a well-defined sense: most players consider it inappropriate, yet they expect the majority will invoke it. To understand this phenomenon we develop an evolutionary model of endogenous social norm transmission and demonstrate that a payoff advantage from adherence to the norm in social dilemmas, combined with sufficient heterogeneity in the disutility of those who view the norm as inappropriate, can generate the apparent paradox of an anti-social norm in the steady-state equilibrium. We provide further evidence that historical exposure to political violence, which increased the ostracization of snitches, raised sensitivity to this norm.
papers.zh_title: 反社会规范
papers.zh_abstract: 由于正式规则只能部分减少机会主义行为，第三方惩罚以促进公平对于实现理想的社会结果至关重要。社会规范可能支撑这种行为，但也可能削弱它。我们研究了一种这样的规范——在哥伦比亚被称为“别当癞蛤蟆”的规范——它告诉人们管好自己的事，不要告发他人。在一系列公平博弈中，第三方可以惩罚不公平行为，但参与者可以援引“别当癞蛤蟆”规范。我们发现，仅仅援引这一规范的可能性就完全逆转了第三方惩罚在实现公平社会结果方面的益处。我们确定这是一种明确意义上的反社会规范：大多数参与者认为它不合适，但他们预期大多数人会援引它。为了理解这一现象，我们开发了一个内生社会规范传播的演化模型，并证明，在社会困境中遵守该规范所带来的收益优势，加上那些认为该规范不合适的个体的负效用存在足够异质性，可以产生稳态均衡中反社会规范这一看似矛盾的现象。我们提供了进一步证据，表明历史上接触政治暴力（这增加了对告密者的排斥）提高了对这一规范的敏感性。

papers.title: Toward a Holistic Approach to Central Bank Trust
papers.authors: Sandra Eickmeier, Luba Petersen
papers.abstract: We examine public trust in the European Central Bank (ECB) and its determinants using data from the Bundesbank Household Panel survey for Germany. Employing an interdisciplinary approach that integrates insights from political science and psychology, we offer a fresh perspective on the factors influencing central bank trust that is more holistic than the conventional one. Our primary findings can be summarized as follows. Households who state that competence, which we define as the ECB's performance in maintaining stable prices and making decisions grounded in rules, science, and data, matters for their trust in the ECB, tend to express higher trust in the ECB. Conversely, those who place greater importance on values, particularly the integrity of top central bankers, honest communication and broader concern, tend to trust the ECB less. Trust in the ECB also hinges on trust in political institutions more generally and, to a lesser extent, on generalized trust (i.e. trust in others).
papers.zh_title: 迈向央行信任的整体性方法
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用德国联邦银行家庭面板调查的数据，考察了公众对欧洲中央银行（ECB）的信任及其决定因素。通过采用一种整合政治学和心理学见解的跨学科方法，我们提供了一个比传统方法更全面的、关于影响央行信任因素的新视角。我们的主要发现可概括如下：那些表示能力（我们将其定义为欧洲央行在维持物价稳定以及基于规则、科学和数据做出决策方面的表现）对其信任欧洲央行很重要的家庭，往往对欧洲央行表现出更高的信任。相反，那些更重视价值观（特别是央行高层官员的诚信、坦诚沟通和更广泛的关切）的家庭，往往对欧洲央行的信任度较低。对欧洲央行的信任也取决于对更广泛政治机构的信任，并在较小程度上取决于一般化信任（即对他人的信任）。

papers.title: Subjective Income Expectations and Household Debt Cycles
papers.authors: Francesco D’Acunto, Michael Weber, Xiao Yin
papers.abstract: Matched transaction-level, credit-registry, and survey-based data reveal that consumers on average form excessively high (low) income expectations relative to ex-post realizations after unexpected positive (negative) income shocks. These extrapolative income expectations lead consumers to increase current spending, accumulate more debt, and face more defaults when lower-than-expected incomes are realized. We assess the aggregate implications by estimating a consumption model with defaultable unsecured debt and diagnostic Kalman filtering whereby consumers over-extrapolate income shocks when forming expectations. Extrapolative income expectations help explain state-dependent household debt cycles qualitatively and quantitatively.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：D14, D84, E21, E71, G51
papers.zh_title: 主观收入预期与家庭债务周期
papers.zh_abstract: 匹配的交易层面、信贷登记层面和调查层面的数据显示，在经历意外的正向（负向）收入冲击后，消费者平均会形成相对于事后实现值过高（过低）的收入预期。这些外推性的收入预期导致消费者增加当前支出，积累更多债务，并在收入低于预期时面临更多违约。我们通过估计一个包含可违约无担保债务和诊断性卡尔曼滤波的消费模型来评估其总体影响，在该模型中，消费者在形成预期时会过度外推收入冲击。外推性收入预期有助于在定性和定量上解释状态依赖的家庭债务周期。

papers.title: Taxing Capital in a Globalized World: The Effects of Automatic Information Exchange
papers.authors: Hjalte Fejerskov Boas, Niels Johannesen, Claus Thustrup Kreiner, Lauge Truels Larsen, Gabriel Zucman
papers.abstract: In the second half of the 2010s more than 100 countries—including all large offshore financial centers—started to automatically exchange bank information with foreign tax authorities. This informational big-bang marks a break with the situation of offshore bank secrecy that prevailed before. We study its effects on tax compliance by analyzing the universe of information reports sent by foreign banks to Danish authorities, matched to population- wide micro-data on income, wealth, and cross-border bank transfers. In response to the automatic exchange of bank information, tax evaders may repatriate previously undeclared offshore wealth, they may start to self-report offshore income to the tax authorities, or the tax authorities may detect their evasion in audits that use the new information reports. Using a variety of research designs, we find large compliance effects along all these margins, with the largest response coming from repatriation of wealth. Overall we estimate that the automatic exchange of bank information has closed about 70% of the offshore tax gap. These results highlight the power of international cooperation to improve tax compliance in a globalized world.
papers.zh_title: 全球化世界中的资本课税：自动信息交换的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 在2010年代后半期，超过100个国家——包括所有大型离岸金融中心——开始自动与外国税务机关交换银行信息。这一信息大爆炸标志着与之前盛行的离岸银行保密制度的决裂。我们通过分析外国银行发送给丹麦当局的全部信息报告，并将其与涵盖人口范围的收入、财富和跨境银行转账微观数据相匹配，研究了其对税收遵从的影响。为应对银行信息的自动交换，逃税者可能会将此前未申报的离岸财富汇回国内，可能会开始向税务机关自行申报离岸收入，或者税务机关可能会在使用这些新信息报告的审计中发现其逃税行为。通过使用多种研究设计，我们发现所有这些方面都存在显著的合规效应，其中最大的反应来自财富汇回。总体而言，我们估计银行信息的自动交换已缩小了约70%的离岸税收缺口。这些结果凸显了国际合作在全球化世界中提高税收遵从度的力量。

papers.title: Estimation of Property Value Changes from Nearby Carbon Capture, Utilization, and Storage Projects in the United States
papers.authors: Kaifang Luo, Yueming Lucy Qiu, Pengfei Liu, Yingdan Mei
papers.abstract: Carbon capture, utilization, and storage (CCUS) techniques are vital to decarbonization goals. A CCUS supply chain captures CO₂ and delivers it to a suitable location where CO₂ can either be used or injected deep underground for long-term storage. CCUS projects reduce carbon emissions but also pose certain risks to local communities. Using nationwide CCUS data combined with property-level transaction records from 1990 to 2021 in the U.S., we quantify the net impact of proximity to CCUS projects on nearby housing prices in light of their positive and negative externalities. The results show that proximity to CCUS projects leads to a price premium on nearby house sales prices, but such effects disappear beyond the 4.2-km buffer. Compared to homes without CCUS projects nearby, houses with CCUS projects within 4.2 km typically command a price premium of 3.90% (or $8,582). CCUS deployment could be facilitated with a more detailed explanation of the housing price premium. The observed increase in property values near CCUS operations in the U.S. provides insights that could inform CCUS project development in other regions, though local regulatory and socio-economic factors must be carefully considered.
papers.zh_title: 美国碳捕集、利用与封存项目对邻近房产价值变化的估计
papers.zh_abstract: 碳捕集、利用与封存（CCUS）技术对于实现脱碳目标至关重要。CCUS供应链捕获二氧化碳，并将其输送至合适的地点，在那里二氧化碳可以被利用或注入地下深处进行长期封存。CCUS项目能减少碳排放，但也给当地社区带来一定风险。利用全美范围内的CCUS数据，结合1990年至2021年美国房产层面的交易记录，我们量化了邻近CCUS项目对周边房价的净影响，同时考虑了其正负外部性。结果显示，邻近CCUS项目会推高附近房屋的销售价格，但这种效应在超过4.2公里缓冲区后消失。与附近没有CCUS项目的房屋相比，4.2公里范围内有CCUS项目的房屋通常享有3.90%（或8,582美元）的价格溢价。对房价溢价的更详细解释可能有助于推动CCUS的部署。美国CCUS运营附近房产价值的增长，可为其他地区的CCUS项目开发提供参考，但必须仔细考虑当地的监管和社会经济因素。

papers.title: Billionaire Superstar: Public Image and Demand for Taxation
papers.authors: Ricardo Perez-Truglia, Jeffrey Yusof
papers.abstract: In the United States, there are 741 billionaires with a combined net worth of $5.2 trillion. Despite this extreme inequality, billionaires face effective tax rates lower than those of the average American. We examine how the public image of billionaires shapes support for taxing them, using a pre-registered survey experiment with 9,013 Americans. Subjects were randomly assigned to one of four treatments, each emphasizing a different aspect of billionaires’ public image: the role of merit in building the billionaires’ wealth, their lavish consumption, the scale of their fortunes, and their average tax rates. All four treatments significantly and strongly affected the intended beliefs— for instance, information about how the billionaires made their fortunes significantly reduced the perceived role of merit. Moreover, all treatments elicited strong emotional reactions. A panel of academic experts predicted that all four treatments would substantially increase demand for taxation. In sharp contrast, we find that only one treatment—providing information about lavish lifestyles—had a robust positive effect on support for taxation, while another—focused on effective tax rates—had a strong negative effect. We discuss implications for both researchers and policymakers.
papers.zh_title: 亿万富翁明星：公众形象与税收需求
papers.zh_abstract: 在美国，有741位亿万富翁，总净资产达5.2万亿美元。尽管存在这种极端不平等，亿万富翁的实际税率却低于普通美国人。我们通过一项针对9,013名美国人的预注册调查实验，研究了亿万富翁的公众形象如何影响对其征税的支持度。受试者被随机分配到四种处理组之一，每种处理强调亿万富翁公众形象的不同方面：财富积累中个人努力的作用、奢侈消费、财富规模以及平均税率。所有四种处理都显著且强烈地影响了预期的信念——例如，关于亿万富翁如何发家致富的信息显著降低了人们对个人努力作用的认知。此外，所有处理都引发了强烈的情绪反应。一个由学术专家组成的小组预测，所有四种处理都会大幅增加对征税的需求。与此形成鲜明对比的是，我们发现只有一种处理——提供关于奢侈生活方式的信息——对支持征税产生了稳健的正面效应，而另一种处理——侧重于实际税率——则产生了强烈的负面效应。我们讨论了对研究人员和政策制定者的启示。

papers.title: Does Income Affect Health? Evidence from a Randomized Controlled Trial of a Guaranteed Income
papers.authors: Sarah Miller, Elizabeth Rhodes, Alexander W. Bartik, David E. Broockman, Patrick K. Krause, Eva Vivalt
papers.abstract: This paper provides new evidence on the causal relationship between income and short-term health in the United States. We study a randomized experiment in which 1,000 low-income adults age 21 to 40 received $1,000 per month for three years with 2,000 control participants receiving $50 monthly over that same period, from November 2020 until October 2023. The cash transfer resulted in large but short-lived improvements in stress and food security, greater use of hospital and emergency department care, and increased medical spending in the treatment relative to the control group. The use of other office-based care—particularly dental care—may also have increased as a result of the transfer. However, over the three year time horizon that we study, we find no effect of the transfer across several measures of physical health, and we can rule out even very small improvements. The transfer also did not improve mental health after the first year and by year 2 we can again reject very small improvements. We also find precise null effects on self-reported access to health care, physical activity, sleep, and several other measures related to preventive care and health behaviors. We find no effect of the transfer on the health of participants’ children, but we do find that children in treated households were more likely to be up to date on their vaccinations.
papers.zh_title: 收入是否影响健康？来自一项有保障收入随机对照试验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提供了关于美国收入与短期健康之间因果关系的新证据。我们研究了一项随机实验，其中1,000名年龄在21至40岁之间的低收入成年人每月获得1,000美元，为期三年，而2,000名对照组参与者在同一时期（2020年11月至2023年10月）每月获得50美元。与对照组相比，现金转移导致治疗组在压力和食品安全方面出现大幅但短暂的改善，增加了医院和急诊科的使用，并提高了医疗支出。转移支付也可能增加了其他基于办公室的护理（尤其是牙科护理）的使用。然而，在我们研究的三年时间范围内，我们发现转移支付在多项身体健康指标上没有影响，并且我们可以排除即使是非常微小的改善。转移支付在第一年后也没有改善心理健康，到第二年，我们再次可以排除非常微小的改善。我们还发现，在自我报告的医疗保健可及性、体育活动、睡眠以及其他与预防保健和健康行为相关的几项指标上，存在精确的零效应。我们发现转移支付对参与者子女的健康没有影响，但我们确实发现，治疗组家庭的子女更有可能按时接种疫苗。

papers.title: The Effects of State Paid Sick Leave Mandates on Parental Childcare Time
papers.authors: Johanna Catherine Maclean, Sabrina Wulff Pabilonia
papers.abstract: Unlike most developed countries, the U.S. lacks a federal paid sick leave policy. As a result, many workers must choose between losing earnings and attending to childcare responsibilities. To date, 17 states and the District of Columbia have adopted or announced paid sick leave mandates that provide up to seven days of paid leave per year that can be used for family responsibilities and healthcare. In this study, we estimate the effects of state paid sick leave mandates on parents’ time spent providing childcare using time diaries from the 2004-2023 American Time Use Survey. Findings from difference-in-differences estimators suggest that post-mandate, parental time spent providing childcare increases by 5.8%. Effects are stronger among women with younger children. Overall, our findings suggest that paid sick leave mandates allow parents to better balance work and family responsibilities.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, LE, LS, PE；JEL：I18, J28, J33
papers.zh_title: 州带薪病假强制令对父母育儿时间的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 与大多数发达国家不同，美国缺乏联邦层面的带薪病假政策。因此，许多工人不得不在损失收入和照顾子女责任之间做出选择。迄今为止，已有17个州和哥伦比亚特区通过或宣布了带薪病假强制令，每年提供最多七天的带薪假期，可用于家庭责任和医疗保健。在本研究中，我们利用2004-2023年美国时间使用调查的时间日志，估计了州带薪病假强制令对父母提供育儿时间的影响。双重差分估计器的结果表明，强制令实施后，父母用于育儿的时间增加了5.8%。这种效应在有年幼子女的女性中更为显著。总体而言，我们的研究结果表明，带薪病假强制令使父母能够更好地平衡工作和家庭责任。

papers.title: Granular Income Inequality and Mobility using IDDA: Exploring Patterns across Race and Ethnicity
papers.authors: Illenin O. Kondo, Kevin Rinz, Natalie Gubbay, Brandon Hawkins, John L. Voorheis, Abigail K. Wozniak
papers.abstract: We explore the evolution of income inequality and mobility in the U.S. for a large number of subnational groups defined by race and ethnicity, using granular statistics describing income distributions, income mobility, and conditional income growth derived from the universe of tax filers and W-2 recipients that we observe over a two-decade period (1998–2019). We find that income inequality and income growth patterns identified from administrative tax records differ in important ways from those that one might identify in public survey sources. The full set of statistics that we construct is available publicly alongside this paper as the Income Distributions and Dynamics in America, or IDDA, dataset. Using two applications, we illustrate IDDA’s relevance for understanding income inequality trends. First, we extend Bayer and Charles (2018) beyond earnings gaps between Black and White men and document that, unlike those for other groups, earnings for both Black men and Black women fell behind earnings for White men following the Great Recession. This trend lasted through 2019, the end of the data period. Second, we document a significant reversal in the convergence of earnings for Native earners in Native areas.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PE, POL；JEL：D1, D31, J15, J16, J31
papers.zh_title: 使用IDDA研究细粒度收入不平等与流动性：探索种族和族裔模式
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用描述收入分布、收入流动性和条件收入增长的细粒度统计数据，探讨了美国按种族和族裔划分的大量地方群体中收入不平等和流动性的演变。这些统计数据来源于我们在二十年期间（1998-2019年）观察到的所有纳税人和W-2接收者。我们发现，从行政税务记录中识别出的收入不平等和收入增长模式，与从公共调查来源中可能识别出的模式存在重要差异。我们构建的完整统计数据集与本论文一同作为“美国收入分布与动态”（IDDA）数据集公开发布。通过两个应用案例，我们说明了IDDA对于理解收入不平等趋势的相关性。首先，我们扩展了Bayer和Charles（2018）的研究，超越了黑人和白人男性之间的收入差距，并记录到，与其他群体不同，黑人男性和黑人女性的收入在大衰退后都落后于白人男性。这一趋势持续到2019年，即数据期结束。其次，我们记录了原住民地区原住民收入趋同的显著逆转。

papers.title: The U.S. Low-Wage Structure: A McWage Comparison
papers.authors: Orley C. Ashenfelter, Štěpán Jurajda
papers.abstract: Thanks to standardized work protocol and technology of McDonald’s restaurants, the hourly wage of McDonald’s Basic Crew enables wage comparisons under near-identical skill inputs and hedonic job conditions. McWages capture labor costs in entry-level jobs, while the Big Macs (earned) Per Hour (BMPH) index measures corresponding purchasing power of wages. We document large and growing geographical wage differences in standardized jobs using data covering most U.S. counties during 2016-2023. Before the Covid-19 pandemic, there was no BMPH growth where minimum wages stayed constant, but the pandemic wage increase, which diminished the importance of minimum wages, was stronger in these areas.
papers.zh_title: 美国低工资结构：一份McWage比较
papers.zh_abstract: 得益于麦当劳餐厅标准化的工作流程和技术，麦当劳基础员工的时薪使得在近乎相同的技能投入和享乐工作条件下进行工资比较成为可能。McWage衡量了入门级工作的劳动力成本，而每小时赚取的巨无霸指数（BMPH）则衡量了相应工资的购买力。我们利用覆盖2016-2023年期间美国大部分县的数据，记录了标准化工作中巨大且不断增长的地理工资差异。在新冠疫情之前，在最低工资保持不变的地方，BMPH没有增长，但疫情导致的工资增长在这些地区更为强劲，这削弱了最低工资的重要性。

papers.title: Risk, Specialization, and Covered-Interest Parity
papers.authors: Tobias J. Moskowitz, Chase P. Ross, Sharon Y. Ross, Kaushik Vasudevan
papers.abstract: Prevailing theories of financial intermediation assume an integrated financial sector with frictionless risk sharing. However, we identify substantial risk-sharing frictions linked to intermediary specialization using currency derivatives markets as a laboratory. Using confidential supervisory data covering $25 trillion in daily bank exposures, we document imperfect hedging in banks’ FX-swap intermediation: banks rarely hedge their synthetic dollar lending with maturity-matched foreign safe assets. Intermediaries specialize in markets where they have expertise in managing the associated exposures, giving rise to cross-market variation in deviations from covered-interest parity. Our results highlight the importance of intermediary specialization and its impact on risk premia.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, IFM；JEL：F3, F31, G1, G11, G12, G15, G2, G20, G21
papers.zh_title: 风险、专业化与抛补利率平价
papers.zh_abstract: 主流的金融中介理论假设一个具有无摩擦风险分担的整合金融部门。然而，我们利用货币衍生品市场作为实验室，识别出与中介专业化相关的重大风险分担摩擦。利用涵盖每日2.5万亿美元银行敞口的机密监管数据，我们记录了银行在外汇掉期中介中的不完全对冲：银行很少用期限匹配的外国安全资产来对冲其合成美元贷款。中介机构专注于其擅长管理相关敞口的市场，这导致了抛补利率平价偏差的跨市场差异。我们的结果强调了中介专业化的重要性及其对风险溢价的影响。

papers.title: Contrasting the Local and National Demographic Incidence of Local Labor Demand Shocks
papers.authors: Richard K. Mansfield
papers.abstract: This paper examines how spatial frictions that differ among heterogeneous workers and establishments shape the geographic and demographic incidence of alternative local labor demand shocks, with implications for the appropriate level of government at which to fund local economic initiatives. LEHD data featuring millions of job transitions facilitate estimation of a rich two-sided labor market assignment model. The model generates simulated forecasts of many alternative local demand shocks featuring different establishment compositions and local areas. Workers within 10 miles receive only 11.2% (6.6%) of nationwide welfare (employment) short-run gains, with at least 35.9% (62.0%) accruing to out-of-state workers, despite much larger per-worker impacts for the closest workers. Local incidence by demographic category is very sensitive to shock composition, but different shocks produce similar demographic incidence farther from the shock. Furthermore, the remaining heterogeneity in incidence at the state or national level can reverse patterns of heterogeneous demographic impacts at the local level. Overall, the results suggest that reduced-form approaches using distant locations as controls can produce accurate estimates of local shock impacts on local workers, but that the distribution of local impacts badly approximates shocks' statewide or national incidence.
papers.zh_title: 地方劳动力需求冲击的地方与国家人口统计影响的对比
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了在异质性工人和机构之间存在不同空间摩擦的情况下，这些摩擦如何塑造替代性地方劳动力需求冲击的地理和人口统计影响，并探讨了其对资助地方经济举措的适当政府层级的启示。包含数百万次工作转换的LEHD数据有助于估计一个丰富的双边劳动力市场分配模型。该模型生成了许多替代性地方需求冲击的模拟预测，这些冲击具有不同的机构构成和地方区域。在短期福利（就业）的全国性增长中，距离冲击10英里以内的工人仅获得11.2%（6.6%），而至少35.9%（62.0%）的收益流向了州外工人，尽管对最近工人的影响要大得多。按人口统计类别划分的地方影响对冲击构成非常敏感，但不同的冲击在远离冲击的地方产生了相似的人口统计影响。此外，在州或国家层面，剩余的影响异质性可能逆转地方层面异质性人口影响的模式。总体而言，结果表明，使用远距离地点作为对照组的简化形式方法可以准确估计地方冲击对当地工人的影响，但地方影响的分布并不能很好地近似冲击在全州或全国范围内的影响。

papers.title: Is Model Accuracy Enough? A Field Evaluation Of A Machine Learning Model To Catch Bogus Firms
papers.authors: Taha Barwahwala, Aprajit Mahajan, Shekhar Mittal, Ofir Reich
papers.abstract: We investigate the use of a machine learning (ML) algorithm to identify fraudulent non-existent firms. Using a rich dataset of tax returns over several years in an Indian state, we train an ML-based model to predict fraudulent firms. We then use the model predictions to carry out field inspections of firms identified as suspicious by the ML tool. We find that the ML model is accurate in both simulated and field settings in identifying non-existent firms. Withholding a randomly selected group of firms from inspection, we estimate the causal impact of ML driven inspections. Despite its strong predictive and field performance, the model driven inspections do not yield a significant increase in enforcement as measured by the cancellation of fraudulent firm registrations and tax recovery. We provide two rationales for this discrepancy based on a close analysis of the tax department’s operating protocols: selection bias, and institutional friction in integrating the model into existing administrative systems. Our study serves as a cautionary tale for the application of machine learning in public policy contexts and of relying solely on test set performance as an effectiveness indicator. Field evaluations are critical in assessing the real-world impact of predictive models.
papers.zh_title: 模型精度足够吗？机器学习模型识别虚假企业的实地评估
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了使用机器学习算法识别欺诈性不存在的企业。利用印度某邦多年丰富的纳税申报数据集，我们训练了一个基于机器学习的模型来预测欺诈性企业。随后，我们利用模型预测结果，对机器学习工具识别为可疑的企业进行实地检查。我们发现，该机器学习模型在模拟和实地环境中都能准确识别不存在的企业。通过随机保留一组企业不予检查，我们估计了机器学习驱动检查的因果影响。尽管该模型具有强大的预测和实地表现，但以取消欺诈性企业注册和追回税款为衡量标准，模型驱动的检查并未带来执法效果的显著提升。我们基于对税务部门操作流程的细致分析，为这一差异提供了两种解释：选择偏差，以及将模型整合到现有行政体系中的制度摩擦。我们的研究为机器学习在公共政策背景下的应用，以及仅依赖测试集表现作为有效性指标的做法，提供了一个警示。实地评估对于评估预测模型在现实世界中的影响至关重要。

papers.title: The Socioeconomic Outcomes of Native Groups in Argentina
papers.authors: Pedro Dal Bó, Carolina Lopez
papers.abstract: This study uses individual-level census data from Argentina to examine the socioeconomic disparities between Native and non-Native people. Native people fare worse across a variety of indicators, including housing, education, employment, and health. On average, the observed disparities amount to 12 percent of the standard deviation and persist even after controlling for factors such as geographic location. Furthermore, there are differences in the intergenerational transmission of education between Natives and non-Natives: for each level of education of the parents, the children of Natives have, on average, fewer years of education than the children of non-Natives. Finally, the study also reveals large differences between Native groups: while some achieve average outcomes that surpass those of the non-Native population, others significantly lag behind. Notably, these differences are correlated with a characteristic of their pre-Columbian economy: the practice of agriculture.
papers.zh_title: 阿根廷原住民群体的社会经济状况
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究利用阿根廷的个人层面人口普查数据，考察原住民与非原住民之间的社会经济差异。原住民在住房、教育、就业和健康等多个指标上表现较差。平均而言，观察到的差异达到标准差的12%，并且在控制了地理位置等因素后仍然存在。此外，原住民与非原住民在教育代际传递方面存在差异：对于父母每一教育水平，原住民子女的平均受教育年限低于非原住民子女。最后，研究还揭示了原住民群体之间的巨大差异：一些群体的平均结果超过了非原住民人口，而另一些群体则显著落后。值得注意的是，这些差异与其前哥伦布时期经济的一个特征——农业实践——相关。

papers.title: Don’t Throw the Baby Out With the Bathwater: Firm Response to Downstream Product Shocks
papers.authors: Phares Akari, Chirantan Chatterjee, Matthew J. Higgins
papers.abstract: We explore how firms respond to downstream product shocks. We find that affected firms increase R&D and make additional safety-related investments in their existing assets-in-place. These investments vary with firm capabilities and across shock severity. Competitors appear to vicariously learn and also engage in similar upstream investments. We present evidence that these upstream investments have important performance implications. First, these investments are positively related to transition probabilities and approval rates for products that received them. Second, these investments are related to a decrease in the intensity and rate of future downstream product shocks. Surprisingly, however, these investments appear to have limited impact on mitigating the negative demand response caused by these shocks.
papers.zh_title: 不要因噎废食：企业对下游产品冲击的应对
papers.zh_abstract: 我们探讨了企业如何应对下游产品冲击。我们发现，受影响的企业会增加研发投入，并对其现有资产进行额外的安全相关投资。这些投资因企业能力和冲击严重程度而异。竞争对手似乎会进行替代性学习，也参与类似的上游投资。我们提供的证据表明，这些上游投资对绩效有重要影响。首先，这些投资与获得投资产品的转型概率和批准率正相关。其次，这些投资与未来下游产品冲击的强度和频率下降相关。然而，令人惊讶的是，这些投资似乎对缓解由这些冲击引起的负面需求反应影响有限。

papers.title: Extreme Events, Educational Aspirations and Long-term Outcomes
papers.authors: Rene A. Iwo, Elizabeth Frankenberg, Cecep Sumantri, Duncan Thomas
papers.abstract: The 2004 Indian Ocean tsunami was an extremely destructive event in Aceh, Indonesia, killing over 160,000 people and destroying infrastructure, homes, and livelihoods over miles of coastline. In its immediate aftermath, affected populations faced a daunting array of challenges. At the population level, questions of how the disaster affected children’s and parents’ aspirations for education and whether it permanently disrupted schooling progression are critical in understanding how shocks affect human capital in the short and long term. We use longitudinal data from the Study of the Tsunami Aftermath and Recovery (STAR) to examine how disaster exposure affects educational aspirations and eventual attainment. We find that damage to one’s community depresses aspirations in the short term but that this weakens with time. With respect to educational attainment 15 years after the event, children’s aspirations, parents’ education, and family socioeconomic status are more important determinants of whether children complete high school and go on to tertiary schooling than disaster exposure. While these results likely reflect, at least in part, the successful post-tsunami reconstruction program, they also establish enormous resilience among survivors who bore the brunt of the tsunami.
papers.zh_title: 极端事件、教育期望与长期结果
papers.zh_abstract: 2004年印度洋海啸是印度尼西亚亚齐省一场极具破坏性的事件，造成超过16万人死亡，并摧毁了数英里海岸线上的基础设施、房屋和生计。在灾难发生后，受影响人口面临一系列严峻挑战。在人口层面，了解灾难如何影响儿童和父母的教育期望，以及它是否永久性地中断了学业进程，对于理解冲击如何短期和长期影响人力资本至关重要。我们利用海啸后果与恢复研究（STAR）的纵向数据，考察灾难暴露如何影响教育期望和最终成就。我们发现，社区受损在短期内会降低期望，但这种影响随时间减弱。关于事件发生15年后的教育成就，儿童期望、父母教育程度和家庭社会经济地位比灾难暴露更能决定儿童是否完成高中并继续接受高等教育。虽然这些结果至少部分反映了海啸后重建项目的成功，但它们也表明了承受海啸冲击的幸存者具有巨大的韧性。

papers.title: Government as Venture Capitalists in AI
papers.authors: Martin Beraja, Wenwei Peng, David Y. Yang, Noam Yuchtman
papers.abstract: Venture capital plays an important role in funding and shaping innovation outcomes, characterized by investors’ deep knowledge of the technology, industry, and institutions, as well as their long-running relationships with the entrepreneurship and innovation community. China, in its pursuit of global leadership in AI innovation and technology, has set up government venture capital funds so that both national and local governments act as venture capitalists. These government-led venture capital funds combine features of private venture capital with traditional government innovation policies. In this paper, we collect comprehensive data on China’s government and private venture capital funds. We draw three important contrasts between government and private VC funds: (i) government funds are spatially more dispersed than private funds; (ii) government funds invest in firms with weaker ex-ante performance signals but these firms exhibit growth rates exceeding those of firms in which private funds invest; and (iii) private VC funds follow government VC investments, especially when hometown government funds directly invest on firms with weaker ex-ante performance signals. We interpret these patterns in light of VC funds’ traditional role overcoming information frictions and China’s unique institutional environment, which includes important frictions on mobility and information.
papers.meta: Programs：POL, PR；JEL：G18, G24, G28, G30, H19, O3, O38
papers.zh_title: 政府作为人工智能领域的风险投资家
papers.zh_abstract: 风险投资在资助和塑造创新成果方面发挥着重要作用，其特点是投资者对技术、行业和制度有深入了解，并与创业和创新社区保持长期关系。中国在追求人工智能创新和技术全球领导地位的过程中，设立了政府风险投资基金，使国家和地方政府都扮演风险投资家的角色。这些政府主导的风险投资基金结合了私人风险投资与传统政府创新政策的特点。在本文中，我们收集了中国政府和私人风险投资基金的全面数据。我们指出了政府与私人风险投资基金之间的三个重要区别：（i）政府基金在空间上比私人基金更分散；（ii）政府基金投资于事前业绩信号较弱的企业，但这些企业的增长率超过了私人基金投资的企业；（iii）私人风险投资基金跟随政府风险投资，特别是当本地政府基金直接投资于事前业绩信号较弱的企业时。我们根据风险投资基金克服信息摩擦的传统角色以及中国独特的制度环境（包括重要的流动性和信息摩擦）来解释这些模式。

papers.title: Moral Hazard and Unemployment in Competitive Equilibrium
papers.authors: Patrick Rey, Joseph E. Stiglitz
papers.abstract: Principal-agent models take outside options, determining participation and incentive constraints, as given. We construct a general equilibrium model where workers’ reservation wages and the maximum punishment acceptable before workers quit are instead determined endogenously. We simultaneously extend the standard effort efficiency-wage model by incorporating noisy signals, labor market frictions, and the possibility of performance-based pay, analyzing the equilibrium response to an adverse signal, and establishing conditions under which equilibrium entails lowering wages (performance contracting) rather than firing. We provide a complete analysis of the general equilibrium comparative statics, showing, for instance, that frictions (sand-in-the-wheels) may decrease unemployment and that the equilibrium is determined by two simple aggregates which depend on the parameters of the economy, interpretable as the intercept and slope of a pseudo-labor supply curve, embedding all the binding constraints (e.g., the no-shirking and labor market participation constraints). We also show that there may exist only a firing equilibrium, a no-firing equilibrium, multiple (firing and no-firing) equilibria, and no pure-strategy equilibrium. The economy is, in general, not efficient either in the selection of the form of equilibrium or the wages paid within any type of equilibrium. We discuss welfare enhancing government interventions, including publicly provided sand-in-the-wheels.
papers.meta: Programs：LS；JEL：D82, D86, E24, J31, J41, J63, J64
papers.zh_title: 竞争均衡中的道德风险与失业
papers.zh_abstract: 委托代理模型将决定参与约束和激励约束的外部选择视为给定。我们构建了一个一般均衡模型，其中工人的保留工资和工人辞职前可接受的最大惩罚是内生的。我们同时通过引入噪声信号、劳动力市场摩擦以及基于绩效的薪酬可能性，扩展了标准的努力效率工资模型，分析了均衡对不利信号的反应，并建立了均衡是降低工资（绩效合同）而非解雇的条件。我们提供了对一般均衡比较静态的完整分析，例如，表明摩擦（齿轮中的沙子）可能降低失业率，并且均衡由两个简单的总量决定，这两个总量取决于经济参数，可解释为伪劳动力供给曲线的截距和斜率，其中嵌入了所有约束条件（例如，不偷懒约束和劳动力市场参与约束）。我们还表明，可能只存在解雇均衡、不解雇均衡、多重（解雇和不解雇）均衡，以及不存在纯策略均衡。经济在均衡形式的选择或任何类型均衡内支付的工资方面，通常都不是有效率的。我们讨论了增进福利的政府干预，包括公共提供的“齿轮中的沙子”。

papers.title: How Do You Find a Good Manager?
papers.authors: Ben Weidmann, Joseph Vecci, Farah Said, David J. Deming, Sonia R. Bhalotra
papers.abstract: This paper develops a novel method to identify the causal contribution of managers to team performance. The method requires repeated random assignment of managers to multiple teams and controls for individuals’ skills. A good manager is someone who consistently causes their team to produce more than the sum of their parts. Good managers have roughly twice the impact on team performance as good workers. People who nominate themselves to be in charge perform worse than managers appointed by lottery, in part because self-promoted managers are overconfident, especially about their social skills. Managerial performance is positively predicted by economic decision-making skill and fluid intelligence – but not gender, age, or ethnicity. Selecting managers on skills rather than demographics or preferences for leadership could substantially increase organizational productivity.
papers.zh_title: 如何找到一位好经理？
papers.zh_abstract: 本文开发了一种新颖的方法来识别管理者对团队绩效的因果贡献。该方法要求将管理者重复随机分配到多个团队，并控制个人技能。一位好经理是指那些始终能使其团队产出超过其成员个人能力总和的人。好经理对团队绩效的影响大约是优秀员工的两倍。自荐担任管理者的人的表现比通过抽签任命的管理者更差，部分原因是自荐的管理者过度自信，尤其是在社交技能方面。管理绩效与经济决策技能和流体智力呈正相关——但与性别、年龄或种族无关。根据技能而非人口统计特征或领导偏好来选择管理者，可以显著提高组织生产力。

papers.title: Intellectual Property and Creative Machines
papers.authors: Gaétan de Rassenfosse, Adam B. Jaffe, Joel Waldfogel
papers.abstract: The arrival of creative machines—software capable of producing human-like creative content—has triggered a series of legal challenges about intellectual property. The outcome of these legal challenges will shape the future of the creative industry in ways that could enhance or jeopardize welfare. Policymakers are already tasked with creating regulations for a post-generative AI creative industry. Economics may offer valuable insights, and this paper is our attempt to contribute to the discussion. We identify the main economic issues and propose a framework and some tools for thinking about them.
papers.zh_title: 知识产权与创意机器
papers.zh_abstract: 创意机器——能够生成类似人类创意内容的软件——的出现引发了一系列关于知识产权的法律挑战。这些法律挑战的结果将以可能增强或损害福利的方式塑造创意产业的未来。政策制定者已经面临为后生成式人工智能创意产业制定法规的任务。经济学可能提供有价值的见解，本文是我们为这一讨论做出贡献的尝试。我们识别了主要的经济问题，并提出了一个框架和一些思考工具。

papers.title: Changing Opportunity: Sociological Mechanisms Underlying Growing Class Gaps and Shrinking Race Gaps in Economic Mobility
papers.authors: Raj Chetty, Will S. Dobbie, Benjamin Goldman, Sonya Porter, Crystal Yang
papers.abstract: We show that intergenerational mobility changed rapidly by race and class in recent decades in the U.S. and study the causal mechanisms underlying those changes. Between the 1978 and 1992 birth cohorts, earnings increased for white children from high-income families relative to white children from low-income families, increasing earnings gaps by parental income (“class”) by 30%. Earnings increased for Black children at all parental income levels, reducing white-Black earnings gaps for children from low-income families by 30%. Class gaps grew and race gaps shrank similarly for non-monetary outcomes such as educational attainment, standardized test scores, and mortality rates. Using a quasi-experimental design, we show that the divergent trends in economic mobility were caused by differential changes in childhood environments, as proxied by parental employment rates, within local communities defined by race, class, and childhood county. Outcomes improve across birth cohorts for children who grow up in communities with increasing parental employment rates, with larger effects for children who move to such communities at younger ages. Children’s outcomes are most strongly related to the parental employment rates of peers they are more likely to interact with, such as those in their own birth cohort, suggesting that the relationship between children’s outcomes and parental employment rates is mediated by social interaction.
papers.zh_title: 变化中的机会：美国经济流动性中阶级差距扩大与种族差距缩小的社会学机制
papers.zh_abstract: 我们展示了近几十年来美国代际流动性按种族和阶级划分的快速变化，并研究了这些变化背后的因果机制。在1978年至1992年出生队列之间，高收入家庭白人子女的收入相对于低收入家庭白人子女有所增加，这使得按父母收入（“阶级”）划分的收入差距扩大了30%。所有父母收入水平的黑人子女收入均有所增加，这使得低收入家庭子女的白人-黑人收入差距缩小了30%。对于非货币性结果，如教育程度、标准化考试分数和死亡率，阶级差距扩大和种族差距缩小的趋势类似。利用准实验设计，我们表明经济流动性的不同趋势是由童年环境（以父母就业率为代理变量）在按种族、阶级和童年县定义的本地社区内的差异化变化所导致的。在父母就业率不断提高的社区长大的儿童，其跨出生队列的结果有所改善，并且对于在更年轻时搬到此类社区的儿童影响更大。儿童的结果与他们更有可能互动的同龄人（例如同出生队列的同龄人）的父母就业率关系最为密切，这表明儿童结果与父母就业率之间的关系是由社会互动所中介的。

papers.title: Navigating Software Vulnerabilities: Eighteen Years of Evidence from Medium and Large U.S. Organizations
papers.authors: Raviv Murciano-Goroff, Ran Zhuo, Shane Greenstein
papers.abstract: How prevalent are severe software vulnerabilities, how fast do software users respond to the availability of secure versions, and what determines the variance in the installation distribution? Using the largest dataset ever assembled on user updates, tracking server software updates by over 150,000 medium and large U.S. organizations between 2000 and 2018, this study finds widespread usage of server software with known vulnerabilities, with 57% of organizations using software with severe security vulnerabilities even when secure versions were available. The study estimates several different reduced-form models to examine which organization characteristics correlate with higher vulnerability prevalence and which update characteristics causally explain higher responsiveness to the releases of secure versions. The disclosure of severe vulnerability fixes in software updates does not jolt all organizations into installing them. Factors related to the cost of updating, such as whether the software is hosted on a cloud-based platform and whether the update is an incremental change or a major overhaul, play an important role. Observables cannot easily explain much variation. These findings suggest that there could be high returns to incorporating organizations' relative (in)attentiveness to act on software update releases into the design of cybersecurity policies.
papers.zh_title: 应对软件漏洞：来自美国大中型组织的十八年证据
papers.zh_abstract: 严重软件漏洞有多普遍？软件用户对安全版本可用性的响应速度有多快？安装分布差异的决定因素是什么？本研究使用了有史以来最大的用户更新数据集，追踪了2000年至2018年间超过15万家美国大中型组织的服务器软件更新，发现已知漏洞的服务器软件使用非常普遍，即使安全版本可用时，仍有57%的组织使用存在严重安全漏洞的软件。本研究估计了几种不同的简化形式模型，以考察哪些组织特征与更高的漏洞流行率相关，以及哪些更新特征在因果上解释了组织对安全版本发布的更高响应性。软件更新中严重漏洞修复的披露并未促使所有组织立即安装。与更新成本相关的因素，例如软件是否托管在云平台上以及更新是增量更改还是重大改革，起着重要作用。可观测变量难以轻易解释大部分变异。这些发现表明，将组织对软件更新发布的相对（不）关注度纳入网络安全政策设计可能会带来高回报。

papers.title: An Engine of (Pay) Growth? Productivity and Wages in the UK Auto Industry
papers.authors: Agnes Norris Keiller, Tim Obermeier, Andreas Teichgraeber, John Van Reenen
papers.abstract: When labour market competition is imperfect, positive industry (and firm) productivity shocks can be passed through to workers in the form of higher wages. We document how the UK auto industry, following a period of decline, experienced a four-decade-long productivity boom. There was a thirteen-fold increase in real output per worker between 1980 and 2018, compared to a four-fold increase in manufacturing. Greater foreign ownership, tougher competition and improved industrial relations all likely played a role. The greater use of intermediate inputs (outsourcing) and growing capital intensity account for most of this growth, but we estimate that TFP still grew three times as fast in the auto industry than the rest of manufacturing. Examining whether this productivity increase has been shared with employees, we find that auto workers experienced far stronger hourly wage growth than workers in the rest of manufacturing. After controlling for individual fixed effects, the auto wage premium relative to the rest of manufacturing doubled from 8% in the 1980s to 17% in the 2010s. Interpreted through the lens of a rent sharing model, we estimate that most of the wage increase (63% in the baseline case) can be accounted for by the auto productivity boom. In contrast, the bargaining power of UK auto workers seems to have fallen. If worker power had held up at the 1980s level, the wage premium would have been about 38% higher in the 2010s.
papers.zh_title: （薪酬）增长的引擎？英国汽车行业的生产率与工资
papers.zh_abstract: 当劳动力市场竞争不完善时，积极的行业（和企业）生产率冲击可以通过提高工资的形式传导给工人。我们记录了英国汽车行业在经历了一段衰退期后，如何迎来了长达四十年的生产率繁荣。1980年至2018年间，实际人均产出增长了13倍，而制造业整体增长了4倍。更高的外资所有权、更激烈的竞争以及改善的劳资关系都可能发挥了作用。中间投入（外包）的更多使用和不断增长的资本密集度解释了大部分增长，但我们估计汽车行业的全要素生产率（TFP）增长速度仍是制造业其他部分的三倍。通过考察这种生产率增长是否与员工共享，我们发现汽车工人的小时工资增长远强于制造业其他部门的工人。在控制个体固定效应后，相对于制造业其他部门，汽车行业的工资溢价从1980年代的8%翻倍至2010年代的17%。通过租金分享模型的视角进行解读，我们估计大部分工资增长（基准情况下为63%）可以由汽车行业的生产率繁荣来解释。相比之下，英国汽车工人的议价能力似乎有所下降。如果工人的议价能力保持在1980年代的水平，那么2010年代的工资溢价将高出约38%。

papers.title: Trends in Competition in the United States: What Does the Evidence Show?
papers.authors: Carl Shapiro, Ali Yurukoglu
papers.abstract: Has the United States economy become less competitive in recent decades? One might think so based on a body of research that has rapidly become influential for antitrust policy. We explain that the empirical evidence relating to concentration trends, markup trends, and the effects of mergers does not actually show a widespread decline in competition. Nor does it provide a basis for dramatic changes in antitrust policy. To the contrary, in many respects the evidence indicates that the changes observed in a number of industries are likely to reflect competition in action. We highlight research that points to targeted interventions that can enable antitrust enforcement policy to better promote and protect competition. Throughout the paper, we identify open questions and opportunities for future research in the cross-industry evidence-at-scale paradigm, the industry-specific study paradigm, and their intersection.
papers.zh_title: 美国竞争趋势：证据表明了什么？
papers.zh_abstract: 美国经济在近几十年是否变得不那么具有竞争力？基于一项迅速影响反垄断政策的研究，人们可能会这样认为。我们解释，与集中度趋势、加成率趋势以及并购效应相关的实证证据实际上并未显示竞争普遍下降，也未为反垄断政策的剧烈变革提供依据。相反，在许多方面，证据表明在多个行业中观察到的变化很可能反映了竞争的实际运作。我们重点介绍了那些指向针对性干预措施的研究，这些措施可以使反垄断执法政策更好地促进和保护竞争。在整篇论文中，我们指出了跨行业大规模证据范式、特定行业研究范式及其交叉领域中尚未解决的问题和未来研究的机会。

papers.title: How Much Will Global Warming Cool Global Growth?
papers.authors: Ishan B. Nath, Valerie A. Ramey, Peter J. Klenow
papers.abstract: Does a permanent rise in temperature decrease the level or growth rate of GDP in affected countries? Differing answers to this question lead prominent estimates of climate damages to diverge by an order of magnitude. This paper combines indirect evidence on economic growth with new empirical estimates of the dynamic effects of temperature on GDP to argue that warming has persistent, but not permanent, effects on growth. We start by presenting a range of evidence that technology flows tether country growth rates together, preventing temperature changes from causing growth rates to diverge permanently. We then use data from a panel of countries to show that temperature shocks have large and persistent effects on GDP, driven in part by persistence in temperature itself. These estimates imply projected future impacts that are three to five times larger than level effect estimates and two to four times smaller than permanent growth effect estimates, with larger discrepancies for initially hot and cold countries.
papers.zh_title: 全球变暖将在多大程度上冷却全球增长？
papers.zh_abstract: 气温的永久性上升是否会降低受影响国家的GDP水平或增长率？对这个问题的不同回答导致对气候损害的主要估计相差一个数量级。本文结合关于经济增长的间接证据与温度对GDP动态影响的新实证估计，论证了变暖对增长具有持续性但非永久性的影响。我们首先提出一系列证据，表明技术流动将各国增长率联系在一起，阻止温度变化导致增长率永久性分化。然后，我们使用跨国面板数据表明，温度冲击对GDP具有巨大且持续的影响，这部分是由温度本身的持续性驱动的。这些估计得出的未来影响预测是水平效应估计的三到五倍，是永久增长效应估计的二到四分之一，且对于最初炎热和寒冷国家之间的差异更大。

papers.title: Limits on Regret as a Tool for Incentive Design
papers.authors: Felipe Araujo, Alex Imas, Alistair Wilson
papers.abstract: We demonstrate the pitfalls when extrapolating behavioral findings across different contexts and decision environments. We focus on regret theory and the use of “regret lotteries” for motivating behavior change. Here, findings from one-shot settings have been used to promote regret as a tool to boost incentives in recurrent decisions across many settings. Using theory and experiments, we replicate regret lotteries as the superior one-shot incentive; however, for repeated decisions the comparative static is entirely reversed. Moreover, the effects are extremely sensitive to details of regret implementation. Our results suggest caution should be used when designing incentive schemes that exploit regret.
papers.zh_title: 后悔作为激励设计工具的限制
papers.zh_abstract: 我们展示了在不同情境和决策环境中推断行为发现时的陷阱。我们聚焦于后悔理论和利用“后悔彩票”来激励行为改变。在此，一次性情境中的发现已被用来推广后悔作为增强许多情境中重复决策激励的工具。通过理论和实验，我们复制了后悔彩票作为优越的一次性激励；然而，对于重复决策，比较静态完全逆转。此外，这些效应对后悔实施细节极为敏感。我们的结果表明，在设计利用后悔的激励方案时应谨慎。

papers.title: Estimating the Potential Impact of Combined Race and Ethnicity Reporting on Long-Term Earnings Statistics
papers.authors: Kevin L. McKinney, John M. Abowd
papers.abstract: We use place of birth information from the Social Security Administration linked to earnings data from the Longitudinal Employer-Household Dynamics Program and detailed race and ethnicity data from the 2010 Census to study how long-term earnings differentials vary by place of birth for different self-identified race and ethnicity categories. We focus on foreign-born persons from countries that are heavily Hispanic and from countries in the Middle East and North Africa (MENA). We find substantial heterogeneity of long-term earnings differentials within country of birth, some of which will be difficult to detect when the reporting format changes from the current two-question version to the new single-question version because they depend on self-identifications that place the individual in two distinct categories within the single-question format, specifically, Hispanic and White or Black, and MENA and White or Black. We also study the USA-born children of these same immigrants. Long-term earnings differences for the 2nd generation also vary as a function of self-identified ethnicity and race in ways that changing to the single-question format could affect.
papers.zh_title: 估计种族与族裔合并报告对长期收入统计的潜在影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用社会保障管理局的出生地信息，结合纵向雇主-家庭动态计划的收入数据以及2010年人口普查详细的种族和族裔数据，研究对于不同自我认同的种族和族裔类别，长期收入差异如何因出生地而异。我们重点关注来自高度西班牙裔国家以及中东和北非国家的国外出生者。我们发现，在出生国内部，长期收入差异存在显著的异质性，其中一些差异在报告格式从当前的双问题版本变为新的单问题版本时将难以检测，因为它们依赖于自我认同，这种认同在单问题格式中将个体置于两个不同的类别中，具体而言，西班牙裔与白人或黑人，以及中东和北非裔与白人或黑人。我们还研究了这些移民在美国出生的子女。第二代人的长期收入差异也因自我认同的族裔和种族而异，其方式可能受到改为单问题格式的影响。

papers.title: Quantitative Tightening with Slow-Moving Capital
papers.authors: Zhengyang Jiang, Jialu Sun
papers.abstract: We document shifts in investor composition during quantitative tightening, which suggest that investors adjust their portfolios at different speeds. To understand its implications for bond valuation, we develop a general equilibrium model which highlights the dynamic interaction between heterogeneous investors. In the model, long-term investors have higher risk-taking capacity, but face a portfolio adjustment cost; liquidity traders have lower risk-taking capacity, but can trade freely. Our model predicts a novel overshooting pattern: when the central bank unwinds its bond purchase, slow adjustment by long-term investors requires liquidity traders to absorb the imbalance, who demand a higher risk premium that creates excessive bond price decline and volatility in the short run. As a result, quantitative tightening is not simply a symmetric reversal of quantitative easing.
papers.zh_title: 缓慢移动资本下的量化紧缩
papers.zh_abstract: 我们记录了量化紧缩期间投资者构成的转变，这表明投资者以不同速度调整其投资组合。为了理解其对债券估值的影响，我们开发了一个一般均衡模型，该模型强调了异质性投资者之间的动态互动。在该模型中，长期投资者具有更高的风险承担能力，但面临投资组合调整成本；流动性交易者风险承担能力较低，但可以自由交易。我们的模型预测了一种新颖的过度调整模式：当中央银行缩减其债券购买时，长期投资者的缓慢调整要求流动性交易者吸收失衡，后者要求更高的风险溢价，从而在短期内造成过度的债券价格下跌和波动。因此，量化紧缩并非量化宽松的简单对称逆转。

papers.title: Elephants in Equity Markets
papers.authors: Hélène Rey, Adrien Rousset Planat, Vania Stavrakeva, Jenny Tang
papers.abstract: We introduce a novel empirical market-clearing–based decomposition of equity price growth. Using sample holdings covering only an average of 6% of market capitalization, we account for, on average, 88% of time variation in over 22,000 individual stock prices and 95% of fluctuations in 33 aggregate stock indices. Changes in portfolio weights contribute most to the variance of individual stock prices, while “safe haven” markets feature strong cross-stock substitution patterns that leave aggregate portfolio weight changes uncorrelated with aggregate indices. Equity markets are global and exchange rates play a key equilibrating role. We find that the behavior of active funds’ portfolio managers has a causal effect on stock prices by transmitting firm-specific news. Similarly, final funds’ investors play a key role in transmitting macroeconomic and risk aversion news to stock prices.
papers.zh_title: 股票市场中的大象
papers.zh_abstract: 我们引入了一种新颖的基于实证市场出清的股票价格增长分解方法。使用仅覆盖平均6%市值的样本持仓，我们平均解释了超过22,000只个股价格时间变动的88%，以及33个股票综合指数波动的95%。投资组合权重的变化对个股价格方差贡献最大，而“避风港”市场则表现出强烈的跨股票替代模式，使得总体投资组合权重变化与综合指数不相关。股票市场是全球性的，汇率起着关键的均衡作用。我们发现，主动型基金投资组合经理的行为通过传递公司特定新闻对股票价格产生因果影响。同样，最终基金投资者在将宏观经济和风险厌恶新闻传递至股票价格方面发挥着关键作用。

papers.title: Mobilizing the Manpower of Mothers: Childcare under the Lanham Act during WWII
papers.authors: Joseph P. Ferrie, Claudia Goldin, Claudia Olivetti
papers.abstract: The Lanham Act was a federal infrastructure bill passed by Congress in 1940 and eventually used to fund programs for the preschool and school-aged children of working women during WWII. It remains, to this day, the only example in US history of an (almost) universal, largely federally supported childcare program. We explore its role in enabling and increasing the labor supply of mothers during WWII using information on the program, war contracts, and employment at the city level. Use of Lanham Act funds for a wartime childcare program was initially controversial. However, the program was eventually well funded per child in average daily attendance and provided generally high-quality care. But it was late to start, limited in scope, and incapable of greatly increasing women’s employment in the aggregate. Childcare facilities were funded more in places that already had higher participation rates of mothers and where the wartime need was the greatest. The impact on the children served is still to be determined.
papers.zh_title: 动员母亲劳动力：二战期间《兰哈姆法案》下的儿童保育
papers.zh_abstract: 《兰哈姆法案》是国会于1940年通过的一项联邦基础设施法案，最终用于资助二战期间职业女性的学龄前和学龄儿童保育项目。至今，它仍是美国历史上唯一一个（几乎）普及的、主要由联邦支持的儿童保育项目的例子。我们利用该项目的相关信息、战时合同以及城市层面的就业数据，探讨其在二战期间促进和增加母亲劳动力供给方面的作用。使用《兰哈姆法案》资金用于战时儿童保育项目最初存在争议。然而，该项目最终按日均出勤人数计算，每个儿童获得了充足的资金，并提供了普遍高质量的保育服务。但它启动较晚、范围有限，且无法大幅提高总体女性就业率。儿童保育设施更多地是在那些母亲劳动参与率已经较高以及战时需求最大的地方获得资助。对受保育儿童的影响仍有待确定。

papers.title: Filtering with Limited Information
papers.authors: Thorsten Drautzburg, Jesús Fernández-Villaverde, Pablo A. Guerrón-Quintana, Dick Oosthuizen
papers.abstract: We propose a new tool to filter non-linear dynamic models that does not require the researcher to specify the model fully and can be implemented without solving the model. If two conditions are satisfied, we can use a flexible statistical model and a known measurement equation to back out the hidden states of the dynamic model. The first condition is that the state is sufficiently volatile or persistent to be recoverable. The second condition requires the possibly non-linear measurement to be sufficiently smooth and to map uniquely to the state absent measurement error. We illustrate the method through various simulation studies and an empirical application to a sudden stops model applied to Mexican data.
papers.zh_title: 有限信息下的滤波
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种新的工具来滤波非线性动态模型，该工具不需要研究者完全指定模型，并且可以在不求解模型的情况下实施。如果满足两个条件，我们可以使用灵活的统计模型和已知的测量方程来反推出动态模型的隐藏状态。第一个条件是状态变量具有足够的波动性或持续性以便可恢复。第二个条件要求可能非线性的测量函数足够平滑，并且在无测量误差的情况下唯一地映射到状态变量。我们通过各种模拟研究以及一个应用于墨西哥数据的突然停止模型实证应用来说明该方法。

papers.title: Constructing BEA Highways and Streets Net Wealth Stocks with Detailed Types of Investment and Engineering-based Estimates of Depreciation
papers.authors: Barbara M. Fraumeni, Robert Kornfeld
papers.abstract: This paper builds on a previous paper by the authors (Kornfeld and Fraumeni, 2022) that primarily used U.S. Federal Highway Administration Highway Statistics data to disaggregate investment in highways and streets into more detailed types to produce updated estimates of net wealth stocks and depreciation. In this paper, major components of highways and streets other than pavement: grading, bridges and other structures, traffic management, safety, and environmental, are set equal to comprehensive revision updated versions of those derived in the earlier paper. All capital outlays, including those for pavement, and non-pavement net wealth stocks, are controlled to current BEA estimates. The engineering-based depreciation patterns are very dissimilar to the BEA patterns. The engineering-based net wealth pavement stock depreciation patterns fall from an efficiency level of about 0.055 to zero after 20 years of life; the BEA Hulten-Wykoff-based net wealth pavement stock depreciation patterns are at approximately the same efficiency level after 62 years, with a positive efficiency level continuing to infinity. BEA adopted Hulten-Wykoff default depreciation rates in the absence of other information (Fraumeni, 1997), however research by Fraumeni established engineering-based Picher pavement depreciation rates for highways and streets (Fraumeni, 1999, 2007).
papers.zh_title: 构建BEA公路与街道净财富存量：基于详细投资类型与工程折旧估算
papers.zh_abstract: 本文在作者前期论文（Kornfeld and Fraumeni, 2022）基础上展开，该前期论文主要利用美国联邦公路管理局《公路统计》数据，将公路与街道投资细分为更详细的类型，以更新净财富存量与折旧的估算。本文中，除路面外的公路与街道主要组成部分——路基、桥梁及其他结构、交通管理、安全与环境——均设定为与前期论文推导结果经全面修订更新后的版本一致。所有资本支出（包括路面支出）及非路面净财富存量均受当前BEA估算值的控制。基于工程的折旧模式与BEA模式差异显著。基于工程的路面净财富存量折旧模式在20年使用寿命后从约0.055的效率水平降至零；而基于Hulten-Wykoff方法的BEA路面净财富存量折旧模式在62年后仍保持大致相同的效率水平，且正效率水平持续至无穷。BEA在缺乏其他信息时采用了Hulten-Wykoff默认折旧率（Fraumeni, 1997），但Fraumeni的研究已为公路与街道确立了基于工程的Picher路面折旧率（Fraumeni, 1999, 2007）。

papers.title: Adjusting Labor Along The Intensive Margins
papers.authors: Daniel S. Hamermesh, Jeff Biddle
papers.abstract: We expand the analysis of cyclical changes in labor demand by decomposing changes along the intensive margin into those in days/week and in hours/day. Using large cross sections of U.S. data, 1985-2018, we observe around 1/4 of the adjustment in weekly hours occurring through changing days/week. There is no adjustment of days/week in manufacturing; but 1/3 of the adjustment outside manufacturing occurs through days/week. The desirability of bunched leisure implies that secular shifts away from manufacturing have contributed to increasing economic welfare.
papers.zh_title: 劳动集约边际的调整
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过将集约边际的变化分解为每周工作天数和每天工作小时数，扩展了对劳动力需求周期性变化的分析。利用1985-2018年美国大规模横截面数据，我们观察到每周工作小时数调整中约有四分之一是通过改变每周工作天数实现的。制造业中不存在每周工作天数的调整；但制造业以外部门中，三分之一的调整是通过每周工作天数实现的。集中休闲的合意性表明，远离制造业的长期结构性转变有助于提高经济福利。

papers.title: Social Insurance Spillovers: Evidence From Paid Sick Leave Mandates and Workers' Compensation
papers.authors: Xiuming Dong, Johanna Catherine Maclean, David Powell
papers.abstract: Social insurance programs shield individuals from specific risks, but these programs are not necessarily independent of each other. The existence and scope of one program can potentially influence the use of others, especially when the risks covered by the programs are related. This study investigates the relationship between two mandated benefit programs in the United States: state paid sick leave (PSL) mandates and workers’ compensation. Unlike most developed countries, the U.S. lacks a federal PSL mandate; however, 15 states have implemented such policies. PSL mandates require firms to provide compensated time off for employee health-related needs, while workers’ compensation offers benefits to help workers recover from workplace injuries or illnesses. Using a difference-in-differences analysis, the study explores the impact of state PSL mandates on the usage of workers’ compensation benefits. The findings reveal meaningful spillover effects: when states adopt PSL requirements, there is a decrease in workers’ compensation benefit receipt. While some evidence suggests possible improvements in health, there are no observed reductions in workplace injury rates specifically, indicating that workers may substitute PSL benefits directly for workers’ compensation.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LE, LS, PE；JEL：I18, J28, J32
papers.zh_title: 社会保险的溢出效应：来自带薪病假强制令与工伤保险的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 社会保险计划保护个人免受特定风险，但这些计划之间并非相互独立。一个计划的存在和范围可能影响其他计划的使用，尤其是当这些计划覆盖的风险相互关联时。本研究探讨了美国两项强制性福利计划之间的关系：州级带薪病假强制令与工伤保险。与大多数发达国家不同，美国缺乏联邦层面的带薪病假强制令；然而，已有15个州实施了此类政策。带薪病假强制令要求企业为员工因健康需求提供带薪休假，而工伤保险则为工人因工伤或职业病恢复提供福利。通过双重差分分析，本研究考察了州级带薪病假强制令对工伤保险福利使用的影响。研究结果揭示了显著的溢出效应：当各州实施带薪病假要求时，工伤保险福利的领取有所减少。虽然部分证据表明健康状况可能有所改善，但并未观察到工伤率的特定下降，这表明工人可能直接用带薪病假福利替代了工伤保险。

papers.title: The Micro and Macro Productivity of Nations
papers.authors: Stephen Ayerst, Duc M. Nguyen, Diego Restuccia
papers.abstract: We examine aggregate productivity differences across nations using cross-country firm-level data and a quantitative model of production heterogeneity with distortions featuring operation decisions (selection) and productivity-enhancing investments (technology). Empirically, less developed countries feature higher distortions and larger dispersion in firm-level productivity, mostly resulting from the higher prevalence of unproductive firms. Quantitatively, measured cross-country differences in the elasticity of distortions with respect to firm productivity generate the bulk of empirical patterns and over two-thirds of cross-country labor productivity differences. Both selection and technology channels are important. Variation in static misallocation also plays an important role, albeit smaller.
papers.zh_title: 国家的微观与宏观生产率
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用跨国企业层面数据以及一个包含扭曲、运营决策（选择）和生产率提升投资（技术）的生产异质性定量模型，考察了各国间的总体生产率差异。实证发现，欠发达国家具有更高的扭曲程度和更大的企业层面生产率离散度，这主要源于低生产率企业的更高普遍性。定量分析表明，所测度的跨国扭曲弹性（相对于企业生产率）差异，解释了大部分实证模式以及超过三分之二的跨国劳动生产率差异。选择和技术渠道均至关重要。静态错配的变动也发挥了重要作用，尽管程度较小。

papers.title: The Graduation Part II: Graduate School Graduation Rates
papers.authors: Jeffrey T. Denning, Lesley J. Turner
papers.abstract: This paper documents several facts about graduate program graduation rates using administrative data covering public and nonprofit graduate students in Texas. Despite conventional wisdom that most graduate students complete their programs, only 58 percent of who started their program in 2004 graduated within 6 years. Between the 2004 and 2013 entering cohorts, graduate student completion rates grew by 10 percentage points. Graduation rates vary widely by field of study--ranging from an average of 81 percent for law programs to 53 percent for education programs. We also find large differences in graduation rates across institutions. On average, 72 percent of students who entered programs in flagship public universities graduated in 6 years compared to only 57 percent of those who entered programs in non-research intensive (non-R1) institutions. Graduate students who do not complete may face negative consequences due to lower average earnings and substantial levels of student debt.
papers.zh_title: 毕业之续篇：研究生院毕业率
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用涵盖德克萨斯州公立及非营利研究生群体的行政数据，记录了关于研究生项目毕业率的若干事实。尽管普遍认为大多数研究生能完成学业，但2004年入学的研究生中仅有58%在六年内毕业。从2004年至2013年的入学队列来看，研究生完成率增长了10个百分点。毕业率因学科领域而异——从法律项目的平均81%到教育项目的53%不等。我们还发现不同院校间的毕业率存在巨大差异。平均而言，进入旗舰公立大学项目的学生中有72%在六年内毕业，而进入非研究密集型（非R1）院校项目的学生中这一比例仅为57%。未完成学业的研究生可能因较低的平均收入和大量学生债务而面临负面后果。

papers.title: Nonlinear Dynamics in Menu Cost Economies? Evidence from U.S. Data
papers.authors: Andrés Blanco, Corina Boar, Callum J. Jones, Virgiliu Midrigan
papers.abstract: We show that standard menu cost models cannot simultaneously reproduce the dispersion in the size of micro-price changes and the extent to which the fraction of price changes increases with inflation in the U.S. time-series. Though the Golosov and Lucas (2007) model generates fluctuations in the fraction of price changes, it predicts too little dispersion in the size of price changes and therefore little monetary non-neutrality. In contrast, versions of the model that reproduce the dispersion in the size of price changes and generate stronger monetary non-neutrality predict a nearly constant fraction of price changes.
papers.zh_title: 菜单成本经济中的非线性动态？来自美国数据的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们证明，标准菜单成本模型无法同时再现美国时间序列中微观价格变动规模的离散程度以及价格变动比例随通胀上升而增加的程度。尽管Golosov和Lucas（2007）模型产生了价格变动比例的波动，但它预测的价格变动规模离散度过小，因此货币非中性程度较弱。相反，能够再现价格变动规模离散度并产生更强货币非中性的模型版本，则预测价格变动比例几乎恒定。

papers.title: The Impact of Incarceration on Employment, Earnings, and Tax Filing
papers.authors: Andrew Garin, Dmitri K. Koustas, Carl McPherson, Samuel Norris, Matthew Pecenco, Evan K. Rose, Yotam Shem-Tov, Jeffrey Weaver
papers.abstract: We study the effect of incarceration on wages, self-employment, and taxes and transfers in North Carolina and Ohio using two quasi-experimental research designs: discontinuities in sentencing guidelines and random assignment to judges. Across both states, incarceration generates short-term drops in economic activity while individuals remain in prison. As a result, a year-long sentence decreases cumulative earnings over five years by 13%. Beyond five years, however, there is no evidence of lower employment, wage earnings, or self-employment in either state, as well as among defendants with no prior incarceration history.
