papers.authors: Adam Bloomfield, Lucas Goodman, Manita Rao, Sita Slavov
papers.abstract: Several states have recently attempted to boost retirement saving by adopting “auto-IRA” policies that require employers not currently offering an employer-sponsored retirement plan (ESRP) to either (1) establish an ESRP or (2) enroll employees in state-facilitated Individual Retirement Accounts (IRAs). We identify the effect of these state policies on firm decisions to offer ESRPs, exploiting the phased rollout of these policy treatments across states and employer size categories. Using U.S. tax microdata, we estimate that about 17% of treated firms have been induced to offer an ESRP by these policies, although there is substantial heterogeneity in these effects across firm and worker characteristics. This effect is large considering that, for employers, establishing and maintaining an ESRP is more costly than utilizing the state-facilitated IRAs. We explore both rational and behavioral explanations for why firms might choose the higher-cost option to comply with state auto-IRA policies.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, LS, PE；JEL：D14, H75, J26, J32
papers.zh_title: 州自动IRA政策与企业行为：来自行政税收数据的教训
papers.zh_abstract: 几个州最近试图通过采用“自动IRA”政策来促进退休储蓄，这些政策要求目前不提供雇主赞助退休计划（ESRP）的雇主要么（1）建立ESRP，要么（2）让员工加入州政府推动的个人退休账户（IRA）。我们利用这些政策处理在各州和雇主规模类别中的分阶段推出，识别了这些州政策对企业提供ESRP决策的影响。使用美国税收微观数据，我们估计约有17%的受处理企业被这些政策诱导提供了ESRP，尽管这些效应在不同企业和工人特征之间存在显著的异质性。考虑到对雇主而言，建立和维护ESRP的成本高于使用州政府推动的IRA，这一效应是巨大的。我们探讨了企业为何可能选择成本更高的选项来遵守州自动IRA政策的理性和行为解释。

papers.title: Relative-Price Changes as Aggregate Supply Shocks Revisited: Theory and Evidence
papers.authors: Hassan Afrouzi, Saroj Bhattarai, Edson Wu
papers.abstract: We provide theory and evidence that relative price shocks can cause aggregate inflation and act as aggregate supply shocks. Empirically, we show that exogenous positive energy price shocks have a positive impact not only on headline but also on U.S. core inflation while depressing U.S. real activity. In a two-sector monetary model with upstream and downstream sectors and heterogeneous price stickiness, we analytically characterize how upstream shocks propagate to prices. Using panel IV local projections, we show that the responsiveness of sectoral PCE prices to energy price shocks is in line with model predictions. Motivated by post-COVID inflation in the U.S., a model experiment shows that a one-time relative price shock generates persistent movements in headline and core inflation similar to those observed in the data, even in the absence of aggregate slack. The model also emphasizes that monetary policy stance plays an important role in propagation of such shocks.
papers.zh_title: 作为总供给冲击的相对价格变化再探：理论与证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提供了相对价格冲击可能导致总体通胀并充当总供给冲击的理论和证据。实证上，我们表明外生的正向能源价格冲击不仅对美国总体通胀，而且对核心通胀产生正向影响，同时抑制美国实际经济活动。在一个包含上游和下游部门以及异质性价格粘性的两部门货币模型中，我们分析性地刻画了上游冲击如何传导至价格。使用面板工具变量局部投影法，我们表明部门PCE价格对能源价格冲击的反应与模型预测一致。受美国后疫情通胀的启发，一个模型实验表明，即使没有总体经济疲软，一次性的相对价格冲击也会产生与数据中观察到的类似的持续性总体和核心通胀变动。该模型还强调，货币政策立场在此类冲击的传导中扮演重要角色。

papers.title: Racial Housing Price Differentials and Neighborhood Segregation
papers.authors: Sebastien Box-Couillard, Peter Christensen
papers.abstract: We report evidence from the largest study of racial price differentials in the U.S. housing market, using a panel of 40 million repeat-sales transactions. We find\nthat price premiums facing Black and Hispanic homebuyers are ubiquitous and systematically higher in neighborhoods with a larger share of non-white residents.\nWe find that non-white buyers purchase at a premium when buying from sellers from outside their group. Consistent with predictions from theoretical models, we find higher premiums in supply-constrained markets. Leveraging exogenous variation in racial segregation, we find that racial segregation leads to larger price premiums paid by Black homebuyers.
papers.zh_title: 种族房价差异与社区隔离
papers.zh_abstract: 我们报告了美国住房市场中规模最大的种族价格差异研究证据，使用了包含4000万笔重复销售交易的面板数据。我们发现，黑人和西班牙裔购房者面临的价格溢价普遍存在，并且在非白人居民比例较高的社区中系统性更高。我们发现，非白人购房者从本群体以外的卖家处购房时支付了溢价。与理论模型的预测一致，我们发现供应受限的市场中溢价更高。利用种族隔离的外生变化，我们发现种族隔离导致黑人购房者支付更高的价格溢价。

papers.title: Unequal Uptake: Assessing Distributional Disparities in the Residential Solar Market
papers.authors: Jackson Dorsey, Derek C. Wolfson
papers.abstract: We examine technology adoption and consumer welfare disparities across demographic groups using data from an online solar photovoltaic (PV) marketplace. Low-income households are 25% less likely to purchase solar through the platform and obtain 53% lower expected consumer surplus than high-income households. Moreover, Black and Hispanic households are relatively less likely to purchase solar through the platform and obtain lower consumer surplus than White and Asian households. We develop a method to decompose the drivers of consumer welfare disparities between demographic groups. Differences in demand fully account for the consumer surplus disparities between high- and low-income households and between White and Hispanic households. However, supply-side factors explain 37% of the consumer surplus gap between White and Black households. Black households get relatively fewer bids and face higher prices, and installers have higher implied costs to serve them. Lastly, we assess counterfactuals that offer targeted price discounts to certain demographic groups.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, IO；JEL：D22, D44, D63, H23, L11, Q4, Q41, Q48
papers.zh_title: 不平等的采用：评估住宅太阳能市场中的分配差异
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用在线太阳能光伏市场的数据，考察了不同人口群体之间的技术采用和消费者福利差异。低收入家庭通过该平台购买太阳能的概率比高收入家庭低25%，获得的预期消费者剩余低53%。此外，黑人和西班牙裔家庭通过该平台购买太阳能的相对可能性较低，获得的消费者剩余也低于白人和亚裔家庭。我们开发了一种方法，用于分解不同人口群体之间消费者福利差异的驱动因素。需求差异完全解释了高收入与低收入家庭之间、以及白人与西班牙裔家庭之间的消费者剩余差异。然而，供给侧因素解释了白人与黑人家庭之间37%的消费者剩余差距。黑人家庭获得的报价相对较少，面临的价格更高，并且安装商为他们服务的隐含成本也更高。最后，我们评估了向特定人口群体提供针对性价格折扣的反事实情景。

papers.title: Intrapersonal Utility Comparisons as Interpersonal Utility Comparisons: Welfare, Ambiguity, and Robustness in Behavioral Policy Problems
papers.authors: Canishk Naik, Daniel Reck
papers.abstract: Inconsistent choice undermines the revealed preference foundations of traditional welfare economics, leading to controversy about policymaking in the presence of behavioral frictions. We model an optimal policy problem wherein a benevolent planner is uncertain which behavioral frame reveals normative preferences. We axiomatize welfarist criteria that are similar to social welfare functions, with intrapersonal frames replacing interpersonal types. Under paternalistic ambiguity aversion or paternalistic risk aversion, the planner values policies that are robust to normative uncertainty. We apply these welfarist criteria and robustness concepts in examples, including default options, manipulation of reference points, present focus, corrective taxation for internalities, and nudging.
papers.zh_title: 作为人际效用比较的个体内效用比较：行为政策问题中的福利、模糊性与稳健性
papers.zh_abstract: 不一致的选择削弱了传统福利经济学的显示偏好基础，导致在存在行为摩擦时关于政策制定的争议。我们建模了一个最优政策问题，其中一位仁慈的规划者不确定哪个行为框架揭示了规范性偏好。我们公理化了类似于社会福利函数的福利主义标准，用个体内框架取代了人际类型。在家长式模糊厌恶或家长式风险厌恶下，规划者重视对规范性不确定性具有稳健性的政策。我们在示例中应用了这些福利主义标准和稳健性概念，包括默认选项、参考点操纵、当前焦点、针对内部性的矫正税收以及助推。

papers.title: Measuring Potential Effects of Introducing the 2024 Race and Ethnicity Standards into the Current Population Survey
papers.authors: Mark Loewenstein, David Piccone, Anne Polivka
papers.abstract: When obtaining information on individuals’ race and ethnicity, the Current Population Survey (CPS) currently follows the 1997 OMB standards, which prescribes race and Hispanic ethnicity as distinct concepts that should be asked about in separate questions. In 2024, OMB updated the standards to stipulate that race and ethnicity be asked in one question and that a separate category be added to the single race and ethnicity question for Middle Eastern and North African. We examine the CPS microdata to tease out the effects that introduction of the 2024 standards might have on CPS labor force estimates across time. Our estimates show that individuals who indicate they are Middle Eastern or North African will likely be those who previously would have indicated that they are White, however their proportion of the population is small. In contrast, Hispanics make up a larger proportion of the population. “Other Race” responses in the CPS provide a lower bound estimate of the number of individuals who will identify as just Hispanic (Hispanic Alone) in a combined question while responses to the Hispanic ethnicity question provide an upper bound. Results from the Census Bureau’s National Content test suggest that the upper bound estimate is closer to the proportion of the population that will identify as Hispanic Alone, but there is insufficient information in the National Content test to determine how this will affect the various CPS labor force estimates. To address this issue, we calculate the labor force estimates corresponding to our lower and upper bounds However, we note that to obtain a more precise estimate of the effects changing the race and ethnicity questions on labor force estimates the two sets of questions should administered to the same respondents. One way of accomplishing this is to take advantage of the longitudinal aspect of the CPS. Individuals who initially provided their race and ethnicity using the 1997 standard questions can be asked their race and ethnicity using a combined question in subsequent months. An ongoing question is how the children of Hispanic immigrants who were born in the United States will view themselves. We therefore look at the tendency of individuals to identify as Hispanic because they were either born in a Hispanic country or were born in the U.S. but have one or two Hispanic parents.
papers.zh_title: 衡量将2024年种族与族裔标准引入当前人口调查的潜在影响
papers.zh_abstract: 在获取个人种族和族裔信息时，当前人口调查目前遵循1997年OMB标准，该标准规定种族和西班牙裔族裔应作为独立概念，在单独的问题中询问。2024年，OMB更新了标准，规定种族和族裔应在同一个问题中询问，并在单一的种族和族裔问题中为中东和北非增加一个单独类别。我们检查了CPS微观数据，以梳理引入2024年标准可能对CPS劳动力估计随时间产生的影响。我们的估计显示，表明自己是中东或北非的个人很可能之前会表明自己是白人，但他们在人口中的比例很小。相比之下，西班牙裔在人口中占更大比例。CPS中的“其他种族”回答提供了在合并问题中仅认同为西班牙裔的个人数量的下限估计，而西班牙裔族裔问题的回答则提供了上限估计。人口普查局全国内容测试的结果表明，上限估计更接近将认同为仅西班牙裔的人口比例，但全国内容测试中没有足够信息来确定这将如何影响各种CPS劳动力估计。为解决此问题，我们计算了对应于我们下限和上限的劳动力估计。然而，我们注意到，要更精确地估计改变种族和族裔问题对劳动力估计的影响，应向同一受访者同时询问这两套问题。实现此目的的一种方法是利用CPS的纵向特性。最初使用1997年标准问题提供种族和族裔信息的个人，可以在后续月份中被询问使用合并问题的种族和族裔。一个持续存在的问题是，在美国出生的西班牙裔移民子女将如何看待自己。因此，我们考察了个人因出生在西班牙裔国家或在美国出生但有一方或双方父母是西班牙裔而认同为西班牙裔的倾向。

papers.title: The Impact of Cloud Computing and AI on Industry Dynamics and Concentration
papers.authors: Yao Lu, Gordon M. Phillips, Jia Yang
papers.abstract: We examine the rise of cloud computing and AI in China and their impacts on industry dynamics after the shock to the cost of Internet-based computing power and services. We find that cloud computing is associated with an increase in firm entry, exit and the likelihood of M&A in industries that depend more on cloud infrastructure. Conversely, AI adoption has no impact on entry but reduces the likelihood of exit and M&A. Firm size plays a crucial role in these dynamics: cloud computing increases exit rates across all firms, while larger firms benefit from AI, experiencing reduced exit rates. Cloud computing decreases industry concentration but AI increases concentration. On the financing side, firms exposed to cloud computing increase equity and venture capital financing, while only large firms increase equity financing when exposed to AI.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, PR；JEL：D25, G3, G34, L20, L23, L25
papers.zh_title: 云计算与人工智能对行业动态和集中度的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了中国云计算和人工智能的兴起，以及它们对基于互联网的计算能力和服务成本冲击后行业动态的影响。我们发现，在更依赖云基础设施的行业中，云计算与企业进入、退出和并购可能性的增加相关。相反，人工智能的采用对进入没有影响，但降低了退出和并购的可能性。企业规模在这些动态中起着关键作用：云计算增加了所有企业的退出率，而大型企业从人工智能中受益，退出率降低。云计算降低了行业集中度，但人工智能提高了集中度。在融资方面，接触云计算的企业增加了股权和风险资本融资，而只有大型企业在接触人工智能时增加了股权融资。

papers.title: Macro-Financial Implications of the Surging Global Demand (and Supply) of International Reserves
papers.authors: Enrique G. Mendoza, Vincenzo Quadrini
papers.abstract: Research has shown that the unilateral accumulation of international reserves by a country can improve its own macro-financial stability. However, we show that when many countries accumulate reserves, the induced general equilibrium effects weaken financial and macroeconomic stability, especially for countries that do not accumulate reserves. The issuance of public debt by advanced economies has the opposite effect. We derive these results from a two-region model where private defaultable debt has a productive use. Quantitative counterfactuals show that the surge in reserves (public debt) contributed to reduce (increase) world interest rates but also to increase (reduce) private leverage. This in turn increased (decreased) volatility in both emerging and advanced economies.
papers.zh_title: 全球国际储备需求（和供给）激增的宏观金融影响
papers.zh_abstract: 研究表明，一国单方面积累国际储备可以改善其自身的宏观金融稳定性。然而，我们表明，当许多国家积累储备时，引发的总体均衡效应会削弱金融和宏观经济稳定性，特别是对于不积累储备的国家。发达经济体发行公共债务则产生相反的效果。我们从两区域模型中推导出这些结果，其中私人违约债务具有生产性用途。定量反事实分析表明，储备（公共债务）的激增有助于降低（提高）世界利率，但也增加了（减少了）私人杠杆。这反过来又增加了（减少了）新兴经济体和发达经济体的波动性。

papers.title: Looks and Gaming: Who and Why?
papers.authors: Andy Chung, Daniel S. Hamermesh, Carl Singleton, Zhengxin Wang, Junsen Zhang
papers.abstract: We investigate the relationship between physical attractiveness and the time people devote to video/computer gaming. Average American teenagers spend 2.6% of their waking hours gaming, while for adults this figure is 2.7%. Using the American Add Health Study, we show that adults who are better-looking have more close friends. Arguably, gaming is costlier for them, and they thus engage in less of it. Physically attractive teens are less likely to engage in gaming at all, whereas unattractive teens who do game spend more time each week on it than other gamers. Attractive adults are also less likely than others to spend any time gaming; and if they do, they spend less time on it than less attractive adults. Using the longitudinal nature of the Add Health Study, we find supportive evidence that these relationships are causal for adults: good looks decrease gaming time, not vice-versa.
papers.zh_title: 外貌与游戏：谁在玩以及为什么？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了外貌吸引力与人们投入视频/电脑游戏时间之间的关系。美国青少年平均花费其清醒时间的2.6%用于游戏，而成年人这一数字为2.7%。利用美国青少年健康纵向研究数据，我们表明外貌更佳的成年人拥有更多亲密朋友。可以说，游戏对他们而言成本更高，因此他们参与更少。外貌有吸引力的青少年完全参与游戏的可能性更低，而参与游戏的外貌不佳的青少年每周花费在游戏上的时间多于其他游戏玩家。外貌有吸引力的成年人也比其他人更不可能花费任何时间玩游戏；如果他们玩，花费的时间也少于外貌较差的成年人。利用青少年健康纵向研究的纵向性质，我们发现了支持性证据，表明这些关系对成年人而言是因果性的：良好的外貌减少了游戏时间，而非相反。

papers.title: Exchange Rate Models are Better than You Think, and Why They Didn't Work in the Old Days
papers.authors: Charles Engel, Steve P.Y. Wu
papers.abstract: Exchange-rate models fit very well for the U.S. dollar in the 21st century. A “standard” model that includes real interest rates and a measure of expected inflation for the U.S. and the foreign country, the U.S. comprehensive trade balance, and measures of global risk and liquidity demand is well-supported in the data for the U.S. against other G10 currencies. The monetary and non-monetary variables play equally important roles in explaining exchange rate movements. In the 1970s – early 1990s, the fit of the model was poor but the fit (as measured by t- and F-statistics, and R-squareds) has increased almost monotonically to the present day. We make the case that it is better monetary policy (inflation targeting) that has led to the improvement, as the scope for self-fulfilling expectations has disappeared. We provide a variety of evidence that links changes in monetary policy to the performance of the exchange-rate model.
papers.zh_title: 汇率模型比你想象的要好，以及为什么它们在过去不奏效
papers.zh_abstract: 汇率模型在21世纪对美元拟合得很好。一个包含美国和外国实际利率及预期通胀指标、美国综合贸易差额以及全球风险和流动性需求指标的“标准”模型，在美元兑其他G10货币的数据中得到了很好的支持。货币和非货币变量在解释汇率变动中扮演着同等重要的角色。在1970年代至1990年代初，模型的拟合度较差，但拟合度（以t统计量、F统计量和R平方衡量）几乎单调递增至今。我们论证，是更好的货币政策（通胀目标制）导致了这种改善，因为自我实现预期的空间已经消失。我们提供了多种证据，将货币政策变化与汇率模型的表现联系起来。

papers.title: Neural Network Learning for Nonlinear Economies
papers.authors: Julian Ashwin, Paul Beaudry, Martin Ellison
papers.abstract: Neural networks offer a promising tool for the analysis of nonlinear economies. In this paper, we derive conditions for the global stability of nonlinear rational expectations equilibria under neural network learning. We demonstrate the applicability of the conditions in analytical and numerical examples where the nonlinearity is caused by monetary policy targeting a range, rather than a specific value, of inflation. If shock persistence is high or there is inertia in the structure of the economy, then the only rational expectations equilibria that are learnable may involve inflation spending long periods outside its target range. Neural network learning is also useful for solving and selecting between multiple equilibria and steady states in other settings, such as when there is a zero lower bound on the nominal interest rate.
papers.zh_title: 非线性经济体的神经网络学习
papers.zh_abstract: 神经网络为分析非线性经济体提供了一种有前景的工具。在本文中，我们推导了在神经网络学习下非线性理性预期均衡全局稳定性的条件。我们通过分析和数值示例展示了这些条件的适用性，其中非线性是由货币政策瞄准一个通胀区间（而非特定值）所导致的。如果冲击持续性较高或经济结构存在惯性，那么唯一可学习的理性预期均衡可能涉及通胀长期处于目标区间之外。神经网络学习也有助于在其他情境下求解和选择多重均衡与稳态，例如当名义利率面临零下限约束时。

papers.title: Positive Incentives: The Income Effect and The Optimal Regulation of Crime
papers.authors: W. Bentley MacLeod, Roman Rivera
papers.abstract: Theories of crime in economics focus on the roles of deterrence and incapacitation in reducing criminal activity. In addition to deterrence, a growing body of empirical evidence has shown that both income support and employment subsidies can play a role in crime reduction. This paper extends the Becker-Ehrlich model to a standard labor supply model that includes the notion of a consumption need (Barzel and McDonald (1973)) highlights the role of substitution vs income effects when an individual chooses to engage in crime. Second, we show that whether the production of criminal activity is a substitute or a complement with the production of legitimate activity is central to the design of optimal policy. We find that both individual responsiveness to deterrence and optimal policy vary considerably with context, which is consistent with the large variation in the effect of deterrence on crime. Hence, optimal policy is a combination of deterrence, work subsidies and direct income transfers to the individual that vary with both income and location.
papers.zh_title: 正向激励：收入效应与犯罪的最优规制
papers.zh_abstract: 经济学中的犯罪理论侧重于威慑和监禁在减少犯罪活动中的作用。除威慑外，越来越多的经验证据表明，收入支持和就业补贴也能在减少犯罪方面发挥作用。本文将贝克尔-埃利希模型扩展为一个包含消费需求概念的标准劳动供给模型（Barzel and McDonald (1973)），强调了当个体选择从事犯罪活动时替代效应与收入效应的作用。其次，我们表明犯罪活动的生产与合法活动的生产是替代关系还是互补关系，对于最优政策的设计至关重要。我们发现，个体对威慑的反应以及最优政策在不同情境下差异显著，这与威慑对犯罪影响的巨大差异是一致的。因此，最优政策是威慑、工作补贴和直接收入转移的组合，这些政策随收入和地点而变化。

papers.title: Supply-Side Drug Policy, Polydrug Use, and the Economic Effects of Withdrawal Symptoms
papers.authors: Alexander Ahammer, Analisa Packham
papers.abstract: Despite the fact that 30 percent of opioid overdoses also involve a benzodiazepine, there is little policy guidance on how to curb concurrent misuse and even less evidence on how changes to co-prescribing practices can affect patients' economic trajectories. In 2012, Austria restricted access to flunitrazepam, one of the most potent, and most heavily misused, benzodiazepines. We use linked individual-level data to identify opioid users and estimate the reform's impact on their health and labor market outcomes relative to a randomly selected comparison group of non-opioid users. Estimates indicate a 12.7 percent drop in employment, a 13.1 percent increase in unemployment insurance claims, and a 26.5 percent increase in overall healthcare expenditures. We provide suggestive evidence that these effects are due to incapacitating withdrawal symptoms, rather than substitution to other drugs, including heroin or alcohol.
papers.zh_title: 供给侧毒品政策、多药滥用与戒断症状的经济效应
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管30%的阿片类药物过量事件也涉及苯二氮卓类药物，但关于如何遏制同时滥用的政策指导很少，关于共同处方实践的变化如何影响患者经济轨迹的证据甚至更少。2012年，奥地利限制了对氟硝西泮（一种效力最强且滥用最严重的苯二氮卓类药物之一）的获取。我们使用关联的个人层面数据来识别阿片类药物使用者，并估计该改革相对于随机选择的非阿片类药物使用者对照组对其健康和劳动力市场结果的影响。估计结果显示，就业率下降12.7%，失业保险索赔增加13.1%，总体医疗保健支出增加26.5%。我们提供了提示性证据，表明这些影响是由于致残性戒断症状所致，而非转向其他药物（包括海洛因或酒精）。

papers.title: Bilateral Economies of Scope
papers.authors: Yao Amber Li, Sichuang Xu, Stephen Yeaple, Tengyu Zhao
papers.abstract: International transactions are costly because they require investments in logistics, contracts, and the acquisition of local institutional knowledge. We posit that a portion of the fixed costs of entering a specific export market can be used toward costs of acquiring imports from that same market, and vice versa. Using dis-aggregated transactions data for Chinese firms from 2000 to 2015, we document firm-level trading patterns that suggest such market-specific bilateral economies of scope. Using a structural model, we estimate that the simultaneous export and import in a given country reduces export and import fixed costs by over 41 and 37 percent, respectively.
papers.zh_title: 双边范围经济
papers.zh_abstract: 国际交易成本高昂，因为需要在物流、合同以及获取当地制度知识方面进行投资。我们假设，进入特定出口市场的部分固定成本可用于从同一市场获取进口的成本，反之亦然。利用2000年至2015年中国企业的细分交易数据，我们记录了企业层面的贸易模式，这些模式表明存在这种市场特定的双边范围经济。通过结构模型，我们估计在某一国家同时进行出口和进口，分别使出口和进口的固定成本降低超过41%和37%。

papers.title: Beliefs About Political News in the Run-up to an Election
papers.authors: Charles Angelucci, Michel Gutmann, Andrea Prat
papers.abstract: This paper develops a model of news discernment to explore the influence of elections on the formation of partisan-driven parallel information universes. Using survey data from news quizzes administered during and outside the 2020 U.S. presidential election, the model shows that partisan congruence’s impact on news discernment is substantially amplified during election periods. Outside an election, when faced with a true and a fake news story and asked to select the most likely true story, an individual is 4% more likely to choose the true story if it favors their party; in the days prior to the election, this increases to 11%.
papers.zh_title: 选举前夕对政治新闻的信念
papers.zh_abstract: 本文构建了一个新闻辨别模型，以探讨选举对形成党派驱动的平行信息宇宙的影响。利用2020年美国总统大选期间及非选举期间进行的新闻测验调查数据，该模型表明，党派一致性对新闻辨别的影响在选举期间被显著放大。在非选举期间，当面对一条真实新闻和一条虚假新闻并被要求选择最可能真实的故事时，如果真实故事有利于其所属党派，个体选择真实故事的可能性高出4%；而在选举前的几天里，这一比例增加到11%。

papers.title: Misreporting in the Norwegian Business Cash Support Scheme
papers.authors: Dinara Alpysbayeva, Annette Alstadsæter, Wojciech Kopczuk, Simen Markussen, Oddbjorn Raaum
papers.abstract: We analyze the reporting response to an ambitiously targeted government support scheme for Norwegian businesses at the very start of the Coronavirus crisis\nin 2020. Our empirical design is based on cross-checking self-reported data in the applications for support with administratively reported data used for VAT. We\nfind strong evidence that strategic misreporting was present but conclude that its remaining quantitative extent after enforcement actions already taken by the tax authorities was relatively small. Firms tend to misreport 4 percent more often than expected, and the actual support paid out was 5 percent higher than it should have been. We discuss possible reasons for the relatively limited extent of non-compliance and more general lessons for the design of transfer programs
papers.zh_title: 挪威企业现金支持计划中的虚报行为
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了在2020年新冠疫情危机初期，企业对挪威一项目标精准的政府支持计划的报告反应。我们的实证设计基于将支持申请中的自我报告数据与用于增值税的行政报告数据进行交叉核对。我们发现了战略性虚报存在的有力证据，但得出结论，在税务机关已采取的执法行动之后，其剩余的量化程度相对较小。企业虚报的频率比预期高出4%，实际支付的支持金额比应有水平高出5%。我们讨论了不遵从行为相对有限的可能原因，以及这对转移支付计划设计的更普遍启示。

papers.title: The Spatial Impacts of a Massive Rail Disinvestment Program: The Beeching Axe
papers.authors: Steve Gibbons, Stephan Heblich, Edward W. Pinchbeck
papers.abstract: This paper investigates the reversibility of the effects of transport infrastructure investments, based on a programme that removed much of the rail network in Britain during the mid-20th Century. We find that a 10% loss in rail access between 1950 and 1980 caused a persistent 3% decline in local population relative to unaffected areas, implying that the 1 in 5 places most exposed to the cuts saw 24 percentage points less population growth than the 1 in 5 places that were least exposed. The cuts reduced local jobs and shares of skilled workers and young people.
papers.zh_title: 大规模铁路撤资计划的空间影响：比钦大斧
papers.zh_abstract: 本文基于20世纪中期英国大规模拆除铁路网络的计划，研究了交通基础设施投资效应的可逆性。我们发现，1950年至1980年间铁路通达性损失10%，导致受影响地区相对于未受影响地区的本地人口持续下降3%，这意味着受削减影响最严重的五分之一地区的人口增长比受影响最小的五分之一地区低24个百分点。这些削减还减少了本地就业岗位以及技能工人和年轻人的比例。

papers.title: Health Inequality and Health Types
papers.authors: Margherita Borella, Francisco A. Bullano, Mariacristina De Nardi, Benjamin Krueger, Elena Manresa
papers.abstract: While health affects many economic outcomes, its dynamics are still poorly understood. We use k means clustering, a machine learning technique, and data from the Health and Retirement Study to identify health types during middle and old age. We identify five health types: the vigorous resilient, the fair-health resilient, the fair-health vulnerable, the frail resilient, and the frail vulnerable. They are characterized by different starting health and health and mortality trajectories. Our five health types account for 84% of the variation in health trajectories and are not explained by observable characteristics, such as age, marital status, education, gender, race, health-related behaviors, and health insurance status, but rather, by one’s past health dynamics. We also show that health types are important drivers of health and mortality heterogeneity and dynamics. Our results underscore the importance of better understanding health type formation and of modeling it appropriately to properly evaluate the effects of health on people’s decisions and the implications of policy reforms.
papers.zh_title: 健康不平等与健康类型
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管健康影响许多经济结果，但其动态变化仍未被充分理解。我们使用k均值聚类这一机器学习技术，结合健康与退休研究的数据，识别中老年时期的健康类型。我们识别出五种健康类型：强健韧性型、一般健康韧性型、一般健康脆弱型、虚弱韧性型和虚弱脆弱型。这些类型以不同的初始健康状况以及健康和死亡率轨迹为特征。我们的五种健康类型解释了健康轨迹变异的84%，并且无法由可观测特征（如年龄、婚姻状况、教育、性别、种族、健康相关行为和健康保险状况）解释，而是由个人过去的健康动态所决定。我们还表明，健康类型是健康和死亡率异质性与动态的重要驱动因素。我们的结果强调了更好地理解健康类型形成以及对其进行适当建模的重要性，以便正确评估健康对人们决策的影响以及政策改革的含义。

papers.title: Sabotage as Industrial Policy
papers.authors: Jin Liu, Martin Rotemberg, Sharon Traiberman
papers.abstract: We characterize sabotage, exemplified by recent U.S. policies concerning China's semiconductor industry, as trade policy. For some (but not all) goods, completely destroying foreigners’ productivity increases domestic real income by shifting the location of production and improving the terms of trade. The gross benefit of sabotage can be summarized by a few sufficient statistics: trade and demand elasticities and import and production shares. The cost of sabotage is determined by countries' relative unit labor costs for the sabotaged goods. We find important non-monotinicities: for semi-conductors, partially sabotaging foreign production would lower US real income, while comprehensive sabotage would raise it.
papers.zh_title: 作为产业政策的破坏行为
papers.zh_abstract: 我们将破坏行为（以近期美国针对中国半导体产业的政策为例）定性为贸易政策。对于某些（但非全部）商品，完全摧毁外国生产率可以通过改变生产地点和改善贸易条件来提高国内实际收入。破坏行为的总收益可由几个充分统计量概括：贸易和需求弹性以及进口和生产份额。破坏行为的成本则由各国在受破坏商品上的相对单位劳动成本决定。我们发现重要的非单调性：对于半导体而言，部分破坏外国生产会降低美国实际收入，而全面破坏则会提高实际收入。

papers.title: Inefficient Labor Market Sorting
papers.authors: Carsten Eckel, Stephen Yeaple
papers.abstract: A growing empirical literature attributes much of the productivity advantages of large, "superstar" firms to their adoption of best practice management techniques that allow them to better identify and use talented workers. The reasons for the incomplete adoption of these "structured management practices" (SMPs) and their welfare implications are not well understood. This paper provides a positive and normative analysis of these issues in a theoretical framework in which SMPs induce sorting of talent across firms. Incomplete adoption arises because SMPs are costly and worker talent is in limited supply. In equilibrium there is excessive adoption of SMPs and too much sorting of talented workers into large firms. In this second-best environment, policy changes that favor large firms, such as trade liberalization, have the potential to lower welfare.
papers.meta: Programs：ITI；JEL：F12, F16, J31, J33, J42, M51
papers.zh_title: 低效的劳动力市场分类
papers.zh_abstract: 越来越多的实证文献将大型“超级明星”企业的生产率优势归因于它们采用了最佳管理实践，从而能够更好地识别和利用有才能的工人。对于这些“结构化管理制度”未被完全采用的原因及其福利影响，目前尚不明确。本文在一个理论框架中对此进行了实证和规范分析，该框架下结构化管理制度导致人才在企业间的分类。不完全采用的原因在于结构化管理制度成本高昂且人才供给有限。在均衡状态下，结构化管理制度被过度采用，有才能的工人过度集中于大型企业。在这种次优环境中，有利于大型企业的政策变化（如贸易自由化）有可能降低福利。

papers.title: Pension Reforms and Inequality in Germany: Micro-Modelling
papers.authors: Axel H. Börsch-Supan, Johannes Rausch, Luca Salerno
papers.abstract: Germany, like many other countries, has undergone a series of pension reforms since the 1980s which generally decreased benefit generosity and increased the retirement age due to demographic pressures. This paper investigates whether these reforms have increased income and wealth inequality among retirees. In order to answer this question, we employed counterfactual simulations in which we predict how the income and social security wealth distributions would have developed if these reforms had not taken place, compared to the actual development of the income and social security wealth distributions. \nOur analysis reveals that the pension reforms has led to an increase in inequality in terms of social security wealth between the 1990s and 2000s and decreased inequality thereafter. The decrease in inequality is mainly driven by social assistance as it represents a lower bound for benefit size and thus mitigates the effect of benefit-reducing reforms for lower income groups. We further divided the total effect of the pension reforms into two components. The first component is the mechanical effect, which keeps retirement probabilities constant and only considers changes in benefit calculation. The second component is the behavioral effect, which describes how SSW differs because of altered retirement probabilities. Our findings indicate that in the German context the behavioral effect is statistically significant but economically small.
papers.zh_title: 德国养老金改革与不平等：微观建模
papers.zh_abstract: 与许多其他国家一样，德国自20世纪80年代以来经历了一系列养老金改革，这些改革通常因人口压力而降低了福利慷慨程度并提高了退休年龄。本文研究了这些改革是否增加了退休人员的收入和财富不平等。为了回答这个问题，我们采用了反事实模拟，预测如果这些改革没有发生，收入和社会保障财富分布将如何发展，并与实际发展情况进行比较。我们的分析显示，养老金改革在20世纪90年代至21世纪初导致社会保障财富不平等加剧，此后不平等程度下降。不平等程度的下降主要由社会救助驱动，因为它构成了福利规模的下限，从而减轻了福利削减改革对低收入群体的影响。我们进一步将养老金改革的总效应分解为两个部分：第一部分是机械效应，保持退休概率不变，仅考虑福利计算的变化；第二部分是行为效应，描述因退休概率改变而导致的社会保障财富差异。我们的研究结果表明，在德国背景下，行为效应在统计上显著但在经济上较小。

papers.title: Bank Lending and Deposit Crunches during the Great Depression
papers.authors: Kris James Mitchener, Gary Richardson
papers.abstract: Bank distress was a defining feature of the Great Depression in the United States. Most banks, however, weathered the storm and remained in operation throughout the contraction. We show that surviving banks cut lending when depositors withdrew funds en masse during panics. This panic-induced decline in lending explains about one-third of the reduction in aggregate commercial bank lending between 1929 and 1932, more than twice as much as attributed to the failure of banks.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, ME；JEL：N1, N10, N12, N2, N22
papers.zh_title: 大萧条时期的银行信贷与存款紧缩
papers.zh_abstract: 银行困境是美国大萧条的一个显著特征。然而，大多数银行经受住了风暴，在整个经济收缩期间持续运营。我们表明，在恐慌期间，当储户大规模提取资金时，幸存的银行削减了贷款。这种由恐慌引发的贷款下降，解释了1929年至1932年间商业银行总贷款减少量的大约三分之一，是银行倒闭所导致减少量的两倍多。

papers.title: Global Hegemony and Exorbitant Privilege
papers.authors: Carolin Pflueger, Pierre Yared
papers.abstract: We present a dynamic two-country model in which military spending, geopolitical risk, and government bond prices are jointly determined. The model is consistent with three empirical facts: hegemons have a funding advantage, this advantage rises with geopolitical tensions, and war losers suffer from higher debt devaluation than victors. Even though higher debt capacity increases the military and financial advantage of the exogenously stronger country, it also gives rise to equilibrium multiplicity and the possibility that the weaker country overwhelms the stronger country with support from financial markets. For intermediate debt capacity, transitional dynamics exhibit geopolitical hysteresis, with dominance determined by initial conditions, unless war is realized and induces a hegemonic transition. For high debt capacity, transitional dynamics exhibit geopolitical fragility, where bond market expectations drive unpredictable transitions in dominance, and hegemonic transitions occur even in the absence of war.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, POL；JEL：F51, F65, G15, H56
papers.zh_title: 全球霸权与过高特权
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个动态的两国模型，在该模型中，军费开支、地缘政治风险和政府债券价格是共同决定的。该模型与三个经验事实一致：霸权国家具有融资优势；这种优势随着地缘政治紧张局势加剧而上升；战争失败者比胜利者遭受更高的债务贬值。尽管更高的债务能力增强了外生较强国家的军事和金融优势，但它也导致了均衡的多重性，以及较弱国家在金融市场支持下压倒较强国家的可能性。对于中等债务能力，转型动态表现出地缘政治滞后性，主导地位由初始条件决定，除非战争爆发并引发霸权转移。对于高债务能力，转型动态表现出地缘政治脆弱性，债券市场预期驱动着主导地位不可预测的转变，并且即使没有战争也会发生霸权转移。

papers.title: NAR Settlement, House Prices, and Consumer Welfare
papers.authors: Greg Buchak, Gregor Matvos, Tomasz Piskorski, Amit Seru
papers.abstract: Motivated by the recent National Association of Realtors (NAR) settlement, we examine how reduced real estate agent commissions affect home prices, housing turnover, and consumer welfare. Using a calibrated dynamic structural search model, we show that by reducing future transaction costs, lower commissions raise the value of housing as a durable asset and tend to increase house prices. While reduced fees generally improve consumer welfare, most gains accrue to current homeowners, with limited benefits for prospective buyers. Higher prices may also crowd out financially constrained households, suggesting that lower agent fees are unlikely to significantly improve housing affordability and access. Our findings underscore the importance of accounting for market dynamics, consumer heterogeneity, and general equilibrium effects. They also shed light on the redistributive implications of technological innovations—such as those leveraging AI—that reduce transaction costs. Finally, our analysis suggests that static IO-style models may be ill-suited to studying transaction costs in durable goods markets, where dynamic considerations and repeated resale are central, as this can lead to misestimated magnitudes and even incorrect signs of key effects.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, PE；JEL：G0, G2, G50, L0, R20
papers.zh_title: NAR和解协议、房价与消费者福利
papers.zh_abstract: 受近期全国房地产经纪人协会（NAR）和解协议的启发，我们研究了降低房地产经纪人佣金如何影响房价、住房周转率以及消费者福利。通过使用一个校准后的动态结构搜索模型，我们表明，降低未来交易成本会提高住房作为耐用资产的价值，并倾向于推高房价。虽然降低费用通常能改善消费者福利，但大部分收益流向了现有房主，而对潜在购房者的好处有限。房价上涨还可能挤出受财务约束的家庭，这表明降低经纪人费用不太可能显著改善住房可负担性和可及性。我们的研究结果强调了考虑市场动态、消费者异质性和一般均衡效应的重要性。它们也揭示了降低交易成本的技术创新（例如利用人工智能的技术）的再分配影响。最后，我们的分析表明，静态的产业组织风格模型可能不适合研究耐用商品市场中的交易成本，因为在这些市场中，动态考量和重复转售是核心问题，这可能导致对关键效应的估计幅度出现偏差，甚至符号错误。

papers.title: Have CEOs Changed?
papers.authors: Yann Decressin, Steven N. Kaplan, Morten Sorensen
papers.abstract: Using more than 4,900 assessments, we study changes in the characteristics and objectives of CEOs and top executives since 2001. The same four factors explain roughly half of the variation of assessed CEO characteristics in this larger sample of executive assessments as in Kaplan and Sorensen (2021). After the global financial crisis (GFC), the average interviewed CEO candidate has lower overall ability, is more execution oriented / less interpersonal, less charismatic and less creative/strategic than pre-GFC. Except for overall ability and execution oriented/interpersonal, these differences persist in hired CEOs. Interpersonal or “softer” skills do not increase over time, either for CEO candidates or hired CEOs. Pre- and post-GFC, we find a positive correlation between the ability of assessed CEOs and other C-level executives assessed at the same company, suggesting that higher-ability executives complement each other. Finally, we look at the relation between the objectives for which the CEOs are interviewed and CEO characteristics.
papers.zh_title: CEO变了吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 利用超过4900份评估数据，我们研究了自2001年以来CEO及高层管理人员的特征和目标的变化。在这份更大的高管评估样本中，相同的四个因素解释了评估的CEO特征变异的约一半，这与Kaplan和Sorensen（2021）的研究结果一致。在全球金融危机之后，与危机前相比，接受面试的CEO候选人的平均综合能力较低，更偏向执行导向/人际交往能力较弱，魅力较低，且创造性/战略性较弱。除了综合能力和执行导向/人际交往能力外，这些差异在已聘用的CEO中仍然存在。无论是对于CEO候选人还是已聘用的CEO，人际交往或“软性”技能并未随时间推移而增加。在金融危机前后，我们发现，在同一家公司接受评估的CEO与其他C级高管的能力之间存在正相关关系，这表明能力较高的高管之间具有互补性。最后，我们考察了CEO被面试时所追求的目标与CEO特征之间的关系。

papers.title: Fair Trade Agreements
papers.authors: Francesco Passarelli, Robert W. Staiger
papers.abstract: The legitimacy of the world trading system is under growing attack, as challenges to its conformity with norms of fairness and social justice are increasingly voiced by citizens and their governments around the world. Taking a novel "bottom up" approach to concerns for fairness, we show how these concerns can be formalized in a general and tractable way, and we describe their implications for the purpose and design of a trade agreement. Our findings suggest that as currently designed, the GATT/WTO is well-equipped to allow its member governments to address many, but not all, of the possible trade-related fairness concerns of their citizens. More generally, our findings point to a detailed understanding of real-world perceptions of fairness in trade policy as the key input into the appropriate design of fair trade agreements.
papers.zh_title: 公平贸易协定
papers.zh_abstract: 世界贸易体系的合法性正受到日益增长的攻击，因为世界各地的公民及其政府越来越多地对其是否符合公平和社会正义的规范提出质疑。我们采用一种新颖的“自下而上”的方法来关注公平关切，展示了如何以一种通用且易于处理的方式将这些关切形式化，并描述了它们对贸易协定的目的和设计的影响。我们的研究结果表明，按照目前的设计，关贸总协定/世贸组织能够很好地使其成员国政府解决其公民可能存在的许多（但并非全部）与贸易相关的公平关切。更广泛地说，我们的研究结果指出，对现实世界中贸易政策公平观念的详细理解，是恰当设计公平贸易协定的关键输入。

papers.title: Direct and Indirect Taxes in Pollution Dynamics
papers.authors: Vladimir Smirnyagin, Aleh Tsyvinski, Xi Wu
papers.abstract: Analyzing the universe of federal environmental regulations in the U.S., we construct a measure of regulations—direct taxes on pollution. Analyzing the universe of firms’ investor disclosures, we construct a measure of material environmental concerns—indirect taxes on pollution. These two empirical measures are new to the environmental regulations literature. Thirdly, we document an important new fact that the cross-sectional distribution of pollution changes is lumpy. We build a dynamic heterogeneous firm model with non-convex adjustment costs that fits the cross-sectional pollution evidence. The model explains half of the pollution decline in U.S. manufacturing over the last two decades due to direct and indirect taxes. We show that the dynamics of direct taxes (environmental regulations) and indirect taxes (environmental concerns), non-convex adjustment costs, and idiosyncratic productivity shocks are key determinants of pollution dynamics in U.S. manufacturing.
papers.zh_title: 污染动态中的直接税与间接税
papers.zh_abstract: 通过分析美国联邦环境法规的总体情况，我们构建了一个衡量法规的指标——对污染的直接税。通过分析企业投资者披露信息的总体情况，我们构建了一个衡量实质性环境关切的指标——对污染的间接税。这两个实证指标对于环境法规文献来说是全新的。第三，我们记录了一个重要的新事实：污染变化的横截面分布是块状的。我们构建了一个包含非凸调整成本的动态异质性企业模型，该模型拟合了污染横截面的证据。该模型解释了美国制造业在过去二十年中污染下降的一半原因，这归因于直接税和间接税。我们表明，直接税（环境法规）和间接税（环境关切）的动态变化、非凸调整成本以及异质性生产率冲击是美国制造业污染动态的关键决定因素。

papers.title: Parental Investments and Skills Formation During Infancy and Youth: Long Term Evidence From an Early Childhood Intervention
papers.authors: Orazio Attanasio, Darwin Cortes, Dario Maldonado, Paul Rodriguez-Lesmes, Nathalie Charpak, Rejean Tessier, Juan G. Ruiz, Juan Gallego, Tiberio Hernandez, Felipe Uriza, Andres Gallegos
papers.abstract: What happens to children during the early years is recognized to be very important for their long run development. It is also increasingly clear that the skills that are relevant for economic success and more generally well-being are multidimensional, including different types of socioemotional skills. In this paper, we look at the long run impacts of an intervention targeted to premature children, known as Kangaroo Mother Care. We do so using data from a randomised control trial performed several decades ago in Bogotá, Colombia, to assess the short run impacts of such an intervention. A large fractions of the participants to that trial were examined over 20 years after the original intervention. We first show that the original intervention had a significant impact on externalizing socio-emotional skills at age 22 and a variety of adult outcomes. We then perform a mediation analysis which involves the estimation of a production function of socioemotional skills and show that the long run impact seems to be explained entirely by an increase on one type of parental investment measured when the participants were 12 months old. Our results also show a remarkable degree of persistence of different types of skills.
papers.zh_title: 婴幼儿期与青年期的父母投资与技能形成：来自一项早期儿童干预的长期证据
papers.zh_abstract: 儿童在早期经历什么被认为对其长期发展非常重要。同时，越来越清楚的是，与经济成功以及更广泛的福祉相关的技能是多维的，包括不同类型的社会情感技能。在本文中，我们研究了一项针对早产儿的干预措施（称为袋鼠妈妈护理法）的长期影响。我们利用几十年前在哥伦比亚波哥大进行的一项随机对照试验的数据来评估此类干预措施的短期影响。该试验的很大一部分参与者在原始干预实施20多年后接受了检查。我们首先表明，原始干预对参与者在22岁时的外化社会情感技能以及各种成人结果产生了显著影响。然后，我们进行了一项中介分析，其中涉及估计社会情感技能的生产函数，并表明长期影响似乎完全由参与者在12个月大时测量到的一种父母投资的增加所解释。我们的结果还显示了不同类型技能具有显著程度的持续性。

papers.title: Spooky Boundaries at a Distance: Inductive Bias, Dynamic Models, and Behavioral Macro
papers.authors: Mahdi E. Kahou, Jesús Fernández-Villaverde, Sebastian Gomez-Cardona, Jesse Perla, Jan Rosa
papers.abstract: In the long run, we are all dead. Nonetheless, when studying the short-run dynamics of economic models, it is crucial to consider boundary conditions that govern long-run, forward-looking behavior, such as transversality conditions. We demonstrate that machine learning (ML) can automatically satisfy these conditions due to its inherent inductive bias toward finding flat solutions to functional equations. This characteristic enables ML algorithms to solve for transition dynamics, ensuring that long-run boundary conditions are approximately met. ML can even select the correct equilibria in cases of steady-state multiplicity. Additionally, the inductive bias provides a foundation for modeling forward-looking behavioral agents with self-consistent expectations.
papers.zh_title: 远距离的诡异边界：归纳偏差、动态模型与行为宏观经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 从长期来看，我们都会死去。尽管如此，在研究经济模型的短期动态时，考虑支配长期前瞻性行为的边界条件（例如横截性条件）至关重要。我们证明，机器学习可以自动满足这些条件，这是因为它具有内在的归纳偏差，倾向于寻找函数方程的平坦解。这一特性使得机器学习算法能够求解转型动态，确保长期边界条件被近似满足。在稳态多重性的情况下，机器学习甚至可以选择正确的均衡。此外，这种归纳偏差为建模具有自我一致预期的前瞻性行为主体提供了基础。

papers.title: People, Practices, and Productivity: A Review of New Advances in Personnel Economics
papers.authors: Mitchell Hoffman, Christopher T. Stanton
papers.abstract: This chapter surveys recent advances in personnel economics. We begin by presenting evidence showing substantial and persistent productivity variation among workers in the same roles. We discuss new research on incentives and compensation; hiring practices; the influence of managers and peers; and time use, technology, and training. We emphasize two main themes. First, we seek to illustrate the interplay between these topics and productivity differences between people and work units. Second, we argue that personnel economics has benefited from exploration, which we think of as the willingness to use new data and methods to shed light on existing questions and to raise new ones. As many personnel studies use data from individual firms, we discuss external validity and provide concrete guidance on how to improve discussions of the generalizability of findings from specific contexts.
papers.zh_title: 人员、实践与生产率：人事经济学新进展综述
papers.zh_abstract: 本章综述了人事经济学的最新进展。我们首先展示了证据，表明在同一岗位上工作的工人之间存在显著且持续的生产率差异。我们讨论了关于激励与薪酬、招聘实践、管理者和同僚的影响，以及时间利用、技术与培训的新研究。我们强调两个主要主题。首先，我们试图说明这些主题与人员及工作单位之间的生产率差异之间的相互作用。其次，我们认为人事经济学受益于探索，我们将其理解为利用新数据和新方法来阐明现有问题并提出新问题的意愿。由于许多人事实证研究使用来自单个企业的数据，我们讨论了外部有效性，并就如何改进对特定情境下研究结果可推广性的讨论提供了具体指导。

papers.title: Firm Adaptation to Climate Change
papers.authors: Arti Grover, Matthew E. Kahn
papers.abstract: We survey the microeconomics literature that studies how firms in the developing world are adapting to extreme weather, local pollution, and natural disasters. Climate change increases the uncertainty that every firm must address as it decides where and how to produce and who to trade with. We study how expectations, market structure and firm heterogeneity determine investment in self-protection. A firm’s resilience also depends on government policies, market insurance access and infrastructure investments. We explore the strategic interactions between firms and governments that together determine firm risk exposure. We discuss benchmarks for measuring adaptation progress at the firm, industry and macroeconomic level.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, PR；JEL：D2, O12, Q5, Q54
papers.zh_title: 企业对气候变化的适应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们综述了研究发展中国家企业如何适应极端天气、局部污染和自然灾害的微观经济学文献。气候变化增加了每个企业在决定在哪里生产、如何生产以及与谁交易时必须应对的不确定性。我们研究了预期、市场结构和企业异质性如何决定对自我保护的投入。企业的韧性还取决于政府政策、市场保险的可获得性和基础设施投资。我们探讨了企业与政府之间的战略互动，这种互动共同决定了企业的风险敞口。我们讨论了在企业、行业和宏观经济层面衡量适应进展的基准。

papers.title: Eliciting Thresholds for Interdependent Behavior
papers.authors: Moritz Janas, Nikos Nikiforakis, Simon Siegenthaler
papers.abstract: Individuals’ willingness to act often depends on how many others do, but the structure of such interdependence is hard to disentangle with observational data. We introduce an incentivized method to measure interdependence, grounded in threshold models. We apply it to a stratified U.S. sample of 5,000+ Asian, Black, Hispanic, and White adults to study support for affirmative action. We document substantial heterogeneity in thresholds consistent with preregistered hypotheses from a model. Following changes in federal support for affirmative action, thresholds shift even as perceived benefits and beliefs remain unchanged, indicating that thresholds provide insights not captured by standard behavioral measures.
papers.zh_title: 诱发相互依赖行为的阈值测量
papers.zh_abstract: 个体采取行动的意愿往往取决于有多少其他人也在行动，但这种相互依赖的结构很难通过观测数据来厘清。我们引入一种基于阈值模型的激励相容方法来测量相互依赖。我们将该方法应用于一个包含5000多名亚裔、黑人、西班牙裔和白人美国成年人的分层样本，以研究对平权行动的支持。我们记录了与模型预先注册假设一致的阈值异质性。在联邦对平权行动的支持发生变化后，即使感知到的收益和信念保持不变，阈值也会发生偏移，这表明阈值提供了标准行为测量无法捕捉的洞见。

papers.title: The Consumer Welfare Effects of Online Ads: Evidence from a 9-Year Experiment
papers.authors: Erik Brynjolfsson, Avinash Collis, Asad Liaqat, Daley Kutzman, Haritz Garro, Daniel Deisenroth, Nils Wernerfelt
papers.abstract: Research on the causal effects of online advertising on consumer welfare is limited due to challenges in running large-scale field experiments and tracking effects over extended periods. We analyze a long-running field experiment of online advertising in which a random 0.5% subset of all users are assigned to a group that does not ever see ever ads. We recruit a representative sample of Facebook users in the ads and no-ads groups and estimate their welfare gains from using Facebook using a series of incentive-compatible choice experiments. We find no significant differences in welfare gains from Facebook. Our estimates are relatively precisely estimated reflecting our large sample size (53,166 participants). Specifically, the minimum detectable difference in median valuations at standard thresholds is $3.18/month compared to a baseline valuation of $31.95/month for giving up access to Facebook. That is, we can reject the hypothesis that the median disutility from advertising exceeds 10% of the median baseline valuation. Our findings suggest that either the disutility of ads for consumers is relatively small, or that there are offsetting benefits, such as helping consumers find products and services of interest.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, PR；JEL：D12, D6, K24, M15, M37
papers.zh_title: 在线广告对消费者福利的影响：来自一项为期9年实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 由于开展大规模现场实验和长期追踪效果的挑战，关于在线广告对消费者福利因果效应的研究十分有限。我们分析了一项长期运行的在线广告现场实验，其中所有用户中随机抽取0.5%的子集被分配到一个从未看到广告的组。我们从广告组和无广告组中招募了具有代表性的Facebook用户样本，并通过一系列激励相容的选择实验来估计他们使用Facebook的福利收益。我们发现两组在Facebook福利收益上没有显著差异。我们的估计相对精确，这反映了我们的大样本量（53,166名参与者）。具体而言，在标准阈值下，中位数估值的最小可检测差异为3.18美元/月，而放弃使用Facebook的基线中位数估值为31.95美元/月。也就是说，我们可以拒绝广告带来的中位数负效用超过基线中位数估值10%的假设。我们的发现表明，要么广告对消费者的负效用相对较小，要么存在抵消性的收益，例如帮助消费者找到感兴趣的产品和服务。

papers.title: Credit When You Need It
papers.authors: Benjamin L. Collier, Daniel A. Hartley, Benjamin J. Keys, Jing Xian Ng
papers.abstract: We estimate the causal effect of emergency credit on households' finances after a negative shock. To do so, we link application data from the U.S. Federal Disaster Loan program, which provides loans to households that have uninsured damages from a federally-declared natural disaster, to a panel of credit records before and after the shock. We exploit a discontinuity in the loan approval rules that led applicants with debt-to-income ratios below 40% to be differentially likely to be approved. Using an instrumented difference-in-differences research design, we find that credit provision at the time of a shock significantly reduces severe financial distress, decreasing the likelihood of filing for bankruptcy by 61% in the three years following the disaster. We explore mechanisms using additional quasi-experimental variation in interest rates, finding support for a liquidity-based explanation. Credit provision in a time of crisis has real consumption effects in the form of additional car purchases even 3 years after loan receipt. Our findings suggest that well-timed liquidity provided to households in acute need can have substantial and persistent positive effects.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EEE, PE；JEL：D14, G23, G28, H81
papers.zh_title: 在你需要时提供信贷
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估计了在负面冲击后紧急信贷对家庭财务的因果效应。为此，我们将美国联邦灾害贷款项目的申请数据与冲击前后的信用记录面板数据相链接。该项目向因联邦宣布的自然灾害而遭受未保险损失的家庭提供贷款。我们利用了贷款审批规则中的一个断点，该规则使得债务收入比低于40%的申请人更有可能获得批准。通过使用工具变量双重差分研究设计，我们发现冲击发生时提供信贷显著减少了严重的财务困境，使灾难后三年内申请破产的可能性降低了61%。我们利用利率的额外准实验变化来探索机制，结果支持了基于流动性的解释。危机时期的信贷供给具有真实的消费效应，即使在获得贷款三年后，仍表现为额外的汽车购买。我们的发现表明，在紧急需求时向家庭提供的及时流动性可以产生显著且持久的积极影响。

papers.title: Technology Adoption and Career Concerns: Evidence from the Adoption of Digital Technology in Motion Pictures
papers.authors: Grant Goehring, Filippo Mezzanotti, S. Abraham (Avri) Ravid
papers.abstract: This paper studies the impact of career concerns on technological change by analyzing the adoption of digital cinematography in the US motion picture industry. This setting allows us to collect rich data on the adoption of this new technology at the project level (i.e., movie) as well as on the career of the main decision maker (i.e., director). We find that early career directors played a leading role in the adoption of digital technology and that this effect appears to be explained by career concerns, rather than alternative motives we consider and analyze. Technological savviness also plays a role.
papers.zh_title: 技术采纳与职业关切：来自电影行业数字技术采纳的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文通过分析美国电影行业数字电影摄影技术的采纳，研究了职业关切对技术变革的影响。这一背景使我们能够收集关于该新技术在项目层面（即电影）以及主要决策者（即导演）职业生涯的丰富数据。我们发现，早期职业导演在数字技术采纳中发挥了主导作用，这一效应似乎可以用职业关切来解释，而非我们考虑和分析的其他动机。技术熟练程度也起到了一定作用。

papers.title: Who Benefits from Retirement Saving Incentives in the U.S.? Evidence on Gaps in Retirement Wealth Accumulation by Race and Parental Income
papers.authors: Taha Choukhmane, Jorge Colmenares, Cormac O'Dea, Jonathan L. Rothbaum, Lawrence D.W. Schmidt
papers.abstract: U.S. employers and the federal government devote the equivalent of 1.5% of GDP annually toward promoting defined contribution (DC) retirement savings. Using a new employer-employee linked dataset covering millions of Americans, we show that tax and employer matching incentives disproportionately benefit White and Asian workers compared to their similar-income Hispanic, Black, and American Indian or Alaska Native coworkers. Similarly, these incentives disproportionately benefit those with richer parents compared to those from lower-income families. Breaking the link between contribution choices and saving subsidies through revenue-neutral reforms could close up to one-third of the DC wealth gaps by race and parental income.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, AP, CF, LS, PE；JEL：D14, G5, H2, H31, J15, J32
papers.zh_title: 谁从美国退休储蓄激励中受益？基于种族和父母收入的退休财富积累差距证据
papers.zh_abstract: 美国雇主和联邦政府每年将超过GDP的1.5%用于促进固定缴费型（DC）退休储蓄。利用一个覆盖数百万美国人的新型雇主-雇员关联数据集，我们表明，这一储蓄激励体系使白人工人和父母更富有的工人受益更多，相比于收入相似但为黑人、西班牙裔或来自低收入家庭的同事。通过收入中性的改革打破缴费选择与储蓄补贴之间的联系，可以将白人与黑人或西班牙裔工人之间、以及父母最富有与最贫穷工人之间的DC财富差距缩小约三分之一。

papers.title: School Milestones Impact Child Mental Health in Taiwan
papers.authors: Kuan-Ming Chen, Janet Currie, Hui Ding, Wei-Lun Lo
papers.abstract: This study uses administrative health insurance records in Taiwan to examine changes in child mental health treatment around four school milestones including: Primary and middle school entry, high stakes testing for high school, and high stakes testing for college entry. Leveraging age cutoffs for school entry in Taiwan, we compare August-born children to children born in September of the same year. The former hit all the milestones one year earlier than the latter, enabling us to identify each milestone’s effect. We find that entry into both primary school and middle schools is associated with increases in mental health prescribing, not only for ADHD but also for depression. Middle school entry is also associated with increases in the prescribing of anti-anxiety and antipsychotic medications. Perhaps surprisingly, there is no run-up in the use of psychiatric medications prior to high-stakes tests. But the use of psychiatric medications falls sharply following the tests. These effects are stronger in counties where both parents and children have higher educational aspirations. Hence, the use of psychiatric drugs increases at junctures when educational stresses increase and falls when these stresses are relieved.
papers.zh_title: 学校里程碑影响台湾儿童心理健康
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究利用台湾的行政健康保险记录，考察了儿童心理健康治疗在四个学校里程碑前后的变化，包括：小学和初中入学、高中升学高风险考试以及大学入学高风险考试。利用台湾入学年龄截止点，我们比较了八月出生的儿童与同年九月出生的儿童。前者比后者早一年经历所有里程碑，这使我们能够识别每个里程碑的效应。我们发现，进入小学和初中都与心理健康药物处方的增加相关，不仅针对多动症，还包括抑郁症。初中入学还与抗焦虑和抗精神病药物处方的增加相关。也许令人惊讶的是，在高风险考试之前，精神药物的使用并没有增加。但在考试之后，精神药物的使用急剧下降。这些效应在父母和子女教育期望都更高的县更为强烈。因此，精神药物的使用在教育压力增加的节点上升，而在这些压力缓解时下降。

papers.title: Reserve Asset Competition and the Global Fiscal Cycle
papers.authors: Zhengyang Jiang, Robert J. Richmond
papers.abstract: Governments tend to increase their borrowing at the same time, giving rise to a global fiscal cycle. This global fiscal cycle has a large component that is unexplained by global business cycle variables. We propose a novel explanation for the emergence of the global fiscal cycle: governments' competition over the provision of reserve assets gives rise to strategic complementarity in the issuances, even when the reserve assets are substitutes in partial equilibrium. We show our reserve-asset-competition channel explains economically significant common variation in fiscal variables, beyond the common variation induced by correlated business cycles. In doing so, our model of reserve asset demand and supply also shines light on the sources of variation in the convenience yields and seigniorage revenues earned on government debt.
papers.zh_title: 储备资产竞争与全球财政周期
papers.zh_abstract: 政府倾向于同时增加借贷，从而引发全球财政周期。这种全球财政周期有一个很大的组成部分无法用全球商业周期变量来解释。我们提出了一个关于全球财政周期出现的新解释：政府在提供储备资产方面的竞争导致了发行中的战略互补性，即使这些储备资产在局部均衡中是替代品。我们表明，我们的储备资产竞争渠道解释了财政变量中经济上显著的共同变化，超出了由相关商业周期引起的共同变化。在此过程中，我们的储备资产需求和供给模型也揭示了政府债务上便利收益率和铸币税收入变化的来源。

papers.title: Managing Margins: PE Effects on Financial, Physical, and Human Capital
papers.authors: Michael R. Richards, Maggie Shi, Christopher M. Whaley
papers.abstract: Private equity (PE) plays an increasingly important role in the modern US economy. However, its impacts on owned-firms are incompletely understood. We exploit a historically large leveraged buyout of a national hospital chain to examine how the full life cycle of PE influences hospital-level revenues, technology sourcing, labor use, and financial performance. We find permanent improvements in hospital volumes and revenues. PE also reduces growth in full-time employees, with a suggestive partial substitution toward part-time workers. Technology adoption is restrained, but the number of vendors expands. Overall, PE has nuanced effects on hospital management, which translate to improved operating margins.
papers.zh_title: 管理利润空间：私募股权对财务、实物和人力资本的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 私募股权在现代美国经济中扮演着越来越重要的角色。然而，其对被收购企业的影响尚未被完全理解。我们利用一次历史上规模巨大的全国性医院连锁杠杆收购，来考察私募股权完整生命周期如何影响医院层面的收入、技术采购、劳动力使用和财务绩效。我们发现医院业务量和收入有永久性改善。私募股权还减少了全职员工的增长，并暗示性地部分替代为兼职员工。技术采纳受到抑制，但供应商数量有所增加。总体而言，私募股权对医院管理产生了微妙的影响，这些影响转化为运营利润率的改善。

papers.title: Parental Leave: Economic Incentives and Cultural Change
papers.authors: James Albrecht, Per-Anders Edin, Raquel Fernández, Jiwon Lee, Peter Thoursie, Susan Vroman
papers.abstract: The distribution of parental leave uptake and childcare activities continues to conform to traditional gender roles. In 2002, with the goal of increasing gender equality, Sweden added a second “daddy month,” i.e., an additional month of pay-related parental leave reserved exclusively for each parent. This policy increased men’s parental leave uptake and decreased women’s, thereby increasing men’s share. To understand how various factors contributed to these outcomes, we develop and estimate a quantitative model of the household in which preferences towards parental leave respond to peer behavior. We distinguish households by the education of the parents and ask the model to match key features of the parental leave distribution before and after the reform by gender and household type (the parents’ education). We find that changed incentives and, especially, changed social norms played an important role in generating these outcomes whereas changed wage parameters, including the future wage penalty associated with different lengths of parental leave uptake, were minor contributors. We then use our model to evaluate three counterfactual policies designed to increase men’s share of parental leave and conclude that giving each parent a non-transferable endowment of parental leave or only paying for the length of time equally taken by each parent would both dramatically increase men’s share whereas decreasing childcare costs has almost no effect.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EFG, LS, PE, POL；JEL：D10, J16, Z10, Z18
papers.zh_title: 育儿假：经济激励与文化变迁
papers.zh_abstract: 育儿假的使用和育儿活动的分配仍然遵循传统的性别角色。2002年，为了促进性别平等，瑞典增加了第二个“爸爸月”，即额外一个月与收入挂钩的、专门为每位父母保留的育儿假。这项政策增加了男性的育儿假使用，减少了女性的使用，从而提高了男性的份额。为了理解各种因素如何促成这些结果，我们开发并估计了一个家庭定量模型，在该模型中，对育儿假的偏好会响应同伴行为。我们根据父母的教育程度区分家庭，并要求模型按性别和家庭类型（父母的教育程度）匹配改革前后育儿假分布的关键特征。我们发现，激励的改变，尤其是社会规范的改变，在产生这些结果中发挥了重要作用，而工资参数的变化（包括与不同育儿假使用时长相关的未来工资惩罚）是次要因素。然后，我们利用模型评估了旨在提高男性育儿假份额的三种反事实政策，并得出结论：给予每位父母不可转让的育儿假配额，或者仅支付父母双方等额休假的时间，都将显著提高男性的份额，而降低育儿成本则几乎没有影响。

papers.title: Why Do Europeans Save? Micro-Evidence from the Household Finance and Consumption Survey
papers.authors: Charles Yuji Horioka, Luigi Ventura
papers.abstract: We analyze the saving motives of European households using micro-data from the Household Finance and Consumption Survey, which is conducted by the European Central Bank. We find that the rank ordering of saving motives differs greatly depending on what criterion is used to rank them. We find that the precautionary motive is the most important saving motive of European households when the proportion of households saving for each motive is used as the criterion to rank them but that the retirement motive is the most important saving motive of European households if the quantitative importance of each motive is taken into account. Moreover, the generosity of social safety nets seems to affect the importance of individual saving motives, with saving for the retirement motive being less important in countries with generous public pension benefits and saving for the precautionary motive being less important in countries with generous public health systems.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EFG, PE；JEL：D12, D14, D15, D64, E21, J14
papers.zh_title: 欧洲人为何储蓄？来自家庭金融与消费调查的微观证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用欧洲央行进行的家庭金融与消费调查的微观数据，分析了欧洲家庭的储蓄动机。我们发现，储蓄动机的排序因所使用的排序标准不同而存在巨大差异。我们发现，如果以出于每种动机储蓄的家庭比例作为排序标准，预防性动机是欧洲家庭最重要的储蓄动机；但如果考虑每种动机的定量重要性，退休动机则是欧洲家庭最重要的储蓄动机。此外，社会保障网的慷慨程度似乎会影响个人储蓄动机的重要性：在公共养老金福利慷慨的国家，为退休动机储蓄的重要性较低；在公共医疗体系慷慨的国家，为预防性动机储蓄的重要性较低。

papers.title: Toward an Understanding of the Economics of Prosumers: Evidence from a Natural Field Experiment
papers.authors: John A. List, Ioannis C. Pragidis, Michael K. Price
papers.abstract: Prosumers are becoming increasingly important in global energy consumption and production. We partner with an energy service provider in Sweden to explore the economics facing such agents by conducting a natural field experiment over a 32-month period. As a policy instrument, we explore how simple nudges affect choices on both the consumption and production sides. Importantly, with the added flexibility to influence both sides of the market, and with a rich data set that permits an analysis of intraday, intraweek, and seasonal variation, we can detail effects on overall conservation efforts, intertemporal substitution, load shifting, and net purchases from the grid. The overarching theme is that nudges have the potential to have an even greater impact on the energy market with prosumers compared to their portmanteau components.
papers.zh_title: 理解产消者的经济学：来自自然实地实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 产消者在全球能源消费和生产中变得越来越重要。我们与瑞典的一家能源服务提供商合作，通过进行一项为期32个月的自然实地实验来探索这类经济主体面临的经济学问题。作为一种政策工具，我们探讨了简单的助推如何影响消费和生产两侧的选择。重要的是，由于增加了影响市场两侧的灵活性，并且拥有允许分析日内、周内和季节性变化的丰富数据集，我们可以详细描述对整体节能努力、跨期替代、负荷转移以及从电网净购买的影响。总体主题是，与它们的组合成分相比，助推在产消者参与的能源市场中具有产生更大影响的潜力。

papers.title: Money in a Heterogeneous Agent Model
papers.authors: Roger E.A. Farmer
papers.abstract: I introduce money into an incomplete markets model with heterogeneous agents and uninsurable income risk. I show that the model exhibits both non-monetary and monetary equilibria, with the latter existing when income risk is sufficiently high. Using numerical methods, I characterize the properties of these equilibria and analyze their stability. I find that for a range of realistic parameter values, the non-monetary equilibrium is dynamically inefficient and indeterminate, and there is a second determinate monetary equilibrium with positive valued fiat money.
papers.zh_title: 异质性主体模型中的货币
papers.zh_abstract: 我将货币引入一个具有异质性主体和不可保险收入风险的不完全市场模型。我证明该模型同时存在非货币均衡和货币均衡，其中货币均衡在收入风险足够高时存在。利用数值方法，我刻画了这些均衡的性质并分析了它们的稳定性。我发现，在一系列现实参数值下，非货币均衡是动态无效率且不确定的，并且存在第二个确定的货币均衡，其中具有正价值的不兑现纸币。

papers.title: Reciprocity and the China Shock
papers.authors: Chad P. Bown, Lorenzo Caliendo, Fernando Parro, Robert W. Staiger, Alan O. Sykes
papers.abstract: We formalize the GATT/WTO principle of reciprocity in workhorse quantitative trade models, characterizing reciprocal tariff cuts that hold terms of trade fixed and investigating their labor-market impacts. We provide closed-form expressions mapping reciprocal tariff cuts to labor market dislocation. We demonstrate that a country’s own tariff liberalization is a sufficient statistic for the labor-market adjustments it can expect from tariff negotiations that satisfy reciprocity. Applying our theoretical results to China’s 2001 WTO accession, we find that China’s tariff reductions exceeded reciprocity norms, increasing real incomes but amplifying the manufacturing employment dislocation – the China Shock – in the United States and globally.
papers.meta: Programs：ITI；JEL：F02, F1, F13, F14, F16, F66, F68
papers.zh_title: 互惠原则与中国冲击
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在主流的定量贸易模型中形式化了GATT/WTO的互惠原则，刻画了保持贸易条件不变的互惠关税削减，并研究了其对劳动力市场的影响。我们提供了将互惠关税削减与劳动力市场错位联系起来的闭式表达式。我们证明，一个国家自身的关税自由化是其在满足互惠原则的关税谈判中预期劳动力市场调整的充分统计量。将我们的理论结果应用于中国2001年加入WTO，我们发现中国的关税削减超出了互惠规范，这增加了实际收入，但加剧了美国及全球的制造业就业错位——即中国冲击。

papers.title: Remote Work and Political Preferences: Evidence from U.S. Counties
papers.authors: Benjamin W. Cowan, Kairon Shayne D. Garcia
papers.abstract: We examine how trends in remote work vary by U.S. county-level characteristics. Using several data sources with various definitions of remote work, we show that 2016 presidential Democratic vote share is associated with an increase in remote work starting in 2020 and continuing through 2023. An increase in 2016 Democratic vote share of one standard deviation is related to an increase in the likelihood of remote work by 1-2 percentage points and the share of job postings that advertise a remote-work component by about 2 percentage points. These effects are not altered by differences in various COVID policies and outcomes or labor-market indicators. We hypothesize that differences in preferences for workplace flexibility that are correlated with local political tastes opened a gap in remote-work rates once the pandemic-induced “remote-work revolution” substantially increased individuals’ opportunities for working from home.
papers.meta: Programs：LS, PE；JEL：D72, H73, H75, J22, J24
papers.zh_title: 远程工作与政治偏好：来自美国县级层面的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了远程工作趋势如何随美国县级特征而变化。利用多种数据源和不同的远程工作定义，我们表明，2016年总统选举的民主党得票率与2020年开始并持续到2023年的远程工作增加相关。2016年民主党得票率每增加一个标准差，远程工作的可能性增加1-2个百分点，而招聘广告中包含远程工作成分的职位份额增加约2个百分点。这些效应并未因各种COVID政策和结果或劳动力市场指标的差异而改变。我们假设，与地方政治偏好相关的工作场所灵活性偏好的差异，一旦疫情引发的“远程工作革命”大幅增加了个人在家工作的机会，就导致了远程工作率的差距。

papers.title: Vertical Integration and Plan Design in Healthcare Markets
papers.authors: José Ignacio Cuesta, Carlos E. Noton, Benjamin Vatter
papers.abstract: We study the impacts of vertical integration between insurers and hospitals. We develop a bilateral oligopoly model of competition with endogenous plan design and hospital prices, and estimate it using administrative data from Chile. Integrated insurers offer plan networks that favor integrated hospitals, and non-integrated insurers restrict access to integrated hospitals to limit the raising rivals’ costs threat. These skewed networks restrict substitution across hospitals, softening price competition. Whereas vertical integration reduces double marginalization, plan design distortions and weaker hospital competition more than compensate. Vertical integration leads to a misallocation of demand across hospitals, higher healthcare spending, and lower welfare.
papers.zh_title: 医疗市场中的纵向整合与计划设计
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了保险公司与医院之间纵向整合的影响。我们构建了一个具有内生计划设计和医院价格的双边寡头竞争模型，并使用智利的行政数据对其进行估计。整合后的保险公司提供的计划网络偏向于整合医院，而非整合的保险公司则限制对整合医院的访问，以限制其提高竞争对手成本的威胁。这些倾斜的网络限制了医院之间的替代，从而削弱了价格竞争。虽然纵向整合减少了双重边际化，但计划设计的扭曲和医院竞争的弱化超过了这一效应。纵向整合导致需求在医院间的错误配置、更高的医疗支出和更低的福利。

papers.title: Disemployment Effects of Unemployment Insurance: A Meta-Analysis
papers.authors: Jonathan P. Cohen, Peter Ganong
papers.abstract: We systematically review studies of how unemployment benefits affect unemployment duration. Statistically significant findings are eight times more likely to be published. Correcting for publication bias cuts the average elasticity by a third. Meta-analysis is a data-driven way to aggregate estimates across policy contexts and generalize sufficient statistics methods to compute the global optimal policy. Although existing consumption drop-based approaches typically imply an optimal replacement rate near zero, our corrected estimates imply an optimal replacement rate of 28% in the US. We are unable to reject the hypothesis that the “micro” elasticity is equal to the “macro” elasticity.
papers.meta: Programs：LS, ME, PE；JEL：C13, E24, E64, J64, J65
papers.zh_title: 失业保险的失业效应：一项元分析
papers.zh_abstract: 我们系统性地回顾了关于失业救济金如何影响失业持续时间的研究。统计上显著的研究结果被发表的可能性高出八倍。纠正发表偏倚后，平均弹性降低了三分之一。元分析是一种数据驱动的方法，用于汇总不同政策背景下的估计值，并推广充分统计量方法以计算全局最优政策。尽管现有的基于消费下降的方法通常暗示最优替代率接近零，但我们的修正估计表明，美国的最优替代率为28%。我们无法拒绝“微观”弹性等于“宏观”弹性的假设。

papers.title: Can Operation Warp Speed Serve as a Model for Accelerating Innovations Beyond COVID Vaccines?
papers.authors: Arielle D'Souza, Kendall Hoyt, Christopher M. Snyder, Alec Stapp
papers.abstract: Operation Warp Speed (OWS) was a U.S. government-led program to accelerate the development, production, and administration of COVID-19 vaccines. The program cut the typical ten-year timeline needed to develop a new vaccine down to ten months and began vaccinating vulnerable populations within a year after launch. OWS’s success has led to calls for a similar mission model to accelerate innovations addressing other pressing social needs, including a cure for Alzheimer’s disease or atmospheric-carbon removal to combat global warming. We provide a framework to understand which innovations call for a mission approach and apply economic principles to identify key design features that contributed to the success of OWS.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, POL, PR；JEL：D47, I18, L65, O31, O32, O35, O38, Q54
papers.zh_title: “曲速行动”能否成为加速新冠疫苗以外创新的模式？
papers.zh_abstract: “曲速行动”是一项由美国政府主导的计划，旨在加速新冠疫苗的研发、生产和接种。该计划将通常需要十年才能完成的新疫苗开发时间缩短至十个月，并在启动后一年内开始为脆弱人群接种疫苗。“曲速行动”的成功引发了呼吁，希望采用类似的使命驱动模式来加速应对其他紧迫社会需求的创新，例如阿尔茨海默病的治疗方法或应对全球变暖的大气碳去除技术。我们提供了一个框架来理解哪些创新需要采用使命驱动方法，并应用经济学原理来识别促成“曲速行动”成功的关键设计特征。

papers.title: Modeling Uncertainty in Climate Policy: An Application to the US IRA
papers.authors: James B. Bushnell, Aaron Smith
papers.abstract: In recent years the analysis of US climate policy on the electricity sector has predominantly deployed electricity planning or capacity expansion models that use deterministic or equilibrium optimization methods. While uncertainty in key input assumptions is considered, it is usually restricted to scenario analysis. In this study we combine time-series econometric forecasting methods with an equilibrium electricity system-expansion model. The goal is to produce statistically rigorous distributions of outcomes, rather than rely upon individually selected scenarios. \nWe apply these techniques to the case of the US Inflation Reduction Act (IRA) in the context of the western US electricity grid. The most significant power sector financial incentives are tax credits applied to eligible zero-carbon and storage resources. Our results indicate that the impact of the IRA, in terms of additional investment in low-carbon resources, depends heavily on the realization of key exogenous variables. However, the net effect of the IRA is to sharply narrow the range of future carbon emissions, largely by eliminating states of the world where investment in natural gas resources would otherwise be optimal.
papers.zh_title: 气候政策中的不确定性建模：对美国《通胀削减法案》的应用
papers.zh_abstract: 近年来，对美国电力部门气候政策的分析主要采用电力规划或容量扩展模型，这些模型使用确定性或均衡优化方法。虽然考虑了关键输入假设的不确定性，但这通常仅限于情景分析。在本研究中，我们将时间序列计量经济预测方法与均衡电力系统扩展模型相结合。目标是产生统计上严谨的结果分布，而不是依赖于单独选择的场景。我们将这些技术应用于美国西部电网背景下的美国《通胀削减法案》案例。最重要的电力部门财政激励措施是对符合条件的零碳和储能资源提供的税收抵免。我们的结果表明，《通胀削减法案》在低碳资源额外投资方面的影响，在很大程度上取决于关键外生变量的实现情况。然而，《通胀削减法案》的净效应是大幅缩小了未来碳排放的范围，主要是通过消除那些原本投资天然气资源是最优选择的世界状态。

papers.title: Productivity Gains and Work Conditions in Coercive Labor Markets: Experimental Evidence from the Bangladesh Brick Sector
papers.authors: Grant Miller, Debashish Biswas, Aprajit Mahajan, Kimberly Singer Babiarz, Nina R. Brooks, Jessie Brunner, Sania Ashraf, Jack Shane, Alvise Scarabosio, Sameer Maithel, Shoeb Ahmed, Moogdho Mahzab, Mohammad Rofi Uddin, Mahbubur Rahman, Stephen P. Luby
papers.abstract: Productivity growth in competitive labor markets can improve worker welfare over time through higher wages or better conditions, but it is unclear if productivity gains benefit workers in coercive labor markets (where force or threats shape employment). We examine this issue in the Bangladesh brick sector using a randomized trial that introduced a more efficient production method. Despite large productivity improvements, we find no reduction in (high) rates of labor trafficking or child labor. These findings suggest that in the short-term, productivity growth alone may be insufficient to improve work conditions in coercive settings.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, LS；JEL：J28, J39, J46, J49, J59, J81, J83, O17, O53
papers.zh_title: 强制劳动力市场中的生产率提升与工作条件：来自孟加拉国砖瓦行业的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 生产率增长是经济发展理论的核心，并且可以通过提高工资或改善条件来提升工人福利。虽然这在竞争性劳动力市场中可能成立，但在强制劳动力市场中，即通过武力或威胁来塑造雇佣关系的情况下，生产率提升是否能使工人受益尚不清楚。我们通过在孟加拉国砖瓦行业进行的一项随机试验来研究这个问题，该试验引入了一种更高效的生产方法。尽管生产率有了大幅提升，但我们发现劳动力贩卖或童工的高发生率并未减少。这些发现表明，仅靠生产率增长可能不足以改善强制环境下的工作条件。

papers.title: Smaller than We Thought? The Effect of Automatic Savings Policies
papers.authors: James J. Choi, David Laibson, Jordan Cammarota, Richard Lombardo, John Beshears
papers.abstract: Medium- and long-run dynamics undermine the effect of automatic enrollment and default savings-rate auto-escalation on retirement savings. Our analysis of nine 401(k) plans incorporates the facts that employees frequently leave firms (often before matching contributions from their employer have fully vested), a large percentage of 401(k) balances are withdrawn upon employment separation, and many employees opt out of auto-escalation. Steady-state saving rates increase by 0.6% of income due to automatic enrollment and 0.3% of income due to default autoescalation. Only 40% of those with an auto-escalation default escalate on their first escalation date, and more opt out later.
papers.zh_title: 比我们想象的要小？自动储蓄政策的效果
papers.zh_abstract: 中期和长期的动态变化削弱了自动加入和默认储蓄率自动递增对退休储蓄的影响。我们对九个401(k)计划的分析纳入了以下事实：员工经常离职（通常是在雇主的匹配缴款完全归属之前），很大比例的401(k)余额在离职时被提取，以及许多员工选择退出自动递增。由于自动加入，稳态储蓄率增加了收入的0.6%；由于默认自动递增，增加了收入的0.3%。在默认自动递增的人群中，只有40%的人在第一个递增日期进行了递增，更多的人后来选择退出。

papers.title: Long-term Pre-conception Exposure to Local Violence and Infant Health
papers.authors: Eunsik Chang, Sandra Orozco-Aleman, María Padilla-Romo
papers.abstract: This paper studies the effects of mothers' long-term pre-conception exposure to local violence on birth outcomes. Using administrative data from Mexico and two different empirical strategies, our results indicate that mothers' long-term exposure to local violence prior to conception has detrimental effects on infant health at birth. The results suggest that loss of women's human capital and deterioration of mental health are potential underlying mechanisms behind the adverse effects, highlighting intergenerational consequences of exposure to local violence. Our findings shed light on the welfare implications of local violence that are not captured in in-utero exposure to violence.
papers.zh_title: 孕前长期暴露于本地暴力与婴儿健康
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了母亲在受孕前长期暴露于本地暴力对出生结局的影响。利用墨西哥的行政数据和两种不同的实证策略，我们的结果表明，母亲在受孕前长期暴露于本地暴力对婴儿出生时的健康产生不利影响。研究结果提示，女性人力资本的损失和心理健康状况的恶化是这些不利影响背后的潜在机制，凸显了暴露于本地暴力的代际后果。我们的发现揭示了本地暴力对福利的影响，这些影响并未被宫内暴力暴露所捕捉。

papers.title: Short-time Employment Aid During the Covid-19 Lockdown Short- and Long-run Effectiveness
papers.authors: Luca Salerno, Axel H. Börsch-Supan, Diana López-Falcón, Johannes Rausch
papers.abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic led to significant economic disruptions, prompting many governments to implement short-time employment aid (STEA) to mitigate job losses and income reductions. This study examines the effectiveness of STEA in the short and long term in Europe among workers aged 50 and older, a part of the population that was especially threatened by the disease. Using data from the Survey of Health, Ageing and Retirement in Europe (SHARE), we analyze the impact of STEA on employment status, working hours, and income during and after the pandemic.
papers.zh_title: 新冠封锁期间的短期就业援助：短期与长期有效性
papers.zh_abstract: COVID-19大流行导致了重大的经济混乱，促使许多政府实施短期就业援助以减少失业和收入下降。本研究考察了短期就业援助在欧洲50岁及以上工人中的短期和长期有效性，这一人群尤其受到该疾病的威胁。利用欧洲健康、老龄化和退休调查的数据，我们分析了短期就业援助在大流行期间及之后对就业状况、工作时间和收入的影响。

papers.title: Tasks At Work: Comparative Advantage, Technology and Labor Demand
papers.authors: Daron Acemoglu, Fredric Kong, Pascual Restrepo
papers.abstract: This chapter reviews recent advances in the task model and shows how this framework can be put to work to understand trends in the labor market in recent decades. Production in each industry requires the completion of various tasks that can be assigned to workers with different skills or to capital. Factors of production have well-defined comparative advantage across tasks, which governs substitution patterns. Technological change can: (1) augment a specific labor type—e.g., increase the productivity of labor in tasks it is already performing; (2) augment capital; (3) automate work by enabling capital to perform tasks previously allocated to labor; (4) create new tasks. The task model clarifies that these different technologies have distinct effects on labor demand, factor shares, and productivity and their full impact depends on the substitution patterns between workers that arise endogenously in the task framework. We explore the implications of the task framework using reduced-form evidence, highlighting the central role of automation and new tasks in recent labor market trends. We also explain how the general equilibrium effects ignored in these reduced-form approaches can be estimated structurally.
papers.zh_title: 工作中的任务：比较优势、技术与劳动力需求
papers.zh_abstract: 本章回顾了任务模型的最新进展，并展示了如何利用这一框架来理解近几十年来劳动力市场的趋势。每个行业的生产都需要完成各种任务，这些任务可以分配给具有不同技能的工人或资本。生产要素在不同任务中具有明确的比较优势，这支配着替代模式。技术变革可以：（1）增强特定劳动类型——例如，提高劳动在其已执行任务中的生产率；（2）增强资本；（3）通过使资本能够执行以前分配给劳动的任务来实现自动化；（4）创造新任务。任务模型阐明，这些不同的技术对劳动力需求、要素份额和生产率具有不同的影响，其全面影响取决于任务框架内内生产生的工人之间的替代模式。我们利用简化形式证据探讨了任务框架的含义，强调了自动化和新任务在近期劳动力市场趋势中的核心作用。我们还解释了如何通过结构性估计来估算这些简化形式方法所忽略的一般均衡效应。

papers.title: Markups and Markdowns
papers.authors: Chad Syverson
papers.abstract: Interest in market power has recently surged among economists in many fields, well beyond its traditional home in industrial organization. This has focused empirical attention on markups, the ratios of price to marginal cost in product markets, and markdowns, the ratios of inputs’ marginal products to their paid wage in factor markets. In this review, I offer a conceptual overview of both metrics and survey recent research examining them. I pay particular attention to the distinct interests that microeconomists and macroeconomists have had regarding these metrics, as well as topics that have bridged and are bridging these often distinct literatures.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, DEV, EFG, IO, LS, PR；JEL：D4, E3, L0
papers.zh_title: 加成率与折价率
papers.zh_abstract: 近年来，许多领域的经济学家对市场势力的兴趣激增，远远超出了其传统的产业组织领域。这使实证研究聚焦于产品市场的加成率（价格与边际成本之比）和要素市场的折价率（投入要素的边际产品与其支付工资之比）。在本综述中，我提供了这两个指标的概念性概述，并调查了近期对它们进行的研究。我特别关注微观经济学家和宏观经济学家对这些指标的不同兴趣，以及已经并将这些通常不同的文献联系起来的话题。

papers.title: The Potential Long-Run Implications of a Permanently-Expanded Child Tax Credit
papers.authors: Elizabeth Ananat, Irwin Garfinkel
papers.abstract: For many of those who worked to include an expanded Child Tax Credit in the 2021 American Rescue Plan, an important motivation was to test the feasibility and effectiveness of a permanent U.S. child allowance similar to those provided in other rich countries. Because this expansion was short-lived, however, evaluations of its effects cannot provide complete evidence on the long-run effects of a permanently expanded CTC. We leverage theoretical predictions from standard economic models, behavioral science, and child development frameworks, along with empirical evidence from literature evaluating previous long-term cash and quasi-cash transfers to families with children, to predict the likely long-run impacts of a permanent child allowance. We find that it would lead to increased future earnings and tax payments, improved health and longevity, and reduced health care, crime, and child protection costs; using conventional valuations, benefits to society outweigh costs nearly 10 to 1, with most benefits due to credit refundability.
papers.zh_title: 永久性扩大儿童税收抵免的潜在长期影响
papers.zh_abstract: 对于许多致力于将扩大儿童税收抵免纳入2021年《美国救援计划》的人来说，一个重要的动机是测试类似于其他富裕国家提供的永久性美国儿童津贴的可行性和有效性。然而，由于这次扩大是短暂的，对其效果的评估无法为永久性扩大儿童税收抵免的长期影响提供完整证据。我们利用标准经济模型、行为科学和儿童发展框架的理论预测，以及评估以往向有子女家庭提供长期现金和准现金转移的文献中的实证证据，来预测永久性儿童津贴可能产生的长期影响。我们发现，这将导致未来收入和税收增加、健康和寿命改善，以及医疗、犯罪和儿童保护成本降低；使用传统估值方法，社会收益与成本之比接近10比1，其中大部分收益归因于税收抵免的可退还性。

papers.title: The Politicization of Social Responsibility
papers.authors: Todd A. Gormley, Manish Jha, Meng Wang
papers.abstract: Institutional investors are less likely to support shareholder proposals on environmental and social issues for firms headquartered in Republican-led states. The decline in support has become more pronounced in recent years, aligning with politicians emphasizing companies’ social responsibility efforts, and among firms receiving state-level subsidies and tax breaks.
