papers.zh_abstract: 2021年约有2750万人成为强迫劳动的受害者。印度建筑业尤其容易受到强迫劳动的影响，因为工人面临过长工时、强制休息日工作以及工资拖欠。负责管理工人环境的微型承包商，由于获得营运资金的渠道有限，常常自身面临财务约束。本研究调查了在班加罗尔和德里，通过向随机选择的微型承包商提供低成本贷款，缓解其流动性约束是否能改善其工人的劳动条件。我们的研究结果显示，这一干预措施总体上并未改善工作条件；事实上，某些结果略有恶化。然而，由受教育程度更高且非移民的微型承包商雇用的工人经历了显著更好的劳动条件，这突显了微型承包商之间的重要异质性。这项研究为打击强迫劳动的努力提供了新的因果见解。

papers.title: How Do Holistic Wrap-Around Anti-Poverty Programs Affect Employment and Individualized Outcomes?
papers.authors: Javier Espinosa, William N. Evans, David C. Phillips, Tim Spilde
papers.abstract: A new wave of social service programs aims to build a pathway out of poverty by helping clients define their own goals and then supporting them flexibly and intensively over multiple years to meet those goals. We conduct a randomized controlled trial of one such program. Participants randomly assigned to intensive, holistic, wrap-around services have 10 percentage points higher employment rates after one year compared with a control group offered only help with an immediate need. Most of this effect appears to persist after programming ends. However, we find limited evidence that intensive, holistic services affect areas beyond employment, even when other areas of life are participants’ primary goals. We find some evidence that the program works by increasing hopefulness and agency among participants, which may be more useful in supporting labor force participation than in meeting other goals.
papers.zh_title: 整体性全方位反贫困项目如何影响就业和个性化结果？
papers.zh_abstract: 新一波社会服务项目旨在通过帮助客户定义自己的目标，然后灵活且密集地支持他们多年以实现这些目标，从而构建一条摆脱贫困的路径。我们对其中一个项目进行了随机对照试验。与仅提供即时需求帮助的对照组相比，随机分配到密集、整体、全方位服务的参与者在一年后的就业率高出10个百分点。这种效果的大部分似乎在项目结束后仍然持续。然而，我们发现的有限证据表明，密集、整体的服务会影响就业以外的领域，即使生活的其他领域是参与者的主要目标。我们找到一些证据表明，该项目通过增加参与者的希望感和能动性来发挥作用，这可能更有助于支持劳动力参与，而非实现其他目标。

papers.title: Invoicing Currency and Exchange Rate Pass-Through in Japanese Imports: A Panel VAR Analysis
papers.authors: Taiyo Yoshimi, Uraku Yoshimoto, Takatoshi Ito, Kiyotaka Sato, Junko Shimizu, Yushi Yoshida
papers.abstract: This study utilizes the granular Japanese customs data from 2014 to 2020 to examine the exchange rate pass-through (ERPT) to Japanese import prices. It mainly focuses on the impact of the invoicing currency choice on ERPT. The ERPT elasticity in products invoiced in the exporter’s currency is greater than those invoiced in yen. In the full sample analysis, the ERPT elasticity was 0.75 for products invoiced in the exporter’s currency, compared to about 0.19 for yen-invoiced products. We find the same tendency for imports from two Asian powerhouses: China and Thailand. There is no significant difference in the ERPT elasticity between products invoiced in the exporter’s currency and those invoiced in a third currency (i.e., a currency other than yen or the exporter’s currency). In addition, an asymmetric pass-through is found, namely the ERPT during the appreciation phase of the yen is higher than during the depreciation phase. This finding is interpreted that foreign exporters strengthen their pricing-to-market behavior during the yen depreciation phase to maintain their market share.
papers.zh_title: 日本进口中的计价货币与汇率传递：面板VAR分析
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究利用2014年至2020年详细的日本海关数据，考察汇率传递对日本进口价格的影响。它主要关注计价货币选择对汇率传递的影响。以出口商货币计价的产品的汇率传递弹性大于以日元计价的产品。在全样本分析中，以出口商货币计价的产品的汇率传递弹性为0.75，而以日元计价的产品约为0.19。我们发现从两个亚洲强国——中国和泰国——进口时也存在同样的趋势。以出口商货币计价的产品与以第三方货币（即日元或出口商货币以外的货币）计价的产品之间，在汇率传递弹性上没有显著差异。此外，还发现了非对称传递，即日元升值阶段的汇率传递高于贬值阶段。这一发现被解释为，在日元贬值阶段，外国出口商为了维持其市场份额而加强了定价行为。

papers.title: The Case for Researching Applied Privacy Enhancing Technologies
papers.authors: Claire M. Bowen, Joshua Snoke, Aaron R. Williams, Andrés F. Barrientos
papers.abstract: Research on privacy enhancing approaches for sharing data has grown significantly over the past two decades. This increased interest has led to extensive theoretical and methodological research, but the number of practical applications of privacy enhancing technologies has lagged far behind. This paper provides an overview of the Safe Data Technologies Project and the approach we have taken to conducting privacy research with the specific aim of putting theory into practice and incorporating user input. We provide an overview of the broader project goals, which aim to safely expand access to administrative tax data that is currently highly restricted. We highlight how understanding user interactions with the privacy enhancing methods has driven our research path and challenged the often unrealistic assumptions underlying much of the theoretical work. We review the primary findings from our research, discuss our plans for future directions, and make the case for researchers to pursue similar lines of applied inquiry.
papers.zh_title: 研究应用型隐私增强技术的理由
papers.zh_abstract: 过去二十年，关于共享数据的隐私增强方法的研究显著增长。这种日益增长的兴趣导致了广泛的理论和方法研究，但隐私增强技术的实际应用数量远远落后。本文概述了安全数据技术项目以及我们为进行隐私研究所采取的方法，其具体目标是将理论付诸实践并纳入用户意见。我们概述了更广泛的项目目标，旨在安全地扩大对目前高度受限的行政税务数据的访问。我们强调，理解用户与隐私增强方法的互动如何推动了我们的研究路径，并挑战了支撑许多理论工作的往往不切实际的假设。我们回顾了研究的主要发现，讨论了未来方向的计划，并主张研究人员应追求类似的应用探究路线。

papers.title: Skills and Human Capital in the Labor Market
papers.authors: David J. Deming, Mikko I. Silliman
papers.abstract: This paper synthesizes the economics literature on skills and human capital, with a particular focus on higher-order capacities like social and decision-making skills. We review the empirical evidence on returns to human capital from both a micro and macro perspective, as well as the evidence on returns to human capital investment over the life-cycle. We highlight two key limitations of human capital theory as currently implemented. First, prior work mostly assumes that human capital is one-dimensional and can be measured by education or test scores alone. Second, human capital is typically modeled as augmenting the marginal product of labor with workers being treated as factors of production, just like physical capital. We argue for a new approach that treats workers as agents who decide how to allocate their labor over job tasks. Traditional cognitive skills make workers more productive in any task, while higher-order skills govern workers’ choices of which tasks to perform and whether to work alone or in a team. We illustrate the value of this approach with stylized models that incorporate teamwork and decision-making skills and generate predictions about how returns to skills vary across contexts.
papers.zh_title: 劳动力市场中的技能与人力资本
papers.zh_abstract: 本文综合了关于技能和人力资本的经济学文献，特别关注社会技能和决策技能等高级能力。我们从微观和宏观角度回顾了人力资本回报的实证证据，以及生命周期中人力资本投资回报的证据。我们强调了当前实施的人力资本理论的两个关键局限性。首先，先前的工作大多假设人力资本是一维的，可以仅通过教育或考试成绩来衡量。其次，人力资本通常被建模为增加劳动的边际产品，工人被视为生产要素，就像物质资本一样。我们主张一种新方法，将工人视为决定如何将劳动分配到工作任务中的代理人。传统的认知技能使工人在任何任务中都更有效率，而高级技能则支配工人选择执行哪些任务以及是单独工作还是团队合作。我们通过包含团队合作和决策技能的程式化模型来说明这种方法的价值，并生成关于技能回报如何随环境变化的预测。

papers.title: Failing Banks
papers.authors: Sergio A. Correia, Stephan Luck, Emil Verner
papers.abstract: Why do banks fail? We create a panel covering most commercial banks from 1863 through 2024 to study the history of failing banks in the United States. Failing banks are characterized by rising asset losses, deteriorating solvency, and an increasing reliance on expensive noncore funding. These commonalities imply that bank failures are highly predictable using simple accounting metrics from publicly available financial statements. Failures with runs were common before deposit insurance, but these failures are strongly related to weak fundamentals, casting doubt on the importance of non-fundamental runs. Furthermore, low recovery rates on failed banks’ assets suggest that most failed banks were fundamentally insolvent, barring strong assumptions about the value destruction of receiverships. Altogether, our evidence suggests that the primary cause of bank failures and banking crises is almost always and everywhere a deterioration of bank fundamentals.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, DAE, ME；JEL：G01, G21, N20, N21, N22
papers.zh_title: 失败银行
papers.zh_abstract: 银行为何会失败？我们构建了一个涵盖1863年至2024年大多数商业银行的面板数据，以研究美国失败银行的历史。失败银行的特征是资产损失上升、偿付能力恶化以及对昂贵的非核心融资的依赖日益增加。这些共性意味着，使用公开财务报表中的简单会计指标可以高度预测银行失败。在存款保险制度建立之前，伴随挤兑的失败很常见，但这些失败与薄弱的基本面密切相关，这使人们对非基本面挤兑的重要性产生了怀疑。此外，失败银行资产的低回收率表明，除非对接管造成的价值破坏做出强有力的假设，否则大多数失败银行在根本上是资不抵债的。总而言之，我们的证据表明，银行失败和银行危机的主要原因几乎总是且在任何地方都是银行基本面的恶化。

papers.title: Adapting to Misspecification
papers.authors: Timothy Armstrong, Patrick M. Kline, Liyang Sun
papers.abstract: Empirical research typically involves a robustness-efficiency tradeoff. A researcher seeking to estimate a scalar parameter can invoke strong assumptions to motivate a restricted estimator that is precise but may be heavily biased, or they can relax some of these assumptions to motivate a more robust, but variable, unrestricted estimator. When a bound on the bias of the restricted estimator is available, it is optimal to shrink the unrestricted estimator towards the restricted estimator. For settings where a bound on the bias of the restricted estimator is unknown, we propose adaptive estimators that minimize the percentage increase in worst case risk relative to an oracle that knows the bound. We show that adaptive estimators solve a weighted convex minimax problem and provide lookup tables facilitating their rapid computation. Revisiting some well known empirical studies where questions of model specification arise, we examine the advantages of adapting to—rather than testing for—misspecification.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, EFG, IO, LS, PE, TWP；JEL：C13, C18
papers.zh_title: 适应模型误设
papers.zh_abstract: 实证研究通常涉及稳健性与效率之间的权衡。试图估计标量参数的研究者可以借助强假设来推导出一个精确但可能存在严重偏误的受限估计量，或者他们可以放宽其中一些假设，以推导出一个更稳健但波动性更大的非受限估计量。当受限估计量的偏误上界已知时，将非受限估计量向受限估计量收缩是最优的。对于受限估计量偏误上界未知的情况，我们提出了自适应估计量，该估计量能够最小化相对于知道该上界的理想估计量的最坏情况风险百分比增加。我们证明，自适应估计量解决了一个加权凸极小极大问题，并提供了便于其快速计算的查找表。通过重新审视一些涉及模型设定问题的知名实证研究，我们检验了适应模型误设（而非检验模型误设）的优势。

papers.title: The Complexities of Differential Privacy for Survey Data
papers.authors: Jörg Drechsler, James Bailie
papers.abstract: The concept of differential privacy (DP) has gained substantial attention in recent years, most notably since the U.S. Census Bureau announced the adoption of the concept for its 2020 Decennial Census. However, despite its attractive theoretical properties, implementing DP in practice remains challenging, especially when it comes to survey data. In this paper we present some results from an ongoing project funded by the U.S. Census Bureau that is exploring the possibilities and limitations of DP for survey data. Specifically, we identify five aspects that need to be considered when adopting DP in the survey context: the multi-staged nature of data production; the limited privacy amplification from complex sampling designs; the implications of survey-weighted estimates; the weighting adjustments for nonresponse and other data deficiencies, and the imputation of missing values. We summarize the project’s key findings with respect to each of these aspects and also discuss some of the challenges that still need to be addressed before DP could become the new data protection standard at statistical agencies.
papers.zh_title: 差分隐私在调查数据中的复杂性
papers.zh_abstract: 差分隐私（DP）的概念近年来获得了广泛关注，尤其是在美国人口普查局宣布将其用于2020年十年一次的人口普查之后。然而，尽管其理论特性颇具吸引力，在实践中实施DP仍然具有挑战性，尤其是在调查数据方面。在本文中，我们介绍了一个由美国人口普查局资助的正在进行中的项目的一些结果，该项目正在探索DP在调查数据中的可能性和局限性。具体来说，我们确定了在调查背景下采用DP时需要考虑的五个方面：数据生产的多阶段性质；复杂抽样设计带来的有限隐私放大效应；调查加权估计的含义；针对无应答和其他数据缺陷的加权调整；以及缺失值的插补。我们总结了项目在每一个方面的关键发现，并讨论了在DP成为统计机构新的数据保护标准之前仍需解决的一些挑战。

papers.title: Trade, Innovation and Firm Financing
papers.authors: Paul Bergin, Ling Feng, Ching-Yi Lin
papers.abstract: While the trade literature has tended to view export activity and innovation as complementary activities, we present evidence that financial constraints are a reason the two activities can act as substitutes for small exporters. In particular, we find that small exporters have lower expenditure on R&D than comparable non-exporters, and we find a corresponding pattern in the leverage ratio of the capital structure of small firms. A model that combines firm decisions regarding the amount of innovation, exporting, and endogenous financial capital structure is able to account for these empirical findings. The model implies that small firms are unable to fully reap the gains from exporting due to financial constraints, as they reduce R&D to finance the costs of export participation.
papers.zh_title: 贸易、创新与企业融资
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管贸易文献倾向于将出口活动和创新视为互补活动，但我们提供的证据表明，融资约束是导致这两种活动对小型出口商而言可能表现为替代关系的一个原因。特别是，我们发现小型出口商的研发支出低于可比的非出口商，并且我们在小型企业资本结构的杠杆率中发现了相应的模式。一个结合了企业在创新量、出口和内生金融资本结构方面决策的模型能够解释这些实证发现。该模型表明，由于融资约束，小型企业无法充分获得出口收益，因为它们会削减研发以资助参与出口的成本。

papers.title: Privacy Elasticity: A (Hopefully) Useful New Concept
papers.authors: Inbal Dekel, Rachel Cummings, Ori Heffetz, Katrina Ligett
papers.abstract: Privacy considerations and their effects on behavior are becoming increasingly important. Yet the extremes of full and no privacy are rarely an option. How much does behavior change with small changes in privacy? Dekel et al. (2023) introduce the concept of privacy elasticity, the responsiveness of economic variables to small changes in privacy protections. This concept combines elasticity—a key economic measure of responsiveness of one variable to changes in another—and differential privacy—a computer science theory emerging as the standard tool for protecting and quantifying privacy. Together, they create a measure of privacy elasticity that is portable and comparable across contexts. The applicability of this concept is demonstrated by reviewing how privacy elasticity can be estimated in a public-good lab experiment.
papers.zh_title: 隐私弹性：一个（希望是）有用的新概念
papers.zh_abstract: 隐私考量及其对行为的影响正变得越来越重要。然而，完全隐私和完全没有隐私这两种极端情况很少是可行的选择。行为会随着隐私的微小变化而发生多大程度的改变？Dekel等人（2023）引入了隐私弹性的概念，即经济变量对隐私保护微小变化的响应程度。这个概念结合了弹性（衡量一个变量对另一个变量变化的响应程度的关键经济指标）和差分隐私（一种计算机科学理论，正成为保护和量化隐私的标准工具）。两者共同创造了一个可移植且可在不同情境下进行比较的隐私弹性度量。通过回顾如何在公共品实验室实验中估计隐私弹性，我们展示了这一概念的适用性。

papers.title: Restaurant Employment, Minimum Wages, and Border Discontinuities
papers.authors: Arindrajit Dube, Michael Reich, Akash Bhatt, Denis Sosinskiy
papers.abstract: Dube, Lester and Reich (2010), using cross-state border county pairs (BCPs), did not detect restaurant employment losses from higher minimum wages. Jha, Neumark and Rodriguez- Lopez (2024, JNR), using multi-state commuting zones (MSCZs), do find disemployment effects. However, JNR’s results are confounded by 1990s-era parallel trends violations amplified by the two-way-fixed-effects (TWFE) model, which is also unreliable for detecting such violations. With post-2000 data, JNR’s specification does not indicate substantial disemployment. BCPs are much less affected by such pre-trends than MSCZs. Importantly, modern event study designs (using either MSCZs or BCPs) show no local pre-tends, and find no meaningful employment decline.
papers.zh_title: 餐饮业就业、最低工资与边界不连续性
papers.zh_abstract: Dube, Lester和Reich（2010）使用跨州边界县对（BCPs）并未发现更高最低工资导致餐饮业就业损失。Jha, Neumark和Rodriguez-Lopez（2024，JNR）使用多州通勤区（MSCZs）则发现了就业抑制效应。然而，JNR的结果受到了20世纪90年代平行趋势假设违反的干扰，这种违反被双向固定效应（TWFE）模型放大，而该模型在检测此类违反时也不可靠。使用2000年后的数据，JNR的设定并未表明存在显著的就业抑制。与MSCZs相比，BCPs受此类事前趋势的影响要小得多。重要的是，现代事件研究设计（使用MSCZs或BCPs）均未显示局部事前趋势，也未发现任何有意义的就业下降。

papers.title: What’s Across the Border? Re-Evaluating the Cross-Border Evidence on Minimum Wage Effects
papers.authors: Priyaranjan Jha, David Neumark, Antonio Rodriguez-Lopez
papers.abstract: Dube, Lester, and Reich (2010) argue that state-level minimum wage variation correlated with economic shocks generates spurious evidence that higher minimum wages reduce employment. Using minimum wage variation within contiguous county pairs sharing a state border, they find no relationship between minimum wages and employment in the U.S. restaurant industry. Using the same research design, we show that this result is overturned if we use instead multi-state commuting zones, which provide superior definitions of local economic areas. These contrasting results are explained by a positive bias in the county-pair specification when using pairs formed by counties from different commuting zones.
papers.zh_title: 边界对面是什么？重新评估最低工资效应的跨境证据
papers.zh_abstract: Dube, Lester和Reich（2010）认为，与经济冲击相关的州级最低工资变化会产生虚假证据，表明更高的最低工资会减少就业。通过使用共享州边界的相邻县对内的最低工资变化，他们发现美国餐饮业的最低工资与就业之间没有关系。使用相同的研究设计，我们表明，如果改用多州通勤区（它提供了对地方经济区域的更优定义），这一结果就会被推翻。这些对比结果可以通过县对设定在使用来自不同通勤区的县对时存在的正向偏误来解释。

papers.title: Reassessing Sources of Risk Premiums in Currency Markets
papers.authors: Mikhail Chernov, Magnus Dahlquist, Lars A. Lochstoer
papers.abstract: We show that a small set of emerging markets with floating exchange rates expand the investment frontier substantially relative to G10 currencies. The frontier is characterized by an out-of-sample mean-variance efficient portfolio that prices G10- and emerging markets-based trading strategies unconditionally as well as conditionally. Our approach reveals that returns to prominent trading strategies are largely driven by factors that do not command a risk premium. After real-time hedging of such unpriced risks, the Sharpe ratios of these strategies increase substantially, providing new benchmarks for currency pricing models. For instance, the Sharpe ratio of the carry strategy increases from 0.71 to 1.29. The unpriced risks are related to geographically-based currency factors, while the priced risk that drives currency risk premiums is related to aggregate consumption exposure.
papers.zh_title: 重新评估货币市场风险溢价的来源
papers.zh_abstract: 我们表明，与G10货币相比，一小部分采用浮动汇率的新兴市场显著扩展了投资前沿。该前沿的特征是一个样本外均值-方差有效投资组合，该组合无条件地以及有条件地对基于G10和新兴市场的交易策略进行定价。我们的方法揭示，显著交易策略的回报在很大程度上由不要求风险溢价的因子驱动。在对这些未定价风险进行实时对冲后，这些策略的夏普比率大幅提高，为货币定价模型提供了新的基准。例如，利差交易策略的夏普比率从0.71增加到1.29。未定价风险与基于地理的货币因子有关，而驱动货币风险溢价的定价风险则与总消费敞口有关。

papers.title: Incentives to Vaccinate
papers.authors: Pol Campos-Mercade, Armando N. Meier, Stephan Meier, Devin G. Pope, Florian H. Schneider, Erik Wengström
papers.abstract: Whether monetary incentives to change behavior work and how they should be structured are fundamental economic questions. We overcome typical data limitations in a large-scale field experiment on vaccination (N = 5,324) with a unique combination of administrative and survey data. We find that guaranteed incentives of $20 increase uptake by 13 percentage points in the short run and 9 in the long run. Guaranteed incentives are more effective than lottery-based, prosocial, or individually-targeted incentives, though all boost vaccinations. There are no unintended consequences on future vaccination or heterogeneities based on vaccination attitudes and incentivized economic preferences. Further, administrative data on relatives shows substantial positive spillovers. Our findings demonstrate the great potential of incentives for improving public health and provide guidance on their design.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LS, PE；JEL：C93, D01, D62, I12, I18
papers.zh_title: 疫苗接种激励措施
papers.zh_abstract: 货币激励能否改变行为以及如何设计这些激励措施是基本的经济学问题。我们通过一项大规模疫苗接种实地实验（样本量N=5,324），结合独特的行政数据和调查数据，克服了典型的数据限制。研究发现，20美元的确定性激励在短期内使疫苗接种率提高13个百分点，长期内提高9个百分点。确定性激励比基于抽奖、亲社会或针对个人的激励更有效，尽管所有激励措施都促进了疫苗接种。这些激励措施对未来疫苗接种没有产生意外后果，也未基于疫苗接种态度和激励性经济偏好表现出异质性。此外，关于亲属的行政数据显示出显著的正向溢出效应。我们的研究结果证明了激励措施在改善公共卫生方面的巨大潜力，并为其设计提供了指导。

papers.title: Equilibrium Evictions
papers.authors: Dean Corbae, Andrew Glover, Michael Nattinger
papers.abstract: We develop a simple equilibrium model of rental markets for housing in which eviction occurs endogenously. Both landlords and renters lack commitment; a landlord evicts a delinquent tenant if they do not expect total future rent payments to cover costs, while tenants cannot commit to paying more rent than they would be able or willing to pay given their outside option of searching for a new rental. Renters who are persistently delinquent are more likely to be evicted and pay more per quality-adjusted unit of housing than renters who are less likely to be delinquent. Evictions due to a tenant’s inability to pay are never socially efficient, and lead to lower quality investment in housing and too few vacancies relative to the socially optimal allocation. Government policies that restrict landlords’ ability to evict can improve welfare relative to laissez-faire, but a full moratorium on evictions only raises welfare when it is temporarily adopted in response to a large adverse shock. Finally, rent support can effectively eliminate evictions even without covering all missed rent and delivers significantly larger gains than eviction restrictions.
papers.zh_title: 均衡驱逐
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个简单的住房租赁市场均衡模型，其中驱逐是内生的。房东和租户都缺乏承诺；如果房东预期未来的总租金支付无法覆盖成本，就会驱逐拖欠租金的租户，而租户则无法承诺支付超出其能力或意愿（基于其寻找新租房的替代选择）的租金。持续拖欠租金的租户更可能被驱逐，并且每质量调整单位住房的支付高于不太可能拖欠租金的租户。因租户无力支付而导致的驱逐在社会效率上从未达到最优，并且会导致住房质量投资降低以及相对于社会最优配置而言过少的空置率。与自由放任相比，限制房东驱逐能力的政府政策可以改善福利，但全面暂停驱逐只有在为应对大规模不利冲击而临时采用时才能提高福利。最后，租金支持即使不覆盖所有拖欠租金，也能有效消除驱逐，并且带来的收益显著大于驱逐限制。

papers.title: Federal Pandemic Relief and Academic Recovery
papers.authors: Dan C. Dewey, Erin M. Fahle, Thomas J. Kane, Sean F. Reardon, Douglas O. Staiger
papers.abstract: We measure the effect of district use of federal pandemic relief during the 2022-23 school year for a sample of more than 5000 districts in 29 states. We rely on several plausibly exogenous sources of variation in federal grants: differences in state Title I funding formulas, estimation error in Census local area poverty rates and differences in eligibility for federal Title I and subsidized lunch eligibility. We find that each $1000 in spending per student was associated with a .0086 SD improvement in math and a .0049 SD improvement in reading. Both are consistent with a recent meta-analysis of spending impacts by Jackson and Mackevicius (2023). As a placebo test, we find no relationship between federal dollars that were not yet spent during the 2022-23 year. We also find similar results using synthetic control group methods to compare high-poverty districts with high and low amounts of federal aid, but with similar trends in achievement through 2022. Because the federal aid was targeted at higher poverty districts, we find the federal dollars not only contributed to the recovery, but also helped narrow the gaps in achievement which had widened during the pandemic.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED；JEL：I20, I21, I22, I24, I28
papers.zh_title: 联邦疫情救助与学业恢复
papers.zh_abstract: 我们测量了2022-23学年期间，来自29个州超过5000个学区的样本中，学区使用联邦疫情救助资金的效果。我们依赖于联邦拨款中几个看似外生的变异来源：各州Title I资助公式的差异、人口普查局地方贫困率估计的误差，以及联邦Title I资格和补贴午餐资格的差异。我们发现，每名学生每增加1000美元支出，数学成绩提高0.0086个标准差，阅读成绩提高0.0049个标准差。这两个结果与Jackson和Mackevicius（2023）近期关于支出影响的元分析一致。作为安慰剂检验，我们发现2022-23学年尚未支出的联邦资金与学业成绩之间没有关系。我们还使用合成控制组方法，比较了高贫困学区中联邦援助金额高和低的群体，这些群体在2022年之前的成绩趋势相似，得出了类似的结果。由于联邦援助针对高贫困学区，我们发现联邦资金不仅促进了学业恢复，还有助于缩小疫情期间扩大的成绩差距。

papers.title: (Dis)Information Wars
papers.authors: Adrian Casillas, Maryam Farboodi, Layla Hashemi, Maryam Saeedi, Steven Wilson
papers.abstract: Over the past decade, social media platforms have emerged as prominent vehicles for displaying dissent. In response, various actors have increasingly spread fake news on these platforms to impair the opposition—the (dis)information war. We analyze a methodology to identify disinformation using network-based characteristics of the news initiators, and use data from Twitter (now X) to assess the effectiveness of this method in limiting the spread of disinformation. We find that it detects at least 85% of verified instances of disinformation without misidentifying any true news, and reduces both account engagement and lifespan of disinformation by at least a factor of two, highlighting the importance of swift discovery of disinformation to interrupt its exponential spread.
papers.zh_title: （虚假）信息战
papers.zh_abstract: 在过去十年中，社交媒体平台已成为展示异议的重要载体。作为回应，各种行为者越来越多地在这些平台上传播假新闻以削弱反对派——即（虚假）信息战。我们分析了一种利用新闻发起者网络特征来识别虚假信息的方法，并使用来自Twitter（现为X）的数据评估该方法在限制虚假信息传播方面的有效性。我们发现，该方法在不误判任何真实新闻的情况下，至少检测出85%的已验证虚假信息案例，并将虚假信息的账户参与度和生命周期至少降低一半，这凸显了快速发现虚假信息以中断其指数级传播的重要性。

papers.title: Patent Hunters
papers.authors: Lauren Cohen, Umit Gurun, Katie Moon, Paula Suh
papers.abstract: Analyzing millions of patents granted by the USPTO between 1976 and 2020, we find a pattern where specific patents only rise to prominence after considerable time has passed. Amongst these late-blooming influential patents, we show that there are key players (patent hunters) who consistently identify and develop them. Although initially overlooked, these late-blooming patents have significantly more influence on average than early-recognized patents and are associated with significantly more new product launches. Patent hunters, as early detectors and adopters of these late-blooming patents, are also associated with significant positive rents. Their adoption of these overlooked patents is associated with a 6.4% rise in sales growth (t = 3.02), a 2.2% increase in Tobin’s Q (t = 3.91), and a 2.2% increase in new product offerings (t = 2.97). We instrument for patent hunting, and find strong evidence that these benefits are causally due to patent hunting. The rents associated with patent hunting on average exceed those of the original patent creators themselves. Patents hunted are closer to the core technology of patent hunters, more peripheral to writers, and in less competitive spaces. Lastly, patent hunting appears to be a persistent firm characteristic and to have an inventor-level component.
papers.zh_title: 专利猎手
papers.zh_abstract: 通过分析美国专利商标局在1976年至2020年间授予的数百万项专利，我们发现了一种模式，即特定专利只有在相当长的时间过去后才变得突出。在这些大器晚成的影响力专利中，我们展示了存在关键参与者（专利猎手），他们持续识别并开发这些专利。尽管最初被忽视，但这些大器晚成的专利平均而言比早期被认可的专利具有显著更大的影响力，并且与显著更多的新产品发布相关。专利猎手作为这些大器晚成专利的早期发现者和采用者，也与显著的正租金相关。他们采用这些被忽视的专利与销售额增长6.4%（t=3.02）、托宾Q值增加2.2%（t=3.91）以及新产品供应增加2.2%（t=2.97）相关。我们为专利猎手行为寻找工具变量，并发现强有力的证据表明这些收益是由专利猎手行为因果导致的。与专利猎手相关的租金平均而言超过了原始专利创造者自身的租金。被猎取的专利更接近专利猎手的核心技术，对原始撰写者而言更边缘化，并且处于竞争较少的领域。最后，专利猎手似乎是一个持久的公司特征，并且具有发明人层面的组成部分。

papers.title: Do Higher Tipped Minimum Wages Reduce Race, Ethnic, or Gender Earnings Gaps for Restaurant Workers?
papers.authors: David Neumark, Emma Wohl
papers.abstract: One of the arguments increasingly made to support large minimum wage increases is that they decrease wage or earnings gaps for minorities or women (e.g., Derenoncourt and Montialoux, 2021). The argument is often made with particular reference to higher tipped minimum wages for restaurant workers, because of discrimination in tipping that is immune to equal pay policy requirements. Of course, even if higher tipped minimum wages reduce hourly pay differences between groups, increases in tipped minimum wages can reduce employment or hours among restaurant workers (Neumark and Yen, 2023), and these effects could differ by race and gender, so implications for hourly earnings do not necessarily extend to overall earnings. We estimate the impact of variation in tipped minimum wages – or, equivalently, tip credits – on earnings of restaurant workers (which ignores employment variation but incorporates hours variation). We find that tipped minimum wages raise hourly earnings of women, but not of Blacks or Hispanics. But tipped minimum wages generally do not raise weekly earnings for these groups (because of hours declines for women). In contrast, regular minimum wages boost hourly and weekly earnings of all three groups of restaurant workers, with the effects arising from non-tipped workers.
papers.zh_title: 提高含小费最低工资能否缩小餐饮业员工的种族、民族或性别收入差距？
papers.zh_abstract: 支持大幅提高最低工资的一个日益常见的论点是，这能缩小少数族裔或女性的工资或收入差距（例如，Derenoncourt 和 Montialoux, 2021）。这一论点尤其针对餐饮业员工，因为小费中的歧视不受同工同酬政策约束。当然，即使提高含小费最低工资能缩小群体间的小时工资差异，它也可能减少餐饮业员工的就业或工时（Neumark 和 Yen, 2023），且这些影响可能因种族和性别而异，因此对小时收入的影响未必能推广到总收入。我们估算了含小费最低工资（或等价地，小费抵免）变化对餐饮业员工收入的影响（这忽略了就业变化，但包含了工时变化）。我们发现，含小费最低工资提高了女性的小时收入，但对黑人或西班牙裔没有影响。然而，含小费最低工资通常并未提高这些群体的周收入（因为女性工时减少）。相比之下，常规最低工资提高了所有三类餐饮业员工的小时和周收入，其影响来自非小费员工。

papers.title: Climate Change through the Lens of Macroeconomic Modeling
papers.authors: Jesús Fernández-Villaverde, Kenneth Gillingham, Simon Scheidegger
papers.abstract: There is a rapidly advancing literature on the macroeconomics of climate change. This review focuses on developments in the construction and solution of structural integrated assessment models (IAMs), highlighting the marriage of state-of-the-art natural science with general equilibrium theory. We discuss challenges in solving dynamic stochastic IAMs with sharp nonlinearities, multiple regions, and multiple sources of risk. Key innovations in deep learning and other machine learning approaches overcome many computational challenges and enhance the accuracy and relevance of policy findings. We conclude with an overview of recent applications of IAMs and key policy insights.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, EFG；JEL：C61, E27, Q5, Q51, Q54, Q58
papers.zh_title: 宏观经济建模视角下的气候变化
papers.zh_abstract: 关于气候变化宏观经济学的文献正在迅速发展。本综述聚焦于结构性综合评估模型（IAMs）的构建与求解进展，强调了最前沿自然科学与一般均衡理论的结合。我们讨论了在求解具有尖锐非线性、多区域和多风险源的动态随机IAMs时所面临的挑战。深度学习及其他机器学习方法的关键创新克服了许多计算难题，并提升了政策发现的准确性和相关性。最后，我们概述了IAMs的最新应用及关键政策启示。

papers.title: Aid for Incumbents: The Electoral Consequences of COVID-19 Relief
papers.authors: Jeffrey Clemens, Julia A. Payson, Stan Veuger
papers.abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic led to unprecedented levels of federal transfers to state governments. Did this funding increase benefit incumbent politicians electorally? Identifying the effect of revenue windfalls on voting is challenging because whatever conditions led to the influx of cash might also benefit or harm incumbents for other reasons. We develop an instrument that allows us to predict allocations to states based on variation in congressional representation. We find that incumbents in state-wide races in 2020, 2021, and 2022 performed significantly better in states that received more relief funding due to their overrepresentation in Congress. These results are robust across specifications and after adjusting for a variety of economic and political controls. We consistently find that the pandemic-period electoral advantage of incumbent politicians in states receiving more aid substantially exceeds the more modest advantage politicians in these states enjoyed before the pandemic. This paper contributes to our understanding of economic voting and the incumbency advantage during times of crisis as well as the downstream electoral consequences of both the COVID-19 pandemic and of unequal political representation at the federal level.
papers.zh_title: 对现任者的援助：新冠疫情救济的选举后果
papers.zh_abstract: 新冠疫情导致联邦政府向州政府转移支付达到前所未有的水平。这笔资金是否在选举中惠及现任政治家？识别收入意外之财对投票的影响具有挑战性，因为导致现金流入的条件本身也可能因其他原因使现任者受益或受损。我们开发了一个工具变量，使我们能够根据国会代表权的差异来预测对各州的拨款分配。我们发现，在2020年、2021年和2022年的全州竞选中，那些因在国会中代表权过高而获得更多救济资金的州的现任者表现显著更好。这些结果在多种设定下以及调整了各种经济和政治控制变量后依然稳健。我们一致发现，在疫情期间，获得更多援助的州的现任政治家的选举优势，显著超过了这些州的政治家在疫情前享有的较为温和的优势。本文有助于我们理解危机时期的经济投票和现任优势，以及新冠疫情和联邦层面不平等的政治代表权所带来的下游选举后果。

papers.title: Optimal Financing of Government Purchases
papers.authors: Andrew B. Abel, Stavros Panageas
papers.abstract: We characterize a planner's optimal allocation of consumption and capital in an overlapping generations model with exogenous government purchases, privately-observed idiosyncratic shocks to the depreciation rate of capital, and a proportional cost of reversing investment to transform used capital to consumption. We show how a package of various taxes and government bonds can finance government purchases and support the same balanced growth path as in the planner's optimum. The optimal tax rate on capital income implements the planner's optimal (but incomplete) sharing of idiosyncratic depreciation risks, while respecting the private nature of these risks.
papers.zh_title: 政府购买的最优融资
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在一个具有外生政府购买、私人观察到的资本折旧率异质性冲击以及将旧资本转化为消费的成比例投资逆转成本的世代交叠模型中，刻画了计划者对消费和资本的最优配置。我们展示了如何通过一揽子税收和政府债券来为政府购买融资，并支持与计划者最优相同的平衡增长路径。最优资本所得税率实现了计划者对异质性折旧风险的最优（但不完全）分担，同时尊重了这些风险的私人性质。

papers.title: Green Bonds: New Label, Same Projects
papers.authors: Pauline Lam, Jeffrey Wurgler
papers.abstract: Green finance emphasizes “additionality,” meaning funded projects should offer distinct environmental benefits beyond standard practice. Analysis of U.S. corporate and municipal green bonds, however, indicates that the vast majority of green bond proceeds is used for refinancing ordinary debt, continuing ongoing projects, or initiating projects without green aspects that are novel for the issuer. Only 2% of corporate and municipal green bond proceeds initiate projects with clearly novel green features. Investors and market participants also do not distinguish among levels of additionality: Offering yields, announcement effects, green bond index inclusion, and green bond fund holdings are uncorrelated with additionality.
papers.zh_title: 绿色债券：新标签，老项目
papers.zh_abstract: 绿色金融强调“额外性”，即所资助的项目应提供超越常规实践的独特环境效益。然而，对美国公司和市政绿色债券的分析表明，绝大多数绿色债券收益用于再融资普通债务、延续现有项目或启动对发行方而言不具有新颖绿色特征的项目。只有2%的公司和市政绿色债券收益启动了具有明显新颖绿色特征的项目。投资者和市场参与者也不区分额外性水平：发行收益率、公告效应、绿色债券指数纳入以及绿色债券基金持有量与额外性无关。

papers.title: The Impact of Early Childhood Parenting Interventions on Child Learning: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis
papers.authors: Kimberly Dadisman, Andre Nickow, Philip Oreopoulos
papers.abstract: Parenting is widely considered to be among the most important influences on early childhood (EC) development. But to what extent and under what circumstances can EC parenting programs improve child learning outcomes? While substantial progress has been made toward addressing these questions in recent years, there have been few attempts to systematically synthesize the evidence thus far with a view toward scaling and policy implications. This paper works toward filling this gap through a systematic review including both a quantitative meta-analysis and a detailed narrative analysis of randomized evaluations that test the impacts of EC parenting programs on learning outcomes. We find that these programs generate substantial effects across a wide range of contexts, and that the largest impacts are associated with programs that are conducted in low- or middle-income countries and that use curricula focusing on cognitive stimulation. Group parenting programs tend to yield effect sizes that are, on average, comparable to home visiting programs, typically at substantially lower costs. Qualitative analysis of evaluations of scaled interventions reveals that administrative implementation barriers rather than program ineffectiveness likely represent the primary impediment to stronger impact. We conclude by reflecting on implications for theory, policy, and priorities for future research.
papers.zh_title: 早期儿童养育干预对儿童学习的影响：系统综述与元分析
papers.zh_abstract: 养育被广泛认为是影响早期儿童发展的最重要因素之一。但早期儿童养育项目在多大程度上以及在何种情况下能够改善儿童的学习成果？尽管近年来在解答这些问题方面取得了实质性进展，但很少有研究试图系统性地综合现有证据，以服务于推广和政策制定。本文通过一项系统综述（包括定量元分析和详细的叙述性分析）来填补这一空白，该综述评估了测试早期儿童养育项目对学习成果影响的随机评估。我们发现，这些项目在广泛的情境中产生了显著效果，其中最大的影响来自中低收入国家实施的项目以及采用认知刺激课程的项目。团体养育项目产生的平均效应量通常与家访项目相当，但成本通常低得多。对规模化项目评估的定性分析表明，行政实施障碍（而非项目无效）可能是影响效果的主要障碍。最后，我们反思了对理论、政策和未来研究优先事项的启示。

papers.title: The Distributional Consequences of Trade: Evidence from the Grain Invasion
papers.authors: Stephan Heblich, Stephen J. Redding, Yanos Zylberberg
papers.abstract: We provide new evidence on the income distributional consequences of trade using the New World Grain Invasion in the 19th Century and variation in agroclimatic suitability for wheat across locations within England and Wales. We show that this large-scale agricultural trade shock led to structural transformation away from agriculture and a redistribution of population from rural to urban areas. We develop a quantitative spatial model to rationalize our empirical findings and evaluate the aggregate implications of this international trade shock. We use our model to undertake counterfactuals for the Grain invasion, holding constant other exogenous determinants of economic activity. We find modest aggregate welfare gains combined with much larger income distributional effects, with geography an important dimension along which these income distributional effects occur.
papers.zh_title: 贸易的分配后果：来自谷物入侵的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用19世纪新世界谷物入侵以及英格兰和威尔士各地小麦农业气候适宜性的差异，提供了关于贸易收入分配后果的新证据。我们表明，这一大规模农业贸易冲击导致了农业的结构转型和人口从农村向城市的重新分布。我们开发了一个定量空间模型来合理化我们的实证发现，并评估这一国际贸易冲击的总体影响。我们利用该模型对谷物入侵进行反事实分析，同时保持经济活动的其他外生决定因素不变。我们发现，适度的总体福利收益伴随着更大的收入分配效应，而地理因素是这些收入分配效应发生的重要维度。

papers.title: The Resilience of Central, Eastern and Southeastern Europe (CESEE) Countries During ECB’s Monetary Cycles
papers.authors: Joshua Aizenman, Jamel Saadaoui
papers.abstract: We investigate the cross-country resilience of CESEE countries during ECB monetary cycles after the entrance of ten countries to the EU in 2004. Our investigation examines how economic fundamental and institutional variables influence cross-country resilience regarding exchange rates, interest rates, stock prices, inflation, and growth during the subsequent monetary cycles. Cross-sectional regressions reveal that limiting inflation, active management of precautionary buffers of international reserves, lower current account deficit, better financial development, and institution quality are important predictors of resilience in the next cycle. The panel regressions show that the US shadow rate strongly influences resilience during the ECB monetary cycles. Besides, various asymmetries are discovered for current account balances, international reserves, and fuel import shares during tightening cycles. Panel quantile regressions detect asymmetries along the distribution of the dependent variables for financial development, central bank independence, and the inflation rate preceding the cycles.
papers.zh_title: 中欧、东欧和东南欧国家在欧洲央行货币政策周期中的韧性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了2004年十个国家加入欧盟后，中欧、东欧和东南欧国家在欧洲央行货币政策周期中的跨国韧性。我们的研究考察了经济基本面和制度变量如何影响各国在后续货币政策周期中在汇率、利率、股票价格、通胀和增长方面的韧性。横截面回归显示，限制通胀、积极管理国际储备的预防性缓冲、降低经常账户赤字、更好的金融发展和制度质量是预测下一周期韧性的重要因素。面板回归显示，美国影子利率在欧洲央行货币政策周期中强烈影响韧性。此外，在紧缩周期中，经常账户余额、国际储备和燃料进口份额存在各种不对称性。面板分位数回归检测到，对于金融发展、央行独立性和周期前的通胀率，因变量分布存在不对称性。

papers.title: Why Do Workers Dislike Inflation? Wage Erosion and Conflict Costs
papers.authors: Joao Guerreiro, Jonathon Hazell, Chen Lian, Christina Patterson
papers.abstract: How costly is inflation to workers? Answers to this question have focused on the path of real wages during inflationary periods. We argue that workers must take costly actions (“conflict”) to have nominal wages catch up with inflation, meaning there are welfare costs even if real wages do not fall as inflation rises. We study a menu-cost style model, where workers choose whether to engage in conflict with employers to secure a wage increase. We show that, following a rise in inflation, wage catch-up resulting from more frequent conflict does not raise welfare. Instead, the impact of inflation on worker welfare is determined by what we call “wage erosion”—how inflation would lower real wages if workers’ conflict decisions did not respond to inflation. As a result, using observed wage growth to measure worker welfare understates the costs of inflation. We conduct a survey showing that workers are willing to sacrifice around 1.75% of their wages to avoid conflict. Calibrating the model to survey data, we find that incorporating conflict significantly raises the costs of inflation for workers.
papers.zh_title: 工人为何厌恶通胀？工资侵蚀与冲突成本
papers.zh_abstract: 通胀对工人的成本有多高？对此问题的回答一直聚焦于通胀期间实际工资的路径。我们认为，工人必须采取代价高昂的行动（“冲突”）才能使名义工资赶上通胀，这意味着即使实际工资在通胀上升时并未下降，也会产生福利成本。我们研究了一个菜单成本型模型，其中工人选择是否与雇主发生冲突以确保加薪。我们表明，在通胀上升后，因冲突更频繁而导致的工资追赶并不会提高福利。相反，通胀对工人福利的影响取决于我们所谓的“工资侵蚀”——即如果工人的冲突决策不对通胀做出反应，通胀将如何降低实际工资。因此，使用观察到的工资增长来衡量工人福利会低估通胀的成本。我们进行了一项调查，显示工人愿意牺牲约1.75%的工资来避免冲突。将模型校准到调查数据后，我们发现纳入冲突显著提高了通胀对工人的成本。

papers.title: Measuring the Costs and Benefits of Regulation
papers.authors: Matilde Bombardini, Francesco Trebbi, Miao Ben Zhang
papers.abstract: This article discusses recent methodological innovations in the area of cost and benefit assessment of government regulation, in both a prospective and retrospective sense. Much of the extant progress is presented on the front of private costs of compliance. Private benefits, social costs, and social benefits remain much less systematically organized and more arduous to quantitatively assess, mostly due to the difficulty of standardizing partial and general equilibrium counterfactuals. We offer a discussion of potential future methodological improvements in cost-benefit analysis.
papers.zh_title: 衡量监管的成本与收益
papers.zh_abstract: 本文讨论了政府监管成本与收益评估领域近期的方法论创新，涵盖前瞻性和回顾性两方面。现有进展大多体现在私人合规成本方面。私人收益、社会成本和社会收益仍缺乏系统性的组织，且更难进行定量评估，这主要是由于难以标准化局部和一般均衡的反事实情景。我们讨论了成本收益分析中未来潜在的方法论改进。

papers.title: Inclusive Teaching: Spotting Social Isolation in the Classroom
papers.authors: Sule Alan, Michela Carlana, Marinella Leone
papers.abstract: We evaluate an intervention designed to increase teachers’ awareness of social isolation by providing them with their own students’ social network and information on developmental risks associated with social exclusion. Using friendship data and incentive-compatible measures of antisocial and prosocial behavior, we find that the intervention reduces social isolation and antisocial behavior without improving prosocial behavior. The reduction in antisocial behavior leads to better economic outcomes in treated classrooms, measured by average payoffs and the Gini coefficient. Our findings highlight the personal and communal benefits of alleviating social exclusion and antisocial peer relationships in schools.
papers.zh_title: 包容性教学：识别课堂中的社会孤立
papers.zh_abstract: 我们评估了一项干预措施，该措施通过向教师提供其学生的社交网络信息以及与社会排斥相关的发育风险信息，旨在提高教师对社会孤立的意识。利用友谊数据和反社会及亲社会行为的激励相容度量，我们发现该干预减少了社会孤立和反社会行为，但并未改善亲社会行为。反社会行为的减少带来了受干预班级更好的经济结果，以平均收益和基尼系数衡量。我们的发现凸显了缓解学校中社会排斥和反社会同伴关系的个人及社区益处。

papers.title: The Increasing Cost of Buying American
papers.authors: Matilde Bombardini, Andres Gonzalez-Lira, Bingjing Li, Chiara Motta
papers.abstract: The latest resurgence in the U.S. of policies aimed at reducing imports and bolstering domestic production has included the expansion of Buy American provisions. While some of these are new and untested, in this paper we evaluate long-standing procurement limitations on the purchase of foreign products by the U.S. Federal Government. We use procurement micro-data to first map and measure the positive employment effects of government purchases. We then calibrate a quantitative trade model adapted to include features relevant to the Buy American Act: a government sector, policy barriers in final and intermediate goods, labor force participation, and external economies of scale. We show that current Buy American provisions on final goods purchase have created up to 100,000 jobs at a cost of between $111,500 and $137,700 per job. However, the recently announced tightening of the policy on the use of foreign inputs will create fewer jobs at a higher cost of $154,000 to $237,800 per job. We also find scant evidence of the use of Buy American rules as an effective industrial policy.
papers.zh_title: 购买美国货的日益高昂成本
papers.zh_abstract: 美国近期旨在减少进口和促进国内生产的政策再度兴起，其中包括扩大“购买美国货”条款。虽然其中一些政策是新的且未经检验，但本文评估了美国联邦政府对购买外国产品的长期采购限制。我们利用采购微观数据首先绘制并衡量了政府购买对就业的积极影响。然后，我们校准了一个量化贸易模型，该模型经过调整以纳入与《购买美国货法案》相关的特征：政府部门、最终品和中间品的政策壁垒、劳动力参与率以及外部规模经济。我们表明，当前对最终品购买的“购买美国货”条款创造了多达10万个就业岗位，每个岗位的成本在111,500美元至137,700美元之间。然而，最近宣布的关于使用外国投入品的政策收紧将创造更少的就业岗位，每个岗位的成本更高，在154,000美元至237,800美元之间。我们还发现，几乎没有证据表明“购买美国货”规则被用作有效的产业政策。

papers.title: Horowitz-Manski-Lee Bounds with Multilayered Sample Selection
papers.authors: Kory Kroft, Ismael Mourifié, Atom Vayalinkal
papers.abstract: This paper studies partial identification of treatment effects in the presence of sample selection, where treatment affects both selection into the sample and sorting across layers with heterogeneous outcomes. We show that canonical Lee bounds identify a total effect that combines the within-layer causal effect of treatment with a sorting effect reflecting outcome differences across layers. We derive sharp bounds on the within-layer causal effect using a two-step approach that extends Horowitz and Manski (1995) to a system of mixture equations with cross-equation dependence. Further, we show that under additional restrictions, these within-layer effects are sufficient for welfare analysis. Two empirical applications to job training experiments illustrate the approach; our estimates show that even when Lee bounds are strictly positive, within-firm bounds can be tight around zero, suggesting that Lee bounds capture a pure sorting effect.
papers.meta: Programs：LS, PE；JEL：C01, C21, C26, H0, H50, J0, J24, J32
papers.zh_title: 多层样本选择下的Horowitz-Manski-Lee界
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了在企业异质性存在的情况下，职业培训对工资率的因果效应。当培训影响工人向企业的分类时，样本选择不再是二元的，而是“多层的”。本文将经典的Heckman（1979）样本选择模型——该模型假设选择是二元的——扩展到选择是多层的情境。在这种情境下，Lee界集识别了一个总效应，该效应结合了跨企业职业培训对工资率因果效应的加权平均值，与在固定培训水平下不同企业之间工资对比的加权平均值。因此，只有当企业支付同质工资和/或职业培训不影响工人跨企业分类时，Lee界集才识别出一个与政策相关的估计量。我们推导了每个企业内职业培训对工资率因果效应的尖锐界的解析表达式，该表达式利用了企业特定工资的信息。我们通过两个职业培训实验的实证应用来说明我们的部分识别方法。我们的估计表明，即使传统的Lee界严格为正，我们的企业内界也可能紧贴0，这表明经典的Lee界可能仅捕捉了职业培训的纯分类效应。

papers.title: Putting the "Finance" into "Public Finance": A Theory of Capital Gains Taxation
papers.authors: Mark A. Aguiar, Benjamin Moll, Florian Scheuer
papers.abstract: Standard optimal capital tax theory abstracts from modeling asset prices, making it unsuitable for thinking about capital gains and wealth taxation. We study optimal redistributive taxation in an environment with asset price changes, adopting the modern finance view that asset prices fluctuate not only because of changing cash flows, but also due to other factors (“discount rates”). We show that the optimal tax base (i) generally differs from the case with constant asset prices, and (ii) depends on the sources of asset-price changes. Whenever asset prices fluctuate, and are not exclusively driven by cash flow changes, taxes must target realized trades and generally involve a combination of realization-based capital gains and dividend taxes. This result stands in contrast to the classic Haig-Simons comprehensive income tax concept, as well as recent proposals for wealth or accrual-based capital gains taxes.
papers.zh_title: 将“金融”注入“公共财政”：资本利得税理论
papers.zh_abstract: 标准的最优资本税理论抽象掉了资产价格的建模，因此不适合思考资本利得和财富税。我们在资产价格变化的环境中研究最优再分配税收，采纳现代金融的观点，即资产价格不仅因现金流变化而波动，还因其他因素（“贴现率”）而波动。我们表明，最优税基（i）通常不同于资产价格不变的情况，并且（ii）取决于资产价格变化的来源。每当资产价格波动且并非完全由现金流变化驱动时，税收必须针对已实现的交易，并且通常涉及基于实现的资本利得税和股息税的组合。这一结果与经典的Haig-Simons综合所得税概念以及最近关于财富税或应计制资本利得税的提议形成对比。

papers.title: Hell with the Lid Off: Racial Segregation and Environmental Equity in America’s Most Polluted City
papers.authors: H. Spencer Banzhaf, William Mathews, Randall Walsh
papers.abstract: This study examines the relationship between racial segregation and environmental equity in Pittsburgh from 1910 to 1940. Utilizing newly digitized historical data on the spatial distribution of air pollution in what was likely America's most polluted city, we analyze how racial disparities in exposure to air pollution evolved during this period of heightening segregation. Our findings reveal that black residents experienced significantly higher levels of pollution compared to their white counterparts, and this disparity increased over time. We identify within-city moves as a critical factor exacerbating this inequity, with black movers facing increased pollution exposure. We also provide evidence of the capitalization of air pollution into housing markets. Taken as a whole, our results underscore the importance of considering environmental factors in discussions of racial and economic inequalities.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, EEE, PE；JEL：H44, I15, N30, N92, Q53, R2
papers.zh_title: 揭开地狱之盖：美国污染最严重城市的种族隔离与环境公平
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究考察了1910年至1940年间匹兹堡种族隔离与环境公平之间的关系。利用新数字化的历史数据，分析在这个可能是美国污染最严重的城市中空气污染的空间分布，我们研究了在这一隔离加剧时期，种族间空气污染暴露差异如何演变。我们的发现表明，黑人居民经历的污染水平显著高于白人居民，并且这种差异随时间推移而扩大。我们将城市内迁移确定为加剧这种不公平的关键因素，因为迁移的黑人面临更高的污染暴露。我们还提供了空气污染资本化进入住房市场的证据。总体而言，我们的结果强调了在讨论种族和经济不平等时考虑环境因素的重要性。

papers.title: Information and Market Power in DeFi Intermediation
papers.authors: Pablo D. Azar, Adrian Casillas, Maryam Farboodi
papers.abstract: This paper considers the “DeFi intermediation chain”—the market structure that underlies the creation and distribution of ETH, the native cryptocurrency of Ethereum—to examine how information asymmetry shapes intermediation rents. We argue that using proof-of-stake blockchain technology in DeFi leads to a novel limit to arbitrage, arising from the tension between arbitrageurs' privacy needs and blockchain transparency. Using a new dataset which distinguishes private and public transactions in Ethereum, we find that a 1% increase in private information advantage leads to a 1.4% increase in intermediaries' profit share. We develop a dynamic bargaining model that predicts information market power stems exclusively from participants' private information advantage. Our analysis illustrates how blockchain technology can sustain arbitrage opportunities despite low entry barriers.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF；JEL：C83, D82, D86, G23, G29, L86
papers.zh_title: DeFi中介中的信息与市场势力
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了“DeFi中介链”——即以太坊原生加密货币ETH创建和分配所依据的市场结构——以审视信息不对称如何塑造中介租金。我们认为，在DeFi中使用权益证明区块链技术导致了一种新颖的套利限制，源于套利者的隐私需求与区块链透明度之间的张力。利用一个区分以太坊中私有和公开交易的新数据集，我们发现私人信息优势每增加1%，中介的利润份额就会增加1.4%。我们开发了一个动态讨价还价模型，该模型预测信息市场势力完全源于参与者的私人信息优势。我们的分析说明了区块链技术如何在低进入壁垒的情况下维持套利机会。

papers.title: Hidden Debt Revelations
papers.authors: Sebastian Horn, David Mihalyi, Philipp Nickol, César Sosa-Padilla
papers.abstract: How reliable are public debt statistics? This paper quantifies the magnitude, characteristics, and timing of hidden debt by tracking ex post data revisions across a comprehensive new database of more than 50 vintages of World Bank debt statistics. In a sample of debt data covering 146 countries and 53 years, the paper establishes three new stylized facts: (i) debt statistics are systematically under-reported; (ii) hidden debt accumulates in boom years and tends to be revealed in bad times, often during IMF programs and sovereign defaults; and (iii) in debt restructurings, higher hidden debt is associated with larger creditor losses. The novel data is used to numerically discipline a quantitative sovereign debt model with hidden debt accumulation and an endogenous monitoring decision that triggers revelations. Model simulations show that hidden debt has adverse effects on default risk, debt-carrying capacity and asset prices and is therefore welfare detrimental.
papers.zh_title: 隐性债务的揭示
papers.zh_abstract: 公共债务统计数据的可靠性如何？本文通过追踪世界银行债务统计数据库超过50个版本的事后数据修正，量化了隐性债务的规模、特征和时机。基于涵盖146个国家和53年数据的债务样本，本文确立了三个新的典型事实：（i）债务统计数据被系统性低估；（ii）隐性债务在经济繁荣时期积累，往往在经济低迷时期（通常是在国际货币基金组织项目期间和主权违约期间）被揭示；（iii）在债务重组中，更高的隐性债务与更大的债权人损失相关。这些新数据被用于数值上约束一个包含隐性债务积累和触发揭示的内生监测决策的量化主权债务模型。模型模拟表明，隐性债务对违约风险、债务承载能力和资产价格产生不利影响，因此对福利是有害的。

papers.title: Social Status, Economic Development and Female Labor Force (Non) Participation
papers.authors: Kaivan Munshi, Swapnil Singh
papers.abstract: This research provides a status-based explanation for the persistent increase in female labor force non-participation (FLFNP) that often accompanies economic development. This explanation is based on the idea that households or ethnic groups in developing economies can signal their wealth, and thereby increase their social status, by withdrawing their women from the labor force. If the value of social status or the willingness to bear the signaling cost is increasing with economic development, then this would explain the persistent increase in FLFNP. To provide empirical support for this argument, we utilize two independent sources of exogenous variation—across Indian districts in the cross-section and within districts over time—to establish that status considerations determine rural FLFNP. Our status-based model, which is used to derive the preceding tests, is able to match the increase in rural Indian FLFNP that motivates our analysis. Counterfactual simulations of the estimated model indicate that conventional policy prescriptions, such as a reduction in the cost of female education, could {\\em raise} FLFNP by increasing potential household incomes and, hence, the willingness to compete for social status. The steep increase in female education in recent decades could paradoxically have increased FLFNP in India even further.
papers.zh_title: 社会地位、经济发展与女性劳动力（非）参与
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究为伴随经济发展而持续增加的女性劳动力不参与（FLFNP）提供了一种基于地位的解释。这一解释基于以下观点：发展中国家的家庭或族群可以通过让女性退出劳动力市场来彰显其财富，从而提高其社会地位。如果社会地位的价值或承担信号成本的意愿随经济发展而增加，那么这将解释FLFNP的持续增加。为了为这一论点提供实证支持，我们利用两个独立的外生变异来源——印度各地区的截面变异和地区内随时间的变化——来确立地位考量决定了农村FLFNP。我们用于推导上述检验的基于地位的模型，能够匹配推动我们分析的印度农村FLFNP的增长。对估计模型的反事实模拟表明，传统的政策处方，例如降低女性教育成本，可能会通过增加潜在家庭收入从而提高竞争社会地位的意愿，而“提高”FLFNP。近几十年来女性教育的急剧增长，可能矛盾地进一步增加了印度的FLFNP。

papers.title: Inflation Expectation and Cryptocurrency Investment
papers.authors: Lin William Cong, Pulak Ghosh, Jiasun Li, Qihong Ruan
papers.abstract: Using proprietary data from the predominant cryptocurrency exchange in India together with the country's Household Inflation Expectations Survey, we document a significantly positive association between inflation expectations and individual cryptocurrency purchases. Higher inflation expectations are also associated with more new investors in cryptocurrencies. We investigate investment heterogeneity in multiple dimensions, and find the effect to be concentrated in Bitcoin (BTC) and Tether (USDT) trading. The results are robust after controlling for speculative demand captured by surveys of investors' expected cryptocurrency returns, and admit causal interpretations as confirmed using multiple instrumental variables. Our findings provide direct evidence that households already adopt cryptocurrencies for inflation hedging, which in turn rationalizes their high adoption in developing countries without a globally dominant currency.
papers.zh_title: 通胀预期与加密货币投资
papers.zh_abstract: 利用印度主要加密货币交易所的专有数据以及该国的家庭通胀预期调查，我们记录了通胀预期与个人加密货币购买之间存在显著的正相关关系。更高的通胀预期也与更多的新加密货币投资者相关。我们从多个维度研究了投资异质性，发现这种效应集中在比特币（BTC）和泰达币（USDT）交易中。在控制了通过投资者预期加密货币回报调查所捕捉的投机需求后，结果依然稳健，并且通过使用多个工具变量确认了因果解释。我们的发现提供了直接证据，表明家庭已经采用加密货币进行通胀对冲，这反过来解释了它们在缺乏全球主导货币的发展中国家的高采用率。

papers.title: Cournot Competition, Informational Feedback, and Real Efficiency
papers.authors: Lin William Cong, Xiaohong Huang, Siguang Li, Jian Ni
papers.abstract: We revisit the relationship between firm competition and real efficiency in a novel setting with informational feedback from financial markets. Although intensified competition can decrease market concentration in production, it reduces the value of proprietary information (e.g., market prospects) for speculators and discourages information production and price discovery in financial markets. Therefore, competition generates non-monotonic welfare effects through two competing channels: market concentration and information production. When information reflected in stock prices is sufficiently valuable for production decisions, competition can harm both consumer welfare and real efficiency. Our results are robust under cross-asset trading and learning and highlight the importance of considering the interaction between product market and financial market in antitrust policy, e.g., concerning the regulation of horizontal mergers.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IO；JEL：D61, D83, G14, G34, G40
papers.zh_title: 古诺竞争、信息反馈与实际效率
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在一个具有金融市场信息反馈的新颖环境中重新审视了企业竞争与实际效率之间的关系。尽管加剧的竞争可以降低生产中的市场集中度，但它会降低投机者专有信息（例如市场前景）的价值，并抑制金融市场中的信息生产和价格发现。因此，竞争通过两个相互竞争的渠道产生非单调的福利效应：市场集中度和信息生产。当股票价格中反映的信息对生产决策足够有价值时，竞争可能损害消费者福利和实际效率。我们的结果在跨资产交易和学习下是稳健的，并强调了在反垄断政策（例如关于横向合并的监管）中考虑产品市场与金融市场之间相互作用的重要性。

papers.title: Work from Home and Disability Employment
papers.authors: Nicholas Bloom, Gordon B. Dahl, Dan-Olof Rooth
papers.abstract: There has been a dramatic rise in disability employment since the pandemic. At the same time, work from home (WFH) has risen four-fold. This paper asks whether the two are causally related. Controlling for compositional changes and labor market tightness, a 1 percentage point increase in WFH increases full-time employment by 1.0% for individuals with a physical disability. The post-pandemic increase in working from home explains 68%-85% of the rise in full-time employment. Wage data suggests that WFH increased the supply of workers with a physical disability, likely by reducing commuting costs and enabling better control of working conditions.
papers.zh_title: 居家办公与残疾人就业
papers.zh_abstract: 自疫情以来，残疾人就业率显著上升。与此同时，居家办公（WFH）的比例增长了四倍。本文探讨两者之间是否存在因果关系。在控制了构成变化和劳动力市场紧张程度后，居家办公比例每增加1个百分点，身体残疾人士的全职就业率增加1.0%。疫情后居家办公的增加解释了全职就业率上升的68%-85%。工资数据表明，居家办公增加了身体残疾人士的劳动力供给，这可能是通过减少通勤成本和更好地控制工作条件来实现的。

papers.title: Expected EPS × Trailing P/E
papers.authors: Itzhak Ben-David, Alex Chinco
papers.abstract: All of asset-pricing theory currently stems from one key assumption: price equals expected discounted payoff. And much of what we think we know about discount rates comes from studying a particular kind of expected payoff: the earnings forecasts in analyst reports. Researchers typically access these numbers through an easy-to-use database and never read the underlying documents. This is unfortunate because the text of each report contains an explicit description of how the analyst priced their own earnings forecast. We study a sample of 513 reports and find that most analysts use a trailing P/E (price-to-earnings) ratio not a discount rate. Instead of computing the present value of a company’s future earnings, they ask: “How would a firm with similar earnings have been priced last year?” Even if other investors do things differently, it does not make sense to put discount rates at the center of every asset-pricing model if market participants do not always use one. There are other options. Trailing twelve-month P/E ratios account for 91% of the variation in analysts’ price targets.We construct a new kind of asset-pricing model around this fact and show that it explains the market response to earnings surprises.
papers.zh_title: 预期每股收益 × 历史市盈率
papers.zh_abstract: 所有资产定价理论目前都源于一个关键假设：价格等于预期贴现后的收益。而我们关于贴现率的大部分认知来自于研究一种特定的预期收益：分析师报告中的盈利预测。研究人员通常通过一个易于使用的数据库获取这些数字，而从未阅读过底层文档。这很不幸，因为每份报告的文本都包含分析师如何为其自身盈利预测定价的明确描述。我们研究了513份报告样本，发现大多数分析师使用历史市盈率（P/E）而非贴现率。他们不是计算公司未来收益的现值，而是问：“一家盈利相似的公司去年是如何被定价的？”即使其他投资者做法不同，但如果市场参与者并不总是使用贴现率，那么将贴现率置于每个资产定价模型的核心是没有意义的。还有其他选择。过去十二个月的市盈率解释了分析师目标价变动的91%。我们围绕这一事实构建了一种新型资产定价模型，并表明它解释了市场对盈利意外的反应。

papers.title: Voting Rules, Turnout, and Economic Policies
papers.authors: Enrico Cantoni, Vincent Pons, Jérôme Schäfer
papers.abstract: In recent years, voter ID laws and convenience voting have generated heated partisan debates. To shed light on these policy issues, we survey the recent evidence on the institutional determinants and effects of voter turnout and broaden the perspective beyond the most debated rules. We begin by discussing the importance of electoral participation both for its consequences on policy choices and for democratic legitimacy. Building on a simple cost-benefit model of voting, we then review (quasi)-experimental work studying the effects of voting procedures and of other election rules. Voting procedures (which determine how people vote) primarily affect the cost of participation. The obstacles they create matter more when they occur ahead of the election, when the stakes are not salient (e.g., voter registration requirements), and less when parties mobilize voters against them and when alternative ways to vote exist (e.g., when people can choose whether to vote by mail or in person). Election rules upstream from the election (such as campaign finance laws) and downstream (such as the use of proportional representation vs. plurality rule to map vote choices into a set of election winners) mostly operate through benefits, for instance by affecting electoral competitiveness and the number of candidates. We conclude by highlighting questions for future research.
papers.zh_title: 投票规则、投票率与经济政策
papers.zh_abstract: 近年来，选民身份法和便利投票引发了激烈的党派辩论。为了阐明这些政策问题，我们调查了关于投票率的制度决定因素和影响的最新证据，并将视角扩展到最具争议的规则之外。我们首先讨论了选举参与的重要性，既因为它对政策选择的影响，也因为它对民主合法性的意义。基于一个简单的投票成本收益模型，我们随后回顾了研究投票程序和其他选举规则影响的（准）实验性工作。投票程序（决定人们如何投票）主要影响参与成本。当这些障碍发生在选举之前、利害关系不突出时（例如选民登记要求），它们造成的影响更大；而当政党动员选民反对它们、并且存在替代投票方式时（例如人们可以选择邮寄投票或亲自投票），影响则较小。选举上游的选举规则（如竞选财务法）和下游的规则（如使用比例代表制与多数制将选票选择映射为一组选举获胜者）主要通过收益发挥作用，例如通过影响选举竞争性和候选人数量。最后，我们强调了未来研究的问题。

papers.title: Data Privacy for Record Linkage and Beyond
papers.authors: Shurong Lin, Eric Kolaczyk
papers.abstract: In a data-driven world, two prominent research problems are record linkage and data privacy, among others. Record linkage is essential for improving decision-making by integrating information of the same entities from different sources. On the other hand, data privacy research seeks to balance the need to extract accurate insights from data with the imperative to protect the privacy of the entities involved. Inevitably, data privacy issues arise in the context of record linkage. This article identifies two complementary aspects at the intersection of these two fields: (1) how to ensure privacy during record linkage and (2) how to mitigate privacy risks when releasing the analysis results after record linkage. We specifically discuss privacy-preserving record linkage, differentially private regression, and related topics.
papers.zh_title: 记录链接及其他场景中的数据隐私
papers.zh_abstract: 在一个数据驱动的世界中，两个突出的研究问题分别是记录链接和数据隐私。记录链接通过整合来自不同来源的同一实体的信息，对于改进决策至关重要。另一方面，数据隐私研究旨在平衡从数据中提取准确见解的需求与保护相关实体隐私的必要性。在记录链接的背景下，数据隐私问题不可避免地会出现。本文识别了这两个领域交叉点的两个互补方面：（1）如何在记录链接过程中确保隐私，以及（2）如何在记录链接后发布分析结果时减轻隐私风险。我们具体讨论了隐私保护记录链接、差分隐私回归及相关主题。

papers.title: The Effect of Inflation Uncertainty on Household Expectations and Spending
papers.authors: Olena Kostyshyna, Luba Petersen
papers.abstract: We use a new Canadian household survey to examine how inflation uncertainty influences inflation expectations and spending. Through randomized information interventions, we provide inflation statistics with or without second moments, creating variations in households' inflation uncertainty. All information types effectively lower inflation expectations and uncertainty. While communicating inflation uncertainty does not affect expectations or uncertainty levels, it increases the probability assigned to expected inflation near communicated ranges. Using Nielsen IQ Homescanner data, we find that higher inflation expectations and uncertainty reduce household spending on goods. Communicating inflation statistics with ranges increases spending by lowering expectations and reducing uncertainty.
papers.zh_title: 通胀不确定性对家庭预期和支出的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用一项新的加拿大住户调查，研究通胀不确定性如何影响通胀预期和支出。通过随机信息干预，我们提供包含或不包含二阶矩的通胀统计数据，从而在家庭中产生通胀不确定性的差异。所有信息类型均有效降低了通胀预期和不确定性。虽然传达通胀不确定性并不影响预期或不确定性水平，但它增加了预期通胀率落在所传达区间附近的概率。利用Nielsen IQ Homescanner数据，我们发现更高的通胀预期和不确定性会减少家庭在商品上的支出。传达带有区间的通胀统计数据，通过降低预期和减少不确定性来增加支出。

papers.title: Firm Productivity and Learning with Digital Technologies: Evidence from Cloud Computing
papers.authors: James M. Brand, Mert Demirer, Connor Finucane, Avner A. Kreps
papers.abstract: Digital technologies have transformed firm production across all sectors. In this paper, we document new facts about firms’ productivity with emerging technologies by studying how efficiently they use cloud computing. Leveraging high-frequency CPU utilization data from nearly 100,000 firms, we find large and persistent dispersion in firms’ cloud productivity. Productivity, however, is highly dynamic in this setting: firms improve their cloud productivity by 33% in the first year after adoption, and reach a stable level only after four years, indicating a long adjustment period to learn the technology. While faster learning among initially less efficient firms reduces productivity dispersion by 60% over time, substantial heterogeneity remains even after 10 years. Finally, productivity improvements occur primarily within individual divisions of a firm, with minimal knowledge transfer across divisions.
papers.zh_title: 数字技术下的企业生产率与学习：来自云计算的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 数字技术已经改变了所有行业的企业生产。在本文中，我们通过研究企业如何高效使用云计算，记录了关于企业在新兴技术下生产率的新事实。利用来自近10万家企业的高频CPU利用率数据，我们发现企业云生产率存在巨大且持续的差异。然而，在这种情境下，生产率具有高度动态性：企业在采用云计算后的第一年内，其云生产率提高了33%，并且需要四年才能达到稳定水平，这表明学习该技术需要较长的调整期。尽管最初效率较低的企业学习速度更快，使得生产率差异随时间推移减少了60%，但即使在十年后，显著的异质性依然存在。最后，生产率的提高主要发生在企业内部的各个部门内部，部门之间的知识转移微乎其微。

papers.title: Carbon VIX: Carbon Price Uncertainty and Decarbonization Investments
papers.authors: Maximilian Fuchs, Johannes Stroebel, Julian Terstegge
papers.abstract: We study the effects of carbon price uncertainty on firms' decisions to decarbonize their operations. We first use information on the pricing of options on emission allowances in the European Emissions Trading System to create the Carbon VIX, a market-based high-frequency measure of carbon price uncertainty. Carbon price uncertainty is high, varies substantially over time, and experiences persistent shocks around major climate policy events. To explore the effects of carbon price uncertainty on expected aggregate decarbonization investments, we analyze its effect on the stock returns of firms that help other businesses decarbonize. To identify these "carbon solution providers," we extract common types of decarbonization investments from a large survey of firms, and then identify companies that offer the associated goods and services. We find that the stock returns of these carbon solution providers vary positively with carbon prices, but negatively with carbon price uncertainty. The effect of increases in carbon price uncertainty on our proxy for expected decarbonization investments is economically large and of similar magnitude as the effect of declines in carbon prices. These findings support predictions from real options theory that firms may delay investments in decarbonization when faced with uncertainty about the future costs of emissions.
papers.zh_title: 碳VIX：碳价不确定性与脱碳投资
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究碳价不确定性对企业运营脱碳决策的影响。我们首先利用欧洲排放交易体系中排放配额期权的定价信息，构建了碳VIX——一种基于市场的高频碳价不确定性衡量指标。碳价不确定性水平较高，随时间大幅波动，并在重大气候政策事件期间经历持续性冲击。为了探究碳价不确定性对预期总脱碳投资的影响，我们分析了其对帮助其他企业脱碳的企业股票回报的影响。为了识别这些“碳解决方案提供商”，我们从一项大型企业调查中提取了常见的脱碳投资类型，然后确定了提供相关商品和服务的公司。我们发现，这些碳解决方案提供商的股票回报与碳价正相关，但与碳价不确定性负相关。碳价不确定性上升对我们代理的预期脱碳投资的影响在经济上很大，其幅度与碳价下降的影响相当。这些发现支持了实物期权理论的预测，即当面临未来排放成本的不确定性时，企业可能会推迟脱碳投资。

papers.title: Perpetual Futures Pricing
papers.authors: Damien Ackerer, Julien Hugonnier, Urban Jermann
papers.abstract: Perpetual futures are contracts without expiration date in which the anchoring of the futures price to the spot price is ensured by periodic funding payments from long to short. We derive explicit expressions for the no-arbitrage price of various perpetual contracts, including linear, inverse, and quantos futures in both discrete and continuous-time. In particular, we show that the futures price is given by the risk-neutral expectation of the spot sampled at a random time that reflects the intensity of the price anchoring. Furthermore, we identify funding specifications that guarantee the coincidence of futures and spot prices, and show that for such specifications perpetual futures contracts can be replicated by dynamic trading in primitive securities.
papers.zh_title: 永续期货定价
papers.zh_abstract: 永续期货是没有到期日的合约，其中期货价格与现货价格的锚定通过多头向空头的定期资金支付来保证。我们推导了各种永续合约（包括离散时间和连续时间下的线性、反向和双币种期货）的无套利价格的显式表达式。特别地，我们表明期货价格由现货在反映价格锚定强度的随机时间点上的风险中性预期给出。此外，我们确定了能保证期货与现货价格一致的资金支付规范，并表明对于此类规范，永续期货合约可以通过在基础证券中进行动态交易来复制。

papers.title: Assessing Nonresponse Bias in Macro Indicators by Combining Para-, Administrative, and Survey Data
papers.authors: Ori Heffetz, Guy Lichtinger, Daniel B. Reeves
papers.abstract: National surveys are crucial for estimating key economic aggregates, including the unemployment rate, labor force participation, and household expenditures. The accuracy of these indicators is increasingly under scrutiny due to declining response rates and the consequent risk of nonresponse bias. How can we assess nonresponse bias in these key economic aggregates?
papers.zh_title: 结合准数据、行政数据和调查数据评估宏观指标中的无应答偏差
papers.zh_abstract: 全国性调查对于估算关键经济总量指标至关重要，包括失业率、劳动力参与率和家庭支出。由于应答率下降以及随之而来的无应答偏差风险，这些指标的准确性正受到越来越多的审视。我们如何评估这些关键经济总量指标中的无应答偏差？

papers.title: Patent Text and Long-Run Innovation Dynamics: The Critical Role of Model Selection
papers.authors: Ina Ganguli, Jeffrey Lin, Vitaly Meursault, Nicholas F. Reynolds
papers.abstract: As distorted maps may mislead, Natural Language Processing (NLP) models may misrepresent. How do we know which NLP model to trust? We provide comprehensive guidance for selecting and applying NLP representations of patent text. We develop novel validation tasks to evaluate several leading NLP models. These tasks assess how well candidate models align with both expert and non-expert judgments of patent similarity. State-of-the-art language models significantly outperform traditional approaches such as TF-IDF. Using our validated representations, we measure a secular decline in contemporaneous patent similarity: inventors are “spreading out” over an expanding knowledge frontier. This finding is corroborated by declining rates of multiple invention from newly-digitized historical patent interference records. In contrast, selecting another single representation without validating alternatives yields an ambiguous or even opposing trend. Thus, our framework addresses a fundamental challenge of selecting among different black-box NLP models that produce varying economic measurements. To facilitate future research, we plan to provide our validation task data and embeddings for all US patents from 1836–2023.
papers.zh_title: 专利文本与长期创新动态：模型选择的关键作用
papers.zh_abstract: 正如扭曲的地图可能误导人，自然语言处理模型也可能产生误判。我们如何知道该信任哪个自然语言处理模型？我们为选择和运用专利文本的自然语言处理表示提供了全面指导。我们开发了新颖的验证任务来评估几个领先的自然语言处理模型。这些任务评估了候选模型与专家及非专家对专利相似性判断的一致性程度。最先进的语言模型显著优于TF-IDF等传统方法。利用我们经过验证的表示，我们衡量了同期专利相似性的长期下降趋势：发明人正在不断扩展的知识前沿上“分散开来”。这一发现得到了来自新近数字化的历史专利冲突记录的多重发明率下降的证实。相比之下，在不验证替代方案的情况下选择另一种单一表示，则会产生模糊甚至相反的趋势。因此，我们的框架解决了在不同黑箱自然语言处理模型中进行选择这一根本性挑战，这些模型会产生不同的经济测量结果。为促进未来研究，我们计划提供我们的验证任务数据以及1836年至2023年间所有美国专利的嵌入向量。

papers.title: Climate Capitalists
papers.authors: Niels Joachim Gormsen, Kilian Huber, Sangmin Simon Oh
papers.abstract: In theory, a cost of capital channel can incentivize green investments like a carbon tax. This channel requires that firms perceive the cost of green capital as lower than that of brown capital. Using hand-collected data, we show that green firms have indeed perceived their cost of capital to be 1 percentage point lower since 2016, when climate concerns by financial investors and governments surged. Moreover, some energy firms have used a lower cost of capital for their green divisions. The findings suggest that the cost of capital can incentivize capital reallocation toward greener investments across firms and within firms.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, DEV, EEE, EFG, IFM, IO, ITI, ME, PE, POL, PR；JEL：D24, E22, G10, G12, G31, G32, G41, Q50, Q51, Q54
papers.zh_title: 气候资本家
papers.zh_abstract: 理论上，资本成本渠道可以像碳税一样激励绿色投资。这一渠道要求企业认为绿色资本的成本低于棕色资本。利用手工收集的数据，我们表明自2016年以来，当金融投资者和政府对气候问题的关注激增时，绿色企业确实认为其资本成本低了1个百分点。此外，一些能源企业已为其绿色部门使用了较低的资本成本。这些发现表明，资本成本可以激励资本在企业间和企业内部向更绿色的投资重新配置。

papers.title: The New Digital Divide
papers.authors: Mayana Pereira, Shane Greenstein, Raffaella Sadun, Prasanna Tambe, Lucia Ronchi Darre, Tammy Glazer, Allen Kim, Rahul Dodhia, Juan Lavista Ferres
papers.abstract: We build and analyze new metrics of digital usage that leverage telemetry data collected by Microsoft during operating system updates across forty million Windows devices in U.S. households. These measures of US household digital usage are much more comprehensive than those made available through any existing commercial or government survey. We construct representations of devices in ZIP codes and find evidence of significant variation in usage reflecting an urban-rural divide. We also show the existence of substantial disparities in usage even within narrowly defined Metropolitan Statistical Areas. Income and education correlate with these observed differences. These effects are large and suggest digital literacy gaps that extend beyond the availability of essential IT infrastructure at the local level. These findings call for interventions beyond the traditional focus on infrastructure access and address usage and skills development. The indices are made publicly available to support future research.
papers.zh_title: 新的数字鸿沟
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建并分析了新的数字使用指标，这些指标利用了微软在操作系统更新期间从美国四千万台Windows设备收集的遥测数据。这些美国住户数字使用指标比任何现有商业或政府调查提供的指标都要全面得多。我们构建了邮政编码层面的设备表示，并发现存在显著的城乡差异证据。我们还表明，即使在狭义的都市统计区内，也存在巨大的使用差异。收入和受教育程度与这些观察到的差异相关。这些影响很大，表明数字素养差距超出了当地基本信息技术基础设施的可获得性。这些发现呼吁采取超越传统基础设施接入关注点的干预措施，并解决使用和技能发展问题。这些指数已公开提供，以支持未来的研究。

papers.title: Black Reparations and Child Well-Being: A Framework and Policy Considerations
papers.authors: Lisa A. Gennetian, Christina M. Gibson-Davis, William Darity
papers.abstract: We offer a child-centric framework for reparations with considerations for policy and implications for child descendants of enslaved African Americans. We apply economic theory of human capital integrated with the theories of bioecological developmental systems to illustrate the multilayered aspects of harm from the legacy of slavery and racism. Our curation of estimates shows that relative to white peers, black children bear more than double the risk in outcomes unfavorable to educational and economic prosperity from birth through young adulthood. We also find that enduring racial wealth differences are larger among households with children than without children, with the child household racial wealth gap in 2019 remaining comparable to that seen 60 years ago. Simulations suggest that a wealth transfer of $130,000 per child during early childhood reduces the black-white gap in high school graduation by 13 percentage points and increases college attendance by 26 percentage points. A review of existing U.S. reparations initiatives shows that few include direct financial transfers or other forms of investments specifically for black families or children. Based on a contemporary survey, we find that black parents with young children express support for reparations in the form of direct cash payments as well as other forms of financial assistance.
papers.meta: Programs：CH；JEL：H31, H5, I30, J15, J18, K38, Z1
papers.zh_title: 黑人赔偿与儿童福祉：一个框架与政策考量
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个以儿童为中心的赔偿框架，并考虑了政策影响及其对被奴役非裔美国人后裔儿童的意义。我们运用人力资本经济理论，结合生物生态发展系统理论，阐述了奴隶制和种族主义遗留问题所造成的多层次伤害。我们对估算数据的整理显示，与白人同龄人相比，黑人儿童从出生到青年时期，在不利于教育和经济繁荣的结果方面，面临的风险高出两倍以上。我们还发现，有子女家庭中的持久种族财富差异大于无子女家庭；2019年有子女家庭中的种族财富差距与60年前的水平相当。模拟结果表明，在儿童早期为每个孩子提供13万美元的财富转移，可将黑人与白人在高中毕业率上的差距缩小13个百分点，并将大学入学率提高26个百分点。对现有美国赔偿举措的回顾显示，很少有项目包含专门针对黑人家庭或儿童的直接资金转移或其他形式的投资。基于一项当代调查，我们发现，有年幼子女的黑人父母表示支持以直接现金支付以及其他形式的经济援助作为赔偿方式。

papers.title: Equity and Efficiency in Technology Adoption: Evidence from Digital Health
papers.authors: Itzik Fadlon, Parag Agnihotri, Christopher Longhurst, Ming Tai-Seale
papers.abstract: Digital technologies are bringing vast improvements to modern society but also carry the risk of perpetuating disparities if adopted at lower rates by underserved communities. We investigate the efficiency and equity aspects of technological advancement in digital health by studying an intervention of “remote patient monitoring” that enabled patients to transmit real-time clinical data for timely treatment. The program was deployed at the Academic Medical Center UC San Diego Health among a diverse population of patients and targeted hypertension management to reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease. From an efficiency standpoint, we find significant and persistent reductions in cardiovascular risk, which are notable across all subgroups of gender, age, race/ethnicity, and geographic affluence. Evidence suggests both reduced frictions in the provision of care and improved health behaviors as mechanisms. The program also led to significant reductions in healthcare utilization costs from improved hypertension control. From an equity standpoint, however, we find that the longer-run health gains from the program fell short among underserved patient subpopulations, inducing inequities in the reductions in cardiovascular risk. The new technology was systematically adopted at lower rates by Black/Hispanic patients and by patients from disadvantaged geographic communities, who were less likely to either take up or adhere to the program. Overall, our analysis highlights the simultaneous promise and hazards of digital health technologies. We further provide evidence that primary care physicians and the nature of their relationship with patients can have a promising role in promoting greater and more equitable adoption of digital health.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LS, PE, PR；JEL：I1, J1, O3
papers.zh_title: 技术采纳中的公平与效率：来自数字健康的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 数字技术正在为现代社会带来巨大进步，但如果被服务不足的社区以较低比率采纳，也存在着加剧差距的风险。我们通过研究一项“远程患者监测”干预措施来调查数字健康技术进步中的效率和公平问题，该措施使患者能够传输实时临床数据以获得及时治疗。该项目在学术医疗中心加州大学圣地亚哥健康中心面向多样化的患者群体实施，针对高血压管理以降低心血管疾病风险。从效率角度来看，我们发现心血管风险显著且持续降低，这在性别、年龄、种族/民族和地理富裕程度的所有子群体中都很显著。证据表明，其机制既包括减少了护理提供中的摩擦，也包括改善了健康行为。该项目还因高血压控制改善而显著降低了医疗保健利用成本。然而，从公平角度来看，我们发现该计划带来的长期健康收益在服务不足的患者亚群中有所不足，导致了心血管风险降低方面的不平等。新技术被黑人和西班牙裔患者以及来自弱势地理社区的患者系统性地以较低比率采纳，他们要么不太可能参与该项目，要么不太可能坚持该项目。总体而言，我们的分析强调了数字健康技术同时带来的希望和风险。我们进一步提供证据表明，初级保健医生及其与患者关系的性质，可以在促进更广泛和更公平地采纳数字健康方面发挥有希望的作用。

papers.title: Fiscal and Monetary Policy with Heterogeneous Agents
papers.authors: Adrien Auclert, Matthew Rognlie, Ludwig Straub
papers.abstract: In the past decade, a new paradigm for fiscal and monetary policy analysis has emerged, combining the canonical macro model of income and wealth inequality with the New Keynesian model. These Heterogeneous-Agent New Keynesian (“HANK”) models feature new transmission channels and allow for the joint study of aggregate and distributional effects. We review key developments in this literature through the lens of a canonical HANK model. Monetary and balanced-budget fiscal policy have similar aggregate effects as in the standard new Keynesian model, while deficit-financed fiscal policy is much more expansionary. We discuss the split between direct and indirect effects of policy, and also the implications of cyclical income risk, maturity structure, nominal assets, behavioral frictions, and many other extensions to the model. Throughout, we highlight the benefits of using sequence-space methods to solve and analyze this class of models.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, ME；JEL：D1, E21, E31, E32, E43, E52, E62
papers.zh_title: 异质性主体下的财政与货币政策
papers.zh_abstract: 在过去十年中，一种新的财政与货币政策分析范式已经出现，它将收入和财富不平等的经典宏观模型与新凯恩斯模型相结合。这些异质性主体新凯恩斯（“HANK”）模型具有新的传导渠道，并允许联合研究总量效应和分配效应。我们通过一个经典HANK模型的视角回顾了这一文献的关键发展。货币和平衡预算财政政策具有与标准新凯恩斯模型相似的总量效应，而赤字融资的财政政策则更具扩张性。我们讨论了政策的直接效应和间接效应之间的划分，以及周期性收入风险、期限结构、名义资产、行为摩擦和模型的许多其他扩展的含义。在整个过程中，我们强调了使用序列空间方法求解和分析这类模型的好处。

papers.title: Cultural Remittances and Modern Fertility
papers.authors: Mickael Melki, Hillel Rapoport, Enrico Spolaore, Romain Wacziarg
papers.abstract: We argue that migrants played a significant role in the diffusion of the demographic transition from France to the rest of Europe in the late 19th century. Employing novel data on French immigration from other European regions from 1850 to 1930, we find that higher immigration to France translated into lower fertility in the region of origin after a few decades - both in cross-region regressions for various periods, and in a panel setting with region fixed effects. These results are robust to the inclusion of a variety of controls, and across multiple specifications. We also find that immigrants who themselves became French citizens achieved lower fertility, particularly those who moved to French regions with the lowest fertility levels. We interpret these findings in terms of cultural remittances, consistently with insights from a theoretical framework where migrants act as vectors of cultural diffusion, spreading new information, social norms and preferences pertaining to modern fertility to their regions of origin.
papers.zh_title: 文化汇款与现代生育率
papers.zh_abstract: 我们认为，在19世纪末，移民在人口转变从法国扩散到欧洲其他地区的过程中发挥了重要作用。利用1850年至1930年来自其他欧洲地区向法国移民的新数据，我们发现，在几十年后，向法国的移民增加转化为原籍地区生育率的降低——无论是在不同时期的跨地区回归中，还是在包含地区固定效应的面板设定中。这些结果在包含各种控制变量以及多种设定下都是稳健的。我们还发现，那些自己成为法国公民的移民实现了更低的生育率，尤其是那些迁移到法国生育率最低地区的移民。我们将这些发现解释为文化汇款，这与一个理论框架的见解一致，在该框架中，移民充当文化传播的载体，将有关现代生育率的新信息、社会规范和偏好传播到他们的原籍地区。

papers.title: Privacy Protection and Accuracy: What Do We Know? Do We Know Things?? Let's Find Out!
