papers.authors: Evan S. Totty, Thor Watson
papers.abstract: Statistical agencies have a dual mandate to provide accurate data and protect the privacy and confidentiality of data subjects. These mandates are fundamentally at odds and therefore must be balanced: more accurate data reduces privacy, while privacy protections introduce error that reduces accuracy. Balancing accuracy and privacy requires, among other things, that we can quantify accuracy and privacy. Quantifying privacy has become easier thanks to differential privacy. Quantifying accuracy may sound easy by comparison, but there are many challenges to doing this effectively. In this paper, we first discuss some challenges associated with quantifying data accuracy. We then focus on an often-ignored challenge, which is the existence of survey error in the data being protected. We provide an overview of how privacy protection error relates to total survey error. We also summarize recent work that uses validation data to quantify the impact of privacy protection error relative to and conditional on other sources of survey error. Finally, we discuss opportunities and challenges for future work on data privacy and survey error.
papers.zh_title: 隐私保护与准确性：我们知道什么？我们知道事情吗？？让我们一探究竟！
papers.zh_abstract: 统计机构肩负着双重使命：提供准确的数据，并保护数据主体的隐私和机密性。这些使命从根本上相互矛盾，因此必须加以平衡：更准确的数据会降低隐私，而隐私保护会引入降低准确性的误差。平衡准确性和隐私需要，除其他外，我们能够量化准确性和隐私。由于差分隐私，量化隐私变得更容易。相比之下，量化准确性听起来可能很容易，但要有效地做到这一点存在许多挑战。在本文中，我们首先讨论与量化数据准确性相关的一些挑战。然后，我们聚焦于一个经常被忽视的挑战，即被保护数据中存在调查误差。我们概述了隐私保护误差与总调查误差之间的关系。我们还总结了最近利用验证数据量化隐私保护误差相对于其他调查误差来源及其条件影响的工作。最后，我们讨论了未来关于数据隐私和调查误差研究的机遇与挑战。

papers.title: Evaluating Monetary Policy Counterfactuals: (When) Do We Need Structural Models?
papers.authors: Tomás E. Caravello, Alisdair McKay, Christian K. Wolf
papers.abstract: To evaluate the evolution of the macro-economy under alternative assumptions on monetary policy, it suffices, under weak structural assumptions, to know the causal effects of monetary shocks on macroeconomic outcomes. The existing empirical literature estimates the effects of monetary shocks to the short end of the yield curve, thus allowing the evaluation of counterfactuals that change assumptions on near-term policy. If the contemplated policy changes are instead more persistent, then model structure becomes necessary, for one sole purpose: to extrapolate from the estimated short-end effects to those of policy shocks further out on the yield curve. Among popular models of monetary policy transmission, market incompleteness (i.e., “HANK”) does not change this extrapolation much, while behavioral frictions do.
papers.zh_title: 评估货币政策反事实：我们何时需要结构性模型？
papers.zh_abstract: 在弱结构假设下，要评估不同货币政策假设下的宏观经济演变，只需知道货币冲击对宏观经济结果的因果效应即可。现有实证文献估计了货币冲击对收益率曲线短端的影响，从而允许评估改变近期政策假设的反事实情景。如果所考虑的政策变化更具持续性，那么模型结构就变得必要，其唯一目的是：从估计的短端效应外推至收益率曲线更远端政策冲击的效应。在流行的货币政策传导模型中，市场不完全性（即“HANK”）对这种外推影响不大，而行为摩擦则会产生显著影响。

papers.title: Theodore Roosevelt, the Election of 1912, and the Founding of the Federal Reserve
papers.authors: Matthew S. Jaremski, David C. Wheelock
papers.abstract: The Federal Reserve Act was the outcome of compromises among competing economic and political interests. Numerous studies examine how the act came together but largely take the makeup of Congress and the Administration as given rather than considering the unique circumstances that led to that political distribution. This paper examines how the election of 1912 changed the makeup of Congress and increased the likelihood of central banking legislation and shaped the act. The decision of Theodore Roosevelt and other Progressives to run as third-party candidates split the Republican Party and enabled Democrats to capture the White House and Congress. We show that the election produced a less polarized Congress and that newly-elected members were more likely to vote for the act. Absent their interparty split, Republicans would likely have held the White House and Congress, and any legislation to establish a central bank almost certainly would have been quite different.
papers.zh_title: 西奥多·罗斯福、1912年大选与美联储的创立
papers.zh_abstract: 《联邦储备法》是相互竞争的经济和政治利益之间妥协的产物。众多研究考察了该法案如何形成，但大多将国会和行政部门的构成视为既定事实，而未考虑导致这种政治分布的独特环境。本文考察了1912年大选如何改变国会构成，增加了中央银行立法的可能性，并塑造了该法案。西奥多·罗斯福和其他进步派人士决定以第三方候选人身份参选，分裂了共和党，使民主党得以入主白宫并控制国会。我们表明，这次选举产生了一个极化程度较低的国会，新当选的议员更有可能投票支持该法案。如果没有他们的党内分裂，共和党很可能仍将控制白宫和国会，任何建立中央银行的立法几乎肯定会大不相同。

papers.title: Do Investor Differences Impact Monetary Policy Spillovers to Emerging Markets?
papers.authors: Ester Faia, Karen K. Lewis, Haonan Zhou
papers.abstract: We re-examine monetary policy spillovers to Emerging Market Economies (EME) in the form of capital flow reversals, using sectoral-level securities holdings data for Euro Area investors. In response to a surprise monetary tightening, active investors such as investment funds re-balance their portfolios away from EME, while more passive, long term investors such as insurance funds and banks exhibit no significant reaction on average. For active investors, the reallocation out of EME appears stronger under synchronized monetary tightening between the Fed and the ECB. However, these investors may even inject more capital to EME securities when the monetary tightening surprises contain positive news about the Euro Area economy. Issuers' monetary-fiscal stability may explain the heterogeneous impact of these spillovers.
papers.zh_title: 投资者差异会影响货币政策对新兴市场的溢出效应吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用欧元区投资者的部门级证券持有数据，重新审视了以资本流动逆转形式出现的货币政策对新兴市场经济体的溢出效应。作为对意外货币紧缩的回应，投资基金等活跃投资者会将其投资组合从新兴市场重新配置出去，而保险公司和银行等更为被动、长期的投资者平均而言没有表现出显著反应。对于活跃投资者而言，当美联储和欧洲央行同步实施货币紧缩时，从新兴市场的重新配置似乎更为强劲。然而，当货币紧缩意外包含关于欧元区经济的积极消息时，这些投资者甚至可能向新兴市场证券注入更多资本。发行国的货币财政稳定性可能解释了这些溢出效应的异质性影响。

papers.title: Are We Adapting to Climate Change?
papers.authors: Marshall Burke, Mustafa Zahid, Mariana C. M. Martins, Christopher W. Callahan, Richard Lee, Tumenkhusel Avirmed, Sam Heft-Neal, Mathew Kiang, Solomon M. Hsiang, David Lobell
papers.abstract: We study whether the sensitivity of economic, health, and livelihood outcomes to climate extremes has declined over the last half century, consistent with adaptation. Understanding whether such adaptation is already occurring is central to anticipating future climate damages, to calibrating the level of ambition needed for emissions mitigation efforts, and to understanding additional investments in adaptation that could be required to avoid additional damages. Using comprehensive panel data across diverse geographies and outcomes, including data on mortality, agricultural productivity, crime, conflict, economic output, and damages from flooding and tropical cyclones, we find limited systematic evidence of adaptation to date. Across 21 outcomes we study, six show a statistically significant declining sensitivity to a changing climate, five show an increasing sensitivity, and the remainder show no statistically significant change. Our results do not imply that specific documented adaptation efforts are ineffective or certain locations have not adapted, but instead that the net effects of existing actions have largely not been successful in meaningfully reducing climate impacts in aggregate. To avoid ongoing and future damages from warming, our results suggest a need to identify promising adaptation strategies and understand how they can be scaled.
papers.zh_title: 我们正在适应气候变化吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在过去半个世纪中，经济、健康和生计结果对气候极端事件的敏感性是否有所下降，这与适应行为一致。了解这种适应是否已经发生，对于预测未来气候损害、校准减排努力所需的雄心水平，以及理解为避免额外损害可能需要的额外适应投资至关重要。利用涵盖不同地理区域和结果（包括死亡率、农业生产力、犯罪、冲突、经济产出以及洪水和热带气旋造成的损害数据）的综合面板数据，我们发现迄今为止有限的系统性适应证据。在我们研究的21个结果中，有6个显示出对气候变化敏感性在统计上显著下降，5个显示出敏感性上升，其余则没有统计上显著的变化。我们的结果并不意味着特定的已记录适应努力无效或某些地点没有适应，而是表明现有行动的综合净效应在很大程度上未能成功地在总体上显著减少气候影响。为了避免变暖带来的持续和未来损害，我们的结果表明需要识别有前景的适应策略并理解如何扩大其规模。

papers.title: Investing in Vaccines to Mitigate Harm from COVID-19 and Future Pandemics
papers.authors: Rachel Glennerster, Catherine Che, Sarrin M. Chethik, Claire T. McMahon, Christopher M. Snyder
papers.abstract: This paper evaluates the social value of investing in vaccine research, development, and manufacturing capacity for pandemic preparedness and response. Rapid vaccination during pandemics can significantly reduce mortality, economic losses, and societal disruptions. However, vaccine manufacturers often lack sufficient incentives for speed and capacity expansion. Strategic policies by governments and international organizations could enhance these incentives and improve equitable vaccine distribution.
papers.zh_title: 投资疫苗以减轻COVID-19和未来大流行病的危害
papers.zh_abstract: 本文评估了投资于疫苗研究、开发和制造能力以进行大流行病防范和应对的社会价值。在大流行期间快速接种疫苗可以显著降低死亡率、经济损失和社会混乱。然而，疫苗制造商往往缺乏足够的激励来加快速度和扩大产能。政府和国际组织的战略政策可以增强这些激励，并改善公平的疫苗分配。

papers.title: On the Identifying Power of Generalized Monotonicity for Average Treatment Effects
papers.authors: Yuehao Bai, Shunzhuang Huang, Sarah Moon, Azeem Shaikh, Edward J. Vytlacil
papers.abstract: In the context of a binary outcome, treatment, and instrument, Balke and Pearl (1993, 1997) establish that the monotonicity condition of Imbens and Angrist (1994) has no identifying power beyond instrument exogeneity for average potential outcomes and average treatment effects in the sense that adding it to instrument exogeneity does not decrease the identified sets for those parameters whenever those restrictions are consistent with the distribution of the observable data. This paper shows that this phenomenon holds in a broader setting with a multi-valued outcome, treatment, and instrument, under an extension of the monotonicity condition that we refer to as generalized monotonicity. We further show that this phenomenon holds for any restriction on treatment response that is stronger than generalized monotonicity provided that these stronger restrictions do not restrict potential outcomes. Importantly, many models of potential treatments previously considered in the literature imply generalized monotonicity, including the types of monotonicity restrictions considered by Kline and Walters (2016), Kirkeboen et al. (2016), and Heckman and Pinto (2018), and the restriction that treatment selection is determined by particular classes of additive random utility models. We show through a series of examples that restrictions on potential treatments can provide identifying power beyond instrument exogeneity for average potential outcomes and average treatment effects when the restrictions imply that the generalized monotonicity condition is violated. In this way, our results shed light on the types of restrictions required for help in identifying average potential outcomes and average treatment effects.
papers.zh_title: 论广义单调性对平均处理效应的识别力
papers.zh_abstract: 在二元结果、处理变量和工具变量的背景下，Balke 和 Pearl (1993, 1997) 确立了 Imbens 和 Angrist (1994) 的单调性条件在工具外生性之外，对于平均潜在结果和平均处理效应没有额外的识别力，其含义是：只要这些限制与可观测数据的分布一致，将单调性条件添加到工具外生性中并不会缩小这些参数的识别集。本文表明，在具有多值结果、处理变量和工具变量的更广泛设定下，在我们称之为广义单调性的单调性条件扩展下，这一现象仍然成立。我们进一步表明，对于任何比广义单调性更强的处理反应限制，只要这些更强的限制不限制潜在结果，这一现象也成立。重要的是，文献中先前考虑的许多潜在处理模型都隐含了广义单调性，包括 Kline 和 Walters (2016)、Kirkeboen 等人 (2016) 以及 Heckman 和 Pinto (2018) 考虑的单调性限制类型，以及处理选择由特定类别的加性随机效用模型决定的限制。我们通过一系列例子表明，当对潜在处理的限制意味着广义单调性条件被违反时，这些限制可以在工具外生性之外为平均潜在结果和平均处理效应提供识别力。通过这种方式，我们的结果揭示了在识别平均潜在结果和平均处理效应时所需限制的类型。

papers.title: Mining Chinese Historical Sources At Scale: A Machine Learning-Approach to Qing State Capacity
papers.authors: Wolfgang Keller, Carol H. Shiue, Sen Yan
papers.abstract: Primary historical sources are often by-passed for secondary sources due to high human costs of accessing and extracting primary information–especially in lower-resource settings. We propose a supervised machine-learning approach to the natural language processing of Chinese historical data. An application to identifying different forms of social unrest in the Veritable Records of the Qing Dynasty shows that approach cuts dramatically down the cost of using primary source data at the same time when it is free from human bias, reproducible, and flexible enough to address particular questions. External evidence on triggers of unrest also suggests that the computer-based approach is no less successful in identifying social unrest than human researchers are.
papers.zh_title: 大规模挖掘中国历史文献：一种研究清朝国家能力的机器学习方法
papers.zh_abstract: 由于获取和提取原始信息的人力成本高昂——尤其是在资源匮乏的环境中——原始历史文献常常被二手文献所取代。我们提出了一种用于中文历史数据自然语言处理的监督式机器学习方法。将其应用于识别《清实录》中不同形式的社会动荡，表明该方法在不受人为偏见影响、可重复且足够灵活以解决特定问题的同时，大幅降低了使用原始文献数据的成本。关于动荡触发因素的外部证据也表明，基于计算机的方法在识别社会动荡方面并不比人类研究者逊色。

papers.title: The Economics of Recycling Heterogeneity
papers.authors: Don Fullerton, Thomas C. Kinnaman
papers.abstract: We summarize the economics of recycling municipal solid waste. OECD data suggest that aggregate recycling rates in member countries have plateaued in recent decades. United States recycling rates for some materials remain low, even after decades of learning and participation. Major new policies may be required to increase recycling rates. Aggregate recycling targets are common in the US and OECD but may no longer be effective. We discuss many sources of recycling heterogeneity often ignored. First, recyclable materials are very different from each other. Economies and natural environments differ across space, and technologies change over time. Recycling policies that ignore heterogeneity are likely not set appropriately. If policy costs are low enough to set a unique recycling policy for each material in each locality, then a surgical recycling strategy may better serve society. Specific recycling policies for automobile batteries differ greatly from policies for yard waste, because these two materials are different. A surgical recycling policy could extend this practice, so that rules for aluminum cans differ from plastic jugs or glass bottles. Reaching future recycling targets could be frustrated by ignoring these heterogeneities across materials, locations, and time.
papers.zh_title: 回收异质性的经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 我们总结了城市固体废物回收的经济学。经合组织的数据表明，成员国总回收率在近几十年已趋于平稳。即使经过数十年的学习和参与，美国某些材料的回收率仍然很低。可能需要重大的新政策来提高回收率。总体回收目标在美国和经合组织很常见，但可能不再有效。我们讨论了许多经常被忽视的回收异质性来源。首先，可回收材料彼此差异很大。经济体和自然环境因空间而异，技术随时间而变化。忽视异质性的回收政策可能设置不当。如果政策成本足够低，可以为每个地区的每种材料设定独特的回收政策，那么精准的回收策略可能更好地服务社会。汽车电池的具体回收政策与庭院废物的政策大不相同，因为这两种材料不同。精准的回收政策可以扩展这种做法，使得铝罐的规则不同于塑料壶或玻璃瓶。忽视这些跨材料、地点和时间的异质性可能会阻碍未来回收目标的实现。

papers.title: Economic Policy Challenges for the Age of AI
papers.authors: Anton Korinek
papers.abstract: This paper examines the profound challenges that transformative advances in AI towards Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) will pose for economists and economic policymakers. I examine how the Age of AI will revolutionize the basic structure of our economies by diminishing the role of labor, leading to unprecedented productivity gains but raising concerns about job disruption, income distribution, and the value of education and human capital. I explore what roles may remain for labor post-AGI, and which production factors will grow in importance. The paper then identifies eight key challenges for economic policy in the Age of AI: (1) inequality and income distribution, (2) education and skill development, (3) social and political stability, (4) macroeconomic policy, (5) antitrust and market regulation, (6) intellectual property, (7) environmental implications, and (8) global AI governance. It concludes by emphasizing how economists can contribute to a better understanding of these challenges.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PE, PR；JEL：A11, E0, O3
papers.zh_title: 人工智能时代的经济政策挑战
papers.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了人工智能向通用人工智能（AGI）的变革性进展将为经济学家和经济政策制定者带来的深刻挑战。我考察了人工智能时代如何通过削弱劳动的作用来彻底改变我们经济的基本结构，带来前所未有的生产率提升，但也引发了对就业冲击、收入分配以及教育和人力资本价值的担忧。我探讨了后AGI时代劳动可能保留的角色，以及哪些生产要素的重要性将增加。随后，本文指出了人工智能时代经济政策的八个关键挑战：（1）不平等与收入分配，（2）教育与技能发展，（3）社会与政治稳定，（4）宏观经济政策，（5）反垄断与市场监管，（6）知识产权，（7）环境影响，以及（8）全球人工智能治理。最后，本文强调了经济学家如何能够为更好地理解这些挑战做出贡献。

papers.title: Synthetic Data and Social Science Research: Accuracy Assessments and Practical Considerations from the SIPP Synthetic Beta
papers.authors: Jordan C. Stanley, Evan S. Totty
papers.abstract: Synthetic microdata – data retaining the structure of original microdata while replacing original values with modeled values for the sake of privacy – presents an opportunity to increase access to useful microdata for data users while meeting the privacy and confidentiality requirements for data providers. Synthetic data could be sufficient for many purposes, but lingering accuracy concerns could be addressed with a validation system through which the data providers run the external researcher’s code on the internal data and share cleared output with the researcher. The U.S. Census Bureau has experience running such systems. In this chapter, we first describe the role of synthetic data within a tiered data access system and the importance of synthetic data accuracy in achieving a viable synthetic data product. Next, we review results from a recent set of empirical analyses we conducted to assess accuracy in the Survey of Income & Program Participation (SIPP) Synthetic Beta (SSB), a Census Bureau product that made linked survey-administrative data publicly available. Given this analysis and our experience working on the SSB project, we conclude with thoughts and questions regarding future implementations of synthetic data with validation.
papers.zh_title: 合成数据与社会科学研究：来自SIPP合成测试版的准确性评估与实践考量
papers.zh_abstract: 合成微观数据——在保留原始微观数据结构的同时，用建模值替换原始值以保护隐私的数据——为数据用户提供了增加有用微观数据访问机会的途径，同时满足了数据提供者的隐私和保密要求。合成数据可能足以满足许多目的，但持续的准确性担忧可以通过一个验证系统来解决，在该系统中，数据提供者在内部数据上运行外部研究人员的代码，并将清理后的输出与研究人员共享。美国人口普查局有运行此类系统的经验。在本章中，我们首先描述了合成数据在分层数据访问系统中的作用，以及合成数据准确性在实现可行的合成数据产品中的重要性。接下来，我们回顾了我们最近进行的一系列实证分析的结果，这些分析旨在评估收入与项目参与调查（SIPP）合成测试版（SSB）的准确性，SSB是人口普查局的一个产品，它使关联的调查-行政数据公开可用。基于这一分析以及我们在SSB项目上的工作经验，我们最后就未来结合验证的合成数据实施提出了想法和问题。

papers.title: Despair and Death in the United States
papers.authors: Christopher J. Ruhm
papers.abstract: Increases in “deaths of despair” have been hypothesized to provide an important source of the adverse mortality experiences of some groups at the beginning of the 21st century. This study examines this possibility and uncovers the following primary findings. First, mental health deteriorated between 1993 and 2019 for all population subgroups examined. Second, these declines raised death rates and contributed to the adverse mortality trends experienced by prime-age non-Hispanic Whites and, to a lesser extent, Blacks from 1999-2019. However, worsening mental health is not the predominant explanation for them. Third, to extent these relationships support the general idea of “deaths of despair”, the specific causes comprising it should be both broader and different than previously recognized: still including drug mortality and possibly alcohol deaths but replacing suicides with fatalities from heart disease, lower respiratory causes, homicides, and conceivably cancer. Fourth, heterogeneity in the consequences of a given increase of poor mental health are generally more important than the sizes of the changes in poor mental health in explaining Black-White differences in the overall effects of mental health on mortality.
papers.zh_title: 美国的绝望与死亡
papers.zh_abstract: “绝望死亡”的增加被假设为21世纪初某些群体不利死亡率经历的一个重要来源。本研究考察了这种可能性，并揭示了以下主要发现。首先，在1993年至2019年间，所有被考察的人口亚群的心理健康状况都恶化了。其次，这些恶化提高了死亡率，并导致了1999-2019年间壮年非西班牙裔白人以及（在较小程度上）黑人经历的不利死亡率趋势。然而，心理健康恶化并不是这些趋势的主要解释。第三，就这些关系支持“绝望死亡”的一般概念而言，构成该概念的具体死因应该比之前认识到的更广泛且不同：仍然包括药物死亡率，可能还包括酒精死亡，但用心脏病、下呼吸道疾病、凶杀以及可能癌症导致的死亡取代自杀。第四，在解释心理健康对死亡率的总体影响中的黑白差异时，给定心理健康恶化程度增加所带来的后果异质性通常比心理健康恶化程度变化的大小更重要。

papers.title: Who should work how much?
papers.authors: Timo Boppart, Per Krusell, Jonna Olsson
papers.abstract: A production efficiency perspective naturally leads to the prescription that more productive individuals should work more than less productive individuals. Yet, systematic differences in actual hours worked across high- and low-wage individuals are barely noticeable. We highlight that the insurance available to households is an important determinant behind this fact. Using a dynamic heterogeneous-agent model with insurance frictions, income effects calibrated to match aggregate hours across time and space, and financial frictions that deliver realistic wealth dispersion, we report stark effects of insurance: perfect insurance would raise aggregate labor productivity by 9.6 percent and decrease hours worked by 7.7 percent.
papers.zh_title: 谁应该工作多少？
papers.zh_abstract: 从生产效率的角度自然会导致这样的结论：生产率更高的个体应该比生产率更低的个体工作更多。然而，在高工资和低工资个体之间实际工作时间的系统性差异几乎不明显。我们强调，家庭可获得的保险是这一事实背后的重要决定因素。使用一个包含保险摩擦的动态异质性主体模型、校准以匹配跨时间和空间的总工作时间的收入效应，以及产生现实财富分散的金融摩擦，我们报告了保险的显著影响：完美保险将使总劳动生产率提高9.6%，并使工作时间减少7.7%。

papers.title: Exchange Rates, Natural Rates, and the Price of Risk
papers.authors: Rohan Kekre, Moritz Lenel
papers.abstract: We study the source of exchange rate fluctuations using a general equilibrium model accommodating shocks in goods and financial markets. These shocks differ in their induced comovements between exchange rates, interest rates, and quantities. A calibration matching data from the U.S. and G10 currency countries implies that persistent shocks to relative demand, reflected in persistent interest rate differentials, account for 75% of the variance in the dollar/G10 exchange rate. Shocks to currency intermediation are important, however, in generating deviations from uncovered interest parity at high frequencies and explaining the dollar appreciation in crises.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E44, F31, G15
papers.zh_title: 汇率、自然利率与风险价格
papers.zh_abstract: 我们使用一个包含商品和金融市场冲击的一般均衡模型来研究汇率波动的来源。这些冲击在它们引起的汇率、利率和数量之间的共同变动上有所不同。一个匹配美国和G10货币国家数据的校准表明，反映在持久利率差异中的相对需求的持久冲击，解释了美元/G10汇率方差的75%。然而，货币中介冲击在产生高频偏离无抛补利率平价以及解释危机中美元升值方面是重要的。

papers.title: The Selective Disclosure of Evidence: An Experiment
papers.authors: Agata Farina, Guillaume Fréchette, Alessandro Ispano, Alessandro Lizzeri, Jacopo Perego
papers.abstract: We conduct an experimental analysis of selective disclosure in communication. In our model, an informed sender aims to influence a receiver by disclosing verifiable evidence that is selected from a larger pool of available evidence. Our experimental design leverages the rich comparative statics predictions of this model, enabling a systematic test of the relative importance of evidence selection versus evidence concealment in communication. Our findings confirm the key qualitative predictions of the theory, suggesting that selection, rather than concealment, is often the dominant distortion in communication. We also identify deviations from the theory: A minority of senders overcommunicate relative to predictions, while some receivers partially neglect the selective nature of the evidence they observe.
papers.zh_title: 证据的选择性披露：一项实验
papers.zh_abstract: 我们对沟通中的选择性披露进行了实验分析。在我们的模型中，一个知情的发送者旨在通过披露从更大可用证据池中选择的可验证证据来影响接收者。我们的实验设计利用了该模型丰富的比较静态预测，从而能够系统性地检验证据选择相对于证据隐瞒在沟通中的相对重要性。我们的发现证实了理论的关键定性预测，表明选择（而非隐瞒）通常是沟通中的主要扭曲。我们还识别出与理论的偏离：少数发送者相对于预测过度沟通，而一些接收者则部分忽视了他们所观察到的证据的选择性本质。

papers.title: Entry Costs Rise with Growth
papers.authors: Peter J. Klenow, Huiyu Li
papers.abstract: Over time and across states in the U.S., the number of firms is more closely tied to overall employment than to output per worker. In many models of firm dynamics, trade, and growth with a free entry condition, these facts imply that the costs of creating a new firm increase sharply with productivity growth. This increase in entry costs can stem from the rising cost of labor used in entry and weak or negative knowledge spillovers from prior entry. How entry costs vary with growth matters for welfare. For example, our findings suggest that productivity-enhancing policies will not induce entry of firms, thereby limiting the total impact of such policies on welfare.
papers.zh_title: 进入成本随增长而上升
papers.zh_abstract: 在美国，随着时间的推移和跨州，企业数量与总就业的关系比与人均产出的关系更为紧密。在许多具有自由进入条件的企业动态、贸易和增长模型中，这些事实意味着创建新企业的成本随着生产率增长而急剧增加。这种进入成本的增加可能源于用于进入的劳动力成本上升，以及来自先前进入的微弱或负面的知识溢出。进入成本如何随增长变化对福利很重要。例如，我们的发现表明，提高生产率的政策不会诱导企业进入，从而限制了此类政策对福利的总影响。

papers.title: Behavioral Attenuation
papers.authors: Benjamin Enke, Thomas Graeber, Ryan Oprea, Jeffrey Yang
papers.abstract: We report a large-scale examination of behavioral attenuation: due to information-processing constraints, the elasticity of people’s decisions to fundamentals is generally too small. We implement 30 experiments on a broad range of economic decisions, including choice, valuation, belief formation, strategic games and generic optimization. In 93% of our experiments, the elasticity of decisions to fundamentals decreases in participants’ cognitive uncertainty. Moreover, in decision problems with objective solutions, elasticities are universally smaller than is optimal. We show that the magnitude of attenuation is partly driven by the complexity of the decision problem. Many widely-studied anomalies represent special cases of behavioral attenuation.
papers.zh_title: 行为衰减
papers.zh_abstract: 我们报告了一项关于行为衰减的大规模检验：由于信息处理约束，人们决策对基本面的弹性通常过小。我们实施了30个实验，涵盖广泛的经济决策，包括选择、估值、信念形成、策略博弈和一般优化。在我们的实验中，93%的情况下，决策对基本面的弹性随着参与者的认知不确定性增加而减小。此外，在具有客观解决方案的决策问题中，弹性普遍小于最优值。我们表明，衰减的程度部分由决策问题的复杂性驱动。许多被广泛研究的异常现象代表了行为衰减的特例。

papers.title: Perry Preschool at 50: What Lessons Should Be Drawn and Which Criticisms Ignored?
papers.authors: Alison W. Baulos, Jorge Luis García, James J. Heckman
papers.abstract: The Perry Preschool Project, the longest-running experimental study of an early childhood education program, demonstrates how such interventions can yield long-term personal, societal, and intergenerational benefits for disadvantaged populations. The evidence is clear: investments in high-quality early childhood education and parental engagement can deliver returns even 50 years later. The program’s findings remain scientifically robust, particularly when analyzed through rigorous small-sample inference methods. The program’s findings also contradict common criticisms of preschool, as, when measured correctly, treatment effects on IQ do not fadeout. This paper draws insights from both the original founders and recent empirical studies, emphasizing the critical role of parental involvement in early education. The authors advocate for a scientific agenda focused on understanding the mechanisms behind treatment effects, rather than replicating specific programs. The analysis also underscores the broader implications of early childhood interventions for social mobility and human capital formation. Analysts of early childhood education should recognize that although credentials and formal curricula contribute to successful programs, the true measure of quality lies in adult-child interactions, which play an essential role.
papers.zh_title: 佩里学前教育项目50周年：应汲取哪些教训，忽略哪些批评？
papers.zh_abstract: 佩里学前教育项目是对早期儿童教育项目进行的最长期的实验研究，它展示了此类干预措施如何为弱势群体带来长期的个人、社会和代际收益。证据明确：对高质量早期儿童教育和家长参与的投入，即使在50年后也能产生回报。该项目的发现在科学上依然稳健，尤其是在通过严格的小样本推断方法进行分析时。该项目的发现也反驳了对学前教育的常见批评，因为当正确衡量时，治疗对智商的影响并未消退。本文从最初的创始人和近期的实证研究中汲取见解，强调了家长参与在早期教育中的关键作用。作者主张建立一个科学议程，专注于理解治疗效果背后的机制，而非复制特定项目。该分析还强调了早期儿童干预对社会流动性和人力资本形成的更广泛影响。早期儿童教育分析人士应认识到，虽然资质和正式课程有助于项目的成功，但质量的真正衡量标准在于成人与儿童的互动，这起着至关重要的作用。

papers.title: Midlife Health and Later Life Economic Inequality
papers.authors: Nicolò Russo, Rory McGee, Mariacristina De Nardi, Margherita Borella, Ross Abram
papers.abstract: Health shapes a broad set of later-life outcomes that are central to macroeconomics and public policy, including disability receipt, retirement, long-term care use, and survival. Yet we know little about how much differences in midlife health contribute to disparities in these outcomes later in life by race, ethnicity, and gender. Using the Health and Retirement Study, we construct a measure of health based on frailty and document large disparities at midlife. Black men and women have frailty levels at age 55 comparable to those of White men and women who are 13 and 20 years older, respectively, while the corresponding gaps for Hispanic men and women are 8 and 12 years. We then estimate a dynamic system linking health at age 55 to subsequent outcomes. Equalizing the distribution of health at age 55 across groups substantially reduces disparities in time spent in poor health, disability benefit receipt, and nursing home residence. Importantly, midlife health can account for later-life disparities more than education, health insurance coverage, and marital status jointly.
papers.zh_title: 中年健康与晚年经济不平等
papers.zh_abstract: 健康状况影响着晚年一系列对宏观经济学和公共政策至关重要的结果，包括残疾补助领取、退休、长期护理使用和生存。然而，我们对中年健康差异在多大程度上导致按种族、民族和性别划分的晚年结果差异知之甚少。利用健康与退休研究，我们基于虚弱程度构建了一个健康指标，并记录了中年时期的巨大差异。55岁时，黑人男性和女性的虚弱程度分别相当于比他们年长13岁和20岁的白人男性和女性，而西班牙裔男性和女性的相应差距则为8岁和12岁。然后，我们估计了一个将55岁时的健康状况与后续结果联系起来的动态系统。使各群体在55岁时的健康分布均等化，能显著减少在健康状况不佳、残疾补助领取和养老院居住时间方面的差异。重要的是，中年健康对晚年差异的解释力超过了教育、医疗保险覆盖和婚姻状况的总和。

papers.title: Moving to Opportunity, Together
papers.authors: Seema Jayachandran, Lea Nassal, Matthew J. Notowidigdo, Marie Paul, Heather Sarsons, Elin Sundberg
papers.abstract: Many couples face a trade-off between advancing one spouse’s career or the other’s. We study this trade-off using administrative data from Germany and Sweden. Using an event study approach, we find that when couples move across commuting zones, men’s earnings increase more than women’s. To distinguish between men’s greater potential earnings and a gender norm that prioritizes men’s careers, we examine how the patterns differ when the woman has higher potential earnings than her husband. We then estimate a model of household decision-making in which households can (and do) place more weight on income earned by the man.
papers.zh_title: 共同迁徙，把握机遇
papers.zh_abstract: 许多夫妇面临着在推进一方或另一方职业生涯之间的权衡。我们利用德国和瑞典的行政数据研究这一权衡。通过事件研究方法，我们发现当夫妇跨通勤区迁移时，男性的收入增长超过女性。为了区分男性更高的潜在收入与优先考虑男性职业的性别规范，我们研究了当女性潜在收入高于其丈夫时，这些模式有何不同。然后，我们估计了一个家庭决策模型，在该模型中，家庭可以（并且确实）更重视男性赚取的收入。

papers.title: A Secure Query System to Improve Access to Individual Income Tax Data
papers.authors: Amy O'Hara, Stephanie Straus, Ron Borzekowski, Paul Arnsberger, Barry Johnson
papers.abstract: In recent years, important and headline-grabbing findings have emerged from research using individual income tax data for statistical purposes. Demand for these microdata, accessible under the tax administration authority of the Internal Revenue Code and through the IRS Statistics of Income (SOI) Division’s Joint Statistical Research Program, continues to grow. This paper describes a new approach to address demand from government agencies and nonprofit institutions for such statistics. \nThe project explores the feasibility of a privacy preserving secure query system (SQS) linking end-users of the data, a data intermediary, and SOI. In the early stages of development, end-users may be state or local government agencies or nonprofit institutions (e.g., non-degree programs at community colleges); the intermediary is Georgetown University; and all processing will be done within and by SOI staff. The objective is for an SQS client, such as a state department of social services, to prepare and submit a dataset with personal identifiers for SOI to match to individual income tax records, in order to produce tables of predefined output statistics. This efficient and automated process should allow greater production of evidence at much lower cost and burden for clients and SOI.
papers.zh_title: 改善个人所得税数据访问的安全查询系统
papers.zh_abstract: 近年来，利用个人所得税数据进行统计研究产生了重要且引人注目的发现。对这些微观数据的需求持续增长，这些数据可通过《国内税收法》下的税收管理权限以及美国国税局收入统计司的联合统计研究项目获取。本文描述了一种满足政府机构和非营利组织对此类统计数据需求的新方法。该项目探索了建立一个连接数据最终用户、数据中介机构和收入统计司的隐私保护安全查询系统的可行性。在开发的早期阶段，最终用户可能是州或地方政府机构或非营利组织（例如社区大学的非学位项目）；中介机构是乔治城大学；所有处理工作将在收入统计司内部并由其工作人员完成。目标是让安全查询系统客户端（例如州社会服务部门）准备并提交一个包含个人标识符的数据集，供收入统计司与个人所得税记录进行匹配，以生成预定义输出统计数据的表格。这种高效自动化的流程应能以更低的成本和负担为客户和收入统计司生产更多证据。

papers.title: Experimentally Validating Welfare Evaluation of School Vouchers
papers.authors: Peter Arcidiacono, Karthik Muralidharan, John D. Singleton
papers.abstract: We leverage a unique two-stage experiment that randomized access to private school vouchers in rural India to estimate willingness-to-pay for greater school choice, a key input for assessing welfare impacts of alternative voucher designs. We find that a voucher targeted to households with limited assets, a proxy for ability-to-pay constraints, yields a marginal value of public funds (MVPF) greater than 3. We obtain this result using a multistep research design that isolates the information contributed by experimental data. We begin by estimating several models of school choice on control data alone, reserving data from treatment markets for model selection via out-of-sample validation. All of the models underpredict take-up of the randomized voucher offer. Evidence from treatment markets points to why: the program induced household search and led private schools to use voucher surplus to attract students. We incorporate these mechanisms into a unified model, estimated with both treatment and control data, that successfully explains the observed choice patterns. Our experience highlights that credible policy analysis requires modeling choice frictions and supply responses and using experimental data in estimation.
papers.zh_title: 实验验证学校代金券的福利评估
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用印度农村地区一项独特的、将私立学校代金券获取权随机化的两阶段实验，来估计对更大择校权的支付意愿，这是评估不同代金券设计福利影响的关键输入。我们发现，针对资产有限（作为支付能力约束的代理变量）家庭的代金券，其公共资金边际价值大于3。我们通过一个多步骤的研究设计获得了这一结果，该设计分离了实验数据所贡献的信息。我们首先仅使用对照组数据估计了几个学校选择模型，保留处理组市场的数据用于通过样本外验证进行模型选择。所有模型都低估了随机代金券要约的接受率。来自处理组市场的证据指出了原因：该项目引发了家庭搜寻，并导致私立学校利用代金券盈余来吸引学生。我们将这些机制整合到一个统一的模型中，该模型使用处理组和对照组数据进行估计，成功解释了观察到的选择模式。我们的经验强调，可信的政策分析需要对选择摩擦和供给反应进行建模，并在估计中使用实验数据。

papers.title: Of Markets and Marriages: A Multidisciplinary, Multibook Review Essay of Recent Work on the Causes of U.S. Poverty
papers.authors: Elizabeth Ananat
papers.abstract: I discuss recent books offering differing explanations for persistent U.S. poverty. Desmond (2023) argues that aid to low-income Americans is captured by more powerful market actors. I contextualize this concern as about incidence and consider both policies for changing incidence (by changing outside options) and supplemental critiques focused on reducing deadweight loss as well as reapportioning surplus. Kearney (2023) argues that declining marriage means American children grow up in less-resourced families. I suggest this decline may reflect shortfalls in “soft” skills needed to make marriage efficient in an era when men are increasingly a source of family economic instability while women’s outside options improve. I consider policies to improve soft skills and policies supporting family economic stability, which could reduce spousal-skill requirements. I conclude by encouraging engagement with the emerging policy feedback literature, which explores why popular, evidence-based policies like those discussed have not so far been adopted in the U.S.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, LS, PE；JEL：I3, I38, J12, J13, J18, J38, J50, J58, J63, J64, J65, J68
papers.zh_title: 市场与婚姻：关于美国贫困成因近期著作的多学科、多书评论文
papers.zh_abstract: 我讨论了近期对持续存在的美国贫困提出不同解释的著作。Desmond（2023）认为，对低收入美国人的援助被更强大的市场参与者攫取。我将这一担忧置于归宿问题的背景下，并考虑了改变归宿的政策（通过改变外部选择）以及侧重于减少无谓损失和重新分配剩余的补充性批评。Kearney（2023）认为，婚姻减少意味着美国儿童在资源更少的家庭中成长。我提出，这种减少可能反映了在男性日益成为家庭经济不稳定来源而女性外部选择改善的时代，使婚姻有效所需的“软”技能不足。我考虑了改善软技能的政策以及支持家庭经济稳定的政策，这些政策可以降低对配偶技能的要求。最后，我鼓励与新兴的政策反馈文献进行互动，该文献探讨了为何像所讨论的那些受欢迎且基于证据的政策迄今未在美国被采纳。

papers.title: The Rapid Adoption of Generative AI
papers.authors: Alexander Bick, Adam Blandin, David J. Deming
papers.abstract: Generative artificial intelligence (AI) is a potentially important new technology, but its impact on the economy depends on the speed and intensity of adoption. This paper reports results from a series of nationally representative U.S. surveys of generative AI use at work and at home. As of late 2024, nearly 40 percent of the U.S. population age 18-64 uses generative AI. 23 percent of employed respondents had used generative AI for work at least once in the previous week, and 9 percent used it every work day. Relative to each technology’s first mass-market product launch, work adoption of generative AI has been as fast as the personal computer (PC), and overall adoption has been faster than either PCs or the internet. Generative AI and PCs have very similar early adoption patterns by education, occupation, and other characteristics. Between 1 and 5 percent of all work hours are currently assisted by generative AI, and respondents report time savings equivalent to 1.4 percent of total work hours. This suggests that substantial productivity gains from generative AI are possible.
papers.zh_title: 生成式人工智能的快速采用
papers.zh_abstract: 生成式人工智能是一项潜在的重要新技术，但其对经济的影响取决于采用的速度和强度。本文报告了一系列具有全国代表性的美国调查结果，内容涉及在工作场所和家庭中使用生成式人工智能的情况。截至2024年底，近40%的18-64岁美国人口使用生成式人工智能。23%的受雇受访者在上周至少使用过一次生成式人工智能进行工作，9%的人每个工作日都使用。相对于每项技术的首个大众市场产品发布，生成式人工智能在工作中的采用速度与个人电脑一样快，而总体采用速度则快于个人电脑或互联网。生成式人工智能和个人电脑在按教育、职业和其他特征划分的早期采用模式上非常相似。目前，1%至5%的总工作时间得到了生成式人工智能的辅助，受访者报告的时间节省相当于总工作时间的1.4%。这表明生成式人工智能可能带来可观的生产力提升。

papers.title: APT or “AIPT”? The Surprising Dominance of Large Factor Models
papers.authors: Antoine Didisheim, Shikun (Barry) Ke, Bryan T. Kelly, Semyon Malamud
papers.abstract: We introduce artificial intelligence pricing theory (AIPT). In contrast with the APT’s foundational assumption of a low dimensional factor structure in returns, the AIPT conjectures that returns are driven by a large number of factors. We first verify this conjecture empirically and show that complex nonlinear models with an exorbitant number of factors (many more than the number of training observations or base assets) are far more successful in describing the out-of-sample behavior of asset returns than simpler benchmark models. Economically, we show that complex models are more than twice as sensitive to long-run macroeconomic activity than simpler benchmarks. Finally, we theoretically characterize the behavior of large factor pricing models, from which we show that the AIPT’s “many factors” conjecture faithfully explains our empirical findings, while the APT’s “few factors” conjecture is contradicted by the data.
papers.meta: Programs：AP；JEL：C1, C40, C45, C55, G1, G11, G12, G14, G17
papers.zh_title: APT还是“AIPT”？大型因子模型的惊人主导地位
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了人工智能定价理论（AIPT）。与APT关于收益率存在低维因子结构的基础假设相反，AIPT推测收益率是由大量因子驱动的。我们首先通过实证验证了这一推测，并表明，与更简单的基准模型相比，使用数量惊人的因子（远多于训练观测值或基础资产数量）的复杂非线性模型在描述资产收益率的样本外行为方面要成功得多。从经济角度看，我们表明，复杂模型对长期宏观经济活动的敏感性是更简单基准模型的两倍以上。最后，我们从理论上刻画了大型因子定价模型的行为，并由此表明，AIPT的“多因子”推测忠实地解释了我们的实证发现，而APT的“少因子”推测则与数据相矛盾。

papers.title: Fear and Dreams: Understanding the Non-Institutional sources of Leader Strategy
papers.authors: Maria Angélica Bautista, Juan Sebastián Galán, James A. Robinson, Rafael F. Torres, Ragnar Torvik
papers.abstract: Political leaders make policy choices which are often hard to explain via institutions. We use the behavior of Colombian paramilitary groups as an environment to study non-institutional sources of variation in how public good provision and violence are combined to control populations. We hypothesize that a significant source of variation stems from the social preferences of the paramilitary commanders. Reciprocators adopt a strategy of offering public goods in exchange for support, but also use violence to punish those who do not reciprocate back. Reciprocity, developed via childhood socialization, is a characteristic of rural “peasants”. We develop a model which generates these hypotheses and test them using a unique dataset compiled from transitional justice documents.
papers.zh_title: 恐惧与梦想：理解领导人战略的非制度性来源
papers.zh_abstract: 政治领导人的政策选择往往难以通过制度来解释。我们利用哥伦比亚准军事组织的行为作为研究环境，探讨在如何结合公共品供给与暴力以控制民众方面，非制度性来源的差异。我们假设，一个重要的差异来源在于准军事指挥官的社会偏好。互惠者采取一种策略，即提供公共品以换取支持，但也使用暴力来惩罚那些不回报的人。互惠性是通过童年社会化形成的，是农村“农民”的一个特征。我们构建了一个模型来生成这些假设，并使用从过渡时期司法文件中编制的独特数据集对其进行了检验。

papers.title: Social Interactions, Information, and Preferences for Schools: Experimental Evidence from Los Angeles
papers.authors: Christopher Campos
papers.abstract: This paper measures parents’ beliefs about school and peer quality, how information about each affects school choices and student outcomes, and how social interactions mediate these effects. Parents underestimate school quality and overestimate peer quality. Cross-randomized school and peer quality information combined with a spillover design shows that when parents received information, they and their neighbors’ preferences shifted toward higher value-added schools, underscoring stronger tastes for school quality and the role of social interactions. These demand responses translate into real educational gains. Students exposed to the improved information enroll in more effective schools, achieve higher test scores, report improved socio-emotional well-being, and are more likely to enroll in college. The experimental evidence shows parents value school effectiveness even conditional on peer quality and that improving the informational environment can elevate numerous policy-relevant outcomes.
papers.zh_title: 社会互动、信息与学校偏好：来自洛杉矶的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文衡量了家长对学校质量和同伴质量的信念，关于每种质量的信息如何影响学校选择和学生成果，以及社会互动如何调节这些效应。家长低估了学校质量，高估了同伴质量。交叉随机化的学校质量和同伴质量信息，结合一个溢出效应设计表明，当家长收到信息时，他们及其邻居的偏好转向了增值更高的学校，这突显了家长对学校质量的更强偏好以及社会互动的作用。这些需求反应转化为真实的教育收益。接触到改进信息的学龄儿童进入了更有效的学校，取得了更高的考试成绩，报告了改善的社会情感福祉，并且更有可能进入大学。实验证据表明，即使在控制同伴质量的条件下，家长也重视学校效能，并且改善信息环境可以提升许多与政策相关的成果。

papers.title: Intergenerational Transmission of Occupation: Lessons from the United States Army
papers.authors: Kyle Greenberg, Matthew Gudgeon, Adam Isen, Corbin L. Miller, Richard W. Patterson
papers.abstract: This paper estimates causal intergenerational occupation transmission in the military using discontinuities in parents’ eligibility for service from the Armed Forces Qualification Test. A parent’s enlistment in the Army increases their children’s military service propensity by between 58% and 110%. Intergenerational occupational transmission rates vary by race and sex—they are highest for demographic groups whose parents gained the most economically from service and for same-sex parent-child pairs. Our findings provide new evidence on the mechanisms driving intergenerational occupation correlations and indicate increasing access to good occupations is an important channel for improving intergenerational economic mobility for less advantaged groups.
papers.zh_title: 职业的代际传递：来自美国陆军的教训
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用武装部队资格测试中父母服役资格的不连续性，估计了军队中职业的代际因果传递。父母在陆军服役使其子女的从军倾向增加了58%至110%。代际职业传递率因种族和性别而异——对于其父母从服役中获得最大经济收益的人口群体以及同性别的亲子对而言，该比率最高。我们的发现为驱动代际职业相关性的机制提供了新证据，并表明增加获得良好职业的机会是改善弱势群体代际经济流动性的重要渠道。

papers.title: The Unintended Consequences of Merit-based Teacher Selection: Evidence from Large-scale Reform in Colombia
papers.authors: Matias Busso, Sebastián Montaño, Juan S. Muñoz-Morales, Nolan G. Pope
papers.abstract: Teacher quality is a key factor in improving student academic achievement. As such, educational policymakers strive to design systems to hire the most effective teachers. This paper examines the effects of a national policy reform in Colombia that established a merit-based teacher-hiring system intended to enhance teacher quality and improve student learning. Implemented in 2005 for all public schools, the policy ties teacher-hiring decisions to candidates’ performance on an exam evaluating subject-specific knowledge and teaching aptitude. The implementation of the policy led to many experienced contract teachers being replaced by high exam-performing novice teachers. We find that though the policy sharply increased pre-college test scores of teachers, it also decreased the overall stock of teacher experience and led to sharp decreases in students’ exam performance and educational attainment. Using a difference-in-differences strategy to compare the outcomes of students from public and private schools over two decades, we show that the hiring reform decreased students’ performance on high school exit exams by 8 percent of a standard deviation, and reduced the likelihood that students enroll in and graduate from college by more than 10 percent. The results underscore that relying exclusively on specific ex ante measures of teacher quality to screen candidates, particularly at the expense of teacher experience, may unintentionally reduce students’ learning gains.
papers.zh_title: 基于绩效的教师选拔的非预期后果：来自哥伦比亚大规模改革的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 教师质量是提高学生学业成绩的关键因素。因此，教育政策制定者努力设计系统以招聘最有效的教师。本文考察了哥伦比亚一项国家政策改革的影响，该改革建立了一个基于绩效的教师招聘系统，旨在提高教师质量并改善学生学习。该政策于2005年在所有公立学校实施，将教师招聘决策与候选人在评估学科知识和教学能力的考试中的表现挂钩。该政策的实施导致许多有经验的合同教师被考试表现优异的新手教师所取代。我们发现，尽管该政策大幅提高了教师的大学入学前考试成绩，但它也降低了教师经验的总体存量，并导致学生考试成绩和受教育程度的急剧下降。使用双重差分策略比较公立和私立学校学生在二十多年间的成果，我们表明，这项招聘改革使学生在高中毕业考试中的成绩下降了8%个标准差，并将学生进入大学和大学毕业的可能性降低了超过10%。这些结果强调，仅依赖特定的教师质量事前衡量标准来筛选候选人，特别是以牺牲教师经验为代价，可能会无意中减少学生的学习收益。

papers.title: Estimating the Regional Welfare Impact of Tariff Changes: Application to the United States
papers.authors: Robert C. Feenstra, Chang Hong
papers.abstract: We propose an empirical method using a translog expenditure function to estimate the regional welfare impact of changes in import tariffs, and we apply this method to the United States. Tariff revenue is assumed to be distributed on a per-capita basis, so states with greater production will experience a welfare gain from tariffs on those products (due to rising producer surplus) while those with little production will lose (due to falling consumer surplus). Over 2002-17, we find that 28 states benefitted from reduced tariffs, with national welfare gains of $5.8 billion or $50 per household in 2017. These national gains were eliminated by the tariff increases after 2017, with national losses of $57 per household in 2019 and rising to $103 per household in 2022, but 25 states still gained. These estimates of the national losses from tariff increases are lower than found in other studies for the 2017-19 period, due to this study incorporating product exclusions that reduced the tariffs on certain products and also due to differences in the methods of calculation.
papers.zh_title: 估算关税变化的区域福利影响：以美国为例
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种实证方法，使用超越对数支出函数来估算进口关税变化对区域福利的影响，并将此方法应用于美国。假设关税收入按人均分配，因此，对于这些产品，产量较大的州将从关税中获得福利收益（由于生产者剩余增加），而产量较少的州将遭受损失（由于消费者剩余减少）。在2002年至2017年间，我们发现28个州从降低的关税中受益，2017年全国福利收益为58亿美元，即每户50美元。这些全国性收益在2017年后的关税增加中被抵消，2019年每户全国损失为57美元，到2022年上升至每户103美元，但仍有25个州获得收益。这些对关税增加造成的全国性损失的估计低于其他针对2017-2019年期间的研究结果，原因是本研究纳入了产品排除条款，这些条款降低了对某些产品的关税，同时也由于计算方法上的差异。

papers.title: Cross-Border Shopping: Evidence and Welfare Implications for Switzerland
papers.authors: Ariel Burstein, Sarah M. Lein, Jonathan Vogel
papers.abstract: Consumers access foreign goods by purchasing them domestically or shopping abroad. We present new facts on cross-border shopping by Swiss households showing, for example, that prices of identical products are lower in neighboring countries, cross-border shopping shares fall with distance to the border, and price gaps and cross-border shopping shares rose following the 2015 Swiss Franc appreciation. We use a simple model of cross-border shopping to quantify how variation across space in cross-border shopping results in heterogeneous changes in cost-of-living in response to changes in international prices such as the 2015 Swiss Franc Appreciation and the 2020 Covid-19-related closing of the border.
papers.zh_title: 跨境购物：瑞士的证据与福利影响
papers.zh_abstract: 消费者通过在国内购买或出国购物来获取外国商品。我们展示了瑞士家庭跨境购物的新事实，例如，相同产品的价格在邻国更低，跨境购物份额随距边境距离的增加而下降，以及价格差距和跨境购物份额在2015年瑞士法郎升值后上升。我们使用一个简单的跨境购物模型来量化，跨境购物在空间上的差异如何导致生活成本对国际价格变化（如2015年瑞士法郎升值和2020年与新冠疫情相关的边境关闭）的异质性反应。

papers.title: Do Elite Universities Overpay Their Faculty?
papers.authors: Cesar Luis Garro-Marin, Shulamit Kahn, Kevin Lang
papers.abstract: Do elite universities overpay their faculty? Not if you believe the AKM model. However, although the AKM model fits well, it is unlikely to be the right interpretation in this case.
papers.zh_title: 精英大学是否向其教师支付过高薪酬？
papers.zh_abstract: 精英大学是否向其教师支付过高薪酬？如果你相信AKM模型，答案是否定的。然而，尽管AKM模型拟合良好，但在这种情况下，它不太可能是正确的解释。

papers.title: Finance Without Exotic Risk
papers.authors: Pedro Bordalo, Nicola Gennaioli, Rafael La Porta, Andrei Shleifer
papers.abstract: We address the joint hypothesis problem in cross-sectional asset pricing by using measured analyst expectations of earnings growth. We construct a firm-level measure of Expectations Based Returns (EBRs) that uses analyst forecast errors and revisions and shuts down any cross-sectional differences in required returns. We obtain three results. First, variation in EBRs accounts for a large chunk of cross-sectional return spreads in value, investment, size, and momentum factors. Second, time variation in these spreads is predictable, and proxied by predictable time variation in EBRs. This result holds even controlling for scaled price variables, which may capture time varying required return differentials. Third, firm characteristics typically viewed as capturing risk predict disappointment of expectations (and of EBRs). Overall, return spreads typically attributed to exotic risk factors are explained by predictable movements in non-rational expectations of firms’ earnings growth.
papers.zh_title: 无奇异风险的金融
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过使用分析师对盈利增长的实际预期来解决横截面资产定价中的联合假设问题。我们构建了一个基于预期的回报（EBRs）的公司层面指标，该指标利用分析师的预测误差和修正，并消除了所需回报的任何横截面差异。我们得到了三个结果。首先，EBRs的变动解释了价值、投资、规模和动量因子中横截面回报差异的很大一部分。其次，这些差异的时间变化是可预测的，并且由EBRs的可预测时间变化所代理。即使控制了可能捕捉时变所需回报差异的缩放价格变量，这一结果仍然成立。第三，通常被视为捕捉风险的公司特征预测了预期（以及EBRs）的落空。总体而言，通常归因于奇异风险因子的回报差异，可以通过公司盈利增长的非理性预期的可预测变动来解释。

papers.title: Currency Centrality in Equity Markets, Exchange Rates and Global Financial Cycles
papers.authors: Hélène Rey, Vania Stavrakeva, Jenny Tang
papers.abstract: The paper explores empirically the tight links between exchange rates and the global network of equity holdings. Exchange rates can be expressed in terms of “equity net currency supplies”, i.e. local currency stock market capitalization minus equity holdings, denominated in investors’ currencies, as well as elasticities, reflecting the “centrality” of currencies in global equity markets. The observed components of our exchange rate decomposition account for, on average, 95% of the monthly variation of 28 bilateral currency crosses vis-à-vis the USD and 98% vis-à-vis the EUR. We use the decomposition to elucidate the unique role of the USD in transmitting risk aversion and U.S. macroeconomic news throughout the global equity network. Our findings contribute towards explaining global financial cycles and “risk-on”/“risk-off” episodes.
papers.zh_title: 股票市场、汇率与全球金融周期中的货币中心性
papers.zh_abstract: 本文实证探讨了汇率与全球股票持有网络之间的紧密联系。汇率可以用“股票净货币供给”来表示，即以投资者货币计价的本地股票市场市值减去股票持有量，以及反映货币在全球股票市场中“中心性”的弹性。我们的汇率分解的观测成分平均解释了28种货币对美元双边汇率月度变动的95%，以及对欧元双边汇率月度变动的98%。我们利用这一分解来阐明美元在通过全球股票网络传递风险厌恶和美国宏观经济新闻方面的独特作用。我们的发现有助于解释全球金融周期和“风险偏好”/“风险规避”时期。

papers.title: Child Penalties and Parental Role Models: Classroom Exposure Effects
papers.authors: Henrik Kleven, Giulia Olivero, Eleonora Patacchini
papers.abstract: This paper investigates whether the effects of children on the labor market outcomes of women relative to men—child penalties—are shaped by the work behavior of peers’ parents during adolescence. Leveraging quasi-random variation in the fraction of peers with working mothers across cohorts within schools, we find that greater exposure to working mothers reduces the child penalty in employment later in life. The effect is economically meaningful, precisely estimated, and robust across specifications. Evidence on mechanisms suggests that these effects are driven by exposure to maternal employment as a parental role model, shaping child-related gender gaps in the labor market.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, LS, PE；JEL：J13, J16, J21, J22
papers.zh_title: 子女惩罚与父母角色模型：课堂接触效应
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了子女对女性相对于男性劳动力市场结果的影响——即子女惩罚——是否受到青春期同伴父母工作行为的塑造。利用学校内不同年级队列中拥有在职母亲的同伴比例的外生变化，我们发现，更多地接触在职母亲会降低日后生活中就业方面的子女惩罚。这一效应在经济意义上显著，估计精确，并且在各种设定下稳健。关于机制的证据表明，这些效应是由将母亲就业作为父母角色模型的接触所驱动的，从而塑造了劳动力市场中与子女相关的性别差距。

papers.title: Financial Advice and Investor Beliefs: Experimental Evidence on Active vs. Passive Strategies
papers.authors: Antoinette Schoar, Yang Sun
papers.abstract: Using a randomized controlled trial we test how retail investors assess and update their priors based on different types of financial advice, which either aligns with their priors or goes against it. We compare advice that emphasizes either the benefits of passive investment strategies (such as diversification and low fees) or active strategies (such as stock picking and market timing). We find that participants rate advice significantly higher when it aligns with their priors rather than contradicts them. But people update their beliefs about investment strategies in the direction of the advice they receive, independent of their priors. At the same time, there is significant heterogeneity based on the subjects’ financial literacy. Financially more literate subjects positively update in response to seeing passive advice, but most do not update (and rate the advice negatively) when exposed to active advice. In contrast, financially less literate subjects are strongly influenced by both types of advice. Finally, subjects rate the advice lower if the advisor is perceived to have misaligned incentives compared to when they are more aligned.
papers.zh_title: 金融建议与投资者信念：关于主动与被动策略的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 通过一项随机对照试验，我们测试了散户投资者如何根据不同类型的金融建议来评估和更新他们的先验信念，这些建议要么与其先验信念一致，要么相悖。我们比较了强调被动投资策略（如分散化和低费用）或主动策略（如选股和市场择时）好处的建议。我们发现，当建议与其先验信念一致而非相悖时，参与者对建议的评价显著更高。但人们会朝着所收到建议的方向更新他们对投资策略的信念，而与其先验信念无关。同时，基于受试者的金融素养存在显著的异质性。金融素养较高的受试者在看到被动建议时会积极更新，但大多数人在接触主动建议时不会更新（并且对建议给予负面评价）。相比之下，金融素养较低的受试者则受到两种类型建议的强烈影响。最后，如果认为顾问的激励不匹配，与激励更匹配的情况相比，受试者对建议的评价更低。

papers.title: Capital-Skill Complementarity in Firms and in the Aggregate Economy
papers.authors: Giuseppe Berlingieri, Filippo Boeri, Danial Lashkari, Jonathan Vogel
papers.abstract: We study capital-skill complementarity in a multi-sector framework featuring firm-specific, multi-factor production functions. We characterize the elasticity of the skill premium to the price of capital equipment in terms of firm-level elasticities of substitution across factors, elasticities of substitution across firms and sectors, and factor intensities. Using French administrative data, we first provide reduced-form evidence that equipment-intensive firms are relatively skill-intensive and that exogenous declines in firm-level equipment prices increase firms’ relative demand for skilled labor. We then estimate the micro-level elasticities needed for theory-guided aggregation, providing the first identification of aggregate capital-skill complementarity allowing for arbitrary firm, industry, and aggregate trends in unobserved skill-biased productivity. We find statistically and economically significant aggregate capital-skill complementarity, but this force alone is insufficient to generate the full increase in the relative demand for high-skilled workers observed in the data.

papers.title: Welfare in the Volunteer’s Dilemma
papers.authors: Marco Battaglini, Thomas R. Palfrey
papers.abstract: We study the volunteer’s dilemma in environments with heterogeneous preferences and private information. We characterize the efficiency properties of equilibrium, which is a departure from all the previous literature that focuses only on the probability of group success. While the probability of success may be non-monotonic in the size of the group, we show that per-capita welfare is always increasing for all types, strictly for sufficiently high types. As group size increases, the expected utility of every type converges to the expected utility of the type with the lowest possible cost, which is the same expected utility when there is no free rider problem, i.e., when there is only a single player in the game and that player has the lowest possible cost.
papers.zh_title: 志愿者困境中的福利
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了具有异质性偏好和私人信息环境下的志愿者困境。我们刻画了均衡的效率特征，这与以往所有仅关注群体成功概率的文献不同。虽然成功概率可能随群体规模非单调变化，但我们表明人均福利对所有类型总是递增的，对足够高的类型严格递增。随着群体规模增加，每种类型的期望效用收敛到具有最低可能成本类型的期望效用，这与不存在搭便车问题时的期望效用相同，即当游戏中只有一个参与者且该参与者具有最低可能成本时。

papers.title: Interdealer Price Dispersion and Intermediary Capacity
papers.authors: Andrea L. Eisfeldt, Bernard Herskovic, Shuo Liu
papers.abstract: Intermediation capacity varies across dealers, and as a result, misallocation of credit risk reduces the risk-bearing capacity of the dealer sector and increases effective market-level risk aversion. When the efficient reallocation of credit risk within the dealer sector is impaired, interdealer price dispersion increases. Empirically, when interdealer price dispersion increases, bond prices decrease. Interdealer price dispersion explains a substantial portion of bond yield spread changes, the cross-section of bond returns, and the changes in the basis between bond spread and fair-value spreads. We conclude interdealer frictions reduce the risk-bearing capacity of intermediaries and are crucial for intermediary bond pricing.
papers.zh_title: 交易商间价格离散与中介能力
papers.zh_abstract: 不同交易商的中介能力存在差异，因此信用风险的错配降低了交易商部门的风险承担能力，并增加了市场层面的有效风险厌恶。当交易商部门内部信用风险的有效再配置受损时，交易商间的价格离散会增加。实证上，当交易商间价格离散增加时，债券价格下降。交易商间价格离散解释了债券利差变化、债券回报横截面以及债券利差与公允价值利差之间基差变化的很大一部分。我们得出结论，交易商间的摩擦降低了中介的风险承担能力，并且对中介债券定价至关重要。

papers.title: Hours Worked and Lifetime Earnings Inequality
papers.authors: Alexander Bick, Adam Blandin, Richard Rogerson
papers.abstract: We document large differences in lifetime hours of work using data from the NLSY79 and argue that these differences are an important source of inequality in lifetime earnings. To establish this we develop and calibrate a rich heterogeneous agent model of labor supply and human capital accumulation that allows for heterogeneity in preferences for work, initial human capital and learning ability, as well as idiosyncratic shocks to human capital throughout the life-cycle. Our calibrated model implies that almost 20 percent of the variance in lifetime earnings is accounted for by differences in lifetime hours of work, with over 90 percent of this effect due to heterogeneity in preferences. Higher lifetime hours contribute to lifetime earnings via two channels: a direct channel (more hours spent in production at given productivity) and a human capital channel (more hours spent investing in human capital, which increases future productivity). Roughly one-half of the effect of lifetime hours on lifetime earnings is due to the human capital channel. Higher lifetime hours are also an important source of upward earnings mobility over the life-cycle for many workers.
papers.zh_title: 工作时间与终生收入不平等
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用NLSY79数据记录了终生工作时间的巨大差异，并认为这些差异是终生收入不平等的重要来源。为了确立这一点，我们开发并校准了一个丰富的异质性代理人模型，该模型包含劳动供给和人力资本积累，允许工作偏好、初始人力资本和学习能力的异质性，以及整个生命周期中人力资本的异质性冲击。我们的校准模型表明，终生收入方差中近20%可由终生工作时间的差异解释，其中超过90%的影响来自偏好的异质性。更高的终生工作时间通过两个渠道对终生收入做出贡献：直接渠道（在给定生产率下更多时间用于生产）和人力资本渠道（更多时间用于投资人力资本，从而提高未来生产率）。终生工作时间对终生收入的影响中大约一半来自人力资本渠道。对于许多工人来说，更高的终生工作时间也是生命周期中向上收入流动性的重要来源。

papers.title: Bridging the Gaps: The Impact of Interregional Transmission on Emissions and Reliability
papers.authors: Audun Botterud, Christopher R. Knittel, John Parsons, Juan Ramon Senga, Drew Story
papers.abstract: The substantial decline in the cost of wind and solar generation over recent decades has significantly altered the energy landscape. With these technologies becoming economically viable, even without stringent decarbonization policies, the role of interregional transmission has become increasingly important. This study examines the value of interregional transmission to the U.S. grid under current policies and deep decarbonization scenarios. By utilizing the GenX capacity expansion model, we evaluate the proposed BIG WIRES Act, which mandates a minimum interregional transfer capability requirement. Our analysis focuses on four key areas: interregional transmission builds and grid characteristics, electricity system cost savings, grid reliability during extreme weather events, and climate benefits. Results show that the Act can lead to a 68% increase in interregional transfer capability under current policies, resulting in annual system cost savings of $487 million and a 43.33 Mmt reduction in CO2 emissions. The benefits are even greater under a 95% CO2 reduction mandate. The study underscores the importance of interregional transmission in optimizing renewable energy use, enhancing grid reliability, and achieving cost savings and emissions reductions.
papers.zh_title: 弥合差距：区域间输电对排放与可靠性的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 近几十年来，风能和太阳能发电成本的大幅下降显著改变了能源格局。随着这些技术在经济上变得可行，即使没有严格的脱碳政策，区域间输电的作用也日益重要。本研究考察了在当前政策和深度脱碳情景下，区域间输电对美国电网的价值。通过利用GenX容量扩展模型，我们评估了拟议的《大电网法案》（BIG WIRES Act），该法案规定了最低区域间输电能力要求。我们的分析聚焦于四个关键领域：区域间输电建设与电网特性、电力系统成本节约、极端天气事件下的电网可靠性以及气候效益。结果显示，在当前政策下，该法案可使区域间输电能力增加68%，每年节省系统成本4.87亿美元，并减少4333万吨二氧化碳排放。在95%的二氧化碳减排要求下，效益甚至更大。该研究强调了区域间输电在优化可再生能源利用、增强电网可靠性以及实现成本节约和减排方面的重要性。

papers.title: The Efficiency of Dynamic Electricity Prices
papers.authors: Andrew J. Hinchberger, Mark R. Jacobsen, Christopher R. Knittel, James M. Sallee, Arthur A. van Benthem
papers.abstract: The marginal cost of electricity fluctuates hour-by-hour, yet retail customers typically face flat prices. Using data from all seven US wholesale markets and a new method to evaluate alternative rates set in advance that accounts for equilibrium price effects, we estimate efficiency gains from time-varying price schedules that better align price with cost. We have three main results. First, time-of-use rates and critical-peak pricing, the two most common time-varying rate plans, each correct about 10% of mispricing. Second, complex rate structures based on historical prices often backfire. Third, real-time pricing with price ceilings can capture most potential efficiency gains while limiting customer risk.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, IO, PE, PR；JEL：L94, L97, Q41, Q48
papers.zh_title: 动态电价的效率
papers.zh_abstract: 电力的边际成本每小时都在波动，但零售客户通常面临固定价格。利用美国所有七个批发市场的数据以及一种评估预先设定替代费率的新方法（该方法考虑了均衡价格效应），我们估算了通过更好地使价格与成本保持一致的分时电价计划所带来的效率收益。我们有三项主要发现。首先，分时电价和关键峰值定价这两种最常见的时间变化电价计划，各自纠正了约10%的错误定价。其次，基于历史价格的复杂费率结构往往适得其反。第三，带有价格上限的实时电价可以捕获大部分潜在效率收益，同时限制客户风险。

papers.title: Nonparametric Estimation of Demand with Switching Costs: the Case of Habitual Brand Loyalty
papers.authors: Xinyao Kong, Jean-Pierre H. Dubé, Øystein Daljord
papers.abstract: We study habitual brand loyalty, one of the earliest empirically-studied forms of switching costs and a classic source of structural state-dependence in consumer demand. Auxiliary instruments and economically-motivated restrictions can tighten nonparametric bounds on the extent of brand loyalty in choice panel data. We also prove that the canonical dynamic discrete-choice model, nested in our nonparametric framework, has “built-in” exclusion restrictions that semiparametrically identify the discount factor, in general, and point identify it for standard parameterizations of switching costs. Case studies of several large consumer goods categories show that brand loyalty accounts for at least 10.8% but no more than 72.2% of the observed choices across categories studied. In some categories, it accounts for over 90% of observed repeat-purchase behavior. Consumers are found to be forward-looking, but more impatient than would be implied by the real rate of interest.
papers.zh_title: 具有转换成本的需求非参数估计：习惯性品牌忠诚度案例
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究习惯性品牌忠诚度，这是最早被实证研究的转换成本形式之一，也是消费者需求中结构性状态依赖的经典来源。辅助工具和经济动机驱动的限制可以收紧选择面板数据中品牌忠诚度程度的非参数界限。我们还证明，嵌套在我们非参数框架中的经典动态离散选择模型，具有“内置”的排除限制，这些限制在半参数上识别了折现因子，并且对于转换成本的标准参数化，可以点识别它。对几个大型消费品类别的案例研究表明，在所研究的类别中，品牌忠诚度至少占观察到的选择的10.8%，但不超过72.2%。在某些类别中，它占观察到的重复购买行为的90%以上。消费者被发现具有前瞻性，但比实际利率所暗示的更加缺乏耐心。

papers.title: China: Autocracy 2.0
papers.authors: David Y. Yang
papers.abstract: Autocracy 2.0, exemplified by modern China, is economically robust, technologically advanced, globally engaged, and controlled through subtle and sophisticated methods. What defines China’s political economy, and what drives Autocracy 2.0? What is its future direction? I start by discussing two key challenges autocracies face: incentives and information. I then describe Autocracy 1.0’s reliance on fear and repression to address these issues. It makes no credible promises, using coercion for compliance, resulting in a low-information environment. Next, I introduce Autocracy 2.0, highlighting its significant shift in handling commitment and information challenges. China uses economic incentives to align interests with regime survival, fostering support. It employs advanced bureaucratic structures and technology to manage incentives and information, enabling success in a high-information environment. Finally, I explore Autocracy 3.0’s potential. In China, forces might revert to Autocracy 1.0, using technology for state control as growth slows but aspirations stay high. Globally, modern autocracies, led by China, are becoming major geopolitical forces, challenging the liberal democratic order.
papers.zh_title: 中国：威权主义2.0
papers.zh_abstract: 以现代中国为代表的威权主义2.0，经济强劲、技术先进、全球参与，并通过微妙而复杂的方法进行控制。是什么定义了中国政治经济学，又是什么驱动了威权主义2.0？其未来方向如何？我首先讨论威权主义面临的两个关键挑战：激励和信息。然后，我描述了威权主义1.0如何依赖恐惧和压制来解决这些问题。它不做任何可信的承诺，使用强制手段来确保服从，导致低信息环境。接下来，我介绍威权主义2.0，强调其在处理承诺和信息挑战方面的重大转变。中国利用经济激励使个人利益与政权生存保持一致，从而培养支持。它采用先进的官僚结构和技术来管理激励和信息，使其能够在高信息环境中取得成功。最后，我探讨了威权主义3.0的潜力。在中国，随着增长放缓但期望依然高涨，各种力量可能会回归威权主义1.0，利用技术进行国家控制。在全球范围内，以中国为首的现代威权主义正成为主要的地缘政治力量，挑战自由民主秩序。

papers.title: Parents' Earnings and the Returns to Universal Pre-Kindergarten
papers.authors: John Eric Humphries, Christopher Neilson, Xiaoyang Ye, Seth D. Zimmerman
papers.abstract: This paper asks whether universal pre-kindergarten (UPK) programs can increase parental earnings and, if so, how much these gains affect the economic returns to UPK. Using admissions lotteries for an extended-day UPK program in New Haven, Connecticut, we find that UPK enrollment increases childcare coverage to span the workday and raises parents’ earnings by 21.7% during pre-kindergarten. Gains persist for at least six years. We find little evidence of effects on children’s academic and behavioral outcomes during elementary and middle school. Combining these results, we demonstrate that tax revenues from parents’ earnings gains reduce the net government costs of UPK by 90% relative to estimates that ignore gains for parents. Overall, we estimate that each dollar spent yields $10 in benefits. Our findings demonstrate the potential of UPK programs that combine quality education with full-day childcare and underscore the importance of thinking about parents when designing and evaluating early-childhood policies.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：H43, I20, J13, J24
papers.zh_title: 父母收入与普及型学前教育的回报
papers.zh_abstract: 本文探讨普及型学前教育（UPK）项目能否提高父母收入，以及这些收益如何影响UPK的经济回报。利用康涅狄格州纽黑文市一个延长日间UPK项目的入学抽签数据，我们发现，UPK入学使儿童保育覆盖整个工作日，并在学前教育期间将父母收入提高21.7%。这些收益至少持续六年。我们几乎没有发现UPK对小学和初中阶段儿童学业及行为结果产生影响的证据。综合这些结果，我们证明，与忽略父母收益的估计相比，来自父母收入增长的税收收入使UPK的政府净成本降低了90%。总体而言，我们估计每花费1美元可产生10美元的收益。我们的研究结果展示了将优质教育与全日制儿童保育相结合的UPK项目的潜力，并强调了在设计和评估儿童早期政策时考虑父母因素的重要性。

papers.title: Trading Volume Alpha
papers.authors: Ruslan Goyenko, Bryan T. Kelly, Tobias J. Moskowitz, Yinan Su, Chao Zhang
papers.abstract: Portfolio optimization focuses on risk and return prediction, yet implementation costs critically matter. Predicting trading costs is challenging because costs depend on trade size and trader identity, thus impeding a generic solution. We focus on a component of trading costs that applies universally – trading volume. Individual stock trading volume is highly predictable, especially with machine learning. We model the economic benefits of predicting volume through a portfolio framework that trades off tracking error versus net-of-cost performance – translating volume prediction into net-of-cost alpha. The economic benefits of predicting individual stock volume are as large as those from stock return predictability.
papers.meta: Programs：AP；JEL：C45, C53, C55, G00, G11, G12, G17
papers.zh_title: 交易量阿尔法
papers.zh_abstract: 投资组合优化侧重于风险和收益预测，但执行成本至关重要。预测交易成本具有挑战性，因为成本取决于交易规模和交易者身份，从而阻碍了通用解决方案。我们专注于交易成本中一个普遍适用的组成部分——交易量。个股交易量具有高度可预测性，尤其是在使用机器学习时。我们通过一个在跟踪误差与净成本绩效之间进行权衡的投资组合框架，对预测交易量的经济收益进行建模，从而将交易量预测转化为净成本阿尔法。预测个股交易量的经济收益与股票收益可预测性的收益一样大。

papers.title: Decarbonizing Heat: The Impact of Heat Pumps and a Time-of-Use Heat Pump Tariff on Energy Demand
papers.authors: Louise Bernard, Andy Hackett, Robert D. Metcalfe, Andrew Schein
papers.abstract: Heat pumps have been proposed as the leading technology in the electrification of domestic heat and therefore could play a crucial part in the transition to low-carbon energy systems. However, there is very little causal evidence of the impact of heat pumps on energy demand and the impact of marginal prices to help optimize energy demand with heat pumps. We leverage a staggered roll-out of heat pumps from Octopus Energy Group to show that: (1) heat pumps have a large impact on energy demand, on average causing a 90% reduction in home gas use and a 61% increase in home electricity use – overall, households reduced total energy demand by 40% and carbon dioxide emissions by 36% in 2024 (with an average of 68% emissions savings over the lifetime of the heat pump); (2) a time-of-use tariff designed for heat pumps can provide large demand flexibility benefits, halving electricity consumption during the evening peak to help balance the grid, and that load shifting is possible on the coldest days and from all building types in our sample; (3) the marginal value of public funds of the current UK heat pump subsidy is £1.24 (for every £1 spent by the Government). Overall, we find that heat pumps can meaningfully decarbonize heat and subsidies to encourage heat pumps can be welfare-enhancing.
papers.zh_title: 供热脱碳：热泵及热泵分时电价对能源需求的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 热泵已被提议作为家庭供热电气化的领先技术，因此在向低碳能源系统转型中可能发挥关键作用。然而，关于热泵对能源需求的影响以及有助于优化热泵能源需求的边际价格，几乎没有因果证据。我们利用Octopus Energy Group分阶段推广热泵的数据表明：（1）热泵对能源需求有巨大影响，平均使家庭燃气使用量减少90%，家庭用电量增加61%——总体而言，到2024年，家庭总能源需求减少40%，二氧化碳排放量减少36%（在热泵整个生命周期内平均减排68%）；（2）为热泵设计的分时电价可带来巨大的需求灵活性效益，将晚间高峰时段的用电量减半以帮助平衡电网，并且在我们样本中最冷的天气和所有建筑类型中均可实现负荷转移；（3）当前英国热泵补贴的公共资金边际价值为1.24英镑（政府每支出1英镑）。总体而言，我们发现热泵可以有效实现供热脱碳，而鼓励使用热泵的补贴可以提高福利。

papers.title: Understanding the Heterogeneity of Intergenerational Mobility across Neighborhoods
papers.authors: Neil A. Cholli, Steven N. Durlauf, Rasmus Landersø, Salvador Navarro
papers.abstract: Recent research has uncovered large spatial heterogeneity in intergenerational mobility across neighborhoods in countries around the world. Yet there is little consensus on the reasons why mobility is high in some neighborhoods and low in others. This paper analyzes a generalized mobility model that examines the roles that families’ selection into neighborhoods and locational characteristics play in generating this spatial heterogeneity. We use administrative data from Denmark to decompose variation in mobility across nearly 300 larger and 2,000 smaller neighborhoods along these dimensions, accounting for sampling error. Families’ selection into neighborhoods and sampling error explain most observed heterogeneity across neighborhoods. Our generalized model explains most of the differences in mobility between neighborhoods, though a small but persistent difference remains between neighborhoods that our model cannot account for. An analysis of this “irreducible heterogeneity” suggests that neighborhoods exhibit multiple types in terms of their mobility effects.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, EFG, LS, PE；JEL：D30, H0, J0, R0
papers.zh_title: 理解代际流动性在社区间的异质性
papers.zh_abstract: 最近的研究发现，世界各国的代际流动性在社区间存在巨大的空间异质性。然而，对于为什么某些社区流动性高而其他社区流动性低，几乎没有共识。本文分析了一个广义流动性模型，考察家庭对社区的选择以及区位特征在产生这种空间异质性中的作用。我们使用丹麦的行政数据，沿着这些维度分解近300个较大社区和2000个较小社区之间流动性的变异，并考虑了抽样误差。家庭对社区的选择和抽样误差解释了观察到的社区间大部分异质性。我们的广义模型解释了社区间流动性差异的大部分，尽管模型无法解释的社区间仍存在微小但持续的差异。对这种“不可还原的异质性”的分析表明，社区在其流动性效应方面表现出多种类型。

papers.title: On the Optimal Allocation of Policy-Making
papers.authors: Alessandro Dovis, Rishabh Kirpalani, Guillaume M. Sublet
papers.abstract: How should society allocate policy-making between the legislative and the executive branches of government? We analyze a model in which biased and polarized policymakers set policy in response to shocks. We show that policy issues for which the policy-maker bias is small relative to the degree of polarization should be delegated to the legislature, while policy issues where the bias is large should be delegated to the executive. Moreover, when executive delegation is preferred, it is optimal to leave little discretion and impose a narrow mandate. This finding contrasts with conventional wisdom that executive delegation allows for greater flexibility. The main difference between the two institutional settings is the ability to restrict ex post bargaining under executive delegation. Thus, when the bias is large, executive delegation is preferred because it can effectively constrain policymakers' choices. In contrast, when the bias is small, the ability to bargain ex post allows for flexible responses to severe shocks while limiting political risk. We also study the credibility of these institutions and show that while delegating to the legislature is typically credible, executive delegation is typically not when the bias is exogenous but can be when the bias arises from time inconsistency problems.
papers.zh_title: 论政策制定的最优分配
papers.zh_abstract: 社会应如何在政府的立法和行政部门之间分配政策制定权？我们分析了一个模型，其中存在偏见和两极分化的政策制定者根据冲击制定政策。我们表明，对于政策制定者偏见相对于两极分化程度较小的政策问题，应委托给立法机构；而对于偏见较大的政策问题，应委托给行政部门。此外，当倾向于行政委托时，最优做法是留下很少的自由裁量权并施加狭窄的授权。这一发现与传统观点（即行政委托允许更大的灵活性）相悖。两种制度设置之间的主要区别在于行政委托下限制事后讨价还价的能力。因此，当偏见较大时，行政委托更受青睐，因为它可以有效约束政策制定者的选择。相比之下，当偏见较小时，事后讨价还价的能力允许对严重冲击做出灵活反应，同时限制政治风险。我们还研究了这些制度的可信度，并表明，虽然委托给立法机构通常是可信的，但当偏见是外生时，行政委托通常不可信，但当偏见源于时间不一致问题时，行政委托则可能是可信的。

papers.title: Theorizing with Large Language Models
papers.authors: Matteo Tranchero, Cecil-Francis Brenninkmeijer, Arul Murugan, Abhishek Nagaraj
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are proving to be a powerful toolkit for management and organizational research. While early work has largely focused on the value of these tools for data processing and replicating survey-based research, the potential of LLMs for theory building is yet to be recognized. We argue that LLMs can accelerate the pace at which researchers can develop, validate, and extend strategic management theory. We propose a novel framework called Generative AI-Based Experimentation (GABE) that enables researchers to conduct exploratory in silico experiments that can mirror the complexities of real-world organizational settings, featuring multiple agents and strategic interdependencies. This approach is unique because it allows researchers to unpack the mechanisms behind results by directly modifying agents’ roles, preferences, and capabilities, and asking them to reveal the explanations behind decisions. We apply this framework to a novel theory studying strategic exploration under uncertainty. We show how our framework can not only replicate the results from experiments with human subjects at a much lower cost, but can also be used to extend theory by clarifying boundary conditions and uncovering mechanisms. We conclude that LLMs possess tremendous potential to complement existing methods for theorizing in strategy and, more broadly, the social sciences.
papers.zh_title: 利用大型语言模型进行理论构建
papers.zh_abstract: 大型语言模型（LLM）正被证明是管理和组织研究的有力工具包。虽然早期工作主要关注这些工具在数据处理和复制基于调查的研究方面的价值，但LLM在理论构建方面的潜力尚未得到充分认识。我们认为，LLM可以加速研究人员开发、验证和扩展战略管理理论的速度。我们提出了一个名为“基于生成式人工智能的实验”（GABE）的新框架，使研究人员能够进行探索性的计算机模拟实验，这些实验可以反映现实组织环境的复杂性，具有多个主体和战略相互依赖性。这种方法的独特之处在于，它允许研究人员通过直接修改主体的角色、偏好和能力，并要求他们揭示决策背后的解释，来揭示结果背后的机制。我们将此框架应用于一项关于不确定性下战略探索的新理论。我们展示了我们的框架如何不仅能以低得多的成本复制人类受试者实验的结果，还能通过阐明边界条件和揭示机制来扩展理论。我们得出结论，LLM具有巨大潜力，可以补充战略学以及更广泛的社会科学中现有的理论构建方法。

papers.title: The Effects of “Buy American”: Electric Vehicles and the Inflation Reduction Act
papers.authors: Hunt Allcott, Reigner Kane, Maximilian S. Maydanchik, Joseph S. Shapiro, Felix Tintelnot
papers.abstract: We provide the first ex post microeconomic welfare analysis of the electric vehicle (EV) tax credits in the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA). Relative to pre-IRA policy, the credits generated $1.96 in domestic benefits per dollar of government spending, with taxpayer cost of $36,500 per additional EV. Relative to having no EV credits, they yielded $1.11 in domestic benefits per dollar of government spending. A leasing loophole that sidestepped domestic content rules created negative domestic benefits. A prominent example of green industrial policy, the credits harmed foreign countries by shifting surplus to domestic producers and helped them by decreasing CO₂ emissions.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, IO, ITI, PE；JEL：F18, H23, L11, Q58
papers.zh_title: “购买美国货”的影响：电动汽车与《通胀削减法案》
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提供了《通胀削减法案》（IRA）中电动汽车（EV）税收抵免的首个事后微观经济福利分析。相对于IRA前的政策，这些抵免每1美元政府支出产生了1.96美元的国内收益，纳税人每增加一辆电动汽车的成本为36,500美元。相对于没有电动汽车抵免的情况，它们每1美元政府支出产生了1.11美元的国内收益。一个规避国内成分规则的租赁漏洞产生了负的国内收益。作为绿色产业政策的一个突出例子，这些抵免通过将剩余转移给国内生产者而损害了外国，并通过减少二氧化碳排放而帮助了它们。

papers.title: Do Workers Undervalue COVID-19 Risk? Evidence from Wages and Death Certificate Data
papers.authors: Cong T. Gian, Sumedha Gupta, Kosali I. Simon, Ryan Sullivan, Coady Wing
papers.abstract: When mortality risks of a job increase, economic theory predicts that wages will rise to compensate workers. COVID-19 became a new source of mortality risk from close contact with other workers and customers. Real wages have risen during the COVID-19 era, but research to date has been sparse on how much of this increase reflects compensating wage differentials for COVID-19 risk on the job. We use 2020- 2021 death certificate data which for the first time includes the decedent’s occupation and industry, together with other occupational and industry mortality for previous years from the Census of Fatal Occupational Injuries (CFOI) and wage data from the Current Population Survey (CPS) to examine whether compensating wage differentials for COVID-19 occupational risks are in line with prior estimates of Values of Statistical Life (VSL). First, we find that there are substantial differences in the compensating differentials associated with COVID-19 vs other sources of job-related mortality risk. Full time workers’ pay is higher by $24 per week in jobs with a 1 in 1,000 higher risk of COVID-19 mortality, but their pay is $320 higher in jobs with 1 in 1,000 higher risk of non-COVID-19 workplace mortality. The non-COVID-19 mortality wage premiums imply that workers trade off money and mortality risk using a VSL of about $18 million, which is near the upper range of the most cited VSL estimates in the literature. In contrast, the COVID-19 wage premium implies that workers make decisions using a VSL of the range $1.24 - $1.54 million, much lower than standard VSL measures. The results are consistent with workers substantially underestimating or undervaluing the risk of COVID-19 mortality.
papers.zh_title: 工人是否低估了COVID-19风险？来自工资和死亡证明数据的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 当工作的死亡风险增加时，经济理论预测工资将上升以补偿工人。COVID-19成为因与其他工人和客户密切接触而产生的新死亡风险来源。在COVID-19时代，实际工资有所上升，但迄今为止的研究很少关注这种增长在多大程度上反映了对工作中COVID-19风险的补偿性工资差异。我们使用2020-2021年死亡证明数据（该数据首次包含死者的职业和行业），结合来自致命职业伤害普查（CFOI）的前几年其他职业和行业死亡率数据，以及来自当前人口调查（CPS）的工资数据，来检验与COVID-19职业风险相关的补偿性工资差异是否与先前统计生命价值（VSL）的估计一致。首先，我们发现与COVID-19相关的补偿性差异与其他工作相关死亡风险来源之间存在显著差异。全职员工在COVID-19死亡风险每增加千分之一的岗位上，周薪高出24美元，但在非COVID-19工作场所死亡风险每增加千分之一的岗位上，周薪高出320美元。非COVID-19死亡率的工资溢价意味着工人以约1800万美元的VSL在金钱和死亡风险之间进行权衡，这接近文献中最常引用的VSL估计值的上限范围。相比之下，COVID-19工资溢价意味着工人以124万至154万美元范围的VSL做出决策，远低于标准VSL衡量指标。这些结果与工人严重低估或低估COVID-19死亡风险的情况一致。

papers.title: Old and Connected versus Young and Creative: Networks and the Diffusion of New Scientific Ideas
papers.authors: Wei Cheng, Bruce A. Weinberg
papers.abstract: The adoption of new ideas is critical for realizing their full potential and for advancing the knowledge frontier but it involves analyzing innovators, potential adopters, and the networks that connect them. This paper applies natural language processing, network analysis, and a novel fixed effects strategy to study how the aging of the biomedical research workforce affects idea adoption. We show that the relationship between adoption and innovator career age varies with network distance. Specifically, at short distances, young innovators’ ideas are adopted the most, while at greater network distances, mid-career innovators’ ideas have the highest adoption.
