The main reason for this contrast is that young innovators are close to young potential adopters who are more open to new ideas, but mid-career innovators are more central in networks. Overall adoption is hump-shaped in the career age of innovators. Simulations show that the aging of innovators and of potential adopters have comparable effects on the adoption of important new ideas.
papers.zh_title: 年长且人脉广与年轻且富创意：网络与新科学思想的扩散
papers.zh_abstract: 新思想的采纳对于实现其全部潜力和推进知识前沿至关重要，但这涉及对创新者、潜在采纳者以及连接他们的网络进行分析。本文运用自然语言处理、网络分析和一种新颖的固定效应策略，研究生物医学研究队伍的老龄化如何影响思想采纳。我们表明，采纳率与创新者职业生涯年龄之间的关系随网络距离而变化。具体而言，在短距离内，年轻创新者的思想被采纳得最多；而在较远的网络距离上，职业生涯中期的创新者的思想具有最高的采纳率。造成这种对比的主要原因是，年轻创新者更接近对新鲜思想更开放的年轻潜在采纳者，而职业生涯中期的创新者在网络中处于更核心的位置。总体采纳率随创新者职业生涯年龄呈驼峰形。模拟表明，创新者的老龄化和潜在采纳者的老龄化对重要新思想的采纳具有可比的影响。

papers.title: Cross-Country Analysis of Labor Markets during the COVID-19 Pandemic
papers.authors: Robert Breunig, Wei Cheng, Laura Montenovo, Kyoung Hoon Lee, Bruce A. Weinberg, Yinjunjie Zhang
papers.abstract: The authors study employment outcomes during the early stages of the COVID-19 pandemic in eight countries with different case levels and policy responses: the United States, Australia, France, Denmark, Italy, South Korea, Spain, and Sweden. While the share of people not at work increased in all countries, safety net policies seem to influence whether people remained employed (but absent from work) versus unemployed or left the labor force. The authors find large employment decreases among middle-educated and young workers, increasing disparities in countries with the largest labor market declines. A variety of evidence suggests that labor demand was likely a larger driver of employment declines than labor supply and that stringent social distancing policies were sufficient to reduce employment even in the absence of high cases. Lastly, job characteristics - the importance of face-to-face interactions and the ability to work remotely - were closely related to labor market outcomes, with these relationships being stronger in countries with more cases.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19疫情期间劳动力市场的跨国分析
papers.zh_abstract: 作者研究了COVID-19大流行早期阶段八个国家的就业结果，这些国家具有不同的病例水平和政策应对措施：美国、澳大利亚、法国、丹麦、意大利、韩国、西班牙和瑞典。虽然所有国家未在工作的人数比例都有所增加，但安全网政策似乎影响了人们是保持就业（但缺勤）还是失业或退出劳动力市场。作者发现，中等教育程度和年轻工人的就业大幅下降，在劳动力市场下降幅度最大的国家中，不平等现象加剧。多种证据表明，劳动力需求可能是就业下降的更大驱动因素，而非劳动力供给，并且严格的社会疏离政策即使在病例不多的情况下也足以减少就业。最后，工作特征——面对面互动的重要性和远程工作的能力——与劳动力市场结果密切相关，这些关系在病例较多的国家更为显著。

papers.title: The Economic Impacts of Clean Power
papers.authors: Costas Arkolakis, Conor Walsh
papers.abstract: In this paper we assess the economic impacts of moving to a renewable-dominated grid in the US. We use projections of capital costs to develop price bounds on future wholesale power prices at the local geographic level. We then use a class of spatial general equilibrium models to estimate the effect on wages and output of prices falling below these bounds in the medium term. Power prices fall anywhere between 20% and 80%, depending on local solar resources, leading to an aggregate real wage gain of 2-3%. Over the longer term, we show how moving to clean power represents a qualitative change in the aggregate growth process, alleviating the “resource drag” that has slowed recent productivity growth in the US.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, EFG, ITI；JEL：E60, O4, Q40, Q42, Q43, Q57, R13
papers.zh_title: 清洁电力的经济影响
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们评估了美国向以可再生能源为主的电网转型的经济影响。我们利用资本成本预测来制定地方地理层面未来批发电价的价格区间。然后，我们使用一类空间一般均衡模型来估计中期内价格低于这些区间对工资和产出的影响。电力价格下降幅度在20%到80%之间，具体取决于当地的太阳能资源，导致总体实际工资增长2-3%。从长期来看，我们展示了向清洁电力转型如何代表总体增长过程中的质变，缓解了近年来减缓美国生产率增长的“资源拖累”。

papers.title: Here Today, Gone Tomorrow? Toward an Understanding of Fade-out in Early Childhood Education Programs
papers.authors: John A. List, Haruka Uchida
papers.abstract: An unsettling stylized fact is that decorated early childhood education programs improve cognitive skills in the short-term, but lose their efficacy after a few years. We implement a field experiment with two stages of randomization to explore the underpinnings of the fade-out effect. We first randomly assign preschool access to children, and then partner with the local school district to randomly assign the same children to classmates throughout elementary school. We find that the fade-out effect is critically-linked to the share of classroom peers assigned to preschool access—with enough treated peers the classic fade-out effect is muted. Our results highlight a paradoxical insight: while the fade-out effect has been viewed as a devastating critique of early childhood programs, our results highlight that fade-out is a key rationale for providing early education to all children. This is because human capital accumulation is inherently a social activity, leading early education programs to deliver their largest benefits at scale when everyone receives such programs.
papers.zh_title: 今日在此，明日消失？理解早期儿童教育项目的效果消退现象
papers.zh_abstract: 一个令人不安的典型事实是，备受赞誉的早期儿童教育项目能在短期内提高认知技能，但几年后就会失去效力。我们实施了一项包含两阶段随机化的实地实验，以探索效果消退现象的基础。我们首先随机分配儿童接受学前教育的机会，然后与当地学区合作，将同一批儿童随机分配到整个小学阶段的同班同学中。我们发现，效果消退现象与获得学前教育机会的同班同学比例密切相关——当有足够多的受处理同伴时，经典的效果消退现象就会被抑制。我们的结果突出了一个矛盾的见解：虽然效果消退现象被视为对早期儿童项目的严厉批评，但我们的结果强调，效果消退是为所有儿童提供早期教育的关键理由。这是因为人力资本积累本质上是一种社会活动，导致早期教育项目在所有人都接受此类项目时，才能大规模地发挥其最大效益。

papers.title: A Flexible, Heterogeneous Treatment Effects Difference-in-Differences Estimator for Repeated Cross-Sections
papers.authors: Partha Deb, Edward C. Norton, Jeffrey M. Wooldridge, Jeffrey E. Zabel
papers.abstract: This paper proposes a method to estimate treatment effects in difference-in-differences designs for repeated cross-section data in which the treatment start is staggered over time and treatment effects are heterogeneous by group, time, and observation-level covariates. We show that a linear-in-parameters regression specification with a sufficiently flexible functional form consisting of group-by-time treatment effects, two-way fixed effects, and interaction terms yields consistent estimates of heterogeneous treatment effects under general conditions. We also show that our method is identical to an imputation estimator. Under homoskedasticity assumptions the estimators are efficient, and aggregation of the treatment effects and inference are straightforward. We illustrate the use of this flexible linear model estimated by OLS with covariates (X) – FLEX – with an empirical example and provide comparisons to some benchmark estimators.
papers.zh_title: 针对重复截面数据的灵活异质性处理效应双重差分估计量
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一种方法，用于估计重复截面数据双重差分设计中的处理效应，其中处理开始时间随时间交错，且处理效应因组别、时间和观测层面协变量而异。我们表明，一个具有足够灵活函数形式的线性参数回归设定，包含组别-时间交互处理效应、双向固定效应和交互项，能在一般条件下得到异质性处理效应的一致估计。我们还表明，我们的方法与插补估计量相同。在同方差假设下，估计量是有效的，并且处理效应的汇总和推断都很直接。我们通过一个实证示例说明了这种由OLS估计的带协变量（X）的灵活线性模型（FLEX）的使用，并与一些基准估计量进行了比较。

papers.title: 12 Best Practices for Leveraging Generative AI in Experimental Research
papers.authors: Samuel Chang, Andrew Kennedy, Aaron Leonard, John A. List
papers.abstract: We provide twelve best practices and discuss how each practice can help researchers accurately, credibly, and ethically use Generative AI (GenAI) to enhance experimental research. We split the twelve practices into four areas. First, in the pre-treatment stage, we discuss how GenAI can aid in pre-registration procedures, data privacy concerns, and ethical considerations specific to GenAI usage. Second, in the design and implementation stage, we focus on GenAI’s role in identifying new channels of variation, piloting and documentation, and upholding the four exclusion restrictions. Third, in the analysis stage, we explore how prompting and training set bias can impact results as well as necessary steps to ensure replicability. Finally, we discuss forward-looking best practices that are likely to gain importance as GenAI evolves.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, LS, PE；JEL：C9, C90, C91, C92, C93
papers.zh_title: 在实验研究中利用生成式人工智能的12项最佳实践
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提供了十二项最佳实践，并讨论了每项实践如何帮助研究人员准确、可信且合乎道德地使用生成式人工智能（GenAI）来增强实验研究。我们将这十二项实践分为四个领域。首先，在处理前阶段，我们讨论了GenAI如何在预注册程序、数据隐私问题以及GenAI使用特有的伦理考量方面提供帮助。其次，在设计和实施阶段，我们重点关注GenAI在识别新的变异渠道、试点和文档记录以及维护四个排除限制方面的作用。第三，在分析阶段，我们探讨了提示和训练集偏差如何影响结果，以及确保可复制性所需的必要步骤。最后，我们讨论了前瞻性的最佳实践，这些实践随着GenAI的发展可能会变得越来越重要。

papers.title: Carbon Tariffs 101
papers.authors: Claire Brunel, Arik Levinson
papers.abstract: We evaluate the economic and environmental consequences of taxes on imported goods based on their carbon content. The analysis uses the simplest possible partial equilibrium framework, with one small open economy and a global pollution externality. It relies on graphs of supply and demand, rather than equations or formulas, hoping to reach readers familiar with basic economics. Despite its simplicity, the framework imparts numerous lessons. (1) Absent a domestic price on carbon, a carbon tariff imposes the same costs on domestic consumers as a domestic carbon price, but a carbon tariff also subsidizes domestic pollution. (2) If one small country imposes a carbon tariff, with or without a domestic carbon tax, the economic incidence of the tariff falls on its consumers. (3) If a holdout country joins the rest of the world by enacting its own carbon regulation and consequently imports more from other countries, those increased imports are not “leakage.” They are the cessation of leakage from when the holdout country’s policy was lax. And (4) if other countries do not appropriately regulate emissions, no single small country can use a combination of carbon taxes and carbon tariffs to fully correct the problem caused by its consumers or producers.
papers.zh_title: 碳关税入门
papers.zh_abstract: 我们评估了基于进口商品碳含量对其征税的经济和环境后果。该分析使用了最简单的局部均衡框架，包含一个小型开放经济和全球污染外部性。它依赖于供需图表，而非方程或公式，希望能触及熟悉基础经济学的读者。尽管框架简单，但它提供了许多启示。(1) 在国内没有碳价的情况下，碳关税给国内消费者带来的成本与国内碳价相同，但碳关税也补贴了国内污染。(2) 如果一个小国征收碳关税，无论是否同时征收国内碳税，该关税的经济负担都落在其消费者身上。(3) 如果一个观望国家通过制定自己的碳法规加入世界其他国家，并因此从其他国家进口更多商品，这些增加的进口并非“泄漏”。它们是该观望国家政策宽松时泄漏的停止。(4) 如果其他国家没有适当监管排放，任何单一小国都无法通过碳税和碳关税的组合来完全纠正其消费者或生产者造成的问题。

papers.title: Transmission of Family Influence
papers.authors: Sadegh S.M. Eshaghnia, James J. Heckman, Rasmus Landersø, Rafeh Qureshi
papers.abstract: This paper studies intergenerational mobility—the transmission of family influence. We develop and estimate measures of lifetime resources motivated by economic theory that account for differences in life-cycle trajectories, and uncertainty about future income. We identify the effects of parents’ resources on child outcomes through policy shocks at different childhood ages that affect family investments. Parents’ expected lifetime resources are stronger predictors of child outcomes than the income measures traditionally used in the literature on social mobility. Moreover, while effects estimated through exogenous variation in parents’ expected lifetime resources are smaller in magnitude than their correlational counterparts, they are still sizable and largest in early childhood. The paper illustrates how integrating key insights from different literatures when studying intergenerational mobility allows for a better understanding of the importance of factors such as the family’s role, changes in individual life cycles across generations, and the expectations and trajectories individuals face across their lifetimes.
papers.zh_title: 家庭影响的传递
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究代际流动性——家庭影响的传递。我们基于经济理论开发并估计了终身资源的度量指标，这些指标考虑了生命周期轨迹的差异以及未来收入的不确定性。我们通过影响家庭投资的、不同童年年龄的政策冲击，识别了父母资源对子女结果的影响。父母预期的终身资源比社会流动性文献中传统使用的收入指标更能预测子女结果。此外，虽然通过父母预期终身资源的外生变化估计的效应在幅度上小于其相关对应物，但它们仍然相当可观，并且在儿童早期最大。本文说明了在研究代际流动性时，整合不同文献的关键见解如何能够更好地理解诸如家庭角色、跨代个体生命周期变化以及个体一生中所面临的期望和轨迹等因素的重要性。

papers.title: Is Distance from Innovation a Barrier to the Adoption of Artificial Intelligence?
papers.authors: Jennifer Hunt, Iain M. Cockburn, James Bessen
papers.abstract: Using our own data on Artificial Intelligence publications merged with Burning Glass vacancy data for 2007-2019, we investigate whether online vacancies for jobs requiring AI skills grow more slowly in U.S. locations farther from pre-2007 AI innovation hotspots. We find that a commuting zone which is an additional 200km (125 miles) from the closest AI hotspot has 17% lower growth in AI jobs' share of vacancies. This is driven by distance from AI papers rather than AI patents. Distance reduces growth in AI research jobs as well as in jobs adapting AI to new industries, as evidenced by strong effects for computer and mathematical researchers, developers of software applications, and the finance and insurance industry. 20% of the effect is explained by the presence of state borders between some commuting zones and their closest hotspot. This could reflect state borders impeding migration and thus flows of tacit knowledge. Distance does not capture difficulty of in-person or remote collaboration nor knowledge and personnel flows within multi-establishment firms hiring in computer occupations.
papers.zh_title: 距离创新中心是否阻碍了人工智能的采用？
papers.zh_abstract: 利用我们自建的人工智能出版物数据，结合2007-2019年Burning Glass职位空缺数据，我们研究了美国距离2007年前人工智能创新热点较远的地区，其需要AI技能的在线职位空缺增长是否较慢。我们发现，一个通勤区若距离最近的AI热点额外远200公里（125英里），其AI职位在总空缺中的占比增长率会低17%。这一效应主要由与AI论文的距离驱动，而非AI专利的距离。距离不仅降低了AI研究岗位的增长，也降低了将AI应用于新行业的岗位的增长，这体现在对计算机与数学研究人员、软件应用开发者以及金融和保险行业的显著影响上。该效应的20%可由某些通勤区与其最近热点之间存在州界来解释。这可能反映了州界阻碍了人口迁移，进而阻碍了隐性知识的流动。距离并不能反映面对面或远程协作的难度，也不能反映在招聘计算机职业的多机构企业内部的知识和人员流动。

papers.title: The ABC’s of Who Benefits from Working with AI: Ability, Beliefs, and Calibration
papers.authors: Andrew Caplin, David J. Deming, Shangwen Li, Daniel J. Martin, Philip Marx, Ben Weidmann, Kadachi Jiada Ye
papers.abstract: We use a controlled experiment to show that ability and belief calibration jointly determine the benefits of working with Artificial Intelligence (AI). AI improves performance more for people with low baseline ability. However, holding ability constant, AI assistance is more valuable for people who are calibrated, meaning they have accurate beliefs about their own ability. People who know they have low ability gain the most from working with AI. In a counterfactual analysis, we show that eliminating miscalibration would cause AI to reduce performance inequality nearly twice as much as it already does.
papers.zh_title: 与AI合作受益者的ABC：能力、信念与校准
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过一项受控实验表明，能力和信念校准共同决定了与人工智能（AI）合作的收益。AI对基线能力较低的人绩效提升更大。然而，在能力不变的情况下，AI辅助对校准型个体（即对自己能力有准确信念的人）更有价值。知道自己能力低的人从与AI合作中获益最多。在一项反事实分析中，我们表明，消除校准偏差将使AI对绩效不平等的降低幅度比现有水平增加近一倍。

papers.title: Describing Deferred Acceptance and Strategyproofness to Participants: Experimental Analysis
papers.authors: Yannai A. Gonczarowski, Ori Heffetz, Guy Ishai, Clayton Thomas
papers.abstract: We conduct an incentivized lab experiment to test participants' ability to understand the DA matching mechanism and the strategyproofness property, conveyed in different ways. We find that while many participants can (using a novel GUI) learn DA's mechanics and calculate its outcomes, such understanding does not imply understanding of strategyproofness (as measured by specially designed tests). However, a novel menu description of strategyproofness conveys this property significantly better than other treatments. While behavioral effects are small on average, participants with levels of strategyproofness understanding above a certain threshold play the classical dominant strategy at very high rates.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：C78, C91, D47, D91
papers.zh_title: 向参与者描述延迟接受机制与策略防护性：实验分析
papers.zh_abstract: 我们进行了一项激励性实验室实验，测试参与者理解DA匹配机制和策略防护性属性的能力，这些属性以不同方式传达。我们发现，虽然许多参与者能够（使用新颖的图形用户界面）学习DA的运作机制并计算其结果，但这种理解并不意味着理解策略防护性（通过专门设计的测试衡量）。然而，一种新颖的策略防护性菜单描述方式在传达这一属性方面显著优于其他处理方式。虽然行为效应平均较小，但策略防护性理解水平超过特定阈值的参与者以非常高的比率采用经典占优策略。

papers.title: The Impact of the Chinese Exclusion Act on the Economic Development of the Western U.S.
papers.authors: Joe Long, Carlo Medici, Nancy Qian, Marco Tabellini
papers.abstract: This paper investigates the economic consequences of the 1882 Chinese Exclusion Act, which banned immigration from China to the United States. The Act reduced the number of Chinese workers of all skill levels residing in the U.S. It also reduced the labor supply and the quality of jobs held by white and U.S.-born workers, the intended beneficiaries of the Act, and reduced manufacturing output. The results suggest that the Chinese Exclusion Act slowed economic growth in western states until at least 1940.
papers.zh_title: 《排华法案》对美国西部经济发展的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了1882年《排华法案》的经济后果，该法案禁止从中国移民到美国。该法案减少了居住在美国的各技能水平华工的数量。它还减少了该法案预期受益者——白人和美国本土工人的劳动力供给和就业质量，并降低了制造业产出。结果表明，《排华法案》至少到1940年为止减缓了西部各州的经济增长。

papers.title: Misperceptions and Demand for Democracy under Authoritarianism
papers.authors: Daron Acemoglu, Cevat Giray Aksoy, Ceren Baysan, Carlos Molina, Gamze Zeki
papers.abstract: This paper investigates whether enduring authoritarian regimes are in part rooted in the population’s misperceptions about their social and economic costs—as opposed to a general preference for authoritarianism. We explore this question using online and field experiments in the context of Türkiye’s May 2023 presidential and parliamentary elections. We confirm that voters, especially those supporting the incumbent authoritarian government systematically underestimate both the extent to which democracy and media freedom have been eroded in Türkiye’ and their usefulness in dealing with natural disasters and corruption (two salient issues in Türkiye). We find that providing (accurate) information about the state and implications of democracy and media freedom have significant effects on beliefs and increase the likelihood of voting for the opposition by about 3.7 percentage points (6.2 percent) in the online experiment. In the field experiment, the ballot-box level opposition vote share in neighborhoods receiving the information treatment increases by 0.8 percentage point (1.5 percent). Interestingly, both in the field and online, the results are driven not by further mobilizing opposition supporters, but by influencing those likely to vote for the governing coalition and those holding more misperceived beliefs about democracy and media freedom in Türkiye. The evidence suggests that at least part of the support for authoritarian regimes may be coming from misperceptions about their institutions and policies, and may be more malleable than typically presumed.
papers.zh_title: 威权主义下的误解与民主需求
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究持久的威权政权是否部分根植于民众对其社会和经济成本的误解——而非对威权主义的普遍偏好。我们利用土耳其2023年5月总统和议会选举的背景，通过在线和实地实验探讨这一问题。我们证实，选民，尤其是支持现任威权政府的选民，系统性地低估了土耳其民主和媒体自由被侵蚀的程度，以及它们在应对自然灾害和腐败（土耳其的两个突出问题）方面的作用。我们发现，提供关于民主和媒体自由状况及其影响的（准确）信息，对信念有显著影响，并在在线实验中将投票给反对党的可能性提高了约3.7个百分点（6.2%）。在实地实验中，接受信息处理的社区中，投票箱层面的反对党得票率增加了0.8个百分点（1.5%）。有趣的是，无论是在实地还是在线实验中，结果并非通过进一步动员反对派支持者驱动，而是通过影响那些可能投票给执政联盟的人以及那些对土耳其民主和媒体自由持有更多误解信念的人。证据表明，对威权政权的支持至少部分可能源于对其制度和政策的误解，并且可能比通常假设的更具可塑性。

papers.title: Online Business Models, Digital Ads, and User Welfare
papers.authors: Daron Acemoglu, Daniel Huttenlocher, Asuman Ozdaglar, James Siderius
papers.abstract: We present a model where social media platforms offer plans that intermix entertaining content with digital advertising (“ads”). Users derive utility from entertainment and learn about their valuation for a product from ads. While some users are fully rational, others naïvely perceive digital ads as more informative than they actually are. We characterize the profit-maximizing business model of the platform and show that welfare is lower when the platform monetizes through advertising instead of subscription both for naïfs (because they are targeted by intense digital advertising, which makes them over-optimistic about product quality and over-purchase the product) and for sophisticates (because the inflated demand from naïfs increases the firm’s price). This negative welfare effect is intensified when the platform can offer mixed business models that separate the naïve and sophisticated users into different plans. Our results are robust to firm-level and platform-level competition, because digital ads soften competition between both firms and platforms. We also show how digital ad taxes can improve welfare.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, IO, PE, PR；JEL：D43, D83, L13
papers.zh_title: 在线商业模式、数字广告与用户福利
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个模型，其中社交媒体平台提供混合娱乐内容与数字广告（“广告”）的方案。用户从娱乐中获得效用，并通过广告了解他们对产品的估值。虽然一些用户是完全理性的，但其他用户天真地认为数字广告比实际更具信息性。我们刻画了平台利润最大化的商业模式，并表明当平台通过广告而非订阅实现盈利时，福利更低：对于天真型用户（因为他们被密集的数字广告所针对，这使他们对产品质量过度乐观并过度购买产品）和精明型用户（因为天真型用户膨胀的需求提高了企业价格）都是如此。当平台可以提供混合商业模式，将天真型和精明型用户分离到不同方案时，这种负面福利效应会加剧。我们的结果在企业层面和平台层面的竞争中都是稳健的，因为数字广告软化了企业和平台之间的竞争。我们还展示了数字广告税如何能够改善福利。

papers.title: Pitfalls of Demographic Forecasts of US Elections
papers.authors: Richard Calvo, Vincent Pons, Jesse M. Shapiro
papers.abstract: Many influential observers have forecast large partisan shifts in the US electorate based on demographic trends. Such forecasts are appealing because demographic trends are often predictable even over long horizons. We backtest demographic forecasts using data on US elections since 1952. We envision a forecaster who fits a model using data from a given election and uses that model, in tandem with a projection of demographic trends, to predict future elections. Even a forecaster with perfect knowledge of future demographic trends would have performed poorly over this period—worse even than one who simply guesses that each election will have a 50-50 partisan split. Enriching the set of demographics available does not change this conclusion. Slow demographic change, unstable group preferences, and strategic party responses all help to explain why demography has not been destiny in US politics.
papers.zh_title: 美国选举人口统计预测的陷阱
papers.zh_abstract: 许多有影响力的观察家基于人口趋势预测了美国选民群体的重大党派转变。这类预测很有吸引力，因为即使是在长期内，人口趋势也常常是可预测的。我们使用1952年以来美国选举的数据对人口统计预测进行了回溯测试。我们设想一位预测者，他使用某次选举的数据拟合一个模型，并利用该模型结合人口趋势预测来预测未来选举。即使是一位对未来人口趋势有完美了解的预测者，在这一时期的表现也会很差——甚至比简单猜测每次选举党派分裂为50-50的预测者还要差。丰富可用的人口统计变量集并不能改变这一结论。缓慢的人口变化、不稳定的群体偏好以及政党的战略回应，都有助于解释为什么人口统计在美国政治中并非宿命。

papers.title: The Impact of Intergenerational Transfers on the Distribution of Wealth: An International Comparison
papers.authors: Charles Yuji Horioka
papers.abstract: In this paper, I analyze detailed data on intergenerational transfers in 4 countries (China, India, Japan, and the United States) from the “Japan Household Panel Survey on Consumer Preferences and Satisfaction (JHPS-CPS)” which has been conducted by the Institute of Social and Economic Research of Osaka University in these 4 countries since 2003, in order to shed light on the impact of intergenerational transfers on household wealth disparities and on possible reasons for the substantial differences in household wealth disparities among the 4 countries. Almost all of the evidence I present suggests that intergenerational transfers have a disequalizing impact on household wealth disparities and promote the transmission of household wealth disparities from generation to generation in all 4 countries although the magnitude of these effects varies considerably from country to country. Moreover, the evidence I present sheds considerable light on possible reasons for the substantial differences in household wealth disparities among the 4 countries.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EFG, PE；JEL：D12, D31, D64, E21, E24, J16
papers.zh_title: 代际转移对财富分配的影响：一项国际比较
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我分析了来自“日本家庭面板调查关于消费者偏好与满意度（JHPS-CPS）”的四个国家（中国、印度、日本和美国）的代际转移详细数据，该调查由大阪大学社会经济研究所自2003年起在这四个国家进行，旨在揭示代际转移对家庭财富差距的影响，以及这四个国家家庭财富差距巨大差异的可能原因。我提出的几乎所有证据都表明，在所有四个国家中，代际转移对家庭财富差距具有不平等化影响，并促进了家庭财富差距的代际传递，尽管这些效应的程度因国家而异。此外，我提出的证据为这四个国家家庭财富差距巨大差异的可能原因提供了相当多的启示。

papers.title: The Causal Effects of Inflation Uncertainty on Households' Beliefs and Actions
papers.authors: Dimitris Georgarakos, Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Olivier Coibion, Geoff Kenny
papers.abstract: We implement a survey-based randomized information treatment that generates independent variation in the inflation expectations and the uncertainty about future inflation of European households. This variation allows us to assess how both first and second moments of inflation expectations separately affect subsequent household decisions. We document several key findings. First, higher inflation uncertainty leads households to reduce their subsequent durable goods purchases for several months, while a higher expected level of inflation increases them. Second, an increase in uncertainty about inflation induces households to tilt their portfolios towards safe and away from riskier asset holdings. Third, higher inflation uncertainty encourages household job search, leading to higher subsequent employment among the unemployed and less under-employment among the employed. Finally, we document that the level of inflation expectations has a different effect from uncertainty in inflation expectations and thus it is crucial to take into account both to measure their separate effects on decisions.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, LS, ME；JEL：C83, D84, E31, G51
papers.zh_title: 通胀不确定性与家庭信念及行为的因果效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们实施了一项基于调查的随机信息处理实验，该实验在欧洲家庭中独立地产生了通胀预期和未来通胀不确定性的变化。这种变化使我们能够分别评估通胀预期的一阶矩和二阶矩如何影响随后的家庭决策。我们记录了若干关键发现。首先，更高的通胀不确定性导致家庭在未来几个月减少耐用品购买，而更高的预期通胀水平则会增加耐用品购买。其次，通胀不确定性的增加促使家庭将其投资组合从风险资产转向安全资产。第三，更高的通胀不确定性鼓励家庭求职，从而提高了失业者随后的就业率，并减少了在职者的就业不足。最后，我们记录到通胀预期水平与通胀预期不确定性具有不同的影响，因此，在衡量它们对决策的各自影响时，同时考虑两者至关重要。

papers.title: Dynamically Optimized Sequential Experimentation (DOSE) for Estimating Economic Preference Parameters
papers.authors: Jonathan Chapman, Erik Snowberg, Stephanie W. Wang, Colin Camerer
papers.abstract: We introduce DOSE—Dynamically Optimized Sequential Experimentation—to elicit preference parameters. DOSE starts with a model of preferences and a prior over the parameters of that model, then dynamically chooses a customized question sequence for each participant according to an experimenter-selected information criterion. After each question, the prior is updated, and the posterior is used to select the next, informationally-optimal, question. Simulations show that DOSE produces parameter estimates that are approximately twice as accurate as those from established elicitation methods. DOSE estimates of individual-level risk and time preferences are also more accurate, more stable over time, and faster to administer in a large representative, incentivized survey of the U.S. population (N = 2,000). By reducing measurement error, DOSE identifies a stronger relationship between risk aversion and cognitive ability than other elicitation techniques. DOSE thus provides a flexible procedure that facilitates the collection of incentivized preference measures in the field.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, POL；JEL：C81, C9, D03, D81, D9
papers.zh_title: 动态优化序贯实验法（DOSE）用于估计经济偏好参数
papers.zh_abstract: 我们引入了DOSE——动态优化序贯实验法——来引出偏好参数。DOSE从一个偏好模型和该模型参数的先验分布开始，然后根据实验者选择的信息准则，动态地为每位参与者选择定制的问题序列。在每个问题之后，先验分布被更新，后验分布被用于选择下一个信息最优的问题。模拟显示，DOSE产生的参数估计精度大约是传统引出方法的两倍。在一个具有代表性的、有激励的美国人口大规模调查（N=2000）中，DOSE对个体层面风险和时间偏好的估计也更准确、随时间更稳定，且管理速度更快。通过减少测量误差，DOSE识别出风险厌恶与认知能力之间的关系比其他引出技术更强。因此，DOSE提供了一种灵活的程序，有助于在现场收集有激励的偏好度量。

papers.title: Slack and Economic Development
papers.authors: Michael W. Walker, Nachiket Shah, Edward Miguel, Dennis Egger, Felix Samy Soliman, Tilman Graff
papers.abstract: Slack – the underutilization of factors of production – varies systematically with economic development. Using novel and detailed measures of the utilization of labor and capital from a large representative sample of firms in rural and urban Kenya, we show that utilization is increasing in firm size, market access, and economic activity. We present a model of firm capacity choice where indivisibility in at least one input is a key driver of slack. We embed the model in spatial general equilibrium, with features characteristic of low-income settings – including many small firms and high transport costs – and show that it rationalizes both the endogenous emergence of slack in steady-state and elastic aggregate supply curves. We empirically validate model predictions using reduced-form estimates of the general equilibrium effects of cash transfers from a large-scale RCT in Kenya. The parsimonious model replicates much of the experimental evidence, predicting a large real multiplier of 1.5, driven by expansion in low-utilization sectors and firms, and limited average price inflation. Counterfactual analyses indicate that multipliers are likely to be meaningfully smaller in lower slack settings, such as urban areas. We use the model to revisit the estimation of spatial spillovers in clustered RCTs and uncover non-trivial ’missing intercept’ effects on income and inflation. Additionally, we innovate methodologically by pre-registering key elements of model estimation and validation. The findings suggest that input indivisibilities and slack are key features of developing country settings, and are quantitatively important for macroeconomic dynamics and policies.
papers.zh_title: 闲置与经济体发展
papers.zh_abstract: 闲置——生产要素的利用不足——随经济发展水平而系统性地变化。利用来自肯尼亚农村和城市地区大型代表性企业样本中关于劳动力和资本利用的新颖且详细的衡量指标，我们表明利用率随企业规模、市场准入和经济活动的增加而提高。我们提出了一个企业产能选择模型，其中至少一种投入的不可分割性是闲置的关键驱动因素。我们将该模型嵌入空间一般均衡中，并加入了低收入环境的典型特征——包括大量小企业和高昂的运输成本——并表明该模型既能解释稳态下闲置的内生出现，也能解释弹性总供给曲线。我们利用肯尼亚一项大规模随机对照试验中现金转移的一般均衡效应的简化式估计，对模型预测进行了实证验证。这个简约模型在很大程度上复现了实验证据，预测出1.5的巨大实际乘数，该乘数由低利用率部门和企业的扩张驱动，而平均价格通胀有限。反事实分析表明，在闲置程度较低的环境（如城市地区），乘数可能会显著变小。我们利用该模型重新审视了整群随机对照试验中空间溢出效应的估计，并发现了对收入和通胀的非平凡的“缺失截距”效应。此外，我们在方法论上进行了创新，预先注册了模型估计和验证的关键要素。研究结果表明，投入不可分割性和闲置是发展中国家环境的关键特征，并对宏观经济动态和政策具有重要的定量意义。

papers.title: Digital Distractions with Peer Influence: The Impact of Mobile App Usage on Academic and Labor Market Outcomes
papers.authors: Panle Jia Barwick, Siyu Chen, Chao Fu, Teng Li
papers.abstract: Concerns about excessive mobile phone use among youth are mounting. We present, to our knowledge, the first estimates of both behavioral and contextual peer effects, along with comprehensive evidence on how students’ own and their peers’ app usage affect academic performance, physical health, and labor market outcomes. Our analysis draws on administrative data from a Chinese university covering three student cohorts over four years. We exploit random roommate assignments, an exogenous policy shock, and an exogenous event for identification. App usage is contagious: a one s.d. increase in roommates’ in-college app usage raises own usage by 5.8%. High app usage is harmful across all measured outcomes. A one s.d. increase in app usage reduces GPAs by 36.2% of a within-cohort-major s.d. and lowers wages by 2.3%. Roommates’ app usage reduces a student’s GPAs and wages through both disruptions and behavioral spillovers, generating a total negative effect that exceeds half the magnitude of the impact from the student’s own app usage. Extending China’s three-hour-per-week gaming restriction for minors to college students would boost their initial wages by 0.9%. High-frequency GPS and app usage data show that heavy app users spend less time in study halls, are more frequently late or absent from class, and get less sleep.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, IO, LS, PE；JEL：D12, D90, E24, I23, L82, L86, Z13
papers.zh_title: 同伴影响下的数字干扰：手机应用使用对学业和劳动力市场结果的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 关于年轻人过度使用手机的担忧日益加剧。我们首次提供了行为性和情境性同伴效应的估计，并全面展示了学生自身及同伴的应用使用如何影响学业表现、身体健康和劳动力市场结果。我们的分析基于一所中国大学跨越四年的三届学生行政数据。我们利用随机室友分配、外生政策冲击和外生事件进行识别。应用使用具有传染性：室友在校期间应用使用量每增加一个标准差，自身使用量增加5.8%。高应用使用对所有测量结果都有害。应用使用量每增加一个标准差，GPA降低同届专业标准差的36.2%，工资降低2.3%。室友的应用使用通过干扰和行为溢出降低学生的GPA和工资，产生的总负面效应超过学生自身应用使用影响幅度的一半。将中国对未成年人每周三小时游戏限制扩展到大学生，将使其初始工资提高0.9%。高频GPS和应用使用数据显示，重度应用使用者花在自习室的时间更少，上课迟到或旷课更频繁，睡眠也更少。

papers.title: Bucky, Becky, and Student Financial Aid Policy Design
papers.authors: Elise A. Marifian, Jeffrey A. Smith, Sarah Turner
papers.abstract: Bucky’s Tuition Promise (BTP) at the University of Wisconsin–Madison offers generous financial aid to low-income, in-state students. Unlike many similar programs at other public universities, financial eligibility for BTP depends solely on a family’s Adjusted Gross Income (AGI), rather than on the Expected Family Contribution (EFC) from the Free Application for Federal Student Aid (FAFSA) or some function of the poverty line. This program design aims to make eligibility simpler and more transparent for students and their families and thereby to encourage application and matriculation. We investigate the implications of the program design for who does and does not receive additional institutional aid, with a particular focus on the marginal group of BTP-eligible students who lack Federal Pell Grant eligibility. With this analysis, we aim to motivate a broader discussion of different notions of equity in financial aid administration and the tough tradeoffs implicit in simplifying eligibility criteria.
papers.zh_title: 巴基、贝基与学生助学金政策设计
papers.zh_abstract: 威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校的“巴基学费承诺”（BTP）为低收入州内学生提供慷慨的助学金。与许多其他公立大学的类似项目不同，BTP的经济资格仅取决于家庭的调整后总收入（AGI），而非联邦学生援助免费申请（FAFSA）的预期家庭贡献（EFC）或贫困线的某种函数。该程序设计旨在使资格认定对学生及其家庭更简单、更透明，从而鼓励申请和入学。我们研究了该程序设计对谁获得或未获得额外机构援助的影响，特别关注那些符合BTP资格但缺乏联邦佩尔助学金资格的边际群体。通过这一分析，我们旨在推动更广泛的讨论，涉及助学金管理中不同公平概念以及简化资格标准所隐含的艰难权衡。

papers.title: Poverty, Hardship, and Government Transfers
papers.authors: Bruce D. Meyer, Jeehoon Han, James X. Sullivan
papers.abstract: We examine how the well-being of those with few resources changed, amidst economic disruption and large, transitory government transfers. We find that in the years leading up to the pandemic and in 2020, the patterns for income and consumption poverty were very similar. In 2021 and 2022, however, changes in income and consumption poverty were quite different—consumption poverty fell less than income poverty in 2021, and then income poverty rose sharply in 2022 while consumption poverty continued to decline. Reports of hardships rose in 2022 for both families with and without children, suggesting increased concern about financial well-being as COVID-era transfer programs expired. A key difference between income and consumption measures appears to be saving during the pandemic followed by dissaving, even among those near the poverty line. This finding indicates that permanent income models can even be relevant when low-income households, that typically have very limited saving, receive very large transitory payments. Unlike past academic studies and numerous politicians and pundits that have attributed most of the decline in income poverty in 2021, and its subsequent rise in 2022, to the Child Tax Credit, we show that expanded Unemployment Insurance and stimulus payments played a larger role.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, LS, PE；JEL：E21, H23, H30, I38
papers.zh_title: 贫困、困难与政府转移支付
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在经济混乱和大规模临时政府转移支付的背景下，资源匮乏者的福祉如何变化。我们发现，在疫情前几年和2020年，收入贫困和消费贫困的模式非常相似。然而，在2021年和2022年，收入贫困和消费贫困的变化差异显著——2021年消费贫困的下降幅度小于收入贫困，随后2022年收入贫困急剧上升，而消费贫困继续下降。2022年，有子女和无子女家庭的困难报告均有所增加，表明随着新冠时期转移支付项目到期，对财务福祉的担忧加剧。收入与消费指标之间的一个关键差异似乎是疫情期间的储蓄行为以及随后的动用储蓄，即使在贫困线附近的人群中也是如此。这一发现表明，永久收入模型即使在低收入家庭（通常储蓄非常有限）收到大量临时支付时也可能适用。与过去的研究以及众多政治家和评论员将2021年收入贫困下降及其后2022年上升主要归因于儿童税收抵免不同，我们表明扩大的失业保险和刺激支付发挥了更大作用。

papers.title: Long-Term Contracts, Commitment, and Optimal Information Disclosure
papers.authors: Alessandro Dovis, Paolo Martellini
papers.abstract: This paper studies optimal information disclosure in dynamic insurance economies with income risk in which an incumbent firm acquires more information about a consumer's persistent type than the rest of the market does. We find that if the incumbent can commit to long-term contracts but the consumer can walk away, the optimal disclosure prescribes no information revelation to maximize cross-subsidization. However, if the incumbent lacks commitment, no cross-subsidization of low-income consumers is feasible for any public information disclosure because of adverse selection. We show that partial information disclosure is typically optimal and it aims at implementing intertemporal consumption smoothing between the first period and the high-state in the second period, generating an inverse of the back-loading result in Harris and Holmstrom (1982). Lastly, we show that, without commitment, banning long-term relations can be beneficial to consumers. Our results can be used to analyze the consequences of policy proposals such as open banking and consumer data ownership.
papers.zh_title: 长期合同、承诺与最优信息披露
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了存在收入风险的动态保险经济中的最优信息披露，其中现有企业比市场其他参与者获取更多关于消费者持久类型的信息。我们发现，如果现有企业可以承诺长期合同但消费者可以退出，最优披露规定不披露任何信息以最大化交叉补贴。然而，如果现有企业缺乏承诺，由于逆向选择，任何公开信息披露都无法实现对低收入消费者的交叉补贴。我们表明，部分信息披露通常是最优的，其目标是在第一期和第二期的高状态之间实现跨期消费平滑，产生与Harris和Holmstrom（1982）中后置结果相反的效果。最后，我们表明，在没有承诺的情况下，禁止长期关系可能对消费者有利。我们的结果可用于分析开放银行和消费者数据所有权等政策提案的后果。

papers.title: Income, Wealth, and Environmental Inequality in the United States
papers.authors: Jonathan M. Colmer, Suvy Qin, John L. Voorheis, Reed Walker
papers.abstract: This paper explores the relationships between air pollution, income, and wealth by combining data from U.S. tax returns between 1979–2016, various measures of air pollution, and sociodemographic information from linked survey and administrative data. In the first year of our data, the relationship between income and ambient pollution levels nationally is approximately zero. However, at every single percentile of the national income distribution, Black individuals are exposed to, on average, higher levels of air pollution than White individuals. By 2016, the relationship between income and air pollution had steepened, primarily for Black individuals, driven by changes in where rich and poor Black individuals live. We utilize quasi-random shocks to income to examine the causal effect of changes in income and wealth on pollution exposure over a five year horizon, finding that these income–pollution elasticities map closely to the values implied by our descriptive patterns. We calculate that Black-White differences in income can explain ∼10 percent of the observed racial gap in air pollution exposure in 2016.
papers.zh_title: 美国的收入、财富与环境不平等
papers.zh_abstract: 本文通过结合1979-2016年美国纳税申报数据、多种空气污染指标以及来自关联调查和行政数据的社会人口信息，探讨了空气污染、收入和财富之间的关系。在我们数据的第一年，全国范围内收入与环境污染物水平之间的关系近似为零。然而，在全国收入分布的每一个百分位，黑人个体平均暴露于比白人个体更高水平的空气污染。到2016年，收入与空气污染之间的关系变得更加陡峭，这主要针对黑人个体，且由富裕和贫困黑人个体居住地的变化驱动。我们利用准随机收入冲击来研究五年内收入和财富变化对污染暴露的因果效应，发现这些收入-污染弹性与我们描述性模式所暗示的值高度吻合。我们计算出，2016年黑人与白人之间的收入差异可以解释观察到的空气污染暴露种族差距的约10%。

papers.title: Financial Sophistication and Bank Market Power
papers.authors: Matthias Fleckenstein, Francis A. Longstaff
papers.abstract: We study the relation between bank funding costs and the financial sophistication of bank customers. In doing this, we make use of a natural experiment that allows us to identify banks that—either intentionally or unintentionally—price time deposits in a way that can result in financially-unsophisticated customers essentially being shortchanged. We find that these banks have significantly lower deposit funding costs. These results provide evidence that having financially-unsophisticated customers may provide banks with substantial market power and be an important component of the value of a bank's deposit franchise.
papers.zh_title: 金融素养与银行市场势力
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了银行融资成本与银行客户金融素养之间的关系。为此，我们利用了一个自然实验，该实验使我们能够识别那些——无论有意还是无意——以可能导致金融素养不高的客户实质上被欺骗的方式定价定期存款的银行。我们发现这些银行的存款融资成本显著较低。这些结果提供了证据，表明拥有金融素养不高的客户可能为银行提供可观的市场势力，并且是银行存款特许经营权价值的重要组成部分。

papers.title: Platform Power Struggle: Spotify and the Major Record Labels
papers.authors: Luis Aguiar, Joel Waldfogel, Axel Zeijen
papers.abstract: Digitization has facilitated the emergence of large distribution platforms downstream from traditionally powerful suppliers. Digital platforms can carry many suppliers’ products, test the products’ consumer appeal, and choose which products to promote, potentially shifting power from the suppliers to the platforms. We study these forces in the recorded music industry, which was traditionally dominated by a few “major” record labels distributing their products through fragmented radio stations and retailers. Now, the majors receive most of their promotion and distribution through platforms like Spotify, which carry millions of songs from both major and “independent” suppliers. We study Spotify’s use of playlists using data covering 2017-2020. First, Spotify used their expanded playlist capacity to test – and discover – proportionately more independent songs to promote on their playlists. Second, at least relative to major-label playlists, Spotify-operated playlists promoted new independent songs more than was indicated by their subsequent success. Third, placement on Spotify new-music playlists has a large causal impact on streams. The independent-label share of new-music promotion rose from 38 percent in late 2017 to 55 percent in early 2020, which helps to explain the reported decline in the share of Spotify royalty payments to major-label suppliers over the same period.
papers.zh_title: 平台权力斗争：Spotify与主要唱片公司
papers.zh_abstract: 数字化促进了大型分销平台在传统上强大的供应商下游出现。数字平台可以承载许多供应商的产品，测试产品的消费者吸引力，并选择推广哪些产品，从而可能将权力从供应商转移到平台。我们在传统上由少数“主要”唱片公司通过分散的广播电台和零售商分销其产品主导的录制音乐行业中研究这些力量。现在，主要唱片公司通过像Spotify这样的平台获得大部分推广和分销，这些平台承载着来自主要和“独立”供应商的数百万首歌曲。我们利用2017-2020年的数据研究Spotify对播放列表的使用。首先，Spotify利用其扩大的播放列表容量来测试——并发现——更多独立歌曲以在其播放列表上推广。其次，至少相对于主要唱片公司的播放列表，Spotify运营的播放列表推广新独立歌曲的程度超过了其后续成功所表明的水平。第三，在Spotify新音乐播放列表上的位置对流媒体有巨大的因果影响。独立唱片公司在新音乐推广中的份额从2017年底的38%上升到2020年初的55%，这有助于解释同期报告的主要唱片公司供应商从Spotify获得的版税份额下降。

papers.title: Modeling Migration-Induced Unemployment
papers.authors: Pascal Michaillat
papers.abstract: Immigration is often blamed for increasing unemployment among local workers. However, standard models, such as the neoclassical model and the Diamond-Mortensen-Pissarides matching model, inherently assume that immigrants are absorbed into the labor market without affecting local unemployment. This paper presents a more general model of migration that allows for the possibility that not only the wages but also the unemployment rate of local workers may be affected by the arrival of newcomers. This extension is essential to capture the full range of potential impacts of labor migration on labor markets. The model blends a matching framework with job rationing. In it, the arrival of new workers can raise the unemployment rate among local workers, particularly in a depressed labor market where job opportunities are limited. On the positive side, in-migration helps firms fill vacancies more easily, boosting their profits. The overall impact of in-migration on local welfare varies with labor market conditions: in-migration reduces welfare when the labor market is inefficiently slack, but it enhances welfare when the labor market is inefficiently tight.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, POL；JEL：E24, E32, J2, J6
papers.zh_title: 模拟移民引发的失业
papers.zh_abstract: 移民常被指责增加了当地工人的失业率。然而，标准模型，如新古典模型和Diamond-Mortensen-Pissarides匹配模型，内在地假设移民被劳动力市场吸收而不影响当地失业率。本文提出了一个更一般的移民模型，允许新移民的到来不仅可能影响当地工人的工资，还可能影响其失业率。这一扩展对于捕捉劳动力迁移对劳动力市场的潜在影响范围至关重要。该模型将匹配框架与工作配给相结合。在该模型中，新工人的到来可能提高当地工人的失业率，特别是在就业机会有限的萧条劳动力市场中。从积极方面看，迁入有助于企业更容易填补职位空缺，从而提高其利润。迁入对当地福利的总体影响随劳动力市场状况而变化：当劳动力市场效率低下且松弛时，迁入会降低福利；但当劳动力市场效率低下且紧张时，迁入则会提高福利。

papers.title: Health Insurance and Part-Time Employment: The Influence of the Affordable Care Act
papers.authors: Katharine G. Abraham, Henry S. Farber
papers.abstract: Prior to the passage of the Affordable Care Act (ACA), part-time workers were much less likely than full-time workers to have health insurance. The ACA included multiple provisions intended to raise health insurance coverage rates, including a mandate that employers provide affordable coverage to full-time workers, a requirement that dependents be allowed to remain on their parents’ plan until age 26, extensions of Medicaid coverage, and the establishment of health insurance exchanges on which lower-income households could purchase subsidized coverage. Implementation of these provisions was associated with a decline in the full-time/part-time coverage gap from 6.5 percentage points in 2013 to 3.1 percentage points in 2021. Increases in Medicaid coverage and insurance purchased on the exchanges reduced were the largest contributors to the reduction in the full-time/part-time coverage gap.
papers.zh_title: 健康保险与兼职就业：《平价医疗法案》的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 在《平价医疗法案》（ACA）通过之前，兼职工作者拥有健康保险的可能性远低于全职工作者。ACA包含多项旨在提高健康保险覆盖率的条款，包括要求雇主为全职工作者提供可负担的保险、允许受抚养人留在父母保单中直至26岁、扩大医疗补助覆盖范围，以及建立健康保险交易所，使低收入家庭能够购买有补贴的保险。这些条款的实施与全职/兼职保险覆盖差距的缩小相关，该差距从2013年的6.5个百分点降至2021年的3.1个百分点。医疗补助覆盖范围的扩大以及在交易所购买的保险的增加，是缩小全职/兼职保险覆盖差距的最大贡献因素。

papers.title: Transitional Market Dynamics in Complex Environments
papers.authors: C. Lanier Benkard, Przemyslaw Jeziorski, Gabriel Weintraub
papers.abstract: This paper presents a new approach to modeling transitional dynamics in dynamic models of imperfect competition, a crucial yet often neglected aspect of empirical models in industrial organization that seek to understand market responses to policy and environmental changes. We introduce Nonstationary Oblivious Equilibrium (NOE), a computationally efficient equilibrium concept based on a mean-field approximation designed to model short- and medium-run market dynamics. Addressing potential limitations of NOE in more concentrated markets or under aggregate shocks, we propose a variant, NOE with Re-solving (RNOE). RNOE modifies firms' strategies by re-computing NOE as industry states get realized; an iterative process inspired by real-world industry practice that has behavioral appeal. We show the potential of NOE and RNOE by applying them to an empirical setting of technology adoption and to two classic dynamic oligopoly models, demonstrating that, in a wide variety of settings of empirical interest, they generate equilibrium behavior that is close to Markov perfect equilibrium in both the short and long runs.
papers.zh_title: 复杂环境中的转型市场动态
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一种新方法来模拟不完全竞争动态模型中的转型动态，这是产业组织实证模型中一个关键但常被忽视的方面，这些模型旨在理解市场对政策和环境变化的反应。我们引入了非平稳无意识均衡（NOE），这是一种基于平均场近似的计算高效均衡概念，旨在模拟短期和中期市场动态。针对NOE在更集中市场或面临总体冲击时可能存在的局限性，我们提出了一种变体，即带重新求解的NOE（RNOE）。RNOE通过随着行业状态实现而重新计算NOE来修改企业策略；这是一个受现实行业实践启发的迭代过程，具有行为吸引力。我们通过将NOE和RNOE应用于一个技术采纳的实证环境以及两个经典动态寡头模型，展示了它们的潜力，证明在多种具有实证兴趣的环境中，它们在短期和长期内都能产生接近马尔可夫完美均衡的均衡行为。

papers.title: Unconventional Policy and Inflation
papers.authors: Jing Cynthia Wu, Yinxi Xie, Ji Zhang
papers.abstract: We study the effects of unconventional monetary and fiscal policies on inflation dynamics. Using multiple complementary empirical approaches, including event studies, vector autoregressions, and regional panel regressions, we find little evidence that these policies contributed meaningfully to inflation in the past decades. The key economic mechanism operates through a disinflationary supply-side channel in the Phillips curve, which offsets the upward pressure on inflation from the usual demand channel. We demonstrate this mechanism both theoretically and empirically.
papers.zh_title: 非常规政策与通货膨胀
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了非常规货币和财政政策对通胀动态的影响。通过使用多种互补的实证方法，包括事件研究、向量自回归和区域面板回归，我们发现几乎没有证据表明这些政策在过去几十年中对通胀产生了显著影响。关键的经济机制通过菲利普斯曲线中的通缩供给侧渠道运作，该渠道抵消了通常需求渠道带来的通胀上行压力。我们从理论和实证两方面论证了这一机制。

papers.title: Industrial Policy: Lessons from Shipbuilding
papers.authors: Panle Jia Barwick, Myrto Kalouptsidi, Nahim B. Zahur
papers.abstract: Industrial policy has been used throughout history in some form or other by most countries. Yet, it remains one of the most contentious issues among policymakers and economists alike. In part, this is because the empirical evidence on whether and how it should be implemented remains slim. Scant data on government subsidies, conflicting theoretical arguments, and the need to account for governments’ short and long-run objectives, render research particularly challenging. In this article, we outline a theory-based empirical methodology that relies on estimating an industry equilibrium model to measure hidden subsidies, assess their welfare consequences for the domestic and global economy, as well as evaluate the effectiveness of different policy designs. We illustrate this approach using the global shipbuilding industry as a prototypical example of an industry targeted by industrial policy, especially in periods of heavy industrialization. Just in the past century, Europe, followed by Japan, then South Korea, and more recently China, developed national shipbuilding programs to propel their firms to global leaders. Success has been mixed across programs, certainly by welfare metrics, and sometimes even by growth metrics. We use our methodology on China to dissect the impact of such programs, what made them more or less successful, and how we can justify why governments have chosen shipbuilding as a target.
papers.zh_title: 产业政策：来自造船业的教训
papers.zh_abstract: 产业政策在历史上以某种形式被大多数国家使用。然而，它仍然是政策制定者和经济学家之间最具争议的问题之一。部分原因是关于是否以及如何实施产业政策的实证证据仍然很少。政府补贴数据匮乏、理论观点相互矛盾，以及需要考虑政府的短期和长期目标，使得研究尤其具有挑战性。在本文中，我们概述了一种基于理论的实证方法，该方法依赖于估计行业均衡模型来衡量隐性补贴，评估其对国内和全球经济的福利后果，以及评估不同政策设计的有效性。我们以全球造船业作为产业政策目标行业的典型例子来说明这种方法，特别是在重工业化时期。仅在过去一个世纪，欧洲、日本、韩国以及最近的中国，都制定了国家造船计划，以推动其企业成为全球领导者。从福利指标来看，各计划的成功程度参差不齐，有时甚至从增长指标来看也是如此。我们使用我们的方法对中国进行分析，以剖析此类计划的影响，分析哪些因素使其或多或少成功，以及我们如何解释政府为何选择造船业作为目标。

papers.title: Job Search, Wages, and Inflation
papers.authors: Laura Pilossoph, Jane M. Ryngaert
papers.abstract: How do inflation expectations affect the job search behavior of workers when wages are set in nominal terms? A canonical job search model incorporating nominal wage rigidities predicts that on-the-job search should increase with expected inflation. Using novel survey questions, we show that workers are more likely to search at higher values of hypothetical inflation. In the Survey of Consumer Expectations, within-respondent variation in inflation expectations predicts on-the-job search.

papers.title: Why Didn't the U.S. Unemployment Rate Rise at the End of WWII?
papers.authors: Shigeru Fujita, Valerie A. Ramey, Tal Roded
papers.abstract: This paper investigates why the U.S. unemployment rate rose only a few percentage points despite the dramatic decline in government spending and other upheaval at the end of World War II. Using a new longitudinal data set based on archival sources and government surveys, we study the many facets of this question. We find five main results. First, withdrawals from the labor force at the end of WWII were an important part of the explanation for the small rise in the unemployment rate. These withdrawals tended to be concentrated among females between the ages of 20 and 44 and male war veterans. Second, among those staying in the labor force, most of the workers who separated from their jobs moved directly into a new job. Third, workers accomplished these job-to-job transitions despite moving across industries. Fourth, returning veterans quickly returned to their previous position on the occupation ladder whereas those laid off from civilian jobs experienced a significant step down the occupation ladder. Fifth, a neoclassical model suggests that the post-war boom in job creation was a direct consequence of the crowding out of investment in consumer durable goods, residential capital, and business capital by military spending during the war.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG；JEL：E22, E32, E37, E62, N10, N42
papers.zh_title: 为什么二战结束时美国失业率没有上升？
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了为什么尽管二战结束时政府支出急剧下降和其他动荡，美国失业率仅上升了几个百分点。利用基于档案资料和政府调查的新纵向数据集，我们研究了这一问题的多个方面。我们发现了五个主要结果。首先，二战结束时退出劳动力市场是失业率小幅上升解释的重要组成部分。这些退出主要集中在20至44岁的女性和男性退伍军人中。其次，在留在劳动力市场的人中，大多数离职的工人直接进入了新工作。第三，工人们尽管跨行业流动，但仍完成了这些工作转换。第四，返乡退伍军人迅速恢复到他们在职业阶梯上的先前位置，而从平民岗位被解雇的人则经历了职业阶梯的显著下降。第五，一个新古典模型表明，战后的就业创造繁荣是战争期间军事支出挤出了对耐用消费品、住宅资本和商业资本投资的直接结果。

papers.title: New Evidence on the Economics of Climate and Conflict
papers.authors: Marshall Burke, Joel Ferguson, Solomon M. Hsiang, Edward Miguel
papers.abstract: We survey the quantitative research literature linking climate and conflict, a body of research that spans multiple academic disciplines and has roughly doubled in size in the last decade. It makes three main contributions. First, we carry out a meta-analysis – updating Hsiang et al (2013) and Burke et al (2015) with a far larger sample – and confirm that extreme climate is associated with elevated risk of inter-group conflict, intra-personal violence, and self-harm. The estimated average effects are smaller than the earlier estimates, although they remain meaningful in magnitude and highly statistically significant. Second, we present a methodological discussion and empirical illustration of how the use of data at different spatial and temporal scales can affect these results. Third, we discuss specific studies that present evidence on the mechanisms underlying this relationship including: (1) economic conditions, income, and agricultural productivity; (2) socio-demographic factors; (3) migration and transportation costs; (4) policy, politics and institutions; and (5) psychological and physiological factors. The chapter concludes with a discussion of policy implications and some open questions.
papers.zh_title: 关于气候与冲突经济学的新证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们调查了将气候与冲突联系起来的定量研究文献，这一研究领域跨越多个学科，在过去十年中规模大约翻了一番。本文做出三项主要贡献。首先，我们进行了一项元分析——用更大的样本更新了Hsiang等人（2013）和Burke等人（2015）的研究——并确认极端气候与群体间冲突、人际暴力和自伤风险升高相关。估计的平均效应小于先前的估计，尽管它们在幅度上仍然有意义且高度统计显著。其次，我们提出了一个方法论讨论和实证说明，展示了在不同空间和时间尺度上使用数据如何影响这些结果。第三，我们讨论了提供关于这种关系背后机制证据的具体研究，包括：（1）经济状况、收入和农业生产力；（2）社会人口因素；（3）移民和交通成本；（4）政策、政治和制度；以及（5）心理和生理因素。本章最后讨论了政策含义和一些未解决的问题。

papers.title: Early-Life Local Labor Market Conditions and Old-Age Male Mortality: Evidence from Deindustrialization of New England Textile Sector
papers.authors: Hamid Noghanibehambari, Jason Fletcher
papers.abstract: Previous studies document the potential links between early-life exposures and life-cycle outcomes. However, fewer studies examine the effects of local labor market shocks during early-life on old-age male mortality. This article empirically investigates this link using a large-scale deindustrialization as a source of shocks to local labor markets: the decline in New England’s textile industry during the 1920s and 1930s. Consistent with prior studies, we find small impacts on migration and changes in sociodemographic composition of counties post-deindustrialization. Using Social Security Administration death records linked with historical censuses 1900-1940 and difference-in-difference event studies, we find reductions in longevity for those born in highly-exposed counties whose families are categorized as non-migrants and those residing in non-urban areas. The results suggest intent-to-treat effects of about 3.6 months while the treatment-on-treated calculations suggest reductions of about 4.2 years in longevity of children of affected families. Using 1950-1960 census data, we find that those born in highly-exposed counties post-deindustrialization reveal large reductions in schooling, decreases in high school completion, and significant decreases in measures of socioeconomic standing. We further discuss the policy implications of these findings.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, CH, DAE, EH, LS；JEL：I1, I15, J1, N30
papers.zh_title: 早期生活的地方劳动力市场条件与老年男性死亡率：来自新英格兰纺织业去工业化的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 先前的研究记录了早期生活暴露与生命周期结果之间的潜在联系。然而，较少有研究考察早期生活中的地方劳动力市场冲击对老年男性死亡率的影响。本文利用大规模去工业化作为地方劳动力市场冲击的来源——即1920年代和1930年代新英格兰纺织业的衰退——对此关联进行了实证研究。与先前研究一致，我们发现去工业化后对移民和县社会人口构成变化的影响较小。利用与社会保障管理局死亡记录相关联的1900-1940年历史人口普查数据以及双重差分事件研究，我们发现，对于出生在高暴露县且其家庭被归类为非移民以及居住在农村地区的人，其寿命有所缩短。结果表明，意向性治疗效应约为3.6个月，而处理组平均处理效应的计算表明，受影响家庭子女的寿命减少了约4.2年。利用1950-1960年人口普查数据，我们发现，去工业化后出生在高暴露县的人，其受教育年限大幅减少，高中毕业率下降，社会经济地位指标显著降低。我们进一步讨论了这些发现的政策含义。

papers.title: On the Nature of Entrepreneurship
papers.authors: Anmol Bhandari, Tobey Kass, Thomas J. May, Ellen McGrattan, Evan Schulz
papers.abstract: This paper provides insights into the nature of entrepreneurship using a novel panel dataset based on U.S. administrative data from the Internal Revenue Service and the Social Security Administration. These data are used to analyze patterns of income growth and determinants of entrepreneurial choice for a large population of business owners. Earlier studies relying on household survey data have been limited by small samples, short panels, and income top-coding and, as a result, have focused on the typical self-employed individual rather than the typical dollar earned in self-employment. Without these limitations, we find that self-employed individuals have significantly higher average income and steeper income growth profiles than paid-employed peers with similar characteristics. Contrary to the survey evidence, we find a smaller role for non-pecuniary motives in driving entrepreneurial choice, little evidence for high risk factors or liquidity constraints impeding entry, and a positive role for past on-the-job experience to start a business. Across years, we find stable entry and exit rates into self-employment and no decline in the share of entrepreneurs in the population over our sample period, even during the Great Recession.
papers.zh_title: 论创业的本质
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用基于美国国税局和社会保障局行政数据的新面板数据集，深入探讨了创业的本质。这些数据用于分析大量企业主的收入增长模式和创业选择决定因素。早期依赖家庭调查数据的研究受到小样本、短面板和收入顶码编码的限制，因此侧重于典型的自雇个体，而非自雇收入中的典型美元。在没有这些限制的情况下，我们发现，自雇个体的平均收入显著高于具有相似特征的受雇同行，且收入增长曲线更陡峭。与调查证据相反，我们发现非金钱动机在驱动创业选择中的作用较小，几乎没有证据表明高风险因素或流动性约束阻碍了进入，并且过去的在职经验对创业有积极作用。在各年份间，我们发现自雇的进入率和退出率保持稳定，并且在我们样本期内，即使在大衰退期间，企业家在总人口中的份额也没有下降。

papers.title: The Statistical Limit of Arbitrage
papers.authors: Rui Da, Stefan Nagel, Dacheng Xiu
papers.abstract: We investigate the economic consequences of statistical learning for arbitrage pricing in a high-dimensional setting. Arbitrageurs learn about alphas from historical data. When alphas are weak and rare, estimation errors hinder arbitrageurs—even those employing optimal machine learning techniques—from fully exploiting all true pricing errors. This statistical limit to arbitrage widens the equilibrium bounds of alphas beyond what traditional arbitrage pricing theory predicts, leading to a significant divergence between the feasible Sharpe ratio achievable by arbitrageurs and the unattainable theoretical maximum under perfect knowledge of alphas.
papers.zh_title: 套利的统计极限
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在高维环境下统计学习对套利定价的经济后果。套利者从历史数据中学习阿尔法。当阿尔法既弱又罕见时，估计误差会阻碍套利者——即使他们采用最优的机器学习技术——无法充分利用所有真实的定价错误。这种套利的统计极限将阿尔法的均衡边界扩大到超出传统套利定价理论预测的范围，导致套利者实际可实现的夏普比率与在完全了解阿尔法情况下无法达到的理论最大值之间存在显著差距。

papers.title: Retirement Incentives and Decisions across the Income Distribution: Evidence in Canada
papers.authors: Kevin S. Milligan, Tammy Schirle
papers.abstract: We evaluate the retirement incentives embedded in Canada’s retirement income system with attention to where individuals are located in the income distribution. We find that larger social security benefits are available to individuals with lower earnings in their work history because of the benefit income tests, but those from the top of the income distribution tend to enjoy longer lives over which they may receive benefits. Overall, we see greater Social Security Wealth among individuals from lower deciles. The implicit tax rates on continued work tend to be higher for workers from lower-earning deciles. Considering changes to actuarial adjustments associated with early pension take up, these implicit tax rates on work at older ages fell substantially after 2011. Our regression estimates confirm the importance of incentives on retirement behavior, with substantially larger effects for individuals in lower deciles. These effects are greater for women than men. In simulations, we show that changes to the actuarial adjustment had some impact on retirement rates by lowering the implicit tax on work. The overall redistributive effect of these induced retirement changes was fairly small, however, as the actuarial adjustments brought the system closer to actuarial fairness.
papers.zh_title: 退休激励与决策在收入分配中的差异：来自加拿大的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们评估了加拿大退休收入体系中蕴含的退休激励，并关注个人在收入分配中所处的位置。我们发现，由于福利收入测试的存在，工作历史中收入较低的个人可以获得更高的社会保障福利，但来自收入分配顶层的个人往往寿命更长，从而可能更长时间地领取福利。总体而言，我们看到较低收入十分位人群的社会保障财富更高。对于来自较低收入十分位的工人，继续工作的隐含税率往往更高。考虑到与提前领取养老金相关的精算调整变化，2011年后，老年工作的隐含税率大幅下降。我们的回归估计证实了激励对退休行为的重要性，且对较低收入十分位人群的影响显著更大。这些影响对女性大于男性。在模拟中，我们表明，精算调整的变化通过降低工作的隐含税率对退休率产生了一定影响。然而，这些由退休变化引起的总体再分配效应相当小，因为精算调整使系统更接近精算公平。

papers.title: How Do Electoral Votes, Presidential Approval, and Consumer Sentiment Respond to Economic Indicators?
papers.authors: Robert J. Gordon
papers.abstract: This paper studies the effect of economic indicators on the Michigan Consumer Sentiment Index, Presidential approval ratings, and Presidential election outcomes since 1956. How closely do the indicators predict sentiment, how well does sentiment predict approval, and what role does approval have in explaining election outcomes measured by electoral votes? How much of the variance of approval ratings depends on non-economic factors like the “honeymoon effect”? Is there a role for economic indicators in explaining election outcomes once the contribution of approval ratings is taken into account? Regression equations provide answers to these questions and allow new interpretations of political history. Equation residuals and the contributions of specific variables are graphically displayed, providing insights into time intervals when sentiment was above or below the prediction of economic indicators, when approval differed from its usual relation with sentiment and the indicators, and when and why the electoral vote totals in each election since 1956 exceeded or fell short of the predictions of the econometric equations.
papers.zh_title: 经济指标如何影响选举人票、总统支持率和消费者情绪？
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了自1956年以来经济指标对密歇根消费者情绪指数、总统支持率和总统选举结果的影响。这些指标在多大程度上预测了情绪？情绪在多大程度上预测了支持率？支持率在解释以选举人票衡量的选举结果中扮演了什么角色？支持率的变化中有多少取决于非经济因素，比如“蜜月效应”？在考虑支持率的贡献后，经济指标在解释选举结果中是否仍有作用？回归方程为这些问题提供了答案，并允许对政治历史进行新的解读。方程残差和特定变量的贡献以图形方式展示，提供了对以下时间区间的洞察：情绪高于或低于经济指标预测的时期；支持率偏离其与情绪和指标通常关系的时期；以及自1956年以来每次选举中选举人票总数超出或低于计量经济方程预测的时间和原因。

papers.title: Information Externalities, Free Riding, and Optimal Exploration in the UK Oil Industry
papers.authors: Charles Hodgson
papers.abstract: Information spillovers between firms can reduce R&D incentives if competitors can free ride on innovations. However, strong property rights may impede cumulative research and lead to inefficient duplication. These effects are particularly relevant in natural resource exploration, where discoveries are spatially correlated. Using UK offshore oil exploration data, I estimate a dynamic model that captures the trade-off between drilling now and waiting to learn from competitors. Removing free-riding incentives increases industry surplus by 52%, while perfect information flow raises it by 24%. Counterfactual policy simulations highlight a trade-off in property rights design: stronger property rights over exploration well data increase the rate of exploration, while weaker property rights increase the efficiency and speed of learning but reduce the rate of exploration. Spatial clustering of each firm's drilling licenses both reduces the incentive to free ride and increases the speed of learning.
papers.zh_title: 信息外部性、搭便车与英国石油行业的最优勘探
papers.zh_abstract: 企业间的信息溢出会降低研发激励，如果竞争对手可以免费搭车利用创新成果。然而，强大的产权可能会阻碍累积性研究并导致低效的重复。这些效应在自然资源勘探中尤为相关，因为发现具有空间相关性。利用英国海上石油勘探数据，我估计了一个动态模型，该模型捕捉了立即钻探与等待从竞争对手那里学习之间的权衡。消除搭便车激励可使行业剩余增加52%，而完美的信息流动则使其增加24%。反事实政策模拟凸显了产权设计中的权衡：对勘探井数据更强的产权会提高勘探率，而较弱的产权会提高学习的效率和速度，但会降低勘探率。每个公司钻井许可证的空间聚集既减少了搭便车的激励，也提高了学习速度。

papers.title: The Time of Your Life: The Mortality and Longevity of Canadians
papers.authors: Kevin S. Milligan
papers.abstract: I develop and implement a methodology for cohort life expectancy using a panel of administrative tax data on a large sample born between 1930 and 1964. Over these 35 years, cohort life expectancy after age 54 grew by 5 years for women and 7 years for men. The income-longevity gradient for the top vs. bottom five percent of incomes is 9 years of post-54 life for men and 7 years for women. The life expectancy improvements arise across the income distribution in Canada, unlike the United States. Large differences across neighbourhoods emerge which cannot be explained by income differences alone.
papers.zh_title: 你生命中的时光：加拿大人的死亡率与长寿
papers.zh_abstract: 我利用一个大型行政税收数据面板，针对1930年至1964年间出生的样本，开发并实施了一种队列预期寿命的测算方法。在这35年间，54岁后的队列预期寿命女性增长了5年，男性增长了7年。收入最高5%与最低5%人群之间的收入-长寿梯度，男性为54岁后寿命相差9年，女性为7年。与美国的趋势不同，加拿大的预期寿命改善发生在整个收入分配中。不同社区之间出现了巨大差异，这些差异无法仅用收入差异来解释。

papers.title: Overcoming Discrimination: Harassment and Discrimination Dynamics
papers.authors: Yi Chen, Adam Dearing, Michael Waldman
papers.abstract: A common feature of historical episodes in which integration was successful, as well as episodes where integration was unsuccessful, is the aggravated harassment of the early pathbreakers who put themselves at risk by violating the previous segregated norm. Examples abound including Jackie Robinson and Larry Doby in the case of Major League Baseball, Autherine Lucy who was the first Black student at the University of Alabama, and Jane Chastain and Melissa Ludtke who were early female sports reporters. In this paper, we explore from a theoretical perspective the role of harassment of what we refer to as integration pathbreakers in the success and speed with which integration occurs. In our model of labor market discrimination, harassment occurs because the harassers receive direct and immediate utility from harassing, but also because harassment has the potential to slow down or even stop integration. Our main result is that such a setting can exhibit path dependence, where the success or failure of the early integration pathbreakers can be pivotal for the success and speed of the subsequent integration process. That is, early success is more likely to be followed by successful and faster integration than early failure, even when the early success is not due to aspects of the environment that make integration easier. In addition to our formal theoretical analysis of the role of harassment in the success and speed of integration, we apply our results to various historical episodes.
papers.zh_title: 克服歧视：骚扰与歧视的动态机制
papers.zh_abstract: 在成功融合的历史事件以及融合失败的事件中，一个共同特征是早期开拓者遭受了加剧的骚扰，这些人通过违反先前的隔离规范而将自己置于风险之中。例子比比皆是，包括美国职业棒球大联盟中的杰基·罗宾逊和拉里·多比、阿拉巴马大学第一位黑人学生奥瑟琳·露西，以及早期女性体育记者简·查斯坦和梅丽莎·卢德克。在本文中，我们从理论角度探讨了骚扰——我们称之为融合开拓者——在融合成功与否及速度中的作用。在我们的劳动力市场歧视模型中，骚扰之所以发生，是因为骚扰者从骚扰行为中获得直接和即时的效用，同时也因为骚扰有可能减缓甚至阻止融合。我们的主要结果是，这种设定可能表现出路径依赖，早期融合开拓者的成功或失败可能对后续融合过程的成功和速度起到关键作用。也就是说，早期成功更有可能带来成功和更快的融合，而早期失败则相反，即使早期成功并非由于使融合更容易的环境因素所致。除了对骚扰在融合成功和速度中作用的正式理论分析外，我们还将我们的结果应用于各种历史事件。

papers.title: Generation and Impact of Novel Articles in Physics
papers.authors: Jacques Mairesse, Michele Pezzoni, Frederique Sachwald
papers.abstract: The aim of this paper is twofold. First, it investigates how the characteristics of a research team relate to the probability of generating a novel article. Second, once a novel article has been generated, it investigates the moderating effects of the team's characteristics on the impact of the article. We consider 42,493 teams of researchers publishing a corresponding number of articles in 273 reputed journals in physics from 2005 to 2009. We find that team experience and team specialization are negatively associated with the probability of generating a novel article. On the contrary, having already written novel articles in the past is positively associated with the probability of generating a novel article. When analyzing the impact of novel articles, we find that a novel article published by an experienced team receives fewer citations than a novel article published by a team with less experience and is published in a lower impact factor journal. We also find that a novel article published by a large established team of researchers receives more citations than a novel article published by a small newly formed team. The team size is also positively related to the impact factor of the journal in which the novel article is published.
papers.zh_title: 物理学中新颖论文的产生与影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本文的目的有两个。首先，它研究了研究团队的特征与产生新颖论文概率之间的关系。其次，一旦新颖论文产生，它研究了团队特征对论文影响的调节效应。我们考虑了2005年至2009年间在273种知名物理学期刊上发表相应数量论文的42493个研究团队。我们发现，团队经验和团队专业化与产生新颖论文的概率呈负相关。相反，过去曾撰写过新颖论文与产生新颖论文的概率呈正相关。在分析新颖论文的影响时，我们发现，由经验丰富的团队发表的新颖论文获得的引用次数少于由经验较少的团队发表的新颖论文，并且发表在影响因子较低的期刊上。我们还发现，由大型成熟研究团队发表的新颖论文获得的引用次数多于由小型新组建团队发表的新颖论文。团队规模也与发表新颖论文的期刊影响因子呈正相关。

papers.title: Inequality in Science: Who Becomes a Star?
papers.authors: Anna Airoldi, Petra Moser
papers.abstract: How does a person’s childhood socioeconomic status (SES) influence their chances to participate and succeed in science? To investigate this question, we use machine-learning methods to link scientists in a comprehensive biographical dictionary, the American Men of Science (1921), with their childhood home in the US Census and with publications. First, we show that children from low-SES homes were already severely underrepresented in the early 1900s. Second, we find that SES influences peer recognition, even conditional on participation: Scientists from high-SES families have 38% higher odds of becoming stars, controlling for age, publications, and disciplines. Using live-in servants as an alternative measure for SES confirms the strong link between childhood SES and becoming a star. Applying text analysis to assign scientists to disciplines, we find that mathematics is the only discipline in which SES influences stardom through the number and the quality of a scientist’s publications. Using detailed data on job titles to distinguish academic from industry scientists, we find that industry scientists have lower odds of being stars. Controlling for industry employment further strengthens the link between childhood SES and stardom. Elite undergraduate degrees explain more of the correlation between SES and stardom than any other control. At the same time, controls for birth order, family size, foreign-born parents, maternal education, patents, and connections with existing stars leave estimates unchanged, highlighting the importance of SES.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, LS, PR；JEL：J24, N0, N32, O3
papers.zh_title: 科学中的不平等：谁会成为明星？
papers.zh_abstract: 一个人的童年社会经济地位如何影响其参与科学并取得成功的几率？为探究这一问题，我们运用机器学习方法，将一部综合性传记辞典《美国科学界人士》（1921年）中的科学家与其在美国人口普查中的童年家庭住址及出版物进行关联。首先，我们发现，早在20世纪初，来自低社会经济地位家庭的儿童就已经严重缺乏代表性。其次，我们发现，即使控制了参与科学活动这一条件，社会经济地位仍会影响同行认可：在控制了年龄、出版物和学科后，来自高社会经济地位家庭的科学家成为明星的几率高出38%。使用家中有住家佣人作为社会经济地位的替代指标，进一步证实了童年社会经济地位与成为明星之间的强关联。通过文本分析将科学家分配到不同学科，我们发现数学是唯一一个社会经济地位通过科学家出版物的数量和质量影响其明星地位的学科。利用详细的职位头衔数据区分学术界与产业界科学家，我们发现产业界科学家成为明星的几率较低。控制产业就业因素后，童年社会经济地位与明星地位之间的关联进一步增强。与其他任何控制变量相比，精英大学本科学位更能解释社会经济地位与明星地位之间的相关性。同时，控制出生顺序、家庭规模、父母是否外国出生、母亲教育程度、专利以及与现有明星的联系等变量后，估计值保持不变，这凸显了社会经济地位的重要性。

papers.title: Feeding the Tigers: Remittances and Conflict in Sri Lanka
papers.authors: Barthélémy Bonadio, Andrei A. Levchenko, Dominic Rohner, Mathias Thoenig
papers.abstract: This paper estimates and quantifies the impact of the diaspora remittance flows on the conflict intensity and outcomes in the Sri Lankan Civil War during the period 1996-2009. We develop an approach to infer which remittance inflows were likely to benefit the Tamil Tiger rebels relative to the central government based on Facebook connections data at the subnational level. Using shocks to source country remittance outflows, we show that exogenous increases in remittances accessible to the Tamil Tigers significantly increased their fighting strength. We then set up a quantitative model of two-sided armed conflict over many contested geographic locations, augmented with remittance flows that affect the fighting strengths of the two sides. We structurally estimate the key parameters using remittance and conflict data, and calibrate the model to the Sri Lankan subdistricts over the period of the conflict. Our main quantitative finding is that remittances had a significant impact on the timing of the central government victory, and were a substantially more important component of the military strength of the Tamil Tigers than of the government. Remittances that favored the Tamil Tiger rebels may have prolonged the war by as much as 14 years.
papers.zh_title: 喂养猛虎：斯里兰卡的侨汇与冲突
papers.zh_abstract: 本文估计并量化了1996-2009年斯里兰卡内战期间，海外侨汇流动对冲突强度和结果的影响。我们开发了一种方法，基于次国家级层面的Facebook连接数据，推断哪些侨汇流入可能更有利于泰米尔猛虎组织而非中央政府。利用来源国侨汇流出的冲击，我们表明，泰米尔猛虎组织可获取的侨汇外生增加显著增强了其战斗力。随后，我们建立了一个涉及多个争议地理位置的双方武装冲突定量模型，并加入了影响双方战斗力的侨汇流。我们利用侨汇和冲突数据对关键参数进行结构估计，并将模型校准至冲突期间斯里兰卡的次行政区。我们的主要定量发现是，侨汇对中央政府获胜的时机产生了显著影响，并且侨汇作为泰米尔猛虎组织军事力量的一个组成部分，其重要性远高于对政府军而言。有利于泰米尔猛虎组织叛军的侨汇可能将战争延长了长达14年。

papers.title: Labor Market Anatomy of a Macroeconomic Crisis
papers.authors: Kevin Donovan, Will Jianyu Lu, Joseph H. Pedtke, Todd Schoellman
papers.abstract: This paper uses two large datasets built from quarterly labor force surveys to provide a global perspective on labor market downturns. The distribution of the severity and duration of labor market downturns is strongly right skewed. The longest and most severe downturns are associated with crises, particularly financial crises, sudden stops, and house price busts. Manufacturing and construction are key sectors for propagation, as they account for more than half of the total decline in employment. Labor market downturns fall most on young and less-educated workers, who are less able to self-insure against idiosyncratic earnings risk.
papers.zh_title: 宏观经济危机的劳动力市场剖析
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用基于季度劳动力调查构建的两个大型数据集，提供了劳动力市场衰退的全球视角。劳动力市场衰退的严重程度和持续时间的分布呈强烈右偏态。持续时间最长、最严重的衰退与危机相关，特别是金融危机、资本流入骤停和房价暴跌。制造业和建筑业是传导的关键部门，它们占就业总下降量的一半以上。劳动力市场衰退对年轻和受教育程度较低的工人影响最大，这些工人更难以自我保险来应对特殊的收入风险。

papers.title: Estimating Peer Effects among College Students: Evidence from a Field Experiment of One-to-One Pairings in STEM
papers.authors: Robert W. Fairlie, Daniel M. Oliver, Glenn Millhauser, Randa Roland
papers.abstract: An extensive literature in the social sciences analyzes peer effects among students, but estimation is complicated by several major problems some of which cannot be solved even with random assignment. We design a field experiment and propose a new estimation technique to address these estimation problems including the mechanical problems associated with repeated observations within peer groups noted by Angrist (2014). The field experiment randomly assigns students to one-to-one partnerships in an important gateway STEM course at a large public university. We find no evidence of peer effects from estimates of exogenous peer effect models. We push further and estimate outcome-on-outcome models which sometimes reveal peer effects when exogenous models do not provide good proxies for ability. We find some limited evidence of small, positive outcome-on-outcome peer effects (which would have been missed without our new estimation technique). Standard estimation methods fail to detect peer effects and even return negative estimates in our Monte Carlo simulations because of the downward bias due to mechanical problems. Simulations reveal additional advantages of our technique especially when peer group sizes are fixed. Estimates of non-linear effects, heterogeneous effects, and different measures of peer ability and outcomes reveal mostly null effects but we find some evidence that low-ability peers negatively affect low-ability and medium-ability students. The findings in this setting of long-term, intensive interactions with classroom random assignment and “throwing everything at it” provide evidence of, at most, small positive peer effects contrasting with the common finding of large peer effects in previous studies in education.
papers.zh_title: 估计大学生中的同伴效应：来自STEM领域一对一配对田野实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 社会科学中大量文献分析了学生间的同伴效应，但由于几个主要问题，估计变得复杂，其中一些问题即使通过随机分配也无法解决。我们设计了一项田野实验，并提出了一种新的估计技术来解决这些估计问题，包括Angrist（2014）指出的与同伴群体内重复观察相关的机械性问题。该田野实验在一所大型公立大学一门重要的STEM入门课程中，将学生随机分配到一对一的学习伙伴关系中。从外生同伴效应模型的估计中，我们没有发现同伴效应的证据。我们进一步推进，估计了结果对结果模型，这些模型有时在外生模型无法提供良好能力代理变量时揭示了同伴效应。我们发现了有限证据表明存在微小、正向的结果对结果同伴效应（如果没有我们的新估计技术，这些效应会被遗漏）。标准估计方法未能检测到同伴效应，甚至在我们的蒙特卡洛模拟中由于机械性问题导致的向下偏误而返回负估计值。模拟揭示了我们技术的额外优势，尤其是在同伴群体规模固定时。对非线性效应、异质性效应以及同伴能力和结果的不同衡量指标的估计，大多显示为零效应，但我们发现一些证据表明，低能力同伴对低能力和中等能力学生产生负面影响。在这个具有课堂随机分配和“倾尽所有”方法的长期、密集互动环境中，研究结果提供了最多存在微小正向同伴效应的证据，这与以往教育研究中普遍发现的大规模同伴效应形成对比。

papers.title: How Do Income-Driven Repayment Plans Benefit Student Debt Borrowers?
papers.authors: Sylvain Catherine, Mehran Ebrahimian, Constantine Yannelis
papers.abstract: Using credit bureau data, we show that nearly half the increase in student debt since 2010 is due to deferred payments and the expansion of income-driven repayment (IDR) plans. These plans help borrowers smooth consumption, insure income risk, and reduce the effective debt cost. Using a life-cycle model, we quantify the welfare gains from this payment deferment and the channels through which welfare increases. New, more generous rules further subsidize borrowers without yielding net welfare gains. We show that an optimally calibrated plan can achieve similar welfare gains at a much lower cost to taxpayers, and without encouraging additional borrowing.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, ED, LS, PE；JEL：G50, H52, I20
papers.zh_title: 收入驱动还款计划如何惠及学生贷款借款人？
papers.zh_abstract: 利用征信局数据，我们表明自2010年以来学生债务增长中近一半是由于延期还款和收入驱动还款计划的扩张。这些计划帮助借款人平滑消费、为收入风险提供保险，并降低有效债务成本。通过使用生命周期模型，我们量化了这种还款延期带来的福利收益以及福利增加的渠道。新的、更慷慨的规则进一步补贴了借款人，但并未产生净福利收益。我们表明，一个经过最优校准的计划可以在不鼓励额外借贷的情况下，以低得多的纳税人成本实现类似的福利收益。

papers.title: Optimal Dynamic Asset Allocation with Transaction Costs: The Role of Hedging Demands
papers.authors: Pierre Collin-Dufresne, Kent D. Daniel, Mehmet Sağlam
papers.abstract: A number of papers have solved for the optimal dynamic portfolio strategy when expected returns are time-varying and trading is costly, but only for agents with myopic utility. Non-myopic agents benefit from hedging against future shocks to the investment opportunity set even when transaction costs are zero (Merton, 1969, 1971). In this paper, we propose a solution to the dynamic portfolio allocation problem for non-myopic agents faced with a stochastic investment opportunity set when trading is costly. We show that the agent’s optimal policy is to trade toward an “aim” portfolio, the makeup of which depends both on transaction costs and on each asset’s correlation with changes in the investment opportunity set. The speed at which the agent should trade towards the aim portfolio depends both on the shock’s persistence and on the extent to which the shock can be effectively hedged. We illustrate the differences in portfolio makeup that result from considering hedging demands of a long-horizon investor using a set of simplified examples, and using a daily trading strategy based on the estimated relation between retail order imbalance and future returns.
papers.zh_title: 存在交易成本时的最优动态资产配置：对冲需求的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 许多论文已经解决了当预期收益率随时间变化且交易有成本时的最优动态投资组合策略问题，但仅针对具有短视效用的代理人。即使交易成本为零，非短视代理人也能从对冲未来投资机会集冲击中获益（Merton, 1969, 1971）。在本文中，我们为面临随机投资机会集且交易有成本的非短视代理人，提出了动态投资组合配置问题的解决方案。我们表明，代理人的最优策略是向一个“目标”投资组合进行交易，该投资组合的构成既取决于交易成本，也取决于每个资产与投资机会集变化的相关性。代理人向目标投资组合交易的速度，既取决于冲击的持续性，也取决于该冲击能被有效对冲的程度。我们通过一组简化示例，以及基于零售订单不平衡与未来收益率之间估计关系的日度交易策略，说明了考虑长期投资者对冲需求所导致的投资组合构成差异。

papers.title: The Impact of United States Assimilation and Allotment Policy on American Indian Mortality
papers.authors: Grant Miller, Jack Shane, C. Matthew Snipp
papers.abstract: In contrast to earlier United States policies of open war, forcible removal, and relocation to address the “Indian Problem,” the Dawes Act of 1887 focused on assimilation and land severalty—making American Indians citizens of the United States with individually-titled plots of land rather than members of collective tribes with communal land. Considerable scholarship shows that the consequences of the policy differed substantially from its stated goals, and by the time of its repeal in 1934, American Indians had lost two-thirds of all native land held in 1887 (86 million acres)—and nearly two-thirds of American Indians had become landless or unable to meet subsistence needs. Complementing rich qualitative history, this paper provides new quantitative evidence on the impact of the Dawes Act on mortality among American Indian children and adults. Using 1900 and 1910 U.S. population census data to study both household and tribe-level variation in allotment timing, we find that assimilation and allotment policy increased the American Indian child mortality ratio by a little more than 15%.
