In secondary analyses (requiring additional assumptions) focused on total mortality, we find increases among young American Indians of nearly one-third (implying a decline in life expectancy at birth of about 20%). These results confirm contemporary critics’ adamant concerns about the Dawes Act.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, EH；JEL：I14, I15, I18, J15, N31
papers.zh_title: 美国同化与土地分配政策对美国印第安人死亡率的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 与早期美国为解决“印第安人问题”而采取的公开战争、强制迁移和重新安置政策不同，1887年的《道斯法案》侧重于同化和土地私有化——使美国印第安人成为拥有个人土地所有权的美国公民，而非拥有公共土地的集体部落成员。大量学术研究表明，该政策的后果与其既定目标大相径庭，到1934年该法案被废除时，美国印第安人已失去了1887年所持所有原住民土地的三分之二（8600万英亩）——近三分之二的美国印第安人变得无地或无法满足生存需求。作为对丰富定性历史的补充，本文提供了关于《道斯法案》对美国印第安儿童和成人死亡率影响的新定量证据。利用1900年和1910年美国人口普查数据，研究家庭和部落层面在土地分配时间上的差异，我们发现，同化与土地分配政策使美国印第安儿童死亡率比率增加了略高于15%。在针对总死亡率的二次分析（需要额外假设）中，我们发现年轻美国印第安人的死亡率增加了近三分之一（意味着出生时预期寿命下降了约20%）。这些结果证实了当时批评者对《道斯法案》的强烈担忧。

papers.title: Revisiting the Phillips and Beveridge Curves: Insights from the 2020s Inflation Surge
papers.authors: Pierpaolo Benigno, Gauti B. Eggertsson
papers.abstract: This paper reexamines the Phillips and Beveridge curves to explain the inflation surge in the U.S. during the 2020s. We argue that the pre-surge consensus regarding both curves requires substantial revision. We propose that the Inverse-L (INV-L) New Keynesian Phillips Curve replace the standard New Keynesian Phillips Curve. The INV-L curve is piecewise-linear and more sensitive to labor market conditions when it crosses the Beveridge threshold — a point at which the labor market becomes excessively tight and enters a "labor shortage" regime. We introduce a modified Beveridge curve that features a near-vertical slope once the Beveridge threshold is passed, suggesting that in this region, adjustment in labor market tightness occurs almost exclusively through a drop in vacancies rather than an increase in unemployment. This feature matches the U.S. experience since the Federal Reserve's tightening cycle began in March 2022. We also observe a similar pattern in the data during five other inflation surges over the past 111 years where the Beveridge threshold was breached. We define a Beveridge-threshold (BT) unemployment rate. Once unemployment falls below this rate, policymakers must be alert to sharp inflationary pressures from demand or supply shocks. We explore several policy implications.
papers.meta: Programs：ME；JEL：E0, E30, E40, E42, E44, E47, E49, E5, E51, E58, J20, J39
papers.zh_title: 重新审视菲利普斯曲线和贝弗里奇曲线：来自2020年代通胀飙升的启示
papers.zh_abstract: 本文重新审视了菲利普斯曲线和贝弗里奇曲线，以解释2020年代美国通胀的飙升。我们认为，在通胀飙升前关于这两条曲线的共识需要大幅修正。我们提出用倒L型新凯恩斯菲利普斯曲线替代标准的新凯恩斯菲利普斯曲线。倒L型曲线是分段线性的，并且当它越过贝弗里奇阈值（即劳动力市场变得过于紧张并进入“劳动力短缺”状态的点）时，对劳动力市场状况更为敏感。我们引入了一条修正的贝弗里奇曲线，其特征是一旦越过贝弗里奇阈值，曲线斜率近乎垂直，这表明在该区域内，劳动力市场紧张程度的调整几乎完全通过职位空缺的下降而非失业率的上升来实现。这一特征与美联储自2022年3月开始紧缩周期以来美国的经验相符。我们还观察到，在过去111年中，其他五次通胀飙升期间的数据也呈现出类似模式，当时贝弗里奇阈值均被突破。我们定义了一个贝弗里奇阈值失业率。一旦失业率低于这一水平，政策制定者必须警惕来自需求或供给冲击的急剧通胀压力。我们探讨了若干政策含义。

papers.title: Marine Microplastics and Infant Health
papers.authors: Xinming Du, Shan Zhang, Eric Zou
papers.abstract: A century of plastic usage has led to an accumulation of plastic waste in waterways and oceans. Over time, these wastes break down into particles smaller than 5 microns – or “microplastics” – which can infiltrate human biological systems. Despite decades of research into this emerging source of environmental pollution, there is a lack of direct evidence on the health impacts of microplastics exposure at a population scale. This paper reports the first causal link between in-utero microplastic exposure and adverse birth outcomes. Our analysis is based on a compiled dataset of 3 million births that occurred in coastal areas of 15 countries spanning four continents, which we merge with a novel remote-sensing measurement of marine microplastic concentrations. We show that in-utero exposure to microplastics, particularly during the third trimester of pregnancy, leads to a significant increase in the likelihood of low birth weight. A doubling of exposure increases low birth weight hazard by 0.37 per 1,000 births, which implies over 205,000 cases per year globally can be attributed to microplastic exposure. We further show that aerosolization – whereby microplastic particles become airborne and inhalable due to seawater evaporation – is an important pathway for health impact, a challenge that is likely to escalate as ocean temperatures continue to rise.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, EH；JEL：I18, O13, Q25, Q53
papers.zh_title: 海洋微塑料与婴儿健康
papers.zh_abstract: 一个世纪的塑料使用导致塑料废物在水道和海洋中积累。随着时间的推移，这些废物分解成小于5微米的颗粒——即“微塑料”——它们可以渗入人体生物系统。尽管对这种新兴环境污染源的研究已有数十年，但缺乏关于微塑料暴露在人口规模上对健康影响的直接证据。本文报告了子宫内微塑料暴露与不良出生结果之间的首个因果联系。我们的分析基于一个汇编数据集，该数据集包含来自横跨四大洲15个国家沿海地区的300万例出生记录，我们将其与一种新颖的海洋微塑料浓度遥感测量数据相结合。我们表明，子宫内微塑料暴露，尤其是在妊娠晚期，会导致低出生体重概率显著增加。暴露量每增加一倍，每1000例出生中低出生体重的风险增加0.37例，这意味着全球每年有超过20.5万例低出生体重病例可归因于微塑料暴露。我们进一步表明，气溶胶化——即微塑料颗粒因海水蒸发而悬浮于空气中并被吸入——是健康影响的一个重要途径，随着海洋温度持续上升，这一挑战可能会加剧。

papers.title: Peer Influence on West Point Cadets’ CivilWar Allegiances
papers.authors: Yuchen Guo, Matthew O. Jackson, Ruixue Jia
papers.abstract: Do social networks and peer influence shape major life decisions in highly polarized settings? We explore this question by examining how peers influenced the allegiances of West Point cadets during the American Civil War. Leveraging quasi-random variations in the proportion of cadets from Free States, we analyze how cadets’ decisions about which army to join depended on the composition of their peers. We have three main findings. First, there was a strong and significant peer effect: a higher proportion of classmates from Free States significantly increased the likelihood that cadets from Slave States joined the Union Army. Second, the peer effect varies with geography, most notably with the slave population share in cadets’ home states or counties, and with cadets’ own slave ownership in 1860. Third, peer effects were amplified by shared experiences such as having served together in the Mexican-American War, continuous military service, and belonging to the same cohort, suggesting that sustained interaction is important.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, PE, POL；JEL：D81, D85, I28, N31, N41
papers.zh_title: 同伴影响对西点军校学员内战效忠选择的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 社会网络和同伴影响是否会在高度两极化的环境中塑造重大人生决策？我们通过考察美国内战期间同伴如何影响西点军校学员的效忠选择来探讨这一问题。利用来自自由州学员比例的准随机变化，我们分析了学员决定加入哪支军队如何受其同伴构成的影响。我们有三个主要发现。首先，存在强烈且显著的同伴效应：来自自由州的同学比例越高，显著增加了来自蓄奴州的学员加入联邦军的可能性。其次，同伴效应随地理因素而变化，最显著的是学员家乡州或县的奴隶人口比例，以及学员自身在1860年的奴隶拥有情况。第三，共同经历（如曾一起在美墨战争中服役、持续服役以及属于同一届学员）会放大同伴效应，这表明持续的互动至关重要。

papers.title: How Big is the “Biggest Climate Spending Bill Ever?” Key Factors Influencing the Inflation Reduction Act’s Clean Energy Impacts
papers.authors: Joseph E. Aldy
papers.abstract: The Inflation Reduction Act could deliver more than $1 trillion in tax expenditures and outlays targeting clean energy deployment, but considerable uncertainty characterizes the economic, emissions, energy, and fiscal implications of the law. I review the features of the political system governing implementation, the regulatory system overlaying performance standards, the innovation responding to IRA incentives, and the energy networks in which IRA-supported investments operate to identify the key factors influencing IRA’s outcomes. Drawing from past research and policy experience, I illustrate how these factors could play out and how future program evaluation could reduce uncertainty and inform better climate policy.
papers.zh_title: “史上最大气候支出法案”有多大？影响《通胀削减法案》清洁能源效果的关键因素
papers.zh_abstract: 《通胀削减法案》可能提供超过1万亿美元的税收支出和拨款，用于清洁能源部署，但该法案的经济、排放、能源和财政影响存在相当大的不确定性。我回顾了实施该法案的政治体系特征、叠加绩效标准的监管体系、响应《通胀削减法案》激励措施的创新，以及《通胀削减法案》支持的投资所运行的能源网络，以识别影响该法案结果的关键因素。借鉴过去的研究和政策经验，我阐述了这些因素可能如何发挥作用，以及未来的项目评估如何能够减少不确定性并为更好的气候政策提供信息。

papers.title: Empirical Bayes Methods in Labor Economics
papers.authors: Christopher R. Walters
papers.abstract: Labor economists increasingly work in empirical contexts with large numbers of unit-specific parameters. These settings include a growing number of value-added studies measuring causal effects of individual units like firms, managers, neighborhoods, teachers, schools, doctors, hospitals, police officers, and judges. Empirical Bayes (EB) methods provide a powerful toolkit for value-added analysis. The EB approach leverages distributional information from the full population of units to refine predictions of value-added for each individual, leading to improved estimators and decision rules. This chapter offers an overview of EB methods in labor economics, focusing on properties that make EB useful for value-added studies and practical guidance for EB implementation. Applications to school value-added in Boston and employer-level discrimination in the US labor market illustrate the EB toolkit in action.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PE, TWP；JEL：C10, C11, I21, J01, J7
papers.zh_title: 劳动经济学中的经验贝叶斯方法
papers.zh_abstract: 劳动经济学家越来越多地在具有大量单位特定参数的实证背景下工作。这些背景包括越来越多的增值研究，用于衡量企业、管理者、社区、教师、学校、医生、医院、警察和法官等个体单位的因果效应。经验贝叶斯方法为增值分析提供了一个强大的工具包。经验贝叶斯方法利用来自全部单位总体的分布信息来细化对每个个体增值的预测，从而产生改进的估计量和决策规则。本章概述了劳动经济学中的经验贝叶斯方法，重点关注使经验贝叶斯方法对增值研究有用的特性，以及实施经验贝叶斯方法的实用指南。对波士顿学校增值和美国劳动力市场雇主歧视的应用展示了经验贝叶斯工具包的实际应用。

papers.title: Physician Practice Preferences and Healthcare Expenditures: Evidence from Commercial Payers
papers.authors: Jeffrey Clemens, Pierre-Thomas Léger, Yashna Nandan, Robert Town
papers.abstract: We examine the relationship between physician preferences and both the intensity and cost of care delivered to commercially insured heart attack patients. We match survey data on physician preferences, collected by Cutler, Skinner, Stern, and Wennberg (2019) (CSSW), to medical claims data from the Health Care Cost Institute, which spans over 50 million insurance beneficiaries. In contrast to CSSW, who find strong correlations between aggressive practice preferences and both expenditure and utilization for the Medicare population, we find relationships that are both economically and statistically smaller in magnitude within the commercially insured population. Variations in commercial insurers’ prices appear to play an important mediating role.
papers.zh_title: 医生执业偏好与医疗支出：来自商业保险支付方的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了医生偏好与商业保险心脏病发作患者所接受医疗服务的强度及成本之间的关系。我们将Cutler, Skinner, Stern和Wennberg (2019)收集的医生偏好调查数据与健康成本研究所的医疗索赔数据（涵盖超过5000万保险受益人）进行匹配。与CSSW发现激进执业偏好与Medicare人群的支出和利用率之间存在强相关性相反，我们发现，在商业保险人群中，这种关系在经济和统计上的幅度都较小。商业保险公司价格的差异似乎起到了重要的中介作用。

papers.title: Welfare Effects of a Permanent Unconditional Cash Transfer Program: Evidence from Maricá, Brazil
papers.authors: Sidhya Balakrishnan, Roberta Costa, Johannes Haushofer, Fábio Waltenberg
papers.abstract: We investigate the impact of a permanent unconditional cash transfer called “Citizen’s Basic Income” in the city of Maricá, Brazil. At the time of the study, the program made monthly household-level transfers of USD 180 PPP on average to about a fourth of the city’s residents. The program is unique in that it is both unconditional and permanent, while existing programs typically only have one of these features. Between September 2021 and April 2022, we surveyed 5,182 individuals, about half of whom received the RBC. We use propensity score matching with inverse probability weights to create a matched comparison group and estimate the effect of the program on economic, social, and psychological outcomes. Our results reveal several positive welfare effects. Household income including transfers increased by 9%; consumption at the per capita level did not change significantly, but the household as a whole experienced a consumption increase of 5%. We also observe improvements in an index of children’s health and education, although the effect does not survive multiple inference correction and bounding. There was a notable displacement of other income sources, particularly labor income, which decreased by 17% among recipients, suggesting shifts to lower-paying but potentially more desirable jobs during the pandemic. The program also led to increased access to financial services, but decreased the propensity to save. These findings paint a nuanced picture of the socioeconomic benefits of unconditional cash transfers and established cash transfer administrative systems.
papers.zh_title: 永久性无条件现金转移项目的福利效应：来自巴西马里卡的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们调查了巴西马里卡市一项名为“公民基本收入”的永久性无条件现金转移项目的影响。在研究期间，该项目平均每月向该市约四分之一的居民提供按购买力平价计算180美元的家庭层面转移支付。该项目的独特之处在于它既是无条件的又是永久性的，而现有项目通常只具备其中一个特征。在2021年9月至2022年4月期间，我们调查了5182人，其中约一半是RBC的受益者。我们使用倾向得分匹配结合逆概率权重来创建匹配的比较组，并估计该项目对经济、社会和心理结果的影响。我们的结果揭示了若干积极的福利效应。包括转移支付在内的家庭收入增加了9%；人均消费水平没有显著变化，但整个家庭的消费增长了5%。我们还观察到儿童健康和教育指数的改善，尽管该效应在多重推断校正和边界分析中不显著。其他收入来源，特别是劳动收入，出现了显著替代，受益者的劳动收入下降了17%，这表明在疫情期间人们转向了收入较低但可能更理想的工作。该项目还导致金融服务可及性增加，但储蓄倾向下降。这些发现描绘了无条件现金转移及其建立的现金转移行政体系的社会经济收益的细致图景。

papers.title: Preferences, Selection, and the Structure of Teacher Pay
papers.authors: Andrew C. Johnston
papers.abstract: I examine teacher preferences using a discrete-choice experiment, which I link to administrative data on teacher effectiveness. I estimate willingness-to-pay for a rich set of compensation elements and working conditions. Highly effective teachers usually have the same preferences as their peers, but they have stronger preferences for performance pay. I use the preference estimates to investigate the optimal compensation structure for three key objectives: maximizing teacher utility, maximizing teacher retention, and maximizing student achievement. Under each objective, schools underutilize salary and performance pay, while overutilizing retirement benefits. Restructuring compensation can significantly improve both teacher welfare and student achievement.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PE；JEL：I20, J32, J45, M50
papers.zh_title: 偏好、选择与教师薪酬结构
papers.zh_abstract: 我使用离散选择实验来考察教师偏好，并将其与教师有效性的行政数据相关联。我估计了教师对一系列薪酬要素和工作条件的支付意愿。高效教师通常与同行具有相同的偏好，但他们更偏好绩效薪酬。我利用偏好估计来研究三个关键目标下的最优薪酬结构：最大化教师效用、最大化教师留任率以及最大化学生成绩。在每个目标下，学校都未能充分利用薪水和绩效薪酬，而过度使用了退休福利。重组薪酬结构可以显著改善教师福利和学生成绩。

papers.title: Service Quality on Online Platforms: Empirical Evidence about Driving Quality at Uber
papers.authors: Susan Athey, Juan Camilo Castillo, Bharat Chandar
papers.abstract: Online marketplaces have adopted new quality control mechanisms that can accommodate a flexible pool of providers. In the context of ride-hailing, we measure the effectiveness of these mechanisms, which include ratings, incentives, and behavioral nudges. Using telemetry data as an objective measure of quality, we find that drivers not only respond to user preferences but also improve their behavior after receiving warnings about their low ratings. Furthermore, we use data from a randomized experiment to show that informing drivers about their past behavior improves quality, especially for low-performing drivers. Lastly, we find that UberX drivers exhibit behavior comparable to that of UberTaxi drivers, suggesting that Uber’s new quality control mechanisms successfully maintain a high level of service quality.
papers.zh_title: 在线平台的服务质量：来自优步驾驶质量的实证证据
papers.zh_abstract: 在线市场采用了新的质量控制机制，以适应灵活的服务提供者群体。在网约车背景下，我们衡量了这些机制的有效性，包括评分、激励和行为助推。使用遥测数据作为质量的客观衡量标准，我们发现司机不仅对用户偏好做出反应，而且在收到低评分警告后改善了自身行为。此外，我们利用随机实验的数据表明，告知司机其过去的行为可以提高质量，尤其是对于表现较差的司机。最后，我们发现UberX司机的行为与UberTaxi司机相当，这表明优步的新质量控制机制成功维持了高水平的服务质量。

papers.title: The Effects of a Statewide Ban on School Suspensions
papers.authors: Jane Arnold Lincove, Catherine Mata, Kalena Cortes
papers.abstract: This research analyzes the implementation of a school suspension ban in Maryland to investigate whether a top-down state-initiated ban on suspensions in early primary grades can influence school behavior regarding school discipline. Beginning in the fall of 2017, the State of Maryland banned the use of out-of-school suspensions for grades PK-2, unless a student posed an “imminent threat” to staff or students. This research investigates (1) what was the effect of the ban on discipline outcomes for students in both treated grades and upper elementary grades not subject to the ban? (2) did schools bypass the ban by coding more events as threatening or increasing the use of in-school suspensions? and (3) were there differential effects for students in groups that are historically suspended more often? Using a comparative interrupted time series strategy, we find that the ban is associated with a substantial reduction in, but not a total elimination of, out-of-school suspensions for targeted grades without substitution of in-school suspensions. Disproportionalities by race and other characteristics remain after the ban. Grades not subject to the ban experienced few effects, suggesting the ban did not trigger a schoolwide response that reduced exclusionary discipline.
papers.zh_title: 全州范围内禁止学校停课的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究分析了马里兰州实施的学校停课禁令，以调查自上而下的州级禁令是否能在早期小学阶段影响学校在纪律方面的行为。自2017年秋季起，马里兰州禁止对学前班至二年级学生使用校外停课，除非该学生对教职员工或其他学生构成“迫在眉睫的威胁”。本研究探讨了：(1) 该禁令对受处理年级以及未受禁令约束的高年级小学学生的纪律结果有何影响？(2) 学校是否通过将更多事件归类为威胁或增加校内停课的使用来规避禁令？(3) 对于历史上更常被停课的学生群体，是否存在差异化效应？采用比较中断时间序列策略，我们发现该禁令与目标年级校外停课的大幅减少（但并非完全消除）相关，且未出现校内停课的替代现象。禁令实施后，按种族和其他特征划分的不成比例现象依然存在。未受禁令约束的年级几乎没有受到影响，这表明该禁令并未引发全校范围内减少排斥性纪律的反应。

papers.title: Distance to Opportunity: Higher Education Deserts and College Enrollment Choices
papers.authors: Riley K. Acton, Kalena Cortes, Camila Morales
papers.abstract: We study how geographic access to public postsecondary institutions is associated with students’ college enrollment decisions across race and socioeconomic status. Leveraging rich administrative data, we first document substantial differences in students’ local college options, with White, Hispanic, and rural students having, on average, many fewer nearby options than their Black, Asian, suburban, and urban peers. We then show that students are sensitive to the distance they must travel to access public colleges and universities, but there are heterogeneous effects across students. In particular, we find that White and non-economically disadvantaged students respond to living far from public two-year colleges primarily by enrolling in four-year colleges, whereas Black, Hispanic, and economically disadvantaged students respond primarily by forgoing college enrollment altogether. Lastly, in a series of decomposition and simulation exercises to inform public policy efforts to increase college enrollment, especially among underrepresented minorities and low-income students, we find that differences in students’ sensitivity to distance, rather than differences in distance to the nearest college, primarily contribute to observed four-year college enrollment gaps across racial and ethnic groups.
papers.zh_title: 通往机会的距离：高等教育荒漠与大学入学选择
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了地理上获得公立高等教育机构的可及性如何与不同种族和社会经济地位学生的大学入学决策相关联。利用丰富的行政数据，我们首先记录了学生在当地大学选择上的显著差异：白人、西班牙裔和农村学生平均而言比黑人、亚裔、郊区和城市学生拥有更少的就近选择。然后，我们表明学生对就读公立学院和大学所需通勤的距离很敏感，但不同学生之间存在异质性效应。具体而言，我们发现白人和非经济弱势学生主要通过就读四年制大学来应对远离公立两年制学院的情况，而黑人、西班牙裔和经济弱势学生则主要通过完全放弃大学入学来应对。最后，在一系列分解和模拟练习中，旨在为增加大学入学率（尤其是代表性不足的少数族裔和低收入学生）的公共政策努力提供信息，我们发现，学生距离敏感性的差异，而非与最近大学距离的差异，是导致不同种族和民族群体间四年制大学入学差距的主要原因。

papers.title: Firm Wage Effects
papers.authors: Patrick M. Kline
papers.abstract: This paper reviews the literature on firm wage differences and the fixed effects methods typically used to measure these differences. High wage firms tend to be more productive, larger, more sought after by workers, and to employ more credentialed and higher wage workers. The latest evidence suggests high wage firms also tend to offer better amenities and are prone to outsourcing and mass layoffs. Reviewing the requirements of the “AKM model” of Abowd, Kramarz, and Margolis (1999), I provide a graph theoretic interpretation of the restrictions this model places on the wage changes of workers who switch employers and examine the extent to which they are satisfied in a benchmark dataset. Assumptions are provided that give these wage changes a causal interpretation and I discuss some difficulties that arise in aggregating them into a global ranking of firm wage levels. In reviewing the econometrics of variance decompositions, I argue that attention ought to focus on effect sizes rather than variance shares, which can be difficult to compare across datasets with different noise levels. Cross-fitting and clustering methods for addressing limited mobility bias are reviewed. A series of bounding and imputation exercises suggest the network pruning typically used in conjunction with cross-fitting methods has little effect on estimands of interest. A review of the latest international evidence finds that the bias-corrected standard deviation of firm effects tends to be substantially elevated in less developed countries. Variance estimation methods for second step regressions of firm effects on covariates are reviewed and illustrated with an empirical application to the firm size wage premium. Finally, I discuss connections between the AKM model and the celebrated sequential auction framework of Postel-Vinay and Robin (2002a), concluding with some areas for future work at this intersection.
papers.zh_title: 企业工资效应
papers.zh_abstract: 本文回顾了关于企业工资差异以及通常用于衡量这些差异的固定效应方法的文献。高工资企业往往生产率更高、规模更大、更受工人青睐，并且雇佣更多拥有资质和更高工资的工人。最新证据表明，高工资企业也倾向于提供更好的工作条件，并且容易出现外包和大规模裁员。在回顾Abowd、Kramarz和Margolis（1999）提出的“AKM模型”要求时，我提供了该模型对工人换雇主时工资变化所施加限制的图论解释，并检验了这些限制在基准数据集中的满足程度。本文给出了赋予这些工资变化因果解释的假设，并讨论了在将其汇总为全球企业工资水平排名时出现的一些困难。在回顾方差分解的计量经济学时，我认为注意力应集中在效应大小而非方差份额上，因为后者在不同噪声水平的数据集之间难以比较。本文回顾了用于解决有限流动性偏差的交叉拟合和聚类方法。一系列边界设定和插补练习表明，通常与交叉拟合方法结合使用的网络修剪对感兴趣的估计量影响很小。对最新国际证据的回顾发现，在欠发达国家，偏差校正后的企业效应标准差往往显著升高。本文回顾了企业效应对协变量进行第二步回归的方差估计方法，并通过一个关于企业规模工资溢价的实证应用加以说明。最后，我讨论了AKM模型与著名的Postel-Vinay和Robin（2002a）序贯拍卖框架之间的联系，并总结了这一交叉领域未来工作的一些方向。

papers.title: The Long-Run Impacts of Regulated Price Cuts: Evidence from Medicare
papers.authors: Yunan Ji, Parker Rogers
papers.abstract: We investigate the effects of substantial Medicare price reductions in the medical device industry, which amounted to a 61% decrease over 10 years for certain device types. Analyzing over 20 years of administrative and proprietary data, we find these price cuts led to a 25% decline in new product introductions and a 75% decrease in patent filings, indicating significant reductions in innovation activity. Manufacturers decreased market entry and increased outsourcing to foreign producers, associated with higher rates of product defects. Our calculations suggest the value of lost innovation may fully offset the direct cost savings from the price cuts. We propose that better-targeted pricing reforms could mitigate these negative effects. These findings underscore the need to balance cost containment with incentives for innovation and quality in policy design.
papers.zh_title: 管制性降价的长期影响：来自医疗保险的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了医疗保险在医疗器械行业大幅降价的影响，某些器械类型的价格在10年内下降了61%。通过分析超过20年的行政和专有数据，我们发现这些降价导致新产品推出减少25%，专利申请减少75%，表明创新活动显著减少。制造商减少了市场进入，并增加了对外国生产商的业务外包，这与更高的产品缺陷率相关。我们的计算表明，创新损失的价值可能完全抵消降价带来的直接成本节约。我们提出，更有针对性的定价改革可以减轻这些负面影响。这些发现强调了在政策设计中平衡成本控制与创新和质量激励的必要性。

papers.title: Firm-to-Firm Referrals
papers.authors: Jing Cai, Wei Lin, Adam Szeidl
papers.abstract: We make randomized firm-to-firm referrals between 700 supplier and client firms in the industry producing the Chinese writing brush. Subsidized referrals lead to subsequent transactions and a partial crowding out of prior partners; information-only referrals have no effect. The referrals increase revenue, profit, and hours worked in supplier firms and growth-oriented client firms. Treated suppliers increase product quality, while treated clients expand product variety into higher-quality products, suggesting that the referrals enable complementary upgrading. Treated firms increase beliefs about the value of partners, search for partners, and the number of non-referred partners, suggesting that pessimistic beliefs is a key partnering friction. The referrals generate very large private and social returns.
papers.zh_title: 企业间推荐
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在生产中国毛笔的行业中，对700家供应商和客户企业进行了随机化的企业间推荐。有补贴的推荐导致了后续交易，并部分挤出了之前的合作伙伴；仅提供信息的推荐则没有效果。这些推荐增加了供应商企业和以增长为导向的客户企业的收入、利润和工作时间。受处理的供应商提高了产品质量，而受处理的客户则将产品种类扩展到更高质量的产品，这表明推荐促进了互补性的升级。受处理的企业增加了对合作伙伴价值的信念、对合作伙伴的搜索以及非推荐合作伙伴的数量，这表明悲观信念是一个关键的合作伙伴关系摩擦。这些推荐产生了非常大的私人和社会回报。

papers.title: Firm Climate Investment: A Glass Half-Full
papers.authors: Prachi Srivastava, Nicholas Bloom, Philip Bunn, Paul Mizen, Gregory Thwaites, Ivan Yotzov
papers.abstract: We analyse the importance of climate-related investment using a large economy-wide survey of UK firms. Over half of firms expect climate change to have a positive impact on their investment in the medium term, with around a quarter expecting a large impact of over 10%. Around two-thirds of these investments are expected to be in addition to normal capital expenditure, with some firms investing less elsewhere. These investments will be driven by larger firms as well as those in more energy-intensive sectors. Climate investments are expected mainly in switching to green energy sources and improving energy efficiency, and firms expect to finance these mainly using internal cash reserves. Overall, although firms are expecting to invest more resources in adapting to climate change, under reasonable assumptions, these investments are still not sufficient to meet the estimated targets implied by the UK Net Zero Pathway.
papers.zh_title: 企业气候投资：半杯满
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用一项覆盖英国各行业的大型企业调查，分析了气候相关投资的重要性。超过一半的企业预计气候变化将在中期内对其投资产生积极影响，约四分之一的企业预计影响较大，超过10%。这些投资中约三分之二预计将超出正常资本支出，部分企业则在其他方面减少投资。这些投资将由大型企业以及能源密集型行业的企业推动。气候投资预计主要集中在转向绿色能源和提高能源效率方面，企业预计主要利用内部现金储备为这些投资提供资金。总体而言，尽管企业预计将投入更多资源来适应气候变化，但在合理假设下，这些投资仍不足以达到英国净零排放路径所暗示的估计目标。

papers.title: Tyranny of the Personal Network: The Limits of Arm’s Length Fundraising in Venture Capital
papers.authors: Sabrina T. Howell, Dean Parker, Ting Xu
papers.abstract: Growing retail participation in private markets causes private fundraising to shift from relationship-based to arm’s length. Focusing on venture capital funds, we study a 2013 policy—the 506(c) exemption—permitting public advertising in private markets. 506(c) funds have more retail investors and managers with weaker networks, yet do not underperform. Advertising reduces search costs and enables more catering to investor preferences. Nonetheless, 506(c) take-up is limited because arm’s length fundraising depends on hard information, but few managers establish a track record without developing a strong network. Institutional investors also consider 506(c) a negative signal because they avoid co-investing with retail.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, LE, PR；JEL：G21, G23, G32, J15, J16
papers.zh_title: 个人网络的暴政：风险投资中保持距离募资的局限
papers.zh_abstract: 私人市场中零售投资者参与度的增长，导致私人募资从基于关系型转向保持距离型。聚焦于风险投资基金，我们研究了2013年的一项政策——506(c)豁免——该政策允许在私人市场进行公开广告。506(c)基金拥有更多零售投资者和网络较弱的经理人，但并未表现不佳。广告降低了搜索成本，并使得更多迎合投资者偏好成为可能。尽管如此，506(c)的采用率有限，因为保持距离的募资依赖于硬信息，但很少有经理人能在不建立强大网络的情况下建立业绩记录。机构投资者也将506(c)视为负面信号，因为他们避免与零售投资者共同投资。

papers.title: Rethinking Short-Term Real Interest Rates and Term Spreads Using Very Long-Run Data
papers.authors: Kenneth S. Rogoff, Barbara Rossi, Paul Schmelzing
papers.abstract: Utilizing critical recent data advances, we analyze empirical evidence on long-run samples of short-maturity real interest rates as well as term spreads based on multi-century data. In contrast to an extensive literature on short-maturity real interest rates over the past few decades, we find strong and consistent evidence of trend stationarity in long horizon series, relatively fast adjustment speeds, and a paucity of structural breaks – results that we show to survive out of sample tests. The use of very long-run data offers a fresh perspective for ongoing monetary policy debates surrounding r*, and also provides a crucial missing link to reconstructing the long-run properties of term spreads. On balance and against limited post-COVID data, our evidence suggests caution on the idea of a break in short-term real interest rate behavior and instead points to elements of continuity over very long time periods. Relatedly, we show that term spreads are secularly rising while inflation volatility trends in the exact opposite direction – a finding questioning the emphasis of influential term structure models.
papers.zh_title: 利用超长期数据重新审视短期实际利率与期限利差
papers.zh_abstract: 借助近期关键的数据进展，我们基于跨越数个世纪的样本，分析了短期实际利率以及期限利差的长期实证证据。与过去几十年来关于短期实际利率的大量文献相反，我们发现了长期序列中趋势平稳性、相对较快的调整速度以及结构性断裂匮乏的强有力且一致的证据——我们证明这些结果在样本外检验中依然成立。利用超长期数据为围绕r*的持续货币政策辩论提供了新视角，也为重构期限利差的长期特性提供了关键缺失的一环。总体而言，面对有限的疫情后数据，我们的证据表明，对于短期实际利率行为出现断裂的观点应持谨慎态度，反而指向了超长时间跨度内的连续性要素。与此相关，我们展示了期限利差在长期内呈上升趋势，而通胀波动性趋势则完全相反——这一发现对具有影响力的期限结构模型的侧重点提出了质疑。

papers.title: The Distaste for Housing Density
papers.authors: Joseph Gyourko, Sean E. McCulloch
papers.abstract: We characterize the distribution of suburban homeowners’ preferences for housing unit density. To measure welfare changes under counterfactual increases in density, we first construct a novel house-level measure of exposure to density and identify its price effects in a boundary discontinuity design. On the borders of municipalities with larger minimum lot sizes, lots are 3,000 ft² larger and houses are $40,000 costlier. We exploit the systematic variation in density exposure induced by these discontinuities to estimate price effects. We then connect these estimates to a structural hedonic model of housing choice to retrieve individuals’ preferences for density. Overall, we find an average welfare loss among incumbent homeowners from a 1/2 unit per acre increase in density (which is equivalent to a 0.3 standard deviation in density) of about $9,500, with significantly larger losses under counterfactual increases solely from rental units. There is other noteworthy heterogeneity in these preferences, too. Most households have only a moderate preference over density. The median welfare loss is only 55% of the average, implying a long, left tail of those with more extreme aversions to density. This tail disproportionately contains households in affluent, low density neighborhoods. In sum, our results document an important foundation of the demand for density regulation across U.S. suburbs that we hope serves as a valuable input into future research into the considerable costs of that policy.
papers.zh_title: 对住房密度的厌恶
papers.zh_abstract: 我们刻画了郊区房主对住房单元密度偏好的分布。为了衡量在反事实密度增加下的福利变化，我们首先构建了一种新颖的房屋层面密度暴露度量，并在边界断点设计中识别其价格效应。在最低地块面积要求较大的城市边界上，地块面积大3000平方英尺，房屋价格贵40000美元。我们利用这些断点引起的密度暴露系统性变化来估计价格效应。然后，我们将这些估计值与住房选择的结构性特征模型联系起来，以获取个人对密度的偏好。总体而言，我们发现现有房主因每英亩增加0.5个单元（相当于密度增加0.3个标准差）而平均福利损失约9500美元，而在仅由租赁单元引起的反事实增加下，损失显著更大。这些偏好也存在其他值得注意的异质性。大多数家庭对密度只有中等程度的偏好。中位福利损失仅为平均值的55%，这意味着存在一个对密度有更极端厌恶的长左尾。这个尾部不成比例地包含了富裕、低密度社区的家庭。总之，我们的结果记录了美国郊区密度管制需求的一个重要基础，我们希望这能为未来研究该政策的巨大成本提供有价值的输入。

papers.title: Ridesharing and Substance Use Disorder Treatment
papers.authors: Conor Lennon, Johanna Catherine Maclean, Keith F. Teltser
papers.abstract: We examine whether ridesharing provides a meaningful transportation alternative for those who require ongoing healthcare. Specifically, we combine variation in UberX entry across the U.S. with the Treatment Episode Data Set to estimate the effect of ridesharing on admissions to substance use disorder treatment. People needing such treatment report transportation as a barrier to receiving care. We find that UberX entry into a Core Based Statistical Area has no effect on the overall number of treatment admissions. However, we find a decline in non-intensive outpatient treatment which is fully offset by an increase in intensive outpatient treatment. Given the required relative frequency of non-intensive and intensive outpatient treatment in terms of visits per week, our findings indicate that UberX helps to reduce transportation barriers to accessing healthcare. Event-studies show parallel trends in outcomes before UberX entry and results are robust to numerous sensitivity checks.
papers.zh_title: 网约车与物质使用障碍治疗
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察网约车是否为需要持续医疗保健的人提供了有意义的交通替代方案。具体而言，我们将UberX在美国各地进入的差异与治疗事件数据集相结合，以估计网约车对物质使用障碍治疗入院人数的影响。需要此类治疗的人报告称交通是接受护理的障碍。我们发现，UberX进入一个核心基于统计区域对总体治疗入院人数没有影响。然而，我们发现非强化门诊治疗有所下降，这完全被强化门诊治疗的增加所抵消。考虑到非强化和强化门诊治疗在每周就诊次数方面的相对频率要求，我们的发现表明UberX有助于减少获取医疗保健的交通障碍。事件研究显示，在UberX进入之前，结果变量呈现平行趋势，并且结果对众多敏感性检验是稳健的。

papers.title: AI and Finance
papers.authors: Andrea L. Eisfeldt, Gregor Schubert
papers.abstract: We provide evidence that the development and adoption of Generative AI is driving a significant technological shift for firms and for financial research. We review the literature on the impact of ChatGPT on firm value and provide directions for future research investigating the impact of this major technology shock. Finally, we review and describe innovations in research methods linked to improvements in AI tools, along with their applications. We offer a practical introduction to available tools and advice for researchers interested in using these tools.
papers.zh_title: 人工智能与金融
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提供证据表明，生成式人工智能的开发和采用正在推动企业和金融研究的重大技术变革。我们回顾了关于ChatGPT对企业价值影响的文献，并为未来研究这一重大技术冲击的影响提供了方向。最后，我们回顾并描述了与人工智能工具改进相关的研究方法创新及其应用。我们为有兴趣使用这些工具的研究人员提供了可用工具的实用介绍和建议。

papers.title: Nonbinary and Transgender Identities and Earnings: Evidence from a National Census
papers.authors: Christopher S. Carpenter, Donn L. Feir, Krishna Pendakur, Casey Warman
papers.abstract: We provide the first evidence from a large population Census on earnings disparities experienced by nonbinary people—those who do not exclusively identify as men or women—and transgender people—those whose gender differs from their sex assigned at birth, relative to cisgender people. Using restricted-access 2021 Canadian Census data linked to tax records, we find that nonbinary individuals assigned male at birth, transgender men, transgender women, and cisgender women all earn significantly less than comparable cisgender men. Nonbinary individuals assigned female at birth experience an additional earnings penalty. Differences in job sorting explain a large share of these disparities.
papers.zh_title: 非二元和跨性别身份与收入：来自全国人口普查的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们首次提供了来自大规模人口普查的证据，关于非二元性别者（那些不纯粹认同为男性或女性的人）和跨性别者（那些性别与出生时指定性别不同的人）相对于顺性别者所经历的收入差距。利用与税务记录相关联的2021年加拿大人口普查受限访问数据，我们发现，出生时被指定为男性的非二元性别者、跨性别男性、跨性别女性和顺性别女性的收入均显著低于可比的顺性别男性。出生时被指定为女性的非二元性别者经历了额外的收入惩罚。工作分类差异解释了这些差距的很大一部分。

papers.title: Targeting the Gender Placement Gap: Marks versus Money
papers.authors: Pelin Akyol, Kala Krishna, Sergey Lychagin
papers.abstract: Using data from the Turkish University Entrance Exam, we investigate the extent of the gender gap in college placement, its underlying causes, and potential policy interventions. We estimate preferences using a novel approach which improves our ability to capture substitution patterns and find clear evidence that placement differences are primarily driven by preference differences across gender. We compare stipend subsidies to score bonuses that achieve gender parity. Score subsidies improve the welfare of women almost entirely at the cost of men with similar scores and favor high-income women. Stipend subsidies improve the welfare of women, but at little cost to men and favor low-income women. Our work is the first to show that how gender neutrality is achieved matters to society.
papers.zh_title: 瞄准性别录取差距：分数补贴与金钱奖励
papers.zh_abstract: 利用土耳其大学入学考试的数据，我们调查了大学录取中性别差距的程度、其根本原因以及潜在的政策干预措施。我们使用一种新颖的方法来估计偏好，该方法提高了我们捕捉替代模式的能力，并发现明确证据表明录取差异主要由性别间的偏好差异驱动。我们比较了实现性别平等的助学金补贴与分数奖励。分数补贴几乎完全以牺牲分数相近的男性为代价来提高女性的福利，并有利于高收入女性。助学金补贴提高了女性的福利，但对男性的成本很小，并有利于低收入女性。我们的工作是首次表明实现性别中性的方式对社会至关重要。

papers.title: Are Community College Students Increasingly Choosing High-Paying Fields of Study? Evidence from Massachusetts
papers.authors: Richard J. Murnane, John B. Willett, Aubrey McDonough, John P. Papay, Ann Mantil
papers.abstract: The labor-market payoff to workers with associate degrees in healthcare and STEM occupations is very high in Massachusetts. We examine whether this induced a growing proportion of students in MA community colleges (MACCs) to earn an associate degree (AD) in one of these fields. We do this by using multinomial logit analysis to compare trends across 12 cohorts of MACC entrants in the proportion of students who earned an AD in a healthcare or STEM program within six years of entry.
papers.zh_title: 社区大学学生是否越来越多地选择高薪专业？来自马萨诸塞州的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 在马萨诸塞州，拥有医疗保健和STEM职业副学士学位的工人的劳动力市场回报非常高。我们考察这是否导致马萨诸塞州社区大学中越来越多的学生选择在这些领域获得副学士学位。为此，我们使用多项逻辑回归分析，比较了12个马萨诸塞州社区大学入学队列中，在入学六年内获得医疗保健或STEM项目副学士学位的学生比例趋势。

papers.title: The Health and Employment Effects of Employer Vaccination Mandates
papers.authors: Ashvin Gandhi, Ian Larkin, Brian McGarry, Katherine Wen, Huizi Yu, Sarah Berry, Vincent Mor, Maggie Syme, Elizabeth White
papers.abstract: Health care facilities considering mandating staff vaccination face a difficult tradeoff. While additional vaccination coverage will directly reduce disease transmission within the facility, the imposition of a mandate may also cause vaccine-hesitant staff to quit, which could harm patient care. To study this tradeoff, we leverage comprehensive administrative data covering virtually all US nursing homes, including payroll-based records on approximately 500 million daily nurse shifts and weekly data on COVID transmission and mortality at each facility. We use a difference-in-differences framework to estimate the impact of employer-imposed vaccine mandates at 581 nursing homes on disease spread, employment outcomes, and several patient care metrics. While mandates did slightly increase staff turnover, the effects were concentrated on staff working less than 20 hours per week, and resulted in a reduction of less than two minutes per patient-day. Furthermore, there is only limited evidence of lower levels of care at mandate facilities in typically-monitored conditions such as patient falls, pressure ulcers, or urinary tract infections. In contrast, implementing a vaccine mandate led to large increases in staff vaccinations at mandate facilities, which directly led to less transmission of and lower patient mortality from COVID. We estimate that vaccine mandates saved one patient life for every two facilities that enacted a mandate, a large effect given the typical facility has around 100 beds. Our results suggest that the health benefits of mandates far outweigh the costs in terms of reduced patient care from staff turnover.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LS；JEL：I1, I10, I12, I18, J2, J28, J30
papers.zh_title: 雇主疫苗接种强制令的健康与就业效应
papers.zh_abstract: 考虑强制要求员工接种疫苗的医疗机构面临艰难的权衡。虽然额外的疫苗接种覆盖率将直接减少机构内的疾病传播，但强制令的实施也可能导致对疫苗犹豫的员工辞职，这可能损害患者护理。为了研究这种权衡，我们利用了覆盖几乎所有美国养老院的综合行政数据，包括基于工资单的约5亿个每日护士班次记录以及每个机构每周的新冠病毒传播和死亡率数据。我们使用双重差分框架来估计581家养老院雇主实施的疫苗强制令对疾病传播、就业结果和多项患者护理指标的影响。虽然强制令确实略微增加了员工流动率，但影响集中在每周工作少于20小时的员工，并导致每位患者每天护理时间减少不到两分钟。此外，在通常监测的条件下，如患者跌倒、压疮或尿路感染，强制令机构的护理水平下降证据有限。相比之下，实施疫苗强制令导致强制令机构的员工疫苗接种率大幅提高，这直接减少了新冠病毒的传播并降低了患者死亡率。我们估计，每两家实施强制令的机构就能挽救一名患者的生命，考虑到典型机构约有100张床位，这是一个很大的效果。我们的结果表明，强制令的健康益处远远超过因员工流动导致患者护理减少的成本。

papers.title: Perceived Political Bias of the Federal Reserve
papers.authors: Pei Kuang, Michael Weber, Shihan Xie
papers.abstract: We conduct a survey experiment with a large, politically representative sample of U.S. consumers (5,205 participants) to study how perceptions of the U.S. Federal Reserve’s (Fed) political stance shape macroeconomic expectations and trust in the Fed. The public is divided on the Fed’s political leaning: most Republican-leaning consumers believe the Fed favors Democrats, whereas most Democrat-leaning consumers perceive the Fed as favoring Republicans. Consumers who perceive the Fed as aligned with their political affiliations tend to (1) have a more positive outlook on current and future economic conditions and express higher trust in the institution, (2) show greater willingness to pay for and are more likely to receive Fed communications, and (3) assign significantly more weight to Fed communications when updating their inflation expectations. Strong in-group favoritism generally amplifies these effects. Finally, if Trump were elected U.S. president, consumers would overwhelmingly view the Fed as favoring Republicans. The proportion of consumers viewing the Fed as an in-group would remain stable, but its composition would shift: Democrat-leaning consumers would see the Fed as less of an in-group, whereas more Republican-leaning consumers would perceive it in this way. Likewise, overall public trust in the Fed would remain steady, but trust among Democrat-leaning consumers would decline significantly, whereas it would rise among Republican-leaning consumers.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：D72, D83, D84, E31, E7
papers.zh_title: 美联储的政治偏见感知
papers.zh_abstract: 我们针对一个大型、具有政治代表性的美国消费者样本（5205名参与者）开展了一项调查实验，研究公众对美联储政治立场的感知如何影响宏观经济预期和对美联储的信任。公众对美联储的政治倾向存在分歧：大多数倾向共和党的消费者认为美联储偏向民主党，而大多数倾向民主党的消费者则认为美联储偏向共和党。那些认为美联储与自己政治立场一致的消费者倾向于：（1）对当前和未来经济状况持更乐观态度，并对该机构表现出更高的信任度；（2）更愿意为美联储的沟通付费，也更有可能接收这些沟通；（3）在更新通胀预期时，会赋予美联储沟通信息显著更高的权重。强烈的内群体偏袒通常会放大这些效应。最后，如果特朗普当选美国总统，消费者将普遍认为美联储偏向共和党。认为美联储属于内群体的消费者比例将保持稳定，但其构成会发生变化：倾向民主党的消费者会认为美联储更不属于内群体，而更多倾向共和党的消费者则会持相反看法。同样，公众对美联储的整体信任度将保持稳定，但倾向民主党的消费者中的信任度将显著下降，而倾向共和党的消费者中的信任度则会上升。

papers.title: Taming the Curse of Dimensionality: Quantitative Economics with Deep Learning
papers.authors: Jesús Fernández-Villaverde, Galo Nuño, Jesse Perla
papers.abstract: We argue that deep learning provides a promising avenue for taming the curse of dimensionality in quantitative economics. We begin by exploring the unique challenges posed by solving dynamic equilibrium models, especially the feedback loop between individual agents' decisions and the aggregate consistency conditions required by equilibrium. Following this, we introduce deep neural networks and demonstrate their application by solving the stochastic neoclassical growth model. Next, we compare deep neural networks with traditional solution methods in quantitative economics. We conclude with a survey of neural network applications in quantitative economics and offer reasons for cautious optimism.
papers.zh_title: 驯服维度灾难：基于深度学习的数量经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 我们认为深度学习为驯服数量经济学中的维度灾难提供了一条有前景的途径。我们首先探讨了求解动态均衡模型所面临的独特挑战，特别是个体代理人决策与均衡所需的总体一致性条件之间的反馈循环。随后，我们介绍了深度神经网络，并通过求解随机新古典增长模型来展示其应用。接着，我们将深度神经网络与数量经济学中的传统求解方法进行了比较。最后，我们综述了神经网络在数量经济学中的应用，并给出了谨慎乐观的理由。

papers.title: Robots and Labor in Nursing Homes
papers.authors: Yong Suk Lee, Toshiaki Iizuka, Karen Eggleston
papers.abstract: How do employment, tasks, and productivity change with robot adoption? Unlike manufacturing, little is known about these issues in the service sector, where robot adoption is expanding. As a first step towards filling this gap, we study Japanese nursing homes using original facility-level panel data that includes the different robots used and the tasks performed. We find that robot adoption is accompanied by an increase in employment and retention and the relationship is strongest for non-regular care workers and monitoring robots. The share of specific tasks performed by robots increases with the adoption of the respective type of robot, leading to reallocation of care worker effort to “human touch” tasks that support quality care. Robots are associated with improved quality (reduction in restraint use and pressure ulcers) and productivity.
papers.zh_title: 养老院中的机器人与劳动力
papers.zh_abstract: 就业、任务和生产率如何随机器人采用而变化？与制造业不同，在机器人采用正在扩大的服务业中，我们对这些问题知之甚少。作为填补这一空白的第一步，我们利用包含所使用不同机器人和所执行任务的原始机构层面面板数据，研究了日本的养老院。我们发现，机器人采用伴随着就业率和留任率的提高，这种关系对于非正式护理工人和监控机器人最为显著。特定任务由机器人执行的份额随着相应类型机器人的采用而增加，导致护理工人的努力重新分配到支持优质护理的“人际接触”任务上。机器人还与质量改善（约束使用和压疮的减少）以及生产率提高相关联。

papers.title: Two Wrongs Can Sometimes Make a Right: The Environmental Benefits of Market Power in Oil
papers.authors: John Asker, Allan Collard-Wexler, Charlotte De Canniere, Jan De Loecker, Christopher R. Knittel
papers.abstract: Market power reduces equilibrium quantities and distorts production, typically causing welfare losses. However, as Buchanan (1969) noted, market power may mitigate overproduction from negative externalities. This paper examines this in the global oil market, where OPEC’s market power affects oil production and carbon intensity. We estimate that from 1970 to 2021, OPEC’s market power reduced emissions by over 67 GtCO2, equating to $4,073 billion in climate damages and 17.8% of the carbon budget needed for the 1.5◦ C Paris Agreement target. This environmental benefit outweighs the welfare loss from distorted production allocation.
papers.zh_title: 两个错误有时能成就一个正确：石油市场势力的环境效益
papers.zh_abstract: 市场势力会减少均衡产量并扭曲生产，通常导致福利损失。然而，正如Buchanan（1969）所指出的，市场势力可能缓解由负外部性导致的过度生产。本文在全球石油市场中检验了这一观点，其中欧佩克的市场势力影响着石油产量和碳强度。我们估计，从1970年到2021年，欧佩克的市场势力减少了超过67 GtCO2的排放，相当于40,730亿美元的气候损害，以及实现《巴黎协定》1.5°C目标所需碳预算的17.8%。这一环境效益超过了因扭曲生产分配而造成的福利损失。

papers.title: Industry and Identity: The Migration Linkage Between Economic and Cultural Change in 19th Century Britain
papers.authors: Vasiliki Fouka, Theo Serlin
papers.abstract: How does economic modernization affect group identity? Modernization theory emphasizes how labor migration led to the adoption of common identities. Yet economic development may reduce incentives to emigrate, preserving local cultures. We study England and Wales during the Second Industrial Revolution, a period characterized by the development of new industries and declines in transportation and communication costs. Using microdata on individuals’ names and migration decisions, we quantify identity change and its variation across space. We develop and estimate a quantitative spatial model in which migration and cultural identities are inter-dependent. Different components of economic modernization had different effects on identity change. Falling migration costs homogenized peripheral regions. In contrast, industrial development led to heterogeneity, increasing the overall prevalence of the culture of London, while also creating local identity holdouts by reducing out-migration from industrializing peripheries. Modernization promotes both national identities and persistent local identities in peripheral regions that industrialize.
papers.zh_title: 产业与身份：19世纪英国经济与文化变迁的迁移关联
papers.zh_abstract: 经济现代化如何影响群体身份？现代化理论强调劳动力迁移如何导致共同身份的采纳。然而，经济发展可能减少移民的激励，从而保护地方文化。我们研究了第二次工业革命期间的英格兰和威尔士，这一时期以新产业发展以及交通和通讯成本下降为特征。利用关于个人姓名和迁移决策的微观数据，我们量化了身份变化及其空间差异。我们开发并估计了一个定量空间模型，其中迁移和文化身份相互依赖。经济现代化的不同组成部分对身份变化产生了不同影响。下降的迁移成本使边缘地区同质化。相比之下，产业发展导致了异质性，既增加了伦敦文化的整体流行度，也通过减少工业化边缘地区的向外迁移而创造了地方身份的坚守者。现代化既促进了国家身份，也促进了工业化边缘地区持久的地方身份。

papers.title: Is Free Trade Good for Renewable Resources: Brander & Taylor Redux
papers.authors: M. Scott Taylor
papers.abstract: This paper generalizes the original Brander and Taylor model of open-access renewable resource use and trade to address three common critiques. First, I introduce heterogeneity across agents in harvesting productivity to smooth out the model's extreme specialization patterns while maintaining its Ricardian structure and tractability. Second, I move beyond the original assumption of open access by constructing a policy stringency function allowing for partial, first-best, and endogenous resource policy. Third, by exploiting the smooth substitution possibilities generated by agent heterogeneity and the insight that policy stringency functions are likely to vary across countries, I show how the model's core predictions can be evaluated using empirical methods related to those in growth econometrics.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, ITI；JEL：F11, F18, F64, Q20, Q27
papers.zh_title: 自由贸易对可再生资源有益吗：布兰德与泰勒再探讨
papers.zh_abstract: 本文对布兰德和泰勒关于开放获取可再生资源利用与贸易的原始模型进行了推广，以回应三项常见批评。首先，我在收获生产率方面引入代理人异质性，以平滑模型中的极端专业化模式，同时保持其李嘉图结构和可处理性。其次，我通过构建一个政策严格度函数，突破了原始模型对开放获取的假设，该函数允许部分、最优和内生资源政策。第三，通过利用代理人异质性带来的平滑替代可能性以及政策严格度函数可能因国家而异的洞察，我展示了如何运用与增长计量经济学相关的方法来评估模型的核心预测。

papers.title: Short-Time Work Extensions
papers.authors: Christina Brinkmann, Simon Jäger, Moritz Kuhn, Farzad Saidi, Stefanie Wolter
papers.abstract: Governments use short-time work (STW) schemes to subsidize job retention. A key policy lever during crises is the extension of potential benefit duration (PBD)—how long firms can receive STW subsidies. Using unique German administrative data from 2009 to 2021, we show that separations rise and employment falls when firms exhaust benefits. Yet the uptick in separations at exhaustion almost entirely reflects job-to-job moves rather than transitions into unemployment, even in slack labor markets, consistent with STW delaying reallocation rather than preventing unemployment. We develop a model to analyze exogenous shifts in PBD and show that wage flexibility can substitute for longer benefit duration. Exploiting a 2012 reform that doubled the PBD from six to twelve months, we find no evidence that the extension prevented unemployment and, if anything, reduced reallocation to other firms. In line with the model, firms without extensions reduced wages relative to those with extended support, and across labor market cells, larger wage adjustments coincide with smaller employment losses. Our findings imply that STW extensions operated mainly as wage subsidies rather than job-saving measures.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, CF, EFG, LS, PE；JEL：E24, G32, H20, J2, J63, J65
papers.zh_title: 短时工作延期
papers.zh_abstract: 政府使用短时工作计划来补贴就业保留。危机期间的一个关键政策杠杆是延长潜在福利期限——即企业可以领取短时工作补贴的时长。利用2009年至2021年独特的德国行政数据，我们表明当企业福利耗尽时，离职率上升而就业下降。然而，在福利耗尽时离职率的上升几乎完全反映了工作转换而非向失业的转变，即使在劳动力市场疲软时也是如此，这与短时工作延迟了重新配置而非防止失业的观点一致。我们开发了一个模型来分析福利期限的外生变化，并表明工资灵活性可以替代更长的福利期限。利用2012年一项将福利期限从六个月翻倍至十二个月的改革，我们没有发现延期防止失业的证据，反而发现它减少了向其他企业的重新配置。与模型一致，未获得延期的企业相对于获得延期支持的企业降低了工资，并且在劳动力市场单元中，较大的工资调整伴随着较小的就业损失。我们的发现表明，短时工作延期主要作为工资补贴而非就业保护措施运作。

papers.title: The Mental Health of the Young in Latin America
papers.authors: David G. Blanchflower, Alex Bryson
papers.abstract: We examine the mental wellbeing of the young in 18 Latin American countries using data from five cross-country comparative studies plus cross-sectional and quarterly time series data for a single country, Mexico. We examine whether there has been a decline in youth mental health and, if so, whether it has removed the U-shape in happiness and the hump-shape in unhappiness in Latin America as it has done in the United States and elsewhere. In the Global Minds data, the mental health of the young is poorer than that of older age groups. The Enbiare surveys for Mexico indicate that declining wellbeing of the young has changed the age profile of (un)happiness in that country. The OECD’s Programme for International Student Assessment (PISA) data show a decline in the mental health of school children in Latin America, and that mental ill-health is more pronounced among those who have early access to, or spend excessive time spent on, digital devices. However, in both the Gallup World Poll and the Latinobarometers the young remain happier than older age groups, even though the wellbeing of the young has declined in some Latin American countries. We speculate as to why there may be differences in trends across surveys.
papers.zh_title: 拉丁美洲年轻人的心理健康
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用来自五项跨国比较研究的数据，以及墨西哥一个国家的横截面和季度时间序列数据，考察了18个拉丁美洲国家年轻人的心理健康状况。我们检验了年轻人心理健康是否出现下降，如果是，这种下降是否像在美国和其他地方那样，消除了拉丁美洲幸福感的U形曲线和不幸福感的驼峰形曲线。在全球心智数据中，年轻人的心理健康状况比老年群体更差。墨西哥的恩比亚雷调查表明，年轻人幸福感的下降改变了该国（不）幸福感的年龄分布。经合组织国际学生评估项目数据显示，拉丁美洲学龄儿童的心理健康状况下降，并且心理健康问题在那些早期接触或过度使用数字设备的人群中更为突出。然而，在盖洛普世界民意调查和拉丁美洲晴雨表中，年轻人仍然比老年群体更幸福，尽管在一些拉丁美洲国家年轻人的幸福感有所下降。我们推测了不同调查之间趋势可能存在差异的原因。

papers.title: Carbon Burden
papers.authors: Lubos Pastor, Robert F. Stambaugh, Lucian A. Taylor
papers.abstract: We compute the U.S. corporate sector’s “carbon burden”—the present value of social costs of future carbon emissions. Our baseline estimate is 131% of total corporate equity value. Meeting the Paris Agreement goals would reduce the burden by roughly one-fourth, but emissions forecasts and firms’ own targets fall short of that reduction. 13% of firms have carbon burdens exceeding their market capitalizations, even with indirect emissions excluded. Firms with higher carbon burdens have higher costs of capital, even after controlling for past emissions. Only a small fraction of the burden is priced through that channel, however.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EEE；JEL：D62, G30, G38, Q51, Q54
papers.zh_title: 碳负担
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过计算美国企业部门的“碳负担”——其未来碳排放社会成本的现值——来量化其未来的碳损害。我们的基线估计显示，碳负担占企业总股权价值的131%。即使排除间接排放，仍有13%的企业的碳负担超过其市值。前30大排放企业占据了美国企业到2050年预测的所有脱碳量。预测的减排量，甚至企业的目标，都未能达到《巴黎协定》的要求。碳负担已被定价：碳负担较高的企业具有更高的资本成本，即使在控制过去排放的情况下也是如此。

papers.title: The Complexity of Economic Decisions
papers.authors: Xavier Gabaix, Thomas Graeber
papers.abstract: We propose a theory of the complexity of economic decisions. Leveraging a macroeconomic framework of production functions, we conceptualize the mind as a cognitive economy, where a task's complexity is determined by its composition of cognitive operations. Complexity emerges as the inverse of the total factor productivity of thinking about a task. It increases in the number of importance-weighted components and decreases in the degree to which the effect of one or few components on the optimal action dominates. Higher complexity generates larger decision errors and behavioral attenuation to variation in problem parameters. The model applies both to continuous and discrete choice. We develop a theory-guided experimental methodology for measuring subjective perceptions of complexity that is simple and portable. A series of experiments test and confirm the central predictions of our model for perceptions of complexity, behavioral attenuation, and decision errors. We provide a template for applying the framework to core economic decision domains, and then develop several applications including the complexity of static consumption choice with one or several interacting goods, consumption over time, the tax system, forecasting, and discrete choice between goods.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, PE；JEL：C91, D03, D11, D14, D90, E03
papers.zh_title: 经济决策的复杂性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种关于经济决策复杂性的理论。利用生产函数的宏观经济框架，我们将心智概念化为一个认知经济体，其中任务的复杂性由其认知操作的构成决定。复杂性表现为思考一项任务的全要素生产率的倒数。它随着重要性加权组成部分的数量增加而增加，并随着一个或少数几个组成部分对最优行动的影响占主导地位的程度增加而减少。更高的复杂性会产生更大的决策错误和对问题参数变化的行为衰减。该模型适用于连续选择和离散选择。我们开发了一种理论指导的实验方法，用于测量复杂性的主观感知，该方法简单且可移植。一系列实验检验并证实了我们模型关于复杂性感知、行为衰减和决策错误的核心预测。我们提供了一个将该框架应用于核心经济决策领域的模板，然后开发了几个应用，包括具有一个或多个相互作用商品的静态消费选择、跨期消费、税收体系、预测以及商品之间的离散选择的复杂性。

papers.title: Gambling Away Stability: Sports Betting’s Impact on Vulnerable Households
papers.authors: Scott R. Baker, Justin Balthrop, Mark J. Johnson, Jason D. Kotter, Kevin Pisciotta
papers.abstract: We estimate the causal effect of online sports betting on households' investment, spending, and debt management decisions using household transaction data and a staggered difference-in-differences framework. Following legalization, sports betting spreads quickly, with both the number of participants and frequency of bets increasing over time. This increase does not displace other gambling or consumption but significantly reduces savings, as risky bets crowd out positive expected value investments. These effects concentrate among financially constrained households, as credit card debt increases, available credit decreases, and overdraft frequency rises. Our findings highlight the potential adverse effects of online sports betting on vulnerable households.
papers.zh_title: 赌博侵蚀稳定：体育博彩对弱势家庭的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用家庭交易数据和交错双重差分框架，估计了在线体育博彩对家庭投资、支出和债务管理决策的因果效应。在合法化之后，体育博彩迅速蔓延，参与者和下注频率都随时间增加。这种增加并未取代其他赌博或消费，但显著减少了储蓄，因为风险赌注挤出了正期望值的投资。这些影响集中在财务受限的家庭中，表现为信用卡债务增加、可用信贷减少以及透支频率上升。我们的发现凸显了在线体育博彩对弱势家庭的潜在不利影响。

papers.title: Information Discovery for Industrial Policy
papers.authors: Michael Sockin, Wei Xiong
papers.abstract: Amid growing interest in industrial policy, we develop a model exploring the tension between market-driven information discovery and policymakers’ career incentives. While market-based information discovery can help address informational barriers faced by policymakers, career incentives may lead them to aggressively pursue their agendas to signal political capability, shifting dynamics toward a government-centric equilibrium. In this equilibrium, market participants focus on policy-related information over industry fundamentals, weakening the market’s role in information discovery and reducing policy efficiency. Our analysis highlights the importance of bureaucratic frictions and market-based information discovery in jointly shaping the effectiveness of industrial policy implementation.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, DEV, IO, POL；JEL：D84, L59, P0
papers.zh_title: 产业政策的信息发现
papers.zh_abstract: 在产业政策日益受到关注的背景下，我们构建了一个模型，探讨市场驱动的信息发现与政策制定者职业激励之间的张力。虽然基于市场的信息发现有助于解决政策制定者面临的信息障碍，但职业激励可能促使他们积极推行议程以展示政治能力，从而将动态转向以政府为中心的均衡。在这种均衡中，市场参与者更关注政策相关信息而非行业基本面，削弱了市场在信息发现中的作用，并降低了政策效率。我们的分析强调了官僚摩擦和市场驱动的信息发现在共同塑造产业政策实施有效性方面的重要性。

papers.title: Current Account Dynamics and the Saving-Investment Nexus In a Changing and Uncertain World
papers.authors: Menzie D. Chinn, Hiro Ito
papers.abstract: We re‐examine the determinants of current account balances (CAB) and the saving-investment nexus with focus on emerging market and developing economies (EMDEs). We are in a new age in terms of facing not just economic challenges but also other non-economic challenges such as global climate changes, increasing natural disasters, and wars. We face the need to reexamine the determinants of CAB along with national saving and investment. We first take an event study approach, examining how these variables have evolved historically in the wake of wars, natural disasters, and pandemics. The second is a cross‐country panel investigation of CAB, national saving, and of investment. In the presence of global financial instability, EMDEs tend to experience an improvement in CAB due to a fall in investment. A rise in oil prices increases both national saving and investment, but the change in investment is greater than the change in national saving, which worsens CAB. Contractionary monetary policy by the U.S. Federal Reserve Board tends to lower both national saving and investment, but the impact on CAB is not statistically different from zero. The more frequently a country experiences wars, on average, its CAB tends to improve. When a climatological or geographical disaster occurs, its CAB, national saving, and investment tend to improve. A rise in the level of U.S. monetary policy uncertainty leads to an improvement in CAB, mainly due to a fall in investment.
papers.zh_title: 变化与不确定世界中的经常账户动态与储蓄-投资关系
papers.zh_abstract: 我们重新审视了经常账户余额的决定因素以及储蓄-投资关系，重点关注新兴市场和发展中经济体。我们正处在一个新时代，不仅面临经济挑战，还面临其他非经济挑战，如全球气候变化、日益增多的自然灾害和战争。我们需要重新审视经常账户余额以及国民储蓄和投资的决定因素。我们首先采用事件研究方法，考察这些变量在战争、自然灾害和大流行之后的历史演变。其次是关于经常账户余额、国民储蓄和投资的跨国面板研究。在全球金融不稳定的情况下，新兴市场和发展中经济体由于投资下降，经常账户余额往往改善。油价上涨同时增加了国民储蓄和投资，但投资的变化大于国民储蓄的变化，从而恶化了经常账户余额。美联储的紧缩性货币政策倾向于降低国民储蓄和投资，但对经常账户余额的影响在统计上不显著。一个国家经历战争的频率越高，其经常账户余额平均而言往往改善。当发生气候或地理灾害时，其经常账户余额、国民储蓄和投资往往改善。美国货币政策不确定性水平的上升导致经常账户余额改善，这主要是由于投资下降。

papers.title: Using Policy and Innovation to Improve Life-Saving Access to Naloxone
papers.authors: Evan D. Peet, David Powell, Rosalie Liccardo Pacula
papers.abstract: Naloxone is a life-saving medication which helps reverse the effects of an opioid overdose. Improving naloxone access is a central pillar of the federal response to the worsening opioid crisis in the United States. Existing studies have evaluated the effects of state naloxone access laws, including those that permit naloxone to be dispensed by pharmacies directly to consumers. However, this literature has ignored the role of pharmaceutical innovations like Narcan. Narcan, introduced to the marketplace in February 2016, is a naloxone nasal spray that permits laypersons to successfully administer the drug without training. We first test the hypothesis that naloxone access laws alone increased the distribution of naloxone prior to Narcan, followed by testing the hypothesis that the introduction of Narcan further expanded naloxone’s distribution and its life-saving impacts. We analyze cross-state variation in the adoption of naloxone access laws and their timing relative to Narcan’s introduction. We find that states with naloxone access laws permitting pharmacists to dispense to consumers experienced substantially greater naloxone dispensing after Narcan’s introduction, effects that far outpaced the independent effects of the laws themselves. We also find that while these naloxone access laws did not reduce non-synthetic opioid-related mortality rates on their own, once Narcan was introduced, these mortality rates significantly declined. These findings indicate the important interaction of innovation and policy.
papers.zh_title: 利用政策与创新改善纳洛酮的救命可及性
papers.zh_abstract: 纳洛酮是一种有助于逆转阿片类药物过量影响的救命药物。改善纳洛酮的可及性是联邦政府应对美国日益恶化的阿片类药物危机的核心支柱。现有研究评估了各州纳洛酮获取法律的效果，包括那些允许药房直接向消费者配发纳洛酮的法律。然而，这些文献忽略了像Narcan这样的药物创新的作用。Narcan于2016年2月上市，是一种纳洛酮鼻喷雾剂，允许非专业人士无需培训即可成功施用该药物。我们首先检验了在Narcan出现之前，仅凭纳洛酮获取法律就增加了纳洛酮分发的假设，随后检验了Narcan的引入进一步扩大了纳洛酮分发及其救命效果的假设。我们分析了各州在采纳纳洛酮获取法律方面的差异及其相对于Narcan引入的时间安排。我们发现，在Narcan引入后，那些允许药剂师向消费者配发纳洛酮的州，其纳洛酮配发量显著增加，其效果远超法律本身的独立效应。我们还发现，虽然这些纳洛酮获取法律本身并未降低非合成阿片类药物相关的死亡率，但一旦Narcan被引入，这些死亡率显著下降。这些发现表明了创新与政策的重要相互作用。

papers.title: Unwarranted Disparity in High-Stakes Decisions: Race Measurement and Policy Responses
papers.authors: E. Jason Baron, Joseph J. Doyle Jr., Natalia Emanuel, Peter Hull, Joseph P. Ryan
papers.abstract: Studies of racial discrimination often condition on endogenous measures of race or on earlier decisions that might themselves be affected by discrimination. We develop quasi-experimental tools for estimating the impact of racial misclassification on measures of unwarranted disparity, and for designing policy responses to unwarranted disparity that account for discrimination in earlier decisions. We apply these tools to the setting of child protective services (CPS), where previous work in our context has found that Black children are placed into foster care at higher rates than white children with identical potential for future maltreatment. CPS investigators misclassify 8–9% of Black and white children relative to their self-reported race, and this misclassification obscures around 24% of unwarranted disparity in foster care placement decisions. Policies that use algorithmic recommendations to eliminate total unwarranted disparity in placement rates are also meaningfully affected by earlier discrimination in CPS call screening.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, LS, PE；JEL：C26, I31, J13, J15
papers.zh_title: 高风险决策中的不当差异：种族测量与政策回应
papers.zh_abstract: 关于种族歧视的研究通常以内生的种族测量指标或可能本身受歧视影响的早期决策为条件。我们开发了准实验工具，用于估计种族错误分类对不当差异测量指标的影响，以及设计针对不当差异的政策回应，这些政策回应需考虑早期决策中的歧视。我们将这些工具应用于儿童保护服务（CPS）的背景下，在该背景下，先前的研究发现，与未来虐待风险相同的白人儿童相比，黑人儿童被安置到寄养机构的比率更高。CPS调查员相对于儿童自我报告的种族，错误分类了8-9%的黑人和白人儿童，这种错误分类掩盖了大约24%的寄养安置决策中的不当差异。使用算法建议来消除安置率中总不当差异的政策，也显著受到CPS呼叫筛查中早期歧视的影响。

papers.title: The ECB’s Climate Activities and Public Trust
papers.authors: Sandra Eickmeier, Luba Petersen
papers.abstract: As central banks, including the European Central Bank (ECB), adopt climate-related responsibilities, gauging public support becomes essential. Drawing on a June 2023 Bundesbank household survey, we find that 69% of households report increased trust in the ECB due to its climate actions, valuing the institution's broader scope and concern. While 17% and 20% of households express concerns over risks to price stability or independence, 23% believe climate engagement reinforces the ECB's core objectives. An information intervention indicates minimal impact on household inflation expectations, suggesting a disconnect between institutional trust and inflation outlooks. An internal survey reveals that central bankers accurately gauge trust impacts but tend to overestimate effects on inflation expectations. Overall, our findings indicate broad public support for the ECB’s climate initiatives.
papers.zh_title: 欧洲央行的气候活动与公众信任
papers.zh_abstract: 随着包括欧洲央行（ECB）在内的中央银行承担与气候相关的责任，评估公众支持变得至关重要。基于2023年6月的德国央行家庭调查，我们发现69%的家庭报告称，由于欧洲央行的气候行动，他们对欧洲央行的信任度有所提高，他们看重该机构更广泛的职责范围和关切。虽然17%和20%的家庭对价格稳定或独立性面临的风险表示担忧，但23%的家庭认为气候参与强化了欧洲央行的核心目标。一项信息干预表明，对家庭通胀预期的影响微乎其微，这表明机构信任与通胀前景之间存在脱节。一项内部调查显示，央行官员准确评估了信任影响，但倾向于高估对通胀预期的影响。总体而言，我们的研究结果表明公众广泛支持欧洲央行的气候倡议。

papers.title: Deficits and Inflation: HANK meets FTPL
papers.authors: George-Marios Angeletos, Chen Lian, Christian K. Wolf
papers.abstract: In the Fiscal Theory of the Price Level (FTPL), households are Ricardian, so fiscal deficits drive output and inflation only when the fiscal authority is “active” or “dominant.” In the Heterogeneous Agent New Keynesian (HANK) paradigm, households are instead non-Ricardian, so deficits invariably drive aggregate demand, and thereby also inflation, now through classical wealth or liquidity effects. Because of this difference, HANK is free of the FTPL’s fragilities and controversies. Despite this difference, HANK actually reproduces the FTPL’s quantitative predictions regarding the relation between deficits and inflation, provided that two testable conditions are met: that marginal propensities to consume are high, consistent with microeconomic evidence; and that deficits are not accompanied by interest rate or tax hikes in the near term, as was the case post-2021.
papers.zh_title: 赤字与通胀：HANK模型遇上FTPL理论
papers.zh_abstract: 在价格水平的财政理论（FTPL）中，家庭是李嘉图式的，因此财政赤字仅在关于哪个政策当局是“活跃”或“主导”的难以检验的假设下才驱动产出和通胀。在异质性代理人新凯恩斯（HANK）范式中，家庭反而是非李嘉图式的，因此赤字通过经典的财富效应或流动性效应驱动总需求，从而也驱动通胀。由于这一差异，HANK模型摆脱了FTPL的脆弱性和争议。尽管存在这种差异，HANK模型实际上再现了FTPL关于赤字与通胀之间关系的核心经验预测。即使对于最极端的FTPL情景——即无资金支持的赤字完全由通胀引发的债务侵蚀来融资——也是如此。然而，在实践中，赤字融资的财政刺激有助于扩大产出，从而增加税收收入，这可以替代债务侵蚀并缓和相关的通胀压力。

papers.title: Unbalanced Trade: Is Growing Dispersion from Financial or Trade Reforms?
papers.authors: George A. Alessandria, Yan Bai, Soo Kyung Woo
papers.abstract: We study the reasons for the large, coincident increases in unbalanced international trade and overall trade from 1970 to 2019. We show that these two salient features—a rise in net and gross international trade—are largely a consequence of a reduction in intratemporal trade barriers rather than a substantial reduction in the frictions on intertemporal trade or greater asymmetries in business cycles. Beyond explaining changes in the distribution of gross and net trade, the decline in intratemporal trade frictions is consistent with a fall in the dispersion across countries in other key macro time series, including the real exchange rate, terms of trade, export-import ratio, relative spending, and relative GDP.
papers.zh_title: 失衡贸易：日益加剧的分散性源于金融改革还是贸易改革？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了1970年至2019年间国际收支失衡和总体贸易大幅同步增长的原因。我们表明，这两个显著特征——国际贸易净额和总额的上升——在很大程度上是期内贸易壁垒减少的结果，而非跨期贸易摩擦大幅减少或商业周期不对称性加剧的结果。除了解释总贸易和净贸易分布的变化外，期内贸易摩擦的下降与其他关键宏观经济时间序列（包括实际汇率、贸易条件、进出口比率、相对支出和相对GDP）在国家间分散性的下降是一致的。

papers.title: Did Tariffs Make American Manufacturing Great? New Evidence from the Gilded Age
papers.authors: Alexander Klein, Christopher M. Meissner
papers.abstract: We study the relationship between tariffs and labor productivity in US manufacturing between 1870 and 1909. Using highly dis-aggregated tariff data, state-industry data for the manufacturing sector, and an instrumental variable strategy, results show that tariffs reduced labor productivity. Tariffs also generally reduced the average size of establishments within an industry but raised output prices, value-added, gross output, employment, and the number of establishments. We also find evidence of heterogeneity in the association between tariffs and value added, gross output, employment, and establishments across groups of industries. We conclude that tariffs may have reduced labor productivity in manufacturing by weakening import competition and by inducing entry of smaller, less productive domestic firms. Our research also reveals that lobbying by powerful and productive industries may have been at play. The era’s high tariffs are unlikely to have helped the US become a globally competitive manufacturer.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, ITI；JEL：F13, F15, N11, O14, O47
papers.zh_title: 关税是否让美国制造业再次伟大？来自镀金时代的新证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了1870年至1909年间美国制造业关税与劳动生产率之间的关系。使用高度细化的关税数据、制造业部门的州-行业数据以及工具变量策略，结果表明关税降低了劳动生产率。关税通常也降低了行业内企业的平均规模，但提高了产出价格、增加值、总产出、就业和企业数量。我们还发现，在不同行业组别中，关税与增加值、总产出、就业和企业数量之间的关联存在异质性证据。我们得出结论，关税可能通过削弱进口竞争以及诱导规模更小、生产率更低的本土企业进入，从而降低了制造业的劳动生产率。我们的研究还揭示，强大且高生产率的行业可能进行了游说活动。该时代的高关税不太可能帮助美国成为具有全球竞争力的制造商。

papers.title: The GDPR and SDK Usage In Android Mobile Apps
papers.authors: Ginger Zhe Jin, Ziqiao Liu, Liad Wagman
papers.abstract: Using data on Software Development Kits (SDKs), we study SDKs in Android apps vis-à-vis the adoption of the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) by the European Union in May 2018. Relative to US-only apps, the number of non-Google SDKs used per app in 5 major European countries (EU5) exhibits a 1.3% decline in EU5-only apps after GDPR, and a 6.3% decline in apps multihoming US and EU5. These effects are mostly driven by lower-ranked apps. Using apps’ monthly active users as weights in computing average user exposure to SDKs in app category and country groups, we find no significant change in the average SDK exposure in EU5-only relative to US-only apps. The only significant change in multihoming apps is a 4.2% drop in exposure to SDKs developed by minor SDK providers, although SDKs from Google and major SDK providers were independently assessed as riskier than those from minor SDK providers.
papers.zh_title: 《通用数据保护条例》与安卓移动应用中的软件开发工具包使用
papers.zh_abstract: 利用软件开发工具包（SDK）的数据，我们研究了安卓应用中的SDK使用情况与欧盟于2018年5月采纳《通用数据保护条例》（GDPR）之间的关系。相对于仅在美国上线的应用，在GDPR之后，仅在欧盟五国（EU5）上线的应用中每个应用使用的非谷歌SDK数量下降了1.3%，而在美国和欧盟五国同时上线的应用中则下降了6.3%。这些效应主要由排名较低的应用驱动。以应用的月活跃用户为权重，计算应用类别和国家组中用户对SDK的平均暴露程度，我们发现，相对于仅在美国上线的应用，仅在欧盟五国上线的应用中用户对SDK的平均暴露程度没有显著变化。在同时上线的应用中，唯一显著的变化是用户对小型SDK提供商开发的SDK的暴露程度下降了4.2%，尽管来自谷歌和主要SDK提供商的SDK被独立评估为比来自小型SDK提供商的SDK风险更高。

papers.title: The China Shock Revisited: Job Reallocation and Industry Switching in U.S. Labor Markets
papers.authors: Nicholas Bloom, Kyle Handley, André Kurmann, Philip A. Luck
papers.abstract: Using confidential administrative data from the U.S. Census Bureau we revisit how the rise in Chinese import penetration has reshaped U.S. local labor markets. Local labor markets more exposed to the China shock experienced larger reallocation from manufacturing to services jobs. Most of this reallocation occurred within firms that simultaneously contracted manufacturing operations while expanding employment in services. Notably, about 40% of the manufacturing job loss effect is due to continuing establishments switching their primary activity from manufacturing to trade-related services such as research, management, and wholesale. The effects of Chinese import penetration vary by local labor market characteristics. In areas with high human capital, including much of the West Coast and large cities, job reallocation from manufacturing to services has been substantial. In areas with low human capital and a high initial manufacturing share, including much of the Midwest and the South, we find limited job reallocation. We estimate this differential response to the China shock accounts for half of the 1997-2007 job growth gap between these regions.
papers.zh_title: 再探中国冲击：美国劳动力市场中的就业再配置与行业转换
papers.zh_abstract: 利用美国人口普查局的机密行政数据，我们重新审视了中国进口渗透率上升如何重塑美国地方劳动力市场。受中国冲击影响更大的地方劳动力市场经历了从制造业岗位向服务业岗位更大的再配置。这种再配置大部分发生在同时收缩制造业运营并扩大服务业就业的企业内部。值得注意的是，约40%的制造业岗位损失效应是由于持续经营的企业将其主要活动从制造业转向贸易相关服务业（如研究、管理和批发）所致。中国进口渗透率的影响因地方劳动力市场特征而异。在人力资本高的地区，包括西海岸大部分地区和大城市，从制造业到服务业的就业再配置规模巨大。在人力资本低且初始制造业份额高的地区，包括中西部和南部大部分地区，我们发现就业再配置有限。我们估计，对中国冲击的这种差异化反应解释了1997年至2007年间这些地区之间就业增长差距的一半。

papers.title: Everyone Steps Back? The Widespread Retraction of Crowd-Funding Support for Minority Creators when Migration Fear is High
papers.authors: John (Jianqiu) Bai, William R. Kerr, Chi Wan, Alptug Y. Yorulmaz
papers.abstract: We study funding gaps on Kickstarter across multiple ethnic groups from 2009-2021. Scaling the concept of racially salient events, we quantify the close co-movement of minority funding gaps in crowd-funding to inflamed political rhetoric surrounding migration. The funding gap for minorities more than doubles in the most inflamed periods compared to baseline. Results are especially acute for Hispanic creators. Distant, mostly white backers are typically important for projects reaching a critical threshold of funding support. Retractions in support for minority creators during tense periods are even spatially, as present in liberal cities as conservative ones.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, LS, PR；JEL：D26, G23, J15, L26, M13
papers.zh_title: 人人退后？当移民恐惧高涨时，众筹对少数族裔创作者的支持普遍撤回
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了2009年至2021年间Kickstarter上多个族裔群体的资金缺口。通过扩展种族显著事件的概念，我们量化了少数族裔在众筹中的资金缺口与围绕移民的激烈政治言论之间的紧密联动关系。与基线相比，在政治言论最激烈的时期，少数族裔的资金缺口增加了一倍以上。对于西班牙裔创作者而言，结果尤为严重。通常，来自远方、主要是白人的支持者对于项目达到关键资金支持门槛至关重要。在紧张时期，对少数族裔创作者的支持撤回在空间上也是普遍的，在自由派城市和保守派城市中同样存在。

papers.title: Willingness-To-Pay vs Administrative Hurdles: Understanding Barriers to Social Insurance Enrollment in Thailand
papers.authors: Benjamin A. Olken, Rema Hanna, Phitawat Poonpolkul, Nada Wasi
papers.abstract: Many government social insurance policies have low take-up. To understand whether this is due to administrative barriers, information, or low valuation of the insurance, we study an unusual policy experiment in Thailand that offered a very large lump-sum incentive for informal workers in selected provinces to enroll in a voluntary workers' social insurance program. Using administrative data, we find that the temporary enrollment incentive increased coverage by 67 percentage points—from 6 percent of informal workers to 73 percent -- within just a few months. However, 12 months later, only 13 percent of these new enrollees remained in the scheme, much lower than the retention rate of those who joined absent the incentive. By using new enrollees' choices among insurance tiers to back out a revealed valuation of insurance, we find that those who were induced to enroll by the incentives value insurance less than those who enrolled without. Combined, the results suggest that low social insurance enrollment may be the result of low ex-ante valuations of the insurance, rather than administrative barriers.
papers.zh_title: 支付意愿与行政障碍：理解泰国社会保险参保的障碍
papers.zh_abstract: 许多政府社会保险政策的参保率较低。为了理解这是由于行政障碍、信息问题还是对保险的低估值，我们研究了泰国一项不寻常的政策实验，该实验为选定省份的非正规工人提供一笔非常大的一次性激励，以鼓励他们加入自愿性的工人社会保险计划。利用行政数据，我们发现，临时参保激励在短短几个月内将覆盖率提高了67个百分点——从非正规工人的6%提高到73%。然而，12个月后，这些新参保者中只有13%仍留在该计划中，远低于没有激励而加入者的留存率。通过利用新参保者在保险层级间的选择来反推其揭示的保险估值，我们发现，那些因激励而参保的人对保险的估值低于那些没有激励而参保的人。综合来看，结果表明，社会保险参保率低可能是由于事前对保险的估值低，而非行政障碍。

papers.title: Revisiting Stock Market Signals as a Lens for Patent Valuation
papers.authors: Ashish Arora, Sharon Belenzon, Elia Ferracuti, Jay Prakash Nagar
papers.abstract: Estimating the private value of patents is important, yet challenging. By developing a method based on stock market returns to produce estimates of individual patent values, Kogan, Papanikolaou, Seru, and Stoffman (2017) (KPSS) opened venues for new research. We characterize the measurement error in KPSS – the difference between the true patent value and the corresponding KPSS estimate – and show it is negatively correlated with the true patent value. We then investigate the use of KPSS estimates in two different applications. First, we show that using KPSS values to gauge differences in value between different patent groups is internally inconsistent and introduces attenuation bias. We offer two solutions: extending the original KPSS method to allow for patents to be drawn from two distinct value distributions, and using abnormal stock market returns. We compare both to the original KPSS estimates in several contexts relevant to the organizational scholars, such as patents by large and small teams, scientific and non-scientific patents, and offshored and domestically invented patents. Second, we show that KPSS yield unbiased estimates when used as explanatory variables. These analyses allow us to characterize the main trade-offs associated with each approach, and offer practical guidance to researchers.
papers.zh_title: 重新审视股票市场信号作为专利估值的视角
papers.zh_abstract: 估算专利的私人价值很重要，但也具有挑战性。Kogan、Papanikolaou、Seru和Stoffman（2017）（KPSS）通过开发一种基于股票市场回报的方法来估算单个专利价值，为新的研究开辟了途径。我们刻画了KPSS中的测量误差——真实专利价值与相应KPSS估计值之间的差异——并表明它与真实专利价值呈负相关。然后，我们研究了KPSS估计值在两种不同应用中的使用。首先，我们表明，使用KPSS值来衡量不同专利组之间的价值差异在内部是不一致的，并引入了衰减偏差。我们提供了两种解决方案：扩展原始的KPSS方法以允许专利来自两个不同的价值分布，以及使用异常股票市场回报。我们在与组织学者相关的几个背景下比较了这两种方法与原始KPSS估计值，例如大型和小型团队的专利、科学和非科学专利、离岸和国内发明的专利。其次，我们表明，当KPSS用作解释变量时，它们会产生无偏估计。这些分析使我们能够刻画每种方法的主要权衡，并为研究人员提供实用指导。

papers.title: Capital Flow Stability and Policy Challenges in Southeast Asia: Historical Perspectives from the 19th to the 21st Century
papers.authors: Christopher M. Meissner, Kensuke Molnar-Tanaka
papers.abstract: Over the last 200 years, economies have accumulated significant experience in managing capital flows in the face of globalization. This study examines management of capital flows since the 1800s with an eye towards providing historical lessons for Southeast Asia today. We start with the global sterling/gold standard regime of the late 19th century globalization and then discuss the tumultuous inter-war period. We then examine policies in Southeast Asian countries since the 1950s. In the 1980s and 1990s, many economies faced increasing financial instability related to the resumption of global capital flows, most noticeably in Southeast Asia during the Asian Financial Crisis. The paper examines the historical importance of exchange rate policies for capital flow stability. Capital flow management in the 21st century faces various challenges such as enhanced state-intervention and digital currencies.
papers.zh_title: 资本流动稳定性与东南亚政策挑战：19至21世纪的历史视角
papers.zh_abstract: 在过去200年间，经济体在应对全球化过程中积累了管理资本流动的丰富经验。本研究考察了自19世纪以来的资本流动管理，旨在为当今东南亚提供历史教训。我们从19世纪末全球化时期的全球英镑/金本位制入手，随后讨论了动荡的两次世界大战间期。接着，我们分析了20世纪50年代以来东南亚国家的政策。在20世纪80年代和90年代，许多经济体因全球资本流动的恢复而面临日益加剧的金融不稳定，最显著的是东南亚在亚洲金融危机期间。本文考察了汇率政策对资本流动稳定性的历史重要性。21世纪的资本流动管理面临着各种挑战，例如国家干预的增强和数字货币的出现。

papers.title: Nonlinear Pricing and Misallocation
papers.authors: Gideon Bornstein, Alessandra Peter
papers.abstract: This paper studies the effect of nonlinear pricing on markups and misallocation. We develop a general equilibrium model of firms that are allowed to set a quantity-dependent pricing schedule—contrary to the typical assumption in macroeconomic models. Without the restriction to linear pricing, markup heterogeneity is no longer a sign of misallocation. Larger firms charge higher markups, yet the allocation of resources across firms is efficient. Further, we point to a new source of misallocation. In general equilibrium, high-taste consumers are allocated too much of each good, low-taste consumers too little. When labor supply is elastic, firms’ market power depresses aggregate labor, but this effect is independent of the level of the aggregate markup in the economy. Using micro data from the retail sector, we show that nonlinear pricing is prevalent and quantify the model. We find that the welfare losses from misallocation across consumers under nonlinear pricing are substantially larger than those from misallocation across firms under linear pricing.
papers.zh_title: 非线性定价与资源错配
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了非线性定价对加成率和资源错配的影响。我们构建了一个允许企业设定依赖于数量的定价方案的一般均衡模型——这与宏观经济模型中的典型假设相反。在没有线性定价限制的情况下，加成率异质性不再是资源错配的标志。大企业收取更高的加成率，但资源在企业间的配置是有效的。此外，我们指出了一种新的资源错配来源。在一般均衡中，高品味消费者被分配了过多的每种商品，而低品味消费者则过少。当劳动供给具有弹性时，企业的市场势力压低了总劳动量，但这种效应与经济中总加成率的水平无关。利用零售部门的微观数据，我们展示了非线性定价的普遍性并对模型进行了量化。我们发现，在非线性定价下，消费者之间的资源错配造成的福利损失远大于在线性定价下企业之间的资源错配造成的福利损失。

papers.title: Trade, Trees, and Lives
papers.authors: Xinming Du, Lei Li, Eric Zou
papers.abstract: This paper shows a cascading mechanism through which international trade-induced deforestation results in a decline of health outcomes in cities distant from where trade activities occur. We examine Brazil, which has ramped up agricultural export over the last two decades to meet rising global demand. Using a shift-share research design, we first show that export shocks cause substantial local agricultural expansion and a virtual one-for-one decline in forest cover. We then construct a dynamic area-of-effect model that predicts where atmospheric changes should be felt – due to loss of forests that would otherwise serve to filter out and absorb air pollutants as they travel – downwind of the deforestation areas.
