Leveraging quasi-random variation in these atmospheric connections, we establish a causal link between deforestation upstream and subsequent rises in air pollution and premature deaths downstream, with the mortality effects predominantly driven by cardiovascular and respiratory causes. Our estimates reveal a large telecoupled health externality of trade deforestation: over 700,000 premature deaths in Brazil over the past two decades. This equates to $0.18 loss in statistical life value per $1 agricultural exports over the study period.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, EH, ITI；JEL：F18, O13, Q23, Q53
papers.zh_title: 贸易、树木与生命
papers.zh_abstract: 本文展示了一种级联机制，通过这种机制，国际贸易导致的森林砍伐使得远离贸易活动发生的城市的健康结果下降。我们以巴西为研究对象，该国在过去二十年中为满足日益增长的全球需求而加大了农业出口。使用份额转移研究设计，我们首先表明出口冲击导致了当地农业的大规模扩张和森林覆盖率的几乎一对一的下降。然后，我们构建了一个动态影响区域模型，该模型预测了由于森林损失（这些森林原本可以在空气污染物传播过程中过滤和吸收它们），砍伐区域下风向地区应感受到的大气变化。利用这些大气联系中的准随机变化，我们建立了上游森林砍伐与下游空气污染和过早死亡增加之间的因果关系，其中死亡率影响主要由心血管和呼吸系统原因驱动。我们的估计揭示了一个巨大的贸易森林砍伐远程耦合健康外部性：在过去二十年中，巴西有超过70万人过早死亡。这相当于研究期间每1美元农业出口造成0.18美元的统计生命价值损失。

papers.title: Liquidity Shocks and Firm Exports: Evidence from Cash Shortages During India’s Demonetization
papers.authors: Ritam Chaurey, Ryan Kim, Pravin Krishna
papers.abstract: This paper examines how liquidity shocks caused by currency shortages impact exports. We explore this in the context of India’s 2016 currency demonetization, a sudden government policy announcement that led to 86% of the country’s currency in circulation being rendered illegal within hours. Our analysis uses novel data, including high-frequency customs transaction records matched with exporting firms and their balance sheets, as well as with inter-district domestic trade. While the cash shortages do not directly affect exporting firms, we find a significant and immediate decline in real exports for firms whose domestic customers experience liquidity shocks.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, DEV, IFM, ITI, ME；JEL：E50, F1, F14, O16
papers.zh_title: 流动性冲击与企业出口：来自印度废钞期间现金短缺的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了由现金短缺引起的流动性冲击如何影响出口。我们在印度2016年货币废钞的背景下探讨了这一点，这是一项突然的政府政策公告，导致该国流通中86%的货币在数小时内变为非法。我们的分析使用了新颖的数据，包括与出口企业及其资产负债表以及地区间国内贸易相匹配的高频海关交易记录。虽然现金短缺并不直接影响出口企业，但我们发现，对于其国内客户遭受流动性冲击的企业，实际出口出现了显著且即时的下降。

papers.title: Information Span in Credit Market Competition
papers.authors: Zhiguo He, Jing Huang, Cecilia Parlatore
papers.abstract: We develop a credit market competition model that distinguishes between information span (breadth) and signal precision (quality), capturing the rise of fintech/nonbank lending where traditionally subjective (soft) information is transformed into objective (hard) data. Borrower quality depends on multidimensional fundamentals, assessed through hard or soft signals. Two banks observe private hard signals, but only the specialized bank receives a soft signal. Expanding the span of hard information enables the non-specialized bank to evaluate characteristics previously only available to the specialist, and reducing its winners curse. By contrast, greater precision of hard signals strengthens the specialized banks informational advantage.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, IO, PR；JEL：G21, L13, L52, O33, O36
papers.zh_title: 信贷市场竞争中的信息广度
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个信贷市场竞争模型，该模型区分了信息广度（宽度）和信号精度（质量），捕捉了金融科技/非银行贷款的兴起，其中传统上主观的（软）信息被转化为客观的（硬）数据。借款人质量取决于多维基本面，通过硬信号或软信号进行评估。两家银行观察到私有的硬信号，但只有专业银行收到一个软信号。扩大硬信息的广度使得非专业银行能够评估以前只有专家才能获得的特征，并减轻其赢家诅咒。相比之下，硬信号精度的提高则加强了专业银行的信息优势。

papers.title: Evaluating Minimum Taxation
papers.authors: James R. Hines Jr.
papers.abstract: Minimum tax rules constrain only the lowest-tax jurisdictions. Because higher minimum tax rates expand the circle of affected countries and therefore the impact of any further changes, there can be dominated regions over which no parameter values would make a minimum tax efficient. Applying a Taylor approximation to the distribution of statutory corporate tax rates in 2020, the range 4%-27% is a dominated region: there may be an efficient minimum rate below 4%, or higher than 27%, but there is no efficient world minimum tax rate between 4% and 27%. Minimum taxes set at popular rates are particularly inefficient – a minimum tax rate of 15% yields value that, when positive, is equivalent to offsetting less than one percent of the effect of tax competition.
papers.zh_title: 评估最低税制
papers.zh_abstract: 最低税规则仅约束税率最低的司法管辖区。由于更高的最低税率会扩大受影响国家的范围，从而增加任何进一步变化的影响，因此可能存在一个支配区域，在该区域内没有任何参数值能使最低税有效。对2020年法定公司税率的分布应用泰勒近似，4%-27%的范围是一个支配区域：可能存在低于4%或高于27%的有效最低税率，但不存在介于4%和27%之间的有效全球最低税率。设定在流行税率上的最低税尤其低效——15%的最低税率产生的价值，当为正时，相当于抵消了税收竞争影响的不到百分之一。

papers.title: Concentrating Intelligence: Scaling and Market Structure in Artificial Intelligence
papers.authors: Anton Korinek, Jai Vipra
papers.abstract: This paper examines the evolving structure and competition dynamics of the rapidly growing market for foundation models, with a focus on large language models (LLMs). We describe the technological characteristics that shape the AI industry and have given rise to fierce competition among the leading players. The paper analyzes the cost structure of foundation models, emphasizing the importance of key inputs such as computational resources, data, and talent, and identifies significant economies of scale and scope that may create a tendency towards greater market concentration in the future. We explore two concerns for competition, the risk of market tipping and the implications of vertical integration, and we evaluate policy remedies that aim to maintain a competitive landscape. Looking ahead to increasingly transformative AI systems, we discuss how market concentration could translate into unprecedented accumulation of power, highlighting the broader societal stakes of competition policy.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, IO, PR；JEL：D43, K21, L4, L86, O33
papers.zh_title: 集中智能：人工智能中的规模与市场结构
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了快速增长的基础模型市场（特别是大型语言模型）的演变结构和竞争动态。我们描述了塑造人工智能行业并导致领先参与者之间激烈竞争的技术特征。本文分析了基础模型的成本结构，强调了计算资源、数据和人才等关键投入的重要性，并识别了可能导致未来市场集中度提高的显著规模经济和范围经济。我们探讨了竞争的两个担忧，即市场倾斜的风险和垂直整合的影响，并评估了旨在维持竞争格局的政策补救措施。展望未来日益变革性的人工智能系统，我们讨论了市场集中度如何转化为前所未有的权力积累，强调了竞争政策的更广泛社会利害关系。

papers.title: Industrial Policies and Innovation: Evidence from the Global Automobile Industry
papers.authors: Panle Jia Barwick, Hyuk-Soo Kwon, Shanjun Li, Yucheng Wang, Nahim B. Zahur
papers.abstract: This paper examines the impact of industrial policies (IPs) on innovation in the global automobile industry. We compile the first comprehensive dataset linking global IPs with patent data related to the auto industry from 2008 to 2023. We document a major shift in policy focus: by 2022, nearly half of all IPs targeted electric vehicles (EV)-related sectors, up from almost none in 2008. In the meantime, there has been a clear technological transition from internal combustion engine (GV) technologies to EV innovations. Our analysis finds a positive relationship between policy support and innovation activity. At the country level, a one-standard-deviation increase in five-year cumulative EV-targeted IPs is associated with a four-percent rise in new EV patent applications. Firm-level analyses (using OLS, IV, and PPML) indicate that a ten-percent increase in EV financial incentives received by automakers and EV battery producers leads to a similar four-percent increase in EV innovations. We confirm the importance of path dependence in the direction of technology change in the automobile industry but find no evidence that EV-targeted IPs stimulate innovation in GV technologies.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, IO, PR；JEL：H20, L5, L60, L62, O3
papers.zh_title: 产业政策与创新：来自全球汽车行业的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了产业政策对全球汽车行业创新的影响。我们编制了首个将全球产业政策与2008年至2023年汽车行业相关专利数据联系起来的综合数据集。我们记录了政策重点的重大转变：到2022年，近一半的产业政策针对电动汽车相关领域，而2008年几乎为零。与此同时，从内燃机技术到电动汽车创新的技术转型已经清晰可见。我们的分析发现政策支持与创新活动之间存在正相关关系。在国家层面，五年累计电动汽车目标产业政策每增加一个标准差，与新的电动汽车专利申请量增加百分之四相关。企业层面分析（使用OLS、IV和PPML）表明，汽车制造商和电动汽车电池制造商获得的电动汽车财政激励每增加百分之十，会导致电动汽车创新同样增加约百分之四。我们确认了汽车行业技术变革方向中路径依赖的重要性，但未发现电动汽车目标产业政策刺激内燃机技术创新的证据。

papers.title: Income Inequality and Job Creation
papers.authors: Sebastian K. Doerr, Thomas Drechsel, Donggyu Lee
papers.abstract: We propose a novel channel through which rising income inequality affects job creation and macroeconomic outcomes. High-income households save relatively more in stocks and bonds but less in bank deposits. A rising top income share thereby increases the relative financing cost for bank-dependent firms, which in turn create fewer jobs. Exploiting variation in top income shares across US states and an instrumental variable strategy, we provide evidence for this channel. We then build a general equilibrium macro model with heterogeneous households and heterogeneous firms and calibrate it to our empirical estimates. The model shows that the secular rise in top incomes accounts for 13% of the decline in the employment share of small firms since 1980. Through the new channel, rising inequality also reduces the labor share and aggregate output. Model experiments show that ignoring the link between inequality and job creation understates welfare effects of income redistribution.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, ME；JEL：D22, D31, E44, E60, L25
papers.zh_title: 收入不平等与就业创造
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个新的渠道，通过该渠道，不断上升的收入不平等会影响就业创造和宏观经济结果。高收入家庭相对更多地储蓄于股票和债券，而较少存入银行存款。因此，顶层收入份额的上升增加了依赖银行融资的企业的相对融资成本，这些企业进而会创造更少的就业岗位。利用美国各州顶层收入份额的差异以及工具变量策略，我们为这一渠道提供了证据。随后，我们构建了一个包含异质性家庭和异质性企业的一般均衡宏观模型，并根据我们的实证估计对其进行校准。该模型表明，自1980年以来，顶层收入的长期上升解释了小企业就业份额下降的13%。通过这一新渠道，不断上升的不平等还降低了劳动收入份额和总产出。模型实验显示，忽视不平等与就业创造之间的联系会低估收入再分配的福利效应。

papers.title: Central Bank Information or Neo-Fisher Effect?
papers.authors: Stephanie Schmitt-Grohé, Martín Uribe
papers.abstract: The central bank information (CBI) effect and the neo-Fisher effect produce similar outcomes: under both, a monetary tightening fails to reduce inflation and output. Separate estimates of these effects run the risk of confounding one with the other. To disentangle these two channels, we introduce into a new-Keynesian model, among other sources of fluctuations, a permanent monetary shock that generates neo-Fisher effects and a preference shock to which the central bank responds that creates CBI effects. We estimate the model on postwar quarterly U.S. data. We find that both effects are important: The neo-Fisher effect explains about one third of changes in inflation. And shutting down the Fed’s direct response to the preference shock causes a doubling of the variance of inflation and a twenty percent increase in the variance of output. The results are robust to assuming that private agents have imperfect information, suggesting the presence of a central bank information channel, but the absence of a central bank information advantage, at least at quarterly frequency.
papers.zh_title: 央行信息效应还是新费雪效应？
papers.zh_abstract: 央行信息效应和新费雪效应会产生相似的结果：在两种效应下，货币紧缩都未能降低通胀和产出。分别估计这些效应存在将两者混淆的风险。为了区分这两个渠道，我们在一个新凯恩斯模型中引入了多种波动来源，其中包括一个产生新费雪效应的永久性货币冲击，以及一个央行据此做出反应并产生央行信息效应的偏好冲击。我们利用战后美国季度数据对模型进行估计。我们发现这两种效应都很重要：新费雪效应解释了约三分之一的通胀变化。而关闭美联储对偏好冲击的直接反应会导致通胀方差翻倍，产出方差增加20%。该结果在假设私人主体拥有不完全信息时依然稳健，这表明存在央行信息渠道，但不存在央行信息优势，至少在季度频率上是如此。

papers.title: Education and Preferences for Desired Traits in Children
papers.authors: Naci H. Mocan, Nur Orak
papers.abstract: There is a strong correlation between the preferences and beliefs of parents and their children. Also, children of more educated parents tend to have different preferences and beliefs than those of less educated parents. However, evidence on whether education influences adults’ preferences regarding the attributes they wish to instill in children is missing. This paper seeks to fill that gap. Utilizing compulsory education reforms implemented in 19 European countries and data from the Integrated Values Survey—which includes questions about essential qualities children should be encouraged to learn at home—we demonstrate that women who acquired additional education due to these reforms are more likely to prioritize imagination, determination and perseverance, and a sense of responsibility as important traits to instill in children. Conversely, they are less inclined to regard religiosity, obedience, and unselfishness as essential attributes for children to learn at home. In addition, we find that education reduces women's religiosity. These effects are primarily driven by Catholic women and women living in majority-Catholic countries. In contrast, education does not have a significant impact on men's religiosity or the child attributes they consider important.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, EH, LS, PE；JEL：D0, I20, Z10
papers.zh_title: 教育与对儿童期望特质的偏好
papers.zh_abstract: 父母的偏好和信念与其子女之间存在强相关性。此外，受教育程度较高的父母的子女往往比受教育程度较低父母的子女拥有不同的偏好和信念。然而，关于教育是否会影响成年人对于希望灌输给子女的特质的偏好，目前尚缺乏证据。本文旨在填补这一空白。利用19个欧洲国家实施的义务教育改革以及综合价值观调查的数据——该调查包含关于儿童应在家中学习的必备品质的问题——我们证明，因这些改革而获得额外教育的女性更有可能将想象力、决心和毅力以及责任感视为应灌输给儿童的重要特质。相反，她们不太倾向于将宗教信仰、服从和无私视为儿童应在家里学习的基本属性。此外，我们发现教育降低了女性的宗教信仰程度。这些影响主要由天主教女性和生活在天主教占多数的国家的女性驱动。相比之下，教育对男性的宗教信仰程度或他们认为重要的儿童特质没有显著影响。

papers.title: Randomized Entry: The Equilibrium Effects of Entry in Digital Financial Markets
papers.authors: Francis Annan
papers.abstract: We created randomized variation across and within markets to estimate the equilibrium effects of small microenterprises’ entry into a new market: the market for mobile money services. Entry has a negative net effect on firm misconduct in mobile money. There is a positive direct effect but a similar-sized negative indirect effect on prices for non-financial goods/services. Market-level price-cost markups decreased, indicating net gains in consumer surplus. We ﬁnd evidence of within-market revenue reallocation for mobile money, and a large services multiplier: revenues for non-financial goods/services increased by 20%. We show the improvements come from adoption externalities and decreased transaction costs.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, IO；JEL：D18, D62, G20, G50, L22, L26, O12
papers.zh_title: 随机进入：数字金融市场中进入的均衡效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过跨市场和市场内随机化创造了变异，以估计小型微型企业进入一个新市场——移动货币服务市场——的均衡效应。进入对移动货币中的企业不当行为产生了负的净效应。存在一个正向的直接效应，但对非金融商品/服务的价格有一个规模相似的负向间接效应。市场层面的价格-成本加成下降，表明消费者剩余净增加。我们发现了移动货币市场内收入重新分配的证据，以及一个巨大的服务乘数：非金融商品/服务的收入增加了20%。我们表明这些改善来自于采纳外部性和交易成本的降低。

papers.title: Resolving Puzzles of Monetary Policy Transmission in Emerging Markets
papers.authors: Jongrim Ha, Dohan Kim, M. Ayhan Kose, Eswar S. Prasad
papers.abstract: Conventional empirical models of monetary policy transmission in emerging market economies produce puzzling results: monetary tightening often leads to an increase in prices (the price puzzle) and depreciation of the currency (the FX puzzle). We show that incorporating forward-looking expectations into standard open economy structural VAR models resolves these puzzles. Specifically, we augment the models with novel survey-based measures of expectations based on consumer, business, and professional forecasts. We find that the rise in prices following monetary tightening is related to currency depreciation, so eliminating the FX puzzle helps solve the price puzzle.
papers.zh_title: 解开新兴市场货币政策传导之谜
papers.zh_abstract: 关于新兴市场经济体货币政策传导的传统实证模型会产生令人费解的结果：货币紧缩常常导致价格上涨（价格之谜）和货币贬值（外汇之谜）。我们表明，将前瞻性预期纳入标准的开放经济结构向量自回归模型可以解开这些谜团。具体而言，我们在模型中加入了基于消费者、企业和专业预测的新型调查预期指标。我们发现，货币紧缩后的价格上涨与货币贬值有关，因此消除外汇之谜有助于解决价格之谜。

papers.title: Tax Policy, Investment and Profit Shifting
papers.authors: Katarzyna A. Bilicka, Michael P. Devereux, İrem Güçeri
papers.abstract: Macroeconomic estimates of profit-shifting elasticities typically exceed microeconomic ones. We reconcile these differences by accounting for extensive-margin profit-reporting decisions in a model where multinationals face unobserved and heterogeneous fixed and variable costs of profit shifting. Using UK administrative data, we find that micro semi-elasticities underestimate aggregate semi-elasticities by about 50%. We estimate average fixed and variable costs of profit shifting to be 1.5% and 3.1% of the true tax base, respectively. We validate the model using a quasi-natural experiment that restricted profit shifting by Italian MNEs and use it to evaluate two types of tax policy reforms.
papers.zh_title: 税收政策、投资与利润转移
papers.zh_abstract: 宏观层面估计的利润转移弹性通常超过微观层面。我们通过在一个模型中考虑利润报告的广延边际决策来调和这些差异，在该模型中，跨国公司面临未观测到的、异质性的利润转移固定成本和可变成本。利用英国行政数据，我们发现微观半弹性将总体半弹性低估了约50%。我们估计利润转移的平均固定成本和可变成本分别占真实税基的1.5%和3.1%。我们利用一个限制意大利跨国公司利润转移的准自然实验验证了该模型，并用其评估两类税收政策改革。

papers.title: Forced Displacement, the Perpetuation of Autocratic Leaders, and Development in Origin Countries
papers.authors: Nicolas Cabra-Ruiz, Sandra V. Rozo, Maria Micaela Sviatschi
papers.abstract: When millions flee an autocratic regime, what happens to economic development in the country they leave behind? In Venezuela, nearly eight million people (38.8% of the population in 1990) have left since 2013. Using a difference-in-differences design exploiting historical foreign settlement shares (as migration networks) and post-2013 oil shocks, we find affected municipalities experienced a 29.4 percent GDP contraction (mirrored in lower income per capita and employment) and higher inequality at origin. Paradoxically, this exodus sustains autocracy by silencing political opposition and strengthening organized crime that channels illicit rents and armed enforcement to the regime. These linked economic and political shifts reveal how large-scale migration from weak institutional contexts can entrench autocracy and deepen long-run underdevelopment.
papers.zh_title: 被迫流离失所、威权领导人的延续与原籍国的发展
papers.zh_abstract: 当数百万人逃离一个威权政权时，他们留下的国家的经济发展会发生什么？在委内瑞拉，自2013年以来已有近八百万人（占1990年人口的38.8%）离开。利用基于历史外国定居份额（作为移民网络）和2013年后石油冲击的双重差分设计，我们发现受影响的市镇经历了29.4%的国内生产总值收缩（反映在较低的人均收入和就业上），并且原籍国的不平等加剧。矛盾的是，这种外流通过压制政治反对派和加强向政权输送非法租金和武装力量的有组织犯罪，反而维持了威权统治。这些相互关联的经济和政治变化揭示了来自弱制度背景的大规模移民如何能够巩固威权统治并加深长期的不发达状态。

papers.title: Quantitative Urban Economics
papers.authors: Stephen J. Redding
papers.abstract: This paper reviews recent quantitative urban models. These models are sufficiently rich to capture observed features of the data, such as many asymmetric locations and a rich geography of the transport network. Yet these models remain sufficiently tractable as to permit an analytical characterization of their theoretical properties. With only a small number of structural parameters (elasticities) to be estimated, they lend themselves to transparent identification. As they rationalize the observed spatial distribution of economic activity within cities, they can be used to undertake counterfactuals for the impact of empirically-realistic public-policy interventions on this observed distribution. Empirical applications include estimating the strength of agglomeration economies and evaluating the impact of transport infrastructure improvements (e.g., railroads, roads, Rapid Bus Transit Systems), zoning and land use regulations, place-based policies, and new technologies such as remote working.
papers.zh_title: 定量城市经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 本文回顾了最近的定量城市模型。这些模型足够丰富，能够捕捉数据中观察到的特征，例如许多非对称区位和丰富的交通网络地理结构。然而，这些模型仍然足够易于处理，以至于可以对其理论性质进行分析性刻画。由于只需要估计少量结构参数（弹性），它们便于进行透明的识别。由于这些模型能够合理化城市内部经济活动的观测空间分布，它们可用于对经验上现实的政策干预对该观测分布的影响进行反事实分析。实证应用包括估计集聚经济强度，评估交通基础设施改善（例如铁路、公路、快速公交系统）、分区和土地使用法规、地方性政策以及远程工作等新技术的影响。

papers.title: Macro-Level Institutions and Micro-Level Economic Behavior: A Meta-Meta Analysis of 1,126 Studies
papers.authors: Jason A. Aimone, Sheryl Ball, Esha Dwibedi, Jeremy J. Jackson, James E. West
papers.abstract: We combine societal-level institutional measures from 51 countries between 1996 and 2017 with individual decision-making outcome data from 1,126 laboratory experiments in six meta-analyses to evaluate the effects of within-country institutional change on pro-social and Nash behavior. We find that government effectiveness and regulatory freedom positively correlate with pro-social behavior. We find that freedom from each of the following components of regulation; interest rate controls, binding minimum wages, worker dismissal protections, conscription, and administrative requirements; are correlated with prosocial behavior and are inversely correlated with Nash behavior. These results suggest the importance of considering spillover effects in pro-social behavior when designing government policy.
papers.zh_title: 宏观制度与微观经济行为：基于1126项研究的元元分析
papers.zh_abstract: 我们将1996年至2017年间51个国家的社会层面制度指标与来自六项元分析中1126项实验室实验的个人决策结果数据相结合，评估国内制度变迁对亲社会行为和纳什行为的影响。我们发现，政府效能和监管自由度与亲社会行为呈正相关。我们还发现，以下各项监管组成部分的自由度——利率管制、具有约束力的最低工资、工人解雇保护、征兵制以及行政要求——均与亲社会行为相关，并与纳什行为呈负相关。这些结果表明，在设计政府政策时，考虑亲社会行为的溢出效应具有重要意义。

papers.title: Input Price Dispersion Across Buyers
papers.authors: Ariel Burstein, Javier Cravino, Marco Rojas
papers.abstract: We use a comprehensive dataset of electronic invoices from Chilean firms to document new facts about price dispersion across buyers of the same manufactured intermediate input and assess its implications for aggregate productivity. Price dispersion is pervasive: more than half of manufacturing sales involve products sold to multiple buyers within the same month, with an average interdecile range of prices across buyers of 0.16 log points. The dominant source of this dispersion is match-specific: buyer-seller pair identity absorbs more than 40 percent of the variation in price gaps, with observable buyer-seller characteristics — including size, relationship length, and transaction volume — jointly explaining up to 10 percent. Price gaps vary little with geographic distance or payment method (cash vs. credit), suggesting that they primarily reflect markup differences rather than marginal cost differences. Guided by these facts, we use a production network model calibrated to the Chilean data to quantify the aggregate efficiency gains from eliminating markup dispersion in manufactured intermediate inputs. We find that markup heterogeneity across buyers of the same product accounts for 30 to 64 percent of the total productivity gains from fully equalizing markups across both products and buyers.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, ITI, ME, PR；JEL：D22, D24, D4, E02, O4
papers.zh_title: 买方间投入品价格离散与资源错配
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用智利企业电子发票的全面数据集，记录了制成品中间投入品在不同买方之间价格离散的新事实。超过一半的企业间制造业销售来自同一月份被多个买方购买的产品。买方间的价格离散普遍存在，平均产品的买方间价格范围达46个百分点。价格差异在时间上高度持久，且与同一买方购买的不同产品之间存在强相关性。虽然价格差异与买方-卖方配对的可观测特征（如买方规模和交易规模）共同变动，但这些因素仅解释了价格差异总体变化的一小部分。我们使用一个生产网络的标准模型来量化消除同一产品买方间观测到的价格离散所带来的生产率提升，假设这种离散是由买方-产品特定的加成率驱动的。总生产率（按受处理的多买方企业销售份额标准化）的提升幅度在2%到7%之间，具体取决于替代弹性的校准。消除买方间加成率离散所带来的收益，与消除产品间加成率离散所带来的收益同样显著。

papers.title: Trade Policy as an Exogenous Shock: Focusing on the Specifics
papers.authors: Andrew Greenland, John Lopresti
papers.abstract: This paper introduces a novel approach to quantifying the effects of tariff protection on economic outcomes by leveraging heterogeneous dependence on specific tariffs in the presence of price changes. We construct a database encompassing the universe of tariff lines across five US trade policy regimes between 1900 and 1940 and show that our measure of changes in “realized protection” strongly predicts import growth and labor market outcomes during this period. Using linked full-count Census data, we show that import exposure inhibited structural change by slowing the transition out of agriculture and into the expanding manufacturing sector, particularly among the young.
papers.zh_title: 作为外生冲击的贸易政策：聚焦具体关税
papers.zh_abstract: 本文引入了一种新方法，通过利用在价格变化情况下对特定关税的异质性依赖，来量化关税保护对经济结果的影响。我们构建了一个涵盖1900年至1940年间美国五个贸易政策体制下所有关税税目的数据库，并表明我们测度的“实际保护”变化指标能强有力地预测该时期的进口增长和劳动力市场结果。利用关联的全量人口普查数据，我们表明进口暴露通过减缓年轻人尤其从农业向扩张中的制造业部门的转型，抑制了结构性变革。

papers.title: How the US-China Trade War Accelerated Urban Economic Growth and Environmental Progress in Northern Vietnam
papers.authors: Matthew E. Kahn, Wen-Chi Liao, Siqi Zheng
papers.abstract: The Trump Administration's tariffs created a wedge between mutually beneficial trades between China's producers and U.S. consumers. Moving production to nearby Vietnam allows firms to jump the tariff wall. Within Vietnam, cities closer to China with respect to distance and industrial mix grow faster and attract more FDI. They are increasingly consuming renewable power to fuel their local economy. We study the local air quality gains and the carbon dioxide emissions reductions associated with the growth in regional trade. China’s regional trade increases have important implications for the rise of the system of cities across Asia.
papers.zh_title: 中美贸易战如何加速越南北部城市经济增长与环境进步
papers.zh_abstract: 特朗普政府的关税在中国生产者与美国消费者之间互利贸易的链条上制造了楔子。将生产转移到邻近的越南使企业能够跨越关税壁垒。在越南境内，距离中国更近（就距离和产业结构而言）的城市增长更快，并吸引了更多外国直接投资。这些城市越来越多地消耗可再生能源来推动本地经济发展。我们研究了与区域贸易增长相关的本地空气质量改善和二氧化碳减排。中国区域贸易的增长对整个亚洲城市体系的崛起具有重要影响。

papers.title: Spatial Economics
papers.authors: Stephen J. Redding
papers.abstract: This paper reviews recent research in spatial economics. The field of spatial economics is concerned with the determinants and effects of the location of economic activity in geographic space. It analyses how geographical location shapes the economic activities performed by agents, their interactions with one another, their welfare, and the effects of public policy interventions. Research in this area has benefited from the simultaneous development of new theoretical techniques, new sources of geographic information systems (GIS) data, rapid advances in computing power, machine learning and artificial intelligence, and renewed public policy interest in infrastructure and appropriate policies towards places “left-behind” by globalization and technology. Among the insights from this research are the role of goods and commuting market access in determining location choices; the conditions under which the location of economic activity is characterized by multiple equilibria; the circumstances under which temporary shocks can have permanent effects (hysteresis or path dependence); the heterogeneous and persistent impact of local shocks; the magnitude and spatial decay of agglomeration economics; and the role of both agglomeration forces and endogenous changes in land use in shaping the impact of transport infrastructure improvements.
papers.zh_title: 空间经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 本文回顾了空间经济学领域的最新研究。空间经济学关注经济活动在地理空间中区位的决定因素和影响。它分析地理位置如何塑造经济主体所从事的经济活动、它们之间的相互作用、它们的福利以及公共政策干预的效果。该领域的研究受益于新理论技术、地理信息系统数据新来源、计算能力快速进步、机器学习和人工智能以及公共政策对基础设施和对被全球化和技术“抛在后面”地区适当政策的重新关注。这些研究的见解包括：商品和通勤市场可达性在决定区位选择中的作用；经济活动区位以多重均衡为特征的条件；暂时性冲击可能产生永久性效应（滞后或路径依赖）的情形；局部冲击的异质性和持续性影响；集聚经济的规模及其随距离的衰减；以及集聚力和土地利用内生变化在塑造交通基础设施改善影响中的作用。

papers.title: On the Limits of Chronological Age
papers.authors: Rainer Kotschy, David E. Bloom, Andrew J. Scott
papers.abstract: Analysis of population aging is typically framed in terms of chronological age. However, chronological age itself is not necessarily deeply informative about the aging process. This paper reviews literature and conducts empirical analyses aimed at investigating whether chronological age is a reliable proxy for physiological functioning when used in models of economic behavior and outcomes. We show that chronological age is an unreliable proxy for physiological functioning due to appreciable differences in how aging unfolds across people, health domains, and over time. We further demonstrate that chronological age either fails to predict economic variables when used in lieu of physiological functioning, or that it predicts additional effects on economic behavior and outcomes that are largely unrelated to physiological aging. Continued reliance on chronological age as a proxy for physiological functioning might impede the ability of societies to fully harness the benefits of increasing longevity.
papers.zh_title: 论生理年龄的局限性
papers.zh_abstract: 人口老龄化分析通常以生理年龄为框架。然而，生理年龄本身不一定能深入揭示老龄化过程。本文回顾了相关文献并进行了实证分析，旨在探究在用于经济行为和结果模型时，生理年龄是否是生理功能的可靠代理变量。我们表明，由于老龄化在不同人群、健康领域以及时间上的显著差异，生理年龄是生理功能的不可靠代理变量。我们进一步证明，当替代生理功能使用时，生理年龄要么无法预测经济变量，要么预测出与生理老龄化基本无关的经济行为和结果的额外效应。持续依赖生理年龄作为生理功能的代理变量，可能会阻碍社会充分利用长寿增长带来的益处。

papers.title: Monetary-Fiscal Coordination with International Hegemon
papers.authors: Xuning Ding, Zhengyang Jiang
papers.abstract: Monetary and fiscal policies require coordination to achieve desired macroeconomic outcomes. The literature since Leeper (1991) has focused on two regimes: monetary dominance and fiscal dominance. In both cases, one policy is active while the other is passive and accommodates the former. We study this coordination problem in an international economy, and find a third regime—hegemon dominance. In this case, one country (the hegemon)'s monetary and fiscal authorities can pursue separate policy goals, while the other country's monetary and fiscal policies are both accommodative. For example, the hegemon can pursue a monetary policy unbacked by its fiscal policy. When this happens, the foreign monetary authority has to take the same stance as the hegemon, the foreign fiscal authority has to provide fiscal backing for the monetary stance undertaken by both countries, and the exchange rate adjusts to equilibrate the economy. Our result suggests that the U.S. fiscal policy's independence from its own monetary policy can be made possible by accommodative foreign policies, and that the Fed's effort to fight inflation can succeed despite the high level of public debt which would have required enormous fiscal backing in a closed economy.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E52, E63, F33
papers.zh_title: 国际霸权下的货币财政协调
papers.zh_abstract: 货币政策和财政政策需要协调以实现理想的宏观经济结果。自Leeper（1991）以来的文献主要关注两种体制：货币主导和财政主导。在这两种情况下，一种政策是主动的，而另一种是被动的并适应前者。我们在国际经济中研究这一协调问题，并发现了第三种体制——霸权主导。在这种情况下，霸权国的货币和财政当局可以追求各自独立的政策目标，而另一国的货币和财政政策则都是适应性的。例如，霸权国可以推行一种不受其财政政策支持的货币政策。当这种情况发生时，外国货币当局必须采取与霸权国相同的立场，外国财政当局必须为两国共同采取的货币立场提供财政支持，而汇率则进行调整以使经济达到均衡。我们的结果表明，美国财政政策相对于其货币政策的独立性可以通过外国的适应性政策实现，并且美联储抗击通胀的努力可以成功，尽管公共债务水平很高——在封闭经济中，这种高债务水平本需要巨大的财政支持。

papers.title: Earnings, Marriage, and the Variance of Family Income by Age, Gender, and Cohort
papers.authors: Joseph Altonji, Daniel Giraldo Páez, Disa M. Hynsjö, Ivan Vidangos
papers.abstract: For birth cohorts 1935–44, 1945–62, and 1964–74, we estimate the contribution of edu-cation; permanent heterogeneity in wage rates, employment, and hours; labor market shocks; spouse characteristics and shocks; nonlabor income shocks; and marital histories to the age profiles of the variance of family income per adult equivalent. Education and employment heterogeneity are key sources of the rise in the variance with age and across cohorts. Wage heterogeneity is important at all ages. Own characteristics and shocks matter more for men than women, while spouse characteristics and shocks matter more for women. Gender differences have declined across cohorts.
papers.zh_title: 收入、婚姻与家庭收入方差：基于年龄、性别和队列的视角
papers.zh_abstract: 针对1935-44年、1945-62年和1964-74年出生队列，我们估算了教育、工资率、就业和工作时间的永久性异质性、劳动力市场冲击、配偶特征与冲击、非劳动收入冲击以及婚姻史对按成人等价计算的家庭收入方差年龄曲线的贡献。教育和就业异质性是方差随年龄和队列上升的关键来源。工资异质性在所有年龄段都很重要。自身特征和冲击对男性的影响大于女性，而配偶特征和冲击对女性的影响更大。性别差异在各队列间有所下降。

papers.title: Elite Strategies for Big Shocks: The Case of the Fall of the Ming
papers.authors: Carol H. Shiue, Wolfgang Keller
papers.abstract: This paper documents persistence in the power of elite families in Central China despite dynastic change. We study the impact of the fall of the Ming Dynasty (1368-1644) on couples and their descendants (treatment of people), and present evidence on the response of multigenerational family lines to a big shock. Local Ming elites suffered a decline in influence in the short run, but in the long-run their descendants recovered and tightened their grip on power in their role as the elites of the new Qing Dynasty (1644-1911). In contrast to the recovery of family lines, the fall of Ming had a more persistently negative impact on the regions that historically were most strongly negatively affected by the shock (treatment of regions). The paper suggests that the elite reversal is due to trauma caused by Ming destruction that shifted norms towards the most socially respectable career paths based on the civil service exam; these norms were, to a greater degree, intergenerationally transmitted in family lines that suffered more from the destruction in the fall of the Ming dynasty.
papers.zh_title: 应对重大冲击的精英策略：以明朝灭亡为例
papers.zh_abstract: 本文记录了尽管经历王朝更迭，中国中部地区精英家族权力仍持续存在的现象。我们研究了明朝（1368-1644年）灭亡对夫妻及其后代的影响（对人的处理效应），并提供了多代家族谱系应对重大冲击的证据。地方明朝精英在短期内影响力下降，但长期来看，其后代恢复了权力，并以新清朝（1644-1911年）精英的身份加强了对权力的掌控。与家族谱系的恢复相反，明朝灭亡对历史上受该冲击负面影响最严重的地区（对地区的处理效应）产生了更持久的负面冲击。本文认为，精英逆转是由于明朝灭亡造成的创伤，促使社会规范转向以科举考试为基础的最受社会尊重的职业道路；这些规范在明朝灭亡中遭受更大破坏的家族谱系中，以更大程度代际传递。

papers.title: Small Changes, Big Impact: Nudging Employees Toward Sustainable Behaviors
papers.authors: Laura Cappellucci, Lan Ha, Jeremy Honig, Christopher R. Knittel, Amy Vetter, Richard Wilner
papers.abstract: We designed and conducted three randomized control trials in partnership with a large biopharmaceutical company operating over 160 plasma donation centers, with the aim of promoting sustainable behaviors in a workplace setting. Specifically, we focused on reducing operational errors that led to dropped collection materials, long freezer door open times, and improper recycling practices. To achieve these goals, we employed social norms to nudge employees towards 1) reducing wasted collection materials, 2) minimizing the duration of freezer door openings, and 3) improving recycling practices. We found an average reduction of roughly 70 percent in plastic waste from dropped collection materials and the costs associated with these materials. The frequency of freezer door alarms decreased by over 80 percent, and the duration of alarms decreased by over 45 percent, depending on the empirical specification. We also observed a roughly 40 percent reduction in uncollapsed cardboard, with no statistically significant results for other types of contaminants. Importantly, for each of the interventions, we do not find evidence that the treatment effects waned over time or affected business operations. Our study provides significant implications for promoting sustainable behaviors in a workplace setting, filling an important gap in the literature on the effectiveness of nudges in the workplace.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, IO, LS, PE；JEL：C93, Q40, Q53
papers.zh_title: 小改变，大影响：助推员工走向可持续行为
papers.zh_abstract: 我们与一家运营超过160个血浆捐献中心的大型生物制药公司合作，设计并进行了三项随机对照试验，旨在工作场所环境中促进可持续行为。具体而言，我们专注于减少导致收集材料掉落、冷冻柜门长时间打开以及不当回收操作的操作错误。为实现这些目标，我们运用社会规范来助推员工：1）减少浪费的收集材料，2）最小化冷冻柜门开启的持续时间，以及3）改进回收操作。我们发现，因收集材料掉落产生的塑料垃圾以及相关成本平均减少了约70%。冷冻柜门警报的频率下降了超过80%，警报持续时间根据实证规范不同下降了超过45%。我们还观察到未压扁纸板减少了约40%，而其他类型污染物的结果在统计上不显著。重要的是，对于每项干预措施，我们没有发现处理效应随时间减弱或影响业务运营的证据。我们的研究为在工作场所环境中促进可持续行为提供了重要启示，填补了关于助推在工作场所有效性的文献中的一个重要空白。

papers.title: Expecting Climate Change: A Nationwide Field Experiment in the Housing Market
papers.authors: Daryl Fairweather, Matthew E. Kahn, Robert D. Metcalfe, Sebastian Sandoval Olascoaga
papers.abstract: Climate change presents new risks for property in the United States. Due to the high cost and sometimes unavailability of location-specific property risk data, home buyers can greatly benefit from acquiring knowledge about these risks. To explore this, a large-scale nationwide natural field experiment was conducted through Redfin to estimate the causal impact of providing home-specific flood risk information on the behavior of home buyers in terms of their search, bidding, and purchasing decisions. Redfin randomly assigned 17.5 million users to receive information detailing the flood risk associated with the properties they searched for on the platform. Our analysis reveals several key findings: (1) the flood risk information influences every stage of the house buying process, including the initial search, bidding activities, and final purchase; (2) individuals are willing to make trade-offs concerning property amenities in order to own a property with a lower flood risk; (3) the impact of the flood risk information on behavior is more pronounced for users conducting searches in high flood risk areas, but does not differ significantly between buyers in Republican and Democrat Counties; and (4) the information resulted in changes to property prices and altered the market's hedonic equilibrium, providing a new finding that climate adaptation can be forward-thinking and proactive.
papers.zh_title: 预期气候变化：住房市场中的全国性实地实验
papers.zh_abstract: 气候变化为美国房产带来了新风险。由于获取特定位置房产风险数据成本高昂且有时不可得，购房者可以从获取这些风险知识中大大受益。为探究这一点，我们通过Redfin进行了一项大规模全国性自然实地实验，以估计提供特定房屋洪水风险信息对购房者在搜索、出价和购买决策方面行为的因果影响。Redfin随机分配了1750万用户，使其接收关于他们在平台上搜索房产的洪水风险详细信息。我们的分析揭示了几个关键发现：（1）洪水风险信息影响购房过程的每个阶段，包括初始搜索、出价活动和最终购买；（2）个体愿意在房产便利设施方面做出权衡，以拥有洪水风险较低的房产；（3）洪水风险信息对行为的影响在洪水高风险区域进行搜索的用户中更为显著，但在共和党县和民主党县的购房者之间没有显著差异；（4）该信息导致了房产价格的变化并改变了市场的享乐均衡，提供了一个新的发现，即气候适应可以是前瞻性和主动性的。

papers.title: Using Information to Curb Racial Discrimination
papers.authors: Christopher R. Knittel, Donald MacKenzie, Michiko Namazu, Bora Ozaltun, Dan Svirsky, Stephen Zoepf
papers.abstract: We test whether more information about customers decreases racial bias. Our setting is the market for shared mobility services. Prior work by Ge et al. (2020) found that Uber drivers are two times more likely to cancel a ride if the passenger’s name is one used predominantly by African Americans. In a randomized control trial, we test whether two alterations to the Uber platform app reduce racial discrimination. Within the standard Uber app, drivers see only the passenger’s rating before accepting a ride. Once they accept the ride, they see the name of the passenger. In the first intervention, we increased the size of the font of the rating to draw attention to the quality of the passenger. In the second intervention, the passenger’s name appears from the beginning. Using the control group observations, we confirmed that the more likely African Americans were to use a name, the more likely a driver cancels the ride. However, increasing the font size of the passenger’s rating eliminates this racial bias. In contrast, we do not find much evidence that showing the name on the initial screen reduces or increases cancellation rates.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, IO, LS, PE；JEL：D83, J71, L92
papers.zh_title: 利用信息遏制种族歧视
papers.zh_abstract: 我们检验了更多关于顾客的信息是否会减少种族偏见。我们的研究场景是共享出行服务市场。Ge等人（2020）的先前研究发现，如果乘客的名字是非裔美国人常用的名字，优步司机取消行程的可能性是其他情况的两倍。在一项随机对照试验中，我们测试了对优步平台应用程序的两项修改是否能减少种族歧视。在标准优步应用程序中，司机在接受行程前只能看到乘客的评分。一旦接受行程，他们才能看到乘客的名字。在第一项干预中，我们增大了评分的字体大小，以引起对乘客质量的注意。在第二项干预中，乘客的名字从一开始就显示。利用对照组观察数据，我们确认了乘客名字越可能是非裔美国人使用的名字，司机取消行程的可能性就越大。然而，增大乘客评分的字体大小消除了这种种族偏见。相比之下，我们没有发现太多证据表明在初始屏幕上显示名字会降低或提高取消率。

papers.title: Couch-Locked with the Munchies: Effects of Recreational Marijuana Laws on Exercise and Nutrition
papers.authors: Thomas Wilk, Monica Deza, Timothy Hodge, Shooshan Danagoulian
papers.abstract: As recreational marijuana laws (RML) expanded marijuana access over the last decade, very little is known about the impact of RML on two costly social behaviors that may arise as a consequence of marijuana consumption: unhealthy eating (i.e. munchies) and sedentary lifestyle (i.e. couch-lock). Using NielsenIQ Consumer Panel data, we find that the passage of RML led to an increase in the number of grocery store trips that involved “junk food”, as well as the amount of spending. This effect is particularly driven by an increase in ice cream, chips, and candy. Using the Behavioral Risk Factor Surveillance System (BRFSS) and the American Time Use Survey (ATUS), we find that the passage of RML also led to a decrease in exercise, particularly driven by a reduction in cardio, and suggestive evidence of more time spent at home. These results suggest that RMLs have an adverse effect on health through unhealthy eating and reduced physical activity, posing a significant public health challenge to diet and lifestyle-related chronic conditions.
papers.zh_title: 沙发锁与零食瘾：娱乐用大麻合法化对锻炼和营养的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 在过去十年中，随着娱乐用大麻法律扩大了获取大麻的渠道，关于娱乐用大麻法律对两种可能因大麻消费而产生的昂贵社会行为（不健康饮食和久坐生活方式）的影响，我们知之甚少。利用尼尔森IQ消费者面板数据，我们发现娱乐用大麻法律的通过导致涉及“垃圾食品”的杂货店购物次数以及支出金额的增加。这种效应尤其由冰淇淋、薯片和糖果的购买增加所驱动。利用行为风险因素监测系统和美国时间使用调查数据，我们发现娱乐用大麻法律的通过也导致锻炼减少，尤其是有氧运动的减少，并有提示性证据表明在家时间增加。这些结果表明，娱乐用大麻法律通过不健康饮食和减少体育活动对健康产生不利影响，对与饮食和生活方式相关的慢性疾病构成了重大的公共卫生挑战。

papers.title: A New Measure of Surviving Children that Sheds Light on Long-term Trends in Fertility
papers.authors: Anup Malani, Ari Jacob
papers.abstract: The world has experienced a dramatic decline in total fertility rate (TFR) since the Industrial Revolution. Yet the consequences of this decline flow not merely from a reduction in births, but from a reduction in the number of surviving children. We propose a new measure of the number of surviving children per female, which we call the effective fertility rate (EFR). EFR can be approximated as the product of TFR and the probability of survival. Moreover, TFR changes can be decomposed into changes that preserve EFR and those that change EFR. We specialized EFR to measure the number of daughters that survive to reproduce (reproductive EFR) and the number children that survive to become workers (labor EFR). \nWe use three data sets to shed light on EFR over time across locations. First, we use data from 165 countries between 1950-2019 to show that one-third of the global decline in TFR during this period did not change labor EFR, suggesting that a substantial portion of fertility decline merely compensated for higher survival rates. Focusing on the change in labor EFR, at least 40% of variation cannot be explained by economic factors such as income, prices, education levels, structural transformation, an urbanization, leaving room for explanations like cultural change. Second, using historical demographic data on European countries since 1750, we find that there was dramatic fluctuation in labor EFR in Europe around each of the World Wars, a phenomenon that is distinct from the demographic transition. However, prior to that fluctuation, EFRs were remarkably constant, even as European countries were undergoing demographic transitions. Indeed, even when EFRs fell below 2 after 1975, we find that EFRs remained stable rather than continuing to decline. Third, data from the US since 1800 reveal that, despite great differences in mortality rates, Black and White populations have remarkably similar numbers of surviving children over time.
papers.zh_title: 衡量存活子女数的新指标及其对生育率长期趋势的启示
papers.zh_abstract: 自工业革命以来，世界经历了总和生育率的急剧下降。然而，这种下降的后果不仅源于出生人数的减少，还源于存活子女数的减少。我们提出了一个衡量每位女性存活子女数的新指标，称为有效生育率。有效生育率可以近似为总和生育率与存活概率的乘积。此外，总和生育率的变化可以分解为保持有效生育率不变的变化和改变有效生育率的变化。我们将有效生育率专门化，以衡量存活到生育年龄的女儿数量（生殖有效生育率）和存活到成为劳动者的子女数量（劳动有效生育率）。我们使用三个数据集来揭示不同地区随时间变化的有效生育率。首先，我们利用1950年至2019年间165个国家的数据表明，在此期间全球总和生育率下降的三分之一并未改变劳动有效生育率，这表明相当一部分生育率下降仅仅是对更高存活率的补偿。关注劳动有效生育率的变化，至少40%的变异无法用收入、价格、教育水平、结构转型和城市化等经济因素解释，为文化变迁等解释留下了空间。其次，利用自1750年以来欧洲国家的历史人口数据，我们发现欧洲的劳动有效生育率在两次世界大战前后出现了剧烈波动，这一现象与人口转变截然不同。然而，在此波动之前，即使欧洲国家正在经历人口转变，有效生育率却异常稳定。事实上，即使在1975年后有效生育率降至2以下，我们发现有效生育率保持稳定而非持续下降。第三，自1800年以来美国的数据显示，尽管死亡率存在巨大差异，但黑人和白人群体的存活子女数随时间推移却惊人地相似。

papers.title: Federal Reserve Independence and Congressional Intent: A Reappraisal of Marriner Eccles’ Role in the Reformulation of the Fed in 1935
papers.authors: Gary Richardson, David W. Wilcox
papers.abstract: Congressional intent concerning the independence of the Federal Reserve matters because it protects the public from the politicization of monetary policy. Attempts to subordinate monetary policy to the President could easily end up in front of the Supreme Court. The outcome of such a case would depend importantly on the historical record. Understanding what Congress intended when it designed the decision-making structure of the Fed requires a clear understanding Marriner Eccles’ proposal for the structure of monetary policymaking in Title II of the Banking Act of 1935 and the Congressional response. Eccles' proposal vested monetary policymaking in a body beholden to the President. Eccles argued that leaders of the Fed should serve at the discretion of the President and implement the President's monetary program. The Senate and House rejected Eccles' proposal and explicitly designed the Fed's leadership structure to limit politicians'—particularly the President's—influence on monetary policymaking.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, ME, POL；JEL：B22, B26, E5, G2, N12, N22, N42
papers.zh_title: 美联储独立性与国会意图：对马瑞纳·埃克尔斯在1935年美联储改革中角色的重新评估
papers.zh_abstract: 国会关于美联储独立性的意图至关重要，因为它保护公众免受货币政策政治化的影响。试图将货币政策置于总统控制之下的行为很容易最终诉诸最高法院。此类案件的结果将在很大程度上取决于历史记录。理解国会在设计美联储决策结构时的意图，需要清晰理解马瑞纳·埃克尔斯关于1935年《银行法》第二章中货币政策制定结构的提案以及国会的回应。埃克尔斯的提案将货币政策制定权赋予一个听命于总统的机构。埃克尔斯认为，美联储领导人应由总统酌情任命并执行总统的货币计划。参议院和众议院否决了埃克尔斯的提案，并明确设计了美联储的领导结构，以限制政治家——特别是总统——对货币政策制定的影响。

papers.title: FinTech Platforms and Asymmetric Network Effects: Theory and Evidence from Marketplace Lending
papers.authors: Lin William Cong, Ke Tang, Danxia Xie, Weiyi Zhao
papers.abstract: We conceptually identify and empirically verify using marketplace lending data the features distinguishing FinTech platforms from non-financial platforms: (i) Long-term contracts introducing default risk at both the individual and platform levels; (ii) Lenders’ investment diversification to mitigate individual default risk; (iii) Platform-level default risk leading to greater asymmetric user stickiness and rendering platform-level cross-side network effects (p-CNEs), a novel metric we introduce, crucial for adoption and market dynamics. We incorporate these features into a model of two-sided FinTech platform with potential failures and endogenous participation/fees. The model predicts lenders’ single-homing, occasional lower fees for borrowers, asymmetric p-CNEs, and the predictive power of lenders’ p-CNEs in forecasting platform failures. Marketplace lending in China empirically corroborate our model predictions in this dynamic industry characterized by entries, exits, and network externalities. Specifically, lenders’ p-CNEs are empirically lower on declining or more established platforms compared to growing or new ones. Moreover, lenders’ p-CNEs predict platforms’ survival likelihood among others, even at very early stages. Our findings provide novel economic insights on multi-sided FinTech platforms for both practitioners and regulators.
papers.zh_title: 金融科技平台与非对称网络效应：来自市场借贷的理论与证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们从概念上识别并利用市场借贷数据实证验证了金融科技平台区别于非金融平台的特征：（i）引入个体和平台层面违约风险的长期合同；（ii）贷款人通过投资分散化来缓解个体违约风险；（iii）平台层面的违约风险导致更大的非对称用户粘性，并使得平台层面的跨边网络效应（我们引入的一个新指标）对采用和市场动态至关重要。我们将这些特征纳入一个具有潜在失败和内生参与/费用的双边金融科技平台模型。该模型预测了贷款人的单归属、偶尔对借款人收取较低费用、非对称的平台层面跨边网络效应，以及贷款人平台层面跨边网络效应对预测平台失败的预测能力。中国的市场借贷实证证实了我们的模型预测，该行业以进入、退出和网络外部性为特征，充满动态变化。具体而言，在衰退或更成熟的平台上，贷款人的平台层面跨边网络效应在经验上低于增长或新平台。此外，贷款人的平台层面跨边网络效应能够预测平台的生存可能性，即使在非常早期的阶段也是如此。我们的发现为从业者和监管者提供了关于多边金融科技平台的新经济见解。

papers.title: From Labor to Intermediates: Firm Growth, Input Substitution, and Monopsony
papers.authors: Matthias Mertens, Benjamin Schoefer
papers.abstract: We document and dissect a stylized fact about firm growth: the shift from labor to intermediate inputs. This shift occurs in input quantities, cost and output shares, and output elasticities. We establish this regularity in firm data for Germany and in firm (and industry) data for 11 (20) additional countries, and also in response to exogenous product demand shocks. We explain this regularity through a parsimonious model with two features: (i) an elasticity of substitution between intermediates and labor above one, and (ii) an increasing shadow price of labor (monopsony or adjustment costs). Our firm growth regressions identify a labor-intermediates substitution elasticity between 1.8 and 4.2. Labor-intermediates substitution also accounts for much of the labor share decline that we document accompanies firm and industry growth.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, IO, ITI, LS, ME, PR；JEL：E0, J0, L0, M0, O0
papers.zh_title: 从劳动到中间品：企业成长、投入替代与买方垄断
papers.zh_abstract: 我们记录并剖析了一个关于企业成长的典型事实：从劳动投入向中间投入的转变。这种转变发生在投入数量、成本和产出份额以及产出弹性中。我们在德国的企业数据以及另外11个（20个）国家的企业（和行业）数据中确立了这一规律，并且这种转变也出现在对外生产品需求冲击的响应中。我们通过一个简约模型解释了这一规律，该模型具有两个特征：（i）中间品与劳动之间的替代弹性大于1，以及（ii）劳动影子价格上升（买方垄断或调整成本）。我们的企业增长回归识别出劳动与中间品的替代弹性在1.8到4.2之间。劳动与中间品的替代也解释了我们在企业增长和行业增长中记录的大部分劳动份额下降。

papers.title: Investing in Customer Capital
papers.authors: Bianca He, Lauren I. Mostrom, Amir Sufi
papers.abstract: Firms invest heavily in customer capital; such investment is a main source of intangible capital value. Customer capital investment is measured using sales and marketing expense from income statements, salaries paid to workers in sales and marketing, and text from SEC filings. There is large and persistent variation across industries in customer capital investment; industries investing the most are growing as a share of aggregate enterprise value. Variation in sales and marketing expense explains a large amount of industry-level variation in intangible capital value. Industries characterized by information frictions and network effects in demand invest most heavily in customer capital.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IO, PR；JEL：D20, G3, M30
papers.zh_title: 投资于客户资本
papers.zh_abstract: 企业大量投资于客户资本；这种投资是无形资本价值的主要来源。客户资本投资通过损益表中的销售和营销费用、支付给销售和营销人员的工资以及美国证券交易委员会文件中的文本进行衡量。不同行业的客户资本投资存在巨大且持续的差异；投资最多的行业在企业总价值中所占份额正在增长。销售和营销费用的变化解释了行业层面无形资本价值的大部分变化。以信息摩擦和需求侧网络效应为特征的行业在客户资本上投资最多。

papers.title: Greens are Right to be Suspicious of Carbon Offsets
papers.authors: Geoffrey Heal
papers.abstract: I distinguish between reduction offsets and removal offsets, the former generated by a reduction in the rate of greenhouse gas emissions and the latter generated by the removal of greenhouse gases from the atmosphere. I show that only removal offsets make any contribution to mitigating climate change. There is a simple intuitive explanation: a firm buys an offset to compensate for the fact that it is emitting greenhouse gases and plans to continue to do so. What should “compensate” mean in this context? That the purchase of the offset undoes the negative impact of the continuing emissions on the climate. This can only happen by the removal from the atmosphere of a quantity of greenhouse gases equal to that emitted by the purchaser of the offset. So an offset which compensates for the climatic impact of emissions has to remove greenhouse gases from the atmosphere. I also review carbon offsets generated by forest management, as of all currently-traded offsets these are the closest to removal offsets.
papers.zh_title: 环保主义者有理由对碳抵消持怀疑态度
papers.zh_abstract: 我区分了减排抵消和清除抵消，前者通过降低温室气体排放速率产生，后者通过从大气中清除温室气体产生。我表明，只有清除抵消才对减缓气候变化有所贡献。有一个简单的直观解释：一家公司购买抵消是为了补偿其正在排放温室气体并计划继续排放的事实。在这种情况下，“补偿”应该意味着什么？即购买抵消能够消除持续排放对气候的负面影响。这只能通过从大气中清除与抵消购买者排放量相等的温室气体来实现。因此，能够补偿排放对气候影响的抵消必须从大气中清除温室气体。我还回顾了由森林管理产生的碳抵消，在所有当前交易的抵消中，这些最接近清除抵消。

papers.title: The Signaling Value of Government Action: The Effect of Istanbul Convention on Female Murders
papers.authors: Güneş Aşık, Naci H. Mocan
papers.abstract: We analyze the expressive content of government action, focusing on the Istanbul Convention–an international treaty aimed at protecting women against violence, signed and ratified by 39 countries. In 2021 the Turkish government withdrew from the Convention, 10 years after signing it. Although the withdrawal did not alter existing laws, women's rights advocates viewed it as a signal of increased tolerance for violence against women. Using four datasets on domestic violence, and female murders, including one from the police, we investigate the impacts of both Turkey’s exit from the Convention and its initial entry. Analyses, including a difference-in-difference model using male homicides as control, show that the withdrawal resulted in about 65 additional female murders per year, primarily committed by intimate partners. The effect is more pronounced in provinces where the long-governing religious-conservative coalition parties have stronger voter support and in provinces with lower education levels. Conversely, Turkey's entry into the Convention in 2011 had the opposite impact, leading to a decrease in female murders. The signing of the Convention, which acted as a normative signal against violence, and the subsequent enactment of comprehensive legislation strengthening deterrence, had distinct effects. The signaling effect of the Entry was more significant in the same provinces that reacted more strongly to the Exit: those with lower education levels, stronger support for the governing party, and the Eastern region of the country. These findings support the premise that government actions are interpreted as signals by society.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LE, LS, PE, POL；JEL：D70, I0, J12, K0, Z1
papers.zh_title: 政府行为的信号价值：《伊斯坦布尔公约》对女性谋杀案的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了政府行为的表达性内容，重点关注《伊斯坦布尔公约》——一项旨在保护女性免受暴力侵害的国际条约，已有39个国家签署并批准。2021年，土耳其政府在签署该公约10年后宣布退出。尽管退出并未改变现有法律，但女性权益倡导者将其视为对暴力侵害女性行为容忍度上升的信号。利用包括警方数据在内的四个关于家庭暴力和女性谋杀案的数据集，我们研究了土耳其退出公约及其最初加入公约的影响。分析（包括以男性他杀为对照的双重差分模型）表明，退出导致每年新增约65起女性谋杀案，主要由亲密伴侣实施。这一效应在长期执政的宗教保守联盟政党支持率更高的省份以及教育水平较低的省份更为显著。相反，土耳其于2011年加入公约产生了相反的影响，导致女性谋杀案减少。公约的签署（作为反对暴力的规范性信号）与随后加强威慑力的全面立法颁布，产生了不同的效果。加入公约的信号效应在那些对退出反应更强烈的同一省份更为显著：即教育水平较低、对执政党支持率更高以及位于该国东部地区的省份。这些发现支持了政府行为被社会解读为信号的假设。

papers.title: Textual Factors: A Scalable, Interpretable, and Data-driven Approach to Analyzing Unstructured Information
papers.authors: Lin William Cong, Tengyuan Liang, Xiao Zhang, Wu Zhu
papers.abstract: We introduce a general approach for analyzing large-scale text-based data, combining the strengths of neural network language processing and generative statistical modeling to create a factor structure of unstructured data for downstream regressions typically used in social sciences. We generate textual factors by (i) representing texts using vector word embedding, (ii) clustering the vectors using Locality-Sensitive Hashing to generate supports of topics, and (iii) identifying relatively interpretable spanning clusters (i.e., textual factors) through topic modeling. Our data-driven approach captures complex linguistic structures while ensuring computational scalability and economic interpretability, plausibly attaining certain advantages over and complementing other unstructured data analytics used by researchers, including emergent large language models. We conduct initial validation tests of the framework and discuss three types of its applications: (i) enhancing prediction and inference with texts, (ii) interpreting (non-text-based) models, and (iii) constructing new text-based metrics and explanatory variables. We illustrate each of these applications using examples in finance and economics such as macroeconomic forecasting from news articles, interpreting multi-factor asset pricing models from corporate filings, and measuring theme-based technology breakthroughs from patents. Finally, we provide a flexible statistical package of textual factors for online distribution to facilitate future research and applications.
papers.zh_title: 文本因子：一种可扩展、可解释且数据驱动的非结构化信息分析方法
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种分析大规模文本数据的一般方法，结合了神经网络语言处理和生成式统计建模的优势，为非结构化数据创建因子结构，以用于社会科学中常见的下游回归分析。我们通过以下步骤生成文本因子：(i) 使用词向量嵌入表示文本，(ii) 使用局部敏感哈希对向量进行聚类以生成主题的支持集，以及(iii) 通过主题建模识别相对可解释的跨越性聚类（即文本因子）。我们的数据驱动方法能够捕捉复杂的语言结构，同时确保计算可扩展性和经济可解释性，可能在某些方面优于并补充研究人员使用的其他非结构化数据分析方法，包括新兴的大语言模型。我们对框架进行了初步验证测试，并讨论了其三种应用类型：(i) 利用文本增强预测和推断，(ii) 解释（非基于文本的）模型，以及(iii) 构建新的基于文本的度量指标和解释变量。我们使用金融和经济学中的例子来说明每种应用，例如基于新闻文章进行宏观经济预测、从公司文件中解释多因子资产定价模型，以及从专利中衡量基于主题的技术突破。最后，我们提供了一个灵活的文本因子统计软件包以供在线分发，以促进未来的研究和应用。

papers.title: Minimum Wages and Race Disparities
papers.authors: David Neumark, Jyotsana Kala
papers.abstract: We provide a comprehensive analysis of the effects of minimum wages on blacks, and on the relative impacts on blacks vs. whites. We study not only teenagers – the focus of much of the minimum wage-employment literature – but also broader low-skill groups. We find evidence that job loss effects from higher minimum wages are more evident for blacks – and more so for black men. In contrast, they are not very detectable for whites. Moreover, the effects of minimum wages are often large enough to generate adverse effects on earnings (and relative earnings) of blacks. Given strong residential segregation by race in the United States, the race difference in the effects of minimum wages implies that the adverse impacts fall on areas with a high black population share. We also find evidence that minimum wage effects are more adverse in black areas, regardless of individual race, which accentuates the concentration of the adverse effects of minimum wages in areas where blacks are a very high share of the population.
papers.zh_title: 最低工资与种族差异
papers.zh_abstract: 我们全面分析了最低工资对黑人的影响，以及对黑人与白人的相对影响。我们不仅研究了青少年——最低工资与就业关系文献的主要关注点——还研究了更广泛的低技能群体。我们发现证据表明，最低工资提高导致的就业损失效应在黑人中更为明显——尤其是黑人男性。相比之下，在白人中这种效应并不显著。此外，最低工资的影响通常大到足以对黑人的收入（及相对收入）产生不利影响。鉴于美国存在强烈的种族居住隔离，最低工资影响的种族差异意味着不利影响落在黑人人口比例高的地区。我们还发现证据表明，无论个人种族如何，最低工资在黑人地区的影响更为不利，这加剧了最低工资不利影响集中在黑人人口占比极高地区的现象。

papers.title: Immobility As Memory: Some New Approaches to Characterizing Intergenerational Persistence via Markov Chains
papers.authors: Lawrence Blume, Neil A. Cholli, Steven N. Durlauf, Aleksandra Lukina
papers.abstract: This paper proposes some new measures of intergenerational persistence based on the idea of characterizing the memory of origin in the stochastic process that links the socioeconomic classes of parents and children. We introduce “memory curves” for all future generations given any initial condition of class for a family dynasty, which reveal how initial conditions interact with the transition process between parents and children to create mobility and persistence. We also propose ways to aggregate information across different classes to produce overall characterizations of mobility in the population. To illustrate our measures, we estimate occupational “memory curves” using U.S. survey data. Our findings show that, on average, the memory of initial conditions dissipates largely within three generations, though there is meaningful heterogeneity in mobility rates across dynasties originating from different occupational classes.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, EFG, LS, PE, TWP；JEL：C10, C50, D30, J6
papers.zh_title: 作为记忆的固化：基于马尔可夫链刻画代际持续性的新方法
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一些衡量代际持续性的新指标，其核心思想是刻画连接父母与子女社会经济阶层的随机过程中对出身背景的“记忆”特征。我们针对家族王朝的任何初始阶层条件，引入了所有未来世代的“记忆曲线”，揭示了初始条件如何与父母与子女之间的转移过程相互作用，从而产生流动性和持续性。我们还提出了跨不同阶层聚合信息的方法，以生成对人口整体流动性的总体刻画。为了说明我们的指标，我们使用美国调查数据估计了职业“记忆曲线”。我们的研究结果表明，平均而言，对初始条件的记忆在三代之内基本消散，尽管源自不同职业阶层的家族王朝在流动率上存在显著的异质性。

papers.title: The Value of Statistical Life for Seniors
papers.authors: Jonathan D. Ketcham, Nicolai V. Kuminoff, Nirman Saha
papers.abstract: We develop a new revealed preference framework to estimate the value of statistical life (VSL). Our framework starts from a hedonic model of health care in which heterogenous individuals choose how much to spend on medical services that reduce mortality risk. Their choices generate an equilibrium survival function that can be differentiated to recover their marginal willingness to pay for mortality risk reduction. Our IV estimator uses survey data on Americans over age 66, linked to their federal administrative records. The mean VSL is approximately $1 million at age 67 and increasing in health, income, education, and life expectancy.
papers.zh_title: 老年人的统计生命价值
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个新的显示性偏好框架来估计统计生命价值（VSL）。我们的框架从一个医疗保健的特征模型出发，在该模型中，异质性个体选择在降低死亡风险的医疗服务上花费多少。他们的选择产生了一个均衡的生存函数，该函数可以被微分以恢复他们对降低死亡风险的边际支付意愿。我们的IV估计器使用了66岁以上美国人的调查数据，并将其与联邦行政记录相关联。平均VSL在67岁时约为100万美元，并且随健康状况、收入、教育程度和预期寿命的增加而增加。

papers.title: The G.I. Bill, Standardized Testing, and Socioeconomic Origins of the U.S. Educational Elite Over a Century
papers.authors: Ran Abramitzky, Jennifer K. Kowalski, Santiago Pérez, Joseph Price
papers.abstract: We compile, transcribe, and standardize historical records for 2.5 million students at 65 elite (private and public) U.S. colleges. By combining these data with more recent survey and administrative data, we assemble the largest dataset on the socioeconomic backgrounds of students at American colleges spanning the last 100 years. We document the following: First, despite a large increase in the share of lower-income students in the overall college-going population, the representation of these students at elite private or public colleges has remained at similarly low levels throughout the last century. Second, the representation of upper-income students at elite colleges decreased after World War II, but this group has regained its high representation since the 1980s. Third, while there has been no increase in the economic diversity of elite private and public colleges, these colleges have become more racially and geographically diverse. Fourth, two major policy changes in the history of American higher education, namely the G.I. Bill after World War II and the introduction of standardized tests for admissions, had little success in increasing the representation of lower- and middle-income students at elite colleges.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, ED, LS, PE；JEL：I23, I24, N32
papers.zh_title: 《退伍军人权利法案》、标准化考试与美国精英阶层教育背景的百年社会经济渊源
papers.zh_abstract: 我们整理、转录并标准化了65所美国精英（私立和公立）大学250万名学生的历史记录。通过将这些数据与更近期的调查和行政数据相结合，我们构建了过去100年来美国大学学生社会经济背景的最大数据集。我们记录了以下发现：第一，尽管低收入学生在整个大学入学人口中的比例大幅增加，但这些学生在精英私立或公立大学中的代表性在过去一个世纪中一直保持在同样低的水平。第二，高收入学生在精英大学中的代表性在二战后有所下降，但自1980年代以来，这一群体已重新获得高代表性。第三，尽管精英私立和公立大学的经济多样性没有增加，但这些大学在种族和地理上变得更加多样化。第四，美国高等教育史上的两项重大政策变革，即二战后的《退伍军人权利法案》和引入标准化入学考试，在增加低收入和中等收入学生在精英大学中的代表性方面收效甚微。

papers.title: The Misery of Diversity
papers.authors: Resul Cesur, Sadullah Yıldırım
papers.abstract: Evolutionary accounts assert that while diversity may lower subjective well-being (SWB) by creating an evolutionary mismatch between evolved psychological tendencies and the current social environment, human societies can adapt to diversity via intergroup contact under appropriate conditions. Exploiting a novel natural experiment in history, we examine the impact of the social environment, captured by population diversity, on SWB. We find that diversity lowers cognitive and hedonic measures of SWB. Diversity-induced deteriorations in the quality of the macrosocial environment, captured by reduced social cohesion, retarded state capacity, and increased inequality in economic opportunities, emerge as mechanisms explaining our findings. The analysis of first- and second-generation immigrants in Europe and the USA reveals that the misery of home country diversity persists even after neutralizing the role of the social environment. However, these effects diminish among the second generation, suggesting that long-term improvements in the social environment can alleviate the burden of diversity. Finally, in exploring whether human societies can adapt to diversity, we show evidence that diversity causes adopting cultural traits (such as establishing stronger family ties, assigning greater importance to friendships, and adopting a positive attitude towards competition) that can mitigate the misery of diversity. These results survive an exhaustive set of robustness checks.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EH, POL；JEL：D60, D63, I30, I31, N30, Z13
papers.zh_title: 多样性的痛苦
papers.zh_abstract: 进化论观点认为，虽然多样性可能通过造成进化心理倾向与当前社会环境之间的进化错配而降低主观幸福感（SWB），但人类社会可以通过在适当条件下的群体间接触来适应多样性。利用历史上一个新颖的自然实验，我们考察了由人口多样性所代表的社会环境对主观幸福感的影响。我们发现多样性降低了主观幸福感的认知和享乐维度。多样性导致宏观社会环境质量恶化——表现为社会凝聚力下降、国家能力受阻和经济机会不平等加剧——是解释我们研究结果的机制。对欧洲和美国第一代及第二代移民的分析表明，即使在消除了社会环境的作用之后，原籍国多样性的痛苦依然存在。然而，这些影响在第二代中有所减弱，表明社会环境的长期改善可以减轻多样性的负担。最后，在探索人类社会能否适应多样性时，我们发现有证据表明，多样性促使人们采纳能够缓解多样性痛苦的文化特征（例如建立更强的家庭纽带、赋予友谊更重要的地位以及采取积极竞争的态度）。这些结果在经历了一系列详尽的稳健性检验后依然成立。

papers.title: The Politics of Global Public Goods
papers.authors: Bård Harstad
papers.abstract: Below, I illustrate how a wide range of political economics forces influence nations' provisions of global public goods. The forces can make it difficult for international cooperation to succeed, but they can also be taken advantage of by carefully designed treaties, so that they are stronger because of the domestic political forces. The chapter concludes that global cooperation and democratization reinforce each other, so that multiple equilibrium outcomes are possible. The models are simple and the text is accessible to students at any level.
papers.zh_title: 全球公共产品的政治经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 下文我将阐述广泛的政治经济学力量如何影响各国对全球公共产品的供给。这些力量可能使国际合作难以成功，但精心设计的条约也可以利用这些力量，使其因国内政治力量而变得更加强大。本章的结论是，全球合作与民主化相互强化，因此可能存在多重均衡结果。模型简单，文本适用于任何层次的学生。

papers.title: On International Cooperation
papers.authors: Bård Harstad
papers.abstract: A simple dynamic game is used for analyzing international environmental problems and climate agreements. Different countries are, over time, emitting as well as investing in green technology. In this framework, we can analyze the business-as-usual outcome, short vs. long term agreements, self-enforcing agreements, participation, compliance, alternative designs, and the development from the Kyoto Protocol to the Paris Agreement. The text should be accessible to students at any level.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, PE, POL；JEL：C72, F53, H87, Q2, Q5
papers.zh_title: 论国际合作
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用一个简单的动态博弈模型来分析国际环境问题和气候协议。不同国家随时间推移既进行排放，也投资于绿色技术。在此框架下，我们可以分析一切照常的结果、短期与长期协议、自我执行协议、参与、合规、替代设计方案，以及从《京都议定书》到《巴黎协定》的发展历程。本文内容应适用于任何层次的学生。

papers.title: A Simple Model of Average Inflation Targeting
papers.authors: Laurence M. Ball, Junnan Zhang
papers.abstract: This paper derives the optimal monetary-policy rule in a simple model with anchored inflation expectations and an effective lower bound (ELB) on interest rates, assuming a long-run inflation goal of 2%. With fully anchored expectations, the optimal policy is a version of average inflation targeting: to offset periods when the ELB forces inflation below 2%, policymakers target a fixed inflation rate above 2% whenever they are unconstrained. With expectations that are partially but not fully anchored, the inflation target away from the ELB varies with the state of the economy. For some parameter values, the target is highest after a period when inflation has been low.
papers.zh_title: 平均通胀目标制的简单模型
papers.zh_abstract: 本文在一个具有锚定通胀预期和利率有效下限（ELB）的简单模型中推导出最优货币政策规则，假设长期通胀目标为2%。在预期完全锚定的情况下，最优政策是平均通胀目标制的一种形式：为了抵消ELB迫使通胀低于2%的时期，政策制定者在不受约束时设定一个高于2%的固定通胀目标。在预期部分锚定而非完全锚定的情况下，远离ELB的通胀目标随经济状态而变化。对于某些参数值，目标在通胀持续低迷的时期之后达到最高。

papers.title: Beyond the Fundamentals: How Media-Driven Narratives Influence Cross-Border Capital Flows
papers.authors: Isha Agarwal, Wentong Chen, Eswar S. Prasad
papers.abstract: We provide the first empirical evidence on how media-driven narratives influence cross-border institutional investment flows. Applying natural language processing techniques to one-and-a-half million newspaper articles, we document substantial cross-country variation in sentiment and risk indices constructed from domestic media narratives about China in 15 countries. These narratives significantly affect portfolio flows, even after controlling for macroeconomic and financial fundamentals. This impact is smaller for investors with greater familiarity or private information about China and larger during periods of heightened uncertainty. Political and environmental narratives are as influential as economic narratives. Investors react more sharply to negative narratives than positive ones.
papers.zh_title: 超越基本面：媒体驱动叙事如何影响跨境资本流动
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提供了关于媒体驱动叙事如何影响跨境机构投资流动的首个实证证据。通过对150万篇报纸文章应用自然语言处理技术，我们记录了15个国家国内媒体关于中国的叙事所构建的情绪和风险指数存在显著的跨国差异。这些叙事显著影响投资组合流动，即使在控制了宏观经济和金融基本面之后也是如此。对于对中国更熟悉或拥有更多私人信息的投资者，这种影响较小；在不确定性加剧时期，这种影响更大。政治和环境叙事与经济叙事同样具有影响力。投资者对负面叙事的反应比正面叙事更为剧烈。

papers.title: Economic Surveillance using Corporate Text
papers.authors: Tarek Alexander Hassan, Stephan Hollander, Aakash Kalyani, Laurence van Lent, Markus Schwedeler, Ahmed Tahoun
papers.abstract: This article applies simple methods from computational linguistics to analyze unstructured corporate texts for economic surveillance. We apply text-as-data approaches to earnings conference call transcripts, patent texts, and job postings to uncover unique insights into how markets and firms respond to economic shocks, such as a nuclear disaster or a geopolitical event—insights that often elude traditional data sources. This method enhances our ability to extract actionable intelligence from textual data, thereby aiding policy-making and strategic corporate decisions. By integrating computational linguistics into the analysis of economic shocks, our study opens new possibilities for real-time economic surveillance and offers a more nuanced understanding of firm-level reactions in volatile economic environments.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E3, E5, E6, F01, F3, G12, G32
papers.zh_title: 利用企业文本进行经济监测
papers.zh_abstract: 本文应用计算语言学的简单方法来分析非结构化企业文本以进行经济监测。我们将文本即数据方法应用于财报电话会议记录、专利文本和职位招聘信息，以揭示市场和公司如何应对经济冲击（如核灾难或地缘政治事件）的独特见解——这些见解往往被传统数据源所忽略。这种方法增强了我们从文本数据中提取可操作情报的能力，从而有助于政策制定和战略企业决策。通过将计算语言学整合到经济冲击分析中，我们的研究为实时经济监测开辟了新的可能性，并提供了对波动经济环境中企业层面反应更细致的理解。

papers.title: The Distributional Implications of Itemized Medical Deductions
papers.authors: Gopi Shah Goda, Ithai Lurie, Priyanka S. Parikh, Chelsea Swete
papers.abstract: Approximately $76 billion in out-of-pocket medical spending was deducted as an itemized medical deduction (IMD) in 2021, resulting in about $9 billion in federal forgone tax revenue. We use data from U.S. tax returns to examine how these tax savings are distributed across income and age, how the distributions differ from the mortgage interest deduction, and how the distributions changed with the 2017 Tax Cuts and Jobs Act. While a given level of medical spending is less likely to be above the income threshold for higher-income households, itemization rates and marginal tax rates increase with income, resulting in tax savings skewed towards higher-income taxpayers: 94 percent of the tax savings accrue to those in the top half of the income distribution. The tax savings are also highly concentrated at older ages, with 42 percent accruing to those over age 65. Using rich survey data on out-of-pocket medical spending, we illustrate how the distribution of tax savings varies across policy alternatives. We find that expanding eligibility for the tax subsidy would likely reduce the concentration of tax savings at higher incomes and increase the concentration of tax benefits at older ages.
papers.zh_title: 分项医疗扣除的分配影响
papers.zh_abstract: 2021年，大约760亿美元的自付医疗支出被作为分项医疗扣除（IMD）扣除，导致约90亿美元的联邦税收收入损失。我们利用美国纳税申报数据，研究这些税收节省如何在收入和年龄之间分配，其分配与抵押贷款利息扣除有何不同，以及分配如何随着2017年《减税与就业法案》而变化。虽然对于高收入家庭来说，给定水平的医疗支出不太可能超过收入门槛，但分项扣除率和边际税率随收入增加而增加，导致税收节省向高收入纳税人倾斜：94%的税收节省归于收入分布上半部分的人群。税收节省也高度集中在老年人群体，42%归于65岁以上人群。利用关于自付医疗支出的丰富调查数据，我们说明了税收节省的分配如何随政策替代方案而变化。我们发现，扩大税收补贴的资格可能会降低高收入群体的税收节省集中度，并增加老年群体的税收优惠集中度。

papers.title: Forecasting Natural Gas Prices in Real Time
papers.authors: Christiane Baumeister, Florian Huber, Thomas K. Lee, Francesco Ravazzolo
papers.abstract: This paper provides a comprehensive analysis of the forecastability of the real price of natural gas in the United States at the monthly frequency considering a universe of models that differ in their complexity and economic content. Our key finding is that considerable reductions in mean-squared prediction error relative to a random walk benchmark can be achieved in real time for forecast horizons of up to two years. A particularly promising model is a six-variable Bayesian vector autoregressive model that includes the fundamental determinants of the supply and demand for natural gas. To capture real-time data constraints of these and other predictor variables, we assemble a rich database of historical vintages from multiple sources. We also compare our model-based forecasts to readily available model-free forecasts provided by experts and futures markets. Given that no single forecasting method dominates all others, we explore the usefulness of pooling forecasts and find that combining forecasts from individual models selected in real time based on their most recent performance delivers the most accurate forecasts.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, EFG, ME；JEL：C11, C32, C52, Q41, Q47
papers.zh_title: 实时预测天然气价格
papers.zh_abstract: 本文对月度频率下美国天然气实际价格的可预测性进行了全面分析，考虑了一系列在复杂性和经济内容上各不相同的模型。我们的关键发现是，对于长达两年的预测期，相对于随机游走基准，均方预测误差可以在实时中实现显著降低。一个特别有前景的模型是包含天然气供需基本决定因素的六变量贝叶斯向量自回归模型。为了捕捉这些及其他预测变量的实时数据约束，我们从多个来源汇编了一个丰富的历史数据版本数据库。我们还将基于模型的预测与专家和期货市场提供的现成无模型预测进行了比较。鉴于没有单一预测方法能主导所有其他方法，我们探讨了预测池化的有用性，并发现基于实时表现选择个体模型并组合其预测，能提供最准确的预测。

papers.title: Nonpayment and Eviction in the Rental Housing Market
papers.authors: John Eric Humphries, Scott T. Nelson, Dam Linh Nguyen, Winnie van Dijk, Daniel C. Waldinger
papers.abstract: Recent research has documented the prevalence and consequences of evictions, but our understanding of underlying drivers of the eviction rate and the scope for policy to affect it remains limited. In this paper, we study landlords' decisions to evict tenants and how these decisions may be influenced by policy. We combine novel lease-level ledger data from low-income rental markets with a model of the landlord's eviction decision to characterize the persistence of shocks to tenant default risk, landlords' information about these shocks, and landlords' cost of eviction. Our data show that nonpayment is common, is frequently tolerated by landlords, and is often followed by recovery, suggesting that landlords face a trade-off between initiating a costly eviction or waiting to learn whether a tenant can continue paying. Our dynamic discrete choice model of the eviction decision captures this tradeoff. Estimates indicate that filing an eviction costs landlords the equivalent of 2-3 months of rent, and that the majority of evictions involve tenants who are unlikely to pay going forward. This implies that uniformly applied policies can generate additional forbearance for tenants, but they do not prevent most evictions. We find that 15% of those evicted would have resumed paying rent, suggesting a role for more targeted interventions. Among the policy instruments we consider, direct financial incentives for landlords—such as taxes and subsidies—are more likely to durably prevent evictions than procedural delays.
papers.zh_title: 租赁住房市场中的欠租与驱逐
papers.zh_abstract: 近期研究记录了驱逐的普遍性和后果，但我们对驱逐率潜在驱动因素以及政策影响其范围的理解仍然有限。在本文中，我们研究房东驱逐租户的决定，以及这些决定如何可能受到政策影响。我们将来自低收入租赁市场的新颖租约层面分类账数据与房东驱逐决策模型相结合，以刻画租户违约风险冲击的持续性、房东关于这些冲击的信息以及房东的驱逐成本。我们的数据显示，欠租很常见，经常被房东容忍，并且往往随后得到恢复，这表明房东面临一个权衡：是启动成本高昂的驱逐，还是等待了解租户是否能继续支付。我们的驱逐决策动态离散选择模型捕捉了这一权衡。估计表明，提起驱逐诉讼使房东承担相当于2-3个月租金的成本，并且大多数驱逐涉及未来不太可能继续支付的租户。这意味着统一适用的政策可以为租户带来额外的宽限，但并不能阻止大多数驱逐。我们发现，15%的被驱逐者本可以恢复支付租金，这表明更有针对性的干预措施可以发挥作用。在我们考虑的政策工具中，对房东的直接财政激励——如税收和补贴——比程序性延迟更有可能持久地防止驱逐。

papers.title: Unwarranted Racial Disparity in U.S. Foster Care Placement
papers.authors: E. Jason Baron, Joseph J. Doyle Jr., Natalia Emanuel, Peter Hull
papers.abstract: Black children in the U.S. are twice as likely as white children to spend time in foster care. Such racial disparities raise concerns of discrimination, but might also reflect differences in the underlying need for intervention. This paper estimates unwarranted disparities (UDs)—racial differences in placement rates for children with the same potential for future maltreatment—in national data. We use non-parametric bounds on the potential for future child maltreatment that rely on weak and transparent assumptions. Nationwide, we find that Black children are placed into foster care at higher rates than white children with identical potential to experience subsequent maltreatment; this UD is 42% larger than conventional estimates that control for observables. We demonstrate that UD varies across states and that both the proportion of Black individuals in the population and the racial makeup of caseworkers within a state are key factors in predicting the level of UD. Finally, we show that UD is five times larger among children with potential for subsequent maltreatment than among children without, and that it declined from 2008 to 2020, primarily due to a decline in the placement rate of Black children with potential for subsequent maltreatment. The concentration of UD in cases with potential for future maltreatment yields important policy implications, as it may indicate an "underplacement" of white children—with declining racial gaps over time potentially elevating the risk of maltreatment for Black children.
papers.zh_title: 美国寄养安置中无根据的种族差异
papers.zh_abstract: 美国黑人儿童被送入寄养机构的可能性是白人儿童的两倍。这种种族差异引发了对歧视的担忧，但也可能反映了需要干预的潜在需求的差异。本文利用全国数据估计了无根据的差异（UDs）——即对于具有相同未来虐待可能性的儿童，其安置率的种族差异。我们使用基于弱且透明假设的未来儿童虐待可能性的非参数边界。在全国范围内，我们发现黑人儿童被送入寄养机构的比率高于具有相同后续虐待经历可能性的白人儿童；这种UD比控制可观测变量的传统估计大42%。我们证明UD在各州之间存在差异，并且州内黑人人口比例和个案工作者的种族构成是预测UD水平的关键因素。最后，我们表明，在具有后续虐待可能性的儿童中，UD比没有这种可能性的儿童大五倍，并且从2008年到2020年，UD有所下降，这主要是由于具有后续虐待可能性的黑人儿童安置率下降所致。UD集中在具有未来虐待可能性的案例中，这产生了重要的政策含义，因为它可能表明白人儿童被“安置不足”——随着时间的推移，种族差距的缩小可能会增加黑人儿童遭受虐待的风险。

papers.title: The Evolution of Gender in the Labor Market
papers.authors: Claudia Olivetti, Jessica Pan, Barbara Petrongolo
papers.abstract: This chapter traces the evolution of the study of gender in the labor market, focusing on how academic thinking on this topic has evolved alongside real world developments in gender inequality from the 1980s to the present. We present a simple model of female labor supply to illustrate how various forces discussed in the literature (e.g., productivity differentials, unequal gender roles, wage markdowns) affect the gender earnings gap. A major development in the literature is a clearer distinction between intrinsic differences in preferences and skills between men and women versus differential constraints in driving gender gaps. We discuss insights from research on the relative importance of these explanations, and the implications for economic efficiency. We highlight that much of the literature today emphasizes the relevance of gendered constraints, where women and men typically face differential trade-offs between family and career, with implications for job sorting, job search, and earnings. These constraints have their roots in gender roles within the household that are shaped by wider societal norms. We review recent research that establishes the relevance of identity and norms for understanding gender inequalities in the labor market, both on the supply-side and on the demand-side, as well as what drives the formation and evolution of these norms. Finally, we conclude with suggestions for future research.
papers.zh_title: 劳动力市场中性别角色的演变
papers.zh_abstract: 本章追溯了劳动力市场中性别研究的发展历程，重点关注学术界对该主题的思考如何与20世纪80年代至今性别不平等的现实发展同步演进。我们提出了一个简单的女性劳动力供给模型，以说明文献中讨论的各种力量（例如生产率差异、不平等的性别角色、工资压价）如何影响性别收入差距。该文献的一个主要进展是更清晰地区分了男性和女性在偏好与技能上的内在差异，与导致性别差距的不同约束条件。我们讨论了关于这些解释相对重要性的研究见解，及其对经济效率的影响。我们强调，当今大部分文献都关注性别约束的相关性，即女性和男性通常在家庭与职业之间面临不同的权衡，这对工作选择、求职和收入都有影响。这些约束根植于家庭内部的性别角色，而家庭角色又受到更广泛社会规范的塑造。我们回顾了近期研究，这些研究确立了身份认同和规范对于理解劳动力市场中性别不平等的相关性，既包括供给方也包括需求方，并探讨了这些规范形成和演变的驱动因素。最后，我们提出了对未来研究的建议。

papers.title: The Economics of “Buy Now, Pay Later”: A Merchant’s Perspective
papers.authors: Tobias Berg, Valentin Burg, Jan Keil, Manju Puri
papers.abstract: “Buy Now, Pay Later” (BNPL) is a key innovation in consumer payments. It bundles the sale of a product with a subsidized loan, effectively offering lower prices to low-creditworthiness customers. BNPL thereby allows merchants to price-discriminate among customers with different willingness-to-pay. Consistent with a price-discrimination mechanism, we show that BNPL increases sales by 20%, driven by low-creditworthiness customers and products where market power is larger. We find that the benefits of offering BNPL significantly outweigh the costs for the merchant. Our findings help to explain the surge in popularity of BNPL in e-commerce around the world.
papers.zh_title: “先买后付”的经济学：商家视角
papers.zh_abstract: “先买后付”（BNPL）是消费者支付领域的一项关键创新。它将产品销售与补贴贷款捆绑在一起，实际上为信用度较低的客户提供了更低的价格。因此，BNPL允许商家在具有不同支付意愿的客户之间进行价格歧视。与价格歧视机制一致，我们表明BNPL使销售额增加了20%，这一增长主要由信用度较低的客户以及市场势力较大的产品驱动。我们发现，提供BNPL的收益显著超过了商家的成本。我们的发现有助于解释BNPL在全球电子商务中迅速流行的原因。

papers.title: Estimating Aggregate Human Capital Externalities
papers.authors: Junjie Guo, Nicolas A. Roys, Ananth Seshadri
papers.abstract: This paper estimates two measures of human capital externalities. By incorporating externalities into an overlapping-generations model of human capital accumulation with Compulsory Schooling Laws (CSL), we show that human capital externalities can be estimated from the effects of CSL for one generation on wages of other generations.
