Using an instrumental-variable strategy deduced from the model, we find one more year of average schooling at the U.S. state level raises individual wages by 6-8%. Taking this reduced-form estimate into account, we find the elasticity of a typical firm’s productivity with respect to the average human capital of an economy is 0.121.
papers.zh_title: 估算总体人力资本外部性
papers.zh_abstract: 本文估算了人力资本外部性的两种度量。通过将外部性纳入一个包含义务教育法的人力资本积累世代交叠模型，我们表明，人力资本外部性可以从一代人的义务教育法对其他代际工资的影响中估算出来。使用从模型中推导出的工具变量策略，我们发现，在美国州级层面，平均受教育年限每增加一年，会使个人工资提高6-8%。考虑到这一简化形式估计值，我们发现典型企业的生产率相对于经济体平均人力资本的弹性为0.121。

papers.title: The Color of Ideas: Racial Dynamics and Citations in Economics
papers.authors: Marlène Koffi, Roland Pongou, Leonard Wantchekon
papers.abstract: This paper investigates the existence of racial disparities in the dissemination of ideas using the paper citation network in economics. Exploiting a comprehensive dataset of over 330,000 publications from 1950 to 2021, combined with manually collected data from the CVs of thousands of economists, we document that papers authored by non-White scholars (Black, Hispanic, or Asian) receive 5.1% to 9.6% fewer citations than those authored by White scholars. The citation gap remains or even amplifies with increasing author seniority and conventional quality indicators and is especially pronounced for Black authors. Moreover, papers authored by non-White scholars are less likely to serve as citation bridges and are less often cited by highly cited papers as measured by the centrality indexes, limiting both their direct and indirect influence. Our analysis indicates that this disparity is not attributable to differences in research quality, author ability, or visibility. Rather, it is largely driven by homophily in citation patterns and racial clusters in networks, where scholars tend to cite authors from their racial group. These findings can be rationalized by a simple theoretical model where citation costs and peer-review preferences influence citation behavior. Then, we provide suggestive evidence that reducing information friction—thereby lowering the cost of citing—could reduce the racial citation gap by up to 50%. Finally, using natural language processing, we highlight the complementarity across racial groups in research and discuss potential losses from racial barriers to idea diffusion.
papers.zh_title: 思想的色彩：经济学中的种族动态与引用
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用经济学论文引用网络，研究了思想传播中是否存在种族差异。利用1950年至2021年间超过33万篇出版物的综合数据集，并结合从数千名经济学家简历中手动收集的数据，我们记录了非白人学者（黑人、西班牙裔或亚裔）撰写的论文被引次数比白人学者撰写的论文少5.1%至9.6%。随着作者资历和传统质量指标的提高，引用差距仍然存在甚至扩大，对于黑人作者尤为明显。此外，非白人学者撰写的论文作为引用桥梁的可能性较低，并且根据中心性指数衡量，被高被引论文引用的频率也较低，从而限制了它们的直接和间接影响力。我们的分析表明，这种差异并非归因于研究质量、作者能力或可见度的差异。相反，它很大程度上是由引用模式中的同质性以及网络中的种族聚类所驱动，即学者倾向于引用其同一种族群体的作者。这些发现可以通过一个简单的理论模型得到合理解释，该模型中引用成本和同行评审偏好影响引用行为。然后，我们提供了暗示性证据，表明减少信息摩擦（从而降低引用成本）可以将种族引用差距减少高达50%。最后，利用自然语言处理，我们强调了不同种族群体在研究中的互补性，并讨论了种族障碍对思想传播可能造成的损失。

papers.title: Wage Adjustment in Efficient Long-Term Employment Relationships
papers.authors: Michael W. L. Elsby, Axel Gottfries, Pawel M. Krolikowski, Gary Solon
papers.abstract: We present a model in which efficient long-term employment relationships are sustained by wage adjustments prompted by productivity shocks and outside job offers. These wage adjustments occur only sporadically, due to the presence of renegotiation costs. The model is amenable to analytical solution, yielding new insights for several labor market phenomena, including: (1) key features of empirical distributions of changes in pay among job stayers; (2) a near-"memorylessness" property in wage dynamics whereby hiring wages have only limited influence on later wages and allocation decisions; and (3) a crucial role for recruitment and retention bonuses in sustaining efficient employment relationships.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, ME；JEL：E24, E3, J3, J6
papers.zh_title: 高效长期雇佣关系中的工资调整
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个模型，在该模型中，高效长期雇佣关系通过由生产率冲击和外部工作机会引发的工资调整得以维持。由于存在重新谈判成本，这些工资调整仅偶尔发生。该模型可进行解析求解，为若干劳动力市场现象提供了新见解，包括：（1）在职者工资变动经验分布的关键特征；（2）工资动态中的近乎“无记忆”特性，即雇佣工资对后续工资和分配决策的影响有限；（3）招聘和留任奖金在维持高效雇佣关系中的关键作用。

papers.title: The Economics of Net Zero Banking
papers.authors: Adair Morse, Parinitha R. Sastry
papers.abstract: Banks have voluntarily committed to align their lending portfolios with a net zero path toward a decarbonized economy. In this review, we explore the economic channels for why portfolio decarbonization might be consistent with lender profit maximization. We frame the question by positing that net zero lending may create differential value through the channels of risk and returns, where return topics span profit margins and lending book growth arguments. We then use the lens of the frame to survey the literature and speak to gaps in research knowledge. We uncover multiple roles for risk arguments influencing decarbonization. Moreover, decarbonization and green investment are tied to enhanced profitability through bank lending growth. Yet, the literature has many dots yet to connect. We suggest that future work may draw further connections between the literature in climate finance and the broader literature in banking, to enhance our understanding of the role that banks will play in the net zero transition.
papers.zh_title: 净零银行业的经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 银行已自愿承诺将其贷款组合与通往脱碳经济的净零路径保持一致。在这篇综述中，我们探讨了投资组合脱碳为何可能与贷款机构利润最大化相一致的经济渠道。我们通过假设净零贷款可能通过风险和回报渠道创造差异化价值来构建问题框架，其中回报主题涵盖利润率与贷款簿增长论点。然后，我们利用该框架的视角来审视文献，并指出研究知识中的空白。我们发现了风险论点影响脱碳的多种作用。此外，脱碳和绿色投资通过银行贷款增长与盈利能力提升相关联。然而，文献中仍有许多点有待连接。我们建议，未来的工作可以进一步连接气候金融文献与更广泛的银行业文献之间的联系，以加深我们对银行在净零转型中将扮演角色的理解。

papers.title: Therapy to Reduce Violence and Improve Institutional Safety During Incarceration
papers.authors: Mary Kate Batistich, William N. Evans, Tyler Giles, Rebecca Margolit-Chan
papers.abstract: We evaluate the impact of Step Up, a cognitive behavioral therapy program administered to inmates at the Lubbock County Detention Center in Lubbock, Texas. Step Up aims to address self-destructive thought and behavior patterns through a combination of group classes, one-on-one counseling, and a structured workbook. We compare individuals over time who enter the Step Up program to a group of eligible and interested nonparticipants in an unbalanced two-way fixed effects framework. Despite similarities in observable characteristics and initial behavior metrics, individuals who enter Step Up exhibit a 49% reduction in monthly behavioral incident rates compared to the untreated group, which is about an 8-percentage point decline. The typical participant spends about 3 months in the program, and we find evidence that the behavioral improvements persist after program completion.
papers.zh_title: 减少暴力并改善监禁期间机构安全的疗法
papers.zh_abstract: 我们评估了“Step Up”项目的影响，这是一个在德克萨斯州拉伯克县拘留中心对囚犯实施的认知行为疗法项目。Step Up旨在通过小组课程、一对一咨询和结构化工作手册相结合的方式，解决自我毁灭的思维和行为模式。我们在一个非平衡的双向固定效应框架中，比较了随时间推移进入Step Up项目的个体与一组符合条件且感兴趣但未参与的个体。尽管在可观测特征和初始行为指标上具有相似性，但进入Step Up的个体每月行为事件发生率比未治疗组降低了49%，这大约相当于下降了8个百分点。典型参与者在项目中花费约3个月时间，我们发现有证据表明，行为改善在项目完成后持续存在。

papers.title: The Power of Daughters: How Physicians' Family Influences Female Patients' Health
papers.authors: Mette Gørtz, Ida L. Kristiansen, Tianyi Wang
papers.abstract: While physicians are crucial to patient outcomes, what determines physician behavior and decision making remains to be understood. In this paper, we study how physicians’ family characteristics influence physicians’ behavior and patient health outcomes. Using administrative data from Denmark and the natural experiment of a child’s gender, we find that having daughters affects male primary care physicians’ practices and the health of their female patients. Specifically, female patients cared for by male physicians with one additional daughter (compared to one additional son) are 5.5% less likely to die from female-specific cancers, including breast and gynecologic cancers. This improvement in outcomes appears to stem from enhanced cancer screening and preventive efforts, leading to earlier detection and more successful prevention. Exploring potential mechanisms, we find that male physicians with more daughters show greater attentiveness to female-specific health guidelines and are more likely to collaborate with women. We also find suggestive evidence from survey data that female patients report higher levels of trust, empathy, and clearer communication with these physicians.
papers.zh_title: 女儿的力量：医生的家庭如何影响女性患者的健康
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管医生对患者结果至关重要，但决定医生行为和决策的因素仍有待理解。在本文中，我们研究了医生的家庭特征如何影响医生的行为以及患者的健康结果。利用丹麦的行政数据和子女性别的自然实验，我们发现拥有女儿会影响男性初级保健医生的执业行为及其女性患者的健康。具体而言，与多一个儿子相比，由多一个女儿的男性医生照料的女性患者，死于女性特定癌症（包括乳腺癌和妇科癌症）的可能性降低5.5%。这种结果的改善似乎源于加强的癌症筛查和预防工作，从而导致了更早的发现和更成功的预防。在探索潜在机制时，我们发现拥有更多女儿的男性医生对女性特定健康指南表现出更高的关注度，并且更有可能与女性合作。我们还从调查数据中发现了暗示性证据，表明女性患者报告称，与这些医生相处时感受到更高的信任度、同理心以及更清晰的沟通。

papers.title: Gender-Based Violence in Schools and Girls’ Education: Experimental Evidence from Mozambique
papers.authors: Sofia Amaral, Aixa Garcia-Ramos, Selim Gulesci, Alejandra Ramos, Sarita P. Ore-Quispe, Maria Micaela Sviatschi
papers.abstract: Gender-based violence (GBV) at schools is a pervasive problem that affects millions of adolescent girls worldwide. In partnership with the Ministry of Education in Mozambique, we developed an intervention to increase the capacity of key school personnel to address GBV and to improve students’ awareness as well as proactive behaviors. To understand the role of GBV on girls’ education, we randomized not only exposure to the intervention but also whether the student component was targeted to girls only, boys only, or both. Our findings indicate a reduction in sexual violence by teachers and school staff against girls, regardless of the targeted gender group, providing evidence of the role of improving the capacity of key school personnel to deter perpetrators. Using administrative records, we also find that in schools where the intervention encouraged proactive behavior by girls, there was an increase in their school enrollment, largely due to an increased propensity for GBV reporting by victims. Our findings suggest that effectively mitigating violence to improve girls’ schooling requires a dual approach: deterring potential perpetrators and fostering a proactive stance among victims, such as increased reporting.
papers.zh_title: 校园性别暴力与女童教育：来自莫桑比克的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 校园性别暴力是一个普遍存在的问题，影响着全球数百万青春期女童。我们与莫桑比克教育部合作，开发了一项干预措施，旨在提高关键学校人员应对性别暴力的能力，并改善学生的认知及主动行为。为了理解性别暴力对女童教育的作用，我们不仅随机分配了是否接受干预，还随机分配了学生部分是否仅针对女童、仅针对男童或两者都针对。我们的研究结果表明，无论针对哪个性别群体，教师和学校工作人员对女童的性暴力都有所减少，这为提升关键学校人员能力以威慑施暴者的作用提供了证据。利用行政记录，我们还发现，在鼓励女童采取主动行为的学校中，女童的入学率有所提高，这主要是由于受害者举报性别暴力的倾向增加。我们的研究结果表明，要有效减轻暴力以改善女童教育，需要双管齐下：威慑潜在的施暴者，并培养受害者（如增加举报）的主动姿态。

papers.title: r-g before and after the Great Wars 1507-2023
papers.authors: Kenneth S. Rogoff, Paul Schmelzing
papers.abstract: We present new long-run samples of r-g series over centuries for key economies in the international financial system. Across a wide variety of econometric approaches, and including duration-matched constructions, we demonstrate strong evidence of trend stationarity in these series. Although we confirm trend stationarity, we find robust evidence of a major structural break in the first third of the 20th century. A multi-century downward trend in r-g appears to have levelled off in the years around 1930, and since then r-g has shown high volatility coupled with clear upwards pressure: notably, though real interest rates may still appear favorably low, aggregate growth rates are drifting downwards in advanced economies since the interwar period, creating secular pressures on r-g and debt sustainability. Our results stand in contrast to much recent literature and suggest the need for much more caution in assuming benign trends in global public debt sustainability. At the same time, when adding riskier elements of capital returns, the data lend support for structurally increasing "dynamic efficiency". We then associate the key 1930s inflection to the establishment and growth of welfare states in advanced economies, and the surge in non-defense, non-interest expenditures.
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提供了国际金融体系中关键经济体几个世纪以来r-g序列的新长期样本。通过多种计量经济学方法，包括期限匹配的构建，我们证明了这些序列存在趋势平稳性的有力证据。尽管我们确认了趋势平稳性，但我们发现了20世纪前三分之一时期存在一个重大结构性断裂的有力证据。r-g长达数个世纪的下降趋势似乎在1930年左右趋于平稳，此后r-g表现出高波动性并伴有明显的上行压力：值得注意的是，尽管实际利率可能仍然看似有利地偏低，但自两次世界大战期间以来，发达经济体的总体增长率正在向下漂移，这给r-g和债务可持续性带来了长期压力。我们的结果与近期许多文献形成对比，并表明在假设全球公共债务可持续性呈良性趋势时需要更加谨慎。同时，当加入资本回报中风险较高的要素时，数据支持结构性增强的“动态效率”。然后，我们将关键的1930年代拐点与发达经济体福利国家的建立和增长以及非国防、非利息支出的激增联系起来。

papers.title: Market Power and Redeemable Loyalty Token Design
papers.authors: Kenneth S. Rogoff, Zhiheng He, Yang You
papers.abstract: Digitalization has led to a rapid expansion of loyalty tokens typically bundled as part of product price. An open question is whether, as technology evolves, firms will have a strong incentive to make loyalty tokens tradable, thereby raising regulation issues, including for monetary and banking authorities. Our main finding is that, under fairly general assumptions, firms will still have strong incentives to maintain non-tradability. This may seem surprising, given that an individual consumer would be willing to pay a premium for tradable tokens. However, provided the tokens do not offer a convenience yield to non-platform consumers, non-tradability compensates by expanding the outstanding stock of tokens outstanding at any one time, thereby providing a better overall form of financing. We further show that an issuer with stronger market power tends to make its revenue more token-dependent. Empirical results from airline mileage and hotel reward programs align with our theory.
papers.zh_title: 市场势力与可赎回忠诚代币设计
papers.zh_abstract: 数字化导致忠诚代币迅速扩张，这些代币通常作为产品价格的一部分捆绑销售。一个悬而未决的问题是，随着技术发展，企业是否有强烈动机使忠诚代币可交易，从而引发监管问题，包括货币和银行当局的关注。我们的主要发现是，在相当一般的假设下，企业仍然有强烈动机维持代币的不可交易性。这似乎令人惊讶，因为单个消费者愿意为可交易代币支付溢价。然而，只要代币不向非平台消费者提供便利收益，不可交易性通过在任何时点扩大流通中的代币存量来补偿，从而提供一种更好的整体融资形式。我们进一步表明，具有更强市场势力的发行者倾向于使其收入更依赖代币。来自航空里程和酒店奖励计划的实证结果与我们的理论一致。

papers.title: Labor Force Transitions
papers.authors: Rui Castro, Fabian Lange, Markus Poschke
papers.abstract: Labor Force States and flows between are useful tools to model individual dynamics in the labor market. This chapter reviews recent literature uncovering substantial heterogeneity in transitions across Labor Force States. We review methods and results by replicating leading studies using Canadian data and relate our findings to important literatures on recall non-employment, duration dependence, and job ladders.
papers.zh_title: 劳动力状态转换
papers.zh_abstract: 劳动力状态及其之间的流动是模拟劳动力市场中个体动态的有用工具。本章回顾了近期文献，这些文献揭示了劳动力状态转换中存在显著的异质性。我们通过使用加拿大数据复制领先研究来回顾方法和结果，并将我们的发现与关于召回型非就业、持续时间依赖性和工作阶梯的重要文献联系起来。

papers.title: The Effects of Lump-Sum Food Benefits during the COVID-19 Pandemic on Spending, Hardship, and Health
papers.authors: Lauren L. Bauer, Krista J. Ruffini, Diane Whitmore Schanzenbach
papers.abstract: This paper examines how providing families with lump-sum in-kind assistance during the pandemic affected food hardship, economic well-being, and maternal health. We study the introduction of a new program, P-EBT, that provided grocery vouchers worth approximately $300 per student during spring and summer 2020. Using cross-state variation in program timing, we find that families spent $18-42 per student per week in the 6 weeks after benefit receipt. Household food insufficiency and children’s food insecurity among low-income families declined by 27-49% in the month following receipt, and maternal mental health improved by 0.9 standard deviation.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19疫情期间一次性食品福利对支出、困难与健康的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了疫情期间向家庭提供一次性实物援助如何影响食品困难、经济福祉和母亲健康。我们研究了一项新计划P-EBT的引入，该计划在2020年春夏期间为每位学生提供价值约300美元的食品券。利用各州计划实施时间的差异，我们发现家庭在收到福利后的6周内，每周每位学生支出增加18-42美元。低收入家庭中，家庭食品不足和儿童食品不安全状况在收到福利后的一个月内下降了27-49%，母亲心理健康改善了0.9个标准差。

papers.title: Generative AI for Economic Research: LLMs Learn to Collaborate and Reason
papers.authors: Anton Korinek
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have seen remarkable progress in speed, cost efficiency, accuracy, and the capacity to process larger amounts of text over the past year. This article is a practical guide to update economists on how to use these advancements in their research. The main innovations covered are (i) new reasoning capabilities, (ii) novel workspaces for interactive LLM collaboration such as Claude's Artifacts, ChatGPT's Canvas or Microsoft's Copilot, and (iii) recent improvements in LLM-powered internet search. Incorporating these capabilities in their work allows economists to achieve significant productivity gains. Additionally, I highlight new use cases in promoting research, such as automatically generated blog posts, presentation slides and interviews as well as podcasts via Google's NotebookLM.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PR；JEL：A10, B4, C88, O33
papers.zh_title: 用于经济学研究的生成式AI：大语言模型学会协作与推理
papers.zh_abstract: 在过去一年中，大语言模型在速度、成本效率、准确性以及处理更大文本量的能力方面取得了显著进步。本文是一份实用指南，旨在更新经济学家如何在研究中使用这些进展。涵盖的主要创新包括：(i) 新的推理能力，(ii) 用于交互式LLM协作的新型工作空间，如Claude的Artifacts、ChatGPT的Canvas或Microsoft的Copilot，以及(iii) LLM驱动的互联网搜索的最新改进。将这些能力融入工作中，使经济学家能够实现显著的生产力提升。此外，我还强调了在研究推广中的新用例，例如通过Google的NotebookLM自动生成的博客文章、演示幻灯片、访谈以及播客。

papers.title: Using Stock Price Movements to Estimate the Harm from Collusive Drug Patent Litigation Settlements
papers.authors: Keith M. Drake, Thomas McGuire
papers.abstract: The tradeoff between incentives to invest in R&D and efficient pricing takes a special form in the pharmaceutical sector. Brand drugs command high prices until generic competition begins, the timing of which usually depends on the outcome of patent infringement litigation. One potential outcome is a collusive agreement between the brand and a potential generic competitor that delays competition, with the brand sharing the profits from the delay by paying the generic challenger. Collusive patent settlements have plagued competition in pharmaceutical markets globally and especially in the U.S., the world’s largest market. This paper estimates the cost of these collusive settlements to U.S. drug purchasers using stock price movements. If the brand firm’s increase in profits from collusion is capitalized into stock prices, the change in value upon a settlement announcement can be used to estimate the new profit flows from higher prices to purchasers. We assembled data on 64 settlements reached during 2014-2023 and used the announcement descriptions and information that surfaced later to identify 17 potentially collusive settlements. We applied event study methods and found, consistent with prior research, that settlement announcements with no indication of collusion had no significant effect on the stock prices of brand firms implying that they tended to meet traders’ expectations. Stock prices increased by approximately 3.5%, on average, after settlements with an indication of collusion, implying they increased brand profits by delaying generic entry. These increases correspond to a total increase in U.S. purchaser spending of $3.1-$3.2 billion per year during 2014-2023. Factoring up our estimate to the entire industry implies the increase in spending may be closer to $12 billion per year.
papers.zh_title: 利用股价变动估算合谋性药品专利诉讼和解造成的损害
papers.zh_abstract: 研发投资激励与有效定价之间的权衡在制药行业具有特殊形式。品牌药在仿制药竞争开始前维持高价，而竞争开始的时间通常取决于专利侵权诉讼的结果。一种可能的结果是品牌药企与潜在仿制药竞争者之间达成合谋协议，通过品牌药企向仿制药挑战者支付费用以分享延迟竞争带来的利润，从而推迟竞争。合谋性专利和解一直困扰着全球药品市场，尤其是美国这个全球最大市场。本文利用股价变动估算这些合谋性和解对美国药品购买者造成的成本。如果品牌药企因合谋而增加的利润被资本化到股价中，那么和解公告时的价值变化可用于估算因购买者支付更高价格而产生的新利润流。我们收集了2014-2023年间达成的64项和解数据，并利用公告描述及后来出现的信息识别出17项潜在合谋性和解。我们应用事件研究方法发现，与先前研究一致，没有合谋迹象的和解公告对品牌药企股价没有显著影响，表明它们往往符合交易者的预期。在有合谋迹象的和解公告后，股价平均上涨约3.5%，表明它们通过延迟仿制药进入增加了品牌药企利润。这些增长对应于2014-2023年间美国购买者总支出每年增加31-32亿美元。将我们的估计扩展到整个行业，意味着支出增加可能接近每年120亿美元。

papers.title: Liquidity Traps: A Unified Theory of the Great Depression and Great Recession
papers.authors: Gauti B. Eggertsson, Sergey K. Egiev
papers.abstract: This paper presents a unified framework to explain three major economic downturns: the U.S. Great Depression, the U.S. Great Recession, and Japan’s Long Recession. Temporary economic disruptions, such as banking crises and excessive debt accumulation, can drive natural interest rates into negative territory in the short term. At the same time, structural factors, including demographic decline and rising inequality, can depress natural interest rates over short and long horizons. A negative natural interest rate and the zero lower bound (ZLB) are necessary conditions for a liquidity trap. Credible monetary policy can counteract the adverse effects of short-run liquidity traps. Diminished monetary policy credibility or persistent negative natural rates may necessitate fiscal interventions. The framework sheds light on the macroeconomic challenges of low-interest-rate environments and underscores the central importance of policy regimes. We close by reflecting on the great macroeconomic question of our time: Will short-term interest rates collapse back to zero once the inflation surge of the 2020s moves to the back mirror and the political landscape in the US has dramatically changed?
papers.zh_title: 流动性陷阱：大萧条与大衰退的统一理论
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一个统一框架来解释三次重大经济衰退：美国大萧条、美国大衰退和日本长期衰退。银行危机和过度债务积累等暂时性经济冲击可能在短期内将自然利率推入负值区域。同时，人口下降和不平等加剧等结构性因素可能在短期和长期内压低自然利率。负自然利率和零下限是流动性陷阱的必要条件。可信的货币政策可以抵消短期流动性陷阱的不利影响。货币政策可信度下降或持续的自然利率为负可能需要财政干预。该框架揭示了低利率环境下的宏观经济挑战，并强调了政策体制的核心重要性。最后，我们反思了我们这个时代的重大宏观经济问题：一旦2020年代的通货膨胀激增成为过去，且美国政治格局发生巨大变化，短期利率是否会再次跌回零？

papers.title: Private Equity for Pension Plans? Evaluating Private Equity Performance from an Investor's Perspective
papers.authors: Arthur Korteweg, Stavros Panageas, Anand Systla
papers.abstract: We evaluate private equity (PE) performance using investor-specific stochastic discount factors, and examine whether investors could benefit from changing their allocation to PE. Plans invest in PE funds with higher average risk-adjusted performance. This is mainly due to access to successful PE managers, not superior selection skill. Decomposing returns into risk-compensation and "alpha", we find that some plans obtain higher PE returns by taking more risk without earning higher, and in some cases earning lower, risk-adjusted returns, broadly consistent with agency problems within plans.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, PE, PR；JEL：G11, G12, G23, G24, H75
papers.zh_title: 养老金计划的私募股权投资？从投资者角度评估私募股权表现
papers.zh_abstract: 我们使用投资者特定的随机贴现因子评估私募股权表现，并考察投资者是否可以从改变其私募股权配置中受益。计划投资于具有更高平均风险调整后表现的私募股权基金。这主要归因于接触成功的私募股权经理，而非卓越的选择技能。将回报分解为风险补偿和“阿尔法”，我们发现一些计划通过承担更多风险获得更高的私募股权回报，但没有获得更高、在某些情况下甚至获得更低的风险调整后回报，这大致与计划内部的代理问题一致。

papers.title: How Institutions Interact with Exchange Rates After the 2024 US Presidential Election: New High-Frequency Evidence
papers.authors: Joshua Aizenman, Jamel Saadaoui
papers.abstract: This paper investigates how institutional quality shaped currency responses to the 2024 U.S. presidential election, using high-frequency exchange rate data for 73 countries. We document that virtually all currencies depreciated against the U.S. dollar immediately following the election result, which markets had not anticipated. Surprisingly, countries with stronger institutional quality, typically considered more resilient, experienced larger and more persistent depreciations. We interpret this through the lens of a geopolitical realignment: the election marks a structural break in the U.S. role as guarantor of a rule-based international order. Under the new administration's more transactional and bilateralist orientation, strong institutional alignment with liberal democratic norms may have increased perceived exposure to U.S. policy uncertainty. Our findings reveal how political regime shifts in leading economies can reconfigure the global distribution of financial risk premia.
papers.meta: Programs：IFM；JEL：F01, F31, F36, F4, F40, F42
papers.zh_title: 2024年美国总统大选后制度如何与汇率互动：新的高频证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用73个国家的高频汇率数据，研究了制度质量如何影响货币对2024年美国总统大选的反应。我们记录到，在大选结果公布后（市场此前并未预料到这一结果），几乎所有货币都相对于美元贬值。令人惊讶的是，制度质量更强、通常被认为更具韧性的国家，经历了更大且更持久的贬值。我们通过地缘政治重组的视角来解读这一现象：此次选举标志着美国作为基于规则的国际秩序担保人角色的结构性断裂。在新政府更具交易性和双边主义的导向下，与自由民主规范高度一致的制度可能增加了对美国政策不确定性的感知敞口。我们的研究结果揭示了主要经济体的政治体制更迭如何重新配置全球金融风险溢价的分布。

papers.title: How Important Are Cultural Frictions for Internal Migration? Evidence from the Nineteenth Century United States
papers.authors: Taylor Jaworski, Erik O. Kimbrough, Nicole Saito
papers.abstract: We propose a new measure of cultural distance based on differences in the composition of first names and church denominations between locations. We use a gravity equation to estimate the elasticity of migration flows with respect to the two components of cultural distance as well as a standard measure of travel costs via the transportation network in the United States between 1850 and 1870. Our findings indicate a modest role for cultural distance relative to travel costs in explaining migration flows. We construct migration costs that reflect the distinct contributions of cultural distance and travel costs, and use an economic geography model of migration to quantify their effects. Travel costs are substantially more important than cultural distance for aggregate welfare. Nevertheless, we provide evidence that the components of cultural distance play a role in shaping of how many people move and their final destinations.
papers.zh_title: 文化摩擦对国内移民有多重要？来自十九世纪美国的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种基于不同地点之间名字构成和教会教派差异的文化距离新度量。我们使用引力方程估算了1850年至1870年间美国移民流对文化距离两个组成部分以及通过交通网络衡量的标准旅行成本的弹性。我们的研究结果表明，在解释移民流方面，文化距离相对于旅行成本的作用较小。我们构建了反映文化距离和旅行成本各自贡献的移民成本，并使用移民的经济地理模型来量化其影响。对于总体福利而言，旅行成本比文化距离重要得多。尽管如此，我们提供的证据表明，文化距离的组成部分在决定迁移人数及其最终目的地方面发挥着作用。

papers.title: Development Mismatch? Evidence from Agricultural Projects in Pastoral Africa
papers.authors: Eoin F. McGuirk, Nathan Nunn
papers.abstract: We study the consequences of a clash between contemporary development initiatives and traditional economic practices in Africa. Crop agriculture has expanded considerably across the continent in recent years. Much of this expansion has occurred in traditionally pastoral areas, where land is typically managed according to customary arrangements. This is believed to be a major cause of conflict between pastoral and agricultural ethnic groups. We test this hypothesis using geocoded data on agricultural development projects across Africa from 1995-2014. We find that implementing agricultural projects in traditionally pastoral areas leads to an almost two-fold increase in the risk of conflict. We find no equivalent effect for agricultural projects implemented in traditionally agricultural areas, nor for non-agricultural projects implemented in either location. We also find that this mechanism contributes to the spread of extremist-religious conflict in the form of jihadist attacks. The effects are muted when agricultural projects are paired with pastoral projects. This is more likely to occur when pastoral groups have more political power. Despite these effects on conflict, we find that crop agriculture projects increase nighttime luminosity in both agricultural and pastoral areas. Evidence from survey data suggests that the gains in pastoral areas are concentrated in non-pastoral households. Our findings indicate that "development mismatch"---i.e., imposing projects that are misaligned with local populations---can be costly.
papers.zh_title: 发展错配？来自非洲牧区农业项目的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了当代发展倡议与非洲传统经济实践之间冲突的后果。近年来，作物农业在整个非洲大陆显著扩张。这种扩张大部分发生在传统牧区，这些地区的土地通常根据习惯安排进行管理。这被认为是导致牧民和农业族群之间冲突的主要原因。我们利用1995年至2014年非洲各地农业发展项目的地理编码数据来检验这一假设。我们发现，在传统牧区实施农业项目会导致冲突风险增加近两倍。对于在传统农业区实施的农业项目，或在任何地点实施的非农业项目，我们没有发现类似的影响。我们还发现，这种机制以圣战袭击的形式助长了极端宗教冲突的蔓延。当农业项目与牧业项目配套实施时，这种影响会减弱。当牧民群体拥有更多政治权力时，这种情况更有可能发生。尽管存在这些对冲突的影响，我们发现作物农业项目在农业区和牧区都增加了夜间灯光亮度。来自调查数据的证据表明，牧区的收益集中在非牧户家庭。我们的研究结果表明，“发展错配”——即推行与当地人口不匹配的项目——可能代价高昂。

papers.title: Sticky Inflation: Monetary Policy when Debt Drags Inflation Expectations
papers.authors: Saki Bigio, Nicolas Caramp, Dejanir Silva
papers.abstract: We append the expectation of a monetary-fiscal reform into a standard New Keynesian model. If a reform occurs, monetary policy will temporarily aid debt sustainability through a temporary burst in inflation. The anticipation of a possible reform links debt levels with inflation expectations. As a result, interest rates have two effects: they influence demand and affect expected inflation in opposite directions. The expectations effect is linked to the impact of interest rates on public debt. While lowering inflation in the short term is possible through demand control, inflation tends to rise again due to its impact on inflation expectations (sticky inflation). Optimal monetary policy may allow low real interest rates after fiscal shocks, temporarily breaking away from the Taylor principle. We assess whether the Federal Reserve's “staying behind the curve” was the right strategy during the recent post-pandemic inflation surge.
papers.zh_title: 粘性通胀：当债务拖累通胀预期时的货币政策
papers.zh_abstract: 我们将对货币-财政改革的预期纳入一个标准的新凯恩斯主义模型。如果改革发生，货币政策将暂时通过一轮短暂的通货膨胀来帮助维持债务可持续性。对可能改革的预期将债务水平与通胀预期联系起来。因此，利率产生两种效应：它们影响需求，并以相反方向影响预期通胀。预期效应与利率对公共债务的影响相关。虽然通过需求控制在短期内降低通胀是可能的，但由于其对通胀预期的影响（粘性通胀），通胀往往会再次上升。最优货币政策可能允许在财政冲击后维持低实际利率，暂时偏离泰勒原则。我们评估了美联储在最近疫情后通胀飙升期间“落后于曲线”的策略是否正确。

papers.title: Taxing the Wealth of the Poor: Evidence from the Danish Old-Age Support Asset Test
papers.authors: Niels Johannesen, Johan Sæverud, Emmanuel Saez
papers.abstract: We document strong behavioral responses to an asset test for an old-age support program in Denmark using comprehensive administrative data. We show that the density distribution of the liquid assets targeted by the test exhibits large but diffuse excess mass below the threshold for the treated group relative to control groups of comparable but ineligible individuals. A cohort analysis exploiting the panel structure suggests that the program reduces liquid assets by 20 percent around the threshold. Analyzing high-frequency bank data on assets and cash withdrawals shows that the excess mass around the threshold largely reflects permanent rather than temporary responses.
papers.zh_title: 对穷人财富征税：来自丹麦老年支持计划资产审查的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用全面的行政数据，记录了对丹麦一项老年支持计划进行资产审查所产生的强烈行为反应。我们表明，相对于由类似但不符合条件的个体组成的对照组，该审查所针对的流动资产密度分布在处理组阈值以下呈现出大量但分散的过剩质量。利用面板结构的队列分析表明，该计划在阈值附近将流动资产减少了20%。对资产和现金提取的高频银行数据进行分析表明，阈值附近的过剩质量在很大程度上反映了永久性而非暂时性的反应。

papers.title: Why Has Construction Productivity Stagnated? The Role of Land-Use Regulation
papers.authors: Leonardo D'Amico, Edward L. Glaeser, Joseph Gyourko, William R. Kerr, Giacomo A.M. Ponzetto
papers.abstract: We document a Kuznets curve for construction productivity in 20th-century America. Homes built per construction worker remained stagnant between 1900 and 1940, boomed after World War II, and then plummeted after 1970. The productivity boom from 1940 to 1970 shows that nothing makes technological progress inherently impossible in construction. What stopped it? We present a model in which local land-use controls limit the size of building projects. This constraint reduces the equilibrium size of construction companies, reducing both scale economies and incentives to invest in innovation. Our model shows that, in a competitive industry, such inefficient reductions in firm size and technology investment are a distinctive consequence of restrictive project regulation, while classic regulatory barriers to entry increase firm size. The model is consistent with an extensive series of key facts about the nature of the construction sector. The post-1970 productivity decline coincides with increases in our best proxies for land-use regulation. The size of development projects is small today and has declined over time. The size of construction firms is also quite small, especially relative to other goods-producing firms, and smaller builders are less productive. Areas with stricter land use regulation have particularly small and unproductive construction establishments. Patenting activity in construction stagnated and diverged from other sectors. A back-of-the-envelope calculation indicates that, if half of the observed link between establishment size and productivity is causal, America’s residential construction firms would be approximately 60 percent more productive if their size distribution matched that of manufacturing.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, IFM, ITI；JEL：D24, E23, L7, R31, R52
papers.zh_title: 为什么建筑业生产率停滞不前？土地使用监管的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 我们记录了20世纪美国建筑业生产率的库兹涅茨曲线。1900年至1940年间，每位建筑工人建造的房屋数量停滞不前，二战后激增，然后在1970年后急剧下降。1940年至1970年的生产率繁荣表明，技术进步在建筑业中并非天生不可能。是什么阻止了它？我们提出了一个模型，其中地方土地使用管制限制了建筑项目的规模。这种约束降低了建筑公司的均衡规模，从而减少了规模经济和投资于创新的激励。我们的模型表明，在一个竞争性行业中，这种公司规模和技术投资的低效减少是限制性项目监管的独特后果，而经典的监管进入壁垒则会增加公司规模。该模型与关于建筑业性质的一系列广泛关键事实相一致。1970年后的生产率下降与我们最佳的土地使用监管代理变量的增加相吻合。如今开发项目的规模很小，并且随着时间的推移而下降。建筑公司的规模也相当小，尤其是相对于其他商品生产公司而言，并且较小的建筑商生产率较低。土地使用监管更严格的地区，建筑企业规模特别小且生产率低下。建筑业的专利活动停滞不前，并与其他行业分化。一个粗略的计算表明，如果企业规模与生产率之间观察到的联系有一半是因果关系，那么如果美国住宅建筑公司的规模分布与制造业相匹配，其生产率将提高约60%。

papers.title: Adverse Selection and (un)Natural Monopoly in Insurance Markets
papers.authors: Edward Kong, Timothy Layton, Mark Shepard
papers.abstract: Adverse selection is a classic market failure known to limit or “unravel”' trade in high-quality insurance and many other economic settings. While the standard theory emphasizes quality distortions, we argue that selection has another big-picture implication: it unravels competition among differentiated firms, leading to fewer surviving competitors—and in the extreme, what we call “un-natural” monopoly. Adverse selection pushes firms toward aggressive price cutting to attract price-sensitive, low-risk consumers. This creates a wedge between average and marginal costs that (like fixed costs in standard models) limits how may firms can profitably survive. We demonstrate this insight in a simple model of insurer entry and price competition, estimated using administrative data from Massachusetts' health insurance exchange. We find a large “selection wedge” of 20-30% of average costs, which (without corrective policies) unravels the market to monopoly. Our analysis suggests a surprising policy implication: interventions that limit price-cutting can improve welfare by supporting more entry, and ultimately lower prices.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, IO, PE；JEL：D4, I11, I13, L1, L40
papers.zh_title: 保险市场中的逆向选择与（非）自然垄断
papers.zh_abstract: 逆向选择是一种经典的市场失灵，已知会限制或“瓦解”高质量保险以及许多其他经济环境中的交易。虽然标准理论强调质量扭曲，但我们认为逆向选择还有另一个宏观层面的含义：它瓦解了差异化公司之间的竞争，导致幸存竞争者减少——在极端情况下，导致我们所谓的“非自然”垄断。逆向选择促使公司进行激进的价格削减，以吸引对价格敏感的低风险消费者。这在平均成本和边际成本之间创造了一个楔子（类似于标准模型中的固定成本），限制了有多少公司能够盈利地生存。我们通过一个简单的保险公司进入和价格竞争模型来展示这一见解，并使用来自马萨诸塞州健康保险交易所的行政数据进行估计。我们发现一个巨大的“选择楔子”，占平均成本的20-30%，在没有纠正性政策的情况下，这会将市场瓦解为垄断。我们的分析提出了一个令人惊讶的政策含义：限制价格削减的干预措施可以通过支持更多公司进入来改善福利，并最终降低价格。

papers.title: Racial Screening on the Big Screen? Evidence from the Motion Picture Industry
papers.authors: Liang Zhong, Angela Crema, M. Daniele Paserman
papers.abstract: We develop a model of discrimination that allows us to interpret observed differences in outcomes across groups, conditional on passing a screening test, as taste-based (employer,) statistical, or customer discrimination. We apply this framework to investigate the nature of non-white underrepresentation in the US motion picture industry. Leveraging a novel data set with racial identifiers for the cast of 7,000 motion pictures, we show that, conditional on production, non-white movies exhibit higher average revenues and a smaller variance. Our findings can be rationalized in the context of our model if non-white movies are held to higher standards for production.
papers.zh_title: 大银幕上的种族筛选？来自电影业的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个歧视模型，使我们能够将观察到的、在通过筛选测试后各组之间的结果差异解释为基于偏好的（雇主）、统计性或顾客歧视。我们应用这个框架来调查美国电影业中非白人代表性不足的性质。利用一个包含7000部电影演员种族标识符的新数据集，我们表明，在制作条件给定的情况下，非白人电影表现出更高的平均收入和更小的方差。在我们的模型背景下，如果非白人电影被要求达到更高的制作标准，我们的发现可以得到合理解释。

papers.title: Shifting Patterns of Social Interaction: Exploring the Social Life of Urban Spaces Through A.I.
papers.authors: Arianna Salazar-Miranda, Zhuangyuan Fan, Michael B. Baick, Keith N. Hampton, Fabio Duarte, Becky P.Y. Loo, Edward L. Glaeser, Carlo Ratti
papers.abstract: We analyze changes in pedestrian behavior over a 30-year period in four urban public spaces located in New York, Boston, and Philadelphia. Building on William Whyte's observational work from 1980, where he manually recorded pedestrian behaviors, we employ computer vision and deep learning techniques to examine video footage from 1979-80 and 2008-10. Our analysis measures changes in walking speed, lingering behavior, group sizes, and group formation. We find that the average walking speed has increased by 15%, while the time spent lingering in these spaces has halved across all locations. Although the percentage of pedestrians walking alone remained relatively stable (from 67% to 68%), the frequency of group encounters declined, indicating fewer interactions in public spaces. This shift suggests that urban residents increasingly view streets as thoroughfares rather than as social spaces, which has important implications for the role of public spaces in fostering social engagement.
papers.zh_title: 社交互动模式的变迁：通过人工智能探索城市空间的社会生活
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了纽约、波士顿和费城四个城市公共空间在30年间行人行为的变化。基于William Whyte于1980年手动记录行人行为的观察性研究，我们采用计算机视觉和深度学习技术，检查了1979-80年和2008-10年的视频资料。我们的分析测量了步行速度、逗留行为、群体规模和群体形成的变化。我们发现，平均步行速度增加了15%，而在这些空间中逗留的时间在所有地点都减少了一半。尽管独自行走的行人比例保持相对稳定（从67%到68%），但群体相遇的频率下降了，表明公共空间中的互动减少。这种转变表明，城市居民越来越将街道视为通道而非社交空间，这对公共空间在促进社会参与方面的作用具有重要影响。

papers.title: Assortative Matching and Wages: The Role of Selection
papers.authors: Katarína Borovičková, Robert Shimer
papers.abstract: We develop a random search model with two-sided heterogeneity and match-specific productivity shocks to explain why high-productivity workers tend to work at high-productivity firms despite low-productivity workers gaining about as much from such matches. Our model has two key predictions: i) the average log wage that a worker receives is increasing in the worker's and employer's productivity, with low-productivity workers gaining proportionally more at high-productivity firms and ii) there is assortative matching between a worker's productivity and that of her employer. Selective job acceptance drives these patterns. All workers are equally likely to meet all firms, but workers have higher surplus from meeting firms of similar productivity. The high surplus meetings result in matches more frequently, generating assortative matching. Only the subset of meetings that result in matches are observed in administrative wage data, shaping wages. We show that our findings are quantitatively consistent with recent empirical results. Moreover, we prove this selection is not detected using standard empirical approaches, highlighting the importance of theory-guided empirical work. Our results imply that encouraging high-wage firms to hire low-wage workers may be less effective at reducing wage inequality than wage patterns suggest.
papers.zh_title: 分类匹配与工资：选择的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个具有双边异质性和匹配特定生产率冲击的随机搜索模型，以解释为什么高生产率工人倾向于在高生产率企业工作，尽管低生产率工人从这种匹配中获得的收益几乎相同。我们的模型有两个关键预测：i) 工人获得的平均对数工资随工人和雇主生产率的提高而增加，低生产率工人在高生产率企业获得的比例收益更大；ii) 工人生产率与其雇主生产率之间存在分类匹配。选择性的工作接受驱动了这些模式。所有工人遇到所有企业的可能性相同，但工人在遇到生产率相似的企业时拥有更高的剩余。高剩余会议更频繁地导致匹配，从而产生分类匹配。只有在行政工资数据中观察到的那些导致匹配的会议子集，才塑造了工资。我们表明，我们的发现与最近的实证结果在数量上一致。此外，我们证明这种选择无法通过标准实证方法检测到，这突显了理论指导的实证工作的重要性。我们的结果表明，鼓励高工资企业雇佣低工资工人，在减少工资不平等方面的效果可能不如工资模式所暗示的那样有效。

papers.title: Fintech, Visual Attention, and Financial Inclusion: A Field Experiment on Migrant Remittances
papers.authors: Eduardo Nakasone, Máximo Torero, Angelino Viceisza
papers.abstract: Migrant remittances are significant but remain relatively costly to send. Policymakers have argued that fintech, specifically, comparison websites like kayak.com but for sending money, can boost financial inclusion and reduce remittance prices. Yet, little is known about how migrants with limited education and trust in digital methods interact with fintech. We conduct a field experiment on a comparison website and vary remittance-company attributes shown to migrants, specifically, the time for delivery and customer reviews. We use visual attention data to explore search. We find that (1) while 10-28 percent of migrants exhibit some type of remittance habit, more than half experiment with companies once provided with fintech information; (2) while migrant response to information is rational and search seems targeted, there is considerable heterogeneity—those with low prior awareness of comparison sites, financial literacy, or information-processing capability are less responsive to fintech; and (3) when presented with fintech information, migrants are 44 percent more likely to behave counter to the preferences over attributes they exhibit outside of the study. As such, they pay 20-30 percent more despite typically shopping around for the cheapest company. The findings suggest a nuanced potential for fintech to improve financial inclusion and consumer welfare.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, LS；JEL：C93, D87, F22, F24, G2, G53, O12
papers.zh_title: 金融科技、视觉注意力与金融包容性：关于移民汇款的实地实验
papers.zh_abstract: 移民汇款数额巨大，但汇款成本仍然相对较高。政策制定者认为，金融科技，特别是像kayak.com这样的汇款比较网站，可以促进金融包容性并降低汇款价格。然而，对于受教育程度有限且对数字方法信任度不高的移民如何与金融科技互动，我们知之甚少。我们在一个比较网站上进行了实地实验，并向移民展示了汇款公司的不同属性，特别是交付时间和客户评价。我们使用视觉注意力数据来探索搜索行为。我们发现：(1) 虽然10-28%的移民表现出某种汇款习惯，但超过一半的人在获得金融科技信息后会尝试不同的公司；(2) 虽然移民对信息的反应是理性的，搜索似乎有针对性，但存在相当大的异质性——那些对比较网站认知度低、金融素养低或信息处理能力差的移民对金融科技的反应较弱；(3) 当提供金融科技信息时，移民有44%的可能性会做出与他们在研究之外表现出的属性偏好相悖的行为。因此，尽管他们通常会寻找最便宜的公司，但他们支付的费用却高出20-30%。这些发现表明，金融科技在改善金融包容性和消费者福利方面具有微妙的潜力。

papers.title: Long-Run Effects of Food Assistance: Evidence from the Food Stamp Program and Administrative Data
papers.authors: Marianne Bitler, Theodore F. Figinski
papers.abstract: Previous work using mostly self-reports shows large, positive effects of early-life exposure to Food Stamps on self-sufficiency, health, and well-being-lasting well into adulthood. We combine this same adoption timing with administrative data on earnings, employment, and use of disability benefits. Women born in counties with Food Stamps available in early life had 3 percent higher earnings at age 32. Effects were larger in counties with another in-kind food program in place before Food Stamps. Food Stamps relied on the other program's preexisting administrative eligibility determination. Our results establish links between pre-existing administrative infrastructure and the later-life impacts of Food Stamps.
papers.zh_title: 食品援助的长期效应：来自食品券计划与行政数据的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 先前主要基于自我报告的研究显示，早期接触食品券对自给自足、健康和福祉有巨大且积极的影响，这种影响持续到成年期。我们将相同的采用时间与关于收入、就业和残疾福利使用的行政数据相结合。在早期生活中可获得食品券的县出生的女性，在32岁时的收入高出3%。在食品券实施前已有另一种实物食品计划的县，其效应更大。食品券依赖于该其他计划预先存在的行政资格认定。我们的结果建立了预先存在的行政基础设施与食品券后期生活影响之间的联系。

papers.title: Household Saving in Japan: The Past, Present, and Future
papers.authors: Charles Yuji Horioka
papers.abstract: The primary objective of this paper is to explore the determinants of the level of, and trends over time in, Japan’s household saving rate, with emphasis on the impact of the age structure of the population, and to make projections about future trends therein. The paper finds that Japan’s household saving rate has not always been high either absolutely or relative to other countries, contrary to popular belief, and that, if we confine ourselves to the postwar period, it was only during the 25-year period from 1961 to 1986 that it exceeded 15%. Past and future trends in Japan’s household saving rate can largely be explained by changes in the age structure of her population, but declines in the saving rate of retired elderly households is a more important explanation for the recent decline in the household saving rate. However, it is likely that other factors such as the unavailability of consumer credit, the unavailability of social safety nets, high rates of economic (income) growth, tax breaks for saving, saving promotion policies, and high and rising land and housing prices are also partial explanations for why Japan’s household saving rate was so high during the 1961-86 period and why it declined so much subsequently. As for future trends in Japan’s household saving rate, it is likely to fall even further though not necessarily at a rapid rate.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EFG, PE；JEL：D10, D11, D12, D14, D15, D64, E21, H55, J14, J26
papers.zh_title: 日本的家庭储蓄：过去、现在与未来
papers.zh_abstract: 本文的主要目标是探讨日本家庭储蓄率水平及其随时间变化趋势的决定因素，重点关注人口年龄结构的影响，并对其未来趋势进行预测。本文发现，与普遍看法相反，日本的家庭储蓄率无论从绝对水平还是相对于其他国家而言，并非一直很高；如果仅限于战后时期，只有在1961年至1986年的25年间，其储蓄率才超过15%。日本家庭储蓄率的过去和未来趋势在很大程度上可以通过其人口年龄结构的变化来解释，但退休老年家庭储蓄率的下降是近期家庭储蓄率下降的一个更重要的解释。然而，其他因素，如消费信贷的不可获得性、社会安全网的缺失、高经济增长率、储蓄税收减免、储蓄促进政策以及高昂且不断上涨的土地和住房价格，也可能部分解释了为什么日本家庭储蓄率在1961-86年间如此之高，以及随后为何大幅下降。至于日本家庭储蓄率的未来趋势，它可能会进一步下降，尽管不一定以快速的速度下降。

papers.title: The Forward Guidance Puzzle is not a Puzzle
papers.authors: Gauti B. Eggertsson, Finn D. Schüle
papers.abstract: In standard New Keynesian models, future interest rate cuts have larger effects than current cuts—this is called the forward guidance puzzle. We argue that the forward guidance puzzle is not a puzzle. We show the puzzle arises from an implausibly large monetary regime change, exceeding anything in U.S. history since the Great Depression. By calibrating our model to four regime changes during the U.S. Great Depression, disciplined by changes in long-term bond yields, we find the model’s predictions are broadly consistent with historical data.
papers.zh_title: 前瞻指引之谜并非谜题
papers.zh_abstract: 在标准的新凯恩斯模型中，未来的降息比当前的降息具有更大的效应——这被称为前瞻指引之谜。我们认为前瞻指引之谜并非谜题。我们表明，这个谜题源于一个难以置信的大规模货币制度变迁，其规模超过了美国自大萧条以来的任何历史事件。通过将我们的模型校准到美国大萧条时期的四次制度变迁，并以长期债券收益率的变化为约束，我们发现模型的预测与历史数据大体一致。

papers.title: Overcoming Racial Gaps in School Preferences: The Effect of Peer Diversity on School Choice
papers.authors: Clemence M. Idoux, Viola Corradini
papers.abstract: Differences in school choice by race contribute to school segregation and unequal access to effective schools. Conditional on test score and district of residence, Black and Hispanic families consistently choose schools with fewer white and Asian students, lower average achievement, and lower value-added. This paper combines unique survey data and administrative data from New York City to identify the determinants of racial disparities in school choice and shows that attending a more diverse middle school can mitigate racial choice gaps. Instrumental variable estimates show that middle school students exposed to more diverse peers apply to and enroll in high schools that are also more diverse. These effects particularly benefit Black and Hispanic students who, as a result, enroll in higher value-added high schools. A post-application survey of guardians of high school applicants suggests that most cross-race differences in choice stem from information gaps and homophily in preferences for school demographics. The survey results also reveal that exposure to diverse middle school peers reduces racial differences in choices by addressing these underlying determinants: it increases preferences for peer diversity and broadens the range of known school options.
papers.zh_title: 克服学校偏好中的种族差距：同伴多样性对择校的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 种族间的择校差异导致了学校隔离和获得有效学校机会的不平等。在控制考试成绩和居住区的情况下，黑人和西班牙裔家庭始终选择白人学生和亚裔学生较少、平均成绩较低、增值较低的学校。本文结合纽约市的独特调查数据和行政数据，以识别种族择校差距的决定因素，并表明就读更多元化的中学可以缩小种族选择差距。工具变量估计显示，接触更多元化同伴的中学学生在申请和入读高中时，也会选择更多元化的学校。这些效应尤其有利于黑人和西班牙裔学生，他们因此入读了增值更高的高中。对高中申请者监护人的申请后调查表明，大多数跨种族选择差异源于信息差距和对学校人口统计特征的同质性偏好。调查结果还显示，接触多元化的中学同伴通过解决这些潜在决定因素来减少种族选择差异：它增加了对同伴多样性的偏好，并拓宽了已知学校选择的范围。

papers.title: The Rise of E-Wallet Super-Apps and Buy-Now-Pay-Later
papers.authors: Wenlong Bian, Lin William Cong, Yang Ji
papers.abstract: The rise of super-app digital wallets provides not only a conduit to banks but also internal payment options, including Buy-Now-Pay-Later (BNPL). We examine, for the first time, transactions matched with merchant and consumer information, from a leading e-wallet super-app, and complement the analyses with a randomized experiment. We document that BNPL serves as a dominant form of “digital cash” and expands payment and credit access to underserved consumers without increasing indebtedness or delinquencies despite their spending more. The findings crucially depend on the cross-sale capacity and inherent disciplinary incentives of super-app ecosystems. Our findings underscore the synergy between credit and payments and provide novel insights for economies transitioning to cashless via super-app-driven platforms, where FinTech credit sees the greatest potential.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, DEV, ME, PR；JEL：E42, G20, G23, G51
papers.zh_title: 电子钱包超级应用与先买后付的兴起
papers.zh_abstract: 超级应用数字钱包的兴起不仅提供了通往银行的渠道，还提供了内部支付选项，包括先买后付（BNPL）。我们首次利用来自一家领先电子钱包超级应用的、与商户和消费者信息匹配的交易数据，并结合随机实验进行补充分析。我们记录了BNPL作为一种主导形式的“数字现金”，它扩大了服务不足消费者的支付和信贷获取渠道，尽管他们的支出增加了，但并未增加负债或违约率。这些发现关键取决于超级应用生态系统的交叉销售能力和内在的纪律激励。我们的发现强调了信贷与支付之间的协同作用，并为那些通过超级应用驱动平台向无现金经济转型的经济体提供了新颖见解，在这些经济体中，金融科技信贷看到了最大的潜力。

papers.title: Flexible Pay and Labor Supply: Evidence from Uber’s Instant Pay
papers.authors: M. Keith Chen, Katherine Feinerman, Kareem Haggag
papers.abstract: Modern tech platforms provide workers real-time control over when they work, and increasingly, flexible pay: the option to be paid immediately after work. We investigate the labor supply effects of pay flexibility and the implications of present-biased preferences among gig-economy workers. Using granular data from a nationwide randomized controlled trial at Uber, we estimate the effects of switching from a fixed weekly pay schedule to Instant Pay, a system that allows on-demand, within-day withdrawals. We find that flexible pay substantially increased drivers’ work time. Furthermore, consistent with present bias, the response is significantly higher when drivers are further away from the end of their counterfactual weekly pay cycle. We discuss welfare and broader implications in contexts in which workers have the ability to flexibly supply labor.
papers.zh_title: 灵活支付与劳动力供给：来自优步即时支付的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 现代科技平台为劳动者提供了对工作时间的实时控制，并日益提供灵活支付：即工作后立即获得报酬的选项。我们研究了支付灵活性对劳动力供给的影响，以及零工经济工作者中现时偏好的含义。利用优步在全国范围内开展的随机对照试验的精细数据，我们估计了从固定周薪制切换到即时支付系统（一种允许按需、当日提现的系统）的效果。我们发现，灵活支付显著增加了司机的劳动时间。此外，与现时偏好一致，当司机距离其反事实的每周支付周期结束时间越远时，这种反应显著更高。我们讨论了在劳动者能够灵活提供劳动力的情境下的福利和更广泛的影响。

papers.title: Painful Bargaining: Evidence from Anesthesia Rollups
papers.authors: Aslihan Asil, Paulo Ramos, Amanda Starc, Thomas G. Wollmann
papers.abstract: A rollup is a series of acquisitions through which a financial sponsor consolidates ownership. Increasingly, this strategy is shaping economically important markets, but historically, it has escaped antitrust enforcement. We study this phenomenon in the anesthesia industry, site of the first rollup-based antitrust case in US history. First, we identify eighteen other rollups of anesthesia practices that are observationally similar to the three litigated ones. Next, we show that rollups consolidate ownership and prices rise sharply after competing practices are acquired. Last, we estimate a structural bargaining model and simulate counterfactual equilibria under various remedies.
papers.zh_title: 痛苦的谈判：来自麻醉业务整合的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 业务整合是指财务发起人通过一系列收购来巩固所有权。这种策略正日益塑造着经济上重要的市场，但从历史上看，它一直逃脱了反垄断执法。我们研究了麻醉行业的这一现象，该行业是美国历史上首个基于业务整合的反垄断案件的发生地。首先，我们识别了另外18个麻醉业务的整合案例，它们在观察特征上与那三个被诉讼的案例相似。其次，我们表明，在竞争性业务被收购后，整合会巩固所有权，价格会急剧上涨。最后，我们估计了一个结构性讨价还价模型，并模拟了各种补救措施下的反事实均衡。

papers.title: Predicting College Closures and Financial Distress
papers.authors: Robert J. Kelchen, Dubravka Ritter, Douglas A. Webber
papers.abstract: In this paper, we assemble the most comprehensive dataset to date on the characteristics of colleges and universities, including dates of operation, institutional setting, student body, staff, and finance data from 2002 to 2023. We provide an extensive description of what is known and unknown about closed colleges compared with institutions that did not close. Using this data, we first develop a series of predictive models of financial distress, utilizing factors like operational revenue/expense patterns, sources of revenue, metrics of liquidity and leverage, enrollment/staff patterns, and prior signs of significant financial strain. We benchmark these models against existing federal government screening mechanisms such as financial responsibility scores and heightened cash monitoring. We document a high degree of missing data among colleges that eventually close and show that this is a key impediment to identifying at risk institutions. We then show that modern machine learning techniques, combined with richer data, are far more effective at predicting college closures than linear probability models, and considerably more effective than existing accountability metrics. Our preferred model, which combines an off-the-shelf machine learning algorithm with the richest set of explanatory variables, can significantly improve predictive accuracy even for institutions with complete data, but is particularly helpful for predicting instances of financial distress for institutions with spotty data. Finally, we conduct simulations using our estimates to contemplate likely increases in future closures, showing that enrollment challenges resulting from an impending demographic cliff are likely to significantly increase annual college closures for reasonable scenarios.
papers.zh_title: 预测大学关闭与财务困境
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们汇编了迄今为止最全面的大学特征数据集，包括2002年至2023年的运营日期、机构环境、学生群体、教职员工和财务数据。我们详细描述了已关闭大学与未关闭机构相比已知和未知的信息。利用这些数据，我们首先开发了一系列财务困境预测模型，利用运营收入/支出模式、收入来源、流动性和杠杆指标、招生/员工模式以及重大财务压力的先前迹象等因素。我们将这些模型与现有的联邦政府筛选机制（如财务责任评分和加强现金监控）进行基准比较。我们记录了最终关闭的大学中存在大量缺失数据，并表明这是识别风险机构的关键障碍。然后，我们证明，结合更丰富数据的现代机器学习技术在预测大学关闭方面比线性概率模型有效得多，并且比现有的问责指标有效得多。我们首选的模型将现成的机器学习算法与最丰富的解释变量集相结合，即使对于数据完整的机构也能显著提高预测准确性，但对于预测数据不完整机构的财务困境实例尤其有帮助。最后，我们利用我们的估计进行模拟，以预测未来关闭的可能增加，表明在合理情景下，即将到来的人口悬崖导致的招生挑战可能会显著增加每年的大学关闭数量。

papers.title: Dispersed Information, Nominal Rigidities and Monetary Business Cycles: A Hayekian Perspective
papers.authors: Christian Hellwig, Venky Venkateswaran
papers.abstract: We study the propagation of nominal shocks in a dispersed information economy where firms learn from and respond to information generated by their activities in product and factor markets. We prove the existence of a “Hayekian benchmark”, defined by conditions under which imperfect information has no effect on equilibrium outcomes. This occurs under fairly general conditions when prices are flexible, i.e. without nominal frictions, informational frictions are irrelevant. With sticky prices, however, this irrelevance obtains only if there are no strategic complementarities in pricing and aggregate and idiosyncratic shocks are equally persistent. With complementarities and/or differences in persistence, the interaction of nominal and informational frictions slows down price adjustment, amplifying real effects from nominal shocks (relative to a full information model with only nominal frictions). In a calibrated model, the amplification is most pronounced over the medium to long term. In the short run, market generated information leads to substantial aggregate price adjustment, even though firms may be completely unaware of changes in aggregate conditions.
papers.zh_title: 分散信息、名义刚性与货币商业周期：哈耶克视角
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了名义冲击在分散信息经济中的传导机制，在该经济中，企业从其在产品和要素市场活动中产生的信息中学习并做出反应。我们证明了“哈耶克基准”的存在，该基准由不完全信息对均衡结果没有影响的条件所定义。当价格具有弹性时，即在没有名义摩擦的情况下，信息摩擦是无关紧要的，这在相当一般的条件下成立。然而，在价格粘性的情况下，这种无关性只有在定价中没有战略互补性且总体冲击和特质冲击具有同等持续性时才能实现。当存在互补性和/或持续性差异时，名义摩擦和信息摩擦的相互作用会减缓价格调整，从而放大名义冲击的实际效应（相对于仅存在名义摩擦的完全信息模型）。在校准模型中，这种放大效应在中长期最为显著。在短期内，市场产生的信息会导致总体价格大幅调整，即使企业可能完全不了解总体状况的变化。

papers.title: The Causal Effects of Income on Political Attitudes and Behavior: A Randomized Field Experiment
papers.authors: David E. Broockman, Elizabeth Rhodes, Alexander W. Bartik, Karina Dotson, Sarah Miller, Patrick K. Krause, Eva Vivalt
papers.abstract: We study the causal effects of income on political attitudes and behavior with a field experiment. In the experiment, a non-profit gifted 1,000 low-income Americans $1,000 per month for three years tax-free, and 2,000 control participants $50 monthly. Contrary to resource models of participation, we find no effects on political participation or engagement, and rule out effects equivalent to the observational association between turnout and income. Political preferences largely do not change, with the estimates again distinguishable from the observational relationship that economic conservatism increases with income. Dispositions such as trust in government, polarization, and support for democracy also do not change. We do find effects consistent with mood misattribution: affect towards one's own racial group, other racial groups, and some politicians slightly improves. There is also some evidence that treated participants saw work as more important for individuals, society, or even as a requirement for accessing government programs; qualitative evidence illuminates potential mechanisms. Our findings contrast with findings from other economic shocks such as government-sponsored or taxable transfers—thereby helping clarify the mechanisms likely responsible for their effects—and underscore the durability of political predispositions.
papers.zh_title: 收入对政治态度和行为的因果效应：一项随机实地实验
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过一项实地实验研究了收入对政治态度和行为的因果效应。在实验中，一个非营利组织向1000名低收入美国人每月免税赠送1000美元，为期三年，并向2000名对照组参与者每月赠送50美元。与参与的资源模型相反，我们发现对政治参与或投入没有影响，并排除了相当于投票率与收入之间观察关联的效应。政治偏好基本没有改变，这些估计再次与经济保守主义随收入增加而增强的观察关系区分开来。诸如对政府的信任、两极分化和对民主的支持等倾向也没有改变。我们确实发现了与情绪错误归因一致的效应：对自己种族群体、其他种族群体以及一些政治人物的情感略有改善。还有一些证据表明，受试者认为工作对个人、社会更重要，甚至是获得政府项目的必要条件；定性证据阐明了潜在的机制。我们的发现与政府资助或应税转移等其他经济冲击的发现形成对比——从而有助于澄清可能造成其影响的机制——并强调了政治倾向的持久性。

papers.title: Subsidizing Medical Spending through the Tax Code: Take-Up, Targeting and the Cost of Claiming
papers.authors: Gopi Shah Goda
papers.abstract: The U.S. tax code partially subsidizes out-of-pocket medical spending as itemized medical deductions (IMDs). In this paper, using detailed information in the Health and Retirement Study, I find that while a substantial share of medical spending among older Americans is deducted through the tax code, take-up is incomplete: 61.8 (50.5) percent of potential tax savings (deductions) are claimed, resulting in lost tax savings of $5.4 billion annually. Further, frictions in take-up result in diverting tax savings from higher-need populations. I investigate potential mechanisms and estimate a discrete choice model to simulate eligibility, take-up and the implied cost of claiming under different policy counterfactuals. The results indicate that subsidizing medical expenses through the tax code imposes significant economic burdens, reducing the net subsidy available to taxpayers.
papers.zh_title: 通过税法补贴医疗支出：参与率、目标定位与申报成本
papers.zh_abstract: 美国税法通过列举式医疗扣除（IMD）部分补贴自付医疗支出。在本文中，利用健康与退休研究中的详细信息，我发现，虽然美国老年人医疗支出中有相当一部分通过税法进行了扣除，但参与率并不完全：61.8%（50.5%）的潜在税收节省（扣除）被申报，导致每年损失54亿美元的税收节省。此外，参与中的摩擦导致税收节省从需求更高的群体中转移。我研究了潜在机制，并估计了一个离散选择模型，以模拟不同政策反事实下的资格、参与率和隐含的申报成本。结果表明，通过税法补贴医疗支出带来了显著的经济负担，减少了纳税人可获得的净补贴。

papers.title: The Political Economy of School Finance Systems with Endogenous State and Local Tax Policies
papers.authors: Stephen Calabrese, Dennis Epple, Richard Romano
papers.abstract: Beginning in the 1970’s, many state courts declared the widespread inequality in education spending across schools to violate their state’s constitution. Funding systems then emerged providing differing approaches to state and local support of education. We develop a theoretical framework and characterize outcomes under alternative systems. Our framework is distinctive in having voting over policies in both state and local elections. We also develop a calibrated computational model to compare equilibrium outcomes under the alternative school finance systems and to examine across state differences in expenditures. The model predicts that voters prefer systems with mixed state and local finance with designs mirroring those observed in practice.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, PE, POL；JEL：H10, H19, H72, I24
papers.zh_title: 具有内生州和地方税收政策的学校财政体系的政治经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 从20世纪70年代开始，许多州法院宣布学校间教育支出的普遍不平等违反了州宪法。随后出现的资助体系为州和地方对教育的支持提供了不同的方法。我们开发了一个理论框架，并描述了替代体系下的结果。我们的框架的独特之处在于，在州和地方选举中都有对政策的投票。我们还开发了一个校准的计算模型，以比较替代学校财政体系下的均衡结果，并考察各州之间支出的差异。该模型预测，选民偏好混合州和地方财政的体系，其设计与实践中观察到的模式相似。

papers.title: Systemic Risk Measures: From the Panic of 1907 to the Banking Stress of 2023
papers.authors: Viral V. Acharya, Markus K. Brunnermeier, Diane Pierret
papers.abstract: We assess the efficacy of market-based systemic risk measures that rely on U.S. financial firms’ stock return co-movements with market- or sector-wide returns under stress from 1895 to 2023. Stress episodes are identified using corporate bond spread widening and narrative dating, spanning from the Panic of 1907 to the Banking Stress of 2023. Measures observed prior to the onset of stress episodes predict market outcomes (realized volatility and returns), balance sheet outcomes (lending, profitability, and run risk), and bank failures. Specifically, the measures are: (i) particularly effective in capturing the cross-sectional ranking of institutions conditional on a stress episode, rather than aggregate outcomes; (ii) more informative when stress episodes are severe; and (iii) relevant for both banks and non-bank financial institutions, although measures incorporating market leverage are especially informative for banks. A comparative analysis shows that market-based indicators offer information that is distinct from, and complementary to, traditional balance sheet metrics used in supervisory and macroprudential risk assessment.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IFM, ME；JEL：G01, G20, G21, G23, G28
papers.zh_title: 系统性风险度量：从1907年恐慌到2023年银行业压力
papers.zh_abstract: 我们评估了基于市场的系统性风险度量的有效性，这些度量依赖于1895年至2023年压力时期美国金融公司股票收益与市场或行业范围收益的共同变动。压力事件通过公司债券利差扩大和叙事日期确定，范围从1907年恐慌到2023年银行业压力。在压力事件开始前观察到的度量预测了市场结果（已实现波动率和收益）、资产负债表结果（贷款、盈利能力和挤兑风险）以及银行倒闭。具体来说，这些度量：（i）在捕捉压力事件下机构的横截面排名方面特别有效，而非总体结果；（ii）当压力事件严重时信息量更大；（iii）对银行和非银行金融机构都相关，尽管包含市场杠杆的度量对银行尤其具有信息量。比较分析表明，基于市场的指标提供了与监管和宏观审慎风险评估中使用的传统资产负债表指标不同且互补的信息。

papers.title: Unresolved Conflict in Workers' Compensation: The Impact of Legal Representation on Workers' Compensation Benefits
papers.authors: Bogdan Savych, David Neumark
papers.abstract: We estimate the causal effect of attorney involvement on the indemnity benefits workers receive after their injuries. To address the fundamental challenge that claims and injuries may differ on unmeasured dimensions that affect both attorney involvement and benefits received, we propose and use two instruments. The first is the baseline local area attorney involvement rate derived from a subset of claims for fractures, lacerations, and contusions without permanent partial disability and/or lump-sum payments. The second instrument is a delay in the first indemnity payment. Our outcome is the total indemnity benefits that workers receive after their injuries, which captures payments to workers for time lost from work and other adverse effects of an injury. Our analysis of more than 950,000 claims with more than seven days of lost time indicates that attorney involvement substantially increases total indemnity benefits paid to workers.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, LE, LS, PE；JEL：I18, J38, K31
papers.zh_title: 工伤保险中未解决的冲突：法律代理对工伤保险赔偿的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估计了律师介入对工人受伤后获得的伤残赔偿金的因果效应。为了解决索赔和伤害可能在未测量的维度上存在差异（这些差异同时影响律师介入和获得的赔偿）这一根本性挑战，我们提出并使用两种工具变量。第一个工具变量是基于骨折、撕裂伤和挫伤索赔子集（无永久性部分残疾和/或一次性付款）得出的当地基线律师介入率。第二个工具变量是首次伤残赔偿金的延迟支付。我们的结果是工人受伤后获得的总伤残赔偿金，这涵盖了因工伤导致的工作时间损失和其他不利影响的支付。我们对超过95万起损失时间超过七天的索赔的分析表明，律师介入显著增加了支付给工人的总伤残赔偿金。

papers.title: Household Responses to Guaranteed Income: Experimental Evidence from Compton, California
papers.authors: Sidhya Balakrishnan, Sewin Chan, Sara Constantino, Johannes Haushofer, Jonathan Morduch
papers.abstract: We study the effects of a two-year unconditional cash transfer program for lowincome households in Compton, California between 2021 and 2023. 695 households were randomly assigned to receive transfers averaging about $500 per month over a two year period, with 1,402 households randomly assigned to a control group. To measure the impact of transfer frequency, half of the recipients were paid twice per month and the other half received quarterly transfers. We surveyed 1,074 respondents 18 months after the beginning of transfers. Receiving guaranteed income had no impact on the labor supply of full-time workers, but part-time workers (at baseline) had lower labor market participation by 13 percentage points. Income (excluding the transfer) was reduced by $333 per month on average relative to control households, and expenditures were reduced by $302 per month. At the same time, average non-housing debt balances declined by $2,190 over 18 months relative to the control group, although the drop is not statistically significant. We find a significant improvement in housing security, but no overall effects on indices of psychological and financial well-being. The recipients of twice-monthly transfers were more likely to own a car, had lower credit card debt and greater food security than recipients of quarterly transfers, but otherwise transfer frequency had little impact. Compared to male recipients, female recipients reported a greater increase in financial security, and a smaller reduction in earned income and expenditures.
papers.zh_title: 家庭对保证收入的反应：来自加利福尼亚州康普顿的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了2021年至2023年间在加利福尼亚州康普顿针对低收入家庭实施的两年期无条件现金转移计划的效果。695户家庭被随机分配，在两年期间平均每月获得约500美元的转移支付，另有1402户家庭被随机分配到对照组。为衡量转移支付频率的影响，一半受助者每月领取两次，另一半则每季度领取一次。我们在转移支付开始18个月后对1074名受访者进行了调查。获得保证收入对全职工作者的劳动供给没有影响，但兼职工作者（在基线时）的劳动市场参与率降低了13个百分点。与对照组相比，收入（不包括转移支付）平均每月减少333美元，支出每月减少302美元。同时，相对于对照组，平均非住房债务余额在18个月内下降了2190美元，尽管这一下降在统计上并不显著。我们发现住房保障有显著改善，但对心理和财务福祉指数没有整体影响。与每季度领取转移支付的受助者相比，每月领取两次的受助者更可能拥有汽车，信用卡债务更低，粮食保障更高，但除此之外，转移支付频率影响甚微。与男性受助者相比，女性受助者报告财务安全感有更大提升，而劳动收入和支出减少幅度更小。

papers.title: FinTech Lending to Borrowers with No Credit History
papers.authors: Laura Chioda, Paul Gertler, Sean Higgins, Paolina C. Medina
papers.abstract: Despite the promise of FinTech lending to expand credit access to populations without a formal credit history, FinTech lenders primarily lend to applicants with a formal credit history and rely on conventional credit bureau scores as an input to their algorithms. Using data from a large FinTech lender in Mexico, we show that alternative data from digital transactions through a delivery app are effective at predicting creditworthiness for borrowers with no credit history. Using account-by-month level data on revenues and costs, a machine learning model predicting profits generates similar profits as a model predicting default.
papers.zh_title: 金融科技向无信用记录借款人的贷款
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管金融科技贷款有望扩大对无正式信用记录人群的信贷获取，但金融科技贷款机构主要向有正式信用记录的申请人放贷，并依赖传统的信用局评分作为其算法的输入。利用墨西哥一家大型金融科技贷款机构的数据，我们表明，来自配送应用程序数字交易的替代数据能有效预测无信用记录借款人的信用worthiness。使用按月计算的收入和成本账户数据，一个预测利润的机器学习模型产生的利润与预测违约的模型相似。

papers.title: The End of Oil
papers.authors: Ryan Kellogg
papers.abstract: It is now plausible to envision scenarios in which global demand for crude oil falls to essentially zero by the end of this century, driven by improvements in clean energy technologies, adoption of stringent climate policies, or both. This paper asks what such a demand decline, when anticipated, might mean for global oil supply. One possibility is the well-known “green paradox”: because oil is an exhaustible resource, producers may accelerate near-term extraction in order to beat the demand decline. This reaction would increase near-term CO2 emissions and could possibly even lead the total present value of climate damages to be greater than if demand had not declined at all. However, because oil extraction requires potentially long-lived investments in wells and other infrastructure, the opposite may occur: an anticipated demand decline reduces producers' investment rates, decreasing near-term oil production and CO2 emissions. To evaluate whether this disinvestment effect outweighs the green paradox, or vice-versa, I develop a tractable model of global oil supply that incorporates both effects, while also capturing industry features such as heterogeneous producers, exercise of market power by low-cost OPEC producers, and marginal drilling costs that increase with the rate of drilling. I find that for model inputs with the strongest empirical support, the disinvestment effect outweighs the traditional green paradox. In order for anticipation effects on net to substantially increase cumulative global oil extraction, I find that industry investments must have short time horizons, and that producers must have discount rates that are comparable to U.S. treasury bill rates.
papers.zh_title: 石油的终结
papers.zh_abstract: 现在可以设想这样的情景：到本世纪末，全球原油需求可能降至基本为零，这由清洁能源技术的进步、严格气候政策的采纳或两者共同推动。本文探讨了这种预期中的需求下降对全球石油供应可能意味着什么。一种可能性是众所周知的“绿色悖论”：由于石油是一种可耗竭资源，生产商可能会加速近期开采以赶在需求下降之前。这种反应会增加近期的二氧化碳排放，甚至可能导致气候损害的总现值比需求根本没有下降时还要大。然而，由于石油开采需要对油井和其他基础设施进行可能长期的投资，相反的情况也可能发生：预期的需求下降会降低生产商的投资率，从而减少近期的石油产量和二氧化碳排放。为了评估这种投资减少效应是否超过绿色悖论，或者反之，我开发了一个易于处理的全球石油供应模型，该模型同时包含了这两种效应，并捕捉了行业特征，如异质性生产商、低成本欧佩克生产商行使市场力量以及边际钻井成本随钻井率上升。我发现，对于具有最强实证支持的模型输入，投资减少效应超过了传统的绿色悖论。为了使预期效应净增加全球累计石油开采量，我发现行业投资必须具有短时间视野，并且生产商的贴现率必须与美国国库券利率相当。

papers.title: Financial Conditions Targeting
papers.authors: Ricardo J. Caballero, Tomás E. Caravello, Alp Simsek
papers.abstract: We present evidence that noisy financial flows influence financial conditions and macroeconomic activity. How should monetary policy respond to this noise? We develop a model where it is optimal for the central bank to target and (partially) stabilize financial conditions beyond their direct effect on output and inflation gaps, even though stable financial conditions are not a social objective per se. In our model, noise affects both financial conditions and macroeconomic activity, and arbitrageurs are reluctant to trade against noise due to aggregate return volatility. Our main result shows that Financial Conditions Index (FCI) targeting—announcing a (soft and temporary) FCI target and setting the policy rate in the near future to maintain the actual FCI close to the target—reduces the FCI volatility and stabilizes the output gap. This improvement occurs because a more predictable FCI enables arbitrageurs to trade more aggressively against noise shocks, thereby "recruiting" them to insulate FCI from financial noise. FCI targeting is similar to providing forward guidance about the FCI, and in our framework it is strictly superior to providing forward guidance about the policy interest rate. Finally, we extend recent policy counterfactual methods to incorporate our model's endogenous risk reduction mechanism and apply it to U.S. data. We estimate that FCI targeting could have reduced the variance of the output gap, inflation, and interest rates by 36%, 2%, and 6%, respectively, and decreased the conditional variance of the FCI by 55%. When compared with interest rate forward guidance, it would have reduced output gap variance by 21%. We also show that a significant share of the gains from FCI targeting can be attained by an augmented version of a Taylor rule that gives a large weight to a simplified financial conditions target.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：E12, E32, E44, E52, G10
papers.zh_title: 金融状况目标制
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提供的证据表明，有噪声的金融流动会影响金融状况和宏观经济活动。货币政策应如何应对这种噪声？我们开发了一个模型，在该模型中，央行最优的做法是瞄准并（部分）稳定金融状况，即使其超出了对产出和通胀缺口的直接影响，尽管稳定的金融状况本身并非社会目标。在我们的模型中，噪声同时影响金融状况和宏观经济活动，而套利者由于总体回报波动性而不愿逆噪声交易。我们的主要结果表明，金融状况指数目标制——宣布一个（软性的、临时的）金融状况指数目标，并在近期内设定政策利率以使实际金融状况指数接近目标——能够降低金融状况指数的波动性并稳定产出缺口。这种改善之所以发生，是因为更可预测的金融状况指数使套利者能够更积极地交易以对抗噪声冲击，从而“招募”他们来隔离金融状况指数免受金融噪声的影响。金融状况指数目标制类似于提供关于金融状况指数的前瞻指引，在我们的框架中，它严格优于提供关于政策利率的前瞻指引。最后，我们扩展了最近的政策反事实方法，以纳入我们模型的内生风险降低机制，并将其应用于美国数据。我们估计，金融状况指数目标制本可以使产出缺口、通胀和利率的方差分别降低36%、2%和6%，并使金融状况指数的条件方差降低55%。与利率前瞻指引相比，它本可以使产出缺口方差降低21%。我们还表明，金融状况指数目标制的大部分收益可以通过一个增强版的泰勒规则来实现，该规则对简化的金融状况目标赋予了较大权重。

papers.title: Estimating Gross Output Production Functions
papers.authors: Markus Trunschke, Kenneth L. Judd
papers.abstract: This paper develops a novel method to estimate production functions. Earlier papers rely on special assumptions about the functional form of production functions. Our approach efficiently estimates all parameters of any production functions with Hicks-neutral productivity without additional exogenous variables or sources of variation in flexible input demand. We provide Monte Carlo Simulation evidence of our method’s performance and test our approach on empirical data from Chilean and Colombian manufacturing industries.
papers.zh_title: 估计总产出生产函数
papers.zh_abstract: 本文开发了一种估计生产函数的新方法。早期的论文依赖于关于生产函数函数形式的特殊假设。我们的方法有效地估计了任何具有希克斯中性生产率的生产函数的所有参数，无需额外的外生变量或灵活投入需求的变化来源。我们提供了蒙特卡洛模拟证据来证明我们方法的性能，并利用智利和哥伦比亚制造业的经验数据测试了我们的方法。

papers.title: From Novelty to Norm: Uncovering the Drivers of Virtual Tour Effectiveness in Real Estate Sales
papers.authors: Miremad Soleymanian, Yi Qian
papers.abstract: This study examines the effectiveness of virtual tours and digital marketing strategies in enhancing real estate sales using a unique dataset combining MLS data, government-assessed property values, and agents’ marketing activities. While virtual tours are often perceived as a powerful tool to boost sales, their impact is context-dependent. Using classical econometric models and causal machine learning techniques, we find that virtual tours increase property sale prices by an average of 1%. However, the effect has declined over time, particularly post-COVID, indicating a shift from being a novel feature to a standard practice. Further analysis using causal random forests reveals significant heterogeneity in their effectiveness across property attributes, market conditions, and agent characteristics. Virtual tours are less impactful for highly differentiated properties but more beneficial in competitive markets and for less experienced agents who lack familiarity with the local market. These results suggest that real estate agents may benefit from considering property features, market dynamics, and their own experience when deciding how to use virtual tours. Our findings offer valuable insights for practitioners looking to optimize digital marketing strategies and enhance sales performance.
papers.zh_title: 从新奇到常态：揭示虚拟看房在房地产销售中的有效性驱动因素
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究利用结合了多重上市服务数据、政府评估房产价值和经纪人营销活动的独特数据集，考察了虚拟看房和数字营销策略在提升房地产销售方面的有效性。虽然虚拟看房通常被视为促进销售的强大工具，但其影响取决于具体情境。使用经典计量经济学模型和因果机器学习技术，我们发现虚拟看房平均能使房产销售价格上涨1%。然而，这种效应随时间推移而减弱，尤其是在新冠疫情之后，表明它已从一项新颖功能转变为标准做法。使用因果随机森林的进一步分析揭示了其有效性在房产属性、市场条件和经纪人特征之间存在显著的异质性。虚拟看房对高度差异化的房产影响较小，但在竞争激烈的市场中以及对缺乏当地市场经验的新手经纪人更为有益。这些结果表明，房地产经纪人在决定如何使用虚拟看房时，或许应考虑房产特征、市场动态和自身经验。我们的发现为寻求优化数字营销策略和提升销售业绩的从业者提供了宝贵的见解。

papers.title: Rate-Based Emissions Trading with Overlapping Policies: Insights from Theory and an Application to China
papers.authors: Carolyn Fischer, Chenfei Qu, Lawrence H. Goulder
papers.abstract: Jurisdictions employing emissions trading systems (ETSs) to control emissions often utilize other environmental or energy policies as well, including policies to support renewable energy and reduce energy consumption. Interactions with these other policies lead to different outcomes from what might be predicted by examining the policies separately. The prior literature considering policy interactions has focused mainly on the case where the ETS is cap and trade. This paper extends the literature by examining the outcomes under a wide range of ETSs (including several forms of tradable performance standards) and overlapping policies (including various renewable subsidies and electricity consumption taxes). An analytical model demonstrates that the impacts of overlapping policies on allowance prices, emissions, and electricity output depend critically on the nature of the ETS. A numerical general equilibrium model tailored to China’s economy explores the implications for the cost-effectiveness of emissions reductions. Results indicate that overlapping policies that reduce cost-effectiveness under cap and trade can significantly enhance cost-effectiveness under tradable performance standards. The model predicts that under the current and planned designs for China’s ETS, which sets differentiated tradable performance standards for emitters, implementing renewable portfolio standards and accounting for indirect emissions from electricity consumption are both beneficial. Together they can reduce the cost of achieving the national emissions target by 20-30 percent over the interval 2020-2035. Transitioning to uniform benchmarks for emitting power generators could save another 10-15 percent. The findings highlight the importance of coordinating the designs of emissions trading systems with the overlapping policies.
papers.zh_title: 基于排放率的排放交易与重叠政策：来自理论的见解及对中国的一个应用
papers.zh_abstract: 采用排放交易体系控制排放的司法管辖区通常也使用其他环境或能源政策，包括支持可再生能源和减少能源消耗的政策。与这些其他政策的相互作用导致的结果与单独考察这些政策可能预测的结果不同。先前考虑政策相互作用的文献主要关注排放交易体系为总量控制与交易的情况。本文通过考察多种排放交易体系（包括几种形式的可交易绩效标准）和重叠政策（包括各种可再生能源补贴和电力消费税）下的结果来扩展文献。一个分析模型表明，重叠政策对配额价格、排放和电力产出的影响关键取决于排放交易体系的性质。一个针对中国经济定制的数值一般均衡模型探讨了对减排成本效益的影响。结果表明，在总量控制与交易下降低成本效益的重叠政策，在可交易绩效标准下可以显著提高成本效益。该模型预测，在中国排放交易体系当前和计划的设计下（该体系为排放者设定了差异化的可交易绩效标准），实施可再生能源组合标准并考虑电力消费的间接排放都是有益的。两者结合可以在2020-2035年间将实现国家排放目标的成本降低20-30%。向排放发电机组过渡到统一基准可以再节省10-15%。这些发现强调了协调排放交易体系设计与重叠政策的重要性。

papers.title: Assessing Assessors
papers.authors: Huaizhi Chen, Lauren Cohen
papers.abstract: Property tax revenues – the largest discretionary source of revenue for local governments - adjust at a pace that is inconsistent with property values in the US. We show that this form of revenue smoothing may be rooted in the political economy of municipalities. Measures of local budget stressors are positively related to upward assessments of a property’s value. Moreover, municipalities are significantly more likely to reassess in up markets as opposed to down – consistent with maximizing tax base and revenue collected. Using micro-level evidence from just-passing school referenda in Illinois, these shocks to municipal liabilities lead to significant increases in property assessments without any associated increases in market values or transactions. Passing a referendum over the prior 3 years increases the probability that a house is reassessed upward by 23%. This flexible form of revenue smoothing creates avenues for personal rent extraction. We find that local tax assessors: 1) have tax assessments on their own properties significantly lower than neighboring properties; and 2) these tax assessments grow significantly slower than neighbors – lowering their tax bills. We further document a significant connection between the underassessment of tax assessors’ own properties and the tax-maximizing assessment gaps documented in the districts they operate.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, LE, PE, POL；JEL：G12, G18, H20, H23, H71, R38
papers.zh_title: 评估评估员
papers.zh_abstract: 财产税收入——地方政府最大的可自由支配收入来源——其调整速度与美国房产价值不一致。我们表明，这种收入平滑形式可能根植于市政当局的政治经济学。地方预算压力指标与房产价值的上调评估正相关。此外，市政当局在上涨市场中比下跌市场中更有可能进行重新评估——这与最大化税基和征收收入一致。利用伊利诺伊州刚刚通过的学校公投的微观层面证据，这些对市政负债的冲击导致房产评估显著增加，而市场价值或交易量并未相应增加。在过去3年内通过公投，会使房屋被上调评估的概率增加23%。这种灵活的收入平滑形式为个人寻租创造了途径。我们发现，地方税务评估员：1）他们自己房产的税务评估显著低于邻近房产；2）这些税务评估的增长速度显著慢于邻居——从而降低了他们的税单。我们进一步记录了税务评估员自身房产的低估与其运营区域内记录在案的税收最大化评估差距之间存在显著关联。

papers.title: Hustling From Home? Work From Home Flexibility and Entrepreneurial Entry
papers.authors: John M. Barrios, Yael Hochberg, Hanyi (Livia) Yi
papers.abstract: We investigate the influence of the growing trend of work-from-home (WFH) on new business formation, with a particular focus on the period surrounding the COVID-19 pandemic. At baseline, local new business entry is positively associated with the proportion of occupations amenable to telework in the region. Utilizing the advent of the COVID-19 pandemic and the implementation of stay-at-home mandates as an exogenous shock, we examine the effects of realized flexibility for WFH on entrepreneurial entry.
