While overall new business registrations increased following pandemic stay-at-home mandates, areas with an occupational mix that has higher potential for telework demonstrate less pronounced growth in new business formation, particularly in regions with lower economic demand factors. Survey evidence highlights how flexibility provided by traditional employment reduces entrepreneurial intent, especially for workers seeking non-pecuniary benefits such as autonomy or flexibility. Consistent with this substitution effect, we observe significant gender disparities, with a notable decline in women-led startups in areas with greater telework potential. Our results suggest a nuanced tension between the attractiveness of flexibility in traditional employment and the autonomy provided by entrepreneurial entry.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, LS, PR；JEL：J10, J22, L26, M13
papers.zh_title: 在家 hustling？居家办公灵活性与创业进入
papers.zh_abstract: 我们调查了居家办公（WFH）日益增长的趋势对新企业创建的影响，特别关注COVID-19大流行前后时期。在基线水平上，当地新企业进入与该地区适合远程办公的职业比例正相关。利用COVID-19大流行的出现和居家令的实施作为外生冲击，我们检验了实现WFH灵活性对创业进入的影响。尽管在大流行居家令之后，新企业注册总数有所增加，但职业组合具有更高远程办公潜力的地区在新企业形成方面表现出不那么显著的增长，尤其是在经济需求因素较低的地区。调查证据强调了传统就业提供的灵活性如何降低创业意愿，特别是对于那些寻求非金钱利益（如自主权或灵活性）的工人。与这种替代效应一致，我们观察到显著的性别差异，在远程办公潜力较大的地区，女性领导的初创企业显著减少。我们的结果表明，传统就业的灵活性与创业进入提供的自主权之间存在微妙的张力。

papers.title: A Practical Guide to Shift-Share Instruments
papers.authors: Kirill Borusyak, Peter Hull, Xavier Jaravel
papers.abstract: A recent econometric literature shows two distinct paths for identification with shift-share instruments, leveraging either many exogenous shifts or exogenous shares. We present the core logic of both paths and practical takeaways via simple checklists. A variety of empirical settings illustrate key points.
papers.meta: Programs：ITI, LS, PE；JEL：C18, C21, C26, F16, J21, J61
papers.zh_title: 份额-转移工具实用指南
papers.zh_abstract: 最近的计量经济学文献展示了使用份额-转移工具进行识别的两条不同路径，要么利用许多外生的转移份额，要么利用外生的份额。我们通过简单的检查清单展示了这两条路径的核心逻辑和实用要点。各种实证背景说明了关键点。

papers.title: The Effects of Gender Integration on Men: Evidence from the U.S. Military
papers.authors: Kyle Greenberg, Melanie Wasserman, E. Anna Weber
papers.abstract: Do men negatively respond when women first enter an occupation? We answer this question by studying the end of one of the final explicit occupational barriers to women in the U.S.: in 2016, the U.S. military opened all positions to women, including historically male-only combat occupations. We exploit the staggered integration of women into combat units to estimate the causal effects of the introduction of female colleagues on men’s job performance, behavior, and perceptions of workplace quality, using monthly administrative personnel records and rich survey responses. We find that integrating women into previously all-male units does not negatively affect men’s performance or behavioral outcomes, including retention, promotions, demotions, separations for misconduct, criminal investigations, and medical conditions. Most of our results are precise enough to rule out small detrimental effects. However, there is a wedge between men’s perceptions and performance. The integration of women causes a negative shift in male soldiers’ perceptions of workplace quality. The decline is driven by units integrated with female officers, likely arising from men’s greater awareness of workplace problems or men’s dissatisfaction from working with women in positions of authority—even though men in such units show some performance gains. If male-dominated workplaces are reluctant to incorporate women due to expectations that men will become less productive, our paper provides evidence to weigh against that notion.
papers.zh_title: 性别融合对男性的影响：来自美国军方的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 当女性首次进入某个职业时，男性会做出负面反应吗？我们通过研究美国对女性最后一项明确的职业壁垒的终结来回答这个问题：2016年，美国军方向女性开放了所有职位，包括历史上仅限男性的战斗岗位。我们利用女性逐步融入战斗单位的过程，使用月度行政人事记录和丰富的调查回复，来估计引入女同事对男性工作表现、行为和工作场所质量感知的因果效应。我们发现，将女性融入先前全男性的单位并不会对男性的表现或行为结果产生负面影响，包括留任、晋升、降级、因不当行为离职、刑事调查和医疗状况。我们的大多数结果精确到足以排除微小的不利影响。然而，男性的感知与表现之间存在差距。女性的融入导致男性士兵对工作场所质量的感知发生负面转变。这种下降是由与女性军官融合的单位驱动的，可能源于男性对工作场所问题更强烈的意识，或者男性对与担任权威职位的女性共事的不满——尽管此类单位的男性在表现上有所提升。如果男性主导的工作场所因预期男性生产力下降而不愿接纳女性，我们的论文提供了反驳这一观点的证据。

papers.title: How Curvy is the Phillips Curve?
papers.authors: Philip Bunn, Lena Anayi, Emily Barnes, Nicholas Bloom, Paul Mizen, Gregory Thwaites, Ivan Yotzov
papers.abstract: Macro data suggest a convex relationship between inflation and economic slack, but identifying causality is challenging. Using micro data from large panel surveys of UK and US firms, we show that the response of prices to demand shocks is also convex at the firm level. We obtain similar results using three different empirical exercises examining: the impact of COVID demand shocks, the response to sales shocks, and hypothetical shocks from a survey experiment. This convexity is strongest in firms and industries with higher inflation, disappears at horizons beyond two years, and is also present in response to cost shocks. We rationalize these findings in a menu cost model with positive trend inflation and decreasing returns at the firm level, which replicates firm and aggregate Phillips curve convexity. The non-linearity emerges from trend inflation pushing firms closer to their price increase thresholds.
papers.zh_title: 菲利普斯曲线有多凸？
papers.zh_abstract: 宏观数据表明通胀与经济松弛之间存在凸性关系，但识别因果关系具有挑战性。利用来自英国和美国企业大型面板调查的微观数据，我们表明价格对需求冲击的反应在企业层面也是凸性的。我们通过三项不同的实证研究获得了类似的结果，这些研究考察了：COVID需求冲击的影响、对销售冲击的反应以及来自调查实验的假设冲击。这种凸性在通胀较高的企业和行业中最为强烈，在超过两年的期限后消失，并且在应对成本冲击时也存在。我们用一个具有正趋势通胀和企业层面递减回报的菜单成本模型来合理化这些发现，该模型复制了企业和总体菲利普斯曲线的凸性。这种非线性源于趋势通胀将企业推近其提价阈值。

papers.title: A Theory of How Workers Keep Up With Inflation
papers.authors: Hassan Afrouzi, Andrés Blanco, Andrés Drenik, Erik Hurst
papers.abstract: In this paper, we develop a model that combines elements of modern macro labor theories with nominal wage rigidities to study the consequences of unexpected inflation on the labor market. The slow and costly adjustment of real wages within a match after a burst of inflation incentivizes workers to engage in job-to-job transitions. Such dynamics after a surge in inflation lead to a rise in aggregate vacancies relative to unemployment, associating a seemingly tight labor market with lower average real wages. Calibrating with pre-2020 data, we show the model can simultaneously match the trends in worker flows and wage changes during the 2021-2024 period. Using historical data, we further show that prior periods of high inflation were also associated with an increase in vacancies and an upward shift in the Beveridge curve. Finally, we show that other “hot labor market” theories that can cause an increase in the aggregate vacancy-to-unemployment rate have implications that are inconsistent with the worker flows and wage dynamics observed during the recent inflationary period. Collectively, our calibrated model implies that the recent inflation in the United States, all else equal, reduced the welfare of workers through real wage declines and other costly actions, providing a model-driven reason why workers report they dislike inflation.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, ME；JEL：E24, E31, J30, J63
papers.zh_title: 工人如何跟上通胀的理论
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们开发了一个模型，该模型结合了现代宏观劳动理论的要素与名义工资刚性，以研究意外通胀对劳动力市场的影响。在通胀爆发后，匹配内部实际工资的缓慢且昂贵的调整激励工人进行工作间转换。通胀飙升后的这种动态导致相对于失业的总体职位空缺增加，将看似紧张的劳动力市场与较低的平均实际工资联系起来。使用2020年之前的数据进行校准，我们表明该模型可以同时匹配2021-2024年期间工人流动和工资变化的趋势。利用历史数据，我们进一步表明，先前的高通胀时期也与职位空缺增加和贝弗里奇曲线上移相关。最后，我们表明，其他可能导致总体职位空缺与失业率上升的“火热劳动力市场”理论，其含义与近期通胀期间观察到的工人流动和工资动态不一致。总的来说，我们校准后的模型意味着，美国近期的通胀，在其他条件相同的情况下，通过实际工资下降和其他代价高昂的行动降低了工人的福利，这提供了一个模型驱动的理由来解释为什么工人报告他们不喜欢通胀。

papers.title: Halloween, ADHD, and Subjectivity in Medical Diagnosis
papers.authors: Christopher Worsham, Charles Bray, Anupam Jena
papers.abstract: The practice of medicine relies on accurate diagnosis. However, the diagnosis of many medical conditions involves assessments that invite varying degrees of subjectivity. External and arbitrary factors can influence physicians’ diagnostic assessments in conditions ranging from heart attacks to neurodevelopmental conditions like attention deficit hyperactivity disorder (ADHD). Quantifying this subjectivity is challenging, however, particularly for neurodevelopmental and psychiatric conditions where subjective assessments of behavior are common and important. Halloween, a holiday characterized by excitement among children, could present a natural experiment to study subjectivity in diagnosis, if any ensuing behavioral changes influence diagnosis rates of ADHD. Using data on over 100 million physician office visits, we compared ADHD diagnosis rates, by day, among children seen by physicians in the 10 weekdays surrounding seven Halloween holidays. The rate of new ADHD diagnosis was 62.7 per 10,000 child-visits on Halloween, compared with 55.1 during surrounding weekdays, a 14% increase. There were no increases in diagnoses of several neuropsychiatric disorders with diagnostic criteria that are less focused on hyperactive behavior. Our findings highlight subjectivity in ADHD diagnosis and support the need to consider external factors that may influence diagnosis.
papers.zh_title: 万圣节、多动症与医学诊断中的主观性
papers.zh_abstract: 医疗实践依赖于准确的诊断。然而，许多医疗状况的诊断涉及不同程度的评估主观性。从心脏病发作到注意力缺陷多动障碍（ADHD）等神经发育状况，外部和任意因素都可能影响医生的诊断评估。然而，量化这种主观性颇具挑战性，尤其是对于神经发育和精神疾病，因为对行为的主观评估在这些领域常见且重要。万圣节是一个以儿童兴奋为特征的节日，如果由此产生的行为变化影响ADHD的诊断率，那么它可能为研究诊断中的主观性提供一个自然实验。利用超过1亿次医生门诊就诊的数据，我们比较了七个万圣节前后各10个工作日中，儿童在医生处就诊的ADHD诊断率（按天计算）。万圣节当天新ADHD诊断率为每万次儿童就诊62.7例，而前后工作日为55.1例，增加了14%。对于诊断标准较少关注多动行为的几种神经精神疾病，诊断率没有增加。我们的发现凸显了ADHD诊断中的主观性，并支持考虑可能影响诊断的外部因素的必要性。

papers.title: Are Some Angels Better than Others?
papers.authors: Johan Karlsen, Katja Kisseleva, Aksel Mjøs, David T. Robinson
papers.abstract: This paper provides novel, large-scale evidence on the returns to angel investing. Returns are extremely right-skewed: most lose money, the top one percent return more than fifty times invested capital, and the mean investment doubles invested capital. Investor-specific variation is an important part of overall variation in returns. Wealthier investors sort into better firms yet earn lower returns compared to other investors in those firms. Better performing angels have more startup-specific and industry knowledge, founder connections, and engage in active governance. These findings have implications for policies aimed at expanding early-stage finance.
papers.zh_title: 有些天使投资者比其他的更好吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提供了关于天使投资回报的新颖、大规模证据。回报呈极度右偏分布：大多数投资亏损，前1%的投资回报超过投资资本的50倍，平均投资使资本翻倍。投资者个体差异是回报总体差异的重要组成部分。较富裕的投资者能筛选出更好的公司，但与这些公司中的其他投资者相比，他们获得的回报却较低。表现更好的天使投资者拥有更多创业特定知识和行业知识、创始人关系，并积极参与公司治理。这些发现对旨在扩大早期融资的政策具有启示意义。

papers.title: You Can Take Them With You: Recruiting Coworkers to One's Own New Firm
papers.authors: Marc-Andreas Muendler, James E. Rauch, Sergio Mikio Koyama
papers.abstract: New firms do not yet have employees who can aid recruiting by referrals, but entrepreneurs can recruit workers they know to their startups—in effect making their own referrals. We consider new firms in Brazil’s formal sector founded between 2002 and 2014, for which at least one founding owner can be traced to previous formal employment. We find that 35.1 percent of new firms with at least five employees hire one or more coworkers from a founding owner’s last employer in their first year of operation, and that 9.2 percent of first-year hires at new firms were coworkers at a founding owner’s last employer. The former coworkers most likely to join a founding owner’s new firm are those who, at their last employer, worked in the same plant as a founding owner, had long overlap with a founding owner, were classified in the same industry or occupation as a founding owner, and were hired at roughly the same time as a founding owner. Controlling for observable human capital and new firm fixed effects, former coworkers earn eight percent higher initial wages at new firms and are six percentage points less likely to separate before a new firm’s second year of operation. We find that the coworker wage premium diminishes with tenure by 0.5 percentage points per year and the coworker separation premium diminishes with tenure by 2.0 percentage points per year.
papers.zh_title: 你可以带走他们：招募前同事加入自己的新公司
papers.zh_abstract: 新公司尚未拥有能通过推荐协助招聘的员工，但企业家可以招募他们认识的人加入自己的初创企业——实际上是自己进行推荐。我们研究了2002年至2014年间在巴西正规部门成立的新公司，这些公司至少有一位创始所有者可追溯到之前的正规就业记录。我们发现，在至少有五名员工的新公司中，35.1%在运营第一年从创始所有者上一家雇主处招募了一名或多名前同事，并且新公司第一年招聘的员工中有9.2%曾是创始所有者上一家雇主处的同事。最有可能加入创始所有者新公司的前同事是那些在上一家雇主处与创始所有者同厂工作、与创始所有者有长期共事经历、与创始所有者属于同一行业或职业、以及与创始所有者大致同时被雇佣的人。在控制了可观测的人力资本和新公司固定效应后，前同事在新公司获得的初始工资高出8%，并且在公司运营第二年之前离职的可能性低6个百分点。我们发现，前同事的工资溢价每年随任期减少0.5个百分点，而离职优势每年随任期减少2.0个百分点。

papers.title: Why Aren't There More Minority Entrepreneurs?
papers.authors: Victor M. Bennett, David T. Robinson
papers.abstract: We study racial and gender disparities in entrepreneurial activity through the lens of a Roy model, focusing on the distinction between idea generation and execution. Using nationally representative sur-vey data, we find that Black and Hispanic individuals demonstrate higher entrepreneurial intentions than white respondents. They are much less likely, however, to launch ventures once ideas are conceived. A critical determinant of this gap is differential reliance on social networks, which shapes both the likelihood of launching a business as well as the reasons for stopping. Variation in the strength of local, own-group entrepreneurship reveals that stronger networks enhance the relationship between social engagement and business formation. Also, as predicted by the model, access to social networks also predicts seeking capital. The interconnections between socialization and searching for capital are important for understanding-policies aimed at boosting rates of entrepreneurship in underrepresented groups.
papers.zh_title: 为什么少数族裔企业家更少？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过罗伊模型的视角研究创业活动中的种族和性别差异，重点关注创意产生与执行之间的区别。利用具有全国代表性的调查数据，我们发现黑人和西班牙裔受访者表现出比白人受访者更高的创业意愿。然而，一旦创意形成，他们启动创业的可能性却低得多。这一差距的一个关键决定因素是对社交网络的依赖程度不同，这既影响创业的可能性，也影响放弃创业的原因。本地同族裔创业强度的差异表明，更强的网络能增强社交参与与创业形成之间的关系。此外，正如模型所预测的，社交网络的可得性也预示着寻求资本的行为。社交化与寻求资本之间的相互联系对于理解旨在提高代表性不足群体创业率的政策至关重要。

papers.title: A Market Interpretation of Treatment Effects
papers.authors: Robert Minton, Casey B. Mulligan
papers.abstract: Markets, likened to an invisible hand, often appear to contradict econometric assumptions that rule out spillovers of one person’s treatment on another’s outcomes. This paper provides a simple statistical framework highlighting that controls are indirectly affected by the treatment through the market. Further, the effect of the treatment on the treated reveals only part of the consequence for the treated of treating the entire market. When combined with economic theory, our framework leads to a new application of Marshall’s Laws of Derived Demand that relates econometric estimates of treatment effects in the marketplace to the substitution and scale effects of demand theory. We show how treatment-effect estimators can diverge – both in magnitude and direction – from the causal effects of treatment on the treated or counterfactual policies treating all market participants. The framework shows how the consequences of targeted treatments reveal the effects of marketwide treatments, and the role of market frictions in that inference. Examples from labor, public finance, economic geography, development, and the macro literature on the “missing intercept” are provided.
papers.zh_title: 处理效应的市场解释
papers.zh_abstract: 市场常被比作一只看不见的手，这似乎与排除一个人处理对另一个人结果产生溢出效应的计量经济学假设相矛盾。本文提供了一个简单的统计框架，强调对照组通过市场间接受到处理的影响。此外，处理对受处理者的效应仅揭示了处理整个市场对受处理者后果的一部分。当与经济理论结合时，我们的框架引出了马歇尔派生需求定律的一个新应用，该应用将市场中处理效应的计量经济学估计与需求理论的替代效应和规模效应联系起来。我们展示了处理效应估计量如何在幅度和方向上偏离处理对受处理者的因果效应，或偏离处理所有市场参与者的反事实政策效应。该框架展示了针对性处理的后果如何揭示市场范围处理的效果，以及市场摩擦在这种推断中的作用。文中提供了来自劳动经济学、公共财政、经济地理学、发展经济学以及关于“缺失截距”的宏观文献中的例子。

papers.title: Minimum Viable Signal: Venture Funding, Social Movements, and Race
papers.authors: Matt Marx, Qian Wang, Emmanuel Yimfor
papers.abstract: How do venture capital investors react to social movements, including those that relate to historical underrepresentation in funding? We use image and name algorithms combined with clerical review to classify race for 150,000 founders and 30,000 investors. These data allow us to assess the impact of George Floyd’s murder on VC funding of Black entrepreneurs and identify which VCs were most responsive. Although VCs responded swiftly, investment in Black-founded startups reverted to prior levels within two years. This temporary reaction was concentrated among those who had never previously invested in any Black entrepreneur. Moreover, the investors who responded were less likely to invest in more than one Black-founded startup and were less inclined to engage deeply by taking a board seat. Finally, it appears that the best Black entrepreneurs may have anticipated this “token” response, as they did not match with investors who had no experience funding Black startups.
papers.zh_title: 最小可行信号：风险投资、社会运动与种族
papers.zh_abstract: 风险投资者如何应对社会运动，包括那些与历史上在融资中代表性不足相关的运动？我们使用图像和姓名算法结合文书审查，对15万名创始人和3万名投资者进行了种族分类。这些数据使我们能够评估乔治·弗洛伊德谋杀案对黑人企业家风险投资的影响，并识别出哪些风险投资者反应最为积极。尽管风险投资者迅速做出了反应，但对黑人创办的初创企业的投资在两年内恢复到了之前的水平。这种暂时性的反应集中在那些此前从未投资过任何黑人企业家的投资者身上。此外，做出反应的投资者投资超过一家黑人创办的初创企业的可能性较低，并且不太倾向于通过担任董事会席位来深入参与。最后，最好的黑人企业家可能已经预见到了这种“象征性”回应，因为他们没有与那些没有投资黑人初创企业经验的投资者进行匹配。

papers.title: Investor Memory and Biased Beliefs: Evidence from the Field
papers.authors: Zhengyang Jiang, Hongqi Liu, Cameron Peng, Hongjun Yan
papers.abstract: We survey a large, representative sample of retail investors in China to elicit their memories of stock market investments and their return expectations. We merge this survey data with administrative transaction data to test a model in which investors selectively recall past experiences to form their beliefs. Our analysis uncovers new facts about investor memory and highlights similarity-based recall as a novel mechanism of belief formation in financial markets. A rising market prompts investors to recall their past experiences more positively, leading to more optimistic forecasts of future returns. Recalled experiences explain a sizable fraction of cross-investor variation in return expectations and dominate actual experiences in their explanatory power. In the transaction data, we confirm that recalled experiences affect investors' trading decisions through a belief channel.
papers.zh_title: 投资者记忆与有偏信念：来自田野的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们对中国一个大型、具有代表性的散户投资者样本进行了调查，以引出他们对股票市场投资的记忆和回报预期。我们将这些调查数据与管理交易数据合并，以检验一个模型，在该模型中，投资者选择性回忆过去的经历来形成他们的信念。我们的分析揭示了关于投资者记忆的新事实，并强调了基于相似性的回忆作为金融市场信念形成的一种新机制。上涨的市场促使投资者更积极地回忆过去的经历，导致对未来回报的预测更加乐观。回忆起的经历解释了投资者间回报预期差异的相当大一部分，并且在解释力上超过了实际经历。在交易数据中，我们证实回忆起的经历通过信念渠道影响投资者的交易决策。

papers.title: Valuing Policy Characteristics and New Products using a Simple Linear Program
papers.authors: H. Spencer Banzhaf
papers.abstract: The Random Utility Model (RUM) is a workhorse model for valuing new products or changes in public goods. But RUMs have been faulted along two lines. First, for including idiosyncratic errors that imply unreasonably high values for new alternatives and unrealistic substitution patterns. Second, for involving strong restrictions on functional forms for utility. This paper shows how, instead, starting with a revealed preference framework, one can partially identify nonparametrically the answers to policy questions about discrete alternatives. When the Generalized Axiom of Revealed Preference (GARP) is satisfied, the approach weakly identifies a pure characteristics model. When GARP is violated, it recasts the RUM errors as departures from GARP (critical cost efficiency), to be minimized using a minimum-distance criterion. This perspective provides an alternative avenue for nonparametric identification of discrete choice models. The paper illustrates the approach by estimating bounds on the values of ecological improvements in the Southern Appalachian Mountains using survey data.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, IO；JEL：C14, C25, C61, D12, Q51
papers.zh_title: 使用简单线性规划评估政策特征和新产品
papers.zh_abstract: 随机效用模型（RUM）是评估新产品或公共物品变化价值的工作母机模型。但RUM在两个方面受到批评。首先，它包含了意味着新替代方案价值过高和替代模式不现实的异质性误差。其次，它对效用函数形式施加了严格限制。本文展示了如何从显示性偏好框架出发，非参数地部分识别关于离散替代方案的政策问题的答案。当满足显示性偏好广义公理（GARP）时，该方法弱识别了一个纯特征模型。当GARP被违反时，它将RUM误差重新解释为对GARP（临界成本效率）的偏离，并使用最小距离准则将其最小化。这一视角为离散选择模型的非参数识别提供了另一种途径。本文通过使用调查数据估计南阿巴拉契亚山脉生态改善价值的边界来说明该方法。

papers.title: Business Applications as a Leading Economic Indicator?
papers.authors: Jose Asturias, Emin Dinlersoz, John C. Haltiwanger, Rebecca J. Hutchinson, Alyson Plumb
papers.abstract: How are applications to start new businesses related to aggregate economic activity? This paper explores the properties of three monthly business application series from the U.S. Census Bureau’s Business Formation Statistics as economic indicators: all business applications, business applications that are relatively likely to turn into new employer businesses (“likely employers”), and the residual series -- business applications that have a relatively low rate of becoming employers (“likely non-employers”). Growth in applications for likely employers significantly leads total nonfarm employment growth and has a strong positive correlation with it. Furthermore, growth in applications for likely employers leads growth in most of the monthly Principal Federal Economic Indicators (PFEIs). Motivated by our findings, we estimate a dynamic factor model (DFM) to forecast nonfarm employment growth over a 12-month period using the PFEIs and the likely employers series. The latter improves the model’s forecast, especially in the years following the turning points of the Great Recession and the COVID-19 pandemic. Overall, applications for likely employers are a strong leading indicator of monthly PFEIs and aggregate economic activity, whereas applications for likely non-employers provide early information about changes in increasingly prevalent self-employment activity in the U.S. economy.
papers.zh_title: 商业申请作为领先经济指标？
papers.zh_abstract: 创办新企业的申请与总体经济活动有何关联？本文探讨了美国人口普查局商业形成统计中的三个月度商业申请序列作为经济指标的特性：所有商业申请、相对可能转变为新雇主企业的商业申请（“潜在雇主”），以及剩余序列——成为雇主概率较低的商业申请（“潜在非雇主”）。潜在雇主申请的增长显著领先于非农就业总人数的增长，并与之呈强正相关。此外，潜在雇主申请的增长领先于大多数月度主要联邦经济指标（PFEIs）的增长。基于我们的发现，我们估计了一个动态因子模型（DFM），利用PFEIs和潜在雇主序列来预测12个月内的非农就业增长。后者改善了模型的预测能力，尤其是在大衰退和新冠疫情转折点之后的年份。总体而言，潜在雇主的申请是月度PFEIs和总体经济活动的强领先指标，而潜在非雇主的申请则提供了美国经济中日益普遍的自主创业活动变化的早期信息。

papers.title: Gender Composition and Group Behavior: Evidence from US City Councils
papers.authors: Emilia Brito Rebolledo, Jesse Bruhn, Thea How Choon, E. Anna Weber
papers.abstract: How does gender composition influence individual and group behavior? To study this question empirically, we assembled a new, national sample of United States city council elections and digitized information from the minutes of over 40,000 city-council meetings. We find that replacing a male councilor with a female councilor results in a 25p.p. increase in the share of motions proposed by women. This is despite causing only a 20p.p. increase in the council female share. The discrepancy is driven, in part, by behavioral changes similar to those documented in laboratory-based studies of gender composition. When a lone woman is joined by a female colleague, she participates more actively by proposing more motions. The apparent changes in behavior do not translate into clear differences in spending. The null finding on spending is not driven by strategic voting; however, preference alignment on local policy issues between men and women appears to play an important role. Taken together, our results both highlight the importance of nominal representation for cultivating substantive participation by women in high-stakes decision making bodies; and also provide evidence in support of the external validity of a large body of laboratory-based work on the consequences of group gender composition.
papers.zh_title: 性别构成与群体行为：来自美国市议会的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 性别构成如何影响个人和群体行为？为了实证研究这个问题，我们收集了一个新的全国性美国市议会选举样本，并数字化了超过40,000次市议会会议的会议记录信息。我们发现，用一名女议员替换一名男议员会导致女性提出的动议比例增加25个百分点。尽管这仅使议会中女性比例增加了20个百分点。这种差异部分源于类似于实验室性别构成研究中记录的行为变化。当一名孤立女性有了一位女同事时，她会通过提出更多动议而更积极地参与。行为上的明显变化并未转化为支出上的明确差异。支出方面的零结果并非由策略性投票导致；然而，男女在地方政策问题上的偏好一致性似乎起着重要作用。综合来看，我们的结果既突显了名义代表性对于培养女性在高风险决策机构中实质性参与的重要性；也提供了证据支持大量关于群体性别构成后果的实验室研究的外部有效性。

papers.title: Is Swedish Household Debt Too High? Solvency, Liquidity, and Debt-Financed Overconsumption
papers.authors: Lars E.O. Svensson
papers.abstract:
Swedish authorities and international organizations that monitor and comment on Swedish economic policy have argued that Swedish household debt is too high and a threat to financial and macroeconomic stability (FMS). But household debt may become a threat to FMS under essentially three conditions: (1) Households’ debt becomes too high relative to household assets; households’ solvency is not good. (2) Households’ debt service becomes too high relative to incomes and payment capacity; households’ liquidity is not good. (3) Households use home-equity withdrawals (HEWs)—made possible by rising housing prices—to finance an unsustainable overconsumption of macroeconomic significance. 
The analysis covers both the borrowers of the total stock of mortgages and the new borrowers of new mortgages, not—as is common in Sweden—only the new borrowers and the new mortgages. The total stock is much larger, its borrowers are many more, and they matter much more for FMS than the new mortgages and the new borrowers. 
Two structural features mitigate risks from the Swedish household debt. First, on a closer look, mortgages are in fact a safe cash cow for banks and contribute to financial stability. Second, the mortgage rates are not exogenous but indirectly controlled by the Riksbank and its policy rate. The Riksbank sets the policy rate to maintain macroeconomic stability and to contribute to financial stability. 
Regarding condition (1), aggregate household assets are much larger and have grown much faster than the debt. Net wealth was twice the debt in 1985, five times the debt in 2024. LTV ratios among the borrowers of the mortgage stock are much smaller than those among the new borrowers. A full 78% of the borrowers of the stock have home equity exceeding 30%, which is more than any housing-price fall during the last 50 years. Solvency is good. Regarding condition (2), the debt service of the borrowers of the stock is not high relative to incomes and substantially lower than that of the new borrowers, because lower loan-to-income and LTV ratios imply that both interest and amortization payments are lower. Liquidity is good. Regarding condition (3), there is no indication that there is any debt-financed overconsumption (undersaving) of macroeconomic significance. The HEW recorded by the Swedish FSA is not unusually high, the saving rate is close to a historical high, and the share of durable consumption in total consumption expenditures is normal. 
Thus, none of the three conditions is present. Swedish household debt is neither too high nor a threat to financial and macroeconomic stability.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, IFM, ME；JEL：E21, E52, G01, G21, G28, G51
papers.zh_title: 瑞典家庭债务过高吗？偿付能力、流动性与债务融资的过度消费
papers.zh_abstract: 瑞典当局以及监测和评论瑞典经济政策的国际组织认为，瑞典家庭债务过高，对金融和宏观经济稳定构成威胁。但家庭债务可能成为金融和宏观经济稳定威胁的条件主要有三个：(1) 家庭债务相对于家庭资产过高；家庭偿付能力不佳。(2) 家庭偿债额相对于收入和支付能力过高；家庭流动性不佳。(3) 家庭利用房价上涨带来的房屋净值提取来资助具有宏观经济意义的不可持续的过度消费。 分析涵盖了全部抵押贷款存量借款人和新增抵押贷款的新借款人，而非像瑞典常见的那样仅关注新借款人和新抵押贷款。总存量规模大得多，其借款人数量也多得多，并且它们对金融和宏观经济稳定的影响远大于新抵押贷款和新借款人。 两个结构性特征减轻了瑞典家庭债务的风险。首先，仔细审视，抵押贷款实际上是银行安全的摇钱树，有助于金融稳定。其次，抵押贷款利率并非外生，而是由瑞典央行及其政策利率间接控制。瑞典央行设定政策利率以维持宏观经济稳定并促进金融稳定。 关于条件(1)，家庭总资产远大于债务且增长更快。1985年净资产是债务的两倍，2024年是债务的五倍。抵押贷款存量借款人的贷款价值比远低于新借款人。存量借款人中高达78%的人拥有超过30%的房屋净值，这超过了过去50年中任何一次房价下跌幅度。偿付能力良好。关于条件(2)，存量借款人的偿债额相对于收入并不高，且远低于新借款人，因为较低的贷款收入比和贷款价值比意味着利息和本金偿还额都较低。流动性良好。关于条件(3)，没有迹象表明存在任何具有宏观经济意义的债务融资过度消费（储蓄不足）。瑞典金融监管局记录的房屋净值提取并不异常高，储蓄率接近历史高位，耐用消费品在总消费支出中的占比正常。 因此，三个条件均不存在。瑞典家庭债务既不过高，也不对金融和宏观经济稳定构成威胁。

papers.title: Search Costs, Intermediation, and Trade: Experimental Evidence from Ugandan Agricultural Markets
papers.authors: Lauren F. Bergquist, Craig McIntosh, Meredith Startz
papers.abstract: We study the large-scale experimental rollout of a platform that reduced search and matching frictions in Ugandan agricultural markets by connecting buyers and sellers. Market integration improved substantially: trade increased and price gaps fell. Interpreting the experiment through a trade model, we estimate treatment effects accounting for equilibrium changes that impact control markets. The intervention reduced fixed trade costs by 21% and increased trade flows between treated markets by 6% and across all markets by 1%. Scale economies shaped engagement: few farmers used the platform, but equilibrium price convergence from improved arbitrage by larger traders passed through to farm revenue.
papers.zh_title: 搜索成本、中介与贸易：来自乌干达农产品市场的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个大规模实验性推广的平台，该平台通过连接买卖双方减少了乌干达农产品市场中的搜索和匹配摩擦。市场整合显著改善：贸易增加，价格差距缩小。通过贸易模型解读该实验，我们估计了处理效应，并考虑了影响对照市场的均衡变化。该干预措施将固定贸易成本降低了21%，使处理市场之间的贸易流量增加了6%，所有市场之间的贸易流量增加了1%。规模经济影响了参与度：很少有农民使用该平台，但大型贸易商套利改善带来的均衡价格趋同传导至了农场收入。

papers.title: Tearing the Paper Ceiling: The Impact of State Commitments to Remove Degree Requirements on Public Awareness and Job Opportunities for STARs
papers.authors: Justin Heck, Blair Corcoran de Castillo, Peter Q. Blair, Papia Debroy
papers.abstract: In the past two years, 25 states have enacted executive orders and legislation to reduce unnecessary degree requirements for public sector jobs, signaling a shift toward skill-based hiring. This paper examines the impact of these policy commitments on public perceptions, media coverage, and job posting practices in the time following their adoption. Our analysis reveals significant increases in public awareness of skill-based hiring concepts, such as the 'paper ceiling' (i.e., bachelor’s degree analog of the glass ceiling), and a notable decline in bachelor’s degree requirements in state government job postings. We estimate that degree requirements dropped by 2.5 percentage points for each additional year of policy exposure in states with commitments. These findings suggest that state policy commitments have expanded access to government jobs for workers skilled through alternative routes (STARs) other than the bachelor’s degree in keeping with the intended goals of the policies to broaden the talent pool for public sector hiring.
papers.zh_title: 撕破纸天花板：州政府承诺取消学位要求对STARs公众认知和就业机会的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 在过去两年中，25个州颁布了行政命令和立法，以减少公共部门职位不必要的学位要求，标志着向技能型招聘的转变。本文考察了这些政策承诺在采纳后对公众认知、媒体报道和职位发布实践的影响。我们的分析显示，公众对技能型招聘概念（如“纸天花板”，即学士学位版的玻璃天花板）的认知显著提高，州政府职位发布中对学士学位的要求显著下降。我们估计，在有承诺的州，每增加一年的政策暴露，学位要求下降2.5个百分点。这些发现表明，州政策承诺扩大了通过学士学位以外的替代途径获得技能的工人（STARs）获得政府工作的机会，符合政策旨在拓宽公共部门招聘人才库的目标。

papers.title: Careers and Wages in Family Firms: Evidence from Matched Employer-Employee Data
papers.authors: Edoardo Di Porto, Marco Pagano, Vincenzo Pezone, Raffaele Saggio, Fabiano Schivardi
papers.abstract: We investigate compensation policies in family and non-family firms using a novel employer-employee matched dataset comprising nearly the universe of Italian incorporated firms and ownership information. Family firms pay significantly lower wages and offer slower and less rewarding careers. Differences in worker sorting account for half of the wage gap while productivity differences and compensating differentials explain little of the residual gap. The wage distribution in family firms is more compressed, with infrequent promotions. We rationalize this evidence with a model where family owners seek to maintain control, creating a “glass ceiling” that limits their employees’ career progression.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, LS；JEL：G30, G38, J01, J30, J31
papers.zh_title: 家族企业中的职业与工资：来自匹配雇主-雇员数据的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用一个新颖的雇主-雇员匹配数据集（包含几乎所有意大利注册公司及其所有权信息）研究了家族企业与非家族企业的薪酬政策。家族企业支付的工资显著较低，并提供更慢且回报更低的职业发展。工人分类差异解释了工资差距的一半，而生产率差异和补偿性差异对剩余差距的解释力很小。家族企业中的工资分布更为压缩，晋升频率较低。我们将这一证据合理化，构建了一个模型，其中家族所有者寻求保持控制权，从而形成了限制员工职业发展的“玻璃天花板”。

papers.title: Growth and Fluctuations: An Overview
papers.authors: Joseph E. Stiglitz
papers.abstract: Capitalism since its inception has been marked by large fluctuations. The resulting episodic unemployment has been very costly. This paper provides an overview of alternative theories. Standard models (such as DSGE) have not provided insights into the causes of the fluctuations and the shocks buffeting the economy, which contrary to what they assume, are largely endogenous; they have not provided an understanding of how and why the economy amplifies shocks and makes their effects at times so persistent or how and why there may be oscillatory behavior, rather than a smooth convergence back to some (temporary) equilibrium. Accordingly, they do not give guidance on how to make deep downturns—those that really matter—less frequent, shallower, and less costly. By contrast, there are alternative, new models, often building on older Keynesian foundations, with heterogenous capital goods and heterogeneous agents, interacting with each other in imperfect markets and fragile networks, with endogenous innovation in an ever-evolving economy, with deep uncertainty. These theories, with endogenously driven fluctuations, provide greater insights in the causes and nature of fluctuations, and better policy guidance.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, IFM；JEL：C62, D84, E12, E32, E44, N30
papers.zh_title: 增长与波动：概述
papers.zh_abstract: 资本主义自诞生以来就伴随着巨大的波动。由此产生的间歇性失业代价高昂。本文提供了替代理论的概述。标准模型（如DSGE）未能洞察波动的成因以及冲击经济体的因素——这些因素与它们的假设相反，在很大程度上是内生的；它们未能理解经济如何以及为何放大冲击并使其影响有时如此持久，或者经济如何以及为何可能出现振荡行为，而非平滑收敛回某个（暂时的）均衡。因此，它们没有就如何使深度衰退——那些真正重要的衰退——更不频繁、更浅且代价更低提供指导。相比之下，存在替代性的新模型，通常建立在较老的凯恩斯主义基础上，具有异质性资本品和异质性主体，在不完善市场和脆弱网络中相互作用，在持续演变的经济中具有内生创新，并面临深度不确定性。这些具有内生驱动波动的理论，为波动的成因和性质提供了更深刻的见解，并提供了更好的政策指导。

papers.title: Federal Reserve Structure, Economic Ideas, and Banking Policy During the “Quiet Period” in Banking
papers.authors: Michael D. Bordo, Edward S. Prescott
papers.abstract: We evaluate the decentralized structure of the Federal Reserve System as a mechanism for generating and processing new ideas on banking policy in the 1950s and 1960s. We document that demand for research and analysis was driven by banking industry developments and legal changes that required the Federal Reserve and other banking regulatory agencies to develop guidelines for bank mergers. In response to these developments, the Board and the Reserve Banks hired industrial organization economists and young economists out of graduate school who brought in the leading theory of industrial organization at the time, which was the structure, conduct, and performance (SCP) paradigm. This flow of ideas into the Federal Reserve from academia paralleled the flow that was going on in monetary policy and macroeconomics at the time and contributed to the increased professionalization of research at the Federal Reserve. We document how several Reserve Banks, particularly Boston and Chicago, innovated by creating dissertation support programs, collecting specialized data, and creating the Bank Structure Conference, which became the clearinghouse for academic work on bank structure and later for bank risk and financial stability. We interpret these examples as illustrating an advantage that a decentralized central bank has in the production of knowledge.
papers.zh_title: 美联储结构、经济思想与银行业“平静期”的银行政策
papers.zh_abstract: 我们评估了美联储系统的分散化结构，将其视为20世纪50年代和60年代银行政策新思想的生成和处理机制。我们记录到，对研究和分析的需求是由银行业发展和法律变化驱动的，这些变化要求美联储和其他银行监管机构为银行合并制定指导方针。为应对这些发展，美联储理事会和储备银行聘请了产业组织经济学家和刚从研究生院毕业的年轻经济学家，他们带来了当时领先的产业组织理论，即结构、行为和绩效（SCP）范式。这种思想从学术界流入美联储的过程，与当时货币政策与宏观经济学领域的思想流动并行，并促进了美联储研究专业化的提升。我们记录了多家储备银行（尤其是波士顿和芝加哥）如何通过创建论文支持项目、收集专门数据以及举办银行结构会议进行创新，该会议后来成为银行结构学术工作以及后来银行风险和金融稳定的信息交流中心。我们将这些例子解释为分散化中央银行在知识生产方面具有的优势。

papers.title: Rules vs. Discretion: Decoding FOMC Policy Deliberations
papers.authors: Michael D. Bordo, Klodiana Istrefi, Humberto Martínez
papers.abstract: This study provides evidence on the usage and preferences of Federal Reserves Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) regarding the balance between rules and discretion in policy decisions. Analyzing FOMC transcripts over 40 years, we find that while Discretion has been a consistent feature in the language of the FOMC, the use of the language of Rules surged notably in the mid-1990s, aligning with theoretical advancements in monetary policy. We identify that a rise in Discretion terminology occurs during economic downturns and periods of heightened uncertainty. In contrast, a rise in the language of Rules is supported by higher references to terms such as credibility and commitment, and is more prevalent among hawkish FOMC members. Our findings link the increased use of the language of Rules (Discretion) to tighter (easier) monetary policy, revealing a significant role of this debate in shaping policy outcomes, in particular periods.
papers.zh_title: 规则与自由裁量：解读FOMC政策审议
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究提供了关于美联储联邦公开市场委员会（FOMC）在政策决策中规则与自由裁量平衡的使用和偏好的证据。通过分析40年间的FOMC会议记录，我们发现，虽然自由裁量一直是FOMC语言中的一贯特征，但规则语言的使用在20世纪90年代中期显著增加，这与货币政策的理论进展相一致。我们识别出，自由裁量术语的增加发生在经济衰退和不确定性加剧时期。相比之下，规则语言的增加得到了对可信度和承诺等术语更多提及的支持，并且在鹰派FOMC成员中更为普遍。我们的发现将规则（自由裁量）语言使用的增加与更紧缩（更宽松）的货币政策联系起来，揭示了这一辩论在特定时期对政策结果形成的重要作用。

papers.title: Beliefs of Others: an Experiment
papers.authors: Marina Agranov, Polina Detkova
papers.abstract: We study how people think others update their beliefs upon encountering new evidence. We find that when two individuals share the same prior, one believes that new evidence cannot systematically shift the other’s beliefs in either direction (Martingale property). When the two have different priors, people think that any information brings others’ expected posteriors closer to their own prior, but this adjustment is less responsive to information quality than theory predicts. We identify the primary cause of this insensitivity and discuss the implications of our findings for strategic games with asymmetric information, information design, and, more broadly, for understanding societal polarization.
papers.zh_title: 他人的信念：一项实验
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究人们如何认为他人在遇到新证据时更新自己的信念。我们发现，当两个人拥有相同的先验信念时，一个人认为新证据不会系统性地将另一个人的信念向任一方向偏移（鞅性质）。当两人拥有不同的先验信念时，人们认为任何信息都会使他人的预期后验信念更接近自己的先验信念，但这种调整对信息质量的敏感度低于理论预测。我们识别了这种不敏感性的主要原因，并讨论了我们的发现对非对称信息下的策略博弈、信息设计以及更广泛地理解社会两极分化的启示。

papers.title: Cracks in the Glass Ceiling and Gender Equality: Do Exports Shatter the Glass Ceiling?
papers.authors: Bruno César Araújo, Lourenço S. Paz, James E. West
papers.abstract: Do female managers improve workplace outcomes for female employees? The evidence is mixed. We use Brazilian administrative employer-employee matched data over the large and unanticipated 1999 Brazilian real exchange rate devaluation and find that the share of female employees grows in female-led firms, but the male-female wage gap grows in both female- and male-led firms. This behavior is inconsistent with both theoretical models of taste-based employer discrimination and third-degree oligopsonistic labor markets by gender. Outcomes only differ between female- and male-led firms regarding managerial and supervisory employees, where female-led firms hire more female managerial and supervisory employees, yet the gender wage gap widens relative to male-led firms. We conclude that exports further crack the glass ceiling in female-led firms, though at the cost of a more expansive gender wage gap.
papers.zh_title: 玻璃天花板的裂缝与性别平等：出口是否打破了玻璃天花板？
papers.zh_abstract: 女性管理者是否改善了女性员工的工作场所结果？证据是混杂的。我们利用巴西1999年大规模且出乎意料的雷亚尔贬值期间的行政雇主-雇员匹配数据，发现女性领导的企业中女性员工比例增长，但在女性和男性领导的企业中，男女工资差距都在扩大。这种行为与基于偏好的雇主歧视理论和按性别划分的三级寡头垄断劳动力市场模型都不一致。女性和男性领导的企业之间的结果差异仅体现在管理和监督员工方面，女性领导的企业雇佣了更多的女性管理和监督员工，然而与男性领导的企业相比，性别工资差距却扩大了。我们得出结论，出口进一步打破了女性领导企业中的玻璃天花板，但代价是性别工资差距的扩大。

papers.title: Breaking Barriers to Financial Access: Cross-Platform Digital Payments and Credit Markets
papers.authors: Shashwat Alok, Pulak Ghosh, Nirupama Kulkarni, Manju Puri
papers.abstract: Can cross-platform digital payments improve credit access at scale? We study this question using India’s launch of the Unified Payments Interface (UPI), a nationwide cross-platform payment system. Using rarely available data on the universe of consumer loans, we show that digital payments increased financial deepening, allowing new borrowers to access formal credit. Banks mainly expanded lending to prime borrowers, while fintechs served all borrower segments—but only fintechs extended credit to new-to-credit customers. Credit growth was strongest in regions with affordable internet and recent bank account penetration. We find no evidence that this expansion increased default rates.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, DEV, LE, ME, PE；JEL：D14, G24, G28, G51, J15, R21, R23, R31
papers.zh_title: 打破金融准入壁垒：跨平台数字支付与信贷市场
papers.zh_abstract: 跨平台数字支付能否大规模改善信贷准入？我们利用印度推出的统一支付接口（UPI）——一个全国性的跨平台支付系统——来研究这个问题。利用罕见的消费者贷款全量数据，我们表明数字支付增加了金融深化，使新借款人能够获得正规信贷。银行主要向优质借款人扩大贷款，而金融科技公司服务于所有借款人群体——但只有金融科技公司向无信贷记录的新客户提供信贷。信贷增长在互联网价格可负担且近期银行账户普及率高的地区最为强劲。我们没有发现证据表明这种扩张增加了违约率。

papers.title: Knowledge Suppression and Resilience under Censorship: Three-century Book Publications in China
papers.authors: Ying Bai, Ruixue Jia, Jiaojiao Yang
papers.abstract: This study examines the short-, medium-, and long-term impacts of state censorship on knowledge production, focusing on the largest book-banning campaign in Chinese history, initiated during the compilation of the 'Siku Quanshu' (Complete Library in Four Sections) between 1772 and 1783. Analyzing publication data from over 161,000 books spanning the 1660s to the 1940s, we find that categories subjected to stricter censorship experienced significant declines in publication during the seven decades following the bans (1770s–1830s). However, beginning in the 1840s, political upheavals and the erosion of state control triggered a resurgence of publications in previously restricted categories. This pattern of suppression and recovery extends to ideas, as evidenced by keyword analysis of book titles. Further analysis highlights the central role of chilling effects in driving these dynamics, with the exit and entry of publishers playing a crucial role in both the suppression and subsequent revival of knowledge production.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, POL；JEL：D83, H11, N40, O31, Z18
papers.zh_title: 审查制度下的知识压制与韧性：中国三个世纪的图书出版
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究考察了国家审查对知识生产的短期、中期和长期影响，重点关注中国历史上最大规模的禁书运动，该运动始于1772年至1783年间《四库全书》的编纂。通过分析从1660年代到1940年代超过16.1万本书的出版数据，我们发现，在禁令实施后的七十年间（1770年代至1830年代），受到更严格审查的类别出版量显著下降。然而，从1840年代开始，政治动荡和国家控制的削弱引发了先前受限类别出版的复苏。这种压制与复苏的模式也延伸到了思想层面，图书标题的关键词分析证明了这一点。进一步分析强调了寒蝉效应在驱动这些动态中的核心作用，出版商的退出和进入在知识生产的压制及随后的复兴中都扮演了关键角色。

papers.title: Conditions Under Which College Students Can be Responsive to Text-based Nudging
papers.authors: Lindsay C. Page, Katharine E. Meyer, Jeonghyun Lee, Hunter Gehlbach
papers.abstract: College success requires students to engage with their institution academically and administratively. Missteps with administrative processes can threaten student persistence and success. Through two experimental studies, one exploratory (N=13,657) and one pre-registered and confirmatory (N=11,561), we assessed the effectiveness of an artificially intelligent, text-based chatbot that proactively reached out to students to support navigation of administrative processes and use of campus resources. Across two-year and four-year college contexts, outreach was most effective when focused on discrete administrative processes–such as filing financial aid forms and managing registration holds–which were acute and time-sensitive and for which outreach could be targeted to those for whom it was relevant. We situate these experiments in the context of similar efforts targeting college students to formulate testable hypotheses about their effective use for promoting college success. Specifically, we hypothesize that proactive outreach will be most effective when: (1) framed as from a trusted source with whom students would expect to communicate; (2) targeted using data to ensure that communication is relevant to students’ personal circumstances; and (3) focused on well-defined, required, and often acute tasks.
papers.zh_title: 大学生对基于文本的助推产生回应的条件
papers.zh_abstract: 大学成功要求学生从学术和行政两方面与所在院校保持互动。行政流程中的失误可能威胁到学生的持续学习和成功。通过两项实验研究——一项探索性研究（N=13,657）和一项预注册的验证性研究（N=11,561）——我们评估了一个人工智能驱动的基于文本的聊天机器人的有效性，该机器人主动联系学生，以支持他们完成行政流程和使用校园资源。在两年制和四年制大学背景下，当外联活动聚焦于离散的行政流程（例如提交经济援助表格和管理注册冻结）时最为有效，这些流程具有紧迫性和时效性，并且外联可以针对相关学生。我们将这些实验置于针对大学生的类似努力背景下，以提出关于其有效促进大学成功的可检验假设。具体而言，我们假设主动外联在以下情况下最为有效：（1）以学生期望沟通的、可信赖的来源名义发起；（2）利用数据进行精准定位，确保沟通与学生个人情况相关；（3）聚焦于定义明确、必需且通常紧迫的任务。

papers.title: Financial Inclusion Across the United States
papers.authors: Motohiro Yogo, Andrew Whitten, Natalie Cox
papers.abstract: We study retirement and bank account participation for the universe of U.S. households with a member aged 50 to 59 in the administrative tax data. ZCTA-level average income, income inequality, and racial composition predict retirement account participation for low-income households, conditional on household income and regional price parities. Income inequality also predicts bank account participation for low-income households. We estimate the causal effect of access to an employer retirement plan on participation. Recent policy proposals for universal access with automatic enrollment could increase participation by 19 percentage points in the lowest income quintile over ten years.
papers.zh_title: 美国金融包容性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用行政税收数据，研究了全美所有至少有一名成员年龄在50至59岁之间的家庭的退休账户和银行账户参与情况。在控制家庭收入和地区价格差异的条件下，邮政编码区层面的平均收入、收入不平等程度和种族构成能够预测低收入家庭的退休账户参与率。收入不平等程度也能预测低收入家庭的银行账户参与率。我们估算了获得雇主退休计划对参与率的因果效应。近期提出的全民自动注册政策建议，可能在十年内使最低收入五分位群体的参与率提高19个百分点。

papers.title: Political Power and Market Power
papers.authors: Bo Cowgill, Andrea Prat, Tommaso Valletti
papers.abstract: Brandeis (1914) hypothesized that firms with market power will also attempt to gain political power. To explore this hypothesis empirically, we combine data on mergers with data on lobbying expenditures and campaign contributions in the US from 1999 to 2017. We pursue two distinct empirical approaches: a panel event study and a differential exposure design. Both approaches indicate that mergers are followed by large and persistent increases in lobbying activity, both by individual firms and by industry trade associations. There is also weaker evidence for an association of mergers with campaign contributions (PACs). We also find that mergers impact the extensive margin of political activity, for example, by impacting companies’ choice to establish their first in-house lobbying teams and/or first corporate PAC. We interpret these results within an oligopoly model augmented with endogenous regulation and lobbying.
papers.zh_title: 政治权力与市场权力
papers.zh_abstract: 布兰代斯（1914）假设，拥有市场权力的企业也会试图获取政治权力。为了实证检验这一假设，我们将1999年至2017年美国的并购数据与游说支出和竞选捐款数据相结合。我们采用了两种不同的实证方法：面板事件研究和差异化暴露设计。两种方法均表明，并购之后，无论是单个企业还是行业贸易协会的游说活动都会出现大幅且持续的增加。还有较弱的证据表明并购与竞选捐款（政治行动委员会）之间存在关联。我们还发现，并购影响了政治活动的广延边际，例如影响了企业选择建立首个内部游说团队和/或首个企业政治行动委员会的决定。我们在一个加入了内生监管和游说的寡头垄断模型框架内解释了这些结果。

papers.title: Financing, Ownership, and Performance: A Novel, Longitudinal Firm-Level Database
papers.authors: J. David Brown, Steven J. Davis, Lucia S. Foster, John C. Haltiwanger, John Sabelhaus
papers.abstract: The Census Bureau’s Longitudinal Business Database (LBD) underpins many studies of firm-level behavior. It tracks longitudinally all employers in the nonfarm private sector but lacks information about business financing and owner characteristics. We address this shortcoming by linking LBD observations to firm-level data drawn from several large Census Bureau surveys. The resulting Longitudinal Employer, Owner, and Financing (LEOF) database contains more than 3 million observations at the firm-year level with information about start-up financing, current financing, owner demographics, ownership structure, profitability, and owner aspirations – all linked to annual firm-level employment data since the firm hired its first employee. Using the LEOF database, we document trends in owner demographics and financing patterns and investigate how these business characteristics relate to firm-level employment outcomes.
papers.zh_title: 融资、所有权与绩效：一个新颖的企业层面纵向数据库
papers.zh_abstract: 人口普查局的纵向商业数据库（LBD）是许多企业层面行为研究的基础。它纵向追踪了非农私营部门中的所有雇主，但缺乏关于企业融资和所有者特征的信息。我们通过将LBD观测数据与来自人口普查局几项大型调查的企业层面数据相链接，解决了这一缺陷。由此产生的纵向雇主、所有者与融资（LEOF）数据库包含了超过300万个企业-年度观测值，涵盖了初创融资、当前融资、所有者人口统计特征、所有权结构、盈利能力以及所有者抱负等信息——所有这些数据都与自企业雇佣第一名员工以来的年度企业层面就业数据相关联。利用LEOF数据库，我们记录了所有者人口统计特征和融资模式的趋势，并研究了这些企业特征如何与企业层面的就业结果相关联。

papers.title: Efficient Imperfect Competition with an Application to International Trade
papers.authors: Guido Menzio
papers.abstract: I study the equilibrium and the welfare effects of international trade when product markets are imperfectly competitive due of search frictions—as in Burdett and Judd (1983)—rather than product differentiation—as in Dixit and Stiglitz (1977). Markups are positive, even though there are multiple firms producing identical goods. Markups depend negatively on the number of firms producing identical goods, which, in turn, determines the extent of competition in the market. Markups may be increasing, constant, decreasing or non-monotonic in firm's size, depending on the extent of competition and on the distribution of marginal costs. The entry of firms and the quantity of output produced by each firm are efficient, even though the market is imperfectly competitive. International trade increases the measure of firms in the market, intensifies competition, lowers markups, and unambiguously increases welfare. These "natural" effects of trade emerge generically in the Burdett-Judd model of imperfect competition. In the Dixit-Stiglitz model of imperfect competition, these effects are an artifact of particular specifications of preferences.
papers.zh_title: 有效的不完全竞争及其在国际贸易中的应用
papers.zh_abstract: 我研究了当产品市场因搜索摩擦（如Burdett和Judd，1983所述）而非产品差异化（如Dixit和Stiglitz，1977所述）而处于不完全竞争状态时，国际贸易的均衡和福利效应。即使存在多家生产同质产品的企业，加成率也为正。加成率负向取决于生产同质产品的企业数量，而企业数量又决定了市场竞争程度。加成率可能随企业规模递增、不变、递减或非单调变化，这取决于竞争程度和边际成本的分布。尽管市场是不完全竞争的，但企业的进入和每家企业的产出数量是有效的。国际贸易增加了市场中的企业数量，加剧了竞争，降低了加成率，并明确地提高了福利。这些贸易的“自然”效应在Burdett-Judd的不完全竞争模型中普遍存在。而在Dixit-Stiglitz的不完全竞争模型中，这些效应只是特定偏好设定的产物。

papers.title: Sustainable Investing
papers.authors: Lubos Pastor, Robert F. Stambaugh, Lucian A. Taylor
papers.abstract: We review the literature on sustainable investing, focusing on financial effects. First, we examine the effects of investor tastes on portfolio tilts and asset prices in a simple equilibrium setting. We establish novel connections, including a direct relation between the green portfolio tilt and the greenium. We also relate our framework to prior modeling of divestment. Finally, we review evidence related to the main concepts from our theoretical analysis, including the greenium, green tilts, climate risk, and investor tastes.
papers.zh_title: 可持续投资
papers.zh_abstract: 我们回顾了关于可持续投资的文献，重点关注其财务效应。首先，我们在一个简单的均衡框架下考察了投资者偏好对投资组合倾斜和资产价格的影响。我们建立了新的联系，包括绿色投资组合倾斜与绿色溢价之间的直接关系。我们还将我们的框架与先前的撤资模型联系起来。最后，我们回顾了与我们理论分析中主要概念相关的证据，包括绿色溢价、绿色倾斜、气候风险和投资者偏好。

papers.title: When Democracy Refuses to Die: Evaluating a Training Program for New Politicians
papers.authors: Ernesto Dal Bó, Claudio Ferraz, Frederico Finan, Pedro Pessoa
papers.abstract: We evaluate the effects of a program in Brazil that selects and trains new politicians, addressing three main challenges: selection bias from program screening, self-selection into candidacy, and the need to quantify the contributions of both selection and training in a holistic evaluation. Our findings show that the program raised political entry by doubling candidacy rates and increasing electoral success by 69%. However, much of the overall effect was driven by screening, which accounted for 30% of the increase in candidacy and 43% of the increase in election rates, while also making the candidate pool more diverse, competent, and committed to democratic values. Renewing the political class involves trade-offs, as some traits favored by the program did not align with voter preferences, and also reduced the descriptive representation of low-income individuals.
papers.zh_title: 当民主拒绝消亡：评估一项针对新政治家的培训项目
papers.zh_abstract: 我们评估了巴西一项选拔和培训新政治家的项目效果，该项目面临三个主要挑战：项目筛选带来的选择偏差、候选人资格的自选择，以及需要在整体评估中量化选拔和培训两者的贡献。我们的研究结果表明，该项目通过使候选人率翻倍并将选举成功率提高69%，从而提升了政治参与度。然而，大部分总体效果是由筛选驱动的，筛选占候选人率增长的30%和选举率增长的43%，同时使候选人群体更加多元化、更有能力且更致力于民主价值观。更新政治阶层涉及权衡取舍，因为该项目偏好的某些特质与选民偏好不一致，并且也降低了低收入人群的描述性代表性。

papers.title: Suez
papers.authors: David S. Jacks, Christopher M. Meissner, Nikolaus Wolf
papers.abstract: For all its importance, there still is no comprehensive quantitative assessment of the Suez Canal’s opening in 1869. We find that it led to a 72% relative increase in bilateral exports for affected country pairs and a likely permanent increase in world trade. With respect to the composition of trade, Suez was associated with large changes in export shares but only for a handful of goods categories. With respect to mechanisms, the relative cost of using steamships on Suez-affected routes fell dramatically and immediately after 1869, suggesting a vital role for the canal in the global diffusion of steam technology.
papers.zh_title: 苏伊士运河
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管苏伊士运河极其重要，但目前仍缺乏对其1869年开通影响的全面定量评估。我们发现，对于受影响的贸易伙伴国对，苏伊士运河的开通导致双边出口相对增长了72%，并且可能永久性地增加了世界贸易。在贸易构成方面，苏伊士运河与出口份额的巨大变化相关，但这仅发生在少数商品类别中。在机制方面，受苏伊士运河影响的航线上使用蒸汽轮船的相对成本在1869年后急剧且立即下降，这表明该运河在蒸汽技术全球扩散中发挥了至关重要的作用。

papers.title: Unhooking the Past: Early-life Exposure to Hookworm Eradication and Later-life Longevity
papers.authors: Hamid Noghanibehambari, Jason Fletcher
papers.abstract: This study examines the long-term effects of the Rockefeller Sanitary Commission’s (RSC) hookworm eradication campaign, initiated in the American South in the 1910s, on old-age longevity. Utilizing Social Security Administration death records linked to the 1940 full-count census, we employ a difference-in-differences approach to examine the effects of early-life exposure to the eradication campaign on later-life outcomes. We find that individuals exposed to the RSC campaign during in-utero and early-life experience an increase of 1.3 months in longevity. The effects are substantially larger among nonwhites, children of illiterate mothers, and those born in urban areas. Moreover, we provide evidence of dynamic complementarity in the effects of hookworm eradication on longevity, with larger effects observed in counties exposed to the Rosenwald school construction movement and in states with more stringent child labor laws. Using the 1940 census and World War II enlistment data, we provide suggestive evidence of improvements in educational attainment, income, and cognitive ability as possible pathways. Our findings contribute to the literature on the lasting effects of early-life public health interventions and underscore the importance of such programs in addressing present-day global health challenges.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, CH, DAE, LS；JEL：I1, I14, J10
papers.zh_title: 摆脱过去的束缚：早期接触钩虫根除运动与晚年寿命
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究考察了洛克菲勒卫生委员会（RSC）于1910年代在美国南部发起的钩虫根除运动对老年寿命的长期影响。利用与社会保障管理局死亡记录相关联的1940年全量人口普查数据，我们采用双重差分法来检验早期接触根除运动对晚年结果的影响。我们发现，在子宫内和幼儿时期接触RSC运动的个体，其寿命增加了1.3个月。在非白人、母亲为文盲的儿童以及城市出生的人群中，这种效应要大得多。此外，我们提供了钩虫根除对寿命影响的动态互补性证据，在接触罗森沃尔德学校建设运动的县和童工法更严格的州，观察到的效应更大。利用1940年人口普查和二战征兵数据，我们提供了教育程度、收入和认知能力改善作为可能作用途径的提示性证据。我们的研究结果为关于早期公共卫生干预持久影响的文献做出了贡献，并强调了此类项目在应对当今全球健康挑战中的重要性。

papers.title: The Long-run Effects of Transportation Productivity on the US Economy
papers.authors: A. Kerem Coşar, Sophie Osotimehin, Latchezar Popov
papers.abstract: We quantify the aggregate, regional and sectoral impacts of transportation productivity growth on the US economy over the period 1947-2017. Using a multi-region, multi-sector model that explicitly captures produced transportation services as a key input to interregional trade, we find that the calibrated change in transportation productivity had a sizable impact on aggregate welfare, magnified by a factor of 2.3 compared to its sectoral share in GDP. The amplification mechanism results from the complementarity between transport services and tradable goods, interacting with sectoral and spatial linkages. The geographical implications are highly uneven, with the West and Southwest benefiting the most from market access improvements while the Northeast experiences a decline. Sectoral impacts are largest in transportation-intensive activities like agriculture, mining and heavy manufacturing. Our results demonstrate the outsized and heterogeneous impact of the transportation sector in shaping US economic activity through specialization and spatial transformation.
papers.zh_title: 交通生产率对美国经济的长期影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们量化了1947-2017年间交通生产率增长对美国经济在总体、区域和部门层面的影响。通过使用一个明确将生产性交通服务作为区域间贸易关键投入的多区域、多部门模型，我们发现，校准后的交通生产率变化对总体福利产生了显著影响，其影响程度相比交通部门在GDP中的份额放大了2.3倍。这种放大机制源于交通服务与可贸易商品之间的互补性，并与部门和空间关联相互作用。地理影响极不均衡，西部和西南部从市场准入改善中获益最多，而东北部则经历了下降。部门影响在农业、采矿业和重制造业等交通密集型活动中最大。我们的结果证明了交通部门通过专业化和空间转型在塑造美国经济活动方面具有超乎寻常且异质性的影响。

papers.title: The Complementarity Between Cities and State Capacity
papers.authors: Edward L. Glaeser
papers.abstract: Public capacity complements urban density because externalities abound in cities and urban scale makes it possible to share infrastructure that needs to be managed. Yet, urban governments face limitations that are not experienced by private sector entities. A city cannot just stop policing if it decides it is bad at policing. Typically, public compensation and personnel policies are highly regulated either by law or by union contracts. City governments do, however, have one great advantage over private entities: a greater ability to learn from their peers. City governments do similar things throughout the world, while companies frequently specialize. Private companies have strong incentives to hide the trade secrets that make them more productive, cities do not. As individual cities do not have an incentive to make it easier for other governments to learn from them, multinational entities like the Asian Development Bank and the World Bank could enable that learning. Since climate-change-related crises are relatively rare events, city-to-city learning seems particularly important for adapting to climate change.
papers.zh_title: 城市与国家能力的互补性
papers.zh_abstract: 公共能力与城市密度相辅相成，因为城市中外部性普遍存在，而城市规模使得共享需要管理的基础设施成为可能。然而，城市政府面临着私营部门实体所没有的限制。一个城市不能仅仅因为认为治安工作做得不好就停止治安。通常，公共薪酬和人事政策要么受法律严格监管，要么受工会合同约束。然而，城市政府相对于私营实体有一个巨大优势：更强的向同行学习的能力。世界各地的城市政府做着类似的事情，而公司则经常专业化。私营公司有强烈的动机隐藏使其更具生产力的商业机密，而城市则没有。由于单个城市没有动机让其他政府更容易向它们学习，像亚洲开发银行和世界银行这样的跨国实体可以促成这种学习。由于与气候变化相关的危机是相对罕见的事件，城市间的学习对于适应气候变化似乎尤为重要。

papers.title: War Mobilization and Economic Development: World War II and Structural Transformation in India
papers.authors: Aneesha Parvathaneni, Dean Yang
papers.abstract: Can temporary wartime mobilization change the long-run development trajectory of an economy? We study how mobilization for World War II in colonial India influenced its subsequent development. From 1939 to 1945, the British colonial government purchased massive amounts of war materiel within India. We study long-run impacts on structural transformation—the transition of employment from agriculture to modern sectors (industry and services)—in Indian districts. Causal identification takes a shift-share approach, exploiting variation across industries in war-related government orders, and variation across districts in their pre-war industrial structure. We find that World War II economic mobilization had positive and significant impacts on long-run development. More than six decades later, districts with higher procurement of war materiel saw greater structural transformation from agriculture towards industry and services, and higher consumption levels, urbanization rates, and in-migration. We find substantial spillovers on services sectors not directly subject to procurement. The majority of structural transformation effects are driven by procurement of heavy industrial goods.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, POL；JEL：H56, N15, N45, O14, O25
papers.zh_title: 战争动员与经济发展：第二次世界大战与印度的结构转型
papers.zh_abstract: 暂时的战时动员能否改变一个经济体的长期发展轨迹？我们研究了为第二次世界大战进行的动员如何影响殖民地印度的后续发展。从1939年到1945年，英国殖民政府在印度境内购买了大量的战争物资。我们研究了这种动员对印度各地区结构转型——即就业从农业向现代部门（工业和服务业）转移——的长期影响。因果识别采用了一个转移份额方法，利用不同行业在政府战争订单中的差异，以及各地区在战前产业结构上的差异。我们发现，第二次世界大战的经济动员对长期发展产生了积极且显著的影响。六十多年后，战争物资采购量更高的地区，经历了从农业向工业和服务业更大的结构转型，并且消费水平、城市化率和迁入人口也更高。我们发现，对未直接受到采购影响的服务业部门也存在显著的溢出效应。结构转型效应的大部分是由重工业产品的采购驱动的。

papers.title: Conflict in Dismissals
papers.authors: Pauline Carry, Benjamin Schoefer
papers.abstract: How do the employer and the worker interact during a dismissal? This paper tests whether they cooperate to minimize costs, or instead engage in conflict—i.e., deliberately amplify costs. We leverage a unique feature of the French labor market: an employer and a worker can jointly opt to replace a costly dismissal by a cheaper and more flexible “separation by mutual agreement” (SMA). Introduced in 2008, SMAs eliminate red tape costs, enable severance pay bargaining, and preclude litigation. However, we find that only 12% of dismissals are resolved through SMAs—far below the efficient level predicted by standard bargaining models. Surveying HR directors, we identify three drivers of conflict that hinder cost minimization: (i) hostility between the employer and the employee, (ii) employers using dismissals as a “discipline device” to maintain incentives, and (iii) asymmetric beliefs about subsequent labor court outcomes. Using counterfactual scenarios in the survey, we find that removing these three drivers of conflict would increase SMA adoption from 12% to 67% of dismissals. We confirm that less conflictual dismissals—due to either better employer-employee relationships or workers benefiting from early retirement—end more often as SMAs.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LE, LS, ME, PE；JEL：D9, E24, J0, J38, J50, J63, M5
papers.zh_title: 解雇中的冲突
papers.zh_abstract: 在解雇过程中，雇主和工人是如何互动的？本文检验他们是合作以最小化成本，还是陷入冲突——即故意放大成本。我们利用了法国劳动力市场的一个独特特征：雇主和工人可以共同选择用更便宜、更灵活的“双方协议解除劳动合同”（SMA）来替代成本高昂的解雇。SMA于2008年引入，消除了繁琐的行政成本，允许协商遣散费，并排除了诉讼。然而，我们发现只有12%的解雇是通过SMA解决的——远低于标准讨价还价模型预测的有效水平。通过调查人力资源总监，我们识别出阻碍成本最小化的三个冲突驱动因素：(i) 雇主与雇员之间的敌意，(ii) 雇主将解雇作为维持激励的“纪律工具”，以及 (iii) 关于后续劳动法庭结果的不对称信念。通过调查中的反事实情景，我们发现消除这三个冲突驱动因素将使SMA在解雇中的采用率从12%提高到67%。我们证实，冲突较少的解雇——无论是由于更好的劳资关系还是工人受益于提前退休——更常以SMA告终。

papers.title: The Effect of Medicaid on Crime: Evidence from the Oregon Health Insurance Experiment
papers.authors: Amy Finkelstein, Sarah Miller, Katherine Baicker
papers.abstract: Those involved with the criminal justice system have disproportionately high rates of mental illness and substance-use disorders, prompting speculation that health insurance, by improving treatment of these conditions, could reduce crime. Using the 2008 Oregon Health Insurance Experiment, which randomly made some low-income adults eligible to apply for Medicaid, we find no statistically significant impact of Medicaid coverage on criminal charges or convictions. These null effects persist for high-risk subgroups, such as those with prior criminal cases and convictions or mental health conditions. In the full sample, our confidence intervals can rule out most quasi-experimental estimates of Medicaid’s crime-reducing impact.
papers.zh_title: 医疗补助对犯罪的影响：来自俄勒冈健康保险实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 涉及刑事司法系统的人患有精神疾病和物质使用障碍的比例异常高，这引发了一种推测，即健康保险通过改善对这些疾病的治疗，可以减少犯罪。利用2008年俄勒冈健康保险实验（该实验随机使一些低收入成年人有资格申请医疗补助），我们发现医疗补助覆盖对刑事指控或定罪没有统计上显著的影响。这些零效应在高风险亚组（例如，有先前刑事案件和定罪或心理健康状况的人）中仍然存在。在完整样本中，我们的置信区间可以排除大多数关于医疗补助减少犯罪影响的准实验估计。

papers.title: Granular Treasury Demand with Arbitrageurs
papers.authors: Kristy A.E. Jansen, Wenhao Li, Lukas Schmid
papers.abstract: We show that understanding the Treasury market requires both estimating granular investor demand and structurally modeling arbitrageurs. Using a new dataset of sector-level U.S. Treasury holdings, we estimate demand functions that exhibit strong cross-maturity substitution. Embedding these estimates in an equilibrium model with risk-averse arbitrageurs yields two main findings. First, Treasury market elasticity is steeply downward sloping in maturity, with very high elasticity in the T-bill market; without structurally modeling arbitrageurs, a pure demand system implies implausibly low T-bill elasticity. Second, cross-maturity substitution implies that monetary tightening raises term premia; without it, as in baseline preferred habitat models, the prediction reverses.
papers.zh_title: 具有套利者的颗粒状国债需求
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个涵盖市场大部分份额的、按部门划分的美国国债持有量的新颖数据集。利用该数据集，我们估计了不同投资者和美联储的期限特定需求函数和弹性，并将其整合到一个包含风险厌恶套利者的国债市场动态均衡模型中。对该模型的量化揭示：(1) 国债市场弹性存在陡峭的向下倾斜的期限结构；(2) 由于套利者与表现出高交叉弹性的投资者相互作用，货币紧缩会提高期限溢价；(3) 除非美联储可信地承诺持续扩张资产负债表，否则量化宽松的影响有限。

papers.title: When Given Discretion Teachers Did Not Shirk: Evidence from Remedial Education in Secondary Schools
papers.authors: Sabrin A. Beg, Anne E. Fitzpatrick, Jason T. Kerwin, Adrienne Lucas, Khandker Wahedur Rahman
papers.abstract: Public-sector organizations face a tradeoff: allowing workers discretion at the point of service to adapt to local needs, versus rigid harmonization to ensure uniform service delivery. We examine this tradeoff in the context of secondary schools in Odisha, India, where the centrally set curriculum is nearly 4 grades above the learning levels of the mean student. We conduct a randomized intervention that assigned schools to either a rigid or a flexible version of a remedial learning intervention that displaced the curriculum. We compare learning outcomes and teaching quality to the status quo. Both interventions increased learning by 0.11SD, about 60 percent of a year of learning, with gains throughout the learning distribution. We find no crowd-out of grade-level mastery, and no change in the likelihood of earning passing Board Marks one year later. Discretion did not lower the quality of implementation or induce shirking. Allowing teachers flexibility to adjust classroom content to student needs was beneficial and had limited downsides.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, LS, PE；JEL：H40, I25, I28, J24, M54, O15
papers.zh_title: 当被赋予自由裁量权时，教师并未偷懒：来自中学补习教育的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 公共部门组织面临一个权衡：允许一线工作者根据当地需求灵活调整服务，与为了确保统一服务交付而进行僵化的协调统一。我们在印度奥里萨邦的中学背景下考察了这一权衡，这些学校中央设定的课程比普通学生的学习水平高出近4个年级。我们进行了一项随机干预，将学校分配到一种替代课程的补习干预的僵化版本或灵活版本。我们将学习成果和教学质量与现状进行比较。两种干预措施都将学习效果提高了0.11个标准差，约为一年学习成果的60%，且在整个学习分布中都有所收获。我们没有发现对年级水平掌握的挤出效应，也没有发现一年后通过董事会考试的可能性发生变化。自由裁量权并未降低实施质量或引发偷懒行为。允许教师灵活调整课堂内容以适应学生需求是有益的，且负面影响有限。

papers.title: LASH risk and Interest Rates
papers.authors: Laura Alfaro, Saleem A. Bahaj, Robert Czech, Jonathon Hazell, Ioana Neamtu
papers.abstract: This paper studies a form of liquidity risk that we call ‘Liquidity After Solvency Hedging’ or “LASH” risk. Financial institutions take LASH risk when they hedge against solvency risk, using strategies that require liquidity when the solvency of the institution improves. We focus on LASH risk relating to interest rate movements. Our framework implies that institutions with longer-duration liabilities than assets—e.g. pension funds and insurers—take more LASH risk as interest rates fall. Using UK regulatory data from 2019-22 on the universe of sterling repo and swap transactions, we measure, in real time and at the institution level, LASH risk for the non-bank sector. We find that at the peak level of LASH risk, a 100bps increase in interest rates would have led to liquidity needs close to the cash holdings of the pension fund and insurance sector. Using a cross-sectional identification strategy, we find that low interest rates caused increases in LASH risk. We then find that the pre-crisis LASH risk of non-banks predicts their bond sales during the 2022 UK bond market crisis, contributing to the yield spike in the market.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, IFM, ME；JEL：E44, F30, G10, G22, G23
papers.zh_title: LASH风险与利率
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了一种我们称之为“偿付能力对冲后的流动性”风险或“LASH”风险的流动性风险形式。金融机构在采用需要在其偿付能力改善时提供流动性的策略来对冲偿付能力风险时，会承担LASH风险。我们关注与利率变动相关的LASH风险。我们的框架意味着，负债久期长于资产的机构——例如养老基金和保险公司——在利率下降时会承担更多的LASH风险。利用2019-22年英国关于所有英镑回购和掉期交易的监管数据，我们实时、在机构层面衡量了非银行部门的LASH风险。我们发现，在LASH风险的峰值水平上，利率上升100个基点将导致养老基金和保险部门的流动性需求接近其现金持有量。通过使用横截面识别策略，我们发现低利率导致了LASH风险的增加。然后我们发现，非银行部门在危机前的LASH风险预测了它们在2022年英国债券市场危机期间的债券抛售，从而加剧了市场的收益率飙升。

papers.title: Beyond Bruen: Can Firearm Training Replace Local Discretion in Concealed Carry Permitting?
papers.authors: John J. Donohue, Matthew Benavides, Amy L. Zhang, Alex Oktay
papers.abstract: The 2022 Supreme Court case NYSRPA v. Bruen struck down states’ discretion in issuing individuals firearm right-to-carry permits. As the country transitions towards more and more permissive concealed carry regulation, it has remained unclear how permitting processes and requirements affect personal and public safety. Leveraging a novel dataset of state laws spanning 2000- 2022, we find that more stringent concealed carry requirements, such as higher fees or more training hours, do not deter gun owners from obtaining carrying licenses, nor do they alter their behavior substantially enough to impact public safety outcomes including violent crimes, gun theft, or accidental shootings. As such, stricter training requirements are unable to counteract the effects of more permissive concealed carry issuance.
papers.zh_title: 超越布鲁恩案：枪支培训能否取代地方在隐蔽持枪许可中的自由裁量权？
papers.zh_abstract: 2022年最高法院审理的NYSRPA诉布鲁恩案推翻了各州在发放个人枪支携带许可证方面的自由裁量权。随着国家向越来越宽松的隐蔽持枪监管过渡，许可程序和要求如何影响个人和公共安全仍不清楚。利用2000年至2022年间各州法律的新数据集，我们发现更严格的隐蔽持枪要求，例如更高的费用或更多的培训时长，并不会阻止枪支拥有者获得携带许可证，也不会显著改变他们的行为以影响公共安全结果，包括暴力犯罪、枪支盗窃或意外枪击事件。因此，更严格的培训要求无法抵消更宽松的隐蔽持枪发放所带来的影响。

papers.title: Toward an Understanding of the Political Economy of Using Field Experiments in Policymaking
papers.authors: Guglielmo Briscese, John A. List
papers.abstract: Field experiments provide the clearest window into the true impact of many policies, allowing us to understand what works, what does not, and why. Yet, their widespread use has not been accompanied by a deep understanding of the political economy of their adoption in policy circles. This study begins with a large-scale natural field experiment that demonstrates the ineffectiveness of a widely implemented intervention. We leverage this result to understand how policymakers and a representative sample of the U.S. population update their beliefs of not only the policy itself, but the use of science and the trust they have in government. Policymakers, initially overly optimistic about the program’s effectiveness, adjust their views based on evidence but show reduced demand for experimentation, suggesting experiment aversion when results defy expectations. Among the U.S. public, support for policy experiments is high and remains robust despite receiving disappointing results, though trust in the implementing institutions declines, particularly in terms of perceptions of competence and integrity. Providing additional information on the value of learning from unexpected findings partially mitigates this trust loss. These insights, from both the demand and supply side, reveal the complexities of managing policymakers’ expectations and underscore the potential returns to educating the public on the value of open-mindedness in policy experimentation.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, ED, EEE, PE, PR；JEL：C9, C93, H4, H41, O12, O36, P1
papers.zh_title: 理解在政策制定中使用实地实验的政治经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 实地实验为许多政策的真实影响提供了最清晰的窗口，使我们能够理解哪些政策有效、哪些无效以及原因。然而，它们的广泛使用并未伴随着对其在政策圈中采纳的政治经济学的深入理解。本研究从一个大规模的自然实地实验开始，该实验证明了一项广泛实施的干预措施无效。我们利用这一结果来理解政策制定者和美国人口的代表性样本如何更新他们对政策本身、科学使用以及对政府信任的信念。政策制定者最初对该项目的有效性过于乐观，他们会根据证据调整观点，但对实验的需求却减少了，这表明当结果违背预期时存在实验厌恶。在美国公众中，对政策实验的支持度很高，并且在收到令人失望的结果后仍然保持强劲，尽管对实施机构的信任度有所下降，特别是在能力和诚信认知方面。提供关于从意外发现中学习价值的额外信息，部分缓解了这种信任损失。这些来自需求侧和供给侧的见解揭示了管理政策制定者期望的复杂性，并强调了教育公众在政策实验中保持开放心态价值的潜在回报。

papers.title: Equilibrium Conditions for Catch-22 Situations
papers.authors: Joshua S. Gans
papers.abstract: This is a paper in the ``economists ruin everything'' field. It considers whether Catch-22 situations can persist as an equilibrium phenomenon. Rather than being an arbitrary rule or a set of self-serving beliefs, the focus is on the preferences of Gatekeepers who choose to create such situations in the first place. The base game-theoretic model is of a Catch-22 situation inspired by Heller's famous paradox. We consider a Requester who may be Sane or Insane and a Gatekeeper who must decide whether to grant the Requester's desired outcome or force them into a less desirable one. This is modelled as a game in which the Requester chooses whether to send a request signal before the Gatekeeper decides. We solve for the conditions under which a Catch-22 situation persists as an equilibrium and its efficiency properties. It is demonstrated that Catch-22 situations can arise, but they reflect an efficient response on the part of a Gatekeeper facing asymmetric information. An application to labour markets is also considered
papers.zh_title: 第二十二条军规情境的均衡条件
papers.zh_abstract: 这是一篇属于“经济学家毁掉一切”领域的论文。它探讨了第二十二条军规情境是否能够作为一种均衡现象持续存在。本文关注的焦点并非任意规则或一套自利信念，而是那些最初选择创造此类情境的守门人的偏好。基础博弈论模型受海勒著名悖论的启发，描述了一种第二十二条军规情境。我们考虑一个可能理智或疯狂的请求者，以及一个必须决定是批准请求者的期望结果还是迫使其接受较差结果的守门人。这被建模为一个博弈，其中请求者在守门人决策之前选择是否发送请求信号。我们求解了第二十二条军规情境作为均衡持续存在的条件及其效率属性。研究表明，第二十二条军规情境可能出现，但它们反映了守门人在面临信息不对称时做出的有效反应。本文还考虑了其在劳动力市场中的应用。

papers.title: Child Disability and Effects on Sibling Mental Health
papers.authors: Janet Currie, N. Meltem Daysal, Mette Gørtz, Jonas Cuzulan Hirani
papers.abstract: Mental health disorders are the leading cause of childhood disability worldwide. We examine the impact of a relatively common household stressor on child mental health: the presence of a younger sibling with a physical disability. Using Danish administrative data from families with at least 3 children, we focus on differences between first and second born children in families with and without a 3rd child with a disability. Second-born children in these families spend a larger fraction of their early childhood in families that may be under stress. We find that second-born children are 11 percent more likely to use mental health services than first-born children. There is a 19% increase in psychiatric visits and a 16% increase in use of psychiatric medications. These results are confirmed by matching models.
papers.zh_title: 儿童残疾对兄弟姐妹心理健康的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 心理健康障碍是全球儿童残疾的主要原因。我们考察了一种相对常见的家庭压力源对儿童心理健康的影响：存在一个患有身体残疾的弟弟或妹妹。利用丹麦至少有三个孩子的家庭行政数据，我们重点关注有和没有第三个残疾孩子的家庭中，第一个和第二个孩子之间的差异。在这些家庭中，第二个孩子在童年早期有更大比例的时间生活在可能承受压力的家庭中。我们发现，与第一个孩子相比，第二个孩子使用心理健康服务的可能性高出11%。精神科就诊次数增加了19%，精神科药物使用增加了16%。这些结果通过匹配模型得到了证实。

papers.title: The Dynamic Fiscal Costs of Outsourcing Health Insurance - Evidence from Medicaid
papers.authors: Timothy Layton, Eran Politzer
papers.abstract: Setting payment rates for providers contracted over multiple periods is a persistent challenge in government procurement. We study the dynamics of fiscal costs following the outsourcing of Medicaid provision to private health insurers by states. We focus on beneficiaries with disabilities who account for a third of Medicaid's spending. Using a national administrative database, we identify county-level private plan enrollment mandates and exploit them as an instrument for individuals' transition to managed care plans. These transitions, while initially slightly reducing fiscal costs, lead to a continuous increase in Medicaid's costs over subsequent years. Counties subject to mandates experience a 9.8% higher cost four years post-mandate compared to those without mandates. "Actuarially sound" endogenous payment rates, that are based on past costs in the market, may serve as mechanism underlying the rising spending.
papers.zh_title: 外包健康保险的动态财政成本——来自医疗补助计划的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 为跨多个时期签约的供应商设定支付率是政府采购中一个持续的挑战。我们研究了各州将医疗补助计划提供外包给私人健康保险公司后财政成本的动态变化。我们重点关注占医疗补助计划支出三分之一的残疾受益人。利用全国行政数据库，我们识别了县级私人计划注册强制令，并将其作为个人向管理式医疗计划过渡的工具变量。这些过渡虽然在最初略微降低了财政成本，但导致医疗补助计划成本在随后几年持续增加。与没有强制令的县相比，受强制令影响的县在强制令实施四年后成本高出9.8%。基于市场历史成本的“精算公平”内生支付率，可能是支出上升的作用机制。

papers.title: Consumer Preferences for Cigarettes and Heated Tobacco Products in Japan: Evidence from a Discrete Choice Experiment
papers.authors: Donald S. Kenkel, Alan D. Mathios, Grace N. Phillips, Revathy Suryanarayana, Hua Wang, Sen Zeng
papers.abstract: Heated tobacco products (HTPs), a harm reducing cigarette alternative, gained popularity over the past decade and appear to have contributed significantly to the reduction of smoking in Japan. While the increased popularity of HTPs suggests a consumer preference for cigarette alternatives, there is a limited understanding of how consumers choose between different tobacco products. Understanding consumer choice is especially salient given the evolving policy landscape and proposals to increase HTP taxes. This study uses a large discrete choice experiment to examine the decision-making processes of smokers in Japan when choosing between cigarettes, HTPs, and quitting. We assess the influence of various product attributes such as prices, flavors, nicotine content, and warning messages on these choices. The findings reveal that prices and flavors significantly influence smokers' preferences. Specifically, higher HTP prices tend to drive smokers back to combustible cigarettes and discourage them from choosing to quit. Additionally, there is some evidence that consumers prefer HTPs with a wide variety of flavors. Meanwhile, hypothetical policy simulations that change warning messages or nicotine content do not affect consumers' choices.
papers.zh_title: 日本消费者对卷烟和加热烟草产品的偏好：来自离散选择实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 加热烟草产品（HTPs）作为一种减害的卷烟替代品，在过去十年中越来越受欢迎，并且似乎对日本吸烟率的下降做出了显著贡献。虽然HTPs日益流行表明消费者偏好卷烟替代品，但人们对消费者如何在不同的烟草产品之间进行选择的了解仍然有限。鉴于政策环境不断变化以及提高HTP税收的提议，理解消费者选择尤为重要。本研究采用大规模离散选择实验，考察日本吸烟者在卷烟、HTPs和戒烟之间进行选择时的决策过程。我们评估了价格、口味、尼古丁含量和警示信息等各种产品属性对这些选择的影响。研究结果显示，价格和口味显著影响吸烟者的偏好。具体而言，较高的HTP价格往往会促使吸烟者重新使用可燃卷烟，并阻碍他们选择戒烟。此外，有一些证据表明消费者偏好口味多样的HTPs。与此同时，改变警示信息或尼古丁含量的假设性政策模拟并未影响消费者的选择。

papers.title: The Ethics of Pollution Pricing
papers.authors: Garth Heutel, J. Paul Kelleher
papers.abstract: We survey various ethical issues related to the use of pollution pricing. While pollution pricing, for example in the form of Pigouvian taxes or cap-and-trade systems, is widely used in environmental economics modeling, many moral and ethical assumptions lie behind those models, and many ethical objections to pollution pricing are disregarded. We hope this review will be helpful to environmental economists who are regularly engaged in the use of such models, and in economic reasoning more generally, but who are less familiar with their ethical underpinnings and possible implications.
papers.zh_title: 污染定价的伦理问题
papers.zh_abstract: 我们调查了与使用污染定价相关的各种伦理问题。尽管污染定价（例如以庇古税或总量控制与交易体系的形式）在环境经济学建模中被广泛使用，但这些模型背后隐藏着许多道德和伦理假设，并且许多对污染定价的伦理反对意见被忽视了。我们希望这篇综述能对环境经济学家有所帮助，他们经常使用此类模型并进行更广泛的经济推理，但对这些模型的伦理基础及其可能的影响不太熟悉。

papers.title: Highway Procurement During the Great Recession and Stimulus
papers.authors: Dakshina G. De Silva, Benjamin Rosa
papers.abstract: We study highway procurement in Texas during the Great Recession and stimulus period, finding increased competition with more bidders and lower bids. We argue that the recession reduced opportunity costs, in part due to a slump in private-sector construction. We evaluate costs and efficiency by developing methods to estimate an empirical auction model tailored for public bidding and demonstrate that contracts became more efficient and less costly. A counterfactual analysis confirms that infrastructure procurement during recessions not only stimulates the economy but also enables the government to complete necessary projects at lower costs.
papers.zh_title: 大衰退与刺激计划期间的公路采购
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了大衰退和刺激计划期间德克萨斯州的公路采购，发现竞争加剧，投标人增多且报价降低。我们认为，经济衰退降低了机会成本，部分原因是私营部门建筑业的低迷。我们通过开发一种针对公共招标量身定制的实证拍卖模型估计方法来评估成本和效率，并证明合同变得更高效且成本更低。反事实分析证实，经济衰退期间的基础设施采购不仅能刺激经济，还能使政府以更低成本完成必要项目。

papers.title: Risk Loving and Fat Tails in the Wealth Distribution
papers.authors: Aloisio Araujo, Juan Pablo Gama, Timothy J. Kehoe
