papers.abstract: We study the dynamic properties of the wealth distribution in an overlapping generations model with warm-glow bequests and heterogeneous attitudes towards risk. Some dynasties of agents are risk averters, and others are risk lovers. Agents can invest in two types of Lucas trees. The two types of trees are symmetric in the sense that one type has a high return in states where the other has a return of zero. This symmetry allows risk averters to perfectly ensure their future income and eliminates aggregate uncertainty in the model. Furthermore, risk lovers take extreme portfolio positions, which make it easy for us to characterize the evolution of their wealth holdings over time. We show that the model has an equilibrium in which the aggregate wealth distribution converges to a unique invariant distribution. The invariant distribution of wealth of the risk lovers has fat tails for high bequest rates. The existence of fat tails is endogenously generated by the behavior of risk lovers rather than by the exogenous existence of fat tails in the endowments or in the returns of the assets.
papers.zh_title: 风险偏好与财富分布中的厚尾现象
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个具有温暖遗赠动机和异质性风险态度的世代交叠模型中财富分布的动态特性。一些王朝的代理人是风险规避者，而另一些则是风险偏好者。代理人可以投资于两种类型的卢卡斯树。这两种树是对称的，因为一种树在另一种树收益为零的状态下具有高回报。这种对称性使得风险规避者能够完美地确保其未来收入，并消除了模型中的总体不确定性。此外，风险偏好者采取极端的投资组合头寸，这使得我们能够轻松描述其财富持有量随时间的变化。我们证明，该模型存在一个均衡，其中总财富分布收敛于一个唯一的平稳分布。风险偏好者的财富平稳分布在遗赠率较高时具有厚尾特征。厚尾的存在是由风险偏好者的行为内生生成的，而非源于禀赋或资产回报中外生存在的厚尾。

papers.title: From Competitors to Partners: Banks’ Venture Investments in Fintech
papers.authors: Manju Puri, Yiming Qian, Xiang Zheng
papers.abstract: We hypothesize and find evidence that banks use venture investments in fintech startups as a strategic approach to navigate fintech competition. We show that banks’ venture investments have increasingly focused on fintech firms in systematic ways. We find that banks facing greater fintech competition are more likely to make venture investments in fintech startups. Banks target fintech firms that exhibit higher levels of asset complementarities with their own business. Finally, instrumental variable analyses show that venture investments increase the likelihood of operational collaborations and knowledge transfer between the bank investor and the fintech investee.
papers.zh_title: 从竞争对手到合作伙伴：银行对金融科技的风险投资
papers.zh_abstract: 我们假设并发现证据表明，银行将风险投资于金融科技初创企业作为应对金融科技竞争的战略方法。我们显示，银行的风险投资已日益系统性地聚焦于金融科技公司。我们发现，面临更大金融科技竞争的银行更有可能对金融科技初创企业进行风险投资。银行瞄准那些与其自身业务具有更高资产互补性的金融科技公司。最后，工具变量分析表明，风险投资增加了银行投资者与金融科技被投资方之间运营合作和知识转移的可能性。

papers.title: Instrumental Variables with Time-Varying Exposure: New Estimates of Revascularization Effects on Quality of Life
papers.authors: Joshua Angrist, Bruno Ferman, Carol Gao, Peter Hull, Otavio L. Tecchio, Robert W. Yeh
papers.abstract: The ISCHEMIA Trial randomly assigned patients with ischemic heart disease to an invasive treatment strategy centered on revascularization with a control group assigned non-invasive medical therapy. As is common in such “strategy trials,” many participants assigned to treatment remained untreated while many assigned to control crossed over into treatment. Intention-to-treat (ITT) analyses of strategy trials preserve randomization-based comparisons, but ITT effects are diluted by non-compliance. Conventional per-protocol analyses that condition on treatment received are likely biased by discarding random assignment. In trials where compliance choices are made shortly after assignment, instrumental variables (IV) methods solve both problems—recovering an undiluted average causal effect of treatment for treated subjects who comply with trial protocol. In ISCHEMIA, however, some controls were revascularized as long as five years after random assignment. This paper extends the IV framework for strategy trials, allowing for such dynamic non-random compliance behavior. IV estimates of long-run revascularization effects on quality of life are markedly larger than previously reported ITT and per-protocol estimates. We also show how to estimate complier characteristics in a dynamic-treatment setting. These estimates reveal increasing selection bias in naive time-varying per-protocol estimates of revascularization effects. Compliers have baseline health similar to that of the study population, while control-group crossovers are far sicker.
papers.zh_title: 具有时变暴露的工具变量：血运重建对生活质量影响的新估计
papers.zh_abstract: ISCHEMIA试验将缺血性心脏病患者随机分配至以血运重建为中心的侵入性治疗策略组，对照组则接受非侵入性药物治疗。正如这类“策略试验”中常见的情况，许多被分配至治疗组的参与者未接受治疗，而许多被分配至对照组的参与者则交叉接受了治疗。策略试验的意向治疗分析保留了基于随机化的比较，但意向治疗效果因不依从而被稀释。基于实际接受治疗进行分组的传统符合方案分析很可能因丢弃随机分配而产生偏倚。在依从选择在分配后不久做出的试验中，工具变量方法解决了这两个问题——为遵守试验方案的治疗对象恢复了未被稀释的平均因果效应。然而，在ISCHEMIA试验中，一些对照组参与者在随机分配后长达五年才接受血运重建。本文扩展了策略试验的工具变量框架，允许这种动态的非随机依从行为。血运重建对生活质量的长期效应的工具变量估计值显著大于先前报告的意向治疗和符合方案估计值。我们还展示了如何在动态治疗环境中估计依从者特征。这些估计揭示了血运重建效应的朴素时变符合方案估计中日益增大的选择偏倚。依从者的基线健康状况与研究人群相似，而对照组的交叉者则病情严重得多。

papers.title: Between Government and Market: The Political Economics of Labor Unions
papers.authors: Ethan Kaplan, Suresh Naidu
papers.abstract: We survey and summarize recent literature on labor unions in political economy. While labor unions have been a long-standing subject of study in labor and macroeconomics, until recently they have been less studied by political economists, despite being important political actors in many policy-relevant contexts. We first organize the literature into work on the external influence of unions on the political system, including effects on voting, campaign finance, lobbying, and intraparty bargaining. We then discuss work on the internal politics and organization of unions, including issues of selection and representation, union aggregation of preferences. We pay special attention to the economic and political effects of public sector unions. We also discuss union behavior in weakly institutionalized contexts, where crime, corruption, rent-seeking, political strikes, and violence are all issues. We conclude with directions for future work.
papers.zh_title: 在政府与市场之间：工会的政治经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 我们调查并总结了近期关于政治经济学中工会的文献。尽管工会长期以来一直是劳动经济学和宏观经济学的研究对象，但直到最近，政治经济学家对它们的研究较少，尽管工会在许多政策相关背景下是重要的政治行动者。我们首先将文献组织为关于工会对政治体系外部影响的研究，包括对投票、竞选资金、游说和党内谈判的影响。然后，我们讨论关于工会内部政治和组织的研究，包括选择和代表性问题、工会对偏好的聚合。我们特别关注公共部门工会的经济和政治效应。我们还讨论了在制度薄弱环境中的工会行为，其中犯罪、腐败、寻租、政治罢工和暴力都是问题。最后，我们指出了未来研究的方向。

papers.title: Geopolitics and the World Trading System
papers.authors: Aaditya Mattoo, Michele Ruta, Robert W. Staiger
papers.abstract: Until the beginning of this century, the GATT/WTO system worked. Economic research provided a compelling explanation. It showed that if governments maximize the well-being of their own countries broadly defined, GATT/WTO principles would facilitate mutually beneficial cooperation over their trade policy choices. Now heightened geopolitical rivalry seems to have undermined the WTO. A simple transposition of the previous rationalization suggests that geopolitics and trade cooperation are not compatible. We show that this is only true if rivalry eclipses any consideration of own-country well-being. In all other circumstances, there are gains from trade cooperation even with geopolitics. Furthermore, the WTO’s relevance is in question only if it adheres too rigidly to its existing rules and norms. Through measured adaptation to the geopolitical imperative, the WTO can continue to thrive as a forum for multilateral trade cooperation in the age of geopolitics.
papers.meta: Programs：ITI；JEL：F11, F13, F5, F51, F53, F55
papers.zh_title: 地缘政治与世界贸易体系
papers.zh_abstract: 直到本世纪初，关贸总协定/世贸组织体系一直有效运作。经济研究提供了一个令人信服的解释。它表明，如果政府以广义的本国福祉最大化为目标，关贸总协定/世贸组织的原则将促进其贸易政策选择上的互利合作。如今，加剧的地缘政治竞争似乎削弱了世贸组织。简单套用先前的理论表明，地缘政治与贸易合作是不相容的。我们证明，只有当竞争完全压倒了对本国福祉的任何考虑时，情况才如此。在所有其他情况下，即使存在地缘政治，贸易合作也能带来收益。此外，只有当世贸组织过于僵化地固守其现有规则和规范时，其相关性才会受到质疑。通过适度适应地缘政治需要，世贸组织可以继续作为地缘政治时代多边贸易合作的论坛而蓬勃发展。

papers.title: Phoning Home: The Procurement of Telecommunications for Incarcerated Individuals in the United States
papers.authors: Marleen R. Marra, Nathan H. Miller, Gretchen Sileo
papers.abstract: Incarcerated individuals in the U.S. purchase goods and services from monopoly vendors selected by their correctional authority. We study telecommunications, which have come under bipartisan scrutiny due to the high prices inmates pay for phone calls. Prospective providers are evaluated on their technical capabilities, the prices they would charge, and the “commission” they would pay the correctional authority. Using data from public records requests, we estimate a first-score auction model with evaluation uncertainty and multi-dimensional bidder heterogeneity. The model indicates that reducing the role of commissions in procurement lowers prices, whereas increasing competition among providers mainly raises commissions. Moreover, recent federal regulations that ban commissions and cap prices likely preserve providers' profitability.
papers.meta: Programs：IO；JEL：D43, D44, H57, L13, L51, L96
papers.zh_title: 打电话回家：美国被监禁者电信服务的采购
papers.zh_abstract: 美国的被监禁者从其惩教机构选定的垄断供应商处购买商品和服务。我们研究电信服务，由于囚犯为电话通话支付高昂价格，这一问题已受到两党关注。潜在供应商根据其技术能力、拟收取的价格以及向惩教机构支付的“佣金”进行评估。利用公共记录请求的数据，我们估计了一个具有评估不确定性和多维投标人异质性的第一得分拍卖模型。该模型表明，减少佣金在采购中的作用会降低价格，而增加供应商之间的竞争主要会提高佣金。此外，最近禁止佣金并设定价格上限的联邦法规可能仍能维持供应商的盈利能力。

papers.title: Long Run Cost Benefit Rules
papers.authors: Antony Millner
papers.abstract: I study a preference relation on risky long run public projects induced by a large maturity limit of expected present values. Under common assumptions this relation has a variational representation that is related to a well known model of ambiguity aversion; it is non-probabilistic in general. The formalism generalizes Weitzman’s ‘lowest possible rate’ formula for long run discount rates to a large class of stochastic economies, gives rise to a notion of stochastic dominance adapted to long run valuation, and characterizes features of stochastic processes that cause long run cost benefit rules to be non-probabilistic.
papers.zh_title: 长期成本收益规则
papers.zh_abstract: 我研究了一种由预期现值的长期极限所引致的、关于风险性长期公共项目的偏好关系。在常见假设下，这种关系具有一个变分表示，该表示与一个著名的模糊厌恶模型相关；它通常是非概率性的。该形式将韦茨曼关于长期贴现率的“最低可能利率”公式推广到一大类随机经济体，提出了一个适用于长期估值的随机占优概念，并刻画了导致长期成本收益规则为非概率性的随机过程的特征。

papers.title: On the Definition and Estimation of Economic Resilience using Counterfactuals
papers.authors: Mo Alloush, Michael Carter
papers.abstract: A household is economically resilient if it manages a shock with minimal reduction in current and future well-being. This paper develops the first measure of resilience consistent with this simple, but compelling definition. Using simulated data, we implement the measure and show it can be used to judge the efficacy of resilience-promoting interventions. Simulated data allows us to explore the measure under a variety of scenarios, interventions and data generation processes. We also show how the measure performs in the with and without poverty traps and show that when data are limited, income is a more reliable measure of economic well-being for measuring resilience than is consumption. We also implement the measure using real data from a recent RCT on an intervention intended to promote resilience and show that the financial returns to promoting resilience are high and can save public resources compared to a reactive social protection policy.
papers.zh_title: 基于反事实的经济韧性定义与估计
papers.zh_abstract: 如果一个家庭在应对冲击时能将当前和未来福祉的减少降至最低，则该家庭具有经济韧性。本文开发了第一个符合这一简单但令人信服定义的韧性度量。利用模拟数据，我们实施该度量并展示其可用于判断促进韧性干预措施的有效性。模拟数据使我们能够在各种情景、干预措施和数据生成过程下探索该度量。我们还展示了该度量在存在和不存在贫困陷阱情况下的表现，并表明当数据有限时，收入比消费更适合作为衡量韧性的经济福祉指标。我们还利用来自一项旨在促进韧性的近期随机对照试验的真实数据实施该度量，并表明促进韧性的财务回报很高，并且与反应性社会保护政策相比可以节省公共资源。

papers.title: Climbing the Ivory Tower: How Socio-Economic Background Shapes Academia
papers.authors: Ran Abramitzky, Lena Greska, Santiago Pérez, Joseph Price, Carlo Schwarz, Fabian Waldinger
papers.abstract: We explore how socio-economic background shapes academia, collecting the largest dataset of U.S. academics’ backgrounds and research output. Individuals from poorer backgrounds have been severely underrepresented for seven decades, especially in humanities and elite universities. Father’s occupation predicts professors’ discipline choice and, thus, the direction of research. While we find no differences in the average number of publications, academics from poorer backgrounds are both more likely to not publish and to have outstanding publication records. Academics from poorer backgrounds introduce more novel scientific concepts, but are less likely to receive recognition, as measured by citations, Nobel Prize nominations, and awards.
papers.zh_title: 攀登象牙塔：社会经济背景如何塑造学术界
papers.zh_abstract: 我们探讨了社会经济背景如何塑造学术界，收集了关于美国学者背景和研究成果的最大数据集。来自贫困背景的个人在七十年间一直严重代表性不足，尤其是在人文学科和精英大学。父亲的职业预测了教授的专业选择，从而预测了研究方向。虽然我们在平均发表数量上没有发现差异，但来自贫困背景的学者既更可能不发表论文，也更可能拥有杰出的发表记录。来自贫困背景的学者引入了更多新颖的科学概念，但获得认可的可能性较低，这通过引用次数、诺贝尔奖提名和奖项来衡量。

papers.title: Unified Growth Theory: Roots of Growth and Inequality in the Wealth of Nations
papers.authors: Oded Galor
papers.abstract: What sparked humanity’s leap from stagnation to prosperity? What lies at the core of inequality among nations? Unified Growth Theory explores the evolution of societies over the entire course of human history. It uncovers the universal wheels of change that have governed the journey of humanity, driven the growth process, and shaped inequality across the globe. The theory sheds light on two of the most fundamental mysteries surrounding this journey: (i) The Mystery of Growth—the origins of the dramatic transformation in human prosperity over the past two centuries, in the wake of millennia of near stagnation; and (ii) The Mystery of Inequality—the roots of the vast inequality in the wealth of nations. The theory suggests that forces operating in the distant past are central to the understanding of the uneven development across the globe and the design of effective policies that could promote economic growth and mitigate inequality.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, POL；JEL：I25, J10, O10, O40, Z10
papers.zh_title: 统一增长理论：国家财富中增长与不平等的根源
papers.zh_abstract: 是什么激发了人类从停滞到繁荣的飞跃？国家间不平等的核心是什么？统一增长理论探索了人类社会在整个历史进程中的演变。它揭示了支配人类旅程、驱动增长过程并塑造全球不平等的普遍变革动力。该理论阐明了围绕这一旅程的两个最基本谜团：（i）增长之谜——在数千年的近乎停滞之后，过去两个世纪人类繁荣发生戏剧性转变的起源；以及（ii）不平等之谜——国家财富巨大不平等的根源。该理论表明，在遥远过去运作的力量对于理解全球发展不平衡以及设计能够促进经济增长和缓解不平等的有效政策至关重要。

papers.title: Spatial Linkages and the Uneven Effects of a Commodity Boom
papers.authors: Felipe Benguria, Felipe Saffie, Shihangyin Zhang
papers.abstract: We study the uneven effects of a commodity cycle, documenting its impact across workers based on their skill and the region where they live. To this end, we develop a dynamic quantitative model of a multi-region economy featuring spatial linkages (interregional trade and migration) and downward wage rigidity. Empirically, we focus on the experience of Brazil during the commodity boom of the 2000s and subsequent bust of the 2010s. The commodity cycle causes an important decline in the skill premium during the boom, while the extent of downward wage rigidity determines whether it reverts or maintains its decline during the bust. In addition, there is substantial heterogeneity across Brazilian states in the gains from the commodity cycle. Finally, we build counterfactuals to show that both spatial linkages (interregional migration and interregional trade) and downward wage rigidity jointly shape the impact of the commodity cycle on the skill premium, real wages, unemployment, and spatial disparities.
papers.zh_title: 空间关联与大宗商品繁荣的不均衡影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个大宗商品周期的不均衡影响，记录了其基于工人技能和居住地区对工人的影响。为此，我们开发了一个包含空间关联（区域间贸易和移民）和向下工资刚性的多区域经济动态定量模型。实证上，我们聚焦于巴西在2000年代大宗商品繁荣及随后2010年代萧条期间的经历。大宗商品周期在繁荣期间导致技能溢价显著下降，而向下工资刚性的程度决定了技能溢价在萧条期间是恢复还是维持其下降。此外，巴西各州在大宗商品周期中的收益存在显著异质性。最后，我们构建反事实分析表明，空间关联（区域间移民和区域间贸易）和向下工资刚性共同塑造了大宗商品周期对技能溢价、实际工资、失业和空间差异的影响。

papers.title: From Flat to Fair? The Effects of a Progressive Tax Reform
papers.authors: Nicolas Ajzenman, Guillermo Cruces, Ricardo Perez-Truglia, Darío Tortarolo, Gonzalo Vazquez-Bare
papers.abstract: We study the effects of a progressive tax reform on tax compliance, using a research design that distinguishes between two channels. First, using a quasi-experimental design, we estimate the direct effects of the reform—namely, how changes in a household’s own tax rate affect its own compliance. Second, leveraging a large-scale natural field experiment, we estimate the indirect effects: holding a household’s own tax rate constant, we examine how its compliance is influenced by changes in the tax rates of other, poorer or richer, households. We find substantial direct effects: lowering taxes for poor households increases their compliance, while raising taxes for rich households reduces theirs. We also find sizable indirect effects: when poor households learn about the tax hikes on the rich, their stated perceptions of tax fairness and their actual compliance both increase. Among rich households, learning about tax cuts for the poor also improves perceived fairness, but, if anything, reduces compliance. Using an additional reform and follow-up field experiment conducted a year later, we replicate both the quasi-experimental and experimental results. Together, our findings show that tax compliance responds not only to a household’s own tax burden but also to its perception of fairness of the broader tax system. Our results also underscore the potential disconnect between stated and revealed preferences for redistribution. Finally, we present a counterfactual analysis that illustrates the implications of the direct and indirect effects for designing progressive tax reforms.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, LE, PE, POL；JEL：C93, D31, H24, H26, H71
papers.zh_title: 从单一税率到公平？累进税制改革的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用一种区分两种渠道的研究设计，研究了累进税制改革对税收遵从的影响。首先，利用准实验设计，我们估计了改革的直接效应——即家庭自身税率变化如何影响其自身的税收遵从。其次，利用大规模自然实地实验，我们估计了间接效应：在保持家庭自身税率不变的情况下，我们考察其税收遵从如何受到其他更穷或更富家庭税率变化的影响。我们发现显著的直接效应：降低贫困家庭的税率提高了其税收遵从，而提高富裕家庭的税率则降低了其税收遵从。我们还发现了显著的间接效应：当贫困家庭了解到对富裕家庭的增税时，他们对税收公平的陈述性认知和实际税收遵从都增加了。在富裕家庭中，了解到对贫困家庭的减税也改善了感知公平，但反而降低了税收遵从。利用一年后进行的额外改革和后续实地实验，我们复制了准实验和实验结果。总之，我们的发现表明，税收遵从不仅对家庭自身的税负做出反应，也对其对整个税收体系公平性的感知做出反应。我们的结果还强调了关于再分配的陈述性偏好与揭示性偏好之间可能存在的脱节。最后，我们提出了一个反事实分析，说明了直接和间接效应对设计累进税制改革的意义。

papers.title: Diffusion in Social Networks: Experimental Evidence on Information Sharing vs Persuasion
papers.authors: Marcel Fafchamps, Asadul Islam, Debayan Pakrashi, Denni Tommasi
papers.abstract: We conduct a clustered randomized controlled trial across 180 villages in Uttar Pradesh, India, to promote the take-up of a savings commitment product newly introduced to our study population. A random subset of participants was targeted through our promotional campaign to test whether the product's diffusion among untargeted participants operates primarily through information sharing or through persuasion by incentivized target participants. If social learning is the main channel of diffusion, we would expect higher sign-up and take-up rates in information villages compared to persuasion villages. Conversely, if persuasion is the primary channel, sign-up and take-up rates should be higher in persuasion villages. Our findings consistently favor the persuasion channel, as sign-up and take-up rates were higher in the persuasion treatment, even without increased financial literacy or knowledge about the product. Information alone had a negligible impact on take-up, while the combined treatment achieved the highest sign-up and conversion rates, suggesting that information complements persuasion by enhancing its effectiveness. These results highlight the importance of incentivized persuasion in promoting product take-up and suggest that, in certain contexts, direct information-sharing may be less effective than previously assumed.
papers.zh_title: 社交网络中的扩散：关于信息分享与说服的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在印度北方邦的180个村庄进行了一项整群随机对照试验，以推广一项新引入我们研究人群的储蓄承诺产品的采用。通过我们的推广活动，随机选择了一部分参与者作为目标，以测试该产品在非目标参与者中的扩散主要是通过信息分享还是通过受激励目标参与者的说服来运作。如果社会学习是扩散的主要渠道，我们预期信息村的注册率和采用率会高于说服村。相反，如果说服是主要渠道，说服村的注册率和采用率应该更高。我们的发现一致支持说服渠道，因为说服处理组的注册率和采用率更高，即使没有提高金融素养或对产品的了解。仅凭信息对采用的影响微乎其微，而联合处理实现了最高的注册率和转化率，这表明信息通过增强说服的有效性来补充说服。这些结果强调了受激励的说服在促进产品采用中的重要性，并表明在某些情境下，直接信息分享可能不如先前假设的那样有效。

papers.title: Winners and Losers from the Work-from-Home Technology Boon
papers.authors: Morris A. Davis, Andra C. Ghent, Jesse M. Gregory
papers.abstract: We model how an increase in Work-from-Home (WFH) productivity differentially affects workers using a framework in which some workers cannot work offsite, some are hybrid, and some are completely remote. The improvement in WFH productivity increases housing demand and thus housing prices since housing is inelastically supplied. Because workers in non-telecommutable occupations must consume housing but their total factor productivity does not increase, the rise in house prices reduces their welfare. The welfare decline is equivalent to 1-9% of consumption, depending on how substitutable WFH is with onsite work, and it arises despite measured income of all workers increasing.
papers.zh_title: 远程办公技术繁荣的赢家与输家
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用一个框架模拟了远程办公生产率提高如何对不同工人产生差异化影响，在该框架中，一些工人无法远程工作，一些是混合工作模式，还有一些是完全远程工作。远程办公生产率的提高增加了住房需求，从而由于住房供给缺乏弹性而推高了房价。由于从事不可远程办公职业的工人必须消费住房，但其全要素生产率并未提高，房价上涨降低了他们的福利。福利下降相当于消费的1%至9%，具体取决于远程办公与现场工作的可替代程度，并且这种下降发生在所有工人的测量收入都增加的情况下。

papers.title: Firm Financing During Sudden Stops: Can Governments Substitute Markets?
papers.authors: Miguel Acosta-Henao, Andrés Fernández, Patricia Gomez-Gonzalez, Ṣebnem Kalemli-Özcan
papers.abstract: Using comprehensive administrative data on Chilean firms, we examine whether credit lines and government-backed credit guarantees mitigated the impact of the large sudden stop event during the pandemic—the abrupt withdrawal of international capital. Our analysis employs a regression discontinuity design to demonstrate that firms eligible for these programs increased their borrowing from domestic lenders at a relatively lower cost. By reducing the cost of domestic currency debt relative to foreign currency debt, these policies effectively lowered the relative cost of domestic capital in the short term. This reduction in borrowing costs is conditional on selection effects at both the firm and bank levels, where only policy-eligible firms benefit from the lower credit costs from the same lender that non-eligible firms also borrow from. An open economy model with heterogeneous firms and financial frictions helps explain our findings: government interventions eased the higher cost of capital during the sudden stop by relaxing firms’ domestic collateral constraints, which in turn reduced domestic financial intermediaries’ risk aversion and boosted the supply of domestic credit in the face of shrinking international capital flows.
papers.zh_title: 突然停止期间的企业融资：政府能否替代市场？
papers.zh_abstract: 利用智利企业的全面行政数据，我们考察了信贷额度和政府支持的信贷担保是否缓解了疫情期间大规模突然停止事件——国际资本突然撤出——的影响。我们的分析采用断点回归设计，证明符合这些计划条件的企业以相对较低的成本增加了从国内贷款机构的借款。通过降低本币债务相对于外币债务的成本，这些政策有效地在短期内降低了国内资本的相对成本。这种借贷成本的降低取决于企业和银行层面的选择效应，只有符合政策条件的企业才能从同一贷款机构（非符合条件的企业也从该机构借款）获得较低的信贷成本。一个包含异质性企业和金融摩擦的开放经济模型有助于解释我们的发现：政府干预通过放松企业的国内抵押品约束，缓解了突然停止期间较高的资本成本，这反过来降低了国内金融中介的风险厌恶，并在国际资本流动萎缩的情况下增加了国内信贷供给。

papers.title: Can Gifted Education Help Higher-Ability Boys from Disadvantaged Backgrounds?
papers.authors: David Card, Eric Chyn, Laura Giuliano
papers.abstract: Boys are less likely than girls to enter college, a gap often attributed to differences in noncognitive skills. We study how being classified as gifted – determined by having an IQ score of ≥116 – affects college entry for disadvantaged children in a large urban school district. We find increases of around 50 percent for marginally eligible boys, but only small effects for girls. There are also large effects for boys (but not girls) on course-taking and grades in middle and high school with no effects on standardized tests scores. These patterns suggest that gifted services raise the non-cognitive skills of underachieving boys, leading to gains in educational attainment.
papers.zh_title: 天才教育能否帮助来自弱势背景的高能力男孩？
papers.zh_abstract: 男孩进入大学的可能性低于女孩，这一差距通常归因于非认知技能的差异。我们研究了一个大城市学区中，被归类为天才——由智商分数≥116决定——如何影响弱势儿童的大学入学。我们发现，对于勉强合格的男孩，大学入学率增加了约50%，但对女孩只有微小的影响。对于男孩（而非女孩），天才服务还对初中和高中的课程选择和成绩产生了显著影响，但对标准化考试成绩没有影响。这些模式表明，天才服务提高了学业表现不佳男孩的非认知技能，从而带来了教育成就的提升。

papers.title: Dissertation Paths: Advisors and Students in the Economics Research Production Function
papers.authors: Joshua Angrist, Marc Diederichs
papers.abstract: Elite economics PhD programs aim to train graduate students for a lifetime of academic research. This paper asks how advising affects graduate students’ post-PhD research productivity. Advising is highly concentrated: at the eight highly-selective schools in our study, a minority of advisors do most of the advising work. We quantify advisor attributes such as an advisor’s own research output and aspects of the advising relationship like coauthoring and research field affinity that might contribute to student research success. Students advised by research-active, prolific advisors tend to publish more, while coauthoring has no effect. Student-advisor research affinity also predicts student success. But a school-level aggregate production function provides much weaker evidence of causal effects, suggesting that successful advisors attract students likely to succeed–without necessarily boosting their students’ chances of success. Evidence for causal effects is strongest for a measure of advisors’ own research output. Aggregate student research output appears to scale linearly with graduate student enrollment, with no evidence of negative class-size effects. An analysis of gender differences in research output shows male and female graduate students to be equally productive in the first few years post-PhD, but female productivity peaks sooner than male productivity.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PE, PR；JEL：A2, A20, A23, I21, I23
papers.zh_title: 论文路径：经济学研究生产函数中的导师与学生
papers.zh_abstract: 精英经济学博士项目旨在培养研究生从事终身的学术研究。本文探讨了指导如何影响研究生获得博士学位后的研究生产力。指导高度集中：在我们研究的八所高选择性学校中，少数导师承担了大部分指导工作。我们量化了导师属性，例如导师自身的研究产出，以及指导关系的各个方面，如合著和研究领域亲和性，这些可能有助于学生的研究成功。由研究活跃、多产的导师指导的学生往往发表更多论文，而合著没有影响。学生与导师的研究亲和性也预测了学生的成功。但学校层面的总生产函数提供了更弱的因果效应证据，表明成功的导师吸引了可能成功的学生——而不一定提高学生成功的机会。因果效应的证据在导师自身研究产出的衡量指标上最强。学生的总研究产出似乎与研究生入学人数呈线性关系，没有证据表明班级规模有负面影响。对研究产出性别差异的分析显示，男性和女性研究生在获得博士学位后的最初几年生产力相当，但女性生产力的峰值比男性更早出现。

papers.title: The Mental Health of the Young in Africa
papers.authors: David G. Blanchflower, Alex Bryson
papers.abstract: Growing evidence from around the world suggests the mental health of children and young adults is declining. We examine trends in mental health in Africa where there has been little prior work. We examine data from a number of surveys including Afrobarometers, the Gallup World Poll, the World Values Surveys, UNICEF’s Multiple Cluster Indicator Surveys and Global Minds. We find little support for the proposition that the age structure of wellbeing in Africa has changed over the last decade, although the Global Minds surveys, conducted over the internet, do find mental health improves with age. One potential reason for this is the limited amount of internet access in Africa, especially for women. In countries like Burkina Faso and Guinea the majority of the population say they have never accessed the internet. In a new survey in rural Tanzania, where there is little or no internet access, mental health improves with age. The absence of the internet might help explain why the mental health of young Africans have been declining less than elsewhere other than for the internet savvy. However, there are dangers on the horizon as the sales of smartphones explode in Africa.
papers.zh_title: 非洲年轻人的心理健康
papers.zh_abstract: 来自世界各地的越来越多证据表明，儿童和年轻人的心理健康状况正在下降。我们考察了此前研究较少的非洲地区的心理健康趋势。我们分析了多项调查数据，包括非洲晴雨表、盖洛普世界民意调查、世界价值观调查、联合国儿童基金会多指标类集调查以及全球心智调查。我们发现，几乎没有证据支持非洲幸福感年龄结构在过去十年发生变化的观点，尽管通过互联网进行的全球心智调查确实发现心理健康随年龄增长而改善。一个潜在原因是非洲互联网接入有限，尤其是对女性而言。在布基纳法索和几内亚等国家，大多数人口表示他们从未使用过互联网。在一项针对坦桑尼亚农村地区（那里互联网接入很少或没有）的新调查中，心理健康随年龄增长而改善。互联网的缺失可能有助于解释为什么非洲年轻人的心理健康下降幅度小于其他地区，除了那些精通互联网的群体。然而，随着非洲智能手机销量的激增，危险正在逼近。

papers.title: The Benefits and Costs of Paid Family Leave
papers.authors: Buyi Wang, Meredith Slopen, Irwin Garfinkel, Elizabeth Ananat, Sophie M. Collyer, Robert Paul Hartley, Anastasia Koutavas, Christopher Wimer
papers.abstract: National paid family leave programs have been repeatedly proposed in the United States in recent years. To inform policy discussions, we provide a benefit-cost analysis of introducing such a program. We systematically identify high-quality, quasi-experimental studies on the impact of paid leave on infants and parents. Using the most conservative estimates or the mean estimates from this literature, we estimate that every $1,000 investment in paid parental leave would generate, respectively, $7,275 or $29,406 in present discounted net social benefits. We use these estimates to conduct a microsimulation of benefits and costs of two policy proposals with different eligibility and wage replacement rates. The first, a 4-week program, would have an initial fiscal cost of under $2 billion and net social benefits of $13 (conservative) or $55 billion (mean). The corresponding figures for the 12-week program are about 3.7 times larger, suggesting that either version would likely generate high returns.
papers.zh_title: 带薪家庭假的好处与成本
papers.zh_abstract: 近年来，美国多次提出全国性的带薪家庭假计划。为给政策讨论提供信息，我们对引入此类计划进行了成本效益分析。我们系统地识别了关于带薪休假对婴儿和父母影响的高质量准实验研究。使用这些文献中最保守的估计或平均估计，我们估算出每1000美元的带薪育儿假投资将分别产生7275美元或29406美元的净社会效益现值。我们利用这些估算对两项具有不同资格条件和工资替代率的政策提案进行了效益和成本的微观模拟。第一个是4周计划，初始财政成本低于20亿美元，净社会效益为130亿美元（保守估计）或550亿美元（平均估计）。12周计划的相应数字大约是前者的3.7倍，表明任一版本都可能产生高回报。

papers.title: Non-Profit Hospital Governance, Conduct, and CEO Pay
papers.authors: Daniel Kessler, William Wygal
papers.abstract: We investigate whether the membership of a non-profit hospital’s CEO on its board of directors is associated with CEO pay and several measures of hospital performance, including price, operating margin, quality, and service to low-income patients. Although the consequences of CEO board membership for for-profit firms have been studied extensively, the consequences for non-profits in general, and non-profit hospitals in particular, have received less attention. Because most hospitals are non-profit and non-profit hospital prices have increased rapidly over the past 20 years, this gap is important. We find a strong positive association between CEO board membership and non-profit hospital prices, operating margins, and CEO pay, with a weaker positive (negative) association between CEO board membership and quality (service to low-income patients). We conclude that non-profit hospitals’ CEO board membership is likely associated with increases in agency costs due to a lack of separation between management and control.
papers.zh_title: 非营利医院治理、行为与CEO薪酬
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了非营利医院CEO担任董事会成员是否与CEO薪酬以及多项医院绩效指标（包括价格、营业利润率、质量和对低收入患者的服务）相关。尽管CEO担任董事会成员对营利性公司的影响已被广泛研究，但其对非营利组织（尤其是非营利医院）的影响受到的关注较少。由于大多数医院是非营利性的，且非营利医院的价格在过去20年中迅速上涨，这一研究空白至关重要。我们发现，CEO担任董事会成员与非营利医院的价格、营业利润率和CEO薪酬之间存在强烈的正相关关系，而与质量（对低收入患者的服务）之间存在较弱的正（负）相关关系。我们得出结论，非营利医院CEO担任董事会成员很可能因管理层与控制权缺乏分离而导致代理成本增加。

papers.title: The Claiming of Children on U.S. Tax Returns
papers.authors: Geoffrey Gee, Jacob Goldin, Joseph Gray-Hancuch, Ithai Lurie, Vedant Vohra
papers.abstract: Tax benefits tied to children form a central component of the social safety net in the United States. To participate in these programs, taxpayers must claim a child on their tax return. We study the claiming of children on tax returns by drawing on health insurance information returns to establish the presence of children in the United States. We estimate that the vast majority of insured children (approximately 95 percent) and a significant majority (between 88 and 97 percent) of all U.S. children are claimed on tax returns. Unclaimed children are disproportionately concentrated in lower income households and are more likely to live in Black and Hispanic neighborhoods.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, PE；JEL：H20, H24, H53, I13, I32
papers.zh_title: 美国纳税申报单上子女的申报情况
papers.zh_abstract: 与子女相关的税收优惠构成了美国社会安全网的核心组成部分。要参与这些计划，纳税人必须在其纳税申报单上申报子女。我们通过利用健康保险信息申报表来确定美国儿童的存在情况，从而研究纳税申报单上子女的申报情况。我们估计，绝大多数（约95%）有保险的儿童以及显著多数（介于88%至97%之间）的美国儿童在纳税申报单上被申报。未被申报的儿童不成比例地集中在低收入家庭，并且更可能生活在黑人和西班牙裔社区。

papers.title: The Relationship between Officer Misconduct and Conviction-less Arrests
papers.authors: Bocar A. Ba, Nayoung Rim, Roman Rivera
papers.abstract: Given the use of an individual’s arrest history for many economic and social outcomes, policymakers have enacted criminal justice reform measures. This paper examines which officers are making conviction‐less arrests (arrests that result in no charges or where the defendant is found not guilty), and whether these arrests can be reduced with increased oversight. Using the Chicago Police Department’s rotational duty calendar to obtain plausibly exogenous variation in the set of officers assigned to work on a particular day, we find that high‐misconduct officers are 12% more likely than no‐misconduct officers to make arrests that result in no charges and 31% more likely to make arrests with “not guilty” outcomes, with no difference in arrests yielding “guilty” outcomes. We also analyze two events that increased the transparency of police misconduct through public disclosure of complaint records and find that increased oversight reduces conviction‐less arrests, but with nuances across misconduct profiles–low‐misconduct officers show stronger responses and high‐misconduct officers show weaker responses.
papers.meta: Programs：LE, LS, PE, POL；JEL：D73, J18, K42
papers.zh_title: 警察不当行为与无定罪逮捕之间的关系
papers.zh_abstract: 鉴于个人的逮捕记录被用于许多经济和社会结果，政策制定者已实施了刑事司法改革措施。本文研究了哪些警察在进行无定罪逮捕（即未导致指控或被告被判无罪的逮捕），以及这些逮捕是否可以通过加强监督来减少。利用芝加哥警察局的轮班日历，我们获得了特定日期执勤警察队伍的外生性变化，发现高不当行为警察比无不当行为警察进行无指控逮捕的可能性高12%，进行“无罪”结果逮捕的可能性高31%，而在导致“有罪”结果的逮捕方面没有差异。我们还分析了两个通过公开投诉记录增加警察不当行为透明度的事件，发现加强监督减少了无定罪逮捕，但在不同不当行为档案中存在细微差别——低不当行为警察表现出更强的反应，而高不当行为警察的反应较弱。

papers.title: Transition Risk: Sources and Policy Responses
papers.authors: Stefano Carattini, Garth Heutel, Givi Melkadze, Inès Mourelon
papers.abstract: Transition risk – the financial stability risk related with decarbonization – is a major source of concern. The literature has so far only studied transition risk caused by carbon tax shocks. This paper explores other potential sources of transition risk: two other policy sources – subsidies to abatement or to green producers – and two preference-based sources – a shock to consumer preferences and a shock to investor preferences. We develop an environmental dynamic stochastic general equilibrium model that includes a frictional financial sector, and we consider macroprudential policy responses to transition risks. These different shocks have different effects on the possibility of transition risk and lead to different macroprudential policy implications.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, EFG；JEL：E32, E60, G18, Q43, Q58
papers.zh_title: 转型风险：来源与政策应对
papers.zh_abstract: 转型风险——与脱碳相关的金融稳定风险——是一个主要的担忧来源。迄今为止，文献仅研究了由碳税冲击引起的转型风险。本文探讨了转型风险的其他潜在来源：两种其他政策来源——对减排或绿色生产者的补贴——以及两种基于偏好的来源——消费者偏好冲击和投资者偏好冲击。我们开发了一个包含摩擦性金融部门的环境动态随机一般均衡模型，并考虑了针对转型风险的宏观审慎政策应对。这些不同的冲击对转型风险的可能性产生不同影响，并导致不同的宏观审慎政策含义。

papers.title: Ideological Bias in Estimates of the Impact of Immigration
papers.authors: George J. Borjas, Nate Breznau
papers.abstract: When studying policy-relevant topics, researchers’ policy preferences may shape the design, execution, analysis, and interpretation of results. Detection of such bias is challenging because the research process itself is not normally part of a controlled experimental setting. Our analysis exploits a rare opportunity where 158 researchers working independently in 71 research teams participated in an experiment. After being surveyed about their position on immigration policy, they used the same data to answer the same well-defined empirical question: Does immigration affect the level of public support for social welfare programs? The researchers estimated 1,253 alternative regression models, producing a frequency distribution of the measured impact ranging from strongly negative to strongly positive. We find that research teams composed of pro-immigration researchers estimated more positive impacts of immigration on public support for social programs, while anti-immigration research teams reported more negative estimates. Moreover, the methods used by teams with strong pro- or anti- immigration priors received lower “referee scores” from their peers in the experiment. These lower-rated models helped produce the different effects estimated by the teams at the tails of the immigration sentiment distribution. The underlying research design decisions are the mechanism through which ideology enters the production function for parameter estimates.
papers.zh_title: 移民影响估计中的意识形态偏见
papers.zh_abstract: 在研究政策相关主题时，研究者的政策偏好可能会影响研究的设计、执行、分析和结果解读。检测此类偏见具有挑战性，因为研究过程本身通常不属于受控实验环境的一部分。我们的分析利用了一个罕见的机会，即158名研究人员在71个研究团队中独立参与了一项实验。在调查了他们关于移民政策的立场后，他们使用相同的数据来回答相同的明确实证问题：移民是否影响公众对社会福利计划的支持水平？研究人员估计了1253个替代回归模型，产生了从强烈负面到强烈正面的测量影响频率分布。我们发现，由支持移民的研究人员组成的研究团队估计出移民对公众支持社会计划的更正面影响，而反对移民的研究团队报告了更负面的估计。此外，在实验中，具有强烈支持或反对移民先验的团队使用的方法从其同行那里获得了较低的“评审分数”。这些评分较低的模型有助于产生移民情绪分布两端团队所估计的不同效应。潜在的研究设计决策是意识形态进入参数估计生产函数的机制。

papers.title: Deterrence Through Response Curves: An Empirical Analysis of the Gaza-Israel Conflict
papers.authors: Eli Berman, Prabin B. Khadka, Danny Klinenberg, Esteban Klor
papers.abstract: We use response curves in a repeated game to analyze key aspects of mutual deterrence: escalation, de-escalation, incomplete deterrence, and deterrence by denial. In this approach, episodes of violence are due to interacting response curves, which disincentivize opponents from attacking through both deterrence and compellence. Both sides punish attacks to maintain credibility in future episodes, disincentivizing larger attacks and yielding nonviolent lulls. We empirically estimate those curves using detailed incident data from the Israel-Gaza conflict between 2007 and 2017. Our estimates match the dynamics of the raw data: very frequent episodes of low lethality violent exchange. Response curves are stable and probably Markovian. They exhibit a posture consistent with incomplete deterrence: i.e., episodes de-escalate, but to a violent equilibrium. Israeli missile defense shifts the Gazan response curve to a less aggressive posture, as predicted by theory.
papers.zh_title: 通过响应曲线进行威慑：加沙-以色列冲突的实证分析
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在重复博弈中使用响应曲线来分析相互威慑的关键方面：升级、降级、不完全威慑和拒止威慑。在这种方法中，暴力事件源于相互作用的响应曲线，这些曲线通过威慑和强制手段阻止对手发动攻击。双方惩罚攻击以维持未来事件中的可信度，从而阻止更大规模的攻击并产生非暴力的平静期。我们利用2007年至2017年以色列-加沙冲突的详细事件数据，实证估计了这些曲线。我们的估计与原始数据的动态相符：非常频繁的低致死率暴力交换事件。响应曲线是稳定的，并且可能是马尔可夫性的。它们表现出与不完全威慑一致的状态：即事件降级，但达到一个暴力均衡。正如理论所预测的那样，以色列导弹防御系统将加沙的响应曲线转变为一种不那么激进的姿态。

papers.title: Lessons Learned and Ignored in U.S. Place-Based Policymaking
papers.authors: Matthew Freedman, David Neumark
papers.abstract: Place-based programs aim to encourage economic and community development in defined geographic areas. They frequently offer tax incentives, grants, loans, or regulatory relief to private or non-profit entities for investing in specific communities. Funding can support a range of activities, including investments in job creation, infrastructure, workforce development, affordable housing, and more. Interest in spatially targeted interventions in the U.S. has waxed and waned over time in response to changing political environments, policy advocacy, and the evolving conclusions of academic research. The nature of place-based programs themselves has also evolved – often building on the lessons learned from past research and experience, but sometimes ignoring these lessons. In this chapter, we review what we have learned from past place-based job creation programs in the U.S. context. We also describe some of the newest developments in place-based policymaking and how recent programs’ successes and failures in heeding past lessons have contributed to their relative effectiveness.
papers.zh_title: 美国地方政策制定中的经验教训与忽视
papers.zh_abstract: 地方性项目旨在鼓励特定地理区域内的经济和社区发展。它们通常向投资于特定社区的私营或非营利实体提供税收优惠、赠款、贷款或监管减免。资金可支持一系列活动，包括对创造就业、基础设施、劳动力发展、经济适用房等方面的投资。在美国，对空间定向干预的兴趣随着政治环境、政策倡导以及学术研究结论的演变而时起时落。地方性项目本身的性质也在演变——通常建立在过去研究和经验教训的基础上，但有时也会忽视这些教训。在本章中，我们回顾了从美国过去的地方性创造就业项目中学到的经验。我们还描述了地方政策制定中的一些最新发展，以及近期项目在吸取过去教训方面的成功与失败如何影响了它们的相对有效性。

papers.title: Access to Digital Credit for Smallholder Farmers: Experimental Evidence from Ghana
papers.authors: Dean Karlan, Monica P. Lambon-Quayefio, Utsav Manjeer, Christopher R. Udry
papers.abstract: Digital finance in agriculture is a nascent technology which could help improve rural financial inclusion. In an experimental evaluation of a digital lending product for farmers in Southern Ghana, credit increases farm investments but has few statistically significant average effects on downstream outcomes. However, logistical challenges generated imperfect compliance with the treatment assignment, with some loans delivered in a timely fashion for agricultural investments and others coming later. We cautiously exploit this unplanned non-experimental implementation heterogeneity and conclude that agriculturally-focused digital credit platforms have potential to tackle persistent rural financial market imperfections, but the timing seems critical and deserves further study.
papers.zh_title: 小农户获得数字信贷的途径：来自加纳的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 农业领域的数字金融是一项新兴技术，可能有助于改善农村金融包容性。在对加纳南部农民数字贷款产品的实验评估中，信贷增加了农业投资，但对下游结果几乎没有统计上显著的平均效应。然而，后勤挑战导致了处理分配的不完全依从，部分贷款及时到位用于农业投资，而其他贷款则来得较晚。我们谨慎地利用这种非计划性的非实验性实施异质性，得出结论认为，以农业为重点的数字信贷平台有潜力解决持续的农村金融市场缺陷，但时机似乎至关重要，值得进一步研究。

papers.title: Optimal Income Tax Deductions for Mixed Business and Personal Expenditures
papers.authors: Jacob Goldin, Sebastian Koehne, Nicholas Lawson
papers.abstract: We study the optimal taxation of expenditures that generate income while also serving a consumption function. We characterize the Pareto optimal income tax deduction for such mixed-purpose expenditures within a generalized Atkinson-Stiglitz model. Pareto optimality requires a partial deduction for mixed-purpose expenditures, where the deduction rate depends on the fraction of an expenditure’s marginal benefits that are attributable to income-generation rather than consumption. We extend our results to account for several practical considerations, including potential constraints relating to a uniform deduction rate or a fixed income tax schedule. Our results provide a rationale for non-uniform commodity taxation, distinct from existing models of preference heterogeneity or non-separability.
papers.zh_title: 混合经营与个人支出的最优所得税扣除
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究既能产生收入又具有消费功能的支出的最优税收。我们在广义的阿特金森-斯蒂格利茨模型中刻画了此类混合目的支出的帕累托最优所得税扣除。帕累托最优要求对混合目的支出进行部分扣除，扣除率取决于支出边际收益中归因于创收而非消费的比例。我们将结果扩展到考虑若干实际问题，包括与统一扣除率或固定所得税表相关的潜在约束。我们的结果为非统一商品税提供了理由，这不同于现有的偏好异质性或不可分性模型。

papers.title: College Major Restrictions and Student Stratification
papers.authors: Zachary Bleemer, Aashish Mehta
papers.abstract: Underrepresented minority (URM) college students have been steadily earning degrees in relatively less lucrative fields of study since the mid-1990s. A decomposition reveals that this widening gap is principally explained by rising stratification at public research universities, many of which increasingly prevent students with poor introductory grades from declaring popular majors. We investigate these major restriction policies by constructing a novel 50-year dataset covering four public research universities' student transcripts and employing a staggered difference-in-difference design around the implementation of 25 GPA-based restrictions. Restrictions disproportionately filter out less-prepared students with fewer pre-college academic opportunities, decreasing average URM enrollment shares by 20 percent. They do not measurably improve allocative efficiency across majors, departments' wage value-added, or filtered students' educational attainment. Using first-term course enrollments to identify students who intend to earn restricted majors, we find that major restrictions disproportionately lead URM students toward less lucrative majors, explaining nearly all growth in within-institution ethnic stratification since the 1990s.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, ED, LE, LS, PE；JEL：H75, I24, J31, Z13
papers.zh_title: 大学专业限制与学生分层
papers.zh_abstract: 自20世纪90年代中期以来，代表性不足的少数族裔大学生在相对低薪的研究领域获得学位的比例稳步上升。一项分解显示，这种日益扩大的差距主要归因于公立研究型大学内部日益加剧的分层，其中许多大学越来越阻止入门成绩不佳的学生申报热门专业。我们通过构建一个涵盖四所公立研究型大学学生成绩单的50年新数据集，并采用围绕25项基于GPA的限制政策实施的交错双重差分设计，来研究这些专业限制政策。限制政策不成比例地筛选掉了那些大学前学术机会较少的准备不足的学生，使代表性不足的少数族裔平均入学份额下降了20%。它们并未显著提高跨专业的配置效率、部门的工资增值或被筛选学生的教育成就。通过利用第一学期的课程注册来识别有意攻读受限专业的学生，我们发现专业限制不成比例地引导代表性不足的少数族裔学生转向低薪专业，这几乎解释了自20世纪90年代以来校内种族分层增长的全部原因。

papers.title: Embedded Culture as a Source of Comparative Advantage
papers.authors: Luigi Guiso, Paola Sapienza, Luigi Zingales
papers.abstract: This paper examines how the concept of embedded culture played a transformative role in the ongoing cultural revolution within economics and business. We trace the field's shift from the 20th-century concept of homo economicus universalis to an approach incorporating cultural embeddedness in economic behavior. Beyond documenting this intellectual transformation, we identify fertile areas for future research and explore how an embedded cultural perspective can enhance both our understanding of economic phenomena and the design of effective policies.
papers.zh_title: 嵌入性文化作为比较优势的来源
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了嵌入性文化的概念如何在经济学和商业领域持续的文化革命中发挥变革性作用。我们追溯了该领域从20世纪的普遍经济人概念向将文化嵌入性纳入经济行为的方法的转变。除了记录这一知识转型，我们还确定了未来研究的肥沃领域，并探讨了嵌入性文化视角如何能够增强我们对经济现象的理解以及有效政策的设计。

papers.title: Collective Bargaining, Unions, and the Wage Structure: An International Perspective
papers.authors: Simon Jäger, Suresh Naidu, Benjamin Schoefer
papers.abstract: In this paper, we assess the recent economics literature on collective bargaining. Despite a declining trend in the OECD in coverage and especially union membership, a large share of formal workers around the world are still covered by collective bargaining agreements. We describe the substantial institutional variation across a variety of countries, highlighting research done with modern research designs and recently available administrative datasets. We then estimate a canonical empirical model of individual-level coverage effects and selection in harmonized cross-country data across 18 advanced economies (in Europe and North America). We estimate collective bargaining coverage premia, compression, selection, and spillover coefficients in each country, and use these to document considerable heterogeneity in collective bargaining coverage effects on the wage structure. While there is a strong negative relationship between collective bargaining coverage and wage inequality across countries, substantial uncertainties remain about the underlying mechanisms. Coverage effects may operate through direct premia, selection, or spillovers onto non-covered wages, but distinguishing and quantifying these channels and how they vary across institutional contexts remains a key challenge for future research. In our data, we find that the direct effect of coverage on wages of covered workers does not explain much of the cross-country correlation between coverage and inequality. While compelling research designs often result from specific institutional variation, we also emphasize that these contextual details must be accounted for when comparing estimates across industrial relations systems. A particularly pressing need is for more compelling causal evidence on spillover effects, which could help reconcile conflicting micro and macro evidence on how collective bargaining shapes the wage distribution.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, ITI, LE, LS, PE, PR；JEL：E0, F0, J0, M0, O0
papers.zh_title: 集体谈判、工会与工资结构：国际视角
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们评估了近期关于集体谈判的经济学文献。尽管经合组织国家的覆盖率和尤其是工会会员人数呈下降趋势，但全球仍有大量正规工人受到集体谈判协议的覆盖。我们描述了各国之间显著的制度差异，重点介绍了采用现代研究设计和近期可获得的行政数据集进行的研究。然后，我们在18个发达经济体（欧洲和北美）的协调跨国数据中，估计了一个关于个体层面覆盖效应和选择的经典实证模型。我们估算了每个国家的集体谈判覆盖溢价、压缩、选择和溢出系数，并利用这些系数记录了集体谈判覆盖效应对工资结构的显著异质性。尽管集体谈判覆盖与跨国工资不平等之间存在强烈的负相关关系，但关于其潜在机制仍存在相当大的不确定性。覆盖效应可能通过直接溢价、选择或对未覆盖工资的溢出效应发挥作用，但区分和量化这些渠道以及它们如何随制度背景变化，仍是未来研究的关键挑战。在我们的数据中，我们发现覆盖对受覆盖工人工资的直接效应并不能解释覆盖与不平等之间跨国相关性的很大一部分。虽然令人信服的研究设计通常源于特定的制度变化，但我们也强调，在比较不同产业关系体系的估计值时，必须考虑这些背景细节。一个尤为迫切的需求是，需要更有说服力的关于溢出效应的因果证据，这有助于调和关于集体谈判如何塑造工资分布的微观与宏观证据之间的矛盾。

papers.title: Gender Inequality in the Labor Market: Continuing Progress?
papers.authors: Francine D. Blau
papers.abstract: This article examines the trends in women’s economic outcomes in the United States focusing primarily on labor force participation, occupational attainment, and the gender wage gap. The author first highlights considerable progress on all dimensions prior to the 1990s followed by a slowing or stalling of gains thereafter, with a plateauing of female labor force participation trends and a slowing of women’s occupational and wage convergence with men. She considers the likelihood of a resumption of progress in narrowing gender gaps in these areas, concluding it is unlikely without policy intervention. She then considers some new policy initiatives addressing work-family issues and labor market discrimination that may hold potential for increasing female labor force participation and narrowing gender inequities in the labor market.
papers.meta: Programs：LS；JEL：J16, J18, J21, J24, J31, J48, J71
papers.zh_title: 劳动力市场中的性别不平等：持续进步？
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了美国女性经济成果的趋势，主要关注劳动力参与、职业成就和性别工资差距。作者首先强调了在20世纪90年代之前所有方面的显著进步，随后是进步放缓或停滞，表现为女性劳动力参与率趋势趋于平稳，以及女性在职业和工资方面与男性趋同的速度放缓。她考虑了在这些领域缩小性别差距方面恢复进展的可能性，并得出结论认为，没有政策干预，这种可能性不大。然后，她考虑了一些解决工作-家庭问题和劳动力市场歧视的新政策举措，这些举措可能具有提高女性劳动力参与率和缩小劳动力市场性别不平等的潜力。

papers.title: Handling Endogenous Marketing Mix Regressors in Correlated Heterogeneous Panels with Copula Augmented Mean Group Estimation
papers.authors: Liying Yang, Yi Qian, Hui Xie
papers.abstract: Endogeneity is a primary concern when evaluating causal effects using observational panel data. While unit-specific intercepts control for unobserved time-invariant confounders, dependence between (i) regressors (e.g., marketing mix strategy of interests) and the current error term (regressor endogeneity) and/or between (ii) regressors and heterogeneous slopes (slope endogeneity) can introduce significant endogeneity bias. This paper proposes a two-stage copula endogeneity correction mean group (2sCOPE-MG) estimator for panel models, simultaneously addressing both endogeneity concerns. We generalize the IV-free copula control function, employing a general location Gaussian copula that effectively captures the panel structure. The heterogeneous coefficients are treated as unit-specific parameters without distributional assumptions. Consequently, 2sCOPE-MG allows for arbitrary dependence structure between heterogeneous coefficients and regressors. Compared with Haschka (2022), 2sCOPE-MG is more general (permitting correlated random coefficients), more robust (allowing for heterogeneity in the variance-covariance matrix of the Gaussian copula), and easier to implement. We extend 2sCOPE-MG to dynamic panels, where intertemporal dependence in the outcome process can be suitably captured. We derive its asymptotic properties and an analytical variance formula for inference without bootstrapping. We demonstrate its usage by simulations and a marketing mix response application across 21 categories accounting for both endogeneities in store-sales panel data.
papers.zh_title: 在相关异质性面板中处理内生性营销组合回归量：基于Copula增强均值组估计
papers.zh_abstract: 在使用观测面板数据评估因果效应时，内生性是一个主要问题。虽然个体特定截距项控制了未观测到的时不变混杂因素，但回归量（例如，感兴趣的营销组合策略）与当前误差项之间的依赖关系（回归量内生性）和/或回归量与异质性斜率之间的依赖关系（斜率内生性）可能会引入显著的内生性偏差。本文针对面板模型提出了一种两阶段Copula内生性校正均值组估计量，同时解决了这两种内生性问题。我们推广了无工具变量的Copula控制函数，采用了一种能有效捕捉面板结构的一般位置高斯Copula。异质性系数被视为个体特定参数，无需分布假设。因此，2sCOPE-MG允许异质性系数与回归量之间存在任意依赖结构。与Haschka（2022）相比，2sCOPE-MG更通用（允许相关的随机系数）、更稳健（允许高斯Copula方差-协方差矩阵的异质性），且更易于实施。我们将2sCOPE-MG扩展到动态面板，其中结果过程中的跨期依赖可以被适当捕捉。我们推导了其渐近性质以及无需自举法即可进行推断的解析方差公式。我们通过模拟和一项涵盖21个类别的营销组合响应应用（考虑了商店销售面板数据中的两种内生性）来展示其用法。

papers.title: Adaptation to Climate Change
papers.authors: Tamma Carleton, Esther Duflo, Kelsey Jack, Guglielmo Zappalà
papers.abstract: Mounting costs of anthropogenic climate change reveal that adaptation will be essential to human well-being in coming decades. At the same time, the literature on the economics of adaptation offers relatively little guidance for emerging policy. In this chapter, we review the existing literature, focusing on how it can better inform adaptation policy design and implementation. A simple conceptual model of adaptation decision-making describes two core adaptation channels that we link to two streams of adaptation literature, which have emerged largely in parallel. We outline how insights from these literatures can be used for adaptation policy evaluation, highlight key limitations of and opportunities for public intervention in private adaptation markets, and provide guidance for future work.
papers.zh_title: 气候变化适应
papers.zh_abstract: 人为气候变化日益增加的成本表明，适应对于未来几十年的人类福祉至关重要。与此同时，关于适应经济学的文献为新兴政策提供的指导相对较少。在本章中，我们回顾现有文献，重点关注如何更好地为适应政策的设计和实施提供信息。一个简单的适应决策概念模型描述了两种核心适应渠道，我们将它们与两条大致平行发展的适应文献流联系起来。我们概述了如何利用这些文献的见解进行适应政策评估，强调了公共干预在私人适应市场中的关键局限性和机遇，并为未来工作提供指导。

papers.title: Revenue-Sharing Teams with Remote Workers
papers.authors: E. Glenn Dutcher, Krista J. Saral
papers.abstract: Remote work policies remain controversial because of the perceived opportunity for increased shirking outside of the traditional office; a problem that is potentially exacerbated if employees work in a revenue-sharing team environment. Using a controlled experiment, where individuals are randomized to different work locations (remote or an office-like setting), we examine how remote work impacts effort choices under individual pay schemes and in revenue sharing teams. Treatments vary the number of remote workers on a team. Our results suggest that work location alone does not lead to productivity differences. However, the location of partners does impact an individual’s effort levels in revenue-sharing teams. Non-remote workers reduce effort as the number of remote partners increases, and remote workers increase effort as the number of remote workers increases. These results are driven predominantly by those who are relatively less productive as individuals. Post-experiment incentivized survey evidence points to expectations of partner productivity as a contributing factor.
papers.zh_title: 远程工作者参与的分成制团队
papers.zh_abstract: 远程工作政策仍具争议，因为人们认为在传统办公室之外，员工可能更易偷懒；如果员工在分成制团队环境中工作，这一问题可能进一步加剧。通过一项控制实验，我们将个体随机分配到不同工作地点（远程或类似办公室的环境），考察在个人薪酬方案和分成制团队中，远程工作如何影响努力选择。实验处理方式改变了团队中远程工作者的数量。我们的结果表明，仅工作地点本身并不会导致生产率差异。然而，在分成制团队中，合作伙伴的工作地点确实会影响个体的努力水平。非远程工作者会随着远程合作伙伴数量的增加而减少努力，而远程工作者则会随着远程工作者数量的增加而增加努力。这些结果主要由那些作为个体相对生产率较低的人驱动。实验后的激励性调查证据表明，对合作伙伴生产率的预期是一个促成因素。

papers.title: Glass Box Machine Learning and Corporate Bond Returns
papers.authors: Sebastian Bell, Ali Kakhbod, Martin Lettau, Abdolreza Nazemi
papers.abstract: Machine learning methods in asset pricing are often criticized for their black box nature. We study this issue by predicting corporate bond returns using interpretable machine learning on a high-dimensional bond charac-teristics data set. We achieve state-of-the-art performance while maintaining an interpretable model structure, overcoming the accuracy-interpretability trade-off. The estimation uncovers nonlinear relationships and eco-nomically meaningful interactions in bond pricing, notably related to term structure and macroeconomic un-certainty. Subsample analysis reveals stronger sensitivities to these effects for small firms and long-maturity bonds. Finally, we demonstrate how interpretable models enhance transparency in portfolio construction by providing ex ante insights into portfolio composition.
papers.zh_title: 玻璃箱机器学习与公司债券收益
papers.zh_abstract: 资产定价中的机器学习方法常因其黑箱性质而受到批评。我们通过在一个高维债券特征数据集上使用可解释的机器学习来预测公司债券收益，从而研究这一问题。我们在保持可解释模型结构的同时实现了最先进的性能，克服了准确性与可解释性之间的权衡。该估计揭示了债券定价中的非线性关系和经济上有意义的交互作用，特别是与期限结构和宏观经济不确定性相关的部分。子样本分析显示，小公司和长期限债券对这些效应的敏感性更强。最后，我们展示了可解释模型如何通过提供对投资组合构成的事前洞察，增强投资组合构建的透明度。

papers.title: Linear Estimation of Global Average Treatment Effects
papers.authors: Stefan Faridani, Paul Niehaus
papers.abstract: We study estimation of and inference for the average causal effect of treating every member of a population, as opposed to none, using an experiment that treats only some. Considering settings where spillovers can occur between any pair of units and decay slowly with distance, we derive the minimax rate over all linear estimators and experimental designs, which increases with the spatial rate of spillover decay. This rate of convergence can be achieved using an inverse probability weighting estimator when randomization clusters are large, but not otherwise. If the causal model is linear, however, an OLS-based estimator converges faster than IPW when clusters are small and is consistent even under unit-level randomization. We provide methods for radius selection and inference and apply these to the cash transfer experiment studied by Egger et al. (2022), obtaining a 22% larger estimated effect on consumption.
papers.zh_title: 全局平均处理效应的线性估计
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究利用仅处理部分个体的实验，来估计和处理全体人口（相对于无人受处理）的平均因果效应。考虑在任意一对单元之间都可能发生溢出效应且随距离缓慢衰减的情形，我们推导出所有线性估计量和实验设计上的极小极大速率，该速率随溢出衰减的空间速率增加。当随机化聚类较大时，可以使用逆概率加权估计量达到这一收敛速率，否则则不行。然而，如果因果模型是线性的，当聚类较小时，基于OLS的估计量收敛速度比IPW更快，并且即使在单元级随机化下也是一致的。我们提供了半径选择和推断的方法，并将这些方法应用于Egger等人（2022）研究的现金转移实验，得到了对消费的估计效应高出22%的结果。

papers.title: Harmonization...What Else? The Role for International Regulatory Agreements
papers.authors: Giovanni Maggi, Monika Mrázová
papers.abstract: We examine the potential role of international agreements on product standards through a stylized model where countries have different regulatory preferences and firms incur fixed costs of regulatory diversity. Overall, our analysis suggests that the common perception of regulatory agreements as playing a key role in promoting harmonization may have been overstated. We show that regulatory harmony can arise even in the absence of an agreement, and that “spontaneous” harmonization may be inefficient, suggesting that the role of regulatory agreements could be to promote regulatory diversity rather than harmonization. Moreover, the role of regulatory cooperation depends in important ways on the pattern of trade: in the presence of intra-industry trade, the potential role of an agreement tends to be more limited, and under some conditions it can only play a coordination role. Finally, through the lens of our model, we examine the “Pop Critique” of regulatory agreements, according to which lobbying by corporate interests may lead to welfare-reducing harmonization. Our analysis lends only limited support to this critique.
papers.zh_title: 协调统一……还有别的吗？国际监管协议的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过一个程式化模型考察产品标准国际协议的潜在作用，在该模型中，各国具有不同的监管偏好，而企业承担监管多样性的固定成本。总体而言，我们的分析表明，将监管协议视为促进协调统一关键角色的普遍看法可能被夸大了。我们证明，即使没有协议，监管协调也可能出现，而“自发的”协调统一可能是低效的，这表明监管协议的作用可能是促进监管多样性而非协调统一。此外，监管合作的作用在很大程度上取决于贸易模式：在存在产业内贸易的情况下，协议的潜在作用往往更为有限，并且在某些条件下，它只能发挥协调作用。最后，通过我们模型的视角，我们审视了对监管协议的“大众批评”，即企业利益游说可能导致降低福利的协调统一。我们的分析仅对这一批评提供了有限的支持。

papers.title: In-Person Schooling and Juvenile Violence
papers.authors: Benjamin Hansen, Kyutaro Matsuzawa, Joseph J. Sabia
papers.abstract: While investments in schooling generate large private and external returns, negative peer interactions in school may generate substantial social costs. Using data from four national sources (Uniform Crime Reports, National Incident-Based Reporting System, National Crime Victimization Survey, National Electronic Injury Surveillance System) and a variety of identification strategies, this study comprehensively explores the effect of in-person schooling on contemporaneous juvenile violence. Using a proxy for in-person schooling generated from anonymized smartphone data and leveraging county-level variation in school calendars — including unique, large, localized changes to in-person instruction during the COVID-19 pandemic — we find that in-person schooling is associated with a 28 percent increase in juvenile violent crime. A null finding for young adults is consistent with a causal interpretation of this result. The effects are largest in larger schools and in jurisdictions with weaker anti-bullying policies, consistent with both concentration effects and a peer quality channel. Back-of-the-envelope calculations suggest that relative to closed K-12 schools, in-person schooling generates $233 million in monthly violent crime costs.
papers.zh_title: 线下教学与青少年暴力
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管对学校教育的投资能产生巨大的私人和外部回报，但学校中的负面同伴互动可能产生巨大的社会成本。利用来自四个全国性来源（统一犯罪报告、全国基于事件的报告系统、全国犯罪受害调查、全国电子伤害监测系统）的数据以及多种识别策略，本研究全面探讨了线下教学对同期青少年暴力的影响。利用从匿名智能手机数据生成的线下教学代理变量，并利用县级学校日历的差异——包括COVID-19疫情期间线下教学独特、大规模、局部性的变化——我们发现，线下教学与青少年暴力犯罪增加28%相关。对年轻成年人的零发现与这一结果的因果解释一致。这种效应在规模较大的学校和反欺凌政策较弱的司法管辖区最为显著，这与集中效应和同伴质量渠道均一致。粗略计算表明，相对于关闭K-12学校，线下教学每月产生2.33亿美元的暴力犯罪成本。

papers.title: Coverage, Counter-cyclicality and Targeting of Work Requirement Waivers in the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program
papers.authors: Richard V. Burkhauser, Kevin Corinth, Thomas O'Rourke, Angela K. Rachidi
papers.abstract: Certain recipients of the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program must work 20 hours per week to maintain eligibility. However, historically, states have been able to waive work requirements for areas deemed to have a weak labor market, using at least one of several criteria established through federal regulations. We construct the first dataset containing the monthly waiver status of each United States county from 1997–2023 to explore the coverage, countercyclicality and targeting of waivers resulting from the policy overall, and due to individual criteria specifically. Under the historical waiver criteria, we find that waivers became more prevalent over time and responded positively to county unemployment rates, but were frequently issued to counties with low unemployment rates. We then simulate counterfactual waiver eligibility when eliminating specific waiver criteria, to determine their importance in driving these results.
papers.zh_title: 补充营养援助计划中工作要求豁免的覆盖范围、逆周期性与靶向性
papers.zh_abstract: 补充营养援助计划的某些受助人必须每周工作20小时才能维持资格。然而，历史上，各州能够对被认为劳动力市场疲软的地区豁免工作要求，使用至少一项联邦法规规定的标准。我们构建了第一个包含1997年至2023年每个美国县月度豁免状态的数据集，以探索由整体政策以及具体由各个标准导致的豁免的覆盖范围、逆周期性和靶向性。在历史豁免标准下，我们发现豁免随着时间的推移变得更加普遍，并对县失业率做出正向反应，但经常被发放给失业率较低的县。然后，我们模拟了在取消特定豁免标准时的反事实豁免资格，以确定它们在驱动这些结果中的重要性。

papers.title: From Crisis to Norm: Remote Work Trends and Employee Engagement Across Industries, Occupations, and Geography
papers.authors: Christos A. Makridis, Jason Schloetzer
papers.abstract: We use a survey of nearly 360,000 workers conducted from May 2020 through December 2023 to characterize shifts in remote work across time, industry, occupation, and geography, and examine the evolving relationship between remote work and employee engagement. We find remarkable stability in the incidence of remote work since mid-2021 with roughly one-half of workers reporting always working remotely or in a hybrid arrangement. While remote work arrangements across industries remain broad-based, at the occupation level, they are conspicuously concentrated in certain job classifications. Remote work continues to evolve across the U.S., with 13 (14) states experiencing reported increases (decreases) in remote work rates since 2022 with the most populous states experiencing remote working rates exceeding 40% of workers. Empirical evidence shows that while working remotely correlates with higher job satisfaction and lower intentions to quit, these correlations disappear when other workplace characteristics such as pay practices, human resources policies, and managerial relationships are considered. If remote work remains the norm, our results suggest it may not directly influence employee engagement—the workplace still matters.
papers.meta: Programs：LS；JEL：J2, J28, M12, M54, O33, R23
papers.zh_title: 从危机到常态：跨行业、职业和地理的远程工作趋势与员工敬业度
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用一项从2020年5月至2023年12月对近36万名工人进行的调查，来描述远程工作随时间、行业、职业和地理的变化，并考察远程工作与员工敬业度之间不断演变的关系。我们发现，自2021年年中以来，远程工作的发生率保持显著稳定，大约一半的工人报告总是远程工作或采用混合工作安排。虽然远程工作安排在各行业中仍然广泛存在，但在职业层面，它们明显集中在某些工作类别中。远程工作在美国各地持续演变，自2022年以来，有13个州报告远程工作率上升，14个州报告下降，而人口最多的州远程工作率超过40%。实证证据表明，虽然远程工作与更高的工作满意度和更低的离职意愿相关，但当考虑其他工作场所特征（如薪酬实践、人力资源政策和管理关系）时，这些相关性消失。如果远程工作仍将是常态，我们的结果表明，它可能不会直接影响员工敬业度——工作场所仍然很重要。

papers.title: The Contribution of Foreign Master's Students to US Start-Ups
papers.authors: Michel Beine, Giovanni Peri, Morgan Raux
papers.abstract: In this paper, we estimate the effect of increasing the share of foreign-born Master graduates on the creation of innovative start-ups in the US. We combine information on international students graduating from Master's programs by university cohort with data on start-ups created in the US between 1999 and 2020 by graduates of those cohorts. To establish a causal link, we use idiosyncratic variation in out-of-state relative to in-state fees charged by universities across Master's cohorts, resulting in differential foreign students' enrollment. We also use changes in the share of foreign students predicted by a shift-share instrument, based on university-level past networks, as an additional identification strategy. For each additional ten percentage points of foreign students graduating in a Master's cohort, we find 0.4 additional start-ups in that cohort. Then, using a name-based attribution of the origin of creators of start-ups, we find that between 30 and 45% of the total start-up creation effect is attributable to a positive spillover of foreign-born on start-up founders of US origin.
papers.zh_title: 外国硕士生对美国初创企业的贡献
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们估算了增加外国出生硕士毕业生比例对美国创新型初创企业创建的影响。我们将按大学队列划分的硕士项目国际学生毕业信息与1999年至2020年间由这些队列毕业生在美国创建的初创企业数据相结合。为了建立因果关系，我们利用大学在硕士队列间收取的州外学费相对于州内学费的异质性变化，这导致了外国学生入学的差异。我们还使用基于大学层面历史网络的份额转移工具预测的外国学生比例变化，作为额外的识别策略。对于硕士队列中每增加十个百分点的外国毕业生，我们发现该队列中新增0.4家初创企业。然后，通过基于姓名的初创企业创始人来源归属，我们发现，在总的初创企业创建效应中，有30%至45%可归因于外国出生者对美国本土初创企业创始人的正向溢出效应。

papers.title: Currency Wars and Trade
papers.authors: Kris James Mitchener, Kirsten Wandschneider
papers.abstract: The Great Depression is the canonical case of a widespread currency war, with more than 70 countries devaluing their currencies relative to gold between 1929 and 1936. What were the currency war’s effects on trade flows? We use newly-compiled, high-frequency bilateral trade data and gravity models that account for when and whether trade partners had devalued to identify the effects of the currency war on global trade. Our empirical estimates show that a country’s trade was reduced by more than 21% following devaluation. This negative and statistically significant decline in trade suggests that the currency war destroyed the trade-enhancing benefits of the global monetary standard, ending regime coordination and increasing trade costs.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, IFM, ITI；JEL：F13, F14, F33, F42, N10, N70
papers.zh_title: 货币战争与贸易
papers.zh_abstract: 大萧条是广泛货币战争的典型例子，1929年至1936年间，超过70个国家使其货币相对于黄金贬值。货币战争对贸易流动有何影响？我们利用新编制的、高频的双边贸易数据以及引力模型，通过考虑贸易伙伴是否以及何时贬值，来识别货币战争对全球贸易的影响。我们的实证估计表明，一国在货币贬值后，其贸易量减少了超过21%。这种负面且统计上显著的贸易下降表明，货币战争破坏了全球货币标准带来的贸易促进效益，终结了制度协调并增加了贸易成本。

papers.title: The Uncharted Waters of International Trade
papers.authors: Pol Antràs
papers.abstract: The field of international trade has undergone significant theoretical and empirical advancements over the last twenty-five years. A key breakthrough has been the emergence of firm-level approaches to studying exporting, importing, and global value chains. The field has also experienced a quantitative revolution, driven by medium-scale models that rapidly assess the implications of trade cost shocks on real income. Additionally, a branch of the empirical literature has unshackled itself from the discipline of theoretical frameworks and from traditional data sources. Yet, several underexplored areas, or `uncharted waters,' remain in international trade research. I outline new potential areas for theoretical research, including incorporating oligopolistic (strategic) behavior into core models, and fostering greater cross-disciplinary collaboration with other fields in economics and social sciences, such as behavioral economics or political science. I also discuss potential uncharted waters for empirical trade economists, while identifying potential new sources of data and ways in which official trade statistics could be improved. Finally, I explore how big data and artificial intelligence could reshape the design of international trade policy in coming years.
papers.meta: Programs：ITI；JEL：B27, D21, D22, F12, F14, F23, F52, L11, L13, L22
papers.zh_title: 国际贸易的未知水域
papers.zh_abstract: 国际贸易领域在过去二十五年中经历了重大的理论和实证进展。一个关键突破是研究出口、进口和全球价值链的企业层面方法的出现。该领域还经历了一场定量革命，由能够快速评估贸易成本冲击对实际收入影响的中等规模模型驱动。此外，实证文献的一个分支已摆脱了理论框架和传统数据来源的约束。然而，国际贸易研究中仍存在几个探索不足的领域，即“未知水域”。我概述了理论研究的潜在新领域，包括将寡头垄断（战略）行为纳入核心模型，以及促进与经济学和社会科学其他领域（如行为经济学或政治学）的更大跨学科合作。我还讨论了实证贸易经济学家的潜在未知水域，同时指出了潜在的新数据来源以及官方贸易统计可以改进的方式。最后，我探讨了大数据和人工智能如何在未来几年重塑国际贸易政策的设计。

papers.title: Babies and the Macroeconomy
papers.authors: Claudia Goldin
papers.abstract: Fertility levels have greatly decreased in virtually every nation in the world, but the timing of the decline has differed even among developed countries. In Europe, Asia, and North America, total fertility rates of some nations dipped below the magic replacement figure of 2.1 as early as the 1970s. But in other nations, fertility rates remained substantial until the 1990s but plummeted subsequently. This paper addresses why some countries in Europe and Asia with moderate fertility levels in 1980s, have become the “lowest-low” nations today (total fertility rates of less than 1.3), whereas those that decreased earlier have not. Also addressed is why the crossover point for the two groups of nations was around the 1980s and 1990s. An important factor that distinguishes the two groups is their economic growth in the post WWII decades, especially the 1960s and the 1970s. Countries with “lowest low” fertility rates today experienced rapid growth in GNP per capita after a long period of stagnation or decline. They were catapulted into modernity, but the beliefs, values, and traditions of their citizens changed more slowly. Thus, swift economic change may lead to both generational and gendered conflicts that result in a rapid decrease in the total fertility rate.
papers.zh_title: 婴儿与宏观经济
papers.zh_abstract: 全球几乎所有国家的生育率都大幅下降，但下降的时间点即使在发达国家之间也有所不同。在欧洲、亚洲和北美，一些国家的总和生育率早在20世纪70年代就跌破了2.1的魔法更替水平。但在其他国家，生育率直到20世纪90年代仍保持较高水平，但随后急剧下降。本文探讨了为什么一些在20世纪80年代生育率适中的欧洲和亚洲国家，如今已成为“极低”生育率国家（总和生育率低于1.3），而那些更早下降的国家却没有。本文还探讨了这两组国家的转折点为何出现在20世纪80年代和90年代左右。区分这两组国家的一个重要因素是它们在二战后的几十年里，特别是20世纪60年代和70年代的经济增长。如今生育率“极低”的国家，在经历了长期停滞或下降后，人均国民生产总值经历了快速增长。它们被迅速推入现代化，但其公民的信仰、价值观和传统变化较慢。因此，快速的经济变革可能导致代际和性别冲突，从而导致总和生育率迅速下降。

papers.title: Employee Ownership, Employment, and Work-from-Home in the Covid-19 Shock to the US Job Market
papers.authors: Huanan Xu, Joseph R. Blasi, Douglas L. Kruse, Richard B. Freeman
papers.abstract: To what extent, if at all, did employee-owned (EO) firms maintain jobs for workers compared to non-EO firms in the spring 2020 Covid-19 shock to the US economy? Did EO firms shift jobs from workplaces to work-from-home locations in the pandemic more or less than other firms? This paper uses a unique survey of nearly 750 firms that differ in the Employee Stock Ownership Plan (ESOP) mode of employee ownership to answer these questions. The analysis finds that in the Covid crisis ESOPs with majority ownership of their firm maintained proportionately more jobs and shifted work to workers’ homes more than other firms and that these differences scale with the ESOP percentage of firm ownership. The findings are consistent with a model of firm decision-making in which ESOP firms weigh the well-being of employee-owners as workers in the firm in a job crisis while non-ESOP firms view workers solely as a costly input in production in maximizing the income of their (non-employee) owners.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, IO, LS, PR；JEL：D2, D7, J2, J3, J4, L2, M5, P13, P5
papers.zh_title: 员工所有制、就业与居家办公：新冠疫情对美国就业市场的冲击
papers.zh_abstract: 在2020年春季新冠疫情对美国经济的冲击中，与非员工所有制企业相比，员工所有制企业在多大程度上（如果有的话）为工人保留了工作岗位？在疫情期间，员工所有制企业将工作岗位从工作场所转移到居家办公地点的比例是高于还是低于其他企业？本文利用一项对近750家企业的独特调查，这些企业在员工持股计划这种员工所有制模式上有所不同，来回答这些问题。分析发现，在新冠危机中，拥有其公司多数股权的员工持股计划企业，比其他企业保留了比例更高的就业岗位，并将更多工作转移到了员工家中，并且这些差异随着员工持股计划在公司所有权中的占比而扩大。这些发现与一个企业决策模型一致，在该模型中，员工持股计划企业在就业危机中会权衡作为工人的员工所有者的福祉，而非员工持股计划企业则仅将工人视为生产中昂贵的投入，以最大化其（非员工）所有者的收入。

papers.title: A Theory of Economic Coercion and Fragmentation
papers.authors: Christopher Clayton, Matteo Maggiori, Jesse Schreger
papers.abstract: Hegemonic powers, like the United States and China, exert influence on other countries by threatening the suspension or alteration of financial and trade relationships. Mechanisms that generate gains from integration, such as external economies of scale and specialization, also increase the hegemon’s power because in equilibrium they make other relationships poor substitutes for those with a global hegemon. Other countries can implement economic security policies to shape their economies in order to insulate themselves from undue foreign pressure. Countries considering these policies face a tradeoff between gains from trade and economic security. While an individual country can make itself better off, uncoordinated attempts by multiple countries to limit their dependency on the hegemon via economic security policies lead to inefficient fragmentation of the global financial and trade system. We study financial services as a leading application both as tools of coercion and an industry with strong strategic complementarities. We estimate that U.S. geoeconomic power relies on financial services, while Chinese power relies on manufacturing. Since power is nonlinear and increases disproportionally as the hegemon approaches controlling the entire supply of a sectoral input, we estimate that much economic security could be achieved with little overall fragmentation by diversifying the input sources of key sectors controlled by the hegemons.

papers.zh_title: 经济胁迫与碎片化理论
papers.zh_abstract: 霸权国家，如美国和中国，通过威胁中止或改变金融和贸易关系来对其他国施加影响。产生一体化收益的机制，如外部规模经济和专业化，也增强了霸权国的权力，因为在均衡状态下，这些机制使得其他关系成为与全球霸权国关系的糟糕替代品。其他国家可以实施经济安全政策来塑造其经济，以保护自己免受不当的外部压力。考虑这些政策的国家面临着贸易收益与经济安全之间的权衡。虽然单个国家可以改善自身状况，但多个国家通过经济安全政策来限制对霸权国依赖的、不协调的尝试，会导致全球金融和贸易体系的低效碎片化。我们将金融服务作为主要应用案例进行研究，它既是胁迫工具，也是一个具有强大战略互补性的行业。我们估计，美国的地缘经济力量依赖于金融服务，而中国的力量则依赖于制造业。由于权力是非线性的，并且随着霸权国接近控制某一部门投入的全部供应而不成比例地增加，我们估计，通过使霸权国控制的关键部门的投入来源多样化，可以在总体碎片化程度很小的情况下实现大量的经济安全。

papers.title: Interest Rate Risk in Banking
papers.authors: Peter M. DeMarzo, Arvind Krishnamurthy, Stefan Nagel
papers.abstract: We develop a framework to estimate bank franchise value. Contrary to existing models, sticky deposits and low deposit rate betas do not imply negative duration. While operating costs could generate negative duration, they are offset by fixed interest rate spreads from lending activity. Consequently, franchise value declines as interest rates rise, further exacerbating losses on banks’ securities holdings. Banks with less responsive deposit rates tend to invest more in long-term securities, aiming to hedge cash flows rather than market value. Despite significant recent rate hike losses, most U.S. banks still retain sufficient franchise value to remain solvent, justifying forbearance.
papers.zh_title: 银行业中的利率风险
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个框架来估计银行的特许权价值。与现有模型相反，粘性存款和低存款利率贝塔值并不意味着负久期。虽然运营成本可能产生负久期，但这被贷款活动带来的固定利差所抵消。因此，特许权价值随着利率上升而下降，进一步加剧了银行证券持有组合的损失。存款利率反应较不灵敏的银行倾向于投资更多长期证券，旨在对冲现金流而非市场价值。尽管近期加息造成了重大损失，但大多数美国银行仍保留了足够的特许权价值以保持偿付能力，这为监管宽容提供了理由。

papers.title: Willingness to Travel with Endogenous Distance: Evidence from the Changing Retail Landscape
papers.authors: Yue Cao, Judith A. Chevalier, Jessie Handbury, Hayden Parsley, Kevin R. Williams
papers.abstract: Economists often use variation in consumers’ distance from services as a source of demand variation. This approach typically treats consumer-supplier distance as exogenous, despite suppliers strategically choosing locations. We develop a novel class of instruments to address this endogeneity. These instruments exploit the spatial distribution of consumer demographics and can be constructed from standard cross-sectional data, making them useful in a variety of spatial applications. Our preferred instruments use the income composition of concentric discs centered on the Central Business District. Applying these instruments to smartphone geolocation data for millions of devices across 18 metropolitan areas, we estimate consumer preferences for general merchandise chains across income groups. We show that accounting for distance endogeneity significantly alters willingness-to-travel estimates, distorting welfare conclusions. Contrary to a prevailing “retail apocalypse” narrative, consumer surplus per trip remained stable from 2010 to 2019. Ignoring endogeneity falsely suggests substantial welfare declines for lower-income households.

papers.zh_title: 内生距离下的出行意愿：来自零售业态变迁的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 经济学家经常利用消费者与服务之间的距离变化作为需求变化的来源。这种方法通常将消费者与供应商之间的距离视为外生的，尽管供应商会策略性地选择地点。我们开发了一类新颖的工具变量来解决这种内生性问题。这些工具利用了消费者人口统计特征的空间分布，并且可以从标准的横截面数据中构建，使其在各种空间应用中都有用。我们偏好的工具变量使用以中央商务区为中心的同心圆环的收入构成。将这些工具应用于覆盖18个大都市区数百万设备的智能手机地理定位数据，我们估算了不同收入群体对综合商品连锁店的消费者偏好。我们表明，考虑距离内生性会显著改变出行意愿的估计值，从而扭曲福利结论。与流行的“零售末日”叙事相反，2010年至2019年期间每次出行的消费者剩余保持稳定。忽略内生性会错误地暗示低收入家庭的福利大幅下降。

papers.title: Aggregate Debt Servicing and the Limit on Private Credit
papers.authors: Mathias Drehmann, Mikael Juselius, Sarah Quincy
papers.abstract: This paper reviews the debt service ratio (DSR) as a theoretically well-grounded indicator of systemic risk. The DSR has the desirable feature that it fluctuates around a stable level which makes its early warning signals easy to understand and communicate. In contrast, current early warning indicators (EWIs) based on credit-developments lack clear economic interpretations and require statistical detrending, which can reduce their accuracy and usefulness for macroprudential policymakers. The review of the literature shows that the DSR provides highly accurate early warning signals for crises and future economic slowdowns, outperforming traditional credit-based indicators. By extending the measurement of the DSR back to the 1920s – a novel contribution in this paper – we demonstrate its EWI effectiveness across different historical periods and show that the DSR acts as an upper limit on benign financial deepening. The paper also outlines questions for future research.

papers.zh_title: 总债务偿还与私人信贷上限
papers.zh_abstract: 本文回顾了债务偿还比率作为具有坚实理论基础的系统性风险指标。债务偿还比率具有一个理想特征，即它围绕一个稳定水平波动，这使得其早期预警信号易于理解和沟通。相比之下，当前基于信贷发展的早期预警指标缺乏清晰的经济解释，并且需要统计去趋势处理，这可能会降低其准确性以及对宏观审慎政策制定者的有用性。文献综述表明，债务偿还比率为危机和未来经济放缓提供了高度准确的早期预警信号，其表现优于传统的基于信贷的指标。通过将债务偿还比率的测量追溯到20世纪20年代——这是本文的一个新贡献——我们证明了其早期预警指标在不同历史时期的有效性，并表明债务偿还比率充当了良性金融深化的上限。本文还概述了未来研究的问题。

papers.title: Empowered by Adversity: Economic Shocks and Noncognitive Skill Development in Ethiopian Youth
papers.authors: Leonard Wantchekon, Sally Zhang
papers.abstract: Despite the widespread economic shocks faced by children in developing countries, the factors that contribute to resilience remain poorly understood. In this paper, we present three novel facts on the development of noncognitive skills using a longitudinal dataset from Ethiopia. First, we observe a weak correlation between parental wealth and noncognitive skills. Second, we find that while adverse weather shock cause a slight decline in cognitive test scores, they boost noncognitive skills, including generalized self-efficacy, self-esteem, and internal locus of control. Lastly, we show that past exposure to adverse weather shocks is correlated with better mental health during the COVID-19 pandemic. We rationalize these surprising findings within a model of cognitive and noncognitive skill development, where child agency serves a key role. In this model, when a child chooses to exert effort during a particular period, they not only increase their immediate consumption, but it also enhances their noncognitive skills through “learning by doing.” Incorporation of child agency in human capital development result in model predictions that are consistent with the empirical results, and highlights the policy relevance of improving child agency.
papers.zh_title: 逆境赋能：埃塞俄比亚青年的经济冲击与非认知技能发展
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管发展中国家的儿童普遍面临经济冲击，但关于韧性形成因素的理解仍十分有限。本文利用埃塞俄比亚的纵向数据集，提出了关于非认知技能发展的三个新发现。首先，我们观察到父母财富与非认知技能之间的相关性较弱。其次，我们发现不利天气冲击虽然导致认知测试成绩略有下降，但却提升了非认知技能，包括一般自我效能感、自尊心和内控点。最后，我们表明过去暴露于不利天气冲击与新冠疫情期间更好的心理健康状况相关。我们通过一个认知与非认知技能发展模型来合理化这些令人惊讶的发现，其中儿童能动性发挥着关键作用。在该模型中，当儿童选择在特定时期付出努力时，他们不仅增加了即期消费，还通过“干中学”增强了非认知技能。将儿童能动性纳入人力资本发展模型后，模型预测与实证结果一致，并凸显了改善儿童能动性的政策相关性。
